Genesis1:1 O kĩambĩrĩriainĩ rĩrĩa Ngai oombire thĩ na igũrũ-rĩ
Genesis1:2 thĩ ndĩarĩ ũrĩa yatariĩ
Genesis1:3 Naake Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:4 Ngai akĩona atĩ ũtheri nĩ mwega; akĩgayania ũtheri na nduma
Genesis1:5 ũtheri akĩwĩta “Mũthenya” nayo nduma akĩmĩĩta “Ũtukũ.” Nakuo gũgĩtuka
Genesis1:6 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:7 Ngai agĩgĩthondeka mũtambũrũko ũcio
Genesis1:8 Agĩĩta mũtambũrũko ũcio
Genesis1:9 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:10 Kũndũ kũu gũtaarĩ maaĩ agĩgwĩta
Genesis1:11 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:12 Thĩ ĩkĩruta mĩmera ya mĩthemba yothe. Naake Ngai akĩona atĩ ũguo nĩ wega.
Genesis1:13 Nakuo gũgĩtuka
Genesis1:14 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:15 Marĩkengaga marĩ matuinĩ igũrũ magatũma thĩ kũgĩe na ũtheri.” Gũgĩgĩtuĩka o ũguo.
Genesis1:16 Kwoguo Ngai akĩũmba mootheri marĩa meerĩ manene; riũa rĩathage mũthenya
Genesis1:17 Agĩkĩiga mootheri macio matuinĩ igũrũ nĩguo matũmage thĩ kũgĩe na ũtheri
Genesis1:18 maarage mũthenya na ũtukũ
Genesis1:19 Nakuo gũgĩtuka
Genesis1:20 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:21 Kwoguo Ngai agĩkĩũmba nyamũ iria nene mũno cia iriainĩ
Genesis1:22 Agĩciraathima ciothe
Genesis1:23 Nakuo gũgĩtuka
Genesis1:24 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:25 Ngai agĩkĩũmba ciũmbe ciothe
Genesis1:26 Ningĩ Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis1:27 Kwoguo Ngai agĩkĩũmba andũ mahaana taake. Aamoombire marĩ mũndũ mũrũme na mũndũ wa nja.
Genesis1:28 Agĩkĩmaraathima
Genesis1:29 Nĩndamũhe mĩmera ya mĩthemba yothe ĩrĩa ĩciaraga mbegũ na mĩtĩ ya matunda marĩa me na mbegũ ma mĩthemba yothe mũrĩage.

Genesis5:5 Aakuire e wa mĩaka magana kenda na mĩrongo ĩtatũ (930).
Genesis5:6 Sethu arĩ wa mĩaka igana na ĩtaano (105) nĩaciarĩirwo kaana ga kahĩĩ geetagwo Enoshu.

Genesis5:8 Aakuire e wa mĩaka magana kenda na ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ (912).
Genesis5:9 Enoshu arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo kenda nĩaciarĩirwo kaana ga kahĩĩ geetagwo Kenani.

Genesis5:11 Aakuire e wa mĩaka magana kenda na ĩtaano (905).
Genesis5:12 Kenani arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo mũgwanja nĩaciarĩirwo kaana ga kahĩĩ geetagwo Mahalaleli.

Genesis9:9 “Nĩ kĩrĩĩkanĩro ndĩrathondeka na inyuĩ
Genesis9:10 o hamwe na ciũmbe ciothe i muoyo
Genesis9:11 Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ngũthondeka na inyuĩ nĩ gĩĩkĩ: gũtirĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩ ciũmbe iria i muoyo ikaaniinwo nĩ mũiyũro wa maaĩ
Genesis9:12 Rũũri rwa kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩa gũtũũra tene na tene kĩrĩa ndĩrathondeka na inyuĩ na ciũmbe ciothe i muoyo
Genesis9:13 nĩ rũũrũ: nĩngũiga mũkũngambura wakwa matuinĩ
Genesis9:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndareehe matu ma mbura naguo mũkũngambura ũkooneka matuinĩ
Genesis9:15 nĩndĩririkanaga kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩakwa na inyuĩ o hamwe na ciũmbe ciothe i muoyo atĩ mũiyũro wa maaĩ ndũgacooka kũniina ciũmbe ciothe i muoyo rĩngĩ.
Genesis9:16 Rĩrĩa mũkũngambura wonekana matuinĩ
Genesis9:17 Rũu nĩruo rũũri rwa kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndathondeka na ciũmbe ciothe i muoyo.”
Genesis9:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis9:19 Aariũ acio atatũ a Noa nĩ o maithe ma andũ oothe arĩa me thĩ.
Genesis9:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis9:21 Naake nĩanyuire ndibei ya mĩthabibũ ĩyo akĩrĩĩo
Genesis9:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis9:23 Nao Shemu na Jafethi makĩoya nguo
Genesis9:24 Rĩrĩa Noa aarĩũkirwo
Genesis9:25 akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis9:26 MWATHANI Ngai wa Shemu arogoocwo! Kanaani arotuĩka ngombo ya Shemu.
Genesis9:27 Ngai arotũma ciana cia Jafethi ciingĩhe! Njiarwa ciake irotũũrania na ciana cia Shemu! Kanaani arotuĩka ngombo ya Jafethi.”
Genesis9:28 Thuutha wa mũiyũro wa maaĩ Noa aikarire mĩaka magana matatũ na mĩrongo ĩtaano
Genesis9:29 naake agĩkua aarĩ wa mĩaka magana kenda na mĩrongo ĩtaano (950).
Genesis10:1 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Shemu
Genesis10:2 Aariũ a Jafethi maarĩ: Gomeri
Genesis10:3 Aariũ a Gomeri maarĩ: Ashikenazu
Genesis10:4 Aariũ a Javani maarĩ: Elishahu
Genesis10:5 Aariũ acio a Javani nĩ o maithe ma andũ arĩa matũũraga ndeereinĩ cia iria na icigĩrĩrainĩ. Icio nĩcio njiarwa cia Jafethi
Genesis10:6 Aariũ a Hamu maarĩ: Kushi
Genesis10:7 Aariũ a Kushi maarĩ: Seba
Genesis10:8 Kushi nĩaciarĩirwo kaana ga kahĩĩ geetagwo Nimurodi. Nimurodi nĩwe watuĩkire mũndũ njamba wa mbere gwathana gũũkũ thĩ.
Genesis10:9 Ningĩ nĩateithirio nĩ MWATHANI agĩtuĩka mũgwĩmi mũnene mũno na nĩkĩo kwĩragwo atĩrĩ
Genesis10:10 Kĩambĩrĩriainĩ aathanaga Babiloni
Genesis10:11 Kuuma kũu agĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Asiria
Genesis10:12 na Reseni
Genesis10:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis10:14 Pathirusi
Genesis10:15 Kanaani nĩ we warĩ ithe wa Sidoni na Hethi. Sidoni nĩ we warĩ mũũrũwe wa irigithaathi.
Genesis10:16 Ningĩ Kanaani no we warĩ ithe wa Ajebusi
Genesis10:17 Ahivi
Genesis10:18 Aarivadi
Genesis10:19 kuuma Sidoni
Genesis10:20 Icio nĩcio njiarwa cia Hamu
Genesis10:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis10:22 Aariũ a Shemu maarĩ: Elamu
Genesis10:23 Nao aariũ a Aramu maarĩ: Uzu
Genesis10:24 Aripakishadi aarĩ ithe wa Shela
Genesis10:25 Eberi aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ. Ũmwe eetagwo Pelegu
Genesis10:26 Jokitani aarĩ ithe wa Alimodadi
Genesis10:27 Hadoramu
Genesis10:28 Obali
Genesis10:29 Ofiri
Genesis10:30 Bũrũri ũrĩa maatũũraga woimĩĩte Mesha ũgathiĩ nginya Sefari na mwena wa irathĩro wa bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma.
Genesis10:31 Icio nĩcio njiarwa cia Shemu
Genesis10:32 Andũ acio oothe nĩo njiarwa cia Noa
Genesis11:1 Kĩambĩrĩriainĩ andũ a thĩ yothe maarĩ na rũthiomi rũmwe
Genesis11:2 Na rĩĩrĩ

Genesis11:4 Magĩcooka makĩĩrana atĩrĩ

Genesis11:6 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis11:7 Rekeei tũikũrũke nĩ geetha tũkahĩngĩcanie rũthiomi rwao nĩ geetha matikaiguithanie mĩario.”
Genesis11:8 Kwoguo MWATHANI akĩmahurunja thĩ yothe magĩtiga gwaka itũũra rĩu.
Genesis11:9 Itũũra rĩu rĩetirwo Babiloni
Genesis11:10 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Shemu. Mĩaka ĩĩrĩ thuutha wa mũiyũro wa maaĩ
Genesis11:11 Thuutha ũcio
Genesis11:12 Aripakishadi arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtaano
Genesis11:13 Thuutha ũcio

Genesis11:15 Thuutha ũcio

Genesis11:17 Thuutha ũcio
Genesis11:18 Pelegu arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ

Genesis11:21 Thuutha ũcio

Genesis11:24 Nahori arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na kenda
Genesis11:25 Thuutha ũcio
Genesis11:26 Naake Tera arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo mũgwanja
Genesis11:27 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Tera ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Aburamu
Genesis11:28 na aakuĩrĩire itũũrainĩ rĩa Uru bũrũriinĩ wa Babilonia
Genesis11:29 Aburamu aahikirie Sarai
Genesis11:30 Sarai aarĩ thaata; ndaarĩ na mwana.
Genesis11:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis11:32 Tera aakuĩrĩire kũu Harani e wa mĩaka magana meerĩ na ĩtaano (205).
Genesis12:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis12:2 Nĩngũkũhe njiarwa nyingĩ
Genesis12:3 Nĩndĩraathimaga arĩa makũraathima
Genesis12:4 Aburamu arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo mũgwanja na ĩtaano
Genesis12:5 Aburamu agĩkĩoya mũtumia wake Sarai
Genesis12:6 Aburamu agĩtuĩkanĩria bũrũri
Genesis12:7 MWATHANI nĩoimĩrĩire Aburamu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis12:8 Thuutha wa ũguo nĩathiire mwena ũrĩa wĩ irĩma
Genesis12:9 Agĩcooka agĩthiĩ na mbere aroreete werũinĩ wĩ mwena wa na kĩanda.
Genesis12:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis12:11 Akuhĩrĩria gũtoonya bũrũri wa Misiri
Genesis12:12 na wonwo nĩ andũ a Misiri megwĩciiria atĩ wĩ mũtumia wakwa
Genesis12:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Genesis12:14 Matoonya Misiri
Genesis12:15 Njaama cia mũthamaki wa Misiri ciona Sarai ikĩĩra mũthamaki ũrĩa Sarai aarĩ mũthaka. Kwa ũguo Sarai agĩtwarwo nyũmba kwa mũthamaki
Genesis12:16 na nĩ ũndũ wake
Genesis12:17 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis12:18 Kwa ũguo mũthamaki nĩetire Aburamu akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis12:19 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũmire uuge atĩ nĩ mwarĩ wa maitũguo ũranjĩtĩkĩria ndĩmũtue mũtumia wakwa? Ĩ ũyũ mũtumia waku; muoe uume gũũkũ!”
Genesis12:20 Mũthamaki agĩgĩatha andũ aake akĩmeera mooe Aburamu na mũtumia wake o hamwe na indo ciothe iria aarĩ nacio mamũtware nja ya bũrũri. Nao magĩĩka ũguo.
Genesis13:1 Naake Aburamu akiuma Misiri akĩambata agĩkinya werũ wa mwena wa na kĩanda wa Kanaani arĩ hamwe na mũtumia wake na indo ciothe iria aarĩ nacio; naake Loti agĩtwarana naake.
Genesis13:2 Aburamu aarĩ mũndũ mũtongu mũno; aarĩ na mahiũ
Genesis13:3 Agĩkiuma mwena wa na kĩanda agĩthiĩ akĩraaragĩrĩra o nginya agĩkinya Betheli. Agĩkinya harĩa aambĩĩte hema rĩa mbere gatagatĩinĩ ka Betheli na Ai
Genesis13:4 o harĩa aambĩĩte gwaka kĩgongoona. Agĩthaathaĩria MWATHANI ho.
Genesis13:5 O naake Loti aarĩ na mahiũ
Genesis13:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis13:7 Kwoguo arĩithi a Aburamu makĩnegenania na a Loti. (Hĩndĩ ĩyo Akanaani na Aperizi maatũũraga o kũu bũrũriinĩ ũcio.)
Genesis13:8 Aburamu agĩkĩĩra Loti atĩrĩ
Genesis13:9 Kwoguo reke twamũkane. Thuura mwena wa bũrũri ũrĩa ũkwenda; wathiĩ mwena ũmwe na niĩ ngũthiĩ ũcio ũngĩ.”
Genesis13:10 Naake Loti akĩroranga akĩona atĩ gĩtuamba gĩothe kĩa Jorodani
Genesis13:11 Loti agĩgĩĩthuurĩra gĩtuamba kĩa Jorodani
Genesis13:12 Aburamu aatũũrire Kanaani
Genesis13:13 Andũ a Sodomu maarĩ ooru na maikaraga makĩhĩtagĩria MWATHANI.
Genesis13:14 Thuutha wa kwamũkana na Loti
Genesis13:15 Wee na njiarwa ciaku nĩngũmũhe bũrũri wothe ũcio ũroona
Genesis13:16 Nĩngũkũhe njiarwa nyingĩ o ta rũkũngũ rwa thĩ; o ta ũrĩa gũtarĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũtara rũkũngũ rwa thĩ noguo njiarwa ciaku itagaatarĩka!
Genesis13:17 Gĩũkĩre ũthiĩ ũkeerorere bũrũri ũcio wothe amu nĩwe ngũhe.”
Genesis13:18 Kwoguo Aburamu akĩambũra hema yake agĩthiĩ akĩmĩamba hakuhĩ na mĩgandi ĩrĩa mĩamũre ya Mamure thĩinĩ wa Heburoni
Genesis14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis14:2 magĩthiĩ kũrũa na athamaki angĩ ataano. Athamaki acio maarĩ Bera mũthamaki wa Sodomu
Genesis14:3 Athamaki acio ataano magĩturanĩra mbũtũ ciao gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Sidimu
Genesis14:4 Nao maatũũrĩĩte marĩ rungu rwa mũthamaki Kedorilaomeri mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Genesis14:5 Mwakainĩ wa ikũmi na ĩna
Genesis14:6 na Ahori kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Edomu
Genesis14:7 Magĩkĩgarũrũka magĩcooka Kadeshi (itũũra rĩrĩa tene rĩetagwo Enimishipatu). Nao makĩhoota bũrũri wothe wa Aamaleki
Genesis14:8 Nao athamaki a Sodomu
Genesis14:9 kũrũa na Kedorilaomeri mũthamaki wa Elamu
Genesis14:10 Gĩtuamba kĩu gĩa Sidimu kĩaiyũrĩĩte marima ma rami
Genesis14:11 Athamaki acio ana magĩgĩkuua indo ciothe iria ciarĩ Sodomu na Gomora
Genesis14:12 O na nĩmaakuuire Loti
Genesis14:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis14:14 Rĩrĩa Aburamu aiguire atĩ mũihwawe nĩmũtahe
Genesis14:15 E kũu akĩgayania njamba ciake cia ita ikundi
Genesis14:16 Aburamu nĩahotire gũcookithia indo iria ciatahĩĩtwo
Genesis14:17 Rĩrĩa Aburamu aacookaga arĩĩkia kũhoota Kedorilaomeri na athamaki arĩa maarĩ naake
Genesis14:18 Naake Melikizedeki
Genesis14:19 agĩcooka akĩmũraathima akiuga atĩrĩ

Genesis14:22 No Aburamu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Genesis14:23 atĩ
Genesis14:24 Ndirĩ kĩndũ ngũtigwo nakĩo tiga o kĩrĩa andũ aakwa mahũthĩrĩĩte. No rĩĩrĩ

Genesis16:4 Naake Aburamu agĩkoma na Hagari
Genesis16:5 Sarai agĩkĩĩra Aburamu atĩrĩ

Genesis17:1 Rĩrĩa Aburamu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo kenda na kenda
Genesis17:2 Nĩngũthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro nawe na ngũhe njiarwa nyingĩ.”
Genesis17:3 Aburamu akĩinamĩrĩra akĩhuutia thĩ na thiithi
Genesis17:4 “Nĩndathondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro nawe atĩ nĩũgaatuĩka ithe wa ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ.
Genesis17:5 Ndũgũcooka gwĩtwo Aburamu
Genesis17:6 “Nĩngũkũhe njiarwa nyingĩ mũno
Genesis17:7 “Nĩngũkĩhingia kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩakwa harĩ we o na harĩ njiarwa ciaku
Genesis17:8 Nĩngũkũhe bũrũri ũyũ wa ũgeni ũtũũraga ũtuĩke waku na njiarwa ciaku. Bũrũri wothe wa Kanaani ũgũtuĩka wa njiarwa ciaku nginya tene na tene
Genesis17:9 Ningĩ Ngai akĩĩra Aburahamu atĩrĩ
Genesis17:10 Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa wee mwene na njiarwa ciaku mwagĩrĩirwo kũhingia nĩ gĩĩkĩ: no mũhaka mũndũ mũrũme o wothe aruage.
Genesis17:11 Marĩruaga kĩĩga kĩa ũciari
Genesis17:12 Kuuma rĩu kahĩĩ o goothe karĩruaga ge ka matukũ manaana. Ũguo nĩkuuga kahĩĩ o goothe ka njiarwa ciaku
Genesis17:13 Mũndũ mũrũme o wothe no mũhaka aruage
Genesis17:14 Mũndũ mũrũme o wothe ũtaruĩte ndarĩtaragwo ta ũmwe wa andũ aakwa
Genesis17:15 Ningĩ Ngai akĩĩra Aburahamu atĩrĩ
Genesis17:16 Nĩngũmũraathima
Genesis17:17 Aburahamu akĩinamĩrĩra akĩhuutia thĩ na thiithi
Genesis17:18 Agĩkĩũria Ngai atĩrĩ
Genesis17:19 No Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

Genesis17:22 Ngai arĩĩkia kwarĩria Aburahamu
Genesis17:23 Na rĩĩrĩ

Genesis17:25 naake mũũrũwe Ishumaeli aarĩ wa mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtatũ.
Genesis17:26 Eerĩ maaruire mũthenya o ro ũmwe
Genesis17:27 hamwe na arũme oothe arĩa maarĩ gwake
Genesis18:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis18:2 Rĩrĩa ainamũkire
Genesis18:3 akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis18:4 Rekeei mũreeherwo maaĩ mwĩthambe magũrũ
Genesis18:5 Nĩngũmũcarĩria tũirio nĩguo mũcookwo nĩ hinya
Genesis18:6 Naake Aburahamu agĩthiĩ narua agĩtoonya hemainĩ akĩĩra Sara atĩrĩ
Genesis18:7 Agĩcooka agĩteng'era rũũruinĩ agĩthuura njaũ ĩrĩa yarĩ nyoroku na noru
Genesis18:8 Agĩcooka akĩoya ngorono
Genesis18:9 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis18:10 Ũmwe wao akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis18:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis18:12 Sara nĩethekereire akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis18:13 Naake MWATHANI akĩũria Aburahamu atĩrĩ
Genesis18:14 Kũrĩ ũndũ MWATHANI atangĩhota gwĩka? Nĩngaacooka thuutha wa mĩeri kenda o ta ũguo ndoiga
Genesis18:15 Tondũ Sara nĩaiguire guoya
Genesis18:16 Andũ acio makiumagara makĩerekera Sodomu
Genesis18:17 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩyũria atĩrĩ
Genesis18:18 kuona atĩ njiarwa ciake nĩigaatuĩka rũũrĩrĩ rũnene na rwa hinya
Genesis18:19 Aaca
Genesis18:20 MWATHANI akĩĩra Aburahamu atĩrĩ
Genesis18:21 Nĩngũikũrũka kuo ngarore kana maũndũ macio mooru njiguĩte nĩmeekĩĩte nĩ ma ma.”
Genesis18:22 Andũ acio angĩ eerĩ magĩthiĩ meerekeire Sodomu
Genesis18:23 Aburahamu nĩathiathiire na harĩ MWATHANI akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis18:24 Ĩ kũngĩkorwo kũrĩ na andũ mĩrongo ĩtaano athingu itũũrainĩ-rĩ
Genesis18:25 Nĩ ma ndũngĩĩka ũguo. Ndũngĩniinanĩria andũ athingu na andũ matarĩ athingu
Genesis18:26 Naake MWATHANI agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Genesis18:27 Naake Aburahamu akĩaria rĩngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ

Genesis19:11 Magĩcooka magĩtũma arũme acio maarĩ nja oothe

Genesis19:16 Loti agĩĩka thieya. No rĩĩrĩ

Genesis25:13 Mishima
Genesis25:14 Hadadi

Genesis25:17 Njiarwa icio cia Ishumaeli ciatũũraga kuuma Havila nginya Shuru
Genesis25:18 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Isaaka mũrũ wa Aburahamu:
Genesis25:19 Aburahamu nĩ we warĩ ithe wa Isaaka. Isaaka arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna akĩhikia Rebeka mwarĩ wa Bethueli (Mũaramea wa kuuma Mesopotamia)

Genesis25:21 Nda ĩyo yarĩ ya mahatha
Genesis25:22 MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis25:23 Nĩagĩkinyĩrĩirwo nĩ ihinda rĩa gũciara
Genesis25:24 Ka mbere kaarĩ gatuune

Genesis25:32 Jakubu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis25:33 Naake Jakubu akĩmũhe mũgate na gĩtoero
Genesis26:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis26:2 MWATHANI nĩoimĩrĩire Isaaka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis26:3 Tũũra gũũkũ bũrũri ũyũ na nĩndĩkoragwo hamwe nawe na ngũraathimage. Bũrũri ũyũ wothe nĩngũkũhe o hamwe na njiarwa ciaku. Nĩngũhingia kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndeerĩire thooguo Aburahamu.
Genesis26:4 Nĩngaakũhe njiarwa nyingĩ o ta njata cia matuinĩ
Genesis26:5 Nĩngaakũraathima
Genesis26:6 Kwoguo Isaaka agĩtũũra Gerari.
Genesis26:7 Rĩrĩa andũ a kũu mooririe ũhoro wa mũtumia wake
Genesis26:8 Isaaka aikaranga kũu
Genesis26:9 Abimeleki nĩatũmanĩire Isaaka akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis26:10 Naake Abimeleki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis26:11 Abimeleki nĩakaanirie andũ oothe akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis26:12 Isaaka nĩahandire irio kũu bũrũri ũcio
Genesis26:13 na akĩgĩa na indo nyingĩ agĩtonga mũno.
Genesis26:14 Tondũ aarĩ na ndũũru cia ng'ondu
Genesis26:15 Nĩmaagĩthikire ithima ciothe iria cienjeetwo nĩ ndungata cia ithe Aburahamu e muoyo.
Genesis26:16 Abimeleki agĩkĩĩra Isaaka atĩrĩ
Genesis26:17 Kwoguo Isaaka akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ akĩamba hema gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Gerari kũrĩa aikarangire kwa ihinda.
Genesis26:18 Isaaka nĩathikũririe ithima iria cienjeetwo hĩndĩ ya ithe Aburahamu
Genesis26:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis26:20 arĩithi a Gerari makĩgĩa ngarari na arĩithi a Isaaka
Genesis26:21 Ndungata cia Isaaka nĩcienjire gĩthima kĩngĩ
Genesis26:22 Nĩoimire kũu agĩthiĩ akĩenja gĩthima kĩngĩ
Genesis26:23 Isaaka nĩoimire kũu akĩambata Beerisheba.
Genesis26:24 Ũtukũ o ro ũcio MWATHANI nĩamuumĩrĩire akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis26:25 Isaaka agĩgĩaka kĩgongoona hau
Genesis26:26 Abimeleki nĩoimire Gerari e na mũmũtaari wetagwo Ahuzathu na mũnene wa thigari wetagwo Fikoli magĩthiĩ kuona Isaaka.
Genesis26:27 Isaaka agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Genesis26:28 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis26:29 atĩ ndũgaatwĩka ũũru o ta ũrĩa ithuĩ tũtaagwĩkire ũũru. Twagwĩkire wega na tũkĩreka ũthiĩ na thaayũ. Wee nĩũraathimĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI.”
Genesis26:30 Isaaka agĩkĩmarugĩra
Genesis26:31 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ kĩrooko tene magĩthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro na makĩĩhĩta. Isaaka agĩcooka akĩmoigĩra ũhoro
Genesis26:32 Mũthenya o ro ũcio ndungata cia Isaaka igĩũka ikĩmwĩra ũhoro wa gĩthima kĩrĩa cienjeete ikiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis26:33 Naake agĩtua gĩthima kĩu “Mwĩhĩtwa.” Hau nĩ ho itũũra rĩa Beerisheba rĩarutire rĩĩtwa rĩarĩo.
Genesis26:34 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis26:35 Atumia acio nĩmaanyamaaririe Isaaka na Rebeka.
Genesis27:1 Rĩrĩa Isaaka aakũrire akĩũra maitho
Genesis27:2 Isaaka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis27:3 Ũgwĩka ũguo-ĩ
Genesis27:4 ũũke ũndugĩre irio iria nyendeete
Genesis27:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Isaaka aaragĩria mũũrũwe Esau
Genesis27:6 Rebeka akĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis27:7 ‘Thiĩ ũndeehere nyamũ ũndugĩre
Genesis27:8 Rĩu
Genesis27:9 Thiĩ rũũruinĩ ũnyiite tũũri twĩrĩ tũnoru
Genesis27:10 nĩguo ũmũtwarĩre arĩe nĩ geetha akũraathime atanakua.”
Genesis27:11 No Jakubu akĩĩra nyina atĩrĩ
Genesis27:12 Baaba ahota kũũhuutia amenye atĩ nĩkũmũheenia ndĩramũheenia; ndĩkĩĩreehere kĩrumi handũ ha kĩraathimo.”
Genesis27:13 Naake nyina akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis27:14 Kwoguo agĩthiĩ agĩtũnyiita agĩtwarĩra nyina
Genesis27:15 Agĩcooka akĩoya nguo iria njega mũno cia Esau iria we aigĩĩte nyũmba
Genesis27:16 na akĩmũhumba njũũa cia tũũri tũu
Genesis27:17 Agĩcooka akĩmũnengera irio iria aathondekeete wega
Genesis27:18 Jakubu agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ ithe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis27:19 Naake Jakubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Genesis27:20 Naake Isaaka akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis27:21 Isaaka agĩkĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis27:22 Jakubu agĩgĩkuhĩrĩria ithe
Genesis27:23 No ndamenyire atĩ nĩ Jakubu amu mooko maake maarĩ na guoya ta ma Esau. Atanamũraathima
Genesis27:24 nĩamũririe rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Genesis27:25 Naake Isaaka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis27:26 Ithe agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis27:27 Agĩkĩmũkuhĩrĩria amũmumunye
Genesis27:28 Ngai arokũheaga ime rĩrĩa riumaga igũrũ
Genesis27:29 Ndũũrĩrĩ irotuĩka ndungata ciaku
Genesis27:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis27:31 O naake akĩruga irio njega agĩtwarĩra ithe. Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis27:32 Isaaka akĩũria atĩrĩ
Genesis27:33 Isaaka akĩambĩrĩria kũinaina mwĩrĩ wothe
Genesis27:34 Esau aigua ũguo
Genesis27:35 No Isaaka akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis27:36 Esau akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis27:37 Naake Isaaka agĩcookeria Esau atĩrĩ
Genesis27:38 Esau agĩgĩthaitha ithe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis27:39 Naake ithe Isaaka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis27:40 Ũgũtũũra ũrũaga
Genesis27:41 Esau nĩamenire Jakubu tondũ wa kĩraathimo kĩrĩa ithe amũraathimire nakĩo. Nĩakĩĩĩrire atĩrĩ
Genesis27:42 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis27:43 Kwoguo mũrũ wakwa thikĩrĩria ũrĩa ngũkwĩra. Thiĩ narua kwĩ mũrũ wa maitũ Labani bũrũriinĩ wa Harani
Genesis27:44 ũikarange naake kuo kwa ihinda nginya rĩrĩa mang'ũrĩ ma mũrũ wa maitũguo magaathira
Genesis27:45 na ariganĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa wamwĩkire. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngaatũma mũndũ ooke akũiyĩre. Bata wa njũrwo nĩ aariũ aakwa eerĩ mũthenya o ro ũmwe
Genesis27:46 Rebeka agĩkĩĩra Isaaka atĩrĩ
Genesis28:1 Isaaka agĩgĩĩta Jakubu
Genesis28:2 Ũkĩra ũthiĩ Mesopotamia kwa guukaguo Bethueli
Genesis28:3 Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe arokũraathima na akũhe njiarwa nyingĩ
Genesis28:4 Arokũraathima o hamwe na njiarwa ciaku o ta ũrĩa aaraathimire Aburahamu. Bũrũri ũyũ ũtũũraga
Genesis28:5 Isaaka agĩgĩtũma Jakubu Mesopotamia kwa Labani
Genesis28:6 Esau agĩkĩmenya atĩ Isaaka nĩaraathimĩĩte Jakubu na akamũtũma Mesopotamia agacarie mũtumia kuo. O na nĩamenyire atĩ rĩrĩa Isaaka aamũraathimire nĩamwathire akĩmwĩra atĩ ndakaanahikie mũtumia Mũkanaani.
Genesis28:7 Ningĩ nĩonire atĩ Jakubu nĩathĩkĩire ithe na nyina
Genesis28:8 Esau agĩkĩmenya atĩ atumia aake Akanaani matiendeetwo nĩ ithe.
Genesis28:9 Kwoguo nĩathiire kwa Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Aburahamu akĩhikia mwarĩ wetagwo Mahalathu
Genesis28:10 Jakubu agĩkiuma Beerisheba
Genesis28:11 Nĩgwatukire e njĩra
Genesis28:12 Naake nĩarootire akĩona ngathĩ yoimĩĩte thĩ ĩgakinya igũrũ
Genesis28:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis28:14 Njiarwa ciaku nĩikaingĩha o ta rũkũngũ rwa thĩ
Genesis28:15 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Genesis28:16 Jakubu ookĩra nĩoigire atĩrĩ
Genesis28:17 Nĩaiguire guoya akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis28:18 Jakubu nĩokĩrire rũũciinĩ tene
Genesis28:19 Naake agĩtua handũ hau Betheli (No itũũra rĩrĩa rĩarĩ ho mbere rĩetagwo Luzi).
Genesis28:20 Jakubu nĩehĩtire mbere ya MWATHANI akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis28:21 na ũkaanjookia mũciĩ kwa baaba na thaayũ
Genesis28:22 Ihiga rĩĩrĩ rĩa kĩririkano ndahanda haaha
Genesis29:1 Jakubu nĩathiire na mbere na rũgendo o nginya agĩkinya bũrũri wa andũ a mwena wa irathĩro.
Genesis29:2 Aacũũthĩrĩria akĩona gĩthima kũu werũinĩ
Genesis29:3 Rĩrĩa ndũũru ciothe ciacookanĩrĩra
Genesis29:4 Jakubu akĩũria arĩithi atĩrĩ
Genesis29:5 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Genesis29:6 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Genesis29:7 Jakubu agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Genesis29:8 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis29:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis29:10 Rĩrĩa Jakubu oonire Rakeli e na ng'ondu cia maamawe Labani
Genesis29:11 Agĩcooka akĩmumunya Rakeli na akĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra nĩgũkena.
Genesis29:12 Jakubu akĩĩra Rakeli atĩrĩ
Genesis29:13 Ithe aigua ũhoro ũcio wa Jakubu mũrũ wa mwarĩ wa nyina
Genesis29:14 naake Labani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis29:15 Labani nĩerire Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis29:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis29:17 Lea aarĩ na maitho macici
Genesis29:18 Jakubu nĩendeete Rakeli
Genesis29:19 Labani agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Genesis29:20 Jakubu nĩakĩrutire wĩra mĩaka mũgwanja nĩ geetha anengerwo Rakeli
Genesis29:21 Jakubu agĩkĩĩra Labani atĩrĩ
Genesis29:22 Kwoguo Labani agĩthondeka iruga rĩa ũhiki
Genesis29:23 No ũtukũ agĩtwarĩra Jakubu Lea handũ ha Rakeli
Genesis29:24 (Labani nĩaheanire ndungata yake ya mũirĩĩtu yetagwo Zilipa kũrĩ mwarĩ Lea ĩmũtungatagĩre.)
Genesis29:25 Kwarooka gũkĩa
Genesis29:26 Naake Labani akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis29:27 Eterera kiumia gĩa gũkũngũĩra ũhiki gĩthire
Genesis29:28 Jakubu nĩetĩkĩrire
Genesis29:29 (Labani nĩaheanire ndungata yake ya mũirĩĩtu yetagwo Biliha kũrĩ mwarĩ Rakeli ĩmũtungatagire.)
Genesis29:30 Jakubu nĩakomire na Rakeli
Genesis29:31 MWATHANI oona atĩ Rakeli aarĩ mwende gũkĩra Lea
Genesis29:32 Lea nĩagĩire nda agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ. Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis29:33 Nĩagĩire nda rĩngĩ agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ. Akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis29:34 Nĩagĩire nda rĩngĩ na agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ. Akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis29:35 Nĩagĩire nda rĩngĩ na agĩciara kaana kangĩ ga kahĩĩ. Akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:1 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis30:2 Jakubu nĩaraakaririo nĩ Rakeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis30:3 Naake Rakeli akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:4 Nĩakĩnengerire mũthuuriwe Biliha ndungata ĩyo yake ĩtuĩke mũtumia wake
Genesis30:5 Naake Biliha akĩgĩa nda agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana ga kahĩĩ.
Genesis30:6 Naake Rakeli akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:7 Naake Biliha akĩgĩa nda rĩngĩ agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana ga keerĩ ga kahĩĩ.
Genesis30:8 Rakeli akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:9 Rĩrĩa Lea oonire atĩ nĩatigĩĩte kũgĩa ciana
Genesis30:10 Naake Zilipa agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana ga kahĩĩ.
Genesis30:11 Naake Lea akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:12 Naake Zilipa agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana kangĩ ga kahĩĩ.
Genesis30:13 Naake Lea akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:14 Hĩndĩ ya magetha ma ngano
Genesis30:15 No Lea akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis30:16 Hwaĩinĩ rĩrĩa Jakubu oimaga mũgũnda
Genesis30:17 Naake Ngai akĩigua mahooya ma Lea
Genesis30:18 Naake Lea akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:19 Lea nĩacookire akĩgĩa nda rĩngĩ agĩciarĩra Jakubu kaana ga kahĩĩ ga gatandatũ.
Genesis30:20 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:21 Thuuthainĩ nĩacookire agĩciara kairĩĩtu agĩgatua Dina.
Genesis30:22 Ngai nĩakĩririkanire Rakeli; akĩmũcookeria mahooya maake agĩtũma ahote kũgĩa na ciana.
Genesis30:23 Nĩagĩire nda agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ. Akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis30:24 MWATHANI arohe kaana kangĩ ga kahĩĩ;” kwoguo agĩgatua Josefu.
Genesis30:25 Thuutha wa Rakeli gũciara Josefu
Genesis30:26 He atumia aakwa na ciana iria ngĩĩte nacio nĩ ũndũ wa gũgũtungatĩra
Genesis30:27 No Labani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis30:28 Gweta mũcaara waku na nĩngũkũrĩha.”
Genesis30:29 Jakubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Genesis30:30 Amu itanooka
Genesis30:31 Labani akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis30:32 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Genesis30:33 Thuuthainĩ rĩrĩa ũgooka kũrora mũcaara wakwa nĩũkeeyonera kana ndĩ mwĩhokeku. Ũngĩkangora ndĩ na mbũri ĩtarĩ maara kana njũgũ kana ng'ondu ĩtarĩ mbirũ
Genesis30:34 Labani agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Genesis30:35 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis30:36 Naake agĩthiĩ rũgendo rwa thikũ ithatũ nacio kũndũ kũraaya aciehererie Jakubu. Jakubu agĩtigĩirwo mahiũ macio mangĩ ma Labani amarorage.
Genesis30:37 Jakubu agĩcaria thanju cia mũtĩ wa mũribaana
Genesis30:38 Agĩcooka agĩcikia mbere ya mahiũ harĩa maathiaga kũnyua maaĩ. Aacikirie hau nĩ tondũ mahiũ maahaicanaga mathiĩ kũnyua maaĩ.
Genesis30:39 Kwoguo mahiũ maahaicanĩra thanjuinĩ icio
Genesis30:40 Jakubu nĩamũranirie mbũri na ng'ondu na akĩroria moothiũ maacio mwena ũrĩa mahiũ ma Labani marĩa maarĩ manyaga na marĩa maarĩ njũgũ na marĩa maarĩ maara maarĩ. Ũguo nĩguo Jakubu aathondekire mahiũ maake
Genesis30:41 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis30:42 No ndaigaga thanju icio rĩrĩa marĩa matarĩ hinya marahaicana. Kwoguo mahiũ ma Labani magĩkorwo arĩ marĩa matarĩ hinya
Genesis30:43 Jakubu agĩgĩtonga mũno na njĩra ĩyo
Genesis31:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis31:2 O na nĩonire atĩ Labani ndamwendeete ta ũrĩa aamwendeete mbere.
Genesis31:3 MWATHANI nĩakĩĩrire Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis31:4 Kwoguo Jakubu agĩtũmanĩra Rakeli na Lea akĩmeera matũngane werũinĩ kũrĩa mahiũ maake maarĩ.
Genesis31:5 Nĩameerire atĩrĩ
Genesis31:6 Inyuĩ nĩmũũĩ atĩ ndũũraga ndungatagĩra ithe wanyu na hinya wakwa wothe.
Genesis31:7 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis31:8 Ithe wanyu angĩanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ
Genesis31:9 Kwoguo Ngai nĩatuunyĩĩte ithe wanyu mahiũ maake akaahe.
Genesis31:10 “Mahinda marĩa mahiũ maahaicanaga
Genesis31:11 Naake mũraika wa Ngai akĩnjĩĩra kĩrootoinĩ atĩrĩ
Genesis31:12 ‘Tarora wone! Thenge ciothe iria irahaica i na manyaga
Genesis31:13 Nĩ niĩ Ngai ũrĩa wakuumĩrĩire Betheli harĩa wamũrire ihiga rĩa kĩririkano na ũndũ wa kũrĩitĩrĩria maguta
Genesis31:14 Nao Rakeli na Lea makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis31:15 Rĩu githĩ ndatuonaga ta tũrĩ ndũũrĩrĩ? Amu aatwendirie na akĩhũthĩra mbeeca ciothe iria aarĩhirwo nĩ ũndũ witũ.
Genesis31:16 Ũtonga ũyũ wothe Ngai atuunyĩĩte ithe witũ nĩ witũ na ciana ciitũ. Ũrĩa wothe Ngai akwĩrĩĩte wĩke
Genesis31:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jakubu nĩahaarĩirie gũthiĩ
Genesis31:18 agĩcooka akiumagaria mahiũ maake moothe o hamwe na indo ciothe iria aathũkũmĩĩte Mesopotamia
Genesis31:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Labani aathiĩte kwenja ng'ondu ciake guoya
Genesis31:20 Jakubu nĩaheenirie Labani
Genesis31:21 Agĩkĩoya indo ciake ciothe
Genesis31:22 Mũthenya wa gatatũ Labani nĩerirwo atĩ Jakubu nĩorire.
Genesis31:23 Naake akĩoya andũ akĩmũrũmĩrĩra mĩthenya mũgwanja o nginya akĩmũkinyĩra bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa wĩ irĩma wa Gileadi.
Genesis31:24 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis31:25 Labani nĩakinyĩrire Jakubu aambĩĩte hema yake kĩrĩmainĩ
Genesis31:26 Labani nĩoririe Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis31:27 Wathiire na hitho
Genesis31:28 O na ndwarekire mumunye airĩĩtu aakwa na ciana ciao ndĩmoigĩre ũhoro? Wee nĩwekire ũndũ wa ũrimũ!
Genesis31:29 Niĩ ndĩ na hinya wa gũgwĩka ũũru; no rĩĩrĩ
Genesis31:30 Nĩnjũũĩ wathiire nĩ tondũ nĩwaiguaga wĩrirĩirie gũcooka kwanyu
Genesis31:31 Jakubu nĩamũcookeirie atĩrĩ
Genesis31:32 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis31:33 Labani nĩagĩtoonyire gũcaria ngai ciake thĩinĩ wa hema ya Jakubu
Genesis31:34 Rakeli nĩ we woeete ngai cia mũciĩ cia ithe
Genesis31:35 Rakeli nĩerire ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis31:36 Jakubu nĩatetirie Labani e na maraakara akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Genesis31:37 Nĩwouruuria indoinĩ ciakwa ciothe
Genesis31:38 Mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ tũtũũraga nawe; mbũri na ng'ondu ciaku itirĩ ciahuna
Genesis31:39 Ng'ondu ĩngĩoragirwo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka
Genesis31:40 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis31:41 Mĩaka ĩyo mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ ngoreetwo gwaku-rĩ
Genesis31:42 Korwo Ngai wa maithe maakwa
Genesis31:43 Labani nĩacookeirie Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis31:44 Ũka tũthondeke kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Reke tũcookanĩrĩrie mahiga kĩrũndo magũtũririkanagia kĩrĩĩkanĩro giitũ.”
Genesis31:45 Kwoguo Jakubu akĩoya ihiga akĩrĩhanda rĩtuĩke rĩa kũmaririkania.
Genesis31:46 Agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ aake moonganie mahiga. Nao makĩũngania mahiga makĩmacookanĩrĩria kĩrũndo
Genesis31:47 Labani nĩatuire handũ hau Jegari Sahadutha
Genesis31:48 Labani nĩoigire atĩrĩ
Genesis31:49 Ningĩ Labani nĩerire Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis31:50 Labani nĩathiire na mbere na mĩario akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis31:51 Gĩĩkĩ nĩ kĩrũndo kĩa mahiga marĩa ndacookanĩrĩria gatagatĩ gaakwa nawe
Genesis31:52 Kĩrũndo gĩĩkĩ kĩa mahiga
Genesis31:53 Ngai wa Aburahamu na Ngai wa Nahori nĩagaatũtuithania.” Naake Jakubu akĩĩhĩta na rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai ũrĩa ithe Isaaka aathaathayagia atĩ nĩekũhingia mwĩhĩtwa ũcio.
Genesis31:54 Jakubu nĩarutire igongoona kĩrĩmainĩ
Genesis31:55 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ kĩrooko tene
Genesis32:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis32:2 Aamoona nĩoigire atĩrĩ
Genesis32:3 Jakubu nĩatũmire andũ mbere mathiĩ kũrĩ mũrũ wa nyina Esau bũrũriinĩ wa Edomu
Genesis32:4 makamwĩre atĩrĩ: “Ndungata yaku Jakubu ĩroiga atĩrĩ
Genesis32:5 Ndĩ na ng'ombe
Genesis32:6 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa Jakubu aatũmĩĩte maacookire nĩmaamwĩrire atĩrĩ
Genesis32:7 Jakubu agĩkĩigua guoya na agĩĩtigĩra; agĩkĩgayania andũ arĩa aarĩ nao
Genesis32:8 Agĩĩka ũguo eeciiragia atĩ
Genesis32:9 Naake Jakubu nĩahoire atĩrĩ
Genesis32:10 Niĩ ndungata yaku ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩ ũtugi wothe na maũndũ moothe ma kwĩhokeka marĩa ũnjĩkĩĩte. Ndaringire rũũĩ rwa Jorodani ndĩ o na mũthĩĩgi tu
Genesis32:11 Ndakũhooya ũngitĩre harĩ mũrũ wa maitũ Esau
Genesis32:12 No wee nĩwanjĩĩrire atĩ nĩũkaanjĩka wega
Genesis32:13 Ũtukũ ũcio agĩkĩraara hau
Genesis32:14 Agĩthuura mbũri cia mĩgoma magana meerĩ na thenge mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
Genesis32:15 ngamĩĩra cia gũkamwo mĩrongo ĩtatũ na tũcaũ twacio
Genesis32:16 Nĩacigayanirie ndũũru na akĩĩra ndungata ikarora rũũru rũmwe. Nĩerire ndungata atĩrĩ
Genesis32:17 Nĩerire ndungata ĩrĩa yarĩ na rũũru rwa mbere atĩrĩ
Genesis32:18 Mũmũcookerie atĩrĩ
Genesis32:19 O na ndungata ya rũũru rwa keerĩ
Genesis32:20 ‘Ĩĩ
Genesis32:21 Mahiũ macio ma kũheanwo agĩkiuga mathiĩ mbere
Genesis32:22 Ũtukũ o ro ũcio Jakubu nĩokĩrire akĩoya atumia aake eerĩ
Genesis32:23 Aamaringia nĩacookire akĩringia indo icio ingĩ ciake ciothe
Genesis32:24 nowe agĩtigwo thuutha e wiki.Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis32:25 Na rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio oonire atĩ ndehota Jakubu makĩgiana
Genesis32:26 Mũndũ ũcio nĩerire Jakubu atĩrĩ

Genesis33:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis33:2 Ndũngata icio igĩrĩ cia airĩĩtu na ciana ciacio igĩtongoria
Genesis33:3 Jakubu we mwene agĩthiĩ mbere yao
Genesis33:4 No rĩĩrĩ

Genesis34:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ

Genesis34:5 Jakubu nĩaiguire atĩ Shekemu nĩathaahĩĩtie mwarĩ
Genesis34:6 Hamori
Genesis34:7 rĩrĩa aariũ a Jakubu moimaga rũũru. Rĩrĩa maiguire ũhoro ũcio
Genesis34:8 Hamori akĩĩra Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis34:9 Nĩtũiguithanĩrie atĩ nĩtũrĩhikagia airĩĩtu aanyu
Genesis34:10 No mũtũũranagie na ithuĩ gũũkũ bũrũriinĩ witũ
Genesis34:11 Naake Shekemu akĩĩra Jakubu na aariũ a nyina na Dina atĩrĩ
Genesis34:12 Njĩĩraai iheeo iria ciothe mũkwenda
Genesis34:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis34:14 makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis34:15 Ithuĩ tũngĩĩtĩkĩra amũhikie angĩkorwo nĩmũkwamba kũhaanana na ithuĩ; arũme aanyu oothe maambe marue ta ithuĩ.
Genesis34:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩtũgwĩtĩkĩra mũhikagie airĩĩtu aitũ
Genesis34:17 Mwaga kũrua
Genesis34:18 Ciugo icio ciao nĩciakenirie Hamori na mũũrũwe Shekemu.
Genesis34:19 Shekemu ndateire ihinda ateekĩĩte ũguo eerirwo
Genesis34:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Genesis34:21 “Andũ aya nĩ araata aitũ; rekeei matũũrage gũũkũ na mathiage o harĩa mangĩenda. Bũrũri ũyũ nĩ mũnene wa kũmaigana o nao. Rekeei tũhikagie airĩĩtu aao
Genesis34:22 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis34:23 Na githĩ mahiũ maao na indo iria ingĩ ciothe ciao itigũtuĩka ciitũ? Kĩrekeei tũiguithanĩrie atĩ no matũũranie na ithuĩ.”
Genesis34:24 Andũ oothe a itũũra rĩu makĩiguithanĩria ũhoroinĩ ũcio Hamori na Shekemu moigire; arũme oothe magĩkĩrua.
Genesis34:25 Na rĩĩrĩ

Genesis35:1 Ngai nĩerire Jakubu atĩrĩ
Genesis35:2 Kwoguo Jakubu akĩĩra andũ a mũciĩ wake
Genesis35:3 Nĩtũkuuma gũũkũ tũthiĩ Betheli ngaakĩre Ngai kĩgongoona. Ngai ũcio nĩ we wandeithirie rĩrĩa ndarĩ na thĩĩna na no we ũtũũraga hamwe na niĩ kũrĩa guothe thiaga.”
Genesis35:4 Kwoguo makĩnengera Jakubu ngai ng'eni iria maarĩ nacio na icũhĩ iria ciarĩ matũ maao. Naake

Genesis35:13 Thuutha wa ũguo

Genesis35:21 Jakubu nĩathiire na mbere na rũgendo
Genesis35:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis35:23 Aariũ a Lea maarĩ: Reubeni (irigithaathi rĩa Jakubu)
Genesis35:24 Nao aariũ a Rakeli maarĩ: Josefu na Benjamini.
Genesis35:25 Nao aariũ a Biliha ndungata ya Rakeli ya mũirĩĩtu maarĩ Dani na Nafutali.
Genesis35:26 Nao aariũ a Zilipa ndungata ya Lea ya mũirĩĩtu maarĩ Gadi na Asheri. Aariũ acio a Jakubu maaciarĩirwo Mesopotamia.
Genesis35:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis35:28 Isaaka aakuire e wa mĩaka igana na mĩrongo ĩnaana (180).
Genesis35:29 Aakuire e mũkũrũ mũno
Genesis36:1 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Esau ũrĩa wĩtagwo na rĩĩtwa rĩngĩ Edomu.
Genesis36:2 Esau aahikĩĩtie atumia Akanaani na nĩ o: Ada
Genesis36:3 na Basemathi mwarĩ wa Ishumaeli na nĩ mwarĩ wa nyina na Nebaiothi.
Genesis36:4 Ada aaciarire Elifazi
Genesis36:5 naake Oholibama agĩciara Jeushi
Genesis36:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis36:7 Oimire kuo nĩ tondũ kũrĩa we na Jakubu maatũũraga gũtiamaiganaga; maarĩ na mahiũ maingĩ
Genesis36:8 Kwoguo Esau agĩtũũra bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma wa Edomu.
Genesis36:9 Ici nĩcio njiarwa cia Esau
Genesis36:10 (10-13) Mũtumia wa Esau ũrĩa wetagwo Ada aamũciarĩire mũũriũ ũmwe wetagwo Elifazi. Naake Elifazi aarĩ ithe wa aariũ ataano: Temani
Genesis36:11 Naake mũtumia wa Esau ũrĩa wetagwo Oholibama
Genesis36:12 Ici nĩcio mbarĩ iria cioimire harĩ Esau. Mũrũ wa Esau wa mbere ũrĩa wetagwo Elifazi nĩ we warĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Temani
Genesis36:13 Kora
Genesis36:14 Mũrũ wa Esau ũrĩa wetagwo Reueli nĩ we warĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Nahathu
Genesis36:15 Ici nĩcio mbarĩ cia Esau na mũtumia wake Oholibama
Genesis36:16 Mbarĩ icio ciothe cioimĩĩte harĩ Esau.
Genesis36:17 (20-21) Andũ arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri wa Edomu kĩambĩrĩria magayanĩĩtio na mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa yarĩ ndĩra cia njiarwa ici cia Mũhori wetagwo Seiru: Lotani
Genesis36:18 Lotani aarĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Hori na ya Hemani. (Lotani aarĩ na mwarĩ wa nyina wetagwo Timina)
Genesis36:19 Shobali aarĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Alivani
Genesis36:20 Zibeoni aarĩ ithe wa aariũ eerĩ: Aia na Ana. (Ũyũ nĩ Ana ũrĩa wonire ithima cia maaĩ mahiũ werũinĩ akĩrĩithia ndigiri cia ithe.)
Genesis36:21 Ana aarĩ ithe wa Dishoni na mũirĩĩtu wetagwo Oholibama.
Genesis36:22 Dishoni aarĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Hemudani
Genesis36:23 Ezeri nĩ we warĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Bilihani
Genesis36:24 Dishani aarĩ ithe wa mbarĩ ya Uzu na ya Arani.
Genesis36:25 (29-30) Ĩno nĩ yo mĩhĩrĩga ya Ahori arĩa me bũrũriinĩ wa Edomu: Lotani
Genesis36:26 (31-39) Gũtaanagĩa athamaki bũrũriinĩ wa Isiraeli
Genesis36:27 (40-43) Esau nĩ we warĩ ithe wa mĩhĩrĩga ĩno ya Aedomu: Timina

Genesis38:5 Thuutha ũcio agĩciara kaana kangĩ ga kahĩĩ agĩgatua Shela. Kahĩĩ kau gagĩciarwo Juda aarĩ Akizibu.

Genesis39:12 Mũtumia ũcio akĩmũnyiita nguo
Genesis39:13 Rĩrĩa mũtumia ũcio oonire atĩ Josefu nĩora atiga nguo yake
Genesis39:14 agĩĩta ndungata ciake iria ciamũtungatagĩra kũu nyũmba agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis39:15 Aigua ndathanda mbu
Genesis39:16 Mũtumia ũcio agĩkĩiga nguo ĩyo nginya rĩrĩa mũnene wa Josefu ookire.
Genesis39:17 Agĩkĩmũhe ũhoro ũcio ta ũũ: “Ndungata ĩrĩa ya Mũhibirania wareehire gũũkũ
Genesis39:18 Rĩrĩa thandire mbu
Genesis39:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis39:20 Agĩkĩnyiita Josefu akĩmũikia njeera kũrĩa oohwo a mũthamaki maikagio
Genesis39:21 No MWATHANI aarĩ hamwe na Josefu
Genesis39:22 Mũnene wa njeera agĩgĩtua Josefu mũnene wa oohwo acio angĩ oothe
Genesis39:23 Mũnene wa njeera ndabataragio nĩkũrora ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũrĩa wehokeirwo Josefu
Genesis40:1 Thuutha ũcio
Genesis40:2 Mũthamaki nĩaraakaririo nĩ anjaama acio eerĩ
Genesis40:3 akĩmaikia njeera ĩrĩa yarĩ nyũmba kwa mũnene wa arangĩri
Genesis40:4 Mũnene wa arangĩri agĩgĩtua Josefu wa kũmatungatagĩra
Genesis40:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis40:6 Rĩrĩa Josefu ookire kũrĩ o kĩrooko
Genesis40:7 akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Genesis40:8 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis40:9 Mũnene wa atwarĩri mũthamaki gĩa kũnyua akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis40:10 wĩ na honge ithatũ. Rĩrĩa ũrarutire mahuti
Genesis40:11 Ndĩranyiitĩĩte gĩkombe kĩa mũthamaki na mooko
Genesis40:12 Josefu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis40:13 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ
Genesis40:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis40:15 Amu niĩ
Genesis40:16 Rĩrĩa mũnene wa arugi mĩgate aiguire mũtaũrire wa kĩrooto kĩu warĩ mwega
Genesis40:17 Gĩkabũ kĩrĩa kĩraarĩ igũrũ biũ nĩkĩo kĩraarĩ na mĩgate ya mĩthemba yothe ya kũrĩĩo nĩ mũthamaki
Genesis40:18 Naake Josefu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis40:19 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ
Genesis40:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis40:21 Naake agĩcookia mũnene wa amũtwarĩri gĩa kũnyua wĩra ũrĩa warĩ wake
Genesis40:22 no mũnene wa amũrugĩri mĩgate akĩmũcuuria mũtĩ igũrũ. Gwekĩkire o ta ũrĩa Josefu aamataũrĩire irooto ciao.
Genesis40:23 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis41:1 Thuutha wa mĩaka ĩĩrĩ
Genesis41:2 na kũu rũũĩinĩ gũkiumĩra ng'ombe mũgwanja nyoroku na noru
Genesis41:3 Nĩhaacookire hakiumĩra ng'ombe ingĩ mũgwanja hĩnju mũno o nginya ikoimĩria mahĩndĩ. Nacio ikĩrũũgama hau haarĩ ng'ombe icio ingĩ rũteereinĩ rwa rũũĩ
Genesis41:4 ikĩrĩa ng'ombe iria ciarĩ nyoroku na noru. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki akĩgurumũka kuuma toro.
Genesis41:5 Nĩacookire akĩhĩtwo nĩ toro rĩngĩ akĩroota kĩrooto kĩngĩ kĩahaanaga ta ũũ: nĩonire ngira mũgwanja cia ngano njega mũno ciyũire ngano ikũrĩĩte kamũtĩinĩ kamwe ka ngano.
Genesis41:6 Thuutha wacio nĩacookire akĩona ngira ingĩ mũgwanja
Genesis41:7 Ngira icio mũgwanja hinyaru ikĩmeria iria ciarĩ njega na njiyũru. Mũthamaki akĩgurumũka kuuma toro
Genesis41:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis41:9 Naake mũnene wa atwarĩri mũthamaki gĩa kũnyua akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Genesis41:10 Rĩrĩa niĩ na mũnene wa akũrugĩri mĩgate twakũraakarĩĩtie ũgĩtũikia njeera kwa mũnene wa arangĩri-rĩ
Genesis41:11 ũtukũ ũmwe
Genesis41:12 Kũu twarĩ
Genesis41:13 Na o ta ũrĩa aatũtaũrĩire noguo gwatuĩkire; nĩwanjokirie wĩrainĩ wakwa
Genesis41:14 Mũthamaki nĩatũmanĩire Josefu ageetwo
Genesis41:15 Mũthamaki agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis41:16 Josefu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis41:17 Mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ
Genesis41:18 nacio ng'ombe mũgwanja noru na nyoroku iroimĩra rũũĩinĩ
Genesis41:19 Thuutha ũcio
Genesis41:20 Ng'ombe iria hĩnju irooka irarĩa icio iraarĩ noru.
Genesis41:21 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis41:22 Ningĩ nĩndĩrarootire ndĩroona ngira mũgwanja njega cia ngano i njiyũru igikũra kamũtĩinĩ kamwe ka ngano.
Genesis41:23 Ndĩracooka ndĩroona ngira ingĩ mũgwanja nyũmanĩrĩru
Genesis41:24 Ngira icio iraarĩ hinyaru irameria icio iraarĩ njega. Nĩnjĩrĩĩte ago irooto icio na gũtirĩ o na ũmwe ũhoteete kũndaũrĩra ũrĩa iroiga.”
Genesis41:25 Josefu akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Genesis41:26 Ng'ombe icio noru mũgwanja nĩ mĩaka mũgwanja
Genesis41:27 Ng'ombe icio hĩnju i na mahĩndĩ moimĩru iracookire iroimĩra
Genesis41:28 No ta ũrĩa ngwĩrire; Ngai nĩakũguũrĩirie ũrĩa egwĩka.
Genesis41:29 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Genesis41:30 no thuutha wa ũguo nĩgũgaakorwo na mĩaka ĩngĩ mũgwanja ya ng'aragu
Genesis41:31 Mĩaka ĩyo ya bũũthi ĩkaariganĩra o biũ
Genesis41:32 Ũhoro wa gũcookera kĩrooto gĩaku na njĩra ĩngĩ nĩwakuonania atĩ ũcio nĩ ũndũ Ngai ahaarĩirie
Genesis41:33 “Kwoguo no mũhaka ũthuure mũndũ mũũgĩ na wĩ na ũmenyo ũmũtue mũrori wa bũrũri.
Genesis41:34 Ningĩ no mũhaka ũthuure anjaama angĩ akuoyaga gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ithaano kĩa magetha ma bũrũri wa Misiri mĩaka ĩyo mũgwanja ya bũũthi.
Genesis41:35 Meere moonganie irio icio ciothe mĩaka ĩyo ya bũũthi ĩrooka
Genesis41:36 Irio icio igaakorwo irĩ mũthiithũ wa andũ a bũrũri wa mĩaka ĩyo ĩngĩ mũgwanja ya ng'aragu ĩrĩa ĩgooka bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri. Weka ũguo andũ matikaahũũta.”
Genesis41:37 Mũthamaki na njaama ciake magĩkĩigua ũhoro ũcio ũrĩ mwega.
Genesis41:38 Naake mũthamaki agĩgĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis41:39 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ
Genesis41:40 Nĩngũgũtua mũrori wa bũrũri wakwa
Genesis41:41 Rĩu nĩndagũtua barũũthi wa bũrũri wothe wa Misiri.”
Genesis41:42 Mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩruta gĩcũhĩ kĩ na rĩĩtwa rĩake kĩara
Genesis41:43 Agĩcooka akĩmũhe ngaari ya mbarathi ya kũmũũkua ĩrĩa yarĩ ya keerĩ kuuma harĩ ya mũthamaki wa Misiri
Genesis41:44 Ningĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis41:45 Mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩcooka akĩmũhe rĩĩtwa Zafenathi Panea
Genesis41:46 Josefu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ rĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gũtungata mũthamaki wa Misiri. Josefu agĩkiuma kũu kwa mũthamaki wa Misiri
Genesis41:47 Mĩakainĩ ĩyo mũgwanja ya bũũthi
Genesis41:48 Naake Josefu nĩacicookanagĩrĩria agaciiga matũũrainĩ marĩa manene. Aigaga o itũũrainĩ irio cia kuuma mĩgũndainĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ hakuhĩ narĩo.
Genesis41:49 Nĩkwagĩire na irio nyingĩ o nginya Josefu akĩremwo nĩgũcithima rĩngĩ; ciarĩ nyingĩ o ta mũthanga wa iriainĩ.
Genesis41:50 Mbere ya ng'aragu
Genesis41:51 Wa mbere aaciarwo nĩoigire atĩrĩ
Genesis41:52 Wa keerĩ aaciarwo akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis41:53 Mĩaka mũgwanja ya bũũthi bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri nĩyathirire
Genesis41:54 na mĩaka mũgwanja ya ng'aragu ĩkĩambĩrĩria o ta ũrĩa Josefu oigĩĩte. Mabũrũri marĩa mangĩ moothe nĩmaagĩire na ng'aragu
Genesis41:55 Rĩrĩa Amisiri maambĩrĩirie kũhũũta
Genesis41:56 Ng'aragu ĩgĩkĩneneha bũrũri wothe wa Misiri
Genesis41:57 Andũ nĩmookaga Misiri kuuma thĩ yothe kũgũra irio kuuma kũrĩ Josefu
Genesis42:1 Rĩrĩa Jakubu aamenyire atĩ Misiri nĩkwarĩ na irio
Genesis42:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Genesis42:3 Kwoguo aariũ a ithe na Josefu ikũmi magĩikũrũka Misiri kũgũra irio.
Genesis42:4 No Jakubu ndeetĩkĩrire gũtũma Benjamini mũrũ wa nyina na Josefu
Genesis42:5 Kwoguo aariũ a Jakubu magĩthiĩ kũgũra irio hamwe na andũ arĩa angĩ
Genesis42:6 Josefu nĩ we warĩ barũũthi wa bũrũri wothe wa Misiri; nĩ we wendagĩria andũ a kuuma thĩ yothe irio. Kwoguo aariũ a ithe magĩũka harĩ we

Genesis42:16 Ũmwe wanyu no nginyagia athiĩ amũgĩĩre
Genesis42:17 Nĩacookire akĩmaikia njeera mĩthenya ĩtatũ.
Genesis42:18 Mũthenya wa gatatũ Josefu akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis42:19 Angĩkorwo mũrĩ andũ ehokeku

Genesis43:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis43:2 Rĩrĩa andũ a mũciĩ wa Jakubu maarĩire irio iria ciarutĩĩtwo Misiri makĩniina
Genesis43:3 No Juda akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis43:4 Rĩu angĩkorwo nĩũgwĩtĩkĩra tũthiĩ hamwe na mũrũ wa baaba

Genesis43:6 Naake Jakubu akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis43:7 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Genesis43:8 Naake Juda akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis43:9 Nĩ niĩ ngũkarũũgamĩrĩra
Genesis43:10 Korwo tũtiahũthĩrĩirie ũhoro ũyũ
Genesis43:11 Naake ithe wao akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis43:12 Nĩngĩ mũkuue mbeeca maita meerĩ
Genesis43:13 Oyai mũrũ wa thooguo mũthiĩ.
Genesis43:14 Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe arotũma mũndũ ũcio amũiguĩre tha
Genesis43:15 Kwoguo aariũ acio a ithe ũmwe makĩoya iheeo
Genesis43:16 Rĩrĩa Josefu oonire Benjamini e hamwe nao
Genesis43:17 Ndungata ĩgĩgĩĩka ũguo yerirwo
Genesis43:18 Na rĩĩrĩ

Genesis43:20 “Mwathi witũ
Genesis43:21 na harĩa twaraarĩrĩire tũkĩinũka
Genesis43:22 na tuoka na mbeeca ingĩ cia kũgũra irio ingĩ. Ithuĩ tũtiũĩ nũũ wacookirie mbeeca icio makũniainĩ maitũ.”
Genesis43:23 Ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis43:24 Ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩtoonyia aariũ acio a ithe ũmwe nyũmba
Genesis43:25 Nao makĩhaarĩria iheeo cia kũnengera Josefu ooka hĩndĩ ya mĩaraho
Genesis43:26 Josefu akinya mũciĩ

Genesis43:28 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis43:29 Rĩrĩa Josefu oonire mũrũ wa nyina Benjamini akiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis43:30 Josefu agĩcooka akĩehera hau o hĩndĩ ĩyo amu ngoro yake nĩyaiyũrirwo nĩ gĩkeno nĩ ũndũ wa mũrũ wa nyina
Genesis43:31 Agĩcooka agĩĩthamba ũthiũ
Genesis43:32 Josefu agĩtwarĩrwo ciake handũ mwanya
Genesis43:33 Aariũ a ithe na Josefu maikarĩĩte mang'ethanĩire na Josefu
Genesis43:34 Maaheirwo irio kuuma meethainĩ ya Josefu
Genesis44:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis44:2 Ningĩ gĩkombe kĩrĩa gĩakwa kĩa betha
Genesis44:3 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũũciinĩ tene makĩĩrwo no makĩinũke na ndigiri ciao.
Genesis44:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis44:5 Mũiyĩte gĩkombe kĩa betha kĩa mũnene wakwa nĩkĩ? Nĩkĩo anyuaga nakĩo
Genesis44:6 Rĩrĩa ndungata ĩyo yamakinyĩrĩire
Genesis44:7 Nao makĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis44:8 Wee nĩũũĩ atĩ nĩtũracookirie kuuma Kanaani mbeeca iria tuonire mĩromoinĩ ya makũnia maitũ. Tũngĩkĩiya betha kana thahabu kuuma kwa mwathi waku nĩkĩ?
Genesis44:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Genesis44:10 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis44:11 Magĩkĩruta makũnia maao na ihenya makĩmaiga thĩ
Genesis44:12 Ndungata ya Josefu ĩgĩgĩcaria na kinyi
Genesis44:13 Aariũ a ithe magĩtarũranga nguo ciao nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha
Genesis44:14 Rĩrĩa Juda na aariũ a ithe maakinyire kwa Josefu
Genesis44:15 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Genesis44:16 Naake Juda akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis44:17 No Josefu akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis44:18 Juda agĩthiĩ harĩ Josefu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis44:19 Mwathi wakwa
Genesis44:20 Nĩtwagũcookeirie atĩrĩ
Genesis44:21 Mwathi wakwa
Genesis44:22 no ithuĩ tũgĩkwĩra atĩ kamwana kau gatingĩtiga ithe; kangĩmũtiga
Genesis44:23 Nĩwagĩtwĩrire atĩrĩ
Genesis44:24 “Rĩrĩa twacookire kũrĩ ithe witũ nĩtwamwĩrire ũguo woigire.
Genesis44:25 Nĩacookire agĩtwĩra tũũke tũgũre tũirio tũngĩ
Genesis44:26 na ithuĩ tũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis44:27 Ithe witũ aatwĩrire atĩrĩ
Genesis44:28 Ũmwe wao nĩandigire
Genesis44:29 Rĩu mwaruta ũyũ harĩ niĩ
Genesis44:30 “Mwathi wakwa
Genesis44:31 no gũkua egũkua oona gatarĩ hamwe na ithuĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis44:32 Ũndũ ũngĩ nĩ atĩ
Genesis44:33 Mwathi wakwa
Genesis44:34 Niĩ-rĩ
Genesis45:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis45:2 Josefu nĩagirĩkire oigĩrĩirie o nginya Amisiri makĩigua me nja
Genesis45:3 Josefu agĩkĩĩra aariũ a ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis45:4 Josefu agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis45:5 Rĩu mũtigaakĩigue ũũru kana mwĩmene atĩ tondũ nĩmwanyendirie gũũkũ; nĩ Ngai wandũmire mbere yanyu nĩguo ngaahonokia mĩoyo ya andũ.
Genesis45:6 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Genesis45:7 Ngai nĩ we wandũmire njũke gũũkũ mbere yanyu ndĩmũhonokie na njĩra ĩno ya magegania
Genesis45:8 Kwoguo ti inyuĩ mwandũmire njũke gũũkũ; nĩ Ngai wandũmire. Nĩanduire mũnjaama ũrĩa mũnene mũno wa mũthamaki wa Misiri. Nĩ niĩ mũrori wa mũciĩ wake wothe
Genesis45:9 “Rĩu cookaai kũrĩ baaba narua mũmwĩre mũũrũwe Josefu ekuuga atĩrĩ
Genesis45:10 Woka ũrĩtũũraga mwena wa Gosheni
Genesis45:11 Ũngĩkorwo wĩ Gosheni-rĩ
Genesis45:12 Josefu nĩathiire na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis45:13 Gĩthiĩi mwĩre baaba ũrĩa niĩ ndĩ na ũhoti gũũkũ Misiri
Genesis45:14 Nĩacookire akĩhĩmbĩria mũrũ wa nyina Benjamini na akĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra; o naake Benjamini akĩmũhĩmbĩria akĩrĩraga.
Genesis45:15 O akĩrĩraga
Genesis45:16 Rĩrĩa ũhoro wakinyire kwa mũthamaki wa Misiri atĩ aariũ a ithe na Josefu nĩmookĩĩte
Genesis45:17 Naake mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ
Genesis45:18 Mooe ithe wanyu o na andũ a mĩciĩ yao
Genesis45:19 Meere mathiĩ na makaari ma mbarathi kuuma Misiri magakuue atumia aao o na twana tũrĩa tũniini
Genesis45:20 Matikaae gũtindanĩrĩra na indo ciao
Genesis45:21 Aariũ acio a Jakubu magĩĩka ũguo meerirwo. Josefu nĩamaneire makaari ma mbarathi ta ũguo mũthamaki aathanĩĩte
Genesis45:22 Ningĩ nĩamaheire nguo cia gũcenjania
Genesis45:23 Nĩatũmĩire ithe ndigiri ikũmi ikuuĩĩte indo iria njega mũno cia Misiri
Genesis45:24 Agĩkiugĩra aariũ a ithe ũhoro
Genesis45:25 Nao magĩkiuma Misiri magĩcooka mũciĩ kũrĩ ithe wao Jakubu bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani.
Genesis45:26 Magĩkĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis45:27 No mamwĩra ũhoro wothe ũrĩa Josefu aameerĩĩte
Genesis45:28 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Genesis46:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis46:2 Ũtukũ Ngai nĩamwarĩirie na kĩoneki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis46:3 Naake Ngai agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis46:4 Nĩngũthiĩ hamwe nawe Misiri
Genesis46:5 Jakubu agĩkĩnyiita rũgendo kuuma Beerisheba
Genesis46:6 Magĩgĩkuua mahiũ maao na indo iria maagĩĩte nacio kũu Kanaani
Genesis46:7 ũguo nĩkuuga: aariũ aake
Genesis46:8 Andũ a mũciĩ wa Jakubu arĩa maathiire naake Misiri nĩ: mũũrũwe wa irigithaathi Reubeni
Genesis46:9 na aariũ aake Hanoku
Genesis46:10 Simeoni na aariũ aake Jemueli
Genesis46:11 Lawi na aariũ aake Gerishoni
Genesis46:12 Juda na aariũ aake Shela
Genesis46:13 Isakaru na aariũ aake Tola
Genesis46:14 Zebuluni na aariũ aake Seredi
Genesis46:15 Acio nĩ o aariũ a Jakubu arĩa aaciarĩirwo nĩ Lea bũrũriinĩ wa Mesopotamia
Genesis46:16 Nao arĩa angĩ nĩ Gadi na aariũ aake Zefoni
Genesis46:17 Asheri na aariũ aake Imuna
Genesis46:18 Andũ acio ikũmi na atandatũ nĩ o maarĩ rũciaro rwa Jakubu rwa kuuma harĩ Zilipa
Genesis46:19 Mũtumia wa Jakubu ũrĩa wetagwo Rakeli aamũciarĩire aariũ eerĩ Josefu na Benjamini.
Genesis46:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis46:21 Naake Benjamini na aariũ aake Bela
Genesis46:22 Andũ acio ikũmi na ana nĩ o rũciaro rwa Jakubu kuuma harĩ Rakeli.
Genesis46:23 Naake Dani aarĩ na mũũriũ wetagwo Hushimu.
Genesis46:24 Naake Nafutali na aariũ aake Jahazeeli
Genesis46:25 Andũ acio mũgwanja nĩ o njiarwa cia Jakubu kuuma harĩ Biliha
Genesis46:26 Andũ oothe a rũciaro rwa Jakubu arĩa maathiire Misiri maarĩ mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na atandatũ
Genesis46:27 Naake Josefu nĩaciarĩirwo aariũ eerĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri
Genesis46:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis46:29 Josefu akĩoya ngaari yake ya mbarathi
Genesis46:30 Naake Jakubu agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ
Genesis46:31 Josefu agĩkĩĩra aariũ a ithe na andũ acio angĩ a mũciĩ wao atĩrĩ
Genesis46:32 Ngũmwĩra atĩ inyuĩ mũrĩ arĩithi
Genesis46:33 Mũthamaki wa Misiri aamwĩta amũũrie mũrutaga wĩra ũrĩkũ
Genesis46:34 mũmwĩre atĩrĩ
Genesis47:1 Kwoguo Josefu akĩoya aariũ a ithe ataano agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri
Genesis47:2 Agĩcooka akĩmenyithania aariũ acio ataano a ithe kũrĩ mũthamaki.
Genesis47:3 Mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Genesis47:4 Tũthaamĩire bũrũriinĩ ũyũ nĩ tondũ bũrũri wa Kanaani wĩ na ng'aragu nene mũno
Genesis47:5 Naake mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ
Genesis47:6 bũrũri wa Misiri nĩ wao; kwoguo reke maikare Gosheni
Genesis47:7 Josefu nĩacookire agĩtoonyia ithe Jakubu
Genesis47:8 Mũthamaki wa Misiri nĩamũũririe atĩrĩ
Genesis47:9 Naake Jakubu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Genesis47:10 Jakubu akĩraathima mũthamaki wa Misiri
Genesis47:11 Josefu nĩagĩthiire akĩhe ithe na aariũ a ithe ũtũũro bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri
Genesis47:12 Josefu nĩaheaga ithe irio
Genesis47:13 Ng'aragu nĩyanenehire o nginya kũndũ guothe gũkĩaga irio
Genesis47:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis47:15 Rĩrĩa mbeeca ciothe cia bũrũri wa Misiri na bũrũri wa Kanaani ciathirire
Genesis47:16 Naake Josefu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Genesis47:17 Nĩmaakĩreeheire Josefu mahiũ maao
Genesis47:18 Mwaka ũyũ ũngĩ nĩmookire kũrĩ we makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis47:19 Tũgũgĩkua nĩkĩ ũtwĩroreire? Tũnengere irio ũtũgũre hamwe na ithaka ciitũ. Ithuĩ eene tũgĩtuĩke ngombo cia mũthamaki
Genesis47:20 Kwoguo Josefu akĩgũrĩra mũthamaki wa Misiri ithaka ciothe. Amisiri oothe nĩmeendirie ithaka ciao ciothe amu ng'aragu nĩyanenehire mũno; naguo bũrũri wothe ũgĩgĩtuĩka wa mũthamaki.
Genesis47:21 Nao andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ Misiri
Genesis47:22 Ithaka iria ataagũrire no cia athĩnjĩri Ngai ciiki
Genesis47:23 Josefu agĩkĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Genesis47:24 Magetha maakinya
Genesis47:25 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis47:26 Kwoguo Josefu akĩhĩtũkia watho bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri atĩ irio ciagethwo
Genesis47:27 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩtũũra bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri mwena wa Gosheni
Genesis47:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis47:29 Ihinda rĩake rĩa gũkua rĩakuhĩrĩria
Genesis47:30 Ndakua
Genesis47:31 Naake Jakubu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis48:1 Thuutha ũcio

Genesis48:3 Jakubu agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ
Genesis48:4 Aanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ
Genesis48:5 “Aariũ aaku eerĩ Efiraimu na Manase
Genesis48:6 Ũngĩgaaciarĩrwo aariũ angĩ thuutha wa acio
Genesis48:7 Ndĩreeka ũguo tondũ wa maitũguo Rakeli. Ndĩ na kĩeha ngiuga atĩ aakuĩrĩire bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani
Genesis48:8 Rĩrĩa Jakubu oonire aariũ a Josefu akĩũria atĩrĩ
Genesis48:9 Naake Josefu akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis48:10 Maitho ma Jakubu nĩmaambĩrĩirie kũũra nĩ ũndũ wa gũkũra
Genesis48:11 Jakubu agĩkĩĩra Josefu atĩrĩ
Genesis48:12 Naake Josefu akĩeheria ciana icio kuuma cieroinĩ cia ithe Jakubu
Genesis48:13 Josefu agĩcooka akĩnyiita Efiraimu na guoko kwa ũrĩo
Genesis48:14 No rĩĩrĩ

Genesis48:16 Mũraika ũrĩa ũhonokeetie kuuma mĩtinoinĩ yothe
Genesis48:17 Rĩrĩa Josefu oonire ithe aigĩrĩire guoko gwake kwa ũrĩo mũtweinĩ wa Efiraimu
Genesis48:18 Josefu akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ

Genesis48:22 Wee
Genesis49:1 Ningĩ Jakubu agĩĩta aariũ aake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis49:2 “Aariũ a Jakubu cookanĩrĩraai hamwe mũigue; tegeraai ithe wanyu Isiraeli matũ.
Genesis49:3 “Wee Reubeni-rĩ
Genesis49:4 Wee wagaagĩĩte o ta maaĩ me irũtũinĩ; ndũrĩ hĩndĩ ũgaakĩra arĩa angĩ
Genesis49:5 “Simeoni na Lawi nĩ a nyina ũmwe; mahũthagĩra indo cia mbaara makaruta ngũĩ.
Genesis49:6 Niĩ-rĩ
Genesis49:7 Maraakara maao maronyiitwo nĩ kĩrumi
Genesis49:8 “Wee Juda-rĩ
Genesis49:9 “Juda ahaana ta mũrũũthi
Genesis49:10 Mũthĩĩgi wa ũnene
Genesis49:11 Oohaga njaũ yake ya ndigiri mũthabibũinĩ
Genesis49:12 Maitho maake nĩ matuune nĩ ũndũ wa kũnyua ndibei
Genesis49:13 “Zebuluni agaatũũra ndeereinĩ cia iria; ndeere ciake nĩcio igaatuĩka icukĩro cia meeri; mũhaka wake ũgaakorwo Sidoni.
Genesis49:14 “Isakaru ahaana ndigiri ĩremeetwo nĩgũũkĩra nĩ ũrĩa ĩkuuithĩĩtio mĩrigo mĩritũ.
Genesis49:15 No rĩĩrĩ
Genesis49:16 “Dani nĩagaatha andũ aao
Genesis49:17 Dani agaatuĩka ta nyoka ĩ mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra; agaatuĩka ta nyoka ĩ thumu ĩ mũkĩrainĩ wa gacĩra
Genesis49:18 “Njetereire ũhonokio waku
Genesis49:19 “Gadi nĩagaatharĩkĩrwo nĩ ikundi cia atuunyani
Genesis49:20 “Mĩgũnda ya Asheri-rĩ
Genesis49:21 “Nafutali ahaana thwariga ĩratũũhatũũha
Genesis49:22 “Josefu ahaana ta rũhonge rũrĩa rũciaraga wega; ahaana ta rũhonge rũrĩa rũciaraga wega rwĩ rũteereinĩ rwa gĩthima; honge ciake itaambaga rũthingo igũrũ.
Genesis49:23 Thũ ciake nĩciamũtharĩkĩire i na ũũru mũingĩ mũno
Genesis49:24 No ũta wake ũgĩikara wĩgaathĩĩte
Genesis49:25 Nĩ Ngai wa thooguo ũrĩgũteithagia; Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ we ũrĩkũraathimaga na iraathimo cia mbura kuuma igũrũ
Genesis49:26 Ningĩ nĩarĩkũraathimaga na iraathimo cia irio na mahũa
Genesis49:27 “Benjamini naake ahaana ta njũũi njũru mũno; rũũciinĩ na hwaĩinĩ ooragaga na akarĩa.”
Genesis49:28 Ĩyo nĩ yo mĩhĩrĩga ĩrĩa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya Isiraeli
Genesis49:29 Jakubu agĩcooka agĩatha aariũ aake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis49:30 Ngurunga ĩyo ĩ Makipela
Genesis49:31 Kũu nĩkuo Aburahamu na mũtumia wake Sara maathikirwo; nokuo Isaaka na mũtumia wake Rebeka maathikirwo
Genesis49:32 Mũgũnda ũcio na ngurunga ĩyo ciagũrirwo kuuma kũrĩ Ahiti.”
Genesis49:33 Rĩrĩa Jakubu aarĩĩkirie kwarĩria aariũ aake
Genesis50:1 Naake Josefu agĩkĩĩgũithia harĩ ithe akĩrĩraga
Genesis50:2 Agĩcooka agĩatha mandagĩtaarĩ marĩa maamutungatagĩra moomithie mwĩrĩ wa ithe.
Genesis50:3 Maaniinire matukũ mĩrongo ĩna kũũmithia mwĩrĩ ũcio. Matukũ mĩrongo ĩna no mo maagĩrĩire gwĩka ũguo. Nao andũ a Misiri maamũcakaĩire matukũ mĩrongo mũgwanja.
Genesis50:4 Matukũ ma gũcakaya mathira
Genesis50:5 ‘Baaba atanakua nĩanjĩĩrire ndĩhĩte atĩ ngaamũthika mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ĩrĩa aathondekeete bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani. Kwoguo ndagũthaitha reke thiĩ ngathike baaba
Genesis50:6 Naake mũthamaki agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Genesis50:7 Kwoguo Josefu akĩambata gũthika ithe. Anjaama oothe a mũthamaki
Genesis50:8 O na andũ a mũciĩ wa Josefu
Genesis50:9 Ningĩ nĩathiire na thigari ciakuuĩĩtwo nĩ ngaari cia mbarathi
Genesis50:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Genesis50:11 Rĩrĩa andũ a Kanaani moonire andũ acio magĩcakaya me Atadi
Genesis50:12 Kwoguo aariũ a Jakubu makĩmwĩka o ta ũrĩa aameerĩĩte.
Genesis50:13 Magĩgĩkuua mwĩrĩ wake makĩũtwara Kanaani makĩũthika ngurungainĩ ya mũgũnda ũrĩa warĩ Makipela
Genesis50:14 Josefu arĩĩkia gũthika ithe
Genesis50:15 Thuutha wa gĩkuũ gĩa ithe
Genesis50:16 Kwoguo magĩtũma ndũmĩrĩri kũrĩ Josefu makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis50:17 aatwĩrire tũkwĩre atĩrĩ
Genesis50:18 Aariũ a ithe o eene nĩmaacookire magĩũka makĩĩgũithia mbere yake makĩhuutithia ũthiũ thĩ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Genesis50:19 No Josefu akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Genesis50:20 Inyuĩ mwaciirĩĩte mũnjĩke ũũru
Genesis50:21 Kwoguo inyuĩ mũtiagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩtigĩra. Niĩ nĩngũmũmenyerera o hamwe na ciana cianyu.” Kwoguo akĩmoomĩrĩria o rĩngĩ na akĩmahooreria.
Genesis50:22 Josefu nĩathiire na mbere gũtũũra bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri hamwe na andũ a mũciĩ wa ithe
Genesis50:23 Josefu nĩatũũrire nginya akĩona ciana cia Efiraimu
Genesis50:24 Josefu nĩerire aariũ a ithe atĩrĩ
Genesis50:25 Josefu nĩacookire akĩĩra andũ aake atĩrĩ
Genesis50:26 Josefu aakuĩrĩire Misiri e wa mĩaka igana na ikũmi. Mwĩrĩ wake nĩmaaũmithirie makĩwĩkĩra ithandũkũ.

Exodus1:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Exodus1:12 No o ũrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maahinyagĩrĩrio
Exodus1:13 Kwoguo makĩrutithia andũ a Isiraeli wĩra na hinya mũno
Exodus1:14 o na makĩmaritũhĩria ũtũũro mũno na ũndũ wa kũmarutithia wĩra wa hinya wa gũthondeka thimiti na maturubaarĩ
Exodus1:15 Mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩcooka akĩarĩria Shifira na Pua

Exodus1:18 Kwoguo mũthamaki agĩtũmanĩra atumia acio a gũciarithania akĩmooria atĩrĩ

Exodus2:3 Rĩrĩa aaremirwo nĩgũthiĩ na mbere gũkahitha
Exodus2:4 Naake mwarĩ wa nyina na kaana kau akĩrũũgama haraaya nĩguo oone ũrĩa gũgũtuĩka igũrũ rĩako.

Exodus2:8 Naake mwarĩ wa mũthamaki akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus2:9 Naake mwarĩ wa mũthamaki akĩĩra mũtumia ũcio atĩrĩ

Exodus2:13 Na rĩĩrĩ

Exodus2:15 (15-16) Rĩrĩa mũthamaki aiguire ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte
Exodus2:16 No arĩithi magĩũka makĩmaingata. Naake Musa akĩrũũgama akĩmateithĩrĩria
Exodus2:17 Rĩrĩa airĩĩtu acio maacookire kũrĩ ithe wao
Exodus2:18 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus2:19 Naake ithe akĩmooria atĩrĩ

Exodus2:22 Thuutha wa mĩaka mĩingĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩkua. Nao andũ a Isiraeli no macaayaga marĩ ũkomboinĩ na magakaya mateithio. Nakĩo kĩrĩro kĩao gĩgĩkinyĩra Ngai
Exodus2:23 akĩigua mũcaayo wao
Exodus2:24 Naake Ngai akĩona ũkombo wa andũ a Isiraeli

Exodus3:2 Arĩ kũu
Exodus3:3 Naake Musa akĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ

Exodus3:5 Ngai akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus3:6 Agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus3:7 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus3:8 na kwoguo nĩnjikũrũkĩĩte ndĩmahonokie kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Misiri. Ngũmaruta bũrũri wa Misiri ndĩmatware bũrũriinĩ mwariĩ
Exodus3:9 Ti itherũ kĩrĩro kĩa andũ a Isiraeli nĩkĩnginyĩire
Exodus3:10 Rĩu nĩngũgũtũma kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri nĩ geetha ũgatongorie andũ aakwa moime bũrũriinĩ ũcio.”
Exodus3:11 No Musa akĩũria Ngai atĩrĩ
Exodus3:12 Naake Ngai akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus3:13 No Musa agĩcookeria Ngai atĩrĩ
Exodus3:14 Naake Ngai akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus3:15 Ningĩ Ngai akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus3:16 Thiĩ ũcookanĩrĩrie atongoria oothe a Isiraeli ũmeere atĩ
Exodus3:17 Nĩnduĩte atĩ nĩngũmaruta moime mĩnyamaaroinĩ ĩrĩa marathĩĩnio nayo bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri
Exodus3:18 “Nao nĩmagaathikĩrĩria ũrĩa ũkaameera. Ningĩ nĩũgaacooka ũthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri ũrĩ hamwe na atongoria a Isiraeli ũmwĩre atĩrĩ
Exodus3:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Exodus3:20 No nĩngaahũthĩra hinya wakwa herithie bũrũri wa Misiri na ũndũ wa gwĩka maũndũ ma kũguoyohia kuo. Thuutha wa maũndũ macio
Exodus3:21 “Nĩngaatũma andũ a Misiri matĩĩe andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus3:22 Mũtumia Mũisiraeli o wothe nĩagaathiĩ kũrĩ Mũmisiri ũrĩa marigainie
Exodus4:1 Ningĩ Musa agĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ

Exodus4:5 MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

Exodus4:8 MWATHANI agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus4:9 Mangĩkĩrega gwĩtĩkia o na ũira wa ciama icio cierĩ
Exodus4:10 No Musa akĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Exodus4:11 MWATHANI agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Exodus4:12 Rĩu gĩthiĩ! Nĩngũgũteithĩrĩria kwaria na nĩngũgũtaara ũrĩa ũkuuga.”
Exodus4:13 No Musa agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus4:14 MWATHANI agĩkĩraakarĩra Musa akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Exodus4:15 Mwarĩrie na ũmũtaare ũrĩa ekuuga; nĩngũmũteithĩrĩria inyuĩ eerĩ kwaria na ndĩmũtaare ũrĩa mũgwĩka.
Exodus4:16 Nĩ we ũgũtuĩka wa kwaragĩria andũ handũ haaku
Exodus4:17 Oya mũthĩĩgi ũyũ ũthiĩ naguo
Exodus4:18 Naake Musa agĩcooka kũrĩ Jethero
Exodus4:19 Naake Musa arĩ o kũu bũrũriinĩ wa Midiani
Exodus4:20 Kwoguo Musa agĩkĩoya mũtumia wake na aariũ aake
Exodus4:21 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus4:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũkaamwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus4:23 Ndakwĩra atĩ ũreke mũũriũ wakwa athiĩ nĩ geetha agaathaathaiye. Ũngĩrega kũmwĩtĩkĩria athiĩ
Exodus4:24 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus4:25 (25-26) Zipora agĩkĩoya kahiga kahaanaga rũenji
Exodus4:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus4:27 Naake Musa agĩgĩtaarĩria Harũni ũhoro wothe ũrĩa MWATHANI aamũheete rĩrĩa aamwĩrire acooke Misiri. O na ningĩ nĩamũtaarĩirie ũhoro wa ciama iria MWATHANI aamwathĩĩte aringe.
Exodus4:28 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩgĩthiĩ Misiri
Exodus4:29 Harũni akĩmahe ũhoro wothe ũrĩa MWATHANI eerĩĩte Musa
Exodus4:30 Nao andũ magĩĩtĩkia. Rĩrĩa maiguire atĩ MWATHANI nĩokĩĩte kũmarora
Exodus5:1 Musa na Harũni magĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus5:2 No mũthamaki akĩũria atĩrĩ
Exodus5:3 Nao Musa na Harũni magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus5:4 No mũthamaki akĩũria Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus5:5 Inyuĩ andũ aya nĩmũingĩhĩĩte gũkĩra andũ a Misiri
Exodus5:6 Mũthenya o ro ũcio
Exodus5:7 “Mũtigaacooke kũhe andũ rũũa rwa ngano rwa gũthondeka maturubaarĩ naruo; kuuma rĩu rekeei mathiage gwĩcarĩria o eene.
Exodus5:8 No mũigana wa maturubaarĩ marĩa marĩthondekaga ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ o ta wa mbere. Mũtikaamanyiihĩrie o na haniini
Exodus5:9 Nĩmaheeo wĩra mũritũ makĩria ũrĩa makoragwo makĩruta nĩguo matigaacooke kũrũmbũyania na ũhoro wa maheeni.”
Exodus5:10 Kwoguo akabuurũ na anyabaara magĩthiĩ kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus5:11 Mũrĩthiaga mũkarũcaria o kũrĩa mũngĩhota kũruona
Exodus5:12 Kwoguo andũ magĩkĩũrũũra Misiri guothe gũcaria rũũa.
Exodus5:13 Nao akabuurũ no maamahatagĩrĩria mathondeke o mũthenya mũigana wa maturubaarĩ o ta ũrĩa maathondekaga hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maaheagwo rũũa.
Exodus5:14 Nao akabuurũ a Misiri makĩhũũra anyabaara a andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maigĩĩte marũũgamagĩrĩre wĩra makĩmooragia atĩrĩ
Exodus5:15 Anyabaara acio a andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩthiĩ magĩkaĩra mũthamaki makiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus5:16 Tũtiraheeo rũũa
Exodus5:17 No mũthamaki akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus5:18 Rĩu cookaai mũkarute wĩra! Gũtirĩ rũũa mũkũheeo
Exodus5:19 Anyabaara acio a andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩona atĩ maarĩ thĩĩnainĩ rĩrĩa meerirwo atĩ o mũthenya no mũhaka mathondekage mũigana wa maturubaarĩ o ta ũrĩa marathondekaga mbere ĩyo.
Exodus5:20 Na rĩĩrĩ

Exodus5:22 Musa agĩkĩhũgũkĩra MWATHANI rĩngĩ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Exodus5:23 Kuuma rĩrĩa ndathiire kũrĩ mũthamaki kũmwarĩria thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku

Exodus6:4 Ningĩ nĩndathondekire kĩrĩĩkanĩro nao atĩ nĩngaamahe bũrũri wa Kanaani
Exodus6:5 Rĩu nĩnjiguĩte mũcaayo wa andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maigĩĩtwo ũkomboinĩ nĩ andũ a Misiri

Exodus6:7 Nĩngũmũtua andũ aakwa

Exodus6:13 No MWATHANI agĩatha Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ

Exodus6:25 Naake Eleazaru

Exodus7:1 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus7:2 Wee ũrĩĩraga Harũni maũndũ moothe marĩa ndĩrĩgwathaga
Exodus7:3 (3-4) No nĩngũũmia mũthamaki wa Misiri ngoro
Exodus7:4 Andũ a Misiri nĩmagaakĩmenya atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI
Exodus7:5 Nao Musa na Harũni magĩgĩĩka o ũrĩa MWATHANI aamaathĩĩte.
Exodus7:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarĩirie mũthamaki wa Misiri
Exodus7:7 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus7:8 “Mũthamaki wa Misiri angĩmwĩra mũringe kĩama nĩguo mwonanie atĩ mũrĩ a ma-rĩ
Exodus7:9 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aamaathĩĩte. Harũni agĩikia mũthĩĩgi wake thĩ mbere ya mũthamaki na njaama ciake
Exodus7:10 Mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta andũ aake arĩa oogĩ na ago
Exodus7:11 Magĩgĩikia mĩthĩĩgi yao thĩ
Exodus7:12 O na gwatuĩka ũguo
Exodus7:13 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus7:14 Kwoguo thiĩ ũmũtũnge kĩrooko hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arathiĩ rũũĩinĩ rwa Nailo
Exodus7:15 Nawe ũkĩmwĩre atĩrĩ
Exodus7:16 MWATHANI egũkiuga atĩ ũndũ ũrĩa ũgũkũmenyithia atĩ we nĩ we MWATHANI nĩ atĩ
Exodus7:17 Nacio thamaki nĩigũkua
Exodus7:18 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus7:19 Musa na Harũni magĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa maathĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI. Harũni akĩoya mũthĩĩgi wake na igũrũ akĩgũtha maaĩ ma rũũĩ rwa Nailo
Exodus7:20 Nacio thamaki iria ciarĩ rũũĩ igĩkua
Exodus7:21 No ago a Misiri magĩĩka o ta ũguo na ũgo wao; kwoguo mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩthiĩ na mbere kũũmia ngoro
Exodus7:22 Handũ ha ũguo
Exodus7:23 Nao andũ oothe a Misiri makĩenja hũgũrũrũinĩ cia rũũĩ nĩguo moone maaĩ ma kũnyua nĩ amu matingĩahotire kũnyua maaĩ ma rũũĩ rwa Nailo.
Exodus7:24 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus8:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus8:2 No rĩĩrĩ
Exodus8:3 Rũũĩ rwa Nailo rũkũiyũra ciũra iria igũũka nginya nyũmba gwaku o na nginya nyũmba yaku ya toro
Exodus8:4 Ciũra icio irĩkũrũũgagĩrĩra igatamba mwĩrĩ waku
Exodus8:5 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus8:6 Kwoguo Harũni agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake igũrũ rĩa maaĩ moothe na cio ciũra ikiumĩra ikĩiyũra bũrũri wothe wa Misiri.
Exodus8:7 No ago magĩĩka o ta ũguo na ũgo wao
Exodus8:8 Mũthamaki wa Misiri agĩgĩĩta Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus8:9 Musa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus8:10 Naake mũthamaki agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus8:11 Ciũra nĩigũkweherera
Exodus8:12 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩkiuma kwa mũthamaki
Exodus8:13 Naake MWATHANI agĩĩka ũrĩa Musa aamũũrĩĩtie
Exodus8:14 Nao andũ a Misiri magĩcicookereria irũndo nene
Exodus8:15 No rĩrĩa mũthamaki oonire atĩ ciũra nĩirĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua
Exodus8:16 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus8:17 Kwoguo Harũni agĩgĩtambũrũkia mũthĩĩgi wake akĩgũtha rũkũngũ rwa thĩ
Exodus8:18 Nao ago makĩgeria gwĩka o ta ũguo na ũgo wao atĩ matũme rwagĩ rũgĩe
Exodus8:19 Nao ago acio makĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Exodus8:20 MWATHANI agĩkĩarĩria Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus8:21 Waga kũreka mathiĩ-rĩ
Exodus8:22 No nĩngũgitĩra mwena wa Gosheni
Exodus8:23 Na njĩra ĩyo
Exodus8:24 Naake MWATHANI agĩĩka o ro ũguo; gũgĩũka mĩrumbĩ mĩnene ya ngi thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki
Exodus8:25 Mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus8:26 No Musa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus8:27 No mũhaka tũthiĩ rũgendo rwa mĩthenya ĩtatũ werũinĩ
Exodus8:28 Kwoguo mũthamaki agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus8:29 Naake Musa agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus8:30 Musa agĩkiuma harĩ mũthamaki na akĩhooya MWATHANI.
Exodus8:31 Naake MWATHANI agĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Musa aamũũririe
Exodus8:32 No o na hĩndĩ ĩyo
Exodus9:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus9:2 Amu wamagiria rĩngĩ mathiĩ
Exodus9:3 nĩngũkũherithia na ũndũ wa kũreehithĩria ũhiũ waku
Exodus9:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus9:5 Niĩ MWATHANI
Exodus9:6 Mũthenya ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire
Exodus9:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus9:8 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus9:9 Naguo mũhu ũcio nĩũgũtuĩka rũkũngũ rũceke rũiyũre bũrũri wothe wa Misiri
Exodus9:10 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni makĩoya mũhu kuuma riiko
Exodus9:11 Nao ago matingĩahotire kũrũũgama mbere ya Musa
Exodus9:12 No MWATHANI agĩtũma mũthamaki oomie ngoro
Exodus9:13 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus9:14 Nĩ amu ihinda rĩĩrĩ to njaama ciaku na andũ aaku ngũherithia
Exodus9:15 Nĩ amu-rĩ
Exodus9:16 No kĩrĩa gĩtũmĩĩte ngũtũũrie muoyo nĩguo nguonie hinya wakwa
Exodus9:17 Wee no gwĩtũũgĩria ũretũũgĩria mbere ya andũ aakwa
Exodus9:18 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Exodus9:19 Kwoguo-rĩ
Exodus9:20 Anjaama amwe a mũthamaki nĩmeetigĩrire nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo MWATHANI oigire
Exodus9:21 No arĩa mataathikĩrĩirie ũguo MWATHANI oigire
Exodus9:22 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus9:23 Kwoguo Musa akĩambararia mũthĩĩgi wake aũroreetie na igũrũ; naake MWATHANI akĩreehithia marurumĩ na mbura ya mbembe
Exodus9:24 mbura nene mũno ya mbembe
Exodus9:25 Mbura ĩyo ya mbembe ĩgĩkĩhũũra kĩndũ gĩothe kĩrĩa gĩtaarĩ kĩgitĩre bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri
Exodus9:26 Kũrĩa gũtoirire mbura ya mbembe no mwena wa Gosheni kũrĩa Aisiraeli matũũraga.
Exodus9:27 Mũthamaki agĩtũmanĩra Musa na Harũni. Rĩrĩa mookire akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus9:28 Thaithaai MWATHANI! Tũtikwenda rĩngĩ mbura ĩno ya mbembe na marurumĩ! Rĩu nĩngũmũrekereria mũthiĩ; mũtigũikara gũũkũ rĩngĩ.”
Exodus9:29 Naake Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus9:30 No nĩnjũũĩ atĩ o na rĩu wee hamwe na njaama ciaku mũtitĩĩĩte MWATHANI Ngai.”
Exodus9:31 Ũguta na mbaarĩ nĩcio ciathũũkirio nĩ gũkorwo mbaarĩ yarĩ ngũrũ
Exodus9:32 No ngano ndĩathũũkirio
Exodus9:33 Musa agĩkiuma nja ya itũũra akĩeherera mũthamaki
Exodus9:34 No rĩĩrĩ
Exodus9:35 Mũthamaki oomirie ngoro o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte na kanua ka Musa
Exodus10:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus10:2 Ningĩ njĩkĩĩte ũguo nĩ geetha mũkaahota kũhe ciana cianyu na ciana cia ciana cianyu ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa njĩkĩĩte Misiri
Exodus10:3 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩthiĩ kwa mũthamaki makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus10:4 Wathiĩ na mbere kũmagiria mathiĩ
Exodus10:5 Ikaahumbĩra thĩ ũguo atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkaahota kuona tĩĩri. Ningĩ nĩikaarĩa kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩtaathũũkangirio nĩ mbura ya mbembe
Exodus10:6 Nacio nĩikaiyũra nyũmba ciaku
Exodus10:7 Nacio njaama cia mũthamaki ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus10:8 Kwoguo Musa na Harũni magĩkĩreehwo rĩngĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki
Exodus10:9 Naake Musa agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus10:10 Naake mũthamaki akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus10:11 Aaca! Gũtingĩhoteka ũguo! Arũme oiki nĩmathiĩ magathaathaiye MWATHANI
Exodus10:12 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus10:13 Kwoguo Musa akĩambararia mũthĩĩgi wake
Exodus10:14 Nacio ngigĩ icio igĩũka irĩ mĩrumbĩ mĩingĩ mũno ĩkĩiyũra bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Misiri. Ciarĩ nyingĩ ũguo atĩ gũtirĩ kwagĩa mĩrumbĩ ta ĩyo
Exodus10:15 Ciahumbĩrire thĩ yothe ikĩmĩkunĩkĩra o biũ
Exodus10:16 Mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta Musa na Harũni na ihenya akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus10:17 Kĩnjohereei rĩĩhia rĩakwa riita o rĩĩrĩ rĩmwe tu
Exodus10:18 Musa akĩehera harĩ mũthamaki
Exodus10:19 Naake MWATHANI akĩgarũra rũhuuho rwa mwena wa irathĩro
Exodus10:20 No MWATHANI akĩũmia ngoro ya mũthamaki akĩrega gwĩtĩkĩria Aisiraeli mathiĩ.
Exodus10:21 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus10:22 Musa agĩgĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake akũroreetie igũrũ
Exodus10:23 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wahotaga kuona ũrĩa ũngĩ
Exodus10:24 Mũthamaki agĩgĩĩta Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus10:25 No Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus10:26 Ũhiũ witũ no mũhaka tũthiĩ naguo; gũtirĩ nyamũ o na ĩmwe ya ũhiũ witũ ĩgũtigwo. Ithuĩ eene nĩ ithuĩ tũgwĩthuurĩra kĩrĩa tũkwenda gĩa gũthaathaiya MWATHANI Ngai witũ nakĩo. Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus10:27 No MWATHANI akĩũmia ngoro ya mũthamaki
Exodus10:28 Mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus10:29 Naake Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus11:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus11:2 Rĩu kĩarĩrie andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere meetie andũ arĩa marigainie nao indo cia thahabu o na cia betha.”
Exodus11:3 Naake MWATHANI agĩtũma andũ a Isiraeli meetĩkĩrĩke nĩ andũ a Misiri. O na njaama cia mũthamaki na andũ oothe a Misiri nĩmoonaga Musa arĩ mũndũ wa bata mũno.
Exodus11:4 Musa agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Exodus11:5 na marigithaathi moothe ma tũhĩĩ bũrũriinĩ ũyũ wa Misiri nĩmegũkua
Exodus11:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus11:7 No rĩĩrĩ
Exodus11:8 Musa akĩrĩĩkia na kuuga atĩrĩ
Exodus11:9 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus11:10 Musa na Harũni maaringire ciama icio ciothe mbere ya mũthamaki
Exodus12:1 MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa na Harũni marĩ o kũu bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus12:2 “Mweri ũyũ nĩguo ũgaatuĩka mweri wanyu wa mbere wa mwaka.
Exodus12:3 Ĩra andũ oothe a Isiraeli atĩ: Mũthenya wa ikũmi wa mweri ũyũ wakinya-rĩ
Exodus12:4 Angĩkorwo mũciĩ wa mũndũ nĩ mũniini ũguo atĩ ndũngĩhota kũniina gatũrũme goothe
Exodus12:5 Gatũrũme kau no mũhaka mũgathuure kuuma rũũruinĩ rwa ng'ondu kana rwa mbũri
Exodus12:6 Mũkaiga tũtũrũme tũu nginya hwaĩinĩ wa mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri ũyũ
Exodus12:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus12:8 Nyama ciatuo ikaahĩĩhio ũtukũ o ro ũcio
Exodus12:9 Mũtikaanarĩe nyama o na ĩmwe ya tũtũrũme tũu ĩrĩ njĩthĩ kana ĩtherũkĩĩtio na maaĩ; mũgaatũrĩa tũhĩĩhĩĩtio tuothe
Exodus12:10 Na mũtikaanatigie gĩcunjĩ o na kĩmwe kĩraare nginya rũũciinĩ; kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩgaatigara
Exodus12:11 Mũkĩrĩa nyama icio mũgaakorwo mũhaana ũũ: mũgaacirĩa na ihenya
Exodus12:12 “Ũtukũ ũcio nĩngaatuĩkania bũrũri wothe wa Misiri ngiũragaga marigithaathi moothe ma tũhĩĩ ma Amisiri
Exodus12:13 Nayo thakame ĩrĩa ĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ buremuinĩ cia mĩrango ya nyũmba ĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ kĩmenyithia gĩa kũmenyithania nyũmba iria mũrĩ. Ndoona thakame ĩyo
Exodus12:14 Nĩmũgaakũngũyagĩra mũthenya ũcio ũrĩ ta thigũkũ nyamũre ya kũmũririkanagia ũrĩa niĩ
Exodus12:15 Ningĩ MWATHANI akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus12:16 Mũthenyainĩ wa mbere na wa mũgwanja nĩmũrĩũnganaga nĩ ũndũ wa gũthaathaiya. Gũtirĩ wĩra ũrĩrutagwo mĩthenyainĩ ĩyo yerĩ
Exodus12:17 Menyagĩrĩraai thigũkũ ĩyo
Exodus12:18 Mũtikaarĩage mĩgate mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia kuuma hwaĩinĩ wa mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa mbere
Exodus12:19 (19-20) Gũtikaanooneke ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate nyũmbainĩ cianyu mĩthenya ĩyo mũgwanja. Mũndũ o wothe ũkaarĩa mũgate wĩ na ndaawa ya kũimbia akaingatwo kuuma harĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus12:20 Musa agĩgĩĩta atongoria oothe a Isiraeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus12:21 Mũcooke muoe mathangũ ma hithobu
Exodus12:22 Nĩ amu MWATHANI nĩegũtuĩkania Misiri akĩũragaga Amisiri
Exodus12:23 Mawatho macio mũmarũmagĩrĩre inyuĩ o hamwe na ciana cianyu nginya tene.
Exodus12:24 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus12:25 Rĩrĩa ciana cianyu ikaamũũria atĩrĩ
Exodus12:26 Mũgaacicookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus12:27 Magĩcooka magĩthiĩ magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa na Harũni.
Exodus12:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus12:29 Naake mũthamaki agĩũkĩra ũtukũ arĩ hamwe na njaama ciake ciothe
Exodus12:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus12:31 Oyai ng'ondu cianyu
Exodus12:32 Nao andũ a Misiri makĩhĩkahĩka andũ a Isiraeli moime bũrũriinĩ makĩmeeraga atĩrĩ
Exodus12:33 Kwoguo andũ a Isiraeli makĩiyũria mbakũri ciao cia gũkandĩra mũtu mũkande ũtaarĩ mwĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia
Exodus12:34 Andũ acio a Isiraeli nĩmeekĩĩte ũrĩa Musa ameerĩĩte
Exodus12:35 MWATHANI nĩatũmire andũ a Isiraeli meetĩkĩrĩke nĩ andũ a Misiri
Exodus12:36 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩkiumagara kuuma Ramesese meerekeire Sukothu. Nao maarĩ ta arũme ngiri magana matandatũ (600
Exodus12:37 Ningĩ gĩkundi kĩnene kĩa andũ angĩ nĩkĩoimagaranirie hamwe nao
Exodus12:38 Nao makĩruga mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia na mũtu ũrĩa mũkande maakuuĩĩte kuuma Misiri. Maingatĩĩtwo Misiri na ihenya ũguo atĩ matingĩahotire kũhaarĩria irio ciao
Exodus12:39 Ihinda rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maikarire Misiri rĩarĩ mĩaka magana mana ma mĩrongo ĩtatũ (430).
Exodus12:40 Mũthenya ũrĩa mĩaka ĩyo magana mana ma mĩrongo ĩtatũ yathirire
Exodus12:41 Ũtukũ ũcio MWATHANI ndahingire riitho nĩ geetha amarute kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri. Ũtukũ ũcio Aisiraeli oothe maraaraga matahingĩĩte riitho nĩ ũndũ wa MWATHANI njiarwainĩ ciao ciothe.
Exodus12:42 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus12:43 No rĩĩrĩ
Exodus12:44 Gũtirĩ muumi na njĩra kana mũruti wĩra wa kũrĩhwo ũrĩmĩrĩaga.
Exodus12:45 Ningĩ Bathaka yothe ĩrĩrĩagĩrwo thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ĩrĩa ĩhaarĩirio. Mũtikaanamiumie nja ya nyũmba ĩyo
Exodus12:46 No mũhaka andũ oothe a Isiraeli makũngũagĩre thigũkũ ĩyo.
Exodus12:47 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus12:48 Mawatho macio no mo marĩhũthagĩrwo harĩ mũndũ wanyu
Exodus12:49 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa na Harũni.
Exodus12:50 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus13:2 “Nyamũrĩra marigithaathi moothe ma njamba. Irigithaathi o rĩothe rĩa njamba thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli
Exodus13:3 Naake Musa akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Exodus13:4 Ũũmũũthĩ mweriinĩ ũyũ wa mbere ũrĩa wĩtagwo Abibu nĩguo mwoimagara kuuma Misiri.
Exodus13:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus13:6 Mũkaarĩaga mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩthenya mũgwanja. Mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũgaakoragwo na thigũkũ ya gũtĩĩa MWATHANI.
Exodus13:7 Mĩthenyainĩ ĩyo mũgwanja mũkaarĩaga o mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia. Gũtikaanooneke mĩgate mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia
Exodus13:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus13:9 Ũndũ ũyũ ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ kĩririkano; ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ ta kĩndũ kĩohereirwo mookoinĩ maanyu kana moothiũinĩ maanyu. Ũrĩmũririkanagia mũthiage na mbere gũthooma watho wa MWATHANI
Exodus13:10 Kwoguo tũũraai mũkũngũagĩra thigũkũ ĩno
Exodus13:11 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus13:12 mũkaamwamũragĩra marigithaathi moothe. Marigithaathi moothe ma njamba ma mahiũ maanyu nĩ ma MWATHANI.
Exodus13:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Exodus13:14 Matukũinĩ marĩa magooka ciana cianyu ingĩkaamũũria maũndũ maya moigĩĩte atĩa
Exodus13:15 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri oomirie ngoro akĩrega gũtũrekereria
Exodus13:16 Ũndũ ũyũ ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ kĩririkano; ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ ta kĩndũ kĩohereirwo mookoinĩ maitũ na moothiũinĩ maitũ. Ũrĩtũririkanagia atĩ MWATHANI aatũrutire Misiri na ũndũ wa hinya wake mũnene.’ ”
Exodus13:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus13:18 Handũ ha ũguo

Exodus13:20 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makiuma Sukothu
Exodus13:21 Na rĩĩrĩ

Exodus14:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus14:2 “Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli magarũrũke maambe hema ciao mbere ya itũũra rĩa Pi Hahirothu
Exodus14:3 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo mũthamaki wa Misiri egwĩciiria atĩ andũ a Isiraeli nĩkũũrũũra marorũũra bũrũriinĩ
Exodus14:4 Nĩngũtũma oomie ngoro amũrũmĩrĩre
Exodus14:5 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri eerirwo atĩ andũ acio nĩmaarĩĩkĩĩtie kũũra
Exodus14:6 Kwoguo mũthamaki agĩkĩhaarĩria ngaari yake ya mbarathi o hamwe na mbũtũ yake ya ita.
Exodus14:7 Agĩkiumagara na ngaari ciake ciothe cia mbarathi
Exodus14:8 Naake MWATHANI akĩũmia ngoro ya mũthamaki wa Misiri
Exodus14:9 Nayo mbũtũ ya ita ya Misiri
Exodus14:10 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire mũthamaki na mbũtũ yake ya ita mamoimĩĩte thuutha-rĩ
Exodus14:11 Magĩcooka makĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus14:12 Githĩ ũũ tiguo twakwĩrĩĩte tũtaanoima kuo atĩ no ũgeekĩka? Twakwĩrire ũtigane na ithuĩ ũreke tũthiĩ na mbere gũtungatĩra andũ a Misiri. Nĩkũngĩarĩ wega ithuĩ gũthiĩ na mbere gũtungatĩra andũ a Misiri gũkĩra gũkuĩra gũũkũ werũinĩ.”
Exodus14:13 Naake Musa akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus14:14 MWATHANI nĩ we ũkũmũrũĩrĩra
Exodus14:15 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus14:16 Oya mũthĩĩgi waku na igũrũ ũũtambũrũkie igũrũ rĩa iria
Exodus14:17 Nĩngũũmia ngoro cia andũ a Misiri nĩ geetha matoonye iriainĩ mamarũmĩrĩre
Exodus14:18 Ndarĩĩkia kũmahoota
Exodus14:19 Naake mũraika wa Ngai
Exodus14:20 gatagatĩ ka mbũtũ ya ita ya andũ a Misiri na mbũtũ ya ita ya andũ a Isiraeli. Itu rĩu rĩgĩtũma kũgĩe nduma mwena wa andũ a Misiri
Exodus14:21 Naake Musa agĩgĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake igũrũ wa iria
Exodus14:22 nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩtuĩkanĩria iriainĩ magereire thĩ nyũmũ
Exodus14:23 Nao andũ a Misiri makĩmarũmĩrĩra na ihenya
Exodus14:24 Na rĩĩrĩ

Exodus14:26 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus14:27 Kwoguo Musa agĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake igũrũ rĩa iria
Exodus14:28 Maaĩ magĩgĩcooka makĩhumbĩra ngaari cia mbarathi
Exodus14:29 No andũ a Isiraeli magĩtuĩkanĩria iriainĩ magereire thĩ nyũmũ
Exodus14:30 Mũthenya ũcio MWATHANI agĩkĩhonokia andũ a Isiraeli kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Misiri
Exodus14:31 Rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli moonire ũndũ ũcio mũnene wekĩĩtwo andũ a Misiri nĩ MWATHANI
Exodus15:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Musa na andũ a Isiraeli akĩinĩra MWATHANI rwĩmbo rũũrũ

Exodus15:3 MWATHANI nĩ njamba ya ita; MWATHANI nĩrĩo rĩĩtwa rĩake.
Exodus15:4 “Ngaari cia mbarathi cia mũthamaki o na mbũtũ ciake cia ita nĩaciikĩĩtie iriainĩ; njaama ciake iria njoorua nĩihindĩkanĩĩte Iriainĩ Ituune.
Exodus15:5 Ithikĩĩtwo nĩ maaĩ ma kũndũ kũriku
Exodus15:6 “Guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo
Exodus15:7 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa ũhoti waku wĩ mũnene
Exodus15:8 Na ũndũ wa mĩhũũmũ yaku
Exodus15:9 Nayo thũ ĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus15:10 Wee MWATHANI watũmire rũhuuho rwaku rũhuruutane
Exodus15:11 “Nĩ ngai ĩrĩkũ gatagatĩinĩ ka ngai ĩkĩhaana ta we

Exodus15:13 Tondũ wa ũtugi waku
Exodus15:14 Ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩciiguĩte ũhoro ũcio ikainaina nĩ guoya
Exodus15:15 O nao anene a Edomu nĩmagegearĩĩte
Exodus15:16 Nĩmakinyĩrĩirwo nĩ kĩmako o na guoya nĩ ũndũ wa kuona hinya waku
Exodus15:17 Ũkaamatwara ũmahande kĩrĩmainĩ gĩaku
Exodus15:18 Wee MWATHANI
