Exodus18:1 Naake Jethero
Exodus18:2 Jethero nĩ we waikaraga na Zipora mũtumia wa Musa
Exodus18:3 O na nĩatũire na aariũ a Musa eerĩ Gerishomu na Eliezeri. (Musa oigĩĩte atĩrĩ
Exodus18:4 Ningĩ no oigĩĩte atĩ
Exodus18:5 Naake Jethero agĩtwarĩra Musa mũtumia wake Zipora na aariũ aake eerĩ werũinĩ kũrĩa aambĩĩte hema kĩrĩmainĩ gĩtheru.
Exodus18:6 Jethero nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũtũmanĩra Musa atĩ nĩmarooka
Exodus18:7 kwoguo Musa akiumagara
Exodus18:8 Musa agĩgĩtaarĩria mũthoni we ũrĩa wothe MWATHANI eekĩĩte mũthamaki na andũ a Misiri
Exodus18:9 Naake Jethero agĩkena nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ moothe meega marĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus18:10 Jethero agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus18:11 Rĩu nĩndamenya atĩ MWATHANI nĩ mũnene gũkĩra ngai ciothe
Exodus18:12 Thuutha ũcio Jethero akĩreehe indo cia kũrutĩrwo Ngai igongoona rĩa njino
Exodus18:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus18:14 Rĩrĩa mũthoni we oonire maũndũ moothe marĩa Musa eekagĩra andũ
Exodus18:15 Naake Musa agĩcookeria mũthoni we atĩrĩ
Exodus18:16 Rĩrĩa andũ eerĩ maagĩa na ciira
Exodus18:17 Mũthoni we agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus18:18 Nĩũkwĩnogia o na ũnogie andũ aya
Exodus18:19 Rĩu kĩnjĩtĩkĩrie ngũtaare
Exodus18:20 Ningĩ ũmarutage maathani na mawatho ma Ngai na ũmaataaragĩrie ũrĩa maagĩrĩirwo nĩgũtũũra o na gwĩkaga.
Exodus18:21 Wĩthuurĩre thĩinĩ wa andũ aya
Exodus18:22 Reke andũ acio matuithanagie andũ maciira mahinda moothe. Nĩmakũreehagĩre maciira marĩa maritũ
Exodus18:23 Weka ũguo
Exodus18:24 Kwoguo Musa akĩigua mataaro ma mũthoni we
Exodus18:25 agĩthuura andũ ehoti kuuma andũinĩ oothe a Isiraeli
Exodus18:26 Nao andũ acio magagĩtuithanagia andũ maciira mahinda moothe
Exodus18:27 Musa agĩkiugĩra mũthoni we ũhoro
Exodus19:1 (1-2) Nao andũ a Isiraeli makiumagara kuuma Refidimu
Exodus19:2 Naake Musa akĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ agatũngane na Ngai.Naake MWATHANI akĩmwĩta arĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kĩu akĩmwĩra athiĩ eere andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus19:3 “Nĩmweyoneire maũndũ marĩa ndeekire andũ a Misiri
Exodus19:4 Kwoguo rĩu
Exodus19:5 ndĩmũtue andũ aakwa aamũre na mũndungatagĩre ta athĩnjĩri Ngai.” Icio nĩcio ciugo iria ũkwĩra andũ a Isiraeli.
Exodus19:6 Kwoguo Musa agĩikũrũka agĩĩta atongoria a andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus19:7 Nao andũ oothe magĩcookanĩria hamwe atĩrĩ
Exodus19:8 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus19:9 Musa agĩkĩĩra MWATHANI ũrĩa andũ maacooketie. Naake MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus19:10 na makorwo mehaarĩirie mũthenya wa ĩtatũ. Mũthenya ũcio nĩngaikũrũka kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Sinai
Exodus19:11 Nawe nĩũgeekĩra mũhaka ũthiũrũrũkĩrie kĩrĩma gĩothe nĩ geetha andũ matikaae kũhĩtũka. Ũcooke wĩre andũ memenyerere matikaambate kĩrĩmainĩ o na kana magĩkuhĩrĩrie. Mũndũ o wothe ũkaahuutia kĩrĩma no mũhaka akooragwo.
Exodus19:12 Gũtikaanagĩe na mũndũ ũkaamũhuutia na mooko; akaahũũrwo na mahiga kana arathwo na mĩguĩ. Ũguo nĩguo mũgeeka mũndũ o na nyamũ; mũtikaanareke mũndũ ũcio atũũre muoyo
Exodus19:13 Naake Musa agĩkiuma kĩrĩmainĩ
Exodus19:14 Naake Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus19:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus19:16 Naake Musa agĩgĩtongoria andũ akĩmoimia nja ya hema magatũũngane na MWATHANI
Exodus19:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus19:18 Naguo mũgambo wa karumbeeta ũgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũneneha. Naake Musa aaria
Exodus19:19 Naake MWATHANI agĩikũrũka igũrũ wa kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai o gacũmbĩrĩ
Exodus19:20 Naake MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus19:21 O na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa mekũnguhĩrĩria nĩmetherie
Exodus19:22 Musa akĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Exodus19:23 Naake MWATHANI agĩcookeria Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus19:24 Kwoguo Musa agĩikũrũka kũrĩ andũ akĩmeera ũrĩa MWATHANI oiga.
Exodus20:1 Naake Ngai akĩaria ciugo ici akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus20:2 “Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku ũrĩa wakũrutire bũrũri wa Misiri
Exodus20:3 “Ndũkaanathaathaiye ngai ingĩ tiga niĩ.
Exodus20:4 “Ndũkaanethondekere mĩhianano ya kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩ kũrĩa igũrũ
Exodus20:5 Ndũkaanainamĩrĩre mũhianano o wothe o na kana ũũthaathaiye
Exodus20:6 Ningĩ nĩnjiguagĩra andũ ngiri na ngiri tha arĩa manyendeete na makaigua maathani maakwa.
Exodus20:7 “Ndũkaanagwete rĩĩtwa rĩakwa na itherũ nĩ gũkorwo niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku nĩherithagia mũndũ o wothe ũgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩakwa na itherũ.
Exodus20:8 “Menyagĩrĩra mũthenya wa Thabatũ ũwamũrage.
Exodus20:9 Rutaga wĩra waku wothe mĩthenya ĩtandatũ.
Exodus20:10 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja nĩ mũthenya wa kũhuurũka ũrĩa wamũrĩirwo MWATHANI Ngai waku. Mũthenya ũcio ndũkaanarute wĩra wee mwene
Exodus20:11 Amu niĩ MWATHANI
Exodus20:12 “Tĩĩa thooguo na maitũguo
Exodus20:13 “Ndũkaanooragane.
Exodus20:14 “Ndũkaanatharanie.
Exodus20:15 “Ndũkaanaiye.
Exodus20:16 “Ndũkaanaigĩrĩre mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ kĩgeenyo.
Exodus20:17 “Ndũkaanerirĩrie nyũmba ya mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ
Exodus20:18 Rĩrĩa andũ maiguire marurumĩ
Exodus20:19 makĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus20:20 Naake Musa akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Exodus20:21 Nao andũ magĩthiĩ na mbere kũrũũgama o haraaya
Exodus20:22 Ningĩ MWATHANI agĩatha Musa eere andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ: Inyuĩ eene nĩmweyonera atĩ nĩndamwarĩria ndĩ igũrũ matuinĩ.
Exodus20:23 Mũtikaanethondekere ngai ingĩ cia betha o na kana cia thahabu cia gũthaathayanĩrio na niĩ.
Exodus20:24 Thondekeraai kĩgongoona mũgĩake na tĩĩri na igũrũ rĩakĩo mũrute ng'ondu na ng'ombe cianyu irĩ magongoona ma njino na thaayũ. Handũ o hoothe harĩa ndĩrĩmũamũragĩra hatuĩke ha gũũthaathayagĩria
Exodus20:25 Mũngĩthondekera kĩgongoona kĩa mahiga-rĩ
Exodus20:26 Ningĩ mũtikaananjakĩre kĩgongoona kĩrĩ na ngathĩ
Exodus21:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus21:2 Ũngĩgũra ngombo ya Mũhibirania

Exodus21:4 Mũnene wa ngombo ĩyo angĩmĩhe mũtumia
Exodus21:5 No ngombo ĩyo ĩngiuga atĩ nĩyendeete mũnene wayo
Exodus21:6 hĩndĩ ĩyo mũnene wayo no akĩmĩtware handũ harĩa hathaathayagĩrio na amĩĩre ĩrũũgame mũrangoinĩ kana gĩtugĩinĩ kĩa mũrango. Naake mũnene wayo amĩtũre gũtũ na mũkuha
Exodus21:7 “Mũndũ angĩendia mwarĩ agatuĩke ngombo-rĩ

Exodus21:12 “Mũndũ angĩgũtha ũrĩa ũngĩ akue-rĩ

Exodus21:14 No mũndũ angĩraakara na oorage mũndũ akĩendaga-rĩ
Exodus21:15 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩgũtha ithe kana nyina
Exodus21:16 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩnyiita mũndũ akamwendie kana akamũige e ta ngombo yake
Exodus21:17 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩruma ithe kana nyina
Exodus21:18 (18-19) “Ningĩ andũ eerĩ mangĩtetania na ũmwe agũthe ũrĩa ũngĩ na ihiga kana ngundi no ndamũũrage-rĩ
Exodus21:19 “Ningĩ mũndũ angĩoya rũthanju agũthe ngombo yake ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ wa nja
Exodus21:20 No ngombo ĩyo ĩngĩaga gũkua handũinĩ ha mũthenya ũmwe kana ĩĩrĩ
Exodus21:21 “Ningĩ arũme mangĩkorwo makĩrũa
Exodus21:22 No rĩĩrĩ
Exodus21:23 riitho riumage riitho
Exodus21:24 ihĩa riumage ihĩa

Exodus21:26 Angĩgũtha ngombo yake ya mũndũrũme kana ya mũndũ wa nja igego
Exodus21:27 “Na rĩĩrĩ

Exodus21:31 Ningĩ ndeegwa ĩyo ĩngĩũraga ngombo ya mũndũ mũrũme kana ya mũndũ wa nja-rĩ
Exodus21:32 “Ningĩ mũndũ angĩkunũra irima kana eenje irima na aage kũrĩkunĩka
Exodus21:33 mwene irima rĩu no mũhaka arĩhe nyamũ ĩyo

Exodus22:3 “Mũndũ angĩrĩithia mũgũnda wene

Exodus22:7 “Ciirainĩ o wothe ũkoniĩ indo
Exodus22:8 “Mũndũ angĩtĩkĩra kũhithio nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ ndigiri
Exodus22:9 mũndũ ũcio ũrahithĩĩtio
Exodus22:10 No nyamũ ĩyo ĩngĩiywo ĩ gwake-rĩ
Exodus22:11 Ningĩ ĩngĩrĩĩo nĩ nyamũ cia gĩthaka
Exodus22:12 “Mũndũ angĩgwatio nyamũ nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ
Exodus22:13 No mwene angĩkorwo arĩ ho-rĩ
Exodus22:14 “Mũndũ mũrũme angĩheenereria mũirĩĩtu gathirange ũtoorĩĩtio

Exodus22:16 “Mũtikaanareke mũndũ wa nja mũrogi atũũre muoyo.
Exodus22:17 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩkoma na nyamũ no mũhaka ooragwo.
Exodus22:18 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkaarutĩra ngai ĩngĩ o yothe igongoona tiga o niĩ MWATHANI
Exodus22:19 “Mũtikaanahĩtĩrie mũgeni kana mũmũhinyĩrĩrie
Exodus22:20 Mũtikaananyamaarie mũtumia wa ndigwa kana mwana wa ngoriai.
Exodus22:21 Mũngĩmanyamaaria nao mangaĩre-rĩ
Exodus22:22 Nĩngaraakara na ndĩmũũragithie mbaarainĩ. Nao atumia aanyu matuĩke a ndigwa
Exodus22:23 “ Ũngĩkombera mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ wa andũ aakwa arĩa athĩĩni mbeeca
Exodus22:24 Ũngĩthiĩ na nguo ya mũndũ ũngĩ ĩrĩ kĩndũ gĩa kũrũũgamĩrĩra thiirĩ atĩ nĩguo arĩmĩkũũra
Exodus22:25 Ĩyo no yo nguo ĩrĩa arĩ nayo ya kwĩhumbĩra nĩguo aigue ũrugarĩ. Mũndũ ũcio arĩkĩĩhumbĩra na kĩ? Mũndũ ũcio angĩngaĩra

Exodus23:15 Hĩndĩ ya mweri wa Abibu
Exodus23:16 “Thigũkũ ĩrĩa ĩngĩ ũrĩkũngũagĩra nĩ ya Magetha ma Mbere ma irio iria ũhandĩĩte mũgũndainĩ waku.“Ningĩ ũkũnguagĩre Thigũkũ ya Ithũnũ mwaka ũgĩthiĩ gũthira hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wagetha maciaro kuuma mũgũndainĩ waku wa thabibũ o na wa matunda.
Exodus23:17 O mwaka
Exodus23:18 “Ndũkaanandutĩre mũgate mwĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia rĩrĩa ũkũndutĩra igongoona rĩa nyamũ
Exodus23:19 “O mwaka no mũhaka ũreehage magetha marĩa meega mũno ma mbere ma irio cia mĩgũnda yaku nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI Ngai waku.“Na ningĩ ndũkaanaruge koori na iria rĩa nyina.

Exodus23:29 No rĩĩrĩ

Exodus24:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus24:2 Wee ũrĩ wiki hatarĩ o na ũmwe wa acio angĩ
Exodus24:3 Naake Musa agĩthiĩ akĩĩra andũ ũhoro wothe ũrĩa MWATHANI aamũheete o na maathani maake. Nao andũ oothe magĩcookia hamwe atĩrĩ
Exodus24:4 Naake Musa akĩandĩka ciugo ciothe cia MWATHANI. Agĩũkĩra rũũciinĩ tene agĩaka kĩgongoona magũrũinĩ ma kĩrĩma kĩu na akĩhanda itugĩ ikũmi na igĩrĩ
Exodus24:5 Agĩcooka akĩrekia aanake amwe a andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus24:6 Naake Musa akĩoya nuthu ya thakame ya nyamũ icio akĩmĩĩkĩra mbakũriinĩ
Exodus24:7 Agĩcooka akĩoya ibuku rĩa kĩrĩĩkanĩro
Exodus24:8 Musa agĩkĩoya thakame ĩrĩa yarĩ mbakũriinĩ akĩmĩminjaminjĩria andũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus24:9 Nao Musa
Exodus24:10 makĩyonera Ngai wa Isiraeli; harĩa aakinyĩĩte na magũrũ maake haahaanaga ta haarĩĩtwo mahiga ma goro ma rangi wa mburuu na haathereete o ta matu.
Exodus24:11 No we Ngai ndaigana gwĩka atongoria acio a Isiraeli ũũru; moonire Ngai
Exodus24:12 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus24:13 Kwoguo Musa na Joshua ũrĩa wamũteithagĩrĩria makĩĩhaarĩria

Exodus24:15 Musa agĩkĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ kĩu

Exodus24:17 Naguo riiri wa MWATHANI wonekaga nĩ andũ a Isiraeli ũhaana ta mwaki mũnene ũrĩ gacũmbĩrĩ ga kĩrĩma.

Exodus25:1 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus25:2 “Arĩria andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere maahothere. Nawe wamũkĩre kĩrĩa gĩothe mũndũ o wothe ekũigua na ngoro yake akĩenda kũũhothera.
Exodus25:3 Nayo mĩhothi ĩrĩa ũkwamũkĩra kuuma kũrĩ o nĩ: thahabu
Exodus25:4 gataani ĩrĩa njega; guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus25:5 na njũũa cia ndũrũme itobokeetio rangiinĩ igatuunĩha; njũũa iria njega; mbaaũ cia mũgaa;
Exodus25:6 maguta ma gwakia mataawa; na mahuti manungi wega ma gwĩkĩrwo magutainĩ ma kwamũrana o na ma gwĩkĩrwo ũbaaniinĩ;
Exodus25:7 tũhiga twa goro twa rangi mũtũũne
Exodus25:8 No mũhaka andũ maathondekere gĩikaro gĩtheru gĩa gũikaraga nĩ geetha ndũũre gatagatĩinĩ kaao.
Exodus25:9 Gĩikaro kĩu kĩamũre
Exodus25:10 “Thondeka ithandũkũ rĩa mbaaũ cia mũgaa
Exodus25:11 Nawe ũrĩhumbĩre thĩinĩ na na nja na thahabu ya gũturwo ĩrĩa therie mũno
Exodus25:12 Ningĩ ũrĩthondekere icũhĩ inya cia kũrĩkuua cia thahabu
Exodus25:13 Ũcooke ũthondeke mĩtĩ mĩraaya ya mĩgaa ya kũrĩkuua na ũmĩhumbĩre na thahabu
Exodus25:14 ũcooke ũmĩharũkie icũhĩinĩ icio irĩ mĩenainĩ ya ithandũkũ rĩu.
Exodus25:15 Mĩtĩ ĩyo mĩraaya no mũhaka ĩtigagwo icũhĩinĩ na ndĩkaae kũrutagwo.
Exodus25:16 Ningĩ ũcooke ũige thĩinĩ wa ithandũkũ rĩu ihengere igĩrĩ cia mahiga iria ngũkũnengera
Exodus25:17 “Ningĩ ũthondeke gĩkunĩko gĩa thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
Exodus25:18 Na ũthondeke ciũmbe igĩrĩ irĩ mathagu
Exodus25:19 inyiitanĩĩte na gĩkunĩko kĩu
Exodus25:20 Nacio ciũmbe icio ikorwo iroranĩĩte na itambũrũkĩĩtie mathagu maacio makahumbĩra gĩkunĩko kĩu.
Exodus25:21 Ũcooke ũige ihengere igĩrĩ cia mahiga thĩinĩ wa ithandũkũ na ũigĩrĩre gĩkunĩko kĩu igũrũ warĩo.
Exodus25:22 Hau nĩ ho ndĩrĩcemanagĩria nawe
Exodus25:23 “Ningĩ ũthondeke meetha ya mbaaũ cia mũgaa
Exodus25:24 Ũcooke ũmĩhumbĩre na thahabu ya gũturwo ĩrĩa therie mũno na ũmĩthiũrũrũkĩrie mĩena yothe mũgũkũ wa thahabu.
Exodus25:25 Na ũmĩĩkĩre karũbaaũ gaceke ka wariĩ wa mirimita mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithaano mĩena yothe
Exodus25:26 Ningĩ meetha ĩyo ũmĩthondekere icũhĩ inya cia thahabu cia kũmĩkuua ũciĩkĩre koonainĩ ciayo inya harĩa magũrũ mayo marĩ.
Exodus25:27 Icũhĩ icio cia kũharũkio mĩtĩ ĩrĩa mĩraaya ya gũkuua meetha ĩyo ũciĩkĩre hakuhĩ na karũbaaũ kau gaceke.
Exodus25:28 Nayo mĩtĩ ĩyo mĩraaya ũmĩthondeke na mũtĩ wa mũgaa na ũmĩhumbĩre na thahabu.
Exodus25:29 Ũcooke ũthondeke thaani
Exodus25:30 Meetha ĩyo ũmĩige mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus25:31 “Ningĩ ũcooke ũthondeke mũtĩ wa gũcuuria mataawa na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno. Gĩtina kĩaguo o na mũtĩ waguo ikorwo irĩ cia thahabu ya gũturwo; mahũa maguo ma kũũgemia na thundo ciaguo
Exodus25:32 Naguo mũtĩ ũcio ũgĩe na honge ithathatũ ciumĩĩte mĩenainĩ yaguo
Exodus25:33 O rũhonge hakorwo na mahũa ma kũũgemia mahaana ihũa rĩa mũroothi
Exodus25:34 Naguo mũtĩ ũcio wa kũhangĩrwo mataawa ũkorwo na mahũa mana ma kũgemia mahaana ihũa rĩa mũroothi
Exodus25:35 Ningĩ o mũhuro wa honge igĩrĩ igĩrĩ hakorwo na thundo ĩmwe.
Exodus25:36 Nacio thundo na honge ciacio
Exodus25:37 Ũcooke ũthondekere mũtĩ ũcio mataawa mũgwanja
Exodus25:38 Nayo mĩĩhato yaguo
Exodus25:39 Mũtĩ ũcio wa kũhangĩrwo mataawa hamwe na indo ciaguo ciothe ithondekwo na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno ya ũritũ wa kiro mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ithaano.
Exodus25:40 Na ũmenyerere ũcithondeke ta ũrĩa ndĩrakuonia gũũkũ kĩrĩmainĩ.
Exodus26:1 “Ningĩ ũthondeke Hema ĩrĩa nyamũre
Exodus26:2 Itambaya icio no mũhaka ikorwo ciiganaine o gĩtambaya gĩkorwo kĩrĩ na ũraihu wa mita ikũmi na igĩrĩ
Exodus26:3 Itambaya ithaano ũcinyitithanie hamwe ituĩke kĩmwe
Exodus26:4 Ũcooke ũthondeke ciana na gĩtambaya kĩa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus26:5 Ũtumĩrĩre ciana mĩrongo ĩtaano gĩtambayainĩ kĩmwe
Exodus26:6 Ũcooke ũthondeke ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtaano cia thahabu cia kũnyiitithania itambaya icio
Exodus26:7 “Ningĩ ũthondekere Hema ĩyo kĩandarũũa gĩa kũmĩhumbĩra
Exodus26:8 Ciothe ũcithondeke ciiganaine irĩ na ũraihu wa mita ikũmi na ithatũ na wariĩ wa mita igĩrĩ.
Exodus26:9 Ũcooke ũtumanĩrĩrie ithaano ituĩke kĩndũ kĩmwe
Exodus26:10 Ningĩ ũtumĩrĩre ciana mĩrongo ĩtaano mũthiainĩ wa itambaya cia mbere
Exodus26:11 Ũcooke ũthondeke ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtaano cia gĩcango ũciĩkĩre cianainĩ icio nĩ geetha ũnyiitithanie itambaya icio nĩguo hema ĩyo ĩtuĩke kĩndũ kĩmwe.
Exodus26:12 Nakĩo kĩnuthu gĩa gĩtambaya kĩrĩa gĩgũtigara ũgĩcuurie na mwena wa na thuutha wa Hema ĩyo.
Exodus26:13 Nacio cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtaano iria igũtigara o mwena nĩ ũndũ wa itambaya icio kũraiha-rĩ
Exodus26:14 “Na ũthondekere hema ĩyo ciandarũũa igĩrĩ cia kũmĩhumbĩra; kĩmwe kĩa njũũa cia ndũrũme itobokeetio rangiinĩ mũtuune igatunĩha
Exodus26:15 “Ningĩ ũthondekere Hema ĩyo mbaaũ cia mũgaa cia kũmĩrũũgamia.
Exodus26:16 O rũbaaũ rũkorwo rũrĩ na ũraihu wa mita inya na wariĩ wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithathatũ
Exodus26:17 na o rũbaaũ rũgĩe na ihoce igĩrĩ cia gũcinyiitithania. Mbaaũ ciothe cia Hema ĩyo igĩe na ihoce icio.
Exodus26:18 Ũthondeke mbaaũ mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia mwena wa na kĩanda wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus26:19 na ũcithondekere njikarĩro mĩrongo ĩna cia betha
Exodus26:20 Ningĩ mwena wa na rũgongo wayo ũũthondekere mbaaũ mĩrongo ĩrĩ
Exodus26:21 na njikarĩro mĩrongo ĩna cia betha
Exodus26:22 Ningĩ mwena wa na thuutha wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus26:23 na ũthondekere mbaaũ igĩrĩ cia koona.
Exodus26:24 Mbaaũ icio cia koona ikorwo inyiitithanĩĩtio gĩtinainĩ na ithiĩ inyiitithanĩĩtio o ro ũguo nginya igũrũ. Nacio mbaaũ icio cierĩ cia koona cierĩ igaathondekwo o ro ũguo.
Exodus26:25 Kwoguo hagaakorwo na mbaaũ inyaanya na njikarĩro ikũmi na ithathatũ cia betha
Exodus26:26 “Ningĩ ũcooke ũthondeke mĩgamba ikũmi na ĩtaano ya mũtĩ wa mũgaa
Exodus26:27 ĩngĩ ĩtaano ya kũnyiita cia mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ
Exodus26:28 Naguo mũgamba wa gatagatĩ
Exodus26:29 Ũcooke ũhumbĩre mbaaũ icio na thahabu na ũciharũkie icũhĩ cia thahabu cia kũharũkio mĩgamba ĩyo ĩrĩa o nayo ũkũmĩhumbĩra na thahabu.
Exodus26:30 Na ũmenyerere ũthondeke Hema ĩyo ta ũrĩa ndĩrakuonia gũũkũ kĩrĩmainĩ.
Exodus26:31 “Ningĩ ũtume mbathiya ya kũhakania
Exodus26:32 Ũcooke ũmĩcuurie itugĩinĩ inya cia mũtĩ wa mũgaa ihumbĩrĩĩtwo na thahabu
Exodus26:33 Nayo mbathiya ĩyo ũmĩcuurie gathĩkainĩ irĩa irĩ igũrũ mwena wa na thĩinĩ wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus26:34 Ũcooke ũkunĩke Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro.
Exodus26:35 Naho hau nja ya Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno ũige meetha na mwana wa na rũgongo wa Hema
Exodus26:36 “Naguo mũromo wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus26:37 Ningĩ mbathiya ũmĩthondekere itugĩ ithaano cia mũgaa
Exodus27:1 “Nakĩo kĩgongoona-rĩ
Exodus27:2 Ningĩ ũthondeke hĩa igũrũ wa koona ciakĩo inya
Exodus27:3 Ũcooke ũthondeke ngĩo cia kũrutaga mũhu wakĩo
Exodus27:4 Ningĩ ũcooke ũgĩthondekere rũgara rwa gĩcango na koonainĩ ciaruo wĩkĩre icũhĩ inya cia gĩcango cia gũgĩkuua.
Exodus27:5 Ũcooke ũthondeke rũgara rwa gĩcango ũrwĩkĩre mũhuro wa mũgũkũ wa kĩgongoona kĩu
Exodus27:6 Ningĩ ũthondeke mĩtĩ mĩraaya ya mũgaa ya gũgĩkuua
Exodus27:7 ũmĩharũkagie icũhĩinĩ iria irĩ mĩena ya kĩgongoona kĩu hĩndĩ ĩrĩa rĩothe gĩgũkuuo.
Exodus27:8 Kĩgongoona kĩu ũgĩthondeke na mbaaũ na wĩkĩre irima gatagatĩ gaakĩo kũringana na ũrĩa ndĩrakuonia gũũkũ kĩrĩmainĩ.
Exodus27:9 “Ningĩ Hema ĩyo yakwa ũmĩthondekere nja ĩirigĩirwo na mbathiya cia gataani ĩrĩa njega. Mwena wa na kĩanda mbathiya icio ikorwo na ũraihu wa mita mĩrongo ĩna na inya
Exodus27:10 inyiitĩrĩirwo nĩ itugĩ mĩrongo ĩrĩ cia gĩcango irĩ na njikarĩro mĩrongo ĩrĩ cia gĩcango; natuo tũhocio twa itugĩ icio
Exodus27:11 Ũguo noguo mwena wa na rũgongo wa nja ĩyo ũgũkorwo ũtariĩ.
Exodus27:12 Naguo mwena wa ithũĩro hagĩe na mbathiya irĩ na ũraihu wa mita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ na irĩ na itugĩ ciacio ikũmi na njikarĩro ciacio ikũmi.
Exodus27:13 Naguo mwena wa irathĩro
Exodus27:14 (14-15) O mwena wa mũromo hagĩe na mbathiya ya mita ithathatũ na boiniti ithathatũ na itugĩ ithatũ na njikarĩro ithatũ.
Exodus27:15 Ningĩ mũromoinĩ wa nja ĩyo hagĩe mbathiya ya ũraihu wa mita kenda ĩthondekeetwo na gataani ĩrĩa njega ĩtumĩĩtwo na guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus27:16 Ningĩ itugĩ ciothe iria ikũriigicĩria nja ĩyo inyiitithanio na tũmĩtĩ twa betha
Exodus27:17 Naruo rũirigo rũu rũkorwo na ũraihu wa mita mĩrongo ĩna na inya
Exodus27:18 Nacio indo ciothe cia kũhũthĩrwo Hemainĩ ĩyo na higĩ ciayo ciothe o na higĩ cia rũirigo rũu
Exodus27:19 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Exodus27:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus28:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus28:2 Ningĩ ũtumithĩrie mũrũ wa maitũguo Harũni nguo cia ũthĩnjĩri Ngai cia kũmũheithia gĩtĩĩo o na cia kũmũthakaragia.
Exodus28:3 Ũcooke wĩte mabundi moothe marĩa heete ũũgĩ
Exodus28:4 Nguo iria megũtuma itariĩ ta ũũ: meere matume nguo ya gĩthũri
Exodus28:5 Namo mabundi macio mahũthĩre guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus28:6 “Nayo ebodi mamĩtume na guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus28:7 Ningĩ ebodi ĩyo ĩgĩe na mĩkwa ĩĩrĩ ya kũmĩoha ciandeinĩ
Exodus28:8 Naguo mũcibi ũrĩa ũgemeetio wega
Exodus28:9 Ũcooke woe tũhiga twĩrĩ twa goro twa rangi mũtuune ũtũkurure marĩĩtwa ma aariũ a Jakubu.
Exodus28:10 Namo marĩĩtwa macio ũmaandĩke kũringana na ũkũrũ wao; matandatũ kahigainĩ kamwe
Exodus28:11 Caria mũndũ mũũhĩgĩrĩru wĩrainĩ ũcio akurure tũhigainĩ tũu marĩĩtwa ma aariũ a Jakubu
Exodus28:12 Ũcooke wĩkĩre tũhiga tũu twerĩ mĩkwainĩ ĩrĩa ĩĩrĩ ya kuoha ebodi ĩyo ciandeinĩ
Exodus28:13 Ningĩ ũthondeke tũkonyo twa thahabu
Exodus28:14 na irengeeri igĩrĩ cia thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
Exodus28:15 “Ningĩ ũthondekere Mũthĩnjĩri Ũrĩa Mũnene nguo ya gĩthũri ya kũhũthĩra hĩndĩ ĩrĩa egũtua ciira. Nguo ĩyo ĩthondekwo na indo o ta iria ithondekeete ebodi na ĩgemio o ta yo.
Exodus28:16 Nguo ĩyo ĩkorwo ĩ thikwea na ĩkũnjwo maita meerĩ. Ũraihu wayo ũkorwo ũrĩ cenitimita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ naguo wariĩ ũkorwo ũrĩ o cenitimita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ.
Exodus28:17 Ũcooke ũmĩĩkĩre mĩhari ĩna ya tũhiga twa goro; mũhari wa mbere wĩkĩre kahiga ka goro ka rubi
Exodus28:18 Naguo mũhari wa keerĩ wĩkĩre kahiga ka goro ka rangi wa ngirini ũrĩa mũtheru mũno
Exodus28:19 Naguo mũhari wa gatatũ wĩkĩre kahiga ka goro ka rangi wa mburuu kana wa mũtukanio wa mburuu na ngirini
Exodus28:20 Naguo mũhari wa kana wĩkĩre kahiga ka goro ka rangi wa ngirini kana wa mũtukanio wa mburuu na ngirini
Exodus28:21 Natuo tũhiga tũu tuothe ikũmi na twĩrĩ o kahiga gakorwo gakururĩĩtwo rĩĩtwa rĩa ũmwe wa aariũ a Jakubu
Exodus28:22 Ningĩ nguo ĩyo ya gĩthũri ũmĩthondekere irengeeri ciogotheetwo ta mũhĩndo
Exodus28:23 Ũcooke ũthondeke icũhĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu ũciĩkĩre mĩthiainĩ ya na igũrũ ya nguo ĩyo ya gĩthũri
Exodus28:24 na woherere irengeeri icio igĩrĩ cia thahabu icũhĩinĩ icio cierĩ.
Exodus28:25 Mĩthia yerĩ ya irengeeri icio ũmĩoherere tũkonyoinĩ twerĩ
Exodus28:26 Ningĩ ũthondeke icũhĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu ũciĩkĩre koonainĩ cia mwena wa na kĩanda wa nguo ĩyo ya gĩthũri mũthiainĩ wa na thĩinĩ kũrigania na ebodi.
Exodus28:27 Ũcooke ũthondeke icũhĩ ingĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu ũciĩkĩre mĩkwainĩ ĩyo yerĩ ya ebodi ĩyo
Exodus28:28 Ũcooke woherere icũhĩ icio cia nguo ĩyo ya gĩthũri harĩ icũhĩ cia ebodi na kĩrengeeri kĩa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus28:29 “Rĩrĩa Harũni atoonya Handũ Harĩa Hatheru
Exodus28:30 Ningĩ nguoinĩ ĩyo ya gĩthũri wĩkĩre Urimu na Thumimu nĩguo ikoragwo irĩ gĩthũriinĩ kĩa Harũni rĩrĩa egũũka mbere yakwa. Hĩndĩ o yothe rĩrĩa egũũka mbere yakwa no mũhaka eekagĩre nguo ĩyo ya gĩthũri
Exodus28:31 “Nayo nguo ndaaya ya gwĩkĩrwo thĩ wa ebodi ĩthondekwo na guoya wa rangi wa mburuu.
Exodus28:32 Na ĩgĩe na irima rĩa gũtoonyeria mũtwe rĩtumĩrĩrwo gataamĩ gatirihĩĩtwo rĩtikaae gũtarũka.
Exodus28:33 (33-34) Nguo ĩyo ndaaya ũmĩrigicĩrie mwena wa kĩanda mĩthiainĩ na tũcunjuura tũhaana ta matunda ma makongomanga tũthondekeetwo na guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus28:34 Naake Harũni eekagĩre nguo ĩyo rĩrĩa egũtungata ta mũthĩnjĩri Ngai. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa egũũka mbere yakwa thĩinĩ wa Handũ Harĩa Hatheru kana rĩrĩa e kuuma ho
Exodus28:35 “Ningĩ ũthondeke kĩraũni gĩa thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno na ũkurure igũrũ wakĩo ciugo ici: ‘Wamũrĩirwo MWATHANI.’
Exodus28:36 Ũcooke ũkĩoherere mwenainĩ wa na mbere wa kĩremba kĩa Harũni na karengeeri ka rangi wa mburuu.
Exodus28:37 Naake Harũni agĩĩkĩrage thiithiinĩ wake
Exodus28:38 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus28:39 “O nao aariũ a Harũni ũmathondekere nguo ikinyĩĩte maruinĩ
Exodus28:40 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus28:41 Ningĩ ũmatumithĩrie thuruarĩ cia gataani cia kuuma njohero nginya cieroinĩ nĩ geetha matikaae kuonwo njaga ciao.
Exodus28:42 Naake Harũni na aariũ aake maciĩhumbage rĩrĩa rĩothe megũtoonya Hemainĩ yakwa
Exodus29:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus29:2 Ningĩ woe mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩimbie
Exodus29:3 Ũgaacooka ũmĩĩkĩre gĩkabũinĩ ũndutĩre ũkĩndutĩra ndeegwa ĩyo na ndũrũme icio igĩrĩ.
Exodus29:4 “Nawe ũkaareehe Harũni na aariũ aake mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo
Exodus29:5 Ũgaacooka ũhumbe Harũni nguo icio cia ũthĩnjĩri Nga: nguo ĩkinyĩĩte maruinĩ
Exodus29:6 Na ũkaamuoha kĩremba mũtwe na woherere kĩrembainĩ kĩu kĩraũni kĩrĩa gĩtheru kĩandĩkĩĩtwo atĩrĩ
Exodus29:7 Ũcooke woe maguta ma kwamũrana ũmũitĩrĩrie mũtwe.
Exodus29:8 “O nao aariũ aake ũkaamareehe na ũmeekĩre nguo ikinyĩĩte maruinĩ
Exodus29:9 ũmoohe mĩcibi mĩariĩ njohero ciao na ũmeekĩre tũkũbia mĩtwe. Ũguo nĩguo ũkaamũra Harũni na aariũ aake. O eene na njiarwa ciao magaatũũra maandungatagĩra ta athĩnjĩri Ngai nginya tene.
Exodus29:10 “Nayo ndeegwa ĩyo ũkaamĩreehe mbere ya Hema ya gũtũnganwo
Exodus29:11 Ũcooke ũthĩnjĩre ndeegwa ĩyo hau mbere yakwa mũromoinĩ wa Hema yakwa.
Exodus29:12 Ũcooke woe thakame ĩmwe yayo ũhake koona cia kĩgongoona na kĩara gĩaku
Exodus29:13 Warĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo woe rwambũ ruothe
Exodus29:14 No nyama cia ndeegwa ĩyo
Exodus29:15 “Ningĩ woe ndũrũme ĩmwe
Exodus29:16 Ũmĩthĩnje
Exodus29:17 Ũcooke ũtinangie ndũrũme ĩyo icunjĩ
Exodus29:18 Nayo ndũrũme ĩyo yothe ũmĩcinĩre kĩgongoonainĩ; ndũrũme ĩyo nĩ yo ĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI ya igongoona rĩa njino
Exodus29:19 “Ũcooke woe ndũrũme ya igongoona rĩa kwamũrana
Exodus29:20 Ũmĩthĩnje
Exodus29:21 Ũcooke woe thakame ĩmwe ya ĩrĩa ĩ kĩgongoonainĩ
Exodus29:22 “Ũcooke ũtinie maguta ma ndũrũme ĩyo
Exodus29:23 Kuuma gĩkabũinĩ kĩa mĩgate ĩrĩa ndutĩirwo
Exodus29:24 Indo icio ciothe ũciigĩrĩre mookoinĩ ma Harũni na aariũ aake
Exodus29:25 Ũcooke ũcioe kuuma mookoinĩ maao
Exodus29:26 “Ningĩ woe gĩthũri kĩa ndũrũme ĩyo
Exodus29:27 “Rĩrĩa mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ekwamũrwo
Exodus29:28 Nacio icunjĩ icio irĩtuĩkaga cia Harũni na aariũ aake
Exodus29:29 “Nacio nguo cia ũthĩnjĩri Ngai cia Harũni agaacitigĩra aariũ aake thuutha wa gũkua gwake nĩguo magaaciĩkĩraga magĩitĩrĩrio maguta makĩamũrwo.
Exodus29:30 Mũũriũ wake ũrĩa ũgaatuĩka mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ithenya rĩake agaaciĩhumbaga mĩthenya mũgwanja rĩrĩa egũtoonya gũtungata Handũ Harĩa Hatheru thĩinĩ wa Hema yakwa.
Exodus29:31 “Ningĩ woe ndũrũme ĩyo ya kwamũrana
Exodus29:32 Naake Harũni na aariũ aake marĩĩre nyama icio hamwe na mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩrĩ gĩkabũinĩ mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo.
Exodus29:33 Marĩe indo icio cia horohio ya meehia
Exodus29:34 Gĩcunjĩ o na kĩmwe kĩa nyama cia kwamũrana kana kĩa mĩgate ĩyo kĩngĩgaatigara gĩkinyie rũũciinĩ gĩgaacinwo na mwaki; gĩtikaanarĩo amu nĩ gĩtheru.
Exodus29:35 “Maũndũ macio nĩ mo ũgeeka Harũni na aariũ aake
Exodus29:36 O mũthenya no mũhaka ũkaarutaga ndeegwa ya igongoona rĩa meehia nĩ ũndũ wa horohio. Horohio ĩyo nĩgaatheria kĩgongoona. Nawe nĩũgaacooka ũgĩitĩrĩrie maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ nĩguo ũkĩamũre ũgĩtherie.
Exodus29:37 Maũndũ maya ũkaameeka o mũthenya mĩthenya mũgwanja. Nakĩo kĩgongoona kĩu nĩgĩgaagĩtuĩka gĩtheru biũ
Exodus29:38 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus29:39 Gatũrũme kamwe ũgakaruta rũũciinĩ
Exodus29:40 Na rĩrĩa ũkũruta gatũrũme kau ka mbere
Exodus29:41 Nako gatũrũme kau kangĩ ũgakaruta igongoona hwaĩinĩ
Exodus29:42 Ngũtũũra ndutagĩrwo igongoona rĩu rĩa njino hau mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo. Hau nĩ ho ndĩrĩtũnganaga na inyuĩ na ngaaranĩria na inyuĩ.
Exodus29:43 Ĩĩ
Exodus29:44 Nĩngũtũma Hema na kĩgongoona ituĩke theru
Exodus29:45 Na niĩ nĩngaatũũrania na andũ a Isiraeli
Exodus29:46 Nao nĩmakaamenya atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wao ũrĩa wamarutire bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri nĩ geetha ndũũranagie nao. Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wao.
Exodus30:1 “Ningĩ ũthondeke kĩgongoona kĩa mbaaũ cia mũgaa gĩa gũcinĩrwo ũbaani.
Exodus30:2 Nakĩo gĩkorwo gĩ thikwea kĩrĩ na ũraihu wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩna na ithaano
Exodus30:3 Ningĩ ũkĩhumbĩre na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno mĩena yakĩo ĩna o na hĩa ciakĩo
Exodus30:4 Ningĩ ũcooke ũthondeke icũhĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu cia gũgĩkuua
Exodus30:5 Mĩtĩ ĩyo ĩĩrĩ mĩraaya ũmĩthondeke ĩ ya mũgaa
Exodus30:6 Ũcooke ũige kĩgongoona kĩu mwena wa na nja wa mbathiya ĩrĩa ĩcuurĩĩtio mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Hau nĩ ho ndĩrĩtũnganaga nawe.
Exodus30:7 O rũũciinĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Harũni egũũka kũhaarĩria mataawa
Exodus30:8 Ũguo noguo Harũni arĩĩkaga rĩrĩa ekũgwatia mataawa hwaĩinĩ. Igongoona rĩu rĩa gũcina ũbaani rĩgũtũũra rĩrutagwo nĩ njiarwa ciake nginya tene.
Exodus30:9 Kĩgongoona kĩu gĩtikaanarutĩrwo ũbaani ũtarĩ mũtheru
Exodus30:10 Harũni nĩarĩrutaga igongoona rĩa gũtheria kĩgongoona kĩu o mwaka. Arĩĩkaga ũguo na ũndũ wa gũitĩrĩria hĩainĩ iria inya cia kĩgongoona kĩu thakame ya nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩrutĩĩtwo nĩ ũndũ wa gũgĩtheria. Ũndũ ũcio ũrĩĩkagwo o mwaka nginya tene. Kĩgongoona kĩu kĩrĩkoragwo kĩrĩ gĩtheru mũno
Exodus30:11 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus30:12 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũgũtara andũ a Isiraeli nĩ ũndũ wa kwenda kũmenya ũrĩa maigana-rĩ
Exodus30:13 O mũndũ ũrĩa ũgũtarwo no mũhaka arutage mbeeca iria ituĩtwo
Exodus30:14 Mũndũ o wothe ũgũtarwo wĩ na mĩaka mĩrongo ĩrĩ gũthiĩ na igũrũ
Exodus30:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũtongu ndakaarutage makĩria kana mũthĩĩni arutage nyiinyi hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mekũruta mbeeca icio
Exodus30:16 Ũrĩũnganagia mbeeca icio kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli ũgacihũthĩra na wĩra wa Hema yakwa. Igooti rĩu rĩrĩrutagwo rĩrĩ irĩhi rĩa kũhoroheria mĩoyo yao
Exodus30:17 MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus30:18 “Ũcooke ũthondeke mbakũri ya gwĩthambĩrwo ya gĩcango
Exodus30:19 Namo maaĩ macio nĩmo Harũni na aariũ aake marĩhũthagĩra gwĩthamba mooko na magũrũ.
Exodus30:20 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa megũtoonya Hemainĩ yakwa
Exodus30:21 No mũhaka methambage mooko na magũrũ
Exodus30:22 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus30:23 “Oya indo iria nungi wega mũno: manemane ĩrĩa ndweku ya ũritũ wa kiro ithathatũ
Exodus30:24 Na ningĩ woe mahuti ma mũtĩ wa mũthemba wa ndarathini ma ũritũ wa kiro ithathatũ
Exodus30:25 Ũgĩthondeke maguta matheru ma kwamũrana
Exodus30:26 Maguta macio ũmaitĩrĩrie Hema yakwa
Exodus30:27 meetha na indo ciayo ciothe
Exodus30:28 kĩgongoona gĩa gũcinĩrwo magongoona ma njino na indo ciakĩo ciothe
Exodus30:29 Indo icio ciothe ũgĩciamũre na njĩra ĩyo
Exodus30:30 Ningĩ ũcooke ũitĩrĩrie Harũni na aariũ aake maguta ũmaamũre matuĩke athĩnjĩri Ngai a kũndungatagĩra.
Exodus30:31 Ũcooke wĩre andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Exodus30:32 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus30:33 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũgaathondeka mangĩ ta mo
Exodus30:34 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus30:35 Indo icio ũcihũthĩre gũthondeka ũbaani ũtukanĩĩtio ta maguta manungi wega. Ũcooke wongerere cumbĩ wa gũtũma ũikarage ũrĩ mwega na ũrĩ mũtheru.
Exodus30:36 Ũmwe wa ũbaani ũcio ũũthĩe ũhinye biũ
Exodus30:37 Mũtikaanetukanĩrie ũbaani wanyu na njĩra ĩyo. Ũtuageei ta kĩndũ gĩtheru kĩamũrĩirwo MWATHANI.
Exodus30:38 Mũndũ o wothe angĩgeethondekera ũngĩ taguo aũtue maguta manungi wega ma kwĩhaka

Exodus31:4 nĩguo athugundage na ũũgĩ mĩcoro ya kũhũthĩrwo mawĩrainĩ ma gũtura indo cia thahabu
Exodus31:5 O na nĩndĩmũheete ũũgĩ wa gwacũhia tũhiga twa gũtheecererwo indoinĩ
Exodus31:6 Nĩthuurĩĩte Oholiabu mũrũ wa Ahisamaku wa mũhĩrĩga wa Dani arutithanagie wĩra naake. Ningĩ nĩheete mabundi moothe moogĩ ũũgĩ mũnene
Exodus31:7 Hema yakwa

Exodus32:1 Na rĩrĩ
Exodus32:2 Naake Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Exodus32:3 Andũ oothe magĩkĩruta icũhĩ ciao cia thahabu iria ciarĩ matũ magĩcitwarĩra Harũni.
Exodus32:4 Naake akĩoya icũhĩ icio
Exodus32:5 Ningĩ Harũni agĩaka kĩgongoona mbere ya gateegwa kau ka thahabu
Exodus32:6 Nao andũ oothe makĩrooka gũũkĩra rũũciinĩ tene makĩruta nyamũ cia magongoona ma njino
Exodus32:7 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus32:8 Nĩmarĩĩkĩĩtie gũtiga gũthiĩ na mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa ndamaathire mathiage nayo; nĩmatwekeetie thahabu mageethondekera mũhianano wa gateegwa
Exodus32:9 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ andũ aya nĩ aremi mũno
Exodus32:10 na tondũ ũcio ndũkaae kũndigĩrĩria; nĩndaakarĩĩtio nĩ o
Exodus32:11 No Musa agĩthaitha MWATHANI Ngai wake akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus32:12 Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma ũreke andũ a Misiri mahote kuuga atĩ watongoririe andũ aaku kuuma Misiri ũthiĩ ũkamooragĩre irĩmainĩ ũmaniine biũ? Tiga kũraakara; garũra meciiria na ũtige kũreehere andũ aaku ũũru ũyũ.
Exodus32:13 Ririkana ndungata ciaku Aburahamu
Exodus32:14 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩĩricũkwo na agĩtiga kũreehithĩria andũ ũũru ũrĩa oigĩĩte nĩekũmareehithĩria.
Exodus32:15 Naake Musa akĩhũndũka agĩikũrũka kuuma kĩrĩmainĩ
Exodus32:16 Nacio ihengere icio cierĩ ciathondekeetwo nĩ Ngai we mwene na no we wakururĩĩte maathani macio igũrũ rĩacio.
Exodus32:17 Na rĩrĩa Joshua aiguire inegene rĩa andũ makĩanĩrĩra akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus32:18 No Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus32:19 Rĩrĩa Musa aakuhĩrĩirie kambĩ akĩona mũhianano ũcio wa gateegwa
Exodus32:20 Agĩcooka akĩoya mũhianano ũcio maathondekeete akĩũcina na mwaki
Exodus32:21 Agĩcooka akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Exodus32:22 Harũni agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Exodus32:23 Maanjĩĩrire atĩrĩ
Exodus32:24 Na niĩ ngĩkĩmeera mandeehere indo ciao cia thahabu
Exodus32:25 Musa agĩkĩona atĩ Harũni nĩarekereirie andũ makarema na magetua irimũ maithoinĩ ma thũ ciao.
Exodus32:26 Kwoguo agĩkĩrũũgama mũromoinĩ wa kambĩ akĩanĩrĩra atĩrĩ

Exodus33:7 Na rĩĩrĩ

Exodus33:9 Thuutha wa Musa gũtoonya thĩinĩ

Exodus34:2 Nawe wĩharĩrie rũũciũ kĩrooko
Exodus34:3 Ndũgooke na mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Exodus34:4 Kwoguo Musa agĩacũhia ihengere ingĩ igĩrĩ cia mahiga
Exodus34:5 Naake MWATHANI agĩikũrũka arĩ thĩinĩ wa itu
Exodus34:6 Agĩcooka akĩhĩtũkĩra mbere yake akĩanĩrĩra atĩrĩ
Exodus34:7 Nĩhingagia kĩĩranĩro gĩakwa nginya mĩaka ngiri na ngiri
Exodus34:8 Musa akĩinamĩrĩra thĩ na ihenya agĩthaathaiya.
Exodus34:9 Agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Exodus34:10 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus34:11 Athĩkagĩraai mawatho marĩa ngũmũhe ũũmũũthĩ. Nĩngũingata Aamori
Exodus34:12 Mwĩmenyerereei mũtigaathondeke kĩrĩĩkanĩro na atũũri a bũrũri ũcio mũgũthiĩ
Exodus34:13 Handũ ha gwĩka ũguo
Exodus34:14 “Mũtikaanathaathaiye ngai ĩngĩ
Exodus34:15 Mwĩmenyerereei mũtigaathondeke kĩrĩĩkanĩro na atũũri a bũrũri ũcio
Exodus34:16 Nao aariũ aanyu mahota kũhikia airĩĩtu aao
Exodus34:17 “Mũtikaanethondekere ngai cia kĩgera mũcithaathayagie.
Exodus34:18 “Ningĩ tũũraai mũmenyereire Thigũkũ ya Mĩgate ĩrĩa Ĩtarĩ Mĩĩkĩre Ndaawa ya Kũimbia. Ta ũrĩa ndĩkĩĩtie kũmwatha
Exodus34:19 “Aariũ aanyu oothe arĩa marigithaathi nĩ aakwa
Exodus34:20 No irigithaathi rĩa ndigiri nĩmũrĩrĩkũũraga na ndũrũme. Angĩkorwo mũtirĩrĩkũũraga-rĩ
Exodus34:21 “Rutagaai wĩra mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Exodus34:22 “Na mũmenyagĩrĩre Thigũkũ ya Magetha rĩrĩa mwambĩrĩria kũgetha irio cia magetha ma mbere ma ngano. O na mũmenyagĩrĩre Thigũkũ ya Ithũnũ mũicoinĩ wa mwaka rĩrĩa mũkũgetha irio.
Exodus34:23 “Arũme oothe marĩũkaga gũũthaathaiya niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli maita matatũ o mwaka.
Exodus34:24 Ndarĩĩkia kũingata ndũũrĩrĩ imweherere
Exodus34:25 “Mũtikaanandutĩre mĩgate mĩimbie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkũndutĩra magongoona ma nyamũ. Na ningĩ mũtikaanareke gĩcunjĩ o na kĩmwe kĩa thigũkũ ya Bathaka kĩraare nginya rũũciinĩ.
Exodus34:26 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus34:27 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus34:28 Musa agĩgĩikara kũu kĩrĩmainĩ hamwe na MWATHANI mũthenya na ũtukũ
Exodus34:29 Rĩrĩa Musa aikũrũkire kuuma kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Sinai akuuĩĩte Maathani marĩa Ikũmi
Exodus34:30 Rĩrĩa Harũni na andũ oothe a Isiraeli maamuonire
Exodus34:31 No Musa akĩmeeta
Exodus34:32 Thuutha ũcio andũ oothe a Isiraeli makĩmũthiũrũrũkĩria
Exodus34:33 Rĩrĩa Musa aarĩĩkirie kwaria nao
Exodus34:34 Rĩrĩa rĩothe Musa aathiaga Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo kwaria na MWATHANI
Exodus34:35 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makoona ũthiũ wa Musa ũkĩhenia. Musa agagĩcooka akehumbĩra na gĩtambaya kĩu o nginya rĩrĩa rĩngĩ arĩthiĩ kwaria na MWATHANI.
Exodus35:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus35:2 Rutagaai wĩra mĩthenya ĩtandatũ
Exodus35:3 Mũtikaanakie o na mwaki ciikaroinĩ cianyu mũthenya ũcio wa Thabatũ.”
Exodus35:4 Naake Musa akĩĩra andũ oothe a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Exodus35:5 Rutĩraai MWATHANI mũhothi. Ũrĩa wothe ũkwenda gwĩka ũguo nĩareehe mũhothi wa thahabu
Exodus35:6 ndigi cia gataani iria njega cia guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus35:7 njũũa cia ndũrũme itobokeetio rangiinĩ igatuunĩha
Exodus35:8 maguta ma gwakia mataawa
Exodus35:9 na tũhiga twa goro twa rangi mũtuune na tũngĩ twa goro twa gũtheecererwo ebodiinĩ ya Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene o na nguoinĩ yake ya gĩthũri.
Exodus35:10 “Ningĩ andũ oothe arĩa marĩ na ũũgĩ nĩmooke mathondeke indo icio ciothe MWATHANI aathanĩĩte
Exodus35:11 nacio nĩ: Hema
Exodus35:12 Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro
Exodus35:13 meetha
Exodus35:14 mũtĩ wa gũcuuria mataawa na indo ciaguo ciothe
Exodus35:15 kĩgongoona gĩa gũcinĩra ũbaani hamwe na mĩtĩ yakĩo ĩrĩa mĩraaya
Exodus35:16 kĩgongoona kĩa magongoona ma njino
Exodus35:17 mbathiya cia gũcuurio mĩenainĩ ya nja ya Hema
Exodus35:18 higĩ na mĩkanda ya hema na nja ya yo
Exodus35:19 nguo iria irĩ riiri cia kwĩhumbwo nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai rĩrĩa megũtungata thĩinĩ wa Handũ harĩa Hatheru
Exodus35:20 Nao andũ oothe a Isiraeli magĩkĩehera harĩ Musa.
Exodus35:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus35:22 Arĩa oothe merutĩire gwĩka ũguo
Exodus35:23 Ningĩ ũrĩa wothe wakoragwo arĩ na gataani ĩrĩa njega
Exodus35:24 Nao arĩa oothe mangĩahotire kũruta kĩndũ kĩa betha kana gĩa gĩcango magĩtwarĩra MWATHANI mũhothi wao; nao arĩa oothe maarĩ na mbaaũ cia mũgaa ingĩrutĩrwo wĩra o na ũrĩkũ wĩrainĩ ũcio magĩcitwara.
Exodus35:25 Nao atumia arĩa maarĩ na ũũgĩ wa gũtuma magĩtwara ndigi cia gataani ĩrĩa njega
Exodus35:26 O na ningĩ makĩogotha ndigi cia guoya wa mbũri.
Exodus35:27 Nao atongoria magĩtwara tũhiga twa goro twa rangi mũtuune na tũhiga tũngĩ twa gũtheecererwo ebodiinĩ na nguoinĩ ya gĩthũri
Exodus35:28 mahuti marĩa manungaga wega
Exodus35:29 Ũguo noguo andũ oothe a Isiraeli arĩa meyendagĩra maatwarire mĩhothi yao kũrĩ MWATHANI ya wĩra ũcio aathĩĩte Musa arute.
Exodus35:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus35:31 akamũiyũria na roho wake. Nĩamũheete ũhoti
Exodus35:32 Amũheete ũũgĩ ũcio nĩguo athugundage mĩcoro ya kũhũthĩrwo mawĩrainĩ ma gũtura indo cia thahabu
Exodus35:33 Nĩamũheete ũũgĩ wa gwacũhia tũhiga twa gũtheecererwo indoinĩ
Exodus35:34 Ningĩ MWATHANI nĩaheete Bezaleli na Oholiabu mũrũ wa Ahisamaku wa mũhĩrĩga wa Dani
Exodus35:35 MWATHANI nĩamaheete ũhoti wa kũruta mawĩra ma mĩthemba yothe ya ũũgĩ
Exodus36:1 “Nao Bezaleli
Exodus36:2 Naake Musa agĩgĩĩta Bezaleli
Exodus36:3 Nao magĩkĩnengerwo nĩ Musa indo ciothe iria ciarutĩĩtwo nĩ andũ a Isiraeli cia gwaka Hema ĩyo nyamũre. No andũ a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ na mbere gũtwarĩra Musa mĩhothi yao rũũciinĩ o rũũciinĩ.
Exodus36:4 Namo mabundi marĩa maarutaga wĩra ũcio makiuma o mũndũ wĩrainĩ ũrĩa aarutaga
Exodus36:5 magĩthiĩ makĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus36:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Musa agĩgĩathana kambĩinĩ guothe atĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ndagathiĩ na mbere kũhotha kĩndũ nĩ ũndũ wa Hema ĩyo nyamũre. Nao andũ magĩgĩtiga gũtwara indo ingĩ.
Exodus36:7 Indo iria maarutĩĩte ciarĩ nyingĩ makĩria ma iria ciabatarainie kũrĩĩkia wĩra wothe.
Exodus36:8 Namo mabundi marĩa maarĩ njoorua mũno thĩinĩ wa mabundi marĩa maarutaga wĩra ũcio magĩgĩthondeka Hema ya gũtũnganwo. Makĩmĩthondeka na itambaya ikũmi cia gataani ĩrĩa njega itumĩĩtwo na ndigi cia guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus36:9 Itambaya icio nĩciaiganaine; o gĩtambaya kĩarĩ na ũraihu wa mita ikũmi na igĩrĩ na wariĩ wa mita igĩrĩ.
Exodus36:10 Nao makĩnyiitithania itambaya ithaano hamwe igĩtuĩka kĩmwe
Exodus36:11 Magĩcooka magĩthondeka ciana na gĩtambaya kĩa rangi wa mburuu magĩcitumĩrĩra mũthiainĩ wa itambaya cia mbere ithaano
Exodus36:12 Magĩtumĩrĩra ciana mĩrongo ĩtaano harĩ itambaya cia mbere o na ingĩ mĩrongo ĩtaano harĩ icio ingĩ ithaano. Nacio ciana icio igĩikara iringaine.
Exodus36:13 Ningĩ magĩthondeka ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtaano cia thahabu cia kũnyiitithania itambaya icio nĩguo ituĩke kĩndũ kĩmwe.
Exodus36:14 Ningĩ magĩthondeka hema ya kũhumbĩra Hema ĩyo na itambaya ikũmi na kĩmwe ithondekeetwo na guoya wa ng'ondu.
Exodus36:15 Nacio itambaya icio igĩthondekwo ciiganaine irĩ na ũraihu wa mita ikũmi na ithatũ na wariĩ wa mita igĩrĩ.
Exodus36:16 Itambaya ithaano magĩcitumania hamwe igĩtuĩka kĩndũ kĩmwe
Exodus36:17 Magĩcooka magĩtumĩrĩra ciana mĩrongo ĩtaano mũthiainĩ wa itambaya icio cia mbere
Exodus36:18 Ningĩ magĩthondeka ngathĩka mĩrongo ĩtaano cia gĩcango cia kũnyiitithania itambaya icio
Exodus36:19 Magĩcooka magĩthondekera hema ĩyo ciandarũũa igĩrĩ cia kũmĩhumbĩra; kĩmwe kĩa njũũa cia ndũrũme itobokeetio rangiinĩ mũtuune igatuunĩha
Exodus36:20 Ningĩ magĩthondeka mbaaũ cia mũgaa cia kũrũũgamia Hema ĩyo.
Exodus36:21 O rũbaaũ rwarĩ na ũraihu wa mita inya na wariĩ wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithathatũ
Exodus36:22 na o rũbaaũ rwarĩ na ihoce igĩrĩ cia kũnyiitithania mbaaũ icio hamwe.
Exodus36:23 Magĩgĩthondeka mbaaũ mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ cia mwena wa na kĩanda
Exodus36:24 na njikarĩro ciacio mĩrongo ĩna cia betha
Exodus36:25 Naguo mwena wa na rũgongo wa Hema ĩyo makĩũthondekera mbaaũ mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
Exodus36:26 na njikarĩro ciacio mĩrongo ĩna cia betha
Exodus36:27 Ningĩ mwena wa na thuutha wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus36:28 magĩcooka magĩthondeka mbaaũ ingĩ igĩrĩ cia koona.
Exodus36:29 Nacio icio cia koona ikĩnyiitithanio gĩtinainĩ igĩthiĩ inyiitithanĩĩtio o ro ũguo nginya igũrũ. Nacio mbaaũ icio cierĩ cia koona magĩcithondeka o ro ũguo.
Exodus36:30 Nacio mbaaũ ciothe ciarĩ inyaanya na njikarĩro ikũmi na ithathatũ
Exodus36:31 Ningĩ magĩthondeka mĩgamba ikũmi na ĩtaano ya mũgaa
Exodus36:32 nayo ĩtaano ya mbaaũ cia mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ
Exodus36:33 Ningĩ magĩthondeka mũgamba wa gatagatĩ ka mbaaũ iria irũngiĩ
Exodus36:34 Nacio mbaaũ icio irũngiĩ magĩcihumbĩra na thahabu
Exodus36:35 Ningĩ magĩtuma mbathiya ya kũhakania ya gataani ĩrĩa njega ĩtumĩĩtwo na ndigi cia guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus36:36 Magĩcooka magĩthondeka itugĩ inya cia mũgaa cia gũcuurio mbathiya ĩyo
Exodus36:37 Ningĩ mũromo wa Hema makĩũtumĩra mbathiya ya gataani ĩrĩa njega ĩtumĩĩtwo na ndigi cia guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus36:38 Nayo mbathiya ĩyo makĩmĩthondekera itugĩ ithaano hamwe na ihoce ciacio
Exodus37:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus37:2 Agĩcooka akĩrĩhumbĩra na thĩinĩ na igũrũ na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
Exodus37:3 Ningĩ akĩrĩthondekera icũhĩ inya cia kũrĩkuua cia thahabu
Exodus37:4 Ningĩ agĩthondeka mĩtĩ mĩraaya ya mũgaa akĩmĩhumbĩra na thahabu guothe
Exodus37:5 agĩcooka akĩmĩharũkia icũhĩinĩ icio ciarĩ mwenainĩ wa Ithandũkũ rĩu.
Exodus37:6 Ningĩ agĩthondeka gĩkunĩko gĩa thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
Exodus37:7 Agĩcooka agĩthondeka ciũmbe irĩa irĩ mathagu igĩrĩ na thahabu ya gũturwo
Exodus37:8 Bezaleli athondekire ciũmbe icio igĩtuĩka kĩndũ kĩmwe na gĩkunĩko kĩu inyiitaine nakĩo mĩthiainĩ yakĩo.
Exodus37:9 Ciũmbe icio ciaikaire iroranĩĩte hau gĩkunĩkoinĩ na itambũrũkĩĩtie mathagu maacio makahumbĩra gĩkunĩko kĩu.
Exodus37:10 Ningĩ agĩthondeka meetha ya mbaaũ cia mũgaa ĩrĩ na ũraihu wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩnaana na inyaanya
Exodus37:11 Agĩcooka akĩmĩhumbĩra na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
Exodus37:12 Agĩcooka akĩmĩĩkĩra karũbaaũ ka wariĩ wa mirimita mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithaano mĩena yothe
Exodus37:13 Ningĩ akĩmĩthondekera icũhĩ inya cia thahabu cia kũmĩkuua
Exodus37:14 Nacio icũhĩ icio cia kũharũkio mĩtĩ ĩrĩa mĩraaya ya gũkuua meetha ĩyo agĩciĩkĩra hakuhĩ na karũbaaũ kau gaceke.
Exodus37:15 Agĩthondeka mĩtĩ ĩyo mĩraaya ya mũgaa na akĩmĩhumbĩra na thahabu.
Exodus37:16 Nacio indo cia meetha ĩyo agĩcithondeka na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
Exodus37:17 Ningĩ agĩthondeka mũtĩ wa gũcuuria mataawa wa thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno. Nakĩo gĩtina kĩaguo o na mũtĩ waguo agĩcithondeka na thahabu ya gũturwo; nacio ikombe ciaguo
Exodus37:18 Naguo mũtĩ ũcio ũgĩkorwo na honge ithathatũ ciumĩĩte mĩenainĩ yaguo
Exodus37:19 O rũhonge rwa icio ithathatũ rwarĩ na mahũa ma kũũgemia mahaana ihũa rĩa mũroothi na moothe maarĩ na ikombe ithatũ na thundo ithatũ.
Exodus37:20 Naguo mũtĩ ũcio wa kũhangĩrwo mataawa warĩ na mahũa mana ma kũgemia mahaana ihũa rĩa mũroothi
Exodus37:21 Ningĩ o mũhuro wa honge igĩrĩ igĩrĩ haarĩ na thundo ĩmwe.
Exodus37:22 Nacio thundo na honge ciacio
Exodus37:23 Agĩcooka agĩthondekera mũtĩ ũcio mataawa mũgwanja
Exodus37:24 Naguo mũtĩ ũcio wa kũhangĩrwo mataawa o hamwe na indo ciaguo ciothe agĩcithondeka na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno cia ũritũ wa kiro mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ithaano.
Exodus37:25 Ningĩ agĩthondeka kĩgongoona kĩa mbaaũ cia mũgaa gĩa gũcinĩrwo ũbaani. Nakĩo agĩgĩthondeka kĩrĩ thikwea
Exodus37:26 Agĩcooka agĩkĩhumbĩra na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
Exodus37:27 Agĩcooka agĩthondeka icũhĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu cia gũgĩkuua
Exodus37:28 Nayo mĩtĩ ĩyo ĩĩrĩ mĩraaya akĩmĩthondeka na mũgaa na akĩmĩhumbĩra na thahabu.
Exodus37:29 Ningĩ agĩthondeka maguta matheru ma kwamũrana na ũbaani ũrĩa ũnungaga wega ũtukanĩĩtio na indo nungi wega
Exodus38:1 Nakĩo kĩgongoona gĩa gũcinĩra magongoona-rĩ
Exodus38:2 Agĩcooka agĩthondeka hĩa ciakĩo igũrũ wa koona ciakĩo inya
Exodus38:3 Ningĩ agĩthondeka indo ciothe cia kĩgongoona kĩu
Exodus38:4 Agĩcooka agĩthondeka rũgara rwa gĩcango akĩrwĩkĩra mũhuro wa mũgũkũ wa kĩgongoona kĩu
Exodus38:5 Agĩcooka agĩthondeka icũhĩ inya cia gũgĩkuua agĩciĩkĩra koonainĩ ciakĩo inya.
Exodus38:6 Na agĩthondeka mĩtĩ mĩraaya ya mũgaa ya gũgĩkuua
Exodus38:7 agĩcooka akĩmĩharũkia icũhĩinĩ iria irĩ mĩena ya kĩgongoona kĩu cia gũgĩkuua. Nakĩo kĩgongoona kĩu agĩgĩthondeka na mbaaũ na agĩtiga irima gatagatĩ.
Exodus38:8 Ningĩ agĩthondeka mbakũri ya gwĩthambĩrwo ya gĩcango na njikarĩro ya yo ya gĩcango; acithondekire na iciicio cia atumia arĩa maatungataga mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo.
Exodus38:9 Ningĩ Hema ya gũtũnganwo akĩmĩthondekera nja ya yo ĩirigĩirwo na mbathiya cia gataani ĩrĩa njega.Mwena wa na kĩanda mbathiya icio ciarĩ na ũraihu wa mita mĩrongo ĩna na inya
Exodus38:10 na cianyiitĩrĩirwo na itugĩ mĩrongo ĩrĩ cia gĩcango irĩ na njikarĩro mĩrongo ĩrĩ o cia gĩcango
Exodus38:11 Ũguo noguo mwena wa na rũgongo wa nja ĩyo watariĩ.
Exodus38:12 Naguo mwena wa na ithũĩro haarĩ na mbathiya ciarĩ na ũraihu wa mita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ
Exodus38:13 Naguo mwena wa irathĩro
Exodus38:14 (14-15) O mwena wa mũromo agĩthondeka na mbathiya cia mita ithathatũ na boiniti ithathatũ
Exodus38:15 Mbathiya ciothe cia kũirigĩra nja ĩyo ciathondekeetwo na gataani ĩrĩa njega.
Exodus38:16 Nacio njikarĩro cia itugĩ ciathondekeetwo na gĩcango
Exodus38:17 Nayo mbathiya ya mũromoinĩ wa nja ĩyo yathondekeetwo na gataani ĩrĩa njega ĩtumĩĩtwo na ndigi cia guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus38:18 Yanyiitĩrĩirwo nĩ itugĩ inya irĩ njikarĩroinĩ ciacio inya cia gĩcango. Tũhocio twa itugĩ icio
Exodus38:19 Nacio higĩ ciothe cia Hema ĩyo na cia rũirigo rũu ciathondekeetwo na gĩcango.
Exodus38:20 Ũyũ nĩguo mũtaratara wa mũigana wa indo iria ciahũthĩrirwo gũthondeka Hema ya gũtũnganwo
Exodus38:21 Naake Bezaleli mũrũ wa Uri na mũcũkũrũ wa Huri
Exodus38:22 Naake aateithĩrĩirio wĩrainĩ ũcio nĩ Oholiabu mũrũ wa Ahisamaku
Exodus38:23 Thahabu ĩrĩa yothe yamũrĩirwo MWATHANI nĩ ũndũ wa gũthondeka Hema ĩyo nyamũre yarĩ na ũritũ wa kiro ngiri ĩmwe
Exodus38:24 Nayo betha ĩrĩa yarutirwo nĩ andũ acio maatarwo
Exodus38:25 Mũigana ũcio waiganaine na mbeeca ciothe iria ciarĩhĩĩtwo nĩ andũ oothe makĩyandĩkithia
Exodus38:26 Kiro ngiri ithatũ na magana mana cia betha (3
Exodus38:27 Nacio kiro mĩrongo ĩtatũ cia betha iria ciatigarire
Exodus38:28 Nakĩo gĩcango kĩrĩa kĩamũrĩirwo MWATHANI kĩarĩ kiro ngiri igĩrĩ na magana mana na mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithaano (2
Exodus38:29 Agĩgĩthondeka nakĩo njikarĩro cia mũromo wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo
Exodus38:30 hamwe na njikarĩro cia gũthiũrũrũkĩria nja ya Hema ĩyo
Exodus39:1 Nao magĩtuma nguo iria irĩ riiri cia kwĩhumbwo nĩ Harũni rĩrĩa egũtunga thĩinĩ wa Handũ Harĩa Haamũre. Magĩcituma na ndigi cia guoya wa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus39:2 Ningĩ magĩtuma ebodi na ndigi cia thahabu
Exodus39:3 Magĩkĩhũũrahũũra thahabu makĩmĩtua ithuuma hũthũ mũno
Exodus39:4 Magĩcooka magĩthondekera ebodi ĩyo mĩkwa ya kũmĩoha ciandeinĩ makĩmĩtumĩrĩra mĩthiainĩ ya yo nĩguo yohagwo.
Exodus39:5 Naguo mũcibi ũrĩa wagemeetio wega
Exodus39:6 Ningĩ magĩthondeka tũhiga twa goro twa rangi mũtuune magĩtwĩkĩra tũkonyoinĩ tũgemie twa thahabu
Exodus39:7 Magĩcooka magĩtwĩkĩra mĩkwainĩ ĩrĩa ĩĩrĩ ya kuoha ebodi ĩyo ciandeinĩ
Exodus39:8 Magĩcooka magĩthondeka nguo ya gĩthũri na indo o ta iria ciathondekeete ebodi
Exodus39:9 Nayo nguo ĩyo yarĩ ya thikwea na ĩgakũnjwo maita meerĩ. Ũraihu wayo warĩ cenitimita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ na wariĩ warĩ o cenitimita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ.
Exodus39:10 Magĩcooka makĩmĩĩkĩra mĩhari ĩna ya tũhiga twa goro; mũhari wa mbere makĩwĩkĩra kahiga ka rubi
Exodus39:11 Naguo mũhari wa keerĩ makĩwĩkĩra kahiga ka goro ka rangi wa ngirini ũrĩa mũtheru mũno
Exodus39:12 Naguo mũhari wa gatatũ makĩwĩkĩra kahiga ka goro ka rangi wa mburuu kana wa mĩtukanio wa mburuu na ngirini
Exodus39:13 Naguo mũhari wa kana makĩwĩkĩra kahiga ka goro ka rangi wa ngirini kana wa mũtukanio wa mburuu na ngirini
Exodus39:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus39:15 Na nguo ĩyo ya gĩthũri makĩmĩthondekera irengeeri ciogotheetwo ta mũhĩndo
Exodus39:16 Magĩcooka magĩthondeka tũkonyo twĩrĩ twa thahabu na icũhĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu magĩciĩkĩra mĩthiainĩ yerĩ ya na igũrũ ya nguo ĩyo ya gĩthũri.
Exodus39:17 Nao makĩoherera irengeeri iria igĩrĩ cia thahabu icũhĩinĩ icio cierĩ.
Exodus39:18 Magĩcooka makĩoherera mĩthia ĩyo ĩngĩ ĩĩrĩ ya irengeeri icio tũkonyoinĩ tũu twerĩ
Exodus39:19 Ningĩ magĩthondeka icũhĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu magĩciĩkĩra koonainĩ cierĩ cia na thĩ cia nguo ĩyo ya gĩthũri
Exodus39:20 Magĩcooka magĩthondeka icũhĩ ingĩ igĩrĩ cia thahabu magĩciĩkĩra mĩkwainĩ ĩyo yerĩ ya ebodi kĩanda wa icio ingĩ mwenainĩ wa na mbere wayo; hakuhĩ na inyiitithanĩrio rĩayo
Exodus39:21 O ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa
Exodus39:22 Nayo nguo ndaaya ya gwĩkĩrwo thĩ wa ebodi ĩgĩthondekwo na ndigi cia guoya wa rangi wa mburuu wiki.
Exodus39:23 Narĩo irima rĩa gũtoonyeria mũtwe rĩgĩtumĩrĩrwo gĩtaamĩ rĩtirihĩĩtwo rĩtikaae gũtarũka.
Exodus39:24 (24-26) Ningĩ nguo ĩyo ndaaya makĩmĩriigicĩria mwena wa kĩanda mĩthiainĩ na tũcunjuura tũhaana ta matunda ma makongomanga tũthondekeetwo na gataani ĩrĩa njega
Exodus39:25 Magĩcooka magĩthondekera Harũni o hamwe na aariũ aake nguo ikinyĩĩte maruinĩ
Exodus39:26 iremba
Exodus39:27 na mũcibi mwariĩ wa gataani ĩrĩa njega yogotheetwo
Exodus39:28 Ningĩ magĩthondeka kĩraũni kĩrĩa kĩamũre
Exodus39:29 Magĩkĩoherera mwena wa na mbere wa kĩremba na kĩrengeeri kĩa rangi wa mburuu
Exodus39:30 Wĩra ũcio wothe wa gũthondeka Hema ya gũtũnganwo ũgĩkĩrĩĩka. Andũ acio a Isiraeli magĩgĩĩka maũndũ moothe marĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa.
Exodus39:31 Magĩkĩreehere Musa Hema ĩyo na indo ciayo ciothe
Exodus39:32 kĩandarũũa kĩa njũũa cia ndũrũme itobokeetio rangiinĩ igatuunĩha
Exodus39:33 Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩrĩ na ihengere iria cia mahiga
Exodus39:34 meetha o hamwe na indo ciayo ciothe
Exodus39:35 mũtĩ ũrĩa wa thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno wa kũhangĩrwo mataawa
Exodus39:36 kĩgongoona gĩa thahabu
Exodus39:37 kĩgongoona gĩa gĩcango hamwe na kĩrũtara gĩakĩo gĩa gĩcango
Exodus39:38 mbathiya cia gũcuurio mĩena ya nja ya Hema
Exodus39:39 nguo iria irĩ riiri cia kwĩhumbwo nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai marĩ thĩinĩ wa Handũ hau Hatheru
Exodus39:40 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩkorwo marutĩĩte wĩra wothe o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa.
Exodus39:41 Naake Musa akĩĩrorera wĩra ũcio wothe akĩona atĩ nĩmaũrutĩĩte o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathanĩĩte. Kwoguo Musa agĩkĩmaraathima.
Exodus40:1 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Exodus40:2 “Mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mbere ũkaarũũgamia Hema ya gũtũnganwo.
Exodus40:3 Narĩo Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩrĩ na Maathani marĩa Ikũmi ũkaarĩtoonyia thĩinĩ wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus40:4 Ningĩ ũgaatoonyia meetha thĩinĩ na indo ciayo ũciigĩrĩre igũrũ. O naguo mũtĩ ũrĩa wa kũhangĩrwo mataawa ũkaũtoonyia thĩinĩ na ũũhangĩre mataawa maguo.
Exodus40:5 Ũgaacooka ũige kĩgongoona kĩrĩa gĩa thahabu gĩa gũcinĩrwo ũbaani mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro na ũcuurie mbathiya hau mũromoinĩ wa Hema.
Exodus40:6 Ningĩ ũgaacooka ũige kĩgongoona kĩa magongoona ma njino mbere ya Hema ĩyo.
Exodus40:7 Nayo mbakũri ya gwĩthambĩra ũkaamĩiga gatagatĩ ka Hema ĩyo na kĩgongoona na ũmĩiyũrie maaĩ.
Exodus40:8 Ningĩ ũkaarũũgamia itugĩ cia rũirigo
Exodus40:9 “Thuutha wa ũguo ũgaacooka woe maguta marĩa ma kwamũrana ũitĩrĩrie Hema ĩyo o na indo iria irĩ thĩinĩ wayo. Ũkaamĩamũra hamwe na indo ciayo ciothe
Exodus40:10 Ningĩ ũgaacooka ũitĩrĩrie maguta kĩgongoona kĩa magongoona ma njino ũkĩamũre
Exodus40:11 O na ningĩ ũgaitĩrĩria kĩraĩ gĩa gwĩthambĩra hamwe na njikarĩro yakĩo maguta
Exodus40:12 “Ningĩ ũkaareehe Harũni na aariũ aake mũromoinĩ wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus40:13 Ũgaacooka ũhumbe Harũni nguo cia ũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Exodus40:14 O na ũkaareehe aariũ aake ũmahumbe nguo ikinyĩĩte maruinĩ.
Exodus40:15 Ũcooke ũmaitĩrĩrie maguta
Exodus40:16 Naake Musa agĩgĩĩka maũndũ moothe o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aamwathĩĩte.
Exodus40:17 Kwoguo mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mbere wa mwaka wa keerĩ thuutha wa moima Misiri
Exodus40:18 Musa agĩkĩiga njikarĩro ciayo thĩ agĩciara wega
Exodus40:19 Agĩcooka agĩtambũrũkia kĩandarũũa igũrũ wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus40:20 Agĩcooka akĩoya ihengere iria igĩrĩ
Exodus40:21 Agĩcooka agĩtoonyia Ithandũkũ rĩu thĩinĩ wa Hemainĩ ĩyo na agĩcuuria mbathiya ya kũhakania
Exodus40:22 Nayo meetha akĩmĩiga Hemainĩ ĩyo mwana wa na rũgongo
Exodus40:23 agĩcooka akĩiga igũrũ wayo mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI
Exodus40:24 Naguo mũtĩ wa gũcuuria mataawa akĩũiga
Exodus40:25 namo mataawa akĩmagwatĩria hau mbere ya MWATHANI
Exodus40:26 Agĩcooka akĩiga kĩgongoona kĩrĩa gĩa thahabu thĩinĩ wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus40:27 na agĩcinĩra igũrũ rĩakĩo ũbaani ũrĩa ũnungaga wega
Exodus40:28 Ningĩ agĩcuuria mbathiya hau mũromoinĩ wa Hema ĩyo
Exodus40:29 na hau mbere ya mbathiya ĩyo akĩiga kĩgongoona kĩrĩa kĩa magongoona ma njino. Agĩcooka akĩrutĩra magongoona ma njino igũrũ wakĩo
Exodus40:30 Nakĩo kĩraĩ kĩrĩa gĩa gwĩthambĩra agĩkĩiga gatagatĩ ka Hema ĩyo na kĩgongoona
Exodus40:31 Naake Musa
Exodus40:32 rĩrĩa rĩothe megũtoonya Hemainĩ ĩyo kana kĩgongoonainĩ kĩu
Exodus40:33 Ningĩ Musa akĩrũũgamia itugĩ cia rũirigo
Exodus40:34 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus40:35 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo Musa ndaigana kũhota gũtoonya Hemainĩ ĩyo.
Exodus40:36 Na rĩĩrĩ
Exodus40:37 No itu rĩu rĩaga kwehera
Exodus40:38 Thĩinĩ wa ng'endo ciao ciothe
Leviticus1:1 Naake MWATHANI arĩ Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo
Leviticus1:2 marĩa andũ a Isiraeli maagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrũmagĩrĩra hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe mekũruta magongoona maao.“Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ o wothe wanyu ekũruta igongoona rĩa nyamũ-rĩ
Leviticus1:3 Angĩkorwo mũndũ ekũruta ĩmwe ya ng'ombe ciake ta igongoona rĩa njino
Leviticus1:4 Naake aambe aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe wa nyamũ ĩyo
Leviticus1:5 Mũndũ ũcio acooke amĩthĩnjĩre o hau
Leviticus1:6 Naake mũndũ ũcio acooke amĩrute rũũa na amĩtinangie icunjĩ.
Leviticus1:7 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai maare ngũ wega igũrũ wa kĩgongoona kĩu
Leviticus1:8 Macooke matandaiye icunjĩ icio cia nyamũ ĩyo wega igũrũ wa mwaki ũcio
Leviticus1:9 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus1:10 “Angĩkorwo mũndũ araruta ĩmwe ya ng'ondu kana mbũri ciake-rĩ
Leviticus1:11 Naake amĩthĩnjĩre mwena wa na rũgongo wa kĩgongoona
Leviticus1:12 Mũndũ ũcio arĩĩkia gũtinangia nyamũ ĩyo icunjĩ
Leviticus1:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus1:14 “ Angĩkorwo mũndũ araruta mĩthemba ya nyoni ta igongoona rĩa njino-rĩ
Leviticus1:15 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai amĩtware kĩgongoonainĩ
Leviticus1:16 Ningĩ acooke arute kaigangio kaayo hamwe na taatha wako aciikie mwena wa irathĩro wa kĩgongoona harĩa mũhu ũitagwo.
Leviticus1:17 Acooke anyiite mathagu maayo meerĩ
Leviticus2:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus2:2 aũtwarĩre athĩnjĩri Ngai a mbarĩ ya Harũni. Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa ũratungata hĩndĩ ĩyo arũme rũhĩ rũgima rwa mũtu ũcio ũitĩrĩirio maguta
Leviticus2:3 Kĩrĩa gĩgũtigara kĩa igongoona rĩu rĩa mũtu gĩtuĩke gĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai; kĩndũ kĩu nĩ gĩtheru mũno
Leviticus2:4 “Angĩkorwo igongoona rĩrĩa rĩrarutwo nĩ rĩa mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩthondekeirwo obeniinĩ-rĩ
Leviticus2:5 “Angĩkorwo igongoona rĩrĩa rĩrarutwo nĩ rĩa thigonji-rĩ
Leviticus2:6 Rĩrĩa ũraciruta ta igongoona
Leviticus2:7 “Angĩkorwo igongoona rĩrĩa rĩrarutwo nĩ rĩa mĩgate ĩrugĩĩtwo na rũgĩo-rĩ
Leviticus2:8 Nayo mĩgate ĩyo ĩrugĩĩtwo ũguo ĩtwarwo ĩrĩ igongoona kũrĩ MWATHANI
Leviticus2:9 Acooke ooe mĩgate ĩmwe ya igongoona rĩu amĩcinĩre kĩgongoonainĩ igũrũ ĩrĩ ta kĩndũ gĩa kuonania atĩ mĩgate ĩyo yothe nĩ MWATHANI ĩrutĩirwo. Mũtararĩko wa igongoona rĩu rĩa mũtu nĩũkenagia MWATHANI.
Leviticus2:10 Mĩgate ya igongoona ĩrĩa ĩgũtigara ĩtuĩke ya athĩnjĩri Ngai; mĩgate ĩyo nĩ mĩtheru mũno
Leviticus2:11 “Gũtirĩ igongoona o na rĩrĩkũ rĩa mũtu mũrĩrutagĩra MWATHANI mwĩkĩrĩĩte ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate; nĩ ũndũ gũtirĩ hĩndĩ o na ĩmwe mũrĩhũthagĩra ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate
Leviticus2:12 Nĩmwagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrutagĩra MWATHANI magongoona ma maciaro ma mbere ma irio iria mũgethaga mwaka o mwaka. No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus2:13 Ĩkagĩraai cumbĩ magongoonainĩ maanyu ma mũtu
Leviticus2:14 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus2:15 Mũgacooka mũgaitĩrĩria igongoona rĩu maguta
Leviticus2:16 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai agacina gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe kĩa irio icio thĩe o na maguta mamwe
Leviticus3:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus3:2 Mũndũ ũcio aambe aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe wa nyamũ ĩyo
Leviticus3:3 macooke marute nyama imwe cia nyamũ ĩyo ĩrĩ igongoona rĩa gũcinĩrwo MWATHANI. Nyama icio nĩ: rwambũ rwa nyama cia nda
Leviticus3:4 higo cierĩ na rwambũ rwacio
Leviticus3:5 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai macinĩre nyama icio ciothe kĩgongoonainĩ igũrũ hamwe na igongoona rĩa njino. Mũtararĩko wa igongoona rĩu rĩa gũcinwo nĩũkenagia MWATHANI.
Leviticus3:6 “Angĩkorwo ng'ondu kana mbũri nĩ yo ĩkũrutwo ĩrĩ igongoona rĩa thaayũ-rĩ
Leviticus3:7 Angĩkorwo mũndũ nĩ ng'ondu araruta
Leviticus3:8 aagĩrĩirwo nĩambe aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe wayo
Leviticus3:9 macooke marutĩre MWATHANI nyama imwe cia ng'ondu ĩyo irĩ igongoona rĩa gũcinwo na mwaki. Nyama icio nĩ: maguta
Leviticus3:10 higo cierĩ na rwambũ rwacio
Leviticus3:11 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa ũratungata hĩndĩ ĩyo acinĩre nyama icio ciothe kĩgongoonainĩ igũrũ irĩ igongoona rĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI na ũndũ wa gũcinwo.
Leviticus3:12 “Angĩkorwo mũndũ ũcio araruta mbũri-rĩ
Leviticus3:13 aagĩrĩirwo nĩambe aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe wayo
Leviticus3:14 macooke marutĩre MWATHANI nyama imwe cia mbũri ĩyo irĩ igongoona rĩa ũiguano. Nyama icio nĩ: rwambũ rwa nyama cia nda
Leviticus3:15 higo cierĩ na rwambũ rwacio
Leviticus3:16 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai acine nyama icio ciothe kĩgongoonainĩ irĩ igongoona rĩa njino rĩrĩa mũtararĩko warĩo ũkenagia MWATHANI. Maguta moothe nĩ ma MWATHANI.
Leviticus3:17 Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wĩtĩkĩrĩĩtio kũrĩa maguta kana thakame
Leviticus4:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI agĩatha Musa
Leviticus4:2 eere andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Leviticus4:3 “Angĩkorwo nĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene wĩhĩĩtie
Leviticus4:4 Naake akĩreehe ndeegwa ĩyo mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo
Leviticus4:5 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene ooe thakame ĩmwe ya ndeegwa ĩyo
Leviticus4:6 Acooke atobokie kĩara gĩake thakameinĩ ĩyo
Leviticus4:7 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus4:8 Nayo ndeegwa ĩyo ya igongoona rĩa meehia amĩrute maguta moothe
Leviticus4:9 higo cierĩ na rwambũ rwacio
Leviticus4:10 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ooe maguta macio amacinĩre kĩgongoonainĩ kĩrĩa kĩrutagĩrwo magongoona ma njino
Leviticus4:11 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus4:12 acitware ciothe nja ya kambĩ handũ hatarĩ na thaahu harĩa haitagwo mũhu
Leviticus4:13 “Angĩkorwo nĩ mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli wĩhĩĩtie ũtekwenda
Leviticus4:14 wĩhia ũcio wamenyeka
Leviticus4:15 Nao atongoria a mũingĩ ũcio maambe maigĩrĩre mooko maao mũtwe wa ndeegwa ĩyo
Leviticus4:16 Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene ooe thakame ĩmwe ya ndeegwa ĩyo
Leviticus4:17 acooke atobokie kĩara gĩake thakameinĩ ĩyo
Leviticus4:18 Acooke ahake thakame ĩmwe koona cia kĩgongoona gĩa gũcinĩra ũbaani kĩrĩa kĩrĩ Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo
Leviticus4:19 Ningĩ ooe maguta moothe ma ndeegwa ĩyo amacinĩre kĩgongoonainĩ kĩu.
Leviticus4:20 Ageeka ndeegwa ĩyo o ta ũrĩa eekaga ndeegwa ya igongoona rĩa meehia; na njĩra ĩyo akĩrutĩre mũingĩ ũcio igongoona rĩa horohio
Leviticus4:21 Nayo ndeegwa ĩyo amĩoe
Leviticus4:22 “Angĩkorwo mũtongoria nĩwe wĩhĩĩtie atekwenda
Leviticus4:23 angĩmenyithio wĩhia ũcio eehĩĩtie
Leviticus4:24 Naake aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe wayo
Leviticus4:25 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai atobokie kĩara gĩake thakameinĩ ya nyamũ ĩyo
Leviticus4:26 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus4:27 “Mũndũ ũmwe wa andũ aanyu angĩĩhia atekwenda
Leviticus4:28 amenyithio wĩhia ũcio eehĩĩtie
Leviticus4:29 Naake aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe waguo
Leviticus4:30 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai atobokie kĩara thakameinĩ ya nyamũ ĩyo
Leviticus4:31 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus4:32 “Angĩkorwo mũndũ ũcio ekũruta ng'ondu ĩtuĩke igongoona rĩa meehia maake-rĩ
Leviticus4:33 Naake aigĩrĩre guoko gwake mũtwe wayo
Leviticus4:34 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai atobokie kĩara gĩake thakameinĩ ya nyamũ ĩyo
Leviticus4:35 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus5:1 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Leviticus5:2 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩhuutia kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩ mũgiro atekwenda
Leviticus5:3 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩhuutia kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩ mũgiro kiumanĩĩte na mũndũ atekwenda
Leviticus5:4 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩĩhĩta nĩ ũndũ o wothe ataambĩĩte gwĩciiria nĩ atĩa areeka
Leviticus5:5 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ angĩkorwo ahĩtĩĩtie ũndũinĩ o na ũmwe wa maũndũ macio
Leviticus5:6 acooke atwarĩre MWATHANI igongoona rĩa mwatĩ kana mũgoma nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhia ũcio eekĩĩte
Leviticus5:7 “Angĩkorwo mũndũ ndangĩona mwatĩ kana mũgoma wa kũruta-rĩ
Leviticus5:8 Agĩcitwarĩre mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Leviticus5:9 acooke aminjaminje thakame ĩmwe ya yo mwenainĩ wa kĩgongoona. Nayo thakame ĩyo ĩngĩ amĩite gĩtinainĩ gĩa kĩgongoona. Rĩu nĩrĩo igongoona rĩa meehia.
Leviticus5:10 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus5:11 “Angĩkorwo mũndũ ndangĩona ndutuura igĩrĩ
Leviticus5:12 Naake akĩũtwarĩre mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Leviticus5:13 Na njĩra ĩyo mũthĩnjĩri Ngai akĩhoroherie meehia ma mũndũ ũcio
Leviticus5:14 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Leviticus5:15 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩĩhia atekwenda na ũndũ wa kwaga kũruta indo iria niĩ MWATHANI nyamũrĩirwo
Leviticus5:16 Ningĩ no mũhaka arute indo iria aagĩĩte kũruta
Leviticus5:17 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩĩhia atekwenda na ũndũ wa kuuna rĩathani o rĩothe rĩa maathani ma MWATHANI-rĩ
Leviticus5:18 Aagĩrĩirwo nĩgũtwarĩra mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ndũrũme kana thenge ĩtarĩ na kaũũgũ ĩtuĩke igongoona rĩa kũrĩhĩra meehia. Naguo thogora wayo ũũtue ũthimĩĩtwo na gĩthimi kĩrĩa kĩiguanĩirwo. Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai akĩhoroherie rĩĩhia rĩa mũndũ ũcio
Leviticus5:19 Rĩu nĩrĩo igongoona rĩa kũrĩhĩra meehia marĩa mũndũ ũcio eehĩirie MWATHANI.”
Leviticus6:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Leviticus6:2 “No mũhaka kũrutagwo igongoona mũndũ o wothe angĩhĩtĩria MWATHANI na ũndũ wa kũrega gũcookeria Mũisiraeli ũrĩa ũngĩ kĩndũ kĩrĩa amũigĩire
Leviticus6:3 o na kana wa kũmũheenia akĩhĩtaga atĩ ndooneete kĩndũ gĩake kĩrĩa kĩũrĩĩte o rĩrĩa akĩoneete.
Leviticus6:4 (4-5) Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ angĩkorwo eehĩĩtie na njĩra o yothe ya icio
Leviticus6:5 Acooke atwarĩre mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ndũrũme kana thenge ĩtarĩ na kaũũgũ
Leviticus6:6 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai akĩhoroherie rĩĩhia rĩa mũndũ ũcio
Leviticus6:7 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Leviticus6:8 “Atha Harũni na aariũ aake ũmeere atĩrĩ: Ũyũ nĩguo watho wĩgiĩ igongoona rĩa njino. Rĩrĩraaraga rĩkĩhĩa kĩgongoonainĩ igũrũ o nginya rũũciinĩ
Leviticus6:9 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Leviticus6:10 “Agacooka akaruta nguo icio ciake cia magongoona
Leviticus6:11 Mwaki ũrĩa ũrĩ kĩgongoonainĩ igũrũ ndũrĩ hĩndĩ o na ĩmwe ũkaarekwo ũhore. Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũwĩkagĩra ngũ rũũciinĩ o rũũciinĩ
Leviticus6:12 Mwaki ũcio ũgũtũũra wakanaga kĩgongoonainĩ igũrũ na ndũkaanarekwo ũhore o na rĩ.
Leviticus6:13 “Naguo watho wa igongoona rĩa mũtu nĩ ũyũ: athĩnjĩri Ngai a mbarĩ ya Harũni nĩ o marĩrutagĩra MWATHANI igongoona rĩa mũtu o hau mbere ya kĩgongoona.
Leviticus6:14 Ũmwe wao arĩrũmaga rũhĩ rũmwe rwa mũtu ũcio mũhinyu mũno mũtukanie na maguta
Leviticus6:15 (16-17) Kĩrĩa kĩrĩtigaraga kĩa igongoona rĩu kĩrĩrĩagwo nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai kĩambĩĩte gũthondekwo gĩgatuĩka mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia. Marĩkĩrĩagĩra handũ hatheru
Leviticus6:16 Mũndũ mũrũme o wothe thĩinĩ wa njiarwa cia Harũni
Leviticus6:17 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Leviticus6:18 “Mũthenya ũrĩa mũndũ mũrũme wa mbarĩ ya Harũni agaitĩrĩrio maguta aamũrwo atuĩke mũthĩnjĩri Ngai-rĩ
Leviticus6:19 Naguo mũtu ũcio ũtukanio na maguta
Leviticus6:20 Igongoona rĩu rĩgũtũũra rĩrutagwo nĩ mũndũ mũrũme o wothe wa njiarwa cia Harũni ũrĩa ũratungata ta Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene. Rĩrĩcinagwo rĩothe rĩrĩ igongoona rĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI.
Leviticus6:21 Hatirĩ gĩcunjĩ o na kĩmwe kĩa igongoona rĩa mũtu rĩrĩa mũthĩnjĩri Ngai arutĩĩte kĩrĩrĩagwo; rĩothe nĩgũcinwo rĩrĩcinagwo.”
Leviticus6:22 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Leviticus6:23 “Arĩria Harũni na aariũ aake ũmeere atĩrĩ
Leviticus6:24 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩrutaga igongoona rĩu rĩa meehia nĩ we ũrĩrĩrĩagĩra handũ hatheru
Leviticus6:25 Kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩkaahuutia nyama cia nyamũ ĩyo nĩgĩgaatuĩka gĩtheru. Nguo o yothe ĩngĩkaaminjũkĩrwo nĩ thakame ya nyamũ ĩyo
Leviticus6:26 Nyũngũ o yothe ĩrĩa ĩkaahũthĩrwo kũruga nyama icio no nginya ĩkooragwo; angĩkorwo irugĩĩtwo na thaburia-rĩ
Leviticus6:27 Mũndũ mũrũme o wothe wa mbarĩ ya athĩnjĩri Ngai
Leviticus6:28 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus7:1 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Leviticus7:2 Nyamũ ya igongoona rĩa kũrĩhĩra meehia irĩthĩnjagĩrwo mwena wa na rũgongo wa kĩgongoona
Leviticus7:3 Namo maguta maayo moothe nĩ mo: kĩmengemenge
Leviticus7:4 higo cierĩ na habaya marĩrutagwo marĩ igongoona.
Leviticus7:5 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai arĩmacinagĩra kĩgongoonainĩ igũrũ marĩ igongoona rĩa njino rĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI. Rĩu nĩrĩo igongoona rĩa kũrĩhĩra meehia.
Leviticus7:6 Mũndũ mũrũme o wothe wa mbarĩ ya athĩnjĩri Ngai no arĩe nyama cia igongoona rĩu
Leviticus7:7 “Watho wa igongoona rĩa meehia na wa igongoona rĩa kũrĩhĩra meehia no ũmwe: mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩrutaga magongoona macio meerĩ nĩ we ũrĩrigagia na nyama ciamo.
Leviticus7:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus7:9 Narĩo igongoona rĩa mũtu o rĩothe rĩrĩa rĩrugĩirwo obeniinĩ
Leviticus7:10 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus7:11 “Namo maya nĩmo mawatho ma magongoona ma thaayũ marĩa mũndũ angĩrutĩra MWATHANI:
Leviticus7:12 Angĩkorwo mũndũ araruta igongoona rĩĩrĩ akĩenda gũcookeria Ngai ngaatho-rĩ
Leviticus7:13 O na ningĩ nĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrutanĩria igongoona rĩu rĩa gũcookia ngaatho na mĩgate ĩrugĩĩtwo ĩĩkĩrĩĩtwo ndaawa ya kũimbia.
Leviticus7:14 Naake akĩrute o mũgate kuuma harĩ mĩthemba ĩyo yothe ya mĩgate ũtuĩke kĩheeo kĩa mwanya ĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI. Nayo mĩgate ĩyo ĩtuĩke ya mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa ũkũminjaminjĩria kĩgongoona thakame ya nyamũ ĩyo.
Leviticus7:15 Nacio nyama cia igongoona rĩu irĩĩo ciothe mũthenya o ro ũcio nyamũ ĩyo ĩkũrutwo; nyama o na ĩmwe yayo ndĩkaanarekwo ĩraare nginya rũũciinĩ.
Leviticus7:16 “No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus7:17 Nyama o yothe ya igongoona rĩu ĩrĩa ĩngĩkinyia mũthenya wa gatatũ itarĩ ndĩe no mũhaka ĩcinwo na mwaki.
Leviticus7:18 Nyama o yothe ya igongoona rĩu ĩngĩkaarĩĩo mũthenya wa gatatũ-rĩ
Leviticus7:19 Nyama cia igongoona rĩu ingĩkaahuutania na kĩndũ o na kĩ kĩrĩ mũgiro ndĩkaanarĩĩo ĩgaacinwo na mwaki.“Mũndũ o wothe ũtarĩ na thaahu no arĩe nyama icio
Leviticus7:20 no rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus7:21 Ningĩ-rĩ
Leviticus7:22 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Leviticus7:23 “Arĩria andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere atĩrĩ
Leviticus7:24 Maguta ma nyamũ iria ikuĩte gĩkuũ kĩa ndũire
Leviticus7:25 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũngĩrĩa maguta ma nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI ĩrĩ igongoona rĩa njino
Leviticus7:26 Ningĩ
Leviticus7:27 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkoina watho ũyũ nĩakaingatwo kuuma harĩ andũ a Ngai.”
Leviticus7:28 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Leviticus7:29 “Arĩria andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere atĩrĩ: Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũraruta igongoona rĩa thaayũ nĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrutĩra MWATHANI indo imwe ciarĩo ituĩke kĩheeo kĩa mwanya.
Leviticus7:30 Mũndũ ũcio arĩoyaga indo iria ekũrutĩra MWATHANI irĩ igongoona rĩa njino
Leviticus7:31 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai agacinĩra maguta macio kĩgongoonainĩ
Leviticus7:32 Nakuo kũgũrũ gwa thuutha kwa mwena wa ũrĩo kwa nyamũ ĩyo gũkaheeo mũthĩnjĩri Ngai kũrĩ kĩheeo gĩake kĩa mwanya kiumĩĩte igongoonainĩ rĩu rĩa thaayũ.
Leviticus7:33 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa ũhorohanĩirie na thakame na maguta ma igongoona rĩu rĩa thaayũ nĩ we ũrĩrigagia na kũgũrũ kũu gwa thuutha.
Leviticus7:34 Gĩthũri kĩu na kũgũrũ kũu gwa thuutha kwa ũrĩo nĩ iheeo cia mwanya mũno iria MWATHANI oeete kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Isiraeli agacihe athĩnjĩri Ngai. Icio nĩcio indo iria andũ a Isiraeli maagĩrĩirwo nĩkũheyaga athĩnjĩri Ngai hingo ciothe.
Leviticus7:35 Rĩu nĩrĩo igai rĩa Harũni na aariũ aake kuuma igongoonainĩ rĩa gũcinwo rĩrĩa rĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI rĩrĩa maaheirwo mũthenya ũrĩa maamũrirwo magĩtuĩka athĩnjĩri Ngai.
Leviticus7:36 Mũthenya ũcio maitĩrĩirio maguta makĩamũrwo-rĩ
Leviticus7:37 “Macio nĩ mo mawatho ma magongoona ma njino
Leviticus7:38 MWATHANI aahereire Musa mawatho macio kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Sinai
Leviticus8:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus8:2 “Oya Harũni na aariũ aake ũmatware mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo na ũkuue nguo cia ũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Leviticus8:3 Warĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo-rĩ
Leviticus8:4 Musa agĩgĩĩka o ta ũguo MWATHANI aamwathĩĩte. Andũ oothe marĩĩkia kũgomana hau mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo-rĩ
Leviticus8:5 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Leviticus8:6 Naake Musa akĩreehe Harũni hamwe na aariũ aake hau mbere
Leviticus8:7 Agĩcooka akĩhumba Harũni nguo ĩkinyĩĩte maruinĩ
Leviticus8:8 O na akĩmwĩkĩra gakuo ga gĩthũri
Leviticus8:9 Agĩcooka akĩmuoha kĩremba mũtwe
Leviticus8:10 Musa arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus8:11 Agĩcooka akĩoya maguta mamwe akĩmaminjaminjĩria kĩgongoona hamwe na indo ciakĩo ciothe maita mũgwanja
Leviticus8:12 Ningĩ agĩitĩrĩria Harũni maguta marĩa makwamũrana mũtwe
Leviticus8:13 Musa arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus8:14 Musa agĩcooka akĩreehe ndeegwa ĩrĩa ya igongoona rĩa meehia
Leviticus8:15 Naake Musa akĩmĩthĩnja
Leviticus8:16 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus8:17 Agĩcooka akĩoya ndeegwa ĩyo ĩngĩ yothe
Leviticus8:18 Thuutha ũcio akĩreehe ndũrũme ĩrĩa ya igongoona rĩa njino
Leviticus8:19 Naake Musa akĩmĩthĩnja
Leviticus8:20 (20-21) Agĩcooka agĩtinangia ndũrũme ĩyo icunjĩ
Leviticus8:21 Ningĩ Musa akĩreehe ndũrũme ya keerĩ
Leviticus8:22 Naake Musa akĩmĩthĩnja
Leviticus8:23 Agĩcooka akĩreehe aariũ a Harũni hau mbere
Leviticus8:24 Agĩcooka akĩoya maguta
Leviticus8:25 Ningĩ akĩoya mũgate ũmwe kuuma gĩkabũinĩ kĩrĩa kĩarĩ na mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia ĩrĩa yamũrĩirwo MWATHANI
Leviticus8:26 Indo icio ciothe agĩciigĩrĩra mookoinĩ ma Harũni na aariũ aake
Leviticus8:27 Thuutha wa ũguo akĩoya indo icio kuuma mookoinĩ maao
Leviticus8:28 Musa agĩcooka akĩoya gĩthũri
Leviticus8:29 Ningĩ Musa akĩoya maguta mamwe ma kwamũrana
Leviticus8:30 Musa agĩcooka akĩĩra Harũni na aariũ aake atĩrĩ
Leviticus8:31 Kĩrĩa gĩgũtigara kĩa nyama icio
Leviticus8:32 Ningĩ mũtikoime nja ya Hema ya gũtũnganwo nginya mĩthenya mũgwanja ĩthire. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo ũhoro wanyu wa kwamũrwo ũgaakorwo ũrĩĩkĩĩte.
Leviticus8:33 MWATHANI aathanire gwĩkwo o ta ũguo ndeeka ũũmũũthĩ nĩguo mũhoroherio meehia maanyu.
Leviticus8:34 No mũhaka mũikare hau mũromoinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo mĩthenya na mootukũ mũgwanja
Leviticus8:35 Naake Harũni na aariũ aake magĩĩka maũndũ moothe marĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa ameere meeke.
Leviticus9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus9:2 Akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Leviticus9:3 Nao andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere mooe thenge ĩtuĩke ya igongoona rĩa meehia
Leviticus9:4 O na mooe ndeegwa na ndũrũme macirutĩre MWATHANI irĩ igongoona rĩa thaayũ
Leviticus9:5 Aisiraeli magĩgĩtwara hau mbere ya Hema ya gũtũnganwo indo ciothe iria Musa aamaathĩĩte matware; nao andũ oothe magĩkĩrũrũngana hau makĩrũũgama mbere ya MWATHANI.
Leviticus9:6 Naake Musa akiuga atĩrĩ
Leviticus9:7 Agĩcooka akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Leviticus9:8 Tondũ ũcio Harũni agĩgĩthiĩ kĩgongoonainĩ
Leviticus9:9 Nao aariũ aake makĩmũtwarĩra thakame ya yo
Leviticus9:10 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus9:11 Nacio nyama icio ingĩ
Leviticus9:12 Agĩcooka agĩthĩnja nyamũ ĩrĩa yarĩ ya igoongoona rĩa njino rĩake mwene; nao aariũ aake makĩmũtwarĩra thakame ya yo
Leviticus9:13 Magĩcooka makĩmũnengera mũtwe
Leviticus9:14 Rĩrĩa aarĩĩkirie gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus9:15 Thuutha wa ũguo akĩruta indo iria andũ maarutĩĩte. Akĩamba akĩoya thenge ĩrĩa yarĩ ya igongoona rĩa meehia ma andũ acio
Leviticus9:16 Agĩcooka akĩoya nyamũ ĩrĩa yarĩ ya igongoona rĩa njino
Leviticus9:17 Ningĩ akĩoya igongoona rĩa mũtu
Leviticus9:18 Agĩcooka agĩthĩnja ndeegwa na ndũrũme ituĩke igongoona rĩa thaayũ rĩa andũ; nao aariũ aake makĩmũtwarĩra thakame ya nyamũ icio
Leviticus9:19 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Leviticus9:20 ithũriinĩ cia nyamũ icio
Leviticus9:21 agĩcooka akĩruta ithũri icio na kũgũrũ gwa thuutha kwa ũrĩo ituĩke kĩheeo kĩa mwanya kĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI kĩrĩa kĩrigagia na athĩnjĩri Ngai
Leviticus9:22 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Harũni aarĩĩkirie kũruta magongoona macio moothe
Leviticus9:23 Musa na Harũni magĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo
Leviticus9:24 O hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI akĩrekia mwaki o rĩmwe
Leviticus10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus10:2 Tondũ ũcio MWATHANI akĩrekia mwaki o rĩmwe
Leviticus10:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Musa akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Leviticus10:4 Naake Musa agĩĩta Mishaeli na Elizafani
Leviticus10:5 Tondũ ũcio magĩũka magĩcioya irĩ o na nguo ikinyĩĩte maruinĩ maacio
Leviticus10:6 Musa agĩcooka akĩĩra Harũni na aariũ aake Eleazaru na Ithamaru atĩrĩ
Leviticus10:7 Na mũtigaakĩre mũromo wa Hema ya gũtũnganwo muume na nja; mweka ũguo no mũgũkua
Leviticus10:8 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Leviticus10:9 “Wee mwene o na aariũ aaku mũtikaanatoonye Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo mũnyuĩte ndibei kana njoohi; mũngĩgeeka ũguo no mũgaakua. Ũndũ ũcio nĩ watho ũrĩa njiarwa cianyu ciothe ciagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrũmagĩrĩra hĩndĩ ciothe.
Leviticus10:10 No nginya mũkũũranage indo iria ciamũrĩirwo MWATHANI na iria cia kũhũthĩrwo nĩ mũndũ o wothe
Leviticus10:11 Ningĩ no mũhaka mũrutage andũ a Isiraeli mawatho moothe marĩa ndĩmũheete hũthĩrĩĩte Musa.”
Leviticus10:12 Naake Musa akĩĩra Harũni
Leviticus10:13 Mĩrĩreei handũ hatheru nĩ gũkorwo nĩ yo wee mwene o na aariũ aaku mwagĩrĩirwo nĩkũheagwo kuuma magongoonainĩ marĩa marutĩirwo MWATHANI na ũndũ wa gũcinwo. Ũguo nĩguo MWATHANI anjathĩĩte.
Leviticus10:14 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus10:15 Marĩreehage kũgũrũ kũu gwa thuutha na gĩthũri hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maguta mararutwo marĩ kĩheeo kĩa mwanya kũrĩ MWATHANI. Icunjĩ icio cia nyama igũtũũra irĩ ciaku na ciana ciaku hĩndĩ ciothe
Leviticus10:16 Musa agĩcooka akĩũria ũhoro wa mbũri ya igongoona rĩa meehia
Leviticus10:17 “Nĩkĩ kĩgiririe mũrĩĩre igongoona rĩa meehia handũ haamũre? Igongoona rĩu nĩ rĩtheru mũno
Leviticus10:18 Thakame yarĩo ndĩnatwarwo thĩinĩ wa Hema ĩrĩa nyamũre; nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Leviticus10:19 Naake Harũni agĩcookeria Musa atĩrĩ
Leviticus10:20 Rĩrĩa Musa aiguire ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
Leviticus11:1 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ
Leviticus11:2 “Arĩriai andũ a Isiraeli mũmeere ũũ: no mũrĩe nyamũ o yothe ya thĩ nyũmũ
Leviticus11:3 ĩrĩa ĩrekanĩĩtie mahũngũ
Leviticus11:4 (4-6) No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus11:5 O na mũtikaanarĩe ngũrũe nĩ ũndũ o nacio irĩ mũgiro. Mahũngũ maacio nĩmarekanĩĩtie
Leviticus11:6 Mũtikaanarĩe nyama cia nyamũ icio
Leviticus11:7 “Mwahota kũrĩa thamaki cia mũthemba o wothe iria irĩ mathagu manyiitaine
Leviticus11:8 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus11:9 Nyamũ icio irĩ mũgiro
Leviticus11:10 Mũtirĩ na rũũtha rwa kũrĩa kĩndũ o na kĩrĩkũ kĩrĩa gĩikaraga maaĩinĩ gĩtarĩ mathagu manyiitaine o na gĩtarĩ ngũũcĩ.
Leviticus11:11 (13-19) “Mũtikaanarĩe nyoni o na ĩrĩkũ thĩinĩ wa ici ngũgweta haaha: thũmbaina
Leviticus11:12 “Tũnyamũ tuothe tũrĩa tũrĩ mathagu tũrĩa tũthiaga tũtambĩĩte thĩ na magũrũ maatuo twĩ mũgiro
Leviticus11:13 no tũrĩa tũthiaga tũkĩrũũgarũũgaga na magũrũ maatuo tũtirĩ mũgiro.
Leviticus11:14 Thĩinĩ wa tũnyamũ tũu no mũrĩe ngigĩ
Leviticus11:15 No tũnyamũ tũu tũngĩ tuothe tũrĩa tũrĩ mathagu
Leviticus11:16 (24-28) “Mũndũ o wothe angĩhuutia ciimba cia nyamũ ici ngwete haaha arĩikaraga e na thaahu o nginya hwaĩinĩ. Nyamũ icio nĩ iria irĩ mahũngũ no matirekanĩĩtie na gatagatĩ na iticookagia ithagumia. Iria ingĩ nĩ nyamũ iria magũrũ maacio marĩ ithu ta ma ngui. Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũngĩkuua ciimba ciacio no mũhaka athambie nguo ciake
Leviticus11:17 (29-30) “O nacio huko
Leviticus11:18 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũngĩcihuutia kana ahuutie ciimba ciacio arĩikaraga e na thaahu o nginya hwaĩinĩ.
Leviticus11:19 Ciimba cia nyamũ icio ingĩgũĩra kĩndũ o gĩothe
Leviticus11:20 Ningĩ ciimba ciacio ingĩgũa thĩinĩ wa nyũngũ
Leviticus11:21 Irio o ciothe ingĩrĩĩo na ikorwo ciitĩkĩirwo nĩ maaĩ kuuma nyũngũinĩ ĩyo no ikorwo irĩ mũgiro. O nakĩo kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩngĩnyuuo kĩrĩa kĩngĩkorwo kĩrĩ thĩinĩ wa nyũngũ ĩyo no gĩkorwo kĩrĩ mũgiro.
Leviticus11:22 Kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa kĩngĩgũĩrwo nĩ ciimba cia nyamũ icio no gĩkorwo kĩrĩ mũgiro. Obeni o na thitobu cia rĩũmba iria igĩĩte na thaahu na njĩra ta ĩyo
Leviticus11:23 No gĩthima kana irima rĩa maaĩ itingĩgwatio thaahu; no rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus11:24 Kĩimba kĩa nyamũ ĩmwe ya icio kĩngĩgũĩra mbegũ iria cierekeire kũhandwo-rĩ
Leviticus11:25 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus11:26 “ Nyamũ o na ĩrĩkũ ya iria ĩngĩrĩĩo ĩngĩkua
Leviticus11:27 Naake mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũngĩrĩa nyama o na ĩrĩkũ ya nyamũ ĩyo
Leviticus11:28 “Mũtikaarĩage kanyamũ o na karĩkũ thĩinĩ wa tũnyamũ tũrĩa tũtambaga thĩ
Leviticus11:29 o na tũngĩkorwo nĩ tũrĩa tũthiaga na nda
Leviticus11:30 Mũtigeethaahagie na ũndũ wa kũrĩaga kanyamũ o na kamwe ga tũu.
Leviticus11:31 Nĩ ũndũ niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu
Leviticus11:32 Niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI ũrĩa wamũrutire bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri nĩguo nduĩke Ngai wanyu. No nginya mũtuĩke atheru nĩ ũndũ niĩ ndĩ mũtheru.
Leviticus11:33 “Ũcio nĩguo watho ũkoniĩ nyamũ
Leviticus11:34 No nginya mũkũũranage wega kĩndũ kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mũgiro na kĩrĩa gĩtarĩ mũgiro
Leviticus12:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Leviticus12:2 Mũndũ wa nja angĩgĩa nda aciare kahĩĩ
Leviticus12:3 Mũthenya wa ĩnaana-rĩ
Leviticus12:4 Agacooka agaikara matukũ mangĩ mĩrongo ĩtatũ na matatũ nĩguo athirwo nĩ thaahu wa thakame yake ĩrĩa yurĩĩte. Ndaagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhuutia kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩamũre o na kana gũtoonya Hemainĩ ĩrĩa nyamũre o nginya rĩrĩa ihinda rĩake rĩa gũtherio rĩkaarĩĩka.
Leviticus12:5 “Angĩkorwo aciarĩĩte kairĩĩtu-rĩ
Leviticus12:6 “Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩake rĩa gũtherio rĩgaakorwo rĩrĩĩkĩĩte
Leviticus12:7 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai arutĩre MWATHANI igongoona nĩ ũndũ wake amũhoroherie
Leviticus12:8 “Angĩkorwo mũndũ wa nja ũcio ndangĩhota kuona ndũrũme-rĩ
Leviticus13:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ
Leviticus13:2 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩkorwo na kĩronda ngoothiinĩ ya mwĩrĩ wake
Leviticus13:3 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai arore wega kĩronda kĩu mũndũ ũcio arũarĩĩte ngoothiinĩ yake
Leviticus13:4 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus13:5 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja wakinya
Leviticus13:6 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũthĩnjĩri Ngai abaare mũndũ ũcio rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:7 Thuutha wa mũndũ ũcio kũbaarwo nĩ mũthĩnjĩri Ngai na gũtuĩrwo atĩ ndarĩ na thaahu
Leviticus13:8 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai amũbaare rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:9 “Mũndũ o wothe angĩkorwo na mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi arĩtwaragwo kũrĩ mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Leviticus13:10 nĩguo amũbaare wega. Hangĩkorwo he na kĩronda kĩerũ ngoothiinĩ yake gĩtũmĩĩte guoya ũtuĩke mwerũ na kĩiyũire mahira-rĩ
Leviticus13:11 ũcio nĩ mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi ũkũrĩire mwĩrĩinĩ. Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai agĩtue atĩ mũndũ ũcio e na thaahu; ndaagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmũhingĩra handũ e wiki nĩ ũndũ hatirĩ na nganja e na thaahu.
Leviticus13:12 Mũrimũ wa ngoothi ũngĩtheea ũhumbĩre mũndũ kũrutia mũtwe nginya magũrũ
Leviticus13:13 mũthĩnjĩri Ngai aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmũbaara. Angĩona atĩ ti itherũ mũrimũ ũcio ũiyũire mwĩrĩ wake wothe
Leviticus13:14 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus13:15 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai amũbaare rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:16 No kĩronda kĩu kĩngĩhona na gĩtuĩke kĩerũ rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:17 Naake amũbaare rĩngĩ. Kĩronda kĩu kĩngĩkorwo kĩgarũrũkĩĩte gĩkeerũha
Leviticus13:18 “Mũndũ angĩkorwo na ihũha rĩrĩĩkĩĩtie kũhona
Leviticus13:19 na harĩa rĩraarĩ hagacooka hakagĩa na handũ haimbu heerũ kana handũ haroneka he haregethũku na hakeerũha
Leviticus13:20 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai abaare handũ hau
Leviticus13:21 No mũthĩnjĩri Ngai angĩbaara handũ hau na oone atĩ guoya waho ndũgarũrũkĩĩte ũkeerũha na hatirikĩire na thĩinĩ wa ngoothi
Leviticus13:22 Handũ hau hangĩtheea
Leviticus13:23 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus13:24 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ angĩcinwo nĩ mwaki
Leviticus13:25 mũthĩnjĩri Ngai nĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũbaara handũ hau. Guoya ũrĩa ũrĩ handũ hau ũngĩkorwo ũgarũrũkĩĩte ũkeerũha
Leviticus13:26 No guoya wa handũ hau ũngĩkorwo ũtagarũrũkĩĩte ũkeerũha
Leviticus13:27 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũthĩnjĩri Ngai abaare mũndũ ũcio rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:28 No handũ hau hangĩaga kũgarũrũka na haage gũtheea na hakorwo harĩ heerũ haniini
Leviticus13:29 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ mũrũme kana mũndũ wa nja angĩgĩa na kĩronda mũtwe kana kĩreru
Leviticus13:30 kĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũbaarwo nĩ mũthĩnjĩri Ngai. Kĩngĩoneka kĩrikĩire na thĩinĩ wa ngoothi na njuĩrĩ ĩrĩa ĩrĩ thĩinĩ wakĩo ĩgatuĩka yerũũ na ĩgacekeha
Leviticus13:31 No mũthĩnjĩri Ngai angĩbaara kĩronda kĩu oone atĩ gĩtirikĩire na gĩtirĩ na njuĩrĩ njirũ
Leviticus13:32 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũthĩnjĩri Ngai abaare kĩronda kĩu rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:33 hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ ũcio eenje njuĩrĩ no ndakenje njuĩrĩ iria irĩ hau kĩrondainĩ kĩu. Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai acooke amũhingĩre handũ e wiki mĩthenya ĩngĩ mũgwanja.
Leviticus13:34 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja wakinya mũthĩnjĩri Ngai abaare kĩronda kĩu hĩndĩ ĩngĩ
Leviticus13:35 No kĩronda kĩu kĩngĩtheea mũndũ ũcio arĩĩkĩĩtie gũtuuo mũtheru
Leviticus13:36 mũthĩnjĩri Ngai aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmũbaara rĩngĩ. Kĩronda kĩu kĩngĩkorwo gĩtheeete
Leviticus13:37 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus13:38 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ mũrũme kana mũndũ wa nja angĩgĩa na kĩndũ kĩerũhĩĩte ngoothiinĩ
Leviticus13:39 mũthĩnjĩri Ngai nĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũbaara mũndũ ũcio. Kĩndũ kĩu kĩ ngoothiinĩ kĩngĩkorwo ti kĩerũ mũno
Leviticus13:40 (40-41) “Mũndũ angĩmunyũka njuĩrĩ na thuutha kana na mbere ya mũtwe wake ũndũ ũcio ndũngĩtũma atuĩke atĩ e na thaahu.
Leviticus13:41 No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus13:42 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũbaara mũndũ ũcio
Leviticus13:43 mũthĩnjĩri Ngai atue mũndũ ũcio e na thaahu
Leviticus13:44 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrũarĩĩte mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi no nginya ehumbage nguo ndembũkangu
Leviticus13:45 Mũndũ ũcio egũtũũra e na thaahu matukũ moothe marĩa egũkorwo arĩ na mũrimũ ũcio
Leviticus13:46 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mbuu ingĩkorwo nguoinĩ
Leviticus13:47 kana ikorwo gĩcunjĩinĩ o gĩothe kĩa nguo ya gataani kana ya guoya
Leviticus13:48 ingĩoneka irĩ na rangi wa ngirini kana mũtuune-rĩ
Leviticus13:49 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai acibaare
Leviticus13:50 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja wakinya abaare mbuu icio rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:51 Naake agĩcine kĩndũ kĩu nĩ ũndũ mbuu icio kĩ nacio nĩ iria ciikaraga igĩcookaga na ciagĩrĩirwo nĩkũniinwo na mwaki.
Leviticus13:52 “No rĩĩrĩ
Leviticus13:53 aagĩrĩirwo nĩgwathana oige kĩndũ kĩu gĩthambio
Leviticus13:54 Yathira akĩbaare rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:55 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũthĩnjĩri Ngai angĩbaara kĩndũ kĩu rĩngĩ na oone mbuu icio nĩithirathirĩĩte
Leviticus13:56 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mbuu icio ingĩcooka kuoneka rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:57 No angĩthambia kĩndũ kĩu na mbuu icio icooke kwaga kuoneka rĩngĩ
Leviticus13:58 “Ũcio nĩguo watho ũkoniĩ mbuu iria ingĩkorwo irĩ nguoinĩ
Leviticus14:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
