Numbers13:1 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers13:2 “Thuura mũtongoria ũmwe kuuma harĩ o mũhĩrĩga
Numbers13:3 (3-15) Musa nĩagĩathĩkĩire ũguo eerirwo nĩ MWATHANI
Numbers13:4 Acio nĩ o athigaani arĩa Musa aatũmire magathigaane bũrũri wa Kanaani. Nĩagarũrire rĩĩtwa rĩa Hoshea mũrũ wa Nuni akĩmũtua Joshua.
Numbers13:5 Musa akĩmatũma nĩameerire atĩrĩ
Numbers13:6 Mũrore bũrũri ũcio ũrĩa ũtariĩ
Numbers13:7 Ningĩ mũrore kana bũrũri ũcio matũũraga nĩ mwega kana ti mwega
Numbers13:8 Ningĩ mũrore kana tĩĩri nĩ mũnoru kana ti mũnoru
Numbers13:9 Nĩmaakĩambatire na rũgongo magĩthigaana bũrũri kuuma werũinĩ wa Zini ũrĩa wĩ mwena wa na kĩanda wa bũrũri ũcio nginya Rehobu
Numbers13:10 Maambire magĩthiĩ werũinĩ wĩ mwena wa na kĩanda wa bũrũri ũcio magĩkinya Heburoni
Numbers13:11 Nao magĩkinya gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Eshikoli
Numbers13:12 (Kũndũ kũu nĩmaagũtuire gĩtuamba kĩa Eshikoli nĩ ũndũ wa kĩmanjĩka gĩa thabibũ kĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maatũire kuo.)
Numbers13:13 Andũ acio marĩĩkia gũthigaana bũrũri ũcio mĩthenya mĩrongo ĩna
Numbers13:14 kũrĩ Musa
Numbers13:15 Makĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers13:16 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers13:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers13:18 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers13:19 No andũ arĩa maathiĩte na Kalebu makiuga atĩrĩ
Numbers13:20 Kwoguo magĩkĩhe Aisiraeli oothe ũhoro wa maheeni ũkoniĩ bũrũri ũcio maathiĩte gũthigaana makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers13:21 o na nĩtũroonire imũndũ nene kuo
Numbers14:1 Ũtukũ ũcio andũ oothe makĩraara makĩrĩra nĩ kĩeha.
Numbers14:2 Magĩgĩtetia Musa na Harũni makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers14:3 Nĩkĩ kĩratũma MWATHANI atũtware bũrũriinĩ ũcio? Tũgũthiĩ kũũragĩrwo mbaarainĩ
Numbers14:4 Magĩkĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Numbers14:5 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers14:6 Naake Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni na Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune
Numbers14:7 Makĩĩra andũ oothe atĩrĩ
Numbers14:8 Angĩkorwo MWATHANI nĩakeneetio nĩ ithuĩ-rĩ
Numbers14:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Numbers14:10 Andũ oothe nĩmeendaga kũmahũũra na mahiga
Numbers14:11 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers14:12 Nĩngũmatũmĩra mũthiro ũmaniine
Numbers14:13 No Musa akĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Numbers14:14 nĩmekwĩra andũ arĩa matũũraga bũrũriinĩ ũyũ. Andũ aya nĩmaiguĩte atĩ wee MWATHANI ũrĩ hamwe na ithuĩ
Numbers14:15 Rĩu-rĩ
Numbers14:16 ‘MWATHANI araniinĩire andũ aake werũinĩ nĩ tondũ nĩararemirwo nĩkũmakinyia bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa aameerĩire atĩ nĩakaamahe.’
Numbers14:17 Kwoguo
Numbers14:18 ‘Niĩ MWATHANI ndihiũhaga kũraakara
Numbers14:19 Rĩu
Numbers14:20 MWATHANI agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Numbers14:21 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers14:22 gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa aya ũgũtũũra nginya agaakinya bũrũri ũcio. Nĩmooneete ũtheri mũnene wa riiri wakwa ũgĩkenga
Numbers14:23 Matigaatoonya bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ndeerĩire maithe maao. Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wa arĩa mameneete ũkaawona.
Numbers14:24 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers14:25 ũrĩa Aamaleki na Akanaani matũũraga ituambainĩ ciaguo. Rũũciũ-rĩ
Numbers14:26 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa na Harũni atĩrĩ
Numbers14:27 “Andũ aya aaganu megũtũũra mandetagia nginya rĩ? Nĩnjiganĩĩtie mateta maao!
Numbers14:28 Kĩmeere atĩrĩ
Numbers14:29 Mũgũkua
Numbers14:30 Nĩndamwĩrĩire atĩ nĩngaareka mũtũũre kuo
Numbers14:31 Mwoigire atĩ ciana cianyu nĩigaatahwo
Numbers14:32 No inyuĩ mũgũkuĩra gũũkũ werũinĩ.
Numbers14:33 Ciana cianyu igũtũũra irĩithagia gũũkũ werũinĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna
Numbers14:34 Mũkũherithio nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maanyu mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna
Numbers14:35 Ngwĩhĩta atĩ ũguo nĩguo ngũmwĩka inyuĩ andũ aya aaganu mũũnganĩĩte mũũnjũkĩrĩre. Inyuothe mũgũkuĩra gũũkũ werũinĩ. Ũguo nĩguo niĩ MWATHANI ndoiga.’ ”
Numbers14:36 (36-37) Andũ arĩa Musa aatũmĩĩte mathiĩ magathigaane na maacooka makĩreehere andũ oothe ũhoro wa maheeni ũkoniĩ bũrũri ũcio magĩgĩtũma andũ mookĩrĩre MWATHANI
Numbers14:37 Kuuma harĩ andũ acio oothe maatũmĩĩtwo magathigaane
Numbers14:38 Rĩrĩa Musa eerire andũ a Aisiraeli ũrĩa MWATHANI oigĩĩte
Numbers14:39 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũũciinĩ tene makĩambĩrĩria gũthiĩ gũtharĩkĩra bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma makiugaga atĩrĩ
Numbers14:40 No Musa akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers14:41 Tigaai gũthiĩ tondũ MWATHANI ndarĩ hamwe na inyuĩ
Numbers14:42 Mwang'ethanĩra na Aamaleki na Akanaani
Numbers14:43 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers14:44 Nao Aamaleki na Akanaani arĩa maatũũraga bũrũriinĩ ũcio wĩ irĩma makĩmookĩrĩra makĩmahũũra
Numbers15:1 MWATHANI nĩaheire Musa
Numbers15:2 mawatho maya makũrũmagĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ a Isiraeli marĩ bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa eerekeire kũmahe:
Numbers15:3 ndeegwa
Numbers15:4 (4-5) Mũndũ o wothe ũkũrutĩra MWATHANI ng'ondu kana mbũri ĩrĩ igongoona rĩa njino
Numbers15:5 Angĩkorwo nĩ ndũrũme ĩkũrutwo igongoona-rĩ
Numbers15:6 na rita ĩmwe na nuthu ya ndibei. Mũtararĩko wa igongoona rĩu nĩũkenagia MWATHANI.
Numbers15:7 Angĩkorwo nĩ ndeegwa ĩkũrutĩrwo MWATHANI igongoona rĩa njino
Numbers15:8 arĩmĩreehanagĩria na mũtu kiro ithatũ ũtukanĩĩtio na rita igĩrĩ cia maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ wa igongoona rĩa mũtu
Numbers15:9 na rita igĩrĩ cia ndibei. Mũtararĩko wa igongoona rĩu nĩũkenagia MWATHANI.
Numbers15:10 “Indo icio nĩcio irĩrutagwo gũkĩrutwo igongoona rĩa ndeegwa
Numbers15:11 O ũrĩa nyamũ cia igongoona ciongerereka
Numbers15:12 Mũisiraeli o wothe no mũhaka eekage ũguo rĩrĩa ekũruta igongoona rĩa irio
Numbers15:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers15:14 Mahinda moothe marĩa megũũka-rĩ
Numbers15:15 Inyuĩ Aisiraeli na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa mũtũũranagia nao mũrĩkoragwo na watho na mũtaratara o ro ũmwe.”
Numbers15:16 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers15:17 “Arĩria andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere atĩrĩ
Numbers15:18 mũkaarĩaga irio imwe cia bũrũri ũcio
Numbers15:19 Mwaruga mĩgate
Numbers15:20 Mahinda moothe marĩa megũũka
Numbers15:21 “No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers15:22 Ningĩ matukũinĩ ma thuutha mũingĩ no wage gwĩka maũndũ moothe marĩa MWATHANI aathanire ahũthĩrĩĩte Musa.
Numbers15:23 Angĩkorwo mahĩtia macio meekirwo nĩ andũ matekũmenya
Numbers15:24 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai arute igongoona rĩa kũhoroheria andũ oothe
Numbers15:25 Andũ oothe a Isiraeli
Numbers15:26 “Mũndũ angĩĩhia atekũmenya-rĩ
Numbers15:27 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai arute igongoona rĩa kũmũhoroheria kĩgongoonainĩ
Numbers15:28 Aisiraeli na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa matũũranagia nao arĩa marĩĩhagia matekũmenya
Numbers15:29 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers15:30 Arĩũragagwo nĩ ũndũ nĩareganĩĩte na ũrĩa MWATHANI oigire
Numbers15:31 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maarĩ werũinĩ nĩmaakorire mũndũ akiuna ngũ mũthenya wa Thabatũ.
Numbers15:32 Nao makĩmũtwara kũrĩ Musa
Numbers15:33 agĩikara arangĩirwo
Numbers15:34 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers15:35 Kwoguo mũingĩ wothe ũkĩmũruta nja ya kambĩ
Numbers15:36 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa
Numbers15:37 eere a andũ a Aisiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers15:38 Mwaciona-rĩ
Numbers15:39 Na njĩra ĩyo
Numbers15:40 Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu
Numbers16:1 (1-2) Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers16:2 Andũ acio nĩmoonganire mbere ya Musa na Harũni makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers16:3 Musa aigua ũguo
Numbers16:4 Agĩcooka akĩĩra Kora na andũ arĩa maamũrũmĩrĩire atĩrĩ
Numbers16:5 (6-7) Rũũciũ rũũciinĩ-rĩ
Numbers16:6 Musa agĩgĩthiĩ na mbere kwĩra Kora atĩrĩ
Numbers16:7 Mũkuona arĩ ũndũ mũnyiinyi gũkorwo mũthuurĩĩtwo nĩ Ngai wa Isiraeli kuuma kũrĩ mũingĩ wothe nĩ geetha mũmũkuhagĩrĩrie
Numbers16:8 MWATHANI nĩamwĩtĩkĩrĩĩtie mwĩ hamwe na Alawii arĩa angĩ oothe mũgĩe na gĩtĩĩo kĩu
Numbers16:9 Kwoguo rĩrĩa wee hamwe na arũmĩrĩri aaku mũrateta nĩ ũndũ wa Harũni
Numbers16:10 Musa nĩatũmanire Dathani na Abiramu aariũ a Eliabu mageetwo
Numbers16:11 Kaĩ arĩ ũndũ mũnyiinyi gũtũruta bũrũri ũrĩa warĩ mwega na mũnoru ũũke ũtũũragĩre gũũkũ werũinĩ? Rĩu ũrenda gũtwĩneneheria nĩkĩ?
Numbers16:12 Ndũtũtwarĩĩte bũrũriinĩ mwega na mũnoru
Numbers16:13 Musa nĩaraakarire mũno
Numbers16:14 Musa agĩkĩĩra Kora atĩrĩ
Numbers16:15 Inyuothe o mũndũ akooya kanyũngũ gaake ga gũcinĩra ũbaani
Numbers16:16 Kwoguo o mũndũ akĩoya kanyũngũ gaake ga gũcinĩra ũbaani
Numbers16:17 Kora agĩgĩcookanĩrĩria mũingĩ wothe hau nja ya Hema ya gũtũnganwo
Numbers16:18 naake MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers16:19 “Eheraai harĩ mũingĩ ũyũ nĩguo ndĩũniine o rĩmwe.”
Numbers16:20 No Musa na Harũni makĩĩgũithia thĩ makĩhuutithia moothiũ maao thĩ makiuga atĩrĩ
Numbers16:21 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers16:22 “Ĩra mũingĩ wehere ciikaroinĩ cia Kora
Numbers16:23 Musa agĩgĩũkĩra agĩthiĩ kwa Dathani na Abiramu
Numbers16:24 Akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Numbers16:25 Andũ magĩkĩehera ciikaroinĩ cia Kora
Numbers16:26 Musa agĩkĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Numbers16:27 Andũ aya makua gĩkuũ kĩa ndũire matarĩ na iherithia kuuma kwĩ MWATHANI
Numbers16:28 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers16:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers16:30 ĩkĩmameria hamwe na atumia aao na ciana ciao
Numbers16:31 Kwoguo makĩmerio nĩ thĩ me muoyo
Numbers16:32 Andũ oothe a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ hakuhĩ na hau makĩũra rĩrĩa maiguire kĩrĩro kĩao. Magĩkĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ
Numbers16:33 Ningĩ mwaki ũkiuma kũrĩ MWATHANI ũgĩũka ũgĩcina andũ arĩa magana meerĩ na mĩrongo ĩtaano arĩa maacinĩĩte ũbaani.
Numbers16:34 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers16:35 “Ĩra Eleazaru mũrũ wa Harũni mũthĩnjĩri Ngai eeherie tũnyũngũ twa gũcinĩra ũbaani kuuma hau haacinĩirwo andũ acio ahurunje makara marĩa me thĩinĩ watuo kũndũ kũngĩ
Numbers16:36 Twatuĩkire tũtheru rĩrĩa twarutĩirwo MWATHANI kĩgongoonainĩ. Kwoguo oya tũu twa andũ acio mooragwo nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maao
Numbers16:37 Kwoguo Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai akĩoya tũnyũngũ tũu twa gĩcango agĩtũturithia tũgĩtuĩka tũthaani twa kũhumbĩra kĩgongoona.
Numbers16:38 Tũthaani tũu twarĩ twa kũririkanagia andũ a Isiraeli atĩ mũndũ ũtarĩ wa mbarĩ ya Harũni ndakaanathiĩ gũcinĩra MWATHANI ũbaani kĩgongoonainĩ. Mũndũ angĩgaathiĩ
Numbers16:39 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ andũ oothe magĩtetia Musa na Harũni makiuga atĩrĩ
Numbers16:40 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers16:41 Naake Musa na Harũni magĩthiĩ makĩrũũgama mbere ya Hema ĩyo
Numbers16:42 naake MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers16:43 “Ehereraai andũ aya
Numbers16:44 Naake Musa akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Numbers16:45 Harũni nĩagĩĩkire ũguo eerirwo nĩ Musa
Numbers16:46 Ũndũ ũcio ũgĩkĩrũũgamia mũthiro ũcio
Numbers16:47 Mũigana wa andũ arĩa maakuire warĩ ngiri ikũmi na inya
Numbers16:48 Mũthiro watiga gũthiĩ na mbere
Numbers17:1 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers17:2 “Ĩra andũ a Isiraeli makũnengere mĩthĩĩgi
Numbers17:3 no rĩĩtwa rĩa Harũni ũrĩandĩke mũthĩĩgiinĩ wa mũtongoria wa mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi. Gũgũkorwo na mũthĩĩgi o ũmwe kuuma kũrĩ o mũtongoria wa mũhĩrĩga.
Numbers17:4 Ũcooke ũtware mĩthĩĩgi ĩyo Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo
Numbers17:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers17:6 Musa akĩarĩria Aisiraeli
Numbers17:7 Musa akĩiga mĩthĩĩgi ĩyo Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI.
Numbers17:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers17:9 Musa agĩkĩruta mĩthĩĩgi ĩyo yothe kuuma Hemainĩ
Numbers17:10 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers17:11 Musa agĩgĩĩka o ũrĩa MWATHANI aamwĩrire.
Numbers17:12 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers17:13 Angĩkorwo o na mũndũ angĩkuhĩrĩria Hema nĩegũkua-rĩ
Numbers18:1 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Numbers18:2 Reehe andũ a nyũmba yanyu
Numbers18:3 Wĩra wao ũrĩkoragwo ũrĩ gũgũtungata o na kũmenyagĩrĩra Hema
Numbers18:4 Marĩrutithanagia wĩra na inyuĩ makĩrutaga wĩra wothe ũrĩa ũmakoniĩ Hemainĩ. No mũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga ũngĩ ndakaanarutithanie wĩra na inyuĩ.
Numbers18:5 Wee mwene na aariũ aaku-rĩ
Numbers18:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Numbers18:7 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers18:8 MWATHANI agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Numbers18:9 Iheeo iria theru mũno irutagwo no iticinagwo kĩgongoonainĩ
Numbers18:10 Iheeo icio irĩrĩagĩrwo Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno
Numbers18:11 “O na kĩheeo kĩngĩ o gĩothe kĩa mwanya andũ a Isiraeli mangĩndutĩra nĩ gĩaku. Ndakũhe wee mwene
Numbers18:12 “Maciaro moothe ma mbere marĩa meega mũno heagwo o mwaka nĩ Aisiraeli ma maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ
Numbers18:13 moothe nĩ maaku. Mũndũ o wothe wa mũciĩ waku ũtarĩ na thaahu no amarĩage.
Numbers18:14 “Kĩndũ o gĩothe nyamũrĩirwo thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli na mwĩhĩtwa ũtangiugũkwo nĩ gĩaku.
Numbers18:15 “Marigithaathi moothe ma andũ na ma nyamũ marĩa ndutagĩrwo nĩ Aisiraeli nĩ maaku. No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers18:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers18:17 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers18:18 Nyama ciamo nĩ ciaku
Numbers18:19 “Magongoona moothe ma mwanya marĩa andũ a Isiraeli mandutagĩra nĩ maaku wee mwene
Numbers18:20 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Numbers18:21 “Nao Alawii nĩndamahe gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩrĩa ndutagĩrwo nĩ Aisiraeli. Rĩu nĩrĩo igai rĩao nĩ ũndũ wa gũtungata Hemainĩ ya gũtũnganwo.
Numbers18:22 Andũ acio angĩ a Isiraeli matigaakuhagĩrĩrie Hema matikaae kwĩhia meyũragithie.
Numbers18:23 Alawii nĩ o marĩmenyagĩrĩra Hema na nĩ o marĩcookagĩrĩrwo nĩ ũũru wothe wayo. Watho ũcio nĩ wa gũtũũra ũrũmagĩrĩrwo nĩ inyuĩ na njiarwa cianyu. Alawii matikaagĩa na igai gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ a Isiraeli
Numbers18:24 nĩ ũndũ nĩndĩmaheete gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩrĩa Aisiraeli mandutagĩra kĩrĩ kĩheeo kĩa mwanya. Nĩkĩo ndoigire nĩ ũndũ wao atĩ matikaagaĩrwo ithaka thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli.”
Numbers18:25 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa
Numbers18:26 eere Alawii atĩrĩ
Numbers18:27 Kĩheeo kĩu kĩa mwanya kĩrĩkoragwo gĩtariĩ ta igongoona rĩrĩa arĩmi marutaga rĩa ngano ya mũgethano na ndibei ya mũhihano.
Numbers18:28 Ũguo nĩguo o na inyuĩ mũrĩrutagĩra MWATHANI kĩheeo kĩa mwanya kuuma harĩ icunjĩ ciothe cia ikũmi iria mũrĩnengagĩrwo nĩ Aisiraeli. Mũrĩnengagĩra Harũni mũthĩnjĩri Ngai kĩheeo kĩu kĩa mwanya.
Numbers18:29 Mũrĩmũrutagĩra kuuma indoinĩ iria njega mũno mwanengerwo.
Numbers18:30 Mwaruta gĩcunjĩ kĩrĩa kĩega mũno-rĩ
Numbers18:31 Wee o hamwe na andũ a mũciĩ waku no mũrĩagĩre matigari o kũndũ guothe amu nĩ mũcaara wanyu nĩ ũndũ wa ũtungati wanyu hemainĩ.
Numbers18:32 Mũtirĩkoragwo mwĩhĩĩtie mwacirĩa mwambĩĩte kũrutĩra MWATHANI gĩcunjĩ kĩrĩa kĩega mũno. No mũmenyerere mũtikaanathaahie iheeo icio theru cia Aisiraeli na ũndũ wa kũrĩa kĩndũ o na kĩmwe mbere ya kĩrĩa kĩega mũno kũrutĩrwo MWATHANI; mũngĩkaarĩa mbere nĩmũkooragwo.”
Numbers19:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers19:2 mahe Aisiraeli mawatho maya. Meereei mamũreehere moori nduune ĩtarĩ na kaũũgũ kana karooro
Numbers19:3 mũmĩnengere Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai. Moori ĩyo yumio nja ya kambĩ ĩthĩnjĩrwo ho we arĩ ho.
Numbers19:4 Naake Eleazaru ooe thakame ĩmwe ya yo amĩminjaminje na kĩara maita mũgwanja mwena wa na mbere wa Hema.
Numbers19:5 Nayo moori ĩyo yothe: rũũa
Numbers19:6 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio ooe ngũ cia mũtĩ wa mũtarakwa
Numbers19:7 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai acooke athambie nguo ciake
Numbers19:8 O naake mũcini wa moori ĩyo athambie nguo ciake
Numbers19:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers19:10 Naake mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũhakũra mũhu wa moori ĩyo athambie nguo ciake
Numbers19:11 “Mũndũ angĩhuutia kĩimba kĩa mũndũ arĩikaraga e na thaahu mĩthenya mũgwanja.
Numbers19:12 Mũndũ ũcio arĩĩtheragia na maaĩ ma gwĩtheria mũthenyainĩ wa gatatũ na wa mũgwanja
Numbers19:13 Mũndũ ũhuutĩĩtie kĩimba kĩa mũndũ akaaga gwĩtheria
Numbers19:14 “Mũndũ angĩkuĩra thĩinĩ wa hema
Numbers19:15 Kĩndũ o gĩothe gĩ kũu thĩinĩ gĩtarĩ gĩkunĩke o nakĩo nĩkĩrĩnyiitagwo nĩ thaahu.
Numbers19:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers19:17 “Nĩ geetha mũndũ ũcio athaahũrwo
Numbers19:18 Naake mũndũ ũtarĩ na thaahu akooya mathangũ ma hithobu
Numbers19:19 Mũndũ ũtarĩ na thaahu arĩminjaminjagĩria maaĩ macio ũrĩa wĩ na thaahu mũthenya wa ĩtatũ na wa mũgwanja. Mũthenya wa mũgwanja akamũtheria biũ
Numbers19:20 “Mũndũ ũnyiitĩĩtwo nĩ thaahu akaaga gwĩtheria arĩikaraga arĩ na thaahu
Numbers19:21 Mũgũtũũra mũrũmagĩrĩra watho ũcio matukũ moothe marĩa magooka. Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers19:22 Kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa mũndũ wĩ na thaahu angĩhuutia nĩkĩrĩnyiitagwo nĩ thaahu
Numbers20:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers20:2 Kũu maambire hema gũtiarĩ maaĩ
Numbers20:3 makĩambĩrĩria gũteta makiugaga atĩrĩ
Numbers20:4 Mwatũreehire gũũkũ werũinĩ ũyũ tũkuĩre kuo na mahiũ maitũ?
Numbers20:5 Nĩkĩ gĩatũmire mũtũrute Misiri mũtũreehe kũndũ gũũkũ gwa thĩĩna? Gũũkũ ti kũndũ kũngĩkũra kĩndũ ta ngano
Numbers20:6 Musa na Harũni magĩkĩehera harĩ andũ magĩthiĩ makĩrũũgama mũromoinĩ wa Hema
Numbers20:7 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers20:8 “Oya mũthĩĩgi ũrĩa ũrĩ hau mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro
Numbers20:9 Naake Musa agĩgĩthiĩ
Numbers20:10 Musa na Harũni magĩcookanĩrĩria mũingĩ wothe hau hakuhĩ na ihiga
Numbers20:11 Musa agĩcooka akĩoya mũthĩĩgi ũrĩa na igũrũ akĩgũtha ihiga naguo maita meerĩ
Numbers20:12 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers20:13 Ũndũ ũcio wekĩkĩire Meriba
Numbers20:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers20:15 na ũrĩa maithe maitũ maathiire Misiri
Numbers20:16 Nĩtwagĩkaĩire MWATHANI atũteithie
Numbers20:17 Ndagũthaitha twĩtĩkĩrie tũtuĩkanĩrie bũrũri waku. Tũtigũkĩrĩra mĩgũndainĩ kana kũrĩa kwĩ mĩthabibũ
Numbers20:18 No andũ a Edomu makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Numbers20:19 Nao Aisiraeli makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers20:20 Nao andũ a Edomu makĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Numbers20:21 Tondũ andũ a Edomu nĩmaagiririe Aisiraeli matuĩkanĩrie bũrũri wao
Numbers20:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers20:23 mũhakainĩ wa Edomu. Me kũu MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa na Harũni akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers20:24 “Harũni ndegũtoonya bũrũri ũrĩa ndeerĩire Aisiraeli
Numbers20:25 Oya Harũni na mũũrũwe Eleazaru wambate nao kĩrĩma igũrũ kĩa Hori.
Numbers20:26 Mwĩ kũu kĩrĩmainĩ ũrute Harũni nguo ciake cia ũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers20:27 Musa agĩgĩĩka ũguo eerirwo nĩ MWATHANI; magĩkĩambata kĩrĩma kĩa Hori
Numbers20:28 Musa akĩruta Harũni nguo ciake cia ũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers20:29 Nao andũ oothe a Isiraeli maamenya atĩ Harũni nĩ mũkuũ
Numbers21:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers21:2 Nao Aisiraeli makĩĩhĩta makĩĩra MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Numbers21:3 MWATHANI agĩkĩmaigua
Numbers21:4 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩgĩkiuma kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hori magĩthiĩ na njĩra ĩrĩa yerekeire Iria Ituune
Numbers21:5 magĩkĩambĩrĩria gũtetia Ngai hamwe na Musa makiuga atĩrĩ
Numbers21:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers21:7 Andũ magĩgĩũka kũrĩ Musa makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers21:8 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa athondeke nyoka ĩkũhenia amĩĩkĩre gĩtugĩ igũrũ
Numbers21:9 Musa agĩgĩthondeka nyoka ya gĩcango
Numbers21:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers21:11 Moima kũu Obothu magĩthiĩ na mbere
Numbers21:12 Moima kũu magĩthiĩ nginya gĩtuambainĩ gĩa Zeredi magĩaka kambĩ kuo.
Numbers21:13 Kuuma kũu magĩthiĩ magĩaka kambĩ mwena wa na rũgongo wa rũũĩ rwa Arinoni
Numbers21:14 Nĩkĩo kwandĩkĩĩtwo Ibukuinĩ rĩa Mbaara cia MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Numbers21:15 na kĩharũrũka kĩa ituamba iria ithiĩte kuuma itũũra rĩa Ari
Numbers21:16 Moima kũu magĩthiĩ nginya kũndũ gwetagwo Ithima
Numbers21:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Aisiraeli makĩina rwĩmbo rũũrũ:“Wee gĩthima gĩĩkĩ therũka; na nĩtũkũmakũngũĩra na rwĩmbo.
Numbers21:18 Gĩthima kĩrĩa kĩenjirwo nĩ anene o hamwe na atongoria a andũ
Numbers21:19 moima kũu magĩthiĩ nginya Nahalieli moima Nahalieli magĩthiĩ Bamothi
Numbers21:20 na moima Bamothi magĩthiĩ gĩtuamba kĩrĩa kĩrĩ bũrũri wa Amoabi mũhuro wa kĩrĩma kĩa Pisiga
Numbers21:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers21:22 “Twĩtĩkĩrie tũtuĩkanĩrie bũrũriinĩ waku; tũtikũgerera mĩgũndainĩ kana kũrĩa kwĩ mĩthabibũ
Numbers21:23 No mũthamaki Sihoni akĩgiria andũ a Isiraeli kũhĩtũkĩra bũrũriinĩ wake. Agĩgĩcookanĩrĩria thigari ciake ciothe agĩcitwara Jahazu werũinĩ
Numbers21:24 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers21:25 Kwoguo andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩĩnyiitĩra matũũra moothe ma Aamori
Numbers21:26 Heshiboni nĩrĩo rĩarĩ itũũra rĩrĩa inene rĩa mũthamaki Sihoni wa Aamori
Numbers21:27 Kwoguo nĩkĩo aini mainaga atĩrĩ
Numbers21:28 Amu thigari cia Sihoni nĩcioimire itũũra rĩa Heshiboni ihaana ta mwaki
Numbers21:29 Kaĩ inyuĩ Amoabi mwĩ thĩĩna-ĩ! Inyuĩ arĩa mũthaathayagia Kemoshu nĩmũniinĩĩtwo! Ngai ĩyo yanyu nĩtũmĩĩte arũme moorĩre kwene
Numbers21:30 Njiarwa ciao nĩiniinĩĩtwo
Numbers21:31 Kwoguo Aisiraeli magĩtũũra bũrũri wa Aamori.
Numbers21:32 Naake Musa agĩtũma andũ magathigaane itũũra rĩa Jazeri. Aisiraeli magĩthiĩ makĩrĩnyiita o hamwe na matũũra marĩa marĩthiũrũkĩirie
Numbers21:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers21:34 No MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers21:35 Kwoguo Aisiraeli makĩũraga Ogu
Numbers22:1 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩthiĩ na mbere
Numbers22:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers22:3 we na andũ aake oothe magĩĩtigĩra.
Numbers22:4 Amoabi makĩĩra atongoria a Amidiani atĩrĩ
Numbers22:5 agĩtũma anjaama kũrĩ Balaamu mũrũ wa Beori
Numbers22:6 Ũka ũnumĩre andũ aya amu marĩ na hinya kũngĩra. Ũngĩĩka ũguo
Numbers22:7 Kwoguo atongoria a Amoabi na a Amidiani magĩkuua mbeeca cia kũmũhe nĩguo arumane
Numbers22:8 Balaamu akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers22:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers22:10 Naake Balaamu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Numbers22:11 atĩ harĩ andũ mookĩĩte kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri
Numbers22:12 Naake Ngai akĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers22:13 Kwarooka gũkĩa Balaamu agĩthiĩ kũrĩ anene acio maatũmĩĩtwo nĩ Balaki akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers22:14 Nao magĩgĩcooka kwao makĩĩra Balaki atĩ Balaamu nĩarega gũũka nao.
Numbers22:15 O rĩngĩ Balaki agĩtũma atongoria aingĩ makĩria
Numbers22:16 Magĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Balaamu makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers22:17 Nĩngũkũhe kĩheeo kĩnene
Numbers22:18 No Balaamu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Numbers22:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers22:20 Naake Ngai akĩĩra Balaamu ũtukũ atĩrĩ
Numbers22:21 Kwarooka gũkĩa
Numbers22:22 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers22:23 Rĩrĩa ndigiri yonire mũraika wa MWATHANI arũũgamĩĩte njĩrainĩ anyiitĩĩte rũhiũ rwa njora
Numbers22:24 Ningĩ mũraika akĩrũũgama harĩa njĩra yacekeheire gatagatĩinĩ ka mĩgũnda ĩĩrĩ ya mĩthabibũ
Numbers22:25 Rĩrĩa ndigiri yonire mũraika ĩkĩĩgiritania na rũthingo
Numbers22:26 Ningĩ mũraika wa MWATHANI agĩthiĩ mbere
Numbers22:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo
Numbers22:28 Naake MWATHANI akĩhe ndigiri ũhoti wa kwaria
Numbers22:29 Naake Balaamu akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ
Numbers22:30 Nayo ndigiri ĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Numbers22:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI agĩkĩhingũra Balaamu maitho
Numbers22:32 Naake mũraika wa MWATHANI akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Numbers22:33 Ndigiri yaku nĩĩnyonire
Numbers22:34 Naake Balaamu agĩcookeria mũraika wa MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Numbers22:35 Naake mũraika wa MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers22:36 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers22:37 Balaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Numbers22:38 Naake Balaamu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Numbers22:39 Balaamu agĩgĩthiĩ na Balaki itũũrainĩ rĩa Huzothu
Numbers22:40 kũrĩa Balaki aathĩnjire ndeegwa
Numbers22:41 Kwarooka gũkĩa
Numbers23:1 Balaamu agĩkĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ
Numbers23:2 Naake Balaki agĩgĩĩka o ũguo eerirwo
Numbers23:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Balaamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ
Numbers23:4 naake Ngai akĩmũtũnga. Balaamu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers23:5 MWATHANI akĩĩra Balaamu ũrĩa egũthiĩ kuuga
Numbers23:6 Agĩgĩcooka
Numbers23:7 Balaamu agĩkĩratha atĩrĩ: “Balaki mũthamaki wa Amoabi
Numbers23:8 Mũndũ ũtarumĩĩtwo nĩ Ngai-rĩ
Numbers23:9 Nĩndĩramoona ndĩ ndwaro cia mahiga igũrũ Nĩndĩramacũũthĩrĩria ndĩ irĩma igũrũ. Acio nĩ rũũrĩrĩ rwĩtindĩĩtie.Nĩ rũũrĩrĩ rũũĩ atĩ nĩrũraathime gũkĩra ndũũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ.
Numbers23:10 Andũ a rũciaro rwa Isiraeli nĩ aingĩ o ta rũkũngũ. Nĩ aingĩ mũno matingĩtarĩka. Nĩndekwo ngue ta ũmwe wa andũ aya a Ngai.Ndekwo ngue na thaayũ ta mũndũ mũthingu.”
Numbers23:11 Balaki agĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers23:12 Naake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Numbers23:13 Balaki agĩcooka akĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers23:14 Agĩkĩmũtwara mũgũndainĩ wa Zofimu kĩrĩma igũrũ kĩa Pisiga. O na kũu agĩaka igongoona mũgwanja
Numbers23:15 Naake Balaamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ
Numbers23:16 MWATHANI agĩgĩtũnga Balaamu
Numbers23:17 Agĩgĩcooka harĩ Balaki
Numbers23:18 Naake Balaamu akĩratha atĩrĩ:“Balaki mũũru wa Ziporu
Numbers23:19 Ngai-rĩ
Numbers23:20 Niĩ-rĩ
Numbers23:21 Ngai ndarĩ ũũru ooneete harĩ Jakubu; kana akoona thĩĩna harĩ Isiraeli.MWATHANI Ngai wao arĩ hamwe nao
Numbers23:22 Ngai nĩamarutĩĩte Misiri; amarũagĩrĩra o ta ndeegwa ya gĩthaka.
Numbers23:23 Amu gũtirĩ ũhoro wa mĩthaiga kana wa ũragũri ũngĩhũthĩrwo gũthũũkia andũ a Isiraeli. Andũ mekuuga ũhoro wa Aisiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers23:24 Rũũrĩrĩ rwa Isiraeli rũtariĩ ta mũrũũthi; ndũhuurũkaga ũtarĩ ũranyiita na ũkarĩa
Numbers23:25 Balaki agĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers23:26 No Balaamu akĩĩra Balaki atĩrĩ
Numbers23:27 Balaki agĩkĩĩra Balaamu atĩrĩ
Numbers23:28 Agĩkĩoya Balaamu akĩmũtwara kĩrĩma igũrũ kĩa Peori kĩrĩa kĩng'etheire werũ.
Numbers23:29 Balaamu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers23:30 Balaki agĩgĩĩka ũrĩa eerirwo nĩ Balaamu
Numbers24:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers24:2 agĩcũũthĩrĩria akĩona andũ a Isiraeli maambĩĩte hema kũringana na mĩhĩrĩga yao. Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers24:3 akĩambĩrĩria kũratha ta ũũ:“Ndũmĩrĩri ya Balaamu mũrũ wa Beori
Numbers24:4 ũraigua ũrĩa Ngai aroiga.Ngũũrĩĩte maitho
Numbers24:5 Kaĩ hema cia Aisiraeli nĩ thaka-ĩ!
Numbers24:6 Ihaana ta ituamba ciaraganĩĩte kũndũ kũraaya
Numbers24:7 Marĩkoragwo na mbura nyingĩ
Numbers24:8 Ngai nĩ we wamarutire Misiri
Numbers24:9 Rũũrĩrĩ rũu rũhaana ta mũrũũthi; Rĩrĩa ũkomeete gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩthengerera kũũkĩria.Ũrĩa wothe ũraathimaga Aisiraeli nĩarĩraathimagwo
Numbers24:10 Balaki akĩraakario mũno nĩ Balaamu
Numbers24:11 Rĩu inũka! Nĩndakwĩrĩire kĩheeo
Numbers24:12 Naake Balaamu agĩcookeria Balaki atĩrĩ
Numbers24:13 o na ũngĩhe betha na thahabu ciothe iria irĩ mũciĩ gwaku ndingĩregana na uuge wa MWATHANI na ũndũ wa gwĩka wendi wakwa niĩ mwene. Niĩ ndĩriugaga o ũrĩa MWATHANI anjĩĩra njuge.”
Numbers24:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers24:15 Agĩkĩratha atĩrĩ
Numbers24:16 ũraigua ũrĩa Ngai aroiga
Numbers24:17 Nĩndĩroona matukũ marĩa magooka
Numbers24:18 Nĩakaahoota thũ ciake iria irĩ Edomu naguo bũrũri wao ũtuĩke wake
Numbers24:19 Rũũrĩrĩ rwa Isiraeli nĩrũkaamarangĩrĩria
Numbers24:20 Ningĩ o kĩonekiinĩ gĩake Balaamu akĩona Aamaleki na akĩratha atĩrĩ
Numbers24:21 Kĩonekiinĩ gĩake nĩonire Akeni
Numbers24:22 no inyuĩ Akeni nĩmũkaaniinwo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Aasiria makaamũtaha.”
Numbers24:23 Ningĩ Balaamu akĩratha atĩrĩ
Numbers24:24 Andũ a gũtharĩkĩra nĩmagooka kuuma Kuporo
Numbers24:25 Balaamu agĩcooka akĩĩhaarĩria akĩinũka
Numbers25:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers25:2 Atumia acio nĩmaameetĩire ndĩa magongoonainĩ kũrĩa ngai ya Amoabi yathaathayagĩrio. Aisiraeli magĩgĩthiĩ makĩrĩa
Numbers25:3 Baali ya Peori. MWATHANI akĩraakario nĩ Aisiraeli
Numbers25:4 agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers25:5 Musa agĩkĩĩra atongoria a Aisiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers25:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers25:7 Rĩrĩa Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru na mũcũkũrũ wa Harũni ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri Ngai oonire ũguo
Numbers25:8 akĩrũmĩrĩra mũndũ ũcio na mũndũ wa nja ũcio nginya hemainĩ
Numbers25:9 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers25:10 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers25:11 “Finehasi nĩatũmĩĩte ndige kũraakarĩra andũ a Isiraeli nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo eekire. Nĩaregire kũũmĩrĩria gũthaathaiyo kwa ngai ĩngĩ tiga niĩ
Numbers25:12 Kĩmwĩre nĩndarĩĩkanĩra naake kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩa thaayũ.
Numbers25:13 We o hamwe na njiarwa ciake megũtũũra marĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai nginya tene
Numbers25:14 Mũisiraeli ũrĩa woragirwo na mũndũ wa nja Mũmidiani eetagwo Zimiri mũrũ wa Salu
Numbers25:15 Naake mũndũ wa nja Mũmidiani ũrĩa woragirwo eetagwo Kozibi mwarĩ wa Zuru
Numbers25:16 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers25:17 “Tharĩkĩra Amidiani ũmaniine
Numbers25:18 nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru ũrĩa maamwĩkire rĩrĩa maamũheenirie mũrĩ Peori
Numbers26:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers26:2 “Taraai mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli kũringana na nyũmba cia maithe. Taraai arũme oothe arĩa marĩ na mĩaka kuuma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ gũthiĩ na igũrũ
Numbers26:3 (3-4) Nao Musa na Eleazaru magĩathĩkĩra uuge wa MWATHANI
Numbers26:4 Mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni (Reubeni nĩ we warĩ mũrũ wa Jakubu ũrĩa irigithaathi): mbarĩ ya Hanoku na mbarĩ ya Palu
Numbers26:5 na mbarĩ ya Hezironi
Numbers26:6 Acio nĩ o maarĩ a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni
Numbers26:7 Njiarwa cia Palu ciarĩ Eliabu
Numbers26:8 na aariũ aake Nemueli
Numbers26:9 Thĩ yathamirie kanua kaayo ĩkĩmameranĩria hamwe na Kora na arũmĩrĩri aake
Numbers26:10 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers26:11 Mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni: mbarĩ ya Nemueli
Numbers26:12 Zera
Numbers26:13 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ na magana meerĩ. (22
Numbers26:14 Mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi: mbarĩ ya Zefoni
Numbers26:15 Ozini
Numbers26:16 Arodi
Numbers26:17 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩna na magana mataano. (40
Numbers26:18 (19-21) Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Juda: mbarĩ ya Shela
Numbers26:19 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Juda maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithathatũ na magana mataano. (76
Numbers26:20 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru: mbarĩ ya Tola
Numbers26:21 Jashubu
Numbers26:22 Andũ oothe a mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na inya na magana matatũ. (64
Numbers26:23 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni: mbarĩ ya Seredi
Numbers26:24 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na magana mataano. (60
Numbers26:25 Andũ a mĩhĩrĩga ya Josefu maarĩ a kuuma harĩ aariũ aake eerĩ Manase na Efiraimu.
Numbers26:26 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Manase: mũũriũ wa Manase wetagwo Makiru ũrĩa warĩ ithe wa Gileadi. Nacio nyũmba cia Gileadi irũmanĩrĩire ta ũũ:
Numbers26:27 nyũmba ya Ezeri
Numbers26:28 Asirieli
Numbers26:29 Shemida
Numbers26:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers26:31 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Manase maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtaano na igĩrĩ na magana mũgwanja. (52
Numbers26:32 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu: mbarĩ ya Shuthela
Numbers26:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers26:34 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ na igĩrĩ na magana mataano. (32
Numbers26:35 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini: mbarĩ ya Bela
Numbers26:36 Shefufamu
Numbers26:37 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers26:38 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩna na ithaano
Numbers26:39 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Dani: mbarĩ ya Shuhamu
Numbers26:40 ĩrĩa yarĩ na andũ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na inya
Numbers26:41 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri: mbarĩ ya Imuna
Numbers26:42 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers26:43 Asheri nĩarĩ na mwarĩ wetagwo Sera.
Numbers26:44 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩtaano na ithatũ na magana mana. (53
Numbers26:45 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Nafutali: mbarĩ ya Jahazeeli
Numbers26:46 Jezeri
Numbers26:47 Andũ oothe a mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Nafutali maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩna na ithaano na magana mana. (45
Numbers26:48 Mũigana wa arũme arĩa maatarirwo a Isiraeli warĩ ngiri magana matandatũ na ĩmwe
Numbers26:49 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers26:50 “Acio nĩ o makaagaĩrwo bũrũri
Numbers26:51 Mũhĩrĩga ũrĩa wĩ na andũ aingĩ ũkaaũhe igai inene
Numbers26:52 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers26:53 Andũ arĩa aingĩ na arĩa aniini makaagaĩrwo igai rĩao na ũndũ wa gũcuuka mĩtĩ.”
Numbers26:54 Naguo mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi warĩ wa mbarĩ ya Gerishoni
Numbers26:55 Njiarwa ciao ciahĩmbĩirie nyũmba ya Libini
Numbers26:56 Amuramu aahikirie mwarĩ wa Lawi wetagwo Jokebedi
Numbers26:57 Naake Harũni aarĩ ithe wa Nadabu
Numbers26:58 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers26:59 Arũme Alawii arĩa maarĩ na ũkũrũ wa mweri ũmwe gũthiĩ na igũrũ maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithatũ (23
Numbers26:60 Acio nĩ o andũ arĩa maatarirwo nĩ Musa na Eleazaru ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers26:61 Andũ arĩa maatarĩirwo werũinĩ wa Sinai nĩ Musa na Harũni mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers26:62 Amu MWATHANI nĩoigĩĩte ũhoro wao atĩrĩ
Numbers27:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers27:2 Magĩkĩrũũgama mbere ya Musa na Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers27:3 “Ithe witũ aakuĩrĩire werũinĩ na ndarĩ na mũũriũ. Ndarĩ ũmwe wa arũmĩrĩri a Kora arĩa maacookanĩrĩire hamwe magĩũkĩrĩra MWATHANI. Aakuire nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maake.
Numbers27:4 Rĩĩtwa rĩa ithe witũ rĩgũkĩeherio harĩ andũ a nyũmba yao tondũ ndarĩ na aariũ? Nĩtũheeo igai kuuma harĩ andũ a nyũmba ya ithe witũ.”
Numbers27:5 Musa nĩatwarĩire MWATHANI mateta maao.
Numbers27:6 Naake MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers27:7 “Aarĩ a Zelofehadi matirĩ na mahĩtia; magaĩre igai kuuma kũrĩ andũ a nyũmba ya ithe.” Manengere igai rĩa ithe.
Numbers27:8 Na wĩre andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers27:9 Angĩkorwo atarĩ na mwarĩ
Numbers27:10 Angĩkorwo atarĩ aariũ a nyina arĩgayagwo nĩ aariũ a nyina na ithe.
Numbers27:11 Angĩkorwo ithe ndarĩ na aariũ a nyina
Numbers27:12 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers27:13 Wawona-rĩ
Numbers27:14 amu nĩmwaregire gwĩka ũrĩa ndamwĩrire mwĩ werũinĩ wa Zini. Rĩrĩa mũingĩ wothe wanjũkĩrĩire mwĩ Meriba nĩmwaregire kũmenyithania hinya wakwa mũtheru harĩ mũingĩ ũcio.” (Meriba nĩ gĩthima gĩ Kadeshi werũinĩ wa Zini.)
Numbers27:15 Musa agĩkĩhooya atĩrĩ
Numbers27:16 “MWATHANI Ngai
Numbers27:17 na ũngĩhota kũmatongoragia magĩthiĩ mbaarainĩ
Numbers27:18 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers27:19 Mũrũũgamie mbere ya Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers27:20 Mũhe ũhoti ũmwe waku nĩ geetha mũingĩ wothe wa Isiraeli ũmwathĩkĩre.
Numbers27:21 Nĩarĩteithagĩrĩrio nĩ Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers27:22 Musa agĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa aathĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI. Agĩkĩoya Joshua akĩmũrũũgamia mbere ya Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers27:23 akĩmũigĩrĩra mooko akĩmũtua mũtongoria wao ta ũrĩa aathĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI.
Numbers28:1 MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers28:2 “Atha andũ a Isiraeli ũmeere atĩrĩ
Numbers28:3 Magongoona ma njino marĩa marĩrutagĩra MWATHANI nĩ maya: o mũthenya tũtũrũme twĩrĩ twa mwaka ũmwe tũtarĩ na kaũũgũ.
Numbers28:4 Mũrĩrutaga gatũrũme kamwe rũũciinĩ
Numbers28:5 Mũrĩrutanagĩria o gatũrũme na igongoona rĩa mũtu kiro ĩmwe ũtukanĩĩtio na rita ĩmwe ya maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ marĩa meega mũno.
Numbers28:6 Rĩũ nĩrĩo igongoona rĩa njino rĩa kũrutagwo o mũthenya
Numbers28:7 O na ningĩ nĩmũrĩrutanagĩria gatũrũme ka mbere na igongoona rĩa ndibei rita ĩmwe
Numbers28:8 Naguo hwaĩinĩ mũkaruta gatũrũme kau kangĩ o ta ũrĩa mwĩkire rũũciinĩ
Numbers28:9 “Mũthenya wa Thabatũ mũrĩrutaga igongoona rĩa tũtũrũme twĩrĩ twĩ na ũkũrũ wa mwaka ũmwe tũtarĩ na kaũũgũ
Numbers28:10 Igongoona rĩĩrĩ rĩa njino rĩrĩrutagwo o mũthenya wa Thabatũ hamwe na igongoona rĩrĩa rĩrutagwo mũthenya o mũthenya hamwe na igongoona rĩa ndibei.
Numbers28:11 “Mũthenya wa mbere wa o mweri-rĩ
Numbers28:12 Narĩo igongoona rĩa mũtu mũrĩrutaga mũtu mũhinyu ũtukanĩĩtio na maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ mũkaũruta ta ũũ: gateegwa mũgakarutanĩria na kiro ithatũ cia mũtu
Numbers28:13 na o gatũrũme kiro ĩmwe ya mũtu. Rĩũ nĩ igongoona rĩa njino; mũtararĩko warĩo nĩũkenagia MWATHANI.
Numbers28:14 Narĩo igongoona rĩa ndibei nĩ rita igĩrĩ cia ndibei hamwe na o gateegwa
Numbers28:15 Hamwe na igongoona rĩu rĩa njino rĩa o mũthenya na igongoona rĩarĩo rĩa ndibei nĩmũrĩrutaga thenge ĩmwe ĩrĩ igongoona rĩa meehia.
Numbers28:16 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Numbers28:17 Mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtaano wa mweri ũcio
Numbers28:18 Mũthenya wa mbere wa thigũkũ ĩyo nĩguo mũrĩũnganaga gũthaathaiya
Numbers28:19 Mũrĩrutaga igongoona rĩa njino rĩrĩ igongoona rĩa irio rĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI rĩa indo ici: tũteegwa twĩrĩ
Numbers28:20 Ningĩ igongoona rĩa mũtu ũtukanĩĩtio na maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ mũkaũruta ta ũũ: nĩmũrĩrutanagĩria indo icio na o gateegwa mũtu kiro ithatũ
Numbers28:21 na o gatũrũme mũtu kiro ĩmwe.
Numbers28:22 Hamwe na indo icio nĩmũrĩrutaga thenge ĩmwe ĩ ya igongoona rĩa kũhoroheria meehia.
Numbers28:23 Indo icio irĩrutanagĩrio hamwe na igongoona rĩa njino rĩa o rũũciinĩ.
Numbers28:24 Ũguo nĩguo mũrĩrutagĩra MWATHANI igongoona rĩa irio mĩthenya mũgwanja. Mũtararĩko warĩo nĩũkenagia MWATHANI. Mũrĩrĩrutanagĩria na igongoona rĩa njino rĩa o mũthenya hamwe na igongoona rĩa ndibei.
Numbers28:25 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũrĩũnganaga gũthaathaiya
Numbers28:26 “Mũthenya wa mbere wa Thigũkũ ya Magetha
Numbers28:27 Nĩmũrĩrutaga igongoona rĩa njino
Numbers28:28 Ningĩ nĩmũrĩrutanagĩria indo icio na igongoona rĩa mũtu ũtukanĩĩtio na maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ
Numbers28:29 na o gatũrũme mũtu kiro ĩmwe.
Numbers28:30 O na ningĩ nĩmũrĩrutaga thenge ya igongoona rĩa kuhoroheria meehia.
Numbers28:31 Mũrĩrutanagĩria indo icio na igongoona rĩa ndibei hamwe na igongoona rĩa o mũthenya rĩa njino na rĩa irio.
Numbers29:1 “Mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mũgwanja nĩmũrĩũnganaga gũthaathaiya
Numbers29:2 Nĩmũrĩrutaga igongoona rĩa njino rĩrĩ mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũkenagia MWATHANI rĩa indo ici: gateegwa kamwe
Numbers29:3 Ningĩ nĩmũrĩrutanagĩria indo icio na igongoona rĩa mũtu ũtukanĩĩtio na maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ
Numbers29:4 na o gatũrũme mũtu kiro ĩmwe.
Numbers29:5 Hamwe na indo icio nĩmũrĩrutaga thenge ĩmwe ĩ ya igongoona rĩa kuhoroheria meehia.
Numbers29:6 Mũrĩrutanagĩria indo icio na igongoona rĩa njino rĩa mũthenya wa mbere wa o mweri na igongoona rĩarĩo rĩa mũtu
Numbers29:7 “Mũthenya wa ikũmi wa mweri wa mũgwanja nĩmũrĩũnganaga gũthaathaiya; nĩmũrĩhingaga kũrĩa na kũnyua na mũtirĩrutaga wĩra.
Numbers29:8 Nĩmũrĩrutaga igongoona rĩa njino rĩa mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũkenagia MWATHANI rĩa indo ici: gateegwa kamwe
Numbers29:9 Ningĩ nĩmũrĩrutanagĩria indo icio na igongoona rĩa mũtu mũhinyu ũtukanĩĩtio na maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ
Numbers29:10 na o gatũrũme mũtu kiro ĩmwe.
Numbers29:11 O na ningĩ nĩmũrĩrutaga thenge ĩmwe ĩrĩ ya igongoona rĩa meehia. Mũrĩmĩrutanagĩria na thenge ĩrĩa ĩrutagwo ya igongoona rĩa kũhoroheria meehia
Numbers29:12 “Mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtaano wa mweri wa mũgwanja nĩmũrĩũnganaga gũthaathaiya. Thigũkũ ĩno mũrĩmĩkũngũagĩra mĩthenya mũgwanja nĩ ũndũ wa gũtĩĩa MWATHANI
Numbers29:13 Mũthenya wa mbere mũrĩrutaga igongoona rĩa njino rĩ na mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũkenagia MWATHANI rĩa indo ici: tũteegwa ikũmi na tũtatũ
Numbers29:14 Ningĩ nĩmũrĩrutanagĩria indo icio na igongoona rĩa mũtu mũhinyu ũtukanĩĩtio na maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ
Numbers29:15 na o gatũrũme mũtu kiro ĩmwe.
Numbers29:16 O na nĩmũrĩrutaga thenge ĩmwe ya igongoona rĩa meehia. Mũrĩmĩrutanagĩria na igongoona rĩa njino rĩa o mũthenya hamwe na igongoona rĩarĩo rĩa mũtu na rĩa ndibei.
Numbers29:17 “Mũthenya wa keerĩ mũkaruta tũteegwa ikũmi na twĩrĩ
Numbers29:18 (18-19) Hamwe nacio nĩmũrĩrutaga magongoona marĩa mangĩ moothe maagĩrĩire kũrutwo
Numbers29:19 “Mũthenya wa ĩtatũ mũkaruta tũteegwa ikũmi na kamwe
Numbers29:20 (21-22) Hamwe nacio nĩmũrĩrutaga magongoona marĩa mangĩ moothe maagĩrĩire kũrutwo mũthenya wa mbere.
Numbers29:21 “Mũthenya wa ĩna mũkaruta tũteegwa ikũmi
Numbers29:22 (24-25) Hamwe nacio nĩmũrĩrutaga magongoona marĩa mangĩ moothe maagĩrĩire kũrutwo mũthenya wa mbere.
Numbers29:23 “Mũthenya wa gataano mũkaruta tũteegwa kenda
Numbers29:24 (27-28) Hamwe nacio nĩmũrĩrutaga magongoona marĩa mangĩ moothe maagĩrĩire kũrutwo mũthenya wa mbere.
Numbers29:25 “Mũthenya wa gatandatũ mũkaruta tũteegwa tũnaana
Numbers29:26 (30-31) Hamwe nacio nĩmũrĩrutaga magongoona marĩa mangĩ moothe maagĩrĩire kũrutwo mũthenya wa mbere.
Numbers29:27 “Mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũkaruta tũteegwa mũgwanja
Numbers29:28 (33-34) Hamwe nacio nĩmũrĩrutaga magongoona marĩa mangĩ moothe maagĩrĩire kũrutwo mũthenya wa mbere.
Numbers29:29 “Mũthenya wa kanaana mũrĩũnganaga gũthaathaiya
Numbers29:30 Nĩmũrĩrutaga igongoona rĩa njino rĩa mũtararĩko ũrĩa ũkenagia MWATHANI rĩa: gateegwa kamwe
Numbers29:31 (37-38) Hamwe nacio nĩmũrĩrutaga magongoona marĩa mangĩ moothe maagĩrĩire kũrutwo mũthenya wa mbere.
Numbers29:32 “Macio nĩ mo magongoona ma njino
Numbers29:33 Musa agĩkĩĩra andũ a Isiraeli maũndũ moothe o ta ũrĩa aathĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI.
Numbers30:1 Musa akĩĩra atongoria a mĩhĩrĩga ya Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers30:2 Mũndũ mũrũme angĩĩhĩta oige atĩ nĩekũhe MWATHANI ũndũ kana ehĩte atĩ nĩekwĩhinga kĩndũ
Numbers30:3 “Mũirĩĩtu wĩ gwa ithe angĩĩhĩta oige atĩ nĩekũhe MWATHANI kĩndũ kana ehĩte atĩ nĩekwĩhinga ũndũ
Numbers30:4 na ithe aigue ũhoro ũcio na ndamũũrie
Numbers30:5 No ithe angĩregana na mĩhĩtwa ĩyo aigua ũhoro wayo
Numbers30:6 “Mũirĩĩtu ũcio angĩhika arĩ o na mĩhĩtwa ĩyo yake eehĩtire akĩendaga kana ataambĩĩte gwĩciiria
Numbers30:7 mũthuuriwe angĩigua ũhoro wayo na ndamwĩre ũndũ
Numbers30:8 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers30:9 “No mũhaka mũtumia wa ndigwa kana mũtumia ũtiganĩĩte na mũthuuriwe ahingagie mĩhĩtwa yothe ĩrĩa ehĩtĩĩte.
Numbers30:10 Mũtumia mũhiku angĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa e kwa mũthuuriwe
Numbers30:11 mũthuuriwe angĩigua ũhoro wa mĩhĩtwa ĩyo na ndamwĩre ũndũ
Numbers30:12 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers30:13 Mũthuuriwe e na ũhoti wa gwĩtĩkĩria kana kũregana na mĩhĩtwa ĩrĩa mũtumia wake angĩkorwo ehĩtĩĩte.
Numbers30:14 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers30:15 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers30:16 Macio nĩ mo mawatho marĩa MWATHANI aaheire Musa makoniĩ mũthuuri na mũtumia wake
Numbers31:1 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers31:2 “Herithia Amidiani nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa meekire andũ a Isiraeli. Warĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo nĩũgũkua.”
Numbers31:3 Kwoguo Musa akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Numbers31:4 Kuuma harĩ o mũhĩrĩga wa Isiraeli andũ ngiri ĩmwe nĩ o megũthiĩ mbaarainĩ.”
Numbers31:5 Kwoguo o mũhĩrĩga ũgĩthuura andũ ngiri ĩmwe
Numbers31:6 Musa agĩkĩmatũma mathiĩ mbaara matongoreetio nĩ Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers31:7 Magĩgĩtharĩkĩra Amidiani o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa
Numbers31:8 hamwe na athamaki ataano a Amidiani
Numbers31:9 Andũ a Isiraeli magĩtaha atumia a Amidiani na ciana ciao
Numbers31:10 Magĩcooka magĩcina matũũra maao moothe na kambĩ ciao.
Numbers31:11 Magĩgĩkuua indo ciothe iria maatahĩĩte o hamwe na andũ na mahiũ
Numbers31:12 magĩtwarĩra Musa na Eleazaru o hamwe na andũ oothe a Isiraeli arĩa maakĩĩte kambĩ yao werũinĩ wa Moabi
Numbers31:13 Musa
Numbers31:14 Musa akĩraakario nĩ atongoria a mbaara arĩa maatongoragia thigari ngiri na arĩa maatongoragia thigari igana arĩa macookeete kuuma mbaarainĩ.
Numbers31:15 Akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Numbers31:16 Ririkanaai atĩ nĩ atumia o aya maarũmĩrĩire mataaro ma Balaamu
Numbers31:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Numbers31:18 No airĩĩtu arĩa matarĩ maakomwo nao mwĩtigĩrie.
Numbers31:19 Na rĩĩrĩ mũndũ o wothe ũũraganĩĩte kana akahuutia kĩimba egũikara nja ya kambĩ mĩthenya mũgwanja. Mũthenya wa gatatũ na wa mũgwanja mwĩtherie o hamwe na atumia arĩa mũtahĩĩte.
Numbers31:20 No mũhaka mũtherie nguo ciothe na kĩndũ o gĩothe gĩthondekeetwo na rũũa
Numbers31:21 Naake Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai akĩĩra njamba cia ita iria ciacookeete atĩrĩ
Numbers31:22 (22-23) Kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa gĩtangĩhĩa ta thahabu
Numbers31:23 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja mũthambie nguo cianyu
Numbers31:24 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers31:25 “Wee na Eleazaru na atongoria a mũingĩ taraai indo ciothe iria iratahirwo hamwe na andũ na mahiũ.
Numbers31:26 Mũcooke mũcigayanie maita meerĩ
Numbers31:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers31:28 Mũcinengere Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai irĩ kĩheeo kĩa mwanya kĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI.
Numbers31:29 Kuuma harĩ igai rĩa mũingĩ
Numbers31:30 Naake Musa na Eleazaru magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aamaathĩĩte.
Numbers31:31 (32-35) Ũyũ nĩguo mũigana wa andũ oothe na indo ciothe iria ciatahĩĩtwo nĩ njamba cia ita: mbũri na ng'ondu ngiri magana matandatũ na mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithaano (675
Numbers31:32 (36-40) Nuthu ĩrĩa yatuĩkire ya thigari yaiganaga ta ũũ: mbũri na ng'ondu ngiri magana matatũ na mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja na magana mataano (337
Numbers31:33 Kwoguo Musa agĩkĩnengera Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai indo icio ituĩke kĩheeo kĩa mwanya kĩrutĩirwo MWATHANI
Numbers31:34 (42-46) Igai rĩa mũingĩ rĩaiganaga o ta rĩa thigari: mbũri na ng'ondu ngiri magana matatũ na mĩrongo ĩtatũ na mũgwanja na magana mataano (337
Numbers31:35 Kuuma harĩ igai rĩu rĩao Musa akĩoya mũirĩĩtu ũmwe kuuma harĩ o airĩĩtu mĩrongo ĩtaano
Numbers31:36 Nao anene a thigari magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Musa makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers31:37 “Mwathi witũ
Numbers31:38 Kwoguo nĩtwareehere MWATHANI indo iria o mũndũ aroonire: mathaga ma thahabu
Numbers31:39 Musa na Eleazaru magĩkĩamũkĩra mathaga macio ma thahabu kuuma kũrĩ o.
Numbers31:40 Thahabu yothe ĩrĩa maarutire yarĩ na ũritũ wa kiro magana meerĩ.
Numbers31:41 Andũ arĩa mataarĩ anene a njamba cia ita makĩigĩra indo iria maatahĩĩte.
Numbers31:42 Musa na Eleazaru magĩgĩkuua thahabu ĩyo
Numbers32:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers32:2 magĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Musa na Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai na atongoria a mũingĩ. Makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers32:3 (3-4) “MWATHANI nĩateithĩrĩirie Aisiraeli makeegwatĩra matũũra ma Atarothu
Numbers32:4 Angĩkorwo nĩtwĩtĩkĩrĩkĩĩte nĩ we-rĩ
Numbers32:5 No Musa akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Numbers32:6 Kaĩ mũrakĩenda kũũraga Aisiraeli arĩa angĩ ngoro
Numbers32:7 Ũguo noguo maithe maanyu meekire rĩrĩa ndamatũmire kuuma Kadeshi Barinea magathigaane bũrũri ũcio.
Numbers32:8 Amu rĩrĩa moimagarire magĩthiĩ nginya gĩtuamba kĩa Eshikoli makĩona bũrũri ũcio
Numbers32:9 Mũthenya ũcio MWATHANI nĩaraakarire na akĩĩhĩta atĩrĩ
Numbers32:10 ‘Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wa andũ arĩa moimire Misiri wĩ na ũkũrũ wa makĩria ma mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ ũkoona bũrũri ũrĩa ndeerĩire Aburahamu
Numbers32:11 Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe ũkaaũtoonya tiga Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune ũrĩa Mũkenizi
Numbers32:12 MWATHANI agĩkĩraakario nĩ andũ
Numbers32:13 Rĩu na inyuĩ nĩmũgĩtuĩkĩĩte ta maithe maanyu
Numbers32:14 Kwoguo inyuĩ andũ a Reubeni na a Gadi mwarega kũmwathĩkĩra
Numbers32:15 Magĩgĩkuhĩrĩria Musa makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Numbers32:16 Tũcooke tuoe indo ciitũ cia mbaara
Numbers32:17 Ithuĩ tũtigaacooka mĩciĩ gwitũ Aisiraeli arĩa angĩ oothe mateenyiitĩire igai rĩao.
Numbers32:18 Ithuĩ-rĩ
Numbers32:19 Musa agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers32:20 Njamba cianyu cia ita nĩikuringa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Numbers32:21 anyiite bũrũri ũcio. Thuutha wa ũguo
Numbers32:22 No mwaga gwĩka kũringana na kĩĩranĩro kĩanyu nĩmũgaakorwo mwĩhĩĩtie harĩ MWATHANI; na inyuĩ mũkĩmenye na ma atĩ meehia maanyu nĩ mo magaatũma mũherithio.
Numbers32:23 Gĩakĩreei atumia na ciana cianyu matũũra
Numbers32:24 Nao andũ a Gadi na a Reubeni makĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers32:25 Ciana ciitũ na atumia aitũ
Numbers32:26 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers32:27 Musa agĩkĩhe Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers32:28 maya akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers32:29 No maaga kũringa hamwe na inyuĩ meyoheete indo cia mbaara
Numbers32:30 Nao arũme a mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi na wa Reubeni makiuga atĩrĩ
Numbers32:31 Nĩtũkũringa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani twĩyoheete indo cia mbaara tũtongoreetio nĩ MWATHANI tũtoonye bũrũri wa Kanaani

Numbers32:33 Nao andũ a Gadi
Numbers32:34 Atorothu Shofani
Numbers32:35 Bethi Nimira

Numbers32:37 Nebo
Numbers32:38 Nao andũ a mbarĩ ya Makiru mũrũ wa Manase magĩtharĩkĩra bũrũri wa Gileadi makĩũtuunyana

Numbers32:40 Naake Jairũ
Numbers32:41 Naake Nobahu agĩtharĩkĩra na agĩtuunyana Kenathu o hamwe na matũũra maakuo
Numbers33:1 Ũũ nĩguo andũ a Isiraeli maathiaga makĩambaga hema ciao moima Misiri. Maathiaga kũringana na mĩhĩrĩga yao matongoreetio nĩ Musa na Harũni.
Numbers33:2 Musa nĩathiaga akĩandĩkaga marĩĩtwa ma kũrĩa maambaga hema ta ũrĩa aathĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI.
Numbers33:3 Andũ a Isiraeli moimire Misiri mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtaano wa mweri wa mbere
Numbers33:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Amisiri nĩgũthika maathikaga aariũ aao a marigithaathi arĩa mooragĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI. MWATHANI nĩonanĩĩtie atĩ aarĩ na hinya gũkĩra ngai cia andũ a Misiri na njĩra ĩyo.
Numbers33:5 Andũ a Isiraeli moima Ramesese maathiire makĩamba hema ciao Sukothu.
Numbers33:6 Moima Sukothu magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao Ethamu
Numbers33:7 Moima Ethamu magĩcooka na thuutha magĩthiĩ Pi Hahirothu
Numbers33:8 Moima Pi Hahirothu
Numbers33:9 Moima kũu magĩthiĩ Elimu
Numbers33:10 Moima Elimu magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao hũgũrũrũinĩ cia Iria Ituune.
Numbers33:11 Moima kũu magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao werũinĩ wa Sini.
Numbers33:12 Moima werũinĩ wa Sini magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao Dofika.
Numbers33:13 Moima Dofika magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao Alushu.
Numbers33:14 Moima Alushu magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema ciao Refidimu
Numbers33:15 (15-37) Kuuma Refidimu kinya kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hori
Numbers33:16 (38-39) Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers33:17 Naake mũthamaki wa Aradi
Numbers33:18 (41-47) Kuuma kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hori
Numbers33:19 Maarĩĩkĩrĩirie werũinĩ wa Moabi mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani kũng'ethera Jeriko.
Numbers33:20 Kambĩ yao yoimĩĩte Bethi Jeshamothi nginya gĩtuamba kĩa Mĩgaa.
Numbers33:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers33:22 Aamwĩrire eere andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers33:23 mũkaingata andũ oothe arĩa matũũraga bũrũri ũcio
Numbers33:24 Nĩmũkeenyiitĩra bũrũri ũcio mũtũũre kuo
Numbers33:25 Mũkaagaya bũrũri ũcio kũringana na mĩhĩrĩga na ũndũ wa gũcuuka mĩtĩ. O mũhĩrĩga ũkaagayana kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo
Numbers33:26 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers33:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers34:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa
Numbers34:2 eere andũ Aisiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers34:3 Mũhaka wa na kĩanda ũgaakorwo werũinĩ wa Zini kũrigania na mũhaka wa Edomu. Ũkaambĩrĩria mũthiainĩ wa na kĩanda wa iria rĩa Cumbĩ
Numbers34:4 ũcooke ũikũrũke ũroreete Mwanya wa Akirabimu
Numbers34:5 Woima hau wĩyune werekere gĩtuamba kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mũhakainĩ wa Misiri
Numbers34:6 “Mũhaka wa mwena wa ithũĩro nĩ iria rĩa Mediteraneani.
Numbers34:7 “Naguo mũhaka wa mwena wa na rũgongo ũgaathiĩ ũrũngĩrĩirie kuuma iriainĩ rĩa Mediteraneani nginya kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hori.
Numbers34:8 Kuuma hau ũthiĩ nginya Mwanyainĩ wa Hamathu
Numbers34:9 na nginya Zifironi
Numbers34:10 “Naguo mũhaka wa mwena wa na irathĩro ũgaathiĩ ũrũngĩrĩirie kuuma Hazaru Enani nginya Shefamu.
Numbers34:11 Ũcooke ũikũrũke nginya Haribeli
Numbers34:12 ũcooke ũikũrũke ũtwaranĩĩte na rũũĩ rwa Jorodani ũrĩĩkĩrĩrie iriainĩ rĩa Cumbĩ.“Ĩyo nĩ yo ĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ mĩhaka ya bũrũri wanyu.”
Numbers34:13 Musa agĩkĩĩra Aisiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers34:14 Amu andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni
Numbers34:15 mwena wa irathĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Numbers34:16 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Numbers34:17 “Eleazaru mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
Numbers34:18 Oya mũthuuri ũmwe kuuma harĩ o mũhĩrĩga mamateithĩrĩrie kũũgayania.”
Numbers34:19 (19-28) Maya nĩ mo marĩĩtwa ma athuuri arĩa MWATHANI aathuurire:
Numbers34:20 Acio nĩ o andũ arĩa MWATHANI aaheire wĩra wa kũgaĩra andũ a Isiraeli bũrũri wa Kanaani.
Numbers35:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Numbers35:2 Aamwĩrire atĩrĩ
Numbers35:3 Matũũra macio magaatuĩka maao
Numbers35:4 Morĩithio macio magaakorwo maarĩ mita magana mana na mĩrongo ĩtaano kuuma rũthingoinĩ gũthiũrũrũkĩria o itũũra.
Numbers35:5 Morĩithio magaakorwo marĩ thikwea ĩ na mita magana kenda o mwena
Numbers35:6 “Makaahe Alawii matũũra matandatũ kũrĩa mũndũ angĩũrĩra angĩũraga mũndũ atekwenda. Hamwe na macio nĩmakaamahe matũũra mangĩ mĩrongo ĩna na meerĩ
Numbers35:7 hamwe na morĩithio maamo. Matũũra moothe marĩa makaahe Alawii magaakorwo marĩ mĩrongo ĩna na manaana.
Numbers35:8 Mũigana wa matũũra marĩa Alawii makaaheeo nĩ o mũhĩrĩga ũgaatuuo kũringana na ũria igai rĩa o mũhĩrĩga rĩigana. Igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga rĩakorwo rĩrĩ inene
Numbers35:9 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa eere
Numbers35:10 andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Numbers35:11 mũgaathuura matũũra ma kũũrĩrwo nĩ geetha mũndũ angĩũraga mũndũ atekwenda akoorĩra kuo.
Numbers35:12 Matũũra macio marĩũragĩrwo nĩ mũndũ ũũragĩĩte mũndũ atwekwenda
Numbers35:13 Matũũra ma kũũrĩrwo marĩa mũkaaheana magaakorwo marĩ matandatũ.
Numbers35:14 Matũũra matatũ magaakorwo mwena wa irathĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Numbers35:15 Matũũra macio magaakorwo marĩ ma kũũrĩrwo nĩ Mũisiraeli
Numbers35:16 (16-18) “No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers35:17 Mũndũ wa ũrĩa ũũragĩĩtwo nĩ we wagĩrĩirwo nĩkũũraga mũũragani ũcio rĩrĩa angĩtũngana naake.
Numbers35:18 (20-21) “Mũndũ angĩtheeca mũndũ ũngĩ nĩ ũndũ wa rũthũũro
Numbers35:19 (22-24) “No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers35:20 Mũingĩ nĩguo ũkahonokia mũũragani kuuma harĩ mũndũ wa ũrĩa ũũragĩĩtwo
Numbers35:21 No rĩĩrĩ
Numbers35:22 mũndũ wa ũrĩa ooragire amuone amũũrage
Numbers35:23 Amu mũndũ ũcio aagĩrĩirwo nĩgũikara itũũrainĩ rĩrĩa oorĩire o nginya Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene agaakua
Numbers35:24 Mawatho macio nĩmakũrũmagĩrĩrwo nĩ inyuĩ na njiarwa cianyu ciothe o kũrĩa guothe mũrĩtũũraga.
Numbers35:25 “Mũndũ angĩũragana
Numbers35:26 Mũũragani no mũhaka ooragwo; ndarĩ irĩhi angĩruta nĩguo ndakooragwo.
Numbers35:27 Ningĩ mũũragani wĩtharĩire itũũra rĩa kũũrĩrwo ndarĩ irĩhi angĩruta nĩguo acooke itũũrainĩ rĩake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene atakuĩte.
Numbers35:28 Mũngĩgeeka ũguo
Numbers35:29 Mũtikaanathaahie bũrũri ũrĩa mũtũũraga

Numbers36:4 Mwakainĩ wa Njookio
Numbers36:5 Musa agĩgĩatha andũ a Isiraeli kũringana na watho wa MWATHANI akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Numbers36:6 kwoguo MWATHANI ekuuga atĩ aarĩ a Zelofehadi no mahikĩre mũndũ o ũrĩa mangĩenda
Numbers36:7 Igai rĩa Mũisiraeli o wothe rĩtiriumaga mũhĩrĩgainĩ wake.
Numbers36:8 Mũtumia o wothe ũrĩgĩaga na igai mũhĩrĩgainĩ wothe wa Aisiraeli arĩhikagĩra o mũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wake. Na njĩra ĩyo Mũisiraeli o wothe nĩarĩrigagia na igai rĩa ithe.
Numbers36:9 Kwoguo gũtirĩ igai rĩriumaga mũhĩrĩga ũmwe rĩgathiĩ mũhĩrĩga ũngĩ
Numbers36:10 (10-11) Kwoguo Mahala
Numbers36:11 Maahikirio nĩ andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Manase mũrũ wa Josefu
Numbers36:12 Macio nĩ mo mawatho marĩa MWATHANI aaheire Aisiraeli ahũthĩrĩĩte Musa werũinĩ wa Moabi
Deuteronomy1:1 Ibuku rĩĩrĩ rĩ na ciugo iria Musa aarĩirie andũ a Isiraeli marĩ werũinĩ
Deuteronomy1:2 (Nĩ rũgendo rwa mĩthenya ikũmi na ũmwe kuuma kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai kinya Kadeshi Barinea mũndũ agereire njĩra ya bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Edomu.)
Deuteronomy1:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy1:4 Eekire ũguo thuutha wa MWATHANI arĩĩkia kũhũũra Sihoni mũthamaki wa Aamori ũrĩa wathaga itũũra rĩa Heshiboni
Deuteronomy1:5 Na rĩĩrĩ

Deuteronomy5:3 to o na maithe maitũ moiki

Deuteronomy5:5 Na niĩ ihindainĩ rĩu ngĩrũũgama gatagatĩ kaanyu na MWATHANI nĩguo ndĩmwĩre ũrĩa MWATHANI oigaga

Deuteronomy5:7 “ ‘Ndũkaanathaathaiye ngai ingĩ tiga niĩ.

Deuteronomy5:9 Ndũkaanainamĩrĩre mũhianano o wothe kana ũthaathaiye
Deuteronomy5:10 Ningĩ nĩnjiguagĩra andũ ngiri na ngiri tha arĩa manyendeete na makaigua maathani maakwa.
Deuteronomy5:11 “ ‘Ndũkaanagwete rĩĩtwa rĩakwa na itherũ nĩ gũkorwo niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku nĩherithagia mũndũ o wothe ũgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩakwa na itherũ.
Deuteronomy5:12 “ ‘Menyagĩrĩra mũthenya wa Thabatũ ũwamũrage o ta ũrĩa niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku ngwathĩĩte.
Deuteronomy5:13 Rutaga wĩra waku wothe mĩthenya ĩtandatũ.
Deuteronomy5:14 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja nĩ mũthenya wa kũhuurũka ũrĩa wamũrĩirwo MWATHANI Ngai waku. Mũthenya ũcio ndũkaanarute wĩra wee mwene

Deuteronomy5:16 “ ‘Tĩĩa thooguo na maitũguo
Deuteronomy5:17 “ ‘Ndũkaanooragane.

Deuteronomy6:1 “Maya nĩ mo mawatho moothe marĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu aanjathire ndĩmũrute. Maathĩkagĩreei mwĩ bũrũri ũcio mwĩ hakuhĩ gũtoonya mũwĩgwatĩre ũtuĩke wanyu.
Deuteronomy6:2 Matukũ moothe ma muoyo wanyu no nginya inyuĩ eene na njiarwa cianyu mũtĩĩage MWATHANI Ngai wanyu na mwathĩkagĩre mawatho maake moothe marĩa ndĩramũhe
Deuteronomy6:3 Tondũ ũcio
Deuteronomy6:4 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ wee Isiraeli
Deuteronomy6:5 Nawe enda MWATHANI Ngai waku na ngoro yaku yothe
Deuteronomy6:6 Ndũkaanariganĩrwo nĩ mawatho maya moothe ndĩragwatha ũũmũũthĩ
Deuteronomy6:7 na ũmarutage ciana ciaku na kinyi. Meririkanagie rĩrĩa wĩ gwaku mũciĩ
Deuteronomy6:8 Moohagĩrĩre mookoinĩ maaku
Deuteronomy6:9 Ningĩ maandĩke buremuinĩ cia mũrango wa nyũmba yaku o na ihingoinĩ ciaku.
Deuteronomy6:10 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy6:11 o na nyũmba ciyũrĩĩte indo nyingĩ njega mũno

Deuteronomy6:19 na mũingate thũ cianyu ciehere mbere yanyu o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI eeranĩire.

Deuteronomy12:13 Mwĩmenyerereei mũtikaanarutĩre magongoona macio o harĩa mũkeenda.
Deuteronomy12:14 No mũhaka mũkaarutagĩra magongoona maanyu o handũ hamwe harĩa MWATHANI agaathuura mũhĩrĩgainĩ ũmwe wa mĩhĩrĩga yanyu. Hau nĩ ho mũkaarutagĩra magongoona maanyu ma njino

Deuteronomy13:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ

Deuteronomy13:3 mũtikaanarũmbũyanie naake o na haniini. Nĩ gũkorwo nĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu ũramũhũthĩra nĩguo amũgerie inyuĩ nĩ geetha amenye kana nĩmũmwendeete na ngoro yothe na muoyo wothe.

Deuteronomy13:11 Nao andũ oothe a Isiraeli nĩmakaigua ũrĩa gũgaakorwo gwĩkĩkĩĩte
Deuteronomy13:12 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũgaakorwo mũtũũrĩĩte matũũrainĩ marĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu akaamũhe
Deuteronomy13:13 atĩ andũ amwe aaganu a bũrũri wanyu nĩmaguucĩrĩirie andũ a itũũra rĩao magathaathaiye ngai matarĩ maathaathaiya;
Deuteronomy13:14 mũngĩkaigua mũhuuhu ta ũcio

Deuteronomy16:1 “Menyagĩrĩraai mweri wa Abibu
Deuteronomy16:2 Mũrĩthiaga handũ o harĩa MWATHANI athuurĩĩte ha gũthaathayagĩrio mũgathĩnja ng'ondu ĩmwe yanyu kana ng'ombe ĩrĩ irio cia Bathaka nĩ ũndũ wa kũhe MWATHANI Ngai wanyu gĩtĩĩo.
Deuteronomy16:3 Hĩndĩ ya kũrĩa ndĩa ĩyo mũtikaarĩanagĩrie nyamũ icio na mĩgate ĩrĩa mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia. Mũrĩrĩaga mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩthenya mũgwanja
Deuteronomy16:4 Hatigaakoragwo mũndũ o na ũmwe wĩ na ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate gwake mũciĩ handũ ha mĩthenya mũgwanja bũrũriinĩ wanyu wothe. Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy16:5 (5-6) “Igongoona rĩa Bathaka rĩrĩthĩnjagĩrwo o harĩa MWATHANI aamũrĩĩte ha gũthaathayagĩrio
Deuteronomy16:6 Nacio nyama icio mũgaacitherũkia ikahĩa
Deuteronomy16:7 Mĩthenya ĩtandatũ mũrĩrĩaga mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia
Deuteronomy16:8 “Ningĩ mũtarage ciumia mũgwanja kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa mũkaambagĩrĩria kũgetha ngano
Deuteronomy16:9 mũcooke mũgĩe na thigũkũ ya gũkũngũĩra magetha
Deuteronomy16:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũgĩkene mwĩ mbere ya MWATHANI
Deuteronomy16:11 Menyagĩrĩraai mũno kũrũmagĩrĩra mawatho maya na mũtikaanariganĩrwo atĩ mwarĩ ngombo bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri.
Deuteronomy16:12 “Thuutha wa kũhũũra ngano yanyu o na kũhĩha ndibei yanyu
Deuteronomy16:13 Mũgakena mwĩ na ciana cianyu
Deuteronomy16:14 Tĩĩyagaai MWATHANI Ngai wanyu na ũndũ wa gũkũngũĩra thigũkũ ĩno mĩthenya mũgwanja o harĩa MWATHANI amũrĩĩte ha gũthaathayagĩrio. Na inyuĩ nĩmũrĩkenaga tondũ wa ũrĩa MWATHANI arĩkoragwo araathimĩĩte magetha maanyu o na wĩra wa mooko maanyu.
Deuteronomy16:15 “Arũme oothe a bũrũri wanyu marĩũkaga handũ hau MWATHANI aamũrĩĩte mahinda matatũ o mwaka kũmũthaathaiya. Mahinda macio nĩ Bathaka
Deuteronomy16:16 o ta ũrĩa ekũhota kũringana na ũrĩa araathimĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu.
Deuteronomy16:17 “Thuuragaai atuithania na atongoria itũũra o itũũra rĩrĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu ekũmũhe o ta ũrĩa mĩhĩrĩga yanyu ĩtariĩ. Acio nĩ o marĩtuithanagia andũ na kĩhooto.
Deuteronomy16:18 Matikaanahotomagie ciira
Deuteronomy16:19 Rũmagĩrĩraai ũndũ ũrĩa wa ma na wa kĩhooto nĩguo mũhote kwĩgwatĩra bũrũri ũrĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu ekũmũhe na mũtũũre kuo hĩndĩ ndaaya.
Deuteronomy16:20 “Rĩrĩa mũgaathondeka kĩgongoona kĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu

Deuteronomy17:1 “Mũtikaanarutĩre MWATHANI Ngai wanyu ng'ombe kana ng'ondu i na kaũũgũ o na karĩkũ; MWATHANI nĩathũire ũndũ ũcio.
Deuteronomy17:2 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy17:3 agathaathaiya na agatungatĩra ngai ingĩ
Deuteronomy17:4 mũngĩkaigua ribooti ya mũthemba ta ũcio
Deuteronomy17:5 mũkooya mũndũ ũcio mũmuumie nja ya itũũra
Deuteronomy17:6 Mũndũ ũcio no ooragwo kũngĩkorwo he na ũira ũheanĩĩtwo nĩ andũ eerĩ kana atatũ. Ndakaanooragwo angĩkorwo no mũndũ ũmwe ũheanĩĩte ũira wake.
Deuteronomy17:7 Andũ arĩa maheanĩĩte ũira wake nĩ o magaakorwo marĩ a mbere kũmũikĩria mahiga
Deuteronomy17:8 “Maciira mamwe mahota gũkorwo marĩ na hinya gũtuithanio nĩ atuithania arĩa mũthuurĩĩte
Deuteronomy17:9 mũheane ũhoro wa ciira ũcio kũrĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai a mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi na kũrĩ mũtuithania ũrĩa ũgaakorwo arĩ wĩrainĩ hĩndĩ ĩyo
Deuteronomy17:10 Nao nĩmagaatuithania ciira

Deuteronomy17:14 “Rĩu-rĩ

Deuteronomy17:16 Mũthamaki nĩemenyerere ndakaaneigĩre mbarathi nyingĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ita ciake
Deuteronomy17:17 Ningĩ mũthamaki ndakaanagĩe na atumia aingĩ
Deuteronomy17:18 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa agaikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩake gĩa ũthamaki

Deuteronomy19:15 Na rĩĩrĩ

Deuteronomy19:18 mũira ũcio aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũherithio na ihera o ta rĩrĩa ekwendaga Mũisiraeli ũcio ũngĩ aheeo. Ũguo nĩguo mũkaaniina ũũru ũcio gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu.
Deuteronomy19:19 Ũndũ ũcio nĩũgaatũma arĩa makaũigua metigĩre

Deuteronomy20:7 Nĩharĩ mũndũ ũraacĩĩtie nĩ ũndũ wa mũirĩĩtu na ndarĩ aramũhikia? Angĩkorwo mũndũ ta ũcio arĩ ho

Deuteronomy21:1 “Ningĩ no kũhoteke kuoneke mũndũ ũũragĩirwo gĩthakainĩ bũrũriinĩ ũcio MWATHANI Ngai wanyu ekũmũhe
Deuteronomy21:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo atongoria aanyu na atuithania makoimagara mathiĩ mathime ũraihu wa kuuma handũ hau mũndũ ũcio ooragĩirwo gũthiĩ nginya o itũũra rĩa matũũra marĩa mathiũrũrũkĩirie.
Deuteronomy21:3 Nao atongoria a itũũra rĩrĩa rĩrĩ hakuhĩ na kĩimba kĩu mathuure moori ya ng'ombe ĩtarĩ yarutithio wĩra.
Deuteronomy21:4 Atongoria acio maikũrũkie moori ĩyo kĩandainĩ kĩ na karũũĩ gegũtherera
Deuteronomy21:5 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai a mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi
Deuteronomy21:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo atongoria oothe arĩa moimĩĩte itũũra rĩu rĩkuhanĩrĩirie na harĩa mũndũ ũcio ooragĩirwo methambĩre mooko maao igũrũ rĩa moori ĩyo yunĩĩtwo ngingo

Deuteronomy22:8 “Waka nyũmba njerũ-rĩ

Deuteronomy22:10 “Ndũkaanoohe ndeegwa na ndigiri icookiinĩ rĩmwe nĩguo ũrĩme nacio na mũraaũ.

Deuteronomy22:14 o na no amũigĩrĩre kĩgeenyo oige atĩ nĩakomeetwo naake nĩ mũndũ mũrũme ũngĩ ataanamũhikia.

Deuteronomy26:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ

Deuteronomy26:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo o mũndũ agaagĩthiĩ he mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa ũgaakorwo wĩrainĩ hĩndĩ ĩyo amwĩre atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy26:4 “Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ooe kĩondo kĩu kuuma mookoinĩ ma mũndũ ũcio
Deuteronomy26:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ ũcio oige ciugo ici arĩ o hau mbere ya MWATHANI: ‘Baaba aarĩ Mũaramea worũũraga
Deuteronomy26:6 Nao andũ a Misiri magĩtũhinyĩrĩria na magĩtũrutithia wĩra na hinya ta ngombo.
Deuteronomy26:7 Na ithuĩ tũgĩkaĩra MWATHANI Ngai wa maithe maitũ atũteithie. Naake MWATHANI akĩigua na akĩona mĩnyamaaro
Deuteronomy26:8 MWATHANI agĩgĩtũruta kũu Misiri na hinya na ũhoti wake mũnene
Deuteronomy26:9 Agĩcooka agĩtũreehe gũũkũ bũrũriinĩ ũyũ mwega na mũnoru
Deuteronomy26:10 Tondũ ũcio
Deuteronomy26:11 Naake agĩcanjamũke nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ moothe meega marĩa MWATHANI amũheete we mwene na mũciĩ wake
Deuteronomy26:12 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy26:13 wĩre MWATHANI atĩrĩ

Deuteronomy26:16 “Ũũmũũthĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu aramwatha mwathĩkagĩre mawatho maake moothe; kwoguo maathĩkagĩre na ngoro yothe.
Deuteronomy26:17 Ũũmũũthĩ nĩmwoimbũra atĩ MWATHANI nĩ we Ngai wanyu; nĩmweranĩra atĩ nĩmũrĩmwathĩkagĩra

Deuteronomy27:1 Naake Musa
Deuteronomy27:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy27:3 Ningĩ mũcooke mwandĩke mahigainĩ macio mawatho o na moorutani maya moothe. Mwarĩĩkia gũtoonya bũrũri ũcio mwega na mũnoru ũrĩa MWATHANI Ngai wa maithe maanyu amwĩrĩire
Deuteronomy27:4 na mũkorwo mũringĩĩte mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa Jorodani-rĩ
Deuteronomy27:5 Mũcooke mwakĩre MWATHANI kĩgongoona hau na mahiga matarĩ maicũhie
Deuteronomy27:6 nĩ ũndũ kĩgongoona o gĩothe mũgaakĩra MWATHANI Ngai wanyu kĩagĩrĩirwo nĩgwakwo na mahiga matarĩ maicũhie. Hau nĩ ho mũkaarutĩra MWATHANI Ngai wanyu magongoona ma njino.
Deuteronomy27:7 Ningĩ hau no ho mũkaarutĩra magongoona ma thaayũ na mũmarĩĩre o ho
Deuteronomy27:8 Mũkaandĩka wega mahigainĩ macio mahũũre burathita ciugo ciothe cia watho wa Ngai.”
Deuteronomy27:9 Naake Musa hamwe na athĩnjĩri Ngai a mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi makĩarĩria andũ oothe a Isiraeli makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy27:10 Tondũ ũcio tũũraai mũmwathĩkagĩra na mũmenyagĩrĩre mawatho maake moothe marĩa ndamwatha ũũmũũthĩ.”
Deuteronomy27:11 Ningĩ Musa akĩarĩria andũ a Isiraeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ
