Deuteronomy27:26 “ ‘Kũgwatwo nĩ kĩrumi nĩ mũndũ o wothe ũtarĩathĩkagĩra mawatho na moorutani moothe ma Ngai.’“Nao andũ oothe macookie atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy28:1 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy28:2 Mũngĩathĩkĩra MWATHANI Ngai wanyu
Deuteronomy28:3 “MWATHANI nĩarĩraathimaga matũũra maanyu o na mĩgũnda yanyu.
Deuteronomy28:4 “MWATHANI nĩarĩmũraathimaga na ciana nyingĩ
Deuteronomy28:5 “MWATHANI nĩarĩraathimaga magetha maanyu na irio iria mũrĩrugaga.
Deuteronomy28:6 “MWATHANI nĩarĩmũraathimaga mũkiumagara na mũgĩcooka na mũciĩ.
Deuteronomy28:7 “MWATHANI nĩarĩmũhootanagĩra harĩ thũ cianyu ciamũũkĩrĩra. Irĩmũtharĩkagĩra ciumĩĩte na mwena ũmwe
Deuteronomy28:8 “MWATHANI nĩarĩraathimaga wĩra wa mooko maanyu
Deuteronomy28:9 “Mũngĩtũũra mwathĩkagĩra MWATHANI Ngai wanyu
Deuteronomy28:10 Ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe cia thĩ nĩirĩonaga atĩ nĩmũtuĩtwo andũ a MWATHANI kĩũmbe
Deuteronomy28:11 Ningĩ MWATHANI nĩarĩmũraathimaga na ciana nyingĩ
Deuteronomy28:12 Ningĩ MWATHANI nĩarĩmuuragĩria mbura ya kĩmera o kĩmera kuuma mũthiithũinĩ wake wa igũrũ ũrĩa aigaga mbura
Deuteronomy28:13 MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩarĩmũtuaga atongoria a ndũũrĩrĩ
Deuteronomy28:14 Mũtikaanamakararie o na atĩa
Deuteronomy28:15 “No rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy28:16 “Matũũra maanyu o na mĩgũnda yanyu nĩrĩgwatagwo nĩ kĩrumi.
Deuteronomy28:17 “Magetha maanyu o na irio iria mũrĩrugaga nĩirĩgwatagwo nĩ kĩrumi.
Deuteronomy28:18 “Mũrĩgwatagwo nĩ kĩrumi mũkaaga kũgĩa na ciana nyingĩ
Deuteronomy28:19 “Mũrĩgwatagwo nĩ kĩrumi mũkiumagara na mũgĩcooka na mũciĩ.
Deuteronomy28:20 “Mũngĩgeeka ũũru na mũrege MWATHANI
Deuteronomy28:21 MWATHANI arĩmũtũmagĩra mĩrimũ ĩrũmanĩrĩire
Deuteronomy28:22 Ningĩ MWATHANI nĩarĩmũhũũraga na mĩrimũ ya kũgwatanio
Deuteronomy28:23 Mbura ndĩriuraga
Deuteronomy28:24 Handũ ha kũmuurĩria mbura
Deuteronomy28:25 “MWATHANI nĩarĩtũmaga mũhootwo nĩ thũ cianyu; mũrĩcitharĩkagĩra kuuma na mwena ũmwe
Deuteronomy28:26 Ciimba cianyu irĩrĩagwo nĩ nyoni na nyamũ cia gĩthaka
Deuteronomy28:27 MWATHANI nĩarĩtũmaga mũgĩe mahũha ta marĩa maarĩ na andũ a Misiri. Ningĩ nĩarĩtũmaga mĩĩrĩ yanyu ĩiyũrwo nĩ ironda
Deuteronomy28:28 MWATHANI nĩarĩtũmaga mũtuĩke agũrũki
Deuteronomy28:29 Mũrĩthiaga mũkĩhambataga mũthenya barigici o ta itumuumu
Deuteronomy28:30 “Ũrĩraacagia nĩ ũndũ wa mũirĩĩtu
Deuteronomy28:31 Ndeegwa yaku ĩrĩthĩnjagwo ũkĩyonagĩra
Deuteronomy28:32 Aariũ na aarĩ aaku marĩheanagwo ta ngombo kũrĩ andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ ũkĩyonagĩra. Ũrĩikaraga ũkũũrĩĩte maitho ũcũũthĩrĩirie
Deuteronomy28:33 Irio ciaku iria ũrĩmĩĩte na kĩyo kĩnene irĩrĩagwo nĩ rũũrĩrĩ rũgeni
Deuteronomy28:34 Maũndũ marĩa ũrĩyonagĩra no gũtũma marĩtũmaga ũgũrũke.
Deuteronomy28:35 MWATHANI arĩtũmaga magũrũ maaku maiyũrwo nĩ ironda itakaahona
Deuteronomy28:36 “MWATHANI nĩakamũtwara inyuĩ eene
Deuteronomy28:37 Mũgaatuĩka andũ a kũmakĩrwo
Deuteronomy28:38 “Mũkaahandaga mbeũ nyingĩ
Deuteronomy28:39 Mũkaahandaga mĩthabibũ mĩingĩ na mũkamĩceeha
Deuteronomy28:40 Bũrũri wanyu wothe ũgaakorwo ũiyũire mĩtamaiyũ
Deuteronomy28:41 Nĩmũgaaciara ciana cia aanake na airĩĩtu
Deuteronomy28:42 Mĩtĩ yanyu yothe o na irio cia mĩgũnda yanyu ikaarĩĩo nĩ ngigĩ.
Deuteronomy28:43 “Andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa magaakorwo magĩtũũra bũrũriinĩ wanyu magaakĩragĩrĩria o kũnenehio
Deuteronomy28:44 Makaamũkombagĩra mbeeca
Deuteronomy28:45 “Mũgaatũũra mũthingatagwo nĩ mathĩĩna macio
Deuteronomy28:46 Mathĩĩna macio magaatũũra marĩ kĩmenyithia
Deuteronomy28:47 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Deuteronomy28:48 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Deuteronomy28:49 MWATHANI nĩakaamũreehithĩria rũũrĩrĩ ruumĩĩte kũndũ kũraaya rũmũtharĩkĩre
Deuteronomy28:50 Rũũrĩrĩ rũu rũgaakorwo rwĩ rwa andũ eeĩ mũno; rũtigaacaaĩra mũndũ o wothe
Deuteronomy28:51 Rũkaarĩa ng'ombe na irio cianyu
Deuteronomy28:52 Rũgaatharĩkĩra matũũra maanyu moothe bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu akaamũhe
Deuteronomy28:53 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa matũũra maanyu magaakorwo mathiũrũkĩirio nĩ thũ
Deuteronomy28:54 (54-55) O na mũndũrũme ũrĩa ũrĩ igweta agaathĩĩnĩka o nginya arĩe ciana imwe ciake nĩ ũndũ wa kũhũũta. Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy28:55 (56-57) O na mũndũ wa nja ũrĩa ũrĩ igweta
Deuteronomy28:56 “Mũngĩkaaga gwathĩkĩra ciugo ciothe cia watho ũrĩa mwandĩke ibukuinĩ rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy28:57 nĩakaamũtũmĩra inyuĩ na njiarwa cianyu mĩrimũ ĩtakaahonekaga
Deuteronomy28:58 Nĩakaamũtũmĩra o rĩngĩ mĩrimũ yothe ĩrĩa yarĩ Misiri ĩrĩa mwetigĩrĩĩte
Deuteronomy28:59 Ningĩ MWATHANI nĩakaamũtũmĩra mĩrimũ na mĩthiro ya mĩthemba yothe ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ mĩandĩke ibukuinĩ rĩĩrĩ rĩa watho
Deuteronomy28:60 O na harĩa mũingĩhĩĩte o ta njata cia igũrũ
Deuteronomy28:61 Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy28:62 “MWATHANI akaamũhurunja ndũũrĩrĩinĩ ciothe kuuma gĩturi kĩmwe gĩa thĩ kinya kĩrĩa kĩngĩ. Mwĩ kũu mũgaatungatagĩra ngai ithondekeetwo na mĩtĩ na mahiga
Deuteronomy28:63 Mwĩ kũu ndũũrĩrĩinĩ icio mũtigaikaraga na thaayũ
Deuteronomy28:64 Mũgaikaraga mũrĩ ũgwatiinĩ hĩndĩ ciothe. Mũkaiguaga guoya ũtukũ na mũthenya
Deuteronomy28:65 Maũndũ marĩa mũkoonaga magaatũmaga ngoro cianyu ciigue guoya
Deuteronomy28:66 Naake MWATHANI nĩakaamũcookia Misiri mwĩ meeriinĩ o na gũtuĩka nĩeranĩire atĩ mũtigaacooka kuo rĩngĩ. Mũrĩ kũu mũkaageria kwĩyendia kũrĩ thũ cianyu ta ngombo
Deuteronomy29:1 Maya nĩ mo maũndũ ma kĩrĩĩkanĩro
Deuteronomy29:2 Naake Musa agĩgĩĩta Aisiraeli oothe hamwe akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy29:3 Ningĩ nĩmwonire matũhũũhũ
Deuteronomy29:4 No rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy29:5 Naake MWATHANI akĩmũtongoria werũinĩ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna
Deuteronomy29:6 Mũtiigana kũrĩa irio
Deuteronomy29:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy29:8 Tũgĩkĩmatuunya bũrũri wao
Deuteronomy29:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Deuteronomy29:10 “Ũũmũũthĩ mũrũũgamĩĩte haaha inyuothe mbere ya MWATHANI Ngai wanyu: atongoria aanyu
Deuteronomy29:11 ciana cianyu
Deuteronomy29:12 Ũũmũũthĩ nĩmũgũtoonya kĩrĩĩkanĩroinĩ gĩĩkĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu ekũrĩĩkanĩra na inyuĩ
Deuteronomy29:13 nĩ geetha MWATHANI amũtue andũ aake kĩũmbe
Deuteronomy29:14 To inyuĩ oiki MWATHANI ekũrĩĩkanĩra na inyuĩ;
Deuteronomy29:15 ekũrĩĩkanĩra na ithuĩ ithuothe tũrũũgamĩĩte haaha mbere yake ũũmũũthĩ
Deuteronomy29:16 “Nĩ gũkorwo nĩmũũĩ mũtũũrĩre ũrĩa twatũũraga bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri
Deuteronomy29:17 Ningĩ nĩmuonire mĩhianano yao ĩrĩa ĩ magigi ĩthondekeetwo na mĩtĩ
Deuteronomy29:18 Mwĩmenyerereei mũno inyuothe arĩa mũrũũgamĩĩte haaha ũũmũũthĩ hatikaanooneke mũndũ mũrũme
Deuteronomy29:19 Mwĩmenyerereei mũno mũndũ o na ũmwe ũraigua maũndũ ma kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩĩkĩ ndakeĩĩre na ngoro atĩ MWATHANI nĩekũmũraathima
Deuteronomy29:20 MWATHANI ndakoohera mũndũ ta ũcio. Handũ ha ũguo
Deuteronomy29:21 MWATHANI acooke amwamũranie na mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli
Deuteronomy29:22 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy29:23 Bũrũri wothe nĩũgaathaata ũiyũre ũbiriiti na cumbĩ; gũtirĩ kĩndũ gĩkaahandwo kuo
Deuteronomy29:24 Ũndũ ũcio nĩũgaatũma andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe moorie atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy29:25 Nao andũ mamacookerie atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy29:26 Maatungatĩire ngai ingĩ mataathaathayagia mbere ĩyo
Deuteronomy29:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI akĩraakarĩra andũ aake
Deuteronomy29:28 Naake MWATHANI arĩ na maraakara
Deuteronomy29:29 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy30:1 “Rĩu-rĩ
Deuteronomy30:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo inyuĩ na njiarwa cianyu mũngĩgaacookerera MWATHANI Ngai wanyu o na mwathĩkĩre maathani maake na ngoro yothe na muoyo wothe o ta ũrĩa ndamwatha ũũmũũthĩ
Deuteronomy30:3 MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩakamũiguĩra tha. Acooke amũrute kũrĩa aamũhurunjĩire
Deuteronomy30:4 O na angĩkorwo mũgaakorwo mũtwarĩĩtwo kũndũ kũraaya atĩa
Deuteronomy30:5 nĩ geetha mũcooke mwĩgwatĩre o rĩngĩ bũrũri ũrĩa maithe maanyu maatũũraga. Ningĩ MWATHANI nĩagaatũma mũgaacĩre
Deuteronomy30:6 Naake MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩakaamũhe inyuĩ na njiarwa cianyu ngoro njathĩki
Deuteronomy30:7 Naake MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩagaatũma thũ cianyu iria ciamũthũire
Deuteronomy30:8 Inyuĩ nĩmũgaacooka gwathĩkĩra MWATHANI o rĩngĩ
Deuteronomy30:9 MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩagaatũma mũgaacĩre mawĩrainĩ maanyu moothe
Deuteronomy30:10 Kwoguo no mũhaka mũmwathĩkagĩre o na mũhingagie mawatho maake moothe o ta ũrĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo ibukuinĩ rĩĩrĩ rĩa Watho. Ningĩ no mũhaka mwĩhoke MWATHANI na ngoro yothe na muoyo wothe.
Deuteronomy30:11 “Tondũ rĩathani rĩĩrĩ ndamwatha ũũmũũthĩ nĩ ihũthũ na rĩtirĩ kũraaya na inyuĩ atĩ mũtingĩhota kũrĩhingia.
Deuteronomy30:12 Ningĩ-rĩ
Deuteronomy30:13 Ningĩ-rĩ
Deuteronomy30:14 No rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy30:15 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy30:16 Mũngĩathĩkagĩra maathani ma MWATHANI Ngai wanyu
Deuteronomy30:17 No rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy30:18 ndikũmũhitha no mũhaka mũkaaniinwo. Mũtigaatũũra hĩndĩ ndaaya bũrũriinĩ ũcio mũkeegwatĩra ũtuĩke wanyu mwaringa Jorodani.
Deuteronomy30:19 Rĩu-rĩ
Deuteronomy30:20 Tũũraai mwendeete MWATHANI Ngai wanyu
Deuteronomy31:1 Naake Musa agĩthiĩ na mbere kwarĩria andũ oothe a Isiraeli
Deuteronomy31:2 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy31:3 MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩegũthiĩ mbere yanyu
Deuteronomy31:4 MWATHANI ekũniina ndũũrĩrĩ icio
Deuteronomy31:5 Ningĩ MWATHANI nĩegũcineana mookoinĩ maanyu
Deuteronomy31:6 Gĩai na hinya na mũũmĩrĩrie
Deuteronomy31:7 Naake Musa agĩgĩĩta Joshua
Deuteronomy31:8 Naake MWATHANI nĩegũgũtongoria
Deuteronomy31:9 Naake Musa arĩĩkia kwandĩka Watho ũcio
Deuteronomy31:10 Naake akĩmaatha akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy31:11 Thoomagĩraai andũ oothe a Isiraeli watho ũyũ
Deuteronomy31:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũgaacookanagĩrĩria andũ oothe hamwe
Deuteronomy31:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo o nacio ciana ciao iria itarĩ ciaigua watho ũyũ nĩikaagĩa na kamweke ga kwĩiguĩra
Deuteronomy31:14 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy31:15 Naake MWATHANI akĩmoimĩrĩra kũu Hemainĩ arĩ gĩtugĩinĩ gĩa itu rĩrĩa rĩarũngiĩ mũromoinĩ wa Hema ĩyo.
Deuteronomy31:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI akĩarĩria Musa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy31:17 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũtũme nyiitwo nĩ maraakara
Deuteronomy31:18 Ngaamatiganĩria nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ macio mooru magaakorwo meekĩĩte o na magathaathaiya ngai ingĩ.
Deuteronomy31:19 “Rĩu-rĩ
Deuteronomy31:20 Nĩngaamatwara bũrũri ũcio ndeerĩire maithe maao atĩ nĩngaamahe. Nĩ bũrũri mwega na mũnoru. Maakinya kuo makaarĩaga makahũũna o na maikarage megangarĩĩte. Ũndũ ũcio nĩũgaatũma mandiganĩrie mathaathaiye ngai ingĩ na mathũũkie kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩakwa.
Deuteronomy31:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmagaakorererwo nĩ matũhũũhũ maingĩ. No rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy31:22 Tondũ ũcio
Deuteronomy31:23 Naake MWATHANI agĩtaara Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy31:24 Musa arĩĩkia kwandĩka watho wa Ngai ibukuinĩ aũmenyereire wega
Deuteronomy31:25 agĩĩta athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa maamenyagĩrĩra Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy31:26 Oyai ibuku rĩĩrĩ rĩa watho wa Ngai mũrĩige mwenainĩ wa Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu
Deuteronomy31:27 Nĩ ũndũ nĩnjũũĩ mũrĩ andũ aremi o na akararia. Kuona atĩ mũkoreetwo mũremeire MWATHANI niĩ ngĩonaga na maitho maakwa-rĩ
Deuteronomy31:28 Tacookanĩrĩriai atongoria a mĩhĩrĩga na anjaama oothe mooke harĩ niĩ
Deuteronomy31:29 Ningĩ nĩnjũũĩ atĩ ndarĩĩkia gũkua andũ nĩmekwagana
Deuteronomy31:30 Naake Musa akĩina rwĩmbo rũũrũ rwothe Aisiraeli oothe makĩiguaga.
Deuteronomy32:1 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy32:2 Ũrutani wakwa ũrĩtaataga o ta mataata ma mbura
Deuteronomy32:3 Nĩngũgaathĩrĩria rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI
Deuteronomy32:4 “Nĩ we rwaro rwa ihiga
Deuteronomy32:5 Inyuĩ mũtirĩ ehokeku
Deuteronomy32:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy32:7 “Ririkanaai matukũ marĩa ma tene
Deuteronomy32:8 Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno nĩ we wagaĩire ndũũrĩrĩ mabũrũri maacio;nĩ we wamũranirie kũrĩa andũ matũũraga
Deuteronomy32:9 no agĩĩthuurĩra rũciaro rwa Jakubu rũtuĩke rwake kĩũmbe.
Deuteronomy32:10 “Aamoonire makĩũrũũra werũinĩ
Deuteronomy32:11 O ta ũrĩa rwĩgĩ rũmenyagĩria tũcui twayo kũũmbũka
Deuteronomy32:12 MWATHANI o we wiki nĩ we wamatongoririe
Deuteronomy32:13 “Aamahaicirie mathiagĩre irĩmainĩ iria ndaaya
Deuteronomy32:14 Nacio ng'ombe na mbũri ciao igĩkamwo iria rĩingĩ.Ndũrũme
Deuteronomy32:15 “Andũ a MWATHANI maarĩire makĩiigua na makĩambararũka; maarĩire magĩtunguha na makiumia nda.Magĩtiganĩria Ngai ũrĩa wamoombirena magĩkaana mũhonokia wao.
Deuteronomy32:16 Magĩtũma MWATHANI aigue ũiru maagĩa na ngai ng'eni; na makĩmũraakaria na ciĩko ciao irĩ magigi.
Deuteronomy32:17 Makĩrutĩra ngai itaarĩ kĩene magongoona
Deuteronomy32:18 Nĩmariganĩirwo nĩ Ngai mũhonokia wao
Deuteronomy32:19 “Naake MWATHANI oona ũndũ ũcio akĩraakara agĩtiganĩria aariũ na aarĩ aake.
Deuteronomy32:20 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy32:21 Manjiguithĩĩtie ũiru nĩ ũndũ wa ngai cia mĩhianano
Deuteronomy32:22 Maraakara maakwa maakanĩĩte o ta mwaki
Deuteronomy32:23 “ ‘Nĩngaamareehithĩria matũhũũhũ matarĩ mũthia; ndĩmarathange na mĩguĩ yakwa yothe.
Deuteronomy32:24 Makaaniinwo nĩ ng'aragu na mũrimũ wa kũhiũha mwĩrĩ
Deuteronomy32:25 Hiũ cia njora ikaamaniina marĩ njĩrainĩ
Deuteronomy32:26 Ingĩamarangĩrĩria thĩ ta rũkũngũ maage kũririkanwo hĩndĩ ĩngĩ.
Deuteronomy32:27 No ndingĩĩtĩkĩria thũ ciao ciĩtĩĩe ikiuge atĩ ũhootani uumanĩĩte na kũrĩ cio
Deuteronomy32:28 “Andũ a Isiraeli nĩ rũũrĩrĩ rũtooĩ gũciira
Deuteronomy32:29 Mangĩrĩ oogĩ no mamenye gĩtũmi kĩa mahootwo
Deuteronomy32:30 Mũndũ ũmwe angĩteng'eria andũ ngiri kana andũ ngiri ikũmi mateng'erio nĩ mũndũ ũmwe atĩa?Nĩ tondũ MWATHANI Ngai wao nĩamatiganĩirie; Ngai mwene hinya nĩamaneanĩĩte.
Deuteronomy32:31 Nĩ gũkorwo ngai cia thũ ciao itirĩ hinya ta Ngai wao
Deuteronomy32:32 Thũ ciao ciaganĩĩte o ta Sodomu na Gomora
Deuteronomy32:33 Ndibei yacio ĩrũrĩĩte o ta ũrũrũ wa nyoka; ĩĩni
Deuteronomy32:34 “MWATHANI ndangĩriganĩrwo nĩ ũũru ũrĩa thũ ciao ciĩkĩĩte. Ũikaraga ũkĩrurumũkaga ngoroinĩ yake.
Deuteronomy32:35 Ũhoro wa kũrĩhanĩria na wa gũtuanĩra nĩ wa MWATHANI
Deuteronomy32:36 MWATHANI nĩagaaciirĩrĩra andũ aake
Deuteronomy32:37 Akĩmoorie atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy32:38 O ngai icio mwahũũnagia na maguta ma magongoona maanyu
Deuteronomy32:39 “ ‘Niĩ o niĩ nyiiki
Deuteronomy32:40 O ta ũrĩa ndũũraga muoyo
Deuteronomy32:41 ngũnoora rũhiũ rwakwa rũrĩa rũhenahenagia o nginya nyone kĩhooto nĩkĩahingio.Ngwĩrĩhĩria harĩ thũ ciakwa
Deuteronomy32:42 Mĩguĩ yakwa ĩkũnyũrũrũka thakame yao
Deuteronomy32:43 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy32:44 Naake Musa na Joshua wa Nuni magĩkĩina rwĩmbo rũu andũ oothe makĩiiguagĩra.
Deuteronomy32:45 Naake Musa arĩĩkia kwĩra Aisiraeli oothe maũndũ macio moothe
Deuteronomy32:46 akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy32:47 Tondũ-rĩ
Deuteronomy32:48 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩaria na Musa mũthenya o ro ũcio akĩmwĩra ũũ:
Deuteronomy32:49 “Ũkĩra wambate irĩmainĩ cia Abarimu iria irĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Moabi
Deuteronomy32:50 Nĩngwenda ũmenye atĩ kũu kĩrĩmainĩ kĩu nĩkuo ũgũkuĩra o ta ũrĩa Harũni mũrũ wa maitũguo aakuĩrĩire kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hori
Deuteronomy32:51 nĩ ũndũ inyuĩ nĩmwagire gũtuĩka ehokeku harĩ niĩ andũ a Isiraeli makĩyonagĩra. Mwĩ maaĩinĩ ma Meriba
Deuteronomy32:52 Rĩu-rĩ
Deuteronomy33:1 Musa
Deuteronomy33:2 MWATHANI eguũririe kuuma kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Sinai agĩtwĩguũrĩria arĩ o kũu Edomu
Deuteronomy33:3 MWATHANI nĩendeete andũ aake; andũ aake arĩa atheru nĩ we mũmamenyereri.Nĩkĩo mamũhooyaga
Deuteronomy33:4 Watho ũrĩa twaheirwo nĩ Musa twathĩkagĩre
Deuteronomy33:5 MWATHANI agĩgĩtuĩka mũthamaki wa andũ aake a Isiraeli rĩrĩa mĩhĩrĩga na atongoria aayo moonganĩĩte hamwe.
Deuteronomy33:6 Musa agĩthiĩ na mbere na kũmaraathima akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:7 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:8 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Lawi akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:9 Mũhĩrĩga ũcio wagwathĩkĩire gũkĩra ũrĩa wathĩkagĩra aciari aaguo
Deuteronomy33:10 Acio nĩ o marĩrutaga andũ aaku gwathĩkĩra watho waku;na makũrutagĩre magongoona kĩgongoonainĩ gĩaku.
Deuteronomy33:11 MWATHANI
Deuteronomy33:12 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:13 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Josefu akĩuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:14 Riũa rĩrotũmaga matunda maguo meruhage wega
Deuteronomy33:15 Ũroĩyonagĩra magetha meega irĩmainĩ iria cia tene.
Deuteronomy33:16 Ũroraathimagwo na indo ciothe iria njega cia thĩ o na ũkĩragĩrĩrio; ũroraathimagwo na ũtugi wa MWATHANI ũrĩa waririe arĩ kĩhingainĩ gĩakanaga mwaki.Iraathimo icio ciothe iroikũrũkagĩra mũhĩrĩga wa Josefu
Deuteronomy33:17 Josefu arĩ na hinya ta wa ndeegwa
Deuteronomy33:18 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni na Isakaru akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:19 Mũgeetaga andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ mooke irĩmainĩ cianyu
Deuteronomy33:20 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi akĩuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:21 Agĩkĩyũmbĩria mĩgũnda ĩrĩa mĩega
Deuteronomy33:22 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Dani akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:23 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Nafutali akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:24 Nĩ ũndũ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri akiuga atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy33:25 Matũũra maaku marotũũra magitĩirwo na ihingo cia cuuma
Deuteronomy33:26 Andũ aya a Isiraeli
Deuteronomy33:27 Ngai atũũraga arĩ handũ haanyu ha kwĩhitha;mooko maake marĩa ma tene na tene matũũraga mamũnyiitĩrĩire.Nĩ we wamũingatĩire thũ iria ciarĩ mbere yanyu
Deuteronomy33:28 Njiarwa cia Jakubu itũũraga ciĩgangarĩĩte; itũũraga imenyereirwo bũrũriinĩ ũcio ũtaagaga irio na ndibei
Deuteronomy33:29 Isiraeli
Deuteronomy34:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy34:2 bũrũri wothe wa Nafutali
Deuteronomy34:3 bũrũri wa Juda wa mwena wa na kĩanda
Deuteronomy34:4 Thuutha ũcio MWATHANI akĩĩra Musa atĩrĩ
Deuteronomy34:5 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Deuteronomy34:6 Naake MWATHANI akĩmũthika o kũu bũrũriinĩ ũcio wa Moabi gĩtuambainĩ kĩrĩa kĩng'etheire Bethipeoru. Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy34:7 Naake Musa agĩgĩkua e wa mĩaka igana na mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ (120)
Deuteronomy34:8 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩmũcakaĩra matukũ mĩrongo ĩtatũ marĩ o kũu gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Moabi.
Deuteronomy34:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy34:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Deuteronomy34:11 Ningĩ gũtianacooka kuoneka mũnabii ũngĩ wanahota kũringa ciama na moorirũ ta iria MWATHANI aatũmĩĩte Musa akaringe bũrũri wa Misiri cia kũhũũra mũthamaki
Deuteronomy34:12 O na ningĩ gũtianacooka kuoneka mũnabii ũngĩ wanahota gwĩka maũndũ manene na ma kũguoyohia ta marĩa Musa eekire akĩonagwo nĩ Aisiraeli oothe.
Joshua1:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua1:2 “Musa ndungata yakwa nĩakuĩte
Joshua1:3 O ta ũrĩa ndeerĩire Musa-rĩ
Joshua1:4 Mĩhaka yanyu ĩkaambĩrĩria werũinĩ ũrĩa ũrĩ na mwena wa na kĩanda o nginya irĩmainĩ cia Lebanoni iria irĩ na mwena wa na rũgongo
Joshua1:5 Atĩrĩĩrĩ Joshua
Joshua1:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Joshua1:7 Wee gĩta o kũgĩa na hinya
Joshua1:8 Oonaga atĩ ibuku rĩĩrĩ rĩa Watho nĩrĩrathoomwo hingo ciothe rĩrĩa mũũnganĩĩte gũthaathaiya. Weka ũguo-rĩ
Joshua1:9 Githĩ ti niĩ ndagwatha atĩ ũgĩte o kũgĩa na hinya
Joshua1:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joshua agĩatha atongoria a andũ
Joshua1:11 mathiĩ kambĩ yothe makĩĩraga andũ atĩrĩ
Joshua1:12 Joshua aagĩcooka akĩĩra mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni
Joshua1:13 “Taririkanaai ũrĩa Musa
Joshua1:14 Atumia aanyu
Joshua1:15 Ikũmateithia o nginya itigĩrĩre nĩmegwatĩra bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ na mwena wa ithũĩro wa Jorodani ũrĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu amaheete ũtuĩke ũtũũro wao. Thuutha ũcio ihũndũke icooke bũrũriinĩ wacio kĩũmbe
Joshua1:16 Nao magĩcookeria Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua1:17 O ta ũrĩa tũrathĩkagĩra Musa
Joshua1:18 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũkaaregana na ũrĩa wathanĩĩte
Joshua2:1 Naake Joshua agĩtũma athigaani eerĩ na hitho kuuma kambĩinĩ yao ĩrĩa yarĩ gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Mĩgaa akĩmaatha magathigaane bũrũri wa Kanaani
Joshua2:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua2:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Joshua2:4 (4-6) No Rahabu agĩcookeria andũ acio maarekeetio nĩ mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Joshua2:5 Kwoguo andũ acio maarekeetio nĩ mũthamaki makiuma itũũrainĩ
Joshua2:6 Nao athigaani acio eerĩ matanakoma-rĩ
Joshua2:7 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua2:8 Nĩtũiguĩte ũrĩa MWATHANI aahũithirie Iria Ituune mbere yanyu rĩrĩa mwoimaga Misiri. O na ningĩ nĩtũiguĩte ũrĩa mworagire Sihoni na Ogu
Joshua2:9 Rĩrĩa twakĩiguire ũhoro ũcio-rĩ
Joshua2:10 Rĩu-rĩ
Joshua2:11 Ngwenda mũũnjĩrĩre atĩ nĩmũkahonokia baaba na maitũ
Joshua2:12 Nao andũ acio makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Joshua2:13 Nyũmba ĩrĩa Rahabu aikaraga yakĩĩtwo ĩnyiitaine na rũthingo rwa itũũra rĩu. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akiumĩria andũ acio ndiricainĩ
Joshua2:14 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua2:15 Nao andũ acio makĩĩra Rahabu atĩrĩ
Joshua2:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa tũgooka gũtharĩkĩra bũrũri wanyu-rĩ
Joshua2:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũkoima nyũmba yaku athiĩ njĩrainĩ
Joshua2:18 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua2:19 Naake akiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua2:20 Nao athigaani acio magĩgĩthiĩ irĩmainĩ makĩhitha kuo mĩthenya ĩtatũ
Joshua2:21 Thuutha wa ũguo
Joshua2:22 Makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Joshua3:1 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ kĩrooko tene
Joshua3:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua3:3 makĩĩraga andũ atĩrĩ
Joshua3:4 Nĩ o marĩmuonia njĩra ĩrĩa mũrĩgerera nĩ gũkorwo mũtirĩ mwoka kũndũ gũũkũ hĩndĩ ĩngĩ. No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua3:5 Naake Joshua akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Joshua3:6 Agĩcooka akĩĩra athĩnjĩri Ngai mooe Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro mathiĩ narĩo matongoreetie andũ. Nao magĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa aameerire.
Joshua3:7 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua3:8 Atha athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa megũkuua Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro ũmeere atĩ
Joshua3:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joshua akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Joshua3:10 O ũrĩa mũgũthiĩ na mbere na rũgendo rwanyu
Joshua3:11 mũrĩona Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩa MWATHANI wa thĩ yothe rĩkĩringa Jorodani rĩmũtongoreetie.
Joshua3:12 Tondũ ũcio thuuraai andũ ikũmi na eerĩ kuuma mĩhĩrĩgainĩ ya Isiraeli
Joshua3:13 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Joshua3:14 (14-15) Kwarĩ hĩndĩ ya magetha rĩrĩa andũ moimagarire moimĩĩte kambĩinĩ nĩguo makaringe rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Hĩndĩ ĩyo rũũĩ rũu nĩrwaiyũrĩĩte mũno o nginya rũkoina. Athĩnjĩri Ngai nĩ o maatongoreetie andũ
Joshua3:15 hĩndĩ o ro ĩyo maaĩ marĩa moimaga na mwena wa na rũgongo magĩtiga gũtherera
Joshua3:16 Rĩrĩa andũ maaringaga rũũĩ magereire thĩ nyũmũ
Joshua4:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua4:2 “Thuura andũ ikũmi na e eerĩ kuuma mĩhĩrĩgainĩ ya Isiraeli
Joshua4:3 ũcooke ũmaathe mooe mahiga ikũmi na meerĩ kuuma gatagatĩ ka rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua4:4 Joshua agĩgĩĩta andũ ikũmi na eerĩ arĩa aathuurĩĩte
Joshua4:5 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua4:6 Mahiga macio nĩmaakũririkanagia andũ ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte. Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua4:7 mũgaagĩciĩra atĩ maaĩ nĩmaatigire gũtherera hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI rĩaringaga rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Tondũ ũcio mahiga macio megũtũũra maririkanagia andũ a Isiraeli ũrĩa gwekĩkire handũ haaha.”
Joshua4:8 Nao andũ acio magĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Joshua aamaathĩĩte; makĩoya mahiga ikũmi na meerĩ gatagatĩ ka rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua4:9 Ningĩ Joshua akĩhanda mahiga ikũmi na meerĩ gatagatĩ ka rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua4:10 Hingo ĩyo athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa maakuuĩĩte Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro maarũngiĩ o gatagatĩ ka Jorodani
Joshua4:11 Rĩrĩa oothe maarĩĩkirie kũringa
Joshua4:12 Nao andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni
Joshua4:13 Andũ acio a ita maarĩ ta ngiri mĩrongo ĩna. Maaringire rũũĩ MWATHANI akĩmoonaga
Joshua4:14 Mũthenya ũcio MWATHANI agĩgĩtĩĩithia Joshua mũno harĩ andũ oothe a Isiraeli; magĩgĩtũũra mamũtĩĩĩte matukũ moothe marĩa aatũũrire muoyo
Joshua4:15 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Joshua
Joshua4:16 aathe athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa maakuuĩĩte Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro moimĩre Jorodani.
Joshua4:17 Joshua agĩgĩĩka ũguo.
Joshua4:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua4:19 Andũ acio maaringire rũũĩ rwa Jorodani mũthenya wa ikũmi wa mweri wa mbere
Joshua4:20 Kũu Giligali nĩkuo Joshua aahandire mahiga marĩa ikũmi na meerĩ marĩa maarutĩĩtwo rũũĩinĩ rwa Jorodani.
Joshua4:21 Naake Joshua akĩĩra andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Joshua4:22 mũgaaciĩra ati Aisiraeli makiuma bũrũri wa Misiri meerekeire bũrũri wa Kanaani
Joshua4:23 MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩahũithirie rũũĩ rwa Jorodani nĩ ũndũ wanyu nĩguo mũhote kũringa
Joshua4:24 Tondũ wa maũndũ macio
Joshua5:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Joshua5:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua5:3 Joshua agĩgĩthondeka tũhiũ twa mahiga moomũ
Joshua5:4 (4-6) Andũ a Isiraeli makiuma Misiri
Joshua5:5 Aariũ a andũ acio
Joshua5:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua5:7 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua5:8 Hwaĩinĩ wa mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri
Joshua5:9 Mũthenya wa keerĩ thuutha wa Aisiraeli kũrĩa Bathaka
Joshua5:10 Mũthenya o ro ũcio mana magĩtiga gũcooka kũgũa
Joshua5:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua5:12 Mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Joshua5:13 Mũnene ũcio wa mbũtũ ya ita ya MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Joshua6:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua6:2 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua6:3 Wee mwene na thigari mũrĩthiũrũrũkaga itũũra rĩĩrĩ o mũthenya riita rĩmwe handũ ha mĩthenya ĩtandatũ.
Joshua6:4 Athĩnjĩri Ngai mũgwanja
Joshua6:5 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Joshua6:6 Joshua mũrũ wa Nuni agĩgĩĩta athĩnjĩri Ngai akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua6:7 Agĩcooka agĩatha andũ maambĩrĩrie gũthiũrũrũka itũũra
Joshua6:8 (8-9) Gũgĩgĩĩkwo o ta ũrĩa Joshua aathanĩĩte gwĩkwo. Thigari imwe irĩ na indo cia mbaara ĩgĩtongoria athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa maathiaga makĩhuuhaga macoro mategũtigithĩria. Athĩnjĩri Ngai acio maarũmĩrĩirwo nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa maakuuĩĩte Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI
Joshua6:9 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua6:10 Kwoguo Joshua agĩkĩĩra thigari cioe Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI ithiũrũrũke itũũra riita rĩmwe irĩkuuĩĩte. Ciarĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Joshua6:11 (12-13) Naake Joshua akĩrooka gũũkĩra rũũciinĩ tene
Joshua6:12 O naguo mũthenya ũcio wa keerĩ maathiũrũrũkire itũũra rĩu riita rĩmwe
Joshua6:13 Mũthenya wa mũgwanja makĩrooka gũũkĩra kĩrooko tene
Joshua6:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa itũũra rĩu rĩathiũrũrũkagwo riita rĩa mũgwanja
Joshua6:15 Itũũra na kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩrĩ thĩinĩ warĩo
Joshua6:16 Mũtikooe o na kĩ thĩinĩ wa indo icio cia kũniinwo; mũngĩĩka ũguo
Joshua6:17 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua6:18 Tondũ ũcio athĩnjĩri Ngai makĩhuuha macoro maao
Joshua6:19 Ĩgĩcooka ĩkĩũraga na hiũ cia njora andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ itũũrainĩ rĩu
Joshua6:20 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joshua akĩĩra andũ arĩa eerĩ maathiĩte gũthigaana bũrũri ũcio atĩrĩ
Joshua6:21 Aanake acio magĩgĩthiĩ
Joshua6:22 Magĩcooka magĩcina itũũra rĩu
Joshua6:23 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua6:24 Ihindainĩ o rĩu Joshua akiuga na mwĩhĩtwa atĩrĩ
Joshua6:25 MWATHANI agĩgĩikara hamwe na Joshua
Joshua7:1 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua7:2 Ningĩ Joshua agĩtũma andũ kuuma Jeriko mathiĩ magathigaane itũũra rĩa Ai. Itũũra rĩu rĩakuhanĩrĩirie na Bethaveni
Joshua7:3 Magĩcooka makĩhũndũka magĩtwararĩra Joshua ũhoro makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Joshua7:4 Tondũ ũcio andũ a Isiraeli ta ngiri ithatũ magĩkĩambata nĩguo magatharĩkĩre Ai. No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua7:5 Andũ acio a itũũra rĩa Ai magĩkĩmateng'eria mamarutĩĩtie kĩhingoinĩ gĩa itũũra rĩu
Joshua7:6 Naake Joshua o na atongoria oothe a Isiraeli magĩtembũranga nguo ciao nĩ ũndũ wa kĩeha. Makĩĩgũithia thĩ mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI
Joshua7:7 Naake Joshua agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua7:8 Atĩrĩĩrĩ MWATHANI
Joshua7:9 Tondũ-rĩ
Joshua7:10 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua7:11 Aisiraeli nĩmeehĩĩtie! Nĩmagararĩĩte kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndamaathire mahingie. Nĩmoeete indo imwe thĩinĩ wa indo iria ciamũrĩĩtwo cia kũniinwo
Joshua7:12 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmĩĩte Aisiraeli maremwo nĩgwĩtiiria thũ ciao. Maraciũrĩra nĩ gũkorwo rĩu nĩmatuĩkĩĩte a kũniinwo! Niĩ ndingĩcooka gũikarania hamwe na inyuĩ rĩngĩ
Joshua7:13 Rĩu gĩũkĩre ũtherie andũ
Joshua7:14 Tondũ ũcio
Joshua7:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa ngooroota na akorwo na indo icio nyamũre cia kũniinwo nĩgũcinwo agaacinwo na mwaki we mwene
Joshua7:16 Tondũ ũcio
Joshua7:17 Agĩcooka akĩreehithia mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Juda mbere
Joshua7:18 Agĩcooka akĩreehithia mbere andũ a nyũmba ya Zabedi ũmwe kwa ũmwe
Joshua7:19 Joshua agĩkĩĩra Akani atĩrĩ
Joshua7:20 Naake Akani akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Joshua7:21 thĩinĩ wa indo iria twatahire nĩndoonire kabuuti ga Kĩĩbabuloni karaaya na gathaka mũno
Joshua7:22 Kwoguo Joshua agĩgĩtũma andũ
Joshua7:23 Nao magĩciruta kũu hemainĩ
Joshua7:24 Naake Joshua
Joshua7:25 Naake Joshua akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Joshua7:26 Magĩcooka makĩmũũmbĩrĩra hĩba nene mũno ya mahiga
Joshua8:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua8:2 Mũgwĩka itũũra rĩa Ai na mũthamaki warĩo o ta ũrĩa mwekire itũũra rĩa Jeriko na mũthamaki warĩo. No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua8:3 Kwoguo Joshua na thigari ciake ciothe magĩĩthagathaga nĩguo maambate mathiĩ itũũra rĩa Ai. Naake Joshua agĩthuura thigari ngiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ (30
Joshua8:4 Agĩciatha agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Joshua8:5 Niĩ na niĩ hamwe na andũ aya angĩ oothe tũgũthiĩ hakuhĩ na itũũra rĩa Ai
Joshua8:6 Nao nĩmarĩtũrũmĩrĩra na ihenya
Joshua8:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo na inyuĩ mũkiume kũrĩa mũrĩkorwo mwĩhithĩĩte
Joshua8:8 Mwarĩĩkia kũnyiita itũũra rĩu-rĩ
Joshua8:9 Joshua agĩkĩmarekia
Joshua8:10 Joshua akĩrooka gũũkĩra rũũciinĩ tene
Joshua8:11 Nacio thigari irĩa aarĩ nacio igĩkĩambata ciumĩĩte itũũra rĩu na mbere
Joshua8:12 Naake Joshua agĩkĩoya andũ ta ngiri ithaano
Joshua8:13 Joshua na atongoria a Isiraeli maigire gĩkundi kĩrĩa kĩnene kĩa mbũtũ ciao cia ita na mwena wa na rũgongo wa itũũra rĩa Ai
Joshua8:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Ai oonire andũ a Joshua
Joshua8:15 Naake Joshua na andũ aake magĩĩtua ta maahũũrĩĩtwo makahootwo biũ nĩ andũ a Ai
Joshua8:16 Andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ kũu itũũrainĩ thĩinĩ magĩgĩĩtwo nĩguo mamarũmĩrĩre na ihenya. O ũrĩa maarũmagĩrĩra Joshua na ihenya
Joshua8:17 Andũ oothe a itũũra rĩa Ai magĩkĩrũmĩrĩra Aisiraeli. Narĩo itũũra rĩgĩgĩtigwo o ro ũguo rĩhingũrĩĩtwo rĩtarĩ na mũndũ o na ũmwe wa kũrĩgitĩra.
Joshua8:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua8:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua8:20 Rĩrĩa andũ a Ai meehũgũrire-rĩ
Joshua8:21 Naake Joshua na andũ aake rĩrĩa moonire atĩ andũ arĩa meehithĩĩte nĩmaanyiita itũũra rĩu na marĩcina
Joshua8:22 O nao Aisiraeli arĩa maarĩ itũũrainĩ thĩinĩ magĩikũrũka
Joshua8:23 tiga o mũthamaki wa Ai ũrĩa maanyiitire
Joshua8:24 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua8:25 (25-26) Joshua aikarire aambararĩĩtie itimũ rĩake arĩroreetie na Ai o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ oothe arĩa maatũũraga kuo mooragirwo. Andũ oothe a Ai
Joshua8:26 Ũhiũ wiki
Joshua8:27 Ũguo nĩguo Joshua aacinire itũũra rĩa Ai akĩrĩtiga rĩrĩ maganjo
Joshua8:28 Naake Joshua agĩcuuria mũthamaki wa Ai mũtĩ igũrũ o nginya hwaĩinĩ. Rĩrĩa riũa rĩathũaga
Joshua8:29 Thuutha wa ũguo Joshua agĩakĩra MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli kĩgongoona Kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Ebali.
Joshua8:30 Aagĩakire kũringana na ũrĩa Musa ndungata ya MWATHANI aathĩĩte andũ a Isiraeli meeke
Joshua8:31 Naake Joshua akĩandĩka mahigainĩ macio Watho ũrĩa wandĩkĩĩtwo nĩ Musa. Eekire ũguo Aisiraeli oothe marĩ o hau meroreire.

Joshua9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua9:2 Athamaki acio magĩgĩĩcookanĩrĩria oothe hamwe marĩ na muorooto o ro ũmwe wa kũhũũrana na Joshua na andũ a Isiraeli.
Joshua9:3 No rĩĩrĩ

Joshua9:13 O na takĩbaareei mondo ici ciitũ cia ndibei; rĩrĩa twaciyũririe ndibei-rĩ
Joshua9:14 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩamũkĩra irio imwe kuuma kũrĩ andũ acio
Joshua9:15 Naake Joshua agĩgĩthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa ũraata na andũ acio a Gibeoni

Joshua9:19 no o makĩmacookeria atĩrĩ

Joshua11:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua11:2 o na athamaki arĩa maarĩ bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma ũrĩa ũrĩ na mwena wa na rũgongo
Joshua11:3 O na ningĩ akĩrekanĩria Akanaani arĩa maikaraga mĩrĩmo yerĩ ya rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Joshua11:4 Nao magĩgĩũka me na mbũtũ ciao ciothe cia ita iria ciarĩ na andũ aingĩ mũno o ta mũthanga ũrĩa ũrĩ hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria. O na nĩmaarĩ na mbarathi na ngaari cia mbarathi nyingĩ mũno.
Joshua11:5 Nao athamaki acio oothe magĩturanĩra mbũtũ ciao cia ita
Joshua11:6 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua11:7 Tondũ ũcio
Joshua11:8 Naake MWATHANI akĩhotithia Aisiraeli kũmatooria. Magĩkĩmatharĩkĩra
Joshua11:9 Naake Joshua na thigari ciake magĩtemenga mbarathi ciao magũrũ magĩcithuithia
Joshua11:10 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Joshua akĩhũndũka
Joshua11:11 Magĩcooka makĩũraga andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ kuo; gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe watigirwo muoyo
Joshua11:12 O na ningĩ Joshua nĩanyiitire matũũra macio moothe o hamwe na athamaki a mo
Joshua11:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua11:14 Ũrĩa andũ a Isiraeli meekire nĩkwĩyoera meeyoeire mahiũ moothe na indo ciothe cia bata iria ciarĩ matũũrainĩ macio igĩtuĩka ciao. No nĩmooragire andũ oothe; gũtirĩ o na ũmwe maatigirie.
Joshua11:15 O ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathĩĩte Musa ndungata yake
Joshua11:16 Ũguo nĩguo Joshua aanyiitire bũrũri ũcio wothe: bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma na cianda mwena wa na rũgongo na wa na kĩanda
Joshua11:17 (17-18) Bũrũri ũcio woimĩĩte kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Halaku gũkuhĩ na Edomu mwena wa na kĩanda
Joshua11:18 Itũũra rĩa Gibeoni rĩrĩa rĩatũũragwo nĩ Ahivi norĩo riiki rĩathondekire kĩrĩĩkanĩro na andũ a Isiraeli. Matũũra macio mangĩ moothe andũ a Isiraeli maamatuunyanire na mbaara.

Joshua15:1 Bũrũri ũrĩa wagaĩirwo mũhĩrĩga wa Juda
Joshua15:2 Mũhaka ũyũ wa mwena wa na kĩanda wambĩrĩirie mũthiainĩ wa na kĩanda wa iria rĩa Cumbĩ
Joshua15:3 ũgathiĩ ũkahĩtũkĩra mwena wa na kĩanda wa mwanya wa Akirabimu
Joshua15:4 Woima hau ũgathiĩ na mbere nginya Azimoni. Kuuma hau ũgathiĩ wambatanĩĩtie na karũũĩ karĩa karĩ mũhakainĩ wa Misiri
Joshua15:5 Naguo mũhaka wa mwena wa irathĩro warĩ iria rĩa Cumbĩ
Joshua15:6 Kuuma hau ũkaambata o nginya Bethi Hogila
Joshua15:7 Woima hau ũkaambata uumĩĩte gĩtuambainĩ gĩa Thĩĩna ũgakinya Debiri
Joshua15:8 Ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkaambata ũgereire gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Hinomu mwena wa na kĩanda wa kĩrĩma kĩrĩa itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩakĩĩtwo igũrũ wakĩo. (Itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu hĩndĩ ĩyo rĩarĩ rĩa Ajebusi.) Ũgacooka ũgathiĩ na mbere wambatĩĩte o nginya gacũmbĩrĩ ga kĩrĩma mwena wa na ithũĩro wa gĩtuamba kĩa Hinomu
Joshua15:9 Kuuma hau ũgathiĩ ũgakinya Ithimainĩ cia Nefitoa
Joshua15:10 Ũgacooka ũgathiũrũrũka na mwena wa ithũĩro wa Baala ũkarora na bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Edomu
Joshua15:11 Ningĩ ũgathiĩ nginya kĩrĩmainĩ kĩrĩa kĩrĩ mwana wa na rũgongo wa Ekironi
Joshua15:12 Mũhaka wa mwena wa ithũĩro warĩ ndeere cia iria rĩu rĩa Mediteraneani. Ĩyo nĩ yo mĩhaka ya bũrũri ũrĩa wagaĩirwo mũhĩrĩga wa Juda kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo.
Joshua15:13 Naake Joshua agĩkĩhe Kalebu mũrũ wa Jefune
Joshua15:14 Naake Kalebu akĩingata njiarwa cia Anaki kuuma itũũrainĩ rĩu; nacio nĩcio mbarĩ cia Sheshai
Joshua15:15 Ningĩ akiuma kũu
Joshua15:16 Naake Kalebu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Joshua15:17 Naake Othinieli
Joshua15:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua15:19 Akisa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Joshua15:20 Ũcio nĩguo bũrũri ũrĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo wagaĩirwo.
Joshua15:21 Matũũra maao marĩa manene marĩa maarĩ na kĩanda biũ
Joshua15:22 Kina
Joshua15:23 Kedeshi
Joshua15:24 Zifu
Joshua15:25 Hazoru Hadata
Joshua15:26 Amamu
Joshua15:27 Hazari Gada
Joshua15:28 Hazari Shuali
Joshua15:29 Baala
Joshua15:30 Elitoladi
Joshua15:31 Zikilagi
Joshua15:32 Lebaothu
Joshua15:33 Namo matũũra marĩa maarĩ ciandainĩ cia irĩma nĩ: Eshitaoli
Joshua15:34 Zanoa
Joshua15:35 Jaramuthu
Joshua15:36 Shaaraimu
Joshua15:37 Matũũra mangĩ ma andũ a Juda maarĩ: Zenani
Joshua15:38 Dileani
Joshua15:39 Lakishi
Joshua15:40 Kaboni
Joshua15:41 Gederothu
Joshua15:42 Matũũra mangĩ maao maarĩ: Libina
Joshua15:43 Ifita
Joshua15:44 Keila
Joshua15:45 O na ningĩ nĩmaarĩ na itũũra rĩa Ekironi
Joshua15:46 o na matũũra moothe
Joshua15:47 O na matũũra ma Ashidodu na Gaza
Joshua15:48 Matũũra maao marĩa maarĩ bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma nĩ; Shamiru
Joshua15:49 Dana
Joshua15:50 Anabu
Joshua15:51 Gosheni
Joshua15:52 Ningĩ maarĩ na Araba
Joshua15:53 Janimu
Joshua15:54 Humuta
Joshua15:55 O na maarĩ na Maoni
Joshua15:56 Jezireeli
Joshua15:57 Kaini
Joshua15:58 Ningĩ nĩmaarĩ na Halihuli
Joshua15:59 Maarathu
Joshua15:60 Na Kiriathu Baali (kana Kiriathu Jearimu)
Joshua15:61 Namo matũũra maao marĩa maarĩ werũinĩ maarĩ: Bethi Araba
Joshua15:62 Nibishani
Joshua15:63 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua16:1 Mũhaka wa na kĩanda wa bũrũri ũrĩa wagaĩirwo njiarwa cia Josefu wambĩrĩirie Jorodani kũrĩa kũrĩ hakuhĩ na Jeriko
Joshua16:2 Woima Betheli
Joshua16:3 Ũgacooka ũgathiĩ ũroreete na mwena wa ithũĩro kũrĩa Ajafileti maatũũraga
Joshua16:4 Mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu
Joshua16:5 Mũhaka wa bũrũri wa mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo watariĩ ta ũũ: woimĩĩte Atarothu Adari
Joshua16:6 Woima kũu
Joshua16:7 Ũgacooka ũgaikũrũka o nginya Atarothu na Naara
Joshua16:8 Mũhaka ũcio ũgacooka ũkoima Tapua
Joshua16:9 o na nĩwongereirwo matũũra na icagi imwe iria ciarĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Manase.
Joshua16:10 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua17:1 Nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe kĩa bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ mwena wa ithũĩro wa Jorodani nĩkĩagaĩirwo mbarĩ imwe cia Manase
Joshua17:2 Bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ mwena wa ithũĩro wa Jorodani wagaĩirwo mbarĩ icio ingĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Manase
Joshua17:3 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua17:4 Nao magĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Eleazaru
Joshua17:5 Kwoguo Manase agĩkĩheeo icunjĩ ingĩ ikũmi
Joshua17:6 nĩ ũndũ njiarwa ciake cia airĩĩtu
Joshua17:7 Mũhaka wa bũrũri wa Manase woimĩĩte Asheri ũgathiĩ Mikimethathu
Joshua17:8 Bũrũri wa Tapua warĩ wa Manase
Joshua17:9 Mũhaka ũcio ũgacooka ũgaikũrũka o nginya karũũĩinĩ ga Kana. Matũũra marĩa maarĩ na kĩanda wa karũũĩ kau maarĩ ma Efiraimu
Joshua17:10 Bũrũri wa Efiraimu warĩ na mwena wa na kĩanda
Joshua17:11 Mũhĩrĩga wa Manase warĩ na matũũra maguo thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wa Isakaru
Joshua17:12 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua17:13 O na rĩrĩa andũ a Isiraeli maagĩire na hinya wa kũigana
Joshua17:14 Nacio njiarwa cia Josefu ikĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua17:15 Naake Joshua agĩcicookeria atĩrĩ
Joshua17:16 Nacio njiarwa cia Josefu igĩcookia atĩrĩ
Joshua17:17 Joshua agĩkĩĩra mũhĩrĩga ũcio wa Efiraimu
Joshua17:18 Bũrũri ũcio ũrĩ irĩma noguo ũgũtuĩka wanyu. O na gũtuĩka nĩ mũtitũinĩ-rĩ
Joshua18:1 Naguo mũingĩ wothe wa Aisiraeli warĩĩkia kũhoota bũrũri ũcio
Joshua18:2 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua18:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joshua agĩkĩĩra andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Joshua18:4 Mũhĩrĩga o mũhĩrĩga nĩũthuurire andũ atatũ ndĩmarekie mathiĩ bũrũri wothe maũtuĩrie wega
Joshua18:5 Nao mekũũgayania icunjĩ mũgwanja
Joshua18:6 Andĩkaai wega ũhoro ũkoniĩ icunjĩ icio mũgwanja mũũndeehere
Joshua18:7 No Alawii matirĩ na igai mekũheyanĩrĩo hamwe na inyuĩ
Joshua18:8 Nao andũ acio magĩkiumagara thuutha wa gwathwo nĩ Joshua ũrĩa wameerĩĩte atĩrĩ
Joshua18:9 Andũ acio magĩgĩthiĩ bũrũri ũcio wothe
Joshua18:10 Naake Joshua agĩcuuka mĩtĩ nĩguo amahoere mataaro kuuma kũrĩ MWATHANI
Joshua18:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua18:12 Mũhaka wacio wa na rũgongo woimĩĩte Jorodani
Joshua18:13 Mũhaka ũcio woima hau
Joshua18:14 Mũhaka ũcio ũgacooka ũkeegata na kĩanda
Joshua18:15 Mũhaka wa mwena wa na kĩanda wambĩrĩirie mũthiainĩ wa Kiriathu Jearimu
Joshua18:16 Mũhaka ũcio ũgacooka ũgaikũrũka nginya o magũrũinĩ ma kĩrĩma kĩrĩa kĩng'ethanĩire na gĩtuamba kĩa Hinomu
Joshua18:17 Ningĩ mũhaka ũcio ũkeegata ũkeerekera na rũgongo
Joshua18:18 Ũgathiĩ ũguo ũgereire mwena wa na rũgongo wa bũrũri rũrĩa ũng'ethanĩire na gĩtuamba kĩa Jorodani. Ũgacooka ũgaikũrũka ũgatoonya gĩtuambainĩ
Joshua18:19 ũgathiĩ na mbere ũgereire mwena wa na rũgongo wa bũrũri wa Bethi Hogila
Joshua18:20 Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani nĩruo rwarĩ mũhaka wa na mwena wa irathĩro. Ĩyo nĩ yo mĩhaka ya bũrũri ũrĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo wagaĩrwo ũtuĩke igai rĩaguo.
Joshua18:21 Matũũra ma mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo maarĩ Jeriko
Joshua18:22 Bethi Araba
Joshua18:23 Avimu
Joshua18:24 Kefaramoni
Joshua18:25 Matũũra marĩa mangĩ maao maarĩ Gibeoni
Joshua18:26 Mizipa
Joshua18:27 Rekemu
Joshua18:28 Zela
Joshua19:1 Igai rĩa keerĩ rĩarĩ rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni kũringana na mbarĩ ciacio. Bũrũri waguo wathiĩte nginya ũgatoonya bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa warĩ igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda.
Joshua19:2 Matũũra marĩa maarĩ thĩinĩ wa bũrũri ũrĩa maagaĩirwo nĩ Beerisheba
Joshua19:3 Hazari
Joshua19:4 Elitoladi
Joshua19:5 Zikilagi
Joshua19:6 Bethi Lebaothu na Sharuheni. Moothe maarĩ matũũra ikũmi na matatũ
Joshua19:7 Matũũra marĩa mangĩ maao maarĩ Aini
Joshua19:8 Icagi icio ciatambĩĩte o nginya Baalathu Beeri (kana Rama)
Joshua19:9 Mũhĩrĩga wa Simeoni nĩwaheirwo rwere rũmwe rwa bũrũri ũrĩa warĩ igai rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda nĩ ũndũ bũrũri wa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda warĩ mũnene gũkĩra ũrĩa andũ aaguo maiganaga.
Joshua19:10 Igai rĩa gatatũ rĩarĩ rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo. Bũrũri ũrĩa wagaĩirwo wakinyĩĩte Saridi.
Joshua19:11 Mũhaka wa bũrũri wao ũgacooka ũkoima kũu Saridi
Joshua19:12 Ningĩ kuuma na mwena ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa Saridi
Joshua19:13 Kuuma hau ũgathiĩ na mbere ũroreete na irathĩro ũgakinya Gathu Heferi na Ithikazini. Mũhaka ũcio ũgacooka ũkeegata ũkeerekera Nea
Joshua19:14 Na mwena wa rũgongo mũhaka wegonyeete ũkarora na Hanathoni
Joshua19:15 Mũhaka ũcio wahĩmbĩirie Katathu
Joshua19:16 Matũũra macio
Joshua19:17 Igai rĩa kana rĩarĩ rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Isakaru kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo.
Joshua19:18 Bũrũri waguo wahĩmbĩirie Jezireeli
Joshua19:19 Hafaraimu
Joshua19:20 Rabithu
Joshua19:21 Remethu
Joshua19:22 O na ningĩ mũhaka wao nĩwahuutĩĩtie Taboru
Joshua19:23 Matũũra macio
Joshua19:24 Igai rĩa gataano rĩarĩ rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo.
Joshua19:25 Bũrũri waguo wahĩmbĩirie Helikathu
Joshua19:26 Alamu Meleku
Joshua19:27 Mũhaka wacio ũgacooka ũkeegata ũkarora na mwena wa irathĩro
Joshua19:28 Ebironi
Joshua19:29 Mũhaka ũcio ũgacooka ũkeehiũria ũkeerekera Rama
Joshua19:30 Uma
Joshua19:31 Matũũra macio moothe hamwe na icagi ciamo
Joshua19:32 Igai rĩa gatandatũ rĩarĩ rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Nafutali kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo.
Joshua19:33 Mũhaka waguo woimĩĩte Helefu
Joshua19:34 Kuuma hau
Joshua19:35 Matũũra marĩa mairigĩirwo na thingo cia hinya maarĩ Zidimu

Joshua19:38 Yironi

Joshua19:40 Narĩo igai rĩa mũgwanja rĩarĩ rĩa mũhĩrĩga wa Dani kũringana na mbarĩ ciaguo.
Joshua19:41 Mũhaka wa bũrũri waguo wahĩmbĩirie matũũra maya: Zoa
Joshua19:42 Shaalibimu
Joshua19:43 Eloni
Joshua19:44 Eliteke

Joshua19:46 Mejarikoni

Joshua19:50 Maamũheire itũũra rĩa Timinathu Sera
Joshua19:51 Macio nĩ mo magai marĩa Eleazaru
Joshua20:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Joshua
Joshua20:2 eere andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Joshua20:3 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũngĩũraga mũndũ ateciirĩĩtie gwĩka ũguo
Joshua20:4 Mũndũ ũcio ũũraganĩĩte
Joshua20:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrenda kwĩrĩhĩria angĩmũrũmĩrĩra kuo-rĩ
Joshua20:6 Mũndũ ũcio ũũraganĩĩte agĩtũũre itũũrainĩ rĩu o nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa agaatuĩrwo ciira nĩ andũ aarĩo
Joshua20:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Joshua20:8 Matũũra marĩa maathuurire mwena wa na irathĩro wa Jorodani nĩ Bezeri
Joshua20:9 Macio nĩ mo matũũra ma kũũrĩrwo marĩa maathuurirwo nĩ ũndũ wa andũ oothe a Isiraeli
Joshua21:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua21:2 o kũu Shilo bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua21:3 Kwoguo andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩhe Alawii matũũra mamwe
Joshua21:4 Alawii a mbarĩ ya Kohathu nĩ o maarĩ a mbere kũgaĩrwo matũũra. Njiarwa cia Harũni
Joshua21:5 Alawii acio angĩ a mbarĩ ya Kohathu maagaĩirwo matũũra ikũmi kuuma mabũrũriinĩ ma Efiraimu
Joshua21:6 Alawii a mbarĩ ya Gerishoni maagaĩirwo matũũra ikũmi na matatũ kuuma mabũrũriinĩ ma Isakaru
Joshua21:7 Nao Alawii a mbarĩ ya Merari makĩgaĩirwo matũũra ikũmi na meerĩ kuuma mabũrũriinĩ ma Reubeni
Joshua21:8 Andũ a Isiraeli maagaĩire Alawii matũũra macio
Joshua21:9 Maya nĩ mo marĩĩtwa ma matũũra ma mabũrũri ma Juda na Simeoni marĩa
Joshua21:10 njiarwa cia Harũni
Joshua21:11 Maaheirwo itũũra rĩa Ariba (Ariba aarĩ ithe wa Anaki) rĩrĩa rĩĩtagwo mahindainĩ maya Heburoni
Joshua21:12 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua21:13 Matũũra marĩa mangĩ njiarwa cia Harũni mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ciaheanĩirio hamwe na itũũra rĩu rĩa Heburoni (itũũra rĩĩrĩ rĩarĩ rĩmwe rĩa matũũra ma kũũragĩrwo) nĩ: Libina
Joshua21:14 Jatiru
Joshua21:15 Holoni
Joshua21:16 Aini
Joshua21:17 Nakuo bũrũriinĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini makĩheeo matũũra mana
Joshua21:18 Anathothu
Joshua21:19 Matũũra moothe marĩa njiarwa cia Harũni
Joshua21:20 Njiarwa iria ingĩ cia mbarĩ ya Kohathu ciagaĩirwo matũũra mamwe thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wa mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu.
Joshua21:21 Maaheirwo matũũra mana
Joshua21:22 Kibizaimu
Joshua21:23 Bũrũriinĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Dani maaheirwo itũũra rĩa Eliteke
Joshua21:24 Aijaloni
Joshua21:25 Bũrũri wa nuthu ya mũhĩrĩga wa Manase ũrĩa wa mwena wa ithũĩro wamaheire matũũra meerĩ
Joshua21:26 Matũũra moothe marĩa njiarwa icio ingĩ cia mbarĩ ya Kohathu ciaheirwo maarĩ ikũmi
Joshua21:27 Mbarĩ cia Gerishoni
Joshua21:28 Nakuo bũrũriinĩ wa Isakaru makĩheeo matũũra mana
Joshua21:29 Jaramuthu
Joshua21:30 Nakuo bũrũriinĩ wa Asheri maaheirwo matũũra mana
Joshua21:31 Helikathu
Joshua21:32 Thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wa Nafutali maaheirwo matũũra matatũ
Joshua21:33 Matũũra moothe marĩa njiarwa cia Gerishoni ciaheirwo maarĩ ikũmi na matatũ hamwe na ithaka ciamo cia kũrĩithia.
Joshua21:34 Nao Alawii arĩa maatigarĩĩte
Joshua21:35 Dimuna
Joshua21:36 Nakuo bũrũriinĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni makĩheeo matũũra mana
Joshua21:37 Kedemothu
Joshua21:38 Bũrũriinĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi maaheirwo matũũra mana
Joshua21:39 Heshiboni
Joshua21:40 Mbarĩ icio cia Merari ciaheirwo matũũra ikũmi na meerĩ.
Joshua21:41 (41-42) Matũũra moothe marĩa Alawii maaheirwo thĩinĩ wa mabũrũri marĩa meegwatĩirwo nĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Joshua21:42 Ũguo nĩguo MWATHANI aakĩheire Aisiraeli bũrũri ũcio wothe ũrĩa eehĩtire atĩ nĩakaahe maithe maao. Nao Aisiraeli marĩĩkia kwĩgwatĩra bũrũri ũcio makĩũtũũra.
Joshua21:43 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩmahe thaayũ bũrũriinĩ ũcio wothe
Joshua21:44 Ningĩ gũtirĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe wa maũndũ moothe marĩa MWATHANI eerĩire andũ a Isiraeli atĩ nĩakaameekĩra
Joshua22:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joshua agĩĩta andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni
Joshua22:2 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua22:3 Matukũ macio moothe mahĩtũkĩĩte-rĩ
Joshua22:4 Rĩu
Joshua22:5 Athĩkagĩraai mawatho marĩa Musa aamũheire
Joshua22:6 (6-8) Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Joshua22:7 Kwoguo andũ acio a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni
Joshua22:8 Rĩrĩa andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni
Joshua22:9 Nao andũ a mĩhĩrĩga ĩyo ĩngĩ ya Isiraeli makĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
Joshua22:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua22:11 Hĩndĩ o ro ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli makĩrekia Finehasi
Joshua22:12 Maamũrekirie hamwe na atongoria ikũmi
Joshua22:13 Nao magĩgĩkinya bũrũriinĩ wa Gileadi
Joshua22:14 ithenyainĩ rĩa mũingĩ wothe wa MWATHANI
Joshua22:15 Taririkanaai wĩhia ũrĩa twekire twĩ Peori
Joshua22:16 Mũrenda ũũmũũthĩ ũyũ kũgarũrũka mũtige kũrũmĩrĩra MWATHANI? Ũũmũũthĩ mũngĩũkĩrĩra MWATHANI mũmũremere
Joshua22:17 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Joshua22:18 Taririkanaai ũrĩa Akani mũrũ wa Zera aaregire gwathĩkĩra watho ũrĩa wakonainie na indo iria ciamũrĩĩtwo cia kũniinwo; andũ oothe a Isiraeli nĩmaaherithirio nĩ tondũ wa ũremi ũcio. Akani-rĩ
Joshua22:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni
Joshua22:20 “Ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya nĩ Ngai! Nĩ we MWATHANI! Ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya nĩ Ngai! We nĩoĩ gĩtũmi gĩa ithuĩ gwĩka ũguo twĩkĩĩte
Joshua22:21 “Ningĩ angĩkorwo nĩkwaga twagĩĩte gwathĩkĩra MWATHANI na ũndũ wa kwĩyakĩra kĩgongoona giitũ kĩũmbe gĩa kũrutagĩra magongoona ma njino

Joshua23:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Joshua23:2 Kwoguo Joshua agĩgĩĩta Aisiraeli oothe
Joshua23:3 Inyuothe nĩmwĩyoneire na maitho maanyu maũndũ moothe marĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu eekĩĩte ndũũrĩrĩ ici ciothe nĩ ũndũ wanyu. MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩwe ũkoreetwo akĩmũhũũranĩra.
Joshua23:4 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Joshua23:5 MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩ we ũgaatũma ndũũrĩrĩ icio imweherere
Joshua23:6 Tondũ ũcio
Joshua23:7 Ningĩ mũtikaanagwatanĩre na ndũũrĩrĩ ici itigĩĩtwo gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu
Joshua23:8 No rĩĩrĩ

Joshua23:14 “Rĩu-rĩ
Joshua23:15 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua23:16 Mũngĩaga kũmenyagĩrĩra kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa MWATHANI Ngai wanyu amwathĩĩte mũmenyagĩrĩre
Joshua24:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joshua agĩcookanĩrĩria mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya Isiraeli o kũu Shekemu
Joshua24:2 Naake Joshua agĩkĩĩra andũ oothe atĩrĩ
Joshua24:3 Ngĩkĩruta ithe wanyu Aburahamu kuuma mũrĩmo ũcio wa rũũĩ rwa Farati
Joshua24:4 naake Isaaka ngĩmũhe Jakubu na Esau. Naake Esau ngĩmũhe bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Edomu ũtuĩke igai rĩake. No ithe wanyu Jakubu hamwe na ciana ciake
Joshua24:5 Thuuthainĩ ngĩcooka ngĩrekia Musa na Harũni
Joshua24:6 Ngĩkĩruta maithe maanyu kũu Misiri
Joshua24:7 makĩngaĩra ndĩmateithie
Joshua24:8 Ngĩcooka ngĩmũtwara bũrũri wa Aamori
Joshua24:9 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo
Joshua24:10 No rĩĩrĩ
Joshua24:11 Na inyuĩ mũgĩkĩringa Jorodani
Joshua24:12 O mũgĩthiyaga na mbere-rĩ
Joshua24:13 Ngĩkĩmũhe bũrũri mũtaanogeire o na matũũra mũteeyakĩire. Kũu nĩkuo rĩu mũtũire mũrĩyaga maciaro ma mĩthabibũ
Joshua24:14 Joshua agĩthiĩ o na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua24:15 Angĩkorwo mũtikwenda kũmũtungatagĩra-rĩ
Joshua24:16 Nao andũ acio magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Joshua24:17 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Joshua24:18 O na ningĩ rĩrĩa twatoonyaga bũrũriinĩ ũyũ-rĩ
Joshua24:19 Joshua agĩkĩĩra andũ acio atĩrĩ
Joshua24:20 na mũngĩtigana naake
Joshua24:21 Nao andũ acio magĩkĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua24:22 Joshua agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua24:23 Naake agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Joshua24:24 Nao andũ acio makĩĩra Joshua atĩrĩ
Joshua24:25 Mũthenya o ro ũcio andũ oothe marĩ o kũu Shekemu
Joshua24:26 Naake Joshua akĩandĩka mawatho macio ibukuinĩ rĩa watho wa Ngai. Agĩcooka akĩoya ihiga inene
Joshua24:27 Joshua akĩĩra andũ acio oothe atĩrĩ
Joshua24:28 Agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ methiĩre
Joshua24:29 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio
Joshua24:30 Nao makĩmũthika mũgũndainĩ wake ũrĩa warĩ Timinathu Sera
Joshua24:31 Andũ a Isiraeli maatungatĩire MWATHANI matukũ moothe marĩa Joshua aarĩ muoyo
Joshua24:32 Na rĩĩrĩ
Joshua24:33 O naake Eleazaru
Judges1:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges1:2 Naake MWATHANI akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges1:3 Nao andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Juda makĩĩra andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Simoni atĩrĩ
Judges1:4 Naake MWATHANI nĩamateithĩrĩirie makĩhoota Akanaani na Aperizi. Maahootire andũ ngiri ikũmi (10
Judges1:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges1:6 Naake agĩĩthara
Judges1:7 Naake Adonibezeku akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges1:8 Andũ a Juda magĩgĩtharĩkĩra Jerusalemu na magĩkĩrĩtaha
Judges1:9 Thuutha ũcio andũ a Juda magĩikũrũka magĩthiĩ gũtharĩkĩra Akanaani arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma
Judges1:10 Thuutha ũcio nĩmaatharĩkĩire Akanaani arĩa maatũũraga Heburoni. Heburoni tene gwetagwo Kiriathu Ariba. Mahootire mbarĩ cia Sheshai
Judges1:11 Andũ a Juda moima kũu magĩthiĩ gũtharĩkĩra itũũra rĩa Debiri. Debiri tene narĩo rĩetagwo Kiriathu Seferi
Judges1:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges1:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges1:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges1:15 Akisa akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges1:16 Njiarwa cia mũthoniwe wa Musa iria cietagwo Akeni ikĩambatania na andũ a Juda kuuma Jeriko
Judges1:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges1:18 (18-19) MWATHANI nĩateithirie andũ a Juda magĩkĩĩnyiitĩra bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ ĩrĩma
Judges1:19 Kalebu aaheirwo bũrũri wa Heburoni o ta ũrĩa Musa oigĩĩte
Judges1:20 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges1:21 (22-23) Mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu na wa Manase ĩgĩthiĩ gũtharĩkĩra Betheli. Mbere ĩyo Betheli gwetagwo Luzi. MWATHANI nĩamateithirie. Nĩmaatũmire athigaani magathigaane Betheli.
Judges1:22 Nao magĩthiĩ nĩmaacemanirie na mũndũ woimaga itũũra rĩu makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges1:23 Naake mũndũ ũcio nĩamoonirie itoonyero rĩa itũũra
Judges1:24 Naake mũndũ ũcio akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Ahiti
Judges1:25 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Judges1:26 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges1:27 Mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu o naguo ndũigana kũrutũrũra Akanaani arĩa maatũũraga itũũra rĩa Gezeri. Akanaani maathiire na mbere gũtũũrania nao.
Judges1:28 Mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni o naguo ndũigana kũrutũrũra atũũri a Kitironi o na kana a Nahaloli. Akanaani acio maathiire na mbere gũtũũrania na Aisiraeli no nĩmaarutithagio mawĩra maritũ.
Judges1:29 Mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri naguo ndwaingatire atũũri a matũũra ma Ako
Judges1:30 Kwoguo andũ a Asheri maatũũranagia na Akanaani arĩa maarĩ eene bũrũri nĩ gũkorwo matiigana kũmaingata.
Judges1:31 Mũhĩrĩga wa Nafutali ndwaingatire atũũri a matũũra ma Bethi Shemeshi na Bethanathu
Judges1:32 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Judges1:33 Aamori nĩmaathiire na mbere gũtũũra Aijaloni
Judges1:34 Mũhaka wa Aedomu wambĩrĩirie mwambatoinĩ wa Akirabimu
Judges2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges2:2 Inyuĩ na inyuĩ mũtirĩ hingo mũkaarĩa kĩrĩĩko na atũũri a bũrũri ũyũ. Nĩmũgaatharũria igongoona ciao ciothe. No rĩĩrĩ
Judges2:3 Ngũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges2:4 Mũraika wa MWATHANI arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo
Judges2:5 na nĩkĩo maatuire handũ hau Bokimu. Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩkĩrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona ho.
Judges2:6 Naake Joshua akĩrekereria andũ mathiĩ; magĩgĩthiĩ o andũ kwĩgwatĩra bũrũri ũrĩa warĩ wa gũtuĩka igai rĩao.
Judges2:7 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe Joshua aarĩ muoyo
Judges2:8 Joshua
Judges2:9 Na aathikirwo o mũgũndainĩ wake itũũrainĩ rĩa Timinathu Sera bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu
Judges2:10 Rũciaro rũu ruothe rwathira
Judges2:11 Aisiraeli nĩmaahĩtĩirie MWATHANI na makĩambĩrĩria gũtungatĩra ngai iria cietagwo Baali.
Judges2:12 Magĩkĩhuutatĩra MWATHANI
Judges2:13 Magĩkĩhuutatĩra MWATHANI na magĩtungatĩra Baali na Asitarite.
Judges2:14 Na njĩra ĩyo MWATHANI agĩkĩraakarĩra Aisiraeli na akĩmanenganĩra mookoinĩ ma thũ imatharĩkĩre na imatahe. MWATHANI arekereirie thũ ciao iria ciamathiũrũrũkĩirie imatoorie o nginya makĩremwo nĩkwĩgitĩra o eene.
Judges2:15 Mangĩoimagarire kũrũa
Judges2:16 Thuutha ũcio MWATHANI nĩatũmĩire Aisiraeli atongoria arĩa mamarutire wathoinĩ wa arĩa mamatharĩkagĩra na makamataha
Judges2:17 No o na kũrĩ ũguo matiigana gũthikĩrĩria atongoria acio aao nĩ gũkorwo nĩmaagire kwĩhoka MWATHANI magatungatagĩra ngai ingĩ. Maithe maao nĩmaathĩkagĩra maathani ma MWATHANI
Judges2:18 MWATHANI angĩamaheire mũtongoria
Judges2:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges2:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI nĩaraakarĩire Aisiraeli akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges2:21 kuuma rĩu ndikaamathengeria rũũrĩrĩ o na rũmwe rwa iria Joshua aatigire kuo atanakua.
Judges2:22 Nĩndĩcitũmagĩra kuona kana Aisiraeli nĩmehaarĩirie kũrũmĩrĩra njĩra ya MWATHANI ta maithe maao
Judges2:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI agĩgĩĩtĩkĩria ndũũrĩrĩ icio gũtũũra bũrũri ũcio na ndaigana kũreka Joshua acitoorie o na kana gũcirutũrũra thuutha wa Joshua gũkua.
Judges3:1 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI nĩetĩkĩririe ndũũrĩrĩ imwe itigare
Judges3:2 Eekire ũguo athoomithie rũciaro o rũciaro rwa andũ a Isiraeli mbaara na makĩria arĩa mataarũĩte mbaara mbere ĩyo.
Judges3:3 Arĩa maatigarire bũrũri ũcio nĩ andũ a matũũra mataano ma Afilisiti
Judges3:4 Ndũũrĩrĩ icio ciarĩ o cia kũgeria Aisiraeli kana nĩmarĩrũmagĩrĩra maathani ma MWATHANI o marĩa aathĩĩte maithe maao ahũthĩrĩĩte Musa.
Judges3:5 Kwoguo andũ a Isiraeli maatũũraga gatagatĩ ka Akanaani
Judges3:6 Nĩmahikanagia nao o na magathaathayagia ngai ciao.
Judges3:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges3:8 MWATHANI agĩkĩraakarĩra Aisiraeli na agĩkĩmanenganĩra wathoinĩ wa Kushani Rishathaimu
Judges3:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Aisiraeli magĩkaĩra MWATHANI
Judges3:10 Ũcio agĩgĩikũrũkĩrwo nĩ Roho wa MWATHANI na agĩtuĩka mũtongoria thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli. Naake agĩthiĩ akĩhũũrana na Kushani Rishathaimu
Judges3:11 Bũrũri ũgĩkĩgĩa thaayũ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna na thuutha ũcio Othinieli mũrũ wa Kenazi agĩkua.
Judges3:12 Aisiraeli nĩmaacookire makĩhĩtĩria MWATHANI. MWATHANI agĩgĩĩkĩra Egiloni
Judges3:13 Egiloni agĩgĩcookanĩrĩria Amoabi na Aamaleki agĩthiĩ kũrũa na Aisiraeli
Judges3:14 Aisiraeli maatũũrire rungu rwa Egiloni mũthamaki wa Amoabi mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnaana.
Judges3:15 No Aisiraeli nĩmaakaĩire MWATHANI
Judges3:16 Naake Ehudi agĩĩthondekera rũhiũ rwa njora rwa nuthu mita kũraiha na akĩrũnoora mĩena yerĩ. Agĩcooka akĩrwĩyoha njohero mwena wa ũrĩo rungu wa nguo ciake.
Judges3:17 Agĩgĩtwarĩra Egiloni mũthamaki wa Amoabi mbeeca cia igooti. Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges3:18 Ehudi arĩĩkia kũnenganĩra mbeeca cia igooti
Judges3:19 No we akinya harĩa haarĩ mahiga maicũhie gũkuhĩ na Giligali
Judges3:20 Mũthamaki aikaire arĩ wiki nyũmbainĩ ya ngoroba kũrĩa aikaraga rĩrĩa riũa rĩahiũha. Ehudi agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges3:21 Ehudi agĩgĩtambũrũkia guoko gwake kwa ũmotho agĩcomora rũhiũ rwa njora kuuma mwena wake wa ũrĩo agĩtheeca mũthamaki nda naruo.
Judges3:22 Mũtĩ wa nyiitĩro wa rũhiũ o naguo ũgĩtoonya o nda thĩinĩ rũkĩmũtũrĩkania
Judges3:23 Ehudi akiuma agĩcookia mĩrango ya nyũmba ĩyo ya ngoroba
Judges3:24 Ehudi oima
Judges3:25 Igĩgĩeterera o nginya igĩthethũka. Aaga kũhingũra mũrango
Judges3:26 Ehudi oorire rĩrĩa cietereire
Judges3:27 Akinya kuo akĩhuuhithia karumbeeta kũu bũrũri wa irĩma wa Efiraimu nĩguo Aisiraeli mehaarĩrie gũthiĩ mbaara. Thuutha ũcio Aisiraeli magĩgĩikũrũka amatongoreetie.
Judges3:28 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges3:29 Mũthenya ũcio nĩmooragire thigari ta ngiri ikũmi (10
Judges3:30 Ũguo nĩguo Amoabi maahootirwo nĩ Aisiraeli mũthenya ũcio. Bũrũri ũgĩkĩgĩa na thaayũ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩnaana.
Judges3:31 Mũtongoria ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire nĩ Shamigari mũũriũ wa Anathi. Ũcio naake aahonokirie Aisiraeli na kũũraga Afilisiti magana matandatũ na kĩboko gĩa kũhũũra ng'ombe cia kũrĩma.
Judges4:1 Thuutha wa Ehudi gũkua
Judges4:2 Naake MWATHANI akĩmaneana wathaniinĩ wa Jabini
Judges4:3 Jabini aarĩ na ngaari cia mbarathi cia cuuma magana kenda (900) na nĩahinyĩrĩirie Aisiraeli na ũũru mũingĩ itĩĩna rĩa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ. Nao Aisiraeli magĩgĩkaĩra MWATHANI amateithie.
Judges4:4 Debora
Judges4:5 Aamenyereete gũikaraga rungu rwa mũkĩndũ ũrĩa warĩ gatagatĩ ka Rama na Betheli kũu bũrũriinĩ wa irĩma wa Efiraimu. Aisiraeli nĩmaathiaga kũrĩ we gũtuithanio.
Judges4:6 Mũthenya ũmwe nĩatũmanĩire Baraki
Judges4:7 Niĩ na niĩ nĩngũguucĩrĩria Sisera
Judges4:8 Naake Baraki akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges4:9 Debora agĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges4:10 Baraki agĩĩta mũhĩrĩga wa Zebuluni na wa Nafutali kũu Kedeshi. Na andũ njamba ngiri ikũmi (10
Judges4:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Heberi ũrĩa Mũkeni nĩeyamũranĩĩtie na Akeni arĩa angĩ arĩa maarĩ njiarwa cia Hobabu mũthoniwe wa Musa. Eyamũrania aathiĩte akaamba hema yake mũgandiinĩ o kũu Zaananimu
Judges4:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges4:13 Agĩgĩĩtia ngaari iria magana kenda cia mbarathi cia cuuma na mbũtũ ciake ciothe cia ita. Aaciĩtirie kuuma Haroshethu kwa Ndũũrĩrĩ agĩcitũma karũũĩinĩ ga Kishoni.
Judges4:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges4:15 Rĩrĩa Baraki na thigari ciake maahithũkĩire Sisera
Judges4:16 Baraki akĩrũmĩrĩra na ihenya ngaari icio cia mbarathi o na thigari o nginya Haroshethu kwa Ndũũrĩrĩ. Thigari ciothe cia Sisera ikĩũragwo na gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wetharire.
Judges4:17 Sisera oora aathiire hemainĩ ya Jaeli
Judges4:18 Jaeli nĩakiumagarire gũtũnga Sisera
Judges4:19 Sisera agĩkĩĩra Jaeli atĩrĩ
Judges4:20 Sisera agĩkĩĩra Jaeli atĩrĩ
Judges4:21 Na rĩrĩa Sisera aakomeete toro mũritũ nĩ ũndũ wa mĩnoga
Judges4:22 Jaeli agĩgĩthiĩ gũthaagaana Baraki ũrĩa wahanyũkĩĩtie Sisera akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges4:23 Mũthenya ũcio Ngai agĩkĩhe Aisiraeli ũhootani igũrũ rĩa Jabini mũthamaki wa Kanaani.
Judges4:24 Aisiraeli nao makĩhatĩkana naake o nginya makĩmũtooria o biũ.
Judges5:1 Debora na Baraki mũrũ wa Abinoa makĩina rwĩmbo rũũrũ mũthenya ũcio:
Judges5:2 Atongoria thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli nĩmerutire; andũ makĩyumayumĩria
Judges5:3 Inyuĩ athamaki taiguai! Inyuĩ anene tegaai matũ!Nĩkũina ngũinĩra MWATHANI
Judges5:4 MWATHANI
Judges5:5 Irĩma igĩthingitha o igũthingitha mbere ya MWATHANI wa Sinai O mbere ya MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli.
Judges5:6 Matukũinĩ ma Shamigari mũrũ wa Anathi
Judges5:7 Isiraeli guothe matũũra magĩtiganĩrio nginya rĩrĩa Debora arũũgamireagĩtuĩka ta nyina wa Aisiraeli.
Judges5:8 Ngai njerũ ciathuurwo
Judges5:9 Ngoro yakwa nĩkũgaatha ĩragaatha atongoria a andũ a Isiraeli nĩkwĩrutĩra na wendi.MWATHANI aroogoocwo!
Judges5:10 Inyuĩ mũhaicĩĩte ndigiri njerũ anĩrĩraai ũndũ ũcio! Inyuĩ mũkinyĩĩte mĩgeka ya goro ugĩrĩriai! Inyuĩ mũrathiĩ na barabara inaai! Inaai tũine tũkeneete!
Judges5:11 Andũ nĩkũrũũhia mararũũhia mathiũrũrũkĩirie ithima cia maaĩ
Judges5:12 Debora tiira mũtwe o gũtiira! Wĩtiire
Judges5:13 Matigari ma anene magĩkiumagara
Judges5:14 Kuuma Efiraimu
Judges5:15 Atongoria kuuma Isakaru magĩtwarana na Debora
Judges5:16 Mwatigirwo rũũruinĩ rwa ng'ondu nĩkĩ? Mwatigirwo mũthikĩrĩirie arĩithi magĩĩta ng'ondu? Mũhĩrĩga wa Reubeni nĩwagayũkanĩĩte ndũngĩahotire gũtua gũũka kana gũikara.
Judges5:17 Mũhĩrĩga wa Gadi ũgĩikara mwena wa irathĩro wa Jorodani
Judges5:18 No andũ a Zebuluni na Nafutali makĩaga gũcaaĩra mĩoyo yao magĩtoonya kĩhaaro kĩa mbaara.
Judges5:19 Hau Taanaka karũũĩinĩ ka Megido
Judges5:20 Njata ciahĩtahĩtũkanaga kũu igũrũ
Judges5:21 Mũiyũro wa karũũĩ ga Kishoni ũkĩmatwara; mũhatĩkano wa rũũĩ rwa Kishoni ũkĩmatwara.Nĩgũthiĩ ngũthiĩ o na mbere nyũmĩrĩirie.
Judges5:22 Mbarathi igĩũka ikĩrũũgarũũgaga
Judges5:23 Mũraika wa MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ.“Kĩrumi igũrũ rĩa Merozi! Kĩrumi kĩrĩa kĩũru igũrũ rĩa atũũri a kuo! Tondũ matiokire gũteithia MWATHANI thengia kũhũũrana naake.”
Judges5:24 Ũrĩa ũrĩ na mũnyaka gatagatĩinĩ ga atumia oothe
Judges5:25 Sisera aamũhooire maaĩ
Judges5:26 Oire higĩ na guoko kũmwe na nyondo ya bundi na kũrĩa kũngĩ; aamĩhũũrĩire Sisera akĩmũmemendera mũtwe. Akĩmũtheeca agĩtũrĩkia thikĩrĩrio.
Judges5:27 Aagũire agĩkoma magũrũinĩ ma Jaeli
Judges5:28 Nyina wa Sisera agacũũthagĩrĩria na ndirica; akaroraga arĩ o thuutha wa gatirica
Judges5:29 Airĩĩtu aake arĩa oogĩ makamũcookagĩria
Judges5:30 “No indo cia gũtaha na cia kũgayana maracaria
Judges5:31 Thũ ciaku ciothe
Judges6:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges6:2 Amidiani maarĩ na hinya gũkĩra Aisiraeli
Judges6:3 Aisiraeli mangĩahandire irio
Judges6:4 Maambaga hema mĩgũndainĩ ya Aisiraeli na magathũũkia irio bũrũri wothe o nginya mwena wa na kĩanda gũthiũrũrũkĩria Gaza. Matahaga ng'ondu
Judges6:5 Moomokagĩra kuo na ng'ombe na hema ciao matumanĩĩte o ta ngigĩ. Andũ acio na ngamĩĩra ciao matingĩatarĩkire nĩkũingĩha. Mookaga makahithũkĩra na magathũũkia mĩgũnda
Judges6:6 na Aisiraeli matingĩahotire kũmeetiiria.
Judges6:7 Kwoguo andũ a Isiraeli nĩmaakaĩire MWATHANI amateithie harĩ Amidiani.
Judges6:8 Naake akĩmatũmĩra mũnabii ũrĩa wamaheire ndũmĩrĩri ĩno kuuma kwĩ MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli: “Nĩ niĩ ndamũrutire ũkomboinĩ wa Misiri.
Judges6:9 Ngĩmũkũũra kuuma kũrĩ Amisiri na kũrĩ andũ arĩa maahũũranire na inyuĩ bũrũriinĩ ũyũ. Na o ũrĩa mwathiaga na mbere
Judges6:10 Nĩndamwĩrire atĩ
Judges6:11 Thuutha ũcio mũraika wa MWATHANI agĩũka itũũrainĩ rĩa Ofira agĩikara thĩ rungu rwa mũgandi ũrĩa warĩ wa Joashu
Judges6:12 Naake mũraika wa MWATHANI akĩmuumĩrĩra akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:13 Gideoni akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges6:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI nĩamwathire akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:15 Gideoni agĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges6:16 Naake MWATHANI makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges6:17 Gideoni agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:18 Ndagũthaitha tiga gũthiĩ itakũreeheire kĩheeo.” Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges6:19 Gideoni agĩgĩcooka na mũciĩ
Judges6:20 Naake mũraika wa MWATHANI akĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges6:21 Mũraika wa MWATHANI agĩgĩthiĩ akĩhuutia nyama na mĩgate ĩyo na mũthia wa mũthĩĩgi ũcio aarĩ naguo. O hau mwaki ũkiuma ihigainĩ rĩu
Judges6:22 Gideoni agĩkĩmenya atĩ nĩ mũraika wa MWATHANI ooneete na amakĩĩte akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges6:23 MWATHANI agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:24 Gideoni agĩgĩakĩra MWATHANI kĩgongoona o hau na agĩkĩhe rĩĩtwa rĩa “MWATHANI nĩ thaayũ.” (O na rĩu kĩrĩ o kuo kũu Ofira mbarĩinĩ ya Abiezeri.)
Judges6:25 Ũtukũ o ũcio MWATHANI akĩarĩria Gideoni akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges6:26 Ũcooke wakĩre MWATHANI Ngai waku kĩgongoona kĩngĩ kĩega igũrũ rĩa kĩhumbu kĩu. Ningĩ ũcooke woe ndeegwa ya keerĩ ũmĩcine yothe ĩrĩ igongoona rĩa njino. Ũkĩmĩcina
Judges6:27 Gideoni agĩkĩoya ndungata ciake ikũmi o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aamwathĩĩte. Na tondũ nĩetigagĩra mũno andũ a mũciĩ wa ithe o na a itũũra
Judges6:28 Mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ kĩrooko tene gwakĩa
Judges6:29 Magĩkĩũrania atĩrĩ
Judges6:30 Magĩkĩĩra Joashu atĩrĩ
Judges6:31 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges6:32 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo Gideoni akĩheeo rĩĩtwa rĩa Jerubaali tondũ Joashu nĩoigire
Judges6:33 Thuutha ũcio Amidiani oothe na Aamaleki na ndũũrĩrĩ cia kũu werũinĩ makĩũngana
Judges6:34 Naake Gideoni akĩiyũrwo nĩ roho wa MWATHANI
Judges6:35 Agĩcooka agĩtũma arekio bũrũri wothe wa Manase andũ mamuume thuutha. Nĩatũmire arekio o na kũrĩ mũhĩrĩga wa Asheri
Judges6:36 Gideoni agĩkĩĩra Ngai atĩrĩ
Judges6:37 ngũkĩiga guoya wa ng'ondu kũrĩa tũhũũragĩra ngano
Judges6:38 Na ũguo noguo gwatuĩkire. Kwarooka gũkĩa Gideoni agĩũkĩra tene
Judges6:39 Gideoni akĩĩra Ngai atĩrĩ
Judges6:40 Ũtukũ ũcio Ngai akĩhingia ũndũ ũcio. Rũũciinĩ rũũrũ rũngĩ guoya warĩ mũũmũ
Judges7:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Gideoni na mbũtũ yake nĩmookĩrire tene magĩthiĩ makĩamba hema hakuhĩ na gĩthima kĩa Harodi. Amidiani nao maambĩĩte hema yao gĩtuambainĩ mwena wa na rũgongo rwa Aisiraeli karĩmainĩ ka More.
Judges7:2 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:3 Kĩĩre andũ atĩrĩ
Judges7:4 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:5 Gideoni agĩgĩtwara andũ aake rũũĩinĩ
Judges7:6 Nao andũ arĩa maanyuire maaĩ na rũrĩmĩ ta ngui mamatahĩĩte na mooko maarĩ magana matatũ (300). Arĩa angĩ oothe mainamĩrĩire magĩturia ndu makĩnyua maaĩ.
Judges7:7 MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Gideoni agĩkĩĩra Aisiraeli oothe mainũke o tiga andũ acio magana matatũ
Judges7:9 Ũtukũ ũcio MWATHANI akĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges7:10 No angĩkorwo nĩũretigĩra kũmĩhithũkĩra-rĩ
Judges7:11 na nĩũkũigua ũrĩa maraaria
Judges7:12 Amidiani
Judges7:13 Gideoni akinya aiguire mũndũ akĩĩra mũraatawe kĩrooto. Aamwĩraga atĩrĩ
Judges7:14 Mũraatawe naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges7:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges7:16 Agĩkĩgayania andũ arĩa aake magana matatũ ikundi ithatũ
Judges7:17 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges7:18 Rĩrĩa niĩ na gĩkundi gĩakwa tũrĩhuuha tũrumbeeta twitũ
Judges7:19 Gideoni na gĩkundi gĩake kĩa andũ igana maakinyire rũteereinĩ rwa kambĩ ihinda iniini mbere ya thaa thita cia ũtukũ
Judges7:20 Ikundi icio ingĩ igĩrĩ igĩĩka o ũguo. Oothe maanyiitaga imũrĩ na mooko maao ma ũmotho na tũrumbeeta na mooko ma ũrĩo
Judges7:21 Magaikara mũndũ o harĩa aarĩ mathiũrũrũkĩirie kambĩ ĩyo. Amidiani oothe magĩthombocana makĩũra makiugaga mbu.
Judges7:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges7:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ kuuma mĩhĩrĩga ya Nafutali
Judges7:24 Gideoni agĩgĩtũma arekio bũrũri wothe ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu makoige atĩrĩ
Judges7:25 Nĩmaanyiitire atongoria eerĩ a Amidiani
Judges8:1 Andũ a Efiraimu magĩkĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges8:2 No Gideoni akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges8:3 Makiria ma ũguo-rĩ
Judges8:4 Ihinda rĩu Gideoni na andũ arĩa aake magana matatũ nĩmaakinyĩĩte rũũĩinĩ rwa Jorodani na makarũringa. Nĩmaanogeete na no maahanyũkagia Amidiani.
Judges8:5 Maakinya Sukothu
Judges8:6 No atongoria a Sukothu makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges8:7 Gideoni agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges8:8 Gideoni oima kũu agĩthiĩ Penueli
Judges8:9 Agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges8:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Zeba na Zalimuna maarĩ handũ heetagwo Karikori me na thigari ciao. Harĩ thigari ciothe cia ndũũrĩrĩ cia kũu werũinĩ no andũ ta ngiri ikũmi na ithaano (15
Judges8:11 Gideoni agĩgĩthiĩ na barabara agereire o rũteereinĩ rwa werũ
Judges8:12 Athamaki acio eerĩ a Amidiani
Judges8:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges8:14 nĩanyiitire mwanake wa kuuma Sukothu akĩmũũrangia ciũria. Naake mwanake ũcio akĩandĩkĩra Gideoni marĩĩtwa mĩrongo mũgwanja na mũgwanja ma atongoria arĩa maarĩ igweta a kũu Sukothu.
Judges8:15 Gideoni agĩgĩthiĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Sukothu akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges8:16 Agĩgĩcaria mĩigua na mĩtare o kũu werũinĩ agĩkĩherithia atongoria a Sukothu nayo.
Judges8:17 Ningĩ akĩmomora mũnaara wa Penueli na akĩũraga andũ a itũũra rĩu.
Judges8:18 Gideoni agĩcooka akĩũria Zeba na Zalimuna atĩrĩ
Judges8:19 Gideoni agĩkĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges8:20 Agĩgĩcooka akĩĩra Jetheri mũũrũwe ũrĩa mũkũrũ atĩrĩ
Judges8:21 Zeba na Zalimuna magĩkĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges8:22 Thuutha ũcio Aisiraeli magĩthiĩ makĩĩra Gideoni atĩrĩ
Judges8:23 No Gideoni akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges8:24 No agĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga atĩrĩ
Judges8:25 Andũ magĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges8:26 Icũhĩ icio cia thahabu iria Gideoni oonganirie ciakinyirie ũritũ ta wa kiro mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
Judges8:27 Naake Gideoni agĩkĩoya thahabu ĩyo agĩthondeka mũhianano
Judges8:28 Amidiani magĩkĩhootwo nĩ Aisiraeli na matiacookire kwambararia ciongo. Bũrũri ũgĩkĩgĩa na thaayũ mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna o kinya rĩrĩa Gideoni aakuire.
Judges8:29 Gideoni agĩgĩcooka gwake mũciĩ na agĩikara kuo.
Judges8:30 Aarĩ na aanake mĩrongo mũgwanja nĩ gũkorwo aarĩ na atumia aingĩ.
Judges8:31 Ningĩ aarĩ na mũtumia ũngĩ aigĩĩte Shekemu
Judges8:32 Gideoni mũrũ wa Joashu aakuire arĩ mũkũrũ mũno
Judges8:33 Thuutha wa gĩkuũ kĩa Gideoni
Judges8:34 Nao makĩaga gũcooka gũtungatĩra MWATHANI Ngai wao ũrĩa wamahonokeetie kuuma harĩ thũ ciao iria ciamathiũrũrũkĩirie.
Judges8:35 Ningĩ makĩaga ngaatho kũrĩ mũciĩ wa Gideoni nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ moothe meega marĩa eekĩire Aisiraeli.
Judges9:1 Mũrũ wa Gideoni ũrĩa wetagwo Abimeleki agĩthiĩ Shekemu
Judges9:2 akĩmeera moorie andũ a Shekemu
Judges9:3 Andũ a nyũmba ya nyina makĩarĩria andũ a Shekemu igũrũ rĩa Abimeleki
Judges9:4 Magĩkĩmũhe icunjĩ cia betha mĩrongo mũgwanja kuuma hekaarũ ya Baali ya kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Akĩihũthĩra kwandĩka wĩra mĩkora ya kũmũteithĩrĩria.
Judges9:5 Agĩgĩthiĩ mũciĩ gwa ithe o kũu Ofira
Judges9:6 Thuutha ũcio andũ oothe a Shekemu
Judges9:7 Rĩrĩa Jothamu aiguire ũguo agĩthiĩ akĩrũũgama kĩrĩma igũrũ gĩa Gerizimu akĩanĩrĩra akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges9:8 Tene tene mũno-rĩ
Judges9:9 Naguo mũtamaiyũ ũgĩcookia atĩrĩrĩ
Judges9:10 Ningĩ mĩtĩ ĩkĩĩra mũkũyũ atĩrĩrĩ
Judges9:11 Naguo mũkũyũ ũgĩcookia atĩrĩrĩ
Judges9:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mĩtĩ ĩkĩĩra mũthabibũ atĩrĩ ‘Atĩrĩrĩ
Judges9:13 No mũthabibũ ũgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges9:14 Kwoguo mĩtĩ yothe ĩgĩkĩĩra mũtare atĩrĩ
Judges9:15 Naguo mũtare ũgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges9:16 Jothamu agĩgĩthiĩ na mbere kũmeera atĩrĩ
Judges9:17 Ririkanaai atĩ baaba nĩwe wamũrũĩrĩire na agĩĩtwarĩrĩria ũgwatiinĩ nĩguo amũhonokie kuuma kũrĩ Amidiani.
Judges9:18 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges9:19 Rĩu-rĩ
Judges9:20 No akorwo tiguo
Judges9:21 Na tondũ Jothamu nĩetigagĩra mũrũ wa ithe Abimeleki agĩkĩũra agĩthiĩ gũtũũra Beeri.
Judges9:22 Abimeleki agĩthamakĩra Aisiraeli mĩaka ĩtatũ.
Judges9:23 Thuutha ũcio Ngai agĩtũma kũgĩe ũthũ gatagatĩinĩ ka Abimeleki na andũ a Shekemu
Judges9:24 Ũndũ ũcio watuĩkĩkire nĩ geetha Abimeleki na andũ a Shekemu arĩa maamũũmĩrĩirie oorage aariũ a ithe arĩa mĩrongo mũgwanja marĩhe thiirĩ wa meehia maao.
Judges9:25 Andũ a Shekemu makĩiga arũme mooherie Abimeleki o kũu irĩma igũrũ na magĩtuunya arĩa oothe mahĩtũkagĩra njĩra ĩyo indo ciao. Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũkĩmenyithio Abimeleki.
Judges9:26 Thuutha ũcio Gaali
Judges9:27 Magĩgĩthiĩ mĩgũndainĩ ya mĩthabibũ
Judges9:28 Gaali agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Judges9:29 Korwo nĩ niĩ ndongoragia andũ aya-rĩ
Judges9:30 Zebuli
Judges9:31 Agĩtũma arekio kũrĩ Abimeleki arĩ Aruma makoige atĩrĩ
Judges9:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩ wega we na andũ aaku mũthiĩ kũrĩ o ũtukũ mũkeehithe mĩgũndainĩ.
Judges9:33 Rũũciũ kĩrooko riũa rĩkĩratha mũhithũkĩre itũũra
Judges9:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Abimeleki na andũ aake oothe makiumagara o ũtukũ makĩoheria itũũra rĩa Shekemu marĩ ikundi inya.
Judges9:35 Rĩrĩa Abimeleki na andũ aake moonire Gaali oima akĩrũũgama thoome wa itũũra-rĩ
Judges9:36 Gaali aamoona akĩĩra Zebuli atĩrĩ
Judges9:37 Gaali akiuga rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Judges9:38 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Zebuli agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges9:39 Kwoguo Gaali agĩgĩtongoria andũ a Shekemu mathiĩ makarũe na Abimeleki.
Judges9:40 Abimeleki akĩingatana Gaali
Judges9:41 Abimeleki agĩthiĩ gũtũũra Aruma
Judges9:42 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges9:43 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Judges9:44 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Abimeleki na gĩkundi gĩake maahanyũkire makarangĩre kĩhingo gĩa itũũra
Judges9:45 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges9:46 Rĩrĩa atongoria oothe arĩa maarĩ mũnaarainĩ wa Shekemu maiguire ũhoro ũcio
Judges9:47 Abimeleki nĩerirwo atĩ atongoria maacookanĩrĩire hekaarũinĩ ĩyo.
Judges9:48 Kwoguo agĩthiĩ na andũ aake oothe kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Zalimoni. Akinya kuo
Judges9:49 Kwoguo o mũndũ agĩtema rũhonge rwa mũtĩ
Judges9:50 Abimeleki oima hau agĩthiĩ Thebezi
Judges9:51 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges9:52 Abimeleki agĩthiĩ ho nĩguo aũtharĩkĩre. Agĩgĩthiĩ o hau kĩhingoinĩ nĩ geetha aũcine.
Judges9:53 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges9:54 Abimeleki agĩkĩheneria mwanake ũrĩa wamũkuuagĩra matharaita maake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges9:55 Rĩrĩa Aisiraeli moonire atĩ Abimeleki nĩakua
Judges9:56 Ũguo nĩguo Ngai aarĩhirie Abimeleki ngero ĩrĩa aagereete ithe rĩrĩa ooragire aariũ a ithe mĩrongo mũgwanja.
Judges9:57 Ningĩ Ngai nĩatũmire andũ a Shekemu
Judges10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges10:2 Aatongoririe Aisiraeli mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ. Aakua aathikirwo o kũu Shamiru.
Judges10:3 Thuutha wa Tola
Judges10:4 Jairũ aarĩ na aariũ mĩrongo ĩtatũ arĩa maathiaga mahaicĩĩte ndigiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ. Nao maarĩ na matũũra mĩrongo ĩtatũ kũu bũrũriinĩ wa Gileadi
Judges10:5 Jairũ akua aathikirwo Kamonu.
Judges10:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Judges10:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI akĩmaraakarĩra na akĩreka Afilisiti na Aamoni mamahoote.
Judges10:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges10:9 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe-rĩ
Judges10:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Aisiraeli maakĩrĩrĩra MWATHANI makiugaga atĩrĩ
Judges10:11 MWATHANI agĩkĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges10:12 Asidoni
Judges10:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges10:14 Thiĩi mũkaĩre ngai icio mwethuurĩire. Rekeei imũhonokagie mwagĩa hatĩkainĩ.”
Judges10:15 Nao andũ a Isiraeli magĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Judges10:16 Magĩgĩthengia ngai ciothe ng'eni gatagatĩinĩ kaao
Judges10:17 Thuutha ũcio thigari cia Aamoni ĩkĩĩhaarĩria gũthiĩ mbaara na igĩaka kambĩ yacio Gileadi. Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩũngana magĩaka kambĩ yao Mizipa o kũu Gileadi.
Judges10:18 Andũ a Isiraeli na atongoria aao marĩ kũu magĩkĩũrania atĩrĩ
Judges11:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩkwarĩ mũthigari njamba mũno wa kuuma Gileadi wetagwo Jefitha. Jefitha aarĩ mũũriũ wa mũndũ wa nja mũmaraaya. Gileadi
Judges11:2 nĩagĩĩte ciana ingĩ cia aanake na mũtumia wake. Aanake acio maigana nĩmaingatire Jefitha mũciĩ gwa ithe. Maamwĩrire atĩrĩ
Judges11:3 Jefitha agĩkĩũrĩra aariũ a ithe
Judges11:4 Matukũ maathianga
Judges11:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo
Judges11:6 Mamũkora makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges11:7 No Jefitha akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Judges11:8 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges11:9 Jefitha agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges11:10 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges11:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jefitha agĩgĩthiĩ na atongoria acio a Gileadi. Andũ magĩkĩmũtua mũtongoria na mwathi wao. Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges11:12 Thuutha ũcio Jefitha agĩtũma arekio kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Aamoni makamwĩre atĩrĩ
Judges11:13 Mũthamaki wa Aamoni agĩcookeria arekio a Jefitha atĩrĩ
Judges11:14 Naake Jefitha agĩtũma arekio rĩngĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Aamoni
Judges11:15 na ndũmĩrĩri ĩno: “Ti ma atĩ Aisiraeli nĩmaatuunyanire bũrũri wa Amoabi o na kana wa Aamoni.
Judges11:16 No ũrĩa gwatuĩkire nĩ atĩ Aisiraeli moima Misiri maatuĩkanĩirie werũinĩ o nginya Iria Ituune
Judges11:17 Thuutha ũcio magĩtũmĩra mũthamaki wa Edomu arekio makoorie rũũtha rwa gũtuĩkanĩria bũrũri ũcio wake. No mũthamaki wa Edomu ndameetĩkĩririe. Ningĩ no mooririe mũthamaki wa Amoabi
Judges11:18 Thuutha ũcio magĩgĩtuĩkanĩria werũinĩ matheemeete bũrũri wa Edomu na wa Amoabi o nginya magĩũka mwena wa irathĩro wa bũrũri wa Amoabi
Judges11:19 Thuutha ũcio Aisiraeli nĩmaatũmire arekio kũrĩ Sihoni
Judges11:20 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges11:21 Naake MWATHANI
Judges11:22 Maanyiitire bũrũri wa Aamori mwena wa na kĩanda kuuma rũũĩ rwa Arinoni o kinya rũũĩ rwa Jaboku mwena wa na rũgongo. Ningĩ kuuma werũinĩ wa na mwena wa irathĩro o nginya rũũĩ rwa Jorodani mwena wa na ithũĩro.
Judges11:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩ MWATHANI
Judges11:24 No ũige kĩrĩa gĩothe Kemoshu ngai yanyu ĩmũheete. Ithuĩ na ithuĩ tũgũthiĩ na mbere kũiga kĩrĩa MWATHANI
Judges11:25 Ũreciiria nĩũrũũgĩĩte Balaki mũrũ wa Ziporu
Judges11:26 Mĩaka magana matatũ Aisiraeli matũũrĩĩte Heshiboni na Aroeri na icagiinĩ iria irigicĩirie
Judges11:27 Ndirĩ ũndũ mũũru ndĩmwĩkĩĩte. Inyuĩ nĩ inyuĩ mũreeka ũũru mũgĩũka gũthondeka mbaara na niĩ. MWATHANI nĩ we mũtũtuithania; ũũmũũthĩ nĩegũtuithania Aisiraeli na Aamoni.”
Judges11:28 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges11:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges11:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges11:31 nĩngaakũrutĩra mũndũ ũrĩa ũgaakorwo arĩ wa mbere kuuma nyũmba kũndũnga ngiuma ũhootaniinĩ ũcio. Ngaakũrutĩra mũndũ ũcio arĩ igongoona rĩa njino.”
Judges11:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jefitha agĩkĩringa rũũĩ akarũe na Aamoni
Judges11:33 Aamahũũrire kuuma Aroeri o nginya kũrĩa gũthiũrũrũkĩirie Minithu
Judges11:34 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges11:35 Ithe amuona agĩtembũranga nguo ciake nĩ kĩeha na akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges11:36 Mũirĩĩtu ũcio agĩĩkĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Judges11:37 No agĩkĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Judges11:38 Ithe agĩkĩmwĩra athiĩ na akĩmũrekereria mĩeri ĩĩrĩ. We na araata aake maathiire bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma na akĩigua kĩeha tondũ aarĩ wa gũkua atarĩ mũhiku na atarĩ na ciana.
Judges11:39 Mĩeri ĩĩrĩ yathira agĩcooka kũrĩ ithe. Ithe agĩgĩĩka naake o ta ũrĩa eehĩtĩĩte mbere ya MWATHANI
Judges11:40 atĩ andũ a nja arĩa eethĩ nĩmoimaga mũciĩ mĩthenya ĩna mwaka o mwaka makarĩrĩre mwarĩ wa Jefitha wa Gileadi.
Judges12:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges12:2 No Jefitha agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges12:3 Rĩrĩa ndoonire atĩ mũtihota gwĩka ũguo-rĩ
Judges12:4 Jefitha agĩkĩũngania andũ oothe a Gileadi makĩhũũrana na andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu
Judges12:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges12:6 maamwĩraga uga “Shibolethu
Judges12:7 Jefitha aatongoririe Aisiraeli mĩaka ĩtandatũ. Agĩcooka agĩkua
Judges12:8 Thuutha wa Jefitha
Judges12:9 Aarĩ na aanake mĩrongo ĩtatũ na airĩĩtu mĩrongo ĩtatũ. Aaheanire airĩĩtu acio aake makahike nja ya mbarĩ yao na agĩcooka akĩoya airĩĩtu angĩ mĩrongo ĩtatũ moimĩĩte nja ya mbarĩ yao nĩ geetha mahikio nĩ aanake aake. Ibizani aatongoririe Aisiraeli mĩaka mũgwanja.
Judges12:10 Agĩcooka agĩkua
Judges12:11 Thuutha wa Ibizani
Judges12:12 Akua aathikirwo Aijaloni itũũra rĩa bũrũri wa Zebuluni.
Judges12:13 Thuutha wa Eloni
Judges12:14 Abidoni aarĩ na aanake mĩrongo ĩna na acũkũrũ mĩrongo ĩtatũ
Judges12:15 Agĩcooka agĩkua
Judges13:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Judges13:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges13:3 Mũraika wa MWATHANI agĩkiumĩrĩra mũtumia ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges13:4 Menyerera ndũkaananyue ndibei o na kana kĩndũ kĩrũrũ
Judges13:5 Kahĩĩ gaaku gaaciarwo-rĩ
Judges13:6 Thuutha ũcio mũtumia ũcio agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthuuriwe akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges13:7 No anjĩĩra atĩ nĩndĩgĩa nda njiare kahĩĩ. Anjĩĩra atĩ ndikaananyue ndibei o na kana kĩndũ kĩrũrũ
Judges13:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Manoa akĩhooya MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Judges13:9 Ngai eekire o ũrĩa Manoa aahoeete
Judges13:10 Agĩkĩhanyũka
Judges13:11 Manoa agĩgĩũkĩra akĩrũmĩrĩra mũtumia wake. Agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũndũ ũcio akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges13:12 Manoa agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges13:13 Mũraika wa MWATHANI agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges13:14 Ndaagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrĩa kĩndũ kiumanĩĩte na thabibũ

Judges13:16 Manoa akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges13:17 Mũraika akĩmooria atĩrĩ

Judges13:20 Manoa agĩkĩĩra mũtumia wake atĩrĩ
Judges13:21 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges13:22 Mũtumia nĩaheirwo kaana ga kahĩĩ

Judges14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges14:2 Acooka mũciĩ akĩĩra ithe na nyina atĩrĩ
Judges14:3 No ithe na nyina makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges14:4 No aciari aake matiamenyaga atĩ nĩ MWATHANI watongoragia Samusoni eeke ũguo
Judges14:5 Kwoguo Samusoni magĩikũrũka Timina marĩ na ithe na nyina. Rĩrĩa maatũikanagĩria mĩgũndainĩ ĩmwe ya mĩthabibũ ya kũu Timina
Judges14:6 O ro rĩmwe roho wa MWATHANI agĩĩkĩra Samusoni hinya
Judges14:7 Thuutha ũcio agĩthiĩ akĩarĩria mũirĩĩtu ũcio
Judges14:8 Matukũ maniini mathira Samusoni agĩcooka kuo nĩguo akamũhikie. Arĩ njĩrainĩ nĩakerũrire akarore kĩimba kĩrĩa kĩa mũrũũthi. Nĩagegearire mũno nĩgũkora njũkĩ irĩ na ũũkĩ thĩinĩ wa kĩimba kĩu.
Judges14:9 Nĩahakũrire ũũkĩ ũcio na mooko
Judges14:10 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Judges14:11 Rĩrĩa Afilisiti maamuonire
Judges14:12 (12-13) Samusoni agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges14:13 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Judges14:14 Mũthenya wa kana wakinya-rĩ
Judges14:15 Mũtumia ũcio agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthuuriwe Samusoni akĩrĩraga
Judges14:16 Mũtumia ũcio aarĩrire nĩ ũndũ wa ũndũ ũcio mĩthenya yothe mũgwanja ya thigũkũ. Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges14:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Judges14:18 Ihinda o rĩu roho wa MWATHANI ũgĩĩkĩra Samusoni hinya
Judges14:19 Mũtumia ũcio wa Samusoni aacookire kũhikio nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa warũũgamĩrĩire Samusoni ũhiki.
Judges15:1 Thuutha ũcio
Judges15:2 Eerire Samusoni atĩrĩ
Judges15:3 Samusoni aacookirie atĩrĩ
Judges15:4 Kwoguo agĩkiuma hau
Judges15:5 Agĩcooka akĩmundia icinga icio na akĩrekereria mbwe icio ithiĩ mĩgũndainĩ ya ngano ya Afilisiti. Na njĩra ĩyo agĩgĩcina ngano ĩrĩa yarĩ ngethe na ĩrĩa ĩtaarĩ ngethe o hamwe na mĩthabibũ na mĩtamaiyũ.
Judges15:6 Rĩrĩa Afilisiti mooririe ũrĩa wekĩĩte ũguo
Judges15:7 Samusoni akĩĩra Afilisiti atĩrĩ
Judges15:8 Agĩkĩmahithũkĩra na marũrũ maingĩ
Judges15:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
