Judges15:14 Makinya Lehi
Judges15:15 Agĩcooka akĩona ihĩndĩ rĩa rũthĩa rwa ndigiri ĩtaakuĩte tene. Akĩinamĩrĩra akĩruoya akĩũraga andũ ngiri imwe naruo (1
Judges15:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Samusoni akĩina atĩrĩ
Judges15:17 Arĩĩkia kũina ũguo
Judges15:18 Thuutha ũcio Samusoni akĩigua anyootiĩ mũno agĩgĩkaĩra MWATHANI akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges15:19 Ngai agĩkĩhingũrania mwatũka warĩ kũu Lehi ũkiuma maaĩ. Samusoni agĩkĩnyua maaĩ macio
Judges15:20 Samusoni atongoririe Aisiraeli mĩaka mĩrongo ĩrĩ o Afilisiti magĩathanaga bũrũriinĩ.
Judges16:1 Mũthenya ũmwe-rĩ
Judges16:2 Rĩrĩa andũ a Gaza maamenyire atĩ Samusoni aarĩ kũu-rĩ
Judges16:3 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges16:4 Thuutha wa ũguo Samusoni nĩmeendanire na mũndũ wa nja wetagwo Delila watũũraga gĩtuamba gĩa Soreku
Judges16:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges16:6 Delila agĩkĩĩra Samusoni atĩrĩ
Judges16:7 Samusoni agĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges16:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio anene a Afilisiti makĩreehere Delila ndigi mũgwanja ta iria itũmagĩrwo gũtunga ũta itoomithĩĩtio
Judges16:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges16:10 Delila agĩcooka akĩĩra Samusoni atĩrĩ
Judges16:11 Samusoni akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Judges16:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Delila akĩoya mĩhĩndo ĩtarĩ yatũmĩrwo akĩmuoha nayo. Agĩcooka akiuga na mũgambo mũnene atĩrĩ
Judges16:13 Delila agĩkĩĩra Samusoni rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Judges16:14 Delila agĩkĩheenereria Samusoni o nginya Samusoni agĩkoma. Akoma-rĩ
Judges16:15 Kwoguo Delila akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges16:16 Na o mũthenya nĩathiaga na mbere kũmũũria. Samusoni nĩaiguire ũũru ngoro o ta angĩkua na akĩnogio nĩ ũhoro ũcio
Judges16:17 o nginya mũthiainĩ akĩmwĩra ũhoro wothe. Aamwĩrire atĩrĩ
Judges16:18 Rĩrĩa Delila aamenyire atĩ Samusoni nĩamwĩra ũhoro wa ma
Judges16:19 Delila nĩaheenereirie Samusoni akomere ciero ciake. Agĩcooka agĩĩta mũndũ mũrũme
Judges16:20 Delila agĩcooka akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene atĩrĩ
Judges16:21 Afilisiti maamũnyiitire makĩmũkũũra maitho. Makĩmũtwara Gaza
Judges16:22 Nacio njuĩrĩ ciake ikĩambĩrĩria gũkũra rĩngĩ.
Judges16:23 Athamaki a Afilisiti makĩũngana hamwe makũngũĩre na marutĩre ngai yao ĩrĩa yetagwo Dagoni igongoona inene. Makĩrũũhia makĩina atĩrĩ
Judges16:24 (24-25) Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges16:25 Samusoni agĩkĩĩra kamwana karĩa kamũnyiitaga guoko atĩrĩ
Judges16:26 Nyũmba ĩyo yaiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ arũme na andũ a nja. Athamaki arĩa ataano a Afilisiti o nao maarĩ thĩinĩ. Ningĩ nĩkwarĩ arũme na andũ a nja ta ngiri ithatũ (300) nyũmba igũrũ arĩa meeroragĩra Samusoni akĩmakenia.
Judges16:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Samusoni akĩhooya Ngai akiuga atĩrĩ
Judges16:28 Samusoni agĩkĩnyiita itugĩ icio cierĩ cia gatagatĩ iria ciarũũgamĩĩtie nyũmba ĩyo. Akĩnyiita o gĩtugĩ na guoko kũmwe
Judges16:29 agĩkaya na mũgambo mũnene
Judges16:30 Aariũ a nyina na andũ a nyũmba yao magĩikũrũka makĩoya kĩimba gĩake magĩkĩambatia magĩgĩthika mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ya ithe Manoa gatagatĩ ka Zora na Eshitaoli. Samusoni aatongoririe Aisiraeli mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
Judges17:1 Rĩmwe tene mũno nĩkwarĩ mũndũ wetagwo Mika
Judges17:2 Mũndũ ũcio agĩkĩĩra nyina atĩrĩ
Judges17:3 Naake nĩacookeirie nyina icunjĩ icio cia betha
Judges17:4 Naake agĩcookeria nyina icunjĩ icio cia betha. Naake nyina akĩoya icunjĩ magana meerĩ (200) agĩcinengera mũturi wa betha. Naake mũturi wa betha agĩthondeka mũhianano kuuma mũtĩinĩ na akĩũhumbĩra na betha. Mũhianano ũcio ũkĩigwo thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya Mika.
Judges17:5 Mũndũ ũcio wetagwo Mika aarĩ na handũ ha kũhooyagĩrwo. Nĩathondekire mĩhianano o na ebodi
Judges17:6 Na tondũ gũtiarĩ mũthamaki kũu bũrũri wa Isiraeli mahinda macio
Judges17:7 Mahindainĩ o ro macio
Judges17:8 Mũlawii ũcio nĩoimire Bethilehemu agĩthiĩ gũcaria kũngĩ gwa gũtũũra. Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges17:9 Naake Mika akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges17:10 Mika akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges17:11 Mũlawii ũcio mwĩthĩ nĩetĩkĩrire gũikarania na Mika na agĩtuĩka ta mũũrũwe.
Judges17:12 Mika nĩakĩmũtuire mũthĩnjĩri ngai wake
Judges17:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges18:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges18:2 Kwoguo andũ a Dani magĩthuura andũ ataano njamba kuuma mĩciĩ yothe ya mũhĩrĩga ũcio
Judges18:3 Na marĩ kũu magĩkũũrana mwarĩrie wa Mũlawii ũcio mwĩthĩ
Judges18:4 Naake agĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges18:5 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Judges18:6 Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges18:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ acio ataano njoorua makiuma kũu magĩthiĩ itũũra rĩa Laishi. Nĩmoonire ũrĩa andũ acio maatũũraga mehandĩĩte wega na marĩ na thaayũ o ta Asidoni. Maarĩ andũ a thaayũ
Judges18:8 Rĩrĩa andũ acio ataano macookire Zora na Eshitaoli
Judges18:9 Nao maamacookeirie atĩrĩ
Judges18:10 Mwakinya kuo mũgũkora andũ matekũagĩra ũndũ. Nĩ bũrũri mwariĩ
Judges18:11 Kwoguo andũ magana matandatũ (600) a mũhĩrĩga wa Dani makiuma Zora na Eshitaoli maikaraga mehaarĩirie kũrũa.
Judges18:12 Makĩambata magĩaka kambĩ ciao mwena wa ithũiro wa Kiriathu Jearimu o kũu bũrũriinĩ wa Juda
Judges18:13 Kuuma kũu magĩthiĩ magĩkinya kwa Mika mũciĩ o kũu bũrũri ũrĩa wĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu.
Judges18:14 Nao andũ acio ataano arĩa maathiĩte gũthigaana bũrũri wa Laishi makĩĩra thiritũ ciao atĩrĩ
Judges18:15 Kwoguo magĩthiĩ kwa Mika mũciĩ o harĩa Mũlawii ũcio mwĩthĩ aikaraga makĩmũũria ũrĩa maũndũ maake marathiĩ.
Judges18:16 Ihinda rĩu thigari iria magana matandatũ cia Dani ciaikaraga ciĩhaarĩirie kũrũa.
Judges18:17 Thigari irĩa ithaano igĩthiĩ igĩtoonya nyũmba ikĩoya mũhianano ũcio wahakĩtwo betha ndwekie na mĩhianano ĩrĩa ĩngĩ o na ebodi; na hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthĩnjĩri Ngai aarĩ o kĩhingoinĩ hamwe na thigari iria magana matandatũ ciehaarĩirie gũthiĩ mbaara.
Judges18:18 Rĩrĩa arũme acio maatoonyire nyũmba kwa Mika na makĩoya indo icio theru
Judges18:19 Nao makĩmwĩra
Judges18:20 Ũndũ ũcio nĩwakenirie mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio mũno
Judges18:21 Makĩhũndũka makĩambĩrĩria gũthiĩ matongoretio nĩ ciana ciao
Judges18:22 Maakoreetwo mathiĩte itĩĩna rĩega kuuma mũciĩ ũcio
Judges18:23 makĩmakaĩrĩria. Andũ a Dani makĩĩhũgũra makĩũria Mika atĩrĩ
Judges18:24 Naake Mika agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges18:25 Andũ a Dani makiuga atĩrĩ
Judges18:26 Nao magĩĩthiĩra. Naake akĩona atĩ andũ acio maarĩ na hinya kũmũkĩra
Judges18:27 (27-28) Marĩĩkia kuoya mũthĩnjĩri Ngai o na mĩhianano ĩrĩa Mika aathondekeete
Judges18:28 Nĩmaagarũrire rĩĩtwa rĩarĩo kuuma Laishi makĩrĩĩta Dani
Judges18:29 Andũ a Dani nao makĩhanda mũhianano ũcio nĩ geetha ũhooyagwo. Naake Jonathani mũrũ wa Gerishoni na mũcũkũrũ wa Musa agĩtungata arĩ mũthĩnjĩri Ngai wa mũhĩrĩga wa Dani na ningĩ njiarwa ciake igĩthiĩ na mbere gũtungata ta athĩnjĩri Ngai aao o nginya rĩrĩa maatahirwo magĩthaamio kuuma bũrũri ũcio.
Judges18:30 Mũhianano ũcio Mika aathondekeete waikarire kuo ihinda rĩothe rĩrĩa Hema ya Ngai yaikarire Shilo.
Judges19:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Judges19:2 Mũirĩĩtu ũcio nĩaraakaririo nĩ we
Judges19:3 Thuutha ũcio mũthuuriwe agĩthiĩ kũmũcaria na kũmũringĩrĩria macooke naake. Mũlawii ũcio aathiire na ndungata yake na ndigiri igĩrĩ. Rĩrĩa aakinyire kuo mũirĩĩtu ũcio nĩamũtoonyirie mũciĩ
Judges19:4 Ithe wa mũirĩĩtu ũcio nĩaringĩrĩirie Mũlawii ũcio aikarange
Judges19:5 Mũthenya wa kana rũũciinĩ tene
Judges19:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio

Judges19:9 Rĩrĩa Mũlawii
Judges19:10 (10-11) No rĩĩrĩ
Judges19:11 (12-13) No rĩĩrĩ
Judges19:12 Kwoguo makĩhĩtũka Jebusi magĩthiĩ na mbere na rũgendo rwao. Riũa rĩgĩthũa nĩguo makinyaga itũũra rĩa Gibea bũrũriinĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini.
Judges19:13 Magĩgĩkerũra mathiĩ makaraarĩre kuo. Magĩgĩtoonya itũũra magĩthiĩ magĩikara thĩ o kĩhaaroinĩ
Judges19:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Judges19:15 Mũthuuri ũcio mũkũrũ oona mũgeni arĩ kĩhaaroinĩ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Judges19:16 Naake Mũlawii agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Judges19:17 Ithuĩ tũrĩ na indo ciothe iria tũbataire. Tũrĩ na irio nĩ ũndũ wa ndigiri ciitũ o na rũũa rwa gũkomerwo nĩcio
Judges19:18 Mũthuuri ũcio akĩmeera atĩrĩ “Gĩani na thaayũ! Ũkaai tũthiĩ mũciĩ gwakwa
Judges19:19 Nĩamatwarire mũciĩ gwake na akĩhe ndigiri ciao irio. Ageni aake nao magĩĩthamba magũrũ
Judges19:20 Nĩgwĩkenia meekenagia rĩrĩa andũ amwe aaganu mũno a itũũra rĩu maathiũrũrũkĩirie nyũmba makĩambĩrĩria kũhũũrahũũra mũrango
Judges19:21 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges19:22 Mũtumia wa kũigwo wa mũndũ ũcio na mũirĩĩtu wakwa
Judges19:23 No rĩĩrĩ
Judges19:24 Rũũciinĩ riũa rĩkĩratha mũtumia ũcio agĩũka akĩgũa mũrangoinĩ wa nyũmba ya mũthuuri ũcio mũkũrũ kũrĩa mũthuuriwe aarĩ; na gwakĩire arĩ o hau.

Judges19:26 Agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

Judges20:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Benjamini nĩmaiguire atĩ Aisiraeli arĩa angĩ oothe nĩmaacookanĩrĩire kũu Mizipa.Aisiraeli mooririe atĩrĩ

Judges20:14 Moimũrũrũkire matũũra moothe ma bũrũri wa Benjamini magĩthiĩ Gibea makarũe na andũ arĩa angĩ a Isiraeli.

Judges20:19 Maathiire kũhithũkĩra ita cia andũ a Benjamini
Judges20:20 Mbũtũ cia ita cia Benjamini ikiuma nja ya itũũra
Judges20:21 (22-23) Thuutha ũcio
Judges20:22 Igĩkĩhithũkĩra mbũtũ cia ita cia Abenjamini riita rĩa keerĩ.

Judges20:24 Thuutha ũcio andũ oothe a Isiraeli magĩkĩambata Betheli makĩrĩra na magĩikara o hau mbere ya MWATHANI

Judges20:33 Andũ a Benjamini magĩkĩona atĩ nĩmaatoorio.

Ruth1:4 Nao Mahaloni na Kilioni magĩcooka magĩkua

Ruth1:13 Nao makĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra o rĩngĩ. Naake Oripa akĩmumunya nyaciarawe

Ruth4:20 Aminadabu aarĩ ithe wa Nahashoni
Ruth4:21 Salimoni aarĩ ithe wa Boazu
Ruth4:22 Obedi aarĩ ithe wa Jesii
1Samuel1:1 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe tene mũno nĩkwarĩ mũthuuri ũmwe wetagwo Elikana
1Samuel1:2 Elikana aarĩ na atumia eerĩ
1Samuel1:3 Mwaka o mwaka Elikana nĩoimaga Rama akaambata Shilo gũthaathaiya na kũrutĩra MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe magongoona. Nao aariũ a Eli eerĩ
1Samuel1:4 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yothe Elikana aruta igongoona
1Samuel1:5 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel1:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel1:7 Ũndũ ũyũ wekĩkaga mwaka o mwaka; rĩrĩa rĩothe mathiĩ nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI
1Samuel1:8 Mũthuuriwe Elikana agakĩmũũragia atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:9 (9-10) Mũthenya ũmwe
1Samuel1:10 Hana akĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:11 Hana agĩkĩrũmanĩrĩria kũhooya MWATHANI
1Samuel1:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel1:13 agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:14 No Hana akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:15 Ndũkaae gwĩciiria ndĩ mũtumia ũtarĩ kĩene; ngũhooyaga ũguo tondũ ndĩmũtangĩku mũno.”
1Samuel1:16 Eli agĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:17 Naake Hana akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:18 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũũciinĩ tene
1Samuel1:19 Agĩkĩgĩa nda agĩciara kaana ga kahĩĩ
1Samuel1:20 Mahinda nĩmaagĩkinyire o rĩngĩ ma Elikana na mũciĩ wake gũthiĩ Shilo akarutĩre MWATHANI igongoona rĩa mwaka o mwaka
1Samuel1:21 Hingo ĩyo Hana ndaigana gũthiĩ. Eerire mũthuuriwe atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:22 Elikana akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:23 Arĩĩkia kũmũtigithia kuonga
1Samuel1:24 Marĩĩkia gũthĩnja ndeegwa ĩyo
1Samuel1:25 Hana akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel1:26 Ndamũhooire mwana ũyũ
1Samuel1:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Samuel2:1 Hana akĩhooya atĩrĩ
1Samuel2:2 “Gũtirĩ ũngĩ mũtheru ta MWATHANI
1Samuel2:3 Tigaai mwĩtĩĩo ũcio wanyu; mũtikaarie ciugo cia mwĩgaatho.Tondũ MWATHANI nĩ Ngai ũũĩ maũndũ; nĩ we ũcũũranagia ũrĩa andũ meekaga.
1Samuel2:4 Moota ma thigari irĩ hinya nĩmoinĩkangu
1Samuel2:5 Arĩa maarĩ ahũũnu-rĩ
1Samuel2:6 MWATHANI nĩ we ũũraganaga
1Samuel2:7 Nĩ we ũtuaga andũ amwe athĩĩni na arĩa angĩ itonga; akanyiihia amwe na arĩa angĩ akamatũũgĩria.
1Samuel2:8 Ooyaga mũthĩĩni na igũrũ akamũruta rũkũngũinĩ
1Samuel2:9 “Agitagĩra mĩoyo ya arĩa mamwĩhokeete
1Samuel2:10 Thũ cia MWATHANI nĩikaaniinwo; agaacirurumĩria marurumĩ arĩ matuinĩ.MWATHANI nĩagaaciirithia thĩ yothe; nĩakaahe mũthamaki wake hinya
1Samuel2:11 Naake Elikana akĩinũka gwake mũciĩ Rama
1Samuel2:12 (12-13) Aariũ a Eli maarĩ aaganu mũno
1Samuel2:13 ĩgaikia hũũma nyũngũinĩ
1Samuel2:14 Ningĩ-rĩ
1Samuel2:15 Mũndũ ũcio angĩacookirie atĩrĩ
1Samuel2:16 Wĩhia ũcio wa aariũ a Eli warĩ mũũru mũno maithoinĩ ma MWATHANI
1Samuel2:17 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel2:18 Mwaka o mwaka nyina nĩamũtumagĩra nguo ndaaya akamũtwarĩra hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maambatanagia na mũthuuriwe
1Samuel2:19 Naake Eli nĩaraathimaga Elikana na mũtumia wake
1Samuel2:20 Naake MWATHANI akĩraathima Hana
1Samuel2:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel2:22 Kwoguo akĩmooria atĩrĩ
1Samuel2:23 Tiganaai na mĩtugo ĩyo
1Samuel2:24 Mũndũ angĩhĩtĩria mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ-rĩ
1Samuel2:25 Nako kamwana kau ti Samũeli gagĩkĩrĩrĩria gũkũra
1Samuel2:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel2:27 Mĩhĩrĩgainĩ yothe ya Isiraeli nĩndathuurire andũ a mũciĩ wake matuĩke athĩnjĩri Ngai aakwa
1Samuel2:28 Rĩu-rĩ
1Samuel2:29 Niĩ
1Samuel2:30 Tathikĩrĩria
1Samuel2:31 “Nawe nĩũrĩona thĩĩna o na ũigue ũiru nĩ ũndũ wa iraathimo iria ndĩrĩraathima andũ arĩa angĩ a Isiraeli nacio
1Samuel2:32 No nĩngũtũũria mũndũ ũmwe wa njiarwa ciaku muoyo
1Samuel2:33 Rĩrĩa aariũ aaku eerĩ Hofini na Finehasi magaakua mũthenya o ro ũmwe
1Samuel2:34 Nĩngaathuura mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa ũgaakorwo arĩ mwĩhokeku harĩ niĩ
1Samuel2:35 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel3:1 Matukũinĩ macio
1Samuel3:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel3:3 Naake Samũeli aakomeete Hekaarũinĩ thĩinĩ
1Samuel3:4 MWATHANI agĩĩtana atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:5 Agĩgĩteng'era kwĩ Eli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:6 (6-7) MWATHANI agĩĩta Samũeli rĩngĩ. Kamwana kau gatiigana kũmenya atĩ nĩ MWATHANI wageetaga
1Samuel3:7 MWATHANI agĩĩta Samũeli riita rĩa gatatũ. Naake agĩũkĩra
1Samuel3:8 Kwoguo agĩkeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:9 MWATHANI agĩthiĩ akĩrũũgama hau
1Samuel3:10 MWATHANI agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:11 Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ
1Samuel3:12 “Nĩ gũkorwo nĩndĩmwĩrĩĩte atĩ nĩngũtũũra herithagia mũciĩ wake tene na tene
1Samuel3:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Samuel3:14 Samũeli agĩgĩikara gĩtandainĩ nginya o rũũciinĩ. Agĩcooka agĩũkĩra
1Samuel3:15 No Eli akĩmwĩta atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:16 Eli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:17 Kwoguo Samũeli agĩkĩmwĩra maũndũ moothe; ndamũhithire ũndũ o na ũmwe. Eli agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel3:18 Samũeli agĩgĩkũra
1Samuel3:19 Kwoguo andũ oothe bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Isiraeli
1Samuel3:20 MWATHANI akĩrũmanĩrĩria kwĩyonithania kũu Shilo

1Samuel4:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel4:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Afilisiti maiguire mbugĩrĩrio ĩyo makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel4:7 makĩigua guoya mũno
1Samuel4:8 Nũũ ũngĩgĩtũhonokia kuuma kũrĩ ngai icio i na hinya ũguo? Ngai icio nĩcio cioragire Amisiri werũinĩ!
1Samuel4:9 Mwĩyũmĩrĩriei Afilisiti aya! Rũaai ta arũme ki! Kwaga ũguo
1Samuel4:10 Afilisiti magĩkĩrũa na hinya ma
1Samuel4:11 Narĩo Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa Ngai rĩgĩtahwo
1Samuel4:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel4:13 Eli agĩkorwo aikarĩire gĩtĩ mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra acũũthĩrĩirie
1Samuel4:14 Rĩrĩa Eli aiguire inegene rĩu
1Samuel4:15 (Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel4:16 Mũndũ ũcio agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel4:17 Naake mũndũ ũcio wareeheete ũhoro agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel4:18 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio aagwetire Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro
1Samuel4:19 Ningĩ mũtumia wa mũũrũwe Finehasi aarĩ na nda
1Samuel4:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel4:21 Naake agĩtua kaana kau Ikabodu
1Samuel4:22 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel5:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel5:2 Maarĩigire hekaarũinĩ ya ngai yao yetagwo Dagoni
1Samuel5:3 Rĩrĩa andũ a Ashidodu maarookire gũũkĩra kĩrooko tene
1Samuel5:4 Kwarooka gũkĩa
1Samuel5:5 (Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo ũtũmaga athĩnjĩri ngai a Dagoni na arĩa oothe mathaathayagia ngai ĩyo kũu Ashidodu maage gũkinya handũ hau na ikinya
1Samuel5:6 MWATHANI akĩherithia andũ a Ashidodu mũno na akĩmeekĩra guoya. Aamaherithirie hamwe na andũ arĩa maarigainie nao na gũtũma magĩe na mũrimũ wa ngaaĩ.
1Samuel5:7 Rĩrĩa moonire ũrĩa gwekĩkaga makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel5:8 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩtũmana anene oothe ataano a Afilisiti meetwo
1Samuel5:9 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel5:10 Kwoguo magĩgĩthaamĩria Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa MWATHANI Ekironi
1Samuel5:11 Tondũ ũcio
1Samuel5:12 O na arĩa mataigana gũkua nĩmaanyiitirwo nĩ mũrimũ wa ngaaĩ
1Samuel6:1 Thuutha wa Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI gũikara bũrũriinĩ wa Afilisiti mĩeri mũgwanja
1Samuel6:2 Afilisiti magĩĩta athĩnjĩri nga ciao na aragũri makĩmooria atĩrĩ
1Samuel6:3 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel6:4 Andũ makĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel6:5 No nginya mũthondeke tũmĩhianano tũu twa ngaaĩ na twa tũbĩa tũu tũranyariira bũrũri wanyu
1Samuel6:6 Mũgũkĩũmia ngoro cianyu ta ũrĩa mũthamaki wa Misiri na Amisiri moomirie ngoro ciao nĩkĩ? Tondũ-rĩ
1Samuel6:7 Tondũ ũcio thondekaai ngaari njerũ. Mũcooke muoe ng'ombe igĩrĩ itarĩ ciekĩrwo icooki mũcioherere ngaariinĩ ĩyo
1Samuel6:8 Mũcooke muoe Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI mũrĩigĩrĩre igũrũ wa ngaari ĩyo. Natuo tũmĩhianano twa thahabu tũrĩa mũkũmũtwarĩra tũrĩ kĩheeo gĩa kũhoroheria meehia maanyu mũtwĩkĩre gathandũkũinĩ
1Samuel6:9 Mũbaare na kũrĩa ĩgũthiĩ; ĩngĩthiĩ ĩroreete itũũra rĩa Bethi Shemeshi
1Samuel6:10 Nao andũ magĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa meerirwo; makĩoya ng'ombe igĩrĩ igũkamwo magĩcioherera ngaariinĩ
1Samuel6:11 Makĩigĩrĩra Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro ngaari igũrũ
1Samuel6:12 Ng'ombe icio ikĩgwata njĩra iroreete Bethi Shemeshi itegũkerũra na kũngĩ. Ciathiaga ikĩanagia. Nao anene a Afilisiti magĩcirũmĩrĩra nginya mũhakainĩ wa Bethi Shemeshi.
1Samuel6:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel6:14 Nayo ngaari ĩyo ĩgĩkinya mũgũnda wa mũndũ wetagwo Joshua
1Samuel6:15 Nao Alawii makĩruta Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI na gathandũkũ karĩa kaarĩ na tũmĩhianano twa thahabu
1Samuel6:16 Nao anene acio ataano a Afilisiti moona ũguo
1Samuel6:17 Afilisiti maatwarire mĩhianano ĩyo ĩtaano ya ngaaĩ ĩthondekeetwo na thahabu kũrĩ MWATHANI ĩrĩ ta kĩheeo gĩa kũhoroheria meehia maao. O mũhianano warũũgamagĩrĩra o itũũra rĩa matũũra maao marĩa mataano
1Samuel6:18 O natuo tũbĩa twa thahabu tũrĩa maatũmire twaiganaga o ta ũrĩa matũũra marĩa maathagwo nĩ anene acio ataano a Afilisiti maiganaga
1Samuel6:19 Naake MWATHANI akĩũraga andũ mĩrongo mũgwanja a Bethi Shemeshi nĩ ũndũ nĩmaarorire thĩinĩ wa Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Nao andũ makĩrĩra mũno nĩ kĩeha
1Samuel6:20 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Samuel6:21 Magĩkĩrekia andũ mathiĩ kũrĩ andũ a Kiriathu Jearimu makoige atĩrĩ
1Samuel7:1 Kwoguo andũ a Kiriathu Jearimu makĩgĩĩra Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI
1Samuel7:2 Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩgĩikara Kiriathu Jearimu ihinda iraaya
1Samuel7:3 Samũeli agĩkĩĩra andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel7:4 Kwoguo Aisiraeli magĩkĩeheria mĩhianano yao ya Baali na Ashitorathu
1Samuel7:5 Ningĩ Samũeli akĩrekanĩria Aisiraeli oothe macemanie Mizipa
1Samuel7:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩcemania oothe Mizipa

1Samuel8:10 Samũeli agĩkĩĩra andũ acio mamwĩtagia mũthamaki maũndũ moothe marĩa MWATHANI aamwĩrĩĩte.
1Samuel8:11 Akĩmataarĩria atĩrĩ
1Samuel8:12 Ningĩ nĩagaatua amwe aao anene a thigari ngiri
1Samuel8:13 Nao airĩĩtu aanyu akaamatua a kũmũthondekagĩra maguta marĩa manungaga wega
1Samuel8:14 Ningĩ nĩakooya mĩgũnda yanyu ĩrĩa mĩega
1Samuel8:15 Nĩakooya gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa irio cianyu na gĩa thabibũ cianyu
1Samuel8:16 Nĩakooya ndungata cianyu
1Samuel8:17 Ningĩ nĩakooya gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi kĩa mahiũ maanyu
1Samuel8:18 Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩu rĩgaakinya
1Samuel8:19 No rĩĩrĩ

1Samuel9:4 Nao magĩtuĩkanĩria bũrũri wothe ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu
1Samuel9:5 Rĩrĩa maakinyire rũgongo rwa Zufu
1Samuel9:6 Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ

1Samuel9:10 (12-13) Airĩĩtu acio magĩcookia atĩrĩ

1Samuel9:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel9:13 “Rũũciũ mathaa ta maya nĩngaakũreehithĩria mũndũ wa kuuma mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini
1Samuel9:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Samũeli oonire Saũlũ
1Samuel9:15 Naake Saũlũ agĩgĩthiĩ he Samũeli
1Samuel9:16 Samũeli agĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:17 Naho ha ũhoro wa ndigiri iria ciorire mĩthenya ĩtatũ mĩthiru-rĩ
1Samuel9:18 Saũlũ agĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:19 Naake Samũeli agĩtoonyia Saũlũ na ndungata yake nyũmba ĩrĩa yarĩagĩrwo akĩmaikaria handũ ha gĩtĩĩo mũno meethainĩ hamwe na andũ arĩa meetĩĩtwo
1Samuel9:20 Samũeli agĩkĩĩra mũrugi wa irio atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:21 Kwoguo mũrugi wa irio agĩkĩreehe nyama ĩyo ya guoko na kĩande akĩmĩiga mbere ya Saũlũ. Samũeli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel9:22 Rĩrĩa maikũrũkire kuuma handũ harĩa hatũũgĩru haathaathayagĩrio
1Samuel9:23 naake agĩgĩkoma ho.
1Samuel9:24 Na rĩrĩa maakinyire mũthiainĩ wa itũũra
1Samuel10:1 Naake Samũeli akĩoya cuuba ya maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ agĩitĩrĩria Saũlũ mũtwe
1Samuel10:2 Twatigana nawe ũũmũũthĩ
1Samuel10:3 Ningĩ wathiathia
1Samuel10:4 Nĩmarĩkũgeithia na makũhe mĩgate ĩĩrĩ
1Samuel10:5 Thuutha wa ũguo ũkinye kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Ngai kĩrĩa kĩrĩ Gibea
1Samuel10:6 Nĩũrĩiyũrwo nĩ roho wa MWATHANI o rĩmwe
1Samuel10:7 Rĩrĩa maũndũ maya marĩĩkĩka
1Samuel10:8 Nĩũrĩcooka ũthiĩ Giligali mbere yakwa
1Samuel10:9 Na rĩĩrĩ

1Samuel10:11 Andũ arĩa maamũũĩ mbere ĩyo
1Samuel10:12 Mũndũ ũmwe watũũraga handũ hau akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:13 Saũlũ arĩĩkia kũratha moohoro
1Samuel10:14 Naake maamawe akĩmuona me na ndungata yake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:15 Maamawe akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:16 Saũlũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:17 Naake Samũeli agĩgĩĩta andũ moongane hamwe mbere ya MWATHANI kũu Mizipa
1Samuel10:18 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:19 Nĩ niĩ Ngai wanyu
1Samuel10:20 Tondũ ũcio Samũeli agĩkĩreehithia mũhĩrĩga o mũhĩrĩga hau mbere
1Samuel10:21 Ningĩ agĩkĩreehareehithia mbarĩ cia mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini ĩmwe kwa ĩmwe
1Samuel10:22 makĩũria MWATHANI atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:23 Kwoguo magĩgĩteng'era makĩmũgĩĩra makĩmũreehe mbere ya andũ
1Samuel10:24 Samũeli akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel10:25 Samũeli agĩgĩtaarĩria andũ ihooto na mawĩra ma mũthamaki
1Samuel10:26 O naake Saũlũ akĩinũka mũciĩ gwake Gibea. Nao andũ amwe arĩa maarĩ hinya
1Samuel10:27 No andũ amwe mataarĩ kĩene makiuga atĩrĩ

1Samuel11:2 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:3 Nao atongoria a Jabeshi makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:4 Nao arekio acio magĩkinya Gibea kũrĩa Saũlũ aatũũraga
1Samuel11:5 Ihinda rĩu Saũlũ nĩ kuuma oimaga mũgũnda arũmĩrĩire ndeegwa cia kũrĩma. Akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:6 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ aiguire ndeto icio
1Samuel11:7 Agĩkĩoya ndeegwa igĩrĩ
1Samuel11:8 Naake agĩcookanĩrĩria andũ kũu Bezeku: arĩa moimĩĩte Isiraeli maarĩ ngiri magana matatũ (300
1Samuel11:9 Magĩkĩĩra andũ arĩa marekeetio kuuma Jabeshi atĩrĩ

1Samuel11:11 Mũthenya ũcio ũngĩ
1Samuel11:12 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩũria Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:13 No Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:14 Naake Samũeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel11:15 Kwoguo oothe magĩgĩthiĩ Giligali
1Samuel12:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel12:2 na rĩu mwĩ naake amũtongoragie. Niĩ ndĩ gũkũra na ndaagĩa mbuĩ
1Samuel12:3 “Rĩu ndĩ haaha mbere yanyu. Angĩkorwo ndaneeka ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ mũũru
1Samuel12:4 Nao andũ makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:5 Samũeli agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:6 Samũeli agĩthiĩ na mbere kũmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:7 “Tondũ ũcio rũũgamaai o hau mũrĩ
1Samuel12:8 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jakubu na mũciĩ wake maathiire Misiri na makĩhinyĩrĩrio nĩ Amisiri acio
1Samuel12:9 No andũ makĩriganĩrwo nĩ MWATHANI Ngai wao
1Samuel12:10 Magĩkaĩra MWATHANI amateithie makiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:11 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩmũrekeria Gideoni
1Samuel12:12 No rĩrĩa mwonire mũthamaki Nahashu wa Aamoni agĩũka kũmũtharĩkĩra-rĩ
1Samuel12:13 “Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel12:14 Maũndũ moothe nĩmarĩmwagagĩrĩra angĩkorwo inyuĩ na mũthamaki wanyu nĩmũrĩtĩĩaga MWATHANI Ngai wanyu
1Samuel12:15 No mũngĩkaaga gũthikĩrĩria MWATHANI na mwage gwathĩkĩra maathani maake
1Samuel12:16 Tondũ ũcio
1Samuel12:17 Githĩ rĩu ti ihinda rĩa magetha ma ngano? Nĩngũhooya
1Samuel12:18 Kwoguo Samũeli akĩhooya
1Samuel12:19 Nao magĩkĩĩra Samũeli atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:20 Samũeli akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel12:21 Mũtikaarũmĩrĩre ngai cia mĩhianano; itingĩmũteithia o na kana imũhonokie nĩ ũndũ nĩ cia tũhũ.
1Samuel12:22 MWATHANI ndakaamũtiganĩria tondũ nĩeranĩire na mwĩhĩtwa nĩakaamũtua andũ aake kĩũmbe nĩ geetha mũndũ o wothe amenye atĩ Ngai nĩ mũnene.
1Samuel12:23 Ha ũhoro wakwa niĩ mwene-rĩ
1Samuel12:24 Athĩkagĩraai MWATHANI na mũmũtungatagĩre mũrĩ ehokeku na ngoro yanyu yothe. Ririkanagaai maũndũ manene marĩa aanamwĩkĩra.
1Samuel12:25 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel13:2 Saũlũ agĩgĩthuura arũme ngiri ithatũ (3
1Samuel13:3 Naake Jonathani akĩũraga mũnene wa kambĩ ya Afilisiti ĩrĩa yarĩ Geba
1Samuel13:4 Aisiraeli oothe makĩmenyithio atĩ Saũlũ nĩoragĩĩte mũnene wa kambĩ ya Afilisiti
1Samuel13:5 Nao Afilisiti magĩkĩũngana nĩguo makahũũrane na Aisiraeli; maarĩ na ngiri mĩrongo ĩtatũ (30
1Samuel13:6 Rĩrĩa andũ a Aisiraeli moonire atĩ me handũ hooru mũno
1Samuel13:7 Arĩa angĩ makĩringa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani magĩthiĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Gadi na Gileadi.Naake Saũlũ aarĩ o Giligali
1Samuel13:8 Agĩgĩeterera Samũeli mĩthenya mũgwanja ta ũrĩa aamwathĩĩte
1Samuel13:9 Kwoguo akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel13:11 No we Samũeli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:12 Kwoguo ndagĩciiria atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:13 Samũeli agĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel13:14 No rĩu
1Samuel13:15 Naake Samũeli akiuma Giligali agĩthiĩ Gibea itũũra rĩarĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Benjamini. Naake Saũlũ agĩgĩtara andũ arĩa aarĩ nao hau
1Samuel13:16 Saũlũ na mũũrũwe Jonathani na andũ arĩa maarĩ hamwe nao makĩamba hema ciao Geba kũrĩa kwarĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Benjamini
1Samuel13:17 Nacio thigari cia Afilisiti igĩkiuma kambĩinĩ yacio irĩ ikundi ithatũ igĩthiĩ igĩtharĩkagĩra ta ũũ: gĩkundi kĩa mbere gĩgĩthiĩ kĩerekeire Ofira kũrĩa kwarĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Shuali
1Samuel13:18 gĩa keerĩ nakĩo gĩgĩthiĩ kĩerekeire Bethi Horoni
1Samuel13:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel13:20 (20-21) (Aisiraeli maathiaga kũrĩ Afilisiti makanoorerwo mĩraaũ
1Samuel13:21 Na kwoguo mũthenya wa mbaara gũtiarĩ mũthigari o na ũmwe Mũisiraeli warĩ na rũhiũ kana itimũ tiga Saũlũ na mũũrũwe Jonathani.
1Samuel13:22 Afilisiti magĩkĩrekia mbũtũ ya thigari ĩkagitĩre mwanya wa Mikimashi.
1Samuel14:1 Mũthenya ũmwe Jonathani mũrũ wa Saũlũ akĩĩra mwanake ũrĩa wamũkuuagĩra indo ciake cia mbaara atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:2 ũrĩa waikarĩĩte rungu rwa mũkongomanga kũu Migironi
1Samuel14:3 (Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũrĩa waakuĩĩte ebodi eetagwo Ahija
1Samuel14:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel14:5 Rũmwe rwarĩ na mwena wa na rũgongo wa mwanya ũcio
1Samuel14:6 Jonathani akĩĩra mwanake ũcio atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:7 Mwanake ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:8 Jonathani akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:9 Mangĩtwĩra tũmeeterere mooke kũrĩ ithuĩ
1Samuel14:10 No mangĩtwĩra tũthiĩ kũrĩ o
1Samuel14:11 Kwoguo magĩkĩreka Afilisiti mamoone
1Samuel14:12 Nao magĩgĩĩta Jonathani na mwanake ũcio makĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:13 Naake Jonathani akĩhaicĩrĩra akiuma mwanyainĩ akurumĩĩte
1Samuel14:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ya mbere
1Samuel14:15 Gũgĩkĩgĩa na kĩmako kĩnene kambĩinĩ ya Afilisiti na mĩgũndainĩ; o nao acio maathiaga gũtharĩkĩra na gũtaha indo
1Samuel14:16 Nao arangĩri a Saũlũ me kũu Gibea
1Samuel14:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Samuel14:18 Naake Saũlũ akĩĩra Ahija ũrĩa mũthĩnjĩri Ngai atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:19 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Saũlũ aaragĩria mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
1Samuel14:20 Naake Saũlũ na andũ aake oothe magĩthiĩ mbaarainĩ makahũũrane na Afilisiti
1Samuel14:21 Nao Ahibirania arĩa maarĩ mwena wa Afilisiti
1Samuel14:22 Nao arĩa angĩ meehithĩĩte irĩmainĩ cia Efiraimu
1Samuel14:23 makĩmahũũra makĩmahĩtũkia Bethaveni. Ũguo nĩguo MWATHANI aahonokirie Aisiraeli mũthenya ũcio.
1Samuel14:24 Nao Aisiraeli nĩmoorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya mũno mũthenya ũcio nĩ ũndũ wa kũhũũta
1Samuel14:25 Nao andũ acio oothe magĩtoonya mũtitũinĩ
1Samuel14:26 Mũtitũ ũcio waiyũrĩĩte ũũkĩ
1Samuel14:27 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel14:28 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel14:29 Naake Jonathani agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:30 Kũngĩkĩrĩ wega atĩa ũũmũũthĩ korwo andũ aitũ nĩkũrĩa maarĩire irio iria maratahire rĩrĩa marahootire thũ ciao. Teciiriei nĩ Afilisiti aigana mangĩũragĩĩte!”
1Samuel14:31 Mũthenya ũcio Aisiraeli magĩkĩhoota Afilisiti
1Samuel14:32 Kwoguo magĩteng'erera indo iria maatahĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciao
1Samuel14:33 Naake Saũlũ agĩkĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:34 Agĩcooka agĩathana rĩngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:35 Naake Saũlũ agĩakĩra MWATHANI kĩgongoona; kĩu nĩkĩo kĩarĩ kĩgongoona gĩake kĩa mbere gwakĩra MWATHANI.
1Samuel14:36 Saũlũ agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ aake atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:37 Kwoguo Saũlũ agĩkĩũria Ngai atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:38 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ agĩkĩĩra atongoria a andũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:39 Nĩndehĩta na MWATHANI ũrĩa ũtũũraga muoyo
1Samuel14:40 Kwoguo Saũlũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:41 Naake Saũlũ agĩkĩũria MWATHANI
1Samuel14:42 Saũlũ agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:43 Saũlũ agĩkĩũria Jonathani atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:44 Saũlũ agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:45 Nao andũ makĩũria Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel14:46 Thuutha ũcio Saũlũ agĩtiga kũteng'eria Afilisiti
1Samuel14:47 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel14:48 Agĩkĩrũa na ũcamba nginya agĩtooria o na Aamaleki. Akĩhonokia Aisiraeli kuuma kũrĩ arĩa matahaga indo ciao.
1Samuel14:49 Aariũ a Saũlũ maarĩ Jonathani
1Samuel14:50 Mũtumia wake eetagwo Ahinoamu mwarĩ wa Ahimaazu. Mũnene wa mbũtũ ciake cia ita eetagwo Abineri mũrũ wa Neri
1Samuel14:51 Kishu ithe wa Saũlũ na Neri ithe wa Abineri maarĩ aariũ a Abieli.

1Samuel16:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel16:7 No MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:8 Ningĩ Jesii agĩĩta mũũrũwe Abinadabu
1Samuel16:9 Thuutha wa ũguo Jesii akĩreehe Shama. Naake Samũeli akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:10 Na njĩra ĩyo Jesii akĩreehe aariũ aake mũgwanja kũrĩ Samũeli. Naake Samũeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel16:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩmũũria atĩrĩ

1Samuel17:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel17:2 Naake Saũlũ na Aisiraeli makĩũngana
1Samuel17:3 Nao Afilisiti makĩrũũgama kĩrĩmainĩ kĩmwe
1Samuel17:4 Njamba ĩmwe yetagwo Goliathũ yoimĩĩte itũũra rĩa Gathu
1Samuel17:5 Yehumbĩĩte nguo ya gĩthũri ya gĩcango yarĩ na ũritũ wa kiro mĩrongo ĩtaano na mũgwanja
1Samuel17:6 Namo magũrũ maayo maagitĩirwo na mbatithi cia gĩcango
1Samuel17:7 Itimũ rĩayo rĩarĩ inene ũguo atĩ
1Samuel17:8 Naake Goliathũ akĩrũũgama
1Samuel17:9 Angĩndooria anjũrage
1Samuel17:10 Mũfilisiti ũcio agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:11 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ na thigari ciake ciothe maiguire ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel17:12 Daudi aarĩ mũrũ wa Jesii
1Samuel17:13 Aariũ aake atatũ arĩa akũrũ nĩmaathiĩte na Saũlũ mbaarainĩ. Ũrĩa mũkũrũ eetagwo Eliabu
1Samuel17:14 Daudi nĩ we warĩ wa kĩhinga nda. Rĩrĩa aariũ a nyina arĩa akũrũ atatũ maakoragwo na Saũlũ
1Samuel17:15 Daudi oimaga kambĩinĩ ya Saũlũ
1Samuel17:16 Goliathũ aaniinire matukũ mĩrongo ĩna o athooragia Aisiraeli
1Samuel17:17 Mũthenya ũmwe Jesii akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:18 Nacio ibandĩ ici ikũmi cia thiagĩ ũtwarĩre mũnene wa mbũtũ yao ya thigari ngiri. Tuĩria ũrĩa aariũ a maitũguo matariĩ
1Samuel17:19 Mũthamaki Saũlũ na aariũ a maitũguo
1Samuel17:20 Daudi akĩrooka gũũkĩra rũũciinĩ tene
1Samuel17:21 Nacio thigari cia Afilisiti na cia Aisiraeli ikĩng'ethanĩra nĩguo irũe.
1Samuel17:22 Daudi agĩgĩtigĩra indo iria aakuuĩĩte mũndũ ũrĩa wehokeirwo amenyagĩrĩre indo
1Samuel17:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel17:24 Rĩrĩa Aisiraeli moonire mũndũ ũcio
1Samuel17:25 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:26 Daudi agĩkĩũria andũ arĩa maarĩ hakuhĩ naake atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:27 Nao andũ acio magĩkĩmwĩra ũrĩa mũndũ ũrĩa ũkooraga Goliathũ ageekwo.
1Samuel17:28 Eliabu
1Samuel17:29 Daudi akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:30 Akĩhũgũkĩra mũndũ ũngĩ
1Samuel17:31 Rĩrĩa andũ maiguire ũrĩa Daudi oigaga
1Samuel17:32 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:33 Naake Saũlũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:34 No Daudi akĩĩra Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:35 ndĩmĩrũmagĩrĩra
1Samuel17:36 Nĩnjũragĩĩte mĩrũũthi o na nduba. Ũguo noguo ngwĩka Mũfilisiti ũyũ ũtarĩ mũruu
1Samuel17:37 MWATHANI ũrĩa ũhonokagia kuuma kũrĩ mĩrũũthi na kuuma kũrĩ nduba
1Samuel17:38 Saũlũ agĩcooka akĩhe Daudi nguo ciake mwene cia mbaara. Akĩmwĩkĩra ngobia ya gĩcango mũtwe
1Samuel17:39 Daudi akĩyoha rũhiũ rwa njora rwa Saũlũ igũrũ wa nguo icio
1Samuel17:40 Agĩcooka akĩoya rũthanju rwake rwa kũrĩithia
1Samuel17:41 Naake Goliathũ
1Samuel17:42 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel17:43 Agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:44 Akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:45 Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:46 Ũũmũũthĩ ũyũ MWATHANI nĩegũkũneana mookoinĩ maakwa
1Samuel17:47 Ningĩ mũndũ o wothe wĩ haaha nĩekũmenya atĩ MWATHANI ndahonokanagia na rũhiũ rwa njora na itimũ. Nĩ ũndũ mbaara ĩno nĩ ya MWATHANI
1Samuel17:48 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Goliathũ aambĩrĩirie gũthiĩ na kwĩ Daudi rĩngĩ
1Samuel17:49 Agĩikia guoko mũhuko
1Samuel17:50 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩkĩhoota na akĩũraga Goliathũ na kĩgũtha na kahiga atarĩ na rũhiũ rwa njora.
1Samuel17:51 Daudi agĩgĩteng'era
1Samuel17:52 Nao andũ a Isiraeli na Juda makiugĩrĩria
1Samuel17:53 Rĩrĩa Aisiraeli maahũndũkire moimĩĩte gũteng'eria Afilisiti
1Samuel17:54 Naake Daudi akĩoya mũtwe wa Goliathũ akĩũtwara Jerusalemu
1Samuel17:55 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ oonire Daudi agĩthiĩ kũhũũrana na Goliathũ
1Samuel17:56 Saũlũ agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel17:57 Rĩrĩa Daudi aacookire kambĩinĩ arĩĩkia kũũraga Goliathũ
1Samuel17:58 Naake Saũlũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel18:2 Saũlũ agĩkĩmuoya mũthenya o ro ũcio
1Samuel18:3 Jonathani agĩthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro na Daudi nĩ ũrĩa aamwendeete.
1Samuel18:4 Akĩaũra nguo ndaaya ĩrĩa eekĩrĩĩte
1Samuel18:5 Kũrĩa guothe Daudi aatũmagwo nĩ Saũlũ nĩahootanaga. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Samuel18:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel18:7 Nao makĩina magĩcookanagĩria o mũtumia na ũrĩa ũngĩ makiugaga atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:8 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ aiguire ũguo akĩraakara mũno
1Samuel18:9 Saũlũ agĩkĩambĩrĩria kũiguĩra Daudi ũiru na kũmwĩkũũa kuuma mũthenya ũcio.
1Samuel18:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel18:11 Saũlũ agĩkĩĩĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:12 Naake Saũlũ agĩgĩĩtigĩra Daudi mũno
1Samuel18:13 Kwoguo Saũlũ akĩmũthengia mbere yake
1Samuel18:14 na nĩakoragwo na ũhootani maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa eekaga
1Samuel18:15 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ oonire atĩ Daudi nĩagĩaga na ũhootani mũnene
1Samuel18:16 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel18:17 Saũlũ agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:18 Daudi agĩcookeria Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:19 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel18:20 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel18:21 Saũlũ agĩkĩĩĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:22 Agĩgĩatha ndungata ciake ciarĩrie Daudi keeheriinĩ imwĩre atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:23 Kwoguo magĩkĩĩra Daudi ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel18:24 Nacio njaama icio cia Saũlũ ikĩmwĩra ũrĩa Daudi oigire
1Samuel18:25 naake Saũlũ agĩciatha ikeere Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel18:26 Njaama cia Saũlũ igĩkĩĩra Daudi ũrĩa Saũlũ oigĩĩte
1Samuel18:27 Daudi magĩthiĩ na andũ aake makĩũraga Afilisiti magana meerĩ. Agĩtwarĩra mũthamaki ikonde ciao cia ũruu na akĩmũtarĩra ciothe nĩguo atuĩke mũthoniwe
1Samuel18:28 Saũlũ agĩkĩmenya wega atĩ MWATHANI aarĩ hamwe na Daudi na ningĩ atĩ a Aisiraeli oothe nĩmaamwendeete.
1Samuel18:29 Kwoguo agĩkĩrĩrĩria gwĩtigĩra Daudi
1Samuel18:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel19:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel19:2 Kwoguo Jonathani akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel19:3 Na niĩ nĩngaathiĩ ndũũgame he baaba o gĩthakainĩ kĩu ũgaakorwo wĩhithĩĩte
1Samuel19:4 Jonathani akĩgaathĩrĩria Daudi harĩ ithe Saũlũ
1Samuel19:5 Nĩetwarĩrĩire ũgwatiinĩ mũnene rĩrĩa ooragire Goliathũ. Naake MWATHANI akĩhe Aisiraeli ũhootani mũnene. Rĩrĩa wonire ũndũ ũcio ũgĩkena. Rĩu-rĩ
1Samuel19:6 Saũlũ agĩĩtĩkia ũrĩa Jonathani oigire na akĩĩhĩta na rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI atĩ ndekũũraga Daudi.
1Samuel19:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jonathani agĩĩta Daudi akĩmũmenyithia ũhoro ũcio wothe. Agĩcooka akĩmũtwara kũrĩ Saũlũ
1Samuel19:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel19:9 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel19:10 Saũlũ akĩgeria gũtheecithania Daudi na rũthingo na itimũ rĩu
1Samuel19:11 Ũtukũ o ro ũcio Saũlũ akĩrekia andũ makooherie Daudi gwake mũciĩ marooke kũmũũraga. No Mikali mũtumia wake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel19:12 Mikali agĩikũrũkĩria Daudi ndiricainĩ
1Samuel19:13 Mikali agĩcooka akĩoya mũhianano wa kũu mũciĩ
1Samuel19:14 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa maarekeetio nĩ Saũlũ mookire kũgĩĩra Daudi
1Samuel19:15 No rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel19:16 Magĩgĩtoonya thĩinĩ
1Samuel19:17 Saũlũ agĩkĩũria Mikali atĩrĩ
1Samuel19:18 Naake Daudi akĩũra agĩthiĩ Rama gwĩ Samũeli
1Samuel19:19 Saũlũ akĩmenyithio atĩ Daudi aarĩ Naiothu kũu Rama.
1Samuel19:20 Kwoguo agĩtũma andũ makamũnyiite. No rĩrĩa moonire gĩkundi kĩa anabii gĩkĩratha gĩtongoreetio nĩ Samũeli
1Samuel19:21 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ aiguire ũhoro ũcio
1Samuel19:22 Thuutha wa ũguo
1Samuel19:23 Rĩrĩa aathiaga kuo
1Samuel19:24 O naake akĩruta nguo ciake akĩratha moohoro arĩ mbere ya Samũeli

1Samuel20:19 Mũthenya wa gatatũ-rĩ
1Samuel20:20 Na niĩ nĩngaikia mĩguĩ ĩtatũ mwena wa kĩrũndo kĩu
1Samuel20:21 “Nĩngaacooka ndekie kahĩĩ gathiĩ gakamĩcarie. Ingĩgaakeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:22 No ingĩgaakeera atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:23 Ha ũhoro wa kĩĩranĩro kĩrĩa twathondeka
1Samuel20:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi akĩhitha gĩthakainĩ. Rĩrĩa mahinda ma thigũkũ ya karũũgamo ka mweri maakinyire
1Samuel20:25 Agĩikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩake
1Samuel20:26 Saũlũ ndaigana kuuga ũndũ mũthenya ũcio

1Samuel20:32 Jonathani agĩcookeria ithe atĩrĩ
1Samuel20:33 Oiga ũguo-rĩ
1Samuel20:34 Jonathani agĩgĩũkĩra akiuma hau meethainĩ araakaire mũno. Ndaigana kũrĩa kĩndũ mũthenya ũcio wa keerĩ wa thigũkũ ĩyo
1Samuel20:35 Kwarooka gũkĩa
1Samuel20:36 Akĩĩra kahĩĩ kau atĩrĩ

1Samuel20:38 Tiga kũrũũgama hau! Hiuha narua!” Nako kahĩĩ kau gakĩũngania mĩguĩ ĩyo

1Samuel23:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi akĩigua atĩ Afilisiti nĩmaatharĩkagĩra itũũra rĩa Keila na nĩmaiyaga ngano ĩrĩa yarĩĩkĩĩtie kũgethwo.
1Samuel23:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩgĩtuĩria ũhoro kwĩ MWATHANI akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:3 No andũ arĩa maarĩ hamwe na Daudi makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:4 Kwoguo Daudi agĩtuĩria ũhoro o rĩngĩ kwĩ MWATHANI
1Samuel23:5 Kwoguo Daudi na andũ aake magĩthiĩ Keila
1Samuel23:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Abiatharu mũrũ wa Ahimeleku oorire agĩthiĩ Keila kwĩ Daudi
1Samuel23:7 Saũlũ agĩkĩheeo ũhoro atĩ Daudi nĩathiĩte Keila. Naake akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:8 Kwoguo Saũlũ agĩĩta thigari ciake ciothe mathiĩ mbaara
1Samuel23:9 Rĩrĩa Daudi aamenyire atĩ Saũlũ nĩaciirĩire kũmwĩka ũũru
1Samuel23:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:11 Rĩu-rĩ
1Samuel23:12 Ningĩ Daudi agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:13 Daudi na andũ aake ta magana matandatũ (600) magĩũkĩra
1Samuel23:14 Daudi agĩgĩtũũra ehithĩĩte bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma werũinĩ ũrĩa wĩ hakuhĩ na Zifu. Naake Saũlũ agĩtũũra amũcaragia
1Samuel23:15 Daudi agĩkĩona atĩ Saũlũ nĩehaarĩirie kũmũũraga.Daudi aarĩ Horeshu
1Samuel23:16 Naake Jonathani mũrũ wa Saũlũ akiumagara
1Samuel23:17 Naake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:18 Nao eerĩ magĩtuma ndũgũ makĩhĩtaga na rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI. Daudi agĩgĩikara kũu Horeshu
1Samuel23:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ amwe moimĩĩte Zifu
1Samuel23:20 Nĩtũũĩ ũrĩa mũthamaki wĩrirĩirie kũmũnyiita. Kwoguo gĩikũrũke gwitũ
1Samuel23:21 Naake Saũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel23:22 Thiĩi mũtĩtĩrithie ũhoro ũcio wega
1Samuel23:23 Tuĩriai wega mũmenye kũndũ guothe kũrĩa ehithaga
1Samuel23:24 Nao makiumagara
1Samuel23:25 Saũlũ na andũ aake magĩthiĩ gũcaria Daudi
1Samuel23:26 Saũlũ na andũ aake makĩgera mwena ũmwe wa kĩrĩma
1Samuel23:27 O hĩndĩ ĩyo hagĩũka mũndũ warekeetio gwĩ Saũlũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

1Samuel25:32 Ngai arogaathwo nĩ ũndũ wa ũũgĩ waku
1Samuel25:33 Nĩ MWATHANI ũngiririe ndigaakũgere ngero. No ngwĩhĩta na Ngai wa Isiraeli ũrĩa ũtũũraga muoyo atĩ
1Samuel25:34 Daudi akĩamũkĩra kĩheeo kĩrĩa Abigaĩli aamũtwarĩire na akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel25:35 Abigaĩli agĩgĩcooka mũciĩ kũrĩ Nabali
1Samuel25:36 Kwarooka gũkĩa Nabali aarĩũkwo
1Samuel25:37 Matukũ ta ikũmi mathira
1Samuel25:38 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel25:39 Na rĩrĩ
1Samuel25:40 Abigaĩli agĩũkĩra
1Samuel25:41 Naake agĩũkĩra narua
1Samuel25:42 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel25:43 Saũlũ nĩaheanĩĩte Mikali mwarĩwe
1Samuel26:1 Ningĩ hagĩũka andũ moimĩĩte Zifu he Saũlũ o kũu Gibea
1Samuel26:2 Saũlũ agĩgĩũkĩra na ihenya e na thigari ngiri ithatũ (3
1Samuel26:3 Saũlũ akĩamba hema kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Hakila kĩrĩa kĩang'etheire njĩra ya kuuma werũ. Daudi aikarĩĩte werũinĩ ũcio. Rĩrĩa aamenyire atĩ Saũlũ nĩokĩĩte kũmũcaria
1Samuel26:4 agĩtũma athigaani magatuĩrie ũhoro ũcio wega na agĩkĩmenya ti itherũ atĩ Saũlũ aarĩ kuo.
1Samuel26:5 Daudi agĩgĩthiĩ harĩa Saũlũ aambĩĩte hema
1Samuel26:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi akĩũria Ahimeleku ũrĩa Mũhiti na Abishai mũrũ wa nyina na Joabu (nyina wao eetagwo Zeruia)
1Samuel26:7 Kwoguo ũtukũ ũcio Daudi na Abishai magĩthiĩ magĩtoonya kambĩinĩ ya Saũlũ magĩkora akomeete hemainĩ thĩinĩ
1Samuel26:8 Abishai akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:9 No Daudi akĩĩra Abishai atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:10 Daudi agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:11 MWATHANI arongiria ndambarũkie guoko gwakwa njũkĩrĩre ũrĩa we mwene aitĩrĩirie maguta! Reke tuoe itimũ rĩĩrĩ rĩ mũtweinĩ wake na kĩbũyũ kĩa maaĩ
1Samuel26:12 Kwoguo Daudi akĩoya itimũ na kĩbũyũ kĩa maaĩ
1Samuel26:13 Daudi agĩkĩringa mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa gĩtuamba
1Samuel26:14 akĩgũũthũkĩra thigari cia Saũlũ akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:15 Daudi akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:16 Ũndũ ũcio wĩkĩĩte ti mwega! Ndehĩta na MWATHANI ũrĩa ũtũũraga muoyo atĩ inyuothe mwagĩrĩirwo no kũũragwo
1Samuel26:17 Saũlũ agĩkĩmenya mũgambo wa Daudi akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:18 Agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:19 Rĩu mwathi wakwa mũthamaki
1Samuel26:20 Tondũ ũcio ndũkaanareke thakame yakwa ĩitwo tĩĩriinĩ ũtarĩ witũ
1Samuel26:21 Saũlũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:22 Naake Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel26:23 MWATHANI nĩwe wĩkaga mũndũ o wothe mũthingu na mwĩhokeku maũndũ meega. Ũũmũũthĩ nĩegũkũneanĩĩte mookoinĩ maakwa
1Samuel26:24 O ta ũrĩa ndahonokia muoyo waku ũũmũũthĩ
1Samuel26:25 Saũlũ agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
1Samuel27:1 Daudi agĩkĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ
1Samuel27:2 Kwoguo Daudi na andũ aake magana matandatũ (600) makĩringa na ihenya magĩthiĩ kwĩ Akishi mũrũ wa Maoku
1Samuel27:3 Naake Daudi na andũ aake
1Samuel27:4 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ eerirwo atĩ Daudi nĩorĩire Gathu
1Samuel27:5 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Akishi atĩrĩ “Angĩkorwo wĩ mũraata wakwa-rĩ
1Samuel27:6 Kwoguo Akishi agĩkĩmũhe itũũra rĩa Zikilagi. Tondũ ũcio
1Samuel27:7 Daudi aatũũrire bũrũriinĩ wa Afilisiti mwaka ũmwe na mĩeri ĩna.
1Samuel27:8 Mahindainĩ macio Daudi na andũ aake nĩmaatharĩkagĩra andũ a Geshuri
1Samuel27:9 Aathiaga akĩũragaga arũme na atumia oothe
1Samuel27:10 Akishi angĩamũririe atĩrĩ
1Samuel27:11 Daudi ooragaga arũme na atumia oothe nĩguo mũndũ o na ũmwe ndagathiĩ Gathu oige ũrĩa we na andũ aake meekaga. Ũguo nĩguo Daudi eekaga matukũ moothe marĩa aatũũrire kwa Afilisiti.
1Samuel27:12 No Akishi akĩĩhoka Daudi akĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩ Daudi nĩathũũrĩĩtwo mũno nĩ andũ aake a Isiraeli
1Samuel28:1 Thuutha ũcio
1Samuel28:2 Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Samũeli nĩakuĩte na Aisiraeli oothe makamũrĩrĩra na makamũthika Rama itũũrainĩ rĩake. Naake Saũlũ nĩarutũrũrithĩĩtie ooni maũndũ na arogi makoima Isiraeli.
1Samuel28:4 Thigari cia Afilisiti ikĩũngana igĩaka kambĩ hakuhĩ na itũũra rĩa Shunemu
1Samuel28:5 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ oonire mbũtũ cia ita cia Afilisiti agĩĩtigĩra mũno.
1Samuel28:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩtuĩria ũhoro kwĩ MWATHANI amenye ũrĩa egwĩka
1Samuel28:7 Saũlũ agĩkĩĩra njaama ciake atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:8 Saũlũ agĩkĩĩgarũra ndakaamenyeke
1Samuel28:9 Mũtumia ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:10 Naake Saũlũ akĩmwĩra akĩgweta rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:11 Mũndũ wa nja ũcio akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:12 Rĩrĩa mũndũ wa nja ũcio oonire Samũeli agĩkaya
1Samuel28:13 Mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:14 Akĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:15 Samũeli agĩĩkĩra Saũlũ atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:16 Samũeli agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel28:17 MWATHANI agwĩkĩĩte o ta ũrĩa aakwĩrire na kanua gaakwa; nĩathengeetie ũthamaki kuuma kũrĩ we
1Samuel28:18 MWATHANI agwĩkĩĩte ũguo tondũ nĩwagire gwathĩkĩra uuge wake
1Samuel28:19 MWATHANI nĩagaakũneana wee mwene na Aisiraeli kũrĩ Afilisiti. Wee na aariũ aaku mũgaakorwo mwĩ hamwe na niĩ rũũciũ. O na ningĩ nĩakaaneana mbũtũ cia ita cia Isiraeli kũrĩ Afilisiti.”
1Samuel28:20 O rĩmwe Saũlũ akĩgũa
1Samuel28:21 Naake mũndũ wa nja ũcio agĩthiĩ harĩ Saũlũ
1Samuel28:22 Tondũ ũcio ndagũthaitha o nawe gĩthikĩrĩrie ũrĩa ngũkwĩra. Reke ngũthondekere tũirio tũniini ũrĩe nĩguo ũgĩe na hinya wa kuumagara.”
1Samuel28:23 Saũlũ akĩrega akiuga ndekũrĩa o na kĩ. No njaama ciake na mũndũ wa nja ũcio makĩmũringĩrĩria arĩe
1Samuel28:24 Mũndũ wa nja ũcio agĩgĩthĩnjithia na ihenya njaũ noru ya gĩceegũ aarĩ nayo
1Samuel28:25 Agĩtwarĩra Saũlũ na njaama ciake irio icio
1Samuel29:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel29:2 Nao athamaki arĩa ataano a Afilisiti makiumagara me na ikundi ciao cia thigari igana na cia ngiri. Naake Daudi na andũ aake makiumagara marĩ thuutha hamwe na mũthamaki Akishi.
1Samuel29:3 Rĩrĩa anene a mbũtũ cia ita cia Afilisiti maamoonire makĩũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:4 No anene a mbũtũ cia Afilisiti makĩraakarĩra Akishi mũno makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:5 Githĩ ũyũ ti Daudi o ũrĩa andũ a nja mainĩire makĩrũũgarũũgaga makiugaga atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:6 Akishi agĩgĩĩta Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:7 Kwoguo cooka mũciĩ na thaayũ
1Samuel29:8 Naake Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:9 Akishi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Samuel29:10 Kwoguo ũgookĩra rũũciinĩ tene
1Samuel29:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi na andũ aake makĩrooka gũũkĩra rũũciinĩ tene macooke bũrũri wa Afilisiti. Nao Afilisiti makĩambata Jezireeli.
1Samuel30:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel30:2 na magĩtaha atumia oothe. Matioragĩĩte mũndũ o na ũmwe no nĩmaathiĩte na andũ oothe mũniini na mũnene.
1Samuel30:3 Rĩrĩa Daudi na andũ aake maakinyire itũũrainĩ
1Samuel30:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi na andũ aake makĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra. Maarĩrire o nginyagia rĩrĩa maagire hinya wa kũrĩra rĩngĩ.
1Samuel30:5 Atumia arĩa eerĩ a Daudi
1Samuel30:6 Daudi agĩgĩkorwo arĩ thĩĩnainĩ mũnene mũno
1Samuel30:7 Daudi agĩkĩĩra mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Abiatharu
1Samuel30:8 Naake Daudi agĩgĩtuĩria ũhoro he MWATHANI akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:9 Kwoguo Daudi na andũ aake magana matandatũ (600) magĩthiĩ na rĩrĩa maakinyire karũũĩinĩ ka Besori
1Samuel30:10 Daudi agĩgĩthiĩ na mbere na andũ magana mana (400). Andũ acio angĩ magana meerĩ (200) maatigirwo tondũ maarĩ anogu mũno na matingĩahotire kũringa karũũĩ kau.
1Samuel30:11 Andũ arĩa maarĩ na Daudi magĩkora Mũmisiri kũu gĩthakainĩ makĩmũtwarĩra Daudi. Makĩmũhe irio na maaĩ
1Samuel30:12 kĩenyũ kĩa ngũyũ ciarĩ nyũmithie
1Samuel30:13 Naake Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:14 Nĩtwatharĩkĩire na tũgĩtaha bũrũri wa Akerethi ũrĩa ũrĩ na mwena wa kĩanda wa bũrũri wa Juda
1Samuel30:15 Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:16 Agĩgĩtwara Daudi kũrĩ acio maamatharĩkĩire na makĩmataha.Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel30:17 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ kĩrooko tene
1Samuel30:18 Daudi agĩkĩhonokia andũ oothe na kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩa Aamaleki maatahĩĩte
1Samuel30:19 Gũtirĩ kĩndũ o na kĩmwe kĩagire. Daudi agĩgĩcookithia aariũ na aarĩ oothe a andũ aake
1Samuel30:20 Ningĩ nĩacookithirie mahiũ moothe ma ng'ondu na ng'ombe. Nao andũ aake makĩhũũra mahiũ moothe magĩthiĩ mbere yake magĩkiugaga atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:21 Naake Daudi agĩgĩkinya harĩ andũ arĩa magana meerĩ (200)
1Samuel30:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel30:23 Naake Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Samuel30:24 Hatirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩiguana na inyuĩ mũkiuga ũguo! Andũ oothe maagĩrĩirwo nĩkũgayanio maiganaine
1Samuel30:25 Daudi agĩtua ũndũ ũcio watho na ũtũire ũrũmagĩrĩrwo bũrũriinĩ wa Isiraeli kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo.
1Samuel30:26 Naake Daudi acooka Zikilagi
1Samuel30:27 Aatwarithĩirie andũ a Betheli
1Samuel30:28 a Aroeri
1Samuel30:29 a Rakali
1Samuel30:30 na andũ a Horima
1Samuel30:31 na a Heburoni. Aacitwarithĩirie andũ a kũrĩa guothe we na andũ aake maatũire moorũũraga.
1Samuel31:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Samuel31:2 Nao Afilisiti makĩmateng'eria na makĩũraga aariũ a Saũlũ
1Samuel31:3 Nayo mbaara ĩgĩkĩũmĩra Saũlũ mũno
1Samuel31:4 Saũlũ agĩkĩĩra mwanake ũrĩa wamũkuuagĩra indo ciake cia mbaara atĩrĩ
1Samuel31:5 Mwanake ũcio wamũkuuagĩra indo ciake cia mbaara oona atĩ Saũlũ nĩakua
1Samuel31:6 Ũguo nĩguo Saũlũ
1Samuel31:7 Rĩrĩa Aisiraeli arĩa maarĩ mwena ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa gĩtuamba kĩa Jezireeli o na arĩa maarĩ mwena wa irathĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani maiguire atĩ mbũtũ ya ita ya Isiraeli nĩyora
1Samuel31:8 Mũthenya ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire
1Samuel31:9 Magĩgĩtinia mũtwe wa Saũlũ na makĩmwaũra nguo ciake cia mbaara. Magĩcooka magĩtũma andũ bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Afilisiti makamenyithanie ũhoro ũcio mwega kũrĩ ngai ciao cia mĩhianano o na kũrĩ andũ aao.
1Samuel31:10 Magĩcooka makĩiga indo ciake cia mbaara hekaarũinĩ ya Ashitorathu ngai yao
1Samuel31:11 Rĩrĩa andũ a Jabeshi
1Samuel31:12 andũ arĩa maarĩ njamba makĩraara magĩthiĩ na ũtukũ nginya magĩkinya Bethi Shani. Magĩcuurũria kĩimba gĩa Saũlũ na ciimba cia aariũ aake kuuma rũthingoinĩ
1Samuel31:13 Magĩcooka makĩoya mahĩndĩ maao makĩmathika rungu rwa mũtĩ wa mũbinde ũrĩa warĩ itũũrainĩ rĩu
2Samuel1:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel1:2 Mũthenya wa gatatũ hagĩũka mũndũ oimĩĩte kambĩinĩ ya Saũlũ
2Samuel1:3 Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:4 Naake Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:5 Daudi agĩkĩũria mwanake ũcio wamũheaga ũhoro atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:6 Mwanake ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:7 Rĩrĩa Saũlũ arehũgũrire-rĩ
2Samuel1:8 Naake arakĩnjũũria ndĩ ũ
2Samuel1:9 Arakĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:10 Tondũ ũcio ndĩragĩthiĩ ndĩramũũraga nĩ ũndũ nĩndĩramenyaga atĩ ndangĩhona nĩ ũndũ araarĩ mũtheece mũno. Ndĩracooka ndĩrooya thũmbĩ ya ũthamaki ĩrĩa araarĩ nayo mũtwe na bangiri ya mũthamaki ĩrĩa ĩraarĩ guoko gwake
2Samuel1:11 Daudi na andũ arĩa maarĩ naake
2Samuel1:12 Magĩcakaya
2Samuel1:13 Daudi agĩkĩũria mwanake ũcio wamũreeheire ũhoro atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:14 Daudi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:15 Daudi agĩgĩĩta mwanake ũmwe
2Samuel1:16 Daudi agĩkĩĩra Mũamaleki ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel1:17 Daudi akĩina rwĩmbo rũũrũ rwa macakaya
2Samuel1:18 na agĩathana rũrutwo andũ oothe a Juda. Rwĩmbo rũu rwandĩkĩĩtwo ibukuinĩ rĩa Jasharu.
2Samuel1:19 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
2Samuel1:20 Mũtikaaheane ũhoro ũcio Gathu
2Samuel1:21 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
2Samuel1:22 Ũta wa Jonathani ndũrahũndũkaga ũtarĩ na thakame o na maguta ma andũ njamba arĩa ũũragĩĩte. O naruo rũhiũ rwa njora rwa Saũlũ rũtirahũndũkaga ũtheri.
2Samuel1:23 “Saũlũ na Jonathani maarĩ a kwendeka
2Samuel1:24 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
2Samuel1:25 “Hĩ! Kaĩ thigari iria njamba nĩikuĩte-ĩ! Ciũragĩirwo mbaarainĩ.Jonathani akomeete e mũkuũ irĩmainĩ ciaku.
2Samuel1:26 “Ndĩ na kĩeha mũno nĩ ũndũ waku
2Samuel1:27 “Hĩ! Kaĩ thigari iria njamba nĩikuĩte-ĩ! Indo ciacio cia mbaara kaĩ nĩigĩtiganĩirio ciagĩirwo bata-ĩ!”
2Samuel2:1 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio
2Samuel2:2 Kwoguo Daudi na atumia aake eerĩ makĩambata magĩthiĩ Heburoni
2Samuel2:3 O na nĩambatire na andũ arĩa maakoragwo hamwe naake na mĩciĩ yao
2Samuel2:4 Nao andũ a Juda magĩũka kũu Heburoni magĩitĩrĩria Daudi maguta atuĩke mũthamaki wa mũhĩrĩga wa Juda.Daudi aamenyithio atĩ andũ a Jabeshi kũrĩa kwarĩ thĩinĩ wa Gileadi nĩ o maathikire Saũlũ
2Samuel2:5 agĩkĩrekia andũ kũrĩ o. Aamarekirie me na ndũmĩrĩri ĩno: “MWATHANI aromũraathima
2Samuel2:6 MWATHANI rĩu arotuĩka mũtaana kũrĩ inyuĩ na aromwĩkaga maũndũ ma kĩhooto. Na niĩ nĩndĩrĩmũtugaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo mwekire.
2Samuel2:7 Tondũ ũcio mwĩyũmĩrĩriei
2Samuel2:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel2:9 Marĩ kũu akĩmũtua mũthamaki wa Gileadi
2Samuel2:10 Ishiboshethu aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna akĩambĩrĩria gũthamakĩra Isiraeli
2Samuel2:11 Naake Daudi aathamakĩire Juda arĩ kũu Heburoni mĩaka mũgwanja na nuthu.
2Samuel2:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel2:13 Naake Joabu
2Samuel2:14 Abineri agĩkĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:15 Kwoguo aanake ikũmi na eerĩ marũũgamĩrĩire Ishiboshethu na mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini makĩhũũrana na aanake ikũmi na eerĩ a Daudi.
2Samuel2:16 Nao oothe mũndũ o mũndũ akĩnyiita mũndũ ũrĩa meerekanĩire naake mũtwe
2Samuel2:17 O hau haaro nene ĩgĩtuthũka
2Samuel2:18 Nao aariũ atatũ a Zeruia: Joabu
2Samuel2:19 agĩteng'eria Abineri. Gũtirĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe ũngĩamũgiririe amũhanyũkie.
2Samuel2:20 Abineri akĩĩhũgũra na thuutha akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:21 Abineri akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:22 O rĩngĩ Abineri akĩĩra Asaheli atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:23 No we akĩrega gũtiga kũmũteng'eria; kwoguo Abineri akĩmũtheeca nda na itimũ rĩake
2Samuel2:24 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel2:25 Nao andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini magĩcookanĩrĩra hamwe o rĩngĩ nĩguo mateithĩrĩrie Abineri
2Samuel2:26 Abineri agĩkĩanĩrĩra Joabu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:27 Naake Joabu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel2:28 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joabu akĩhuuha karumbeeta ga kũrũũgamia mbaara

2Samuel3:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel3:2 Aya nĩ o aariũ atandatũ a Daudi arĩa maaciarĩirwo Heburoni: Amũnoni nĩ we warĩ irigithaathi
2Samuel3:3 Kileabu nĩ we wamũrũmĩrĩire
2Samuel3:4 wa kana aarĩ Adonija
2Samuel3:5 Ithireamu nĩ we warĩ wa gatandatũ
2Samuel3:6 O ũrĩa mbaara yathiaga na mbere gatagatĩ ka mũciĩ wa Daudi na mũciĩ wa Saũlũ
2Samuel3:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel3:8 Ũndũ ũcio ũkĩraakaria Abineri mũno
2Samuel3:9 MWATHANI aronjũraga ingĩaga kũhingĩria Daudi o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aamwĩrire na mwĩhĩtwa atĩ
2Samuel3:10 nĩakaaruta ũthamaki kuuma kũrĩ Saũlũ na njiarwa ciake na atue Daudi mũthamaki wa Isiraeli na Juda
2Samuel3:11 Naake Ishiboshethu ndacookeirie Abineri ũndũ ũngĩ nĩ gũkorwo nĩamwĩtigĩrire.
2Samuel3:12 Abineri agĩkĩrekia njaama kũrĩ Daudi kũu Heburoni ikoige atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:13 Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:14 Naake Daudi agĩtũma njaama kũrĩ Ishiboshethu mũrũ wa Saũlũ ikamwĩre atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:15 Kwoguo Ishiboshethu akĩmũgĩĩrithia kuuma kũrĩ mũthuuriwe Palitieli mũrũ wa Laishi.
2Samuel3:16 Mũthuuriwe akĩmũrũmĩrĩra akĩrĩraga o kinya itũũra rĩa Bahurimu. No rĩrĩa Abineri aamwĩrire acooke mũciĩ
2Samuel3:17 Naake Abineri akĩaranĩria na atongoria a Isiraeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:18 Rĩu mwĩ na mweke wa gwĩka ũguo. Ririkanaai atĩ MWATHANI nĩoigire atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:19 Ningĩ Abineri akĩarĩria andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini
2Samuel3:20 Rĩrĩa Abineri
2Samuel3:21 Abineri akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ

2Samuel3:23 Rĩrĩa Joabu na andũ aake maakinyire
2Samuel3:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Joabu agĩthiĩ kwĩ Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel3:25 Nĩũũĩ atĩ Abineri mũrũ wa Neri egũũkĩĩte gũkũheenia

2Samuel11:18 Thuutha ũcio Joabu akĩrekanĩria Daudi akeerwo ũhoro wothe wa mbaara ĩyo.
2Samuel11:19 Joabu agĩtaarĩria mũrekio ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:20 ahota kũraakara akũũrie atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:21 Kaĩ mũtekũririkana ũrĩa Abimeleki mũrũ wa Gideoni ooragirwo? Githĩ ti gũikĩirio aikĩirio ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi marĩ Thebezi nĩ mũtumia e rũthingoinĩ akĩũragwo? Nĩkĩ kĩratũmire mũthiĩ hakuhĩ na rũthingo ũguo?’ Ũkaamũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:22 Tondũ ũcio mũrekio ũcio agĩthiĩ kwĩ Daudi
2Samuel11:23 Mũrekio ũcio akĩongerera atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:24 Nacio iraturatha na mĩguĩ kuuma rũthingo igũrũ
2Samuel11:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi agĩkĩĩra mũrekio ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel11:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel11:27 Mahinda ma gũcakaya mathira-rĩ
2Samuel12:1 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩrekia mũnabii Nathani he Daudi. Naake Nathani agĩthiĩ harĩ we akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:2 Mũndũ mũrũme ũcio warĩ gĩtonga-rĩ
2Samuel12:3 No mũndũ mũrũme ũrĩa mũthĩni-rĩ aarĩ na kamwatĩ kamwe tu aagũrĩĩte. Agĩkamenyerera
2Samuel12:4 Mũthenya ũmwe mũgeni agĩkinya mũciĩ gwa gĩtonga kĩu. Gĩtonga kĩu gĩtietĩkĩrire gũthĩnjĩra mũgeni ũcio o na nyamũ ĩmwe ya ũhiũ wakĩo
2Samuel12:5 Naake Daudi agĩkĩraakarĩra gĩtonga kĩu
2Samuel12:6 No nginya arĩhe kamwatĩ kau maita mana
2Samuel12:7 Naake Nathani agĩkĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:8 Nĩndakũheire ũthamaki wake o na atumia aake
2Samuel12:9 Rĩu-rĩ
2Samuel12:10 Nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo-rĩ
2Samuel12:11 Nĩndehĩta ndoiga atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:12 Ũndũ ũcio wekire-rĩ
2Samuel12:13 Naake Daudi agĩkĩĩra Nathani atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:14 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel12:15 Naake Nathani agĩcooka akĩinũka gwake mũciĩ.
2Samuel12:16 Tondũ ũcio Daudi akĩhoera kaana kau nĩguo kahone
2Samuel12:17 Nacio njaama cia mũciĩ wake igathiaga harĩ we
2Samuel12:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel12:19 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel12:20 Daudi agĩgĩũkĩra kuuma harĩa aakomeete
2Samuel12:21 Nacio njaama ciake ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:22 Naake Daudi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:23 No rĩu nĩgagĩkuĩte. Kaĩ ingĩkĩĩhinga kũrĩa irio nĩkĩ? Ndakĩhota gũkaariũkia hiihi? Nĩngaathiĩ kũu karĩ
2Samuel12:24 Naake Daudi akĩhooreria Bathisheba mũtumia wake. Agĩcooka agĩkoma naake
2Samuel12:25 Na MWATHANI agĩatha mũnabii Nathani agatue Jedidia
2Samuel12:26 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo Joabu agĩthiĩ o na mbere kũhũũrana na Raba
2Samuel12:27 Naake agĩkĩrekia njaama kwĩ Daudi akeerwo atĩrĩ
2Samuel12:28 Tondũ ũcio cookanĩrĩria thigari icio ingĩ ciaku
2Samuel12:29 Kwoguo Daudi agĩcookanĩrĩria thigari ciake
2Samuel12:30 Daudi akĩruta kĩraũni gĩa thahabu mũtweinĩ wa Moleku
2Samuel12:31 Ningĩ agĩtua andũ aakuo aatũri a mbaaũ
2Samuel13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel13:2 Amunoni agĩthĩĩnio mũno nĩ wendo ũcio
2Samuel13:3 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel13:4 Jonadabu akĩĩra Amunoni atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:5 Naake Jonadabu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:6 Kwoguo Amunoni akĩĩrũarithia
2Samuel13:7 Kwoguo Daudi akĩrekanĩria Tamaru akeerwo atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:8 Tondũ ũcio Tamaru agĩgĩthiĩ
2Samuel13:9 Agĩcooka akĩmũihũrĩra
2Samuel13:10 Amunoni agĩkĩĩra Tamaru atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel13:12 Tamaru akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:13 Ingĩhota atĩa gũthiĩ nĩ thoni? O nawe-rĩ
2Samuel13:14 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel13:15 Amunoni akĩmũthũũra na rũthũro rũnene mũno; aamũthũũrire gũkĩra ũrĩa aamwendeete mbere. Akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:16 Tamaru akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:17 Agĩgĩĩta ndungata yake akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:18 Nayo ndungata ĩyo yake ĩkĩmũruta na nja
2Samuel13:19 Agĩkĩitĩrĩria mũhu mũtwe na agĩtembũranga nguo ĩyo yake na akĩhumbĩra ũthiũ wake na mooko
2Samuel13:20 Rĩrĩa Abisalomu mũrũ wa nyina aamuonire akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:21 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki Daudi aiguire ũrĩa gwatuĩkĩkire-rĩ
2Samuel13:22 Naake Abisalomu agĩgĩthũũra Amunoni mũno nĩ ũndũ wa gũkoma na mwarĩ wa nyina Tamaru na hinya. Ndaigana gũcooka kwaria na Amunoni rĩngĩ.
2Samuel13:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel13:24 Agĩcooka agĩthiĩ kwa mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:25 Mũthamaki agĩgĩcookeria Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:26 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Abisalomu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:27 No Abisalomu akĩmũtindĩrĩra mũno
2Samuel13:28 Abisalomu agĩatha ndungata ciake agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:29 Kwoguo ndungata cia Abisalomu igĩĩka o ta ũrĩa aaciathĩĩte
2Samuel13:30 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mainũkaga
2Samuel13:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki akĩrũũgama
2Samuel13:32 No Jonadabu mũrũ wa Shama
2Samuel13:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ndũgeetĩkie ndeto icio atĩ aariũ aaku oothe nĩ akuũ
2Samuel13:34 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel13:35 Naake Jonadabu akĩĩra Daudi atĩrĩ
2Samuel13:36 O arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo
2Samuel13:37 (37-38) Abisalomu akĩũra
2Samuel13:38 No rĩrĩa aathirirwo nĩ kĩeha gĩa gĩkuũ kĩa Amunoni
2Samuel14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel14:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Samuel14:3 ũcooke ũthiĩ kwĩ mũthamaki ũmwĩre ũrĩa ngũkwĩra.” Kwoguo Joabu akĩmwĩra ũrĩa egũthiĩ kuuga.
2Samuel14:4 Mũndũ wa nja ũcio agĩgĩthiĩ kwĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel14:5 Naake mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:6 Mwathi wakwa
2Samuel14:7 Rĩu
2Samuel14:8 Mũthamaki agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:9 Naake mũtumia ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:10 Mũthamaki agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:11 Mũtumia ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:12 Mũtumia ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:13 Naake mũtumia ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:14 Ithuothe no nginya tũgaakua. Tũhaana o ta maaĩ maitĩku thĩ
2Samuel14:15 Rĩu
2Samuel14:16 Ndĩreciiragia nĩũgũũthikĩrĩria na ũhonokie kuuma mookoinĩ ma mũndũ ũcio ũrenda kũũraga mũũriũ wakwa o na anjũrage
2Samuel14:17 Ndĩrakĩĩĩra atĩ ũrĩa ũkũnjĩĩra
2Samuel14:18 Naake mũthamaki agĩcookeria mũtumia ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:19 Mũthamaki agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:20 No areekire ũguo akĩenda kũrũnga ũndũ ũcio. No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel14:21 Thuutha ũcio mũthamaki akĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:22 Naake Joabu akĩinamĩrĩra mbere ya mũthamaki na gĩtĩĩo akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:23 Tondũ ũcio Joabu agĩgĩũkĩra
2Samuel14:24 Mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel14:26 Aarĩ na njuĩrĩ nene mũno na aamĩenjaga o mwaka riita rĩmwe rĩrĩa yakoragwo ĩraihĩĩte na ikamũritũhĩra. Yathimwo yakoragwo na ũritũ wa makĩria ma kiro igĩrĩ
2Samuel14:27 Abisalomu aarĩ na aanake atatũ na mũirĩĩtu ũmwe wetagwo Tamaru
2Samuel14:28 Abisalomu agĩgĩtũũra kũu Jerusalemu mĩaka ĩĩrĩ atekuona mũthamaki.
2Samuel14:29 Thuutha ũcio Abisalomu akĩrekanĩria Joabu nĩguo atũme kwĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel14:30 Tondũ ũcio Abisalomu agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joabu agĩgĩthiĩ mũciĩ kwa Abisalomu akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:32 Abisalomu agĩcookeria Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel14:33 Tondũ ũcio Joabu agĩgĩthiĩ kwĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel15:1 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio
2Samuel15:2 Naake agakĩrookaga gũkĩra kĩrooko tene agathiĩ akarũũgama mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra ĩrĩa yerekagĩra na kĩhingoinĩ gĩa itũũra. Mũndũ angĩokĩire hau e na ciira angĩendire ũtuithanio nĩ mũthamaki
2Samuel15:3 Abisalomu agakĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:4 Agacooka akoongerera atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:5 Mũndũ ũcio angĩakuhĩrĩirie Abisalomu nĩguo amũinamĩrĩre amwĩnyiihĩirie-rĩ
2Samuel15:6 Ũguo nĩguo Abisalomu eekaga Aisiraeli oothe arĩa mookaga kũrĩ mũthamaki nĩguo amatuithanie maciira maao; nĩ ũndũ ũcio agĩĩkĩrĩrwo mũno nĩ o.
2Samuel15:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel15:8 Rĩrĩa ndaikaraga Geshuri bũrũriinĩ wa Siria
2Samuel15:9 Mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:10 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel15:11 Abisalomu nĩetĩĩte andũ magana meerĩ (200)
2Samuel15:12 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Abisalomu aarutaga magongoona
2Samuel15:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel15:14 Kwoguo Daudi akĩĩra njaama ciake ciothe iria ciarĩ hamwe naake Jerusalemu atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:15 Nacio njaama ciake igĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:16 Mũthamaki agĩkiumagara e na andũ oothe a mũciĩ wake na njaama ciake
2Samuel15:17 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki na andũ aake oothe maathiaga moimĩĩte itũũrainĩ
2Samuel15:18 Njaama ciake ciothe ikĩrũũgama o hau aarĩ
2Samuel15:19 Mũthamaki akĩĩra Itai ũrĩa warĩ mũtongoria wa thigari icio ciomĩĩte Gathu atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:20 Ũrookire gũũkũ o ica ikuhĩ
2Samuel15:21 No Itai akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:22 Naake Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:23 Nao andũ a Jerusalemu makĩrĩra maanĩrĩire rĩrĩa andũ arĩa maarũmanĩrĩire na Daudi maumagaraga. Mũthamaki hamwe na andũ aake makĩringa karũũĩ ga Kidironi
2Samuel15:24 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel15:25 Mũthamaki akĩĩra Zadoku atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:26 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel15:27 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩĩra Zadoku atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:28 Na niĩ-rĩ
2Samuel15:29 Tondũ ũcio Zadoku na Abiatharu magĩkĩoya Ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai makĩrĩcookia Jerusalemu na magĩikara kuo.
2Samuel15:30 Daudi akĩambata kĩrĩma kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ akĩrĩraga. Aarĩ magũrũ matheri na eehumbĩrĩĩte mũtwe ta mũndũ ũrĩ na kĩeha. Andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ hamwe naake makĩmũrũmĩrĩra meehumbĩire mĩtwe yao makĩrĩraga.
2Samuel15:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel15:32 Rĩrĩa Daudi aakinyire igũrũ wa kĩrĩma kĩu
2Samuel15:33 Daudi akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Samuel15:34 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel15:35 Zadoku na Abiatharu athĩnjĩri Ngai marĩ kuo; mamenyithagie ũrĩa wothe ũrĩiguaga kuuma nyũmbainĩ ya mũthamaki.
2Samuel15:36 Marĩ na aariũ aao Ahimaazu na Jonathani
2Samuel15:37 Hushai
2Samuel16:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel16:2 Mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:3 Mũthamaki Daudi akĩũria Ziba atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:4 Mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra Ziba atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:5 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki Daudi aakinyire Bahurimu
2Samuel16:6 Shimei akĩambĩrĩria gũikĩria Daudi na njaama ciake mahiga
2Samuel16:7 Shimei akĩmũruma akĩmwĩraga atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:8 Nĩwoire ũthamaki wa Saũlũ. Rĩu MWATHANI nĩgũkũherithia arakũherithia nĩ ũndũ wa kũũraga andũ aingĩ a mũciĩ wa Saũlũ. MWATHANI nĩaheete mũũrũguo Abisalomu ũthamaki waku. Rĩu nĩwathira
2Samuel16:9 Abishai ũrĩa nyina eetagwo Zeruia akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:10 Mũthamaki akĩĩra Abishai na mũrũ wa nyina Joabu atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:11 Ningĩ Daudi akĩĩra Abishai na njaama ciake ciothe atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:12 No gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩekuona mĩnyamaaro yakwa
2Samuel16:13 Tondũ ũcio Daudi na andũ aake magĩthiĩ na mbere na rũgendo rwao magereire rũgongo rũmwe
2Samuel16:14 Mũthamaki na andũ aake oothe magĩkinya Jorodani maarĩ anogu mũno
2Samuel16:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel16:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Hushai
2Samuel16:17 Naake Abisalomu akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:18 Hushai akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:19 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Samuel16:20 Thuutha wa ũguo
2Samuel16:21 Naake Ahithofeli agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel16:22 Tondũ ũcio magĩkĩambĩra Abisalomu hema igũrũ wa nyũmba ĩyo ya mũthamaki
2Samuel16:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel17:1 Ningĩ Ahithofeli akĩĩra Abisalomu atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:2 Ngũthiĩ ndĩmũtharĩkĩre rĩĩrĩ anogeete na akoorwo nĩ hinya. Hĩndĩ ĩyo amake
2Samuel17:3 Njooke ngũhũndũrĩre andũ aake oothe
2Samuel17:4 Mataaro macio magĩkenia Abisalomu na atongoria oothe a Isiraeli.
2Samuel17:5 Ningĩ Abisalomu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel17:7 Naake Hushai agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:8 Wee nĩũũĩ wega atĩ thooguo na andũ aake nĩ arũi mbaara mũno
2Samuel17:9 Rĩu no gũkorwo nĩkwĩhitha ehithĩĩte ngurungainĩ kana handũ hangĩ. Rĩrĩa Daudi arĩtharĩkĩra andũ aaku
2Samuel17:10 O naake mũndũ ũrĩa njamba mũno
2Samuel17:11 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel17:12 Nĩtũgaakora Daudi o harĩa agaakorwo arĩ
2Samuel17:13 Angĩgaatoonya itũũrainĩ-rĩ
2Samuel17:14 Abisalomu na Aisiraeli oothe makiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:15 Hushai agĩcooka akĩĩra athĩnjĩri Ngai Zadoku na Abiatharu
2Samuel17:16 Hushai akĩongerera akiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel17:18 Mũthenya ũmwe nĩmoonirwo nĩ kamwana
2Samuel17:19 Mũtumia wa mũndũ ũcio akĩoya ngunĩko agĩkunĩka mũromo wakĩo. Agĩcooka akĩanĩka ngano hau igũrũ
2Samuel17:20 Nacio njaama cia Abisalomu igĩthiĩ mũciĩ ũcio ikĩũria mũtumia ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel17:21 Njaama icio ciathiĩ
2Samuel17:22 Kwoguo mũthamaki Daudi na andũ aake oothe makĩambĩrĩria kũringa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani. Rũũciinĩ gũkĩrooka gũkĩa
2Samuel17:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel17:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi agĩkorwo akinyĩĩte itũũra rĩa Mahanaimu
2Samuel17:25 Abisalomu nĩatuĩte Amasa mũnene wa gwatha mbũtũ cia ita handũinĩ ha Joabu. Amasa aarĩ mũrũ wa Jetheri
2Samuel17:26 Abisalomu na andũ aake maambire hema ciao bũrũriinĩ wa Gileadi.
2Samuel17:27 Rĩrĩa Daudi aakinyire Mahanaimu
2Samuel17:28 (28-29) Nao makĩmũtwarĩra mbakũri
2Samuel18:1 Naake mũthamaki Daudi agĩcookanĩrĩria andũ aake hamwe
2Samuel18:2 Agĩcooka akĩgayania andũ acio ikundi ithatũ nene. Gĩkundi kĩa mbere agĩkĩiga rungu rwa watho wa Joabu
2Samuel18:3 No o magĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:4 Mũthamaki agĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:5 Naake mũthamaki agĩatha Joabu
2Samuel18:6 Kwoguo ita cia Daudi ikiumagara
2Samuel18:7 Nao andũ a Isiraeli makĩhootwo nĩ andũ a Daudi. Mũthenya ũcio nĩmaahũũrirwo ũũru mũno
2Samuel18:8 Mbaara ĩgĩgĩtamba bũrũriinĩ wothe
2Samuel18:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel18:10 Mũndũ ũmwe wa andũ a Daudi akĩmuona
2Samuel18:11 Naake Joabu akĩũria mũndũ ũcio atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:12 No mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:13 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Samuel18:14 Joabu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Samuel18:15 Nacio thigari ikũmi cia Joabu ikĩrigiicĩria Abisalomu
2Samuel18:16 Joabu agĩcooka agĩathana karumbeeta kahuuhwo ga kũrũũgamia mbaara. Nao andũ aake makĩhũndũka
2Samuel18:17 Magĩcooka makĩoya kĩimba kĩa Abisalomu
2Samuel18:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel18:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ahimaazu mũrũ wa Zadoku akĩĩra Joabu atĩrĩ

2Samuel18:21 Agĩcooka akĩĩra ngombo yake

2Samuel20:10 No Amasa ndaigana kuona rũhiũ rũu Joabu aanyiitĩĩte na guoko gwake kwa ũmotho. Joabu agĩkĩmũtheeca nda

2Samuel20:12 Kĩimba kĩa Amasa kĩaiyũrĩĩte thakame

2Samuel20:16 Itũũrainĩ rĩu nĩkwarĩ na mũndũ wa nja mũũgĩ. Naake akĩanĩrĩra kuuma rũthingoinĩ igũrũ akiuga atĩrĩ

2Samuel21:13 Daudi agĩkĩoithia mahĩndĩ ma Saũlũ
2Samuel21:14 Nao magĩgĩthika mahĩndĩ ma Saũlũ na ma Jonathani mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ya Kishu
2Samuel21:15 Ningĩ gũkiuma mbaara ingĩ gatagatĩinĩ ka Afilisiti na Aisiraeli
2Samuel21:16 Kĩmũndũ kĩmwe kĩnene gĩetagwo Ishibibenobu
2Samuel21:17 No rĩĩrĩ
2Samuel21:18 Thuutha ũcio gũkĩgĩa mbaara ingĩ na Afilisiti kũu Gobu
2Samuel21:19 Ningĩ gũkĩgĩa na mbaara o rĩngĩ kũu Gobu gatagatĩinĩ ka Aisiraeli na Afilisiti. Naake Elihanani mũrũ wa Jairũ woimĩĩte Bethilehemu akĩũraga kĩmũndũ kĩngĩ kĩnene gĩetagwo Goliathũ kĩoimĩĩte Gathu. Mũtĩ wa itimũ rĩakĩo warĩ mũtungu o ta rũbaaũ rũrĩa rũkoragwo maciniinĩ ya gũtuma nguo.
2Samuel21:20 O rĩngĩ gũkĩgĩa na mbaara ingĩ kũu Gathu

2Samuel22:1 Daudi agĩkĩinĩra MWATHANI rwĩmbo rũũrũ
2Samuel22:2 MWATHANI nĩ we mũmenyereri nĩ we handũ haakwa haakĩĩtwo na rũthingo rwa hinya ha kwĩhitha na no we mũngũũri.
2Samuel22:3 Ngai wakwa-rĩ
2Samuel22:4 Ngayagĩra MWATHANI naake akahonokia kuuma harĩ thũ ciakwa.MWATHANI arogoocwo.
2Samuel22:5 Ndathaĩĩtwo nĩ mĩnyororo ya gĩkuũ
2Samuel22:6 Mĩnyororo ya kwa arĩa akuũ nĩ yo yeĩthiorereirie
2Samuel22:7 Ndĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ ĩyo ngĩkaĩra MWATHANI; ngĩkaĩra Ngai wakwa andeithie.Naake akĩigua mũgambo wakwa arĩ o Hekaarũinĩ yake
2Samuel22:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo thĩ ĩkĩinaina na ĩgĩthingitha; nacio itina cia matuinĩ ikĩinaina o na igĩthingitha
2Samuel22:9 Maniũrũ maake makiuma ndoogo ĩkĩambata na igũrũ
2Samuel22:10 Akĩhingũrania igũrũ
2Samuel22:11 Aathiaga oombũkĩĩte akuuĩĩtwo nĩ kĩũmbe kĩrĩ mathagu agĩgĩthiĩ arĩ mathaguinĩ ma rũhuuho.
2Samuel22:12 Eehumbĩire na nduma
2Samuel22:13 Makara maakanaga makĩrĩrĩmbũka moimĩĩte ũkengiinĩ ũrĩa warĩ mbere yake.
2Samuel22:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI akĩruruma e kũu igũrũ; naguo mũgambo wa Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno ũkĩiguuo.
2Samuel22:15 Naake agĩikia mĩguĩ yake
2Samuel22:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kũndũ kũrĩa kwĩ na thĩ wa iria rĩrĩa inene
2Samuel22:17 MWATHANI arĩ igũrũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko akĩnyiita
2Samuel22:18 Agĩkĩĩhonokia kuuma mookoinĩ ma thũ ciakwa iria ciangĩrĩĩtie hinya
2Samuel22:19 Manjũkĩrĩire rĩrĩa ndaarĩ mathĩĩnainĩ
2Samuel22:20 MWATHANI agĩkĩnyumĩrĩria kũndũ gũtaarĩ na moogwati; agĩkĩhonokia nĩ ũndũ nĩakeneetio nĩ niĩ.
2Samuel22:21 MWATHANI akĩndĩha kũringana na ũthingu wakwa; akĩndĩha kĩndũ na kĩngĩ nĩ ũndũ mooko maakwa matiekĩĩte ũũru.
2Samuel22:22 O na nĩ ũndũ ndiagĩĩte kũrũmĩrĩra njĩra cia MWATHANI kana ngahuutatĩra Ngai wakwa nĩguo njĩke maũndũ mooru.
2Samuel22:23 Nĩndahingĩĩtie ũrĩa mawatho maake moothe moigĩĩte
2Samuel22:24 Ndiarĩ na mahĩtia mbere ya MWATHANI
2Samuel22:25 Tondũ ũcio MWATHANI nĩandĩhĩĩte kũringana na ũthingu wakwa
2Samuel22:26 Wee
2Samuel22:27 Wĩ mũtheru harĩ arĩa maikaraga methereetie
2Samuel22:28 Wee-rĩ
2Samuel22:29 Nĩ we

2Samuel22:31 Ĩ Ngai ũyũ njĩra ciake ti nginyanĩru! Ĩ ciĩranĩro ciake ti ciakwĩhokwo! Nĩ we ngo ya arĩa oothe mooragĩra harĩ we amagitagĩre.

1Kings4:1 Naake mũthamaki Solomoni agĩgĩthiĩ na mbere gũthamaka Isiraeli guothe.
1Kings4:2 Nacio njaama iria cia mũteithagia gwathana ciarĩ ici:Azaria mũrũ wa Zadoku: mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
1Kings4:3 Elihorefu na Ahija
1Kings4:4 Benaia mũrũ wa Jehoiada: mũnene wa mbũtũ cia itaZadoku na Abiatharu: athĩnjĩri Ngai
1Kings4:5 Azaria mũrũ wa Nathani: Mũnene wa aathani a ng'ongoZabudu mũrũ wa Nathani: Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai na mũtaari wa mũthamaki
1Kings4:6 Ahisharu: mũrũũgamĩrĩri wa ndungata cia mũthamakiAdoniramu mũrũ wa Abida: mũũrũũgamĩrĩri wa arĩa maarutaga mawĩra ma hinya.
1Kings4:7 Ningĩ Solomoni agĩthuura andũ ikũmi na eerĩ matuĩke aathani a gwathaga ng'ongo ciothe cia Isiraeli. Acio nĩ o maatuĩtwo a kũreehagĩre mũthamaki na mũciĩ wake irio. O mũndũ areehaga irio mweri ũmwe thĩinĩ wa mwaka.
1Kings4:8 Namo marĩĩtwa ma aathani acio ikũmi na eerĩ a ng'ongo na kũrĩa mũndũ aathanaga maahaanaga ta ũũ:Benihuri: bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu
1Kings4:9 Benidekeri: matũũra ma Makazu
1Kings4:10 Benihesedi: matũũra ma Arubothu
1Kings4:11 Benabinadabu ũrĩa wahikĩĩtie Tafathu mwarĩ wa Solomoni: rũgongo ruothe rwa Dori
1Kings4:12 Baana mũrũ wa Ahiludu: matũũra ma Taanaka
1Kings4:13 Benigeberi: itũũra rĩa Ramothu bũrũriinĩ wa Gileadi; na icagi iria ciarĩ kũu Gileadi cia mbarĩ ya Jairũ mũrũ wa Manase
1Kings4:14 Ahinadabu mũrũ wa Ido: rũgongo rwa Mahanaimu
1Kings4:15 Ahimaazu: ũrĩa wahikĩĩtie Basemathi
1Kings4:16 Baana mũrũ wa Hushai: rũgongo ruothe rwa Asheri na itũũra rĩa Bealothu
1Kings4:17 Jehoshafatu mũrũ wa Parua: rũgongo ruothe rwa Isakaru
1Kings4:18 Shimei mũrũ wa Ela: bũrũri wothe wa Benjamini
1Kings4:19 Geberi mũrũ wa Uri: bũrũri wa Gileadi
1Kings4:20 Nao andũ a Isiraeli na a Juda maingĩhĩĩte o ta mũthanga ũrĩa ũrĩ rũteereinĩ rwa iria. Maatũire maarĩaga na makanyuaga na magakenaga.
1Kings4:21 Naake Solomoni agĩgĩathana bũrũri wothe kuuma rũũĩ rwa Farati kinya bũrũri wa Afilisiti o na nginya mũhakainĩ wa Misiri. Nao andũ a kũu nĩmaamũtwaragĩra igooti
1Kings4:22 Indo iria ciatwaragwo kwa Solomoni mũthenya ũmwe ciarĩ kiro ngiri ithaano (5
1Kings4:23 ndeegwa ikũmi noru
1Kings4:24 Ningĩ Solomoni no we wathaga bũrũri wothe wa mwena wa ithũĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Farati
1Kings4:25 Namo matukũ moothe ma wathani wa Solomoni
1Kings4:26 Naake Solomoni aarĩ na ciugũ cia mbarathi ngiri mĩrongo ĩna (40
1Kings4:27 Nao aathani acio aake ikũmi na eerĩ magĩgĩtuĩka a kũreehagĩre mũthamaki Solomoni na andũ aake irio cia kũigana
1Kings4:28 Ningĩ agacooka agatwarĩra mbarathi cia ihenya na mbarathi iria ingĩ mbaarĩ na rũũa rwa ngano o ta ũrĩa aatuĩrĩirwo.
1Kings4:29 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩhe mũthamaki Solomoni ũũgĩ

1Kings5:5 MWATHANI nĩarĩĩkanĩire na baaba Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings5:6 Kwoguo rekia andũ mathiĩ Lebanoni makandemere mĩtarakwa. Niĩ na niĩ nĩngũrekia andũ aakwa mathiĩ magateithanie nao. Andũ acio aaku-rĩ
1Kings5:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings5:8 Ningĩ Hiramu agĩcooka akĩrekanĩria Solomoni na ndũmĩrĩri ĩno akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings5:9 Ndungata ciakwa nĩigaikũrũkia mĩgogo ĩyo imĩrutĩĩte Lebanoni imĩkinyie iriainĩ
1Kings5:10 Kwoguo Hiramu agĩgĩtwarithĩria Solomoni mĩgogo ya mĩtarakwa na ya mĩthengera ĩrĩa eendaga.
1Kings5:11 Naake Solomoni agakĩheaga Hiramu tani cia kĩmetiriki ngiri igĩrĩ (2
1Kings5:12 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩhe Solomoni ũũgĩ o ta ũrĩa aamwĩrĩire. Gũkĩgĩa thaayũ gatagatĩinĩ ka Hiramu na Solomoni na makĩgĩa kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩa gũteithanagia.
1Kings5:13 Na rĩĩrĩ

1Kings5:15 Hamwe na acio
