1Kings5:18 Nao aaki a Hiramu
1Kings6:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings6:2 Naguo mwako ũcio wahaanaga ta ũũ: Mwena wa na thĩinĩ warĩ na ũraihu wa mita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mũgwanja
1Kings6:3 Nakĩo gĩthaku kĩrĩa kĩarĩ mbere ya handũ harĩa hatheru kĩarĩ na ũraihu wa mita inya na nuthu
1Kings6:4 Nacio ndirica cia Hekaarũ ĩyo agĩciakithia na marima maceke na mwena wa na nja na maaramu na mwena wa na thĩinĩ.
1Kings6:5 Ningĩ na mwena wa na nja wa thingo
1Kings6:6 Thĩinĩ wa ngoroba ya thĩ o nyũmba yarĩ na wariĩ wa mita igĩrĩ na boiniti igĩrĩ. O na ningĩ niyarĩ na nyũmba ya gatagatĩ ya wariĩ wa mita igĩrĩ na boiniti mũgwanja na ya gatatũ ya wariĩ wa mita ithatũ na boiniti ĩmwe. Thingo cia Hekaarũ aaciakĩĩte igĩtigagio mbako cia gũcooka kũigĩrĩrwo mbaaũ ndungu cia mwako wa nyũmba icio nĩguo mbaaũ itigaatoonye thingoinĩ cia Hekaarũ ĩyo.
1Kings6:7 Namo mahiga marĩa maakaga Hekaarũ ĩyo maacũhĩirio o kware
1Kings6:8 Naguo mũromo wa gũtoonya ngoroba ya thĩ warĩ na mwena wa kĩanda wa Hekaarũ ĩyo. Mũndũ agĩtoonya ngoroba ya keerĩ o na ya gatatũ ahũthagĩra njĩra yakĩĩtwo ta ngathĩ.
1Kings6:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni agĩakithia mwako wothe wa Hekaarũ akĩũrĩĩkia. Agĩcooka agĩĩkĩra ciiring'i ya mbaaũ cia burangi ndungu na mbaaũ ingĩ
1Kings6:10 Nacio ngoroba icio aakithĩĩtie
1Kings6:11 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Solomoni atĩrĩ
1Kings6:12 “Ũngĩtũũra wathĩkagĩra mawatho na maathani maakwa-rĩ
1Kings6:13 Nĩngũtũũrania na andũ aakwa a Isiraeli ndĩ thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ ĩno ũraaka
1Kings6:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Kings6:15 Nacio thingo cia mwena wa na thĩinĩ agĩcihumbĩrithia na mbaaũ cia mĩtarakwa ciakĩĩtwo kuuma thĩ kinya igũrũ. Nakuo kũu Hekaarũ thĩ
1Kings6:16 Agĩcooka agĩakithia kanyũmba kaniini o kũu Hekaarũinĩ mwena wa na thuutha agĩgatua Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno. Kaagayanĩĩtio na mbaaũ cia mĩtarakwa kuuma thĩ kinya igũrũ na kaarĩ na ũraihu wa mita kenda.
1Kings6:17 Nayo nyũmba ĩyo ĩngĩ ya na mwena wa mbere wa Handũ Hau Hatheru Mũno yarĩ na ũraihu wa mita ikũmi na inyaanya.
1Kings6:18 Nacio mbaaũ cia mĩtarakwa iria ciahumbĩrĩĩte Hekaarũ na mwena wa na thĩinĩ ciagemeetio na mbica ciacũhĩĩtio
1Kings6:19 Nako kanyũmba kau aakithĩĩtie kũu thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ kaarĩ ga kũigaga Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI.
1Kings6:20 Kanyũmba kau kaarĩ mita kenda thikwea na kaahumbĩrĩĩtwo na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno mĩena yothe. Nakĩo kĩgongoona kĩahumbĩrĩĩtwo na mbaaũ cia mĩtarakwa na mwana wa na rũgongo.
1Kings6:21 Kũu thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ guothe kwaahumbĩrĩĩtwo na thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno
1Kings6:22 Naake Solomoni akĩgemia Hekaarũ yothe kũu thĩinĩ na thahabu. Ningĩ akĩhumbĩra kĩgongoona kĩa Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno na thahabu.
1Kings6:23 Naake Solomoni agĩthondekithia mĩhiano ya ciũmbe igĩrĩ iria irĩ mathagu na mbaaũ cia mĩtamaiyũ agĩciiga Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno. O kĩmwe gĩacio kĩarĩ na ũraihu wa mita inya na boiniti inya.
1Kings6:24 (24-26) Ciũmbe icio ciarĩ cia ithimo ciiganaine na ningĩ cia mũthondekere o ro ũmwe. O kĩmwe kĩarĩ na mathagu meerĩ na o ithagu rĩarĩ rĩa ũraihu wa mita igĩrĩ na boiniti igĩrĩ. Kwoguo ũraihu wa kuuma mũthia wa ithagu rĩmwe kinya mũthia wa rĩrĩa rĩngĩ warĩ mita inya na boiniti inya.
1Kings6:25 Nacio ciũmbe icio igĩrĩ i mathagu agĩciiga thĩinĩ wa Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno. Namo mathagu maacio maatambarũkĩĩte o ithagu rĩkahuutanĩria na rĩrĩa rĩngĩ o gatagatĩ ka nyũmba
1Kings6:26 Naake mũthamaki akĩhumbĩra ciũmbe icio na thahabu.
1Kings6:27 Nacio thingo ciothe cia tũnyũmba tũu twerĩ agĩcigemia na mĩhiano ya ciũmbe iria irĩ mathagu ciacũhĩĩtio
1Kings6:28 Nakuo kũu Hekaarũinĩ thĩ
1Kings6:29 Agĩcooka agĩthondekithia mĩrango ĩĩrĩ ya mbaaũ cia mĩtamaiyũ inyiitanĩĩte hamwe ya kũhingaga Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno. Mwena wa na igũrũ wa mĩrango ĩyo yathondekeetwo na mbaaũ cianyiitithanĩĩtio ikagĩa na mĩthia ĩtaano.
1Kings6:30 Nayo mĩrango ĩyo akĩmĩgemia na mĩhiano ĩrĩa ĩrĩ mathagu na ya mĩkĩndũ na ya mahũa macanũku. Agĩcooka akĩmĩhumbĩra na thahabu na akĩhumbĩra ciũmbe icio na mĩkĩndũ ĩyo.
1Kings6:31 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩthondekithia buremu cia mbaaũ cia mĩtamaiyũ mũromoinĩ wa gũtoonyaga Hekaarũ thĩinĩ. Nacio buremu icio ciathondekeetwo irĩ cia thikwea.
1Kings6:32 Mĩrango ĩrĩa yekĩrirwo ho yarĩ ya gũkũnjagwo na yarĩ ya mbaaũ cia mĩthengera.
1Kings6:33 Agĩcooka akĩmĩgemia na mĩhiano yacũhĩĩtio ya ciũmbe iria i mathagu
1Kings6:34 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩakithia gĩthaku na mwena wa na mbere wa Hekaarũ ĩyo. Nakĩo kĩairigĩirwo na rũthingo rwa mahiga rũrĩa rwaigĩrĩirwo mbaaũ ndungu cia mĩtarakwa o thuutha wa koothi ithatũ cia mahiga.
1Kings6:35 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings6:36 Naguo mwako wothe wa Hekaarũ ĩyo
1Kings7:1 Ningĩ Solomoni akĩambĩrĩria gwaka nyũmba ya ũthamaki na thuutha wa mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtatũ akĩmĩrĩĩkia.
1Kings7:2 (2-3) Agĩcooka agĩaka nyũmba ĩngĩ akĩmĩĩta mũtitũ wa Lebanoni. Ũraihu wayo warĩ mita mĩrongo ĩna na inya
1Kings7:3 Nacio thingo cia mĩena yerĩ ciarĩ na mĩhari ĩtatũ ya ndirica. Ndirica icio nĩciaroranĩĩte.
1Kings7:4 Nayo mĩrango yothe na ndirica ciothe ciarĩ na buremu cia thikwea
1Kings7:5 Ningĩ agĩakithia nyũmba ya mĩcemanio na itugĩ
1Kings7:6 Agĩcooka agĩakithia nyũmba harĩa gĩtĩ kĩa ũthamaki gĩaikaraga gĩa gũtuithanagĩria maciira
1Kings7:7 Nayo nyũmba yake ya gũikara akĩmĩaka handũ mwanya o hau thuutha wa nyũmba ya Maciira
1Kings7:8 Mĩako ĩyo yothe o ũndũ ũmwe na gĩthaku kĩrĩa kĩnene ciakĩĩtwo na mahiga ma goro kuuma mũthingiinĩ kinya igũrũ. Mahiga macio maacũhĩirio o kware mathimĩĩtwo wega na magathambio na mũthumeno mĩena yerĩ.
1Kings7:9 Naguo mũthingi wa mwako o mwako wa nyũmba icio wakĩĩtwo na mahiga marĩa manene maacũhĩirio kware. Mamwe maarĩ ma ũraihu wa mita ithatũ na nuthu na marĩa mangĩ ma ũraihu wa mita inya.
1Kings7:10 Igũrũ rĩa mahiga macio kwaigĩrĩirwo mahiga mangĩ ma goro maathimĩĩtwo na magaacũhio wega
1Kings7:11 Nakĩo gĩthaku kĩa nyũmba ya mũthamaki
1Kings7:12 Ningĩ mũthamaki Solomoni akĩrekanĩria mũndũ wetagwo Huramu wa bũrũri wa Turo.
1Kings7:13 Nyina oimĩĩte mũhĩrĩgainĩ wa Nafutali. Ithe oimĩĩte Turo no nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua na aarĩ mũturi wa indo cia gĩcango. Huramu aarĩ mũturi wa indo cia gĩcango mũũgĩ na woĩ gũtura indo cia cuuma mũno. Naake agĩũka kwa mũthamaki Solomoni akĩmũrutĩra wĩra wothe ũrĩa wakonainie na ũturi wa indo cia gĩcango.
1Kings7:14 Huramu agĩthondeka itugĩ igĩrĩ cia gĩcango o kĩmwe gĩa kĩrũũgamo kĩa mita inyaanya na mita ithaano na boiniti ithatũ mũthiũrũrũko.
1Kings7:15 Agĩcooka agĩthondeka ciongo igĩrĩ cia gĩcango cia kĩrũũgamo kĩa mita igĩrĩ na boiniti igĩrĩ. Icio ciarĩ cia kũigĩrĩra igũrũ rĩa itugĩ icio aathondekeete.
1Kings7:16 Ningĩ o igũrũ wa gĩtugĩ o gĩtugĩ
1Kings7:17 Hagacooka hakarigiicĩrio na mĩhari ĩĩrĩ ya makongomanga ma gĩcango.
1Kings7:18 Nacio ciongo icio ciarĩ igũrũ wa itugĩ icio cia gĩthakuinĩ-rĩ
1Kings7:19 Mahũa macio maagemeetie handũ harĩa haarĩ ha gĩthiũrũrĩ harĩa nyororo ĩyo yatoonyanĩĩtio. Na nĩhaarĩ na mĩhiano ya ngongomanga magana meerĩ ciĩkĩrĩĩtwo mĩhari ĩĩrĩ ĩĩrĩ ithiũrũrũkĩirie o kĩongo.
1Kings7:20 Naake Huramu akĩhanda itugĩ icio cierĩ mĩena yerĩ ya mũromo wa Hekaarũ. Kĩrĩa kĩarĩ na mwena wa kĩanda agĩgĩtua Jakini
1Kings7:21 Nacio ciongo cia gĩcango iria ciarĩ na mahũa matariĩ ta itooka ciarĩ igũrũ wa itugĩ icio.Kwoguo wĩra wa gwaka itugĩ icio ũgĩkĩrĩĩka.
1Kings7:22 Ningĩ Huramu agĩthondeka itangi rĩa gĩthiũrũrĩ rĩa gĩcango rĩa ũriku wa mita igĩrĩ na boiniti igĩrĩ
1Kings7:23 Ningĩ gũthiũrũrũkĩria mĩthia ya itangi rĩu na mwena wa thĩ
1Kings7:24 Narĩo itangi rĩu rĩaigĩrĩirwo igũrũ wa mĩhiano ya ndeegwa ikũmi na igĩrĩ cia gĩcango. Mĩhiano ĩyo yaroreete na mwena wa na nja
1Kings7:25 Naguo ũtungu wa mĩena ya itangi rĩu warĩ wa mirimita mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithaano. Mĩcũrĩ yarĩo yathondekeetwo ta mĩcũrĩ ya gĩkombe ĩyũnĩĩte na nja ta mĩcũrĩ ya gĩtooka. Itangi rĩu rĩngĩaiyũririo na rita ngiri mĩrongo ĩna (40
1Kings7:26 Ningĩ Huramu agĩcooka agĩthondeka ngaari cia kũguucio ikũmi cia gĩcango o ĩmwe ya ũraihu wa mita ĩmwe na boiniti inyaanya
1Kings7:27 Ngaari icio agĩcithondekera buremu cia cuuma cia thikwea inyiitithanĩĩtio na tũcunjĩ twa cuuma twa thikwea
1Kings7:28 na ikagemio na mĩhiano ya mĩrũũthi
1Kings7:29 Ngaari icio o ĩmwe yarĩ na mĩgũrũ ĩna ya gĩcango na ĩkagathĩkanio mĩcuumainĩ ya gĩcango. Ningĩ koonainĩ inya cia ngaari o ngaari kwarĩ na cuuma cia gĩcango cia kũnyiitĩrĩra kĩraĩ
1Kings7:30 Ningĩ nĩhaarĩ na buremu ya cuuma ya gĩthiũrũrĩ nĩ ũndũ wa kũnyiitĩrĩra kĩraĩ. Naguo ũraihu wayo na igũrũ warĩ cenitimita mĩrongo ĩna na ithaano kuuma igũrũ wa ngaari na ũriku wa cenitimita ikũmi na inyaanya. Ningĩ nĩyatemereirwo mĩhiano ya kũmĩgemia ya thikwea.
1Kings7:31 Nayo mĩgũrũ ya ngaari icio cia kũguucio yarĩ na kĩrũũgamo kĩa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩtandatũ na ithathatũ na yanyiitithanĩĩtio na cuuma. Mĩcuuma ya kũharũkio mĩgũrũ yohanĩĩtio o ũndũ ũmwe na ngaari icio.
1Kings7:32 Nayo mĩgũrũ ya ngaari icio yahaanaga o ta ya ngaari cia mbarathi; mĩcuuma ya kũharũkio
1Kings7:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings7:34 Narĩo igũrũ rĩa ngaari o ngaari nĩhaarĩ na mũcibi wa gĩthiũrũrĩ warĩ wa cenitimita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ. Mĩrĩnga ĩrĩa yanyiitĩrĩire na cuuma iria ciohithanĩĩtie mũcibi ũcio cianyiitithanĩĩtio na ngaari ĩyo ya kũguucio.
1Kings7:35 Nayo mĩrĩnga o na cuuma ciayo ciagemeetio na mĩhiano ya ciũmbe iria irĩ mathagu
1Kings7:36 Ũguo nĩguo Huramu aagĩthondekire ngaari icio ikũmi cia kũguucio; ciothe nĩciaiganaine o na nĩciahaanaine.
1Kings7:37 Ningĩ Huramu agĩcooka agĩthondekera ngaari icio iraĩ ikũmi cia gĩcango
1Kings7:38 Hiramu akĩiga ngaari ithaano mwena wa na kĩanda wa Hekaarũ
1Kings7:39 (40-45) Ningĩ Huramu agĩcooka agĩthondeka nyũngũ
1Kings7:40 Naake mũthamaki aacithondekithĩirie gĩturĩroinĩ kĩrĩa kĩarĩ gatagatĩ ga Sukothu na Zarethani gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Jorodani.
1Kings7:41 Naake Solomoni ndaigana gũthimithia indo icio cia gĩcango nĩguo imenyeke ũritũ wacio
1Kings7:42 Naake Solomoni agĩthondekithia o na indo cia thahabu cia kũigwo kũu Hekaarũinĩ: kĩgongoona
1Kings7:43 mĩtĩ ikũmi ya gũcuuragio mataawa hau mbere ya Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno
1Kings7:44 ikombe na tũmĩĩhato tũniini twa kũhoria ndambĩ
1Kings7:45 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings8:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Solomoni agĩĩta atongoria oothe a mĩhĩrĩga na a mbarĩ cia Isiraeli mooke harĩ we kũu Jerusalemu. Aameetire nĩ geetha makagĩĩre Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI kuuma itũũra rĩa Daudi rĩrĩa rĩetagwo Zayuni marĩreehe Hekaarũinĩ.
1Kings8:2 Nao atongoria oothe a Isiraeli makĩũngana he mũthamaki mweriinĩ wa mũgwanja (na nĩguo wa Ethanimu) hĩndĩ ya thigũkũ ya Ithũnũ.
1Kings8:3 Na rĩrĩa atongoria oothe maakinyire
1Kings8:4 makĩrĩtoonyia Hekaarũinĩ. Nao Alawii na athĩnjĩri Ngai magĩkuuanĩra Hema ya MWATHANI ya gũtũnganwo o na indo ciothe iria ciarĩ nyamũre iria ciarĩ kuo magĩcitoonyia Hekaarũinĩ.
1Kings8:5 Naake mũthamaki Solomoni hamwe na andũ oothe arĩa moonganĩĩte hau mbere ya Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro makĩruta magongoona ma ng'ondu na ng'ombe itangĩtarĩka nĩ ũndũ wa kũingĩha.
1Kings8:6 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai magĩgĩtoonyia Ithandũkũ rĩu rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩa MWATHANI makĩrĩiga handũ haarĩo harĩa heetagwo Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno rungu rwa ciũmbe iria irĩ mathagu.
1Kings8:7 Namo mathagu ma ciũmbe icio maatambarũkĩĩtio makahumbĩra Ithandũkũ rĩu o na mĩgamba ĩrĩa rĩakuuagwo nayo.
1Kings8:8 Nayo mĩthia ya mĩgamba ĩyo nĩyonekaga nĩ mũndũ arũũgamĩĩte mũrangoinĩ aroreete Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno nĩ mũndũ wa kũraiha. Ndĩngĩahotire kuoneka nĩ mũndũ arĩ handũ hangĩ. (Mĩgamba ĩyo ĩrĩ o ho o na ũũmũũthĩ).
1Kings8:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings8:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings8:11 o nginya athĩnjĩri Ngai makĩremwo nĩgũtungata nĩ ũndũ wa itu rĩu
1Kings8:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Solomoni akĩhooya atĩrĩ:“Wee MWATHANI
1Kings8:13 Rĩu nĩngwakĩire Hekaarũ thaka
1Kings8:14 Naake Solomoni akĩhũgũkĩra andũ oothe a Isiraeli akĩmaraathima marũũgamĩĩte o hau
1Kings8:15 akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings8:16 ‘Kuuma rĩrĩa ndarutire andũ aakwa a Isiraeli kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri
1Kings8:17 Naake Solomoni agĩthiĩ na mbere na mĩario akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings8:18 No MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings8:19 no rĩĩrĩ wee mwene ti we ũkaanjakĩra
1Kings8:20 “Na rĩu
1Kings8:21 Ningĩ hamwe na ũguo nĩnjakĩĩte handũ harĩa Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩrĩa rĩ na ihengere iria cia Kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩrĩigagwo o kũu Hekaarũinĩ. Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu nĩ kĩrĩa MWATHANI arĩĩkanĩire na maithe maitũ rĩrĩa aamarutire bũrũri wa Misiri.”
1Kings8:22 Naake Solomoni akĩrũũgama hau mbere ya kĩgongoona kĩa MWATHANI akĩonagwo nĩ andũ oothe
1Kings8:23 akĩhooya atĩrĩ
1Kings8:24 Nĩũrũmĩĩtie kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa werĩire baaba Daudi
1Kings8:25 Na rĩu MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli
1Kings8:26 Na rĩu
1Kings8:27 “No rĩĩrĩ
1Kings8:28 Ndagũthaitha MWATHANI Ngai wakwa ũthikĩrĩrie ihooya rĩakwa
1Kings8:29 Reke maitho maaku maikarage macũũthĩrĩirie Hekaarũ ĩno ĩrĩa ũthuurĩĩte ya gũthaathayagĩrio hĩndĩ ciothe. Ningĩ ndagũthaitha ũgaathikagĩrĩria hĩndĩ ciothe rĩrĩa ndaingĩra kuo gũkũhooya.
1Kings8:30 Ĩtĩkĩra gũthikagĩrĩria mahooya maakwa o na ma andũ aaku a Isiraeli rĩrĩa tuoka handũ haaha gũkũhooya. Ningĩ ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ ũgatũthikagĩrĩria
1Kings8:31 “Mũndũ angĩkaahĩtĩria mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ
1Kings8:32 hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI ũgaathikĩrĩria ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
1Kings8:33 “Rĩrĩa andũ aaku a Isiraeli mahootwo nĩ thũ ciao nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa makũhĩtĩirie
1Kings8:34 hĩndĩ ĩyo ũmathikagĩrĩrie ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ. Ningĩ ũmoohagĩre meehia maao
1Kings8:35 “Wee
1Kings8:36 ndagũthaitha ũmathikagĩrĩrie ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ. Hĩndĩ ĩyo ohagĩra mũthamaki na andũ a Isiraeli meehia maao
1Kings8:37 “Ningĩ bũrũri ũngĩgwatwo nĩ ng'aragu
1Kings8:38 o na hĩndĩ ĩyo mangĩkũhooya
1Kings8:39 ndagũthaitha ũiguage mahooya maao. Ndagũthaitha ũmathikagĩrĩrie ũrĩ kũu gwaku igũrũ ũkamoohera meehia na ũmateithagie. Ningĩ tondũ wee mwene
1Kings8:40 Ĩkaga ũguo nĩguo andũ aaku matũũre magwathĩkagĩra matukũ moothe ma muoyo wao
1Kings8:41 (41-42) “Ningĩ mũndũ wa bũrũri ũngĩ angĩkaigua ngumo yaku
1Kings8:42 ndagũthaitha ũkamũigua. Ningĩ ũkamũhingĩria mahooya maake ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ
1Kings8:43 “Ningĩ andũ aaku mangĩkoimagara makarũe na thũ ciao
1Kings8:44 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua mahooya maao ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ ũmahe ũhootani.
1Kings8:45 “Andũ aaku mangĩgaakwĩhia (amu hatikĩrĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũteehagia) na nĩ ũndũ wa kũraakario nĩ o
1Kings8:46 mangĩkoona meehia maao merire
1Kings8:47 Ningĩ mangĩkaahera na ma na matarĩ na itherũ marĩ bũrũri ũcio
1Kings8:48 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua mahooya maao ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ na ũmaiguĩre tha.
1Kings8:49 Ningĩ ũkamoohera meehia maao na ũremi wao ũrĩa maanakũremera
1Kings8:50 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Kings8:51 “Na rĩu MWATHANI
1Kings8:52 Nĩ ũndũ wee MWATHANI Ngai nĩ we wamathuurire kuuma kũrĩ andũ arĩa angĩ oothe a thĩ ũkĩmatua aaku o ta ũrĩa wameerire na kanua ka ndungata yaku Musa
1Kings8:53 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings8:54 Akĩraathima andũ aacio oothe na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings8:55 “MWATHANI arogoocwo
1Kings8:56 MWATHANI Ngai witũ aroikara na ithuĩ ta ũrĩa aikaraga hamwe na maithe maitũ; aroaga gũtũtiganĩria kana atũrekererie;
1Kings8:57 MWATHANI arotũma tũmwathĩkagĩre
1Kings8:58 Na rĩu
1Kings8:59 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ oothe a gũũkũ thĩ nĩmarĩmenyaga atĩ MWATHANI o we wiki nĩwe Ngai; na gũtirĩ na ũngĩ o na ũrĩkũ.
1Kings8:60 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Kings8:61 Naake mũthamaki Solomoni na andũ oothe a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ naake makĩrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona.
1Kings8:62 Naake Solomoni agĩkĩrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona ma thaayũ ma ndeegwa ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ (22
1Kings8:63 Ningĩ mũthenya o ũcio
1Kings8:64 Naake Solomoni na andũ oothe a Isiraeli magĩkũngũĩra thigũkũ ya Ithũnũ marĩ o hau mbere ya MWATHANI mĩthenya mũgwanja. Nao andũ acio maarĩ aingĩ mũno na moimĩĩte kuuma mwanyainĩ wa Hamathu na mwena wa rũgongo nginya karũũĩinĩ ka Misiri na mwena wa kĩanda.
1Kings8:65 Naguo mũthenya wa ĩnaana akĩmarekereria mainũke kwao mĩciĩ. Nao makĩgaathĩrĩria mũthamaki na makĩinũka makeneete nĩ ũndũ wa iraathimo iria MWATHANI aaraathimĩĩte ndungata yake Daudi nacio o na andũ aake a Isiraeli.
1Kings9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings9:2 MWATHANI akĩmuumĩrĩra rĩngĩ
1Kings9:3 Naake MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings9:4 No wee ũngĩtũũra wĩ mwĩhokeku na wĩ mũkinyanĩru o ta ũrĩa thooguo Daudi aarĩ
1Kings9:5 nĩngaatũma gĩtĩ gĩaku gĩa ũthamaki kĩgaacĩre o ta ũrĩa ndarĩĩkanĩire na thooguo Daudi. Nĩndamwĩrire atĩ Isiraeli gũgũtũũra gwathagwo nĩ njiarwa ciake.
1Kings9:6 No rĩĩrĩ
1Kings9:7 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngaarutũrũra Aisiraeli kuuma bũrũri ũyũ ndĩmaheete. Ningĩ nĩngaacooka ndiganĩrie Hekaarũ ĩno nyamũrĩĩte ĩgatuĩka handũ haakwa ha gũthaathayagĩrio. Hĩndĩ ĩyo bũrũri wothe ũnyararwo na ũnyũrũragio nĩ andũ oothe.
1Kings9:8 Nayo Hekaarũ ĩno ĩgaatuĩka maganjo matheri
1Kings9:9 Nao andũ magacookanagĩria atĩrĩ
1Kings9:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings9:11 Agĩcooka akĩhe Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo matũũra mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Galili nĩ ũndũ nĩ we wamũheete mĩtarakwa
1Kings9:12 Naake Hiramu agĩthiĩ kuona matũũra marĩa aaheetwo
1Kings9:13 Naake agĩkĩĩra Solomoni atĩrĩ
1Kings9:14 Mbere ĩyo Hiramu nĩatwarithĩirie mũthamaki Solomoni makĩria ma kiro ngiri inya (4
1Kings9:15 Ningĩ Solomoni akĩrutithia andũ wĩra na hinya nĩ ũndũ wa gwaka Hekaarũ
1Kings9:16 (Ningĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri nĩatharĩkĩire itũũra rĩa Gezeri
1Kings9:17 Tondũ ũcio Solomoni akĩrĩaka rĩngĩ.) Ningĩ Solomoni agĩakithia rĩngĩ Bethi Horoni ya na kĩanda
1Kings9:18 Baalathu na Tamaru
1Kings9:19 Ningĩ agĩakithia matũũra ma kũigagwo indo ciake
1Kings9:20 (20-21) Nao andũ arĩa maatigarĩĩte rĩrĩa Aisiraeli mooragire Akanaani rĩrĩa maamatuunyire bũrũri wao
1Kings9:21 No rĩĩrĩ
1Kings9:22 Ningĩ nĩkwarĩ na anjaama magana mataano ma mĩrongo ĩtaano (550)
1Kings9:23 Naake mwarĩ wa mũthamaki wa Misiri ũrĩa warĩ mũtumia wa Solomoni
1Kings9:24 Solomoni aarutagĩra kĩgongoonainĩ kĩrĩa aakĩire MWATHANI magongoona ma njino
1Kings9:25 Ningĩ Solomoni agĩakithia gĩkundi kĩa meeri o kũu Ezionigeberi kũrĩa gwakuhanĩrĩirie na Elathu
1Kings9:26 Naake Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo
1Kings9:27 Nao magĩthiĩ Ofiri
1Kings10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings10:2 Naake agĩkinya Jerusalemu arũmĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ aingĩ marĩ na ngamĩĩra ikuuĩĩte indo nungi wega
1Kings10:3 Naake Solomoni akĩmũcookeria maũndũ moothe ategũtigĩrĩra ũndũ o na ũmwe.
1Kings10:4 Naake kwini wa Sheba agĩkĩigua ũũgĩ wa Solomoni na akĩona nyũmba ĩrĩa aakĩĩte.
1Kings10:5 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩkĩona irio iria aarĩaga
1Kings10:6 Naake kwini agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
1Kings10:7 No rĩĩrĩ
1Kings10:8 Gũkena-rĩ
1Kings10:9 MWATHANI Ngai waku arogoocwo! O we ũrĩa ũkeneetio nĩwe agagũtua mũthamaki wa Isiraeli. Nĩ ũndũ wendo wake harĩ Isiraeli nĩ wa tene na tene
1Kings10:10 Naake kwini akĩhe mũthamaki Solomoni iheeo iria aamũreeheire nacio nĩ: makĩria ma kiro ngiri inya cia thahabu (4
1Kings10:11 Ningĩ gĩkundi kĩa meeri cia Hiramu kĩrĩa kĩareehire thahabu imĩrutĩĩte Ofiri
1Kings10:12 Naake Solomoni agĩthondeka itugĩ cia mĩthandarĩ ĩyo igĩtuĩka cia Hekaarũ na cia nyũmba yake. Ningĩ agĩthondeka nayo inanda o na ngita cia aini a nyĩmbo. Gũtirĩ kwareehwo mĩthandarĩ ĩngĩ mĩega ta ĩyo kũu Isiraeli o na gũtirĩ kuoneka ĩngĩ ta yo o na rĩ.
1Kings10:13 Naake mũthamaki Solomoni akĩhe kwini wa Sheba kĩrĩa gĩothe oorĩĩtie igũrũ rĩa iheeo iria we mwene aamũheete irĩ ũtaana wa mũthamaki. Naake kwini hamwe na njaama ciake makĩinũka Sheba bũrũriinĩ wao.
1Kings10:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings10:15 kuongerera marĩhi ma magooti na uumithio ũrĩa wareehagwo nĩ ahũũri a mbiacara. O na ningĩ nĩareehagĩrwo thahabu nĩ athamaki a Arabia o na abarũũthi a ng'ongo cia Isiraeli.
1Kings10:16 Ningĩ mũthamaki Solomoni agĩthondekithia ngo iria nene magana meerĩ (200)
1Kings10:17 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩthondekithia ngo ingĩ iria niini magana matatũ (300) na o ĩmwe yahumbĩragwo na ta kiro igĩrĩ cia thahabu. Naake mũthamaki akĩiga ngo icio ciothe nyũmbainĩ ĩrĩa yetagwo mũtitũ wa Lebanoni.
1Kings10:18 Ningĩ mũthamaki agĩthondekithia gĩtĩ gĩa ũthamaki kĩnene mũno kĩa mũguongo agĩcooka agĩkĩhumbĩra gĩothe na thahabu ĩrĩa njega mũno.
1Kings10:19 (19-20) Nakĩo gĩtĩ kĩu kĩahaicagwo na ngathĩ ya makinya matandatũ. Ningĩ nĩkĩarĩ na mũhiano wa mũrũũthi o mũthiainĩ wa ngathĩ o ngathĩ; yothe yarĩ mĩhiano ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya mĩrũũthi. Ningĩ na mwena wa na thuutha wa gĩtĩ kĩu nĩharĩ na mũhiano wa mũtwe wa ndeegwa
1Kings10:20 Ningĩ ikombe ciothe iria mũthamaki Solomoni aanyuaga nacio ciathondekeetwo na thahabu
1Kings10:21 Ningĩ Solomoni aarĩ na gĩkundi kĩa meeri gĩatwaranaga hamwe na gĩkundi kĩa Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo. O mĩaka ĩtatũ yathira
1Kings10:22 Naake Solomoni aatongeete
1Kings10:23 Nao andũ oothe a thĩ magagĩũkaga kũrĩ we nĩ geetha maigue ũũgĩ ũcio Ngai aamũheete.
1Kings10:24 Na o mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa wokaga kũmuona nĩamũreehagĩre iheeo. Iheeo icio ciakoragwo irĩ: betha na thahabu
1Kings10:25 Naake Solomoni akĩũmba mbũtũ ya ita yarĩ na ngaari cia mbarathi ngiri ĩmwe na magana mana (1
1Kings10:26 Ningĩ matukũinĩ ma ũthamaki wake
1Kings10:27 Nao andũ arĩa maarutagĩra mũthamaki wĩra wa wonjoria
1Kings10:28 Ningĩ kuuma Misiri makagũra ngaari cia mbarathi. Mbarathi ĩmwe yoimaga betha igana na mĩrongo ĩtaano na ngaari ĩmwe ya ita icunjĩ magana matandatũ (600) cia betha. Ũguo noguo athamaki a Ahiti o na a Siria meendagĩrio nĩ andũ acio a Solomoni a wonjoria.
1Kings11:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings11:2 Ndũũrĩrĩ icio nĩcio MWATHANI eerĩĩte Aisiraeli matikaanahikanagie nacio nĩ ũndũ ciahota kũmaguucĩrĩria harĩ ngai ciacio. Naake Solomoni o na ooĩ ũguo agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũmeenda.
1Kings11:3 Solomoni agĩkĩhikia airĩĩtu a athamaki magana mũgwanja (700)
1Kings11:4 Matukũinĩ ma ũkũrũ wake
1Kings11:5 Nĩ ũndũ nĩathaathairie ngai yetagwo Ashera ya Asidoni na Moleku ngai ĩrĩa ĩrĩ magigi ya Aamoni.
1Kings11:6 Ningĩ Solomoni akĩhĩtĩria MWATHANI na ndaigana kwĩheana biũ kũrĩ we ta ũrĩa ithe Daudi eeheanĩĩte.
1Kings11:7 Ningĩ agĩaka handũ hatũũgĩru kĩrĩmainĩ kĩrĩa kĩarĩ na mwena wa irathĩro wa itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu. Handũ hau haarĩ ha gũthaathayagĩrio Kemoshu ngai ĩrĩa ĩrĩ magigi ya Amoabi
1Kings11:8 Ningĩ nĩakĩire atumia acio aake a ndũũrĩrĩ kũndũ gwa kũhooyagĩra ngai ciao na gwa gũcicinagĩra ũbaani o na gũcirutagĩra magongoona.
1Kings11:9 (9-10) O na gũtuĩka MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli nĩoimĩrĩire Solomoni mahinda meerĩ
1Kings11:10 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings11:11 No ningĩ nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtĩĩo gĩa thooguo Daudi
1Kings11:12 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
1Kings11:13 Naake MWATHANI agĩgĩtũma Hadadi ũrĩa warĩ wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki wa Edomu ookĩrĩre Solomoni.
1Kings11:14 (15-16) Nĩ ũndũ mbere ĩyo o hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Daudi aarĩĩkĩĩtie kũhoota bũrũri ũcio wa Edomu
1Kings11:15 Naake Hadadi me hamwe na ndungata cia ithe makĩũrĩra Misiri
1Kings11:16 Nao magĩkiuma Midiani magĩthiĩ Parani
1Kings11:17 Naake Hadadi akĩendwo mũno nĩ mũthamaki wa Misiri
1Kings11:18 Naake mũtumia ũcio agĩgĩciarĩra Hadadi kamwana geetagwo Genubathi
1Kings11:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings11:20 Naake mũthamaki akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Kings11:21 Ningĩ MWATHANI agĩgĩtũma Rezoni mũrũ wa Eliada
1Kings11:22 Nĩatuĩkĩĩte mũtongoria wa mbũtũ ya mĩkora. (Ũndũ ũyũ wekĩkire thuutha wa Daudi kũhoota Hadadezeri na gũkorwo ooragĩĩte thũ ciake cia kuuma Siria.) Naake Rezoni na andũ aake magĩthiĩ Damasiki magĩtũũra kuo
1Kings11:23 Naake agĩgĩtuĩka thũ ya Isiraeli matukũ moothe ma Solomoni. Ningĩ agĩĩka maũndũ mangĩ ma waganu ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ Hadadi. Naake agĩthũũra Isiraeli mũno na agĩgĩathana Siria.
1Kings11:24 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ wokĩrĩire Solomoni nĩ Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati. Ũcio-rĩ
1Kings11:25 Gĩtũmi kĩrĩa gĩatũmire ookĩrĩre mũthamaki nĩ gĩĩkĩ.Solomoni nĩgwaka aakaga handũ harĩa hatũũgĩru na mwena wa irathĩro wa Jerusalemu na gũcookereria thingo cia Jerusalemu kũrĩa gwatharũkĩĩte.
1Kings11:26 Jeroboamu aarĩ mwanake warĩ njamba ĩrĩ hinya mũno. Rĩrĩa Solomoni oonire arĩ na kĩyo gĩa kũruta wĩra mũno
1Kings11:27 Mũthenya ũmwe rĩrĩa Jeroboamu oimaga Jerusalemu nĩatũngirwo nĩ mũnabii Ahija wa kuuma Shilo
1Kings11:28 Naake Ahija akĩruta nguo ĩyo njerũ eehumbĩĩte akĩmĩtembũranga icunjĩ ikũmi na igĩrĩ
1Kings11:29 agĩcooka akĩĩra Jeroboamu atĩrĩ
1Kings11:30 Ngũtigĩria Solomoni mũhĩrĩga ũmwe
1Kings11:31 Gĩtũmi gĩa gwĩka ũndũ ũyũ nĩ ũndũ Solomoni nĩandiganĩirie agathaathaiya ngai ingĩ
1Kings11:32 No rĩĩrĩ
1Kings11:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings11:34 No rĩĩrĩ
1Kings11:35 Nawe Jeroboamu nĩngaagũtua mũthamaki wa gũthamaka Isiraeli guothe
1Kings11:36 Nawe ũngĩgaatũũra ũnjathĩkagĩra
1Kings11:37 No tondũ wa rĩĩhia rĩa Solomoni
1Kings11:38 Na tondũ wa ũndũ ũcio
1Kings11:39 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings11:40 Naake Solomoni agĩthamakĩra Aisiraeli oothe e Jerusalemu mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
1Kings11:41 Naake agĩkua
1Kings12:1 Naake Rehoboamu agĩgĩthiĩ Shekemu kũrĩa Aisiraeli oothe maathiĩte nĩguo makamũtue mũthamaki.
1Kings12:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings12:3 Nao andũ oothe a Isiraeli makĩrekania ageetwo
1Kings12:4 “Watho ũrĩa thooguo arathanaga naguo ũraarĩ mũrũrũ mũno na mũrigo ũrĩa aratũkuuithagia ũraarĩ mũritũ mũno. Na tondũ ũcio ũngĩtũhũthahũthĩria mũrigo ũcio
1Kings12:5 Naake Rehoboamu akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:6 Naake Rehoboamu agĩthiĩ kũhooya kĩrĩra kũrĩ athuuri arĩa maaheyaga ithe Solomoni kĩrĩra hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarĩ muoyo. Agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:7 Nao athuuri acio makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:8 Naake agĩkararia mataaro ma athuuri
1Kings12:9 Agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:10 Nao aanake acio a riika rĩake makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings12:11 Ningĩ ũmeere atĩrĩ
1Kings12:12 Nayo mĩthenya ĩtatũ yathira Jeroboamu na andũ acio oothe magĩcooka he mũthamaki Rehoboamu o ta ũrĩa aameerĩĩte mageeka.
1Kings12:13 Naake mũthamaki Rehoboamu agĩkararia mataaro ma athuuri
1Kings12:14 o ta ũrĩa aataarĩĩtwo nĩ aanake a riika rĩake. Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Kings12:15 Naake mũthamaki ndaigana gũthikĩrĩria andũ acio o na haniini. Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
1Kings12:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings12:17 Naake Rehoboamu agĩtigĩrwo athamakagĩre andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maatũũraga bũrũri wa Juda.
1Kings12:18 Naake mũthamaki Rehoboamu akĩrekia Adoniramu
1Kings12:19 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a ũthamaki wa na rũgongo wa Isiraeli matiacookire gwathwo nĩ nyũmba ya Daudi kinya ũũmũũthĩ.
1Kings12:20 Na rĩrĩa Aisiraeli maiguire atĩ Jeroboamu nĩacookeete
1Kings12:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings12:22 No rĩĩrĩ
1Kings12:23 kũrĩ Rehoboamu mũthamaki wa Juda na kũrĩ andũ oothe a mũhĩrĩga wa Juda na wa Benjamini akameere atĩrĩ
1Kings12:24 “Mũtigaathiĩ gũtharĩkĩra andũ acio aanyu
1Kings12:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Jeroboamu wa Isiraeli akĩirigĩra itũũra rĩa Shekemu
1Kings12:26 (26-27) Naake Jeroboamu agĩkĩĩĩra na ngoro yake atĩrĩ
1Kings12:27 Thuutha wa gwĩciiria ũhoro ũcio
1Kings12:28 Agĩcooka akĩoya mũhianano ũmwe akĩũiga Betheli
1Kings12:29 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtũma andũ meehie
1Kings12:30 Ningĩ Jeroboamu agĩaka kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathayagĩrio mĩhianano irĩmainĩ igũrũ
1Kings12:31 Naake Jeroboamu agĩgĩtua atĩ kũgĩage na thigũkũ
1Kings12:32 Naake Jeroboamu agĩthiĩ kĩgongoonainĩ kĩu aathondekeete kũu Betheli mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtaano mweri wa kanaana
1Kings13:1 Naake Jeroboamu arĩ o hau kĩgongoonainĩ ehaarĩirie kũruta igongoona-rĩ
1Kings13:2 Naake mũnabii ũcio akĩmenereria kĩgongoona kĩu ta ũrĩa aathĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings13:3 Naake mũnabii ũcio agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings13:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings13:5 Hĩndĩ o ro ĩyo kĩgongoona gĩkĩmomoka
1Kings13:6 Naake mũthamaki Jeroboamu akĩarĩria mũnabii akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings13:7 Naake mũthamaki akĩĩra mũnabii atĩrĩ
1Kings13:8 Naake mũnabii akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings13:9 Tondũ nĩngaanĩĩtio nĩ MWATHANI ngeerwo ndikaarĩe kana nyue kĩndũ
1Kings13:10 Tondũ ũcio mũnabii ũcio agĩkĩgera njĩra ĩngĩ akĩinũka.
1Kings13:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings13:12 Naake mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ akĩũria aariũ aake atĩrĩ
1Kings13:13 Naake akĩmeera matandĩke ndigiri yake
1Kings13:14 Naake mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ agĩkora mũnabi ũcio wa Ngai woimĩĩte Juda aikarĩĩte handũ thĩ gĩtinainĩ kĩa mũgandi. Naake akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
1Kings13:15 Naake mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings13:16 Naake mũnabii ũcio woimĩĩte Juda agĩcookia atĩrĩ
1Kings13:17 Nĩngaanĩĩtio nĩ MWATHANI ngeerwo ndikaarĩe kana nyue kĩndũ gũũkũ
1Kings13:18 Naake mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ woimĩĩte Betheli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
1Kings13:19 Naake mũnabii ũcio wa Ngai woimĩĩte Juda agĩcookania na mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ na akĩrĩa irio gwake.
1Kings13:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings13:21 akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene akĩĩra mũnabii wa Ngai ũcio woimĩĩte Juda atĩrĩ
1Kings13:22 Nĩgũcooka ũcookire kũndũ kũrĩa egũgũkaanĩĩtie na warĩa irio na wanyua kuo. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩũkũũragwo na kĩimba gĩaku gĩtigaathikwo mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ya andũ aanyu.”
1Kings13:23 Na maarĩĩkia kũrĩa irio mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ agĩtandĩkĩra mũnabii ũcio wa Ngai woimĩĩte Juda ndigiri yake
1Kings13:24 akiumagara agĩthiĩ. Na arĩ njĩrainĩ
1Kings13:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings13:26 Rĩrĩa mũnabii ũrĩa warĩ mũkũrũ aiguire ũhoro ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
1Kings13:27 Naake mũnabii ũcio mũkũrũ akĩĩra aariũ aake atĩrĩ

1Kings14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings14:2 Naake Jeroboamu akĩĩra mũtumia wake atĩrĩ
1Kings14:3 Thiĩ ũkuuĩĩte mĩgate ikũmi
1Kings14:4 Naake mũtumia wa Jeroboamu agĩthiĩ kwa Ahija kũu Shilo
1Kings14:5 No MWATHANI nĩamenyithĩĩtie Ahija atĩ mũtumia wa Jeroboamu nĩegũũka kũmũhooya ũhoro tondũ mũũrũwe nĩ mũrũaru. Naake MWATHANI akĩmenyithia Ahija ũrĩa ekũmwĩra.Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings14:6 No rĩrĩa Ahija aiguire mũkubio wa mũtumia wa Jeroboamu e hakuhĩ gũtoonya nyũmba-rĩ
1Kings14:7 Thiĩ ũkeere Jeroboamu atĩ MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli amwĩrĩĩte ũ
1Kings14:8 Ningĩ ngĩtuunya mbarĩ ya Daudi ũthamaki ngĩkũhe. O na ngwĩkĩĩte ũguo
1Kings14:9 Tondũ-rĩ
1Kings14:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Kings14:11 Mũndũ o wothe wa nyũmba ya Jeroboamu ũrĩa ũgaakuĩra itũũrainĩ akaarĩĩo nĩ ngui
1Kings14:12 Naake mũnabii Ahija agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria akĩĩra mũtumia wa Jeroboamu atĩrĩ
1Kings14:13 Nao andũ oothe a Isiraeli nĩmarĩmũrĩrĩra na mũmũthike. Ũcio no we wiki wa nyũmba ya Jeroboamu ũgaathikwo na njĩra njega nĩ ũndũ no we ũkeneetie MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli.
1Kings14:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings14:15 Ningĩ MWATHANI nĩakaaherithia Aisiraeli nao mainaine ta ithanjĩ rĩ rũũĩinĩ. Nĩakaamarutũrũra bũrũri ũyũ mwega ũũ aaheire maithe maao
1Kings14:16 Naake MWATHANI nĩagatiganĩria Isiraeli nĩ ũndũ wa meehia marĩa Jeroboamu eekire o na nĩ ũndũ wa gũtũma Aisiraeli meehie.”
1Kings14:17 Naake mũtumia wa Jeroboamu agĩũkĩra agĩcooka Tiriza. Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings14:18 Nao Aisiraeli oothe magĩkarĩrĩra

1Kings15:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings15:2 Naake Abija agĩthamaka mĩaka ĩtatũ kũu Jerusalemu. Nyina eetagwo Maaka
1Kings15:3 Naake Abija agĩĩka meehia o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ ithe
1Kings15:4 Tondũ wa ũrĩa MWATHANI aatĩĩĩte Daudi
1Kings15:5 MWATHANI eekire ũguo nĩ ũndũ Daudi nĩekaga maũndũ ma kũmũkenia
1Kings15:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings15:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings15:8 Naake Abija agĩkua agĩthikwo itũũrainĩ rĩa Daudi. Naake Asa mũũrũwe agĩthamaka ithenya rĩake.
1Kings15:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings15:10 Naake agĩthamaka mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna na ũmwe kũu Jerusalemu. Cũũwe eetagwo Maaka mwarĩ wa Abisalomu.
1Kings15:11 Naake Asa agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa maakenagia MWATHANI o ta marĩa guukawe Daudi eekĩĩte.
1Kings15:12 Agĩkĩingata kuuma bũrũriinĩ ũcio maraaya moothe ma arũme
1Kings15:13 Ningĩ akĩeheria cũũwe kuuma gĩtĩinĩ gĩa kwini nĩ ũndũ nĩathondekithĩĩtie mũhianano warĩ magigi wa ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Ashera. Naake Asa agĩtemenga mũhianano ũcio na akĩũcinĩra karũũĩinĩ ga Kidironi.
1Kings15:14 O na eekĩĩte ũguo wothe Asa ndaigana gũthũũkangia kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano. Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings15:15 Nacio indo iria ithe Abija aamũrĩire Ngai agĩciiga Hekaarũinĩ thĩinĩ. Ningĩ o na indo cia thahabu na cia betha iria we mwene aamũrĩire Ngai agĩciiga o ro kuo.
1Kings15:16 Naake Asa mũthamaki wa Juda na Baasha mũthamaki wa Isiraeli magĩtũũra marũaga matukũ ma wathani wao wothe.
1Kings15:17 Naake Baasha mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩhithũkĩra bũrũri wa Juda
1Kings15:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Asa akĩruta betha na thahabu yothe
1Kings15:19 “Benihadadi
1Kings15:20 Naake Benihadadi agĩĩtĩkania na mawoni macio ma Asa mũthamaki wa Juda. Agĩkĩrekia anene a thigari ciake magatharĩkĩre matũũra ma Isiraeli. Nao magĩthiĩ makĩĩnyiitĩra matũũra maya: Ijoni
1Kings15:21 Na rĩĩrĩ

1Kings15:24 Asa agĩkua agĩthikwo mbĩĩrĩrainĩ cia athamaki kũu itũũrainĩ rĩa Daudi. Naake Jehoshafatu mũũrũwe agĩthamaka ithenya rĩake.
1Kings15:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings15:26 Naake Nadabu agĩgĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ mooru marĩa mataakenagia Ngai o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ ithe o na agĩgĩtũma Aisiraeli meehie.
1Kings15:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings15:28 Nakĩo gĩĩko gĩĩkĩ gĩekĩkire mwaka wa gatatũ wa ũthamaki wa Asa mũthamaki wa Juda. Naake Baasha agĩgĩthamaka ithenya rĩa Nadabu.
1Kings15:29 Naake mũthamaki Baasha o rĩmwe akĩambĩrĩria kũũraga andũ a mũciĩ wa Jeroboamu. Naake akĩũraga andũ oothe a mũciĩ wa Jeroboamu na hatirĩ o na ũmwe watigarire muoyo
1Kings15:30 Ũndũ ũyũ wekĩkire nĩ ũndũ Jeroboamu nĩaraakaririe MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maake we mwene na marĩa aatũmire Aisiraeli meeke.
1Kings15:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings15:32 Naake Asa mũthamaki wa Juda na Baasha mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
1Kings15:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings15:34 Ningĩ agĩĩka maũndũ mooru marĩa mataakenagia MWATHANI o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki Jeroboamu na agĩtũma Aisiraeli meehie.

1Kings18:3 Naake Ahabu agĩgĩĩta Obadia mũrori wa maũndũ ma nyũmba ya mũthamaki. (Obadia ũcio aarĩ mũhooi Ngai mũno.

1Kings18:11 Na rĩu ũkaanjĩĩra ngamwĩre atĩ wĩ haaha?
1Kings18:12 Ĩ roho wa MWATHANI angĩũka agũkuue agũtware kũndũ kũngĩ gũtekũmenyeka ndarĩĩkia gũthiĩ? Gĩthiĩ ndũgũtũma Ahabu anjũrage nĩ ũndũ wa kũmwĩra atĩ wĩ haaha na ndũrĩ ho? Ririkana atĩ ndũire ndĩ mũhooi Ngai mũno kuuma ndĩ o kahĩĩ.
1Kings18:13 Kaĩ ũtarĩ waigua ũrĩa ndahithire anabii igana ngurungainĩ marĩ ikundi igĩrĩ cia andũ mĩrongo ĩtaano ĩtaano hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jezebeli ooragaga anabii a MWATHANI?
1Kings18:14 Ũngĩkĩhota atĩa kũũnjĩĩra ngeere mũthamaki atĩ wĩ haaha? Hatirĩ na nganja no ekũnjũraga.”
1Kings18:15 Naake Elija agĩcookeria Obadia atĩrĩ
1Kings18:16 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Obadia agĩthiĩ akĩmenyithia Ahabu
1Kings18:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Kings18:18 Naake Elija akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Kings18:19 Na rĩu athana atĩ Aisiraeli oothe mooke tũcemanie kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Karimeli. Nĩmooke hamwe na anabii arĩa a Baali magana mana ma mĩrongo ĩtaano (450) na anabii magana mana (400) ma ngai ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Ashera arĩa mateithagĩrĩrio nĩ kwini Jezebeli.”

1Kings18:22 Naake Elija akĩmeera atĩrĩ

1Kings18:26 Nao magĩkĩoya ndeegwa ĩrĩa maaheirwo
1Kings18:27 Na rĩrĩa gwakinyire thaa thita
1Kings18:28 Nao anabii acio magĩkĩanĩrĩra na hinya magĩtemengaga mĩĩrĩ yao na tũtimũ na hiũ o ta ũrĩa mũtugo wao watariĩ
1Kings18:29 Mĩaraho yahĩtũka-rĩ
1Kings18:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Elija agĩkĩĩra andũ acio oothe atĩrĩ
1Kings18:31 Naake agĩkĩoya mahiga ikũmi na meerĩ
1Kings18:32 Naake Elija agĩgĩaka rĩngĩ kĩgongoona gĩa kũgoocithia MWATHANI na mahiga macio. Agĩcooka akĩenja mũtaro ũgĩthiũrũrũkĩria kĩgongoona kĩu ũngĩaiganĩire rita ikũmi na inya cia maaĩ.
1Kings18:33 Hĩndĩ ĩyo agĩcooka akĩigĩrĩra ngũ igũrũ wa kĩgongoona kĩu
1Kings18:34 Agĩcooka akĩmeera o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
1Kings18:35 Namo maaĩ macio makĩnyũrũrũka kĩgongoonainĩ kĩu mĩena yothe makĩiyũra mũtaro ũcio.
1Kings18:36 Na rĩĩrĩ

1Kings18:46 Na hĩndĩ o ro ĩyo hinya wa MWATHANI ũgĩkorerera Elija

1Kings19:2 Naake Jezebeli akĩrekia mũndũ harĩ Elija akeerwo atĩrĩ

2Kings4:20 Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩkooya ĩgĩgatwarĩra nyina. Naake nyina agĩkaigĩrĩra cieroinĩ ciake na gwakinya thaa thita gagĩkua.
2Kings4:21 Naake nyina agĩgakuua akĩambata nako o kanyũmbainĩ karĩa ka Elisha

2Kings4:23 Naake mũthuuriwe akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Kings4:24 Naake mũtumia arĩĩkia gũtandĩkithia ndigiri
2Kings4:25 Naake agĩkiuma hau agĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Karimeli kũrĩa Elisha aarĩ.Naake Elisha aacũũthĩrĩria akĩona mũtumia ũcio agĩũka na kũrĩ we

2Kings4:39 Mũndũ ũmwe wao akiumagara agĩthiĩ mũgũnda gũtua nyeni. Agĩkĩona rũngũ rwa gĩthaka

2Kings5:5 Naake mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings5:6 Marũa marĩa aathiire namo kwa mũthamaki wa Isiraeli maandĩkĩĩtwo ta ũũ: “Marũa maya nĩmagũkũmenyithania na Naamani ndungata yakwa nĩ geetha ũmĩhonie mũrimũ ũcio mũũru wa ngoothi.”
2Kings5:7 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki wa Isiraeli aathoomire marũa macio
2Kings5:8 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings5:9 Tondũ ũcio Naamani agĩthiĩ na mbarathi ciake o na ngaari ciake cia mbarathi akĩrũũgama mũromoinĩ wa nyũmba ya Elisha.
2Kings5:10 Naake Elisha akĩrekia ndungata ikamwĩre atĩrĩ
2Kings5:11 No Naamani agĩthiĩ araakarĩĩte akiugaga atĩrĩ
2Kings5:12 Githĩ njũũĩ cia Damasiki

2Kings5:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Kings5:15 Naake Naamani agĩcooka rĩngĩ harĩ Elisha e hamwe na gĩkundi kĩa andũ oothe
2Kings5:16 No naake Elisha akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Kings5:17 Naake Naamani akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings5:18 Ningĩ nĩ ihooya rĩakwa atĩ MWATHANI nĩarĩnjohagĩra rĩrĩa ndĩrĩtwaranaga na mũthamaki agĩthiĩ gũthaathaiya ngai ya andũ a Siria ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Rimoni hekaarũinĩ ya yo. Ndĩ na ma atĩ o na niĩ ndainamĩrĩra hamwe naake tũmĩthaathaiye
2Kings5:19 Naake Elisha akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings5:20 Gehazi ndungata ya Elisha agĩkĩyũria kĩrĩa gĩatũma Elisha aage kwamũkĩra iheeo iria Naamani Mũsiria aamũreeheire. Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings5:21 Tondũ ũcio Gehazi agĩkũrĩmĩrĩra Naamani ateng'ereete. Rĩrĩa Naamani oonire mũndũ ũteng'ereete na kũrĩ we

2Kings7:1 Naake Elisha agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Kings7:2 Nayo ndungata ĩyo yatungataga mũthamaki ĩkĩĩra Elisha atĩrĩ
2Kings7:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings7:4 Tũngiuga tũthiĩ itũũrainĩ
2Kings7:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings7:6 MWATHANI nĩatũmĩĩte andũ a Siria maigue mũrurumo ta wa mbũtũ nene ya ita
2Kings7:7 Tondũ ũcio
2Kings7:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings7:9 Magĩcooka makĩĩrana o eene atĩrĩ
2Kings7:10 Tondũ ũcio makiuma kũu kambĩinĩ ya andũ a Siria magĩcooka Samaria. Makinya kuo makĩĩra aikaria a ihingo atĩrĩ
2Kings7:11 Nao aikaria a ihingo makĩanĩrĩra ũhoro ũcio
2Kings7:12 Naake mũthamaki akĩramũka kũrĩ o ũtukũ akĩĩra njaama ciake atĩrĩ
2Kings7:13 Mũndũ ũmwe wa njaama ciake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings7:14 Naake mũthamaki agĩthuura andũ amwe akĩmatũma na ngaari igĩrĩ cia mbarathi marũmĩrĩre ita cia Siria magatuĩrie ũhoro ũcio wega.
2Kings7:15 Nao makĩmathingatia o nginya rũũĩinĩ rwa Jorodani. Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings7:16 Nao andũ a Samaria makĩambũrũrũka
2Kings7:17 Naake mũthamaki nĩatuĩte atĩ ndungata ĩrĩa yamũtungataga ĩrangangire kĩhingo
2Kings7:18 Ningĩ ũhoro ũkĩhinga ũrĩa Elisha eerĩĩte mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Kings7:19 Ningĩ mũrekio wa mũthamaki ndacamire irio icio nĩ ũndũ nĩakararĩĩtie Elisha akoiga atĩ
2Kings7:20 Ũguo nĩguo mũndũ ũcio aakuire thuutha wa kũrangĩrĩrio hau kĩhingoinĩ gĩa itũũra.
2Kings8:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings8:2 Naake mũtumia ũcio arĩĩkia gwĩtĩkĩra ũguo Elisha aamũtaarĩĩte
2Kings8:3 Nayo mĩaka mũgwanja yathira
2Kings8:4 Mũthamaki hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩkwaria aaragia na Gehazi ndungata ya Elisha akĩenda kũmenya ũhoro wa ciama iria Elisha aaringĩĩte.
2Kings8:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings8:6 Naake mũtumia agĩĩkĩra ũhoro ũcio hinya mũthamaki arĩĩkia kũmũũria ciũria. Tondũ ũcio mũthamaki agĩthuura mũnjaama ũmwe
2Kings8:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings8:8 agĩĩta Hazaeli mũnjaama wake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings8:9 Naake Hazaeli agĩthiĩ kwĩ Elisha e na ngamĩĩra mĩrongo ĩna
2Kings8:10 Naake Elisha akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Kings8:11 Naake Elisha agĩgĩikara amũkũrĩire maitho agegearĩĩte o nginya Hazaeli agĩconoka. O rĩmwe Elisha akĩambĩrĩria kũrĩra.
2Kings8:12 Naake Hazaeli akũmũũria atĩrĩ
2Kings8:13 Naake Hazaeli kĩũria Elisha atĩrĩ
2Kings8:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Hazaeli agĩtiga Elisha agĩcooka kwĩ Benihadadi mwathi wake. Naake Benihadadi akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Kings8:15 No rĩĩrĩ mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
2Kings8:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings8:17 Aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩĩrĩ na agĩthamaka mĩaka ĩnaana kũu Jerusalemu.
2Kings8:18 Naake akĩrũmĩrĩra mĩtugo mĩũru ya athamaki a Isiraeli
2Kings8:19 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings8:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings8:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehoramu e na ngaari ciake ciothe cia mbarathi makĩringa magĩthiĩ Zairu
2Kings8:22 Ũguo nĩguo Aedomu maatigire gwathagwo nĩ athamaki a Juda o nginyagia ũũmũũthĩ. Ningĩ o matukũinĩ macio andũ a Libina nao makĩyamũra magĩtĩga gwathagwo nĩ Juda.
2Kings8:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings8:24 Naake Jehoramu agĩkua agĩthikwo mbĩĩrĩrainĩ cia athamaki kũu itũũrainĩ rĩa Daudi
2Kings8:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings8:26 Naake aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩĩrĩ na agĩthamaka mwaka ũmwe kũu Jerusalemu. Nyina eetagwo Athalia mwarĩ wa Ahabu na mũcũkũrũ wa Omuri mũthamaki wa Isiraeli.
2Kings8:27 O naake akĩrũmĩrĩra mĩtugo ya mũciĩ wa Ahabu
2Kings8:28 Naake Ahazia akĩnyiitanĩra na mũthamaki Joramu wa Isiraeli magĩthiĩ kũhũũrana na Hazaeli mũthamaki wa Siria. Nao makĩrũĩra mbaara Ramothu bũrũriinĩ wa Gileadi
2Kings8:29 Joramu agĩkĩhũndũka agĩcooka Jezireeli nĩguo akahonerie ironda ciake kuo
2Kings9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings9:2 Wakinya kuo
2Kings9:3 Ũcooke woe cuuba ũcio wa maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ ũmũitĩrĩrie mũtwe na ũmwĩre atĩrĩ
2Kings9:4 Kwoguo mũnabii ũcio mwĩthĩ agĩgĩthiĩ Ramothu
2Kings9:5 kũrĩa aakorire atongoria a mbũtũ cia ita marĩ na kĩama. Naake akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings9:6 Naake Jehu agĩũkĩra agĩtoonya nyũmba
2Kings9:7 Nawe nĩũkaaniina mũciĩ wa mwathi waku Ahabu
2Kings9:8 Mũciĩ wothe wa Ahabu ngũũniina biũ. Nĩngũniina mũndũ mũrũme wothe
2Kings9:9 Mũciĩ wa Ahabu ngũwĩka o ta ũrĩa ndeekire mũciĩ wa Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati
2Kings9:10 Jezebeli ndakoona mũndũ wa kũmũthika
2Kings9:11 Naake Jehu acooka harĩ atongoria arĩa angĩ
2Kings9:12 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings9:13 O rĩmwe atongoria acio makĩruta o mũndũ nguo yake magĩciara o hau magũrũinĩ ma Jehu nĩguo acikinye
2Kings9:14 (14-15) Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings9:15 Naake Jehu akĩhaica ngaari yake ya mbarathi agĩthiĩ Jezireeli
2Kings9:16 Rĩrĩa Jehu na andũ aake mookaga
2Kings9:17 Naake mũndũ ũcio warekeetio agĩthiĩ ahaicĩĩte mbarathi nĩguo agacemanie na Jehu. Agĩkĩũria Jehu atĩrĩ
2Kings9:18 Ningĩ gũgĩtũmwo mũrekio ũngĩ ahaicĩĩte mbarathi
2Kings9:19 Naake mũndũ ũrĩa warĩ mũnaarainĩ wa kũrangĩra o rĩngĩ agĩcookia ũhoro akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings9:20 Naake Joramu akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings9:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Joramu akĩũria Jehu atĩrĩ
2Kings9:22 Naake Joramu akĩgarũra ngaari yake ya mbarathi akĩũra
2Kings9:23 Naake Jehu akĩgeeta ũta wake na hinya wake wothe agĩikia mũguĩ
2Kings9:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehu akĩĩra Bidikari
2Kings9:25 ‘Ira nĩndĩroonire Nabothu na aariũ aake mooragwo. Na niĩ ndoiga atĩ ngaakũherithĩria o gũũkũ mũgũndainĩ ũyũ!’ ” Kwoguo Jehu agĩatha mũteithĩrĩria wake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings9:26 Rĩrĩa Ahazia oonire ũrĩa gwekĩka
2Kings9:27 Nacio njaama ciake igĩkuua kĩimba gĩake na ngaari ya mbarathi igĩthiĩ nakĩo Jerusalemu

2Kings9:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings9:30 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jehu aatoonyaga kĩhingoinĩ
2Kings9:31 Naake Jehu agĩtiira maitho na igũrũ akĩanĩrĩra akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Kings9:32 Jehu akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings9:33 Naake Jehu agĩtoonya nyũmba ĩyo ya mũthamaki

2Kings9:35 Rĩrĩa maacookire makĩmenyithia Jehu ũhoro ũcio
2Kings9:36 Ningĩ matigari ma mwĩrĩ wake makaanyagio kũu mũgũndainĩ
2Kings10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings10:2 “Kuona atĩ mwĩ na njiarwa cia mwathi wanyu
2Kings10:3 thuuraai ũmwe wa aariũ a mwathi wanyu
2Kings10:4 Nao aathani acio makĩmaka mũno
2Kings10:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings10:6 Naake Jehu akĩmaandĩkĩra marũa mangĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings10:7 Na rĩrĩa marũa macio maakinyĩire andũ acio a bata kũu Samaria makĩnyiita njiarwa icio ciothe cia Ahabu mĩrongo mũgwanja magĩciũraga. Magĩcooka magĩĩkĩra ciongo ciacio ciondoinĩ magĩcitwarĩra Jehu o kũu Jezireeli.
2Kings10:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings10:9 Rũũciinĩ mũthamaki akiuma agĩthiĩ kĩhingoinĩ kĩu akĩĩra andũ oothe atĩrĩ
2Kings10:10 Ũndũ ũyũ ũrorania atĩ ũhoro wothe ũrĩa waririo nĩ MWATHANI ũkoniĩ njiarwa cia Ahabu no mũhaka ũhinge. Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
2Kings10:11 Tondũ ũcio Jehu agĩkĩũraga andũ oothe a Ahabu arĩa maatigarĩĩte kũu Jezireeli. Ningĩ akĩũraga njaama cia Ahabu ciothe
2Kings10:12 Naake Jehu akiuma Jezireeli agĩthiĩ Samaria. Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings10:13 agĩcemania na andũ a nyũmba ya mũthamaki Ahazia wa Juda akĩmooria atĩrĩ
2Kings10:14 Naake Jehu agĩathana atĩrĩ
2Kings10:15 Naake Jehu agĩkiuma hau
2Kings10:16 Naake Jehu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings10:17 Rĩrĩa maakinyire kuo
2Kings10:18 Ningĩ Jehu agĩĩta andũ oothe akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings10:19 Njĩtĩraai anabii oothe a Baali
2Kings10:20 Naake Jehu agĩathana akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings10:21 Jehu agĩtũmana bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Isiraeli
2Kings10:22 Naake akĩĩra mũthĩnjĩri ngai ũrĩa wamenyagĩrĩra nguo iria nyamũre acirutire andũ oothe arĩa maahooyaga Baali. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩmarutĩra nguo icio.
2Kings10:23 Thuutha wa ũguo Jehu me na Jonadabu wa Rekabu
2Kings10:24 Naake Jehu na Jonadabu magĩtoonya hekaarũinĩ nĩguo makarutĩre Baali magongoona
2Kings10:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings10:26 makĩruta gĩtugĩ kĩrĩa kĩarĩ kĩamũre magĩgĩcina.
2Kings10:27 Magĩcooka makiunanga gĩtugĩ kĩa Baali
2Kings10:28 Ũguo nĩguo Jehu aaniinire ũhoro wothe wa kũhooya mĩhianano kũu Isiraeli.
2Kings10:29 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings10:30 Naake MWATHANI akĩĩra Jehu atĩrĩ
2Kings10:31 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings10:32 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings10:33 iria irĩ mwena wa irathĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
2Kings10:34 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings10:35 Naake agĩkua
2Kings10:36 Naake Jehu aakoreetwo athamakĩĩte Isiraeli e kũu Samaria mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩnaana.
2Kings11:1 Rĩrĩa Athalia nyina wa mũthamaki Ahazia aamenyire atĩ mũũrũwe nĩoragwo
2Kings11:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings11:3 Naake Jehosheba akĩmũhitha mĩaka ĩtandatũ Hekaarũinĩ
2Kings11:4 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings11:5 Agĩcooka agĩcionia Joashu mũrũ wa mũthamaki Ahazia
2Kings11:6 na gĩa keerĩ gĩkarangĩra kĩhingo kĩrĩa gĩĩtagwo Suri
2Kings11:7 Nacio ikundi igĩrĩ iria irĩkoragwo ciumĩrĩĩte wĩra mũthenya wa Thabatũ
2Kings11:8 Mũrĩrangagĩra mũthamaki Joashu mũnyiitĩĩte hiũ cia njora o harĩa hoothe arĩthiaga. Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũrĩa ũrĩũkaga hakuhĩ na inyuĩ
2Kings11:9 Nacio njaama icio igĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jehoiada aaciathĩĩte. Igĩkĩreehere Jehoiada andũ aacio
2Kings11:10 Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai akĩmahe matimũ na ngo iria ciarĩ cia mũthamaki Daudi iria ciaigĩĩtwo kũu Hekaarũinĩ.
2Kings11:11 Naake akĩmabanga marigiicĩrie Hekaarũ na mwena wa na mbere o mũndũ anyiitĩĩte matharaita maake nĩguo magitĩre mũthamaki.
2Kings11:12 Naake Jehoiada akiumia Joashu mũrũ wa mũthamaki nja
2Kings11:13 Rĩrĩa kwini Athalia aiguire inegene rĩa arangĩri o na rĩa andũ
2Kings11:14 Naake aacũũthĩrĩria
2Kings11:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings11:16 Tondũ ũcio makĩmũnyiita
2Kings11:17 Naake Jehoiada
2Kings11:18 Nao andũ oothe a bũrũri ũcio magĩthiĩ hekaarũinĩ ya Baali makĩmĩmomora; makiunanga igongoona ciayo
2Kings11:19 Ningĩ agĩcooka we mwene me na atongoria
2Kings11:20 Tondũ ũcio
2Kings11:21 Naake Joashu agĩgĩtuĩka mũthamaki wa Juda e wa mĩaka mũgwanja.
2Kings12:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings12:2 Naake Joashu agĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ marĩa moonagwo marĩ meega nĩ MWATHANI matukũ moothe ma muoyo wake
2Kings12:3 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings12:4 Naake Joashu agĩĩta athĩnjĩri Ngai
2Kings12:5 O mũthĩnjĩri Ngai aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmenyerera mbeeca iria aareehagĩrwo nĩ andũ arĩa aatungataga
2Kings12:6 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings12:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Jehoashu agĩĩta Jehoiada na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa angĩ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
2Kings12:8 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai magĩĩtĩkĩra ũguo
2Kings12:9 Naake Jehoiada akĩoya ithandũkũ
2Kings12:10 Naake mwandĩki wa maũndũ ma mũthamaki
2Kings12:11 Na hĩndĩ o yothe marĩĩkia kwandĩka mũigana wacio
2Kings12:12 Ningĩ o na makarĩha aaki na mahiga
2Kings12:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings12:14 Mbeeca icio ciothe ciarĩ cia mĩcaara ya aruti wĩra
2Kings12:15 Ningĩ gũtiarĩ na bata wa kũũria arutithia wĩra ũrĩa maahũthagĩra mbeeca icio
2Kings12:16 Ha ũhoro wa mbeeca iria ciarutagwo nĩ ũndũ wa igongoona rĩa kũrĩhĩra meehia
2Kings12:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Hazaeli mũthamaki wa Siria agĩtharĩkĩra itũũra rĩa Gathu akĩrĩtuunyana; agĩcooka agĩtua gũtharĩkĩra Jerusalemu.
2Kings12:18 Naake Joashu mũthamaki wa Juda akĩoya indo ciothe cia magongoona iria ciarutĩĩtwo nĩ athamaki arĩa maarĩ mbere yake a Juda magaciamũrĩra MWATHANI
2Kings12:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings12:20 (20-21) Nacio

2Kings13:4 Naake Jehoahazu akĩhooya MWATHANI amũteithie

2Kings13:20 Naake Elisha agĩkua

2Kings14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:2 Naake aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtaano
2Kings14:3 Naake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ marĩa maakenagia MWATHANI
2Kings14:4 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:5 Rĩrĩa Amazia ekinyĩire ta mũthamaki
2Kings14:6 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:7 Naake Amazia akĩũraga thigari ngiri ikũmi (10
2Kings14:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Amazia akĩrekia arekio kwĩ mũthamaki Jehoashu mũrũ wa Jehoahazu mũrũ wa Jehu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli ikamwĩre atĩrĩ
2Kings14:9 Naake Jehoashu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Kings14:10 Atĩrĩĩrĩ Amazia
2Kings14:11 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:12 Nacio thigari cia Juda igĩgĩtoorio nĩ thigari cia Isiraeli
2Kings14:13 Naake Jehoashu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩnyiita Amazia akĩmũtwara Jerusalemu. Agĩcooka agĩtharia rũthingo rwa itũũra rĩu kuuma kĩhingoinĩ kĩa Efiraimu nginya kĩhingoinĩ gĩa Koona
2Kings14:14 Agĩkuua thahabu na betha iria oonire Hekaarũinĩ
2Kings14:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:16 Naake Jehoashu agĩkua
2Kings14:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:19 Nao andũ makĩgĩa ndundu o kũu Jerusalemu nĩguo moorage Amazia. Naake akĩũra agĩthiĩ itũũra rĩa Lakishi
2Kings14:20 Nao andũ acio makĩgĩkuua kĩimba gĩake na mbarathi magĩgĩcookia Jerusalemu
2Kings14:21 Nao andũ oothe a Juda makĩoya Uzia makĩmũtua mũthamaki ithenya rĩa ithe Amazia. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Uzia aarĩ wa mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtandatũ.
2Kings14:22 Naake akĩhoota itũũra rĩa Elathu o rĩngĩ na akĩrĩaka rĩngĩ ithe arĩĩkia gũkua.
2Kings14:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:24 Naake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ mooru marĩa mataakenagia MWATHANI o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati ũrĩa watũmire Aisiraeli meehie.
2Kings14:25 Naake agĩcookia mũhaka wa bũrũri ũrĩa wothe warĩ wa Isiraeli
2Kings14:26 Naake MWATHANI akĩona atĩ Aisiraeli nĩmaathĩĩnagio mũno na gũtiarĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa kũmateithia.
2Kings14:27 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings14:29 Naake Jeroboamu agĩkua

2Kings15:19 Na rĩĩrĩ

2Kings16:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings16:2 Naake aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
2Kings16:3 o ta marĩa athamaki a Isiraeli meekĩĩte. Ningĩ nĩacinĩire ũbaani gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Hinomu
2Kings16:4 Ningĩ Ahazu nĩarutagĩra magongoona o na agacinĩra ũbaani kũndũ kũrĩa gũtũũgĩru gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano
2Kings16:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Rezini mũthamaki wa Siria na Peka mũthamaki wa Isiraeli
2Kings16:6 Ningĩ o hĩndĩ ĩyo Rezini
2Kings16:7 Naake Ahazu agĩtũma andũ kũrĩ Tigilathu Pileseri mũthamaki wa Asiria na ndũmĩrĩri ĩno: “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
2Kings16:8 Naake Ahazu akĩoya betha na thahabu kuuma Hekaarũinĩ o na mũthiithũinĩ wa indo cia nyũmba ya mũthamaki
2Kings16:9 Naake Tigilathu Pileseri agĩĩtĩkĩra ihooya rĩake
2Kings16:10 Na rĩrĩa mũthamaki Ahazu aathiire Damasiki gũtũnga Tigilathu Pileseri mũthamaki wa Asiria
2Kings16:11 Naake Uria agĩgĩaka kĩgongoona o ta kĩu Ahazu aaneanĩĩte mũcoro wakĩo. Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings16:12 Naake Ahazu arĩĩkia gũcooka kuuma Damasiki
2Kings16:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Kings16:14 Nakĩo kĩgongoona gĩa gĩcango kĩrĩa kĩarĩĩkĩĩtie kwamũrĩrwo MWATHANI
2Kings16:15 Naake Ahazu agĩatha Uria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Kings16:16 Naake Uria mũthĩnjĩri Ngai agĩgĩĩka o ta ũrĩa wothe mũthamaki Ahazu aamwathĩĩte.
2Kings16:17 Naake mũthamaki Ahazu agĩthũũkangia ngaari cia gĩcango cia kũguucio iria ciahũthagĩrwo kũu Hekaarũinĩ
2Kings16:18 Ningĩ akĩeheria njukwaa kũu Hekaarũinĩ
2Kings16:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings16:20 Naake agĩkua
2Kings17:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings17:2 Naake Hoshea agĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ marĩa moonagwo marĩ mooru nĩ MWATHANI
2Kings17:3 Naake Shalumaneseri
2Kings17:4 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings17:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings17:6 Naake mũthamaki wa Asiria agĩtuunyana itũũra rĩa Samaria mwaka wa kenda wa ũthamaki wa Hoshea thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli. Ningĩ agĩtaha Aisiraeli aingĩ marĩ mĩgwate akĩmatwara bũrũri wa Asiria
2Kings17:7 Itũũra rĩa Samaria rĩang'aũranirio nĩ ũndũ Asiraeli nĩmeekire maũndũ marĩa moonagwo marĩ mooru nĩ MWATHANI Ngai wao ũrĩa wamahonokirie akĩmaruta ũkomboinĩ wa mũthamaki wa Misiri. Ningĩ nĩmaathaathairie ngai ingĩ
2Kings17:8 na makĩrũmĩrĩra mĩtugo ya andũ arĩa MWATHANI aingatĩĩte makeehera kũrĩa maathiagĩra
2Kings17:9 Nao Asiraeli magĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ marĩa MWATHANI Ngai wao ataakenagio nĩmo. Magĩgĩaka kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio matũũrainĩ maao moothe
2Kings17:10 Ningĩ magĩthondeka itugĩ cia mahiga o na mũhianano wa ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Ashera irĩmainĩ ciothe o na rungu rwa mũtĩ o wothe mũruru.
2Kings17:11 Nakuo kũndũ kũu gũtũũgĩru
2Kings17:12 o na gũkararia ũrĩa aamaathĩĩte atĩ matikaanahooe mĩhianano.
2Kings17:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings17:14 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings17:15 Ningĩ magĩkararia mawatho maake
2Kings17:16 Nao magĩtigana na maathani moothe ma MWATHANI Ngai wao
2Kings17:17 Ningĩ makarahagĩra ngai cia mĩhianano aanake na airĩĩtu aao ta magongoona
2Kings17:18 Naake MWATHANI akĩraakario mũno nĩ andũ a Isiraeli
2Kings17:19 Ningĩ o nao andũ a Juda nĩmaakararirie maathani ma MWATHANI Ngai wao
2Kings17:20 Naake MWATHANI akĩrega andũ oothe a Isiraeli
2Kings17:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings17:22 Nao andũ a Aisiraeli magĩgĩthiĩ na mbere gwĩka meehia o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ Jeroboamu na matiigana gũtigana namo.
2Kings17:23 Maathiire na mbere kwĩhia o nginya MWATHANI akĩmarutũrũra akĩmeeheria mbere yake o ta ũrĩa aameerĩĩte na tũnua twa anabii ndungata ciake atĩ nĩageeka. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Aisiraeli magĩtahwo magĩtwarwo Asiria kũrĩa matũũraga kinyagia ũũmũũthĩ.
2Kings17:24 Naake mũthamaki wa Asiria akĩruta andũ kuuma matũũrainĩ ma Babiloni
2Kings17:25 Na rĩrĩa maambĩrĩirie gũtũũra kuo
2Kings17:26 Tondũ ũcio mũthamaki wa Asiria akĩheeo ũhoro akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
2Kings17:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki agĩgĩathana akiuga atĩrĩ
2Kings17:28 Tondũ ũcio mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Mũisiraeli
2Kings17:29 No rĩĩrĩ
2Kings17:30 Nayo mĩhianano ĩrĩa maathondekire
2Kings17:31 andũ a Iva mĩhianano ya ngai yetagwo Nibihazu na Taritaki; nao andũ a Sefarivaimu makĩrutĩra ngai ciao iria cietagwo Adirameleki na Anameleku ciana ciao irĩ magongoona.
2Kings17:32 Nao andũ acio magĩthaathaiya MWATHANI
2Kings17:33 Tondũ ũcio magĩthaathaiya MWATHANI
2Kings17:34 Nao andũ acio matũire marũmagĩrĩra mĩtugo ĩyo ya tene nginyagia ũũmũũthĩ. O na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings17:35 MWATHANI nĩarĩĩkanĩire na andũ a Isiraeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings17:36 Mwagĩrĩirwo nĩkũnjathĩkagĩra o niĩ nyiiki
2Kings17:37 Ningĩ nĩmwagĩrĩirwo nĩgwathĩkagĩra mawatho o na maathani maakwa marĩa ndamwandĩkĩire. Mũtikaanathĩkĩre ngai ingĩ
2Kings17:38 na mũtikaariganĩrwo nĩ kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndarĩĩkanĩire na inyuĩ.
2Kings17:39 Mwagĩrĩirwo nĩkũnjathĩkagĩra
2Kings17:40 No rĩĩrĩ

2Kings18:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings18:2 Naake aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtaano. Naake agĩthamaka mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na kenda kũu Jerusalemu. Nyina eetagwo Abija
2Kings18:3 Naake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa maakenagia MWATHANI o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ guukawe Daudi.
2Kings18:4 Nĩamomoranirie kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano
2Kings18:5 Naake Hezekia agĩgĩtũũra ehokeete MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli.Thĩinĩ wa athamaki a Juda arĩa maarĩ ho mbere o na arĩa maacookire gũũka thuutha wake gũtiarĩ mũthamaki wahaanaga taake kuo.
2Kings18:6 Nĩ ũndũ nĩatũũrire eetĩkĩĩtie MWATHANI mũno
2Kings18:7 Naake MWATHANI agĩgĩtũũrania hamwe naake
2Kings18:8 Naake akĩhoota Afilisiti
2Kings18:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings18:10 Thuutha wa mĩaka ĩtatũ magĩtuunyana itũũra rĩa Samaria na nĩguo warĩ mwaka wa ĩtandatũ wa ũthamaki wa Hezekia na mwaka wa kenda wa ũthamaki wa Hoshea.
2Kings18:11 Naake mũthamaki wa Asiria agĩtaha Aisiraeli aingĩ marĩ mĩgwate akĩmatwara bũrũriinĩ wa Asiria
2Kings18:12 Itũũra rĩa Samaria rĩang'aũranirio nĩ ũndũ Aisiraeli nĩmaaregire gwathĩkĩra MWATHANI Ngai wao
2Kings18:13 Mwakainĩ wa ikũmi na ĩna wa wathani wa mũthamaki Hezekia
2Kings18:14 Naake Hezekia mũthamaki wa Juda akĩrekania Lakishi kwĩ Senakeribu akeerwo atĩrĩ
2Kings18:15 Naake Hezekia agĩtwarĩra Senakeribu betha yothe ĩrĩa yarĩ Hekaarũinĩ o na ĩrĩa yarĩ mũthiithũinĩ wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki.
2Kings18:16 Ningĩ agĩcooka akĩruta thahabu yothe ĩrĩa yarĩ mĩrangoinĩ ya Hekaarũ o na thahabu ĩrĩa yothe yahumbĩrĩĩte buremu ciayo
2Kings18:17 Naake mũthamaki wa Aasiria agĩtũma mbũtũ yake ya ita kuuma Lakishi ĩtongoreetio nĩ njaama ciake ithatũ iria nene mũno
2Kings18:18 Nacio ciarĩĩkia gũtũmanĩra mũthamaki Hezekia ooke
2Kings18:19 Naake ũmwe wa njaama icio cia Aasiria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Kings18:20 Ũgwĩciiria mĩgambo iiki no ĩĩtiirie wara na hinya wa thigari? Nũũ wĩhokeete agũteithĩrĩrie kũremera Aasiria?
2Kings18:21 No gũkorwo wĩhokeete Misiri. Misiri no ta karũthanju kogondoku mũndũ etirimĩĩtie nako
2Kings18:22 Naake mũnjaama ũcio agĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga atĩrĩ
2Kings18:23 Rĩu-rĩ
2Kings18:24 Mũngĩkĩhota atĩa kũhũndũra o na mũtongoria ũrĩa mũniini wa thigari cia Aasiria
2Kings18:25 Ningĩ-rĩ
2Kings18:26 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Eliakimu
2Kings18:27 No mũnjaama ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Kings18:28 Agĩkĩrũũgama akĩĩhandahanda
2Kings18:29 Tigaai gwĩtĩkĩra mũthamaki Hezekia amũheenie; ndangĩhota kũmũhonokia.
2Kings18:30 Tigaai kũreka Hezekia amũringĩrĩrie mwĩhoke MWATHANI atĩ nĩakaamũhonokia hatarĩ nganja
2Kings18:31 Tigaai gũthikĩrĩria Hezekia! Mũthamaki wa Aasiria aramwatha muumĩre itũũrainĩ na mwĩneane. Inyuothe nĩmũgwĩtĩkĩrio o mũndũ arĩage thabibũ cia mĩthabibũ yake na ngũyũ cia mĩkũyũ yake. Nĩmũgwĩtĩkĩrio mũnyuage maaĩ kuuma ithimainĩ cianyu
2Kings18:32 o nginya rĩria ngooka ndĩmũtware mũgatũũre bũrũri ũngĩ ũhaana o ta ũyũ wanyu. Kũu nĩgũgaakorwo mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ na ya ngano
2Kings18:33 Nĩ ngai cia ndũũrĩrĩ ingĩ irĩkũ ciahonokirie bũrũri wacio kuuma harĩ mũthamaki wa Aasiria?

2Kings19:3 Aameerire mathiĩ meere Isaia atĩrĩ

2Kings23:1 Naake mũthamaki Josia agĩcookanĩrĩria hamwe atongoria oothe a Juda o na a Jerusalemu.
2Kings23:2 Agĩcooka akĩmatongoria
2Kings23:3 Naake akĩrũũgama harĩa aamenyereete gũikara
2Kings23:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Josia agĩatha Hilikia Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene
2Kings23:5 Ningĩ athĩnjĩri ngai arĩa maathuurĩĩtwo nĩ athamaki a Juda makũrutagĩra mĩhianano magongoona kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano
2Kings23:6 Ningĩ mũhianano wa ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Ashera akĩũruta kuuma Hekaarũinĩ
2Kings23:7 Nacio nyũmba iria ciaikaragwo nĩ maraaya kũu hekaarũinĩ agĩcitharia. (Kũu nĩkuo atumia maatumagĩra nguo ndaaya iria ciehumbagwo hĩndĩ ya gũthaathaiya Ashera.)
2Kings23:8 Naake akĩgĩĩra athĩnjĩri Ngai oothe arĩa maatũũraga Juda guothe akĩmareehe Jerusalemu
2Kings23:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Kings23:10 Ningĩ mũthamaki Josia agĩthaahia Tofethi kũndũ kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano kũu gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Hinomu
2Kings23:11 Thuutha ũcio agĩcooka akĩeheria mbarathi iria ciamũrĩirwo riũa nĩ athamaki a Juda
2Kings23:12 Ningĩ Josia agĩtharia igongoona iria athamaki a Juda
2Kings23:13 Ningĩ mũthamaki Josia agĩthaahia kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria kũrĩa gwakĩĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki Solomoni mwena wa irathĩro wa Jerusalemu
2Kings23:14 Nacio itugĩ cia kũhooywo agĩciunanga tũcunjĩ tũcunjĩ
2Kings23:15 Ningĩ Josia agĩcooka akĩmomoranga kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria kũrĩa Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati

1Chronicles9:6 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga ũcio wa Benjamini arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu maarĩ mĩciĩ magana kenda ma mĩrongo ĩtaano na ĩtandatũ (956). Nao acio oothe magweteetwo hau igũrũ nĩ o maarĩ anene a mĩciĩ.
1Chronicles9:7 (10-12) Athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu

1Chronicles9:9 (14-16) Alawii arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu nĩ: Shemaia mũrũ wa Hashubu
1Chronicles9:10 Aya nao nĩ o arangĩri a Hekaarũ arĩa maathiire gũtũũra Jerusalemu; Shalumu
1Chronicles9:11 Mbere ĩyo nĩ o maarangagĩra kĩhingo gĩa kwa mũthamaki kĩa mwena wa irathĩro. Ningĩ no o maarĩ arangĩri a ihingo cia kũrĩa Alawii maikaraga.
1Chronicles9:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles9:13 Finehasi mũrũ wa Eleazaru aarĩ mũnene wao rĩmwe tene; MWATHANI aarĩ hamwe naake.
1Chronicles9:14 O naake Zekaria mũrũ wa Meshelemia
1Chronicles9:15 Andũ acio oothe maathuurĩĩtwo kũrangĩra ihingo
1Chronicles9:16 Nao andũ acio o hamwe na njiarwa ciao magĩthiĩ na mbere kũruta wĩra wa kũrangĩra ihingo icio cia Hekaarũ.
1Chronicles9:17 Kwarĩ na ihingo inya
1Chronicles9:18 Nao arangĩri acio mateithagĩrĩrio nĩ andũ a mbarĩ ciao arĩa maatũũranagia nao matũũrainĩ maao
1Chronicles9:19 Nao arangĩri acio ana anene a ihingo maarĩ Alawii
1Chronicles9:20 Nao maikaraga hakuhĩ na Hekaarũ
1Chronicles9:21 Alawii arĩa angĩ nĩ o maarĩ amenyereri a indo iria ciahũthagĩrwo hĩndĩ ya gũthaathaiya Hekaarũinĩ. Nĩ o maacitaraga ikiumio na igĩcookio.
1Chronicles9:22 Amwe a acio nĩ o maarĩ amenyereri a indo iria ciarĩ nyamũre
1Chronicles9:23 No warĩ wĩra wa athĩnjĩri Ngai gũtukanagia indo icio nungi wega.
1Chronicles9:24 Mũlawii ũmwe wetagwo Matithia irigithaathi rĩa Shalumu wa mbarĩ ya Kora nĩ we waheetwo wĩra wa gũkanda mĩgate ya magongoona.
1Chronicles9:25 Nayo mbarĩ ya Kohathu nĩ yo yaheetwo wĩra wa gũthondeka mĩgate mĩtheru ĩrĩa yarutagĩrwo Ngai Hekaarũinĩ mĩthenya ya Thabatũ.
1Chronicles9:26 Ningĩ nĩkwarĩ na andũ amwe a mĩciĩ ya Alawii arĩa maaheetwo wĩra wa kũina nyĩmbo Hekaarũinĩ. Nao anene a mbarĩ ciao maatũũraga tũnyũmbainĩ twa Hekaarũ na gũtirĩ wĩra ũngĩ maarutaga nĩ ũndũ nĩmangĩetirwo hĩndĩ o yothe mũthenya kana ũtukũ.
1Chronicles9:27 Andũ acio nĩ o maarĩ anene a mĩciĩ ya Alawii kũringana na ũrĩa njiarwa ciao ciatariĩ
1Chronicles9:28 Jeieli nĩwe wambĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Gibeoni na nĩkuo aatũũraga. Mũtumia wake eetagwo Maaka.

1Chronicles10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles10:2 Nao Afilisiti makĩmateng'eria na makĩũraga aariũ a Saũlũ: Jonathani
1Chronicles10:3 Nayo mbaara ĩgĩkĩũmĩra Saũlũ mũno
1Chronicles10:4 Saũlũ agĩkĩĩra mwanake ũrĩa wamũkuuagĩra indo ciake cia mbaara atĩrĩ
1Chronicles10:5 Mwanake ũcio wamũkuuagĩra indo ciake cia mbaara oona atĩ Saũlũ nĩakua
1Chronicles10:6 Ũguo nĩguo Saũlũ na aariũ aake atatũ maakuire. Na rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles10:7 Rĩrĩa Aisiraeli arĩa maarĩ na mwena ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa gĩtuamba kĩa Jezireeli
1Chronicles10:8 Mũthenya ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire
1Chronicles10:9 Magĩgĩtinia mũtwe wa Saũlũ na makĩmwaũra nguo ciake cia mbaara. Magĩcooka magĩtũma andũ bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Afilisiti makamenyithanie ũhoro ũcio mwega kũrĩ ngai ciao cia mĩhianano o na kũrĩ andũ aao.
1Chronicles10:10 Magĩcooka makĩiga indo ciake cia mbaara hekaarũinĩ ĩmwe yao
1Chronicles10:11 Rĩrĩa andũ a Jabeshi
1Chronicles10:12 andũ arĩa maarĩ njamba magĩthiĩ makĩgĩĩra kĩimba gĩa Saũlũ na ciimba cia aariũ aake magĩcitwara Jabeshi. Magĩcithika rungu rwa mũtĩ wa mũgandi na makĩĩhinga kũrĩa irio mĩthenya mũgwanja.
1Chronicles10:13 Ũguo nĩguo Saũlũ aakuire nĩ ũndũ wa kwaga kwĩhokeka harĩ MWATHANI
1Chronicles10:14 handũ ha kũhooya MWATHANI. Kwoguo MWATHANI akĩmũũraga

1Chronicles15:1 Naake Daudi agĩgĩaka nyũmba nyingĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Daudi nĩ ũndũ wa mabata maake. Agĩcooka agĩthondeka handũ akĩamba hema ho nĩguo haigagwo Ithandũkũ rĩa Ngai rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro.
1Chronicles15:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akiuga atĩrĩ
1Chronicles15:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Daudi agĩcookanĩrĩria andũ oothe a Isiraeli kũu Jerusalemu nĩguo makagĩĩre Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro marĩreehe handũ hau aarĩthondekeire.
1Chronicles15:4 Agĩcooka agĩcookanĩrĩria njiarwa cia Harũni o na Alawii.
1Chronicles15:5 Kuuma mbarĩ ya Kohathu gũgĩũka andũ igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles15:6 kuuma mbarĩ ya Merari gũgĩũka andũ magana meerĩ ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ (220) matongoreetio nĩ Asaia;
1Chronicles15:7 kuuma mbarĩ ya Gerishoni gũgĩũka andũ igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩtatũ (130) matongoreetio nĩ Joeli;
1Chronicles15:8 kuuma mbarĩ ya Elizafani gũgĩũka andũ magana meerĩ (200) matongoreetio nĩ Shemaia;
1Chronicles15:9 kuuma mbarĩ ya Heburoni gũgĩũka andũ mĩrongo ĩnaana (80) matongoreetio nĩ Elieli;
1Chronicles15:10 kuuma mbarĩ ya Uzieli gũgĩũka andũ igana na ikũmi na eerĩ (112) matongoreetio nĩ Aminadabu.
1Chronicles15:11 Ningĩ Daudi agĩĩta Zadoku na Abiatharu athĩnjĩri Ngai o na Alawii atandatũ mooke harĩ we
1Chronicles15:12 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Chronicles15:13 Tondũ mũtiarĩkuuĩĩte ihinda rĩrĩa rĩa mbere
1Chronicles15:14 Tondũ ũcio athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii magĩĩtheria magĩthirwo nĩ thaahu nĩguo magĩĩre Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli.
1Chronicles15:15 Nao Alawii makĩrĩkuua na mĩtĩ mĩraaya maigĩrĩire ciande ciao o ta ũrĩa MWATHANI aathanĩĩte ahũthĩrĩĩte Musa.
1Chronicles15:16 Naake Daudi akĩĩra atongoria a Alawii mathuure Alawii amwe a kũina na kũhũũra inanda na thaani iria ihũũrithanagio makeneete.
1Chronicles15:17 (17-21) Tondũ ũcio magĩgĩthuura andũ kuuma mbarĩ iria cioĩ kũina a kũhũũra thaani iria ihũũrithanagio ikagamba. Andũ acio maarĩ Hemani mũrũ wa Joeli
1Chronicles15:18 Naake Kenania nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa aarĩ njoorua ya kũina agĩthuurwo ainithagie Alawii.

1Chronicles16:30 Igũrũ tanĩrĩkene
1Chronicles16:31 Iria tanĩrĩrurume o na indo ciothe iria irĩ kuo.Mĩgũnda tanĩcanjamũke o na kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩ thĩinĩ wayo!

1Chronicles16:36 Naake Daudi agĩgĩtiga Asafu na aariũ a ithe Alawii matuĩke a gũthaathayagia Ngai marĩ o kũu Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩarĩ. Wĩra ũcio wa gũthaathaiya warĩ wa kũrutagwo mũthenya o mũthenya.
1Chronicles16:37 Naake Obedi Edomu
1Chronicles16:38 Naake Zadoku mũthĩnjĩri Ngai
1Chronicles16:39 Maagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrutaga magongoona ma njino o rũũciinĩ na o hwaĩinĩ o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo wathoinĩ ũrĩa MWATHANI aaheire Aisiraeli mahingagie.
1Chronicles16:40 Ningĩ hamwe nao hagĩtigwo Hemani na Jeduthuni o na arĩa maathuurĩĩtwo noguo mainage nyĩmbo cia gũkumia MWATHANI nĩ ũndũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.

1Chronicles17:2 Naake Nathani akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
1Chronicles17:3 No rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles17:4 “Thiĩ ũkeere ndungata yakwa Daudi atĩrĩ
1Chronicles17:5 Kuuma rĩrĩa ndarutire andũ a Isiraeli kuuma Misiri kinyagia ũũmũũthĩ ndirĩ ndatũũra thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ; ndũire njũrũũraga ngĩikaraga hemainĩ.

1Chronicles17:7 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
1Chronicles17:8 Ngoreetwo nawe kũrĩa guothe wanathiĩ
1Chronicles17:9 (9-10) Nĩthuurĩire andũ aakwa a Isiraeli handũ
1Chronicles17:10 Rĩrĩa ũgaakua na ũthikwo mbĩĩrĩrainĩ cia maithe maaku-rĩ
1Chronicles17:11 Ũcio nĩwe ũkaanjakĩra Hekaarũ
1Chronicles17:12 Na niĩ nĩngaatuĩka ithe
1Chronicles17:13 Nĩngaamũtua mũtongoria wa andũ aakwa na wa ũthamaki wakwa tene na tene. Gĩtĩ gĩake gĩa ũthamaki gĩgaatũũra kĩrũmĩĩte tene na tene.’ ”
1Chronicles17:14 Naake Nathani akĩmenyithia Daudi maũndũ moothe marĩa Ngai aamũguũrĩirie.
1Chronicles17:15 Naake mũthamaki Daudi agĩtoonya Hemainĩ thĩinĩ agĩikara thĩ mbere ya MWATHANI akĩhooya ũũ: “Rĩu MWATHANI Ngai

1Chronicles22:3 Agĩcooka akĩigithia cuuma nyingĩ cia gũthondekwo mĩcumaarĩ ya mĩrango ya ihingo o na irenji cia cuuma cia mĩrango ĩyo. Ningĩ akĩigithia o na cuuma nyingĩ cia gĩcango itaarĩ gĩthimi.
