1Chronicles27:5 Naake Joabu
1Chronicles27:6 (25-31) Nao amenyereri a ũtonga wa mũthamaki maahaanaga ta ũũ:Thitoo kũrĩa kwaigagwo ũtonga wa mũthamaki: Azimavethu mũrũ wa Adieli.Thitoo kũrĩa kwaigagwo ũtonga wa mũingĩ: Jonathani mũrũ wa Uzia.Aruti wĩra mũgũndainĩ: Eziri mũrũ wa KelubuMĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ: Shimei wa kuuma Rama.Thitoo kũrĩa ndibei yaigagwo: Zabedi wa kuuma Shefamu.Mũgũnda wa mĩtamaiyũ na mĩkũyũ (ĩrĩa yarĩ magũrũinĩ ma irĩma cia Juda mwena wa na ithũĩro): Baali Hanani wa kuuma GederiThitoo kũrĩa kwaigagwo maguta ma mĩtamaiyũ: Joashu.Mũmenyereri wa ndũũru cia ng'ombe iria ciarĩithagĩrio werũinĩ wa Sharoni: Shitirai wa kuuma Sharoni.Mũmenyereri wa ng'ombe iria ciarĩithagĩrio ciandainĩ: Shafatu mũrũ wa Adilai.Mũmenyereri wa ngamĩĩra: Obili MũishumaeliMũmenyereri wa ndigiri: Jedeia wa kuuma Meronothi.Mũmenyereri wa ng'ondu na mbũri: Jazizi Mũhagari.Acio oothe nĩ o maarĩ aramati a ũtonga wa mũthamaki Daudi.
1Chronicles27:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles27:8 Ahithofeli nĩ we wataaraga mũthamaki
1Chronicles27:9 Ahithofeli akua
1Chronicles28:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Daudi akĩrũũgama mbere yao akĩmeera atĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:3 no rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:6 “MWATHANI anjĩĩre atĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:7 Ningĩ nĩngaatũma ũthamaki wake ũtũũre wĩhandĩĩte tene na tene angĩkorwo nĩagaatũũra amenyereire maathani maakwa o na mawatho maakwa o ta ũrĩa eekaga rĩu.’
1Chronicles28:8 “Na rĩu
1Chronicles28:9 Naake Daudi agĩcooka akĩĩhũgũrĩra mũũrũwe Solomoni
1Chronicles28:10 Rĩu nĩngwenda ũmenye atĩ MWATHANI nĩagũthuurĩĩte nĩguo wake Hekaarũ yake theru. Gĩa na hinya na wambĩrĩrie kũmĩaka.”
1Chronicles28:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Daudi agĩkĩhe Solomoni maabu ya mwako wothe wa Hekaarũ
1Chronicles28:12 Agĩcooka akĩmũhe maabu ingĩ cia ũrĩa angĩendire ithaku cia Hekaarũ ciakwo
1Chronicles28:13 Ningĩ agĩcooka akĩmũhe mũtaratara wa ũrĩa akaabangagĩra athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii mawĩra maao ma Hekaarũ o na ma kũmenyerera indo ciothe cia kũhũthĩrwo kũu Hekaarũinĩ.
1Chronicles28:14 Agĩcooka akĩmuonereria gĩthimi gĩa gũthimaga thahabu na betha nakĩo rĩrĩa egũthondeka indo cia kũhũthĩrwo Hekaarũinĩ
1Chronicles28:15 mataawa na mĩtĩ ya kũmacuuria
1Chronicles28:16 meetha cia betha
1Chronicles28:17 Ningĩ akĩmũtaarĩria mũigana wa thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno ya gũthondekithia hũũma cia kũrĩa
1Chronicles28:18 Agĩcooka akĩmuonereria gĩthimi gĩa thahabu ĩrĩa therie ya gũthondeka kĩgongoona gĩa gũcinĩra ũbaani o na ya gũthondeka ngaari ya mbarathi ya thahabu ya gũkuuaga ciũmbe iria irĩ mathagu iria ihumbagĩra Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩa MWATHANI.
1Chronicles28:19 Naake Daudi akiuga atĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:20 Ningĩ Daudi akĩĩra mũũrũwe Solomoni atĩrĩ
1Chronicles28:21 Ningĩ-rĩ
1Chronicles29:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Daudi akĩĩra kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe kĩa andũ atĩrĩ
1Chronicles29:2 Niĩ haakwa-rĩ
1Chronicles29:3 Hamwe na icio
1Chronicles29:4 Nĩheanĩĩte makĩria ma tani igana cia thahabu iria njega mũno
1Chronicles29:5 o na indo ingĩ iria igaathondekwo nĩ mabundi ma wĩra wa mooko. Rĩu-rĩ
1Chronicles29:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo atongoria a mbarĩ
1Chronicles29:7 Indo iria maarutire cia wĩra wa mwako wa Hekaarũ ciahaanaga ta ũũ: Makĩria ma tani igana na mĩrongo mũgwanja cia thahabu
1Chronicles29:8 Arĩa maarĩ na mahiga ma goro
1Chronicles29:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ acio magĩkena mũno nĩ ũndũ wa kũrutĩra MWATHANI indo nyingĩ na kwĩyendera. O naake mũthamaki Daudi agĩkena gĩkeno kĩnene mũno.
1Chronicles29:10 Tondũ ũcio Daudi akĩgooca MWATHANI arĩ hau mbere ya kĩũngano kĩu gĩothe akiuga atĩrĩ
1Chronicles29:11 Ũnene na hinya nĩ ciaku
1Chronicles29:12 Ũtonga na gĩtĩĩo ciumaga kũrĩ we
1Chronicles29:13 Rĩu
1Chronicles29:14 “Na rĩu MWATHANI Ngai
1Chronicles29:15 Nĩ gũkorwo wee MWATHANI
1Chronicles29:16 MWATHANI Ngai witũ
1Chronicles29:17 Nĩnjũũĩ nĩũthuuthuuragia ngoro ya mũndũ na nĩũkenagĩra andũ arĩa eega. Niĩ ndutĩĩte indo ici ciothe na kwĩyendera o na nĩ ũndũ wa kwĩhokeka. Ningĩ ndĩ mũira wa ũrĩa andũ aya aaku me haaha maakũrutĩra indo ciao na kwĩyendera na maiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ gĩkeno.
1Chronicles29:18 Na rĩu MWATHANI Ngai wa maithe maitũ Aburahamu
1Chronicles29:19 Ndagũthaitha ũhe Solomoni
1Chronicles29:20 Naake Daudi akĩĩra andũ oothe atĩrĩ
1Chronicles29:21 magĩkĩrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona. Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ makĩrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona ma njino: ndeegwa ngiri ĩmwe (1
1Chronicles29:22 Mũthenya ũcio magĩkĩrĩa na makĩnyua marĩ na gĩkeno kĩnene marĩ hau mbere ya MWATHANI.Magĩcooka magĩgĩtua Solomoni mũthamaki hĩndĩ ya keerĩ. Magĩkĩmũitĩrĩria maguta rĩĩtwainĩ rĩa MWATHANI
1Chronicles29:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Solomoni agĩgĩikarĩra gĩtĩ gĩa ũthamaki kĩrĩa MWATHANI aahaarĩirie
1Chronicles29:24 Nao anene oothe na mbũtũ ciothe cia ita
1Chronicles29:25 Naake MWATHANI agĩtũũgĩria Solomoni mũno na agĩtũma eekĩrĩrwo kũu Isiraeli guothe gũkĩra athamaki arĩa oothe maarĩ mbere yake.
1Chronicles29:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles29:27 mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna. Aathamakire mĩaka mũgwanja arĩ Heburoni na mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩtatũ arĩ Jerusalemu.
1Chronicles29:28 Naake agĩgĩkua e mũkũrũ mũno
1Chronicles29:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
1Chronicles29:30 Mabukuinĩ macio nĩkwandĩkĩĩtwo ũrĩa aathanire
2Chronicles1:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:2 Naake mũthamaki Solomoni akĩruta watho kũrĩ atongoria arĩa maarũũgamagĩrĩra ikundi cia andũ ngiri
2Chronicles1:3 Amaathire mathiĩ naake kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria MWATHANI Ngai kũrĩa kwarĩ Gibeoni. Maathiire kũu tondũ nĩkuo Hema ya MWATHANI ya gũtũnganwo yarĩ o ĩrĩa Musa
2Chronicles1:4 (No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:5 O nakĩo kĩgongoona gĩa gĩcango kĩrĩa Bezaleli mũrũ wa Uri na mũcũkũrũ wa Huri aathondekeete kĩarĩ o kũu Gibeoni mbere ya Hema ya MWATHANI ya gũtũnganwo. Naake Solomoni na andũ oothe magĩthaathaĩria MWATHANI kuo.
2Chronicles1:6 Naake mũthamaki Solomoni akĩrutĩra igũrũ wa kĩgongoona kũu gĩa gĩcango
2Chronicles1:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:8 Naake Solomoni agĩcookia atĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:9 Wee MWATHANI Ngai
2Chronicles1:10 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Chronicles1:11 Naake Ngai agĩcookeria Solomoni atĩrĩ
2Chronicles1:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngũkũhe ũũgĩ na ũmenyi wa maũndũ. Ningĩ nĩngũkũhe ũtonga mũingĩ
2Chronicles1:13 Thuutha wa ũguo Solomoni akiuma kũu Gibeoni
2Chronicles1:14 Naake Solomoni akĩyũmbĩra mbũtũ ya ita yarĩ na ngaari cia mbarathi ngiri ĩmwe na magana mana (1
2Chronicles1:15 Matukũinĩ ma ũthamaki wake betha na thahabu igĩkorwo caiingĩhĩĩte o ta mahiga kũu Jerusalemu
2Chronicles1:16 Andũ arĩa maarutagĩra mũthamaki wĩra wa wonjoria maagũraga mbarathi kuuma bũrũri wa Musiri na Kilikia.
2Chronicles1:17 Kuuma Misiri maagũraga ngaari cia mbarathi. Mbarathi ĩmwe yoimaga icunjĩ igana na mĩrongo ĩtaano cia betha
2Chronicles2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles2:2 Tondũ ũcio agĩthuura andũ ngiri mĩrongo mũgwanja
2Chronicles2:3 Naake Solomoni akĩrekanĩria Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo na ndũmĩrĩri ĩno: “Atĩrĩĩrĩ Hiramu
2Chronicles2:4 Nĩndĩharĩirie gwakĩra MWATHANI Hekaarũ ĩĩtanĩĩtio na rĩĩtwa rĩake. Hau harĩtuĩka handũ hatheru
2Chronicles2:5 Hekaarũ ĩrĩa ndaanyĩĩte gwaka
2Chronicles2:6 O na kũrĩ nĩ ũguo-rĩ
2Chronicles2:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Chronicles2:8 Ningĩ ndeehithĩria mĩgogo ya mĩtarakwa
2Chronicles2:9 Nĩndĩharĩirie gũtũma ndungata ciakwa nĩguo iteithagĩrĩrie icio ciaku gũtema mĩtĩ mĩingĩ
2Chronicles2:10 Nao aruti aaku a wĩra nĩndĩrĩmatũmagĩra indo ciao cia kũhũthĩra ihaana ta ũũ: tani cia kĩmetiriki ngiri igĩrĩ (2
2Chronicles2:11 Naake Hiramu
2Chronicles2:12 MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli arogoocwo
2Chronicles2:13 Rĩu nĩndagũtũmĩra Huramu
2Chronicles2:14 Nyina aarĩ wa mũhĩrĩga wa Dani
2Chronicles2:15 Tondũ ũcio
2Chronicles2:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles2:17 Naake Solomoni agĩtara andũ oothe a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa maarĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Isiraeli. Naguo mũtarano ũcio wahaanaga o ta ũrĩa Daudi aataranĩĩte. Nao maarĩ andũ ngiri igana na mĩrongo ĩtaano na ithatũ na magana matandatũ (153
2Chronicles2:18 Naake agĩthuura andũ ngiri mĩrongo mũgwanja (70
2Chronicles3:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles3:2 Naake aambĩrĩirie kũmĩaka mweri wa keerĩ
2Chronicles3:3 Naguo mwako ũcio wahaanaga ta ũũ: Ũraihu warĩ wa mita mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mũgwanja
2Chronicles3:4 Naguo warii wa gĩthaku gĩa itoonyero warĩ mita kenda o ta wa Hekaarũ
2Chronicles3:5 akĩarithia mbaaũ cia mĩtarakwa kũndũ guothe igũrũ wa nyũmba ĩrĩa nene na agĩkũhumbĩrithia guothe na thahabu iria therie mũno. Agĩcooka agĩkũgemia na mbica cia mĩtĩ ya mĩkĩndũ ikururĩĩtwo o na cia nyororo.
2Chronicles3:6 Naake Solomoni akĩgemia Hekaarũ na mahiga ma goro o na thahabu yarutĩĩtwo kuuma Parivaimu.
2Chronicles3:7 Nacio thingo cia Hekaarũ
2Chronicles3:8 Nako kanyũmba karĩa aakithirie kũu thĩinĩ kaarĩ ka mita kenda thikwea. Wariĩ ũcio wako waiganaga o ta wa Hekaarũ yo nyene. Nako agĩgeeta Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno. Nacio thingo cia thĩinĩ cia kanyũmba kau ciahumbĩirwo na thahabu ya tani mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
2Chronicles3:9 Nayo mĩcumaarĩ yathondekeetwo na ũritũ wa thahabu wa ngiramu magana mataano na mĩrongo mũgwanja. O nacio thingo cia tũnyũmba twa igũrũ agĩcihumbĩra na thahabu.
2Chronicles3:10 Naake mũthamaki Solomoni agĩthondekithia ciũmbe igĩrĩ irĩ mathagu cia cuuma
2Chronicles3:11 (11-13) iroreete na kũu mũromoinĩ wa Hekaarũ. O kĩmwe kĩarĩ na mathagu meerĩ na o ithagu rĩarĩ rĩa ũraihu wa mita igĩrĩ na boiniti igĩrĩ. Namo mathagu maacio maatambarũkĩĩte
2Chronicles3:12 Agĩcooka agĩthondekithia mbathiya ya gataani ya Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno ĩgemeetio na rangi wa mburuu
2Chronicles3:13 Naake mũthamaki agĩthondekithia itugĩ igĩrĩ
2Chronicles3:14 Ningĩ o igũrũ wa gĩtugĩ nĩhaagemeetio na mĩcoro ya nyororo ĩtoonyanĩĩtio wega
2Chronicles3:15 Naake agĩkĩhanda itugĩ icio cierĩ o hau gĩthakuinĩ gĩa gũtoonya Hekaarũ. Kĩrĩa kĩarĩ na mwena wa kĩanda agĩgĩtua Jakini
2Chronicles4:1 Ningĩ mũthamaki Solomoni agĩthondekithia kĩgongoona gĩa gĩcango
2Chronicles4:2 O na ningĩ agĩthondekithia itangi rĩa gĩthiũrũrĩ rĩa gĩcango rĩa ũriku wa mita igĩrĩ na boiniti igĩrĩ na kuuma mwena ũmwe kinya ũrĩa ũngĩ mita inya na boiniti inya
2Chronicles4:3 Mĩthiainĩ ya itangi rĩu na gũthiũrũrũkĩria rĩagemeetio na mĩhari ĩĩrĩ ya ndeegwa
2Chronicles4:4 Itangi rĩu rĩaigĩrĩirwo igũrũ wa mĩhiano ya ndeegwa ikũmi na igĩrĩ cia gĩcango. Mĩhiano ĩyo yaroreete na mwena wa na nja
2Chronicles4:5 Ũtungu wa itangi rĩu warĩ wa mirimita mĩrongo mũgwanja na ithaano. Mĩthia yarĩo yathondekeetwo ta mĩthia ya gĩkombe ĩyunĩĩte na nja ta mĩthia ya gĩtooka. Itangi rĩu rĩngĩaiyũririo na rita ngiri mĩrongo ĩtandatũ (60
2Chronicles4:6 Magĩcooka magĩthondeka tũraĩ ikũmi twa gwĩthambĩra
2Chronicles4:7 (7-8) Ningĩ magĩthondeka mĩtĩ ikũmi ya thahabu ya gũcuuragio mataawa o ta ũrĩa mũthondekere wayo wonanĩĩtio
2Chronicles4:8 Nao magĩthondeka nja ya athĩnjĩri Ngai
2Chronicles4:9 Itangi rĩu rĩarũũgamirio na mwena koonainĩ ya na mwena wa kĩanda wa Hekaarũ kwerekera mwena wa irathĩro.
2Chronicles4:10 (11-16) Huramu agĩcooka agĩthondeka nyũngũ
2Chronicles4:11 Naake mũthamaki aacithondekithĩirie gĩturĩroinĩ kĩrĩa kĩarĩ gatagatĩ ga Sukothu na Zereda
2Chronicles4:12 Naake Solomoni ndaigana gũthimithia ũritũ wa gĩcango kĩa indo iria aathondekithĩĩtie nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa ciaingĩhĩĩte. Kwoguo ũritũ ũcio ndwamenyekire ũrĩa waiganaga.
2Chronicles4:13 Naake Solomoni agĩthondekithia o na indo cia thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno cia kũigwo kũu Hekaarũinĩ. Nacio ciarĩ kĩgongoona
2Chronicles4:14 mĩtĩ ya gũcuuragio mataawa hamwe na mataawa maayo ma thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno. Mataawa macio maarĩ ma gũcuuragio magĩakanaga mbere ya Handũ Harĩa Hatheru Mũno kũringana na ũrĩa kwabangĩĩtwo;
2Chronicles4:15 mahũa ma kũgemia
2Chronicles4:16 tũmĩĩhato tũniini twa kũhoria taawa
2Chronicles5:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles5:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Solomoni agĩĩta atongoria oothe a mĩhĩrĩga
2Chronicles5:3 Nao atongoria oothe a Isiraeli makĩũngana he mũthamaki mũthenya wa thigũkũ ya Ithũnũ (mweriinĩ wa mũgwanja).
2Chronicles5:4 Rĩrĩa atongoria oothe maakinyire
2Chronicles5:5 makĩrĩtoonyia Hekaarũinĩ. Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii magĩkuuanĩra Hema ya gũtũnganwo o na indo ciothe iria ciarĩ nyamũre iria ciarĩ kuo
2Chronicles5:6 Naake mũthamaki Solomoni
2Chronicles5:7 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai
2Chronicles5:8 Namo mathagu ma mĩhianano ĩyo ya ciũmbe icio maatambarũkĩĩtio makahumbĩra Ithandũkũ rĩu o na mĩgamba ĩrĩa rĩakuuagwo nayo.
2Chronicles5:9 Nayo mĩthia ya mĩgamba ĩyo nĩyonekaga nĩ mũndũ arũũgamĩĩte mũrangoinĩ aroreete Handũ Hau Hatheru Mũno nĩ ũndũ wa kũraiha. Ndĩngĩahotire kuoneka nĩ mũndũ arĩ handũ hangĩ. (Mĩgamba ĩyo ĩrĩ o ho o na ũũmũũthĩ).
2Chronicles5:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles5:11 (11-14) Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Solomoni akĩhooya atĩrĩ:“Rĩu wee MWATHANI
2Chronicles6:2 Nĩngwakĩire Hekaarũ thaka
2Chronicles6:3 Naake Solomoni akĩhũgũkĩra andũ oothe a Isiraeli
2Chronicles6:4 akiuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:5 ‘Kuuma rĩrĩa ndarutire andũ aakwa a Isiraeli kuuma bũrũri wa Misiri ndirĩ ndathuura itũũra o na rĩmwe bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Isiraeli atĩ nĩguo njakĩrwo Hekaarũ kuo ya gũthaathayagĩrio. Ndirĩ ndathuura mũndũ o na ũmwe atuĩke mũthamaki wao.
2Chronicles6:6 Rĩu nĩthuurĩĩte Jerusalemu gũtuĩke handũ harĩa ndĩthaathayagĩrio
2Chronicles6:7 Naake Solomoni agĩthiĩ na mbere na mĩario akiuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:8 No MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:9 no rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:10 “Na rĩu
2Chronicles6:11 Ningĩ nĩnjigĩĩte Ithandũkũ Hekaarũinĩ rĩrĩa rĩrĩ na ihengere cia mahiga cia kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa MWATHANI aarĩkanĩire na Aisiraeli.”
2Chronicles6:12 Naake Solomoni akĩrũũgama hau mbere ya kĩgongoona kĩa MWATHANI akĩonagwo nĩ andũ oothe
2Chronicles6:13 (Solomoni nĩgwaka aakĩĩte njukwaa ya gĩcango
2Chronicles6:14 Naake akĩhooya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:15 Nĩũrũmĩĩtie kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa werĩire baaba Daudi; naguo ũhoro ũrĩa waririe nĩwahinga ũũmũũthĩ.
2Chronicles6:16 Rĩu MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli
2Chronicles6:17 Na rĩu MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli ndagũthaitha ũtũme kĩĩranĩro kĩrĩa werĩire Daudi baaba
2Chronicles6:18 “No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles6:19 Ndagũthaitha MWATHANI Ngai wakwa
2Chronicles6:20 Reke maitho maaku maikarage hĩndĩ ciothe macũũthĩrĩirie Hekaarũ ĩno hĩndĩ ciothe
2Chronicles6:21 Ĩtĩkĩra gũthikagĩrĩria mahooya maakwa o na ma andũ aaku a Isiraeli rĩrĩa tuoka handũ haaha gũkũhooya. Ningĩ ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ ũgatũthikagĩrĩria
2Chronicles6:22 “Mũndũ angĩkaahĩtĩria mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ
2Chronicles6:23 hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI ũgaathikĩrĩria ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ
2Chronicles6:24 “Rĩrĩa andũ aaku a Isiraeli mahootwo nĩ thũ ciao nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa makũhĩtĩirie
2Chronicles6:25 ũmathikagĩrĩrie ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ. Ningĩ ũmoohagĩre meehia maao
2Chronicles6:26 “Wee MWATHANI
2Chronicles6:27 ndagũthaitha MWATHANI ũmathikagĩrĩrie ũrĩ o kũu igũrũ. Ohagĩra andũ aaku a Isiraeli meehia maao
2Chronicles6:28 “Ningĩ bũrũri ũngĩgĩa ng'aragu
2Chronicles6:29 o na hĩndĩ ĩyo mangĩkũhooya
2Chronicles6:30 ndagũthaitha ũiguage mahooya maao. Ndagũthaitha ũmathikagĩrĩrie ũrĩ kũu gwaku igũrũ ũkamoohera meehia. Tondũ wee mwene
2Chronicles6:31 Ĩkaga ũguo nĩguo andũ aaku matũũre makũheaga gĩtĩĩo na magwathĩkagĩra matukũ moothe
2Chronicles6:32 “Ningĩ mũndũ wa bũrũri ũngĩ angĩkaigua ngumo yaku
2Chronicles6:33 ndagũthaitha ũkamũigua. Ũkamũhingĩria mahooya maake ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ
2Chronicles6:34 “Ningĩ andũ aaku mangĩkoimagara makarũe na thũ ciao
2Chronicles6:35 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua mahooya maao ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ ũmahe ũhootani.
2Chronicles6:36 “Andũ aaku mangĩgaakwĩhia (amu hatikĩrĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe ũteehagia) na nĩ ũndũ wa kũraakario nĩ o
2Chronicles6:37 mangĩkoona meehia maao merire
2Chronicles6:38 Mangĩkaahera na ma matarĩ na itherũ marĩ bũrũri ũcio
2Chronicles6:39 ndagũthaitha ũkaigua mahooya maao ũrĩ o kũu gwaku igũrũ na ũmaiguĩre tha na ũmoohere meehia maao moothe.
2Chronicles6:40 “Rĩu
2Chronicles6:41 “Tondũ ũcio rĩu
2Chronicles6:42 Ndagũthaitha
2Chronicles7:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:2 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai matingĩomĩrĩire gũtoonya Hekaarũinĩ nĩ ũndũ wa riiri ũrĩa warĩ kuo.
2Chronicles7:3 Rĩrĩa andũ oothe a Isiraeli moonire mwaki woima igũrũ o na riiri wa MWATHANI ũiyũrĩĩte kũu Hekaarũinĩ
2Chronicles7:4 Naake Solomoni na andũ oothe makĩrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona.
2Chronicles7:5 Solomoni akĩrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona ma thaayũ ma ndeegwa ngiri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ (22
2Chronicles7:6 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai makĩrũũgama harĩa maatuĩrĩirwo. Nao Alawii makĩrũũgama maroranĩĩte nao
2Chronicles7:7 Naake Solomoni akĩamũra nja ĩrĩa yarĩ hau gatagatĩ na mwena wa mbere wa Hekaarũ. Hau nĩ ho aarutĩire magongoona ma njino
2Chronicles7:8 Naake Solomoni na andũ acio oothe a Isiraeli magĩkũngũĩra thigũkũ ya Ithũnũ handũ ha mĩthenya mũgwanja. Nao andũ acio maarĩ aingĩ mũno na moimĩĩte Mwanyainĩ wa Hamathu na mwena wa rũgongo o nginya karũũĩinĩ ka Misiri na mwena wa kĩanda.
2Chronicles7:9 Maaniinire mĩthenya mũgwanja makĩamũra kĩgongoona
2Chronicles7:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:12 MWATHANI akĩmuumĩrĩra ũtukũ. Naake MWATHANI akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles7:14 hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ aakwa
2Chronicles7:15 Nĩndĩrĩikaraga njũthĩrĩirie Hekaarũ ĩno
2Chronicles7:16 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
2Chronicles7:17 Nawe ũngĩtũũra wĩ ndungata njĩhokeku
2Chronicles7:18 nĩngũtũma gĩtĩ gĩaku gĩa ũthamaki kĩgaacĩre o ta ũrĩa ndeerĩire thooguo Daudi. Nĩndamwĩrire atĩ Aisiraeli megũtũũra maathagwo nĩ njiarwa ciake tene na tene.
2Chronicles7:19 No mũngĩgaatiga kũũnũmĩrĩra na mũtige kũrũmia mawatho maakwa o na maathani maakwa
2Chronicles7:20 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngaamũrutũrũra muume bũrũri ũyũ ndĩmũheete. Ningĩ nĩngatiganĩria Hekaarũ ĩno nyamũrĩĩte ĩgatuĩka handũ haakwa ha gũthaathayagĩrio. Nayo ĩgĩtũũre ĩnyararĩĩtwo na ĩnyũrũragio nĩ andũ oothe.
2Chronicles7:21 “Hekaarũ ĩno ĩtĩĩĩtwo ũũ
2Chronicles7:22 Nao andũ makaamacookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles8:1 Naake Solomoni agĩakithia Hekaarũ o na nyũmba yake ya ũthamaki itĩĩna rĩa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
2Chronicles8:2 Arĩĩkia mĩako ĩyo
2Chronicles8:3 Ningĩ Solomoni agĩthiĩ akĩĩnyiitĩra rũgongo ruothe rwa Hamathu na Zoba.
2Chronicles8:4 Naake agĩaka kũu werũinĩ itũũra akĩrĩĩta Palimura. Agĩcooka agĩaka matũũra moothe kũu Hamathu ma kũigagwo indo.
2Chronicles8:5 Agĩcooka agĩakithia rĩngĩ matũũra ma Bethi Horoni ya rũgongo
2Chronicles8:6 Ningĩ agĩakithia itũũra rĩetagwo
2Chronicles8:7 (7-8) Nao andũ arĩa maatigarĩĩte rĩrĩa Aisiraeli mooragire Akanaani rĩrĩa maamatuunyire bũrũri wao
2Chronicles8:8 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles8:9 Ningĩ nĩkwarĩ na anjaama magana mataano ma mĩrongo ĩtaano (550) arĩa maarũũgamagĩrĩra andũ arĩa maarutaga mawĩra ma hinya mĩakoinĩ yothe ĩrĩa Solomoni aakithagia.
2Chronicles8:10 Naake Solomoni akĩruta mũtumia wake
2Chronicles8:11 Na rĩĩri
2Chronicles8:12 Aarutaga magongoona ma njino o ta ũrĩa Watho wa Musa woigĩĩte marutagwo mĩthenya yothe ĩrĩa ĩrĩ igweta. Mĩthenya ĩyo nĩ mĩthenya ya Thabatũ
2Chronicles8:13 Ningĩ kũringana na ũrĩa ithe Daudi aatigire oiga gwĩkagwo
2Chronicles8:14 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii magĩikara mamenyereire watho wa mũthamaki Daudi

2Chronicles9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:2 Naake Solomoni akĩmũcookeria maũndũ moothe hatarĩ ũndũ o na ũmwe ũkũmũrema.
2Chronicles9:3 Naake kwini wa Sheba agĩkĩĩiguĩra ũũgĩ wa Solomoni na akĩyonera nyũmba ĩrĩa aakĩĩte.
2Chronicles9:4 Agĩcooka agĩkĩona irio iria aarĩaga
2Chronicles9:5 Naake kwini agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:6 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:7 Gũkena-rĩ
2Chronicles9:8 MWATHANI Ngai waku arogoocwo! Nĩakeneetio nĩwe agagũtua mũthamaki ũthamakage thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩake. Nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI nĩendeete andũ aake o na akeenda magaacĩre tene na tene
2Chronicles9:9 Naake kwini akĩhe mũthamaki Solomoni iheeo iria aamũreeheire: nacio nĩ makĩria ma kiro ngiri inya (4
2Chronicles9:10 (Atwarithia meeri a Hiramu na a Solomoni
2Chronicles9:11 Naake Solomoni agĩthondeka ngathĩ cia Hekaarũ o na cia nyũmba ya mũthamaki na mbaaũ cia mĩthandarĩ ĩyo. Ningĩ agĩthondeka inanda o na ngita cia aini a nyĩmbo. Gũtionekeete indo ta icio bũrũriinĩ wa Juda mbere ĩyo.)
2Chronicles9:12 Naake mũthamaki Solomoni akĩhe kwini wa Sheba kĩrĩa gĩothe oorĩĩtie igũrũ wa iria ingĩ aamũheete. Naake kwini hamwe na ndungata ciake makĩinũka Sheba bũrũriinĩ wao.
2Chronicles9:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:14 kuongerera marĩhi ma magooti marĩa maarĩhagwo nĩ ahũũri a mbiacara na oonjoria. O na ningĩ nĩareehagĩrwo thahabu na betha nĩ athamaki a Arabia
2Chronicles9:15 Ningĩ mũthamaki Solomoni agĩthondekithia ngo nene magana meerĩ; o ĩmwe yekagĩrwo ta kiro mũgwanja cia thahabu yaturĩĩtwo wega.
2Chronicles9:16 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩthondeka ngo niinaniini magana matatũ
2Chronicles9:17 Mũthamaki agĩcooka agĩthondekithia gĩtĩ gĩa ũthamaki kĩnene mũno kĩa mũguongo
2Chronicles9:18 Nakĩo gĩtĩ kĩu kĩahaicagwo na ngathĩ ya makinya matandatũ
2Chronicles9:19 O na nĩkĩarĩ na mĩhianano ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ ya mĩrũũthi mĩenainĩ ya ngathĩ
2Chronicles9:20 Ikombe ciothe cia mũthamaki Solomoni o na indo cia kũhũthĩrwo iria ciaigĩĩtwo nyũmba ĩrĩa yetagwo mũtitũ wa Lebanoni ciarĩ cia thahabu ĩrĩa therie mũno. Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:21 Solomoni aarĩ na gĩkundi kĩa meeri gĩatwaranaga hamwe na gĩkundi kĩa Hiramu mũthamaki wa Turo. O mĩaka ĩtatũ yathira
2Chronicles9:22 Mũthamaki Solomoni aatongeete na akoohĩga agakĩra athamaki oothe a thĩ.
2Chronicles9:23 Nao athamaki oothe a thĩ magagĩũkaga kũrĩ we nĩ geetha maigue ũũgĩ ũcio Ngai aamũheete.
2Chronicles9:24 Mũthamaki o wothe ũrĩa wokaga kũmuona nĩamũreehagĩra iheeo. Iheeo icio ciakoragwo irĩ indo cia betha
2Chronicles9:25 Ningĩ Solomoni nĩarĩ na ciugũ ngiri inya (4
2Chronicles9:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:27 Matukũinĩ ma ũthamaki wake betha yaingĩhĩĩte Jerusalemu o ta mahiga
2Chronicles9:28 Naake Solomoni niagũraga mbarathi kuuma Misiri o na kuuma mabũrũri mangĩ.
2Chronicles9:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles9:30 Naake Solomoni agĩthamakĩra Aisiraeli oothe e Jerusalemu mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
2Chronicles9:31 Naake agĩkua
2Chronicles10:1 Naake Rehoboamu agĩgĩthiĩ Shekemu kũrĩa Aisiraeli oothe maathiĩte nĩguo makamũtue mũthamaki.
2Chronicles10:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:3 Nao andũ oothe a Isiraeli makĩrekania ageetwo
2Chronicles10:4 “Mĩrigo ĩrĩa thooguo aratũkuuithagia ĩraarĩ mĩritũ mũno. Tondũ ũcio ũngĩtũhũthahũthĩria mĩrigo ĩyo na ũtũme mũtũũrĩre witũ wagĩrĩre-rĩ
2Chronicles10:5 Naake Rehoboamu akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:6 Naake Rehoboamu agĩthiĩ kũhooya kĩrĩra kũrĩ athuuri arĩa maaheyaga ithe Solomoni kĩrĩra hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarĩ muoyo. Agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:7 Nao athuuri acio makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:8 Naake agĩkararia kĩrĩra kĩa athuuri
2Chronicles10:9 Agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:10 Nao aanake acio a riika rĩake makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:11 Ningĩ ũmeere atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:12 Nayo mĩthenya ĩtatũ yathira
2Chronicles10:13 Naake mũthamaki Rehoboamu agĩkararia kĩrĩra kĩa athuuri
2Chronicles10:14 o ta ũrĩa aataarĩĩtwo nĩ aanake a riika rĩake. Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:15 Naake mũthamaki ndaigana gũthikĩrĩria andũ acio o na haniini. Ũcio warĩ wendi wa MWATHANI Ngai nĩ geetha ũhoro ũrĩa aarĩirie Jeroboamu mũrũ wa Nebati na kanua ka mũnabii Ahija
2Chronicles10:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles10:17 Rehoboamu agĩgĩtigĩrwo andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maatũũraga matũũrainĩ ma Juda amathamakagĩre.
2Chronicles10:18 Naake mũthamaki Rehoboamu akĩrekeria Aisiraeli Adoniramu ũrĩa warũũgamagĩrĩra arĩa maarutithagio mawĩra ma hinya
2Chronicles10:19 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Isiraeli matiacookire gwathwo nĩ nyũmba ya Daudi kinya ũũmũũthĩ.

2Chronicles11:16 Na rĩĩrĩ

2Chronicles13:1 Mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnaana wa ũthamaki wa Jeroboamu nĩrĩo Abija aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka Juda.
2Chronicles13:2 Naake agĩthamaka mĩaka ĩtatũ kũu Jerusalemu. Nyina eetagwo Mikaya
2Chronicles13:3 Naake Abija agĩthondeka mbũtũ ya thigari ngiri magana mana (400
2Chronicles13:4 Nacio mbũtũ icio cia thigari ikĩng'ethanĩra bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu. Naake Abija agĩthiĩ akĩrũũgama igũrũ kĩrĩma kĩa Zemaraimu agĩkaĩrĩria Jeroboamu na Aisiraeli akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Chronicles13:5 githĩ mũtiũĩ atĩ MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli
2Chronicles13:6 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles13:7 Jeroboamu agĩkĩũngania gĩkundi kĩa andũ mĩkora
2Chronicles13:8 Rĩu mũtuĩte ciira atĩ mũhũũrane na ũthamaki ũrĩa MWATHANI aaheire njiarwa cia Daudi tondũ mwĩ na mbũtũ nene ya athigari
2Chronicles13:9 Githĩ mũtiaingatire Athĩnjĩri Ngai a MWATHANI arĩa maarĩ njiarwa cia Harũni
2Chronicles13:10 “Ithuĩ-rĩ
2Chronicles13:11 Acio nĩ o macinagĩra MWATHANI ũbaani na makamũrutĩra magongoona ma njino o rũũciinĩ na hwaĩinĩ. Ningĩ nĩmaigaga mĩgate mĩtheru ya kũrutĩrwo MWATHANI igũrũ rĩa meetha ĩrĩa theru
2Chronicles13:12 Ngai nĩwe mũtongoria witũ
2Chronicles13:13 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles13:14 Rĩrĩa andũ a Juda maacũũthĩrĩirie
2Chronicles13:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Juda makĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
2Chronicles13:16 Nao Aisiraeli oothe makĩũrĩra andũ a Juda
2Chronicles13:17 Naake Abija na thigari ciake magĩtooria Aisiraeli mũno
2Chronicles13:18 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio andũ a Juda makĩhoota andũ a Isiraeli
2Chronicles13:19 Naake Abija agĩgĩteng'eria ita cia Jeroboamu
2Chronicles13:20 Jeroboamu ndaigana gwĩkinyĩra o na haniini matukũinĩ moothe ma wathani wa Abija. Naake MWATHANI akĩmũgũtha
2Chronicles13:21 No Abija agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũgĩa na hinya
2Chronicles13:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles14:1 Naake Abija agĩkua
2Chronicles14:2 Naake Asa agĩĩka maũndũ moothe marĩa maakenagia Ngai wake.
2Chronicles14:3 Agĩkĩeheria igongoona ng'eni bũrũriinĩ guothe
2Chronicles14:4 Naake Asa agĩatha andũ oothe a Juda meekage kwenda kwa Ngai wa maithe maao na mahingagie ũrutani na maathani maake.
2Chronicles14:5 Agĩcooka akĩmomoranga kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano o hamwe na igongoona iria ciacinagĩrwo ũbaani kũu bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Juda. Naguo ũthamaki wothe ũgĩikara na thaayũ matukũ moothe ma wathani wake.
2Chronicles14:6 Ningĩ agĩaka matũũra mairigĩirwo na thingo cia hinya kũu Juda tondũ hĩndĩ ĩyo bũrũri ndwarĩ na mbaara
2Chronicles14:7 Naake Asa agĩkĩĩra andũ a Juda atĩrĩ
2Chronicles14:8 Naake mũthamaki Asa aarĩ na mbũtũ ya thigari ngiri magana matatũ (300
2Chronicles14:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles14:10 Naake Asa akiumagara nĩguo akahũũrane naake
2Chronicles14:11 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Asa akĩhooya MWATHANI Ngai wake atĩrĩ
2Chronicles14:12 Naake MWATHANI akĩrekererie mbũtũ ĩyo ya ita ya Ethiopia mookoinĩ ma Asa na thigari ciake iria cioimĩĩte Juda
2Chronicles14:13 naake Asa na thigari ciake makĩmathingata o nginya Gerari. Nacio thigari cia Ethiopia ikĩũragwo nyingĩ ũguo atĩ itingĩahotire gũthiĩ na mbere na mbaara. MWATHANI we mwene nĩ we watũmire mahootwo nĩ mbũtũ yake
2Chronicles14:14 Magĩcooka makĩhũũra matũũra moothe marĩa maathiũrũrũkĩirie Gerari
2Chronicles14:15 Ningĩ magĩtharĩkĩra kambĩ cia arĩithi
2Chronicles15:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles15:2 Naake akiumagara gũtũnga mũthamaki Asa
2Chronicles15:3 Kwa ihinda iraaya Aisiraeli maatũũraga matarĩ na Ngai ũrĩa wa ma. Ningĩ matiarĩ na athĩnjĩri Ngai a kũmaruta maũndũ
2Chronicles15:4 No rĩrĩa maakorereirwo nĩ mathĩĩna
2Chronicles15:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles15:6 Andũ maikarĩĩte maagaagĩĩte; rũũrĩrĩ rũgookĩrĩra rũrĩa rũngĩ
2Chronicles15:7 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles15:8 Rĩrĩa Asa aiguire ciugo icio cia ũrathi wa Azaria
2Chronicles15:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles15:10 Nao magĩkĩũngana kũu Jerusalemu mweri wa gatatũ mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩtaano wa ũthamaki wa Asa.
2Chronicles15:11 Mũthenya ũcio makĩrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona ma indo iria maatahĩĩte
2Chronicles15:12 Nao magĩthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro atĩ megũtũũra mathaathayagia Ngai wa maithe maao na ngoro yothe
2Chronicles15:13 O na ningĩ makĩrĩkanĩra atĩ mũndũ o wothe
2Chronicles15:14 Nao makĩĩhĩta mwĩhĩtwa na mũgambo mũnene rĩĩtwainĩ rĩa MWATHANI atĩ nĩmarĩhingagia kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu. Magĩcooka makiugĩrĩria na makĩhuuha tũrumbeeta na macoro.
2Chronicles15:15 Nao andũ oothe a Juda magĩkenera mwĩhĩtwa ũcio meehĩtire
2Chronicles15:16 Naake mũthamaki Asa
2Chronicles15:17 O na eekĩĩte ũguo wothe
2Chronicles15:18 Nacio indo iria ithe Abija aamũrĩire Ngai agĩciiga Hekaarũinĩ thĩinĩ. O nacio indo cia thahabu o na cia betha iria we mwene aamũrĩire Ngai agĩciiga o ro kuo.
2Chronicles15:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles16:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles16:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Asa akĩruta betha na thahabu iria ciarĩ mũthiithũinĩ wa Hekaarũ
2Chronicles16:3 “Benihadadi
2Chronicles16:4 Naake Benihadadi agĩĩtĩkĩra ihooya rĩa Asa mũthamaki wa Juda. Agĩkĩrekia anene a thigari ciake magatharĩkĩre matũũra ma Isiraeli. Nao magĩthiĩ makĩĩnyiitĩra matũũra maya: Ijoni
2Chronicles16:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles16:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Asa akĩũnganithia andũ oothe a Juda
2Chronicles16:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles16:8 Rĩu-rĩ
2Chronicles16:9 MWATHANI aikaraga acũũthĩrĩirie gũũkũ thĩ guothe
2Chronicles16:10 Naake Asa akĩraakarĩra mũnabii mũno
2Chronicles16:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles16:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles16:13 Naake Asa agĩkua mwaka wa mĩrongo ĩna na ũmwe wa ũthamaki wake.
2Chronicles16:14 Nao andũ makĩmũthika mbĩĩrĩrainĩ yake mwene ĩrĩa eenjeire kũu itũũra rĩa Daudi. Nao makĩnungĩrĩria mwĩrĩ wake mahuti marĩa manungi wega
2Chronicles17:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles17:2 Namo matũũra moothe ma Juda marĩa mairigĩirwo na thingo cia hinya akĩmaiga thigari cia kũmarangagĩra. O na akĩiga thigari cia kũrangĩra bũrũri wothe wa Juda o na matũũra ma Efiraimu
2Chronicles17:3 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũraathima Jehoshafatu
2Chronicles17:4 Ningĩ nĩatungatagĩra Ngai wa ithe
2Chronicles17:5 Naake MWATHANI agĩgĩtũma wathani wa Jehoshafatu wĩhande kũu Juda
2Chronicles17:6 Naake Jehoshafatu agĩkĩĩhotora gũtungatagĩra MWATHANI; akĩananga kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano
2Chronicles17:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles17:8 Nao magĩtwarana na Alawii kenda na athĩnjĩri Ngai eerĩ. Alawii acio nĩ: Shemaia
2Chronicles17:9 Nao magĩcanga kũndũ guothe kũu bũrũriinĩ wa Juda makĩrutaga andũ maũndũ ta ũrĩa maamathoomaga ibukuinĩ rĩa watho wa MWATHANI.
2Chronicles17:10 Naake MWATHANI agĩtũma andũ a moothamaki moothe marĩa maarigiicĩirie Juda maiyũrwo nĩ guoya magĩgĩĩtigĩra kũrutĩra Jehoshafatu mbaara.
2Chronicles17:11 Nao Afilisiti magĩtwarĩra Jehoshafatu betha nyingĩ
2Chronicles17:12 Naake Jehoshafatu agĩkĩrĩrĩria kwĩgĩĩra na hinya o mũno
2Chronicles17:13 o na agĩaka nyũmba ciarĩ na thingo cia hinya cia kwĩgitĩra Juda guothe. O na agĩaka matũũra ma kũigagwo indo nyingĩ.Nakuo Jerusalemu akĩiga atongoria arĩa a bata
2Chronicles17:14 o ta ũrĩa mbarĩ ciao ciatariĩ. Adina nĩwe warũũgamĩrĩire thigari ngiri magana matatũ (300
2Chronicles17:15 Naake ũrĩa wamũrũmĩrĩire ũneneinĩ aarĩ Jehohanani ũrĩa warũũgamĩrĩire thigari ngiri magana meerĩ ma mĩrongo ĩnaana (280
2Chronicles17:16 Wa gatatũ aarĩ Amasia mũrũ wa Zikiri
2Chronicles17:17 Naake Eliada
2Chronicles17:18 Naake ũrĩa wamũrũmĩrĩire ũneneinĩ aarĩ Jehozabadu ũrĩa warũũgamĩrĩire thigari ngiri igana na mĩrongo ĩnaana (180
2Chronicles17:19 Thigari icio nĩcio ciatungatagĩra mũthamaki kũu Jerusalemu. Ningĩ nĩaigĩĩte thigari ingĩ matũũrainĩ marĩa mairigĩirwo na thingo cia hinya kũu Juda guothe.
2Chronicles18:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:3 Akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:4 Jehoshafatu agĩcooka akĩĩra Ahabu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:5 Kwoguo Ahabu agĩĩta anabii ta magana mana (400) mooke harĩ we. Mooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:6 No Jehoshafatu akĩũria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:7 Ahabu agĩcookeria Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ahabu agĩtũma ndungata ĩmwe yake akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo
2Chronicles18:10 Ũmwe wao wetagwo Zedekia mũrũ wa Kenaana agĩthondeka hĩa cia cuuma akĩĩra Ahabu atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:12 Ihinda o rĩu ndungata ĩrĩa yagĩrĩĩte Mikaya ĩkĩĩra Mikaya atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:13 No Mikaya akiuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:14 Rĩrĩa aathire he mũthamaki
2Chronicles18:15 Naake Ahabu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:16 Naake Mikaya akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ahabu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli akĩĩra Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:18 Naake Mikaya agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria
2Chronicles18:19 MWATHANI arooria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:20 Hĩndĩ ĩyo roho ũmwe ũroimĩra ũreera MWATHANI atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:21 Naguo roho ũcio ũracookia atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:22 Naake Mikaya akĩrĩĩkia na kuuga atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũnabii Zedekia agĩũkĩra akĩgũtha Mikaya rũhĩ
2Chronicles18:24 Naake Mikaya akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ahabu agĩatha mũtongoria ũmwe wake atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:26 Ũmeere ndoiga mamũhingĩre njeera na mamũheage mũgate na maaĩ o nginya rĩrĩa ngaacooka na thaayũ.”
2Chronicles18:27 Naake Mikaya akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:28 Thuutha ũcio Ahabu mũthamaki wa Isiraeli na Jehoshafatu mũthamaki wa Juda makiumagara magĩthiĩ gũtharĩkĩra itũũra rĩa Ramothu bũrũriinĩ wa Gileadi.
2Chronicles18:29 Naake Ahabu akĩĩra Jehoshafatu atĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:30 Naake mũthamaki wa Siria nĩathĩĩte anene aake a ngaari cia mbarathi atĩ matigatharĩkĩre mũndũ ũngĩ o tiga mũthamaki wa Isiraeli.
2Chronicles18:31 Rĩrĩa moonire mũthamaki Jehoshafatu
2Chronicles18:32 Rĩrĩa anene acio a ngaari cia mbarathi moonire atĩ ti mũthamaki wa Isiraeli magĩtiga kũmũteng'eria.
2Chronicles18:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles18:34 Nayo mbaara ĩgĩthiĩ na mbere
2Chronicles19:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles19:2 Naake mũnabii Jehu mũrũ wa Hanani agĩthiĩ kũmũtũnga na amuona akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
2Chronicles19:3 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles19:4 Naake mũthamaki Jehoshafatu agĩgĩtũũra Jerusalemu na akoimagaraga kaingĩ kũrora andũ aake kuuma Beerisheba o nginya bũrũri ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Efiraimu na mwena wa rũgongo. Eekaga ũguo nĩguo amaringĩrĩrie gũcookerera MWATHANI Ngai wa maithe maao.
2Chronicles19:5 Naake akĩiga atuithania kũu matũũrainĩ moothe ma Juda marĩa mairigĩirwo na thingo cia hinya.
2Chronicles19:6 Agĩcooka akĩmaatha atĩrĩ
2Chronicles19:7 Tondũ ũcio
2Chronicles19:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles19:9 Naake akĩmataara akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Chronicles19:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles19:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:2 Arekio amwe magĩthiĩ he Jehoshafatu makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:3 Naake Jehoshafatu nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra
2Chronicles20:4 Nao andũ oothe makiuma matũũrainĩ moothe ma Juda na ihenya magĩthiĩ Jerusalemu gũcaria ũteithio kwĩ MWATHANI.
2Chronicles20:5 Andũ oothe a Juda na a Jerusalemu makĩũngana kĩhaaro kĩerũ kĩa Hekaarũ. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Jehoshafatu agĩthiĩ akĩrũũgama gatagatĩ kaao
2Chronicles20:6 akĩhooya MWATHANI atĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:7 Wee
2Chronicles20:8 Rĩu
2Chronicles20:9 mangĩgaakorererwo nĩ ũndũ mũũru ta mbaara
2Chronicles20:10 “Rĩu
2Chronicles20:11 Tarora wone atĩ o na matirĩ ngaatho
2Chronicles20:12 Rĩu
2Chronicles20:13 Nao andũ oothe a Juda
2Chronicles20:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:15 Naake Jahazieli akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:16 Rũũciũ-rĩ
2Chronicles20:17 Ti inyuĩ mũkaarũa mbaara ĩyo. Inyuĩ ũrĩa mũgeeka no kwĩhaarĩria mũkeehaarĩria ta andũ mekũrũa. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũgaakorwo mũhaana ũguo-rĩ
2Chronicles20:18 Naake Jehoshafatu akĩinamĩrĩra
2Chronicles20:19 Nao Alawii a mbarĩ ya Kohathu na a mbarĩ ya Kora makĩrũũgama magĩkumia MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli maanĩrĩire na mũgambo mũnene mũno.
2Chronicles20:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:21 Naake arĩĩkia gũcookania ndundu na andũ acio
2Chronicles20:22 Na rĩĩri
2Chronicles20:23 Nao andũ a Amoni na a Moabi magĩtharĩkĩra mbũtũ ĩyo yothe ya Edomu makĩmĩniina biũ. Marĩĩkia kũmĩniina
2Chronicles20:24 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mbũtũ ya ita ya Juda yakinyire harĩa haarĩ na mũnaara ũrĩa warĩ kũu werũinĩ
2Chronicles20:25 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jehoshafatu na thigari ciake maathiire kwĩyoera indo
2Chronicles20:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:27 Naake Jehoshafatu agĩtongoria mbũtũ yake yothe ya ita magĩcooka Jerusalemu makeneete
2Chronicles20:28 Nao maakinya Jerusalemu magĩtoonya Hekaarũinĩ makĩinaga makĩhũũraga ngita
2Chronicles20:29 Namo mabũrũri moothe rĩrĩa maiguire ũrĩa MWATHANI aahootanĩire Aisiraeli harĩ thũ ciao
2Chronicles20:30 Nakuo kũu bũrũriinĩ gũkĩiyũra thaayũ hĩndĩ yothe ya wathani wa Jehoshafatu
2Chronicles20:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:32 Naake agĩgĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ meega ma gũkenia MWATHANI o ta marĩa meekĩĩtwo nĩ ithe Asa.
2Chronicles20:33 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:34 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:35 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles20:36 Nao eerĩ
2Chronicles20:37 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:1 Naake Jehoshafatu agĩkua agĩthikwo mbĩĩrĩrainĩ cia athamaki kũu itũũrainĩ rĩa Daudi
2Chronicles21:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:3 Naake ithe nĩaheete aariũ acio aake thahabu na betha nyingĩ
2Chronicles21:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:5 Jehoramu aatuĩkire mũthamaki wa Juda e wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:6 Naake akĩrũmĩrĩra mĩtugo mĩũru ya athamaki a Isiraeli
2Chronicles21:7 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jehoramu e hamwe na njaama ciake o na ngaari ciake cia mbarathi makiumagara gũtharĩkĩra Aedomu
2Chronicles21:10 Ũguo nĩguo Aedomu maatigire gwathagwo nĩ Juda o nginyagia ũũmũũthĩ. Matukũinĩ o ro macio andũ a itũũra rĩa Libina nao makĩremera Juda magĩtiga gwathagwo nĩ o. Meekire ũguo tondũ Jehoramu nĩatirikĩĩte MWATHANI Ngai wa maithe maake.
2Chronicles21:11 Ningĩ nĩakire kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano irĩmainĩ cia Juda guothe na agĩtũma andũ a Juda na a Jerusalemu meehie.
2Chronicles21:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:13 Handũ ha ũguo ũrũmĩrĩire mĩtugo mĩũru ya athamaki a Isiraeli ũgagĩtũma andũ a Juda na a Jerusalemu maage kwĩhokeka o ta ũrĩa Ahabu na athamaki arĩa maarĩ thuutha wake matũmire andũ a Aisiraeli maage kwĩhokeka. Ningĩ
2Chronicles21:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Chronicles21:15 Wee mwene nĩũkũrũara mũrimũ wĩ na ruwo mũno wa mara
2Chronicles21:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:17 magĩtharĩkĩra Juda. Magĩtaha indo iria ciarĩ nyũmba ya mũthamaki
2Chronicles21:18 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio moothe MWATHANI akĩreehithĩria mũthamaki Jehoramu mũrimũ wa mara ũtangĩhoneka.
2Chronicles21:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles21:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles22:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles22:2 (2-3) Ahazia aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka arĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles22:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles22:4 Naake arĩĩkia gwĩtĩkania na kĩrĩra kĩao
2Chronicles22:5 Naake Joramu akĩhũndũka agĩcooka Jezireeli nĩguo akahonerie ironda ciake kuo
2Chronicles22:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles22:7 Na rĩĩri
2Chronicles22:8 Naake Jehu agĩathana Ahazia acario
2Chronicles22:9 Rĩrĩa Athalia nyina wa mũthamaki Ahazia aamenyire atĩ mũũrũwe nĩoragwo
2Chronicles22:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles22:11 Naake akĩhithwo nĩ o mĩaka ĩtandatũ kũu Hekaarũinĩ
2Chronicles23:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles23:2 Nao magĩgĩthiĩ bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Juda
2Chronicles23:3 Nao andũ acio magĩtoonya Hekaarũinĩ makĩgĩa na kĩrĩĩkanĩro na Joashu mũrũ wa mũthamaki. Naake Jehoiada akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Chronicles23:4 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles23:5 Nakĩo kĩu kĩngĩ gĩa ithatũ gĩkarangĩra nyũmba ya mũthamaki. Kĩu kĩngĩ kĩrĩrangagĩra kĩhingo kĩrĩa gĩĩtagwo ‘Kĩhingo kĩa Mũthingi.’ Andũ angĩ oothe marĩikaraga kũu nja ya Hekaarũ.
2Chronicles23:6 Mũtikaarekagĩrĩrie mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ atoonye Hekaarũinĩ o tiga athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii arĩa maratungata kuo. Acio nĩ o maagĩrĩirwo nĩgũtoonyaga kuo tondũ nĩ aamũre. Andũ acio angĩ maagĩrĩirwo nĩgwathĩkagĩra MWATHANI
2Chronicles23:7 Alawii marĩrangagĩra mũthamaki manyiitĩĩte hiũ cia njora o harĩa hoothe arĩthiaga. Mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũrĩgeragia gũtoonya Hekaarũinĩ
2Chronicles23:8 Nao Alawii na andũ oothe a Juda magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jehoiada mũthĩnjĩri Ngai aamaathĩĩte. Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles23:9 Naake Jehoiada akĩhe anene matimũ na ngo iria ciarĩ cia mũthamaki Daudi iria ciaigĩĩtwo kũu Hekaarũinĩ.
2Chronicles23:10 Naake akĩmabanga marigiicĩirie Hekaarũ mwena wa na mbere
2Chronicles23:11 Naake Jehoiada akiumia Joashu mũrũ wa mũthamaki nja
2Chronicles23:12 Rĩrĩa kwini Athalia aiguire andũ magĩkũngũĩra mũthamaki
2Chronicles23:13 Naake aacũũthĩrĩria
2Chronicles23:14 Na rĩĩrĩ

2Chronicles23:16 Naake Jehoiada

2Chronicles24:13 Namo makundi macio makĩruta wĩra na kĩyo o nginya makĩũrĩĩkia. Nayo Hekaarũ ĩgĩkorwo ĩthakarĩĩte na ĩkarũma wega o ta mbere.

2Chronicles26:1 Nao andũ oothe a Juda makĩoya Uzia mũrũ wa Amazia e wa mĩaka ikũmi na ĩtandatũ
2Chronicles26:2 (Uzia nĩ we wacookire gũtuunyana itũũra rĩa Elathu
2Chronicles26:3 Na rĩĩrĩ

2Chronicles26:5 Naake Uzia agĩtungatĩra Ngai na kĩyo
2Chronicles26:6 Naake Uzia agĩthiĩ akĩhũũrana na Afilisiti
2Chronicles26:7 Naake Ngai akĩmũteithia akĩhoota Afilisiti
2Chronicles26:8 Nao Aamoni makĩrutĩra Uzia igooti
2Chronicles26:9 Uzia agĩcooka agĩaka mĩnaara kũu Jerusalemu kĩhingoinĩ gĩa Koona
2Chronicles26:10 Agĩcooka agĩaka mĩnaara kũu werũinĩ
2Chronicles26:11 Ningĩ Uzia nĩarĩ na mbũtũ nene ya kũrũa mbaara. Mũthiĩre wayo wa mbaarainĩ wabangagwo nĩ Jeieli na Maaseia arĩa maarĩ tũrani. Naake Hanania ũmwe wa anene a mbũtũ cia ita cia mũthamaki nĩ we wamarũũgamagĩrĩra oothe.
2Chronicles26:12 Nayo mbũtũ ĩyo ya ita yarũũgamagĩrĩrwo nĩ atongoria ngiri igĩrĩ na magana matandatũ (2
2Chronicles26:13 Nacio thigari ciothe iria ciarĩ rungu rwao ciarĩ ngiri magana matatũ na mũgwanja na magana mataano
2Chronicles26:14 Naake Uzia agĩthondekithĩria mbũtũ ĩyo yothe ya ita ngo
2Chronicles26:15 Nao andũ aake arĩa maarĩ njoorua cia gũtura indo magĩthondeka kũu Jerusalemu inyamũ cia gũikagia mĩguĩ
2Chronicles26:16 Na rĩĩrĩ

2Chronicles26:18 makĩmũgiria gwĩka ũguo. Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
2Chronicles26:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Uzia aarũũgamĩĩte mwenainĩ wa kĩgongoona gĩa gũcinĩra ũbaani anyiitĩĩte kanyũngũ ga gũcinĩra ũbaani kũu Hekaarũinĩ ya MWATHANI. Naake akĩnyiitwo nĩ maraakara nĩ ũndũ wa athĩnjĩri Ngai acio. O hĩndĩ ĩyo mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi ũkĩiyũra thiithi wake arĩ o hau mbere ya athĩnjĩri Ngai acio.

2Chronicles29:14 Athĩnjĩri Ngai magĩtoonya thĩinĩ nĩguo mamĩtherie
2Chronicles29:15 Wĩra ũcio wa gũtheria Hekaarũ mawambĩrĩirie mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mbere
2Chronicles29:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles29:17 O nacio indo ciothe iria mũthamaki Ahazu eehereetie rĩrĩa aagararire watho wa Ngai nĩtũcithereetie tũgaciamũra rĩngĩ. Rĩu irĩ mbere ya kĩgongoona kĩa MWATHANI.”

2Chronicles29:22 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai magĩcithĩnja magĩitĩrĩria thakame yacio kĩgongoona igũrũ

2Chronicles29:24 Alawii acio magĩkĩrũũgama manyiitĩĩte indo icio cia kũina
2Chronicles29:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Hezekia agĩathana igongoona rĩa njino rĩrutĩrwo kĩgongoona igũrũ. Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa igongoona rĩu rĩambĩrĩirie kũrutwo
2Chronicles29:26 Nao andũ oothe magĩthaathaiya Ngai
2Chronicles29:27 Thuutha wa ũguo

2Chronicles29:29 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Hezekia akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ

2Chronicles30:18 Naake MWATHANI akĩigua ihooya rĩa Hezekia
2Chronicles30:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles30:20 Naake Hezekia akĩgaathĩrĩria Alawii nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa maatongoririe igongoona rĩu rĩa gũthaathaiya MWATHANI wega.
2Chronicles30:21 Nayo mĩthenya ĩyo yathira
2Chronicles30:22 Mũthamaki Hezekia nĩwe waheanĩĩte ndeegwa ngiri ĩmwe (1
2Chronicles30:23 Nao andũ oothe a Juda
2Chronicles30:24 Gũgĩkĩgĩa gĩkeno kĩnene mũno kũu Jerusalemu. Tondũ kuuma o mahinda ma mũthamaki Solomoni
2Chronicles30:25 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii
2Chronicles31:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:2 Naake mũthamaki Hezekia akĩbanga wĩra wa athĩnjĩri Ngai na wa Alawii wega rĩngĩ nĩ geetha o mũndũ amenye wĩra wake kĩũmbe. Mawĩra marĩa maamegiĩ nĩ: magongoona ma njino
2Chronicles31:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:4 O na Hezekia nĩathire andũ kũu Jerusalemu marutage mĩhothi ĩrĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii maagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhũthagĩra nĩguo mahotage gũtabarĩra watho wa MWATHANI na njĩra njega.
2Chronicles31:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:7 Indo icio ciambĩrĩirie kũreehwo mweri wa gatatũ
2Chronicles31:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki akĩhooya athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii ũhoro wa indo icio.
2Chronicles31:10 Naake Azaria
2Chronicles31:11 Naake Hezekia agĩathana gũthondekwo thitoo kũu Hekaarũinĩ
2Chronicles31:12 Nacio indo ciothe o na mĩhothi ya gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi o na indo iria ciamũrĩĩtwo
2Chronicles31:13 Nao magĩthurĩrwo Alawii angĩ ikũmi marutage wĩra rungu rwao. Nao maarĩ Jehieli
2Chronicles31:14 Naake Mũlawii wetagwo Kore mũrũ wa Imuna
2Chronicles31:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles31:16 no ti kũringana na mbarĩ ciao. O mũndũ mũrũme wothe wakinyĩĩtie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na agakĩria watoonyaga kũruta wĩra Hekaarũinĩ
2Chronicles31:17 Athĩnjĩri Ngai maagayanĩĩtio mawĩra maao kũringana na mbarĩ
2Chronicles31:18 Andũ acio oothe maatarirwo hamwe na atumia aao
2Chronicles31:19 Naho ha ũhoro wa athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa maatũũraga matũũrainĩ marĩa maagaĩrwo njiarwa cia Harũni
2Chronicles31:20 Naake Hezekia agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa moonagwo marĩ meega
2Chronicles31:21 Namo maũndũ marĩa eekire nĩ ũndũ wa Hekaarũ
2Chronicles32:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:3 (3-4) agĩciira na njaama ciake atĩ mathike ithima cia maaĩ iria ciarĩ na kũu nja ya itũũra nĩguo Aasiria matikoone tũũĩ o na tũniini
2Chronicles32:4 Naake mũthamaki agĩaka rĩngĩ rũthingo rũrĩa rwatharũkĩĩte
2Chronicles32:5 Naake akĩiga anene a mbũtũ cia ita marorage andũ na akĩmaatha macookanĩrĩre hamwe thoome wa itũũra hakuhĩ na kĩhingo. Naake mũthamaki Hezekia akĩmeera atĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:6 “Gĩai na hinya na mwĩyũmĩrĩrie
2Chronicles32:7 We-rĩ
2Chronicles32:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:9 “Niĩ Senakeribu mũthamaki wa Asiria
2Chronicles32:10 Hezekia aramwĩra atĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩekũmũhonokia kuuma mookoinĩ maitũ
2Chronicles32:11 Githĩ Hezekia ti we wamomoranirie kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria na akĩmomorania igongoona cia MWATHANI? Githĩ ndacookire agĩatha andũ a Juda na a Jerusalemu mathaathayagĩrie na macinagĩre ũbaani kĩgongoonainĩ o ro kĩmwe?
2Chronicles32:12 Kaĩ mũtooĩ ũrĩa niĩ na maithe maakwa twĩkĩĩte andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ? Ngai cia ndũũrĩrĩ icio nĩciahotire gũcihonokia kuuma mookoinĩ maakwa?
2Chronicles32:13 Kwanaiguĩka mũthenya o na ũmwe ngai icio ciao imahonokeetie? Nĩkĩ kĩragĩtũma mwĩciirie atĩ ngai yanyu yahota kũmũhonokia kuuma mookoinĩ maakwa?
2Chronicles32:14 Rĩu-rĩ
2Chronicles32:15 Nao anene acio a Aasiria magĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria maũndũ mooru igũrũ rĩa MWATHANI Ngai o na igũrũ wa Hezekia
2Chronicles32:16 Ningĩ mũthamaki akĩandĩka marũa ma kũmenereria MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli. Ũũ nĩguo marũa macio maandĩkirwo
2Chronicles32:17 Nao anene acio makĩgũũthũkĩra andũ a Jerusalemu na Kĩhibirania arĩa maikaire rũthingo igũrũ nĩguo mamamakie mahote gũtuunyana itũũra rĩao.
2Chronicles32:18 Nao makĩaria ũhoro wa Ngai wa Jerusalemu na mwarĩrie o ta ũrĩa maaragia naguo igũrũ wa ngai cia andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Hezekia na mũnabii Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu makĩhooya na magĩkaĩra Ngai amateithie.
2Chronicles32:20 Naake MWATHANI akĩrekia mũraika
2Chronicles32:21 Ũguo nĩguo MWATHANI aahonokirie Hezekia
2Chronicles32:22 Nao andũ aingĩ magĩthiĩ Jerusalemu magĩtwarĩra MWATHANI maruta
2Chronicles32:23 Mahindainĩ o ro macio
2Chronicles32:24 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:25 Naake Hezekia na andũ a Jerusalemu magĩtiga gwĩtĩĩa. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI ndacookire kũmaherithia o nginya rĩrĩa Hezekia aakuire.
2Chronicles32:26 Naake Hezekia agĩgĩtonga mũno na andũ makĩmũtĩĩa mũno. Agĩgĩakithia mathitoo ma kũiga thahabu na betha
2Chronicles32:27 Ningĩ agĩakithia thitoo cia kũigaga irio
2Chronicles32:28 Naake Ngai akĩmũraathima mũno na ng'ombe na ng'ondu o na indo ingĩ nyingĩ o na akĩyakĩra matũũra maingĩ.
2Chronicles32:29 Hezekia nĩwe wahingĩrĩirie gĩthima kĩa maaĩ ma Gihoni na mwena wa na rũgongo
2Chronicles32:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles32:32 Naake Hezekia agĩkua
2Chronicles33:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:2 Naake Manase agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa mataakenagia MWATHANI
2Chronicles33:3 Naake agĩgĩaka rĩngĩ kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa gwathaathayagĩrio mĩhianano kũrĩa ithe Hezekia aamomorangĩĩte. Ningĩ agĩaka igongoona cia kũhoerwo Baali
2Chronicles33:4 Ningĩ agĩaka igongoona kũu Jerusalemu Hekaarũinĩ thĩinĩ
2Chronicles33:5 O na agĩaka igongoona ingĩ igĩrĩ na kũu nja cia Hekaarũ irĩ handũ ha gũthaathayagĩria njata.
2Chronicles33:6 Agĩcooka akĩruta mũũrũwe ta igongoona rĩa njino; akaragũraga na akaringaga ciama
2Chronicles33:7 Nĩaigire mũhianano wa ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Ashera Hekaarũ thĩinĩ
2Chronicles33:8 Ndikaareka Aisiraeli maingatwo moime bũrũri ũyũ ndaheire maithe maao
2Chronicles33:9 Naake Manase akĩmatwarĩrĩria meehiainĩ manene
2Chronicles33:10 Naake MWATHANI agĩkaania Manase na andũ aake
2Chronicles33:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
2Chronicles33:12 Naake akĩrĩĩo nĩ thĩĩna mũno. Arĩ thĩĩnainĩ
2Chronicles33:13 Naake Ngai akĩigua ihooya rĩa Manase
2Chronicles33:14 Thuutha ũcio
2Chronicles33:15 Ningĩ akĩeheria ngai cia mĩhianano iria ciarĩ kũu Hekaarũinĩ
2Chronicles33:16 Agĩcooka agĩaka rĩngĩ kĩgongoona harĩa MWATHANI aathaathayagĩrio na akĩrutĩra magongoona ma thaayũ na magũcookeria Ngai ngaatho igũrũ wakĩo. Naake agĩgĩatha andũ oothe a Juda mathaathayagie MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli.
2Chronicles33:17 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:19 Narĩo ihooya rĩrĩa Manase aahoire
2Chronicles33:20 Naake Manase agĩkua
2Chronicles33:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles33:22 Naake akĩrũmĩrĩra mĩtugo ya ithe
2Chronicles33:23 No we ndaigana kwĩnyiihia aathĩkĩire MWATHANI ta ũrĩa ithe Manase eekĩĩte
2Chronicles33:24 Nacio ndungata ciake ikĩbanga mũbango wa kũmũũraga
2Chronicles33:25 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:2 Naake agĩĩka maũndũ marĩa maakenagia MWATHANI
2Chronicles34:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:4 Nao andũ aake makĩmomoranga igongoona ciothe cia gũthaathaĩria Baali o na igongoona cia gũcinĩra ũbaani iria ciarĩ hakuhĩ nacio o ta ũrĩa aamaathĩĩte. Ningĩ akiunangithia mĩhianano ya Ashera o na mĩhianano ĩrĩa ĩngĩ yothe. Agĩcooka agĩthĩithia mĩhianano ĩyo ĩgĩtuĩka rũkũngũ
2Chronicles34:5 Namo mahĩndĩ ma athĩnjĩri ngai icio akĩmacinithĩria igũrũ wa igongoona iria maathaathayagĩria ngai ciao. Ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtũma Juda na Jerusalemu gũthirwo nĩ thaahu.
2Chronicles34:6 Ũguo noguo eekire matũũra ma Manase na Efiraimu
2Chronicles34:7 Agĩcooka akiunangithia igongoona ciothe
2Chronicles34:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:9 Naake Hilikia Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene akĩnengerwo mbeeca ciothe iria cionganĩĩtio nĩ Alawii arĩa maikaragia mĩrango ya Hekaarũ. Mbeeca icio cionganĩĩtio kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Manase na Efiraimu o na andũ arĩa angĩ maatũũraga Ũthamakiinĩ wa na Rũgongo. O na nĩcionganĩĩtio kuuma kũrĩ andũ a Juda
2Chronicles34:10 Mbeeca icio igĩcooka ikĩnengerwo andũ arĩa atatũ meehokeirwo wĩra wa gũthondeka Hekaarũ kũrĩa gwatharũkĩĩte. Nao magĩcinengera
2Chronicles34:11 mabundi ma mbaaũ na a mahiga nĩguo magũre mahiga na mbaaũ cia gũthondeka mwako kũrĩa gwatharũkĩĩte
2Chronicles34:12 Nao andũ acio meehokeirwo wĩra ũcio
2Chronicles34:13 Nao Alawii arĩa angĩ maaroraga andũ arĩa maakuuaga indo cia mwako
2Chronicles34:14 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarutaga mbeeca kuuma thitoo kũu Hekaarũinĩ
2Chronicles34:15 Naake Hilikia akĩĩra Shafani atĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:16 naake Shafani akĩrĩtwarĩra mũthamaki. Agĩcooka akĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:17 Nacio mbeeca ciothe iria ciaigĩĩtwo Hekaarũinĩ nĩtũcirutĩĩte tũgacihe aruti a wĩra o na arori aao.”
2Chronicles34:18 Shafani agĩthiĩ na mbere kwĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:20 Agĩcooka agĩatha Hilikia
2Chronicles34:21 “Thiĩi mũkaanduĩrĩrie ũhoro he MWATHANI
2Chronicles34:22 Tondũ ũcio Hilikia
2Chronicles34:23 Naake akĩmeera macooke kwĩ mũthamaki makamũhe
2Chronicles34:24 ndũmĩrĩri ĩno kuuma kwĩ MWATHANI: “Nĩndĩharĩirie kũrehithĩria Jerusalemu o hamwe na atũũri aakuo ũũru
2Chronicles34:25 Andũ acio nĩmandiganĩirie na makarutĩra ngai ingĩ magongoona
2Chronicles34:26 Naake mũthamaki we mwene thiĩi mũmwĩre ũũ nĩguo niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli njugĩĩte: Atĩrĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles34:27 na werira wĩnyiihĩĩtie mbere yakwa wĩ na maithori maingĩ na ũgĩtembũrangaga nguo ciaku
2Chronicles34:28 na ngaaherithia Jerusalemu thuutha wa gũkua gwaku. Wee-rĩ
2Chronicles34:29 Naake mũthamaki Josia agĩcookanĩrĩria atongoria oothe a Juda o na a Jerusalemu.
2Chronicles34:30 Agĩcooka akĩmatongoria
2Chronicles34:31 Naake akĩrũũgama harĩa aamenyereete gũikara
2Chronicles34:32 Ningĩ agĩtũma andũ oothe a mũhĩrĩga wa Benjamini o na andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ kũu Jerusalemu meeranĩre kũhingia kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu. Nao andũ oothe a Jerusalemu magĩgĩtũũra meekaga maũndũ maringaine na kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu kĩarĩĩkanĩirwo nĩ o na Ngai wa maithe maao.
2Chronicles34:33 Naake mũthamaki Josia akĩananga mĩhianano yothe kũu ng'ongoinĩ cia bũrũri wothe wa Aisiraeli. Agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ oothe mathiĩ na mbere gũtungatĩra MWATHANI Ngai wa maithe maao. Naguo ũndũ ũcio magĩthiĩ na mbere matukũ moothe ma wathani wake.
2Chronicles35:1 Naake mũthamaki Josia agĩkũngũĩra thigũkũ ya Bathaka kũu Jerusalemu
2Chronicles35:2 Naake akĩonia athĩnjĩri Ngai mawĩra marĩa maagĩrĩirwo nĩkũrutaga kũu Hekaarũinĩ na akĩmoomĩrĩria mamarutage na kinyi.
2Chronicles35:3 Nao Alawii arĩa maamũrĩirwo MWATHANI
2Chronicles35:4 Ikaraai kũu Hekaarũinĩ kũringana na mbarĩ na mawĩra marĩa mũthamaki Daudi
2Chronicles35:5 Na mũikarage mwĩhaarĩirie nĩ geetha amwe aanyu makahotaga gũteithia mũciĩ o mũciĩ ya andũ a Isiraeli.
2Chronicles35:6 Nĩ inyuĩ mũgũthĩnja ndũrũme na mbũri cia Bathaka. Rĩu mwĩtheriei mũthirwo nĩ thaahu
2Chronicles35:7 Naake mũthamaki Josia akĩheana kuuma ndũũruinĩ ciake ng'ondu
2Chronicles35:8 Nacio njaama cia mũthamaki Josia ikĩruta maruta maacio ma kũrutwo Bathaka nĩ andũ na athĩnjĩri Ngai. Naake Hilikia Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene
2Chronicles35:9 Nao atongoria a Alawii: Konania
2Chronicles35:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:11 Nacio ndũrũme na mbũri ciarĩĩkia kũng'eo
2Chronicles35:12 Nao makĩgayania nyama icio cia magongoona ma njino kũringana na o mũciĩ nĩguo ĩrutwo magongoona o ta ũrĩa gwathanĩĩtwo Wathoinĩ wa Musa.
2Chronicles35:13 Nao Alawii makĩhĩĩhia nyama cia Bathaka na mwaki o ta ũrĩa gwathanĩĩtwo. Nacio nyama iria nyamũre magĩciruga na nyũngũ na iteng'ũ
2Chronicles35:14 Marĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo wothe
2Chronicles35:15 Nao aini a nyĩmbo Alawii a mbarĩ ya Asafu maikaire o handũ haao o ta ũrĩa gwathanĩĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki Daudi
2Chronicles35:16 Ũguo nĩguo Bathaka yakũngũĩirwo na MWATHANI akĩrutĩrwo magongoona ma njino kĩgongoonainĩ mũthenya ũcio
2Chronicles35:17 Nao andũ a Isiraeli arĩa maarĩ ho
2Chronicles35:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:19 Nayo thigũkũ ĩyo ya Bathaka yakũngũĩirwo mwaka wa ikũmi na ĩnaana wa ũthamaki wa Josia.
2Chronicles35:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:21 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:22 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:24 Nacio ndungata ciake ikĩmũruta ngaariinĩ yake ya mbarathi ikĩmũhaicia ĩngĩ yake yarĩ hau
2Chronicles35:25 Naake mũnabii Jeremia agĩtunga rwĩmbo rwa gũcakaĩra mũthamaki Josia. Naguo gũgĩtuĩka mũtugo atĩ rwĩmbo rũu rũtũire rũinagwo Isiraeli nĩ arũme na atumia hĩndĩ ciothe rĩrĩa megũcakaĩra mũthamaki Josia. Rwĩmbo rũu rũinagwo nyĩmboinĩ cia macakaya.
2Chronicles35:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles35:27 o na maũndũ moothe marĩa eekire kuuma kĩambĩrĩria kinya kĩrĩĩkĩrĩro
2Chronicles36:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:2 Joahazu aambĩrĩirie gũthamaka Juda aarĩ wa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ. Naake agĩthamaka mĩeri ĩtatũ kũu Jerusalemu.
2Chronicles36:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:4 Neko agĩtua Eliakimu mũrũ wa nyina na Joahazu mũthamaki wa Juda na Jerusalemu
2Chronicles36:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:6 Na rĩĩrĩ Nebukadinezaru mũthamaki wa Babilonia agĩtharĩkĩra Juda
2Chronicles36:7 Nebukadinezaru agĩcooka agĩkuua mũthiithũ ũmwe wa Hekaarũ akĩũtwara Babiloni akĩũiga nyũmba yake thĩinĩ.
2Chronicles36:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:10 Kĩambĩrĩriainĩ kĩa mwaka ũrĩa warũmĩrĩire
2Chronicles36:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:12 Naake Zedekia agĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ mooru akĩhĩtĩria MWATHANI Ngai wake. Ndaigana kwĩnyiihĩria mũnabii Jeremia ũrĩa wamũheaga ciugo cia MWATHANI.
2Chronicles36:13 Naake Zedekia akĩremera mũthamaki Nebukadinezaru o na gwatuĩka nĩamwĩhĩtithĩĩtie akĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai atĩ nĩarĩmwathĩkagĩra. Naake akĩũmia ngoro akĩrega kwĩrira o na gũcookerera MWATHANI
2Chronicles36:14 Hamwe na ũguo
2Chronicles36:15 Naake MWATHANI Ngai wa maithe maao agĩkĩrĩrĩria kũmatũmĩra anabii nĩguo mamakaanie
2Chronicles36:16 No rĩĩrĩ
2Chronicles36:17 Tondũ ũcio MWATHANI akĩmarekereria magĩtharĩkĩrwo nĩ mũthamaki wa Babilonia. Naake mũthamaki wa Babilonia akĩũraga aanake a kũu Juda
2Chronicles36:18 Naake mũthamaki wa Babilonia agĩkuua indo ciothe cia Hekaarũ
2Chronicles36:19 Magĩgĩcina Hekaarũ
2Chronicles36:20 Nao andũ arĩa maahonokire kũũragwo
2Chronicles36:21 Kwoguo ũhoro wothe ũrĩa MWATHANI aarĩĩtie na kanua ka mũnabii Jeremia ũkĩhinga. MWATHANI aarĩĩtie akoiga atĩrĩ

Ezra1:6 Nao andũ oothe arĩa matũũranĩĩtie nao
Ezra1:7 Ningĩ mũthamaki Cairasi
Ezra1:8 Mũthamaki agĩcinengera Mithiredathu
Ezra1:9 (9-10) Nacio indo icio ciaiganaga ta ũũ:mbakũri cia thahabu cia kũũngania mĩhothi 30 mbakũri cia betha cia kũũngania mĩhothi 1
Ezra1:10 Mbakũri icio ciothe cia thahabu na cia betha ciarĩ ngiri ithaano na magana mana (5.400) o hamwe na indo cia mĩthemba ĩngĩ. Nacio ciothe-rĩ
Ezra2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra2:2 Atongoria aao maarĩ Zerubabeli
Ezra2:3 (3-20)
Ezra2:4 (21-35) O nao andũ arĩa maithe maao matũũraga matũũrainĩ maya
Ezra2:5 (36-39) Nacio mbarĩ cia athĩnjĩri Ngai iria ciacookire kuuma ithaamĩrio nĩ ici:
Ezra2:6 (40-42) Nacio mbarĩ cia Alawii iria ciacookire kuuma ithaamĩrio nĩ ici:
Ezra2:7 (43-54) Mbarĩ cia arĩa maarutaga wĩra Hekaarũinĩ nacio nĩ ici: Ziha
Ezra2:8 (55-57) Nacio mbarĩ cia ndungata cia Solomoni iria ciacookire kuuma ithaamĩrio nĩ ici: Sotai
Ezra2:9 Rĩu-rĩ
Ezra2:10 (59-60) Nao arĩa maarĩ a mbarĩ ya Delaia
Ezra2:11 (61-62) Mbarĩ ici cia athĩnjĩri Ngai
Ezra2:12 Naake barũũthi akĩmeera matikaarĩe irio cia magongoona marutĩirwo Ngai
Ezra2:13 (64-67) Nao andũ oothe arĩa maacookire kuuma ithaamĩrio maarĩ ngiri mĩrongo ĩna na igĩrĩ
Ezra2:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra2:15 Nao nĩmaaheanire o ta ũrĩa hinya wao waiganaga nĩ ũndũ wa mwako ũcio. Nacio indo iria maaheanire nĩ kiro magana mataano cia thahabu
Ezra2:16 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai
Ezra3:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra3:2 Naake Joshua mũrũ wa Jehozadaku
Ezra3:3 O na gũtuĩka no meetigagĩra andũ a bũrũri ũcio
Ezra3:4 Ningĩ magĩkũngũĩra Thigũkũ ya Ithũnũ o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo
Ezra3:5 Ningĩ makaarutaga magongoona ma njino na magongoona marĩa mangĩ ma karũũgamo ka mweri
Ezra3:6 Nao maambĩrĩirie kũrutĩra MWATHANI magongoona ma njino mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa mũgwanja. No rĩĩrĩ
Ezra3:7 Nao andũ magĩkĩruta mbia cia kũrĩha aaki na mahiga
Ezra3:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra3:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jeshua ũrĩa Mũlawii na aariũ aake
Ezra3:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra3:11 Nao makĩina
Ezra3:12 No rĩĩrĩ
Ezra3:13 Hatirĩ mũndũ ũngĩahotire gũkũũrana rĩanĩrĩra rĩa gĩkeno o na kana rĩa kĩrĩro nĩ gũkorwo inegene rĩu rĩao nĩrĩahotaga kũiguĩka kũndũ kũraaya.
Ezra4:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra4:2 Igĩgĩthiĩ gwĩ Zerubabeli o na kũrĩ anene a mbarĩ
Ezra4:3 No rĩĩrĩ
Ezra4:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ arĩa maatũire bũrũri ũcio makĩũraga andũ a Juda ngoro o na makĩmeekĩra guoya nĩguo maremwo nĩgũthiĩ na mbere na mwako.
Ezra4:5 Magĩcooka makĩhaka atongoria a thirikaari ya Perisia nĩguo mathũũkie wĩra ũcio. Nao magĩthiĩ na mbere gwĩka ũguo matukũ moothe ma ũthamaki wa Cairasi mũthamaki wa Perisia o na nginya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Dario aatuĩkire mũthamaki.
Ezra4:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũthamaki Ahasuerusu
Ezra4:7 O na ningĩ matukũinĩ ma mũthamaki Aritashashita mũthamaki wa Perisia
Ezra4:8 Ningĩ o naake Rehumu ũrĩa barũũthi na Shimushai karani wake makĩandĩkĩra Aritashashita marũa makoniĩ Jerusalemu ta ũũ:
Ezra4:9 “Marũa maya moimĩĩte kwĩ barũũthi Rehumu
Ezra4:10 O na ningĩ mamatũmĩĩte maanyiitanĩire na andũ arĩa angĩ
Ezra4:11 Marũa macio maandĩkĩĩtwo ta ũũ:Kuuma kũrĩ ithuĩ ndungata ciaku
Ezra4:12 Nĩtũkwenda gũkũmenyithia ũndũ ũyũ
Ezra4:13 Rĩu-rĩ
Ezra4:14 Rĩu-rĩ
Ezra4:15 nĩwathane ũhoro ũyũ ũtuĩrio wega thĩinĩ wa mabuku marĩa maigirwo nĩ maithe maanyu. Ũngĩĩka ũguo
Ezra4:16 Na rĩu wee mũgaathe mũthamaki witũ
Ezra4:17 Maya nĩ mo macookio ma mũthamaki:Kũrĩ Rehumu
Ezra4:18 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Ezra4:19 Na tondũ ũcio ngĩgĩathana ũhoro ũcio ũtuĩrio na nĩkuonekeete atĩ ti itherũ kuuma o tene andũ a itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu matũire mookagĩrĩra athamaki. Ningĩ itũũra rĩu rĩkoreetwo rĩiyũrĩĩte mĩkora o na andũ arĩa meendaga gũthũũkia thaayũ.
Ezra4:20 Ningĩ kwanagĩa na athamaki a hinya a gũthamaka kuo
Ezra4:21 Tondũ ũcio
Ezra4:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra4:23 Na rĩrĩa marũa macio moimĩĩte kwa mũthamaki Aritashashita
Ezra4:24 Naguo wĩra wa gwaka Hekaarũ ũgĩkĩrũũgamio o na ũgĩikara ũguo ũtekũrutwo o nginya mwaka wa keerĩ wa ũthamaki wa Dario
Ezra5:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo anabii aya eerĩ Hagai na Zekaria mũrũ wa Ido
Ezra5:2 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Zerubabeli mũrũ wa Shealitieli na Joshua mũrũ wa Jehozadaku maiguire ndũmĩrĩri ciao
Ezra5:3 Na ihinda o ro rĩu Tatenai
Ezra5:4 Ningĩ magĩcooka makiuga maheeo marĩĩtwa ma andũ arĩa oothe maamateithagĩrĩria gwaka.
Ezra5:5 No rĩĩrĩ
Ezra5:6 Ĩno nĩyo ribooti ĩrĩa maandĩkĩire mũthamaki:
Ezra5:7 Kũrĩ Dario mũthamaki
Ezra5:8 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Ezra5:9 Ningĩ nĩtwacookire tũkĩũria atongoria a andũ acio kũrĩa marutĩĩte watho wa gwaka rĩngĩ Hekaarũ ya MWATHANI o na kũmĩrĩĩkia.
Ezra5:10 O na tũgĩcooka tũkĩmooria marĩĩtwa maao nĩguo tũkũmenyithie atongoria aao.
Ezra5:11 Nao magĩtũcookeria atĩrĩ
Ezra5:12 No rĩĩrĩ
Ezra5:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Ezra5:14 Ningĩ agĩcookia indo cia thahabu na cia betha cia hekaarũ ya ngai iria Nebukadinezaru aarutĩĩte Hekaarũinĩ kũu Jerusalemu agacitwara agĩciiga hekaarũinĩ ya kũu Babiloni. Indo icio ciothe Cairasi agĩcinengera mũndũ ũmwe wetagwo Shashibazaru

Ezra6:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Dario
Ezra6:2 No rĩĩrĩ
Ezra6:3 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Ezra6:4 Ningĩ thingo ciayo ciakwo na mahiga na o thuutha wa mĩhari ĩtatũ ya mahiga hakaigĩrĩrwo mbaaũ ya hinya. Namo marĩhi ma wĩra ũcio wothe makoima thĩinĩ wa kĩgĩĩna kĩa mũthamaki.
Ezra6:5 O na ningĩ indo cia thahabu na betha cia Hekaarũ ya Ngai iria mũthamaki Nebukadinezaru aareehire gũũkũ Babiloni-rĩ
Ezra6:6 Maya nĩ mo macookio ma marũa macio marĩa mũthamaki Dario aandĩkire:Kũrĩ Tetenai
Ezra6:7 O na ningĩ mũtigaatoonyerere ũhoro wa mwako ũcio o na haniini. No rĩĩrĩ
Ezra6:8 Na rĩu nĩndaruta watho atĩ mũmateithĩrĩrie gwaka rĩngĩ mwako ũcio. Namo marĩhi moothe ma kũrĩha wĩra ũcio makarĩhwo o narua marutĩĩtwo mũthiithũinĩ wa mũthamaki ũrĩa uumĩĩte igootiinĩ rĩrĩa rĩrutagwo mwena wa na ithũĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Farati nĩguo wĩra ũcio ndũgaakome.
Ezra6:9 Ningĩ
Ezra6:10 Ũndũ ũcio ũrĩĩkagwo nĩ geetha marutagĩre Ngai wa igũrũ magongoona marĩa mangĩtĩkĩrĩka nĩ we
Ezra6:11 Na nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Ezra6:12 Naake Ngai ũrĩa wathuurire Jerusalemu gũtuĩke nĩkuo arĩthaathayagĩrio arong'aũrania mũthamaki o wothe kana rũũrĩrĩ o ruothe rũrĩa rũgaakararia watho ũyũ o na kana rũgaathũũkia Hekaarũ ĩyo ya Ngai kũu Jerusalemu. Nĩ niĩ Dario ndaathana ũguo. Watho ũyũ nĩwagĩrĩirwo kũrũmĩrĩrwo na kĩyo kĩnene.
Ezra6:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Tatenai ũrĩa barũũthi
Ezra6:14 Nao atongoria a Ayahudi magĩgĩtũma wĩra wa mwako ũcio ũthiĩ na mbere mũno
Ezra6:15 Nao magĩkĩrĩĩkia mwako wa Hekaarũ
Ezra6:16 Nao andũ a Isiraeli
Ezra6:17 Nĩ ũndũ wa kwamũra kwa Hekaarũ ĩyo
Ezra6:18 Nao magĩcooka makĩbanga athĩnjĩri Ngai o na Alawii matungatage kũu Hekaarũinĩ
Ezra6:19 Nao andũ arĩa maacookeete kuuma ithaamĩrio
Ezra6:20 Athĩnjĩri Ngai o na Alawii oothe nĩmaarĩĩkĩĩtie gwĩtheria na oothe matiarĩ na thaahu. Nao Alawii magĩgĩthĩnja ndũrũme cia Bathaka nĩ ũndũ wa acio maacookeete kuuma ithaamĩrio
Ezra6:21 Nayo thigũkũ ya Bathaka ĩkĩrĩĩo nĩ Aisiraeli oothe arĩa maacookeete kuuma ithaamĩrio
Ezra6:22 Nao magĩkũngũĩra na gĩkeno kĩnene thigũkũ ya mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩthenya mũgwanja. Maarĩ na gĩkeno kĩnene nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI nĩatũmĩĩte mũthamaki wa andũ a Siria amaiguĩre tha

Ezra7:10 Kuuma kũrĩ niĩ Aritashashita

Ezra7:13 Ningĩ nĩwagĩrĩirwo nĩgũkuua betha na thahabu
Ezra7:14 Ningĩ nĩwagĩrĩirwo nĩgũkuua betha o na thahabu ciothe iria ũkũũngania bũrũriinĩ ũyũ wothe wa Babiloni
Ezra7:15 Mbeeca icio ũgaacihũthĩra wega na kũgũra ndeegwa

Ezra7:19 Na rĩĩrĩ

Ezra8:1 Na rĩĩrĩ

Ezra8:3 Nao acio ngĩmacookanĩrĩria hamwe hakuhĩ na rũũĩ rũrĩa rũthereraga rũroreete itũũra rĩa Ahava
Ezra8:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩrekania ngeetĩrwo atongoria kenda
Ezra8:5 Ngĩmatũma mathiĩ kwĩ Ido
Ezra8:6 Na nĩ ũndũ wa wega wa Ngai
Ezra8:7 Ningĩ magĩtũma Hashabia na Jeshaia a mbarĩ ya Merari hamwe na andũ angĩ aao mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ.
Ezra8:8 Hamwe na acio nĩhaarĩ na andũ angĩ magana meerĩ ma mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ (220) arĩa maarutaga wĩra Hekaarũinĩ ya Ngai
Ezra8:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra8:10 Nĩ ũndũ nĩndaconokire kũhooya mũthamaki thigari cia mbarathi cia gũtuumagaria nĩ geetha itũgitĩre kuuma gwĩ thũ
Ezra8:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio tũkĩiima kũrĩa irio na tũkĩhooya MWATHANI atũteithie
Ezra8:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩthuura Sherebia
Ezra8:13 Ngĩcooka ngĩthima betha
Ezra8:14 (26-27) Mũigana wa indo icio nĩ ũyũ: tani mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na igĩrĩ cia betha indo cia betha igana rĩmwe cia kũhũthĩra cia kiro mĩrongo mũgwanja thahabu tani ngiri ithathatũ na magana mana (3
Ezra8:15 Ngĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Ezra8:16 Ikaraai mũcimenyereire o kinya rĩrĩa mũgaakinya Hekaarũinĩ ya MWATHANI. Ningĩ mũgaacithima mũrĩ kũu bethitĩrĩ ya athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na mũcooke mũcinengere atongoria a athĩnjĩri Ngai
Ezra8:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii magĩkĩmenyerera indo icio cia betha
Ezra8:18 Tũgĩkiuma hau mũkuruinĩ ũcio wa rũũĩ rwa Ahava mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ wa mweri wa mbere tũroreete Jerusalemu. Naake Ngai witu aarĩ hamwe na ithuĩ na agĩtũgitĩra kuuma gwĩ thũ o na kuuma kũrĩ arĩa mangĩatũtharĩkĩire njĩrainĩ.
Ezra8:19 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa twakinyire Jerusalemu
Ezra8:20 Naguo mũthenya wa kana tũgĩthiĩ Hekaarũinĩ
Ezra8:21 Indo ciothe igĩtarwo na igĩthimwo na igĩcooka ikĩandĩkwo wega thĩinĩ wa ibuku.
Ezra8:22 Nao andũ oothe arĩa maacookeete kuuma ithaamĩrio makĩruta matega maao nĩ geetha matuĩke magongoona ma njino kwĩ Ngai wa Isiraeli. Nao makĩruta ndeegwa ikũmi na igĩrĩ nĩ ũndũ wa Aisiraeli oothe na ndũrũme mĩrongo kenda na ithathatũ
Ezra8:23 Magĩcooka magĩtwarĩra barũũthi na atongoria arĩa matũũraga na mwena ũcio wa ithũĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Farati
Ezra9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra9:2 Ayahudi nĩkũhikia mahikagia atumia a ndũũrĩrĩ icio na ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtũma andũ acio atheru a Ngai magwatwo nĩ thaahu. Atongoria aao o na aathani aao nĩ o maatororeetie ũndũinĩ ũcio.
Ezra9:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra9:4 Ngĩgĩikara o ũguo makĩĩte o nginya rĩrĩa igongoona rĩa hwaĩinĩ rĩakinyire kũrutwo
Ezra9:5 Narĩo ihinda rĩrĩa rĩrutagwo igongoona rĩa hwaĩinĩ rĩakinya-rĩ
Ezra9:6 Ngiuga atĩrĩ
Ezra9:7 Kuuma o hĩndĩ ya maithe maitũ kinyagia rĩu tũtũire o twĩhagia. Na nĩ ũndũ wa meehia macio maitũ
Ezra9:8 Na rĩu
Ezra9:9 Twarĩ ngombo
Ezra9:10 “Na rĩu-rĩ
Ezra9:11 marĩa watũheire na tũnua twa anabii ndungata ciaku. Nĩmaatũmenyithĩĩtie atĩ bũrũri ũrĩa twathiaga kwĩgwatĩra warĩ mũthũũku nĩ ũndũ mĩtugo ya atũũri aakuo yarĩ mĩũru na waiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ maũndũ marĩ magigi kuuma gĩturi kĩaguo kinya kĩrĩa kĩngĩ.
Ezra9:12 Ningĩ nĩmaatũmenyithirie atĩ tũtiagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhikanagia na andũ acio o na tũtikaanamateithĩrĩrie kũgaacĩra kana gũtonga. Twaga gwĩka maũndũ macio
Ezra9:13 Na rĩĩrĩ

Ezra10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra10:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo
Ezra10:3 Rĩu no nginya tũthondeke kĩrĩĩkanĩro mbere ya Ngai witũ atĩ nĩtũkũingata atumia aya tũhikĩĩtie o na ciana ciao. Nĩtũgwĩka ũrĩa wothe
Ezra10:4 Atĩrĩ
Ezra10:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo
Ezra10:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ezira agĩkiuma hau Hekaarũinĩ ya Ngai
Ezra10:7 Gũkĩanĩrĩrwo Jerusalemu o na Juda guothe atĩ andũ oothe arĩa maacookeete kuuma ithaamĩrio matũngane Jerusalemu.
Ezra10:8 Nĩ atongoria a andũ maathanĩĩte kwanĩrĩrwo ũguo. Na atĩ mũndũ wothe ũtagaakinya kuo thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ
Ezra10:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezra10:10 Naake Ezira ũcio mũthĩnjĩri Ngai akĩrũũgama akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Ezra10:11 Rĩu-rĩ
Ezra10:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ acio oothe makĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ
Ezra10:13 Ningĩ magĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga atĩrĩ
Ezra10:14 Tondũ ũcio reka atongoria aitũ makuue mũrigo wa ũndũ ũyũ na maikare gũũkũ Jerusalemu. Hĩndĩ ĩyo o mũndũ o wothe ũhikĩĩtie mũtumia mũrũũrĩrĩ agooka o mahinda marĩa maiguanĩirwo na magooka na atongoria na aciirithania a itũũra rĩake. Ũndũ ũcio wahota gũtũma maraakara ma Ngai maage gũtũkorerera nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhia ũyũ.”
Ezra10:15 Nao magĩĩtĩkanĩria ũguo
Ezra10:16 Nao acio maacookeete kuuma ithaamĩrio magĩĩtĩkania na mũbango ũcio. Naake Ezira ũcio mũthĩnjĩri Ngai agĩthuura andũ kuuma kũrĩ atongoria a mbarĩ o mbarĩ na akĩandĩka marĩĩtwa maao. Nao makĩambĩrĩria gũtuĩria ũhoro ũcio mũthenya wa mbere wa mweri wa ikũmi.
Ezra10:17 Naguo wĩra ũcio wothe wa gũtuĩria arũme oothe arĩa maahikĩĩtie atumia a ndũũrĩrĩ
Ezra10:18 Ũyũ nĩguo mũtaratara wa athuuri arĩa maahikĩĩtie atumia a ndũũrĩrĩ;Mbarĩ cia athĩnjĩri Ngai nĩ aya:Mbarĩ ya Joshua na aariũ a nyina
Ezra10:19 Acio makĩĩhĩta kũingata atumia aao
Ezra10:20 Mbarĩ ya Imeri: Hanani na Zebadia
Ezra10:21 Mbarĩ ya Harimu: Maaseia
Ezra10:22 Mbarĩ ya Pashuri: Elioenai
Ezra10:23 Alawii maarĩ:Jozabadu
Ezra10:24 Aini a nyĩmbo maarĩ:Eliashibu Aikaria a mĩrango ya Hekaarũ maarĩ:Shalumu
Ezra10:25 Arĩa angĩ nao nĩ aya:Mbarĩ ya Peroshu:Ramia
Ezra10:26 Mbarĩ ya Elamu: Matania
Ezra10:27 Mbarĩ ya Zatu: Elioenai
Ezra10:28 Mbarĩ ya Bebai: Jehohanani
Ezra10:29 Mbarĩ ya Bani: Meshulamu
Ezra10:30 Mbarĩ ya Pahathu Moabi: Adina
Ezra10:31 (31-32) Nao a mbarĩ ya Harimu: Eliazeru
Ezra10:32 Mbarĩ ya Hashumu: Matenai
Ezra10:33 (34-37) Mbarĩ ya Bani: Maadai
Ezra10:34 (38-42) Mbarĩ ya Binui: Shimei
Ezra10:35 Mbarĩ ya Nebo: Jeieli
Ezra10:36 Arũme acio oothe nĩ o maahikĩĩtie atumia a ndũũrĩrĩ. Nao makĩmaingata o hamwe na ciana ciao.
Nehemiah1:1 Maya nĩ mo maũndũ marĩa Nehemia mũrũ wa Hekalia eekire.
Nehemiah1:2 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Hanani ũmwe wa aariũ a baaba agĩũka me na andũ moimĩĩte Juda
Nehemiah1:3 Nao makĩnjĩĩra atĩ Ayahudi arĩa maatigarĩĩte kũu bũrũriinĩ maarĩ na mathĩĩna maingĩ mũno na atĩ nĩmaconoragwo mũno. Ningĩ makĩnjĩĩra atĩ rũthingo rwa Jerusalemu rwatũũraga rũrĩ rũmomoku
Nehemiah1:4 Na rĩrĩa ndaiguire ũguo ngĩikara thĩ
Nehemiah1:5 “MWATHANI Ngai wa igũrũ
Nehemiah1:6 Ndagũthaitha MWATHANI
Nehemiah1:7 Nĩtũgwĩkĩĩte maũndũ mooru mũno
Nehemiah1:8 Ririkana ũrĩa wothe werire Musa ndungata ĩyo yaku
Nehemiah1:9 No rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah1:10 “Na rĩu MWATHANI
Nehemiah1:11 Rĩu thikĩrĩria mahooya maakwa o na mahooya ma ndungata ciaku ciothe iria ciendeete gũkũhe gĩtĩĩo. Ndeithia hootane ũũmũũthĩ
Nehemiah2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:2 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akĩnjũũria atĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:3 ngĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:4 Naake mũthamaki agĩkĩnjũũria atĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:5 ngĩcooka ngĩcookeria mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki
Nehemiah2:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩkĩmũthaitha ahe marũa ma gũtwarĩra abarũũthi arĩa maarĩ mwena wa ithũĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Farati
Nehemiah2:8 O na ningĩ ngĩũria heeo marũa ma gũtwarĩra Asafu
Nehemiah2:9 Naake mũthamaki akĩĩhe anene amwe a thigari o na thigari imwe cia mbarathi nĩguo matwarane na niĩ. Ngĩkiumagara ngĩthiĩ na mwena wa ithũĩro wa rũũĩ rwa Farati. Ndakinya kuo ngĩhe abarũũthi marũa marĩa ndaheetwo nĩ mũthamaki.
Nehemiah2:10 No rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:11 Tondũ ũcio ngĩgĩthiĩ Jerusalemu na ngĩikara kũu mĩthenya ĩtatũ
Nehemiah2:12 itekwĩra mũndũ ũrĩa MWATHANI aanguũrĩirie gwaka Jerusalemu. Ngĩcooka ngĩũkĩra ũtukũ gatagatĩ
Nehemiah2:13 Kũrĩ o ũtukũ ũguo
Nehemiah2:14 Ningĩ ngĩthiĩ ndoreete na mwena wa irathĩro wa itũũra rĩu
Nehemiah2:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩkĩambata kũrĩ o ũtukũ ũguo
Nehemiah2:16 Nao atongoria aakuo matiigana kũmenya kũrĩa ndathiĩte o na ũrĩa ndeekĩĩte. Nginyagia hĩndĩ ĩyo gũtirĩ ũndũ ndamenyithĩĩtie Ayahudi
Nehemiah2:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩmeera atĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:18 Ngĩcooka ngĩmamenyithia ũrĩa Ngai aandeithĩĩtie
Nehemiah2:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah2:20 Na niĩ ngĩmacookeria ngĩmeera atĩrĩ
Nehemiah3:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah3:2 Nao andũ a Jeriko magĩaka rĩngĩ rũthingo marutĩĩtie harĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai maakinyĩĩtie.Naake Zakuru mũrũ wa Imuri agĩaka rũthingo rũu arutĩĩtie harĩa andũ a Jeriko maakinyirie.
Nehemiah3:3 Nayo mbarĩ ya Hasenaa ĩgĩaka rĩngĩ kĩhingo kĩrĩa gĩetagwo kĩhingo gĩa Thamaki. Ningĩ makĩrũũgamia buremu na magĩgĩĩkĩra mĩrango. Magĩcooka magĩkĩoha wega na cuuma na magĩgĩĩkĩra mĩgĩĩko ya cuuma ya kũhingaga nayo.
Nehemiah3:4 Naake Meremothu mũrũ wa Uria na mũcũkũrũ wa Hakozu
Nehemiah3:5 Nao andũ a Tekoa magĩthiĩ na mbere magĩaka marutĩĩtie harĩa Zadoku aakinyirie. No rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah3:6 Naake Joiada mũrũ wa Pasea me na Meshulamu mũrũ wa Besodeia magĩaka rĩngĩ kĩhingo kĩrĩa gĩetagwo kĩhingo gĩa Jeshana. O na ningĩ makĩrũũgamia buremu na magĩgĩĩkĩra mĩrango. Magĩcooka magĩkĩoha wega na cuuma na magĩgĩĩkĩra mĩgĩĩko ya cuuma ya kũhingaga.
Nehemiah3:7 Naake Melatia wa kuuma Gibeoni
Nehemiah3:8 Naake Uzieli mũrũ wa Harihaia
Nehemiah3:9 Naake Refaia mũrũ wa Huri
Nehemiah3:10 Naake Jedaia mũrũ wa Harumafu agĩaka arutĩĩtie harĩa Refaia aakinyirie. Handũ hau haarĩ hakuhĩ na nyũmba yake.Naake Hatushu mũrũ wa Hashabuneia agĩaka arutĩĩtie harĩa Jedaia aakinyirie.
Nehemiah3:11 Naake Malikija mũrũ wa Harimu me na Hashubu mũrũ wa Pahathu Moabi magĩaka marutĩĩtie harĩa Hatushu aakinyirie. O na ningĩ magĩaka cimuni.
Nehemiah3:12 Naake Shalumu mũrũ wa Haloheshu
Nehemiah3:13 Naake Hanuni na andũ arĩa maatũũraga itũũra rĩa Zanoa magĩaka rĩngĩ kĩhingo kĩrĩa gĩetagwo kĩhingo gĩa Gĩtuamba. Magĩcooka magĩgĩĩkĩra mĩrango na magĩkĩoha wega na cuuma
Nehemiah3:14 Naake Malikija mũrũ wa Rekabu
Nehemiah3:15 Naake Shalumu mũrũ wa Kolihoze
Nehemiah3:16 Naake Nehemia mũrũ wa Azibuku
Nehemiah3:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah3:18 Naake Bawai mũrũ wa Henadadi
Nehemiah3:19 Naake Ezeri mũrũ wa Jeshua
Nehemiah3:20 Naake Baruku mũrũ wa Zabai agĩaka arutĩĩtie harĩa Ezeri aakinyirie
Nehemiah3:21 Naake Meremothu mũrũ wa Uria na mũcũkũrũ wa Hakozu
Nehemiah3:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah3:23 Naake Benjamini na Hashubu magĩaka marutĩĩtie harĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai acio maakinyirie. Hau maakire haarĩ na mwena wa na mbere wa nyũmba ciao.Naake Azaria
Nehemiah3:24 Naake Binui mũrũ wa Henadadi agĩaka arutĩĩtie harĩa Azaria aakinyirie. Aahaakire arutĩĩtie nyũmbainĩ ya Azaria akĩhakinyia koonainĩ ya rũthingo.
Nehemiah3:25 (25-26) Naake Palali mũrũ wa Uzai agĩaka arutĩĩtie harĩa Binui aakinyirie. Aahaakire aharutĩĩtie kuuma koonainĩ ya rũthingo rwa na harĩa mũnaara wa na rũgongo wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki warĩ
Nehemiah3:26 Nao andũ a kuuma Tekoa magĩaka marutĩĩtie harĩa Pedaia aakinyirie. Maahaakire kuuma kamwenainĩ karĩa kaariganĩĩtie na mũnaara ũrĩa mũnene wahũthagĩrwo kũrangĩra Hekaarũ. Maahaakire makĩhakinyia hakuhĩ na rũthingo rũrĩa rwarĩ hakuhĩ na Ofeli. Hau haarĩ haao ha keerĩ gwakwa.
Nehemiah3:27 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai amwe magĩaka marutĩĩtie harĩa andũ acio a Tekoa maakinyirie. Maarutirie kĩhingoinĩ kĩa Mbarathi maroreetie na rũgongo. O mũndũ aakaga o mbere ya nyũmba yake.
Nehemiah3:28 Naake Zadoku mũrũ wa Imeri agĩaka arutĩĩtie harĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai maakinyirie naho haarĩ mbere ya nyũmba yake.Naake Shemaia mũrũ wa Shekania agĩaka arutĩĩtie harĩa Zadoku aakinyirie. Ũcio nĩ we waikaragia kĩhingo kĩa Mwena wa Irathĩro.
Nehemiah3:29 Naake Hanania mũrũ wa Shelemia
Nehemiah3:30 Naake Malikija
Nehemiah3:31 Nao aturi a thahabu na ahũũri a mbiacara magĩaka marutĩĩtie harĩa Malikija aakinyirie. Maahaakire marutĩĩtie nyũmbainĩ ĩrĩa yarĩ koonainĩ makĩhakinyia kĩhingoinĩ kĩrĩa gĩetagwo Kĩhingo kĩa Ng'ondu.
Nehemiah4:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah4:2 Naake Sanibalati
Nehemiah4:3 Naake Tobia arũũgamĩĩte hakuhĩ naake akĩgwatĩria ũhoro ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
Nehemiah4:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩhooya atĩrĩ
Nehemiah4:5 Ndũkaanamoohere ũũru ũrĩa meekaga o na ndũkaanariganĩrwo nĩ meehia maao. Tondũ ithuĩ tũkoreetwo tũgĩaka nĩmatũrumĩĩte.”
Nehemiah4:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio tũgĩthiĩ na mbere gwaka rũthingo rũu
Nehemiah4:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah4:8 Nao magĩthiĩ ndundu nĩguo matharĩkĩre itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu matũme kũgĩe ngũĩ.
Nehemiah4:9 No ithuĩ tũkĩhooya Ngai witũ na tũkĩiga andũ a kũrangĩra itũũra ũtukũ na mũthenya.
Nehemiah4:10 Nao andũ a Juda magĩkĩina rwĩmbo rũũrũ:Nĩtũrathira hinya nĩ wĩra ũyũ; mahiga marĩa maamomorangirwo maiyũire gũũkũ.Tũtingĩkĩhota gwaka rũthingo rũũrũ.
Nehemiah4:11 Nacio thũ ciitũ igĩciiria atĩ tũtingĩciona
Nehemiah4:12 No rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah4:13 Tondũ ũcio ngĩbanga andũ mbarĩ kwa mbarĩ
Nehemiah4:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩbaara ngĩona ũrĩa andũ maiguaga guoya
Nehemiah4:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah4:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Nehemiah4:17 arĩa maakaga rũthingo. Nao andũ arĩa maanenganagĩrĩria indo cia mwako
Nehemiah4:18 O nao andũ arĩa maakaga
Nehemiah4:19 Ningĩ ngĩĩra andũ o na anene na atongoria aao oothe atĩrĩ
Nehemiah4:20 Mũngĩigua karumbeeta kahuuhwo ũrĩraai na kũrĩ ithuĩ. Ngai witũ nĩwe ũgũtũhũũranĩra.”
Nehemiah4:21 Ũguo nĩguo twakĩrutaga wĩra wa gwaka rũthingo rũu. Nuthu ĩmwe ya andũ yarutaga wĩra kuuma rũũciinĩ o nginya hwaĩinĩ njata ikĩumĩra
Nehemiah4:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩcooka ngĩĩra andũ arĩa maarũũgamagĩrĩra wĩra o hamwe na ndungata ciao maraarage Jerusalemu nĩguo tũrangagĩre itũũra ũtukũ
Nehemiah4:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
