Esther7:9 Naake Haribona ũmwe wa arũme acio maarĩ ahakũre
Esther7:10 Kwoguo Hamani agĩcuurio mĩtĩinĩ ĩrĩa we mwene aakĩire Moridekai
Esther8:1 Mũthenya o ro ũcio
Esther8:2 Mũthamaki akĩruta gĩcũhĩ gĩake gĩa kũhũũra mũhũũri kĩrĩa eetĩĩtie Hamani
Esther8:3 Ningĩ Esiteri akĩarĩria mũthamaki rĩngĩ egũithĩĩtie magũrũinĩ maake akĩmũthaitha agĩitaga maithori akĩmwĩra atĩ aniine mũbango ũrĩa Hamani ũrĩa Mũagagi aathondekeete wa kũniina Ayahudi.
Esther8:4 Naake mũthamaki agĩtambũrũkĩria Esiteri mũthĩĩgi wake wa thahabu.
Esther8:5 Naake Esiteri akĩrũũgama na igũrũ hau mbere ya mũthamaki akiuga atĩrĩ
Esther8:6 Amu ingĩhota kũũmĩrĩria atĩa ngĩona andũ aitũ makĩniinwo?”
Esther8:7 Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu akĩĩra kwini Esiteri na Moridekai ũrĩa Mũyahudi atĩrĩ
Esther8:8 No rĩĩrĩ
Esther8:9 Ũndũ ũyũ wekĩkire mweri mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithatũ mweriinĩ wa ĩtatũ
Esther8:10 Moridekai akĩandĩka marũa macio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa mũthamaki Ahasuerusu
Esther8:11 Marũa macio moigĩĩte atĩ mũthamaki nĩetĩkĩrĩĩtie Ayahudi a itũũra o rĩothe macookanĩrĩre hamwe magitĩre mĩoyo yao. Andũ me na matharaita a mũhĩrĩga o na ũrĩkũ kana rũgongo ruothe mangĩũkĩrĩra arũme Ayahudi
Esther8:12 Watho ũcio wambagĩrĩria kũrutithio wĩra bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Perisia ũcio mũthamaki Ahasuerusu aathanaga mũthenya ũrĩa wabangĩĩtwo wa kũũraga Ayahudi
Esther8:13 Ũhoro ũcio nĩwatuirwo atĩ nĩ watho
Esther8:14 Atwarithia a mbarathi nĩmaahaicire mbarathi igũrũ cia kwa mũthamaki amaatha
Esther8:15 Naake Moridekai akiuma mũciĩ kwa mũthamaki ehumbĩĩte nguo ya ũthamaki ya rangi wa mburuu na mwerũ
Esther8:16 Ayahudi magĩthera ithiithi
Esther8:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Esther9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Esther9:2 Ayahudi nĩmaagĩcookanĩrĩire matũũrainĩ ma mabũrũri moothe ma kũrĩa mũthamaki Ahasuerusu aathanaga mahũũre andũ arĩa mangĩamookĩrĩire. Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩametiiririe tondũ andũ oothe nĩmaanyiitĩĩtwo nĩ guoya.
Esther9:3 Anene oothe
Esther9:4 Amu nĩkwamenyekeete o wega bũrũriinĩ ũcio wothe mũthamaki aathanaga
Esther9:5 Kwoguo Ayahudi nĩmangĩekire thũ ciao o ũrĩa mangĩendire. Nĩmaagĩciũkĩrĩire na hiũ cia njora magĩcitemanga magĩciniina biũ.
Esther9:6 Thĩinĩ wa Susa kuo gwiki mũciĩ ũrĩa warĩ mũnene
Esther9:7 (7-10) Gatagatĩinĩ ka acio mooragirwo nĩhaarĩ aariũ ikũmi a Hamani mũrũ wa Hamedatha
Esther9:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Esther9:9 Naake akĩĩra kwini Esiteri atĩrĩ
Esther9:10 Naake Esiteri agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Esther9:11 Mũthamaki agĩgĩathana atĩ gwĩkwo ũguo; na watho ũcio ũgĩathanwo thĩinĩ wa Susa
Esther9:12 Mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa Adari
Esther9:13 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Esther9:14 Meekire ũguo mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩtatũ wa mweri wa Adari
Esther9:15 No rĩĩrĩ
Esther9:16 Kwoguo nĩkĩo Ayahudi arĩa maikaraga matũũrainĩ manyiinyi makoragwo na mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna wa mweri wa Adari wĩ wa gĩkeno
Esther9:17 Naake Moridekai akĩandĩka maũndũ macio
Esther9:18 Akĩmeera atĩ mũthenya wa ikũmi na ĩna
Esther9:19 Mĩthenya ĩyo nĩyo Ayahudi maaniinire thũ ciao
Esther9:20 Kwoguo Ayahudi
Esther9:21 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Esther9:22 No rĩĩrĩ
Esther9:23 Kwoguo magĩtua mĩthenya ĩyo rĩĩtwa Purimu
Esther9:24 Ayahudi nĩmethondekeire watho wao o eene na wa njiarwa ciao
Esther9:25 Nĩgwagĩtuirwo atĩ mĩthenya ĩyo ĩririkanagwo
Esther9:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
Esther9:27 Marũa macio maandĩkĩirwo Ayahudi oothe na kobĩ ciamo igĩtũmĩrwo ng'ongo ciothe igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na mũgwanja cia ũthamaki wa Perisia. Marũa macio maarĩ ma kũmeerĩra thaayũ na ũgaacĩru.
Esther9:28 Makĩĩrwo atĩ mĩthenya ĩyo ya Purimu imenyagĩrĩrwo mahindainĩ maayo marĩa maagĩrĩire
Esther9:29 Watho ũcio wa kwini Esiteri wa gwĩkĩra hinya mawatho makoniĩ Purimu nĩwandĩkirwo ibukuinĩ.
Esther10:1 Mũthamaki Ahasuerusu agĩathana atĩ andũ a bũrũri wake
Esther10:2 No rĩĩrĩ
Esther10:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
Job1:1 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe tene nĩkwarĩ mũndũ watũũraga bũrũri wa Uzu wetagwo Ayubu. Ayubu ũcio aarĩ mũndũ mũthingu na ũtarĩ ũcuke. Aarĩ mũndũ waheete Ngai gĩtĩĩo na wathengagĩra ũũru hingo ciothe.
Job1:2 Aarĩ na aanake mũgwanja na airĩĩtu atatũ.
Job1:3 Ningĩ nĩarĩ na rũũru rwa ng'ondu ngiri mũgwanja (7
Job1:4 Aanake aake maarĩ na mũtugo wa kũgĩaga na iruga
Job1:5 Mĩthenya ya iruga yathira
Job1:6 Mũthenya ũmwe ciũmbe cia igũrũ nĩciathire mbere ya MWATHANI
Job1:7 MWATHANI agĩkĩũria Caitaani atĩrĩ
Job1:8 MWATHANI akĩũria Caitaani atĩrĩ
Job1:9 Naake Caitaani agĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Job1:10 Githĩ ndũmũgĩtĩire na mĩena yothe o na ũkagitĩra mũciĩ wake na indo ciake ciothe? Nĩũraathimĩĩte mawĩra maake o na ũkaingĩhia mahiũ maake makaiyũra bũrũri.
Job1:11 No rĩĩrĩ
Job1:12 Naake MWATHANI agĩkĩĩra Caitaani atĩrĩ
Job1:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Job1:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo gũgĩũka mũndũ watũmĩĩtwo ateng'ereete akĩĩra Ayubu atĩrĩ
Job1:15 Asabea macihithũkĩra
Job1:16 Ataanarĩĩkia kũheana ũhoro
Job1:17 Ũcio naake ataanarĩĩkia kwaria
Job1:18 O na ũcio naake ataanarĩĩkia kwaria
Job1:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo guoka rũhuuho rũnene ruumĩĩte na werũinĩ
Job1:20 Kũigua ũguo
Job1:21 akiuga atĩrĩ
Job1:22 Ũhoroinĩ ũcio wothe Ayubu ndaigana kwĩhia o na kana kũruta Ngai mahĩtia.
Job2:1 Mũthenya ũngĩ ciũmbe cia igũrũ nĩciathiire mbere ya MWATHANI. O rĩngĩ Caitaani agĩtwarana nacio.
Job2:2 MWATHANI agĩkĩũria Caitaani atĩrĩ
Job2:3 MWATHANI akĩũria Caitaani rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Job2:4 Naake Caitaani agĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Job2:5 No rĩĩrĩ
Job2:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI agĩcookeria Caitaani atĩrĩ
Job2:7 Kwoguo Caitaani agĩthiĩ akiuma hau mbere ya MWATHANI. Agĩthiĩ akĩhũũra Ayubu na ironda nene kuuma o kĩara gĩa kũgũrũ kinya mũtwe.
Job2:8 Naake Ayubu agĩthiĩ agĩikara kĩarainĩ kĩa mũhu
Job2:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũtumia wake agĩthiĩ harĩ we akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Job2:10 Ayubu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Job2:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Job2:12 Rĩrĩa maarĩ o haraaya
Job2:13 Magĩikara thĩ o hau aarĩ
Job3:1 Thuutha ũcio Ayubu akĩambĩrĩria kwaria
Job3:2 Ayubu oigire atĩrĩ
Job3:3 “Mũthenya ũrĩa ndaciarirwo ũroora; ũtukũ ũrĩa maitũ oohire nda ya kahĩĩ ũroaga gũkaaririkanwo!
Job3:4 Mũthenya ũcio ũrotuĩka nduma; Ngai aroriganĩrwo nĩguo
Job3:5 Ũrotuĩka mũthenya wa kĩeha na wa nduma ndumanu; ũrotũũra ũhumbĩrĩĩtwo nĩ matu; na ũroaga gũkoona riũa.
Job3:6 Ũtukũ ũcio maitũ oohire nda ũrohumbwo nĩ nduma; ũroaga gũtarwo matukũinĩ ma mwaka ũcio; na wage gũtaranĩrio na matukũ ma mweri ũcio.
Job3:7 Ũtukũ ũcio ũrothaata; na ndũkaanaugwo ngemi
Job3:8 Arĩa mooĩ kũruma mũthenya o arĩa mooĩ gũthaathaiya ndamaathia
Job3:9 Njata ya kĩrooko ĩroaga kũruta ũtheri; Ũroeterera ũtheri na ũwage; Ũroaga kũramũria maitho gũgĩkĩa.
Job3:10 Tondũ ndwahingire nda ya maitũ ndigaciarwo
Job3:11 “Ũi ĩiya wakwa-ĩ? Nĩ kĩĩ kĩagiririe ngue ngĩciarwo?Ndaagire gũkua ndaciarwo o ũguo nĩkĩ?
Job3:12 Maitũ aanjigĩrĩire cieroinĩ ciake nĩkĩ? Aanyongithirie nĩkĩ?
Job3:13 Naarĩ korwo nĩndakuire! Rĩu ingĩkomeete na ngahuurũka. Ingĩhuurũkĩĩte hooreire
Job3:14 twĩ hamwe na athamaki na anene arĩa meyakĩire rĩngĩ nyũmba cia ũnene gũũkũ thĩ
Job3:15 kana twĩ hamwe na atongoria arĩa maiyũrĩĩtie nyũmba ciao thahabu na betha.
Job3:16 Naarĩ korwo ndathikirwo ndĩ o kĩhuno
Job3:17 “Kwa arĩa akuũ-rĩ
Job3:18 Ningĩ mĩgwate ĩikaraga ĩhooreire
Job3:19 Kũu-rĩ
Job3:20 “ Mũndũ mũgiĩki aciaragwo wa kĩ? Mũndũ ũracakaya arekagwo atũũre nĩkĩ?
Job3:21 Ũcio-rĩ
Job3:22 Akenaga o akua na aathikwo.
Job3:23 Mũndũ ũtururĩĩte na akahingĩrĩrio nĩ Ngai na mbarĩ ciothe
Job3:24 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job3:25 Maũndũ marĩa maamakagia nĩ mo mangoreete; maũndũ ma kũndua nda nĩ mo ndũnganĩĩte namo.
Job3:26 Niĩ-rĩ
Job4:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Elifazi ũrĩa wa kuuma Temani agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job4:2 “Ayubu
Job4:3 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job4:4 Ciugo ciaku cianatiirĩrĩra andũ maagaagĩĩte
Job4:5 Rĩu mathĩĩna magũkorereire ũkaremwo nĩgũkirĩrĩria! Makũhuutĩĩtie
Job4:6 Gĩtĩĩo kĩrĩa ũheete Ngai-rĩ
Job4:7 Taikia maitho na thuutha; ũrĩ wona mũndũ mũthingu akorereirwo nĩ mũthiro
Job4:8 Ũrĩa ndanoona nĩ atĩ
Job4:9 Ngai amaniinaga na mĩhũũmũ yake
Job4:10 Andũ arĩa ooru mararamaga na magathunguruma o ta mĩrũũthi
Job4:11 Makuaga o ta mũrũũthi waga gĩa kũhĩta
Job4:12 “Nĩndaheirwo ũhoro na kĩheehũ; ndaheirwo ũhoro ũcio kahora ũguo atĩ ndaũnyiitire na thĩĩna mũno.
Job4:13 Ũhoro ũcio wathĩĩnirie ũkĩnjagithia toro
Job4:14 Ndanyiitirwo nĩ kĩmako na ngĩinaina
Job4:15 Karũhuuho gakĩhĩtũkĩra ũthiũinĩ wakwa
Job4:16 Ngĩona kĩndũ kĩrũũgamĩĩte hau mbere yakwa; ndarora
Job4:17 ‘Nĩkũrĩ mũndũ mũthingu mbere ya Ngai? Mũndũ no atuĩke mũtheru mbere ya ũrĩa wamũũmbire?
Job4:18 Angĩkorwo Ngai ndehokeete arĩa mamũtungatagĩra kũũrĩa igũrũ
Job4:19 angĩkĩĩhoka atĩa andũ moombĩĩtwo na ndooro
Job4:20 Andũ mathiaga magĩthiraga kuuma kĩrooko kinya o hwaĩinĩ
Job4:21 Mangĩtuunywo indo iria marĩ nacio
Job5:1 “Ayubu
Job5:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job5:3 Ndanoona irimũ ciĩkinyĩire wega
Job5:4 Ciana ciacio itingĩona ũhuurũko
Job5:5 Andũ arĩa ahũũtu na akoroku nĩ o marigagia na magetha ma irimũ
Job5:6 Nĩ gũkorwo mĩnyamaaro ndiumaga rũkũngũinĩ
Job5:7 No mũndũ aaciarirwo arĩ wa kuonaga mathĩĩna
Job5:8 “Korwo nĩ niĩ wee
Job5:9 Ngai eekaga maũndũ manene tũtangĩhungura
Job5:10 Nĩoiragia mbura gũũkũ thĩ
Job5:11 Nĩ we ũtũũgagĩria arĩa enyiihia
Job5:12 Nĩ we ũharaganagia mĩbango ya andũ arĩa aara
Job5:13 Agwatagia andũ arĩa aara na ungumania wao
Job5:14 Moonaga nduma riũa rĩkĩaraga
Job5:15 No Ngai nĩ we ũhonokagia athĩĩni kuuma gĩkuũinĩ; no we ũtharaga ngĩa kuuma mĩnyamaaroinĩ.
Job5:16 Agakĩhe athĩĩni kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro
Job5:17 “Kũrathimwo-rĩ
Job5:18 Angĩtiihia mũndũ
Job5:19 Nĩarĩgũteithagia hingo ciothe rĩrĩa ũrĩ mathĩĩnainĩ.
Job5:20 Hingo ya ng'aragu nĩarĩkũhonokagia ndũgakue
Job5:21 Nĩarĩgũkũũraga waigĩrĩrwo igeenyo
Job5:22 Ng'aragu na haaro cioka nĩũrĩcithekagĩrĩra
Job5:23 Mĩgũnda yaku ndĩrĩkoragwo na mahiga
Job5:24 Ũrĩikaraga hemainĩ yaku na thaayũ
Job5:25 Ũkaagĩa na ciana nyingĩ o ta mahuti ma gĩthaka.
Job5:26 O ta ũrĩa ngano ĩgethagwo yakũra
Job5:27 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job6:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia akiuga atĩrĩ:
Job6:2 “Ũi ĩiya wakwa-ĩ!Naarĩ korwo mathĩĩna maakwa no mathimwo! Naarĩ korwo kĩeha gĩakwa kĩaigĩrĩrwo ratiriinĩ!
Job6:3 No ikorwo iritũhĩĩte gũkĩra mũthanga ũrĩa ũrĩ iriainĩ; nĩkĩo o na ingĩkĩaria na marũrũ mũtikaagege.
Job6:4 Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩandathĩĩte na mĩguĩ
Job6:5 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job6:6 Irio itarĩ cumbĩ-rĩ
Job6:7 Ngoro yakwa ndĩngĩrirĩria irio ta icio; ingĩcirĩa nĩindwaragia.
Job6:8 “Ũi! Nũũ ũngĩhingĩria ihooya rĩakwa? Naarĩ korwo Ngai ahingĩria wendi wakwa!
Job6:9 Naarĩ korwo Ngai eetĩkĩra kũnjũraga! Naarĩ korwo no eetĩkĩre guoko gwake kũũniine!
Job6:10 Kĩu nĩkĩo kĩngĩtuĩka gĩkeno gĩakwa; o na ingĩigua ruwo rũigana atĩa
Job6:11 “Ndĩ na hinya ũrĩkũ nĩguo thiĩ na mbere gweterera? Kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa nĩ kĩrĩkũ
Job6:12 Kaĩ ndĩ hinya ta ihiga? Kaĩ mwĩrĩ wakwa ũrĩ wa cuuma?
Job6:13 Niĩ-rĩ
Job6:14 “Ndĩ thĩĩnainĩ ta ũyũ
Job6:15 No inyuĩ
Job6:16 Ciyũraga maaĩ moimĩĩte mbarabuinĩ magatuĩka munju moothe
Job6:17 no kwara
Job6:18 Agendi moorũũraga kuo magĩetha maaĩ
Job6:19 Agendi moimĩĩte Tema na Sheba meerekagĩra mĩkuruinĩ ĩyo
Job6:20 mehokeete kuona maaĩ
Job6:21 Mũhaana o ta njũũĩ icio harĩ niĩ; mũroona maũndũ marĩa mangorereire
Job6:22 No rĩĩrĩ
Job6:23 Ningĩ-rĩ
Job6:24 “Rĩu-rĩ
Job6:25 Ciugo cia kĩhooto irĩ hinya
Job6:26 Mũreciiria ndĩraaria matũhũũhũ; mũrakĩenda gũcookanĩria na mũndũ ũũmĩirwo tha nĩkĩ?
Job6:27 Inyuĩ-rĩ
Job6:28 “Rĩu-rĩ
Job6:29 Tigaai kũnduĩra na mahĩtia; mũrenda kũnjonorithia nĩkĩ?
Job6:30 Mũreciiria atĩ nĩndĩraheenania
Job7:1 “Atĩrĩ
Job7:2 Ahaana ta ngombo ĩracaria kĩĩgunyĩ
Job7:3 Niĩ ngaĩirwo mĩeri itarĩ kĩndũ gĩa gwĩteithia
Job7:4 Ndakoma nyonaga ũtukũ ũrĩ mũraihu
Job7:5 Mwĩrĩ wakwa ũhumbĩrĩĩtwo nĩ igunyũ na ngũũcĩ; ũiyũire ironda
Job7:6 Matukũ maakwa marahanyũka na ihenya mũno; marathira itarĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro o na kĩrĩkũ.
Job7:7 “Ngai
Job7:8 Rĩu nĩũranyona
Job7:9 (9-10) Ta ũrĩa itu rĩthengaga rĩkabũĩria
Job7:10 “Ingĩkĩhota atĩa gũtumia kanua gaakwa? Ngwaria ndĩ na ruwo ngoroinĩ
Job7:11 Kaĩ ngĩrĩ ndamaathia ya iriainĩ nĩ geetha uuge nangagĩrwo?
Job7:12 Thiaga ũrĩrĩ ngahuurũke
Job7:13 no wee ũkaamakia na irooto
Job7:14 Kaba gũitwo ngue
Job7:15 Nĩnogeetio nĩgũtũũra muoyo
Job7:16 Mũndũ nĩ kĩĩ
Job7:17 Ũmũng'eetagia rũũciinĩ o rũũciinĩ
Job7:18 Kaĩ ũtangĩrora na mwena ũngĩ haniini
Job7:19 Ingĩĩhia-rĩ
Job7:20 Kaĩ ũtarĩ hingo ũngĩnjohera wĩhia wakwa? Kaĩ ũtangĩndekera ihĩtia rĩrĩa njĩhĩĩtie?Njerekeire gũthiĩ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ
Job8:1 Naake Bilidadi wa kuuma Shuha agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job8:2 “Ũgũthiĩ na mbere itĩĩna rĩigana atĩa ũkĩaragia maũndũ ta maya? Mĩario yaku no ta kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ.
Job8:3 Kaĩ kũrĩ hingo Ngai oogomagia waragania? Mwene Hinya Wothe-rĩ
Job8:4 Ciana ciaku no mũhaka ikorwo ciĩhĩirie Ngai
Job8:5 Ũngĩcookerera Ngai
Job8:6 ũngĩkorwo ũrĩ mũthingu na ũtarĩ na ũcuuke
Job8:7 Ũtonga ũrĩa wothe ũteete ũgũtuĩka kĩndũ hatarĩ
Job8:8 “Ndagũthaitha taikia maitho na thuutha mahindainĩ ma tene
Job8:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job8:10 Reke andũ arĩa oogĩ a tene magũthoomithie; thikĩrĩria ũrĩa maroiga.
Job8:11 “Ithanjĩ-rĩ
Job8:12 Maaĩ mangĩhũa-rĩ
Job8:13 Andũ arĩa mataathĩkagĩra Ngai mahaana o ta marura macio; maaga gwathĩkĩra Ngai kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩao no gũthira gĩthiraga.
Job8:14 Maigaga mwĩhoko wao handũ hatarĩ harũmu
Job8:15 Mangĩĩtiirania naho
Job8:16 Andũ arĩa ooru maringũkaga o ta rĩa hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ;mahaana o ta ria rĩrĩa rĩhambaga mũgũnda wothe.
Job8:17 Mĩri yarĩo ĩtambagĩrĩra mahiga
Job8:18 No rĩĩrĩ
Job8:19 Kĩu nĩkĩo gĩkeno kĩa andũ arĩa ooru; andũ angĩ mookaga magaikara handũ haao.
Job8:20 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job8:21 Kwoguo nĩagaatũma ũtheke o rĩngĩ
Job8:22 Nĩagaaconorithia arĩa makũmeneete
Job9:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job9:2 “Nĩnjũũĩ ma atĩ ũguo nĩguo kũrĩ; no rĩĩrĩ
Job9:3 Mũndũ angĩenda gũciira na Ngai
Job9:4 Ngai nĩ mũũgĩ na arĩ hinya mũingĩ; kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩ wehandahanda aciire naake akĩhootana?
Job9:5 Athengagia irĩma iterĩgĩrĩire
Job9:6 Ainainagia thĩ ĩkoima harĩa ĩrĩ
Job9:7 Aathaga riũa
Job9:8 Nĩ we wiki watambũrũkirie matu mairũ
Job9:9 Nĩ we wathondekire njata iria ciĩtagwo
Job9:10 Eekaga maũndũ manene tũtangĩhungura
Job9:11 Ngai ahĩtũkagĩra hakuhĩ na niĩ
Job9:12 Ooyaga kĩrĩa gĩothe ekwenda
Job9:13 “Angĩraakara
Job9:14 “Ingĩkĩruta ciugo kũ
Job9:15 O na angĩkorwo itarĩ na ũcuuke-rĩ
Job9:16 O na ingĩĩka ũguo
Job9:17 Amu nĩatũmaga kĩhuuhũkanio kĩĩhũũre
Job9:18 Ndaheaga mweke wa kũhiihia; aiyũrĩĩtie ũtũũro wakwa na mathĩĩna.
Job9:19 Angĩkorwo nĩkũgerana hinya-rĩ
Job9:20 O na gũtuĩka ndirĩ na mahĩtia
Job9:21 (21-22) Niĩ ndirĩ na mahĩtia
Job9:22 Mũndũ ũtarĩ ũcuke angĩkua gĩkuũ kĩa na ihenya
Job9:23 Ngai nĩkũneana aneanĩĩte thĩ mookoinĩ ma andũ ooru.Nĩkũhinga ahingĩĩte maitho ma arĩa oothe matuithanagia ciira. Angĩkorwo ti Ngai wĩkĩĩte ũguo-rĩ
Job9:24 “Matukũ maakwa nĩmarathira na ihenya; marahanyũka
Job9:25 Marahĩtũka o ta gatarũ karĩa karĩ ihenya mũno
Job9:26 (27-28) Ingĩtheria gĩthiithi gĩakwa
Job9:27 Tondũ nĩnduĩtwo mwĩhia-rĩ
Job9:28 O na ingĩĩthamba na thabuuni ũrĩkũ
Job9:29 Ngai anjikĩĩtie irimainĩ rĩa gĩko
Job9:30 Ngai angĩrĩ mũndũ
Job9:31 Ĩndĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ wa kũrũũgama gatagatĩ gaakwa naake; gũtirĩ wa gũtũtuithania niĩ na Ngai.
Job9:32 Ngai
Job9:33 Ngwaria itarĩ na guoya
Job10:1 “Niĩ-rĩ
Job10:2 Ngai
Job10:3 Kaĩ wonaga arĩ wega kũhinyanĩrĩria? No ũmene kĩndũ ũthondekeete na mooko maaku
Job10:4 Maitho maaku-rĩ
Job10:5 Matukũ maaku-rĩ
Job10:6 Ũragĩthuuthuuria mahĩtia maakwa na ũkanjarĩria meehia nĩkĩ?
Job10:7 Wee nĩũũĩ atĩ ndihĩtĩĩtie
Job10:8 “Mooko maaku nĩ mo manyũmbire na magĩĩthondeka
Job10:9 Ririkana atĩ ũnyũmbĩĩte na rĩũmba; kaĩ ũgũgĩĩthĩa nduĩke rũkũngũ o rĩngĩ?
Job10:10 Nĩwaheire baaba hinya wa kũnjiara
Job10:11 Nĩwathondekire mwĩrĩ wakwa na mahĩndĩ na mĩkiha
Job10:12 Nĩũheete muoyo na ũkaanyonia ũtugi; nĩũmenyagĩrĩra na ũkanjiga muoyo.
Job10:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Job10:14 Wetereire wone kana nĩngwĩhia
Job10:15 Ingĩĩhĩa
Job10:16 Ingĩyambararia
Job10:17 Ũnjethagĩra aira angĩ mangararie; maraakara maaku harĩ niĩ nĩkuongerereka moongererekaga; ũndeehithagĩria mbũtũ na mbũtũ cia kũhũũra hingo ciothe.
Job10:18 “Warekire nyume nda ya maitũ nĩkĩ? Naarĩ korwo ndakuire itooneetwo nĩ riitho o na rĩmwe!
Job10:19 Naarĩ korwo ndakuire o ndoima nda ya maitũ
Job10:20 Githĩ matukũ maakwa ti manyiinyi? Tandigithĩria ngenakene haniini
Job10:21 itaanathiĩ kũrĩa itakoima
Job10:22 bũrũri wĩ nduma na thogothogo
Job11:1 Zofaru ũrĩa wa kuuma Naama agĩcookia atĩrĩ: Ndeto nyingĩ ũguo-rĩ
Job11:2 “Mũndũ wa kwaria maũndũ maingĩ ũguo-rĩ
Job11:3 Mũhũhũũtĩko waku-rĩ
Job11:4 Woiga atĩ ũrutani waku nĩ mũrũngarũ
Job11:5 Naarĩ korwo Ngai no aarie; naarĩ korwo no agũcookerie!
Job11:6 Naarĩ korwo no akũmenyithie maũndũ marĩa mahithe ma ũũgĩ! Ngai nĩoĩ maũndũ maingĩ.Kĩmenye atĩ ndakũherithĩĩtie ta ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire.
Job11:7 “No ũhote kũmenya maũndũ ma hitho marĩa mathiũrũrũkĩirie Mwene Hinya Wothe?
Job11:8 Maũndũ macio nĩ maraaya gũkĩra igũrũ
Job11:9 Ningĩ nĩ maraihu gũkĩra thĩ
Job11:10 Ngai angĩgũikia njeera
Job11:11 Ngai nĩoĩ andũ arĩa a tũhũ; angĩkĩona mahĩtia no aage kũrũmbũiya?
Job11:12 Angĩkorwo ndigiri ya gĩthaka no ĩciare mũndũ-rĩ
Job11:13 “Ayubu
Job11:14 Angĩkorwo wĩ na mahĩtia
Job11:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo no ũtiire ũthiũ waku ũtarĩ na thoni. Ĩĩ
Job11:16 No ũriganĩrwo nĩ mĩtangĩko yaku
Job11:17 Ũtũũro waku ũgĩthere gũkĩra thaa thita cia mũthenya
Job11:18 Nawe ũtũũre wĩiguĩte na ũiyũirwo nĩ kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro
Job11:19 No ũkomage na nduone wa gũgũthĩĩnia
Job11:20 No rĩĩrĩ
Job12:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ:
Job12:2 “Kaĩ mũrĩ imenyi-ĩ! Mwakua-rĩ
Job12:3 No rĩĩrĩ
Job12:4 Araata aakwa rĩu nĩgũũthekerera marathekerera
Job12:5 Matirĩ na mathĩĩna
Job12:6 No rĩĩrĩ
Job12:7 “Rĩu-rĩ
Job12:8 Arĩria mĩtĩ na nĩgũgũthoomithia; ningĩ arĩria thamaki na nĩigũgũtaarĩria.
Job12:9 Ciothe nĩciũĩ atĩ nĩ guoko kwa MWATHANI gwaciũmbire.
Job12:10 Kĩndũ o gĩothe kĩrĩ muoyo
Job12:11 Matũ makenagio nĩkũigua ciugo
Job12:12 Andũ akũrũ makoragwo na ũũgĩ; arĩa maikĩĩtie matukũ nĩmooĩ maingĩ.
Job12:13 “Ngai nĩ mwene ũũgĩ na hinya; nĩoĩ gũtaarana
Job12:14 Ngai angĩmomora-rĩ
Job12:15 Angĩgirĩrĩria mbura
Job12:16 Nĩarĩ hinya o na ũũgĩ; mũhĩtithio na mũhĩtithania
Job12:17 Aconoraga anene
Job12:18 Arutaga athamaki itĩinĩ ciao
Job12:19 Aconoraga athĩnjĩri Ngai
Job12:20 Akiragia arĩa mehokeetwo nĩ andũ
Job12:21 Aagithagia aathani gĩtĩĩo
Job12:22 Athikũragia maũndũ marĩa mathike
Job12:23 Atũũgagĩria ndũũrĩrĩ na agacihang'urania; atũmaga itheereme o na agaciharagania.
Job12:24 Atuaga aathani irimũ
Job12:25 Magagĩthiĩ makĩhambahambataga ndumainĩ
Job13:1 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job13:2 Marĩa mũũĩ o na niĩ nĩndĩmooĩ; ndĩ mũũgĩ o ta inyuĩ.
Job13:3 No ngwenda kwaria na Mwene Hinya Wothe; ngwenda gũciira na Ngai.
Job13:4 Inyuĩ-rĩ
Job13:5 Naarĩ korwo mwakira; no mwoneke ta mũrĩ oogĩ!
Job13:6 “Rĩu tathikĩrĩriai ihooto ciakwa; tathikĩrĩriai mateta maakwa.
Job13:7 Mũraarĩria Ngai mũgĩtũmagĩra maheeni? Mũramwarĩria mũgĩtũmagĩra wara?
Job13:8 Nĩkũgeria mũrageria kũmũgitĩra? Nĩmũkũmũciirĩrĩra?
Job13:9 No muone wega Ngai angĩmũthuuthuuria? Ningĩ-rĩ
Job13:10 O na mũngĩgĩa na mũthuutũkanio na hitho-rĩ
Job13:11 Githĩ riiri wake to ũmwĩkĩre guoya? Githĩ gĩtĩĩo gĩake to kĩmũtue nda?
Job13:12 Thimo cianyu nĩ cia tũhũ o ta mũhu; ihooto cianyu nĩ cia tũhũ o ta ndaka.
Job13:13 Kiraai mũreke njarie; ngwaria njĩkwo ũrĩa ngwĩkwo.
Job13:14 “Ngũkĩaga gũikia muoyo wakwa ũgwatiinĩ nĩkĩ?
Job13:15 O na Ngai angĩnjũraga-rĩ
Job13:16 No gũkorwo gwĩtetera nokuo kũngĩĩhonokia
Job13:17 “Tagĩthikĩrĩriei wega ciugo ciakwa; tategaai matũ mũigue mĩario yakwa.
Job13:18 Rĩu nĩngwĩciirĩrĩra
Job13:19 “Nũũ ũngĩrũũgamana na niĩ? No ngĩkire njeterere kũũragwo.
Job13:20 Ngai
Job13:21 Namo nĩ maya: ũtige kũũnyamaaria
Job13:22 “Weka ũguo
Job13:23 Njĩkĩĩte mahĩtia marĩkũ? Meehia maakwa-rĩ
Job13:24 “Ũraĩtheema nĩkĩ? Ũranyona ta ndĩ thũ yaku nĩkĩ?
Job13:25 Ũrahahũra nĩkĩ? Niĩ ndĩ o ihuti; ũrahanyũkania na niĩ o ta maragara.
Job13:26 Ũrathitangĩra maũndũ mooru mũno
Job13:27 Ũnjoheete magũrũ na nyororo
Job13:28 Ndĩragĩthira o ta kĩndũ kĩbuthu
Job14:1 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũciaragwo nĩ mũtumia
Job14:2 Akũraga na akahooha o ta ihũa
Job14:3 Wee Ngai-rĩ
Job14:4 Kũrĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũruta kĩndũ gĩtheru kuuma harĩ kĩndũ gĩtarĩ gĩtheru? Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe ũngĩhota!
Job14:5 Matukũ ma mũndũ nĩmatare; nĩũũĩ mũigana wa mĩaka yake; ũmwĩkĩrĩire mĩhaka atangĩhota gũkĩra.
Job14:6 Roria maitho na kũngĩ ũtige kũmuona; reke akenere matukũ maake
Job14:7 “Mũtĩ watemwo
Job14:8 O na mĩri yaguo ĩngĩhoohera tĩĩriinĩ
Job14:9 wona maaĩ ũthundũkaga na ũkoimia honge o ta mũtĩ mwĩthĩ.
Job14:10 Ĩndĩ mũndũ akuaga
Job14:11 “Ta ũrĩa maaĩ ma iria mahũaga
Job14:12 noguo mũndũ akuaga na ndacookaga muoyo; kinya rĩrĩa igũrũ rĩgaathenga
Job14:13 “Naarĩ korwo no ũũhithe kwa arĩa akuũ nginya maraakara maaku mathire
Job14:14 Mũndũ angĩkua-rĩ
Job14:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo no wĩtane na niĩ njĩtĩke; nawe ũgĩkenio nĩ niĩ
Job14:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo no ũkĩbaarage mĩthiĩre yakwa yothe
Job14:17 No ũnjohere meehia maakwa na ũriganĩrwo nĩmo
Job14:18 “Nĩkũrĩ mahinda makinyaga irĩma ikainaina na ikaharagana
Job14:19 maaĩ makahũũra mahiga ma rũũĩ magathera
Job14:20 Ũtooragia mũndũ
Job14:21 Ciana ciake itũũgĩragio
Job14:22 Aiguaga ruwo o rwa mwĩrĩ wake
Job15:1 Thuutha ũcio Elifazi ũrĩa wa kuuma Temani agĩcookia o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Job15:2 “Ayubu
Job15:3 Mũndũ mũũgĩ-rĩ
Job15:4 No rĩĩrĩ
Job15:5 Waganu waku nĩguo ũragũtongoria; ũgagĩtũmĩra ciugo cia wara.
Job15:6 Kwoguo kanua gaaku nĩ ko karakuohithia
Job15:7 “Kaĩ arĩ we mũndũ wa mbere gũciarwo? Kaĩ waciarirwo mbere ya ithũngũri?
Job15:8 Kaĩ waiguire kĩama kĩa Ngai gĩgĩciira? Ũreciiria atĩ we no we mũũgĩ?
Job15:9 Nĩ kĩĩ ũũĩ ithũĩ tũtooĩ? Nĩ kĩĩ ũiguĩte
Job15:10 Gatagatĩinĩ gaitũ harĩ na andũ akũrũ na marĩ na mbuĩ
Job15:11 Kaĩ ũtaanaiganĩra Ngai akũũmĩrĩria
Job15:12 Ngoro yaku ĩratuumatuuma nĩkĩ? Ũratũbucabucĩria maitho macio maaku nĩkĩ?
Job15:13 Ũraraakarĩra Ngai nĩkĩ? Ũrareka mĩgambo ta ĩyo yume kanua gaaku nĩkĩ?
Job15:14 Mũndũ kaĩ akĩrĩ kĩĩ
Job15:15 Ngai ndehokaga o na araika aake
Job15:16 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnyuaga waganu o ta ũrĩa anyuaga maaĩ-rĩ
Job15:17 “Tathikĩrĩria
Job15:18 Nĩngũkuumbũrĩra maũndũ marĩa andũ oogĩ maanoiga
Job15:19 No o oiki maatũũraga bũrũriinĩ wao; gũtiarĩ mũrũũrĩrĩ wa gũtũma matigane na Ngai.
Job15:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhinyagĩrĩria arĩa angĩ atangĩkaga matukũ maake moothe.
Job15:21 Mĩgambo ya kũmwĩkĩra guoya nĩ yo aiguaga matũinĩ maake
Job15:22 We ndeetĩkagia atĩ nĩakoima ndumainĩ; oonaga eetereirwo no gĩkuũ.
Job15:23 Kĩimba gĩake gĩgaatuĩka irio cia nderi; nĩoĩ atĩ marigĩrĩrio maake no kwanangwo.
Job15:24 Kĩeha na kĩmako imwĩkagĩra guoya; imũũkagĩrĩra o ta mũthamaki wĩhaarĩirie gũthiĩ mbaarainĩ.
Job15:25 Nĩ tondũ nĩakũnjĩire Ngai ngundi
Job15:26 (26-27) Nĩ mwĩtĩi na nĩ mũremi; anyiitaga ngo yake oomĩĩtie kĩongo
Job15:27 Mũndũ ũcio atũũraga matũũrainĩ matiganĩirio
Job15:28 Ndangĩtũũra e mũtongu; ũtonga wake ndũngĩtheerema
Job15:29 na ndangĩhota gũthengera gĩkuũ. Ahaana o ta mũtĩ ũrĩa honge ciaguo icinĩĩtwo nĩ mwaki na mahũa maguo moombũrĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho.
Job15:30 Tanĩagĩtige kwĩheenia akĩiga mwĩhoko wake ũũruinĩ
Job15:31 Akaahooha o ta mũtĩ hĩndĩ yake ĩtarĩ nginyu
Job15:32 Akaahaana o ta mũthabibũ ũrĩa thabibũ ciaguo ciitĩkaga itaaneerua
Job15:33 Imaramari itikaagĩa na mbeũ
Job15:34 Acio nĩ o andũ arĩa mathugundaga mathĩĩna
Job16:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job16:2 “Nĩnjiguĩte ciugo nyingĩ ta icio. Kaĩ inyuothe mũrĩ oomanĩrĩria a kũiguĩrwo tha-ĩ!
Job16:3 Kaĩ ciugo cia kũhũhũũtĩka itegũthira? Nĩ kĩĩ kĩramũhatĩrĩria mũthiĩ o na mbere kwaria?
Job16:4 Mũngĩrĩ handũ haakwa-rĩ
Job16:5 No ndĩmũũmĩrĩrie na mataaro
Job16:6 “O na ndaria
Job16:7 Ngai ahũũrĩĩte kĩhinyio; nĩanangĩĩte mũciĩ wakwa wothe.
Job16:8 Ũrĩa eekĩĩte mwĩrĩ ũyũ wakwa
Job16:9 “Ngai andambururangĩĩte na maraakara; angũũrĩire maitho e na rũthũũro.
Job16:10 Andũ nĩmaanyararĩĩte; moonganĩĩte hamwe manjũkĩrĩre; marahũũra thĩa matarĩ na tha.
Job16:11 Ngai anenganĩrĩĩte kũrĩ andũ ooru; anjikĩĩtie mookoinĩ ma andũ aaganu.
Job16:12 Ndatũũraga hooreire
Job16:13 aranjikĩria mĩguĩ na mĩena yothe; atheeceete akandiihia; ndaranjiguĩra tha o na haniini.
Job16:14 Ngai atheecangĩĩte maita maingĩ; ahithũkĩire o ta mũũthigari ũrĩ na rũthũũro rũingĩ.
Job16:15 “Ndĩracakaya ndĩhumbĩĩte nguo ya ikũnia
Job16:16 Ndĩrĩĩte nginya maitho magatuunĩha; ndĩroona o marundurundu.
Job16:17 No niĩ ndirĩ ũũru njĩkĩĩte
Job16:18 “We thĩ
Job16:19 Kũũria igũrũ kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩ mwena wakwa ũranjarĩrĩria.
Job16:20 Araata aakwa marathekerera
Job16:21 Ũcio ũrĩ mwena wakwa-rĩ
Job16:22 Mĩaka yakwa nĩgũthira ĩrathira
Job17:1 “Ũtũũro wakwa werekeire gũkinya mũthia; ndirahota kũhiihia; no mbĩĩrĩra ĩnjetereire.
Job17:2 Thiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ andũ maramiinja mĩnyĩrĩ; maitho maakwa maroona o andũ maratũma ndaakare.
Job17:3 “Ngai
Job17:4 Tondũ nĩũhingĩĩte meciiria maao matikaagĩe na ũmenyo
Job17:5 Arĩa makunyanagĩra araata aao nĩ geetha megune
Job17:6 “Ngai anduĩte kĩndũ gĩa gũthekererwo; andũ no mata maranduĩra ũthiũ.
Job17:7 Ndĩ na ruwo rũingĩ ũguo atĩ
Job17:8 Andũ arĩa metuaga athingu maroona ũguo makamaka; maranjũkĩrĩra ta mũndũ ũtatĩĩĩte Ngai.
Job17:9 No rĩĩrĩ
Job17:10 No hatirĩ o na ũmwe wa araata aakwa oonekaga arĩ mũũgĩ.
Job17:11 Matukũ maakwa nĩmathiru; mĩbango yakwa nĩharaganĩĩte; mwĩhoko wakwa nĩ mũthiru.
Job17:12 No araata aakwa maroiga ũtukũ nĩ mũthenya; maroiga nĩgũkĩa kũrakĩa
Job17:13 Mwĩhoko wakwa no kwa arĩa akuũ
Job17:14 Ngeera mbĩĩrĩra atĩrĩ
Job17:15 Kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa gĩkĩrĩ ha? Nũũ ũgũkĩona kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro gĩakwa?
Job17:16 Kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩu no gĩgĩthiĩ na niĩ kwa arĩa akuũ? No gĩgĩikũrũkanie na niĩ rũkũngũinĩ?”
Job18:1 Naake Bilidadi ũrĩa wa kuuma Shuha agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job18:2 “Ayubu
Job18:3 Ũratuona tũrĩ ta ng'ombe nĩkĩ? Ũratuona tũrĩ akĩĩgu nĩkĩ?
Job18:4 Nĩkwĩyũnũha ũreyũnũha waraakara. Thĩ-rĩ
Job18:5 “Ũtheri wa mũndũ mwaganu no ũkũhorio; rũrĩrĩmbĩ rwaguo rũtigaacooka gwakana rĩngĩ.
Job18:6 Ũtheri wa nyũmba yake ũtuĩkĩĩte o nduma
Job18:7 Arathiaga ekinyĩire
Job18:8 Etwarĩrĩire mũtegoinĩ magũrũ maake magakĩgwatio; agereire o marimainĩ.
Job18:9 Mũtego ũmũnyiitĩĩte o thũngw'ainĩ ũgategũka na ndangĩĩteithũra.
Job18:10 Ahithĩirwo mũtego thĩ
Job18:11 Kĩmako kĩmuumaga na mĩena yothe
Job18:12 Aratũũraga ta gĩtonga
Job18:13 Mwĩrĩ wake ũiyũirwo nĩ mũrimũ wa kũmakania
Job18:14 Arutũrũrĩĩtwo nyũmba ĩrĩa aratũire egangarĩĩte
Job18:15 Nyũmba yake rĩu ĩratũũrwo nĩ andũ angĩ
Job18:16 Na thĩ mĩri yake nĩkũũma irooma
Job18:17 Ngumo yake nĩgũthira ĩrathira gũũkũ thĩ; gũtirĩ mũndũ ũramũririkana.
Job18:18 Arutĩĩtwo ũtheriinĩ
Job18:19 Ndarĩ na ciana kana njiarwa mũhĩrĩgainĩ wao; ndarĩ na wa gũcooka gũtũũra kũu aratũũraga.
Job18:20 Kuuma irathĩro kinya ithũĩro
Job18:21 Macio nĩ mo marigĩrĩrio ma andũ arĩa ooru; macio nĩ mo marigĩrĩrio ma arĩa matarũmbũyanagia na Ngai.”
Job19:1 Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job19:2 “Mũgũtũũra mũũnyamaaragia nginya rĩ? Mũgũtũũra mũũhũũraga na ciugo nginya rĩ?
Job19:3 Nĩ maita maingĩ mũkoreetwo mũkĩnjinũra; kaĩ mũtangĩconoka nĩ ũguo mũũnumĩĩte?
Job19:4 O na akorwo nĩnjĩhĩĩtie-rĩ
Job19:5 Mũreyona ta mũrĩ eega kũngĩra
Job19:6 Kaĩ mũtaroona atĩ nĩ Ngai ũrahinyĩrĩria
Job19:7 Ndateta nĩ ũndũ wa ũguo ahinyĩrĩirie-rĩ
Job19:8 Ngai ahingĩĩte njĩra yakwa ũguo atĩ ndingĩhota kũhungura. Nĩekĩrĩĩte njĩra yakwa nduma.
Job19:9 Nĩandunyĩĩte ũtonga wakwa wothe
Job19:10 Arahũũra na mĩena yothe
Job19:11 Anjitũrũrĩire maraakara maake
Job19:12 Andũmĩire thigari citharĩkĩre
Job19:13 “Nĩatũmĩĩte andũ a mũciĩ wakwa mandiganĩrie
Job19:14 Andũ aitũ na araata aakwa nĩmandiganĩirie.
Job19:15 Ageni arĩa marookaga gwakwa nĩmariganĩirwo nĩ niĩ; ndungata ciakwa cia andũ a nja iranyona ta mũrũũrĩrĩ; nduĩkĩĩte ta mũndũ itarĩ ciona.
Job19:16 Ingĩĩta ĩmwe ya ndungata ciakwa
Job19:17 Mũtumia wakwa ndaroomĩrĩria mĩheehũ yakwa
Job19:18 O na ciana nĩcimeneete; ndarũũgama no gũũthekerera irathekerera.
Job19:19 Araata aakwa oothe arĩa a bata maranyona magethithimũkwo; andũ arĩa ndĩrendeete mũno nĩmangarũrũkĩĩte.
Job19:20 Rĩu ndigĩĩtwo o mahĩndĩ matheri; no gũkua itakuĩte.
Job19:21 “Araata aakwa
Job19:22 Mũragĩthiĩ o na mbere kũũnyariira ta ũguo Ngai areeka nĩkĩ? Kaĩ mũtangĩiganwo nĩ ũguo mũũnyariirĩĩte?
Job19:23 “No nyende ciugo ciakwa ciandĩkwo! No nyende ciandĩkwo ibukuinĩ iririkanagwo!
Job19:24 No nyende ikarwo mahigainĩ igũrũ na karamu ga cuuma
Job19:25 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ Mũngũũri arĩ muoyo
Job19:26 O na ikonde ciakwa ciarĩĩo nĩ mũrimũ ũguo
Job19:27 Ngaamuona na maitho maakwa kĩũmbe; ngaamuona arĩ mwena wakwa.No rĩĩrĩ
Job19:28 Araata aakwa
Job19:29 No rĩĩrĩ
Job20:1 Zofaru ũrĩa wa kuuma Naamathu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job20:2 “Ayubu nĩũrathĩĩnia meciiria maakwa
Job20:3 Nĩndaigua irumi ciaku no nĩngũmenya ũrĩa ngũcookia.
Job20:4 “Kaĩ ũtooĩ atĩ kuuma o tene
Job20:5 kũrũũhia kwa mũndũ mwaganu nĩ kũniini na ũkeni wa mũndũ mũũru no wa ihinda?
Job20:6 O na angĩĩtũũgĩria
Job20:7 athiraga o ta mai maake. Arĩa maramuonaga mooranagia atĩrĩ
Job20:8 Airagĩria o ta kĩrooto
Job20:9 Andũ arĩa maramuonaga
Job20:10 Ciana ciake nĩcio ituĩkaga cia kũrĩha athĩĩni arĩa aanatuunya indo.
Job20:11 Mwĩrĩ wake ũrĩa wakoragwo wĩ na hinya na ũrugarĩ
Job20:12 “Ũũru ũkoragwo ũrĩ mũrĩo kanuainĩ gaake ũguo atĩ
Job20:13 ndangĩũrekereria ũthiĩ
Job20:14 No rĩĩrĩ
Job20:15 Agagĩtahĩka ũtonga ũrĩa aanameria; Ngai agakĩũrutũrũra uume nda yake.
Job20:16 Ameragia thumu wa nyoka; nyoka ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo gĩĩko ĩmũrũmaga ĩkamũũraga.
Job20:17 Ndatũũraga kinya akoona iraathimo cia Ngai; ndakoona ũũkĩ na iria irĩa Ngai aheaga andũ aake na ũingĩ.
Job20:18 Ndakaarĩa kĩrĩa anogeire
Job20:19 amu nĩahinyagĩrĩria athĩĩni na akamatiganĩria
Job20:20 “Tondũ ũhahanyi wake ndũrĩ gĩthimi
Job20:21 Tondũ ndarĩ kĩndũ atigagia aarĩa
Job20:22 Oomokagĩrwo nĩ mathĩĩna o rĩĩrĩ egangarĩĩte; akoragĩrĩrwo nĩ nditi nene cia mĩnyamaaro akaharagana.
Job20:23 Nĩarĩe o kĩrĩa gĩothe ekwenda! Ngai arĩmũherithia arĩ na maraakara mekũrĩrĩmbũka mwaki.
Job20:24 Akoorĩra rũhiũ rwa njora rwa cuuma
Job20:25 ũtũrĩkanie mwĩrĩ wake
Job20:26 Kĩrĩa gĩothe eigĩire mũthiithũ nĩkĩrĩanangwo; arĩcinwo nĩ mwaki ũtaakĩĩtio nĩ mũndũ
Job20:27 Igũrũ nĩrĩrĩmenyithania waganu wa mũndũ ũcio
Job20:28 Kĩrĩa gĩothe arĩ nakĩo kĩrĩkuuo gĩthiio nakĩo; kĩrĩkururio gĩthiio nakĩo rĩrĩa Ngai arĩraakara.
Job20:29 Kĩu nĩkĩo kĩheeo kĩrĩa mũndũ mwaganu arĩheeo nĩ Ngai; rĩu nĩrĩo igai rĩrĩa aathĩrĩirwo nĩ Ngai.”
Job21:1 Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job21:2 “Tategaai matũ mũigue ũrĩa nguuga! Ũguo noguo ngũmũũria mũnyũmĩrĩrie naguo.
Job21:3 Njĩtĩkĩriai njarie; ndarĩĩkia kwaria no mũgĩcooke kũnyũrũria.
Job21:4 “Mũreciiria nĩ mũndũ ndĩratetia? Ngũgĩkirĩrĩa nĩkĩ?
Job21:5 Tandoraai na nĩmũkũgega
Job21:6 Ndĩreciiria ũndũ ũyũ ngethithimũkwo
Job21:7 “Andũ arĩa aaganu-rĩ
Job21:8 Ciana ciao ikũraga magĩcionaga
Job21:9 Mĩciĩ yao ĩikaraga na thaayũ; Ngai ndamĩreehithagĩria ũũru o wothe.
Job21:10 Ng'ombe ciao igwatagia igaciara
Job21:11 Moimagaragia ciana ciao o ta rũũru
Job21:12 Ithiaga ikĩinagĩrwo na tamburini na ngita
Job21:13 Matũũraga o magaacĩire
Job21:14 “Meeraga Ngai atigane nao; matiendaga kũrũmĩrĩra njĩra ciake.
Job21:15 Mooragia atĩrĩ
Job21:16 Moigaga atĩ nĩ o eene mecarĩirie ũtonga wao; niĩ ndingĩnyiitanĩra na meciiria macio maao.
Job21:17 “Nĩ maita maigana taawa wa andũ arĩa aaganu wanahorio?Nĩ maita maigana maanakorererwo nĩ mũtino?Nĩ maita maigana Ngai aanamaherithia araakaire?
Job21:18 Nĩ maita maigana aanamoombũra ta uumbuthĩ? Nĩ maita maigana maanahurutwo ta maragara moombũrĩĩtwo nĩ kĩhuuhũkanio?
Job21:19 “Muugaga atĩ Ngai aherithagia mwana nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wa mũciari.Aaca! Ngai nĩaherithie mũndũ mwaganu nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wake mwene; nĩonanie atĩ areeka ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhia. nĩarekwo aigue ũritũ wa waganu wake arĩ we mwene;
Job21:20 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩarekwo akuue ihera rĩake mwene
Job21:21 Ũtũũro wake wathira-rĩ
Job21:22 Nũũ ũngĩtaara Ngai
Job21:23 (23-24) “Andũ amwe matũũraga na ũgima wa mwĩrĩ o nginya rĩrĩa magaakua; makuaga makeneete na mahooreire
Job21:24 Angĩ nao makuaga marĩ na ruwo ngoro
Job21:25 No oothe makuaga magathikwo
Job21:26 “Nĩndĩramenya ũrĩa mũreciiria
Job21:27 Mũrooria atĩrĩ
Job21:28 Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwatereeta na agendi? Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwaigua ndeto iria mainũkaga nacio?
Job21:29 Andũ arĩa ooru no o matigaraga mũthenya wa ũgwati; no o mahonokagio mũthenya wa maraakara.
Job21:30 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa gũthitanga mũndũ mwaganu
Job21:31 Rĩĩrĩ akuuĩĩtwo agĩtwarwo irimainĩ
Job21:32 Andũ aingĩ moimanaga mũtongoro magĩthiĩ mathiko maake; o na tĩĩri nĩũhumbagĩra kĩimba gĩake wega.
Job21:33 Mũrakĩĩnyũmĩrĩria na maũndũ ma tũhũ nĩkĩ? Macookio maanyu moothe no maheeni matheri!”
Job22:1 Elifazi ũrĩa wa kuuma Temani agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job22:2 “Mũndũ nĩ wa bata ũrĩkũ harĩ Ngai
Job22:3 Gũkorwo ũrĩ mũthingu-rĩ
Job22:4 Ngai ndarakũherithia na ndaragũtuĩra
Job22:5 Githĩ ti ũndũ wa waganu waku mũnene
Job22:6 Nĩwarĩhirie andũ a mũciĩ wanyu thiirĩ mataarĩ naguo
Job22:7 Nĩwaimire arĩa maanogeete maaĩ ma kũnyua
Job22:8 Nĩwatũmĩrire ũhoti waku na gĩtĩĩo kĩrĩa ũheetwo
Job22:9 Waingatire atumia a ndigwa mooko matheri
Job22:10 Nĩkĩo ũthiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ mĩtego
Job22:11 Nokĩo ũraremwo nĩkuona nĩ ũrĩa ũtumanĩirwo; mũiyũro wa maaĩ ũrakũiga na guoya.
Job22:12 Githĩ Ngai ndatũũraga igũrũ rĩa igũrũ
Job22:13 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Job22:14 Wĩciiragia atĩ nĩagiragĩrĩrio kuona nĩ matu matumanu
Job22:15 Ũgũgĩthiĩ o na mbere kũrũmĩrĩra njĩra o ĩrĩa andũ aaganu matũire mageragĩra?
Job22:16 Maatwarirwo nĩ kĩguũ o na ihinda rĩao rĩtakinyĩĩte.
Job22:17 Acio nĩ arĩa maakararirie Ngai
Job22:18 Ĩndĩ nĩ Ngai watũmire matonge; niĩ ndingĩnyiitanĩra na meciiria ma andũ acio aaganu.
Job22:19 Andũ arĩa athingu moonaga andũ aaganu makĩherithio magakena; andũ arĩa matarĩ ũcuuke mamathekagĩrĩra
Job22:20 makoiga atĩrĩ
Job22:21 “Ayubu
Job22:22 Amũkĩra mataaro marĩa arakũhe
Job22:23 Cookerera Mwene Hinya Wothe wĩnyiihĩĩtie
Job22:24 Ikia thahabu yaku kũraaya nawe; te thahabu yaku ĩrĩa thaka mũno o ta ũrĩa ũngĩte ngomongo.
Job22:25 Reke Mwene Hinya Wothe atuĩke thahabu yaku
Job22:26 Weka ũguo-rĩ
Job22:27 Wamũhooya
Job22:28 Nĩũrĩgaacagĩra maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa ũrĩĩkaga
Job22:29 Ngai nĩanyiihagia arĩa etĩĩi
Job22:30 Nĩegũkũhonokia akorwo ũtarĩ na mahĩtia
Job23:1 Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job23:2 “O na ũũmũũthĩ ngũthiĩ o na mbere gũteta ndĩ na marũrũ
Job23:3 Korwo nĩnjũũĩ kũrĩa ingĩmuona no thiĩ kuo.
Job23:4 No ndĩmũmenyithie mateta maakwa
Job23:5 No nyende kũmenya ũrĩa angĩnjĩĩra
Job23:6 Ngai no ahũthĩre ũhoti wake mũnene kũũnjũkĩrĩra? Aaca
Job23:7 Tondũ ndirĩ ũcuuke
Job23:8 “Ndĩmũcarĩĩtie mwena wa irathĩro
Job23:9 Akoreetwo akĩruta wĩra mwena wa na rũgongo na wa na kĩanda
Job23:10 No rĩĩrĩ
Job23:11 Ndiumaga njĩrainĩ ciake
Job23:12 Ndirĩ ndatiganĩria maathani maake; ndũire hingagia wendi wake.
Job23:13 Ngai ndagarũrũkaga
Job23:14 Ũrĩa ekwenda gwĩka na niĩ
Job23:15 Nĩkĩo nyinainaga ndĩ harĩ we
Job23:16 Ngai nĩagithĩĩtie ngoro yakwa hinya; Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩanjĩguithĩĩtie guoya.
Job23:17 Ti nduma ĩmakĩĩtie
Job24:1 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job24:2 Andũ ooru mamunyaga ngiri cia mĩhaka
Job24:3 Matuunyaga ciana cia ngoriai ndigiri
Job24:4 Maagithagia athĩĩni ihooto
Job24:5 Athĩĩni acio magagĩcangacanga werũinĩ
Job24:6 Meyũnganagĩria gĩa kũrĩa mĩgũndainĩ ĩtarĩ yao
Job24:7 Ũtukũ maraaraga matehumbĩire; matikoragwo na gĩa kwĩrigĩrĩria heho.
Job24:8 Moiragĩrwo nĩ mbura irĩmainĩ magaconjora
Job24:9 “Andũ acio ooru matuunyaga atumia a ndigwa ciana iria marongithia
Job24:10 Athĩĩni acio magakĩũrũũraga matarĩ na nguo cia kwĩhumba
Job24:11 Mamahihagĩra ndamaiyũ ikoima maguta
Job24:12 Itũũrainĩ andũ arĩa marakua no gũcaaya maracaaya
Job24:13 “Kũrĩ andũ mooragĩra ũtheri
Job24:14 Mũũragani ookagĩra rũũciinĩ tene
Job24:15 Gĩtharia gĩetagĩrĩra kũgĩe mairia gĩkiugaga na ngoro atĩrĩ
Job24:16 Aici matharĩkagĩra nyũmba ũtukũ
Job24:17 Nduma ndumanu nĩ yo rũũciinĩ rwao oothe
Job24:18 “Andũ ooru makuuagwo nĩ maaĩ o ta mahuti; mĩgũnda yao ĩkoragwo ĩrĩ mĩrume nĩ Ngai;na gũtirĩ mũndũ ũthiaga kũruta wĩra mĩgũndainĩ yao ya mĩthabibũ.
Job24:19 O ta ũrĩa riũa na ũrugarĩ iringũraga mbarabu ĩgathira
Job24:20 Maanyina mariganagĩrwo nĩ o
Job24:21 “Andũ eehia mahinyagĩrĩria atumia thaata
Job24:22 Ngai nĩanangaga andũ arĩa marĩ hinya na hinya wake; ooya guoko na igũrũ
Job24:23 Ngai no areke matũũre magaacĩire
Job24:24 Matũũgagĩrio kwa ihinda
Job24:25 Angĩkorwo ũguo tiguo kũrĩ
Job25:1 Bilidadi ũrĩa wa kuuma Shuha agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job25:2 “Ngai arĩ hinya
Job25:3 Thigari ciake no itarĩke? Kũrĩ handũ atamũrĩkaga na ũtheri wake?
Job25:4 Mũndũ angĩkĩhota atĩa gũtuĩka mũthingu mbere ya Ngai? Mũndũ ũciarĩĩtwo nĩ mũtumia no aage kũhĩtia?
Job25:5 Angĩkorwo maithoinĩ ma Ngai mweri ndũrĩ ũtheri wa kũigana
Job25:6 mũndũ
Job26:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job26:2 “Kaĩ nĩũndeithĩĩtie-ĩ
Job26:3 Nĩũheete ũtaaro mwega na ũkanjũhĩgia
Job26:4 Nũũ wera ũguo wothe? Nũũ ũkũhotithĩĩtie kwaria ũguo?”
Job26:5 Naake Bilidadi agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job26:6 Ngai nĩonaga kwa arĩa akuũ; maithoinĩ maake gũtirĩ kĩndũ gĩkũhumbĩrĩĩte.
Job26:7 Nĩ we watambũrũkirie igũrũ
Job26:8 Nĩ we ũiyũragia matu maaĩ na maritũha akamanyiitĩrĩra matigaatathũke.
Job26:9 Nĩ we ũhumbagĩra mweri
Job26:10 Eekĩrire rũkiriri maaĩinĩ
Job26:11 Akayagĩrĩria itugĩ iria itiirĩrĩire igũrũ
Job26:12 Nĩ we watooririe iria na hinya wake. na agĩtooria ndamaathia ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Rahabu na ũũgĩ wake.
Job26:13 Mĩhũũmũ yake nĩ yo yatũire igũrũ gũthaka
Job26:14 Maũndũ macio moothe no mũhiũkio wa ũhoti wake; ũrĩa wothe tũiguĩte
Job27:1 Naake Ayubu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Job27:2 “Ngwĩhĩta na Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe
Job27:3 Rĩrĩa rĩothe ngũkorwo ndĩ muoyo
Job27:4 mĩromo yakwa ndĩkaaria ũndũ wa ũrongo
Job27:5 Niĩ ndirĩ hĩndĩ ngoiga atĩ mũrĩ a ma
Job27:6 “Ndĩikaraga nũmĩĩtie atĩ ndirĩ na mahĩtia; ngoro yakwa ndĩrĩ ũndũ ĩranjuuka naguo.
Job27:7 “Thũ ciakwa na arĩa oothe mahinyagĩrĩria
Job27:8 Andũ arĩa matatĩĩĩte Ngai
Job27:9 Ngai nĩagaagĩthikĩrĩria kĩrĩro kĩao
Job27:10 Mangĩambĩĩte gũcaria gĩkeno kĩrĩa Mwene Hinya Wothe aheanaga
Job27:11 Nĩngũmuonereria ũrĩa Ngai arĩ hinya; nĩngũmũtaarĩria maũndũ marĩa Mwene Hinya Wothe abangĩĩte.
Job27:12 No rĩĩrĩ
Job27:13 “Ũũ nĩguo Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe aherithagia andũ arĩa aaganu na arĩa mahinyagĩrĩria arĩa angĩ.
Job27:14 Mahota kũgĩa na ciana nyingĩ
Job27:15 Iria ikaahonoka mbaarainĩ igaakua nĩ ng'aragu; atumia aao a ndigwa matigaacicakaĩra.
Job27:16 Andũ arĩa aaganu mahota kũgĩa na betha nyingĩ o na kana nguo nyingĩ o ta mahuti.
Job27:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Job27:18 Andũ arĩa aaganu meyakagĩra nyũmba ta ya mbũmbũĩ
Job27:19 Mũthenya ũmwe magaathiĩ toro marĩ itonga
Job27:20 Magaakorererwo nĩ guoya o ta arĩ kĩguũ
Job27:21 Rũhuuho rwa kuuma irathĩro rũkamoombũra mathiĩ; rũkamoombũra rũmarute mĩciĩ yao.
Job27:22 Rũkamoombũra rũtekũmaiguĩra tha
Job27:23 Rũkaamagoromookera makĩũra
Job28:1 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job28:2 Cuuma yenjagwo kuuma na kũu thĩ
Job28:3 Andũ matuĩragia nduma ĩrĩa ndumanu mũno
Job28:4 Meenjaga marima ma mahiga ma goro kũndũ andũ matatũũraga kana magathiĩ.Marutagĩra wĩra kũndũ maikaraga marĩ oiki
Job28:5 Irio ikũraga tĩĩriinĩ igũrũ
Job28:6 Tĩĩriinĩ ũcio gũkoragwo na mahiga ma rangi wa mburuu
Job28:7 “Gũtirĩ hũngũ yũĩ njĩra ya gũthiĩ marimainĩ macio
Job28:8 Gũtirĩ mũrũũthi kana nyamũ ĩngĩ o yothe ĩtuĩkanagia kuo.
Job28:9 “Eenji meenjaga mahiga marĩa moomũ mũno
Job28:10 Matũrĩkanagia mahiga macio moomũ
Job28:11 Mahingagĩrĩria matherũkĩro ma njũũĩ itigaatherere
Job28:12 “No rĩĩrĩ
Job28:13 Gũtirĩ ũũĩ thogora wa ũũgĩ
Job28:14 Ndũrĩ thĩ kũrĩa kũriku
Job28:15 Ũũgĩ ndũgũragwo na thahabu
Job28:16 Thahabu iria njega mũno na mahiga marĩa ma goro itingĩhota kũringanio naguo.
Job28:17 Ũũgĩ ũrĩ goro gũkĩra thahabu
Job28:18 Thogora waguo nĩ mũnene gũkĩra wa mahiga ma goro marĩa ma mburuu
Job28:19 Kahiga ka goro ka rangi wa yerũũ karĩa keega mũno gatingĩringithanio naguo ningĩ ndũngĩgũrĩka na thahabu
Job28:20 “Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Job28:21 Nĩũhithĩĩtwo ciũmbe ciothe o na ũkahithwo nyoni iria ciũmbũkaga.
Job28:22 Mwanangĩko na gĩkuũ kĩo kĩene
Job28:23 “Ngai no we ũmenyaga kĩhumo kĩaguo na no we ũũĩ kũrĩa ũtũũraga.
Job28:24 Nĩ gũkorwo no we wiki ũcũũthagĩrĩria kinya ituri cia thĩ
Job28:25 Ningĩ rĩrĩa athondekagĩra rũhuuho hinya waruo
Job28:26 rĩrĩa aheaga mbura mũtaratara wayo
Job28:27 hĩndĩ ĩyo oonire ũũgĩ akĩũgaathĩrĩria
Job28:28 Agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ atĩrĩ
Job29:1 Ayubu akĩambĩrĩria kwaria rĩngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
Job29:2 “Naarĩ korwo no haane ũrĩa ndahaanaga tene
Job29:3 rĩrĩa ũtheri wake wamũrĩkagĩra na ũkaanyonereria njĩra ngĩgerera ndumainĩ!
Job29:4 Naarĩ korwo mĩaka ya tene no ĩcooke
Job29:5 rĩrĩa Mwene Hinya Wothe aikaranagia na niĩ
Job29:6 Rĩrĩa mbũri na ng'ombe ciakwa cioimagia iria rĩingĩ
Job29:7 Rĩrĩa rĩothe ndoimagaraga ngathiĩ kĩhingoinĩ gĩa itũũra
Job29:8 aanake manyonaga makanjeherera njĩra na ihenya
Job29:9 Atongoria a mũingĩ nao maatigaga kwaria
Job29:10 Andũ arĩa marĩ igweta maakiragio
Job29:11 “Mũndũ o wothe wanyonaga na waiguaga ũhoro wakwa
Job29:12 Athĩĩni maangaĩra nĩndamateithagia
Job29:13 Andũ magĩkua nĩmandaathimaga
Job29:14 Hĩndĩ ciothe ndeekaga o maũndũ ma ũthingu na ngatuanagĩra nũmĩrĩire kĩhooto.
Job29:15 Nĩndoonagĩrĩria itumuumu njĩra
Job29:16 Harĩ arĩa athĩĩni
Job29:17 Nĩndaanangaga andũ arĩa matarĩ tha
Job29:18 Ndeĩraga atĩ ngaatũũra mĩaka mĩingĩ ta kagoogo
Job29:19 Ndahaanaga ta mũtĩ ũhandĩĩtwo hũgũrũrũinĩ cia maaĩ
Job29:20 Ngumo yakwa yatwaranaga na niĩ ĩkĩongererekaga
Job29:21 “Andũ maathikagĩrĩria na mageeterera njarie
Job29:22 Ndarĩĩkia kwaria
Job29:23 Maacĩetagĩrĩra o ta ũrĩa meetagĩrĩra mbura; na magaciamũkĩra ta ũria maamũkagĩra mbura niini.
Job29:24 Maakoragwo moorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya
Job29:25 Ndamoonagĩrĩria njĩra ndĩ ta mũtongoria wao; ndatũũranagia nao ta ũrĩa mũthamaki atũũranagia na mbũtũ ciake cia ita
Job30:1 “No rĩĩrĩ
Job30:2 Andũ ta acio mangĩndeithia na kĩ? Nĩ andũ athiru hinya biũ.
Job30:3 Nĩ andũ marĩ na thĩĩna na ahũũtu
Job30:4 Matuaga mahuti ma werũinĩ makarĩa
Job30:5 Nĩkũingatwo maingatĩĩtwo mũingĩinĩ
Job30:6 Matũũraga ngurungainĩ cia rũũĩ
Job30:7 Mararamaga o ta nyamũ na kũu gĩthakainĩ
Job30:8 Nĩ kĩruka kĩa andũ matarĩ mbuguĩro na gĩtarĩ igweta. Nĩkũingatwo maingatĩĩtwo moime bũrũriinĩ.
Job30:9 “Rĩu mookaga o gũũthekerera; harĩ o ndĩ o kĩndũ gĩa gũthaakĩrwo.
Job30:10 Nĩmaanyararĩĩte na nĩgũũtheema maatheemaga
Job30:11 tondũ Ngai nĩanjagithĩĩtie hinya na kĩene
Job30:12 Maratharĩkĩra marĩ gĩtutu
Job30:13 Nĩmahingĩĩte njĩra ciakwa cia kũũrĩra
Job30:14 Marangora ta andũ matũrĩkĩĩtie thingo ciakwa cia kũngitĩra
Job30:15 Maanjigĩĩte na kĩmako; gĩtĩĩo gĩakwa kĩroora ta kĩũmbũrĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho
Job30:16 “Rĩu ngiriĩ gũkua; ruwo rwakwa rũtiratigithĩria.
Job30:17 Mahĩndĩ maakwa maraaraga magĩakana ũtukũ mũgima ruwo rũrĩa ndĩ naruo rũtirathira.
Job30:18 Ngai anyiitĩĩte mũmero
Job30:19 Andekanĩĩtie mũtooroinĩ
Job30:20 “Ngai
Job30:21 Nĩũngarũrũkĩĩte ũkaanyonia ũũru; ũranyamaaria na hinya waku wothe.
Job30:22 Ũranyũmbũra ũkareka rũhuuho rũthiĩ na niĩ; ũranyaagia kĩhuuhũkanioinĩ kĩa iria.
Job30:23 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ ũnjerekeirie o gĩkuũinĩ; na nokĩo andũ oothe meetereire.
Job30:24 “Ũratharĩkĩra mũndũ mũhooteku
Job30:25 Githĩ arĩa maarĩ thĩĩna
Job30:26 No rĩĩrĩ
Job30:27 Mara maakwa maakanaga nĩ ruwo mategũtigithĩria
Job30:28 Thiaga ndĩthikĩire itekuona riũa
Job30:29 Mũgambo wakwa ũtuĩkĩĩte wa kĩeha na wa ihooru
Job30:30 Ngoothi yakwa nĩrĩĩkĩĩtie kũhĩa na nĩroonũka
Job30:31 Ndatũire njiguaga nyĩmbo cia gĩkeno
Job31:1 “Nĩndĩhĩtĩĩte ngoiga
Job31:2 “Ngai Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ-rĩ
Job31:3 Andũ arĩa aaganu nĩkũmatũmĩra amatũmagĩra mũthiro; arĩa nao meekaga maũndũ mooru akamaananga.
Job31:4 Ngai nĩonaga mĩthiĩre yakwa
Job31:5 “Ndehĩta na ma atĩ
Job31:6 Ngai ta nĩagĩĩthime na ratiri ĩrĩa ya ma
Job31:7 Ingĩkorwo ndĩndaregenyũka
Job31:8 irio iria handĩĩte
Job31:9 “Ingĩkorwo ndĩnderirĩria mũtumia wene
Job31:10 mũtumia wakwa arokĩrugagĩra mũndũ ũngĩ
Job31:11 Nĩ amu ũtharia nĩ ngero njũru na nĩ wĩhia wa gũtwaranĩrwo igootiinĩ.
Job31:12 Ũtharia ũhaana ta mwaki ũrarĩrĩmbũka o kũrĩrĩmbũka
Job31:13 “Ingĩkorwo ndĩndaaga gũthikĩrĩria ndungata ciakwa rĩrĩa ciateta
Job31:14 ngaagĩĩka atĩa rĩrĩa Ngai akanjĩta? Ngakĩmũcookeria atĩa rĩrĩa akaahooya ũhoro?
Job31:15 Githĩ ũrĩa wanyũmbire to we wombire ndungata ciakwa? Kaĩ atarĩ Ngai o ũmwe watũũmbire ithuothe?
Job31:16 “Ndirĩ ndaima mũthĩĩni kĩndũ; kana ngĩtũma mũtumia wa ndigwa akue ngoro.
Job31:17 Ndirĩ ndarĩa irio ndĩ nyiiki
Job31:18 Kuuma ndĩ o mũnyiinyi ndũire mbaaragĩrĩra ciana cia ngoriai ta ndĩ ithe wacio
Job31:19 Ndoona mũndũ ũrathĩĩnĩka nĩkwaga nguo
Job31:20 ndĩmũheaga nguo ithondekeetwo na guoya wa kuuma ng'ondu ciakwa; naake akandaathima na ngoro yake yothe
Job31:21 Ingĩkorwo ndĩndaheenia mwana wa ngoriai tondũ wa kũmenya atĩ igooti rĩrĩ mwena wakwa-rĩ
Job31:22 guoko gwakwa kũrounĩkĩra o mũrĩngainĩ wa kĩande
Job31:23 Ndingĩĩka ũmwe wa macio moothe
Job31:24 “Ndirĩ ndaiga mwĩhoko wakwa ũtongainĩ wakwa
Job31:25 kana ngĩgĩĩtĩĩa nĩ ũndũ waguo.
Job31:26 Ndirĩ ndathaathaiya riũa nĩ ũndũ wa ũkengu warĩo
Job31:27 Ndirĩ ndaheenererio ngĩcihe gĩtĩĩo
Job31:28 Ũcio nĩ wĩhia wa gũtwaranĩrwo igootiinĩ
Job31:29 “Ndirĩ ndakenerera kwanangwo gwa thũ ciakwa
Job31:30 Ndirĩ ndeehia na ũndũ wa kũhoera thũ ciakwa gĩkuũ.
Job31:31 Arĩa tũtũũranagia nao nĩmooĩ atĩ nĩndugaga ageni hĩndĩ ciothe.
Job31:32 Agendi matirĩ maaraara nja
Job31:33 Andũ nĩkũhithĩrĩra mahithagĩrĩra mahĩtia maao
Job31:34 Ndirĩ ndakira kana ngĩaga kuumagara
Job31:35 Naarĩ korwo ndĩ na wa gũũthikĩrĩria! Ũcio nĩguo ũira wakwa!Reke Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe akĩnjookerie.Naarĩ korwo thũ yakwa yandĩka thitango ciayo ndĩcione!
Job31:36 Hatirĩ nganja no ndĩcikuue na ciande
Job31:37 No hote gũtaarĩria Ngai ciĩko ciakwa
Job31:38 “Angĩkorwo nĩkũiya njiĩĩte mũgũnda ũrĩa nĩmaga
Job31:39 angĩkorwo ndĩ ndarĩa irio ciaguo itacirutĩire wĩra
Job31:40 mĩigua ĩrogĩkũra handũ ha ngano
Job32:1 Andũ acio atatũ nĩmaatigire gũcookanĩria na Ayubu tondũ nĩetĩkĩĩtie na ngoro yake atĩ ndaarĩ na mahĩtia.
Job32:2 No rĩĩrĩ
Job32:3 Ningĩ nĩaraakaririo nĩ araata acio atatũ a Ayubu tondũ nĩmaaremirwo nĩgũcookeria Ayubu magĩgĩtũma Ngai ooneke ta arĩ we warĩ na mahĩtia.
Job32:4 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job32:5 Rĩrĩa Elihu oonire atĩ athuuri acio atatũ matinahota gũcookeria Ayubu wega
Job32:6 Agĩkĩambĩrĩria kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ
Job32:7 Nguugĩĩte ndeke inyuĩ akũrũ mwaranĩrie
Job32:8 No rĩĩrĩ
Job32:9 Atĩrĩ
Job32:10 Kwoguo ngũmũũria mũthikĩrĩrie. Rekeei o na niĩ heane woni wakwa.
Job32:11 “Atĩrĩ
Job32:12 Nĩngũmũthikĩrĩirie wega
Job32:13 Mũtigaakiuge atĩ mũrĩ oogĩ; rekeei Ngai acookerie Ayubu arĩ we
Job32:14 Ayubu nĩ inyuĩ akwaragĩria ti niĩ; na niĩ ndikũmũcookeria ũguo mũkũmũcookagĩria.
Job32:15 “Ayubu
Job32:16 Maagĩkira-rĩ
Job32:17 Atĩrĩ
Job32:18 Ndĩ na ũhoro mũingĩ
Job32:19 Ingĩaga kwaria
Job32:20 No mũhaka njarie nĩguo hũũcũke; nĩngũtumũra kanua njarie.
Job32:21 Ndigwĩcukumania na mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ kana ngenie mũndũ na mĩario
Job32:22 Niĩ ndiũĩ gũkenia mũndũ na mĩario
Job33:1 “Ayubu
Job33:2 Ngũtumũra kanua njarie kĩrĩa kĩrĩ ngoro yakwa.
Job33:3 Ciugo ciakwa ciothe nĩ nginyanĩru
Job33:4 Roho wa Ngai nĩguo wanyũmbire
Job33:5 “No ũnjookerie ũngĩhota; kĩhaarĩrie ihooto ciaku.
Job33:6 Maithoinĩ ma Ngai
Job33:7 Kwoguo ndũrĩ na gĩtũmi gĩa kwĩĩndigĩra
Job33:8 “Waria ngĩiguaga; nĩndathikĩrĩria ũrĩa wothe woiga.
Job33:9 Nĩndaigua woiga: ‘Niĩ ndirĩ na mahĩtia; niĩ ndirĩ ũũru njĩkĩĩte
Job33:10 No Ngai nĩacaragia ciĩgwatio nĩguo ahũũre na anyiite ta thũ yake.
Job33:11 Anjoheete magũrũ na bĩngũ na nĩabaaraga ũrĩa wothe njĩkaga.’
Job33:12 “Ayubu
Job33:13 Ũragĩtetia Ngai nĩkĩ atĩ ndacookagia mateta maaku?
Job33:14 Ngai aaragia rĩmwe na njĩra ĩno
Job33:15 Rĩrĩa andũ marĩ toro
Job33:16 Agatũma maigue ũrĩa arenda kuuga
Job33:17 Eekaga ũguo
Job33:18 Ndangĩreka maanangwo
Job33:19 Ngai arũngaga andũ na kũmatũmĩra mĩrimũ
Job33:20 Andũ acio arũaru magakĩaga cama wa irio
Job33:21 Mĩĩrĩ yao ĩgakĩhĩnja ĩgathira
Job33:22 Magagĩkuhĩrĩria gũkua
Job33:23 “No rĩĩrĩ
Job33:24 Mũraika ũcio amaiguĩre tha
Job33:25 Mĩĩrĩ ya andũ acio ĩgagĩcookwo nĩ hinya rĩngĩ ĩkahaana o ta rĩrĩa maarĩ eethĩ.’
Job33:26 Andũ acio magakĩhooya Ngai
Job33:27 O mũndũ akeera arĩa angĩ atĩrĩ
Job33:28 Nĩahonokeetie ndigaathiĩ kwa arĩa akuũ
Job33:29 “Ngai nĩekaga andũ maũndũ macio moothe
Job33:30 Agakĩhonokia mũndũ ndagathiĩ kwa arĩa akuũ
Job33:31 “Ayubu
Job33:32 No angĩkorwo ũrĩ na ũndũ wa gũcookia
Job33:33 No angĩgĩkorwo ndũrĩ na ũndũ
Job34:1 Elihu agĩgĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ
Job34:2 “Taiguai ciugo ciakwa
Job34:3 Matũ makũũranaga ciugo o ta ũrĩa rũrĩmĩ rũkũũranaga cama wa irio.
Job34:4 Ũkaai tũtuĩrie ũndũ ũrĩa wa kĩhooto
Job34:5 Ayubu oiga atĩ we ndarĩ na mahĩtia
Job34:6 Ningĩ nĩoiga atĩ o na gũtuĩka ndarĩ na mahĩtia
Job34:7 Mũrĩ muona mũndũ ũhaana ta Ayubu? Ayubu ndarĩ na gĩtĩĩo o na haniini na Ngai.
Job34:8 Atumaga ndũgũ na andũ ooru
Job34:9 Nĩkĩo aroiga
Job34:10 “Tathikĩrĩriai inyuĩ imenyi ici; Ngai-rĩ
Job34:11 Eekaga mũndũ kũringana na ciĩko ciake
Job34:12 Ũhoro wa ma nĩ atĩ Ngai ndeekaga waganu; Mwene Hinya Wothe ndoogomagia kĩhooto kĩa mũndũ.
Job34:13 Nĩkũrĩ mũndũ waheire Ngai ũhoti wake? Nĩkũrĩ mũndũ wamũtuire mũnene wa thĩ yothe?
Job34:14 Ngai angĩcookera mĩhũũmũ ya muoyo
Job34:15 mũndũ o wothe wĩ muoyo no gũkua angĩkua
Job34:16 “Angĩkorwo ũrĩ mũũgĩ-rĩ
Job34:17 Kaĩ ũragĩtuĩra Ngai na nĩ mũthingu? Ũgwĩciiria atĩ nĩathũire kĩhooto?
Job34:18 Nĩatuagĩra athamaki na aathani maatuĩka andũ a tũhũ kana andũ ooru.
Job34:19 Ndecukumithanagia na aathani kana akeenda itonga gũkĩra athĩĩni; tondũ oothe nĩ we wamoombire.
Job34:20 Ũtukũ oothe no makue o ta kũbucia kwa riitho
Job34:21 “Amu nĩabaaraga mĩthiĩre ya andũ
Job34:22 Gũtirĩ nduma o na ĩngĩkorwo ĩrĩ ndumanu atĩa
Job34:23 Amu gũtirĩ mũthenya Ngai aigĩĩte nĩ ũndũ wa andũ
Job34:24 Ngai ndabataraga gũtuĩria
Job34:25 Tondũ nĩoĩ ciĩko ciao
Job34:26 Nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maao
Job34:27 tondũ nĩmaamũtiganĩirie
Job34:28 Nĩmaatũmire athĩĩni makaĩre Ngai
Job34:29 “Ngai angĩtua atĩ ndarĩ ũndũ egwĩka-rĩ
Job34:30 Gũtirĩ ũndũ ndũũrĩrĩ ingĩĩka
Job34:31 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job34:32 Ũrĩ wamwĩra akũmenyithie mahĩtia maaku
Job34:33 No tondũ nĩũraregana na ũrĩa Ngai eekaga-rĩ
Job34:34 Mũndũ wothe mũtaũku na mũũgĩ angĩnjigwa angĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Job34:35 ‘Ti itheru Ayubu araaria ũrimũ na ndarĩ ũndũ aroiga.’
Job34:36 Naarĩ korwo Ayubu athuuthuurio o nginya mũthia
Job34:37 Harĩ meehia maake nĩarongerera ũremi
Job35:1 Elihu agĩgĩthiĩ o na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ
Job35:2 “Ayubu
Job35:3 Kana ũkĩũria Ngai meehia maaku mamũhuutagia atĩa? Na nĩ uumithio ũrĩkũ ũgĩĩte naguo waga kwĩhia?
Job35:4 Nĩ niĩ ngũgũcookeria
Job35:5 Ikia maitho na igũrũ wĩrorere! Taone ũrĩa matu maraihanĩrĩirie nawe!
Job35:6 Rĩrĩa wehia-rĩ
Job35:7 Ũgwĩciiria ũthingu waku nĩũteithagia Ngai? Nĩkũrĩ kĩndũ aamũkagĩra?
Job35:8 Nĩ mũndũ ta we ũũnũhagwo nĩ meehia maaku
Job35:9 “Andũ mahatĩrĩrio mũno nĩmakayaga
Job35:10 No gũtirĩ ũcookagĩrĩra Ngai ũrĩa wamũũmbire o we ũrĩa ũmũheaga mwĩhoko rĩrĩa maũndũ maritũha.
Job35:11 Gũtirĩ ũcookagĩrĩra Ngai ũrĩa ũtũheaga ũũgĩ
Job35:12 Magĩkayaga
Job35:13 Nĩ ma atĩ Ngai ndathikagĩrĩria kĩrĩro gĩtarĩ kĩene; Mwene Hinya Wothe ndarũmbũyanagia nakĩo.
Job35:14 Ayubu
Job35:15 Ũreciiria atĩ ndangĩraakara akũherithie
Job35:16 Nĩkĩo Ayubu warĩĩtie mĩario ya tũhũ na maũndũ maingĩ ma ũrimũ.”
Job36:1 Elihu agĩthiĩ o na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ
Job36:2 “Tanjĩtĩkĩria haniini
Job36:3 Ndĩ na ũũgĩ mũingĩ
Job36:4 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job36:5 “Atĩrĩ
Job36:6 Andũ arĩa eehia ndarekaga matũũre muoyo
Job36:7 Ndaagaga kũbaarĩrĩra andũ arĩa athingu; nĩameetĩkagĩria gũthamaka ta aathani na akamatũũgĩria tene na tene.
Job36:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Job36:9 nĩamoonagia meehia maao na wĩtĩĩi wao.
Job36:10 Agagĩtũma mathikĩrĩrie ũrutani wake
Job36:11 Mangĩmũigua na mamũtungatĩre
Job36:12 Mangĩaga kũmũigua
Job36:13 “Andũ arĩa matatĩĩĩte Ngai mathiaga na mbere kũraakara
Job36:14 Magagĩkua marĩ o eethĩ
Job36:15 No rĩĩrĩ
Job36:16 Ngai nĩakũrutire thĩĩnainĩ
Job36:17 No rĩu ũraherithio ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩkũherithio.
Job36:18 Kĩĩmenyerere ndũkaaheenererio nĩ mahaki; na ndũkaahĩtithio nĩ ũtonga.
Job36:19 Ũtonga waku wothe ndũngĩkũguna
Job36:20 Gĩtige kũũria ũtukũ ũrĩũka rĩ andũ makue.
Job36:21 Kĩĩmenyerere
Job36:22 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job36:23 Gũkĩrĩ mũndũ ũrĩ wonia Ngai njĩra
Job36:24 Kĩĩrute gũtũũgĩria mawĩra ma Ngai; marĩa andũ matũire makumagia.
Job36:25 Andũ oothe nĩmamoonaga
Job36:26 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job36:27 Ngai oonganagia mataata ma maaĩ
Job36:28 Oiragia mbura kuuma matuinĩ
Job36:29 Kũrĩ mũndũ ũũĩ ũrĩa Ngai atambarũkagia matu? Nĩkũrĩ ũũĩ ũrĩa marurumĩ marurumaga kũu igũrũ atũũraga?
Job36:30 Atũmaga heni ihenũke kũu igũrũ
Job36:31 Ũguo nĩguo Ngai ahũũnagia andũ
Job36:32 Anyiitaga ngwa na mooko maake
Job36:33 Mũrurumo wacio nĩũmenyithanagia atĩ kĩhuuhũkanio nĩkĩrooka
Job37:1 “Ngoro yakwa yamenya ũguo
Job37:2 Tegaai matũ mũthikĩrĩrie mũgambo wa Ngai
Job37:3 Arekaga rũheni rũhenũke igũrũ
Job37:4 Thuutha ũcio mũgambo wake ũkaiguuo; araramaga na mũgambo wake ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya
Job37:5 Ngai araramaga na mũgambo wa kũgegania
Job37:6 Aathaga mbarabu ĩgue thĩ
Job37:7 Agakĩrũũgamia wĩra wa mũndũ o wothe nĩ geetha andũ oothe mamenye mawĩra maake.
Job37:8 Nacio nyamũ ĩgagĩcooka imaamoinĩ ciacio
Job37:9 Kĩhuuhũkanio kiumaga kũrĩa gĩikaraga
Job37:10 Mĩhũũmũ ya Ngai ĩgagĩtũma kũgĩe mbarabu
Job37:11 Ningĩ nĩ we ũritũhagia matu na ũigũ
Job37:12 Acihurunjaga mĩena yothe ya thĩ nĩguo ikahingie ũrĩa wothe aaciathĩĩte.
Job37:13 Atũmaga mbura ĩgĩe kuo
Job37:14 “Ayubu
Job37:15 Nĩũũĩ ũrĩa Ngai aathanaga heni ikahenũka ciumĩĩte matuinĩ?
Job37:16 Nĩũũĩ ũrĩa atũmaga matu macuuhĩrĩre kũu igũrũ? Ũcio nĩ wĩra wa magegania wa Ngai ũrĩa mũũgĩ kũna.
Job37:17 Wee no gũthĩĩnio ũthĩĩnagio nĩ ũrugarĩ
Job37:18 No ũhote kũnyiitanĩra na Ngai gũtambũrũkia matu mairũ na ũtũme moome o ta cuuma ngumuthe?
Job37:19 Gĩtuonie ũrĩa tũkwĩra Ngai; nĩtũturuurĩĩte; tũtirĩ na ũndũ wa kuuga.
Job37:20 Niĩ ndikũũria njarie na Ngai
Job37:21 Rĩu tũtingĩhota kwĩrorera riũa
Job37:22 Mĩrũri ta ya thahabu nĩrooka yumĩĩte mwena wa na rũgongo Ngai arooka arigiicĩirio nĩ riiri wa kũmakania.
Job37:23 Tũtingĩhota gũkuhĩhĩria riiri wa Mwene Hinya Wothe; Atwĩkaga maũndũ ma ũthingu na ma kĩhooto.
Job37:24 Nĩkĩo andũ oothe mamũheaga gĩtĩĩo. We ndarũmbũyanagia na mũndũ ũrĩa wĩtuaga mũũgĩ.”
Job38:1 Thuutha ũcio MWATHANI arĩ thĩinĩ wa kĩhuuhũkanio agĩcookeria Ayubu atĩrĩ
Job38:2 “Ũrĩ ũ nĩguo ũrarie kĩrĩra gĩakwa na ciugo cia ũrimũ?
Job38:3 Akorwo ũrĩ njamba
Job38:4 “Warĩ ha rĩrĩa ndaambaga mũthingi wa thĩ? Njookeria akorwo nĩũũĩ.
Job38:5 Akorwo nĩũũĩ-rĩ
Job38:6 Itugĩ iria inyiitĩrĩire thĩ-rĩ
Job38:7 Mũthenya ũcio ũgĩkia
Job38:8 “Nũũ wekĩrĩire iria mĩrango ya kũrĩhingĩrĩria
Job38:9 Nĩ niĩ ndarĩhumbĩire na matu na ngĩrĩrigiicĩria na kĩbii gĩtumanu.
Job38:10 Nĩ niĩ ndarĩĩkĩrĩire mĩhaka
Job38:11 No niĩ ndaarĩrire atĩ ‘Ũrĩkinyaga haaha na ndũrĩkĩraga; ndiihũ ciaku cia hinya irĩrũũgamagĩra haaha.’
Job38:12 “Ayubu
Job38:13 Ũrĩ warwatha rũnyiite icũrĩ cia thĩ
Job38:14 Ruoro rũgĩtema rũtũmaga irĩma na mĩkuru cionekane wega
Job38:15 Andũ arĩa aaganu magakĩimwo ũtheri mooko marĩa maambararĩĩtie magakiunangwo.
Job38:16 “Atĩrĩrĩ
Job38:17 Ũrĩ wonio ihingo cia gĩkuũ kana ihingo cia kwa arĩa akuũ?
Job38:18 Ũrĩ wemenyera wariĩ wa thĩ? Njookeria akorwo nĩũũĩ maũndũ macio moothe!
Job38:19 “Nĩũũĩ njĩra ya gũthiĩ kũrĩa ũtheri ũikaraga? Nduma-rĩ
Job38:20 No ũcionie bũrũri wacio na ũciathĩrĩre njĩra cia kũinũka kuo?
Job38:21 Tondũ warĩ mũciare
Job38:22 “Ũrĩ watoonya kũrĩa mbarabu ciigagwo kana ũkĩona kũrĩa mbembe cia mbura icookanagĩrĩrio?
Job38:23 Ndĩciigaga kuo cietagĩrĩre hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna. Ndĩcietagĩrĩria mũthenya wa haaro na wa mbaara.
Job38:24 Njĩra ya kũrĩa ũtheri ũgayagĩrwo
Job38:25 “Nũũ watemeire mbura ya kĩboboto mũkaro wa gũthiĩra kana agĩtemera mbura ya mbembe njĩra?
Job38:26 Nũũ ũtũmaga kũrĩa gũtatũũragwo nĩ andũ
Job38:27 Nũũ ũtũmaga kwoira
Job38:28 “Ime na mbura-rĩ
Job38:29 Mbaa na mbarabu-rĩ
Job38:30 nĩ geetha imatage igatuĩka ihiga
Job38:31 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Job38:32 No ũhote kũreehithia itutu cia njata kĩmera gĩacio gĩakinya?No ũhote kuonereria Nduba na ciana ciayo njĩra.
Job38:33 Nĩũũĩ mawatho marĩa marũmagĩrĩrwo kũũrĩa igũrũ matuinĩ? Mawatho macio-rĩ
Job38:34 “No ũhote kũgũũthũkĩra matu ũmaathe makũũrĩrie mbura ũconjore?
Job38:35 No ũhote gũtũma heni ihenũke na igwathĩkĩre?
Job38:36 Nũũ wamenyithirie matu rĩrĩa mariuraga
Job38:37 Nũũ ũrĩ na mũũgĩ wa kũhota gũtara matu? Nũũ ũngĩhota kũmainamia nĩ geetha moire
Job38:38 kinyagia rũkũngũ rũthire na mĩatũka ĩnyiitane?
Job38:39 “Nĩ we ũcaragĩria mĩrũũthi irio na ũkahũũnia ciana ciayo
Job38:40 rĩrĩa ĩhithĩĩte ngurungainĩ ya mahiga
Job38:41 Nũũ ũheaga mahuru irio rĩrĩa mekũũrũũra mahũũtiĩ
Job39:1 Nĩũũĩ rĩrĩa mbũri cia irĩmainĩ iciaraga? Ũrĩ werorera thwariga igĩciara?
Job39:2 Nĩũũĩ ciikaraga itĩĩna rĩigana atĩa igĩgaciara? Nĩũmenyaga mũthenya ũrĩa igũciara?
Job39:3 Nĩũũĩ rĩrĩa ikomaga thĩ igĩciara?
Job39:4 Tũũri twacio tũkũraga tũkagĩĩra hinya o kũu werũinĩ; tũgacooka tũgatigana na maanyina na tũtimacookagĩrĩra.
Job39:5 “Nũũ wetĩkĩririe ndigiri cia gĩthaka kũrimũũthaga? Nũũ waciohorire agĩcirekereria irimũũthage?
Job39:6 Nĩ niĩ ndaciheire werũ ciikarage kuo
Job39:7 Itikuhanagĩrĩria na inegene rĩa itũũra
Job39:8 Irimũthaga irĩmainĩ igĩcaria gwa kũrĩa
Job39:9 “Mbogo-rĩ
Job39:10 No ũhote kũmĩĩkĩra icooki ĩrĩme na mũraaũ? kana ũtũme ĩkururie mũraaũ ĩthondeke mĩtaro?
Job39:11 Tondũ ĩrĩ hinya mũingĩ mũno-rĩ
Job39:12 No ũmĩĩhoke ĩgũkuĩra magetha ĩkũinũkĩrie
Job39:13 “Mathagu ma nyaga mabatabataga na ihenya mũno
Job39:14 Nyaga ĩtigaga matumbĩ maayo tĩĩri igũrũ
Job39:15 Ndĩmakaga kana nĩmekũrangwo
Job39:16 Ĩhũũraga tũcui twayo ta tũtarĩ twayo; o na tũngĩkua tuothe ndĩmakaga.
Job39:17 Ĩĩkaga ũguo tondũ Ngai nĩamĩimire ũũgĩ
Job39:18 No rĩĩrĩ
Job39:19 “Nĩ we ũheaga mbarathi hinya
Job39:20 Nĩ we ũmĩhotithagia kũrũũgarũũga ta ngigĩ
Job39:21 Ĩteng'eraga ĩkubĩĩtie ituambainĩ
Job39:22 Ndĩmakaga o na kana igetigĩra kĩndũ; rũhiũ rwa njora rũtimĩmakagia.
Job39:23 Matharaita ma mũndũ ũrĩa ũmĩhaicĩĩte makomoranagia makĩhenagia igũrũ rĩayo.
Job39:24 Yambambaga ĩkĩringaringaga thĩ
Job39:25 Karumbeeta kaahuuhwo nĩgũtiiha ĩtiihaga; ĩnungagĩra mbaara ĩrĩ o kũraihu
Job39:26 “Nĩ we wonagia rwĩgĩ kũũmbũka rĩrĩa rwatambarũkia mathagu rwerekeire mwena wa na kĩanda?
Job39:27 Rwĩgĩ nĩrwetagĩrĩra ũrũathe rũgaake gĩtara kĩarwo irĩma igũrũ?
Job39:28 Nderi ĩthondekaga gĩikaro kĩayo mahiga igũrũ marĩa maraaya
Job39:29 Ĩtuĩragia kĩndũ gĩa kũnyiita ĩrĩ kũu mahigainĩ igũrũ; maitho maayo moonaga kũraihu mũno.
Job39:30 Ĩreraga tũcui twayo na thakame
Job40:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩĩra Ayubu atĩrĩ
Job40:2 “We ũteendaga kũhootwo-rĩ
Job40:3 Naake Ayubu agĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Job40:4 “ Niĩ ndĩ kĩndũ hatarĩ! Nĩ atĩa ĩngĩgũcookeria? Niĩ ndirĩ na ũndũ ũngĩ wa kuuga.
Job40:5 Nĩnjarĩĩtie maita maingĩ
Job40:6 Naake MWATHANI arĩ kĩhuuhũkanioinĩ akĩarĩria Ayubu o rĩngĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Job40:7 “Akorwo ũrĩ njamba-rĩ
Job40:8 Ũrenda kuonania ndirũmagĩrĩra waragania? Ũrenda kũnduta mahĩtia nĩguo wĩtue mwega?
Job40:9 Ũrĩ na hinya ta niĩ? Mũgambo waku no ũrurume ta wakwa?
Job40:10 “Takĩĩhotore ũhoti na gĩtĩĩo
Job40:11 Itũrũra marũrũ maaku; baara mũndũ o wothe mwĩtĩi ũmũng'aũranie.
Job40:12 Erekera mũndũ o wothe mwĩtĩi ũmũconorithie; anangĩra andũ arĩa aaganu o harĩa marũngiĩ.
Job40:13 Mathike oothe rũkũngũinĩ
Job40:14 Ũngĩĩka ũguo
Job40:15 “Tawĩciirie ũhoro wa nyamũ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Behemothu. Ngĩmĩũmba norĩo ndaakũũmbire; ĩrĩaga nyeki ta ng'ombe.
Job40:16 Tawĩciirie ũrĩa mwĩrĩ wayo ũrĩ hinya; mĩkiha ya yo ĩrĩ hinya mũno.
Job40:17 Ĩrũũgamagia mũting'oe wayo ũkeehanda o ta mũtarakwa; mĩkiha ya magũrũ maayo ĩrĩ hinya.
Job40:18 Mahĩndĩ maayo marĩ hinya o ta gĩcango; magũrũ maayo nĩ moomũ o ta cuuma.
Job40:19 “Behemothu nĩkĩo kĩũmbe gĩa kũgegania mũno thĩinĩ wa ciũmbe ciakwa ciothe! No niĩ
Job40:20 Nyeki ĩrĩa ĩrĩaga ĩkũraga irĩmainĩ kũrĩa nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka ithaakagĩra.
Job40:21 Yarahaga rungu rwa ihinga cia mĩigua
Job40:22 Ihinga cia mĩigua na mĩtĩinĩ ĩrĩa ĩmeraga ndeereinĩ cia rũũĩ
Job40:23 O na rũũĩ rũngĩtherera na hinya nĩ ũrĩa rũiyũrĩĩte
Job40:24 Nũũ ũngĩhota kũmĩnyiita na mũtego
Job41:1 “No ũhote kũnyiita ndamaathia ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Leviathani na ndwano? No ũhote kũmĩoha kanua na mũkanda?
Job41:2 No ũhote kũmĩĩkĩra mũkanda iniũrũ
Job41:3 No ĩgũthaithe ũmĩrekererie ĩĩthiĩre
Job41:4 No ĩthondeke kĩrĩĩkanĩro nawe ĩtũũre ĩgũtungatagĩra tene na tene?
Job41:5 No ũmĩohe ta nyoni ũthaakage nayo
Job41:6 Ategi a thamaki no mahĩtahĩtane makĩmĩgũra
Job41:7 No ũmĩtheecange ngoothi ya yo na mĩguĩ
Job41:8 Ũromĩhuutia na guoko; ũngĩhũũrwo mbaara ũtakaariganĩrwo
Job41:9 “Kuona ndamaathia ĩyo ĩĩtagwo Leviathani kuo gwiki gũtũmaga mũndũ oorwo nĩ hinya na aringĩke.
Job41:10 Angĩkorwo gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ ũcamba wa kũmĩarahũra-rĩ
Job41:11 Nũũ ndĩ thiirĩ naake nĩguo ndĩmũrĩhe? Kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩrĩ gũũkũ thĩ nĩ gĩakwa!
Job41:12 “Nĩngũthiĩ na mbere gũkwĩra ũhoro wa magũrũ ma ndamaathia ĩyo
Job41:13 Nũũ ũngĩhota kũũnũra rũũa rwayo? Nũũ ũngĩhota gũtũrĩkania rũũa rũu rwayo rũũmũ ta gĩcango?
Job41:14 Nũũ ũngĩũmĩrĩria kũmĩathamia kanua? Kanua kaayo kaiyũire magego ma kũmakania!
Job41:15 Mũgongo wayo ũthondekeetwo na ngũũcĩ ihaana ngo inyiitithanĩĩtio ikarũma
Job41:16 Ngũũcĩ ĩmwe inyiitaine na iria ingĩ ũguo atĩ
Job41:17 Ningĩ itumanĩĩtio ikanyiitana ũguo atĩ
Job41:18 Yathimũraga hakoima ũtheri; maitho maayo makengaga ta ũtheri wa riũa rĩkĩratha.
Job41:19 Kanua kaayo koimaga mwaki ũrarĩrĩmbũka
Job41:20 Maniũrũ maayo marutaga ndoogo ta nyũngũ ĩgĩtherũka kana ta mathanjĩ marahĩa.
Job41:21 Mĩhũũmũ ya yo ĩgwatagia makara magaakana
Job41:22 Ngingo ya yo ĩrĩ hinya ũguo atĩ
Job41:23 Ngũũcĩ cia mwĩrĩ wayo ikomanĩire ũguo atĩ
Job41:24 Nĩ nyũmũ ngoro o ta ihiga; nĩ nyũmũ o ta ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi.
Job41:25 Rĩrĩa yetiira
Job41:26 Rũhiũ rwa njora rũtingĩmĩtiihia; o na ndĩngĩtiihio nĩ itimũ
Job41:27 Yunangaga cuuma ta arĩ rũũa rwa ngano
Job41:28 Mĩguĩ ndĩngĩtũma yũre; kũmĩhũũra na mahiga no ta kũmĩhũũra na nyeki.
Job41:29 Njũgũma no ta mahuti harĩ yo; nĩgũthekerera ĩthekagĩrĩra andũ makĩmĩikĩria matimũ.
Job41:30 Ngũũcĩ cia nda ya yo ihaana ngĩo; itigaga mũgirito wayo ndakainĩ o ta icembe rĩgĩcimba.
Job41:31 Itũmaga iria rĩhũyũke o ta maaĩ magĩtherũka
Job41:32 Ĩthiaga ĩtigĩĩte mũkirito ũgũkenga thuutha wayo; mũndũ no gwĩciiria atĩ iria nĩriumĩĩtie mbuĩ.
Job41:33 Gũtirĩ kĩũmbe kĩngĩ kĩhaanaine nayo thĩ yothe; nĩ kĩũmbe gĩtarĩ guoya o na haniini.
Job41:34 Nĩnyararaga o na nyamũ iria njĩtĩĩi mũno; nĩ mũthamaki wa nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka.”
Job42:1 Ayubu agĩcookeria MWATHANI atĩrĩ
Job42:2 “Niĩ nĩnjũũĩ atĩ no ũhote gwĩka maũndũ moothe; mũbango waku ndũngĩgirĩrĩrio nĩ mũndũ.
Job42:3 Ũrooria atĩ ndĩroomĩrĩria atĩa gũkararia mataaro maaku
Job42:4 Ũnjĩĩrire thikĩrĩrie ndeke warie
Job42:5 Mbere ĩyo no kũigua ndĩraiguaga ũhoro waku
Job42:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩndemena niĩ mwene
Job42:7 MWATHANI arĩĩkia kwarĩria Ayubu
Job42:8 Kwoguo oyai ndeegwa mũgwanja na ndũrũme mũgwanja mũthiĩ kwa Ayubu ndungata yakwa mũkarute igongoona rĩa njino nĩ ũndũ wanyu kĩũmbe. Ayubu nĩekũmũhoera
Job42:9 Kwoguo Elifazi
Job42:10 Ayubu arĩĩkia kũhooya nĩ ũndũ wa araata acio aake
Job42:11 Thuutha ũcio
Job42:12 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩraathima ũtũũro wa kũrĩĩkĩrĩria wa Ayubu gũkĩra ũrĩa amũraathimĩĩte rĩa mbere. Ayubu nĩagĩire na ng'ondu ngiri ikũmi na inya (14
Job42:13 Ningĩ nĩagĩire na aanake mũgwanja na airĩĩtu atatũ.
Job42:14 Mũirĩĩtu wa mbere aamwĩtire Jemima
Job42:15 Bũrũriinĩ ũcio wothe gũtiarĩ andũ a nja angĩ athaka ta airĩĩtu acio a Ayubu. Ayubu nĩagaĩire airĩĩtu acio aake indo o ta ũrĩa agaĩire aariũ aake.
Job42:16 Thuutha wa ũguo Ayubu aatũũrire mĩaka ĩngĩ igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩna. Nĩonire ciana ciake na ciana cia ciana ciake
Job42:17 Aakuire arĩ mũthuuri mũkũrũ mũno.

Psalms1:4 No arĩa ooru matihaana ta ũguo o na haniini; mahaana ta mahuti marĩa moombũragwo nĩ rũhuuho.

Psalms2:8 Hooya
Psalms2:9 Wee nĩũkaamoinanga na njũgũma ya cuuma; o na ũmamemende makuange ta nyũngũ.’ ”

Psalms5:6 Arĩa oothe maaragia maheeni-rĩ

Psalms6:3 Ngoro yakwa o nayo nĩnyamaarĩkĩĩte mũno. Ĩ
Psalms6:4 MWATHANI
Psalms6:5 Nĩ gũkorwo ndũririkanagwo kwa arĩa akuũ; nũũ ũngĩgũkumia e kũu kwa arĩa akuũ?
Psalms6:6 Gũcaaya gwakwa nĩgũtũmĩĩte njũrwo nĩ hinya; ũtukũ o ũtukũ nĩgũconjoria njonjoragia kamuuto gaakwa na maithori
Psalms6:7 Maitho maakwa matirona wega nĩ kĩeha; nĩmoorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩ ũrĩa thũ ciakwa itũmĩĩte ndĩre.
Psalms6:8 Inyuĩ eeki naaĩ
Psalms6:9 MWATHANI nĩaiguĩte gũthaithana gwakwa; ihooya rĩakwa nĩarĩtĩkĩrĩĩte.
Psalms6:10 Thũ ciakwa ciothe nĩirĩconoka
Psalms7:1 MWATHANI Ngai wakwa
Psalms7:2 Waga gwĩka ũguo mekũndembũranga o ta mũrũũthi
Psalms7:3 MWATHANI Ngai wakwa
Psalms7:4 ngorwo nĩndĩhĩĩte mũraata wakwa wega na ũũru
Psalms7:5 reke thũ ĩyo ĩhanyũkanie na niĩ ĩnyiite. Reke o na ĩhũũre ĩnjũrage
Psalms7:6 MWATHANI arahũka na maraakara maaku
Psalms7:7 Reke andũ moongane makũrigiicĩrie; nawe ũmathamakĩre ũrĩ kũu igũrũ matuinĩ.
Psalms7:8 MWATHANI
Psalms7:9 Ndũkaareke andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru makĩrĩrĩrie gwĩka ũũru;tiirĩrĩra arĩa athingu
Psalms7:10 Ngai nĩ we mũmenyereri nĩ we ũhonokagia arĩa atheru ngoro.
Psalms7:11 Ngai-rĩ
Psalms7:12 Mũndũ angĩaga gũtigana na mĩthiĩre yake mĩũru-rĩ
Psalms7:13 o na ooe indo cia mbaara itangĩĩtiirio nĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ
Psalms7:14 Ta baara wone ũrĩa mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkaga ũũru ararũmwo aciare waganu. Ihu rĩu e narĩo no rĩa kĩũnũhu na kĩrĩa egũciara no maheeni matheri.
Psalms7:15 Nĩkwenja eenjeete irima o na akarĩrikia
Psalms7:16 Egũcookererwo no kĩũnũhu kĩu gĩake
Psalms7:17 Nĩngũcookeria MWATHANI ngaatho nĩ ũndũ wa ũthingu wake
Psalms8:1 MWATHANI
Psalms8:2 na twana o na tũkenge nĩtũũkumagia na tũnua twatuo.Wee-rĩ
Psalms8:3 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms8:4 ndĩyũragia atĩrĩ
Psalms8:5 Nĩ amu wee ũmũũmbĩĩte ũguo atĩ no haniini atigairie ahaane o ta we mwene; o na ũkamũhumba thũmbĩ ya riiri na ya gĩtĩĩo mũtwe wake.
Psalms8:6 Nĩũmũthuurĩĩte ũkamũhe wathani igũrũ rĩa indo ciothe iria wee ũũmbĩĩte; ũgakĩiga indo ciothe o nyaarĩrĩinĩ ciake:
Psalms8:7 ng'ondu ciothe o na ng'ombe
Psalms8:8 nyoni cia rĩerainĩ
Psalms8:9 MWATHANI
Psalms9:1 Nĩngũgũcookeria ngaatho MWATHANI na ngoro yakwa yothe;nĩngũgana maũndũ moothe ma magegania marĩa wĩkĩĩte.
Psalms9:2 Nĩngũkena o na njanjamũke nĩ ũndũ waku; nĩngũina ngĩgoocaga rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Psalms9:3 nĩ ũndũ rĩrĩa thũ ciakwa
Psalms9:4 Nĩũtiirĩrĩire kĩhooto gĩakwa ũikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũthamakiũgĩtuithania ciira ũtekuogomia kĩhooto.
Psalms9:5 Ndũũrĩrĩ nĩũcirũithĩĩtie
Psalms9:6 Thũ ciitũ nĩũciniinĩĩte nginya tene na tene; kũririkanwo itikaaririkanwo o na rĩ; matũũra maacio namo nĩũmaanangĩĩte.
Psalms9:7 No MWATHANI egũtũũra aikarĩire gĩtĩ kĩa ũthamaki nginya mĩndĩ na mĩndĩ o gĩtĩ kĩrĩa ahaarĩirie gĩa gũciirithanĩria.
Psalms9:8 We nĩ we ũtuagĩra thĩ na kĩhooto
Psalms9:9 MWATHANI-rĩ
Psalms9:10 Arĩa mooĩ rĩĩtwa rĩaku nĩ we marĩhokaga
Psalms9:11 Inaai mũgĩkumagia MWATHANI ũrĩa ũtũũraga Zayuni; ciĩko ciake-rĩ
Psalms9:12 Nĩ ũndũ Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩhagĩria arĩa maranyariirĩka ndariganagĩrwo nĩ o; mũkayo wa arĩa marathĩĩnĩka nĩaũririkanaga.
Psalms9:13 MWATHANI
Psalms9:14 nĩguo ng'ane ngumo yaku yothe na njanjamũke ndĩ o ihingoinĩ cia Zayuni nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa honokeetio nĩ we.
Psalms9:15 Ndũũrĩrĩ nĩigũĩte irimainĩ o rĩrĩa irenjeete magũrũ maacio nĩmagwatie nĩ mũtego o ũrĩa irategeete.
Psalms9:16 MWATHANI nĩemenyithanĩĩtie
Psalms9:17 Andũ arĩa ooru makaarĩĩkĩrĩria kwa arĩa akuũ; kũu nokuo ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe iria iriganagĩrwo nĩ Ngai igaathiĩ.
Psalms9:18 Nĩ gũkorwo andũ arĩa mabataire matigũtũũra mariganĩire; mwĩhoko wa arĩa athĩĩni naguo ndũgũtũũra wagithĩĩtio kĩene.
Psalms9:19 Arahũka
Psalms9:20 Ciĩkĩre guoya
Psalms10:1 MWATHANI
Psalms10:2 Andũ arĩa ooru mahĩtaga arĩa athĩĩni magĩtĩĩaga; mĩtego ĩyo mathondekeete ĩromagwatia.
Psalms10:3 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru-rĩ
Psalms10:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru-rĩ
Psalms10:5 Maũndũ ma mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru maikaraga magaacĩire hingo ciothe. Maitho maake matingĩhota kuona matuĩro ma Ngai; we no kũnyũrũria anyũrũragia arĩa oothe marĩ ũthũ naake.
Psalms10:6 Eĩraga na ngoro atĩrĩ
Psalms10:7 Kanua gaake-rĩ
Psalms10:8 Aikaraga ooheirie hakuhĩ na matũũra eetereire kũũraga na hitho arĩa matarĩ na ũũru. Maitho maake maikaraga magĩtuĩragia ũrĩa ũtarĩ na wa kũmũgitĩra.
Psalms10:9 Aikaraga kũndũ kũhitharu ooheirie o ta mũrũũthi ũrĩ kĩmaamoinĩ kĩaguo; agakĩoheria ũrĩa mũthĩĩni nĩguo amũnyĩĩte
Psalms10:10 Agakĩgũtha mũndũ ũcio ũtarĩ na wa kũmũgitĩra
Psalms10:11 Mũndũ ũcio mũũru agakĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ
Psalms10:12 Arahũka
Psalms10:13 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms10:14 No wee-rĩ
Psalms10:15 Unanga guoko kwa mũndũ ũrĩa ũmaramaraga na ageeka ũũru; mũherithie nĩ ũndũ wa ũũru ũrĩa eekĩĩte o nginya aage gũcooka kũwĩka rĩngĩ.
Psalms10:16 MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki kinya tene na tene; arĩa mathaathayagia ngai ingĩ nĩmakaaniinwo mathengio bũrũri wake.
Psalms10:17 Nĩũiguaga
Psalms10:18 na nĩũtegaga matũ ũkaigua mũkayo wa ciana cia ngoriai na wa arĩa ahinyĩrĩrie ũmatiirĩrĩre na kĩhooto
Psalms11:1 Harĩ MWATHANI nĩ ho ndĩtharĩire. Mũgũkĩnjĩĩra atĩ nyũmbũke o ta kanyoni njũrĩre irĩmainĩ nĩkĩ?
Psalms11:2 Nĩ ũndũ andũ arĩa ooru nĩmoeete moota maao
Psalms11:3 Nĩ atĩa mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu angĩhota gwĩka mũthingi wake ũngĩharaganio?
Psalms11:4 MWATHANI arĩ thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ yake theru
Psalms11:5 MWATHANI nĩathimaga andũ arĩa athingu o na arĩa ooru; andũ arĩa meendeete kũhũthĩra hinya nĩamathũire na ngoro yake yothe.
Psalms11:6 Nĩakoirĩria andũ arĩa ooru makara maakanĩĩte magatuunĩha
Psalms11:7 Tondũ MWATHANI nĩ mũthingu na maũndũ ma ũthingu no mo eendeete; andũ arĩa mameekaga-rĩ
Psalms12:1 MWATHANI
Psalms12:2 O mũndũ no maheeni areera ũrĩa marigainie naake; maraheenania na tũnua monjore marĩ na ũhinga ngoroinĩ ciao.
Psalms12:3 MWATHANI arotinia mĩromo ĩyo yao ĩheenanagia. Arokiria nĩmĩ icio ciaragia na mwĩgaatho ikoiga atĩrĩ
Psalms12:4 “Tũrĩonaga kĩrĩa gĩothe tũngĩenda na tũnua twitũ; tũriugaga ũrĩa wothe tũrĩendaga kuuga na gũtirĩ o na ũ ũrĩtũgiragĩrĩria.”
Psalms12:5 MWATHANI egũkiuga atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms12:6 Ciĩranĩro cia MWATHANI nĩciakwĩhokwo; nĩ theru o ta betha ĩrĩa ĩthereetio maita mũgwanja na mwaki.
Psalms12:7 Tũgitagĩre hingo ciothe
Psalms12:8 Andũ arĩa ooru maracangacanga kũndũ guothe
Psalms13:1 MWATHANI
Psalms13:2 Nĩ nginya rĩ ngũtũũra njiguaga ruwo rohoinĩ wakwa
Psalms13:3 Ndora
Psalms13:4 thũ ciakwa itikoige atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms13:5 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms13:6 Nĩngũinĩra MWATHANI
Psalms14:1 Irimũ ciĩĩraga atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms14:2 MWATHANI acũũthagĩrĩria andũ arĩ o igũrũ
Psalms14:3 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms14:4 MWATHANI egũkĩũria atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms14:5 No hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakaanyiitwo nĩ guoya mũnene
Psalms14:6 Andũ arĩa ooru mathũũkagia mĩbango ya arĩa athĩĩni
Psalms14:7 Naarĩ korwo Zayuni kwoima ũhonokio wa Isiraeli!Ĩ andũ a Isiraeli magaakena atĩa hiihi hĩndĩ ĩrĩa MWATHANI agaakorwo atũmĩĩte magaacĩre rĩngĩ!
Psalms15:1 MWATHANI
Psalms15:2 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mĩthiĩre yake ĩtarĩ ũcuuke
Psalms15:3 Kanua gaake gaticambanagia
Psalms15:4 Maitho maake matienda kuona arĩa maremeire Ngai
Psalms15:5 Ndakombanagĩra mbeeca ciake nĩguo oone uumithio
Psalms16:1 Menyerera
Psalms16:2 MWATHANI ngwĩraga atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms16:3 Ĩ andũ arĩa athingu matitĩĩĩtwo bũrũriinĩ! Ngoro yakwa nĩkenagio mũno nĩ o.
Psalms16:4 Arĩa mateng'agĩrĩra ngai ingĩ no mathĩĩna matarĩ mũthia mereehagĩrĩra; niĩ-rĩ
Psalms16:5 MWATHANI
Psalms16:6 Ũnjatũrĩire ithaka kũndũ kwega mũno; ti itherũ igai rĩakwa nĩ rĩega mũno!
Psalms16:7 Nĩngũgaatha MWATHANI ũrĩa ũheaga mataaro; ũtukũ-rĩ
Psalms16:8 Njigaga MWATHANI mbere yakwa mahinda moothe; tondũ e mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo
Psalms16:9 Tondũ ũcio ngoro yakwa nĩkeneete
Psalms16:10 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩũmenyereire kuuma harĩ hinya wa gĩkuũ
Psalms16:11 Wee-rĩ
Psalms17:1 MWATHANI
Psalms17:2 Ituĩro rĩaku rĩrondirĩrĩra; maitho maaku marona ũhoro ũrĩa mũrũngĩrĩru.
Psalms17:3 Nĩũgereetie ngoro yakwa
Psalms17:4 Ndongoreetio nĩ uuge wa kanua gaaku-rĩ
Psalms17:5 Makinya maakwa maikaraga marũmĩĩtie njĩra ciaku
Psalms17:6 Nĩndagũkaĩra
Psalms17:7 Nyonia wendo waku wa magegania ũrĩa ũtagarũrũkaga; wee ũhonokagia na guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo arĩa mooragĩra harĩ we nĩguo ũmateithie kuuma harĩ thũ ciao.
Psalms17:8 Menyerera o ta kĩũma kĩa riitho rĩaku; hitha rungu rwa mathagu maaku
Psalms17:9 ndikanyiitwo nĩ andũ ooru arĩa maratharĩkĩra
Psalms17:10 Ngoro ciao itirĩ na tha; tũnua twao twaragia na mwĩtĩĩo.
Psalms17:11 No kũũhĩta marahĩta
Psalms17:12 Mahaana o ta mũrũũthi mũhũũtu ũgĩcaria gĩa kũrĩa
Psalms17:13 Arahũka
Psalms17:14 Honokia
Psalms17:15 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms18:1 Ĩ ndĩkwendeete
Psalms18:2 MWATHANI nĩ we mũmenyereri
Psalms18:3 Ngayagĩra MWATHANI
Psalms18:4 Mĩnyororo ya kwa arĩa akuũ nĩ yo yeĩthiorereirie
Psalms18:5 Mĩnyororo ya kwa arĩa akuũ yeĩthiorereirie
Psalms18:6 Ndĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ ĩyo ngĩkaĩra MWATHANI; ngĩkaĩra Ngai wakwa andeithie.Naake akĩigua mũgambo wakwa arĩ o Hekaarũinĩ yake
Psalms18:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo thĩ ĩkĩinaina na ĩgĩthingitha; o nacio itina cia irĩma ikĩinaina na ĩgĩthingitha
Psalms18:8 Maniũrũ maake makiuma ndoogo ĩkĩambata na igũrũ
Psalms18:9 Akĩhingũrania igũrũ
Psalms18:10 Aathiaga oombũkĩĩte akuuĩĩtwo nĩ kĩũmbe kĩrĩ mathagu agĩgĩthiĩ arĩ mathaguinĩ ma rũhuuho.
Psalms18:11 Eehumbĩire na nduma
Psalms18:12 Mbura ya mbembe na makara maarĩrĩmbũkaga igĩtũrĩkania matu macio maake mairũ
Psalms18:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI akĩruruma e kũu igũrũ; naguo mũgambo wa Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno ũkĩiguuo igũrũ rĩa mbura ĩyo ya mbembe na makara macio maarĩrĩmbũkaga.
Psalms18:14 Naake agĩikia mĩguĩ yake
Psalms18:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kũndũ kũrĩa kwĩ na thĩ wa iria rĩrĩa inene
Psalms18:16 MWATHANI arĩ igũrũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko akĩnyiita
Psalms18:17 Agĩkĩhonokia kuuma mookoinĩ ma thũ ciakwa iria ciangĩrĩĩtie hinya
Psalms18:18 Manjũkĩrĩire rĩrĩa ndaarĩ mathĩĩnainĩ
Psalms18:19 MWATHANI agĩkĩnyumĩrĩria kũndũ gũtaarĩ na moogwati; agĩkĩhonokia nĩ ũndũ nĩakeneetio nĩ niĩ.
Psalms18:20 MWATHANI akĩndĩha kũringana na ũthingu wakwa; akĩndĩha kĩndũ na kĩngĩ nĩ ũndũ mooko maakwa matiekĩĩte ũũru.
Psalms18:21 O na nĩ ũndũ ndiagĩĩte kũrũmĩrĩra njĩra cia MWATHANI
Psalms18:22 Nĩndahingĩĩtie ũrĩa mawatho maake moothe moigĩĩte
Psalms18:23 Ndiarĩ na mahĩtia mbere ya MWATHANI
Psalms18:24 Tondũ ũcio MWATHANI nĩandĩhĩĩte kũringana na ũthingu wakwa
Psalms18:25 Wee
Psalms18:26 Wĩ mũtheru harĩ arĩa maikaraga methereetie
Psalms18:27 Wee-rĩ
Psalms18:28 Nĩ we
Psalms18:29 Nĩ we ũheaga hinya wa kũhehenja mbũtũ cia thũ ciakwa; o na ũkaahotithia kũrũũga thingo ciacio cia hinya cia kwĩgitĩra.
Psalms18:30 Ĩ Ngai ũyũ njĩra ciake ti nginyanĩru! Ĩ ciĩranĩro ciake ti ciakwĩhokwo! Nĩ we ngo ya arĩa oothe amenyagĩrĩra.
Psalms18:31 MWATHANI wiki no we Ngai; Ngai wiki nĩ we mũtũgitĩri.
Psalms18:32 Ngai ũcio nĩ we ũheaga hinya
Psalms18:33 Nĩ we ũhotithagia gũteng'era itegũtindirũka o ta thwariga ya mũgoma
Psalms18:34 Nĩ we ũndutaga ũrĩa mbaara ĩrũagwo
Psalms18:35 MWATHANI
Psalms18:36 Nĩ we ũheaga kũndũ kwariĩ gwa kũũrĩra; magũrũ maakwa matirĩ maatirũka.
Psalms18:37 Thũ ciakwa ndeng'eranagia nacio ngacinyiita; ndihũndũkaga o nginya rĩrĩa ndĩrĩĩkia gũciniina.
Psalms18:38 Ndĩcigũthaga ikagũa thĩ
Psalms18:39 Nĩ ũndũ wee
Psalms18:40 Nĩũtũmaga thũ ciakwa injũrĩre
Psalms18:41 Makayaga mateithio
Psalms18:42 Na niĩ ngakĩmathĩa
Psalms18:43 Nĩ we wahonokirie kuuma harĩ andũ arĩa maang'eng'anaga na niĩ
Psalms18:44 Andũ a kuuma mabũrũri mangĩ mookaga mbere yakwa makĩinamagĩrĩra; maiguaga ngumo yakwa
Psalms18:45 Makuaga ngoro magooka makĩinainaga moimĩĩte matũũrainĩ maao marĩa mairigĩre na thingo cia hinya.
Psalms18:46 MWATHANI e muoyo! Arogoocwo
Psalms18:47 Nĩ we Ngai ũrĩa ũndĩhagĩria harĩ thũ ciakwa
Psalms18:48 Nĩ we ũndutaga mookoinĩ ma thũ ciakwa
Psalms18:49 Tondũ ũcio
Psalms18:50 Nĩũheete mũthamaki waku ũhootani mũnene
Psalms19:1 Igũrũ rĩonanagia riiri wa Ngai
Psalms19:2 Mũthenya ũkinyagĩria mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ ũhoro wa riiri ũcio
Psalms19:3 Gũtirĩ ciugo kana mĩario ihũthagĩra
Psalms19:4 No o na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Psalms19:5 rĩrĩa rĩrookaga kwĩyumĩria o ta mũhikania akiuma gwake mũciĩ
Psalms19:6 Rĩrathagĩra mũthiainĩ ũmwe wa igũrũ
Psalms19:7 Watho wa MWATHANI nĩ mũkinyanĩru
Psalms19:8 Mawatho ma MWATHANI nĩ marũngĩrĩru
Psalms19:9 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩ ũndũ mwega
Psalms19:10 Nĩmakwĩrirĩrio gũkĩra thahabu ĩrĩa njega mũno; me mũrĩo gũkĩra mũruru wa ũũkĩ.
Psalms19:11 Nĩ mo manjũhĩgagia
Psalms19:12 Nũũ ũngĩhota gũkũũrana wega mahĩtia maake mwene? MWATHANI
Psalms19:13 Ningĩ ndigagĩrĩria
Psalms19:14 Ciugo cia kanua gaakwa
Psalms20:1 MWATHANI arogwĩtĩkaga hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũrĩ mathĩĩnainĩ Ngai wa Jakubu arokũmenyagĩrira.
Psalms20:2 Arogũtũmĩra ũteithio kuuma Hekaarũinĩ yake
Psalms20:3 Aroririkana mahaki maaku moothe
Psalms20:4 Arokũhe ũndũ ũrĩa ngoro yaku ĩrirĩirie
Psalms20:5 Nĩguo hĩndĩ ĩyo tũkaarũũhia nĩ ũndũ wa ũhootani waku
Psalms20:6 Rĩu nĩndamenya atĩ mũthamaki wake ũrĩa aitĩrĩirie maguta akamwamũraMWATHANI nĩamũheaga ũhootani
Psalms20:7 Andũ amwe mehokaga ngaari ciao cia mbarathi
Psalms20:8 Marĩtũgũũga magũe thĩ o mu
Psalms20:9 MWATHANI
Psalms21:1 MWATHANI
Psalms21:2 Nĩũmũhingĩirie ũrĩa erirĩirie na ngoro yake
Psalms21:3 Nĩũmũreehithĩirie iraathimo nene
Psalms21:4 Aakũhoire muoyo
Psalms21:5 Riiri wake nĩ mũnene nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa wee ũmũteithĩĩtie; nĩũmũheete ũnene o na igweta.
Psalms21:6 Nĩũmũraathimĩĩte na iraathimo cia gũtũũra nginya tene na tene
Psalms21:7 Nĩ gũkorwo mũthamaki ehokeete o MWATHANI na tondũ wa ũtugi wa Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno ndarĩ hingo akeenyenyeka.
Psalms21:8 Guoko gwaku nĩgũkaanyiita thũ ciaku ciothe; guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo nĩgũgaakumbata arĩa oothe magũthũire.
Psalms21:9 Rĩrĩa ũkaamoimĩrĩra-rĩ
Psalms21:10 Nĩũkaaniina ciana ciao ciothe ciehere gũũkũ thĩ; mbeũ yao ĩthire biũ thĩinĩ wa andũ.
Psalms21:11 O na mangĩbanga ũrĩa megũgwĩka ũũru
Psalms21:12 Nĩ gũkorwo wee nĩũkaamaratha na mĩguĩ yaku
Psalms21:13 Nĩtũgũgũkumia
Psalms22:1 Ngai wakwa
Psalms22:2 Ngũkayagĩra mũthenya
Psalms22:3 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms22:4 Wee nĩ we maithe maitũ meehokaga; maakwĩhokire
Psalms22:5 Nĩ we maakayagĩra
Psalms22:6 No niĩ ndĩ o kĩgunyũ
Psalms22:7 Arĩa oothe manyonaga no gũũthekerera mathekagĩrĩra
Psalms22:8 makoiga atĩrĩ
Psalms22:9 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms22:10 Ndũire menyereirwo nĩ we kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndaciarirwo; kuuma rĩrĩa ndoimire nda ya maitũ wee ũtũire ũrĩ Ngai wakwa.
Psalms22:11 Ndũkandaihĩrĩrie MWATHANI
Psalms22:12 Thiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ thũ nyingĩ ihaana ndeegwa; gũtirĩ mwena o na ũmwe thũ icio itariĩ ta ndeegwa iria irĩ ũrũme mũno cia bũrũri wa Bashani itarĩ.
Psalms22:13 Injathamĩirie tũnua twacio o ta mĩrũũthi
Psalms22:14 Hinya wakwa ũthirĩĩte o ta ũrĩa maaĩ maitĩĩtwo handũ hoomũ maniaraga na ihenya
Psalms22:15 Mũmero wakwa ũng'arĩĩte o ta rũgĩo rũhiũ
Psalms22:16 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩndigicĩirio nĩ mbũtũ ya andũ ooru; marooka na kũrĩ niĩ o ta magui mahũũtu
Psalms22:17 Mahĩndĩ maakwa moothe nĩmaroneka
Psalms22:18 Nĩkũgayana iragayana nguo ciakwa
Psalms22:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms22:20 Honokia harĩ rũhiũ rwa njora; honokia muoyo wakwa harĩ magui maya!
Psalms22:21 Honokia kuuma tũnuainĩ twa mĩrũũthi ĩno; honokia kuuma harĩ hĩa cia mbogo.
Psalms22:22 Nĩngũganĩra andũ aitũ ngumo ya rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Psalms22:23 Inyuĩ mũtĩĩĩte MWATHANI
Psalms22:24 Tondũ ndatiganĩirie ũrĩa ũnyamaarĩĩtio
Psalms22:25 Nĩ we ũheete hinya wa gũgũkumia ndĩ kĩũnganoinĩ kĩnene nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa wĩkĩĩte; ngũhingia mĩhĩtwa yakwa ĩrĩa ndeeranĩire ndĩ o mbere ya arĩa magũtĩĩĩte.
Psalms22:26 Andũ arĩa anyamaarie nĩmarĩe nginya mahũũne; arĩa mamaathaga MWATHANI nĩmamũkumie.Marotũũra magaacĩire nginya tene na tene!
Psalms22:27 Mĩhĩrĩga yothe ya ndũũrĩrĩ cia thĩ nĩgaathaathaiya MWATHANI; ĩkaamũririkana na ĩmũcookerere harĩa hoothe yarũma gũũkũ thĩ.
Psalms22:28 Nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki
Psalms22:29 Andũ oothe arĩa etĩĩi nĩmakaamũinamĩrĩra; arĩa oothe makuaga magathikwo no nginya magaaturia ndu mbere yake.
Psalms22:30 Njiarwa cia thuuthainĩ nĩikaamũtungatĩra; andũ nĩmakaaheaga rũciaro rũrĩa rũgooka thuutha ũhoro wa MWATHANI
Psalms22:31 o na mahunjagĩrie andũ arĩa magaaciarwo mameerage atĩrĩ
Psalms23:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mũrĩithi wakwa
Psalms23:2 Anjarahagia kũndũ kũrĩa kwĩ nyeki nduru
Psalms23:3 Aheaga ngoro yakwa hinya mwerũ
Psalms23:4 O na ingĩtuĩka ndĩrahungura mũkuru wĩ nduma ndumanu mũno
Psalms23:5 Ũthondekeire iruga thũ ciakwa ciothe ikĩonaga
Psalms23:6 Wendo na ũtugi nocio igũtũũra irũmanagĩrĩra na niĩ matukũ moothe ma muoyo wakwa
Psalms24:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mwene thĩ na kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩ thĩinĩ wayo; mabũrũri moothe nĩ maake
Psalms24:2 Tondũ nĩ we wakire mũthingi wayo ndiainĩ ndiku
Psalms24:3 Nũũ ũngĩambata kĩrĩma kĩa MWATHANI? Nũũ ũngĩrũũgama harĩa haake haamũre?
Psalms24:4 Nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mũtheru ngoro o na ciĩkoinĩ ciake; ũrĩa ũtathaathayagia mĩhianano
Psalms24:5 Mũndũ ta ũcio nĩarĩraathimagwo nĩ MWATHANI
Psalms24:6 Andũ a mũthemba ũcio nĩ o mamaathaga Ngai
Psalms24:7 Inyuĩ ihingo ici hingũkaai! Inyuĩ mĩrango ĩno ya tene hingũkaai
Psalms24:8 Mũthamaki ũcio wa riiri nĩ we ũ? Nĩ MWATHANI ũrĩa ũrĩ hinya na nĩ njamba; nĩ MWATHANI ũrĩa njamba ya ita.
Psalms24:9 Inyuĩ ihingo ici hingũkaai! Inyuĩ mĩrango ĩno ya tene hingũkaai nĩguo Mũthamaki wa riiri atoonye thĩinĩ!
Psalms24:10 Mũthamaki ũcio wa riiri nĩ we ũ? MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ we Mũthamaki ũcio wa riiri.

Psalms25:9 Atongoragia andũ arĩa menyiihagia na njĩra ya kĩhooto

Psalms26:12 Rĩu ndirĩ ũgwati o na ũrĩkũ ingĩtigĩra; ngũkĩgooca MWATHANI ndĩ o kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ aake.
Psalms27:1 MWATHANI nĩ we ũtheri wakwa
Psalms27:2 Rĩrĩa andũ ooru manjũkĩrĩra makĩenda kũnjũraga
Psalms27:3 O na ingĩrigiicĩrio nĩ mbũtũ nene ya ita
Psalms27:4 Ndĩ o ũndũ ũmwe njũũrĩĩtie MWATHANI
Psalms27:5 Tondũ nĩarĩngitagĩra hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna; Hekaarũinĩ yake nĩkuo arĩhithaga
Psalms27:6 Rĩu nĩndooreetie thũ ciakwa iria ithiũrũrũkĩirie; nĩngũruta magongoona Hekaarũinĩ ya MWATHANI ngĩrũũhagia na ndĩmũinĩre rwĩmbo rwa kũmũgooca.
Psalms27:7 Thikagĩrĩria
Psalms27:8 Rĩrĩa woigire atĩrĩ
