Psalms27:10 O na baaba na maitũ mangĩndiganĩria
Psalms27:11 Nyonagĩrĩria
Psalms27:12 Ndũkaaneane kũrĩ thũ ciakwa iria iranjigĩrĩra igeenyo
Psalms27:13 Nĩnjĩtĩkĩĩtie atĩ nĩngoona wega wa MWATHANI ndĩ o muoyoinĩ ũyũ.
Psalms27:14 Eterera o MWATHANI! gĩa na hinya

Psalms31:1 MWATHANI
Psalms31:2 Thikĩrĩria na ũndeithie o narua! Tuĩka handũ haakwa ha gwĩtharĩra ũmenyagĩrĩre
Psalms31:3 Nĩ gũkorwo wee nĩ we mũngitĩri
Psalms31:4 Nduta mũtegoinĩ ũrĩa nyambĩirwo
Psalms31:5 Ndaiga muoyo wakwa mookoinĩ maaku; nĩũkũngũũra
Psalms31:6 Nĩũthũire arĩa oothe mathaathayagia ngai cia mĩhianano; niĩ-rĩ
Psalms31:7 Nĩngũkena o na njanjamũke tondũ wa ũtugi waku
Psalms31:8 Ndũndekereirie mookoinĩ ma thũ ciakwa
Psalms31:9 Nginyĩria wega waku
Psalms31:10 Nĩndooreetio nĩ kĩeha
Psalms31:11 Nĩnyararĩĩtwo nĩ arĩa marĩ ũthũ na niĩ
Psalms31:12 Meciiriainĩ ma andũ ndiganĩire o ta ũrĩa mũndũ ũrĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua ariganagĩra; haana o ta kĩndũ gĩteetwo mborerainĩ.
Psalms31:13 Nĩndĩraigua thũ nyingĩ ikĩaria na mĩheehũ guoya ũgakĩnyuma na mĩena yothe.Irabangĩra mĩbango mĩũru
Psalms31:14 No wee
Psalms31:15 Nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra hingo ciothe; honokia kuuma harĩ thũ ciakwa
Psalms31:16 Ũthiũ waku ũrotherera ndungata yaku; honokia tondũ wa ũtugi waku.
Psalms31:17 Ndũgeetĩkĩre
Psalms31:18 Tũnua tũrĩa twaragia maheeni tũrotumana
Psalms31:19 Ĩ wega waku ũrĩa ũigĩire arĩa magũtĩĩĩte ti mũingĩ! Andũ oothe nĩmooĩ ũrĩa wee ũtugaga arĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra.
Psalms31:20 Ũmahithaga o harĩa wee ũrĩ
Psalms31:21 Goocaai MWATHANI nĩ ũndũ nĩaranyonirie wendo wa magegania
Psalms31:22 Nĩndĩramakĩĩte na ngambĩrĩria gwĩciiria atĩ nĩanyingatĩĩte akanjeheria maithoinĩ maake; no nĩaraiguire mathaithana maakwa
Psalms31:23 Endaai MWATHANI
Psalms31:24 Gĩai na hinya

Psalms33:1 Inyuothe arĩa athingu

Psalms33:4 Tondũ ciugo cia MWATHANI nĩ cia ma
Psalms33:5 MWATHANI eendeete ũthingu na kĩhooto; ũtugi wake ũiyũire thĩ o kũiyũra.
Psalms33:6 Igũrũ rĩombirwo na kiugo kĩa MWATHANI nĩ we woigire igũrũ rĩgĩe
Psalms33:7 Nĩ we wacookanĩrĩirie maaĩ ma maria marĩa manene handũ hamwe
Psalms33:8 Thĩ yothe nĩthaathaiye MWATHANI
Psalms33:9 Nĩ ũndũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aaririe
Psalms33:10 MWATHANI nĩ we ũtũmaga maũndũ marĩa ndũũrĩrĩ ibangĩĩte gwĩka matuĩke ma tũhũ; nĩ we ũthũũkanagia mĩbango ĩrĩa andũ mabangĩĩte.
Psalms33:11 Ũndũ ũrĩa MWATHANI aciirĩire gwĩka-rĩ
Psalms33:12 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Psalms33:13 MWATHANI acũũthagĩrĩria arĩ o igũrũ
Psalms33:14 Acũũthagĩrĩria arĩa oothe matũũraga gũũkũ thĩ arĩ o gĩtĩinĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki.
Psalms33:15 Nĩ we ũmahotithagia gwĩciiria na nĩoĩ ciĩko ciao ciothe.
Psalms33:16 Mũthamaki-rĩ

Psalms34:1 Nĩndĩcookagĩria MWATHANI ngaatho hĩndĩ ciothe; ngũtũũra ndĩmũgoocaga.
Psalms34:2 Ngoro yakwa no gũkumia ĩrakumia MWATHANI; arĩa oothe ahinyĩrĩrie marĩiguaga ũguo magakena.
Psalms34:3 Goocaai ũnene wa MWATHANI mwĩ hamwe na niĩ; rekeei tũtũũgĩrie rĩĩtwa rĩake tũrĩ hamwe!
Psalms34:4 Ndahoire MWATHANI
Psalms34:5 Andũ arĩa mahinyĩrĩirio mamũcũũthagĩrĩria magakena; gũtirĩ hingo maconorithagio.
Psalms34:6 Ndakaĩire MWATHANI
Psalms34:7 Mũraika wa MWATHANI aikaraga arangĩire arĩa mathĩkagĩra MWATHANI
Psalms34:8 Camaai muone atĩ MWATHANI nĩ mwega! Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Psalms34:9 Athĩkĩraai MWATHANI
Psalms34:10 Mĩrũũthi mĩĩthĩ nĩyagaga gĩa kũrĩa ĩkahũũta
Psalms34:11 Ũkaai
Psalms34:12 Nĩ ũrĩkũ wanyu ũngĩenda gũikara na gĩkeno na gũtũũra matukũ maingĩ oonaga maũndũ meega?
Psalms34:13 Kĩmenyagĩrĩre rũrĩmĩ rwaku rũtikanoige ũũru
Psalms34:14 Ndũkaneeke ũũru
Psalms34:15 MWATHANI aikaraga acũũthĩrĩirie andũ arĩa athingu
Psalms34:16 No nĩareganaga na andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru
Psalms34:17 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ arĩa athingu makaĩra MWATHANI amateithie
Psalms34:18 MWATHANI akoragwo hakuhĩ na arĩa makuĩte ngoro
Psalms34:19 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩatũnganaga na mathĩĩna maingĩ
Psalms34:20 Amũmenyagĩrĩra wega; hatirĩ ihĩndĩ o na rĩmwe rĩake rĩngiunwo.
Psalms34:21 Andũ arĩa aaganu makooragwo nĩ ũũru; arĩa nao mathũire andũ arĩa athingu nĩmakaaherithio.
Psalms34:22 MWATHANI nĩakũũraga mĩoyo ya ndungata ciake; arĩa mooragĩra harĩ we amamenyerere ndamaherithagia.
Psalms35:1 MWATHANI
Psalms35:2 Oya ngo yaku na indo ciaku cia mbaara
Psalms35:3 Arĩa mahanyũkanĩĩtie na niĩ moere itimũ rĩaku o na ithanwa; ũkĩnjĩĩre atĩrĩ
Psalms35:4 Arĩa meendaga kũnduta muoyo maroconorwo na maagithio gĩtĩĩo.Arĩa mabangaga ũrĩa mekũnjũkĩrĩra manjĩke ũũru marohũndũrwo
Psalms35:5 Marotuĩka ta mahuti moombũrĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho nĩ ũrĩa maingatithĩĩtio nĩ mũraika wa MWATHANI.
Psalms35:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũraika wa MWATHANI ahanyũkanĩĩtie nao-rĩ
Psalms35:7 Nĩ ũndũ manjigĩire mũtego na makanyenjera irima nĩguo manyiite o na itameekĩĩte ũũru o na atĩa.
Psalms35:8 Marokorererwo nĩ mwanangĩko materĩgĩrĩire; maronyiitwo nĩ mũtego ũcio manjigĩire maanangĩke arĩ o!
Psalms35:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngoro yakwa nĩgacanjamũka nĩ ũndũ wa MWATHANI; nĩngaakena nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa ahonokeetie.
Psalms35:10 Nĩngeera MWATHANI na ngoro yakwa yothe atĩrĩ
Psalms35:11 Aira me na muorooto wa kũndoonyia ũgwatiinĩ marookĩra
Psalms35:12 Marandĩha wega na ũũru
Psalms35:13 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maarĩ arũaru-rĩ
Psalms35:14 ta arĩ mũraata wakwa kana mũrũ wa maitũ ũratũma ndĩthikĩre.Ndathiaga ndĩthikĩire o ta mũndũ ũracakaĩra nyina.
Psalms35:15 No niĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndarĩ mathĩĩnainĩ
Psalms35:16 Magĩgĩkĩrĩrĩria kũnyũrũria makĩmenagĩrĩria na makĩndoraga manyiira.
Psalms35:17 Nĩ ihinda rĩigana atĩa hiihi
Psalms35:18 Na niĩ nĩndĩrĩgũcookagĩria ngaatho ndĩ kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ aaku; ngũgoocage ndĩ mbere yao oothe.
Psalms35:19 Ndũkaareke arĩa manduĩte thũ yao o rĩrĩa itarĩ makenerere kũhootwo gwakwa; arĩa mathũire o na hatarĩ na ũũru ndĩmeekĩĩte ndũkaareke maroranage makiunanagĩra maitho nĩgũkenio nĩ ũrĩa ndĩranyariirĩka.
Psalms35:20 Nĩ gũkorwo o maaragia o maũndũ ma haaro
Psalms35:21 Manjathamagĩria tũnua twao makaanĩrĩra makoiga atĩrĩ
Psalms35:22 No wee
Psalms35:23 Arahũka
Psalms35:24 MWATHANI Ngai wakwa
Psalms35:25 Ndũkaareke ciĩĩre na ngoro atĩrĩ
Psalms35:26 Reke arĩa makenaga nĩkuona ngĩnyariirĩka maconoke na maturuure; arĩa meyonaga ta marĩ eega kũngĩra marohumbwo nĩ gĩconoko na manyararwo!
Psalms35:27 Reke arĩa marenda kuona kĩhooto gĩakwa kĩgitĩirwo maanĩrĩre makeneete na moige mategũtigithĩria atĩrĩ
Psalms35:28 Na niĩ nĩndĩrĩheanaga ũrĩa wee wĩ mũthingu na ngũgoocage mũthenya wothe.
Psalms36:1 Andũ arĩa ooru matitĩĩaga Ngai meciiragia o ũhoro wa meehia.
Psalms36:2 Nĩ gũkorwo meheenagia makeĩĩra atĩ Ngai ndangĩmenya meehia marĩa meekĩĩte na amaherithie nĩ ũndũ wamo.
Psalms36:3 Kanua kaao kaaragia o maũndũ mooru na ma maheeni; matiĩkaga maũndũ ma ũũgĩ na meega.
Psalms36:4 Mathugundaga mĩbango mĩũru makomeete itandainĩ ciao; njĩra ĩrĩa mageragĩra ĩmeerekagĩria o maũndũinĩ mooru; na gũtirĩ hĩndĩ mathũũraga ũndũ o wothe mũũru.
Psalms36:5 Ũtugi waku
Psalms36:6 Ũthingu waku ũraihĩĩte na igũrũ o ta irĩma
Psalms36:7 Ĩ ũtugi waku
Psalms36:8 Nao makarĩa makahũũna wega nyũmbainĩ yaku
Psalms36:9 Wee-rĩ
Psalms36:10 Kĩrĩrĩria gũkinyĩria arĩa makũũĩ wendo waku
Psalms36:11 Ndũkaareke nginyangĩrĩrio thĩ nĩ andũ arĩa marĩ mwĩtĩĩo
Psalms36:12 Taone ũrĩa andũ arĩa ooru magũĩte! Maikanĩĩtio thĩ
Psalms37:1 Ndũgatangĩkage ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa meekaga ũũru
Psalms37:2 Amu megũthira narua ta ũrĩa nyeki yũmaga
Psalms37:3 Wĩhokage o MWATHANI
Psalms37:4 Ikaraga ũgĩĩkaga maũndũ marĩa makenagia Ngai
Psalms37:5 Rekagĩrĩria MWATHANI maũndũ maaku moothe
Psalms37:6 Nĩarĩtũmaga ũthingu waku ũkengage ta ũtheri wa mũthenya
Psalms37:7 Ikaraga mbere ya MWATHANI ũhooreire
Psalms37:8 Wĩgiragĩrĩrie kũraakara
Psalms37:9 Arĩa meekaga ũũru nĩmakaaniinwo
Psalms37:10 No ihinda iniini rĩtigarĩĩte andũ arĩa ooru maniinwo; ũrĩmacaria ciikaroinĩ ciao
Psalms37:11 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms37:12 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru abangagĩra mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu mĩbango mĩũru
Psalms37:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms37:14 Andũ arĩa ooru macomoreete hiũ ciao cia njora
Psalms37:15 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms37:16 Indo niini iria mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu akoragwo nacio nĩ njega gũkĩra ũtonga wothe wa andũ arĩa ooru.
Psalms37:17 Tondũ hinya wa arĩa ooru nĩũkaaniinwo nĩ MWATHANI
Psalms37:18 MWATHANI nĩarũmbũyagia andũ arĩa mamwathĩkagĩra
Psalms37:19 Mationaga ũũru hingo ya mathĩĩna; makoragwo na irio cia kũigana hingo ĩrĩa kũrĩ na ng'aragu.
Psalms37:20 No andũ arĩa ooru nĩgũthira magaathira; thũ cia MWATHANI igaathira o ta ũrĩa ũthaka wa mahũa ũthiraga; igaathirĩrĩkĩra o ta ũrĩa ndoogo ithirĩrĩkagĩra.
Psalms37:21 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru akombaga kĩndũ na ndarĩhaga
Psalms37:22 Arĩa maraathimĩĩtwo nĩ MWATHANI nĩ o makaagaya thĩ
Psalms37:23 MWATHANI nĩ we wonagĩrĩria mũndũ njĩra ĩrĩa aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũgera; mũndũ ũrĩa ũthiaga na mĩthiĩre ĩrĩa ĩmũkenagia nĩamũmenyagĩrĩra wega.
Psalms37:24 O na angĩtindirũka ndangĩgũa
Psalms37:25 Kuuma rĩrĩa ndarĩ mũnyiinyi nginyagia rĩu ndĩ mũkũrũ
Psalms37:26 Hingo ciothe aheanaga ategũthuurania na agakombagĩra andũ arĩa angĩ; ciana ciake nĩ kĩraathimo harĩ we.
Psalms37:27 Tigaga gwĩka ũũru
Psalms37:28 Tondũ MWATHANI eendeete o kĩhooto
Psalms37:29 Arĩa athingu nĩ o makaagaya thĩ
Psalms37:30 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu aaragia o ndeto cia ũũgĩ
Psalms37:31 Ngoro yake ĩikaraga ĩrũmĩĩtie o watho wa Ngai wake
Psalms37:32 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru aikaraga ooheirie mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩguo amũũrage
Psalms37:33 no MWATHANI ndangĩmũrekereria mookoinĩ ma mũndũ ũcio mũũru
Psalms37:34 Ikaraga wĩhokeete o MWATHANI na ũrũmagĩrĩre njĩra ciake
Psalms37:35 Njĩrĩgĩĩte kuona mũndũ ũmwe mũũru wahinyanagĩrĩria mũno; aikaraga eetũũgĩrĩĩtie igũrũ rĩa andũ oothe ta mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni.
Psalms37:36 Mũthenya ũmwe nĩndahĩtũkĩire gwake
Psalms37:37 Baara mũndũ ũrĩa mwega
Psalms37:38 No arĩa meehagia nĩkũniinwo makaaniinwo o biũ; njiarwa ciao nĩkũũragwo ikooragwo.
Psalms37:39 MWATHANI nĩ we ũhonokagia andũ arĩa athingu; nĩamamenyagĩrĩra hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna.
Psalms37:40 Nĩamateithagia na akamaruta ũgwatiinĩ; amahonokagia kuuma harĩ andũ arĩa ooru tondũ mooragĩra harĩ we nĩguo amamenyerere.
Psalms38:1 MWATHANI
Psalms38:2 tondũ nĩũndihangĩĩtie na mĩguĩ yaku
Psalms38:3 Mwĩrĩ wakwa wothe nĩũratuura nĩ ũndũ wa maraakara maaku; mahĩndĩ maakwa nĩmarandĩa nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maakwa.
Psalms38:4 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩngunĩkanĩirio nĩ meehia maakwa; nĩ mũrigo mũritũ mũno itangĩhota gũkuua.
Psalms38:5 Tondũ wa ũrimũ wakwa-rĩ
Psalms38:6 Thiaga ndĩhacĩĩte o nginya ngakuruma na nda; mũthenya wothe ndindaga ngĩcakaya.
Psalms38:7 Nĩ gũkorwo njohero yakwa ĩ na ruwo ta rwa mwaki
Psalms38:8 Ndirĩ na hinya o na mũnyiinyi
Psalms38:9 MWATHANI
Psalms38:10 Ngoro yakwa ĩrahũũra na hinya; hinya wakwa nĩ mũthiru
Psalms38:11 Araata aakwa na arĩa tũrigainie nao matirenda kũnguhĩrĩria nĩ ũndũ wa ironda iria ndĩ nacio; o na andũ a mũciĩ witũ nĩmaranjũrĩra.
Psalms38:12 Arĩa marenda kũnjũraga nĩ mĩtego maranjigĩra nao arĩa marenda kũnjĩka ũũru no kũmakia maramakia; mũthenya wothe matindaga makĩbanga ũrĩa mekũnjũkĩrĩra.
Psalms38:13 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms38:14 Haana ta mũndũ ũtaiguaga
Psalms38:15 No wee
Psalms38:16 Ndakũhooya ndũkaareke thũ ciakwa ikenerere mĩnyamaarĩko yakwa! Ndũkaareke ciĩtĩĩe nĩ ũndũ wa kũhootwo gwakwa!
Psalms38:17 Tondũ ndigairie o haniini ngurumane
Psalms38:18 Nĩndoimbũra meehia maakwa
Psalms38:19 Arĩa mathũire nĩ andũ matarĩ na mũrimũ
Psalms38:20 Ndumĩĩtwo ũthũ nĩ arĩa mandĩhaga wega na ũũru tondũ nĩngeragia gwĩka maũndũ marĩa maagĩrĩire.
Psalms38:21 Ndũkaanandiganĩrie
Psalms38:22 Ũka na ihenya ũndeithie
Psalms39:1 Ndoigire atĩrĩ
Psalms39:2 Ndakirĩĩte ki o ta mũndũ ũtangĩhota kwaria
Psalms39:3 nayo ngoro yakwa ĩkahĩĩahĩĩagĩra thĩinĩ wakwa.O ũrĩa ndakĩragĩrĩria gwĩcũũrania
Psalms39:4 “MWATHANI
Psalms39:5 Ĩ matukũ marĩa ũheete ma gũtũũra gũũkũ thĩ ti maniini!Ihinda rĩakwa rĩothe rĩa gũtũũra gũũkũ thĩ ti kĩndũ harĩ we.Ti itherũ mũndũ o wothe wĩ muoyo o na angĩkorwo ahaana atĩa
Psalms39:6 Muoyo wake ũthiraga na ihenya o ta kĩĩruru; mĩhang'o ĩrĩa ehang'agia nayo no ya tũhũ; eyũmbagĩrĩra ũtonga mũingĩ
Psalms39:7 “Rĩu
Psalms39:8 Nduta meehiainĩ maakwa moothe
Psalms39:9 Ngũikara ngirĩĩte ki
Psalms39:10 Ndũkahũũre rĩngĩ! Ihũũra rĩaku nĩrĩniinĩĩte mwĩrĩ wakwa hinya.
Psalms39:11 Rĩrĩa watua kũherithia mũndũ ũkĩmũrũithagia nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maake-rĩ
Psalms39:12 “Igua ihooya rĩakwa
Psalms39:13 Tiga kũndaakarĩra
Psalms40:1 Ndeetereire MWATHANI andeithie o ngirĩrĩirie
Psalms40:2 Akĩnduta irimainĩ rĩa rĩũrĩro
Psalms40:3 Agĩĩkĩra rwĩmbo rwerũ kanuainĩ gaakwa rwa kũgoocaga Ngai witũ naruo.Andũ aingĩ marĩonaga ũguo magetigĩra
Psalms40:4 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Psalms40:5 MWATHANI Ngai wakwa
Psalms40:6 Wee-rĩ
Psalms40:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms40:8 Nĩngenagio nĩgwĩka ta ũrĩa wendeete
Psalms40:9 Nĩheanĩĩte ũhoro mwega wa ũrĩa ũtũhonokeetie
Psalms40:10 Ndihithĩĩte ngoroinĩ yakwa ũhoro wa ũrĩa ũhonokanagia nĩnjarĩĩtie ũhoro wa ũrĩa wee wĩ mwĩhokeku
Psalms40:11 MWATHANI
Psalms40:12 Nĩthiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ mathĩĩna maingĩ mũno; meehia maakwa nĩmanyingĩhĩire nginya ngaremwo nĩkuona. Nĩ maingĩ gũkĩra njuĩrĩ cia mũtwe wakwa
Psalms40:13 Honokia
Psalms40:14 Andũ arĩa marenda kũnjũraga maroconorwo na maturuure biũ; acio marenda kũnjĩka ũũru marohũndũrwo na maconorwo.
Psalms40:15 Arĩa mathekagĩrĩra marokua ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mahooteetwo.
Psalms40:16 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms40:17 MWATHANI
Psalms41:1 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Psalms41:2 MWATHANI nĩarĩmũmenyagĩrĩra na amũtũũragie muoyo arĩmũikaragia na gĩkeno bũrũriinĩ na ndarĩmũrekagĩrĩria mookoinĩ ma thũ ciake.
Psalms41:3 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa akomeete gĩtandainĩ arĩ mũrũaru-rĩ
Psalms41:4 Na niĩ ngũkiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms41:5 Thũ ciakwa ciaragia ũhoro wakwa irĩ na ũiru ikooria atĩrĩ
Psalms41:6 Ũrĩa mũrĩ ũthũ na niĩ angĩũka kũndora
Psalms41:7 Arĩa oothe mathũire maheehanaga makĩaria ndeto ciakwa makĩhooyagĩra nyone ũũru.
Psalms41:8 Moigaga atĩrĩ
Psalms41:9 O na mũraata wakwa ũrĩa mũnene
Psalms41:10 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms41:11 Weka ũguo nĩngũmenya atĩ nĩũkeneetio nĩ niĩ na atĩ thũ yakwa ndĩngĩrũũhia nĩ ũndũ nĩndĩmĩtooreetie.
Psalms41:12 Nĩũkũndeithia
Psalms41:13 Goocaai MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli nginya tene na tene! Ameni! Ameni!
Psalms42:1 Wee Ngai ngoro yakwa ĩkwĩrirĩirie
Psalms42:2 Ngoro yakwa ĩnyooteire Ngai
Psalms42:3 Ndĩraga mũthenya na ũtukũ
Psalms42:4 Nĩnguaga ngoro
Psalms42:5 Nĩkĩ wee ngoro yakwa
Psalms42:6 (6-7) Gũũkũ ithaamĩrioinĩ ngoro yakwa nĩrathĩĩnĩka mũno
Psalms42:7 MWATHANI aronanagia ũtugi wake mũthenya
Psalms42:8 Njũũragia Ngai
Psalms42:9 Nĩhehenjeetwo nĩ irumi iria thũ ciakwa iranuma ikĩnjũũragia itegũtigithĩria atĩrĩ
Psalms42:10 Nĩ kĩĩ
Psalms43:1 Tua ciira wakwa
Psalms43:2 Wee Ngai nĩ we mũmenyereri ũndiganĩirie nĩkĩ?Thiaga ndĩthikĩire nĩ ũrĩa thũ ciakwa ihinyĩrĩirie nĩkĩ?
Psalms43:3 Tũma ũtheri waku o na ũhoro waku wa ma indongorie arĩ cio
Psalms43:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩndĩthiĩ kĩgongoonainĩ gĩaku
Psalms43:5 Nĩ kĩĩ
Psalms44:1 Twaneiguĩra na matũ maitũ
Psalms44:2 Nĩ we warutũrũrire ndũũrĩrĩ na guoko gwaku
Psalms44:3 Andũ aaku matiahootire bũrũri na hiũ ciao cia njora; ti mooko maao maamaheire ũhootani; nĩ na hinya na ũhoti waku
Psalms44:4 Wee nĩ we mũthamaki wakwa na Ngai wakwa
Psalms44:5 Nĩ we ũtũhotithagia na hinya waku
Psalms44:6 Ndiĩhokeete ũta wakwa
Psalms44:7 Wee nĩ we ũtũhonokagia kuuma gwĩ thũ ciitũ
Psalms44:8 Wee Ngai tũtũire twĩgoocaga nawe
Psalms44:9 No rĩu nĩũtũtiganĩirie na ũgatũconorithia; ndũtwaranaga na mbũtũ ciitũ cia ita.
Psalms44:10 Nĩũtũmĩĩte tũũrĩre thũ ciitũ
Psalms44:11 Ũrekereirie tũthĩnjwo o ta ng'ondu
Psalms44:12 Wendeetie andũ aaku ta nyũngũ nguũ
Psalms44:13 Nĩũtũtuĩte andũ a kũmenwo nĩ arĩa tũrigainie nao
Psalms44:14 Nĩ ũtũtuĩte andũ anyarare gatagatĩinĩ ka ndũũrĩrĩ
Psalms44:15 Njikaraga hingo ciothe nyararĩĩtwo ngahumbwo nĩ thoni ũthiũ wothe
Psalms44:16 nĩ ũndũ wa inyũrũri na irumi cia thũ ciakwa na cia arĩa mathũire.
Psalms44:17 Tũkorereirwo nĩ maũndũ macio moothe
Psalms44:18 Ithuĩ tũtikũremeire
Psalms44:19 o na gũtuĩka wee nĩũtũtiganĩirie o ũguo gatagatĩinĩ ka nyamũ ndĩani
Psalms44:20 Korwo nĩtwariganĩirwo nĩgũgũthaathaiya
Psalms44:21 ti itherũ wee no ũngĩamenyire ũndũ ũcio
Psalms44:22 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms44:23 Arahũka! MWATHANI
Psalms44:24 Ũratũhitha ũthiũ waku nĩkĩ? Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma ũriganĩrwo nĩ mĩnyamaaro iitũ na mathĩĩna maitũ?
Psalms44:25 Tũgũĩte thĩ tũhũũrĩkĩĩte
Psalms44:26 Ũkĩra MWATHANI
Psalms45:1 Ngoro yakwa nĩiyũrĩrĩirwo nĩ ciugo njega
Psalms45:2 Wee ũrĩ mũthaka gũkĩra arũme oothe; nĩũũĩ kwaria wega mũno;Ngai nĩakũraathimaga hingo ciothe.
Psalms45:3 Ũrĩ na ũnene waku na riiri waku wĩyohe rũhiũ rwaku rwa njora
Psalms45:4 Thiĩ na ũnene waku ũhaicĩĩte mbarathi ũkĩhootanaga ũgitĩre ũũma na kĩhooto; hinya waku ũrokũhe ũhootani mũnene!
Psalms45:5 Mĩguĩ yaku nĩ mĩũgĩ nĩtheeceete ngoro cia thũ ciaku; andũ no kũgũa maragũa magũrũinĩ maaku.
Psalms45:6 Ũthamaki ũrĩa Ngai akũheete ũgũtũũra nginya tene na tene.Ũthamakagĩra andũ aaku na kĩhooto;
Psalms45:7 nĩwendeete ũthingu na ũgathũũra waganuNĩkĩo Ngai
Psalms45:8 Nguo ciaku inungĩĩte o manemane na thubiri; ũracanjamũrwo nĩ aini me nyũmbainĩ cia ũthamaki igemeetio na mĩguongo.
Psalms45:9 Thĩinĩ wa arũũgamĩrĩri aaku a andũ a nja harĩ na aarĩ a athamaki mwena waku wa ũrĩo nĩ ho ngatha yaku ĩrũngiĩ
Psalms45:10 Tandegera matũ
Psalms45:11 Ũthaka waku nĩũgũtũma mũthamaki akwĩrirĩrie. Mwathĩkagĩre
Psalms45:12 Mwarĩ ũyũ uumĩĩte bũrũri wa Turo
Psalms45:13 Mwarĩ wa mũthamaki e thĩinĩ wa nyũmba ya mũthamaki. Ĩ ti mũthaka!Nguo yake ĩtumĩĩtwo na ndigi cia thahabu.
Psalms45:14 Aratwarwo he mũthamaki ehumbĩĩte nguo thaka mũno
Psalms45:15 Maratwarwo na gĩkeno na ndũũhiũ magĩtoonya nyũmba kwa mũthamaki.
Psalms45:16 Wee
Psalms45:17 Rwĩmbo rũũrũ rwakwa rũgũtũma ũtũũre ũririkanagwo nĩ njiarwa ciothe
Psalms46:1 Ngai-rĩ
Psalms46:2 Tondũ ũcio tũtingĩtigĩra o na thĩ ĩngĩthingitha
Psalms46:3 na o maaĩ maarĩo marurume na mahũyũke
Psalms46:4 Nĩharĩ rũũĩ rũrĩa tũrũũĩ twarwo tũkenagia itũũra rĩa Ngai
Psalms46:5 Ngai arĩ thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩu na rĩtikaaharaganio o na rĩ; kĩrooko tene nĩrĩo Ngai arĩũkaga kũrĩteithia.
Psalms46:6 Mabũrũri nĩmambararũkĩĩte
Psalms46:7 MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ; Ngai wa Jakubu nĩ we handũ haitũ ha gwĩtharĩra.
Psalms46:8 Ũkaai muone ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte muone maũndũ ma magegania marĩa eekĩĩte gũũkũ thĩ
Psalms46:9 aniinaga mbaara thĩ yothe
Psalms46:10 Aroiga atĩrĩ
Psalms46:11 MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ; Ngai wa Jakubu nĩ we handũ haitũ ha gwĩtharĩra.
Psalms47:1 Hũũraai hĩ nĩgũkena inyuĩ andũ oothe! Inaai mwanĩrĩire mũgooce Ngai!
Psalms47:2 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI
Psalms47:3 Aatũheire ũhootani igũrũ rĩa andũ
Psalms47:4 Bũrũri ũrĩa tũtũũraga nĩ we watũthuurĩire
Psalms47:5 Ngai nĩkwambata arambata gĩtĩinĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki; MWATHANI arambata agĩkũngũagĩrwo o na gĩkeno na akĩhuhagĩrwo tũrumbeeta.
Psalms47:6 Inĩraai Ngai mũkĩmũgoocaga mũinĩreei mũkĩmũkumagia!Inĩraai mũthamaki witũ mũkĩmũgoocaga
Psalms47:7 Nĩ gũkorwo Ngai nĩ we mũthamaki wa thĩ yothe; mũgooceei na nyĩmbo!
Psalms47:8 Ngai aikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩake gĩtheru kĩa ũthamaki; nĩ we ũthamakagĩra ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe.
Psalms47:9 Athamaki a ndũũrĩrĩ nĩkũrũrũngana mararũrũngana matuĩke andũ a Ngai wa Aburahamu.Arĩ hinya gũkĩra mbũtũ ciothe cia ita; nĩ we ũtũũgĩrĩĩtio mũno!
Psalms48:1 MWATHANI nĩ mũnene na nĩ wa kũgoocwo mũno itũũrainĩ rĩa Ngai witũ
Psalms48:2 Zayuni
Psalms48:3 Kũu nyũmbainĩ cia itũũra iria ciakĩĩtwo na thingo cia hinya
Psalms48:4 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Psalms48:5 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms48:6 Maambĩrĩirie kũinainĩra o hau na makĩnyiitwo nĩ ruwo ta rwa mũtumia arĩ hakuhĩ gũciara.
Psalms48:7 Maahaanire ta meeri cia Sipania iria ciahũũrithanagio nĩ kĩhuuhũkanio kĩnene
Psalms48:8 Ũrĩa tũiguĩte
Psalms48:9 Thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ yaku wee
Psalms48:10 Ngumo yaku
Psalms48:11 Reke andũ a Zayuni makene! Reke matũũra ma Juda macanjamũke nĩ ũndũ wa matua maaku meega!
Psalms48:12 Thiũrũrũkaai Zayuni
Psalms48:13 roraai thingo ciarĩo na mũbaare nyũmba ciarĩo cia kwĩgitĩra iria ciakĩĩtwo na thingo cia hinya mũno
Psalms48:14 “Ngai ũyũ nĩ we Ngai witũ nginya tene na tenena egũtũũra atũtongoragia nginya tene na tene.”
Psalms49:1 Thikĩrĩriai ũndũ ũyũ
Psalms49:2 arĩa marĩ ngumo na arĩa matarĩ
Psalms49:3 Ngwaria ciugo cia ũũgĩ
Psalms49:4 Nĩngwĩciiria ũrĩa thimo ciugĩĩte
Psalms49:5 Hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna
Psalms49:6 Ndiĩtigagĩra andũ arĩa mehokeete ũtonga wao
Psalms49:7 Mũndũ ndangĩhota o na atĩa gwĩkũũra we mwene; gũtirĩ kĩndũ mũndũ angĩhe Ngai agũre muoyo wake nakĩo
Psalms49:8 nĩ gũkorwo irĩhi rĩa muoyo wa mũndũ nĩ rĩnene mũno. Kĩrĩa mũndũ angĩheana gĩtingĩigana o na atĩa
Psalms49:9 gũtũma aage gũkaanatoonya mbĩĩrĩrainĩ. agĩtũũre muoyo tene na tene.
Psalms49:10 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtoonaga andũ arĩa oogĩ magĩkua
Psalms49:11 Mbĩĩrĩra ciao nĩcio mĩciĩ yao ya tene na tene; kũu nĩkuo megũtũũra mĩndĩ na mĩndĩ
Psalms49:12 Ũtonga wa mũndũ ndũngĩmũhonokia harĩ gĩkuũ; no agaakua o ta ũrĩa nyamũ ikuaga.
Psalms49:13 Ũguo nĩguo andũ arĩa meĩhokaga o eene marĩĩkagĩrĩria
Psalms49:14 Maathĩrĩirwo gũgaakua o ta ng'ondu
Psalms49:15 No Ngai nĩagaakũũra muoyo wakwa kuuma hinyainĩ wa gĩkuũ
Psalms49:16 Ndũgetigagĩre rĩrĩa mũndũ atuĩka gĩtonga
Psalms49:17 nĩ gũkorwo rĩrĩa agaakua ndakaahota gũkuua ũtonga ũcio athiĩ naguo; ũtonga wake ndũgaikũrũkania naake mbĩĩrĩrainĩ.
Psalms49:18 O na mũndũ angĩkorwo muoyoinĩ ũyũ nĩaiganĩire
Psalms49:19 no mũhaka agaakua o ta ũrĩa maithe maake maakuire
Psalms49:20 Ũtonga wa mũndũ ndũngĩmũhonokia harĩ gĩkuũ; no agaakua o ta ũrĩa nyamũ ikuaga.
Psalms50:1 Ngai MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩkwaria araaria; areeta thĩ yothe kuuma irathĩro nginya ithũĩro.
Psalms50:2 Ngai nĩgũkenga arakenga e Zayuni
Psalms50:3 Ngai witũ nĩgũũka arooka na ndakirĩĩte ki; atongoreetio nĩ mwaki ũrarĩrĩmbũka o kũrĩrĩmbũka
Psalms50:4 Areeta igũrũ na thĩ ituĩke aira agĩtuĩra andũ aake.
Psalms50:5 Aroiga atĩrĩ
Psalms50:6 Igũrũ nĩkwanĩrĩra rĩranĩrĩra atĩ Ngai nĩ mũthingu
Psalms50:7 “Inyuĩ andũ aakwa
Psalms50:8 Ndiramũrũithia nĩ ũndũ wa magongoona maanyu; mũndutagĩra magongoona maanyu ma njino o mũthenya.
Psalms50:9 Ndibatairio nĩ ndeegwa kuuma mĩgũndainĩ yanyu o na kana mbũri kuuma ndũũruinĩ cianyu.
Psalms50:10 Nĩ gũkorwo nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka nĩ ciakwa
Psalms50:11 Nyoni ciothe cia rĩerainĩ nĩndĩciũĩ
Psalms50:12 “Ingĩkorwo ndĩ mũhũũtu
Psalms50:13 Kaĩ niĩ ndĩaga nyama cia ndeegwa
Psalms50:14 Rutagĩra Ngai igongoona rĩa kũmũcookagĩria ngaatho na ũhingagĩrie Ũrĩa Wĩ Igũrũ Mũno ũrĩa wothe ũmwĩrĩire.
Psalms50:15 Ngayagĩra hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna; nĩndĩkũhonokagia
Psalms50:16 No Ngai arooria mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms50:17 Nĩũthũire kũrũngwo nĩ niĩ
Psalms50:18 Ũngĩona mũici
Psalms50:19 “Hingo ciothe no maũndũ mooru waragia
Psalms50:20 Ũikaraga thĩ ũgacuuka mũrũ wa thooguo
Psalms50:21 Maũndũ macio moothe wĩkĩĩte o ngirĩĩte
Psalms50:22 “Tathikĩrĩriai ũndũ ũyũ wega
Psalms50:23 Ũrĩa ũnjookagĩria ngaatho irĩ igongoona rĩake harĩ niĩ nĩandĩĩĩte; ũrĩa wothe ũnjathĩkagĩra nĩndĩmũhonokagia.”
Psalms51:1 Njiguĩra tha
Psalms51:2 Thambia mahĩtia maakwa moothe
Psalms51:3 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩnjũũĩ mahĩtia maakwa
Psalms51:4 No wee wiki tu
Psalms51:5 Ti itherũ niĩ ndaciarirwo ndĩ o na mahĩtia
Psalms51:6 Wee-rĩ
Psalms51:7 Thengia meehia maakwa
Psalms51:8 Reke njigue mĩgambo ya gĩkeno na mũcanjamũko; tondũ nĩũbebereete
Psalms51:9 Ndũkaabaare meehia maakwa tharia mahĩtia maakwa moothe.
Psalms51:10 Ũmba ngoro theru thĩinĩ wakwa
Psalms51:11 Ndũkanyingate kuuma ũthiũinĩ waku
Psalms51:12 Njookeria gĩkeno kĩrĩa kiumanaga na ũhonokania waku
Psalms51:13 na niĩ nĩndĩrutaga arĩa mahĩtagia maathani maaku
Psalms51:14 Honokia kuuma mahĩtiainĩ ma kũũragana
Psalms51:15 Hingũra kanua
Psalms51:16 Nĩ gũkorwo wee ndũrenda mahaki
Psalms51:17 Igongoona rĩakwa harĩ we
Psalms51:18 Ngai
Psalms51:19 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũrĩkenagio nĩ magongoona marĩa maagĩrĩire
Psalms52:1 Wee mũndũ ũyũ njamba
Psalms52:2 Wee ũthondekaga mĩbango ya kũũnũha andũ arĩa angĩ; rũrĩmĩ rwaku nĩ rũũgĩ o ta kanyũi. Hingo ciothe no maheeni ũkoragwo ũgĩthugunda.
Psalms52:3 Wendeete ũũru gũkĩra wega
Psalms52:4 Wendeete o kũiguithia andũ ũũru na mĩario yaku
Psalms52:5 Kwoguo Ngai nĩegũkũmomorania tene na tene; egũkũnyiita akũguthe kuuma mũciĩ waku
Psalms52:6 Andũ arĩa athingu moona ũguo nĩmarĩtigĩra; marĩgũthekerera makiugaga atĩrĩ
Psalms52:7 “Taoneei mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarehokeete atĩ Ngai no amũgitĩre we arehokeete ũtonga wake mũnene
Psalms52:8 No niĩ haana ta mũtamaiyũ mũruru wega
Psalms52:9 Ngũtũũra ngũcookagĩrira ngaatho
Psalms53:1 Irimũ ciĩĩraga atĩrĩ
Psalms53:2 Ngai acũũthagĩrĩria andũ arĩ o igũrũ
Psalms53:3 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms53:4 Ngai egũkĩũria atĩrĩ
Psalms53:5 No hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakaanyiitwo nĩ guoya mũnene matarĩ manyiitwo nĩguo hĩndĩ ĩngĩ
Psalms53:6 Naarĩ korwo Zayuni kwoima ũhonokio wa Isiraeli! Ĩ andũ a Isiraeli magaakena atĩa hiihihĩndĩ ĩrĩa Ngai agaakorwo atũmĩĩte magaacĩre o rĩngĩ!
Psalms54:1 Honokia
Psalms54:2 Igua ihooya rĩakwa
Psalms54:3 Nĩnjũkĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ etĩĩi; andũ ooru matarũmbũyanagia na Ngai nĩmarenda kũnjũraga.
Psalms54:4 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms54:5 Arohũũra thũ ciakwa na ũũru wacio na aciniine nĩ ũndũ we nĩ mwĩhokeku.
Psalms54:6 Na niĩ nĩndĩrĩkũrutĩra igongoona ngeneete
Psalms54:7 Nĩ ũndũ nĩũhonokeetie kuuma mathĩĩnainĩ moothe
Psalms55:1 Igua ihooya rĩakwa
Psalms55:2 Thikĩrĩria na ũnjookerie
Psalms55:3 Nĩnyiitĩĩtwo nĩ guoya nĩ ũrĩa thũ ciakwa ireĩhĩtĩra; arĩa ooru mahinyĩrĩirie o nginya makahehenja.Mandeehereire mathĩĩna na makanduma ũthũ me na maraakara.
Psalms55:4 Ngoro yakwa ĩrĩ na ruwo rũingĩ; guoya wa gĩkuũ nĩũngomeire.
Psalms55:5 No guoya ndĩraigua ngĩinainaga
Psalms55:6 Ngakiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms55:7 Ingĩũra thiĩ kũndũ kũraaya mũno ngatũũre werũinĩ;
Psalms55:8 ndeyethera o na ihenya handũ ha kwĩgitia rũhuuho rũũrũ rũnene na kĩhuuhũkanio.”
Psalms55:9 Turuuria mĩario ya thũ ciakwa
Psalms55:10 irĩthiũrũrũkĩirie mũthenya na ũtukũ
Psalms55:11 Thĩinĩ warĩo no mwanangĩko wĩ kuo; njĩra ciarĩo ciyũire o ũhinyanĩrĩria na maheeni.
Psalms55:12 Korwo nĩ thũ ĩranyũrũria no ngĩrĩrĩrie; korwo nĩ mũndũ wĩnjiiragĩria ũũru ũreĩndĩĩra
Psalms55:13 No nĩ we
Psalms55:14 o wee twagwatanagĩra wega mũno
Psalms55:15 Thũ ciakwa irokua ihinda rĩacio rĩtakinyĩĩte; iroikũrũka kwa arĩa akuũ i muoyo! Nĩ gũkorwo ngoroinĩ ciacio na mĩciĩinĩ yacio kwĩ na ũũru.
Psalms55:16 No niĩ nĩgũkaĩra ngũkaĩra MWATHANI Ngai
Psalms55:17 Ndĩrĩtetaga ngĩcaayaga rũũciinĩ
Psalms55:18 Nĩekũnjookia ndĩ o mũgima kuuma mbaarainĩ ici ndĩrarũa na thũ itangĩtarĩka.
Psalms55:19 Ngai ũrĩa ũtũire athamakaga kuuma tene na tene
Psalms55:20 Mũraata ũcio wakwa wa tene aatharĩkĩire araata aake
Psalms55:21 Mĩario yake yanyorokeete gũkĩra thiagĩ
Psalms55:22 Neanaai mathĩĩna maanyu moothe kũrĩ MWATHANI
Psalms55:23 Nĩ gũkorwo wee
Psalms56:1 Njiguĩra tha
Psalms56:2 Thũ ciakwa inyariiraga mũthenya wothe; andũ arĩa marahũũrana na niĩ nĩ aingĩ mũno.
Psalms56:3 Rĩrĩa ndĩraigua guoya
Psalms56:4 Ndĩhokaga Ngai na ndiguaga guoya; nĩndĩmũgoocaga nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩranĩro ciake. Mũndũ ũrĩa arĩ o rũkũngũ-rĩ angĩnjĩka atĩa?
Psalms56:5 Mũthenya wothe thũ ciakwa igeragia o kũndonyia mathĩĩnainĩ; ciĩciiragia o ũrĩa ingĩnjĩka ũũru.
Psalms56:6 Cithiaga keeheriinĩ
Psalms56:7 Ciherithie
Psalms56:8 Nĩũũĩ mathĩĩna moothe marĩa nyoneete; maithori moothe marĩa ndanarĩra nĩũũĩ ũrĩa maigana. Nĩũmaandĩkĩĩte moothe ibukuinĩ rĩaku.
Psalms56:9 Mũthenya ũrĩa ngaagũkaĩra
Psalms56:10 Ngai ũrĩa ngoocaga ciĩranĩro ciake
Psalms56:11 Ũcio nĩ we niĩ ndĩhokeete
Psalms56:12 Nĩngũkũhingĩria ũrĩa ngwĩrĩire Ngai; nĩngũkũrutĩra kĩheeo gĩa gũgũcookeria ngaatho.
Psalms56:13 Nĩ ũndũ nĩũhonokeetie kuuma gĩkuũinĩ
Psalms57:1 Njiguĩra tha
Psalms57:2 Ngũkaĩra Ngai Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno
Psalms57:3 Nĩekũnjĩtĩka arĩ o igũrũ na ahonokie; nĩegũconorithia arĩa maranangĩrĩria thĩ.Ngai nĩekũnyonia ũtugi wake na wĩhokeku wake.
Psalms57:4 Thiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ thũ itariĩ ta mĩrũũthi ĩkorokeetio nĩkũrĩa andũ; magego maacio mahaana ta matimũ na mĩguĩ
Psalms57:5 Onania ũnene waku
Psalms57:6 Thũ ciakwa cianjigĩire gĩkerenge nĩguo inyiite
Psalms57:7 Ndingĩenyenyeka
Psalms57:8 Wee roho wakwa arahũka! Arahũkaai kĩnanda na ngita! Nĩngwarahũra riũa!
Psalms57:9 Nĩngũgũcookeria ngaatho
Psalms57:10 Nĩ gũkorwo ũtugi waku nĩ mũraaya o ta igũrũ; wĩhokeku waku ũkinyĩĩte o matuinĩ.
Psalms57:11 Onania ũnene waku
Psalms58:1 Inyuĩ aathani aya
Psalms58:2 Aaca! Mũthugundaga o maũndũ mooru na meciiria maanyu
Psalms58:3 Andũ arĩa ooru maambagĩrĩria kũrema
Psalms58:4 Me ũrũrũ o ta wa nyoka; mathingĩĩte matũ maao o ta gĩĩko gĩtaigua
Psalms58:5 kĩrĩa gĩtaiguaga mũgambo wa ũrĩa ũragĩthuuthĩra
Psalms58:6 Unanga magego marĩa marĩ tũnuainĩ twao
Psalms58:7 Marohwererekera o ta ũrĩa maaĩ ma kĩguũ mahwererekagĩra; marorangĩrĩrio thĩ mahoohe o ta nyeki ĩrĩa ĩkoragwo njĩrainĩ.
Psalms58:8 Marotweka o ta ũrĩa ndinoho ĩtwekaga o ĩgĩthiaga
Psalms58:9 Marotũgũtwo o ta mĩigua materĩgĩrĩire; Ngai aromombũra marĩ o muoyo o ta mahuti nĩ ũrĩa araakarĩĩte!
Psalms58:10 Andũ arĩa athingu nĩmarĩkena rĩrĩa marĩona arĩa meehagia makĩherithio; marĩgerera thĩinĩ wa thakame ya andũ arĩa ooru.
Psalms58:11 Andũ nĩmariuga atĩrĩ
Psalms59:1 Ngai wakwa
Psalms59:2 Honokia kuuma harĩ arĩa meekaga ũũru; ndeithũra kuuma harĩ ooragani.
Psalms59:3 Tarora wone nĩkũnjoheria manjoheirie nĩguo manjũrage!Andũ ooru nĩgwĩcookanĩrĩria marecookanĩrĩria hamwe nĩguo manjũkĩrĩre
Psalms59:4 Marethagathaga na ihenya kũnjũkĩrĩra o na hatarĩ na mahĩtia njĩkĩĩte.
Psalms59:5 Arahũka MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe ũũke ũndeithie
Psalms59:6 Macookaga hwaĩinĩ o hwaĩinĩ
Psalms59:7 Taigua ũrĩa maranuma makĩĩhĩtagĩra! Nĩmĩ ciao ihaana ta hiũ cia njora irĩ tũnuainĩ twao
Psalms59:8 No wee
Psalms59:9 Wee
Psalms59:10 Ngai wakwa nĩekũndeithia tondũ nĩ muuma andũ nĩekũreka ndũũgarũũge nĩgũkena nĩkuona thũ ciakwa itooreetio.
Psalms59:11 Ndũkaamoorage o rĩmwe Ngai nĩguo andũ aakwa matikariganĩrwo
Psalms59:12 Marogwatio nĩ mwĩtĩĩo wao
Psalms59:13 maniine na maraakara maaku. maniine o biũ.Nĩguo andũ oothe mamenye atĩ Ngai nĩathanaga thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli. na wathani wake ũhĩmbĩirie thĩ yothe.
Psalms59:14 Thũ ciakwa icookaga hwaĩinĩ o hwaĩinĩ
Psalms59:15 Icangacangaga o ta magui igĩethaga gĩa kũrĩa
Psalms59:16 No niĩ nĩngũina ng'ane ũrĩa wĩ hinya; rũũciinĩ o rũũciinĩ ndĩrĩinaga nyanĩrĩire ũrĩa wee wĩ mũtugi. Nĩ ũndũ nĩũkoreetwo wĩ handũ haakwa ha gwĩtharĩra
Psalms59:17 Nĩngũkũinĩra ngĩkũgoocaga
Psalms60:1 Nĩũtũregeete
Psalms60:2 Nĩũtũmĩĩte bũrũri ũthingithe na ũkaũtarũrania; thinga mĩatũka yaguo
Psalms60:3 Nĩũtũmĩĩte andũ aaku manyariirĩke mũno; tũrathiĩ tũgĩtũgũũgaga ta andũ marĩĩtwo nĩ njoohi.
Psalms60:4 Nĩũheete arĩa magũtĩĩĩte kĩmenyithia
Psalms60:5 Tũhonokie na hinya waku
Psalms60:6 Ngai arĩ gĩikaro gĩake gĩtheru oigĩĩte atĩrĩ
Psalms60:7 Gileadi nĩ gwakwa
Psalms60:8 Moabi nĩ kĩraĩ gĩakwa gĩa gwĩthambĩra; nĩ niĩ mwene bũrũri wa Edomu.Nĩngũkena ngĩrũũhagia nĩ ũrĩa hooteete bũrũri wa Filisitia.”
Psalms60:9 Nũũ
Psalms60:10 No wee
Psalms60:11 Tũhootanĩre harĩ thũ ciitũ
Psalms60:12 Ngai arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ nĩtũkũhootana; nĩ we ũkũrangĩrĩria thũ ciitũ thĩ.
Psalms61:1 Igua kĩrĩĩro gĩakwa
Psalms61:2 Ndĩragũkaĩra njũrĩĩtwo nĩ hinya ngoro na ndĩ kũraaya mũno na mũciĩ.Haicia igũrũ wa ndũmba ya ihiga harĩa itangĩona ũgwati
Psalms61:3 nĩ gũkorwo wee nĩ we mũmenyereri
Psalms61:4 Reke ndũũre thĩinĩ wa handũ haaku harĩa haamũre matukũ moothe na muoyo wakwa;reke nyone ũgitĩri rungu rwa mathagu maaku.
Psalms61:5 Nĩ gũkorwo wee
Psalms61:6 Raihia ũtũũro wa mũthamaki; reke akĩrĩrĩrie gũtũũra.
Psalms61:7 Arotũũra athamakaga arĩ mbere yaku
Psalms61:8 Kwoguo nĩndĩrĩinaga ngĩkũgoocaga hĩndĩ ciothe
Psalms62:1 Njetereire o Ngai wiki ngirĩrĩirie; ũhonokio wakwa uumaga harĩ we.
Psalms62:2 We wiki nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra na akahonokia; nĩ we mũngitĩri
Psalms62:3 Nĩ nginya rĩ inyuothe mũgũtũũra mũtharĩkagĩra mũndũ ũrĩa o na rũgiri rũmomokanu rũmũkĩrĩĩtie hinya?
Psalms62:4 Mũrabanga o ũrĩa mũngĩmũng'aũrania kuuma ũneneinĩ wake; mũkenagio no maheeni.Mũraathimanaga na tũnua twanyu
Psalms62:5 Njetereire o Ngai wiki ngirĩrĩirie
Psalms62:6 We wiki nĩ we ũmenyagĩrĩra na akahonokia; nĩ we mũngitĩri; ndirĩ hingo ngaatoorio.
Psalms62:7 Ũhonokio wakwa na gĩtĩĩo gĩakwa ciumaga kũrĩ Ngai; nĩ we mũmenyereri wĩ hinya; nĩ we handũ haakwa ha gwĩtharĩra.
Psalms62:8 Andũ aakwa
Psalms62:9 Andũ oothe mahaana o ta ihũũmũka rĩmwe; arĩa atĩĩĩku na arĩa matarĩ atĩĩĩku no tũhũ mũtheri. Mangĩthimwo oothe na ratiri matingĩona ũritũ wa ihũũmũka rĩmwe.
Psalms62:10 Kũhinyanĩrĩria gũtigaatuĩke mwĩhoko waku
Psalms62:11 Nĩnjiguĩte makĩria ma riita rĩmwe Ngai akiuga atĩ
Psalms62:12 na atĩ ũtugi wake ndũgarũrũkaga.Wee
Psalms63:1 Wee
Psalms63:2 Reke nguone wĩ handũ haaku harĩa hatheru; reke ndĩroragĩre hinya waku na riiri waku.
Psalms63:3 Nĩngũkũgooca nĩ ũndũ ũtugi waku nĩ mwega gũkĩra muoyo guo mwene.
Psalms63:4 Ngũtũũra ngũcookagĩria ngaatho matukũ moothe ma muoyo wakwa;ngĩkũhooya ndĩrĩambararagia mooko maakwa ndĩmeerekeirie kũrĩ we.
Psalms63:5 Nĩnjiganĩire o ta mũndũ ũrugĩirwo iruga rĩega mũno
Psalms63:6 Nĩngũririkanaga ndĩ ũrĩrĩ
Psalms63:7 nĩ ũndũ nĩũkoreetwo ũrĩ ũteithio wakwa. Nĩndĩinaga ngeneete ndĩ rungu rwa mathagu maaku.
Psalms63:8 Ndĩhoceetie harĩ we: guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo nĩkũũnyiitĩrĩire.
Psalms63:9 Arĩa marenda kũnjũraga maroikũrũka kwa arĩa akuũ;
Psalms63:10 maroanangwo na hiũ cia njora; ciimba ciao irorĩĩo nĩ mbwe.
Psalms63:11 No mũthamaki nĩarĩkena nĩ ũndũ Ngai nĩarĩmũhe ũhootani; arĩa mehĩtaga makĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai nĩmarĩmũgooca
Psalms64:1 Thikĩrĩria mateta maakwa ngĩkũhooya Ngai; rangĩra muoyo wakwa tondũ thũ ciakwa nĩitũmĩĩte ngĩe na guoya mũno.
Psalms64:2 Menyerera harĩ mĩbango mĩũru ya eeki naaĩ
Psalms64:3 Manooraga nĩmĩ ciao ta hiũ cia njora na magaikia ciugo njũru ta mĩguĩ.
Psalms64:4 Mehithagĩra andũ arĩa eega makamaratha na mĩguĩ; mamarathaga o rĩmwe matarĩ na guoya.
Psalms64:5 Matitiganaga na mĩbango yao mĩũru; mabangaga ũrĩa mekũiga mũtego na hitho
Psalms64:6 Mathondekaga mĩbango mĩũru makoiga atĩrĩ
Psalms64:7 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms64:8 Akaamananga nĩ ũndũ wa ciugo njũru iria maarĩĩtie na tũnua twao; arĩa oothe makaamoona nĩkũinainia makainainia mĩtwe mamakĩĩte.
Psalms64:9 Oothe nĩmageetigĩra; mageeciiria ũrĩa Ngai eekĩĩte na maheane ũhoro wa ciĩko ciake.
Psalms64:10 Andũ oothe arĩa athingu nĩmagaakena nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte.Nĩmakaagitĩrwo nĩ we;andũ oothe arĩa eega nĩmakaamũgooca.
Psalms65:1 Wee Ngai
Psalms65:2 nĩ ũndũ nĩũcookagia mahooya maitũ.Andũ oothe mookaga harĩ we
Psalms65:3 nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maao.Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa twatoorio nĩ meehia maitũ
Psalms65:4 Gũkena-rĩ
Psalms65:5 Wee Ngai
Psalms65:6 Nĩ we wahandire irĩma na hinya waku ikĩrũma
Psalms65:7 Nĩ we ũhooragĩria mũraramo wa maria
Psalms65:8 Thĩ yothe nĩgegeetio nĩ maũndũ manene marĩa wee wĩkĩĩte; ciĩko ciaku nĩitũmĩĩte andũ moigĩrĩrie makeneete kuuma mũthia ũmwe wa thĩ nginya ũrĩa ũngĩ.
Psalms65:9 Wee Ngai
Psalms65:10 Uuragĩria mĩgũnda ĩrĩa ĩrĩmĩĩtwo mbura ũkamĩconjoria; ũmĩororoagia na mbura ya rũthuthuũ na ũgatũma irio iria ihandĩĩtwo ikũre.
Psalms65:11 O mwaka we nĩũtũheaga magetha maingĩ nĩ ũndũ wĩ mũtugi; ũthiaga ũgĩtigaga iraathimo nyingĩ kũrĩa guothe ũgeragĩra.
Psalms65:12 Moorĩithio maiyũire nyeki nduru
Psalms65:13 Cieni ciyũire ndũũru cia ng'ondu
Psalms66:1 Goocaai Ngai mũkĩanagĩrĩra mũkeneete
Psalms66:2 Inaai nyĩmbo cia kuonania ũrĩa Ngai e mũnene; mũkumiei mũno!
Psalms66:3 Ĩraai Ngai atĩrĩ
Psalms66:4 Andũ oothe gũũkũ thĩ nĩ we marathaathaiya magĩkũinagĩra nyĩmbo cia gũkũgooca; maraina nyĩmbo cia gũkumia rĩĩtwa rĩaku.”
Psalms66:5 Ũkaai muone ũrĩa Ngai eekĩĩte; eekaga andũ ciĩko cia kũmagegia.
Psalms66:6 Aagarũrire iria rĩgĩtuĩka thĩ nyũmũ; maithe maitũ maaringire rũũĩ na magũrũ.Tũgĩgĩcanjamũka twĩ handũ hau nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa Ngai eekire.
Psalms66:7 Aathanaga nginya tene na tene na hinya wake; maitho maake maikaraga macũũthĩrĩire ndũũrĩrĩ; andũ arĩa makũremagĩra nĩmemenyerere gũkaanetũũgĩria.
Psalms66:8 Goocaai Ngai witũ inyuĩ andũ oothe
Psalms66:9 Nĩatũigĩĩte muoyo na agatũgirĩrĩria tũtikaagũe.
Psalms66:10 Wee
Psalms66:11 Nĩwatũmire tũnyiitwo nĩ mũtego na ũgĩtũkuuithia mũrigo mũritũ.
Psalms66:12 Nĩwarekire tũrangĩrĩrio thĩ nĩ thũ ciitũ; nĩtwahĩtũkĩire mwakiinĩ na mũiyũroinĩ wa maaĩ
Psalms66:13 Nĩngũreehe magongoona ma njino nyũmbainĩ yaku; nĩngũkũhingĩria ũrĩa ngwĩrĩire
Psalms66:14 ũrĩa ndeehĩtire na kanua gaakwa ndĩ mbere yaku
Psalms66:15 Ngũkũrutĩra magongoona ma gũcinwo ma ndũrũme iria noru mũno; ngũruta igongoona rĩa ndeegwa na mbũri
Psalms66:16 Ũkaai inyuothe arĩa mũtĩĩĩte Ngai mũigue ngĩheana ũrĩa anjĩkĩire.
Psalms66:17 Ndamwĩtire na mũgambo mũnene
Psalms66:18 Korwo ndaarĩ na meehia ngoroinĩ yakwa-rĩ
Psalms66:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms66:20 Ngai arogoocwo tondũ ndaregeete ihooya rĩakwa
Psalms67:1 Ngai ũrotũiguĩra tha na ũtũraathime; ũrotuonia ũtaana.
Psalms67:2 Nĩguo wendi waku ũmenyeke thĩ yothe
Psalms67:3 Andũ marokũgooca
Psalms67:4 Ndũũrĩrĩ irocanjamũka na ciine nĩgũkena
Psalms67:5 Andũ marokũgooca wee Ngai; andũ oothe marogũkumia!
Psalms67:6 Thĩ nĩrutĩĩte maciaro maayo; Ngai
Psalms67:7 Ngai arothiĩ na mbere gũtũraathima
Psalms68:1 Ngai aroarahũka ahurunje thũ ciake; arĩa mamũthũire maromũũrĩra.
Psalms68:2 Mahurunje o ta ũrĩa ndoogo yũmbũragwo nĩ rũhuuho; andũ arĩa ooru marothira marĩ mbere ya Ngai
Psalms68:3 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms68:4 Inĩraai Ngai; inaai mũkĩgoocaga rĩĩtwa rĩake; tũũgĩriai ũrĩa ũthiaga ahaicĩĩte matũ;Rĩĩtwa rĩake nĩ MWATHANI; canjamũkaai mũrĩ mbere yake.
Psalms68:5 Ngai
Psalms68:6 Nĩ we ũheaga arĩa matiganĩirio ũikaro na akoohora arĩa mooheetwo akamahe wĩyathi na gĩkeno
Psalms68:7 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa
Psalms68:8 thĩ nĩyathingithire
Psalms68:9 Nĩwoiririe mbura kwa ũingĩ
Psalms68:10 andũ aaku magĩkĩona gwa gũtũũra.Tondũ wa ũrĩa wee
Psalms68:11 MWATHANI aathanire
Psalms68:12 “Athamaki na mbũtũ cia ita nĩkũũra maroora matekwĩhũgũra!”Atumia arĩa maarĩ mĩciĩinĩ makĩgayana indo iria ciatahĩĩtwo
Psalms68:13 nacio ciarĩ mĩhiano ya ndutuura yahakĩĩtwo betha
Psalms68:14 Rĩrĩa Mwene Hinya Wothe aahurunjire athamaki
Psalms68:15 Ĩ kĩrĩma kĩa Bashani ti kĩrĩma kĩnene; Ĩ gĩtirĩ tũcũmbĩrĩ tũingĩ!
Psalms68:16 Wee kĩrĩma gĩĩkĩ kĩrĩ tũcũmbĩrĩ tũingĩ
Psalms68:17 MWATHANI arooka handũ harĩa hatheru oimĩĩte kĩrĩma gĩa Sinai arĩ na ngaari cia mbarathi itangĩtarĩka.
Psalms68:18 Arambata kĩrĩma kĩrĩa kĩraaya na igũrũ arĩ na mĩgwate mĩingĩ
Psalms68:19 Goocaai MWATHANI o we ũkuuaga mĩrigo iitũ mũthenya o mũthenya; we-rĩ
Psalms68:20 Ngai witũ nĩ Ngai ũrĩa ũhonokagia; MWATHANI o we Ngai witũ
Psalms68:21 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms68:22 MWATHANI oigĩĩte atĩrĩ
Psalms68:23 nĩguo mũgerere thakameinĩ yacio
Psalms68:24 Mũkinyũkĩrie waku wa ũhootani
Psalms68:25 Aini nĩ o marĩ mbere
Psalms68:26 Marathiĩ makĩinaga atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms68:27 Matongoreetio nĩ mũhĩrĩga ũrĩa mũniini mũno wa Benjamini
Psalms68:28 Ngai onania hinya waku ũrĩa wanahũthĩra nĩ ũndũ witũ
Psalms68:29 uumĩĩte Hekaarũ yaku ĩrĩa ĩrĩ Jerusalemu
Psalms68:30 Rũithia Misiri
Psalms68:31 Andũ a bata makuuĩĩte iheeo nĩmagooka moimĩĩte bũrũri wa Misiri; Bũrũri wa Ethiopia nĩũkaareehere Ngai iheeo na mĩtũkĩ.
Psalms68:32 Inĩraai Ngai
Psalms68:33 ũrĩa ũthiaga ahaicĩĩte igũrũ rĩrĩa rĩtũĩre ho kinya tene na tene.Tathikĩrĩriai ũrĩa aragũũthũka na hinya!
Psalms68:34 Ganaai hinya wa Ngai
Psalms68:35 Ĩ Ngai ndũrĩ wa kũguoyohithia rĩrĩa ũrooka uumĩĩte handũ haaku harĩa hatheru!Ngai wa Isiraeli nĩ we ũheaga andũ aake ũhoti o na hinya. Ngai arogoocwo!
Psalms69:1 Honokia Ngai
Psalms69:2 Ndĩratoonyerera mũtondoinĩ
Psalms69:3 Nĩnogeetio nĩgũkaya nĩguo ndeithio na mũmero wakwa nĩ mũng'aru.Maitho maakwa nĩmoorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩgũgũcũũthĩrĩria wee Ngai
Psalms69:4 Arĩa mathũire hatarĩ gĩtũmi nĩ aingĩ gũkĩra njuĩrĩ cia mũtwe wakwa.Thũ ciakwa ciaragia maheeni igũrũ rĩakwa; i na hinya mũno na irenda kũnjũraga.Ndahota atĩa gũcookia indo itaiyĩte?
Psalms69:5 Wee
Psalms69:6 MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe ndũgeetĩkĩre njonorithie arĩa makwĩhokeete!Ngai wa Isiraeli
Psalms69:7 Nĩ gũkorwo irumi iria numĩĩtwo
Psalms69:8 Nduĩkĩĩte ta mũgeni harĩ aariũ a maitũ
Psalms69:9 Kĩyo kĩrĩa ndĩ nakĩo kĩa Hekaarũ yaku nĩkĩo kĩndĩĩte; irumi iria ũrarumwo nĩ niĩ icookereire.
Psalms69:10 Ndenyiihirie na ngĩiima irio
Psalms69:11 ndehumbire nguo cia macakaya
Psalms69:12 Njĩrainĩ cia itũũra no ndeto ciakwa ciaragio
Psalms69:13 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms69:14 Honokia ndigatoonyerere mũtondoinĩ; ngitĩra kuuma harĩ thũ ciakwa
Psalms69:15 Ndũkaareke mũiyũro wa maaĩ ũhumbĩkanie
Psalms69:16 Njookeria MWATHANI
Psalms69:17 Ndũkaae kũrora na kũngĩ wona ndungata yaku; njookeria narua tondũ ndĩ mũnyamaaru!
Psalms69:18 Ũka ũngũũre; ndeithũra kuuma harĩ thũ ciakwa!
Psalms69:19 Wee-rĩ
Psalms69:20 Irumi iria numĩĩtwo nĩcinjiguithĩĩtie ruwo ngoro o nginya ngaaga mwĩhoko.Ndĩretereire nyone wa kũnjiguĩra tha
Psalms69:21 Ndahũũta maheire irio ciarĩ na ũrogi
Psalms69:22 Maruga maao marotuĩka kĩndũ gĩa kũmaniina; thigũkũ ciao iria theru irotuĩka mũthiro wao.
Psalms69:23 Maroaga kuona matuĩke itumuumu!Marothiaga mahocereire nĩ ũrĩa mĩgongo yao yagĩĩte hinya!
Psalms69:24 Maitĩrĩrie mang'ũrĩ maaku; marokinyĩrĩrwo nĩ maraakara maaku me gwakana ta mwaki.
Psalms69:25 Kambĩ ciao irotuĩka maganjo matheri; hema ciao irotigwo itarĩ na wa gũcitũũra.
Psalms69:26 Tondũ o nĩkũnyariira maranyariira arĩa wee ũrĩĩkĩĩtie kũherithia
Psalms69:27 Maherithie o kũmaherithia; ndũkamoohere o na atĩa.
Psalms69:28 Marĩĩtwa maao marothario kuuma ibukuinĩ rĩa muoyo; maroaga kwandĩkanĩrio hamwe na ma andũ aaku arĩa athingu.
Psalms69:29 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms69:30 Nĩngũgooca rĩĩtwa rĩa Ngai na rwĩmbo
Psalms69:31 Ũndũ ũcio nĩũgũkenia MWATHANI gũkĩra kũmũrutĩra ng'ombe o na kana kũmũrutĩra ndeegwa ĩrĩa nene.
Psalms69:32 Rĩrĩa arĩa mahinyĩrĩirio marĩona ũguo nĩmarĩkena: arĩa mathaathayagia Ngai nĩmarĩũmĩrĩrio ngoro.
Psalms69:33 Nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI nĩathikagĩrĩria andũ arĩa mabataire
Psalms69:34 Goocaai Ngai
Psalms69:35 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩakaahonokia Jerusalemu na aake rĩngĩ matũũra ma Juda.Andũ aake magaatũũra kuo na megwatĩre bũrũri ũtuĩke wao;
Psalms69:36 ciana cia ndungata ciake nĩikaũgaya
Psalms70:1 Honokia Ngai nĩ ũndũ wa kwenda gwaku! Hiũha
Psalms70:2 Andũ arĩa marenda kũnjũraga maroconorwo na maturuure; arĩa marenda kũnjĩka ũũru marohũndũrwo na maconorwo.
Psalms70:3 Arĩa mathekagĩrĩra marokua ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mahooteetwo.
Psalms70:4 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms70:5 Niĩ ndĩ mũndũ mũthĩĩnĩku na mũbataru; hiũha
Psalms71:1 MWATHANI njũkĩĩte harĩ we ũmenyerere
Psalms71:2 Ndeithia na ũhatũre
Psalms71:3 Tuĩka rwaro rwakwa rwa ihiga rwa gwĩtharĩra handũ haakwa haakĩĩtwo na hinya ha kũmenyagĩrĩra. Wee nĩ we handũ haakwa ha gwĩtharĩra o na ha kwĩgitia.
Psalms71:4 Ndeithũra
Psalms71:5 Nĩ gũkorwo wee MWATHANI Ngai
Psalms71:6 Ndũire ndĩtiiranĩĩtie nawe ũtũũro wakwa wothe; ũtũire ũmenyagĩrĩra kuuma mũthenya ũrĩa ndaciarirwo. Ngũtũũra ngũgoocaga.
Psalms71:7 Nĩnduĩkĩĩte kĩonereria harĩ andũ arĩa angĩ
Psalms71:8 Ndĩkũgoocaga na ng'anage riiri waku mũthenya wothe.
Psalms71:9 Ndũkande rĩu ndĩ mũkũrũ; ndũkandiganĩrie rĩu itarĩ na hinya!
Psalms71:10 Nĩ gũkorwo thũ ciakwa nĩiraaria igũrũ rĩakwa; arĩa maikaraga manjoheirie nĩmaracookania ndundu
Psalms71:11 makoiga atĩrĩ
Psalms71:12 Ngai
Psalms71:13 Arĩa maranjũkĩrĩra marohootwo na maniinwo. Andũ arĩa marenda kũnjĩka ũũru maroconorwo na manyararwo!
Psalms71:14 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms71:15 Ndĩrĩganaga ũrĩa wee wĩ mwega
Psalms71:16 MWATHANI Ngai ngũũka ngĩgoocaga ciĩko ciaku cia hinya
Psalms71:17 Wee Ngai
Psalms71:18 Ngai ndũkandiganĩrie rĩu ndĩ mũkũrũ
Psalms71:19 Ũthingu waku
Psalms71:20 Nĩũtũmĩĩte thĩĩnĩke mũno na nyariirĩke; no rĩĩrĩ
Psalms71:21 Nĩũkũndũũgĩria gũkĩra mbere
Psalms71:22 Na niĩ nĩndĩrĩkũgooca na kĩnanda nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa wĩ mwĩhokeku
Psalms71:23 Ndĩrĩanĩrĩra ngeneete rĩrĩa ndĩrĩkorwo ngĩkũgooca ngĩinaga; ndĩrĩkũinĩra na muoyo wakwa wothe tondũ nĩũngũũrĩĩte.
Psalms71:24 Ndĩrĩganaga mũthenya wothe ũrĩa wee wĩ mũthingu
Psalms72:1 Ngai onereria mũthamaki ũrĩa arĩtuithanagia ciira na kĩhooto
Psalms72:2 Arotuithanagia andũ aaku na kĩhooto na aathage arĩa athĩĩni na ũthingu.
Psalms72:3 Bũrũri ũrogĩa na ũthii wa na mbere
Psalms72:4 Mũthamaki arogitagĩra ihooto cia arĩa athĩĩni; aroteithagia arĩa mabataire na ahehenjage arĩa mamahinyagĩrĩria.
Psalms72:5 Mũthamaki arotũũra tene na tene o ta riũa na mweri.
Psalms72:6 Mũthamaki arotuĩka mũtugi o ta mbura ya maguna ng'ombe.
Psalms72:7 Ũthingu ũrotheerema matukũinĩ maake
Psalms72:8 Ũthamaki wake ũrorutia iriainĩ rĩmwe o nginya rĩrĩa rĩngĩ; ũrorutia rũũĩinĩ rwa Farati nginya o gĩturi gĩa thĩ.
Psalms72:9 Aroinamagĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ arĩa matũũraga werũinĩ
Psalms72:10 Arorutagĩrwo igooti nĩ athamaki a Sipania na a icigĩrĩra cia iriainĩ; athamaki a Sheba na Seba maromũreehagĩra iheeo.
Psalms72:11 Aroinamagĩrĩrwo nĩ athamaki oothe
Psalms72:12 Nĩahonokagia arĩa mabataire mamũkaĩra
Psalms72:13 Nĩaiguagĩra tha arĩa matarĩ na hinya na arĩa mabataire
Psalms72:14 Nĩ we ũkũũraga athĩĩni kuuma harĩ arĩa mamahinyagĩrĩria na makameeka maũndũ mooru; arĩ bata mũno na mĩoyo yao.
Psalms72:15 Mũthamaki arotũũra matukũ maingĩ! Aroheeo thahabu ya kuuma Arabia. Arohooyagĩrwo hĩndĩ ciothe Ngai aromũraathimaga hĩndĩ ciothe!
Psalms72:16 Bũrũri ũrogĩa bũũthi; irio ironekanaga irurĩrĩire irĩma igũrũ
Psalms72:17 Rĩĩtwa rĩa mũthamaki rĩrotũũra rĩririkanagwo tene na tene; ngumo yake ĩrotũũra hĩndĩ yothe rĩrĩa riũa rĩgũtũũra rĩaraga.Ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe irooragia Ngai aciraathime ta ũrĩa araathimĩĩte mũthamaki.
Psalms72:18 MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli arogoocwo! We wiki nĩ we wĩkaga maũndũ ma kũgegania.
Psalms72:19 Rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩrĩa rĩrĩ riiri rĩrotũũra rĩgoocagwo tene na tene. Riiri wake ũroiyũra thĩ yothe. Ameni! Ameni!
Psalms72:20 Ũcio nĩguo mũthia wa mahooya ma Daudi
Psalms73:1 Ti itherũ Ngai no wega eekaga andũ a Isiraeli
Psalms73:2 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms73:3 tondũ nĩndaiguagĩra andũ arĩa etĩĩi ũiru rĩrĩa ndoonire atĩ andũ arĩa ooru no wega moonaga.
Psalms73:4 Matiiguaga ruwo
Psalms73:5 Matinyariirĩkaga ta ũrĩa andũ arĩa angĩ manyariirĩkaga
Psalms73:6 Tondũ ũcio mwĩtĩĩo wao nĩ ta mũgathĩ wĩ ngingo
Psalms73:7 Ngoro ciao itherũkaga o maũndũ mooru
Psalms73:8 Mathekagĩrĩra andũ arĩa angĩ na makaaragia maũndũ mooru; mabangaga ũrĩa mekũhinyĩrĩria andũ arĩa angĩ magĩtĩĩaga.
Psalms73:9 Maaragia ndeto njũru cia Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ na magaathaga andũ a gũũkũ thĩ makĩmetĩĩyagĩra.
Psalms73:10 Kwoguo o nao andũ a Ngai makamategera matũ na mageetĩkia ũrĩa wothe maroiga.
Psalms73:11 Andũ acio ooru magakiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms73:12 Ũguo nĩguo andũ arĩa aaganu matariĩ; maikaraga megangarĩĩte magĩkĩragĩrĩria o gũtonga.
Psalms73:13 Gwĩtheria kũrĩa ndĩtheragia ngaikara itekwĩhia nĩ gwa tũhũ mũtheri!
Psalms73:14 Tondũ wee Ngai
Psalms73:15 Korwo nĩndaaririe maũndũ mooru-rĩ
Psalms73:16 Kwoguo ngĩgeria gwĩciiria ũhoro ũcio nĩguo ndĩũmenye wega
Psalms73:17 nginya rĩrĩa ndathiire Hekaarũinĩ yaku. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo ndamenyire ũrĩa andũ arĩa ooru makaarĩĩkĩrĩria.
Psalms73:18 Ũkaamaiga kũndũ gũtenderũ magũe maharagane.
Psalms73:19 Makaanangwo o rĩmwe makue gĩkuũ kĩũru mũno!
Psalms73:20 Andũ arĩa ooru mahaana ta kĩrooto kĩrĩa gĩthiraga mũndũ arĩĩkia gũũkĩra; mabuagĩria o rĩmwe rĩrĩa
Psalms73:21 Rĩrĩa ndaraakarĩĩte na ngatuurwo o ngoroinĩ thĩinĩ
Psalms73:22 ndakĩĩgĩĩte o ta nyamũ na ndiakũmenyaga.
Psalms73:23 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Psalms73:24 Ũndongoragia ũkĩndaaraga na mũthiainĩ nĩũkaanyamũkĩra na gĩtĩĩo.
Psalms73:25 Nũũ ũngĩ ndĩ naake kũu igũrũ tiga wee? Nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ ũngĩ ingĩkĩenda gũũkũ thĩ o rĩrĩa ndĩ nawe?
Psalms73:26 Mwĩrĩ wakwa na ngoro no ciage hinya
Psalms73:27 Ti itherũ arĩa magũtiganagĩria nĩmagaathira; arĩa matakwĩhokeete nĩũkaamananga.
Psalms73:28 Haakwa mwene-rĩ
Psalms74:1 Ngai ũtũtiganĩirie ũguo nĩkĩ? Ũgũtũũra ũraakarĩire andũ aaku kĩũmbe nginya tene na tene?
Psalms74:2 Ririkana andũ aaku arĩa wethuurĩire kuuma o tene
Psalms74:3 Thiĩra igũrũ rĩa mwanangĩko ũyũ wothe; kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩrĩ Hekaarũinĩ nĩgĩgĩthũũkangĩĩtio nĩ thũ ciitũ!
Psalms74:4 Thũ ciaku nĩkugĩrĩria iroigĩrĩria Hekaarũinĩ ikĩrũũhagia
Psalms74:5 Mahaana ta atemi a mĩtĩ magĩtema mĩtĩ na mathanwa.
Psalms74:6 Moinangĩĩte buremu ciothe
Psalms74:7 Mamomoranĩĩtie Hekaarũ yaku na makamĩcina na mwaki; handũ harĩa wee ũthaathayagĩrio nĩkũhathaahia mahathaahĩĩtie.
Psalms74:8 Matuĩte atĩ megũtũniina ithuothe
Psalms74:9 Gũtirĩ ciama theru tũraringĩrwo mahindainĩ maya; anabii oothe nĩmathirĩĩte. na gũtirĩ o na ũmwe witũ ũũĩ gũgũikara ũguo nginya rĩ.
Psalms74:10 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms74:11 Ũregeete gũtũteithia nĩkĩ? Ũraikara wĩnyiitanĩirie nĩkĩ?
Psalms74:12 No wee
Psalms74:13 Nĩ we wagayanirie iria na hinya waku na ũkĩmemenda ciongo cia marimũ thĩinĩ warĩo.
Psalms74:14 Nĩ we wahehenjire ciongo cia Ndamaathia ĩrĩa yetagwo Leviathani ũkĩmĩtua irio cia nyamũ cia werũinĩ.
Psalms74:15 Wee-rĩ
Psalms74:16 Nĩ we wombire mũthenya na ũtukũ; na ũkĩiga riũa na mweri handũ haacio.
Psalms74:17 Nĩ we wekĩrire mĩhaka ya thĩ
Psalms74:18 Ririkana
Psalms74:19 Ndũkaae kũrekereria andũ aaku matarĩ hinya mookoinĩ ma thũ ciao itarĩ tha; ndũgaatũũre ũriganĩirwo nginya tene na tene nĩ andũ aaku arĩa manyariirĩĩtwo.
Psalms74:20 Ririkana kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa warĩĩkanĩire na ithuĩ; nĩ gũkorwo bũrũri wothe kũrĩa kwĩ na nduma kũiyũire haaro.
Psalms74:21 Ndũkaareke arĩa mahinyĩrĩirio maconorithio; reke arĩa athĩĩni na arĩa mabataire makũgooce.
Psalms74:22 Arahũka
Psalms74:23 Ndũkaariganĩrwo nĩ mbugĩrĩrio ya thũ ciaku
Psalms75:1 Nĩtũgũgũcookeria ngaatho Ngai
Psalms75:2 Ngai aroiga atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms75:3 Rĩrĩa indo ciothe irĩ muoyo ciainaina na thĩ yathingitha
Psalms75:4 Andũ arĩa etĩĩi ndĩmeeraga matigeetĩĩe
Psalms75:5 Ndĩmeeraga matige kwĩraha.”
Psalms75:6 Ũhoro wa gũtuanĩra ciira nduumaga na irathĩro kana ithũĩro
Psalms75:7 Ngai nĩ we mũtuanĩri
Psalms75:8 MWATHANI anyiitĩĩte gĩkombe na guoko gwake kĩiyũre ndibei ndũrũ ya maraakara maake. ekũmũkerũrĩra andũ arĩa aaganu; mamĩnyue nginya itaata rĩa mũthia.
Psalms75:9 No niĩ-rĩ
Psalms75:10 Nĩakaaniina hinya wothe wa andũ arĩa aaganu
Psalms76:1 Ngai nĩoĩkaine Juda; rĩĩtwa rĩake nĩrĩheetwo gĩtĩĩo thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli.
Psalms76:2 Mũciĩ wake nĩ Jerusalemu; Kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni nĩkĩo gĩikaro gĩake.
Psalms76:3 Kũu nĩkuo oinangĩire mĩguĩ ya thũ
Psalms76:4 Ĩ wee
Psalms76:5 Thigari ciacio iria njamba ituunyĩĩtwo indo ciacio ciothe na rĩu nĩgũkoma ikomeete toro wa gĩkuũ; hinya na ũũgĩ wacio wothe ũraarĩ wa tũhũ.
Psalms76:6 Rĩrĩa wee
Psalms76:7 Ĩ wee
Psalms76:8 Itua rĩaku warĩmenyithanirie ũrĩ o igũrũ matuinĩ thĩ yetigĩrire na ĩgĩkira ki
Psalms76:9 rĩrĩa wee
Psalms76:10 Andũ arĩa araakaru
Psalms76:11 Hingĩriai MWATHANI Ngai wanyu ũrĩa mũmwĩrĩire; andũ oothe a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa mũrĩ hakuhĩ naake mũreehereei iheeo. Ngai nĩatũmaga andũ mamwĩtigĩre;
Psalms76:12 anyiihagia atongoria arĩa etĩĩi na agatũma athamaki a thĩ metigĩre.
Psalms77:1 Niĩ nĩgũkaĩra ndĩrakaĩra Ngai na hinya; ndĩramũkaĩra na hinya nĩguo anjigue.
Psalms77:2 Rĩrĩa ndĩ mathĩĩnainĩ-rĩ
Psalms77:3 Ndĩciiragia igũrũ rĩa Ngai
Psalms77:4 Atũmaga njũrwo nĩ toro ũtukũ wothe; ngakĩremwo nĩkwaria nĩ ũrĩa thĩĩnĩkĩĩte.
Psalms77:5 Ndĩciiragia ũhoro wa matukũ marĩa marĩĩkĩĩtie kũhĩtũka na ngaririkana mĩaka ya hĩndĩ ya tene.
Psalms77:6 Ũtukũ ndaaraga ngĩĩcũũrania; ndĩciiragia
Psalms77:7 “MWATHANI egũtũũra atũregeete nginya tene na tene? Ndarĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩ agaakenio nĩ ithuĩ?
Psalms77:8 Kaĩ atigĩĩte gũtwenda? Ciĩranĩro ciake kaĩ itigĩĩte gũtuĩka cia ma?
Psalms77:9 Ngai-rĩ
Psalms77:10 Ngakiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms77:11 Nĩndĩririkanaga ciĩko ciaku cia hinya
Psalms77:12 Nĩndĩciiragia ũhoro wa maũndũ moothe marĩa wĩkĩĩte. na ndĩciiragie ũhoro wa ciĩko cia hinya iria wee waneeka.
Psalms77:13 Maũndũ moothe marĩa wee
Psalms77:14 Wee-rĩ
Psalms77:15 Nĩ we wahonokirie andũ aaku na hinya waku
Psalms77:16 Rĩrĩa wee
Psalms77:17 Matu magĩkiuria mbura
Psalms77:18 Ngwa ciaku igĩkĩgamba o kũgamba
Psalms77:19 Wagereire iriainĩ
Psalms77:20 Watongoririe andũ aaku ta ũrĩa mũrĩithi atongoragia rũũru rwake
Psalms78:1 Andũ aakwa thikĩrĩriai ũrutani wakwa
Psalms78:2 Ngwaria na thimo
Psalms78:3 marĩa tũiguĩte na tũkamenya
Psalms78:4 Tũtirĩmahithaga ciana ciitũ; nĩtũrĩĩraga rũciaro rũrĩa rwĩ thuutha ũrĩa Ngai arĩ hinya
Psalms78:5 Aaheire andũ a Isiraeli mawatho na akĩhe njiarwa cia Jakubu maathani.Aathire maithe maitũ marute ciana ciao mawatho maake
Psalms78:6 nĩguo rũciaro rũrĩa rũgooka thuutha rũkaameeruta
Psalms78:7 Na njĩra ĩyo o nacio cikĩige mwĩhoko wacio harĩ Ngai na ciage kũriganĩrwo nĩ ciĩko ciake nene
Psalms78:8 O na ningĩ itikaahaane ta maithe maacio
Psalms78:9 Andũ a mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu o na marĩ na moota na mĩguĩ
Psalms78:10 Matiigana kũiga kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩao na Ngai; nĩmaaregire kũrũmĩrĩra watho wake.
Psalms78:11 Maariganĩirwo nĩ ũrĩa eekĩĩte
Psalms78:12 Ngai aaringire ciama maithe maao makĩyonagĩra rĩrĩa maarĩ werũinĩ wa Zoani ũrĩa ũrĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri.
Psalms78:13 Aagayanirie iria akĩmaringia na agĩtũma maaĩ marũũgame ta thingo.
Psalms78:14 Mũthenya aamatongoragia na itu
Psalms78:15 Aatũranirie mahiga werũinĩ
Psalms78:16 Aatũmire tũrũũĩ tuume rwaroinĩ rwa ihiga
Psalms78:17 No o-rĩ
Psalms78:18 Makĩgeria Ngai makĩendaga na ũndũ wa gwĩtia irio iria meeriragĩria kũrĩa.
Psalms78:19 Mookĩrĩire Ngai na mĩario makĩũria atĩrĩ
Psalms78:20 Nĩ ma nĩagũthire ihiga maaĩ magĩitĩka boo
Psalms78:21 Naake MWATHANI rĩrĩa aiguire ũguo akĩng'ũrĩka agĩtharĩkĩra andũ aake na mwaki
Psalms78:22 tondũ nĩmaagire kũmwĩtĩkia
Psalms78:23 No o na kũhaana ũguo-rĩ
Psalms78:24 akĩmahe irio kuuma kuo
Psalms78:25 Magĩkĩrĩa irio cia araika
Psalms78:26 O na ningĩ nĩatũmire rũhuuho rũrĩa ruumaga mwena wa irathĩro rũhuruutane
Psalms78:27 Agĩkĩreehithĩria andũ aake nyoni kuuma igũrũ ciaingĩhĩĩte ta mũthanga wa iria
Psalms78:28 akĩreka igũe gatagatĩ ga kambĩ yao
Psalms78:29 Nao magĩkĩrĩa
Psalms78:30 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms78:31 Ngai akĩnyiitwo nĩ maraakara nĩ ũndũ wao
Psalms78:32 No o na ameekĩĩte ũguo wothe-rĩ
Psalms78:33 Kwoguo agĩtũma matukũ maao mathire ta ihũũmũka rĩa ngoro
Psalms78:34 Rĩrĩa rĩothe angĩoragire amwe aao
Psalms78:35 Makaririkana atĩ Ngai nĩ we wamamenyagĩrĩra Ngai Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno nĩ we wamateithagia.
Psalms78:36 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms78:37 Matiamwĩtĩkĩĩtie na ngoro ciao
Psalms78:38 No Ngai
Psalms78:39 Tondũ nĩaririkanaga atĩ o maarĩ o andũ tu; maatariĩ o ta rũhuuho rũrĩa rũhuruutanaga rũgacooka rũgathira.
Psalms78:40 Kaingĩ na kaingĩ nĩmaamũremagĩra me kũu werũinĩ
Psalms78:41 Matiaikaraga matekũgeria Ngai na mategũtuuria ngoro Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli.
Psalms78:42 Matiigana kũririkana hinya wake mũnene
Psalms78:43 na agĩĩka ciĩko ciake cia hinya o hamwe na ciama werũinĩ wa Zoani ũrĩa ũrĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri.
Psalms78:44 Aagarũrire njũũĩ igĩtuĩka thakame
Psalms78:45 Aamarekeirie ngi nyingĩ mũno ikĩmathĩĩnia
Psalms78:46 Aarekereirie mĩgũnda yao irĩĩo nĩ igunyũ
Psalms78:47 Aanangire mĩthabibũ yao na mbura ya mbembe
Psalms78:48 Ooragire mahiũ maao na mbura ya mbembe
Psalms78:49 Aamahũũrire na maraakara maakanaga ta mwaki
Psalms78:50 Ndahooragĩria maraakara maake o na kana agĩcaaĩra mĩoyo yao; we-rĩ
Psalms78:51 Nĩoragire aariũ oothe a marigithaathi mĩciĩinĩ yothe ya andũ a Misiri.
Psalms78:52 Agĩcooka agĩtongoria andũ aake ta ũrĩa mũrĩithi atongoragia ng'ondu ciake
Psalms78:53 Aamatongoririe hatarĩ na ũgwati mekuona
Psalms78:54 Naake agĩkĩmareehe bũrũriinĩ wake ũrĩa mũtheru
Psalms78:55 Akĩingata ndũũrĩrĩ iria ciatũũraga kuo
Psalms78:56 No o makĩgeria Ngai Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno
Psalms78:57 Maaremire na makĩaga wĩtĩkio o ta maithe maao; maatariĩ o ta ũta mũgaathũku ũrĩa ũtangĩhokwo.
Psalms78:58 Nĩ ũndũ nĩmaamũraakaririe na ũndũ wa gũkorwo marĩ na kũndũ kwao gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria
Psalms78:59 Ngai nĩaraakarire mũno rĩrĩa aamenyire ũndũ ũcio; naake agĩkaana andũ aake a Isiraeli o biũ.
Psalms78:60 Agĩtiganĩria hema yake ĩrĩa yarĩ Shilo
Psalms78:61 Akĩrekereria thũ ciake itahe Ithandũkũ rĩa Kĩrĩĩkanĩro rĩrĩa rĩonanagia hinya o na riiri wake.
Psalms78:62 Nao andũ aake kĩũmbe akĩreka mooragwo nĩ thũ ciao na hiũ cia njora
Psalms78:63 Aanake aao makĩũragĩrwo mbaarainĩ
Psalms78:64 Athĩnjĩri Ngai aao makĩũragwo na hiũ cia njora
Psalms78:65 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI akĩarahũka o ta oima toro
Psalms78:66 Naake agĩcookithia thũ ciake na thuutha agĩgĩciconorithia na agĩcitooria rĩmwe rĩa kũigana.
Psalms78:67 Akĩrega njiarwa cia Josefu; ndathuurire mũhĩrĩga wa Efiraimu.
Psalms78:68 Handũ haaguo aathuurire mũhĩrĩga wa Juda na kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni
Psalms78:69 Agĩaka kuo Hekaarũ yake ĩhaana mũciĩ wake ũrĩa wĩ igũrũ
Psalms78:70 Agĩthuura Daudi
Psalms78:71 kũrĩa aarĩithagia ng'ondu
Psalms78:72 Naake Daudi akĩmatungata arĩ na ngoro theru
Psalms79:1 Bũrũri waku
Psalms79:2 Matigĩĩte ciimba cia andũ aaku irĩĩo nĩ nderi
Psalms79:3 Maitangĩĩte thakame ya andũ aaku o ta maaĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Jerusalemu rĩothe igatherera o ta maaĩ
Psalms79:4 Ndũũrĩrĩ iria tũrigainie nacio nĩgũtũruma iratũruma
Psalms79:5 MWATHANI
Psalms79:6 Erekeria maraakara maaku kũrĩ ndũũrĩrĩ iria itagũthaathayagia
Psalms79:7 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩmooragĩĩte andũ aaku
Psalms79:8 Ndũgaatũherithie nĩ ũndũ wa meehia ma maithe maitũ
Psalms79:9 Tũteithie
Psalms79:10 Reke tũtikoorio nĩ ndũũrĩrĩ atĩrĩ
Psalms79:11 Reke mũcaayo wa arĩa mooheetwo ũkinye matũinĩ maaku. na wohorithie na hinya waku arĩa matuĩrĩirwo kũũragwo.
Psalms79:12 Wĩrĩhĩrie
Psalms79:13 Na ithuĩ andũ aaku
Psalms80:1 Tũthikĩrĩrie
Psalms80:2 wĩguũrĩrie mĩhĩrĩga ya Efiraimu
Psalms80:3 Tũgaacĩrithie rĩngĩ
Psalms80:4 MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe ũgũtũũra nginya rĩ ũraakarĩire mahooya ma andũ aaku?
Psalms80:5 Ũtũheete kĩeha tũrĩe
Psalms80:6 Nĩũrekereirie ndũũrĩrĩ iria tũrigainie nacio irũe ikĩng'eng'anĩra bũrũri witũ; thũ ciitũ itũrumaga o ũrĩa ikwenda.
Psalms80:7 Tũgaacĩrithie rĩngĩ
Psalms80:8 Wee-rĩ
Psalms80:9 Ũgĩtheria handũ
Psalms80:10 Irĩma ikĩhumbĩrwo nĩ kĩĩruru kĩaguo
Psalms80:11 Wakinyĩĩtie honge ciaguo o iriainĩ rĩa Mediteraneani
Psalms80:12 Wakĩmomoranirie rũgiri rũrĩa wairigĩirwo naruo nĩkĩ? Rĩu-rĩ
Psalms80:13 Ũrangarangagwo nĩ ngũrũe cia gĩthaka
Psalms80:14 Tũhũgũkĩre
Psalms80:15 Ũka ũhonokie mũthabibũ ũyũ wahandire
Psalms80:16 Thũ ciitũ nĩiũtemeete ũkagũa thĩ na ikaũcina na mwaki; cirore ũraakarĩĩte ũcianange!
Psalms80:17 Menyerera andũ aaku arĩa wee ũthuurĩĩte; na ũtũũrie rũũrĩrĩ rũrĩa watũmire rũgĩe na hinya.
Psalms80:18 Tũtigaagũtiga rĩngĩ rĩ o rĩ; tũtũũrie muoyo na nĩtũrĩkũgoocaga.
Psalms80:19 Tũgaacĩrithie rĩngĩ
Psalms81:1 Inĩraai Ngai
Psalms81:2 Ambĩrĩriai kũina na mũhũũre tamburini
Psalms81:3 Huuhaai karumbeeta gakũmenyithania thigũkũ nĩyambĩrĩria: ya karũũgamo ka mweri na ya mweri waiganana.
Psalms81:4 Ũguo nĩguo watho wa Isiraeli uugĩĩte; nĩguo Ngai wa Jakubu aathanĩĩte.
Psalms81:5 Aũheire andũ a Isiraeli hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aatharĩkĩire bũrũri wa Misiri.Ndĩraigua mũgambo itooĩ ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms81:6 “Nĩ niĩ ndakwaũrire mũrigo ciande
Psalms81:7 Wangaĩire ũrĩ mathĩĩnainĩ
Psalms81:8 Andũ aakwa
Psalms81:9 Ndũkaanagĩe na ngai ng'eni
Psalms81:10 Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku
Psalms81:11 “No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms81:12 Kwoguo ngĩmarekereria marũmĩrĩre mwĩĩro wa ngoro ciao
Psalms81:13 Naarĩ korwo andũ aakwa maathikĩrĩria! Naarĩ korwo manjathĩkĩra!
Psalms81:14 No kũhoota ingĩhoota thũ ciao o narua na ndoorie arĩa oothe marĩ muku nao.
Psalms81:15 Arĩa mathũire no gũturia mangĩturia ndu mbere yakwa makĩinainaga; ihera rĩao rĩngĩtũũra tene na tene.
Psalms81:16 No inyuĩ ingĩmũhe ngano iria njega mũno mũrĩagage na ndĩmũhũũnagie na ũũkĩ wa gĩthaka.”
Psalms82:1 Ngai nĩgũikarĩra aikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩake kĩamainĩ kĩa igũrũ; aratuĩra ngai e gatagatĩ gaacio agĩciũragia atĩrĩ
Psalms82:2 “Mũgũtũũra nginya rĩ mũtuaga ciira mũtekũrũmĩrĩra kĩhooto
Psalms82:3 Gitagĩraai ihooto cia athĩĩni na cia ciana cia ngoriai; mũtikaahinyagĩrĩrie arĩa mabataire na arĩa matarĩ na wa kũmateithia.
Psalms82:4 Hatũragaai athĩĩni na arĩa mabataire; mahonokagiei kuuma mookoinĩ ma andũ arĩa ooru.
Psalms82:5 “Ĩ mũtirĩ ahũhũũtĩki na mũkariita; inyuĩ mũtirĩ ehokeku o na haniini
Psalms82:6 Ndoigire atĩrĩ
Psalms82:7 No rĩĩrĩ

Psalms83:1 Wee
Psalms83:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms83:3 Marabanga na hitho ũrĩa mekũũnũha andũ aaku; maraciira ũũru igũrũ rĩa andũ arĩa wee ũmenyagĩrĩra.
Psalms83:4 Mareerana atĩrĩ
Psalms83:5 Nĩmaiguithanĩirie ũrĩa mabangĩĩte gwĩka na makaiguithanĩria magũũkĩrĩre:
Psalms83:6 andũ a Edomu na a Ishumaeli; andũ a Moabi na a Hagari;
Psalms83:7 andũ a Gebali
Psalms83:8 O nao Aasiria nĩmeturanĩire nao nĩguo mateithĩrĩrie na ũcamba njiarwa cia Loti
Psalms83:9 Meeke ta ũrĩa wekire Amidiani
Psalms83:10 Wamahooteire Enidori
Psalms83:11 Ĩka atongoria aao ũrĩa wekire Orebu na Zeebu; hoota aathani aao oothe ta ũrĩa wahootire Zeba na Zalimuna
Psalms83:12 arĩa moigire atĩrĩ
Psalms83:13 Tondũ ũcio
Psalms83:14 (14-15) Maingatithie na kĩhuuhũkanio gĩaku
Psalms83:15 Humba moothiũ maao na thoni
Psalms83:16 Marotoorio na maguoyohio nginya tene na tene; marokua na gĩconoko kĩnene.
Psalms83:17 Maromenya atĩ wee wiki
Psalms84:1 Hekaarũ yaku

Psalms84:3 O nacio nyoni nĩciĩyoneire ũikaro kuo
Psalms84:4 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Psalms84:5 Kũraathimwo-rĩ

Psalms84:9 Ngai
Psalms84:10 Gũtinda mũthenya ũmwe Hekaarũinĩ yaku nĩ kwega gũkĩra gũikara handũ hangĩ o hoothe mĩthenya ngiri.Nĩ kaba ndũũgame kĩhingoinĩ kĩa nyũmba ya Ngai handũ ha gũtũũra mĩciĩ ya andũ arĩa aaganu.
Psalms84:11 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩ we ũtũmenyagĩrĩra na agatũthamakagĩra arĩ na riiri

Psalms85:1 MWATHANI
Psalms85:2 Nĩwarekeire andũ aaku mahĩtia maao; meehia maao moothe wee nĩwamooheire.
Psalms85:3 Nĩwatigire kũng'ũrĩka nĩ ũndũ wao na ũgĩthirwo nĩ maraakara mekũrĩrĩmbũka marĩa warĩ namo.
Psalms85:4 Gĩtũgaacĩrithie rĩngĩ Ngai mũhonokia witũ
Psalms85:5 Ũgũtũũra ũtũraakarĩire nginya tene na tene? Gũtirĩ hĩndĩ maraakara maaku magaathira?
Psalms85:6 Tũhe hinya o rĩngĩ
Psalms85:7 Tuonie ũtugi waku
Psalms85:8 Rĩu-rĩ
Psalms85:9 Ti itherũ nĩehaarĩirie kũhonokia arĩa mamũtĩĩĩte
Psalms85:10 Wendo na ũhoro wa ma nĩirĩcemania; ũthingu na thaayũ nĩirĩmumunyana.
Psalms85:11 Wĩhokeku ũrĩkunũkaga kuuma na thĩ

Psalms85:13 Ũthingu ũrĩthiaga MWATHANI mbere

Psalms86:3 Njiguĩra tha

Psalms86:5 Nĩ gũkorwo wee

Psalms86:8 Gũtirĩ ngai ĩngĩ ĩhaana ta we

Psalms86:10 Tondũ wee wĩ mũnene na nĩwĩkaga maũndũ ma kũgegania; wee o wee wiki nĩ we Ngai.
Psalms86:11 MWATHANI
Psalms86:12 Nĩngũgũcookeria ngaatho
Psalms86:13 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩũnyoneetie ũtugi mũnene mũno; nĩũhonokeetie kuuma irimainĩ rĩa gĩkuũ.
Psalms86:14 Nĩnjũkĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ etĩĩi
Psalms86:15 No wee

Psalms87:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms87:2 eendeete itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu gũkĩra kũndũ kũrĩa kũngĩ guothe thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli.
Psalms87:3 Wee
Psalms87:4 “Nĩngaagwetanĩria Misiri na Babilonia hamwe na mabũrũri marĩa manjathĩkagĩra; nĩngaataranĩria andũ a Filisitia
Psalms87:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Psalms87:6 MWATHANI nĩakandĩka marĩĩtwa ma andũ ibukuinĩ atĩ oothe maaciarĩirwo Jerusalemu.

Psalms88:1 MWATHANI
Psalms88:2 Igua ihooya rĩakwa
Psalms88:3 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩnyariirĩkĩĩte mũno
Psalms88:4 Ndaranĩirio na arĩa makirie gũkua; ndirĩ na hinya o na mũniini.
Psalms88:5 Haana ta mũndũ ũtiganĩirio gatagatĩinĩ ga ciimba; ndariĩ ta ũmwe wa andũ mooragĩĩtwo magathikwo mbĩĩrĩrainĩ arĩa ũtacookaga kũrũmbũiya rĩngĩ
Psalms88:6 Ũnjikĩĩtie o mbĩĩrĩrainĩ gĩtina
Psalms88:7 Maraakara maaku nĩmangomeire mũno; ndiihũ ciamo nĩcihehenjeete.
Psalms88:8 Nĩũtũmĩĩte ndiganĩrio nĩ araata aakwa; ũnduĩte kĩndũ kĩ magigi harĩ o.Hingĩrĩirio ũguo atĩ ndingĩhota kũũra.
Psalms88:9 Maitho maakwa nĩmoorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩ ũrĩa nyamaarĩkĩĩte; ngũkayagĩra mũthenya o mũthenya
Psalms88:10 Nĩũringagĩra andũ arĩa akuũ ciama? Nĩmarĩũkaga gũkũgooca?
Psalms88:11 Ũtugi waku nĩũhunjagio mbĩĩrĩrainĩ
Psalms88:12 Ciama ciaku nĩcionagwo kũndũ kũu kwa nduma kana wega waku ũkamenywo bũrũriinĩ ũcio wa kĩriganĩro?
Psalms88:13 Niĩ-rĩ
Psalms88:14 Ũndegeete nĩkĩ
Psalms88:15 Ndũire nyariirĩkaga ngakuhagĩrĩria gũkua kuuma ndĩ o mũnyiinyi; nĩniinĩĩtwo hinya nĩ maũndũ ma kũguoyohia marĩa ũnjĩkĩĩte.
Psalms88:16 Maraakara maaku matangĩtatĩka nĩmahehenjeete; mahũũra maaku ma kũguoyohia nĩmaranyananga.
Psalms88:17 Mathiũrũrũkagĩria mũthenya wothe o ta mũiyũro wa maaĩ; hingagĩrĩrio nĩmo na mĩena yothe.
Psalms88:18 Nĩũtũmĩĩte ndiganĩrio o na nĩ araata aakwa arĩa nyumĩranĩĩtie ngoro mũno nao; nduma noyo mũraata wakwa.
Psalms89:1 MWATHANI
Psalms89:2 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ wendo waku ũgũtũũra nginya tene na tene
Psalms89:3 Wee nĩwoigire atĩrĩĩrĩ
Psalms89:4 ‘Njiarwa ciaku igũtũũra ithamakaga; ũthamaki waku ngũũtũũria nginya tene na tene.’ ”
Psalms89:5 Igũrũ nĩgũkumia rĩrakumia ciĩko cia magegania iria wee
Psalms89:6 Gũtirĩ ũngĩ kũu igũrũ ũhaana ta we
Psalms89:7 Wee-rĩ
Psalms89:8 Gũtirĩ wĩ hinya ta we
Psalms89:9 Nĩ we wathaga iria rĩrĩa rĩhuuhũkanagia na hinya
Psalms89:10 Nĩ we wahehenjire ndamaathia ĩrĩa yetagwo Rahabu ũkĩmĩũraga; thũ ciaku wacihurunjire na guoko gwaku kũrĩ hinya.
Psalms89:11 Igũrũ nĩ rĩaku
Psalms89:12 Nĩ we wombire mwena wa na rũgongo na wa na kĩanda; kĩrĩma gĩa Taboru na gĩa Herimoni nĩgũkũinĩra irakũinĩra nĩgũkena.
Psalms89:13 Wee-rĩ
Psalms89:14 Mũthingi wa ũthamaki waku nĩ ũthingu na kĩhooto; maũndũ moothe marĩa wĩkaga moonanagia wendani na wĩhokeku.
Psalms89:15 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Psalms89:16 Matindaga macanjamũkĩĩte mũthenya wothe nĩ ũndũ waku
Psalms89:17 Nĩ we ũtũheaga ũhootani mũnene; tũrũũhagia tũkiugagĩrĩria nĩ ũndũ nĩũtwendeete.
Psalms89:18 Wee
Psalms89:19 Tene mũno-rĩ
Psalms89:20 Nĩnduĩte ndungata yakwa Daudi mũthamaki na ũndũ wa kũmũitĩrĩria maguta marĩa matheru.
Psalms89:21 Hinya wakwa ũrĩkoragwo hamwe naake hingo ciothe
Psalms89:22 Thũ ciake itikaamũkĩria hinya rĩ o rĩ
Psalms89:23 Nĩngaahehenja thũ ciake na njũrage arĩa oothe mamũthũire.
Psalms89:24 Nĩndĩrĩmwendaga na ndĩmuonagie wĩhokeku; ndĩrĩmũheaga ũhootani hingo ciothe.
Psalms89:25 Nĩngaaramia ũthamaki wake kuuma iria rĩa Mediteraneani nginya rũũĩ rwa Farati.
Psalms89:26 Akanjĩĩraga atĩrĩ
Psalms89:27 Nĩngaamũtua mũrũ wakwa wa irigithaathi
Psalms89:28 Ngũtũũra ndĩmũtugaga nginya tene na tene
Psalms89:29 Ũthamaki wake ũgũtũũra o nginya igũrũ rĩgaathira; njiarwa ciake igũtũũra ithamakaga nginya tene na tene.
Psalms89:30 “No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms89:31 ingĩkaagarara ũrĩa ndĩcirũtĩĩte
Psalms89:32 nĩngaaciherithia nĩ ũndũ wa wĩhia ũcio wacio na nĩngaatũma inyariirĩke nĩ ũndũ wa mahĩtia maacio.
Psalms89:33 No ndigaatiga kwenda Daudi kana njage kũhingia ũrĩa ndĩmwĩrĩire.
Psalms89:34 Ndigaathũũkia kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ndĩĩkanĩire naake kana ngarũre ũrĩa ndĩmwĩrĩire.
Psalms89:35 “Nĩndehĩta na rĩĩtwa rĩakwa rĩtheru atĩ ndikaaheenia Daudi rĩ o rĩ.
Psalms89:36 Mbeũ yake ndĩgaathira tene na tene
Psalms89:37 Ũthamaki wake ũgũtũũra wĩhandĩĩte o ta mweri ũrĩa ũtũũraga wonagwo igũrũ matuinĩ.”
Psalms89:38 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms89:39 Nĩwĩthambĩĩte kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa ũrĩĩkanĩire na ndungata yaku na ũkarangĩrĩria thũmbĩ yake ndooroinĩ.
Psalms89:40 Nĩũmomoranĩĩtie thingo cia itũũra rĩake na ũgatharũrania nyũmba ciake cia kwĩgitĩra iria njake na thingo cia hinya.
Psalms89:41 Indo ciake iraiywo nĩ mwĩhĩtũkĩri o wothe; arĩa oothe arigainie nao nĩkũmũthekerera maramũthekerera.
Psalms89:42 Nĩũheete arĩa marĩ muku naake ũhootani; nĩũtũmĩĩte thũ icio ciake ciothe ikene.
Psalms89:43 Nĩũtũmĩĩte indo ciake cia mbaara ituĩke cia tũhũ
Psalms89:44 Nĩũmũtuunyĩĩte mũthĩĩgi wa ũthamaki na ũgaikania thũmbĩ yake thĩ.
Psalms89:45 Nĩũtũmĩĩte oonekane arĩ mũkũrũ
Psalms89:46 MWATHANI
Psalms89:47 Ririkana
Psalms89:48 Nũũ ũngĩtũũra na aage gũkaanakua? Mũndũ-rĩ
Psalms89:49 MWATHANI
Psalms89:50 Ririkana ũrĩa niĩ
Psalms89:51 Thũ ciaku
Psalms89:52 Goocaai MWATHANI nginya tene na tene! Ameni! Ameni!
Psalms90:1 MWATHANI
Psalms90:2 Mbere ya ũtanoomba irĩma
Psalms90:3 Wĩraga mũndũ acooke o rũkũngũinĩ; ũmũgarũraga agatuĩka o rũkũngũ.
Psalms90:4 Harĩ we-rĩ
Psalms90:5 Ũtũhaataga ta ũrĩa mũiyũro wa maaĩ ũhaataga; tũthiraga na ihenya o ta kĩrooto.Tũhaana ta nyeki ĩrĩa ĩringũraga rũũciinĩ
Psalms90:6 ĩgakũra na ĩkarura wega
Psalms90:7 Ithuĩ-rĩ
Psalms90:8 Waganu witũ ũũigĩĩte o mbere yaku; meehia maitũ marĩa tũhithĩĩte ũmaigĩĩte o harĩa ũngĩmoona.
Psalms90:9 Ũtũũro witũ nĩkũniinwo ũraniinwo nĩ maraakara maaku; ũrathira o ta ihũũmũka.
Psalms90:10 Ũtũũro witũ wa gũũkũ thĩ nĩ mĩaka mĩrongo mũgwanja
Psalms90:11 Nũũ ũũĩ mang'ũrĩ maaku maigana atĩa na akamenya marũrũ maaku nĩguo akũhe gĩtĩĩo kĩrĩa wagĩrĩire kũheeo?
Psalms90:12 Tuonie ũrĩa ũtũũro witũ wĩ mũkuhĩ
Psalms90:13 Ũgũikara ũraakarĩĩte nginya rĩ
Psalms90:14 Tũhũũnagie ũtugi waku rũũciinĩ o rũũciinĩ
Psalms90:15 Tũkenie matukũ o ta marĩa ũtũnyariirĩĩte. na mĩaka o ta ĩrĩa tuoneete mathĩĩna.
Psalms90:16 Reke ithuĩ
Psalms90:17 Wega wa MWATHANI Ngai witũ ũrogĩa na ithuĩ
Psalms91:1 Ũrĩa wothe ũikaraga ũgitĩriinĩ wa Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ Mũno
Psalms91:2 no ahote kũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Psalms91:3 Tondũ we nĩarĩkũrigagĩrĩria ndũgaatoonye mũtegoinĩ ũrĩa ũhithĩĩtwo
Psalms91:4 Arĩkũhumbagĩra na mathagu maake
Psalms91:5 Ndũrĩtigagĩra ũgwati o wothe ũrĩa ũngĩũka ũtukũ
Psalms91:6 kana mũthiro ũrĩa ũniinanaga rĩrĩa kwĩ nduma na mwanangĩko ũrĩa ũũraganaga kwĩ o mũthenya.
Psalms91:7 Andũ ngiri ĩmwe o na mangĩgũa mwena waku wa ũmotho makuĩte
Psalms91:8 Wee-rĩ
Psalms91:9 Tondũ nĩũtuĩte MWATHANI mũkũgitĩri
Psalms91:10 ndũrĩ ũũru ũrĩonaga
Psalms91:11 Ngai nĩarĩathaga araika aake makũmenyagĩrĩre kũrĩa guothe ũrĩthiaga.
Psalms91:12 Marĩgũkuuaga na mooko maao nĩguo ndũkaahĩngwo kũgũrũ nĩ ihiga.
Psalms91:13 Nĩũrĩrangagĩrĩria mĩrũũthi na gĩĩko na ũkinyagĩrĩrie na magũrũ maaku mĩrũũthi ĩrĩa mĩĩthĩ na nyoka iria irĩ thumu.
Psalms91:14 Ngai aroiga atĩrĩ
Psalms91:15 Manjĩta nĩndĩrĩmeetĩkaga; nĩndĩrĩkoragwo hamwe nao magĩthĩĩnĩka
Psalms91:16 Nĩndĩrĩmaheaga ũtũũro mũraaya
Psalms92:1 Nĩ wega mũno gũgũcookagĩria ngaatho wee
Psalms92:2 Nĩ ũndũ mwega mũno kũganaga ũtugi waku o rũũciinĩ
Psalms92:3 tũkĩhũũraga ngita na tũkĩinaga na inanda.
Psalms92:4 Nĩ gũkorwo wee
Psalms92:5 Ĩ ciĩko ciaku
Psalms92:6 Mũndũ ũrĩa kĩrimũ ndangĩmenya; mũndũ mũkĩĩgu ndangĩkũũrana ũndũ ũyũ;
Psalms92:7 andũ arĩa aaganu o na mangĩkũra ta nyeki; arĩa meekaga ũũru o na mangĩtonga; makaaniinwo o biũ
Psalms92:8 tondũ wee
Psalms92:9 Ti itherũ
Psalms92:10 Ũtũmĩĩte ngĩe na hinya o ta mbogo; nĩũndaathimĩĩte na gĩkeno.
Psalms92:11 Nĩndĩyoneire na maitho maakwa thũ ciakwa ikĩhootwo
Psalms92:12 Andũ arĩa athingu mathegeaga o ta mĩkĩndũ
Psalms92:13 Mahaana ta mĩtĩ ĩhandĩĩtwo nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI ĩrĩa ĩkũraga Hekaarũinĩ ya Ngai witũ
Psalms92:14 ĩkarutaga maciaro o na ĩrĩ mĩkũrũ na ĩgaikaraga ĩrurĩĩte na ĩrĩ na hinya.
Psalms92:15 Ũndũ ũcio wonanagia atĩ MWATHANI nĩ mũrũngĩrĩru
Psalms93:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki; ehumbĩĩte ũnene na hinya.Thĩ ĩhandĩĩtwo ĩkarũma ki; ndĩngĩenyenyeka o na atĩa.
Psalms93:2 Gĩtĩ gĩaku kĩa ũnene

Psalms94:1 MWATHANI

Psalms94:3 MWATHANI
Psalms94:4 Andũ arĩa ooru-rĩ

Psalms94:6 Mooragaga atumia a ndigwa na ciana cia ngoriai
Psalms94:7 Moigaga atĩrĩ
Psalms94:8 Inyuĩ andũ aya akingitaru
Psalms94:9 Mũreciiria Ngai ũrĩa wombire matũ ndaiguaga? Mũreciiria ũrĩa wombire maitho ndoonaga?
Psalms94:10 Mũreciiria Ngai ũrĩa ũrũngaga ndũũrĩrĩ ndangĩciherithia? Mũreciiria Ngai ũrĩa ũrutaga andũ oothe ndarĩ ũmenyo?
Psalms94:11 MWATHANI nĩoĩ ũrĩa andũ meciiragia; nĩoĩ ũrĩa meciiria maao marĩ ma tũhũ.
Psalms94:12 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Psalms94:13 Ũtũmaga aikare ahooreire hĩndĩ ya mathĩĩna o nginya andũ arĩa aaganu makenjerwo irima.
Psalms94:14 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI ndangĩtiganĩria andũ aake; ndangĩteanĩria andũ arĩa marĩ aake kĩũmbe.
Psalms94:15 Kĩhooto nĩgĩgũcooka kuonekana maciirainĩ nao andũ oothe athingu nĩmarĩnyiitaga ũndũ ũcio mbaru.
Psalms94:16 Nũũ wokĩrĩire andũ acio aaganu handũinĩ haakwa? Nũũ warĩ mwena wakwa ngĩng'eng'ana na andũ acio meekaga ũũru?
Psalms94:17 Korwo MWATHANI ndandeithĩrĩirie-rĩ
Psalms94:18 Ndoigire atĩrĩ

Psalms94:20 Wee-rĩ

Psalms94:22 No rĩĩrĩ

Psalms96:1 Inĩraai MWATHANI rwĩmbo rwerũ! Inĩraai MWATHANI

Psalms96:3 Ganĩraai ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe ũhoro wa riiri wake; ĩraai andũ oothe ũhoro wa ciĩko ciake cia magegania.
Psalms96:4 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩ mũnene
Psalms96:5 Ngai cia ndũũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ ciothe nĩ mĩhianano mĩtheri
Psalms96:6 Athiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ ũnene na riiri; Hekaarũ yake ĩiyũire hinya na ũthaka.
Psalms96:7 Goocaai MWATHANI
Psalms96:8 Goocaai rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI rĩrĩa rĩrĩ riiri; ũkaai Hekaarũinĩ yake mũrĩ na iheeo.
Psalms96:9 Thaathayai MWATHANI o we mwene ũnene na riiri; inainaai mũrĩ mbere yake andũ oothe a thĩ!

Psalms96:13 mbere ya MWATHANI
Psalms97:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki! Thĩ ta nĩkene
Psalms97:2 Athiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ matu na nduma ndumanu; arathana na ũthingu na kĩhooto.
Psalms97:3 Atongoreetio nĩ mwaki ũracina thũ ciake mĩena yothe.
Psalms97:4 Heni ciake nĩkũmũrĩka iramũrĩka mabũrũri; thĩ no kũinaina ĩrainaina yaciona.
Psalms97:5 Irĩma iraringũka o ta mũcumaa mbere ya MWATHANI
Psalms97:6 Igũrũ rĩranĩrĩra ũthingu wake
Psalms97:7 Arĩa oothe mathaathayagia mĩhianano nĩmaconoreetwo
Psalms97:8 Andũ a Zayuni nĩmakeneete nĩkũigua ũguo
Psalms97:9 Nĩ gũkorwo wee
Psalms97:10 MWATHANI nĩendeete arĩa mathũire ũũru; nĩamenyagĩrĩra mĩoyo ya andũ aake
Psalms97:11 Ũtheri nĩwarĩire andũ arĩa athingu
Psalms97:12 Inyuothe arĩa athingu kenaai nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte!Ririkanaai ũrĩa Ngai ũrĩa mũtheru eekĩĩte
Psalms98:1 Inĩraai MWATHANI rwĩmbo rwerũ
Psalms98:2 MWATHANI nĩamenyithanĩĩtie ũhootani wake; nĩoneetie ndũũrĩrĩ hinya wake wa kũhonokania.
Psalms98:3 Nĩahingĩĩtie na wĩhokeku ũrĩa eerĩire andũ aake a Isiraeli; thĩ yothe nĩyoneete ũhootani wa Ngai witũ.
Psalms98:4 Inĩraai MWATHANI mũkeneete inyuĩ andũ oothe a thĩ; mũgooceei na nyĩmbo mũkiugagĩrĩria nĩgũkena!
Psalms98:5 Inaai mũkĩgoocaga MWATHANI! Inaai mũkĩhũũraga inanda!
Psalms98:6 Huuhaai tũrumbeeta na macoro
Psalms98:7 Iria nĩrĩrurume
Psalms98:8 Njũũĩ nĩihũũre hĩ; irĩma nĩciine mbere ya MWATHANI ikeneete
Psalms98:9 tondũ nĩarooka gwatha thĩ.Arĩathaga andũ a thĩ na kĩhooto na amatuagĩre ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire.
Psalms99:1 MWATHANI nĩ we mũthamaki; andũ nĩkũinaina marainaina. Aikarĩire ciũmbe iria irĩ mathagu irĩ ta gĩtĩ gĩake gĩa ũthamaki
Psalms99:2 MWATHANI nĩ mũnene Zayuni; nĩ we wathaga ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe.
Psalms99:3 Andũ oothe nĩmarĩkumagia rĩĩtwa rĩake rĩnene na rĩa gwĩtigĩrwo. We nĩ mũtheru!
Psalms99:4 Wee
Psalms99:5 Goocaai MWATHANI Ngai witũ! Mũthaathaiyei mũrĩ mbere ya gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki. We nĩ mũtheru!
Psalms99:6 Musa na Harũni maarĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai aake

Psalms100:1 Inĩraai MWATHANI inyuĩ andũ oothe a thĩ!
Psalms100:2 Thaathayai MWATHANI mũcanjamũkĩĩte; ũkaai mbere yake mũkĩinaga mũkeneete!
Psalms100:3 Menyaai atĩ MWATHANI nĩ Ngai; nĩ we watũũmbire
Psalms100:4 Toonyeraai ihingo cia Hekaarũ yake mũrĩ na ngaatho thiĩi njainĩ ciayo mũkĩgoocaga.Mũcookeriei ngaatho na mũmũgooce.
Psalms100:5 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩ mwega; wendo wake ndũrĩ hĩndĩ ũgaathira na wĩhokeku wake ũgũtũũra nginya tene na tene.
Psalms101:1 Nĩngũina rwĩmbo rũkoniĩ wĩhokeku na kĩhooto; wee
Psalms101:2 Ndĩrĩthiaga na mĩthiĩre ĩtarĩ na ũcuuke. Ũgooka harĩ niĩ rĩ?Nĩndĩrĩikaraga gwakwa mũciĩ na mũikarĩre mũkinyanĩru
Psalms101:3 na nĩndĩrĩreganaga na ũndũ o wothe mũũru.Nĩthũire ciĩko cia arĩa matirikaga Ngai; ndĩrĩgĩaga ngwatanĩro nao.
Psalms101:4 Ndirĩogomagia kĩhootona ndirĩendaga gũkuhanĩrĩria na ũndũ mũũru.
Psalms101:5 Nĩndĩrĩniinaga mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũcambagia mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ na hitho; ndirĩkiragĩrĩria mũndũ mwĩtĩi na mũng'athia.
Psalms101:6 Nĩndĩrĩiguagĩra tha andũ arĩa ehokeku bũrũriinĩ
Psalms101:7 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũrĩkũ ũheenanagia ũrĩikaraga gwakwa; mũndũ ũrĩa waragia ũhoro ũtarĩ wa ma ndarĩikaraga mbere yakwa.
Psalms101:8 Mũthenya o mũthenya nĩndĩrĩniinaga andũ ooru arĩa marĩ bũrũriinĩ witũ; nĩndĩrĩingataga andũ oothe arĩa meekaga ũũru kuuma itũũra rĩa MWATHANI.
Psalms102:1 Thikĩrĩria ihooya rĩakwa
Psalms102:2 Ndũkaae kũrora na kũngĩ rĩrĩa ndĩrathĩĩnĩka! Thikĩrĩria
Psalms102:3 Ũtũũro wakwa nĩgũthira ũrathira o ta ũrĩa ndoogo ĩthiraga; mwĩrĩ wakwa ũrakana o ta mwaki.
Psalms102:4 Hũũrĩkangĩĩte ngahooha o ta nyeki; nĩnjũrĩĩtwo nĩ ngoro ya kũrĩa irio.
Psalms102:5 Nĩhĩnjĩĩte mũno nĩ ũrĩa ndĩracaaya na hinya.
Psalms102:6 Haana o ta nderi ya werũinĩ; nduĩkĩĩte o ta ndundu ĩrĩa ĩikaraga kũndũ gũtharũranĩĩtio.
Psalms102:7 Ndionaga toro; haana ta kanyoni karĩ o goiki gacũmbĩrĩ igũrũ ka nyũmba.
Psalms102:8 Ndindaga ngĩthirĩkio nĩ thũ ciakwa; arĩa manyũrũragia mahũthagĩra rĩĩtwa rĩakwa makĩrumana.
Psalms102:9 Ndĩaga mũhu ta irio na ngatukania kĩrĩa ndĩranyua na maithori maakwa
Psalms102:10 nĩ ũndũ wa maraakara maaku na mang'ũrĩ tondũ ũnjoeete na igũrũ ũkanyuguta kũndũ kũraaya.
Psalms102:11 Ũtũũro wakwa ũhaana ta kĩĩruru kĩa hwaĩinĩ; ndĩrahooha o ta nyeki.
Psalms102:12 No wee
Psalms102:13 Ti itherũ nĩũkwarahũka ũiguĩre itũũra rĩa Zayuni tha; ihinda rĩa kũrĩka wega nĩrĩrĩĩkĩĩtie gũkinya; ihinda rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire ti rĩngĩ nĩ rĩĩrĩ.
Psalms102:14 Ndungata ciaku nĩirĩendeete
Psalms102:15 Ndũũrĩrĩ nĩigeetigĩra MWATHANI; athamaki oothe a thĩ nĩmageetigĩra hinya wake.
Psalms102:16 Nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI nĩagaaka Zayuni rĩngĩ; nĩakoonania ũnene wake.
Psalms102:17 Nĩakaigua ihooya rĩa andũ aake arĩa matiganĩirio
Psalms102:18 Andĩkĩra rũciaro rũrĩa rũrooka ũrĩa MWATHANI eekĩĩte
Psalms102:19 MWATHANI aacũũthĩrĩirie arĩ handũ haake hatheru kũu igũrũ
Psalms102:20 Akĩigua mũcaayo wa arĩa mooheetwo na akĩohora arĩa maatuĩrĩirwo kũũragwo.
Psalms102:21 Tondũ ũcio rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI nĩrĩkaanĩrĩrwo Zayuni
Psalms102:22 rĩrĩa mabũrũri na moothamaki makoongana hamwe mathaathaiye MWATHANI.
Psalms102:23 MWATHANI nĩahinyarĩĩtie ndĩ o mwĩthĩ
Psalms102:24 Ndũkanjũrage
Psalms102:25 nĩ we wombire thĩ kuuma o tene
Psalms102:26 Thĩ na igũrũ nĩigaathira
Psalms102:27 No wee-rĩ
Psalms102:28 Ciana ciitũ nĩigaatũũra na thaayũ

Psalms103:7 Nĩaguũrĩirie Musa mĩbango yake

Psalms103:9 Ndaikaraga agĩtũrũithagia
Psalms103:10 Ndatũherithagia ta ũrĩa twagĩrĩirwo nĩkũherithio
Psalms103:11 O ta ũrĩa igũrũ rĩraihĩrĩirie thĩ-rĩ
Psalms103:12 O ta ũrĩa irathĩro rĩraihĩrĩirie ithũĩro

Psalms103:15 Ithuĩ tũhaana o ta nyeki

Psalms103:17 No rĩĩrĩ
