Psalms103:22 Goocaai MWATHANI inyuĩ ciũmbe ciake ciothe iria irĩ kũrĩa guothe athamakaga!Ngoro yakwa gooca MWATHANI!
Psalms104:1 Ngoro yakwa gooca MWATHANI! Ĩ wee
Psalms104:2 na ũkehumba ũtheri ta nguo.Nĩ we watambũrũkirie igũrũ ta hema
Psalms104:3 na ũkĩhanda itugĩ cia nyũmba yaku maaĩinĩ marĩa marĩ na kũu igũrũ.Wee nĩ we ũtuaga matu ngaari ya mbarathi ya gũgũkuua
Psalms104:4 Wee nĩ we ũtuaga huuho arekio aaku
Psalms104:5 Wee nĩ we wakire thĩ mũthingiinĩ wayo
Psalms104:6 Wee nĩ we wahumbĩrĩĩte thĩ na maaĩ ma iria ta nguo
Psalms104:7 Ũgĩcooka ũgĩkũũma maaĩ makĩũra magĩtherera rĩrĩa maiguire wathana na kayũ kanene
Psalms104:8 magĩtherera igũrũ wa irĩma magĩitĩrĩra ciandainĩ
Psalms104:9 Wee nĩ we wekĩrĩire maaĩ macio mĩhaka ĩrĩa matangĩkĩra nĩguo matikaanacooke kũhumbĩra thĩ rĩ kana rĩ.
Psalms104:10 Wee nĩwe ũtũmaga ithima cia maaĩ itherũkage ciandainĩ
Psalms104:11 makanyuagwo nĩ nyamũ ciothe cia gĩthaka; ndigiri cia gĩthaka ikenyotoraga namo.
Psalms104:12 Ngurumoinĩ cia ithima icio nĩkuo nyoni ciakaga itara ciacio
Psalms104:13 Wee nĩ we uuragĩria irĩma mbura kuuma igũrũ
Psalms104:14 Wee nĩ we ũtũmaga nyeki ĩkũre nĩ ũndũ wa mahiũ na ũgakũria mĩmera ĩrĩa andũ mahandaga
Psalms104:15 na moonage ndibei ya kũmacanjamũra ngoro
Psalms104:16 Mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni nĩyuragĩrio mbura wega; mĩtĩ ĩyo nĩ ya MWATHANI kĩũmbe
Psalms104:17 Mĩtĩinĩ ĩyo nĩ ho nyoni ciakaga itara ciacio; mĩkarakabainĩ nĩkuo nyũmba cia mĩĩhau irĩ.
Psalms104:18 Irĩmainĩ iria ndaaya nĩkuo mbũri cia gĩthaka ciikaraga
Psalms104:19 Wee-rĩ
Psalms104:20 Nĩ we ũtũmaga kũgĩe nduma gũgagĩtuka
Psalms104:21 Mĩrũũthi ĩrĩa mĩĩthĩ ĩraramaga o ĩkĩhĩtaga
Psalms104:22 Riũa rĩaratha
Psalms104:23 Nao andũ magathiĩ mawĩrainĩ magakĩmaruta o nginya hwaĩinĩ.
Psalms104:24 Ĩ wee
Psalms104:25 Iria nĩrĩo rĩĩrĩa
Psalms104:26 Meeri nĩkuo igeragĩra
Psalms104:27 Indo icio ciothe nĩ we ikoragwo iroreete igũrũ nĩguo ũciheage irio ciacio rĩrĩa ciabatara.
Psalms104:28 Ũciheaga
Psalms104:29 Rĩrĩa wacitiganĩria ikaigua guoya mũno; wathengia mĩhũũmũ yaku
Psalms104:30 Rĩrĩa wacihe mĩhũũmũ yaku ikoombĩka
Psalms104:31 Riiri wa MWATHANI ũrotũũra nginya tene na tene! MWATHANI arokenera wĩra wake!
Psalms104:32 Aroraga thĩ
Psalms104:33 Ngũtũũra nyinagĩra MWATHANI matukũ moothe ma muoyo wakwa; ndĩrĩinaga ngĩgoocaga Ngai wakwa matukũ moothe marĩa ngũtũũra muoyo.
Psalms104:34 MWATHANI arokenio nĩ meciiria maakwa
Psalms104:35 Eehia maroniinwo kuuma gũũkũ thĩ; andũ arĩa aaganu marothira o biũ.Ngoro yakwa gooca MWATHANI! Goocaai MWATHANI!
Psalms105:1 Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho
Psalms105:2 Mũgooceei na nyĩmbo; menyithaniai maũndũ moothe ma magegania marĩa eekĩĩte!
Psalms105:3 Kenaai tondũ tũrĩ aake; arĩa oothe mamũthaathayagia nĩmacanjamũke!
Psalms105:4 Cariai MWATHANI
Psalms105:5 (5-6) Inyuĩ njiarwa cia Aburahamu
Psalms105:6 MWATHANI nĩ we Ngai witũ; maathani maake nĩmakũrũmagĩrĩrwo nĩ thĩ yothe.
Psalms105:7 Egũtũũra amenyereire kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩake nginya tene na tene
Psalms105:8 Kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu nĩkĩo aarĩĩkanĩire na Aburahamu
Psalms105:9 MWATHANI nĩerũhĩirie Jakubu kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩu
Psalms105:10 akiuga atĩrĩ
Psalms105:11 Andũ acio a Ngai matiarĩ aingĩ; maarĩ o ageni bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani.
Psalms105:12 Maatũire moorũũraga mabũrũriinĩ moothe
Psalms105:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms105:14 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Psalms105:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Psalms105:16 No nĩatũmĩĩte mũndũ mbere yao
Psalms105:17 Aikaraga ooheetwo na mabĩngũ magũrũ
Psalms105:18 o nginya rĩrĩa ũndũ ũrĩa oigĩĩte nĩũgeekĩka wekĩkire. Kiugo kĩa MWATHANI gĩkĩonania atĩ aarĩ mũndũ wa ma.
Psalms105:19 Naake mũthamaki wa Misiri akĩohorithia Josefu; mwathi wa ndũũrĩrĩ akĩmũrekereria.
Psalms105:20 Akĩmũtua mũnene wa thirikaari yake
Psalms105:21 Aarĩ na hinya wa gwathaga anene a kwa mũthamaki
Psalms105:22 Nĩrĩo Jakubu
Psalms105:23 Naake MWATHANI agĩtũma andũ aake maingĩhe mũno
Psalms105:24 Agĩgĩtũma Amisiri mathũũre andũ aake
Psalms105:25 Nĩrĩo aatũmire ndungata yake Musa
Psalms105:26 Nao magĩĩka ciĩko cia Ngai cia hinya
Psalms105:27 Naake Ngai agĩtũma kũgĩe na nduma ndumanu mũno bũrũriinĩ ũcio
Psalms105:28 Agĩkĩgarũra maaĩ maao magĩtuĩka thakame
Psalms105:29 Bũrũri wao wothe ũkĩiyũra ciũra
Psalms105:30 Ngai agĩcooka agĩathana
Psalms105:31 Agĩcooka akĩrekia mbura ya mbembe na heni
Psalms105:32 akĩhũũra mĩthabibũ yao na mĩkũyũ o na agĩatũranga mĩtĩ ya bũrũri wao.
Psalms105:33 Agĩcooka agĩathana o rĩngĩ
Psalms105:34 ikĩrĩa mĩmera yothe ĩrĩa yarĩ bũrũriinĩ ũcio
Psalms105:35 Ngai agĩcooka akĩũraga aariũ oothe a marigithaathi mĩciĩinĩ yothe ya andũ a Misiri.
Psalms105:36 Nĩrĩo aarutire Aisiraeli kuo makuuĩĩte betha na thahabu na gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wao ũtaarĩ na hinya na ũgima mwega wa mwĩrĩ.
Psalms105:37 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moimagarire Amisiri magĩkena
Psalms105:38 Naake Ngai agĩtambũrũkia itu igũrũ rĩa andũ aake
Psalms105:39 Rĩrĩa maamwĩtirie irio akĩmareehithĩria tũmakia arũme
Psalms105:40 Ningĩ Ngai nĩatũranirie rwaro rwa ihiga
Psalms105:41 Ndaigana kũriganĩrwo nĩ kĩĩranĩro
Psalms105:42 Kwoguo
Psalms105:43 Akĩmahe mabũrũri ma ndũũrĩrĩ
Psalms105:44 Eekire ũguo nĩguo andũ aake maathĩkagĩre mawatho maake na marũmagĩrĩre kĩrĩra gĩake.Goocaai MWATHANI!
Psalms106:1 Goocaai MWATHANI! Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ nĩ mwega; wendo wake nĩ wa nginya tene tene!
Psalms106:2 Nũũ ũngĩhota kũgana ciĩko cia hinya iria eekĩĩte
Psalms106:3 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Psalms106:4 Ndirikanaga
Psalms106:5 nĩguo nyonage ũgaacĩru wa andũ aaku aamũre
Psalms106:6 Ithuĩ-rĩ
Psalms106:7 Rĩrĩa maithe maitũ maarĩ Misiri
Psalms106:8 No nĩamahonokirie
Psalms106:9 Aathire Iria Ituune rĩũme
Psalms106:10 Na njĩra ĩyo akĩmahonokia kuuma harĩ arĩa maamathũire; akĩmakũũra kuuma harĩ thũ ciao.
Psalms106:11 Thũ icio ciao ikĩhumbanĩrio nĩ maaĩ; hatirĩ o na ĩmwe yatigarire.
Psalms106:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ aake magĩĩtĩkia ciĩranĩro ciake
Psalms106:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms106:14 Makĩnyiitwo nĩ thuti nene ya irio marĩ kũu werũinĩ
Psalms106:15 Naake MWATHANI akĩmahe kĩrĩa maamũũrĩĩtie
Psalms106:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Psalms106:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo thĩ ĩgĩkĩemũka
Psalms106:18 Thuutha wa ũguo mwaki ũgĩtuthũkĩra arũmĩrĩri aao
Psalms106:19 Rĩrĩa maarĩ Sinai
Psalms106:20 Magĩgĩkũũrania Ngai na mũhianano wa ndeegwa ĩrĩa ĩrĩaga nyeki.
Psalms106:21 Makĩriganĩrwo nĩ Ngai ũrĩa wamahonokirie
Psalms106:22 o na makĩriganĩrwo nĩ maũndũ ma magegania marĩa eekĩire bũrũriinĩ ũcio
Psalms106:23 Ngai nĩangĩaniinire andũ aake
Psalms106:24 Magĩcooka makĩnyarara bũrũri ũrĩa mwega tondũ matiigana gwĩtĩkia ũrĩa Ngai aameerĩire.
Psalms106:25 Makĩng'oong'oora marĩ hemainĩ ciao
Psalms106:26 Tondũ ũcio akĩoya guoko na igũrũ akĩĩhĩta atĩ nĩegũtũma makuire kũu werũinĩ
Psalms106:27 na ahurunje njiarwa ciao ndũũrĩrĩinĩ
Psalms106:28 Ningĩ Aisiraeli marĩ Peori nĩmaatuĩkire arũmĩrĩri a ngai ĩrĩa yetagwo Baali
Psalms106:29 Ciĩko ciao nĩciatũmire MWATHANI araakare
Psalms106:30 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms106:31 Ũndũ ũcio mwega eekire nĩũtũire ũririkanagwo nĩ andũ
Psalms106:32 Aisiraeli nĩmaaraakaririe MWATHANI marĩ ithimainĩ cia Meriba
Psalms106:33 tondũ nĩmaamũiguithirie ũũru mũno ngoro
Psalms106:34 Matiigana kũniina ndũũrĩrĩ
Psalms106:35 handũ ha gwĩka ũguo-rĩ
Psalms106:36 Magĩcooka makĩambĩrĩria gũthaathaiya mĩhianano ya ndũũrĩrĩ icio
Psalms106:37 Makĩruta aariũ na aarĩ aao magongoona kũrĩ ngoma
Psalms106:38 magĩgĩita thakame ĩtaarĩ na mahĩtia
Psalms106:39 O nao eene makĩnyiitwo nĩ thaahu nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko icio ciao
Psalms106:40 Tondũ ũcio MWATHANI akĩraakarĩra andũ aake
Psalms106:41 Akĩmaneana mookoinĩ ma ndũũrĩrĩ
Psalms106:42 Makĩhinyĩrĩrio nĩ thũ ciao
Psalms106:43 MWATHANI nĩahonokirie andũ aake maita maingĩ
Psalms106:44 O na kũrĩ ũguo
Psalms106:45 Nĩ ũndũ wao-rĩ
Psalms106:46 Agĩgĩtũma maiguĩrwo tha nĩ arĩa oothe maamahinyagĩrĩria.
Psalms106:47 Tũhonokie
Psalms106:48 Goocaai MWATHANI
Psalms107:1 “Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho
Psalms107:2 Inyuothe arĩa MWATHANI ahonokeetie ugaai ũguo. Nĩamũhonokeetie kuuma harĩ thũ cianyu
Psalms107:3 akamũcookia amũrutĩĩte kuuma mabũrũriinĩ mageni
Psalms107:4 Amwe nĩmoorũũrire werũinĩ ũrĩa ũtaarĩ o na kĩ
Psalms107:5 Maarĩ ahũũtu na makanyoota na magate mwĩhoko wothe.
Psalms107:6 Magĩkaĩra MWATHANI marĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ yao
Psalms107:7 Akĩmagereria njĩra nũngĩrĩru
Psalms107:8 Andũ acio ta nĩmagĩcookerie MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ wa ũtugi wake
Psalms107:9 We-rĩ
Psalms107:10 Amwe maikaraga ndumainĩ methikĩire makĩnyariirĩkaga marĩ mĩgwate mooheetwo na mĩnyororo
Psalms107:11 tondũ nĩmaaremeire maathani ma Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe
Psalms107:12 Nao makĩrutithio wĩra mũritũ ũkĩmooraga ngoro
Psalms107:13 Magĩkaĩra MWATHANI marĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ yao
Psalms107:14 Akĩmaruta kũu maikaraga ndumainĩ methikĩire
Psalms107:15 Andũ acio ta nĩmagĩcookerie MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ wa ũtugi wake
Psalms107:16 We-rĩ
Psalms107:17 Amwe maarĩ irimũ cianyariirĩkaga nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maacio
Psalms107:18 Moonaga irio o ciothe makaira ngoro
Psalms107:19 Magĩkaĩra MWATHANI marĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ yao
Psalms107:20 Agĩathana
Psalms107:21 Andũ acio ta nĩmagĩcookerie MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ wa ũtugi wake
Psalms107:22 Nĩmamũrutĩre magongoona ma kũmũcookeria ngaatho na magane ũrĩa wothe eekĩĩte makĩinaga makeneete.
Psalms107:23 Amwe maagereire iriainĩ na meeri
Psalms107:24 makĩyonera ũrĩa MWATHANI angĩĩka
Psalms107:25 MWATHANI aathanire
Psalms107:26 Meeri igĩikanio na igũrũ
Psalms107:27 makĩagaaga magĩtũgũũgaga ta arĩĩu
Psalms107:28 Magĩkaĩra MWATHANI marĩ mĩnyamaaroinĩ yao
Psalms107:29 Naake akĩhooreria kĩhuuhũkanio kĩu kĩnene
Psalms107:30 Nao magĩgĩkena tondũ iria nĩrĩahoorereete
Psalms107:31 Andũ acio ta nĩmagĩcookerie MWATHANI ngaatho tondũ wa ũtugi wake
Psalms107:32 Nĩmagane ũnene wake kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ
Psalms107:33 MWATHANI atũmaga njũũĩ ihwe
Psalms107:34 Atũmaga bũrũri ũrĩa mũnoru ũhĩnje
Psalms107:35 Agarũraga werũ ũgatuĩka kũndũ kũrĩ na tũria twa maaĩ
Psalms107:36 akareka andũ arĩa ahũũtu matũũre kũndũ kũu
Psalms107:37 Makahanda irio mĩgũndainĩ na makahanda mĩthabibũ
Psalms107:38 MWATHANI araathimaga andũ aake makagĩa na ciana nyingĩ
Psalms107:39 Rĩrĩa andũ a Ngai maahootwo na maaconorithio na ũndũ wa kũhinyĩrĩrio mategũcaaĩrwo na kũnyariirwo
Psalms107:40 nĩanyararaga arĩa maramahinyĩrĩria
Psalms107:41 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms107:42 Andũ arĩa athingu moonaga ũguo magakena
Psalms107:43 Mũndũ o wothe mũũgĩ ta nĩagĩĩciirie ũhoro wa maũndũ macio; na akĩmenye ũrĩa MWATHANI e mũtugi.
Psalms108:1 Ndingĩenyenyeka
Psalms108:2 Arahũkaai kĩnanda na ngita! Nĩngwarahũra riũa!
Psalms108:3 Nĩngũgũcookeria ngaatho
Psalms108:4 Nĩ gũkorwo ũtugi waku nĩ mũraaya gũkĩra igũrũ; wĩhokeku waku ũkinyĩĩte o igũrũ matuinĩ.
Psalms108:5 Onania ũnene waku Ngai
Psalms108:6 Tũhonokie na hinya waku
Psalms108:7 Ngai
Psalms108:8 Gileadi nĩ gwakwa
Psalms108:9 Moabi nĩ kĩraĩ gĩakwa gĩa gwĩthambĩra; nĩ niĩ mwene bũrũri wa Edomu.Nĩngũkena ngĩrũũhagia nĩ ũrĩa hooteete bũrũri wa Filisitia.”
Psalms108:10 Nũũ ũkũndwara itũũrainĩ rĩrĩa rĩirigĩirwo na thingo cia hinya? Nũũ ũkũndongoria andware Edomu?
Psalms108:11 No wee
Psalms108:12 Tũhootanĩre harĩ thũ ciitũ
Psalms108:13 Ngai arĩ hamwe na ithuĩ nĩtũkũhootana; nĩ we ũkũrangĩrĩria thũ ciitũ thĩ.
Psalms109:1 Ndũgaakire
Psalms109:2 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩnjũkĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ ooru na aheenania
Psalms109:3 Manyumĩĩte na mĩena yothe makĩaragia ciugo cia rũthũũro
Psalms109:4 O na gũtuĩka nĩndĩmeendeete
Psalms109:5 Marandĩha wega na ũũru
Psalms109:6 Mũndũ ũrĩa arĩ we thũ yakwa
Psalms109:7 Arociirithio na oonekane arĩ na mahĩtia; ihooya rĩake rĩronwo rĩrĩ o meehia!
Psalms109:8 Ũtũũro wake ũrokuhĩha; wĩra wake ũroywo nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ!
Psalms109:9 Ciana ciake irotuĩka cia ngoriai
Psalms109:10 Ciana ciake irocangacanga ikĩhooyaga; irorutũrũrwo maganjoinĩ maacio kũrĩa itũũraga.
Psalms109:11 Indo ciake ciothe irotahwo nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩ thiirĩ naake; andũ a kũngĩ maroeyoera indo ciothe iria aanathũkũma.
Psalms109:12 Aroaga mũndũ ũngĩmũtaanahĩra; o na kana ciana ciake cia ngoriai cione mũndũ ũngĩciiguĩra tha.
Psalms109:13 Njiarwa ciake ciothe irokua; rũciaro rũrĩa rũgooka rũroriganĩrwo nĩ rĩĩtwa rĩake.
Psalms109:14 MWATHANI aroririkanaga mahĩtia ma maithe maake
Psalms109:15 Meehia maao marotũũra maririkanagwo nĩ MWATHANI
Psalms109:16 Tondũ rĩĩrĩ
Psalms109:17 Arogwatwo nĩ kĩrumi
Psalms109:18 Aramenyereete kũrumana o ta ũrĩa amenyereete kwĩhumba nguo. Irumi icio ciake iroconjoria mwĩrĩ wake o ta maaĩ; irotoonya mahĩndĩinĩ maake o ta maguta!
Psalms109:19 Iromũhumbagĩra o ta nguo iria ehumbaga
Psalms109:20 Herithia thũ ciakwa ta ũguo
Psalms109:21 No rĩĩrĩ
Psalms109:22 Nĩ gũkorwo ndĩ mũthĩĩni na nĩmbataire
Psalms109:23 Ndĩ hakuhĩ kũbuĩria o ta kĩĩruru kĩa hwaĩinĩ; nyũmbũrĩĩtwo nĩ rũhuuho o ta ngigĩ.
Psalms109:24 Maru maakwa nĩmoorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya nĩ ũndũ wa kwĩhinga kũrĩa; ndĩ mũhĩnju mũno.
Psalms109:25 Andũ manyona
Psalms109:26 Ndeithia
Psalms109:27 Menyithia thũ ciaku atĩ wee
Psalms109:28 No inume
Psalms109:29 Thũ ciakwa irohumbwo nĩ thoni; irwehumba gĩconoko gĩacio ta kabuuti.
Psalms109:30 Nĩngũcookeria MWATHANI ngaatho mũno nyanĩrĩire; nĩngũmũgooca ndĩ ũũnganoinĩ wa andũ
Psalms109:31 tondũ nĩagitagĩra mũndũ mũbataru na akamũhonokia kuuma harĩ arĩa mamũtuĩrĩire gĩkuũ.
Psalms110:1 MWATHANI nĩerire MWATHANI wakwa atĩrĩ
Psalms110:2 MWATHANI nĩagaatũma ũthamaki waku ũnenehe wambĩrĩirie Zayuni
Psalms110:3 Andũ aaku nĩmakeerutĩra mũthenya ũrĩa ũkaarũa na thũ ciaku.Aanake aaku magooka kũrĩ we irĩmainĩ iria theru matariĩ ta ime rĩa rũũciinĩ kĩrooko tene.
Psalms110:4 MWATHANI nĩehĩtĩĩte na ndangĩĩricũkwo
Psalms110:5 MWATHANI e mwena waku wa ũrĩo; rĩrĩa arĩraakara nĩarĩhehenja athamaki.
Psalms110:6 Nĩagaatuĩra ndũũrĩrĩ na aiyũrie kũrĩa kũrũagĩrwo na ciimba; nĩakaahoota athamaki gũũkũ thĩ guothe.
Psalms110:7 Mũthamaki nĩakaanyua maaĩ karũũĩinĩ karĩa karĩ mũkĩra wa njĩra. Tondũ ũcio nĩakaagĩa na ũhootani.
Psalms111:1 Goocaai MWATHANI! Nĩngũcookeria MWATHANI ngaatho na ngoro yakwa yothe ndĩ kĩũnganoinĩ kĩa andũ aake.
Psalms111:2 Ĩ ciĩko iria MWATHANI eekaga ti cia magegania! Arĩa oothe makenagio nĩcio nĩmeendaga gũcimenya.
Psalms111:3 Ciĩko ciake ciyũire ũtĩĩku na riiri; ũthingu wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms111:4 MWATHANI nĩatũmĩĩte ciĩko ciake cia magegania iririkanwo; MWATHANI nĩ mũtugi na mũigua tha.
Psalms111:5 Arĩa mamũtĩĩĩte nĩamaheaga irio
Psalms111:6 Nĩoneetie andũ aake hinya wake
Psalms111:7 Akoragwo arĩ mwĩhokeku na wa kĩhooto ũndũinĩ o wothe ũrĩa eekaga; maathani maake moothe nĩmakwĩhokwo.
Psalms111:8 Megũtũũra nginya tene na tene; maaheanirwo nĩ we na ũũma na ũthingu.
Psalms111:9 Nĩahonokirie andũ aake
Psalms111:10 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩkuo kĩhumo kĩa ũũgĩ wothe;Ngai nĩahotithagia andũ arĩa mathĩkagĩra maathani maake gũtuithania maũndũ wega.Arotũũra agoocagwo nginya tene na tene.

Psalms113:1 Goocaai MWATHANI! Inyuĩ ndungata cia MWATHANI

Psalms113:4 MWATHANI aathaga ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe; riiri wake ũrĩ na kũu igũrũ rĩa igũrũ.
Psalms113:5 Gũtirĩ ũhaana ta MWATHANI Ngai witũ. Aikarĩire gĩtĩ gĩake kĩa ũthamaki na kũu igũrũ rĩa igũrũ
Psalms113:6 no nĩainamagĩrĩra acũũthĩrĩrie igũrũ na thĩ.

Psalms119:106 Nĩndĩhĩtĩĩte ngwatĩirie atĩ nĩndĩrĩathĩkagĩra matua maaku marĩa me ma kĩhooto.

Psalms119:124 Nyonia ũtugi waku
Psalms119:125 Niĩ ndĩ ndungata yaku; he ũmenyo nĩguo menyage kĩrĩra gĩaku.

Psalms119:129 Ũrutani waku-rĩ

Psalms119:133 Menyerera ndikaagũe
Psalms119:134 Honokia kuuma harĩ arĩa marahinyĩrĩria nĩguo njathĩkĩre mawatho maaku.
Psalms119:135 Ũthiũ waku ũrotherera
Psalms119:136 Maitho maakwa maraita maithori mategũtigithĩria
Psalms119:137 Wee
Psalms119:138 Maathani marĩa wee ũheanĩĩte nĩ ma kĩhooto na ma kwĩhokwo o biũ.
Psalms119:139 Nĩnjinĩĩtwo mũno nĩ maraakara nĩ ũrĩa thũ ciakwa itiganĩirie ciugo ciaku.
Psalms119:140 Ĩ kĩĩranĩro gĩaku ti kĩa ma! na nĩndĩkĩendeete
Psalms119:141 Nĩnyararĩĩtwo na ngaagĩrwo kĩene
Psalms119:142 Ũthingu waku nĩ wa tene na tene
Psalms119:143 Nĩthĩĩnĩkĩĩte o na ngatangĩka
Psalms119:144 Maathani maaku megũtũũra marĩ ma kĩhooto nginya tene na tene; he ũmenyo nĩguo ndũũre muoyo.
Psalms119:145 Ngũkaĩire na ngoro yakwa yothe; njĩtĩka
Psalms119:146 Nĩ we ngaĩire; honokia
Psalms119:147 Njũkagĩra riũa rĩtanaratha gũgũkaĩra ũndeithie; njigĩĩte mwĩhoko wakwa ũndũinĩ ũrĩa wĩranĩire.
Psalms119:148 Ndaaraga ũtukũ wothe
Psalms119:149 Igua mũgambo wakwa
Psalms119:150 Arĩa manyariiraga matarĩ na tha nĩmarakuhĩhĩria; nĩ andũ matarũmbũyanagia na watho waku.
Psalms119:151 No wee
Psalms119:152 Ndamenyire o tene kuuma kĩrĩrainĩ gĩaku atĩ wagĩthondekire kĩrĩ gĩa gũtũũra nginya tene na tene.
Psalms119:153 Rora mĩnyamaaro yakwa
Psalms119:154 Njarĩrĩria na ũndekererie
Psalms119:155 Andũ arĩa aaganu matikaahonokio
Psalms119:156 Tha ciaku
Psalms119:157 Arĩa maranyariira na arĩa mathũire nĩ aingĩ
Psalms119:158 Ndoraga andũ arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie ngamanyarara
Psalms119:159 Tarora ũrĩa nyendeete mawatho maaku! Menyerera MWATHANI
Psalms119:160 Ũũma nĩguo mũthingi wa uuge waku
Psalms119:161 Aathani maranyariira hatarĩ gĩtũmi
Psalms119:162 Ngenagĩra ciĩranĩro ciaku o ta ũrĩa mũndũ ũtahĩĩte indo nyingĩ itainĩ akenaga.
Psalms119:163 Nĩthũire o na nganyarara maheeni
Psalms119:164 Ngũcookagĩria ngaatho maita maingĩ o mũthenya tondũ wa matua maaku ma kĩhooto.
Psalms119:165 Arĩa meendeete watho waku nĩmaikaraga na thaayũ mũingĩ
Psalms119:166 Wee
Psalms119:167 Nĩnjathĩkagĩra mawatho maaku
Psalms119:168 Nĩnjathĩkagĩra mawatho na maũira maaku; nĩwonaga ũrĩa wothe njĩkaga.
Psalms119:169 MWATHANI
Psalms119:170 Ũroigua ihooya rĩakwa
Psalms119:171 Nĩndĩrĩkũgoocaga hĩndĩ ciothe
Psalms119:172 Nĩndĩrĩganaga ciĩranĩro ciaku
Psalms119:173 Koragwo wĩhaarĩirie hingo ciothe kũndeithia
Psalms119:174 Nĩtheethũkĩire ũhonokio waku
Psalms119:175 Reke ndũũre muoyo nĩguo ngũgoocage na ũreke matua maaku mandeithagie.
Psalms119:176 Nĩnduruurĩĩte o ta ng'ondu yũrĩĩte; njaria niĩ

Psalms127:1 Tiga nyũmba yakirwo nĩ MWATHANI
Psalms127:2 Nĩ tũhũ mũtheri mũndũ gũũkagĩra kĩrooko tene na gũkomaga acereirwo akĩruta wĩra nĩguo oone gĩa kũrĩa.MWATHANI-rĩ
Psalms127:3 Ciana nĩ kĩheeo na nĩ kĩraathimo kuuma kũrĩ MWATHANI.
Psalms127:4 Ciana iria mũndũ aciaraga arĩ o mwĩthĩ ihaana ta mĩguĩ mĩingĩ ĩnyiitĩĩtwo na mooko nĩ njamba ya ita.

Psalms128:3 Mũtumia wake arĩciaraga o ta mũthabibũ ũrĩa ũciaraga mũno e mũciĩ gwake
Psalms128:4 Ũguo nĩguo mũndũ ũrĩa ũtĩĩĩte MWATHANI arĩraathimagwo.

Psalms132:18 Thũ ciake ndĩrĩcihumbaga gĩconoko
Psalms133:1 Ĩ nĩ ũhoro mwega atĩa
Psalms133:2 Ũiguano ta ũcio ũhaana maguta ma goro ma kwamũrana maitĩrĩirio mũtwe wa Harũni makanyũrũrũkĩra nderuinĩ ciake o nginya karainĩ ya nguo yake.
Psalms133:3 Ningĩ ũiguano ta ũcio ũhaana ime rĩa kĩrĩma kĩa Herimoni

Psalms135:1 Goocaai MWATHANI! Goocaai rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI
Psalms135:2 o inyuĩ mũrũũgamaga nyũmbainĩ ya MWATHANI
Psalms135:3 Goocaai MWATHANI
Psalms135:4 MWATHANI nĩethuurĩire Jakubu atuĩke wake; nĩethuurĩire andũ a Isiraeli matuĩke aake kĩũmbe.
Psalms135:5 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ MWATHANI nĩ mũnene; MWATHANI witũ nĩ mũnene gũkĩra ngai iria ingĩ ciothe.
Psalms135:6 MWATHANI eekaga o ũrĩa ekwenda kũũrĩa igũrũ na gũũkũ thĩ
Psalms135:7 Nĩ we ũtũmaga matu maambate kuuma ituri cia thĩ; nĩ we ũtũmaga kũgĩe na heni ireehane na marurumĩ na no we ũreehithagia rũhuuho kuuma thitooinĩ ciake.
Psalms135:8 MWATHANI nĩ we woragire marigithaathi moothe ma Misiri ma andũ o na ma nyamũ.
Psalms135:9 Nĩ we wekire moorirũ na akĩringa ciama bũrũriinĩ ũcio wa Misiri nĩguo aherithie mũthamaki wakuo na ndungata ciake ciothe.
Psalms135:10 Nĩ we wanangire ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ na akĩũraga athamaki maarĩ na hinya;
Psalms135:11 Sihoni
Psalms135:12 agĩcooka akĩhe andũ aake a Isiraeli mabũrũri maao matuĩke ũgai wao.
Psalms135:13 Rĩĩtwa rĩaku
Psalms135:14 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩakaagitĩra andũ aake
Psalms135:15 Mĩhianano ya ndũũrĩrĩ ĩthondekeetwo na betha na thahabu; ĩthondekeetwo nĩ mooko ma andũ.
Psalms135:16 Ĩ na tũnua
Psalms135:17 Ĩ na matũ
Psalms135:18 Arĩa mamĩthondekaga na arĩa mamĩhokaga marohaana o tayo.

Psalms135:21 Goocaai MWATHANI arĩ Zayuni! Mũkumiei arĩ Jerusalemu
Psalms136:1 Cookeriai MWATHANI ngaatho
Psalms136:2 Cookeriai Ngai ũrĩa mũnene gũkĩra ngai iria ingĩ ciothe ngaatho;tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:3 Cookeriai MWATHANI wa aathani oothe ngaatho; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:4 We wiki nĩ we wĩkaga maũndũ ma kũgegania mũno; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:5 Nĩ we wombire igũrũ na ũũgĩ wake; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:6 Nĩ we wakire thĩ ndiainĩ iria ndiku
Psalms136:7 Nĩ we wombire riũa na mweri; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:8 Riũa rĩathage mũthenya; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:9 Naguo mweri na njata ciathage ũtukũ; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:10 Nĩ we woragire aariũ a marigithaathi ma Amisiri; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:11 Akĩruta andũ a Isiraeli kuuma Misiri; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:12 Na guoko gwake na gĩcoka gĩake kĩrĩ hinya mũno; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:13 Nĩ we wagayanirie Iria Ituune; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:14 Akĩringĩria Aisiraeli gatagatĩ kaarĩo; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:15 No mũthamaki wa Misiri na mbũtũ ciake cia ita akĩmahubĩkania kũu Iriainĩ; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:16 Nĩ we watongoririe andũ aake werũinĩ; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:17 Akĩũraga athamaki maarĩ na hinya; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:18 Akĩũraga athamaki maarĩ ngumo; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:19 Sihoni mũthamaki wa Aamoni; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:20 Na Ogu mũthamaki wa Bashani; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:21 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩhe andũ aake bũrũri wa athamaki acio ũgĩtuĩka ũgai wao; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:22 Akĩũheana kũrĩ Isiraeli
Psalms136:23 MWATHANI ndariganĩirwo nĩ ithuĩ rĩrĩa twatooreetio; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:24 Nĩatũhonokirie kuuma harĩ thũ ciitũ; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:25 Nĩ we ũheaga ciũmbe ciothe irĩ muoyo irio; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.
Psalms136:26 Cookeriai Ngai wa igũrũ ngaatho; tondũ ũtugi wake nĩ wa tene na tene.

Psalms139:1 MWATHANI
Psalms139:2 Wee-rĩ
Psalms139:3 Wee nĩũnyonaga rĩrĩa ndĩraruta wĩra kana rĩrĩa huurũkĩĩte; gũtirĩ gĩĩko o na kĩmwe gĩakwa wee ũtooĩ.
Psalms139:4 O na itarĩ ndĩratumũra kanua
Psalms139:5 Ũthiũrũrũkĩirie na mĩena yothe
Psalms139:6 Kũũmenya ta ũguo wee ũmenyeete nĩ ũndũ wa magegania mũno harĩ niĩ; ũmenyo ta ũcio ũrĩ igũrũ mũno ũguo atĩ ndingĩhota kũũkinyĩra.
Psalms139:7 Nĩ na kũ ingĩgĩthiĩ ndĩthare kuuma harĩ we? Nĩ na kũ ingĩũrĩra ndũkaanyone?
Psalms139:8 Ingĩambata igũrũ
Psalms139:9 O na ingĩũmbũka hĩtũke rũkĩrĩrĩ rwa mwena wa irathĩro
Psalms139:10 ũngĩkorwo o kuo ũkĩndongoria na ũkĩndeithia.
Psalms139:11 Ingĩũria nduma ĩhithe kana ũtheri ũrĩa ũthiũrũrũkĩirie ũtuĩke ũtukũ
Psalms139:12 nduma ĩyo ndĩngĩkorwo ĩrĩ nduma harĩ we
Psalms139:13 Wee-rĩ
Psalms139:14 Nĩngũkũgooca tondũ nĩũnyũmbĩĩte na njĩra ya kũmakania na ya kũgegania; ũrĩa wothe wĩkaga nĩ wa kũgegania mũno; niĩ mwene nĩnjũũĩ ũguo na ngoro yakwa yothe.
Psalms139:15 Rĩrĩa mahĩndĩ maakwa maathondekagwo makanyiitithanio na kinyi ndainĩ ya maitũ
Psalms139:16 Nĩwanyonaga o na itarĩ ndĩraciarwo.Wandĩkire ibukuinĩ rĩaku matukũ marĩa wangaĩire o na matarĩ marambĩrĩria.

Psalms149:5 Andũ arĩa ehokeku nĩmakene nĩ ũndũ wa kũhootana; nĩmaraare magĩkũngũiya ũtukũ wothe.

Psalms150:1 Goocaai MWATHANI!Goocaai Ngai arĩ kũu gwake gũtheru! Mũkumiei arĩ igũrũ
Psalms150:2 Mũgooceei nĩ ũndũ wa ciĩko ciake cia hinya; mũkumiei nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa e mũnene!
Psalms150:3 Mũgooceei mũkĩhuuhaga tũrumbeeta; mũkumiei na ngita na inanda!
Psalms150:4 Mũgooceei mũkĩhũũraga tamburini mũkĩrũũgarũũgaga; mũkumiei na inanda na mĩtũũrirũ!
Psalms150:5 Mũgooceei mũkĩhũũrithanagia thaani iria ng'ambi mũno; mũkumiei na thaani iria ihũũrithanagio ikagamba o kũgamba!
Psalms150:6 Ciũmbe ciothe irĩ muoyo nĩigooce MWATHANI!Goocaai MWATHANI!

Proverbs3:17 Ũũgĩ ũtũmaga mĩthiĩre ya mũndũ ĩtuĩke mĩega
Proverbs3:18 Ũrĩa ũgĩĩte na ũũgĩ nĩagĩĩte na mũtĩ wa muoyo
Proverbs3:19 MWATHANI oombire thĩ na ũũgĩ wake; narĩo igũrũ rĩkĩgĩa na ũndũ wa ũmenyo wake.

Proverbs3:22 Icio-rĩ

Proverbs3:25 Ndũkaamakio nĩ mwanangĩko ũrĩa ũngĩũka ũterĩgĩrĩirwo o na kana kĩhuuhũkanio kĩrĩa gĩkoragĩrĩra andũ arĩa aaganu.
Proverbs3:26 Tondũ MWATHANI no we mwĩhoko waku; ndangĩreka kũgũrũ gwaku kũnyiitwo nĩ mĩtego.
Proverbs3:27 Andũ arĩa mabatairio nĩgwĩkwo wega meekage
Proverbs3:28 Ndũkaaneere mũndũ wa itũũra rĩaku ainũke mooko matheri angĩkorwo wahota kũmũteithia o hĩndĩ ĩyo.
Proverbs3:29 Mũndũ wa itũũra rĩaku ũrĩa ũtũũranagia nawe akwĩhokeete
Proverbs3:30 Ndũkaanakararanie na mũndũ tũhũ atarĩ na ũndũ mũũru agwĩkĩĩte.
Proverbs3:31 Ndũkaanaiguĩre andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra hinya ũiru; o na kana wĩciirie gwĩka ciĩko ta iria meekaga.

Proverbs10:20 Mĩario ya mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ta betha ĩrĩa njega mũno; no mathugunda ma mũndũ mwaganu matirĩ uumithio.
Proverbs10:21 Mĩario ya mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ũteithio kũrĩ andũ aingĩ
Proverbs10:22 Kĩraathimo kĩa MWATHANI kĩreehage ũtonga
Proverbs10:23 Harĩ kĩrimũ gwĩka ũũru nĩ ta ithaako. Naake mũndũ mũũgĩ akenagio no gwĩka ciĩko cia ũũgĩ.
Proverbs10:24 Ũndũ ũrĩa mũndũ mwaganu etigĩrĩĩte nĩguo ũmũkoraga no ũndũ ũrĩa mũndũ mũthingu eriragĩria nĩguo aheagwo.

Proverbs10:31 Mũndũ mũthingu aaragia o maũndũ ma ũũgĩ
Proverbs10:32 Mũndũ mũthingu aaragia o ndeto cia kwendeka
Proverbs11:1 MWATHANI nĩathũire andũ arĩa mahũthagĩra ithimi cia maheeni
Proverbs11:2 Mwĩtĩĩo-rĩ
Proverbs11:3 Andũ arĩa eega
Proverbs11:4 Ũtonga ndũrĩ ũteithio mũthenya wa maraakara ma Ngai
Proverbs11:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩatũũraga mũtũũrĩre mwega
Proverbs11:6 Ũthingu wa arĩa ehokeku nĩũmateithũraga
Proverbs11:7 Mũndũ mwaganu akua
Proverbs11:8 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩagitagĩrwo mĩnyamaaroinĩ; ĩndĩ ũrĩa mwaganu nĩkũrekererio arekagĩrĩrio mĩnyamaaroinĩ ĩyo
Proverbs11:9 Mĩario ya mũndũ mwaganu nĩgũthũũkia ĩthuũkagia mũndũ ũrĩa marigainie
Proverbs11:10 Rĩrĩa andũ athingu maraathimwo andũ a itũũra nĩgũkena makenaga; na rĩrĩa arĩa aaganu marathira no ngemi.
Proverbs11:11 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa athingu maraathimwo itũũra nĩgũtũũgĩrio rĩtũũgagĩrio
Proverbs11:12 Nĩ ũrimũ gũcambia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩaku
Proverbs11:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthiaga akĩaragia ndeto cia mũhuuhu ndarĩ hitho
Proverbs11:14 Bũrũri ũngĩaga ũtaaro mwega nĩkũgũa ũgũaga
Proverbs11:15 Ũrĩa ũtuĩkĩĩte wa kũrĩhĩra mũndũ ũngĩ thiirĩ wake
Proverbs11:16 Mũtumia wa ngoro njega nĩaheyagwo gĩtĩĩo
Proverbs11:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkaga wega
Proverbs11:18 Mũndũ mwaganu ndarĩ mũcaara oonaga
Proverbs11:19 Mũndũ ũrũmagĩrĩra ũthingu nĩagaatũũra muoyo
Proverbs11:20 Andũ a meciiria mooru nĩmathũirwo nĩ MWATHANI
Proverbs11:21 Hatirĩ hĩndĩ andũ arĩa ooru matakaaherithio
Proverbs11:22 Mũtumia mũthaka ũtarĩ kĩhaarĩro
Proverbs11:23 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu eriragĩria ũndũ ũrĩa mwega
Proverbs11:24 Mũndũ mũtugi athiaga na mbere na gũtonga
Proverbs11:25 Mũndũ mũtugi nĩaraathimagwo
Proverbs11:26 Ũrĩa ũregaga kwenderia andũ irio nĩarumagwo nĩ andũ
Proverbs11:27 Ũrĩa ũcaragĩrĩria maũndũ ma wega nĩagaathagĩrĩrio
Proverbs11:28 Ũrĩa wĩhokaga ũtonga wake aitĩkaga ta mahuti hĩndĩ ya mbura ĩrĩa nene
Proverbs11:29 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnyariiraga mũciĩ wake ndarĩ uumithio oonaga
Proverbs11:30 Maciaro ma mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩ mũtĩ wa muoyo
Proverbs11:31 Angĩkorwo andũ arĩa eega magwataga igai rĩao marĩ o gũũkũ thĩ-rĩ
Proverbs12:1 Mwendi gũtaarwo nĩ mwenda ũmenyo ĩndĩ mũthũũri gũkaanio ũcio nĩ kĩrimũ.
Proverbs12:2 Mũndũ mwega nĩatũũgagĩrio nĩ MWATHANI
Proverbs12:3 Mũndũ ndangĩgaacĩra na maũndũ ma waganu
Proverbs12:4 Mũtumia ngatha nĩ thũmbĩ ya mũthuuriwe
Proverbs12:5 Mathugunda ma mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ma kĩhooto
Proverbs12:6 Mĩario ya arĩa aaganu no ya ũũragani mũtheri
Proverbs12:7 Arĩa aaganu nĩkũng'aũranio mang'aũranagio magathira
Proverbs12:8 Mũndũ agaathagĩrĩrio nĩ ũndũ wa ũũgĩ wake
Proverbs12:9 Kaba mũndũ wonagwo ta atarĩ kĩene na nĩeyonagĩra gĩa kũrĩa
Proverbs12:10 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩamenyagĩrĩra mahiũ maake
Proverbs12:11 Mũrĩmi wĩ kĩyo ndaagaga gĩa kũrĩa ĩndĩ ũrĩa ũtũũraga mbũrũũrũ no kwara araga rũhĩ.
Proverbs12:12 Andũ arĩa aaganu maakenagĩra o maũndũ ma waganu wao
Proverbs12:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu agwatagio nĩ mĩario ya kanua gaake

Proverbs12:15 Kĩrimũ-rĩ

Proverbs12:18 Ciugo itarĩ mbaarĩrĩre wega itiihagia o ta rũhiũ
Proverbs12:19 Ũhoro wa ma ũtũũraga tene na tene
Proverbs12:20 Maheeni marĩ ngoroinĩ cia arĩa mathugundaga ũũru

Proverbs12:22 Maheeni nĩ kĩndũ kĩ magigi harĩ MWATHANI
Proverbs12:23 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩahithagĩrĩra ũũgĩ wake
Proverbs12:24 Mũndũ wĩ kĩyo nĩatuĩkaga mũthamaki
Proverbs12:25 Kĩeha gĩikaragia ngoro ĩrĩ nditũ
Proverbs12:26 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu nĩ kĩonereria kĩega harĩ andũ arĩa angĩ
Proverbs12:27 Kĩgũũta gĩtingĩinũkĩria nyama ya iguĩma
Proverbs12:28 Ũthingu ũtũmaga mũndũ atũũre muoyo
Proverbs13:1 Mwana mũũgĩ nĩathikagĩrĩria ithe akĩmũtaara
Proverbs13:2 Mũndũ wa mĩario mĩega arĩagĩra mĩario ĩyo yake
Proverbs13:3 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra ciugo ciake
Proverbs13:4 Kĩgũũta kĩĩriragĩria na gĩtione kĩndũ
Proverbs13:5 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩathũire ndeto cia maheeni
Proverbs13:6 Ũthingu nĩũgitagĩra mũndũ ũtarĩ na mahĩtia
Proverbs13:7 Kwĩ mũndũ wĩtuaga mũtongu na ndarĩ kĩndũ
Proverbs13:8 Mũndũ gĩtonga ahũthagĩra ũtonga wake nĩguo ahonokie muoyo wake
Proverbs13:9 Mũndũ mũthingu nĩ ta taawa wakanaga hingo ciothe
Proverbs13:10 Mwĩtĩĩo ũreehage o thĩĩna
Proverbs13:11 Ũtonga wa gũũka na ihenya ũthiraga na ihenya
Proverbs13:12 Ũndũ mwĩrĩgĩrĩre waga kũhinga nĩũragaga mũndũ ngoro
Proverbs13:13 Mũndũ ũthũire gũtaarwo nĩkwĩyũnũha eyũnũhaga
Proverbs13:14 Kĩrĩra kĩa mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo; gĩteithagia mũndũ gũtheema ũgwati.
Proverbs13:15 Ũũgĩ ũtũmaga mũndũ aheeo gĩtĩĩo
Proverbs13:16 Andũ arĩa abaarĩrĩri meekaga maũndũ maao na ũũgĩ
Proverbs13:17 Mũrekio mũũru aingagĩria andũ ũũruinĩ
Proverbs13:18 Mũregi gũtaarwo atũũraga e mũthĩĩni na aconokeete
Proverbs13:19 Ũndũ mwĩrirĩrie wahinga wĩ gĩkeno ngoroinĩ
Proverbs13:20 Mũceera na andũ arĩa oogĩ nĩohĩgaga
Proverbs13:21 Eehia ũũru nĩguo ũmathingataga

Proverbs13:23 Mũgũnda wa mũthĩĩni ũrĩa ũtarĩmagwo wahota kuumia irio nyingĩ
Proverbs13:24 Mũndũ wa kũiga rũthanju thĩ ndeendeete mwana wake
Proverbs13:25 Mũndũ mũthingu ndaagaga gĩa kũrĩa
Proverbs14:1 Mũtumia mũũgĩ nĩgwaka aakaga mũciĩ wake
Proverbs14:2 Mũndũ wa mũtũũrĩre mwega nĩgũtĩĩa atĩĩaga MWATHANI
Proverbs14:3 Mĩario ya mũndũ kĩrimũ nĩ rũthanju rwa kũmũhũũra
Proverbs14:4 Kũrĩa kwĩ ndeegwa cia kũrĩma magetha nĩ maingĩ
Proverbs14:5 Mũira mwĩhokeku ndaheenanagia
Proverbs14:6 Mũndũ wa kĩnyũrũri ndangĩũhĩga
Proverbs14:7 Tiga gũikarania na kĩrimũ
Proverbs14:8 Ũũgĩ wa mũndũ mũbaarĩrĩri nĩkũmenya ũhoro wa mĩthiĩre yake
Proverbs14:9 Ngai nĩanyaraire andũ arĩa aaganu
Proverbs14:10 Ũrũrũ wa ngoro ũmenyekaga no mwene yo
Proverbs14:11 Nyũmba ya mũndũ mwaganu nĩkũniinwo ĩkaaniinwo
Proverbs14:12 Nĩkũrĩ njĩra mũndũ oonaga ta arĩ yo nũngarũ
Proverbs14:13 Mĩtheko no ĩhithĩrĩre kĩeha
Proverbs14:14 Mũndũ mũgarũ ndarĩ uumithio oonaga
Proverbs14:15 Kĩrimũ gĩĩtĩkagia ũndũ o wothe
Proverbs14:16 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩgwĩcuuma ecuumaga agetheemaga ũũru
Proverbs14:17 Mũndũ wa kũraakara na ihenya eekaga maũndũ ma ũrimũ
Proverbs14:18 Irimũ magai macio no ũrimũ
Proverbs14:19 Andũ arĩa ooru mainamagĩrĩra arĩa eega
Proverbs14:20 Mũthĩĩni athũirwo nĩ nginyagia mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake
Proverbs14:21 Mũndũ ũmeneete ũrĩa ũngĩ ũcio nĩ mwĩhia
Proverbs14:22 Githĩ arĩa mathugundaga ũũru ti kũhĩtia mahĩtagia? Arĩa mathugundaga mawega
Proverbs14:23 Kũruta wĩra na kĩyo kwĩ uumithio
Proverbs14:24 Andũ arĩa oogĩ ũtonga wao nĩguo thũmbĩ yao
Proverbs14:25 Mũira wa ma nĩahonokagia andũ
Proverbs14:26 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtĩĩĩte MWATHANI nĩarĩ na mwĩhoko mũrũmu; na ciana ciake nĩirĩonaga ha kũũrĩra.
Proverbs14:27 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo
Proverbs14:28 Mũthamaki ũrĩa wathaga andũ aingĩ nĩekagĩrĩrwo
Proverbs14:29 Mũndũ mũũgĩ ndahiũhaga kũraakara
Proverbs14:30 Thaayũ wa ngoro ũtũmaga mwĩrĩ ũgĩe na hinya
Proverbs14:31 Mũhinyĩrĩria athĩĩni nĩkũnyarara anyararaga ũrĩa wamoombire
Proverbs14:32 Mũndũ mwaganu ang'aũranagio nĩ waganu wake

Proverbs15:1 Icookia rĩega nĩrĩhooreragia maraakara

Proverbs15:4 Ciugo cia tha ciĩkagĩra mũndũ hinya

Proverbs15:10 Mũndũ wa mĩtugo mĩũru iherithia rĩake nĩ inene; mũndũ ũthũire gũkaanio marigĩrĩrio maake no gũkua.
Proverbs15:11 Kwa arĩa akuũ o na icuainĩ MWATHANI nĩoĩ ũrĩa gũtariĩ
Proverbs15:12 Mũndũ mwĩĩkĩrĩri ndeendaga kũrũngwo; ndeendaga gũthiĩ ndunduinĩ ya arĩa oogĩ.
Proverbs15:13 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ akeneete
Proverbs15:14 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩendaga kuongerera ũũgĩ
Proverbs15:15 Mũtũũrĩre wa arĩa anyamarĩku nĩ wa kwĩhinyanĩrĩria gũtheri

Proverbs15:20 Mwana mũũgĩ atũmaga ithe akene
Proverbs15:21 Mũndũ mũkĩĩgu akenagio nĩ ũrimũ wake
Proverbs15:22 Kĩrĩra kĩega kĩreehage mĩbango mĩega
Proverbs15:23 Kaĩ nĩ ũndũ wĩ gĩkeno kũheana icookia rĩega ihinda rĩrĩa rĩagĩrĩire-i!
Proverbs15:24 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ atheemaga njĩra ya kwa arĩa akuũ
Proverbs15:25 MWATHANI nĩgũtharia atharagia mũciĩ wa mũndũ mwĩtĩi
Proverbs15:26 MWATHANI nĩathũire mathugunda mooru
Proverbs15:27 Mũhahamĩri wa indo ciene areehagĩra mũciĩ wake thĩĩna

Proverbs15:33 Gũtĩĩa MWATHANI nĩgũtũmaga mũndũ agĩe na ũũgĩ
Proverbs16:1 Mũndũ abangaga mĩbango
Proverbs16:2 Mĩthiĩre ya mũndũ nĩ mĩkinyanĩru maithoinĩ maake
Proverbs16:3 Wĩhokagĩre MWATHANI mĩbango yaku na nĩrĩgaacagĩra.
Proverbs16:4 Hatirĩ kĩndũ o na kĩmwe MWATHANI oombire hatarĩ gĩtũmi gĩakĩo
Proverbs16:5 MWATHANI nĩathũire mũndũ mwĩtĩi
Proverbs16:6 Wĩhokeku na ũthingu nĩihorohagĩria meehia
Proverbs16:7 Mũndũ akenia MWATHANI
Proverbs16:8 Kaba tũindo tũniini twĩ na kĩhooto
Proverbs16:9 Mũndũ nĩ we ũthugundaga mĩthiĩre yake
Proverbs16:10 Mũthamaki arĩ na ũhoti wa gũtuithania maũndũ
Proverbs16:11 MWATHANI eendaga ithimi ciothe ituĩke cia ma
Proverbs16:12 Harĩ athamaki kũmaramara nĩ ũndũ wĩ magigi
Proverbs16:13 Mũthamaki akenaga nĩkũigua ũhoro wa ma
Proverbs16:14 Marũrũ ma mũthamaki mareehage gĩkuũ
Proverbs16:15 Gũtiirĩrwo gĩthiithi nĩ mũthamaki kwĩ mwago
Proverbs16:16 Kũgĩa na ũũgĩ gũkĩrĩĩte kũgĩa na thahabu
Proverbs16:17 Barabara ya mũndũ mũthingu ĩmwĩthemagia ũũruinĩ; ũrĩa ũmenyagĩrĩra njĩra yake nĩagitagĩra muoyo wake.
Proverbs16:18 Mwĩtĩĩo werekagĩria mũndũ mũthiroinĩ
Proverbs16:19 Kaba kwĩnyiihia ũikaranie na mũthĩĩni
Proverbs16:20 Ũrĩa ũthikagĩrĩria agĩtaarwo nĩagaacagĩra; nakuo kwĩhoka MWATHANI kũreehagĩre mũndũ gĩkeno.
Proverbs16:21 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩamenyekaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũũgĩ wake
Proverbs16:22 Ũũgĩ nĩ gĩthima kĩa muoyo kũrĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mũũgĩ
Proverbs16:23 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩabaaragĩrĩra mĩario yake
Proverbs16:24 Ndeto njega nĩ ta ũũkĩ; igĩcamwo i mũrĩo
Proverbs16:25 Harĩ na njĩra mũndũ oonaga ta arĩ yo njega
Proverbs16:26 Kũnyootera wĩra gũtũmaga mũndũ aũrute na kĩyo
Proverbs16:27 Mũndũ mwaganu athugundaga o maũndũ ma ũũru
Proverbs16:28 Mũhuuhu ũtambagio nĩ mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu; naake mũndũ wa njuukũ aharaganagia ũraata wa andũ.
Proverbs16:29 Mũndũ wa haaro aguucagĩrĩria mũndũ wa itũũra rĩake
Proverbs16:30 Mũndũ ũhingahingaga maitho maake mĩtugo yake ti mĩega.Mũndũ ũtembaga mĩromo yake atũmaga maũndũ mooru mekĩke.
Proverbs16:31 Mbuĩ nĩ thũmbĩ ya ũgemu
Proverbs16:32 Mũndũ ũtumagĩria maraakara maake nĩ mwega gũkĩra njamba
Proverbs16:33 Kura nĩgũikio ciikagio andũ mamenye wendi wa Ngai ĩndĩ Ngai nĩ we ũtuithanagia.
Proverbs17:1 Kaba kũrĩa keenyũ gatheri ka mũgate kwĩ na thaayũ
Proverbs17:2 Ndungata ĩrĩa mbaarĩrĩri maũndũ wega
Proverbs17:3 Betha na thahabu iniinagwo ngaanga nĩ mwaki
Proverbs17:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa mwaganu athikagĩrĩria maũndũ ma waganu; na mũndũ wa maheeni athingataga o maũndũ ma maheeni.
Proverbs17:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũnyũrũragia mũthĩĩni nĩ ũrĩa wa mũũmbire anyũrũragia; mũndũ ũkenaga andũ moona ũũru ndangĩaga kũherithio.
Proverbs17:6 Andũ arĩa akũrũ metĩĩaga na ciana cia ciana ciao
Proverbs17:7 Mĩario ya bata ndĩngiuma kanua ka mũndũ kĩrimũ na mũndũ wĩheete gĩtĩĩo ndangĩaria maheeni.
Proverbs17:8 Andũ amwe meciiragia mahaki maringaga ciama
Proverbs17:9 Ũrĩa wohanagĩra nĩ wendani acaragia
Proverbs17:10 Mũndũ mũũgĩ angĩkaanio nĩaiguaga
Proverbs17:11 Waganu ũtwaranaga na ũremi
Proverbs17:12 Kaba gũtũngwo nĩ nduba ĩtuunyĩĩtwo ciana ciayo
Proverbs17:13 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũrĩhaga wega na ũũru
Proverbs17:14 Kĩambĩrĩria kĩa ngarari nĩ ta rũũĩ rũkiuna
Proverbs17:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhinyagĩrĩria mũndũ ũrĩa mũthingu

Proverbs17:19 Mwendi wĩhia nĩ haaro egĩĩragĩra. Mwendi gũtonga nĩ thĩĩna mũtheri ecaragĩria.

Proverbs20:4 Kĩgũũta kĩregaga gũciimba mũgũnda wakĩo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire
Proverbs20:5 Meciiria ma mũndũ mahaana ta maaĩ me gĩthima kĩriku

Proverbs20:16 Mũndũ angĩtuĩka mũira wa kũrĩhĩra mũndũ ũngĩ thiirĩ nĩ indo ciake we mwene atoonyagia ũgwatiinĩ.

Proverbs20:23 MWATHANI nĩathũire ithimi cia maheeni o nacio ratiri cia maheeni ndacikenagĩra.

Proverbs20:25 Nĩ ũndũ mũũru mũndũ kwĩrĩra Ngai kĩheeo na mwĩhĩtwa ataambĩĩte gwĩciiria wega

Proverbs24:14 kĩmenye na ma atĩ ũguo noguo ũũgĩ ũtariĩ harĩ ngoro yaku. Wĩnyiitĩre ũũgĩ na mũtũũrĩre waku wa thuutha nĩ ũkaagacĩra.
Proverbs24:15 Ndũgaatuĩke mũndũ mwaganu wa kuohagĩria andũ arĩa athingu kana ũtuĩke wa gũtharĩkĩra mĩciĩ yao.
Proverbs24:16 Nĩ amu mũndũ mũthingu o na angĩgũa maita mũgwanja
Proverbs24:17 Ndũkaanakene rĩrĩa thũ yaku yona thĩĩna
Proverbs24:18 Nĩ ũndũ MWATHANI ndakenagio nĩ ũndũ ta ũcio; amu ahota kwĩricũkwo eeherie maraakara maake harĩ thũ ĩyo.
Proverbs24:19 Tiga gwakanagwo nĩ ngoro nĩ ũndũ wa andũ arĩa ooru
Proverbs24:20 Nĩ gũkorwo mũndũ ũrĩa mũũru ndarĩ ũndũ mwega eetereire thuuthainĩ

Proverbs24:22 Amu-rĩ

Proverbs24:24 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtuaga ũrĩa mwaganu mwega

Proverbs24:29 Menya gũkaanoiga

Proverbs24:31 ndĩrona yothe ĩramereete mĩigua

Proverbs25:1 Ici o nacio nĩ thimo ingĩ cia Solomoni

Proverbs25:3 O ta ũrĩa igũrũ rĩraihĩte
Proverbs25:4 Theria betha ĩthire gutu
Proverbs25:5 Andũ arĩa aaganu ndũkaameetĩkĩrie gũtuĩka ataari a mũthamaki na ũthamaki wake ũgũtuĩka wa kĩhooto.
Proverbs25:6 Ndũkaanetũgĩrie mbere ya mũthamaki o kana ũikaranie na atongoria;
Proverbs25:7 nĩ kaba gwĩtwo ũthiĩ ũikarĩre itĩ cia mbere
Proverbs25:8 Wona ũndũ na maitho maaku

Proverbs25:10 Wauumia nja nĩũkwĩyagithia gĩtĩĩo ũgĩtũũre ũnyararĩĩtwo.

Proverbs26:7 Kĩrimũ kĩraaria na thimo

Proverbs26:9 Ta mũigua ũgĩtheeca guoko kwa mũrĩĩu

Proverbs26:14 Ta ũrĩa mũrango ũtindaga ũgĩcuuha na marenji maguo
Proverbs26:15 Kĩgũũta nĩkĩremagwo nĩkwĩyoera irio kĩrĩe.
Proverbs26:16 Kĩgũũta kĩyonaga gĩ kĩũgĩ gũkĩra andũ mũgwanja arĩa mangĩcookia na ũũgĩ.
Proverbs26:17 Mũndũ wa gũtoonyerera ngũĩ yene
Proverbs26:18 (18-19) Mũndũ ũrĩa ũhĩtithagia mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ wa mũhaka na akoiga atĩ no itherũ-rĩ
Proverbs26:19 Mwaki waga kuongererwo ngũ

Proverbs26:27 Mũndũ wa maheeni

Proverbs28:5 Andũ aaganu matimenyaga kĩhooto
Proverbs28:6 Kaba mũthĩĩni mwĩhokeku kũrĩ gĩtonga gĩkoroku.

Proverbs28:11 Gĩtonga kĩyonaga gĩ kĩũgĩ ĩndĩ mũthĩĩni wĩ na mĩthiĩre mĩega nĩagĩkĩrĩĩte.

Proverbs31:14 Athũgũraga irio ciake kũraaya agaciinũkia
Proverbs31:15 Ookagĩra kũrĩ o ũtukũ
Proverbs31:16 Eethaga mũgũnda akagũra na mbeeca iria athũkũmĩĩte
Proverbs31:17 Mũtumia ũcio e kĩyo
Proverbs31:18 Nĩoĩ uumithio wa mawĩra maake moothe
Proverbs31:19 Nĩ we mwene wĩyogothagĩra ndigi
Proverbs31:20 Nĩatugaga athĩĩni
Proverbs31:21 Kwagĩa mbaa we ndamakaga
Proverbs31:22 Ningĩ nĩegemagĩria macuka ma kwara ũrĩrĩ agakĩĩhumbaga nguo cia gataani iria njega na cia babũ.
Proverbs31:23 Mũthuuriwe nĩoĩo wega
Proverbs31:24 Mũtumia ũcio agagĩtumaga nguo cia gataani akĩendagia
Proverbs31:25 Arĩ hinya na nĩatĩĩĩtwo
Proverbs31:26 Aaragia na ũũgĩ

Proverbs31:29 Oigaga atĩrĩ
Proverbs31:30 Mĩthaiga nĩyakũheenania
Proverbs31:31 Mũgaathageei nĩ ũndũ wa mawĩra moothe marĩa arutaga; arokumagio nĩ andũ oothe.
Ecclesiastes1:1 Ici nĩcio ciugo cia Mũhunjia mũrũ wa Daudi
Ecclesiastes1:2 Maũndũ moothe nĩ ma tũhũ
Ecclesiastes1:3 Nĩ uumithio ũrĩkũ mũndũ agĩaga naguo
Ecclesiastes1:4 Njiarwa ciũkaga igacooka igathiĩ
Ecclesiastes1:5 Riũa rĩrathaga na rĩgathũa
Ecclesiastes1:6 Naruo rũhuuho rũhuruutanaga na kĩanda na na rũgongo
Ecclesiastes1:7 Nacio njũũĩ ithereraga ikeitĩrĩra iriainĩ
Ecclesiastes1:8 Maũndũ moothe mareehanagĩra mĩnoga ĩrĩa mũndũ atangĩhota kũgweta; maitho matingĩigania kũmĩona kana matũ maiganie kũmĩigua.
Ecclesiastes1:9 Maũndũ marĩa maarĩ kuo tene
Ecclesiastes1:10 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Ecclesiastes1:11 Maũndũ marĩa maanakorwo kuo matiririkanagwo
Ecclesiastes1:12 Niĩ Mũhunjia ndaarĩ mũthamaki wa Isiraeli thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu.
Ecclesiastes1:13 Nĩndatuire atĩ nĩngũbaara na nduĩrie maũndũ moothe marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ.Ngai nĩatũnengerire maũndũ matarĩ meega tũtangagwo nĩ mo.
Ecclesiastes1:14 Nĩnyoneete maũndũ marĩa moothe meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ na moothe nĩ ma tũhũ; no ũndũ ũmwe na kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ.
Ecclesiastes1:15 Kĩndũ kĩrĩa kĩogomu gĩtingĩrũngĩka; na kĩrĩa gĩtarĩ ho gĩtingĩtarwo.
Ecclesiastes1:16 Nĩndeĩĩrire atĩrĩ
Ecclesiastes1:17 Nĩndagĩtuire atĩ nĩngũmenya maũndũ ma ũũgĩ
Ecclesiastes1:18 Amu ũũgĩ mũnene nĩũreehage kĩeha
Ecclesiastes2:1 Nĩndatuire na ngoro atĩ nĩngwĩkenia na ndĩkĩmenye gĩkeno nĩ kĩĩ. No nĩndacookire ngĩmenya
Ecclesiastes2:2 Nĩndagundũrire atĩ mĩtheko nĩ ũrimũ
Ecclesiastes2:3 O ndĩ na thuti ya kũgĩa na ũũgĩ-rĩ
Ecclesiastes2:4 Nĩndeekire maũndũ manene; ngĩyakĩra manyũmba o na ngĩĩhandĩra mĩthabibũ mĩgũndainĩ.
Ecclesiastes2:5 Nĩndethondekeire mĩgũnda
Ecclesiastes2:6 Ngĩcooka ngĩthondeka tũria twa maaĩ ma gũitĩrĩria mĩtitũ ya mĩtĩ ĩyo yakũraga.
Ecclesiastes2:7 Ngĩcooka ngĩgũra ngombo
Ecclesiastes2:8 Ngĩcooka ngĩcookanĩrĩria betha na thahabu kuuma mĩthiithũinĩ ya moothamaki na mabũrũri marĩa ndaathaga; o na nĩndaarĩ na arũme na atumia manyinagĩra
Ecclesiastes2:9 Kwa ũguo nĩndatuĩkire mũndũ mũnene gũkĩra arĩa maanakorwo Jerusalemu mbere yakwa
Ecclesiastes2:10 Ingĩabataririo nĩ kĩndũ o nakĩ

Ecclesiastes2:12 Tondũ wa rĩĩrĩ
Ecclesiastes2:13 Ngĩkĩmenya atĩ ũũgĩ nĩ mwega gũkĩra ũrimũ o ta ũrĩa ũtheri ũrĩ mwega gũkĩra nduma.
Ecclesiastes2:14 Mũndũ mũũgĩ nĩakoragwo akĩona kũrĩa arathiĩ
Ecclesiastes2:15 Ngĩgĩcooka ngĩĩĩra atĩrĩ

Ecclesiastes2:17 Niĩ ngĩkĩmena ũtũũro
Ecclesiastes2:18 Nĩndamenire indo ciothe iria ndarutĩire wĩra gũũkũ thĩ
Ecclesiastes2:19 Nũũ ũũĩ kana hiihi mũndũ ũcio agaakorwo e mũũgĩ kana e mũkĩĩgu? Na mũndũ ũcio agaagĩtuĩka mwene indo iria ndutĩire wĩra na ngahũthĩra ũũgĩ gũũkũ thĩ. O na ũguo wothe no tũhũ.
Ecclesiastes2:20 Kwa ũguo nĩnderirire nĩ ũndũ wa wĩra wothe ndarutĩĩte gũũkũ thĩ.
Ecclesiastes2:21 Tondũ mũndũ aruta wĩra na ũũgĩ wake na ũmenyi
Ecclesiastes2:22 Mũndũ-rĩ

Ecclesiastes2:25 Tondũ-rĩ

Ecclesiastes3:11 Indo ciothe nĩacithondekire i njagĩrĩru mahindainĩ maacio

Ecclesiastes3:13 O na ngamenya atĩ nĩ kĩheeo kĩa Ngai kũrĩ mũndũ o wothe akarĩa

Ecclesiastes4:1 Ngĩcooka ngĩrora ngĩona ũrĩa gũũkũ thĩ kwagĩĩte kĩhooto. Arĩa maahinyĩrĩirio nĩmaarĩraga na gũtiarĩ mũndũ wamoomagĩrĩria. Gũtiarĩ mũndũ wamoomagĩrĩria tondũ arĩa maamahinyagĩrĩria maarĩ na hinya.
Ecclesiastes4:2 Nĩndeciiririe atĩ andũ arĩa makuĩte nĩ eega gũkĩra arĩa me muoyo
Ecclesiastes4:3 no arĩa eega makĩria yao oothe nĩ arĩa matarĩ maaciarwo
Ecclesiastes4:4 O na ningĩ nĩndoonire atĩ mũndũ arutaga wĩra na akenogia nĩ ũndũ wa kũiguĩra mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ ũiru. O na ũguo no tũhũ na no ũndũ ũmwe na kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ.
Ecclesiastes4:5 Kwĩragwo atĩ mũndũ no akorwo arĩ mũkĩĩgu angĩĩnyiitanĩria ahũũte nginya akue.
Ecclesiastes4:6 Hiihi ũguo no gũkorwo arĩ ma
Ecclesiastes4:7 Ngĩcooka ngĩona o ũndũ ũngĩ wa tũhũ gũũkũ thĩ.
Ecclesiastes4:8 Kũrĩ mũndũ ũtũũraga arĩ wiki
Ecclesiastes4:9 Andũ eerĩ nĩ eega gũkĩra ũmwe
Ecclesiastes4:10 Tondũ ũmwe wao angĩgũa
Ecclesiastes4:11 O na ningĩ andũ eerĩ makoma hamwe nĩmaiguithanagia ũrugarĩ
Ecclesiastes4:12 Ningĩ mũndũ angĩũkĩrĩrwo nĩ mũndũ ũmwe no aremwo nĩkũmwĩtiiria
Ecclesiastes4:13 Nĩ kaba mũndũ mwĩthĩ mũũgĩ o na e mũthĩĩni gũkĩra mũthamaki mũkũrũ mũkĩĩgu ũtathikagĩrĩria mataaro.
Ecclesiastes4:14 Tondũ mũndũ ũcio mwĩthĩ no oime njeera atuĩke mũthamaki
Ecclesiastes4:15 Nĩndagĩĩciiririe ũhoro wa andũ oothe arĩa morũũraga gũũkũ thĩ
Ecclesiastes4:16 Andũ arĩa mũthamaki aathaga nĩ aingĩ mũno
Ecclesiastes5:1 Menyerera mũthiĩre waku rĩrĩa ũgũtoonya nyũmba ya Ngai. Gũthiĩ kuo gũthikĩrĩria nĩ kwega gũkĩra magongoona ma irimũ
Ecclesiastes5:2 Tiga kũhiũhaga kwaria
Ecclesiastes5:3 O ũrĩa mũndũ akoragwo na mĩtangĩko mĩingĩ
Ecclesiastes5:4 Rĩrĩa werĩra Ngai kĩndũ
Ecclesiastes5:5 Nĩ kaba kwaga kũmwĩrĩra kĩndũ gũkĩra kũmwĩrĩra ũcooke wage kũmũhingĩria.
Ecclesiastes5:6 Ndũgaatũme ciugo ciaku wee mwene itũme wĩhie
Ecclesiastes5:7 Amu o ũrĩa mwĩĩro wa ngoro ũrĩ mũingĩ
Ecclesiastes5:8 Ũngĩona thirikaari ĩkĩhinyĩrĩria mũthĩĩni
Ecclesiastes5:9 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Ecclesiastes5:10 Mũndũ ũrĩa wendeete mbeeca ndaciiganagia
Ecclesiastes5:11 O ũrĩa indo cia mũndũ iraingĩha
Ecclesiastes5:12 Mũndũ wa kũrĩmia arĩĩte irio nyingĩ kana nyiinyi nĩakomaga toro mwega
Ecclesiastes5:13 Nĩharĩ ũndũ mũũru mũno nyoneete gũũkũ thĩ
Ecclesiastes5:14 No rĩĩrĩ
Ecclesiastes5:15 O ũrĩa mũndũ aaciarirwo nĩ nyina atarĩ kĩndũ
Ecclesiastes5:16 Ũguo nĩ ũũru mũno atĩ o ũrĩa mũndũ ookire noguo agathiĩ. Nĩ uumithio ũrĩkũ agĩaga naguo gũtũũra arutaga wĩra wa kũhũũra maaĩ na ndĩrĩ?

Ecclesiastes6:1 Nĩharĩ ũndũ mũũru nyoneete gũũkũ thĩ
Ecclesiastes6:2 Mũndũ ũrĩa Ngai aheaga ũtonga
Ecclesiastes6:3 Mũndũ no agĩe na ciana igana
Ecclesiastes6:4 Kĩhuno gĩtikoragwo kĩrĩ na bata amu kĩũragĩra ndumainĩ gĩkariganĩra.
Ecclesiastes6:5 Makĩria ma ũguo-rĩ
Ecclesiastes6:6 o na angĩkorwo atũũrĩĩte mĩaka ngiri igĩrĩ
Ecclesiastes6:7 Wĩra ũrĩa wothe mũndũ arutaga
Ecclesiastes6:8 Mũndũ mũũgĩ akĩrĩĩte kĩrimũ na kĩ? Na ningĩ wega wa mũndũ mũthĩĩni kũmenya ũrĩa mũtũũrĩre wagĩrĩire nĩ ũrĩkũ?
Ecclesiastes6:9 Kũiganĩra na kĩrĩa mũndũ arĩ na kĩo nĩ kwega gũkĩra mũndũ gũtũũra eriragĩria kũgĩa na indo makĩria. O na ũguo no tũhũ
Ecclesiastes6:10 Ũrĩa wothe wĩkĩkaga watuirwo o tene atĩ nĩũgeekĩka

Ecclesiastes7:1 Ngumo njega nĩkĩrĩĩte maguta manungi wega ma goro
Ecclesiastes7:2 Nĩ kaba gũthiĩ mũciĩ wĩ na macakaya gũkĩra gũthiĩ mũciĩ wĩ na iruga
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kĩeha nĩ kĩega kũrĩ mĩtheko
Ecclesiastes7:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩciiragia o ũhoro wa gĩkeno nĩ mũkĩĩgu
Ecclesiastes7:5 Nĩ kaba mũndũ kũigua akĩrumwo nĩ mũndũ mũũgĩ gũkĩra kũigua akĩinĩrwo nĩ kĩrimũ.
Ecclesiastes7:6 Mĩtheko ya kĩrimũ ĩhaana ta ũrĩa mĩigua ĩtoorekaga ĩkĩhĩa
Ecclesiastes7:7 Ũtuunyani ũtũmaga mũndũ mũũgĩ atuuo kĩrimũ na ihaki nĩrĩthũũkagia ngoro ya mũndũ.
Ecclesiastes7:8 Mũthia wa ũndũ o wothe nĩ mwega gũkĩra kĩambĩrĩria kĩaguo
Ecclesiastes7:9 Ndũkaahiũhage kũraakara
Ecclesiastes7:10 Ndũkaanoorie atĩrĩ
Ecclesiastes7:11 Nĩ ũndũ wa bata mũndũ gũkorwo arĩ mũũgĩ
Ecclesiastes7:12 Amu ũũgĩ ũgitagĩra mũndũ o ta ũrĩa angĩgitĩrwo nĩ mbeeca
Ecclesiastes7:13 Tawĩciirie ũrĩa Ngai eekĩĩte. Nũũ ũngĩrũngaria kĩrĩa we athondekeete kĩrĩ kĩgonyoku?
Ecclesiastes7:14 Rĩrĩa maũndũ maaku marathiĩ wega-rĩ
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ũtũũroinĩ wakwa wa tũhũ nĩnyoneete maũndũ moothe. Mũndũ mwega ahota gũkua na mũndũ mũũru atigwo arĩ o muoyo.
Ecclesiastes7:16 Gĩtige gũtuĩka mũndũ mwega mũno kana mũũgĩ mũno. Ũreniina nĩkĩ?
Ecclesiastes7:17 Tiga gũtuĩka mũndũ mwaganu mũno
Ecclesiastes7:18 Wagĩrĩirwo nĩkwĩrigĩrĩria gũthiĩ mũno mwenainĩ o wothe wa ĩyo yerĩ. Angĩkorwo nĩũtĩĩĩte Ngai
Ecclesiastes7:19 Ũũgĩ nĩũtũmaga mũndũ agĩe na hinya gũkĩra athamaki ikũmi marĩ itũũrainĩ.
Ecclesiastes7:20 Nĩ ma thĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩkaga wega hingo ciothe na gũtirĩ ũteehagia.
Ecclesiastes7:21 Ndũgaathikĩrĩrie maũndũ moothe marĩa maaragio nĩ andũ amu wahota kũigua ndungata yaku ĩgĩkũruma
Ecclesiastes7:22 o na wee nĩũũĩ na ngoro yaku atĩ mahinda maingĩ wanaruma andũ angĩ.
Ecclesiastes7:23 Nĩndathuuthuuririe maũndũ macio moothe na ũũgĩ
Ecclesiastes7:24 Mũndũ angĩhota kũmenya ũrĩa mũtũũrĩre uugĩĩte atĩa? Nĩ ũndũ mũrikĩru mũno harĩ ithuĩ na nĩ mũritũ mũno ndũngĩtũtaũkĩra.
Ecclesiastes7:25 Nĩnderutĩire kũmenya
Ecclesiastes7:26 Na rĩĩrĩ

Ecclesiastes7:29 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Ecclesiastes8:1 Nũũ ũtariĩ ta mũndũ mũũgĩ? Na nũũ ũũĩ ũrĩa maũndũ moigĩĩte?Ũũgĩ nĩũtũmaga ũthiũ wa mũndũ ũkenge
Ecclesiastes8:2 Athĩkagĩra mawatho ma mũthamaki
Ecclesiastes8:3 Ehagĩrĩra mũthamaki; tiga gũikaraga hakuhĩ naake rĩrĩa maũndũ matarathiĩ wega
Ecclesiastes8:4 Mũthamaki aaragia na ũnene
Ecclesiastes8:5 Mũndũ ũrĩa wathĩkagĩra watho ndarĩ hingo angĩona ũũru
Ecclesiastes8:6 Ũndũ o wothe nĩũrĩ ihinda rĩrĩa rĩwagĩrĩire na ũrĩa wagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩkwo
Ecclesiastes8:7 Amu mũndũ ndamenyaga ũrĩa gũgũtuĩka
Ecclesiastes8:8 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩ na hinya wa kũgiria akue
Ecclesiastes8:9 Maũndũ maya ndamoonire hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndeciiragia ũhoro wa maũndũ moothe marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ
Ecclesiastes8:10 O na nĩndoonire andũ aaganu magĩthikwo; o acio maamenyereete gũtoonyaga na kuumaga handũ harĩa hatheru
Ecclesiastes8:11 Ngoro cia andũ ikoragwo kũna ciĩhaarĩirie gwĩka ũũru tondũ iherithia rĩa gwĩka maũndũ mooru rĩtiherithanagio narua.
Ecclesiastes8:12 Mũndũ mwĩhia o na angĩĩka ũndũ mũũru maita igana
Ecclesiastes8:13 no gũtigaakorwo kũrĩ kwega harĩ andũ arĩa aaganu. Matukũ maao magaathira o ta kĩĩruru tondũ matitĩĩĩte Ngai.
Ecclesiastes8:14 Nĩkũrĩ ũndũ wa tũhũ ũthiaga na mbere thĩinĩ wa thĩ: atĩ andũ athingu makaherithio tondũ wa andũ aaganu
Ecclesiastes8:15 Kwa ũguo nĩnjũũĩ wega atĩ mũndũ aagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩkenia
Ecclesiastes8:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndeciiragia ũrĩa ingĩgĩa na ũũgĩ na menye ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ nĩndamenyire atĩ mũndũ no aage toro ũtukũ na mũthenya
Ecclesiastes8:17 na aage gũtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa Ngai areeka gũũkũ thĩ. O na mũndũ angĩgeria na hinya atĩa kũũmenya
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nĩndeciiririe mũno ihinda iraaya ũhoro wa maũndũ macio moothe na ngĩona atĩ Ngai nĩ we wathaga andũ arĩa oogĩ na arĩa athingu ũrĩa megwĩka
Ecclesiastes9:2 amu andũ arĩa athingu marĩĩkagĩrĩria o ta arĩa aaganu
Ecclesiastes9:3 Ũyũ nĩguo ũũru ũrĩa ũkoragwo maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa meekagwo gũũkũ thĩ atĩ andũ oothe marĩĩkagĩrĩria o ũndũ ũmwe. Ningĩ ngoro cia andũ ikoragwo ciyũrĩĩtwo nĩ ũũru na ũgũrũki rĩrĩa me muoyo
Ecclesiastes9:4 No ũrĩa ũrĩ thiritũ na arĩa marĩ muoyo nĩakoragwo na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro
Ecclesiastes9:5 Tondũ arĩa me muoyo nĩmooĩ atĩ nĩmagaakua
Ecclesiastes9:6 Naguo wendo wao
Ecclesiastes9:7 Gĩthiĩ ũrĩe irio ciaku na gĩkeno
Ecclesiastes9:8 Hingo ciothe koragwo ũkeneete na ũcanjamũkĩĩte.
Ecclesiastes9:9 Wĩkenagie na mũtumia ũrĩa wee wendeete matukũinĩ maaku ma ũtũũro wa tũhũ marĩa Ngai akũheete gũũkũ thĩ
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũrĩĩkaga-rĩ
Ecclesiastes9:11 O na nĩndamenyire atĩ gũũkũ thĩ mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ ihenya ti we ũhootanaga
Ecclesiastes9:12 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ ihinda rĩake. Mũndũ anyiitagwo ihindainĩ rĩake rĩũru rĩrĩa aterĩgĩrĩire
Ecclesiastes9:13 O na nĩndoonire ngerekano ĩno ya ũũgĩ gũũkũ thĩ na ngĩkĩona ĩ nene mũno.
Ecclesiastes9:14 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Ecclesiastes9:15 No rĩĩrĩ kũu gatũũrainĩ kau nĩgwatũũraga mũndũ ũmwe warĩ mũthĩĩni na mũũgĩ
Ecclesiastes9:16 Ngũkiuga atĩ ũũgĩ nĩ mwega kwĩ hinya o na gũtuĩka atĩ ũũgĩ wa mũndũ mũthĩĩni nĩũnyararagwo
Ecclesiastes9:17 Ciugo cia mũndũ mũũgĩ ithikĩrĩirio hatarĩ inegene nĩ njega gũkĩra kũgũũthũka kwa mũthamaki arĩ gatagatĩinĩ ka irimũ.

Isaiah1:1 Ibuku rĩĩrĩ rĩ na ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu aaguũrĩirio nĩ Ngai ĩkoniĩ bũrũri wa Juda na Jerusalemu. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩrĩo Uzia
Isaiah1:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah1:3 Ndeegwa nĩyũĩ mwene yo
Isaiah1:4 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Inyuĩ rũũrĩrĩ rwĩhia
Isaiah1:5 Kaĩ mũkwenda gũtũũra mũhũũragwo? Mũragĩthiĩ na mbere kũrema nĩkĩ?Mũtwe wothe ũiyũire ironda
Isaiah1:6 Kuuma ikinya kinya mũtwe hatirĩ handũ hagima tiga o ironda
Isaiah1:7 Bũrũri wanyu ũkirĩĩte ihooru
Isaiah1:8 No itũũra rĩa Zayuni rĩtigĩĩtwo rĩhaana ta gĩthũnũ mũgũndainĩ wa mĩthabibũ
Isaiah1:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah1:10 Wee Jerusalemu
Isaiah1:11 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah1:12 Nũũ ũmwĩrĩĩte mũndeehagĩre indo icio ciothe rĩrĩa mũrooka gũũthaathaiya? Nũũ ũmwĩrĩĩte mũrangarangage Hekaarũ yakwa?
Isaiah1:13 Tigaai kũndutĩra magongoona matarĩ kĩene. Mũnungo wa ũbaani ũrĩa mũcinaga ndũngenagia o na haniini.Ndingĩhota kũũmĩrĩria maruga maanyu ma karũũgamo ka mweri
Isaiah1:14 Nĩthũire na ngoro yakwa yothe maruga maanyu ma karũũgamo ka mweri na maruga marĩa mangĩ maathane. Nĩmatuĩkĩĩte mũrigo harĩ niĩ
Isaiah1:15 “Rĩrĩa mwatambũrũkia mooko maanyu mũkĩĩhooya ndĩrĩĩhũgũraga na kũngĩ.O na mũngiuga mahooya maingĩ atĩa
Isaiah1:16 Wĩthambei mũthere; thengiai ũũru wanyu mbere yakwa na mũtige gwĩka ũũru.
Isaiah1:17 Mwĩruteei gwĩkaga wega.Rũmagĩrĩraai kĩhooto
Isaiah1:18 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah1:19 Mũngĩnjĩtĩkia na mũnjathĩkĩre
Isaiah1:20 Mũngĩndega na mũũnemere-rĩ
Isaiah1:21 Itũũra rĩrĩa rĩarĩ rĩhokeku
Isaiah1:22 Betha yaku ĩiyũirwo nĩ ngaanga na ndibei yaku nĩ ndukanu na maaĩ.
Isaiah1:23 Anene aaku nĩmatuĩkĩĩte aremi na araata a aici
Isaiah1:24 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe
Isaiah1:25 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah1:26 Nĩngaakũhe athamaki ta arĩa a tene na ngũhe andũ a gũgũtaara ta arĩa maarĩ kuo na hau kabere.Na ũgaagĩcooka gwĩtagwo
Isaiah1:27 “Ũthingu nĩguo ũkaahonokia Jerusalemu nakĩo kĩhooto kĩhonokie andũ aakuo arĩa mahereete.
Isaiah1:28 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah1:29 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah1:30 Mũgaakĩũma o ta mĩgandi ĩrahũrũrũka mathangũ
Isaiah1:31 Na o ta ũrĩa mahuti magwatagio mwaki nĩ thandĩ
Isaiah2:1 Ũyũ nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa MWATHANI aaguũrĩirie Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu
Isaiah2:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah2:3 Andũ aingĩ magooka moige atĩrĩ
Isaiah2:4 Nĩagaatuithania andũ aingĩ
Isaiah2:5 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah2:6 Wee Ngai
Isaiah2:7 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah2:8 Bũrũri wao ũiyũire ngai cia mĩhianano na mathaathayagia indo mathondekeete na mooko maao.
Isaiah2:9 Mũndũ o wothe nĩakaanyiihio na aconorithio. MWATHANI ndũkamoohere!
Isaiah2:10 Andũ makoorĩra ngurungainĩ cia mahiga
Isaiah2:11 Mwĩtĩĩo nĩũkaanangwo
Isaiah2:12 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩaigĩĩte mũthenya: wa gũũkĩrĩra arĩa marĩ na hinya na metũũgagĩria
Isaiah2:13 Mũthenya wa gũũkĩrĩra mĩtarakwa yothe ya Lebanoni
Isaiah2:14 Mũthenya wa gũũkĩrĩra irĩma ciothe iria ndaihu
Isaiah2:15 Mũthenya wa gũũkĩrĩra mĩnaara yothe mĩraaya na igũrũ
Isaiah2:16 Mũthenya wa gũũkĩrĩra meeri ciothe cia mbiacara
Isaiah2:17 Andũ arĩa aremi nĩmakaarangĩrĩrio
Isaiah2:18 Ningĩ ngai ciothe cia mĩhianano nĩgũthenga igaathenga o biũ.
Isaiah2:19 Andũ makoorĩra ngurungainĩ cia mahiga kana meenje marima tĩĩriinĩ meehithe makĩgeria kũũrĩra maraakara ma MWATHANI na riiri wa ũnene wake rĩrĩa akaarũũgama kũinainia thĩ.
Isaiah2:20 Mũthenya ũcio ngai cia mĩhianano ya thahabu na ya betha
Isaiah2:21 Rĩrĩa MWATHANI akaarũũgama kũinainia thĩ
Isaiah2:22 Ndũkaanehoke andũ tondũ matukũ maao nĩmatare.Andũ makĩrĩ a bata ũrĩkũ?
Isaiah3:1 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩekwehereria andũ a Jerusalemu na a Juda ũteithio wa mĩthemba yothe ũrĩa ũngĩmaguna. Ameehererie ũteithio wa irio na wa maaĩ.
Isaiah3:2 Njamba ciao na thigari ciao
Isaiah3:3 Atongoria a thigari mĩrongo ĩtaano na andũ a gĩtĩĩo
Isaiah3:4 Ciana nĩcio igaatuĩka anene aao na magaathagwo nĩ ngeenge.
Isaiah3:5 Andũ nĩmakaahinyanagĩrĩria: mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
Isaiah3:6 Mũndũ akaanyiitaga mũrũ wa nyina
Isaiah3:7 Mũthenya ũcio naake agaacookia na mũgambo mũnene oige atĩrĩ
Isaiah3:8 Nĩ gũkorwo Jerusalemu nĩ kũharaganu nakuo Juda nĩkũgũa kũraagũa. Tondũ andũ nĩmaraakarĩĩtie MWATHANI na mĩario na ciĩko ciao na makaagĩra riiri wake gĩtĩĩo o akĩonaga.
Isaiah3:9 Gũthuutũkania nĩkuo kũramathitanga
Isaiah3:10 Ĩraai arĩa athingu atĩ nĩmagaakena nĩ gũkorwo nĩmagaakenera mũcaara wa wĩra wao.
Isaiah3:11 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah3:12 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah3:13 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah3:14 MWATHANI nĩarũũgamanĩĩte na atongoria na anene a andũ aake. Arameera atĩrĩ
Isaiah3:15 Mwendaga atĩa rĩrĩa mũkũhinyĩrĩria andũ aakwa na mũkanyariira athĩĩni?”Ũguo nĩguo niĩ MWATHANI Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe ndoiga.
Isaiah3:16 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah3:17 Kwoguo MWATHANI nĩageekĩra magata mĩtweinĩ ya andũ a nja a kũu Jerusalemu na oonanie njaga yao.
Isaiah3:18 (18-23) Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI nĩakaamatuunya indo iria meegemagia nacio magũrũ
Isaiah3:19 Handũ ha gũkorwo mehakĩĩte maraaci
Isaiah3:20 Arũme aanyu magaatemengwo na hiũ cia njora
Isaiah3:21 Ihingo cia ĩtũũra rĩa Jerusalemu nĩigaacakaya na irĩre
Isaiah4:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo atumia mũgwanja makeegwatagĩrĩra mũndũ mũrũme ũmwe makamwĩra atĩrĩ
Isaiah4:2 Mũthenya ũcio rũhonge rũrĩa MWATHANI agaatũma rũthundũke nĩrũgaathakara na rũgĩe na riiri. Na rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah4:3 Andũ oothe arĩa magaakorwo matigarĩĩte kũu Jerusalemu
Isaiah4:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI na ũndũ wa hinya wake nĩagaatuanĩra
Isaiah4:5 MWATHANI nĩakaahumbĩra kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni na andũ oothe arĩa magomanĩĩte kuo. Akaamahumbagĩra na itu mũthenya
Isaiah4:6 Riiri ũcio ũgaatuĩka kĩĩgunyĩ gĩa kwĩgitia riũa mũthenya
Isaiah5:1 Nĩndekwo nyine rwĩmbo rwa mũraata wakwa
Isaiah5:2 Nĩonganirie mahiga na agĩcimba
Isaiah5:3 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah5:4 Nĩ atĩa ingĩekire mũgũnda ũcio wakwa na ndiawĩkire? Rĩrĩa ndeetereire ũciare thabibũ njega
Isaiah5:5 Rekeei ndĩmwĩre ũrĩa ngũwĩka; nĩkũũirigũra ngũũirigũra
Isaiah5:6 Nĩkũũtiganĩria ngũũtiganĩria
Isaiah5:7 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah5:8 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ
Isaiah5:9 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩehĩtĩĩte ngĩiguaga
Isaiah5:10 Nĩ gũkorwo ĩĩka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ithaano cia mĩthabibũ ikoimagia o rita inyaanya cia ndibei
Isaiah5:11 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Inyuĩ mwambagĩrĩria kũrĩĩo nĩ njoohi o rũũciinĩ
Isaiah5:12 Marugainĩ maanyu mũkoragwo na inanda
Isaiah5:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũkaanyiitwo mĩgwate mũthaamio nĩ ũndũ wa kũriita kwanyu.Atongoria aanyu magaakua nĩ ng'aragu
Isaiah5:14 Nĩkĩo kwa arĩa akuũ kũmahũũtĩire na gũgaathamia kanua gatarĩ gĩthimi.Kũrameria andũ a gĩtĩĩo a Jerusalemu
Isaiah5:15 Andũ nĩmaconoreetwo
Isaiah5:16 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah5:17 Ng'ondu ikaarĩithagio maganjoinĩ; o na mbũri nĩikoona ũrĩithio kuo.
Isaiah5:18 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ!Inyuĩ mũguucagia waganu ta ũguucĩĩtio na mĩkwa ya maheeni
Isaiah5:19 O inyuĩ muugaga atĩrĩ
Isaiah5:20 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ!Inyuĩ arĩa muugaga atĩ maũndũ marĩa mooru nĩ mo meega
Isaiah5:21 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Inyuĩ mwĩyonaga mũrĩ oogĩ na mũgetua aara!
Isaiah5:22 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Inyuĩ mũnyuaga njoohi mũgĩcitukanagia.
Isaiah5:23 O inyuĩ mũrekagĩrĩria mũndũ ũhĩtĩĩtie mwahakwo
Isaiah5:24 Kwoguo o ta ũrĩa mĩtĩ na nyeki nyũmũ ĩhĩaga nĩ mwaki
Isaiah5:25 Maraakara ma MWATHANI nĩmamũũkĩrĩire
Isaiah5:26 MWATHANI nĩagaatũmanĩra rũũrĩrĩ rwa kũraihu
Isaiah5:27 Gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wao ũgaakorwo anogeete kana agĩthua
Isaiah5:28 Mĩguĩ yao ĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ mĩnoore
Isaiah5:29 Thigari ikaararamaga ta mĩrũũthi ĩnyiitĩĩte nyamũ

Isaiah8:6 “Andũ aya nĩmaregeete maaĩ ma karũũĩ ga Shiloa karĩa gaikũrũkaga kahooreire na makaambĩrĩria kũinaina mbere ya mũthamaki Rezini na mũthamaki Peka.
Isaiah8:7 Kwoguo niĩ MWATHANI nĩngũmareehithĩria mũthamaki wa Asiria na mbũtũ ciake ciothe ahaana o ta maaĩ ma rũũĩ rwa Farati rĩrĩa rũiyũrĩĩte rũkoinĩra ndeere ciothe.
Isaiah8:8 Mekũiyũrĩrĩra bũrũri wa Juda maũkinye o ngingo na makĩre
Isaiah8:9 Inyuĩ andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ cookanĩrĩriai na no mũkuharaganio! Inyuĩ mabũrũri ma kũraaya tategaai matũ na no mũkũhũũrwo!Tawĩhotoreei kũrũa
Isaiah8:10 Thondekaai mĩbango
Isaiah8:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah8:12 “Ndũkaananyiitanĩre na andũ aya mĩbangoinĩ yao mĩũru
Isaiah8:13 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe no we ũrĩtuaga mũtheru; no we wiki wagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩtigĩra
Isaiah8:14 Tondũ wa ũrĩa ndĩ riiri wa kũguoyohia
Isaiah8:15 Andũ aingĩ nĩmakaahĩngwo
Isaiah8:16 Cookanĩrĩria moohoro macio
Isaiah8:17 Niĩ-rĩ

Isaiah8:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah8:20 Na inyuĩ mũkaamacookagĩria atĩrĩ
Isaiah8:21 Andũ nĩmakoorũũra bũrũriinĩ moorĩĩtwo nĩ hinya na mahũũtiĩ. Nĩmakaaruma mũthamaki wao na Ngai wao nĩ ũrĩa magaakorwo mahũũtiĩ na maraakaire. Ningĩ mangĩkaaroria maitho na igũrũ
Isaiah8:22 kana mamarorie na thĩ
Isaiah9:1 Matikoona gwa kũũrĩra hĩndĩ ĩyo ya mathĩĩna macio.
Isaiah9:2 Andũ arĩa matũire mathiagĩra ndumainĩ nĩmooneete ũtheri mũnene.Arĩa matũũraga bũrũri wĩ nduma ndumanu nĩmaarĩirwo nĩ ũtheri.
Isaiah9:3 Nĩũingĩhĩĩtie rũũrĩrĩ
Isaiah9:4 Amu nĩuunangĩĩte icooki rĩrĩa rĩramaritũhĩire
Isaiah9:5 Indo ciothe cia atharĩkanĩri iria ciitĩkĩirwo nĩ thakame nĩigaacinwo na mwaki.
Isaiah9:6 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩtũciarĩirwo kaana
Isaiah9:7 Ũthamaki wake ũgaathiaga o ũkĩnenehaga
Isaiah9:8 MWATHANI nĩatuĩrĩire ũthamaki wa Isiraeli
Isaiah9:9 Andũ oothe a Isiraeli
Isaiah9:10 “Nyũmba cia maturubarĩ nĩmomoku
Isaiah9:11 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI nĩarahũrĩĩte thũ ciao nĩguo imatharĩkĩre.
Isaiah9:12 Nĩarahũrĩĩte andũ a Siria na mwena wa na irathĩro
Isaiah9:13 Andũ a Isiraeli matiigana kwĩrira
Isaiah9:14 Kwoguo mũthenya o ro ũmwe
Isaiah9:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa mũkũrũ na ũrĩa mũhe gĩtĩĩo nĩ o mũtwe
Isaiah9:16 Andũ arĩa matongoragia andũ aya nĩmamahĩtithĩĩtie
Isaiah9:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio MWATHANI ndakeneetio nĩ andũ aao eethĩ
Isaiah9:18 Waganu wa andũ wakanaga o ta mwaki ũrĩa ũcinaga mĩtare na mĩigua.Wakanaga o ta mwaki ũracina mũtitũinĩ ũrĩa wambatagia ndoogo na igũrũ.
Isaiah9:19 Tondũ MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩ mũraakaru
Isaiah9:20 Bũrũriinĩ wothe andũ marĩhuragia na makarĩa kĩrĩa gĩothe mangĩona na matihũũne; o na mũndũ nĩarĩrĩaga mwana wake.
Isaiah9:21 Andũ a Manase marĩũkĩrĩra Efiraimu
Isaiah10:1 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ!Inyuĩ mũthondekaga mawatho matarĩ ma kĩhooto nĩguo mũhinyĩrĩrie andũ aakwa.
Isaiah10:2 Ũguo nĩguo mwagithagia arĩa abataru waragania
Isaiah10:3 Mũgaagĩĩka atĩa rĩrĩa MWATHANI akaamũherithia? Mũgaagĩĩka atĩa rĩrĩa akaamũreehithĩria ndirũ yumĩĩte bũrũri wa kũraaya?Mũgaacaria ũteithio kũ
Isaiah10:4 Inyuothe mũkooragĩrwo mbaarainĩ
Isaiah10:5 Aasiria nĩ rũthanju rwa maraakara maakwa
Isaiah10:6 Ndĩmatũmĩĩte magatharĩkĩre rũũrĩrĩ rũtaaheete gĩtĩĩo
Isaiah10:7 No ũguo tiguo mũthamaki wa Aasiria ataanyĩĩte gwĩka; o na tiguo areciiria.Ataanyĩĩte kwananga ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ.
Isaiah10:8 Areraha atĩrĩ
Isaiah10:9 Nĩhooteete matũũra ma Kalino na Karikemishi
Isaiah10:10 Nĩndambũrũkĩĩtie guoko herithie moothamaki marĩa mathaathayagia ngai cia mĩhianano; ngai icio nĩ nyingĩ gũkĩra ngai ciothe ĩrĩa ĩrĩ Jerusalemu na Samaria.
Isaiah10:11 Nĩharaganĩĩtie Samaria na ngai ciothe cia mĩhianano ciakuo
Isaiah10:12 No MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah10:13 Mũthamaki ũcio wa Aasiria areraha akoiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah10:14 Guoko gwakwa nĩkũhambatĩĩte ũtonga wa ndũũrĩrĩ gũkaũnyiita
Isaiah10:15 Ithanwa no rĩtĩĩĩre ũrĩa ũtemaga narĩo
Isaiah10:16 Kwoguo
Isaiah10:17 Ngai
Isaiah10:18 MWATHANI nĩkũniina akaaniina riiri wa mũtitũ wake
Isaiah10:19 Mĩtĩ ya mũtitũ wake ĩrĩa ĩgaatigara
Isaiah10:20 Mũthenya ũcio wakinya-rĩ
Isaiah10:21 Arĩa magaakorwo matigarĩĩte thĩinĩ wa Isiraeli nĩmagaacookerera Ngai Mwene Hinya.
Isaiah10:22 Isiraeli
Isaiah10:23 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩakareehithia mũthiro bũrũriinĩ wothe
Isaiah10:24 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah10:25 Thuutha wa ihinda iniini nĩngũtiga kũmũherithia
Isaiah10:26 Niĩ
Isaiah10:27 Ihinda rĩu rĩakinya-rĩ
Isaiah10:28 Mbũtũ cia ita cia thũ nĩinyiitĩĩte itũũra rĩa Ai. Ĩtuĩkanĩirie Migironi
Isaiah10:29 Nĩiringĩĩte iriũko
Isaiah10:30 Andũ a Galimu
Isaiah10:31 Andũ a Madimena nĩgwĩthara marethara
Isaiah10:32 Ũũmũũthĩ ũyũ thũ irĩ o itũũrainĩ rĩa Nobu; ikũnjĩire kĩrĩma gĩa Zayuni ngundi
Isaiah10:33 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya wothe ekũmagũithia thĩ o ta honge itemeetwo kuuma mũtĩinĩ; njamba ciao iria irĩ ciũga nene itemengwo igũithio
Isaiah10:34 MWATHANI ekũmatemenga o ta ũrĩa mĩtĩ ya kĩrĩĩti ĩtemagwo na ithanũa
Isaiah11:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah11:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah11:3 Gwathĩkĩra MWATHANI nĩkuo gũkaamũkenagia
Isaiah11:4 Agaaciirithagia andũ arĩa athĩĩni na waragania. Nĩakaagitagĩra ihooto cia andũ arĩa matangĩĩteithia
Isaiah11:5 Agaathaga andũ aake na waragania na arũmagĩrĩre kĩhooto.
Isaiah11:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo njũũi na ng'ondu igaatũũranagia itekũũgitana
Isaiah11:7 Ng'ombe na nduba ikaarĩaga hamwe
Isaiah11:8 Gakenge gagaathaakagĩra irimainĩ rĩa nduĩra
Isaiah11:9 Kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Zayuni
Isaiah11:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki ũcio mwerũ kuuma njiarwainĩ cia Daudi akaarũũgamio ta kĩonereria harĩ andũ. Ndũũrĩrĩ igaathiaga itũũrainĩ rĩake rĩrĩa itheru na imũheage gĩtĩĩo.
Isaiah11:11 Rĩrĩa hĩndĩ ĩyo ĩgaakinya
Isaiah11:12 MWATHANI nĩagaacuuria bendera ya kuonania kũrĩ ndũũrĩrĩ atĩ
Isaiah11:13 Ũiru nĩũgaathira gatagatĩ ka ũthamaki wa Isiraeli na wa Juda. Ũthamaki wa Juda ndũgaacooka gũtuĩka thũ ya Isiraeli hĩndĩ ĩngĩ.
Isaiah11:14 Moothamaki macio meerĩ nĩmakaanyiitanĩra mahithũkĩre Afilisiti na mwena wa na ithũĩro
Isaiah11:15 MWATHANI nĩakoomia Iria Ituune acooke areehithie rũhuuho rũrĩ na ũrugarĩ mũingĩ
Isaiah11:16 Andũ a Isiraeli arĩa matigarĩĩte bũrũri wa Asiria makaagerera barabara nene makiuma kuo
Isaiah12:1 Mũthenya nĩũgooka rĩrĩa mũkaina atĩrĩ
Isaiah12:2 Ngai nĩ we Mũhonokia witũ
Isaiah12:3 O ta ũrĩa maaĩ mahoro makenagia mũndũ anyootiĩ
Isaiah12:4 Mũthenya ũcio mũkaina atĩrĩ
Isaiah12:5 Inĩraai MWATHANI mũmũgooce tondũ nĩekĩĩte maũndũ me ngumo nene. Thĩ yothe nĩĩigue ũhoro ũcio.
Isaiah12:6 Inyuĩ mũtũũraga Zayuni
Isaiah13:1 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩrĩa Isaia mũrũ wa Amozu aaheirwo nĩ MWATHANI ĩkoniĩ Babiloni.
Isaiah13:2 Haiciai bendera ya kwanĩrĩra mbaara kũu kĩrĩmainĩ kĩrĩa gĩtarĩ kĩndũ!Gũũthũkĩraai thigari na mũcihenerie na mooko
Isaiah13:3 MWATHANI we mwene nĩetĩĩte thigari ciake iria itamakaga
Isaiah13:4 Taiguai inegene rĩa andũ aingĩ kũũrĩa irĩma igũrũ! Nĩ mũrurumo wa moothamaki na ndũũrĩrĩ ikĩũngana hamwe.MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩkũhaarĩria arahaarĩria thigari ciake ithiĩ ikarũe.
Isaiah13:5 Irooka ciumĩĩte mabũrũriinĩ ma kũraaya
Isaiah13:6 Girĩkaai nĩ amu mũthenya wa MWATHANI ũrĩ hakuhĩ! Mũthenya ũcio ũgũũka ũhaana o ta mũthiro ũtũmĩĩtwo nĩ Mwene Hinya Wothe.
Isaiah13:7 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah13:8 Andũ oothe nĩmakaamaka na makorererwo nĩ ruwo
Isaiah13:9 Mũthenya wa MWATHANI no ũrooka
Isaiah13:10 Njata o yothe o na iria ikoragwo gĩtutu itirĩruta ũtheri wacio.Riũa narĩo rĩkĩratha rĩrĩtuĩka o nduma
Isaiah13:11 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah13:12 Nĩndĩrĩtũma andũ moonekage na hinya
Isaiah13:13 Nĩndĩrĩtũma igũrũ kũinaine na thĩ ĩthingithe
Isaiah13:14 “Andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa matũũraga Babiloni marĩura
Isaiah13:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah13:16 Ngeenge ciao irĩbacanio thĩ ikue
Isaiah13:17 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah13:18 Marĩtũmĩra moota na mĩguĩ yao moorage andũ eethĩ; matirĩringwo nĩ tha nĩ ũndũ wa ngeenge
Isaiah13:19 Babiloni nĩguo ũthamaki ũrĩa wĩ riiri mũno
Isaiah13:20 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũgaacooka gũtũũra kuo; gũtirĩ Mũarabu ũgaacooka gũthondeka kĩraaro gĩake kuo
Isaiah13:21 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah13:22 Hiti ikaarĩraga irĩ mĩnaarainĩ igũrũ
Isaiah14:1 MWATHANI nĩakaaringwo nĩ tha nĩ ũndũ wa Aisiraeli andũ aake na amatue aake kĩũmbe o rĩngĩ. Ningĩ nĩakaamaiga bũrũriinĩ wao kĩũmbe
Isaiah14:2 Ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ nĩigaateithĩrĩria Aisiraeli gũcooka bũrũri ũrĩa MWATHANI aamaheire. Marĩ bũrũriinĩ wao ndũũrĩrĩ icio
Isaiah14:3 MWATHANI nĩagaakũũra andũ aake a Isiraeli
Isaiah14:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmakaina magĩthirĩkagia mũthamaki wa Babilonia moige atĩrĩ:“Taoneei ũrĩa ũratũhinyagĩrĩria! Rĩu ndarĩ ho! Ndegũcooka gũtũhinyĩrĩria rĩngĩ!
Isaiah14:5 MWATHANI nĩaniinĩĩte ũthamaki wa aathani ooru
Isaiah14:6 arĩa mahinyagĩrĩria andũ marĩ na maraakara maingĩ
Isaiah14:7 Rĩu thĩ yothe nĩnogokeete na ĩkagĩa na thaayũ
Isaiah14:8 O na mĩthengera na mĩtarakwa ya Lebanoni nĩrakenerera mũthamaki ũcio ũng'aũranĩĩtio
Isaiah14:9 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah14:10 Ciothe iramwanĩrĩra ikiugaga atĩrĩ
Isaiah14:11 Ũratũire ũinagĩrwo na mĩtũũrirũ
Isaiah14:12 “Ũũi
Isaiah14:13 Ũreĩĩraga ũgwĩtũũgĩria
Isaiah14:14 Ũroigaga ũkwambata na kũu igũrũ rĩa matu
Isaiah14:15 No rĩu ũikũrũkĩĩtio kwa arĩa akuũ
Isaiah14:16 “Rĩu arĩa akuũ megũkwĩrorera magegeete meyũrie atĩrĩ
Isaiah14:17 Ũyũ-rĩ
Isaiah14:18 Athamaki oothe a mabũrũri mathikĩĩtwo na gĩtĩĩo
Isaiah14:19 No wee o na mbĩĩrĩra ndũrĩ. Kĩimba gĩaku gĩikanĩĩtio o ro ũguo kĩbuthe na gĩkarangarangwo.Gĩkomeirwo nĩ ciimba cia thigari iria ciũragĩirwo mbaarainĩ
Isaiah14:20 Tondũ nĩwanangĩĩte bũrũri waku
Isaiah14:21 Tarekeei mbũragano ĩkinye!Ciana cia mũthamaki ũyũ nĩgũkua igũkua nĩ ũndũ wa meehia ma maithe maacio; itigaacooka gwatha thĩ
Isaiah14:22 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah14:23 Nĩngaatũma gũtuĩke gwa gũtũũrwo nĩ ngũrũe cia gĩthaka

Isaiah14:25 Aasiria arĩa matũũraga bũrũriinĩ wakwa wa Isiraeli nĩngũmaniina na ndĩmarangĩrĩrie irĩmainĩ ciakwa.Nĩngũthengeria andũ aakwa mũtĩ wa ngingo
Isaiah14:26 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah14:27 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe nĩeciirĩĩtie kũhingia ũndũ ũcio. Nũũ ũngĩkĩmũgiria?Nĩatambũrũkĩtie guoko gwake aherithanie. Nũũ ũngĩgĩgũkũnja?
Isaiah14:28 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩrĩa MWATHANI aaheanire mwaka ũrĩa mũthamaki Ahazu aakuire.
Isaiah14:29 Andũ a Filisitia

Isaiah15:1 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩrĩa yaheanirwo ĩkoniĩ Moabi.Matũũra ma Ari na Kiri maniinĩĩtwo ũtukũ o ũmwe
Isaiah15:2 Andũ a Diboni moorĩire kũndũ gũtũũgĩru kũrĩa mathaathayagĩria makarĩrĩre kuo. Amoabi maragirĩka moigĩrĩirie
Isaiah15:3 Andũ marathiĩ mehumbĩĩte nguo cia makũnia; kũgirĩka na kũrĩra nocio iraiguo ciathĩinĩ na nyũmba igũrũ.
Isaiah15:4 Andũ a Heshiboni na Eleale no kũrĩra mararĩra; kĩrĩro kĩao kĩraiguuo nĩ andũ marĩ Jahazu. Thigari cia Moabi no kũrĩra irarĩra ciugĩrĩirie ikĩinainaga nĩ guoya.
Isaiah15:5 Ngoro yakwa nĩkũrĩrĩra ĩrarĩrĩra Moabi
Isaiah15:6 Maaĩ ma karũũĩ ka Nimirimu nĩ mahũu
Isaiah15:7 Andũ mararinga karũũĩ karĩa ke mĩtĩ hũgũrũrũinĩ ciako makuuĩĩte kĩrĩa gĩothe mahoteete kũhonokia.
Isaiah15:8 Kĩrĩro nĩkĩhunjĩĩte bũrũriinĩ wothe wa Moabi; nĩkĩiguĩtwo matũũrainĩ ma Egilaimu na Beerelimu.
Isaiah15:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ

Isaiah16:3 Mareera andũ a Juda atĩrĩ
Isaiah16:4 Rekeei tũtũũranie na inyuĩ; tũgitĩreei kuuma harĩ ũrĩa ũrenda gũtũniina.”(Mũhinyanĩrĩria arĩĩkia gũthengio
Isaiah16:5 ũmwe wa njiarwa cia Daudi nĩagaatuĩka mũthamaki
Isaiah16:6 Nao andũ a Juda maracookia atĩrĩ
Isaiah16:7 Amoabi nĩkũrĩra mararĩra nĩ ũrĩa marathĩĩnĩka. Mararĩra maririkana ũrĩa maarĩaga wega itũũrainĩ rĩa Kiri Heresi.Mathĩĩnĩkĩĩte o nginya makaaga kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro.

Isaiah16:13 Ĩyo nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa MWATHANI aarĩĩtie o tene ĩkoniĩ Moabi.

Isaiah17:1 Ĩno nĩyo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Damasiki.“Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah17:2 Matũũra ma Siria magaatũũra matarĩ na andũ tene na tene. Ng'ondu na ng'ombe igaatũũra irĩaga na ikaaraha kuo
Isaiah17:3 Isiraeli gũgaikara gũtarĩ na ũgitĩri
Isaiah17:4 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah17:5 Isiraeli kũrĩtuĩka o ta mũgũnda ũgetheetwo ngano; kũrĩtuĩka kũndũ gũtiganĩirio o ta mũgũnda ũgetheetwo ngano gĩtuambainĩ kĩa Refaimu.
Isaiah17:6 No andũ aniini magaatigara; Aisiraeli makaahaana o ta mũtamaiyũ ũgetheetwo ndamaiyũ ciothe

Isaiah17:14 Hwaĩinĩ igũtũma kũgĩe na kĩmako
Isaiah18:1 Mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa njũũĩ cia Ethiopia
Isaiah18:2 Bũrũri ũcio nĩũtũmaga arekio magereire maaĩinĩ ma Nailo makuuĩĩtwo nĩ tũtarũ tũthondekeetwo na marura.Cookaai bũrũriinĩ wanyu! Inyuĩ arekio aya mũrĩ ihenya.Cookiai ndũmĩrĩri bũrũriinĩ wanyu ũcio ũtwĩkanĩirio nĩnjũũĩ
Isaiah18:3 Inyuothe mũtũũraga gũũkũ thĩ tathikĩrĩriai!Etereraai muone bendera ĩkĩhaicio irĩma igũrũ
Isaiah18:4 MWATHANI anjĩrĩĩte atĩrĩ
Isaiah18:5 Mbere ya magetha ma thabibũ
Isaiah18:6 Ciimba cia thigari cia Ethiopia igaatigĩrwo nyoni iria irĩaga nyama na itigĩrwo nyamũ cia gĩthaka.Nyoni igaaciria hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ
Isaiah18:7 Hĩndĩ nĩrooka
Isaiah19:1 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Misiri.MWATHANI arooka Misiri ahaicĩĩte itu rĩrahanyũka mũno.Mĩhianano ya Misiri nĩkũinaina ĩrainaina
Isaiah19:2 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah19:3 Nĩngũthũũkia mĩbango ya Amisiri
Isaiah19:4 Nĩngũnenganĩra Amisiri maathwo nĩ mũthamaki mũũru. Mũthamaki ũtarĩ tha nĩ we ũrĩmathamakagĩra.Ũguo nĩguo MWATHANI
Isaiah19:5 Maaĩ ma rũũĩ rwa Nailo nĩmarĩhũa
Isaiah19:6 Mĩtaro yaruo nĩrĩnunga
Isaiah19:7 nacio irio iria ihandĩĩtwo ndeereinĩ cia Nailo ciũme
Isaiah19:8 Mũndũ o wothe wĩyonagĩra gĩa kũrĩa na njĩra ya gũtega thamaki rũũĩinĩ rwa Nailo
Isaiah19:9 Mabundi marĩa matumaga nguo cia gataani mwĩhoko wao nĩgũthira ũrĩthira.
Isaiah19:10 Atumi na aruti wĩra arĩa njoorua nĩmarĩkua ngoro na maigue kĩeha.
Isaiah19:11 Atongoria a itũũra rĩa Zoani nĩ akĩĩgu! Andũ arĩa mataaraga mũthamaki wa Misiri mamũheaga ũtaari mũhĩtanu.Mangĩhota atĩa kwĩra mũthamaki wa Misiri atĩ o nĩ andũ oogĩ
Isaiah19:12 Wee mũthamaki wa Misiri
Isaiah19:13 Atongoria a Zoani na Memufisi nĩ akĩĩgu; handũ ha gũtongoria rũũrĩrĩ nĩkũrũhĩtithia marũhĩtithĩĩtie.
Isaiah19:14 MWATHANI nĩatũmĩĩte maheane mataaro mahĩngĩcanu. Nĩkĩo Amisiri maagaagĩĩte maũndũinĩ moothe marĩa meekaga
Isaiah19:15 Gũtirĩ mũndũ
Isaiah19:16 Ihinda nĩrĩrooka
Isaiah19:17 Andũ a Misiri nĩmarĩtuĩka nda rĩrĩa marĩigua Juda kwagwetwo. Magweterwo ũhoro wakuo
Isaiah19:18 Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩu rĩrĩkinya
Isaiah19:19 Ihinda rĩu rĩakinya-rĩ
Isaiah19:20 Indo icio irĩonanagia ũrĩa MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe eekĩrĩirwo bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri. Andũ mahinyĩrĩrio makaĩra MWATHANI amateithie
Isaiah19:21 MWATHANI nĩarĩmenyithia andũ a Misiri
Isaiah19:22 MWATHANI arĩmahũũraga akĩmahuuhaga; maamũcookerera nĩarĩiguaga mahooya maao
Isaiah19:23 Rĩrĩa ihinda rĩu rĩrĩkinya
Isaiah19:24 Ihinda rĩu rĩakinya-rĩ
Isaiah19:25 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe arĩmaraathimaga akiugaga atĩrĩ
Isaiah20:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah20:2 Mĩaka ĩtatũ mbere ĩyo
Isaiah20:3 Rĩrĩa itũũra rĩa Ashidodu rĩanyiitirwo
Isaiah20:4 Mũthamaki wa Aasiria nĩagaathiĩ na andũ arĩa agataha mabũrũriinĩ macio meerĩ marĩ njaga. Athuuri na aanake magaathio nao matina maao makĩonekaga
Isaiah20:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ arĩa mehokeete andũ a Ethiopia na metĩĩaga na andũ a Misiri nĩmarĩkua ngoro na maturuure.
Isaiah20:6 Andũ arĩa matũũraga ndeereinĩ cia iria cia bũrũri wa Filisitia mariuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah21:1 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Babilonia.O ta ũrĩa kĩhuuhũkanio kĩa ngoma cia aka kĩhuuhũkanagia gĩtuĩkanĩirie werũinĩ
Isaiah21:2 Nĩnyoneete kĩoneki kĩrũrũ ma; kĩoneki kĩa andũ magĩkunyananĩra na makĩniinana.Mbũtũ cia Elamu tharĩkĩraai! Mbũtũ cia Amede thiũrũrũkĩraai matũũra!Ngai nĩekũniina mathĩĩna marĩa mareehithĩĩtio nĩ Babiloni.
Isaiah21:3 Maũndũ marĩa nyoneete na ngaigua kĩonekiinĩ kĩu nĩmanduĩte nda na makanjiguithia ruwo
Isaiah21:4 Meciiria maakwa nĩmaturuurĩĩte na nĩndĩrainaina ndĩ na guoya.Ndĩratheethũkagĩra hwaĩinĩ ũkinye
Isaiah21:5 Kĩonekiinĩ kĩu-rĩ
Isaiah21:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mwathani anjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Isaiah21:7 Oona andũ magĩũka mahaicĩĩte mbarathi eerĩ eerĩ
Isaiah21:8 Mũrangĩri aanĩrĩra na kayũ kanene atĩrĩ
Isaiah21:9 “Rĩu nĩ o aarĩa marooka! Marooka eerĩ eerĩ mahaicĩĩte mbarathi.”Mũrangĩri akiuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah21:10 Andũ aakwa a Isiraeli
Isaiah21:11 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Edomu.Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah21:12 Na niĩ ngacookia atĩrĩ
Isaiah21:13 Ĩno nĩ yo ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ Arabia.Inyuĩ mĩtongoro ya andũ a Dedani
Isaiah21:14 andũ arĩa mekũmũkora marĩ anyootu maheei maaĩ.Inyuĩ andũ a bũrũri wa Tema

Isaiah22:1 Ĩno nĩ ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ikoniĩ gĩtuamba gĩa Kĩoneki.Nĩ kĩĩ kĩrathiĩ na mbere

Isaiah22:8 Ũgitĩri wothe wa bũrũri wa Juda nĩũharaganĩĩte. Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũkĩruta indo cia mbaara iria ciarĩ “Thitoo ya matharaita.”
Isaiah22:9 (9-10) Nĩmuonire mĩanya ĩrĩa yarĩ thingoinĩ cia Jerusalemu ĩrĩa yabataire gũthingwo. Ningĩ nĩmwabaarire nyũmba ciothe thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu na mũkĩmomora imwe nĩguo muone mahiga ma gũthinga kũrĩa thingo cia itũũra ciarĩ na mĩanya. Nĩguo mũgĩe na gwa kũiga maaĩ
Isaiah22:10 nĩmwakire itangi itũũra thĩinĩ rĩa kũiga maaĩ ma karia karĩa ga tene. No nĩmwagire kũmenya Ngai ũrĩa wabangire ũndũ ũcio kuuma o tene

Isaiah29:17 Nĩ ihinda iniini rĩtigarĩĩte

Isaiah30:1 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
