Isaiah30:4 O na gũtuĩka njaama ciake nĩikinyĩĩte Zoani na atũmwo aake magakinya Hanesi
Isaiah30:5 andũ oothe a Juda nĩmakeerira nĩ ũndũ mehokeete rũũrĩrĩ rũtangĩmateithia
Isaiah30:6 Ĩno nĩ ndũmĩrĩri nditũ ĩkoniĩ nyamũ cia werũ wa mwena wa kĩanda;“Atũmwo maratuĩkanĩria bũrũri wa mathĩĩna na kĩmako
Isaiah30:7 Na tondũ ũteithio wa Misiri ndũrĩ kĩene na nĩ wa tũhũ
Isaiah30:8 Thiĩ ũmaandĩkĩre ũndũ ũyũ kĩhengereinĩ na ũũtoonyie mabukuinĩ; ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtuĩke ũira nĩ ũndũ wa mahinda marĩa magooka
Isaiah30:9 Ũyũ nĩ mũingĩ mũremi
Isaiah30:10 Ciĩraga arathi atĩrĩ
Isaiah30:11 Eheraai njĩrainĩ ciitũ
Isaiah30:12 Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli egũkiuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah30:13 Ũũru ũgũkĩmũgũĩra o mu ũmũkomere o ta rũthingo rũraihu na igũrũ rwatũkangu
Isaiah30:14 Ũgũkĩmũmemenda ũtarĩ na tha mũkue o ta nyũngũ
Isaiah30:15 MWATHANI Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli aramwĩra atĩrĩ; “Mũngĩhonoka o mũngĩmũcookerera na mũmwĩhoke.Mũngĩkirĩrĩria na mũmwĩhoke
Isaiah30:16 Mũroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah30:17 Andũ aanyu ngiri ĩmwe makaingatithagio nĩ mũndũ ũmwe. Andũ ataano magaakorwo marĩ aiganu a kũmũingatithia inyuothe
Isaiah30:18 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah30:19 Inyuĩ mũtũũraga Jerusalemu
Isaiah30:20 MWATHANI no areke muone thĩĩna kana mũhinyĩrĩrio
Isaiah30:21 Mũngĩhĩtia njĩra
Isaiah30:22 Mũgĩcooke muoe mĩhianano yanyu ĩrĩa ĩhumbĩrĩĩtwo na betha na na ĩrĩa ĩhumbĩrĩĩtwo na thahabu mũmĩikie kũraihu na inyuĩ o ta gĩko
Isaiah30:23 MWATHANI agĩcooke amuurĩrie mbura mwahanda irio; irio ikũre mĩgũndainĩ yanyu na ciumie mũno. Mahiũ maanyu hĩndĩ ĩyo makĩone ũrĩithio mwariĩ.
Isaiah30:24 Nacio ndeegwa cia mĩraaũ na ndigiri iria mũtũmagĩra mũkĩrĩma mĩgũnda yanyu
Isaiah30:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo matũũra marĩa mairigĩre na thingo cia hinya ma thũ
Isaiah30:26 Mweri ũkaara o ta riũa; naguo ũtheri wa riũa ũkorwo na hinya maita mũgwanja
Isaiah30:27 Riiri na hinya wa MWATHANI ũroneka o kũraaya.Arooka aakanĩĩte ta mwaki
Isaiah30:28 Mĩhũũmũ yake ĩhaana o ta rũũĩ rũiyũrĩĩte rũgakinya mũndũ o ngingo; ĩramũrania ndũũrĩrĩ
Isaiah30:29 No inyuĩ mũkaina mũkeneete
Isaiah30:30 MWATHANI nĩakaareka andũ oothe maigue mũgambo wake wĩ na riiri
Isaiah30:31 Aasiria nĩmakaanyiitwo nĩ kĩmako kĩnene
Isaiah30:32 Maita moothe MWATHANI anahũũra Aasiria
Isaiah30:33 Icua rĩa mwaki rĩhaarĩĩrio ihinda iraaya
Isaiah31:1 Kaĩ andũ arĩa mathiaga Misiri gũcaria ũteithio marĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Andũ acio mehokeete mbarathi
Isaiah31:2 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah31:3 Rĩu-rĩ
Isaiah31:4 MWATHANI aranjĩĩra atĩ
Isaiah31:5 Ningĩ o ta ũrĩa nyoni ireraga igũrũ rĩa itara ciacio
Isaiah31:6 “Andũ a Isiraeli njookereraai
Isaiah31:7 Tondũ mũthenya nĩũrooka
Isaiah31:8 Mũthenya ũcio Aasiria makooragwo na rũhiũ rwa njora
Isaiah31:9 Mũthamaki wao akaanyiitwo nĩ guoya
Isaiah32:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah32:2 Oothe magatuĩkaga ta kũndũ gwa kwĩgitia rũhuuho
Isaiah32:3 Maitho ma arĩa moonaga matigaacooka kũhingwo
Isaiah32:4 Ngoro cia arĩa matarĩ tha nĩikaamenyera gũthugundaga maũndũ
Isaiah32:5 Andũ arĩa akĩĩgu matigaacooka kũgaathĩrĩrio
Isaiah32:6 Irimũ ciaragia ũrimũ na ciĩciiragia o gwĩka maũndũ mooru.Mĩario yacio na ciĩko ciacio no cia kũruma MWATHANI na itiheaga arĩa ahũũtu irio o na kana ikahe arĩa anyootu gĩa kũnyua.
Isaiah32:7 Imaramari nĩ andũ ooru na ithugundaga na mĩgambo ya maheeni kũũnũha athĩĩni
Isaiah32:8 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah32:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah32:10 Mwaka na matukũ maniini magĩthira
Isaiah32:11 Inyuĩ andũ a nja arĩa mũikaraga mwĩgangarĩĩte
Isaiah32:12 Mwĩthikĩreei nĩ kĩeha
Isaiah32:13 Mwĩthikĩreei tondũ mĩigua na mĩtare nĩ yo ĩrakũra mĩgũndainĩ ya andũ aakwa. Mũrĩre nĩ ũndũ wa nyũmba ciothe kũrĩa andũ maratũũraga na gĩkeno; o na nĩ ũndũ wa itũũra rĩrĩa rĩraiyũire ngemi.
Isaiah32:14 Ningĩ mwĩthikĩreei tondũ nyũmba ya mũthamaki nĩgaatiganĩrio
Isaiah32:15 Mũgeethikĩra nginya rĩria Ngai akaamũtũmĩra roho wake kuuma igũrũ
Isaiah32:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo waragania nĩũkeehanda kũu werũinĩ
Isaiah32:17 Thaayũ
Isaiah32:18 Ningĩ andũ aakwa magaatũũra mĩciĩ yao na thaayũ
Isaiah32:19 o na mĩtitũ yathũũkangio na matũũra maanangwo.
Isaiah32:20 Ĩ mũtigaakenaga mũkĩhanda irio ndeereinĩ cia tũrũũĩ tuothe
Isaiah33:1 Kaĩ inyuĩ thũ ciitũ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Mũroonũhana o rĩrĩa inyuĩ mũtoonũhĩĩtwo.Mũreeka arĩa angĩ maũndũ ma ungumania
Isaiah33:2 MWATHANI tũtugage
Isaiah33:3 Andũ maigua mũrurumo wa inegene nĩkũũra moorire
Isaiah33:4 Indo cia ndũũrĩrĩ icio igĩtahwo ikĩũngũrũrio o ta ũrĩa igunyũ ciũngũrũragia
Isaiah33:5 Ĩ MWATHANI ti mũnene! nĩ we wathaga indo ciothe.Nĩaiyũrĩĩtie Jerusalemu waragania na ũthingu.
Isaiah33:6 Nĩatũmĩĩte mũgaacĩre matukũinĩ maanyu na akamũhe ũhonokio
Isaiah33:7 Andũ arĩa njamba mararĩrĩra na kũu barabarainĩ; arĩa maatũmĩĩtwo magacarie thaayũ mararĩra makĩgirĩkaga.
Isaiah33:8 Barabara iria nene nĩitiganĩirio
Isaiah33:9 Bũrũri nĩgũtiganĩrio ũtiganĩirio
Isaiah33:10 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah33:11 Mũbangaga maũndũ matarĩ kĩene na mũgeeka matarĩ bata. Nĩ inyuĩ mũreniina.
Isaiah33:12 Andũ magaacinwo ta ũrĩa mahiga macinagwo mathondeke coka
Isaiah33:13 Inyuĩ mũikaraga kũraaya
Isaiah33:14 Andũ arĩa imaramari marĩ Zayuni nĩmanyiitĩĩtio nĩ guoya
Isaiah33:15 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkaga maũndũ ma ũthingu
Isaiah33:16 mũndũ ta ũcio nĩ we ũrĩtũũgagĩrio
Isaiah33:17 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah33:18 Mũkaaririkanaga maũndũ ma tene mũrĩ na guoya
Isaiah33:19 Mũtigaacooka kuona andũ acio matarĩ tha
Isaiah33:20 Tamwĩrorereei Zayuni kũrĩa tũcemanagia hĩndĩ ya thigũkũ ciitũ! Tamwĩrorereei Jerusalemu! Kaĩ nĩ itũũra rĩgaakorwo rĩhooreire-ĩ!Nĩ kambĩ ĩtaagathario
Isaiah33:21 Kũu nĩkuo MWATHANI agaatuonagĩria riiri wake.Tũgaatũũraga ndeereinĩ cia njũũĩ njariĩ na cia ithima
Isaiah33:22 Nĩ gũkorwo MWATHANI nĩ we ũgaakoragwo arĩ mũtuithania witũ
Isaiah33:23 Mĩkanda yothe ya meeri icio nĩ mĩregeru ndĩngĩhota kũrũũgamia mĩringoti handũ haayo o na kana ĩhote gũtũma matanga matambarũke mahotithie meerĩ gũthiĩ.Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩtũkeyoera ũtonga wothe wa thũ ciitũ; ũgaakorwo ũrĩ mũingĩ mũno ũguo atĩ
Isaiah33:24 Andũ arĩa marĩ bũrũriinĩ witũ
Isaiah34:1 Andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe ũkaai! Cookanĩrĩraai mũtege matũ!Thĩ yothe na mũndũ o wothe ũtũũraga kuo
Isaiah34:2 MWATHANI nĩaraakarĩire ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe
Isaiah34:3 Ciimba ciacio itigaathikwo
Isaiah34:4 Riũa
Isaiah34:5 MWATHANI nĩahaarĩirie rũhiũ rwake rwa njora kũu igũrũ
Isaiah34:6 Rũhiũ rũu rwake rwa njora rũkaiyũrwo nĩ thakame na maguta maao
Isaiah34:7 Andũ makaaraganio kuo mahaana o ta mbogo na ndeegwa njĩthĩ; tĩĩri naguo ũtuunĩhio nĩ thakame yao na ũnorio nĩ maguta maao.
Isaiah34:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩ yo MWATHANI akaahonokia itũũra rĩa Zayuni
Isaiah34:9 Njũũĩ cia Edomu igaatuĩka rami
Isaiah34:10 Bũrũri ũgaakanaga mũthenya na ũtukũ
Isaiah34:11 Ndundu na magoogo nĩcio igaatuĩka eene kuo.MWATHANI akaaũiga ũrĩ mũthaatu
Isaiah34:12 Gũtikooneka mũthamaki ũngĩ wa gwatha bũrũri ũcio o na kana kũgĩe na atongoria angĩ.
Isaiah34:13 Mĩigua na mĩtare ĩgaakũraga nyũmbainĩ cia ũthamaki na matũũrainĩ marĩa mairigĩre na thingo cia hinya.Ndundu na mbwe nĩcio igaatũũraga kuo.
Isaiah34:14 Nyamũ cia gĩthaka igaacangacangaga kuo
Isaiah34:15 Ndundu igaaka itara ciacio kuo
Isaiah34:16 Thuuthuuriai ibukuinĩ rĩa MWATHANI mũthoome muone atĩ
Isaiah34:17 Nĩ we ũgaacigayania bũrũri na ahe ĩmwe o ĩmwe gĩcunjĩ kĩayo.Ikaawĩnyiitĩra aagu na aagu
Isaiah35:1 Bũrũri ũrĩa mũũmũ nĩũgaakena
Isaiah35:2 Bũrũri ũcio mũũmũ ũgaakena ũine.Ũgaathakara o ta irĩma cia Lebanoni na ũgaakorwo ũrĩ mũnoru o ta mĩgũnda ya Karimeli na Sharoni.Mũndũ o wothe nĩakoona riiri wa MWATHANI na oone ũnene na hinya wa Ngai witũ.
Isaiah35:3 Ũmĩrĩriai arĩa maregereetie mooko; mwĩkĩre hinya arĩa maru maao maagĩĩte hinya.
Isaiah35:4 Ĩraai arĩa makuĩte ngoro atĩrĩ
Isaiah35:5 Itumuumu nĩikaahoota kuona
Isaiah35:6 Ithua igaacimbicaga o ta thwariga
Isaiah35:7 Mũthanga ũrĩa mũhiũ ũgaatweka ũtuĩke karia ka maaĩ; na bũrũri ũrĩa mũnyootu ũiyũre ithima cia maaĩ
Isaiah35:8 Nĩgũkaagĩa barabara njariĩ
Isaiah35:9 Mĩrũũthi ndĩkooneka njĩrainĩ ĩyo
Isaiah35:10 Andũ arĩa MWATHANI ahonokeetie makaamĩcookera mooke Jerusalemu makĩinaga.Moothiũ maao magaakorwo makengeete na ũkeni wa tene na tene magaakenaga na marũũhie
Isaiah36:1 Mwakainĩ wa ikũmi na ĩna wa wathani wa mũthamaki Hezekia
Isaiah36:2 Agĩcooka agĩtũma mũnjaama ũmwe wake ũrĩa warĩ mũnene kuuma Lakishi athiĩ Jerusalemu arĩ na thigari nyingĩ mũno
Isaiah36:3 Arĩ hau-rĩ
Isaiah36:4 Mũnjaama ũcio Mũasiria agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Isaiah36:5 Ũgwĩciiria mĩgambo iiki no ĩĩtiirie wara na hinya wa thigari? Nũũ wĩhokeete agũteithĩrĩrie kũremera Aasiria?
Isaiah36:6 No gũkorwo wĩhokeete Misiri. Misiri no ta karũthanju kagondoku mũndũ etirimĩĩtie nako; gatheecaga mũndũ ũcio guoko gagatũrĩkania. Ũguo nĩguo mũthamaki wa Misiri ahaana harĩ mũndũ o wothe ũmwĩhokeete.’ ”
Isaiah36:7 Mũnjaama ũcio agĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah36:8 Rĩu-rĩ
Isaiah36:9 Mũngĩkĩhota atĩa kũhũndũra o na mũtongoria ũrĩa mũniini wa thigari cia Aasiria
Isaiah36:10 Ningĩ-rĩ
Isaiah36:11 Eliakimu
Isaiah36:12 No mũnjaama ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Isaiah36:13 Agĩkĩrũũgama akĩĩhandahanda
Isaiah36:14 ‘Tigaai gwĩtĩkĩra mũthamaki Hezekia amũheenie; ndangĩhota kũmũhonokia.
Isaiah36:15 Tigaai kũreka Hezekia amũringĩrĩrie mwĩhoke MWATHANI
Isaiah36:16 Tigaai gũthikĩrĩria Hezekia! Mũthamaki wa Aasiria aramwatha muumĩre itũũrainĩ na mwĩneane. Inyuothe nĩmũgwĩtĩkĩrio o mũndũ arĩage thabibũ cia mĩthabibũ yake na ngũyũ cia mĩkũyũ yake. Nĩmũgwĩtĩkĩrio mũnyuage maaĩ kuuma ithimainĩ cianyu
Isaiah36:17 o nginya rĩrĩa ngooka ndĩmũtware mũgatũũre bũrũri ũngĩ ũhaana o ta ũyũ wanyu. Kũu nĩgũgaakorwo mĩgũnda ya mĩthabibũ na ya ngano
Isaiah36:18 Wĩmenyerereei Hezekia ndakaamũheenererie akĩmwĩra atĩ MWATHANI nĩekũmũhonokia. Nĩ ngai cia ndũũrĩrĩ ingĩ irĩkũ ciahonokirie bũrũri wacio kuuma harĩ mũthamaki wa Aasiria?
Isaiah36:19 Ngai cia Hamathu na Aripadi rĩu irĩ ha? Ngai cia Sefarivaimu-rĩ
Isaiah36:20 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah36:21 Andũ acio no gũkira maakirire na matiamũtumũkire o ta ũrĩa mũthamaki Hezekia aameerĩĩte.
Isaiah36:22 Thuutha ũcio Eliakimu
Isaiah37:1 Rĩrĩa mũthamaki Hezekia aiguire ũhoro ũcio
Isaiah37:2 Ningĩ agĩtũma Eliakimu
Isaiah37:3 Aameerire mathiĩ meere Isaia atĩrĩ
Isaiah37:4 Mũthamaki wa Aasiria nĩatũmĩĩte mũnjaama ũmwe wake ũrĩa mũnene ooke arume Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩ muoyo. MWATHANI Ngai waku aroigua irumi icio na aherithie acio marumanĩĩte. Kwoguo hoera andũ aitũ arĩa matigarĩĩte.”
Isaiah37:5 Ndungata cia mũthamaki Hezekia ciakinya kwa Isaia
Isaiah37:6 ithiĩ ikeere Hezekia atĩrĩ
Isaiah37:7 Nĩngũmwĩkĩra ngoro ĩngĩ; nĩekũreeherwo ndũmĩrĩri ya mũhuuhu na amĩigua nĩegũcooka bũrũri wake mwene. Nĩngaatũma ooragĩrwo o bũrũriinĩ wake na rũhiũ rwa njora.”
Isaiah37:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah37:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah37:10 njaama imwĩre atĩrĩ

Isaiah37:13 Athamaki a matũũra ma Hamathu

Isaiah37:15 akĩhooya akiuga atĩrĩ

Isaiah37:20 Rĩu MWATHANI Ngai witũ
Isaiah37:21 Thuutha ũcio Isaia akĩheana ndũmĩrĩri kũrĩ mũthamaki Hezekia akiuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah37:22 MWATHANI arĩĩtie ũhoro wake akoiga atĩrĩ:‘Itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩkũmenereirie wee Senakeribu na rĩgakũminja mĩnyĩrĩ.Itũũra rĩa Zayuni rĩkuumĩĩte thuutha rĩgĩgũkombaga.
Isaiah37:23 Ũreciiria nũũ ũranyiira na ũgathekerera? Nũũ ũragũũthũkĩra na ũgakũũrĩra maitho? Nĩ niĩ Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli ũkoreetwo wagĩire gĩtĩĩo.
Isaiah37:24 Ũtũmĩĩte ndungata ciaku ciũke ciĩndahĩre ikĩnjĩĩraga atĩ nĩũhooteete irĩma iria ndaaya mũno cia Lebanoni
Isaiah37:25 Ũreraha atĩ nĩwenjeete ithima na ũkanyua maaĩ ma mabũrũri mageni
Isaiah37:26 “Kaĩ ũtarĩ waigua atĩ ndabangĩĩte ũndũ ũcio o tene?Ũndũ ũrĩa njerekeire kũhingia ndaũhaarĩirie mahinda ma tene.Nĩndakũheire hinya wa kũmomora matũũra marĩa mairigĩre na thingo cia hinya ũkĩmatua hĩba cia mahiga.
Isaiah37:27 Andũ arĩa maatũũraga matũũrainĩ macio nĩmaagire hinya
Isaiah37:28 “Nĩnjũũĩ mĩthiĩre yaku yothe
Isaiah37:29 Na tondũ nĩũndaakarĩire
Isaiah37:30 Naake Isaia agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki Hezekia ũũ
Isaiah37:31 Andũ a Juda arĩa magaatigara nĩmakaagĩa mĩri
Isaiah37:32 Andũ nĩmagaatigara kũu Jerusalemu o na kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Zayuni
Isaiah37:33 “MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah37:34 Njĩra ĩrĩa agookĩra no yo agacookera
Isaiah37:35 Ngaagitĩra itũũra rĩĩrĩ na ndĩrĩhonokie
Isaiah37:36 Mũraika wa MWATHANI akiumagara agĩthiĩ akĩũraga thigari ngiri igana rĩa mĩrongo ĩnaana na ithaano (185
Isaiah37:37 Tondũ ũcio Senakeribu
Isaiah37:38 Na rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah38:1 Mahindainĩ o ro macio
Isaiah38:2 Hezekia kũigua ũguo
Isaiah38:3 akiuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah38:4 MWATHANI agĩcooka akĩarĩria Isaia rĩngĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Isaiah38:5 “Cooka wĩre Hezekia atĩ ‘Niĩ MWATHANI
Isaiah38:6 Ningĩ nĩngũkũhonokia na ndute itũũra rĩrĩ wathaniinĩ wa Aasiria na nĩngũikara ndĩrĩgitĩire.’ ”
Isaiah38:7 Isaia agĩcooka akĩĩra Hezekia atĩrĩ
Isaiah38:8 Hezekia agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
Isaiah38:9 Naake Isaia agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Isaiah38:10 nĩegũtũma kĩĩruru gĩcooke na thuutha makinya ikũmi ngathĩinĩ iria ciakĩĩtwo nĩ mũthamaki Ahazu.” Nakĩo kĩĩruru gĩgĩcooka na thuutha makinya ikũmi.
Isaiah38:11 Mũthamaki Hezekia aahona mũrimũ wake nĩandĩkire rwĩmbo rũũrũ rwa kũgooca Ngai.
Isaiah38:12 Ndĩreciiragia atĩ o rĩrĩa ndoona ũtũũro wakwa ta waigananĩrĩria wega-rĩ
Isaiah38:13 Ndĩreciiragia ndigaacooka kuona MWATHANI o na kana mũndũ wĩ muoyo ndĩ bũrũri wa arĩa marĩ muoyo.
Isaiah38:14 Ũtũũro wakwa ũtinangĩĩtio ũkaambũrwo biũ
Isaiah38:15 Ũtukũ wothe ndĩrarĩraga ndĩ na ruwo rũingĩ o ta mahĩndĩ maakwa maroinangagwo nĩ mũrũũthi. Ndĩreciiragia Ngai nĩgũkinyia arakinyagia ũtũũro wakwa mũthia.
Isaiah38:16 Mũgambo wakwa ũraarĩ mũceke na ũtarĩ na hinya na ndĩracaayaga o ta ndutuura. Maitho maakwa namo nĩmaranogeete nĩgũcũũthĩrĩria na kũu matuinĩ.MWATHANI
Isaiah38:17 Ngũkiuga atĩa? Nĩ MWATHANI wĩkĩĩte ũguo. Ngoro yakwa ĩrĩ na marũrũ
Isaiah38:18 MWATHANI
Isaiah38:19 Marũrũ maakwa magarũrũke matuĩke thaayũ wakwa.Nĩũrutĩĩte ũtũũro wakwa moogwatiinĩ moothe; na nĩũnjoheire meehia maakwa moothe.
Isaiah38:20 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ kwa arĩa akuũ ũngĩhota gũgũkumia; arĩa akuũ matingĩhota kũiga kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro kĩao thĩinĩ wa wĩhokeku waku.
Isaiah38:21 Arĩa marĩ muoyo nĩ o magũkumagia o ta ũũ ndĩragũkumia rĩu.Aciari nĩmamenyithagia ciana ciao ũrĩa Wee wĩ mwĩhokeku.
Isaiah38:22 MWATHANI
Isaiah39:1 Mahindainĩ macio mũthamaki wa Babilonia
Isaiah39:2 Hezekia nĩanyiitire njaama icio ũgeni akeneete na agĩcionia ũtonga wake. Aacionirie betha
Isaiah39:3 Thuutha ũcio mũnabii Isaia agĩcooka agĩthiĩ kũrĩ mũthamaki Hezekia akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Isaiah39:4 Mũnabii akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Isaiah39:5 Naake Isaia agĩkĩĩra mũthamaki atĩrĩ
Isaiah39:6 Nĩgũgaakinya ihinda
Isaiah39:7 Ciana imwe ciaku
Isaiah39:8 Mũthamaki Hezekia aanyiitire atĩ eerwo nĩgũgũkorwo na thaayũ na ũgaacĩru matukũ moothe ma muoyo wake. Kwoguo agĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ

Isaiah40:2 Ũmĩrĩria andũ a Jerusalemu
Isaiah40:3 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah40:4 Thikaai mũkuru o wothe na mwaraganie kĩrĩma o gĩothe.Ithũngũri ciothe igaatuĩka kũndũ kwaraganu na kũrĩa gũtarĩ kwaraganu kwaraganio.
Isaiah40:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo riiri wa MWATHANI nĩũkoonanio na andũ oothe nĩmakaawona.MWATHANI nĩ we mwene wĩranĩire ũguo.”
Isaiah40:6 Kũrĩ na mũgambo wa mũndũ ũrakayũrũrũka ũkoiga “Anĩrĩra ndũmĩrĩri.”Na niĩ ngooria atĩrĩ
Isaiah40:7 Nyeki yũmaga namo mahũa magaitĩka rĩrĩa MWATHANI atũma rũhuuho rũmoombũre.Nĩ ma andũ mahaana o ta nyeki
Isaiah40:8 Ĩĩni
Isaiah40:9 Wee ũheanaga ũhoro mwega Zayuni
Isaiah40:10 MWATHANI Ngai nĩarooka gwathana arĩ na ũhoti; arooka hamwe na andũ arĩa ahonokeetie.
Isaiah40:11 Arĩramataga rũũru rwake ta mũrĩithi; arĩcookanagĩrĩria tũgondu agatũkuua na mooko maake; arĩtongoragia ng'ondu iria irĩ na tũgondu acimenyereire wega.
Isaiah40:12 Nũũ ũngĩhota gũthima maaĩ ma iria rĩrĩa inene na rũhĩ rwake? Nũũ ũngĩhota gũthima mũtambũrũko wa matu na guoko gwake? Nũũ ũngĩhota kũiganĩria tĩĩri wa thĩ yothe gĩkombeinĩ? Nũũ ũngĩhota gũthima irĩma na tũthũngũri na ratiri?
Isaiah40:13 Nũũ wanonereria MWATHANI ũrĩa egwĩka? kana agatuĩka wa kũmũtaara?
Isaiah40:14 Nũũ MWATHANI arĩ ahooya ũtaaro? Na nũũ wanonereria MWATHANI njĩra ya kĩhooto? Nũũ ũrĩ wamũthoomithia nĩguo oohĩge kana akĩmuonia ũrĩa angĩĩka angĩenda ũũgĩ?
Isaiah40:15 Maithoinĩ ma MWATHANI-rĩ
Isaiah40:16 Nyamũ ciothe cia mĩtitũ ya Lebanoni itingĩigana cia kũrutĩra Ngai witũ igongoona; mĩtĩ yothe ya mĩtitũ ĩyo ndĩngĩigana ya gwakia mwaki wa igongoona.
Isaiah40:17 Harĩ we-rĩ
Isaiah40:18 Nũũ ũngĩkĩigananio na Ngai? Ngai angĩhaananio na mũhianano ũrĩkũ?
Isaiah40:19 Mũhianano ũthondekagwo nĩ bundi
Isaiah40:20 Mũndũ mũthĩĩni ũtangĩonera thahabu-rĩ
Isaiah40:21 Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwamenya? Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwaigua? Kaĩ mũteerirwo kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria? Kaĩ mũtarĩ mwamenya ũrĩa thĩ yambĩrĩirie?
Isaiah40:22 Yathondekirwo nĩ ũrĩa ũikaraga gĩtĩinĩ gĩa ũthamaki igũrũ rĩa thĩ
Isaiah40:23 Atuaga athamaki kĩndũ hatarĩ
Isaiah40:24 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah40:25 Ngai ũrĩa Mũtheru arakĩũria atĩrĩ
Isaiah40:26 Roriai maitho maanyu na igũrũ
Isaiah40:27 Isiraeli
Isaiah40:28 Kaĩ ũtarĩ wamenya? Kaĩ ũtarĩ waigua?MWATHANI nĩ we Ngai ũrĩa ũtũire aagu na aagu; nĩ we wombire thĩ yothe
Isaiah40:29 Arĩa maagĩĩte hinya nĩ we ũmacookagĩria hinya
Isaiah40:30 Andũ eethĩ no maage hinya na manoge
Isaiah40:31 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah41:1 Ngai aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah41:2 “Nũũ ũtũmĩĩte mũhootani ooke oimĩĩte mwena wa irathĩro
Isaiah41:3 Amaingatithagia na akahĩtũka na ihenya inene
Isaiah41:4 Nũũ ũbangĩĩte na agatũma maũndũ maya matuĩke? Nũũ ũbangaga ũrĩa maũndũ marũmanagĩrĩra kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria?Niĩ MWATHANI
Isaiah41:5 “Andũ a icigĩrĩrainĩ cia iriainĩ nĩmooneete ũrĩa njĩkĩĩte
Isaiah41:6 Mookĩĩte magĩteithanagia na makĩũmanagĩrĩria mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ.
Isaiah41:7 Bundi wa mbaaũ akeera mũturi wa thahabu atĩrĩ
Isaiah41:8 “No-rĩ
Isaiah41:9 Ndamũreehire ndĩmũrutĩĩte ituri cia thĩ
Isaiah41:10 Tigaai gwĩtigĩra
Isaiah41:11 “Arĩa oothe mamũraakarĩire magaaconoka na mahootwo. Arĩa mahũũranaga na inyuĩ makooragwo mathire.
Isaiah41:12 Mũgaagĩcaria arĩa macindanaga na inyuĩ na mũtikaamoona. Arĩa mahũũranaga na inyuĩ magaatuĩka tũhũ mũtheri.
Isaiah41:13 Nĩ gũkorwo niĩ MWATHANI Ngai wanyu
Isaiah41:14 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah41:15 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah41:16 Mũgacihuuhĩra rĩerainĩ na rũhuuho rũciũmbũre
Isaiah41:17 “Rĩrĩa athĩĩni na arĩa abatari megũcaria maaĩ
Isaiah41:18 Nĩngaatũma njũũĩ itherũke na itherere kuuma kũndũ gũtheri kwambararu
Isaiah41:19 Kũu werũinĩ nĩngaareka gũkũre mĩtarakwa
Isaiah41:20 Nao andũ moona ũguo mamenye atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI njĩkĩĩte ũndũ ũcio; na meetĩkie atĩ Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli nĩ we ũtũmĩĩte ũndũ ũcio ũhinge.”
Isaiah41:21 MWATHANI
Isaiah41:22 Ũkaai haaha mũtũrathĩre maũndũ marĩa magatuĩka
Isaiah41:23 Twĩreei maũndũ marĩa magooka na nĩtũgũkĩmenya atĩ mũrĩ ngai!Ĩkaai ũndũ mwega kana mũũru
Isaiah41:24 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah41:25 “Niĩ-rĩ
Isaiah41:26 Nĩ ũrĩkũ wanyu wahotire kũratha kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria atĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩũgeekĩka
Isaiah41:27 Niĩ MWATHANI
Isaiah41:28 No ndaikia maitho gatagatĩ ka ngai icio ndianoona ya kũũdaara
Isaiah41:29 Mĩhianano ĩno yothe ndĩrĩ kĩene na ndĩrĩ ũhoti o na haniini. Ndĩngĩhota kwĩĩkĩra ũndũ o na haniini.”
Isaiah42:1 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah42:2 Ndĩgaakararania na andũ kana ĩmagũũthũkĩre ningĩ ndĩgaathiĩ ikĩmaheaga ũhoro yanĩrĩire njĩrainĩ.
Isaiah42:3 Nĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ hooreri mbere ya arĩa matarĩ hinya
Isaiah42:4 Ndĩgaakua ngoro na ndĩgaatoorio kinya kĩhooto kĩiyũre thĩ
Isaiah42:5 Ngai nĩ we wombire igũrũ na akĩrĩtambũrũkia; nĩ we wathondekire thĩ na kĩrĩa gĩtũũraga kuo; na no we ũheaga andũ aayo mĩhũũmũ na roho.MWATHANI Ngai arakĩĩra ndungata yake atĩrĩ
Isaiah42:6 “Niĩ MWATHANI
Isaiah42:7 Nĩũkahingũra maitho ma arĩa matoonaga
Isaiah42:8 “Niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI
Isaiah42:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah42:10 Inĩraai MWATHANI rwĩmbo rwerũ
Isaiah42:11 Werũ na matũũra maakuo nĩmamũkumie
Isaiah42:12 Andũ arĩa matũũraga icigĩrĩra cia iriainĩ nĩmakumie na magooce MWATHANI.
Isaiah42:13 MWATHANI oimagaraga ta njamba ya ita
Isaiah42:14 Ngai aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah42:15 Nĩngwananga irĩma na ithũngũri
Isaiah42:16 “Ngũtongoria andũ arĩa atumuumu ndĩmagerie njĩra matooĩ.Ngũgarũrania ũtumuumu wao ũtuĩke ũtheri
Isaiah42:17 Arĩa maigaga mwĩhoko wao thĩinĩ wa mĩhianano
Isaiah42:18 Thikĩrĩriai
Isaiah42:19 Nũũ mũtumuumu ta ndungata ĩyo yakwa? Nũũ mbũramatũ ta mũrekio wakwa ũrĩa ndũmĩĩte?Nũũ mũtumuumu ta ũrĩa wakwa mwamũre? Nũũ mũtumuumu ta ndungata ya MWATHANI?
Isaiah42:20 Nĩonaga maũndũ maingĩ no ndamarũmbũyagia.Nĩahingũrĩĩte matũ no ndaiguaga ũndũ.
Isaiah42:21 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah42:22 No rĩu
Isaiah42:23 Nũũ wanyu ũgũthikĩrĩria ũhoro ũyũ? Nũũ ũrĩiguaga na arũmbũyanagie naguo?
Isaiah42:24 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah42:25 Nĩkĩo aatũmire tũigue ũritũ wa maraakara maake na tũgĩkorererwo nĩ mathĩĩna ma mbaara.Maraakara maake maarĩrĩmbũkaga ta mwaki mĩena yothe
Isaiah43:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah43:2 Rĩrĩa ũkũgerera ndiainĩ ndiku ndĩrĩkoragwo ndĩ hamwe nawe; na mathĩĩna maaku matirĩkũmakagia.Rĩrĩa ũkũhĩtũkĩra thĩinĩ wa mwaki
Isaiah43:3 Nĩ gũkorwo niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku
Isaiah43:4 Ningĩ nĩngũheana ndũũrĩrĩ ng'ima nĩguo ngũũre muoyo waku
Isaiah43:5 Tiga gwĩtigĩra
Isaiah43:6 Nĩngwĩra mwena wa na rũgongo ũmarekererie naguo mwena wa na kĩanda ndũkamarigĩrĩrie.Aanake aakwa nĩmarekwo mooke moimĩĩte mabũrũri ma kũraaya o na airĩĩtu aakwa mooke moimĩĩte itũri ciothe cia thĩ.
Isaiah43:7 Oothe nĩ andũ aakwa kĩũmbe
Isaiah43:8 Ngai aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah43:9 Ĩtaai ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe ciũke ituĩroinĩ. Nĩ ngai irĩkũ ciacio ingĩhota kũratha ũhoro ũrĩa ũgooka?Nĩkũrĩ ciahotire kũratha ũrĩa kũreekĩka ũũmũũthĩ?Nĩikĩreehe aira aacio
Isaiah43:10 “Inyuĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Isaiah43:11 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah43:12 Nĩndooroteete o kabere ũndũ ũrĩa ũgeekĩka
Isaiah43:13 Niĩ
Isaiah43:14 MWATHANI Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli o we MWATHANI ũrĩa ũkũhonokagia
Isaiah43:15 Niĩ
Isaiah43:16 Tene MWATHANI nĩathondekire barabara
Isaiah43:17 Nĩagereirie mbũtũ nene ya ita
Isaiah43:18 MWATHANI arakiuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah43:19 Eterera wone ũndũ ũngĩ mwerũ ũrĩa ngwĩka
Isaiah43:20 Nyamũ iria iraaraga gĩthaka nĩikũũhe gĩtĩĩo
Isaiah43:21 Acio nĩ andũ arĩa ndeyũmbĩire nĩ geetha maanyinagĩre na mangoocage.”
Isaiah43:22 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah43:23 Nĩwagĩĩte kũndutĩra magongoona ma njino ma ndũrũme
Isaiah43:24 Wee-rĩ
Isaiah43:25 No o na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Isaiah43:26 “Ũka tũthiĩ ciirainĩ.Gweta thitango iria ũgũũthitanga nacio. Heana itũmi cia kuonania atĩ wĩ kĩhootoinĩ.
Isaiah43:27 Guukaguo ũrĩa wa tene nĩehirie o na atongoria aanyu nĩmaahĩtĩirie.
Isaiah43:28 Aathani aanyu nĩmaathaahirie Hekaarũ yakwa
Isaiah44:1 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah44:2 Niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI ũrĩa wamũũmbire. Kuuma rĩrĩa mwaciarirwo
Isaiah44:3 “Nĩngũhe bũrũri ũrĩa mũnyootu maaĩ
Isaiah44:4 Nacio ikũre o ta nyeki ĩitĩrĩirio maaĩ wega
Isaiah44:5 “Amwe moigage atĩrĩ
Isaiah44:6 MWATHANI
Isaiah44:7 Nũũ ũhaana ta niĩ? Nĩeyumaumĩrie!Nũũ wanahota kũratha maũndũ marĩa mageekĩka kuuma kĩambĩrĩria kinya mũico wa mahinda maya?
Isaiah44:8 Tigaai gwĩtigĩra kana kũmaka; nĩmũũĩ atĩ kuuma o tene kinya rĩu
Isaiah44:9 Andũ arĩa mathondekaga ngai cia mĩhianano nĩ a tũhũ mũno
Isaiah44:10 Nũũ ũthondekaga ngai ya mũhianano kana agaacũhia mĩhianano ateetereire kuona uumithio?
Isaiah44:11 Arĩa oothe maheaga ngai icio cia mĩhianano gĩtĩĩo-rĩ
Isaiah44:12 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah44:13 Bundi wa mbaaũ naake athimaga gĩcunjĩ kĩa mũtĩ
Isaiah44:14 Ahota gũtema mũtarakwa aũtũmĩre
Isaiah44:15 Mũtĩ ũcio ũtũmagĩrwo ta ngũ na ũgatũmĩrwo gwacũhio mĩhianano. Mũndũ oyaga kĩnuthu kĩmwe agaakia nakĩo mwaki wa guota na wa kũruga irio
Isaiah44:16 Gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe kĩa mũtĩ aakagia mwaki nakĩo; akahĩĩhia nyama naguo
Isaiah44:17 Gĩcunjĩ kĩu kĩngĩ agathondeka mũhianano
Isaiah44:18 Andũ acio nĩ akingitaru mũno na matimenyaga ũrĩa mareeka. Mahingaga maitho na meciiria maao matikaanoone na mamenye ũũma.
Isaiah44:19 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũthondekaga mĩhianano ndagĩaga na ũcamba kana ũmenyo wa kuuga
Isaiah44:20 Mũndũ ũcio ariitĩĩte akarĩa mai! Meciiria maake mamũturuurĩĩtie makamwagithia njĩra na ndangĩteithĩka. Ndangĩĩcookerera amenye atĩ mũhianano ũcio anyiitĩĩte na mooko maake ti ngai o na atĩa!
Isaiah44:21 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah44:22 Haatĩĩte mahĩtia maaku o ta ũrĩa matu mahaatagwo
Isaiah44:23 Inaai mũkeneete inyuĩ
Isaiah44:24 “Niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI mũhonokia waku; nĩ niĩ ndakũũmbire ndainĩ ya maitũguo.Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI ũrĩa wombire indo ciothe; nĩ niĩ ndatambarũkirie igũrũ.No niĩ ndoombire thĩ na ndamĩũmbire ndĩ o nyiiki.
Isaiah44:25 Nĩ niĩ nduruuragia ooni maũndũ
Isaiah44:26 Nĩ niĩ ndũmaga mĩgambo ya ndungata yakwa ĩhinge
Isaiah44:27 Nĩ niĩ ndutaga watho iria na njũũĩ ikahũa.
Isaiah44:28 Na niĩ njĩĩrĩĩte Cairasi atĩrĩ
Isaiah45:1 MWATHANI areera Cairasi
Isaiah45:2 Ngũgũtongoria thiĩ ngĩaraganagia irĩma mbere yaku
Isaiah45:3 Nĩngũkũhe ũtonga ũrĩa ũhithĩĩtwo kũndũ kũrĩ nduma
Isaiah45:4 O na gũtuĩka ndũnjũũĩ
Isaiah45:5 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah45:6 Njĩkĩĩte ũguo nĩguo
Isaiah45:7 Nĩ niĩ nyũũmbaga ũtheri na ngoomba nduma
Isaiah45:8 Niĩ MWATHANI nĩngeeka ũũ: nĩngaareka igũrũ na matu
Isaiah45:9 “Kaĩ ũrĩa ũng'eng'anaga na ũrĩa wamũũmbire arĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Atariĩ o ta gĩcere kĩrĩ thĩinĩ wa icere iria ingĩ.Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah45:10 Ũrĩa ũũragia ithe ‘Ũciaraga nĩkĩ?’Kana akooria nyina
Isaiah45:11 MWATHANI
Isaiah45:12 Nĩ niĩ ndoombire thĩ
Isaiah45:13 Nĩ niĩ njarahũrĩĩte Cairasi ngamũhe kĩhooto na ngathondeka njĩra iria ekũgerera.Nĩakanjakithĩria rĩngĩ itũũra rĩakwa rĩa Jerusalemu
Isaiah45:14 Ningĩ MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah45:15 Ngai wa Isiraeli
Isaiah45:16 Arĩa oothe mathondekaga mĩhianano nĩgũconoka marĩconakaga o na manyararagwo.
Isaiah45:17 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah45:18 MWATHANI ũrĩa wombire igũrũ
Isaiah45:19 Niĩ ndiarĩĩtie na hitho kana ngahithĩrĩra itaanya rĩakwa.Ndierire andũ a Isiraeli
Isaiah45:20 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah45:21 Ũkaai mũreehe ciira wanyu igootiinĩ
Isaiah45:22 “Njookereraai na nĩmũkũhonokio inyuĩ andũ oothe a thĩ
Isaiah45:23 Ndĩrehĩta ngĩĩgwetaga niĩ mwene.Ũndũ ũrĩa njugĩĩte na kanua gaakwa nĩ ũhoro wa ma na ndirĩ hingo ngericũkwo.Andũ oothe marĩnduragĩria ndu na mehĩtage kũndungatagĩra.”
Isaiah45:24 Mariugaga atĩrĩ
Isaiah45:25 Niĩ MWATHANI nĩngaahonokia njiarwa ciothe cia Isiraeli
Isaiah46:1 “Ngai ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Beli nĩgwĩte nayo ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Nebo nĩnũnde.Ngai icio rĩu ikuuĩĩtwo nĩ ndigiri ta mĩrigo; na nĩiritũhĩire nyamũ icio icikuuĩĩte.
Isaiah46:2 Ngai icio igwĩte ikaiganĩrĩrwo hamwe
Isaiah46:3 “Tegaai matũ mũũthikĩrĩrie
Isaiah46:4 Ngũtũũra njĩkaga ũguo kinya mũkũre na mũgĩe na mbuĩ.Nĩ niĩ ndamũũmbire na nĩndĩrĩmũmenyagĩrĩra
Isaiah46:5 “Mũngĩningithania na ũ atĩ nĩguo tũiganane? Ningĩ mũngĩningithania na ũ atĩ nĩguo tũhaanane?
Isaiah46:6 Andũ mahingũraga mĩhuko yao makaruta thahabu
Isaiah46:7 Magacooka makamĩigĩrĩra ciande
Isaiah46:8 Kwoguo
Isaiah46:9 Ririkanaai maũndũ marĩa maatuĩkĩkire tene
Isaiah46:10 O kĩambĩrĩriainĩ nĩndamenyithanirie ũrĩa maũndũ makaarĩĩkĩrĩria; na kabere mũno ngĩmenyithania maũndũ marĩa meerekeire gũũka.Ngakiuga atĩ mũbango wakwa
Isaiah46:11 Nĩndĩreeta mũndũ ũmwe mwena wa irathĩro
Isaiah46:12 “Tegaai matũ mũũthikĩrĩrie

Isaiah47:2 Oya ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi
Isaiah47:3 Andũ magĩkuone njaga ũconokeete na ũinamĩĩtie maitho nĩ thoni
Isaiah47:4 Mũkũũri witũ eetagwo MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe na no we Ngai Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli.
Isaiah47:5 MWATHANI areera Babiloni atĩrĩ
Isaiah47:6 Tondũ-rĩ
Isaiah47:7 Ningĩ weĩraga atĩ ũgũtũũra ũrĩ kwini
Isaiah47:8 “Tagĩthikĩrĩrie
Isaiah47:9 Maũndũ macio meerĩ-rĩ
Isaiah47:10 “Ũratũire wĩhandĩĩte ũũruinĩ waku
Isaiah47:11 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah47:12 Tagĩthiĩ na mbere na mĩthaiga yaku mĩingĩ o na ũhũthire ũgo waku ũrĩa wa hinya
Isaiah47:13 O na ũheetwo mataaro maingĩ ũguo
Isaiah47:14 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah47:15 Aragũri acio ũtũire ũhũthagĩra kuuma rĩrĩa warĩ mwĩthĩ
Isaiah48:1 Tathikĩrĩriai ũhoro ũyũ inyuĩ andũ a Isiraeli
Isaiah48:2 Mwĩtĩĩaga mũkiugaga atĩ mũrĩ atũũri a itũũra rĩrĩa rĩtheru
Isaiah48:3 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah48:4 Tondũ nĩnjũũĩ atĩ mũrĩ andũ oomũ ngoro mũno
Isaiah48:5 Ndamũmenyithirie maũndũ marĩa magaatuĩkĩka o kabere
Isaiah48:6 “Maũndũ marĩa ndamwĩrire tene nĩmuoneete moothe nĩmahingĩĩte.Mũkĩagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩtĩkĩra atĩ maũndũ marĩa ndarathire maarĩ ma ma.Rĩu nĩngũmwĩra maũndũ mangĩ meerũ
Isaiah48:7 Matiathondekirwo tene nĩ hĩndĩ marathondekwo; mũtierirwo ũhoro wamo mbere ya hĩndĩ ĩno
Isaiah48:8 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ mũtingĩĩhokwo
Isaiah48:9 “Nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa niĩ mwene nĩngwĩgirĩrĩria ndikaaraakare.Nĩ ũndũ wa gĩtĩĩo gĩakwa niĩ mwene ndikũmũraakarĩra na ndikũmũniina.
Isaiah48:10 Oneei nĩndĩmũthereetie
Isaiah48:11 Ũndũ ũyũ ngwĩka nĩ ũndũ wakwa kĩũmbe. Kaĩ rĩĩtwa rĩakwa rĩagĩrĩirwo nĩgũthaahio? Ndingĩtĩkĩra kũhe ũngĩ riiri ũrĩa ũrĩ wakwa kĩũmbe.”
Isaiah48:12 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah48:13 Mooko maakwa nĩ mo maathondekire itina cia thĩ
Isaiah48:14 “Gomanaai inyuothe na mũthikĩrĩrie
Isaiah48:15 Niĩ
Isaiah48:16 “Ũkaai hakuhĩ na niĩ
Isaiah48:17 Mũkũũri waku
Isaiah48:18 Naarĩ korwo nĩwathikĩrĩirie maathani maakwa! Ũtonga waku ũngĩhaana o ta rũũĩ rũtahũaga
Isaiah48:19 Ciana ciaku ingĩingĩhĩĩte o ta mũthanga
Isaiah48:20 Umaai Babiloni!Mwĩthareei mwehererere Ababilonia!Thiĩi mũkĩanagĩrĩra mũkeneete!Anĩrĩraai mũmenyithanie ituriinĩ ciothe cia thĩ
Isaiah48:21 Aamagereirie kũndũ werũinĩ na matiathĩĩnire nĩkwaga maaĩ.Aatũmire maaĩ moime rwaroinĩ rwa ihiga na agĩatũranga ndwaro cia mahiga gũkiuma tũrũũĩ.
Isaiah48:22 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:1 Tategaai matũ mũũthikĩrĩrie inyuĩ andũ a icigĩrĩrainĩ cia iria o inyuĩ andũ arĩa matũũraga kũndũ kũraaya!Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah49:2 Aathondekire kanua gaakwa karĩ koogĩ o ta rũhiũ rwa njora
Isaiah49:3 Agĩcooka akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:4 No niĩ ngiuga atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:5 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndaarĩ ndainĩ ya maitũ
Isaiah49:6 MWATHANI arakĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:7 MWATHANI Ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Isiraeli
Isaiah49:8 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:9 Arĩa marĩ njeera
Isaiah49:10 Matikaahũũta o na kana manyoote
Isaiah49:11 “Nĩngaathondeka njĩra yakwa itwĩkanĩirie irĩmainĩ ciothe
Isaiah49:12 Amwe makoima mabũrũri ma kũraaya
Isaiah49:13 Wee igũrũ ina ũkeneete! Nawe thĩ ugĩrĩria nĩgũkena! Irĩma nacio nĩ itumũke ciine! MWATHANI nĩomĩrĩirie andũ aake; andũ aake arĩa maranyarirĩka nĩamaiguĩrĩire tha.
Isaiah49:14 No andũ a Jerusalemu maroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:15 Naake MWATHANI agacookia atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:16 Jerusalemu
Isaiah49:17 “Andũ a gũgwaka rĩngĩ megũũka o narua
Isaiah49:18 Taikia maitho maaku mĩena na mĩena wone ũrĩa kũrathiĩ na mbere!Andũ aaku nĩkũũngana marongana
Isaiah49:19 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah49:20 Andũ aaku arĩa maaciarĩirwo ĩthaamĩrioinĩ
Isaiah49:21 We nawe nĩũgecũũrania wĩyũrie atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:22 MWATHANI Ngai areera andũ aake atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:23 Athamaki nĩ o magaakorwo mahaana maithe maanyu nao kwini matuĩke ta maanyina maanyu.Nao magooka mainamĩrĩire mbere yaku
Isaiah49:24 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah49:25 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah49:26 Arĩa makũhinyagĩrĩria ngaatũma marĩe nyama cia mĩĩrĩ yao
Isaiah50:1 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah50:2 “Nĩkĩ kĩagiririe andũ aakwa manjookerere
Isaiah50:3 No hote gũtũma igũrũ rĩthimbe rĩtumane
Isaiah50:4 MWATHANI Ngai nĩaheete mĩario nyũmagĩrĩrie arĩa manogeete.Kĩrooko o kĩrooko anjarahũraga nĩguo thikĩrĩrie ũrĩa we ekũnduta.
Isaiah50:5 MWATHANI nĩangunũrĩĩte matũ
Isaiah50:6 Arĩa maahũũraga nĩndamaarĩire mũgongo wakwa; ndiigana kũmakiria rĩrĩa maanumaga
Isaiah50:7 Tondũ MWATHANI Ngai nĩandeithagia
Isaiah50:8 nĩ gũkorwo ũrĩa ũkũndĩhĩria e hakuhĩ na niĩ.Nũũ ũngĩũmĩrĩria gũũthitanga? Nĩoke tũthiĩ igootiinĩ! Nũũ ũngĩbingana na niĩ? Nĩakĩreehe thitango ciake.
Isaiah50:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah50:10 Mũndũ o wothe ũheaga MWATHANI gĩtĩĩo nĩathĩkagĩre mũgambo wa ndungata yake.Ũrĩa wothe ũthiagĩra kũndũ kũrĩ nduma ndumanu nĩehoke rĩĩtwa rĩa MWATHANI na erĩgagĩrĩre Ngai wake.
Isaiah50:11 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah51:1 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah51:2 Tacũũraniai ũhoro wa Aburahamu
Isaiah51:3 “Nĩngũiguĩra Jerusalemu tha
Isaiah51:4 “Andũ aakwa
Isaiah51:5 Nĩngũũka o narua ndĩmahonokie; ihinda rĩakwa rĩa kũhootana rĩrĩ hakuhĩ.Niĩ mwene nĩ niĩ ndĩathaga ndũũrĩrĩ.Icigĩrĩra cia iriainĩ
Isaiah51:6 Taikiai maitho na igũrũ muone
Isaiah51:7 “Tathikĩrĩriai inyuĩ mũũĩ ũthingu nĩ kĩĩ
Isaiah51:8 Andũ acio oothe magaathira o ta nguo irĩĩtwo nĩ mũthũa no ũhonokania ũrĩa ngũheana nĩ wa tene na tene
Isaiah51:9 Arahũka
Isaiah51:10 No we womirie iria na ũgĩthondeka kuo njĩra yagũthĩirwo.Wekire ũguo nĩguo andũ arĩa wahonokagia mahote kũringa.
Isaiah51:11 Andũ arĩa ũhonoketie megũcooka makinye Jerusalemu makĩrũũhagia; makĩinaga maanĩrĩire nĩgũkena.Megũtũũra makeneete tene na tene Matigaacooka kũigua kĩeha kana gwĩthikĩra rĩ o rĩ.
Isaiah51:12 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah51:13 Kaĩ ũriganĩirwo nĩ MWATHANI ũrĩa wakũũmbire
Isaiah51:14 Arĩa mahingĩirwo mekũhingũrĩrwo o narua
Isaiah51:15 “Niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI Ngai waku
Isaiah51:16 Nĩngũheete ũrutani wakwa na ngakũgitĩra na hinya wakwa.Niĩ ndatambarũkirie igũrũ na ngĩaka mũthingi wa thĩ na ndĩreera andũ a Jerusalemu atĩrĩ
Isaiah51:17 Jerusalemu
Isaiah51:18 Ciana iria ciothe ũciarĩĩte-rĩ
Isaiah51:19 Nĩũkomeirwo nĩ maũndũ meerĩ: bũrũri waku nĩwanangĩĩtwo ũgakira ihooru
Isaiah51:20 Koonainĩ cia njĩra ciothe andũ aaku nĩkũringĩka mararingĩka maagĩĩte hinya
Isaiah51:21 Inyuĩ andũ a Jerusalemu
Isaiah51:22 MWATHANI Ngai wanyu nĩekũmũmenyerera
Isaiah51:23 Acio mamũnyariiraga
Isaiah52:1 Jerusalemu
Isaiah52:2 Itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu
Isaiah52:3 MWATHANI areera andũ aake atĩrĩ
Isaiah52:4 MWATHANI Ngai aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah52:5 Rĩu gũũkũ Babiloni noguo kũrathiĩ na mbere. Mũrĩ ngombo na gũtirĩ mbeeca mũgũrĩĩtwo nacio. Arĩa maramwatha nĩkwĩraha mareraha na makanjagĩra gĩtĩĩo mĩthenya yothe.
Isaiah52:6 Andũ aakwa
Isaiah52:7 Kaĩ nĩ gĩkeno kĩnene kuona mũtũmwo ũrooka agereire ng'ongoinĩ
Isaiah52:8 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah52:9 Ambĩrĩriai kuugĩrĩria mũine mũrĩ hamwe mũkeneete
Isaiah52:10 MWATHANI nĩegũtũmĩra guoko gwake gũtheru akĩonagwo nĩ ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe; ituri ciothe cia thĩ nĩikuona ũhonokania wa Ngai witũ.
Isaiah52:11 Thiĩi
Isaiah52:12 Mũtikoime kuo na ihenya kana ta andũ marethara.MWATHANI nĩ we ũkũmũtongoria
Isaiah52:13 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah52:14 Andũ aingĩ nĩmaagegire rĩrĩa maamĩonire; ũthiũ wayo wathũũkangĩĩtio ũguo atĩ ndĩonekaga ĩhaana mũndũ o na haniini.”
Isaiah52:15 Ndũũrĩrĩ nyingĩ nĩkaagegeara
Isaiah53:1 Andũ makoigaga atĩrĩ
Isaiah53:2 Ndungata ĩyo yake yakũrire o ta mũtĩ mwĩthĩ ũraruta mĩri ũrĩ kũndũ kũũmũ.Ndĩarĩ na kĩũga atĩ nĩ geetha tũmĩĩrorere na ndĩarĩ thaka kana riiri atĩ nĩngĩagĩtũguucĩrĩirie na kũrĩ yo tũmĩende.
Isaiah53:3 Nĩyameneetwo na ĩgĩkaanwo nĩ andũ. Nĩ mũndũ wamenyereete gũkoragwo na kĩeha na kũrĩa thĩĩna.Aarĩ ta mũndũ woragĩrwo nĩ arĩa angĩ
Isaiah53:4 “Ĩndĩ
Isaiah53:5 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah53:6 Ithuothe nĩkũũra tuorĩĩte o ta ng'ondu
Isaiah53:7 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah53:8 Aanyiitirwo na agĩtuĩrwo
Isaiah53:9 Aatwarirwo mbĩĩrĩrainĩ hamwe na andũ arĩa aaganu
Isaiah53:10 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ“Nĩ wendi wakwa kũhehenja ndungata yakwa; gĩkuũ kĩayo gĩgũtuĩka igongoona rĩa meehia.Nĩkoona rũciaro rwayo
Isaiah53:11 Thuutha wa gũkirĩrĩria mathĩĩna nĩkoona ũtheri na ĩcooke gũkena.Ndungata ĩyo yakwa thingu
Isaiah53:12 Kwoguo nĩngaamĩhe igai hamwe na andũ arĩa anene
Isaiah54:1 Jerusalemu
Isaiah54:2 Araramia hema ĩrĩa ũtũũraga
Isaiah54:3 Nĩũkaaramia mĩhaka na mĩena yothe
Isaiah54:4 Tiga kũmaka
Isaiah54:5 Ũrĩa wakũũmbire-rĩ
Isaiah54:6 Isiraeli
Isaiah54:7 “Ndĩragũteete kwa ihinda iniini
Isaiah54:8 Ndĩragũthengeire kwa ihinda ndĩ na maraakara maingĩ
Isaiah54:9 “Ta ũrĩa ndeekire tene matukũinĩ ma Noa
Isaiah54:10 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah54:11 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah54:12 Mĩnaara yaku ngũmĩaka na mahiga ma goro ma rubi
Isaiah54:13 “Ciana ciaku ciothe nĩ niĩ mwene ndĩrĩcirutaga na ndũme igaacĩre na igĩe na thaayũ mũingĩ.
Isaiah54:14 Waragania na kĩhooto nĩcio irĩkũrũũgamagĩrĩra
Isaiah54:15 Mũndũ wothe ũgaagũũkĩrĩra
Isaiah54:16 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah54:17 Gũtirĩ indo cia mbaara igaathondekwo cia gũkũhũũra
Isaiah55:1 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah55:2 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah55:3 “Tegaai matũ mũthikĩrĩrie na mũũke harĩ niĩ.Ũkaai harĩ niĩ na nĩmũgũtũũra muoyo.Nĩngũthondeka kĩrĩĩkanĩro gĩa gũtũũra na inyuĩ na ndĩmũhe iraathimo iria ndeerĩire Daudi.
Isaiah55:4 Nĩndatuire Daudi mũtongoria na mũnene wa ndũũrĩrĩ
Isaiah55:5 Nĩmũgaatũmanĩra ndũũrĩrĩ ng'eni
Isaiah55:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah55:7 Andũ arĩa imaramari nĩmatigane na mĩtugo yao; na arĩa matarĩ athingu magarũrĩre mĩciirĩrie yao.Nĩmacookerere MWATHANI Ngai witũ
Isaiah55:8 Tondũ-rĩ
Isaiah55:9 Ta ũrĩa igũrũ rĩraihanĩrĩirie na thĩ
Isaiah55:10 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah55:11 Ũguo noguo mũgambo ũrĩa njaragia
Isaiah55:12 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah55:13 Mĩthengera nĩyo ĩgakũra kũrĩa rĩu kũrakũra mĩtare. Mĩhandathi nayo ĩkũre kũrĩa rĩu kũrakũra cong'e.Ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtuĩke rũũri rwa gũtũũra tene na tene rwakũririkananagia ũrĩa niĩ MWATHANI njĩkĩĩte.”
Isaiah56:1 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah56:2 Kũraathimwo nĩ mũndũ wothe wĩkaga na akarũmia maũndũ maya: ũhingagia wega mũthenya wa Thabatũ akaaga kũmĩthaahia; na ũrĩa wĩrigagĩrĩria gwĩka ũndũ o ũrĩkũ mũũru.
Isaiah56:3 “Mũtikaanareke mũrũũrĩrĩ ũrĩa wĩnyiitithanĩĩtie na andũ a MWATHANI
Isaiah56:4 MWATHANI areera mũndũ ta ũcio atĩrĩ
Isaiah56:5 nĩngaatũma ũririkanagwo Hekaarũinĩ yakwa na gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ aakwa
Isaiah56:6 Andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa menyiitithanĩĩtie na andũ a MWATHANI
Isaiah56:7 “Nĩngũmũreehe Zayuni
Isaiah56:8 MWATHANI Ngai
Isaiah56:9 MWATHANI eerĩĩte ndũũrĩrĩ ng'eni ciũke irĩ na ũũru mũingĩ o ta wa nyamũ cia gĩthaka
Isaiah56:10 Tondũ aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah56:11 Nĩ ngui ngoroki itarĩ kĩndũ kĩngĩihũũnia.Arĩithi nao matirĩ na ũũgĩ o na atĩa.Mũndũ o mũndũ arathiĩ na njĩra yake
Isaiah56:12 Maikaraga makĩĩranaga ‘Ũkaai tũnyue ndibei tũrĩĩo. Rũũciũ rũgaakorwo rũrĩ rwega gũkĩra ũũmũũthĩ.’ ”
Isaiah57:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah57:2 matwarwo kũndũ kũrĩ na thaayũ.Andũ arĩa matũũraga ũtũũro wa ũthingu
Isaiah57:3 Ũkaai haaha
Isaiah57:4 Nũũ mũrathaaka naake? Nũũ mũrathamĩria kanua mũkĩmũrutagĩra rũrĩmĩ?Githĩ mũticiarĩirwo meehiainĩ na maheeniinĩ?
Isaiah57:5 Inyuĩ mũhũũragĩra ũmaraaya mĩgandiinĩ yanyu ĩrĩa mĩamũre na mũtĩinĩ o wothe mũruru.Mũrutaga ciana cianyu magongoona
Isaiah57:6 Ningĩ muoyaga mahiga marĩa manyoroku ma kũu ciandainĩ icio
Isaiah57:7 Mũthiaga irĩmainĩ iria ndaaya
Isaiah57:8 Mũigaga mĩhianano yanyu thuutha wa mĩrango ya nyũmba cianyu
Isaiah57:9 Mwĩhakaga maguta marĩa manungaga wega na ũingĩ
Isaiah57:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah57:11 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah57:12 Tondũ mwĩciiragia nĩmũreeka wega-rĩ
Isaiah57:13 Rĩrĩa mũrĩkaya mũteithio-rĩ
Isaiah57:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩgũkaanĩrĩrwo atĩrĩ
Isaiah57:15 Nĩ gũkorwo Ngai Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ
Isaiah57:16 Amu hĩndĩ ciothe ndirĩikaraga ngĩmatetagia kana ndĩmaraakarĩire.Ingĩĩka ũguo
Isaiah57:17 Nĩndaraakaririo nĩ waganu na ũkoroku wao ngĩmaherithia na ngĩmatiganĩria.Nao makĩũmia ciongo
Isaiah57:18 “Nĩnyoneete ũrĩa meekĩĩte
Isaiah57:19 Nĩngũhe andũ oothe
Isaiah57:20 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah57:21 Andũ arĩa aaganu mationaga thaayũ.” Ũguo nĩguo MWATHANI oiga.
Isaiah58:1 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah58:2 Maathaathayagia mũthenya o mũthenya
Isaiah58:3 Andũ marooria atĩrĩ
Isaiah58:4 Mwĩimaga irio
Isaiah58:5 Mũthenya ũrĩa mwehinga kũrĩa
Isaiah58:6 “Kwĩhinga kũrĩa kũngenagia nĩ gũũkũ: gũthengia mĩnyororo ya kũhinyanĩrĩria na ya kũimana kĩhooto; kũrekereria andũ arĩa ahinyĩrĩrie
Isaiah58:7 Ningĩ nĩkũhe arĩa matarĩ
Isaiah58:8 “Mweka maũndũ macio
Isaiah58:9 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũrĩhooyaga ngaigua mahooya maanyu; mũrĩnjĩtaga na niĩ ngamwĩtĩka.“Mũngĩniina kũhinyanĩrĩria o guothe
Isaiah58:10 ningĩ mũngĩheaga arĩa matarĩ na irio
Isaiah58:11 Ningĩ nĩndĩmũtongoragia hĩndĩ ciothe
Isaiah58:12 Andũ aanyu nĩmagaaka rĩngĩ nyũmba iria ciamomoreetwo tene
Isaiah58:13 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Isaiah58:14 hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩũrĩgĩagĩra na ũkeni ũrĩa heaga arĩa mandungatagĩra
Isaiah59:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah59:2 No rĩĩrĩ
Isaiah59:3 Nĩ gũkorwo mooko maanyu nĩmaitithĩĩtie thakame nyingĩ
Isaiah59:4 Mwatwarana igootiinĩ mũtithitanganagĩra maũndũ na kĩhooto
Isaiah59:5 Mũgakĩhaana o ta mũkomereirie matumbĩ ma nyoka cia thumu
Isaiah59:6 Ta ũrĩa ndigi cia rũrenda rwa mbũmbũĩ itangĩhota gũthondeka nguo cia kwĩhumbĩra
Isaiah59:7 Mũhanyũkagĩra gwĩka ũũru
Isaiah59:8 Mũtirũmbũyanagia na maũndũ ma thaayũ
Isaiah59:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Isaiah59:10 Tũthiaga tũkĩhambahambataga ta itumuumu
Isaiah59:11 Tũthiaga tũceemeete o ta nduba
Isaiah59:12 MWATHANI
Isaiah59:13 Nĩtũkũremeete na tũgagũkaana
Isaiah59:14 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio waragania nĩũthengeetio
Isaiah59:15 Ũhoro wa ma wagĩĩte na njĩra nene ũguo atĩ mũndũ wothe ũteekaga ũũru nĩkũherithio aherithagio.
Isaiah59:16 Nĩamakĩĩte nĩkuona atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ wa gũteithĩrĩria andũ arĩa ahatĩrĩrie.Nĩ ũndũ ũcio egũtũmĩra ũhoti wake
Isaiah59:17 Akwĩhumba ũthingu ta arĩ gako ga kwĩgitĩra gĩthũri
Isaiah59:18 Ekũrĩha mũndũ o mũndũ kũringana na ikĩro ciake
Isaiah59:19 Kuuma mwena wa irathĩro kinya wa ithũĩro
Isaiah59:20 MWATHANI arakĩĩra andũ aake atĩrĩ
Isaiah59:21 Njooke thondeke kĩrĩĩkanĩro na inyuĩ ta ũũ: ndĩmũhe hinya wakwa na mataaro maakwa mũtũũre nacio aagu na aagu. Inyuĩ na inyuĩ kuuma rĩu mũtũũre mũnjathĩkagĩra na mũrutaga ciana cianyu kũnjathĩkagĩra hingo ciothe.”

Jeremiah1:1 Ici nĩcio ciugo iria ciaririo nĩ Jeremia mũrũ wa Hilikia ũrĩa warĩ ũmwe wa athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa matũũraga itũũrainĩ rĩa Anathothu rĩrĩa rĩarĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Benjamini.
Jeremiah1:2 MWATHANI nĩarĩirie Jeremia mwakainĩ wa ikũmi na ĩtatũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Josia mũrũ wa Amoni aathamakaga Juda.
Jeremiah1:3 MWATHANI nĩakĩrĩrĩirie kũhe Jeremia ndũmĩrĩri ciake o na mahinda marĩa Jehoiakimu mũrũ wa Josia aathamakaga Juda. Ningĩ o na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Zedekia mũrũ wa Josia aathamakaga Juda

Jeremiah3:9 na ndaigana kũigua thoni o na haniini. Athaahirie bũrũri
Jeremiah3:10 Thuutha wa gwĩka maũndũ macio moothe mooru

Jeremiah3:12 Thiĩ kũrĩ Isiraeli ũrĩa ũikaraga na mwena wa na rũgongo ũmũkinyĩrie ndũmĩrĩri ĩno ũmwĩre atĩrĩ

Jeremiah3:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ a Juda magaathiĩ na andũ a Isiraeli moime bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ũrĩ na mwena wa na rũgongo

Jeremiah3:20 No rĩĩrĩ

Jeremiah3:22 Inyuĩ andũ aya mũtarĩ ehokeku njookereraai
Jeremiah3:23 Mũtugo witũ wa gũthaathaiya mĩhianano kũũrĩa irĩma igũrũ ndũrĩ na uumithio ũtũreeheire. Ũhonokio wa Isiraeli ũrĩ he MWATHANI Ngai witũ.

Jeremiah4:6 Ĩkĩraai kĩbaaũ gĩa kuonanĩrĩria njĩra ya gũthiĩ Zayuni.Mwĩthareei! Tigaai kũgonderera! Nĩ gũkorwo nĩngũreehithia ũũru uumanĩĩte na mwena wa na rũgongo

Jeremiah10:1 Inyuĩ andũ aya a Isiraeli
Jeremiah10:2 MWATHANI aroiga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah10:3 Ndini cia andũ acio nĩ cia maheeni.Mũtĩ ũtemagwo mũtitũ
Jeremiah10:4 na akaũgemia na betha na thahabu.Agacooka akaũhũũrĩrĩra mĩcumaarĩ nĩguo ũrũme ndũkang'aũkane.
Jeremiah10:5 Mĩhianano ĩyo yao ĩhaana ibuuri irĩ mũgũndainĩ wa marenge; ndĩngĩhota kwaria; no mũhaka ĩkuuo
Jeremiah10:6 MWATHANI
Jeremiah10:7 Nũũ ũtangĩgũtĩĩa
Jeremiah10:8 Oothe nĩ akĩĩgu na makariita; nĩ kĩĩ mangĩĩruta na mĩhianano ya mĩtĩ?
Jeremiah10:9 Mĩhianano yao ĩgemeetio na betha ya kuuma Sipania na thahabu ya kuuma Ũfazi.Wĩra ũcio wothe ũrutĩĩtwo nĩ aacũhia a mĩtĩ na aturi thahabu ĩhumbĩĩtwo nguo cia rangi wa mburuu na wa babũ itumĩĩtwo nĩ atumi nguo oohĩgĩrĩru.
Jeremiah10:10 No wee
Jeremiah10:11 (Inyuĩ andũ a Isiraeli no mũhaka mũmeere atĩ ngai iria itoombire thĩ na igũrũ nĩikaaniinwo ithire biũ gũũkũ thĩ).
Jeremiah10:12 MWATHANI nĩ we wombire thĩ na hinya wake; nĩ we wathondekire thĩ na ũũgĩ wake
Jeremiah10:13 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa agũũthũka

Jeremiah19:4 Ngwĩka ũguo tondũ andũ nĩmandiganĩirie na magathaahia kũndũ gũũkũ na ũndũ wa kũrutĩra ngai ingĩ magongoona. Ngai icio nĩ ngai iria o eene matooĩ
Jeremiah19:5 Nĩmaakĩire ngai ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Baali kũndũ gũtũũgĩru gwa gũthaathaĩria nĩguo mamĩcinagĩre ciana ciao irĩ ta magongoona ma njino. Niĩ ndirĩ hingo ndĩ ndamaatha meekage ũguo
Jeremiah19:6 Tondũ ũcio-rĩ
Jeremiah19:7 Mĩbango yothe ya Juda na Jerusalemu ngũmĩthũũkĩria kũndũ gũũkũ. Nĩngũreka thũ ciao imahoote na imooragĩre mbaarainĩ. Ngũhe nyoni na nyamũ cia gĩthaka ciimba ciao ituĩke irio ciacio.
Jeremiah19:8 Ngũreehithĩria itũũra rĩĩrĩ mwanangĩko ũguo atĩ ũrĩa wothe ũrĩhĩtũkagĩra hakuhĩ narĩo ariugaga

Jeremiah25:3 “MWATHANI akoreetwo akĩĩhe ndũmĩrĩri ciake kuuma mwakainĩ wa ikũmi na ĩtatũ rĩrĩa Josia mũrũ wa Amoni aarĩ mũthamaki wa Juda nginyagia ũũmũũthĩ ũyũ. Rĩu nĩ itĩĩna rĩa mĩaka mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ. Ihindainĩ rĩu rĩothe-rĩ
Jeremiah25:4 O na gũtuĩka MWATHANI nĩakoreetwo akĩmũtũmĩra ndungata ciake ti anabii ategũtigithĩria
Jeremiah25:5 Maamwĩrire mũtigane na mĩthiĩre yanyu mĩũru o na ciĩko cianyu cia waganu iria mwĩkaga nĩguo mũthiĩ na mbere gũtũũra bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa MWATHANI aamũheire o na akĩhe maithe maanyu ũtuĩke igai rĩanyu rĩa tene na tene.
Jeremiah25:6 O na ningĩ nĩmaamwĩrire mũtigaathaathayagie kana mũtungatagĩre ngai ingĩ

Jeremiah25:10 Nĩngũniina thĩinĩ wamo mĩgambo ya gĩkeno na mĩtheko
Jeremiah25:11 Bũrũri ũyũ wothe ũgũtigwo ũrĩ maganjo na ũrĩ kũndũ gwa gũtũmaga andũ mamake moigage hĩ hĩ hĩ hĩ-ĩ! Mabũrũri marĩa mahakanĩĩte naguo megũtungatĩra mũthamaki wa Babilonia ihinda rĩa mĩaka mĩrongo mũgwanja.

Jeremiah27:5 “Nĩ niĩ ndoombire thĩ na hinya na ũhoti wakwa o na ngĩũmba andũ

Jeremiah27:12 O naake Zedekia mũthamaki wa Juda nĩndamwĩrire o taguo
Jeremiah27:13 Kaĩ we mwene na andũ aaku mũkũũragwo na mbaara
Jeremiah27:14 Ndũgaathikĩrĩrie anabii arĩa marakũĩra atĩ ndũgaatungate mũthamaki wa Babilonia
Jeremiah27:15 MWATHANI we mwene oigĩĩte atĩ ndamatũmĩĩte na atĩ nĩkũmũheenia maramũheenia makĩgwetaga rĩĩtwa rĩake. Tondũ ũcio
Jeremiah27:16 Ngĩcooka ngĩĩra athĩnjĩri Ngai na andũ oothe atĩrĩ

Jeremiah35:12 Njiarwa cia Jonadabu nĩciathĩkĩire ũrĩa aaciathire atĩ itikaananyue ndibei
Jeremiah35:13 Ndũire ndĩmũtũmagĩra anabii
Jeremiah35:14 Njiarwa cia Jonadabu nĩciathĩkĩire ũrĩa ciathirwo nĩ ithe wao
Jeremiah35:15 Tondũ ũcio niĩ
Jeremiah35:16 Ngĩcooka ngĩĩra mbarĩ ya Rekabu atĩ MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe
Jeremiah35:17 niĩ
Jeremiah36:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:2 “Oya ibuku rĩa gĩkũnjo wandĩke ũhoro wothe ũrĩa ngũheete ũkoniĩ Isiraeli na Juda o na ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe. Andĩka ũhoro wothe ũrĩa ngũheete kuuma rĩrĩa ndakwarĩirie rĩa mbere
Jeremiah36:3 No gũkorwo andũ a Juda maigua ũhoro wa mwanangĩko wothe ũrĩa bangĩĩte kũmareehithĩria nĩmegũtigana na mĩthiĩre yao mĩũru
Jeremiah36:4 Kwoguo ngĩgĩĩta Baruku mũrũ wa Neria
Jeremiah36:5 Ngĩcooka ngĩatha Baruku ngĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:6 Ingĩkĩenda wee ũthiĩ kuo mũthenya ũrĩa andũ marĩkorwo mehingĩĩte kũrĩa
Jeremiah36:7 No gũkorwo nĩmegũthaitha MWATHANI na matigane na mĩthiĩre yao mĩũru
Jeremiah36:8 Naake Baruku agĩgĩthiĩ
Jeremiah36:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Baruku agĩgĩthooma kuuma ibukuinĩ rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo maũndũ moothe marĩa ndoigĩĩte andũ oothe mategeete matũ. Eekĩire ũndũ ũcio Hekaarũinĩ
Jeremiah36:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:12 Naake agĩikũrũka agĩthiĩ nyũmba ya mũthamaki
Jeremiah36:13 Mikaya agĩkĩmeera ũhoro wothe ũrĩa aiguĩte Baruku agĩthoomera andũ.
Jeremiah36:14 Nao magĩtũma Jehudi (mũrũ wa Nethania na mũcũkũrũ wa Shelemia mũrũ wa Kushi) akeere Baruku amatwarĩre ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo rĩrĩa aathoomeire andũ. Naake Baruku akĩoya ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo
Jeremiah36:15 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:16 Marĩĩkia kũigua ũhoro wothe
Jeremiah36:17 Magĩcooka makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:18 Baruku akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:19 Nao atongoria acio makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:20 Kwoguo atongoria acio magĩtiga ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo kũu wabiciinĩ ya Elishama
Jeremiah36:21 Naake mũthamaki agĩtũma Jehudi athiĩ akagĩĩre ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo kuuma wabiciinĩ ya Elishama. Jehudi akĩrĩgĩĩra
Jeremiah36:22 Hingo ĩyo kwarĩ hĩndĩ ya heho
Jeremiah36:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:24 O na kũhaana ũguo-rĩ
Jeremiah36:25 Ningĩ o na mũthamaki athaithwo nĩ Elinathani
Jeremiah36:26 Mũthamaki agĩcooka agĩatha mũũrũwe Jerameeli
Jeremiah36:27 Thuutha wa mũthamaki Jehoiakimu gũcina ibuku rĩu rĩa gĩkũnjo rĩrĩa rĩarĩ na ũhoro ũrĩa ndeerĩĩte Baruku akĩwandĩkaga
Jeremiah36:28 njoe ibuku rĩngĩ
Jeremiah36:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah36:30 Tondũ ũcio
Jeremiah36:31 Nĩngũkũherithia we mwene
Jeremiah36:32 Kwoguo ngĩkĩoya ibuku rĩngĩ rĩa gĩkũnjo ngĩrĩnengera Baruku karani wakwa
Jeremiah37:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:2 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:3 Mũthamaki Zedekia agĩtũma Jehukali mũrũ wa Shelemia
Jeremiah37:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo-rĩ
Jeremiah37:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:6 Hĩndĩ ĩyo MWATHANI Ngai wa Isiraeli
Jeremiah37:7 njĩĩre Zedekia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:8 Ababilonia nao nĩmekũhũndũka
Jeremiah37:9 Niĩ MWATHANI
Jeremiah37:10 O na mũngĩhoota mbũtũ ciothe cia ita cia Ababilonia
Jeremiah37:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:12 ngĩkiuma kũu Jerusalemu nĩguo thiĩ bũrũri wa Benjamini nĩguo ngegwatĩre igai rĩakwa thĩinĩ wa indo cia mũciĩ witũ.
Jeremiah37:13 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:14 Na niĩ ngĩcookia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:15 Nao atongoria acio makĩndaakarĩra mũno
Jeremiah37:16 Ngĩkĩigwo kanyũmbainĩ kaarĩ thĩ wa nyũmba ĩyo
Jeremiah37:17 Thuutha ũcio mũthamaki Zedekia akĩndũmanĩra
Jeremiah37:18 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩũria mũthamaki Zedekia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:19 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah37:20 Rĩu
Jeremiah37:21 Kwoguo mũthamaki Zedekia agĩathana hingĩrwo kũrĩa arangĩri maikaraga. Na niĩ ngĩgĩikara kuo
Jeremiah38:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:2 MWATHANI oigĩĩte atĩ mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũgũikara kũu itũũrainĩ arĩkuĩra mbaarainĩ
Jeremiah38:3 O na ningĩ nĩndeeraga andũ atĩ MWATHANI oigĩĩte atĩ nĩekũneana itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu mookoinĩ ma mbũtũ cia ita cia mũthamaki wa Babilonia
Jeremiah38:4 Nao atongoria acio magĩthiĩ kwĩ mũthamaki makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:5 Naake mũthamaki Zedekia agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:6 Kwoguo makĩnjoya
Jeremiah38:7 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:8 Kwoguo Ebedimeleku agĩgĩthiĩ ho
Jeremiah38:9 “Mwathi wakwa mũthamaki
Jeremiah38:10 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki agĩatha Ebedimeleku ooe arũme atatũ mooke manguucie kuuma kũu irimainĩ itanakua.
Jeremiah38:11 Kwoguo Ebedimeleku akĩoya arũme atatũ
Jeremiah38:12 Akĩnjĩĩra njĩkĩre ndangari icio njegeekeinĩ ciakwa
Jeremiah38:13 nao makĩnguucia kuuma kũu irimainĩ. Thuutha ũcio ngĩigwo kũrĩa arangĩri maikaraga.
Jeremiah38:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:15 Na niĩ ngĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Zedekia akĩĩheeherera akĩhĩtaga akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:17 Na niĩ ngĩĩra Zedekia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:18 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:19 Naake mũthamaki Zedekia akĩnjookeria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:20 Na niĩ ngĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:21 Tondũ rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:22 Kĩonekiinĩ kĩu anyoneetie atumia oothe arĩa matigĩĩtwo nyũmbainĩ yaku ya ũthamaki makĩrutwo na nja matwarĩrwo anene a thigari cia mũthamaki wa Babilonia. Atumia acio marathiĩ makiugaga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:23 Ngĩcooka ngĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:24 Naake Zedekia akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:25 Atongoria mangĩigua atĩ nĩnjarĩĩtie nawe
Jeremiah38:26 meere atĩ nĩgũũthaitha ũgũũthaithaga ndikaae gũgũcookia kandurumu ũgakuĩre kuo.”
Jeremiah38:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah38:28 Na niĩ ngĩigwo kũrĩa arangĩri maikaraga o nginya rĩrĩa itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩanyiitirwo.
Jeremiah39:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah39:2 Mũthenya wa kenda wa mweri wa ĩna wa mwaka wa ikũmi na ũmwe wa ũthamaki wa Zedekia
Jeremiah39:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah39:4 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũthamaki Zedekia na thigari ciake ciothe maamoonire
Jeremiah39:5 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah39:6 Mũthamaki Nebukadinezaru agĩkĩũragithia aariũ a Zedekia o kũu Ribila ithe wao akĩonaga
Jeremiah39:7 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo agĩkũũrithia Zedekia maitho na akĩmuoha na bĩngũ nĩguo atwarwo Babilonia.
Jeremiah39:8 Nao Ababilonia magĩcina nyũmba ya mũthamaki
Jeremiah39:9 Naake Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah39:10 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah39:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah39:12 “Thiĩ ũgacarie Jeremia
Jeremiah39:13 Tondũ ũcio
Jeremiah39:14 makiuga ndutwo kũu kwa arangĩri. Makĩĩneana kũrĩ Gedalia
Jeremiah39:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah39:16 “Thiĩ
Jeremiah39:17 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah39:18 Nĩndĩrĩkũmenyerera
Jeremiah40:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah40:2 Naake mũnene ũcio wa arangĩri akĩndwara handũ keeheriinĩ
Jeremiah40:3 na ũguo noguo rĩu ahingĩĩtie. Eekĩĩte ũguo
Jeremiah40:4 Rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah40:5 Rĩrĩa ndaagire gũcookia-rĩ
Jeremiah40:6 Na niĩ ngĩthiĩ Mizipa ngĩtũũrania na Gedalia na andũ arĩa maatigarĩĩte bũrũriinĩ.
Jeremiah40:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah40:8 Kwoguo anene acio magĩthiĩ na thigari ciao Mizipa kuona Gedalia. Anene acio maarĩ Ishumaeli mũrũ wa Nethania
Jeremiah40:9 Naake Gedalia akĩmaarĩria ciugo cia kũmoomĩrĩria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Jeremiah40:10 Niĩ-rĩ
Jeremiah40:11 Aisiraeli oothe arĩa maarĩ Moabi
Jeremiah40:12 Nao Aisiraeli acio oothe magĩkiuma kũndũ kũrĩa maahurunjũkĩire
Jeremiah40:13 Thuutha ũcio-rĩ
Jeremiah40:14 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah40:15 Johanani agĩcooka akĩĩra Gedalia na hitho atĩrĩ
Jeremiah40:16 No Gedalia agĩcookeria Johanani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:2 Ishumaeli na andũ arĩa ikũmi maarĩ hamwe naake magĩcomora hiũ ciao cia njora
Jeremiah41:3 Ningĩ Ishumaeli nĩoragire Aisiraeli oothe arĩa maarĩ na Gedalia kũu Mizipa na akĩũraga thigari cia Ababilonia iria ciakorereirwo kuo.
Jeremiah41:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:5 arũme mĩrongo ĩnaana meenjeete nderu ciao
Jeremiah41:6 Naake Ishumaeli agĩkiumagara Mizipa akĩrĩraga agĩthiĩ kũmatũnga. Rĩrĩa aacemanirie nao
Jeremiah41:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:8 No arũme ikũmi gatagatĩinĩ ka acio mĩrongo ĩnaana makĩĩra Ishumaeli atĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:9 Irima rĩrĩa Ishumaeli aikirie ciimba cia andũ acio oothe ooragire nĩ irima rĩrĩa rĩarĩ inene rĩrĩa mũthamaki Asa eenjithĩĩtie hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Baasha
Jeremiah41:10 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Jeremiah41:11 Naake Johanani
Jeremiah41:12 Kwoguo magĩkĩoya thigari ciao ciothe
Jeremiah41:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:14 Andũ acio oothe magĩkĩhũndũka
Jeremiah41:15 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah41:16 Naake Johanani na atongoria a mbũtũ cia ita arĩa maarĩ hamwe naake makĩoya andũ arĩa makuuĩĩtwo marĩ mĩgwate kuuma Mizipa nĩ Ishumaeli arĩĩkia kũũraga Gedalia. Thĩinĩ wa andũ acio haarĩ na thigari
Jeremiah41:17 (17-18) Nao oothe magĩkĩnyiitwo nĩ guoya nĩ ũndũ wa Ababilonia tondũ Ishumaeli nĩoragĩĩte Gedalia
Jeremiah42:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo anene oothe a mbũtũ cia ita
Jeremiah42:2 makĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah42:3 Hooya MWATHANI Ngai witũ nĩguo atuonie njĩra ĩrĩa tũkũgerera na ũrĩa tũgwĩka.”
Jeremiah42:4 Na niĩ ngĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Jeremiah42:5 Nao makĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Jeremiah42:6 O na ũndũ ũcio wakorwo wĩ mwega kana wĩ mũũru-rĩ
Jeremiah42:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah42:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngĩgĩĩta Johanani
Jeremiah42:9 Mooka ngĩmeera atĩrĩ
Jeremiah42:10 ‘Angĩkorwo nĩmũgwĩtĩkĩra gũthiĩ na mbere gũtũũra bũrũriinĩ ũyũ-rĩ
Jeremiah42:11 Mũtigeetigĩre mũthamaki wa Babilonia; ndĩ hamwe na inyuĩ
Jeremiah42:12 Tondũ niĩ ndĩ tha-rĩ
Jeremiah42:13 (13-15) “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah42:14 mbaara ĩrĩa mũretigĩra ĩkũmũkora o kuo
Jeremiah42:15 Arĩa oothe matuĩte gũthiĩ Misiri magatũũre kuo makooragĩrwo mbaarainĩ
Jeremiah42:16 “MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe
Jeremiah42:17 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah42:18 atĩ nĩmũkũhĩtia mũno. Tondũ rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah42:19 Ũũmũũthĩ-rĩ
Jeremiah42:20 Kwoguo
Jeremiah43:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah43:2 Azaria mũrũ wa Hoshaia
Jeremiah43:3 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah43:4 Kwoguo Johanani
Jeremiah43:5 Hĩndĩ ĩyo
Jeremiah43:6 Andũ acio maarĩ arũme
Jeremiah43:7 Nao magĩgĩthiĩ Misiri
Jeremiah43:8 Twĩ kũu itũũrainĩ rĩu
Jeremiah43:9 “Oya mahiga manene ũmathike mũtukanioinĩ mũigũ wa thimiti na mũthanga njĩrainĩ ya mahiga ĩrĩa ĩrĩ itoonyeroinĩ rĩa nyũmba ya mũthamaki wa Misiri gũũkũ itũũrainĩ
Jeremiah43:10 Ũcooke ũmeere atĩrĩ
Jeremiah43:11 Arĩũka atharĩkĩre bũrũri ũyũ wa Misiri
Jeremiah43:12 “Nĩndĩrĩcina hekaarũ cia ngai cia Misiri
Jeremiah43:13 O na ningĩ nĩarĩananga mĩnaara ya mahiga ĩrĩa mĩamũre ĩrĩa ĩrĩ Heliopoli
Jeremiah44:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah44:2 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe
Jeremiah44:3 tondũ atũũri aamo nĩmeekire maũndũ mooru
Jeremiah44:4 O na mũgĩĩkaga ũguo-rĩ
Jeremiah44:5 No inyuĩ-rĩ
Jeremiah44:6 Kwoguo ngĩgĩitĩrĩria matũũra ma Juda o na njĩrainĩ cia Jerusalemu maraakara na mang'ũrĩ maakwa
Jeremiah44:7 “Rĩu-rĩ
Jeremiah44:8 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩratũma mũndaakarie na ũndũ wa gũthaathaiya mĩhianano
Jeremiah44:9 Kaĩ mũriganĩirwo nĩ maũndũ moothe mooru marĩa meekirwo matũũrainĩ ma Juda
Jeremiah44:10 Nginyagia ũũmũũthĩ ũyũ mũtirĩ mwahera; mũtirĩ mwahe gĩtĩĩo
Jeremiah44:11 “Tondũ ũcio
Jeremiah44:12 Ngũtigĩrĩra ndoona atĩ andũ oothe a Juda arĩa matigarĩĩte
Jeremiah44:13 Ngũherithia andũ arĩa marĩ gũũkũ bũrũriinĩ wa Misiri
Jeremiah44:14 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa andũ a Juda arĩa matigarĩĩte
Jeremiah44:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arũme oothe arĩa mooĩ atĩ atumia aao nĩmaarutagĩra ngai ingĩ magongoona
Jeremiah44:16 “Ithuĩ-rĩ
Jeremiah44:17 Tũgwĩka ũrĩa wothe tuugĩĩte nĩtũgwĩka. Tũgũthiĩ o na mbere gũcinĩra ngai iitũ ĩrĩa ĩĩtagwo Kwini wa Igũrũ
Jeremiah44:18 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah44:19 Nao atumia makiuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah44:20 Na niĩ ngĩĩra arũme na atumia oothe arĩa maanjookeirie ũguo atĩrĩ
Jeremiah44:21 “Ti itherũ MWATHANI nĩamenyire
Jeremiah44:22 Ũũmũũthĩ ũyũ-rĩ
Jeremiah44:23 Mũkorereirwo nĩ mũthiro ũyũ mũrĩ naguo mahindainĩ maya tondũ nĩmwarutĩire ngai ingĩ magongoona
Jeremiah44:24 Ngĩthiĩ na mbere
Jeremiah44:25 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe
Jeremiah44:26 No tathikĩrĩriai
Jeremiah44:27 Ngũmwĩka ũũru
Jeremiah44:28 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah44:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah44:30 Nĩngũneana Hofura
Jeremiah45:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah45:2 MWATHANI
Jeremiah45:3 “Wee ũroiga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah45:4 “No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah45:5 Wee-rĩ
Jeremiah46:1 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah46:2 aambĩrĩirie na andũ a Misiri. Ũũ nĩguo MWATHANI oigire ũhoroinĩ wa mbũtũ cia ita cia Neko
Jeremiah46:3 “Thagathagaai ngo cianyu
Jeremiah46:4 Tandĩkaai mbarathi cianyu na mũcihaice! Mwĩbangeei wega na mwĩkĩre ngobia cianyu cia kũgitĩra mũtwe! Noraai matimũ maanyu. Mwĩhumbeei nguo cianyu cia gĩcango!”
Jeremiah46:5 “Hĩ! Kaarĩ atĩa ndĩrona? Nĩgũcooka maracooka na thuutha makĩinainaga nĩ guoya!Thigari ciao nĩhoote o biũ; nĩkũũra iroora na ihenya itekwĩhũgũra nĩ ũrĩa ihĩkĩĩtwo nĩ guoya na mĩena yothe!Ũguo nĩguo niĩ
Jeremiah46:6 Arĩa marĩ ihenya mũno matirahota kũũra
Jeremiah46:7 Nũũ ũyũ ũreyambararia ta rũũĩ rwa Nailo
Jeremiah46:8 Bũrũri wa Misiri nĩguo wĩyambararĩĩtie ta rũũĩ rwa Nailo
Jeremiah46:9 Umagaraai
Jeremiah46:10 Ũũmũũthĩ-rĩ
Jeremiah46:11 Andũ aya a Misiri
Jeremiah46:12 Ndũũrĩrĩ nĩciiguĩte ũrĩa mũconoreetwo
Jeremiah46:13 Ũyũ nĩguo ũhoro ũrĩa MWATHANI aaheire ũkoniĩ gũũka kwa Nebukadinezaru
Jeremiah46:14 “Anĩrĩra matũũrainĩ ma Misiri; anĩrĩra wĩre matũũra ma Migidoli
Jeremiah46:15 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah46:16 Thigari cianyu nĩihĩngĩĩtwo ikaharagana;ireerana mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ atĩrĩ
Jeremiah46:17 “Heei mũthamaki wa Misiri rĩĩtwa rĩa
Jeremiah46:18 Niĩ
Jeremiah46:19 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah46:20 Bũrũri wa Misiri ũhaana ta moori njega mũno
Jeremiah46:21 Thigari cia gũkomborwo cia Misiri ihaana njaũ cia gĩceegũ. O nacio nĩihũndũkĩĩte ikoora irĩ hamwe; itiigana kwĩhanda irũe
Jeremiah46:22 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah46:23 kana ta andũ marananga mĩtitũ.Thigari ciacio nĩ nyingĩ mũno mũno; cingĩhĩĩte gũkĩra ngigĩ.
Jeremiah46:24 Andũ a Misiri nĩmarĩconorithio; marĩhootwo nĩ andũ moimĩĩte mwena wa na rũgongo.Niĩ MWATHANI
Jeremiah46:25 MWATHANI Mwene Hinya Wothe
Jeremiah46:26 ndĩmaneane mookoinĩ ma arĩa marenda kũmooraga
Jeremiah46:27 “No inyuĩ

Jeremiah48:1 MWATHANI Mwene hinya Wothe
Jeremiah48:2 riiri wa Moabi nĩ mũthiru.Thũ nĩinyiitĩĩte itũũra rĩa Heshiboni
Jeremiah48:3 Taiguai! Mbu ĩroima itũũrainĩ rĩa Horonaimu! ‘Tũrĩ gũthira! Nĩtwanangwo o biũ!’
Jeremiah48:4 “Bũrũri wa Moabi nĩmwanange; andũ aakuo no kũrĩra mararĩra moigĩrĩirie.
Jeremiah48:5 Taiguai ũrĩa mararĩra makiumagwo nĩ ngoro makĩambata mwambato wa Luhithu; na ũrĩa maragirĩka magĩikũrũka mũikũrũko wa Horonaimu.
Jeremiah48:6 Maroiga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah48:7 “Bũrũri wa Moabi
Jeremiah48:8 Hatirĩ itũũra o na rĩmwe rĩtekwanangwo; ituamba ciothe nĩikũniinwo na werũ wothe wanangwo.Niĩ MWATHANI
Jeremiah48:9 Enjeraai bũrũri wa Moabi mbĩĩrĩra tondũ no nginya wanangwo.Matũũra maaguo megũtigwo makirĩĩte ihooru matarĩ na wa kũmatũũra.”
Jeremiah48:10 (Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtekwĩrutanĩria akĩruta wĩra wa MWATHANI arogwatwo nĩ kĩrumi! O naake mũndũ ũrĩa ũtekũũragana na rũhiũ rwake rwa njora arogwatwo nĩ kĩrumi!)
Jeremiah48:11 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ
Jeremiah48:12 “No rĩĩrĩ

Jeremiah48:14 “Andũ aya a Moabi

Jeremiah48:16 Bũrũri wa Moabi ũkirie kũgwatwo nĩ mũtino; ũtigairie o haniini kwanangwo.
Jeremiah48:17 “Ũcakaĩreei
Jeremiah48:18 Atĩrĩĩrĩ

Jeremiah48:39 Ĩ bũrũri wa Moabi ndwanangĩĩtwo! Ĩ Amoabi matirarĩra na ruwo rũingĩ! Bũrũri wa Moabi nĩũconorithĩĩtio

Jeremiah51:15 MWATHANI nĩ we wombire thĩ na hinya wake; nĩ we wathondekire thĩ na ũũgĩ wake na agĩtambũrũkia matu mairũ na ũmenyo wake.
Jeremiah51:16 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa agũũthũka-rĩ
Jeremiah51:17 Andũ oothe moona ũguo makariita na magaturuura; arĩa nao mathondekaga mĩhianano makaigua maconokeete tondũ ngai iria mathondekaga ti cia ma na itirĩ muoyo.
Jeremiah51:18 Ngai icio ciao nĩ cia tũhũ
Jeremiah51:19 Ngai wa Jakubu ndahaana ta cio; nĩ we wombire indo ciothe
Jeremiah51:20 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ

Jeremiah51:22 nĩ we hũthagĩra kũhehenja arũme na atumia
Jeremiah51:23 nĩ we hũthagĩra kũhehenja arĩithi na mahiũ maao

Jeremiah51:27 “Heanaai kĩmenyithia bũrũri wa Babilonia wambĩrĩrie gũtharĩkĩrwo! Huuhaai tũrumbeeta nĩguo ndũũrĩrĩ ciigue! Cithagathageei nĩguo ciũtharĩkĩre!Ĩtaai moothamaki ma Ararati

Jeremiah51:32 Mariũko nĩmanyiite

Jeremiah51:35 Andũ a Zayuni nĩmoige atĩrĩ

Jeremiah51:37 Bũrũri wa Babilonia ũgũtuĩka o maganjo marĩa marĩtũũragwo nĩ mbwe; ũgũtuĩka kũndũ gwa kũguoyohia gũtarĩ na andũ maragũtũũra.Arĩa oothe marĩwonaga mariugaga hĩ hĩ hĩ hĩ-ĩ! nĩ ũrĩa mamakĩĩte.
Jeremiah51:38 Atĩrĩĩrĩ

Jeremiah51:40 Ngũmatwara magathĩnjwo ta ng'ondu
Jeremiah51:41 MWATHANI ekuuga atĩrĩ ũhoroinĩ wa itũũra rĩa Babiloni
Jeremiah51:42 Itũũra rĩa Babiloni nĩrĩhubĩkanie nĩ iria
Jeremiah51:43 Tũtũũra twarĩo tũtuĩkĩĩte o kũndũ gwa kũguoyohia

Jeremiah51:45 Andũ aakwa a Isiraeli
Jeremiah51:46 Atĩrĩĩrĩ

Jeremiah51:48 Indo ciothe iria irĩ thĩ na igũrũ nĩiriugĩrĩria nĩgũkena
Jeremiah51:49 Atĩrĩĩrĩ

Jeremiah51:57 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:58 Niĩ
Jeremiah51:59 Ũũ nĩguo niĩ Jeremia
Jeremiah51:60 Na niĩ ngĩandĩka ibukuinĩ maũndũ moothe ma mwanangĩko ũrĩa bũrũri wa Babilonia werekeire gũtũngana naguo
Jeremiah51:61 Ngĩcooka ngĩĩra Seraia atĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:62 Ũcooke uhooe atĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:63 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah51:64 Ũcooke uuge atĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:2 Naake mũthamaki Zedekia agĩgĩĩka maũndũ maingĩ mooru marĩa mataakenagia MWATHANI
Jeremiah52:3 Naake MWATHANI akĩraakario mũno nĩ andũ a Jerusalemu na a Juda
Jeremiah52:4 Na kwoguo
Jeremiah52:5 Itũũra rĩu rĩgĩgĩtũũra rĩthiũrũrũkĩirio ũguo o nginya mwaka wa ikũmi na ũmwe wa ũthamaki wa Zedekia.
Jeremiah52:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:7 Hĩndĩ ĩyo rũthingo rwa itũũra rũgĩtũrĩkio mwanya wa gũtoonyerwo
Jeremiah52:8 No rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:9 Nacio mbũtũ icio cia ita cia Ababilonia ikĩnyiita mũthamaki Zedekia
Jeremiah52:10 Agĩcooka akĩũragithia aariũ a Zedekia o kũu Ribila ithe wao akĩonaga
Jeremiah52:11 Arĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Jeremiah52:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:13 Naake agĩcina Hekaarũ
Jeremiah52:14 Nacio thigari ciake ikĩmomoranga thingo ciothe cia itũũra rĩu.
Jeremiah52:15 Naake Nebuzaradani agĩtaha andũ oothe arĩa maatigarĩĩte kũu itũũrainĩ
Jeremiah52:16 Andũ arĩa maatigirwo kũu bũrũriinĩ wa Juda nĩ Nebuzaradani no arĩa maarĩ athĩĩni mũno na mataarĩ na kĩndũ. Acio akĩmatua a gũceehaga mĩthabibũ na a kũrĩmaga mĩgũnda.
Jeremiah52:17 Nao Ababilonia makiunanga itugĩ cia gĩcango
Jeremiah52:18 Ningĩ makĩoya nyũngũ
Jeremiah52:19 Ningĩ magĩkuua indo ciothe iria ciathondekeetwo na thahabu kana betha
Jeremiah52:20 Nakĩo gĩcango kĩrĩa Solomoni aatũmĩrĩĩte gwaka itugĩ iria igĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:21 (21-22) Itugĩ icio cierĩ ciakĩĩtwo na mwakĩre o ro ũmwe; o kĩmwe gĩakoragwo na kĩrũũgamo kĩa mita inyaanya na gũthiũrũrũkĩria mita ithaano na boiniti ithatũ. O na ningĩ o gĩtugĩ nĩkĩarĩ na irima gatagatĩ
Jeremiah52:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:23 Ningĩ Nebuzaradani
Jeremiah52:24 Nakuo itũũrainĩ akĩnyiita mũnene wa thigari
Jeremiah52:25 Naake Nebuzaradani akĩmatwara kũrĩ mũthamaki wa Babilonia ũrĩa warĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Ribila.
Jeremiah52:26 Naake mũthamaki akĩmahũũra na akĩmooragĩra o kũu Ribila
Jeremiah52:27 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:28 mwakainĩ wa ikũmi na ĩnaana wa ũthamaki wake
Jeremiah52:29 naguo mwakainĩ wa mĩrongo ĩĩrĩ na ĩtatũ wa ũthamaki wake
Jeremiah52:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
Jeremiah52:31 Naake Evilimerodaku akĩmwĩka wega na akĩmũtũũgĩria gũkĩra athamaki arĩa angĩ marĩ ithaamĩrio hamwe naake kũu Babilonia.
Jeremiah52:32 Naake Jehoiakini agĩkĩruta nguo ciake cia njeera
Jeremiah52:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
Lamentations1:1 Kaĩ Jerusalemu itũũra rĩraiyũire andũ
Lamentations1:2 Ũtukũ wothe no kũrĩra rĩrarĩra
Lamentations1:3 Andũ a Juda nĩ ngombo itangĩĩteithia
Lamentations1:4 Gũtirĩ andũ marooka Hekaarũinĩ gũthaathaiya Ngai mĩthenya ya thigũkũ.Airĩĩtu arĩa mainaga kuo manyariirĩĩtwo magathira
Lamentations1:5 Thũ cia Jerusalemu nĩcio ituĩkĩĩte anene na ikagaacĩra kuo; MWATHANI nĩarĩherithĩĩtie nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa mahĩtia maarĩo maingĩhĩĩte. Ciana ciarĩo itahĩĩtwo na igathiio nacio.
Lamentations1:6 Riiri wothe wa Jerusalemu nĩũthengeetio. Anene aakuo matuĩkĩĩte o ta thwariga ĩhinyarĩĩte nĩ ng'aragu. Maramateng'erio
Lamentations1:7 Mahinda ma mathĩĩna na mũũro
Lamentations1:8 Jerusalemu nĩrĩhĩĩtie mũno
Lamentations1:9 Gĩko kĩarĩo kĩronekana o wega
Lamentations1:10 Thũ ciarĩo iratambũrũkĩĩtie mooko irenyiitĩra mũthiithũ warĩo wothe.Nĩrĩronire ndũũrĩrĩ ng'eni igĩtharĩkĩra Hekaarũ
Lamentations1:11 Andũ oothe a Jerusalemu maracakaya magĩcaria gĩa kũrĩa.Maracenjania mũthiithũ wao na irio o geetha metũũrie muoyo.Itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu rĩroiga atĩrĩ “MWATHANI

Lamentations2:1 Hĩ! MWATHANI araakarĩĩte akahumbĩra Zayuni na nduma!Riiri wa Isiraeli aũrutĩĩte kuuma o igũrũ akaũgũithia thĩ.Mũthenya ũrĩa aaraakarĩĩte nĩatiganĩirie gaturwa gaake.
Lamentations2:2 MWATHANI nĩanangĩĩte matũũra moothe ma Juda atarĩ na tha o na haniini. Ningĩ nĩamomoranĩĩtie nyũmba cia kwĩgitĩra cia Juda arĩ na marũrũ maingĩ.Nĩaconorithĩĩtie ũthamaki na anene aaguo.
Lamentations2:3 Arĩ na marũrũ maingĩ
Lamentations2:4 Aatwerekeirie mĩguĩ yake ta arĩ thũ akĩũraga arĩa oothe twerahaga nao.Nĩtũkinyĩrĩirwo nĩ maraakara maake mararĩrĩmbũka ta mwaki gũũkũ Jerusalemu.
Lamentations2:5 MWATHANI atuĩkĩĩte o ta arĩ thũ akaananga Isiraeli; nĩamomorangĩĩte nyũmba ciakuo ciothe cia ũthamaki o na cia kwĩgitĩra. Andũ a Juda nĩkũmaingĩhĩria amaingĩhĩirie gũcakaya na kĩrĩro.
Lamentations2:6 MWATHANI nĩaharaganĩĩtie Hekaarũ ĩrĩa tũmũthaathayagĩria
Lamentations2:7 MWATHANI nĩaregeete kĩgongoona gĩake na agatiganĩria Hekaarũ yake. Nĩetĩkĩrĩĩtie thũ imomoranie thingo ciayo
Lamentations2:8 MWATHANI nĩabangĩĩte atĩ thingo cia Zayuni nĩikaamomorwo
Lamentations2:9 Ihingo ciakuo nĩihorokeire na thĩ na cuuma ciacio ikoinangwo. Mũthamaki na anene aakuo nĩathaamie.Watho nĩũtigĩĩte kũrutanwo
Lamentations2:10 Athuuri a itũũra rĩa Zayuni maikarĩĩte thĩ methikĩire
Lamentations2:11 Maitho maakwa nĩmanogeetio nĩkũrĩra
Lamentations2:12 Irarĩrĩra maanyina ikĩmooragia gĩa kũrĩa na gĩa kũnyua.Iraringĩkĩra kũu njĩrainĩ cia itũũra o ta andũ atiihangie. Irakua o kahora irĩ o mookoinĩ ma maanyina.
Lamentations2:13 Jerusalemu
Lamentations2:14 Anabii aaku maakuoneire o cioneki cia maheeni na cia tũhũ. Matiakũmenyithirie mahĩtia maaku nĩguo ũhere ndũgaatwarwo ithaamĩrĩoinĩ. Maakũheete o ndũmĩrĩri cia maheeni na cia gũkũhĩtithia.
Lamentations2:15 Andũ oothe arĩa marahĩtũkĩra hakuhĩ nawe
Lamentations2:16 Thũ ciaku ciothe nĩgwathamia igwathamĩirie kanua
Lamentations2:17 MWATHANI nĩahingĩĩtie ũndũ ũrĩa aabangĩĩte nĩagwĩka Atwanangĩĩte atarĩ na tha o ta ũrĩa oigĩĩte o tene.Nĩaheete thũ ciitũ ũhootani

Lamentations3:1 Ngai anyoneetie mathĩĩna na rũthanju rwa maraakara maake.
Lamentations3:2 Anyingatithĩĩtie ngathiĩ ndumainĩ ndumanu.

Lamentations3:7 Athiũrũrũkĩirie na thingo na akanjoha na bĩngũ ndikoore.

Lamentations3:35 Ndakenaga kuona mũndũ akĩimwo ihooto ciake.
Lamentations3:36 Ndakenaga kuona mũndũ agĩtuĩrwo nĩ igooti gũtarũmĩrĩirwo waragania.
Lamentations3:37 Nũũ ũngĩhota gwathana na ũndũ ũhinge
Lamentations3:38 Githĩ maũũru na mawega moothe maatiũkaga o rĩrĩa Ũrĩa Ũrĩ Igũrũ oiga?
Lamentations3:39 Mũndũ arĩ muoyo akĩherithio nĩ ũndũ wa meehia maake-rĩ

Lamentations5:5 Arĩa maratũthĩĩnia matũikarĩire o ciande; tũrĩ anogu na matiratũhe ũhuurũko.
Lamentations5:6 Nĩtũtumĩĩte ndũgũ na Misiri na Asiria
Lamentations5:7 Maithe maitũ nĩmeehirie
Lamentations5:8 Tũrathwo nĩ ngombo

Lamentations5:21 MWATHANI
Lamentations5:22 Tiga no ũkorirwo ũtũregeete tene na tene na ũgatũraakarĩra hatarĩ na gĩthimi.
Ezekiel1:1 Kwarĩ mũthenya wa gataano wa mweri wa kana mwakainĩ wa mĩrongo ĩtatũ
Ezekiel1:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel1:3 Niĩ
Ezekiel1:4 Ngĩcooka ngĩcũũthĩrĩria ngĩona kĩhuuhũkanio kĩhuuhũkanagia kiumĩĩte na mwena wa na rũgongo. Na itu inene rĩathiũrũrũkĩirio nĩ ũtheri mũnene na mwaki warĩrĩmbũkaga uumĩĩte ituinĩ na ũtheri mũnene wamenamenũkaga mĩena yothe. Gatagatĩ kaarĩo kwarĩ ta kwa rangi wa gĩcango gĩkumuthĩĩtwo gĩgathera.
Ezekiel1:5 Ningĩ o kũu gatagatĩ gũkĩonekana mũhianĩre wa ciũmbe inya irĩ muoyo. Na ũũ nĩguo ciahaanaga: maũũthĩ maacio maahaanaga ta ma mũndũ; no rĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel1:6 o kĩũmbe kĩarĩ na moothiũ mana na mathagu mana;
Ezekiel1:7 magũrũ maacio matieyunaga na maarĩ na mahũngũ magaũkanĩĩte ta ma gacaũ ka ng'ombe na maahenagia o ta gĩcango gĩkumuthĩĩtwo gĩgathera mũno.
Ezekiel1:8 Hamwe na kũgĩa na moothiũ mana
Ezekiel1:9 Mathagu meerĩ ma o kĩũmbe matambarũkĩĩtio nĩmaahuutanagia na ma kĩũmbe kĩrĩa kĩngĩ. Igĩthiĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel1:10 Mathiithi maacio maahaanaga ta ũũ: mwena wa na mbere
Ezekiel1:11 Ũguo nĩguo ithiithi ciacio ciahaanaga. Mathagu meerĩ ma o kĩũmbe
Ezekiel1:12 Na tondũ o kĩũmbe kĩarĩ na moothiũ maroreete mĩena ĩrĩa ĩna
Ezekiel1:13 Ningĩ gatagatĩ ga ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo haarĩ na kĩndũ kĩahaanaga ta mwaki wa makara megwakana kana ta kĩmũrĩ kĩa mwaki. Mwaki ũcio waikaraga ũgĩthiũrũrũkaga ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo. Warĩ mwaki warĩrĩmbũkaga mũno na nĩwaikagia thandĩ ikũmenamenũka o ta rũheni.
Ezekiel1:14 Ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo ciathiaga na mbere igĩcookaga na thuutha o ta rũheni.
Ezekiel1:15 Ngĩcooka ngĩrora ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo
Ezekiel1:16 Magũrũ macio o na mũthondekere wamo maahenagia o ta mahiga ma goro
Ezekiel1:17 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩmaahotaga gũthiĩ na mĩena yothe ĩna matekũgatwo.
Ezekiel1:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel1:19 Ningĩ ngĩona atĩ rĩrĩa ciũmbe icio irĩ muoyo ciathiĩ
Ezekiel1:20 Ciũmbe icio ciathiaga o kũrĩa guothe ciendaga gũthiĩ
Ezekiel1:21 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio rĩrĩa ciũmbe icio ciagwata gũthiĩ
Ezekiel1:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel1:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel1:24 Rĩrĩa ciũmbe icio ciombũka
Ezekiel1:25 No o na ciomba na ciakũnja mathagu maacio
Ezekiel1:26 Igũrũ rĩa kĩndũ kĩu kĩahaanaga ta mũtambũrũko wa matu mairũ ũrĩa warĩ igũrũ rĩa mĩtwe yacio
Ezekiel1:27 Kĩũmbe kĩu kuuma njohero gũthiĩ na igũrũ gĩatuunĩhĩĩte o ta gĩcango kĩrĩ thĩinĩ wa mwaki
Ezekiel1:28 na kiarĩ na marangi moothe o ta ũrĩa mũkũngambura ũhenagia hĩndĩ ya mbura. Ũcio nĩguo ũtheri ũkũhenia ũrĩa wonanagia riiri wa MWATHANI.

Ezekiel2:3 akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel2:4 Nĩ andũ moomĩĩtie mĩtwe na ngoro ciao
Ezekiel2:5 Na tondũ nĩ andũ aremi
Ezekiel2:6 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ

Ezekiel2:8 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel2:9 Thuutha ũcio ngĩona ndambarũkĩirio guoko kũnyiitĩĩte ibuku rĩa gĩkũnjo rĩrĩ rĩandĩke.
Ezekiel2:10 Agĩcooka akĩrĩkũnjũra mbere yakwa
Ezekiel3:1 Ningĩ agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ

Ezekiel3:3 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel3:4 Agĩcooka akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:5 Ndiragũtũma kũrĩ rũũrĩrĩ rwaragia rũthiomi rũgeni na rũritũ; ndĩragũtũma kũrĩ o andũ a Isiraeli.
Ezekiel3:6 Ndiragũtũma kũrĩ ndũũrĩrĩ iria ciaragia thiomi nditũ ũtooĩ. Korwo nĩcio ndĩragũtũma kũrĩ cio
Ezekiel3:7 No-rĩ
Ezekiel3:8 Nĩndĩromia kĩongo gĩaku na nĩngũũmia ngoro yaku nĩguo ũhote kũng'ethanĩra nao.
Ezekiel3:9 Nĩngũtũma ũũmie kĩongo gĩaku kũmakĩra. Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:10 Ningĩ akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:11 Ũkĩra ũthiĩ kũrĩ andũ aanyu arĩa maatahirwo ũmaarĩrie
Ezekiel3:12 Naake roho akĩnjoya na igũrũ
Ezekiel3:13 Naguo mũgambo ũcio ndaiguire
Ezekiel3:14 Roho agĩcooka akĩnjoya na igũrũ akĩndwara kũndũ kũraaya
Ezekiel3:15 Ngĩgĩkinya Teli Abibu kũrĩ andũ arĩa maatahĩĩtwo arĩa maatũũraga gũkuhĩ na rũũĩ rwa Kebari
Ezekiel3:16 Mĩthenya ĩyo mũgwanja yathira-rĩ
Ezekiel3:17 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel3:18 Ingĩĩra mũndũ mwĩhia
Ezekiel3:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:20 Mũndũ mũthingu angĩtigana na ũthingu wake
Ezekiel3:21 Na mwena ũrĩa ũngĩ ũngĩkaania mũndũ mũthingu nĩ geetha ndakeehie
Ezekiel3:22 Ningĩ ngĩiyũrwo nĩ hinya wa MWATHANI
Ezekiel3:23 Ngĩgĩũkĩra ngĩthiĩ gĩtuambainĩ kĩu kĩaraganu
Ezekiel3:24 No Roho agĩtoonya thĩinĩ wakwa akĩndũũgamia. Akĩnjarĩria akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel3:25 Mũrũ wa mũndũ

Ezekiel4:1 Ngai akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel4:2 Ũcooke wonanie ta rĩratharĩkĩrwo
Ezekiel4:3 Ningĩ woe kĩhengere gĩa cuuma ũkĩige kĩhaane ta rũthingo rwa cuuma rũrĩ gatagatĩ gaaku na itũũra rĩu. Ũcooke ũrĩng'ethere. Nĩ itũũra rĩũkĩrĩirwo na nĩ we ũrarĩũkĩrĩra. Ũndũ ũyũ ũgũtuĩka kĩmenyithia harĩ andũ a Isiraeli.
Ezekiel4:4 (4-5) “Ũcooke ũkome na mwena waku wa ũmotho na niĩ ngũigĩrĩre waganu wa andũ a Isiraeli. Ngũtuĩrĩire ũkome ũguo matukũ magana matatũ ma mĩrongo kenda (390) ũgĩthĩĩnĩka nĩ ũndũ wa waganu wao. Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel4:5 Warĩĩkia gwĩka ũguo
Ezekiel4:6 “Ũcooke wĩhũgũre wĩrorere Jerusalemu rĩgĩtharĩkĩrwo
Ezekiel4:7 Niĩ-rĩ
Ezekiel4:8 “Wĩyoere ngano
Ezekiel4:9 Mũthenya o mũthenya ũrĩrĩaga gĩthimi ta kĩa ngiramu magana meerĩ na mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ũrĩcirĩaga mahinda kwa mahinda.
Ezekiel4:10 Ningĩ nĩũrĩthimaga maaĩ marĩa ũrĩnyuaga ikombe igĩrĩ o mũthenya (namo ũmanyuage mahinda kwa mahinda).
Ezekiel4:11 Ũrĩrĩaga irio icio ikandĩĩtwo ta mĩgate ya mbaarĩ na ũgacikaranga na mwaki ũthondekeetwo na mai ma andũ

Ezekiel5:1 MWATHANI akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel5:2 Gĩkundi kĩmwe ũgĩcine na mwaki o kũu gatagatĩ ka itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu mũtharĩko wathira. Gĩkundi gĩa keerĩ ũkĩoe ũthiũrũrũke itũũra ũgĩgĩtinangagia na rũhiũ; nakĩo gĩkundi gĩa gatatũ ũkĩhurunje gĩthiĩ na rũhuuho
Ezekiel5:3 No rĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel5:4 Ningĩ kuuma gakundiinĩ kau woe imwe
Ezekiel5:5 MWATHANI Ngai agĩthiĩ na mbere kuuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel5:6 No nĩrĩregenyũkĩĩte rĩkaregana na mataaro maakwa. Rĩrĩ na ũtũrĩka mũingĩ gũkĩra ndũũrĩrĩ iria ingĩ na nĩrĩreganĩĩte na mawatho maakwa gũkĩra ũrĩa mabũrũri marĩa marĩrigiicĩirie maaneeka. Nĩrĩregeete mataaro maakwa o kũrega na rĩkaaga kũrũmĩrĩra mawatho maakwa.
Ezekiel5:7 Kwoguo niĩ MWATHANI Ngai nguuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel5:8 Niĩ na niĩ MWATHANI Ngai nĩngũkũgarũrũka na nĩngũhingia matua maakwa igũrũ rĩaku
Ezekiel5:9 Nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ ma thaahu marĩa waneeka
Ezekiel5:10 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Ezekiel5:11 “O ta ũrĩa ndũũraga muoyo-rĩ
Ezekiel5:12 Gĩcunjĩ kĩmwe gĩa ithatũ kĩanyu gĩgũkua nĩ mĩrimũ kana kĩũragwo nĩ ng'aragu. Gĩcunjĩ kĩngĩ gĩa ithatũ kĩũragĩrwo mbaarainĩ; nakĩo gĩcunjĩ kĩu kĩngĩ gĩa ithatũ ndĩkĩhurunje mĩena yothe
Ezekiel5:13 “Ngũmũitũrũrĩra marũrũ maakwa na ndĩmũkinyĩrie matũkũya maakwa o nginya ndĩrĩhĩrie njiganĩre. Ndamũitũrũrĩra maraakara maakwa nĩmũkũmenya atĩ niĩ MWATHANI njarĩĩtie ũguo tondũ ndiendaga kũigananio na ngai ĩngĩ nĩ inyuĩ.
Ezekiel5:14 Ngũmũtua kĩndũ kĩanangĩku na gĩa gũthekererwo nĩ ndũũrĩrĩ iria imũrigiicĩirie o na nĩ andũ arĩa oothe marĩhĩtũkagĩra gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu.
Ezekiel5:15 “Nĩngũhingia matua maakwa ma ciira igũrũ rĩanyu ndĩ na maraakara na marũrũ maingĩ. Ngũmũherithia na ihũũra inene
Ezekiel5:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩ rĩrĩa ndĩrekereria mĩguĩ mĩrũrũ ya ng'aragu na ya kũniinana ĩmũkorerere
Ezekiel5:17 Ndĩrĩmũtũmĩra ng'aragu na nyamũ cia gĩthaka imũtuunye ciana cianyu; mũthiro na haaro imwakĩrĩre kĩraaro na ndeke rũhiũ rwa njora rũmũomokere. Nĩ niĩ MWATHANI ndoiga ũguo.”
Ezekiel6:1 Ningĩ MWATHANI akĩnjarĩria akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Ezekiel6:2 “Mũrũ wa mũndũ
Ezekiel6:3 ũciĩre atĩrĩ
Ezekiel6:4 Igongoona ciacio igũtigwo ũtheri
Ezekiel6:5 Ngwaragania ciimba cia Aisiraeli o kũu mbere ya mĩhianano yao ya kũhooywo na hurunje mahĩndĩ maao gũthiũrũrũkĩria igongoona ciao.
Ezekiel6:6 Kũrĩa guothe matũũraga
Ezekiel6:7 Moona mathiũrũrũkĩirie ciimba nĩmekũmenya atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI.’ ”
Ezekiel6:8 “Nĩngũtigia andũ amwe aao matooragĩĩtwo na ndĩmanyaagie ndũũrĩrĩinĩ
Ezekiel6:9 matũũre kuo marĩ mĩgwate. Na nĩmakaandirikana ndamahũũra nĩ ũndũ wa kũũndiganĩria na ũtũrĩka
Ezekiel6:10 Nĩmakaamenya atĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI na atĩ ti gũthaaka ndathaakaga rĩrĩa ndoigire atĩ nĩngaamahũũra na ihũũra inene.”
Ezekiel6:11 MWATHANI Ngai ekuuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel6:12 Arĩa me kũraaya makooragwo nĩ mũrimũ
Ezekiel6:13 Inyuĩ na inyuĩ nĩmũkaamenya atĩ niĩ nĩ niĩ MWATHANI rĩrĩa ciimba cia andũ aao igaakorwo ciaraganĩĩte gũkuhĩ na mĩhianano ĩrĩa maahooyaga
Ezekiel6:14 Ngaamooroota na kaara na ndue kũrĩa guothe matũũraga bũrũriinĩ maganjo matheri

Ezekiel7:4 Ndikũmũiguĩra tha o na kana ndĩmũcaaĩre
Ezekiel7:5 MWATHANI Ngai ekuuga atĩrĩ
Ezekiel7:6 Mũthia nĩũrooka! Mũthia ũrooka ũmwerekeire! Oneei nĩmwathira.
Ezekiel7:7 Mũthiro nĩũrooka kũrĩ inyuĩ
Ezekiel7:8 “Ndigairie haniini ndĩmũitũrũrĩre marũrũ maakwa
Ezekiel7:9 Ndikũmũiguĩra tha kana ndĩmũcaaĩre. No ngũmũherithia kũringana na ũrĩa mĩthiĩre yanyu ĩtariĩ
Ezekiel7:10 Mũthenya ũcio nĩguo ũyũ! Nĩwakinya

Ezekiel7:12 “Ihinda nĩrĩrooka
Ezekiel7:13 Gũtirĩ mũhũũri wa mbiacara ũgũtũũra matukũ maingĩ nĩguo anyiihanyiihie hathara ĩrĩa athiĩte
Ezekiel7:14 Nĩmahuuhĩĩte karumbeeta na andũ oothe nĩmehaarĩirie
Ezekiel7:15 Ndĩroimagara na nja ngakora mbaara
Ezekiel7:16 Arĩa nao megũtigara
Ezekiel7:17 Mooko moothe nĩmekwaga hinya
Ezekiel7:18 Mekwĩhumba nguo cia makũnia na maiyũrwo nĩ guoya
Ezekiel7:19 Ningĩ mooe betha yao mamĩikanie na kũu njĩrainĩ
Ezekiel7:20 Maatũire metĩĩaga na mahiga maao ma goro na mathaka
Ezekiel7:21 “Nĩngũnenganĩra mahiga macio maao ma goro mookoinĩ ma andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ matuĩke mũcaara wao
Ezekiel7:22 Ningĩ ngũmahuutatĩra
Ezekiel7:23 “Wĩthondekereei mabĩngũ
Ezekiel7:24 nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩngũreehithia andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa arũrũ mũno
Ezekiel7:25 Hĩndĩ ya kĩeha yakinya-rĩ
Ezekiel7:26 Ningĩ mathĩĩna megũũka meiganĩrĩire
