Matthew5:17 “Mũtigeciirie atĩ njũkĩĩte kũniina Watho wa Musa kana ũrutani wa anabii. Ndiũkĩĩte gũciniina
Matthew5:18 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew5:19 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtaathĩkagĩra maathani
Matthew5:20 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew5:21 “Nĩmũiguĩte atĩ andũ a tene meerĩĩtwo atĩ
Matthew5:22 No rĩu niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ: mũndũ o wothe ũkaaraakarĩra mũrũ wa ithe
Matthew5:23 Tondũ ũcio
Matthew5:24 amba ũtige kĩheeo gĩaku o hau kĩgongoonainĩ ũthiĩ wambe ũkaiguithanie naake
Matthew5:25 “Mũngĩhĩtania na mũndũ na agũtware igootiinĩ
Matthew5:26 Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew5:27 “Nĩmũiguĩte nĩkwĩrĩĩtwo atĩ: ‘Ndũkaanatharanie.’
Matthew5:28 No rĩu ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ: mũndũ o wothe ũroraga mũndũ wa nja na akamwĩrirĩria nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũtharia naake ngoroinĩ yake.
Matthew5:29 Kwoguo riitho rĩaku rĩa ũrĩo rĩngĩtũma wĩhie
Matthew5:30 Nakuo guoko gwaku kwa ũrĩo kũngĩtũma wĩhie
Matthew5:31 “Ningĩ nĩmũiguĩte nĩkwĩrĩĩtwo atĩ
Matthew5:32 No rĩu ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew5:33 “Ningĩ nĩmũiguĩte atĩ andũ a tene meerĩĩtwo atĩrĩ
Matthew5:34 No niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew5:35 o na kana mwĩhĩte na thĩ nĩ ũndũ nĩkuo gaturwa ka makinya maake
Matthew5:36 O na ndũkaanehĩte na mũtwe waku nĩ ũndũ ndũngĩhota gũtũma rũcuĩrĩ o na rũmwe rwaku rũire kana rũerũhe.
Matthew5:37 Mũkiuga ũndũ
Matthew5:38 “O na nĩmũiguĩte nĩkwĩrĩĩtwo atĩ
Matthew5:39 No niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew5:40 Na mũndũ angĩgũthitanga agũtuunyithie igooti
Matthew5:41 Na mũndũ angĩgwatha mũthiĩ naake kiromita ĩmwe
Matthew5:42 Ningĩ mũndũ angĩkũhooya kĩndũ mũhe
Matthew5:43 “Nĩmũiguĩte kwĩrĩĩtwo atĩ
Matthew5:44 No niĩ ngũmwĩra mwendage thũ cianyu na mũhooyagĩre arĩa mamũnyariiraga
Matthew5:45 nĩ geetha mũtuĩke ciana cia Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ. Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ atũmaga riũa rĩake rĩarĩre andũ arĩa ooru o na arĩa eega
Matthew5:46 Ngai angĩkĩmũhe kĩheeo kĩrĩkũ angĩkorwo mwendeete o andũ arĩa mamwendeete inyuĩ? Githĩ o na arĩa meetagia mbeeca cia igooti matiĩkaga o ũguo?
Matthew5:47 Angĩkorwo no araata aanyu mũgeithagia-rĩ
Matthew5:48 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew6:1 “Mwĩmenyerereei mũtikaae gwĩkaga ciĩko cianyu njega mbere ya mũingĩ atĩ nĩ geetha wone ũrĩa mũreeka. Mũngĩĩka ũguo gũtirĩ kĩheeo mũkaaheeo nĩ Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ.
Matthew6:2 “Kwoguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwaheana kĩndũ gĩgateithie athĩĩni
Matthew6:3 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ũkũheana kĩndũ gĩa gũteithia athĩĩni
Matthew6:4 Naake Ithe wanyu ũrĩa wonaga maũndũ ma hitho nĩagaakũhe kĩheeo.
Matthew6:5 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkũhooya tigagaai gwĩka ta hinga! Hinga ciendeete kũrũũgama thunagogiinĩ o na mĩkĩrainĩ ya njĩra rĩrĩa ikũhooya nĩ geetha andũ macione. Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ nĩirĩĩkĩĩtie kũrĩhwo mũcaara wacio.
Matthew6:6 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wee ũkũhooya toonyaga nyũmba yaku na warĩĩkia kũhinga mĩrango
Matthew6:7 “Rĩrĩa mũkũhooya tigagaai kũhũhũũtĩka mũkiugaga maũndũ ma tũhũ ta ũrĩa andũ arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie meekaga. Acio meciiragia atĩ ngai ciao nĩikũmaigua nĩ ũndũ wa kũraihia mahooya.
Matthew6:8 Inyuĩ tigagaai gũtuĩka ta o
Matthew6:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew6:10 Ũthamaki waku nĩũũke;reke wendi waku wĩkagwo gũũkũ thĩo ta ũrĩa wĩkagwo kũu igũrũ.
Matthew6:11 Tũhe ũũmũũthĩ irio ciitũ cia gũtũigana
Matthew6:12 na ũtuohere mahĩtia maitũ
Matthew6:13 Na ndũkaareke tũgũe magerioinĩ
Matthew6:14 “Nĩ gũkorwo mũngĩrekagĩra arĩa mamũhĩtagĩria
Matthew6:15 No mũngĩrega kũrekagĩra arĩa angĩ
Matthew6:16 “Ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mwĩhingĩĩte
Matthew6:17 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa wĩhingĩĩte
Matthew6:18 nĩ geetha mũndũ o wothe ndakaamenyage atĩ nĩwĩhingĩĩte tiga o thooguo waku ũrĩa ũtoonekaga. Naake thooguo ũcio wonaga maũndũ ma hitho nĩagaakũhe iheeo ciaku.
Matthew6:19 “Tigagaai kwĩigĩra mũthiithũ gũũkũ thĩ kũrĩa ũrĩagwo nĩ memenyi na ũkaguma
Matthew6:20 Mwĩigagĩreei mũthiithũ igũrũ kwa Ngai kũrĩa ũtangĩrĩĩo nĩ memenyi kana ũgume
Matthew6:21 Nĩ ũndũ kũrĩa mũthiithũ wanyu ũrĩ nĩkuo ngoro cianyu o nacio irĩkoragwo.
Matthew6:22 “Maitho nĩ mo taawa wa mwĩrĩ. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio maitho maaku mangĩkorwo marĩ meega
Matthew6:23 no maitho maaku mangĩkorwo ti meega
Matthew6:24 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũtungatĩra aathani eerĩ; nĩ ũndũ no mũhaka amene ũmwe na eende ũrĩa ũngĩ; o na aathĩkagĩre ũmwe na anyarare ũrĩa ũngĩ. Mũtingĩhota gũtungatĩra Ngai na mũtungatĩre ũtonga.
Matthew6:25 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew6:26 Taroraai nyoni cia rĩerainĩ: itihandaga kana ikagetha o na kana ikaiga thitoo; no Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ nĩ we ũciheaga gĩa kũrĩa! Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Matthew6:27 Ningĩ-rĩ
Matthew6:28 “Mwĩtangaga nĩkĩ nĩ ũndũ wa nguo? Taroraai mahũa ma gĩthaka ũrĩa makũraga: matirutaga wĩra kana magetumĩra nguo;
Matthew6:29 no ngũmwĩra atĩ o na gũtuĩka mũthamaki Solomoni aarĩ na ũtonga mũingĩ mũno
Matthew6:30 Angĩkorwo Ngai nĩ we ũhumbaga nyeki ya gĩthaka
Matthew6:31 “Kwoguo tigagaai gwĩtanga mũkĩũria atĩrĩ
Matthew6:32 (Macio nĩ mo maũndũ marĩa andũ arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie metangaga namo.) Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ nĩoĩ atĩ nĩmũbatairio nĩ maũndũ macio moothe.
Matthew6:33 No ambaai mũcarie Ũthamaki wa Ngai na ũthingu wake na maũndũ macio mangĩ moothe nĩarĩmũheaga.
Matthew6:34 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew7:1 “Mũtigaatuanagĩre
Matthew7:2 nĩ ũndũ akaamũtuĩra o ta ũrĩa mũtuagĩra andũ arĩa angĩ
Matthew7:3 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma wone kĩhuti kĩrĩa kĩrĩ riitho rĩa mũrũ wa thooguo
Matthew7:4 Kana ũngĩhota atĩa kwĩra mũrũ wa thooguo atĩ ũmũrute kĩhuti kĩrĩa kĩrĩ riitho rĩake
Matthew7:5 Wee hinga ĩno! Amba ũrute mũgogo ũcio ũrĩ riitho rĩaku na nĩũkuona wega ũkĩruta mũrũ wa thooguo kĩhuti kĩrĩa kĩrĩ riitho rĩake.
Matthew7:6 “Tigagaai kũhe ngui kĩndũ kĩrĩa kĩamũre
Matthew7:7 “Hooyai na nĩmũkũheeo; cariai na nĩmũkuona; ringaringaai mũrango na nĩmũkũhingũrĩrwo.
Matthew7:8 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ o wothe ũhooyaga nĩaheagwo
Matthew7:9 Kana nĩ mũndũ ũrĩkũ wanyu ũngĩĩtio mũgate nĩ mwana wake
Matthew7:10 O na kana amwĩtie thamaki
Matthew7:11 Angĩkorwo inyuĩ o na mũrĩ ooru nĩmũmenyaga kũhe ciana cianyu iheeo njega-rĩ
Matthew7:12 “Kwoguo ĩkagaai andũ arĩa angĩ ũrĩa inyuĩ mũngĩenda mamwĩke
Matthew7:13 “Toonyeraai kĩhingo kĩrĩa gĩceke
Matthew7:14 No kĩhingo gĩa kũingĩra muoyoinĩ nĩ gĩceke
Matthew7:15 “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei anabii a maheeni
Matthew7:16 Andũ acio nĩmũrĩmamenyaga na ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao. Mĩtĩ ya mĩigua ndĩciaraga thabibũ
Matthew7:17 Mũtĩ mwega ũciaraga matunda meega
Matthew7:18 Gũtirĩ hĩndĩ mũtĩ mwega ũngĩciara matunda mooru
Matthew7:19 Mũtĩ o wothe ũtaciaraga matunda meega nĩũtemagwo ũgaikio mwakiinĩ.
Matthew7:20 Kwoguo nĩmũrĩmenyaga anabii a maheeni na ũndũ wa ciĩko ciao.
Matthew7:21 “Ti mũndũ
Matthew7:22 Mũthenya wa Ituĩro wakinya andũ aingĩ nĩmakaanjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew7:23 Na niĩ nĩngaameera atĩrĩ
Matthew7:24 “Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew7:25 Rĩrĩa mbura yoirire
Matthew7:26 “No mũndũ wothe ũiguaga ciugo ici ciakwa na ndaciathĩkĩre
Matthew7:27 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mbura yoirire
Matthew7:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew7:29 Amu aarutanaga ta mũndũ warĩ na ũhoti
Matthew8:1 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aikũrũkaga kuuma kĩrĩma igũrũ nĩarũmĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ aingĩ.
Matthew8:2 Naake mũndũ warũarĩĩte mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi nĩokire harĩ we
Matthew8:3 Naake Jesũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko akĩmũhuutia akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:5 Na rĩĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aakinyire Kaperinaumu
Matthew8:6 “Mwathani
Matthew8:7 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:8 No Mũroma ũcio mũnene wa thigari
Matthew8:9 Niĩ-rĩ
Matthew8:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew8:11 Ngũmwĩra na ma andũ aingĩ nĩmagooka moimĩĩte na mĩena ya na irathĩro na ya na ithũĩro maikare thĩ marĩanĩre na Aburahamu
Matthew8:12 No arĩa maagĩrĩirwo nĩ gũkorwo marĩ Ũthamakiinĩ nĩkũrutũrũrwo makaarutũrũrwo maikio ndumainĩ kũrĩa makaarĩra na mahagaranie magego.”
Matthew8:13 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra mũnene ũcio wa thigari igana atĩrĩ
Matthew8:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew8:15 Agĩkĩmũhuutia guoko
Matthew8:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew8:17 Eekire ũguo nĩ geetha ũrĩa kwarathĩĩtwo nĩ mũnabii Isaia kũhinge atĩ: “Wee mwene nĩoire wonje witũ
Matthew8:18 Ningĩ Jesũ oona kĩrĩndĩ kĩrĩa kĩamũthiũrũrũkĩirie
Matthew8:19 Naake mũrutani ũmwe wa Watho agĩũka harĩ we akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:20 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew8:21 Ningĩ mũndũ ũngĩ warĩ mũrutwo wake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:22 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew8:23 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩingĩra gatarũinĩ o hamwe na arutwo aake.
Matthew8:24 Na o rĩmwe gũkĩgĩa na kĩhuuhũkanio kĩnene kũu iriainĩ
Matthew8:25 Nao arutwo aake magĩthiĩ harĩ we makĩmũũkĩria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:26 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew8:27 Nao andũ makĩgega
Matthew8:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew8:29 Nao rĩmwe makĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew8:30 Na hau hakuhĩ nĩhaarĩ na rũũru rũnene rwa ngũrũe rwarĩaga ho.
Matthew8:31 Nacio ngoma icio ikĩmũthaitha ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:32 Naake Jesũ agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew8:33 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩithagia ngũrũe icio makĩũra magĩthiĩ itũũrainĩ
Matthew8:34 Nao andũ oothe a itũũra rĩu magĩthiĩ gũtũnga Jesũ; hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maamuonire makĩmũthaitha oime kũu kwao.
Matthew9:1 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka gatarũinĩ
Matthew9:2 Nao andũ makĩmũreehere mũndũ warĩ na mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga akuuĩĩtwo na gĩtanda. Naake Jesũ oona ũrĩa andũ acio meetĩkĩĩtie akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru atĩrĩ
Matthew9:3 Nao arutani amwe a Watho makĩĩĩra na ngoro atĩrĩ
Matthew9:4 Naake Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeciiragia
Matthew9:5 Kuuga ‘Nĩwoherwo meehia maaku’ kana ‘Ũkĩra wĩtware-rĩ’
Matthew9:6 Nĩngũmuonia atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩ na ũhoti thĩinĩ wa thĩ wa kuohanĩra meehia.” Naake arĩĩkia kũmeera ũguo
Matthew9:7 Naake mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru agĩũkĩra akĩinũka.
Matthew9:8 Nao andũ moona ũguo
Matthew9:9 Naake Jesũ oima hau
Matthew9:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew9:11 Nao Afarisai amwe hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moonire ũguo makĩũria arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Matthew9:12 Naake Jesũ aigua ũguo akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew9:13 Thiĩi mwĩrute bata wa ciugo ici cia Maandĩko: ‘Nĩ tha ngwenda no ti magongoona.’ Niĩ ndiokire gwĩta andũ arĩa athingu
Matthew9:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo a Johana Mũbatithania magĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew9:15 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew9:16 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũtumagĩrĩra nguo ngũrũ kĩraka kĩa nguo njerũ nĩ ũndũ kĩraka kĩu kĩerũ no kĩhiũke kĩguucie nguo ĩyo
Matthew9:17 Ningĩ ndibei ya mũhihano ndĩĩkĩragwo mondoinĩ ya rũũa ngũrũ
Matthew9:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew9:19 Naake Jesũ agĩũkĩra akĩmũrũmĩrĩra e na arutwo aake.
Matthew9:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew9:21 Eekire ũguo tondũ eeĩraga atĩrĩ
Matthew9:22 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra akĩmuona akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew9:23 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aakinyire nyũmba kwa mũtongoria ũcio
Matthew9:24 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew9:25 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ oothe moimirio nja
Matthew9:26 Naguo ũhoro ũcio ũkĩmenyekana bũrũri ũcio wothe.
Matthew9:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew9:28 Naake arĩĩkia gũtoonya nyũmba
Matthew9:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmahuutia maitho akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew9:30 Nao makĩambĩrĩria kuona. Naake Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmakaania akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew9:31 No moima hau magĩthiĩ makĩheana ũhoro wa Jesũ bũrũri ũcio wothe.
Matthew9:32 Rĩrĩa andũ acio moimagaraga
Matthew9:33 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngoma ĩyo yaingatirwo
Matthew9:34 No Afarisai makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew9:35 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ agĩthiũrũrũka thĩinĩ wa matũũra moothe o hamwe na icagi
Matthew9:36 Na rĩrĩa aarorire andũ
Matthew9:37 Agĩkĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Matthew9:38 Gĩthaitheei Mwathani mwene magetha
Matthew10:1 Naake Jesũ agĩĩta arutwo aake ikũmi na eerĩ hakuhĩ naake
Matthew10:2 Marĩĩtwa ma atũmwo acio ikũmi na eerĩ nĩ mo maya: wa mbere nĩ Simoni (ũrĩa wetagwo Petero)
Matthew10:3 Filipu na Baritholomayo; Toma na Mathayo ũrĩa warĩ mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti; Jakubu mũrũ wa Alufayo
Matthew10:4 Simoni ũrĩa Mũzelote
Matthew10:5 Atũmwo acio ikũmi na eerĩ nĩ o Jesũ aatũmire
Matthew10:6 No thiĩi kũrĩ ng'ondu iria ciũrĩĩte
Matthew10:7 Mwathiĩ mũmahunjĩrie mũkĩmeeraga atĩrĩ
Matthew10:8 Ningĩ mũhonie arĩa arũaru
Matthew10:9 Mũtigakuue thahabu kana betha
Matthew10:10 Ningĩ mũtigakuue mondo ya rũgendo
Matthew10:11 “Na rĩrĩa mwatoonya itũũra kana gĩcagi
Matthew10:12 Mwaingĩra mũciĩ-rĩ
Matthew10:13 nao eene mũciĩ maamũkĩria
Matthew10:14 Mũndũ aaga kũmũnyiita ũgeni kana kũmũthikĩrĩria
Matthew10:15 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Matthew10:16 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Matthew10:17 Mwĩmenyerereei nĩ ũndũ andũ nĩmakaamũneana Kĩamainĩ na mamũhũũrĩre thunagogiinĩ ciao.
Matthew10:18 Ningĩ nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa nĩmũgaaciirithio mbere ya aathani na athamaki
Matthew10:19 Mwatwarwo igootiinĩ mũtikaanetange na ũrĩa mũkoiga kana ũrĩa mũkaaria
Matthew10:20 Ciugo iria mũkoiga itigaakorwo irĩ cianyu
Matthew10:21 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Matthew10:22 Andũ oothe nĩmakaamũthũũra nĩ ũndũ wakwa. No ũrĩa ũgaakirĩrĩria kinya hĩndĩ ya mũthia nĩakaahonokio.
Matthew10:23 Mwanyariirwo itũũrainĩ rĩmwe
Matthew10:24 “Gũtirĩ mũrutwo mũnene kũrĩ mũrutani wake
Matthew10:25 Kwoguo mũrutwo nĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũiganĩra angĩhaana ta mũrutani wake
Matthew10:26 “Kwoguo mũtikaae gwĩtigĩra andũ nĩ ũndũ gũtirĩ ũndũ mũhumbĩre ũtakoimbũrio kana ũndũ mũhithe ũtakaamenyeka.
Matthew10:27 Ũrĩa ngũmwĩrĩra ndumainĩ uugĩreei ũtheriinĩ
Matthew10:28 Tigaai gwĩtigĩra arĩa mooragaga mwĩrĩ no matingĩhota kũũraga muoyo
Matthew10:29 Githĩ tũnyoni twĩrĩ tũtiendagio thendi ĩmwe? No gũtirĩ kanyoni o na kamwe kangĩgũa thĩ Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ ateetĩkĩrĩĩte.
Matthew10:30 Ningĩ o na njuĩrĩ cianyu cia mũtwe nĩndare.
Matthew10:31 Tondũ ũcio tigaai gwĩtigĩra; inyuĩ mũrĩ a goro gũkĩra tũnyoni tũingĩ!
Matthew10:32 “Mũndũ angiumbũra mbere ya andũ oige atĩ nĩ wakwa
Matthew10:33 No mũndũ angĩngaana mbere ya andũ
Matthew10:34 “Mũtigeciirie atĩ njũkĩĩte kũreehe thaayũ thĩ. Niĩ ndiũkĩĩte kũreehe thaayũ njũkĩĩte kũreehe haaro.
Matthew10:35 Njũkĩĩte gũtũma mwanake ookĩrĩre ithe
Matthew10:36 nacio thũ cia mũndũ iria njũru mũno igaakorwo irĩ o andũ a gwake mũciĩ.
Matthew10:37 “Mũndũ wendeete ithe kana nyina gũkĩra ũrĩa anyendeete ti mwagĩrĩru gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa. Na ũrĩa wendeete mũũriũ kana mwarĩ kũrĩ ũrĩa anyendeete ti mwagĩrĩru gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa.
Matthew10:38 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũtekuoya mũtharaba wake anũmĩrĩre ti mwagĩrĩru gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa.
Matthew10:39 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũgeria kũmenyerera muoyo wake nĩakoorwo nĩguo
Matthew10:40 “Mũndũ wothe ũmwamũkagĩra inyuĩ nĩ niĩ aamũkagĩra
Matthew10:41 Mũndũ wothe wamũkagĩra mũnabii nĩ ũndũ nĩ mũnabii
Matthew10:42 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew11:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew11:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew11:3 “Wee nĩ we ũrooka kana tweterere ũngĩ?”
Matthew11:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew11:5 atumuumu nĩmarona
Matthew11:6 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Matthew11:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew11:8 Mwagĩthiĩte kuona ũ? Mwathiĩte kuona mũndũ wekĩrĩĩte nguo irĩ na riiri? Arĩa meekĩraga nguo irĩ riiri makoragwo mĩciĩ gwa athamaki.
Matthew11:9 Mwagĩthiĩte kuona ũ? Mwathiĩte kuona mũnabii? Ĩĩ
Matthew11:10 Johana nĩ we maandĩko maandĩkĩĩte ũhoro wake makoiga atĩrĩ
Matthew11:11 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew11:12 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Johana Mũbatithania aambĩrĩirie kũhunjia kinyagia ũũmũũthĩ
Matthew11:13 O na anabii oothe o hamwe na Watho wa Musa nĩmaatũire marathaga ũhoro wa Ũthamaki ũcio nginyagia hĩndĩ ya Johana.
Matthew11:14 Angĩkorwo nĩmũgwĩtĩkia ũhoro wao-rĩ
Matthew11:15 Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ nĩakĩigue.
Matthew11:16 “Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew11:17 ‘Twamũinĩire nyĩmbo cia ũhiki
Matthew11:18 Amu Johana Mũbatithania ookire ehingĩĩte kũrĩa
Matthew11:19 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ooka akĩrĩaga na akĩnyuaga moigire atĩrĩ
Matthew11:20 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria gũteta nĩ ũndũ wa andũ a matũũra kũrĩa aaringĩĩte ciama nyingĩ
Matthew11:21 “Kaĩ inyuĩ andũ a matũũra ma Korazini na Bethisaida mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Nĩ amu ciama iria iringĩĩtwo thĩinĩ wa matũũra maanyu korwo ciaringĩirwo Turo na Sidoni
Matthew11:22 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew11:23 Inyuĩ andũ a Kaperinaumu-rĩ
Matthew11:24 Ikaragaai mũũĩ na ma atĩ Mũthenya wa Ituĩro
Matthew11:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew11:26 Ĩĩ Awa
Matthew11:27 “Awa nĩanengereete maũndũ moothe
Matthew11:28 “Ũkaai kũrĩ niĩ inyuothe mũnogeetio nĩgũkuua mĩrigo mĩritũ na nĩngũmũhuurũkia.
Matthew11:29 Oyai icooki rĩakwa mwĩigĩrĩre na mwĩrute na niĩ nĩ ũndũ ndĩ mũhooreri na mwĩnyiihia ngoroinĩ na nĩmũkuona ũhuurũko;
Matthew11:30 tondũ icooki rĩakwa nĩ ihũthũ na mũrigo wakwa ti mũritũ.”
Matthew12:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew12:2 Rĩrĩa Afarisai moonire ũguo makĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Matthew12:3 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew12:4 Aatoonyire nyũmba ya Ngai hamwe na andũ arĩa maarĩ naake
Matthew12:5 Ningĩ kaĩ mũtarĩ mwathooma Wathoinĩ wa Musa atĩ thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ gũtirĩ mũthenya wa Thabatũ athĩnjĩri Ngai matoinaga Watho o na gũtuĩka matiĩragwo nĩmeehĩĩtie?
Matthew12:6 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:7 Maandĩko moigaga atĩrĩ
Matthew12:8 Nĩ ũndũ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩ Mwathani o na wa mũthenya wa Thabatũ.”
Matthew12:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew12:10 nakuo kũu thunagogi nĩkwarĩ na mũndũ wonjeete guoko. Tondũ nĩmaacaragia ũndũ wa gũthitanga Jesũ naguo
Matthew12:11 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew12:12 Mũndũ arĩ bata mũno gũkĩra ng'ondu
Matthew12:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wonjeete guoko atĩrĩ
Matthew12:14 Nao Afarisai moima nja magĩcookania ndundu mamenye ũrĩa mangĩũragithia Jesũ.
Matthew12:15 Naake Jesũ aamenya ũguo akiuma kũu
Matthew12:16 agĩcooka akĩmakaania atĩ matikaae gũtũma amenyeke.
Matthew12:17 Eekire ũguo nĩ geetha ciugo iria ciaririo nĩ Ngai
Matthew12:18 “Ĩno nĩ yo ndungata yakwa ĩrĩa ndĩthuurĩire
Matthew12:19 Ndĩgaakararania na andũ kana ĩmagũũthũkĩre
Matthew12:20 Nĩgaakorwo ĩrĩ hooreri mbere ya arĩa matarĩ hinya
Matthew12:21 nao andũ oothe a ndũũrĩrĩ nĩmakaiga mwĩhoko wao thĩinĩ wayo.”
Matthew12:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew12:23 Nao andũ oothe makĩgega makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Matthew12:24 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Afarisai maiguire ũguo makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew12:25 Naake Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeciiragia akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew12:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew12:27 Angĩgĩkorwo nyingataga ngoma na hinya wa Beelizebuli-rĩ
Matthew12:28 No rĩĩrĩ
Matthew12:29 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũingĩra nyũmba ya mũndũ njamba akuue indo ciake ataambĩĩte kuoha mũndũ ũcio njamba. No aambire amuohe agĩcooka gũtaha indo ciake.
Matthew12:30 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ hamwe na niĩ nĩ thũ yakwa
Matthew12:31 Tondũ ũcio ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:32 Mũndũ o wothe waragia kiugo gĩa gũcambia Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakooherwo; no mũndũ o wothe ũcambagia Roho Mũtheru ndakooherwo
Matthew12:33 “Nĩ geetha mũtĩ ũciare matunda meega no mũhaka ũkorwo ũrĩ mwega. Angĩkorwo mũtĩ nĩ mũũru matunda maaguo marĩkoragwo marĩ mooru. Mũtĩ ũmenyekanaga nĩ ũndũ wa matunda maaguo.
Matthew12:34 Inyuĩ ciana cia nduĩra! Mũngĩhota atĩa kwaria maũndũ meega na mũrĩ ooru? Kanua kaaragia maũndũ marĩa marĩ ngoro.
Matthew12:35 Mũndũ mwega aaragia maũndũ meega kuuma mũthiithũinĩ wa wega wake
Matthew12:36 “Ikaragaai mũũĩ na ma atĩ Mũthenya wa Ituĩro andũ nĩmakaaheana gĩtũmi gĩa ciugo ciothe cia tũhũ iria cianoima tũnuainĩ twao.
Matthew12:37 Ciugo ciaku nĩcio igaatũma ũtuĩke ndũrĩ na mahĩtia
Matthew12:38 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew12:39 No Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew12:40 O ta ũrĩa Jona aikarire mĩthenya ĩtatũ na mootukũ matatũ thĩinĩ wa thamaki ĩrĩa nene iriainĩ-rĩ
Matthew12:41 Mũthenya wa Ituĩro andũ a Nineve nĩmagookĩra na igũrũ mathitange andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ nĩ ũndũ o nĩmeeririre hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jona aamahunjĩirie; ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Matthew12:42 Mũthenya wa Ituĩro kwini wa Sheba nĩakaarũũgama na igũrũ athitange andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ
Matthew12:43 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew12:44 Yawaga ĩkeĩĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew12:45 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngoma ĩyo ĩgathiĩ ĩkagĩĩra ngoma ingĩ mũgwanja njũru kũrĩ yo
Matthew12:46 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ aaragĩria andũ
Matthew12:47 Naake mũndũ ũmwe warĩ ho akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Matthew12:48 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew12:49 Agĩcooka akĩoroota arutwo aake akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew12:50 Amu mũndũ o wothe wĩkaga ũrĩa Awa ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ eendaga ũcio nĩ we maitũ
Matthew13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew13:2 Nao andũ aingĩ mũno makĩmũthiũrũrũkĩria
Matthew13:3 Naake Jesũ akĩmaruta maũndũ maingĩ na ngerekano
Matthew13:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew13:5 Ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjarainĩ kũrĩa gũtaarĩ na tĩĩri mũingĩ
Matthew13:6 Ĩndĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa riũa rĩarire
Matthew13:7 Ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa mĩiguainĩ
Matthew13:8 Iria ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru
Matthew13:9 Jesũ arĩĩkia ngerekano ĩyo akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:10 Nao arutwo magĩũka harĩ Jesũ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew13:11 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:12 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew13:13 Ndĩmaaragĩria na ngerekano nĩ ũndũ maroraga na mationaga
Matthew13:14 Acio nĩ o mũnabii Isaia aaragia ũhoro wao hĩndĩ ĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ:‘Andũ aya magaathikagĩrĩria na matikaigua; makaaroraga na matione.
Matthew13:15 Nĩ ũndũ nĩmoomĩĩtie ngoro
Matthew13:16 “Kaĩ inyuĩ mũrĩ araathime-ĩ! Amu maitho maanyu nĩmoonaga na matũ maanyu makaigua.
Matthew13:17 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew13:18 “Kwoguo tagĩthikĩrĩriei mũigue ngĩtaarĩria ngerekano ĩyo ya mũhuri.
Matthew13:19 Arĩa maiguaga ũhoro wa Ũthamaki na ndũmataũkĩre
Matthew13:20 Nacio mbegũ iria ciagũire mahigainĩ ihaana ta andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro na o rĩmwe makawamũkĩra na gĩkeno.
Matthew13:21 No matiũnyiitaga hĩndĩ ndaaya nĩ ũndũ ndũkoragwo ũrũmĩĩte thĩinĩ wao. Na ũndũ ũcio hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maathĩĩnio kana maanyariirwo nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio
Matthew13:22 Nacio mbegũ iria ciagũire mĩiguainĩ
Matthew13:23 Nacio mbegũ iria ciagũire tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro na magataũkĩrwo nĩguo
Matthew13:24 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩngĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:25 no ũtukũ ũmwe andũ me toro
Matthew13:26 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngano yamerire na ĩgĩkũra ĩkĩambĩrĩria gũciara
Matthew13:27 Nacio ndungata cia mũndũ ũcio igĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ we ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew13:28 Naake agĩcicookeria agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew13:29 Naake agĩcicookeria agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew13:30 Rekeei ikũranĩre kinya hĩndĩ ya magetha. Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩngeera agethi maambe mamunye itindiĩ maciohe itĩĩa macicine
Matthew13:31 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩngĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:32 Mbegũ ya karatarĩ nĩ yo niini kũrĩ mbegũ ciothe
Matthew13:33 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩngĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:34 Jesũ aatũmagĩra ngerekano akĩĩra andũ maũndũ macio moothe; ndarĩ ũndũ aameeraga ategũtũmĩra ngerekano.
Matthew13:35 Eekaga ũguo nĩ geetha ciugo iria ciarathĩĩtwo nĩ mũnabii ihinge:“Ngaatũmĩra ngerekano ngĩmaarĩria
Matthew13:36 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew13:37 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:38 Mũgũnda naguo nĩ thĩ ĩno
Matthew13:39 Thũ ĩyo yahandire itindiĩ nĩ Ngoma. Nayo hĩndĩ ya magetha nĩ ithirĩro rĩa thĩ
Matthew13:40 O ta ũrĩa itindiĩ ciũnganagio na igacinwo na mwaki
Matthew13:41 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩagaatũma araika aake magacookanĩrĩrie arĩa oothe mahĩtithagia andũ
Matthew13:42 Macooke mamaikie icuainĩ rĩa mwaki kũrĩa makaarĩra na mahagaranie magego.
Matthew13:43 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ arĩa athingu nao makaahenia ta riũa Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ithe wao. Ũrĩa wĩ na matũ
Matthew13:44 “Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta mũthiithũ ũhithĩĩtwo mũgũndainĩ
Matthew13:45 “Ningĩ Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta mũhũũri mbiacara wethaga ruuru
Matthew13:46 na arĩĩkia kuona ruuru ĩmwe ya goro
Matthew13:47 “Ningĩ Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta rũgara rũrĩa rwaikirio iriainĩ rũkĩgwatia thamaki cia mĩthemba yothe.
Matthew13:48 Naruo rwaĩyũra andũ makĩrũguucia hũgũrũrũinĩ
Matthew13:49 Ũguo noguo gũgaakorwo kũhaana ithirĩro rĩa thĩ: araika nĩmagooka kwamũrania andũ arĩa aaganu kuuma kũrĩ arĩa athingu.
Matthew13:50 Arĩa aaganu makaamaikia icuainĩ rĩa mwaki
Matthew13:51 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew13:52 Naake agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:53 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kũheana ngerekano icio akiuma kũu.
Matthew13:54 Akinya itũũrainĩ rĩao akĩrutana thunagogiinĩ yakuo
Matthew13:55 Githĩ ũyũ ti mũrũ wa bundi ũrĩa wa mbaaũ? Na githĩ nyina ndeetagwo Mariamu? Ningĩ githĩ ti mũrũ wa nyina na Jakubu
Matthew13:56 Nao aarĩ a nyina githĩ matirĩ gũũkũ na ithuĩ? Nĩ kũ aakĩrutire maũndũ maya moothe?”
Matthew13:57 Nao magĩkĩregana naake. Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew13:58 Naake ndaringire ciama nyingĩ kũu nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa maagĩĩte wĩtĩkio.
Matthew14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew14:2 Naake agĩkĩĩra ndungata ciake atĩrĩ
Matthew14:3 Amu Herode nĩanyiitithĩĩtie Johana akamuohithia na akamũikithia njeera nĩ ũndũ wa Herodia ũrĩa warĩ mũtumia wa mũrũ wa nyina na Filipu
Matthew14:4 Johana nĩerĩĩte Herode atĩ ndaagĩrĩirwo nĩkũmũhikia.
Matthew14:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew14:6 Na rĩĩrĩ mũthenya wa gũkũngũĩra gũciarwo kwa Herode wakinya-rĩ
Matthew14:7 Naake agĩgĩkenia Herode mũno o kinya akĩmwĩrĩra mwĩhĩtwa atĩ nĩekũmũhe o kĩrĩa gĩothe aangĩetirie.
Matthew14:8 Naake mũirĩĩtu ũcio agĩtaarwo nĩ nyina akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
Matthew14:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew14:10 Kwoguo agĩgĩtũmana njeera
Matthew14:11 Naguo mũtwe ũgĩkĩreehwo na kiuga ũkĩnengerwo mũirĩĩtu ũcio
Matthew14:12 Nao arutwo a Johana magĩũka
Matthew14:13 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire ũhoro wa Johana akĩingĩra gatarũ agĩthiĩ arĩ o wiki handũ hataarĩ na andũ. Rĩrĩa nao andũ maiguire ũguo makĩmũrũmĩrĩra na magũrũ kuuma matũũrainĩ maao.
Matthew14:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew14:15 Gwakinya hwaĩinĩ
Matthew14:16 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew14:17 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew14:18 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew14:19 Agĩcooka agĩatha andũ maikare thĩ nyekiinĩ; oya mĩgate ĩyo ĩtaano na thamaki icio igĩrĩ
Matthew14:20 Nao oothe makĩrĩa makĩhũũna. Nao arutwo magĩcooka makĩũngania cienyũ iria ciatigarĩĩte makĩiyũria ciondo ikũmi na igĩrĩ.
Matthew14:21 Andũ arĩa maarĩire maarĩ arũme ta ngiri ithaano
Matthew14:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew14:23 Arĩĩkia kuugĩra andũ ũhoro
Matthew14:24 nako gatarũ kaarĩ iria gatagatĩ gakĩhũũrana na makũmbĩ ma maaĩ nĩ ũndũ keerekeire mwena ũrĩa rũhuuho rwoimaga.
Matthew14:25 Na kũrĩ ũtukũ ta rĩrĩa ngũkũ igambaga
Matthew14:26 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maamuonire agereire maaĩ igũrũ na magũrũ
Matthew14:27 Naake Jesũ o rĩmwe akĩmaarĩria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew14:28 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew14:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew14:30 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa oonire rũhuuho rũnene agĩĩtigĩra
Matthew14:31 O rĩmwe Jesũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko akĩmũnyiita
Matthew14:32 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew14:33 Nao arĩa maarĩ gatarũinĩ makĩmũthaathaiya makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew14:34 Nao maaringa iria magĩkinya bũrũri wa Genesareti.
Matthew14:35 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ a kũu maamũmenyire magĩtũmanĩra arĩa maarĩ arũaru kũu guothe
Matthew14:36 Magĩkĩmũthaitha eetĩkĩrie acio maarĩ arũaru mahuutie o na akorwo no gĩcũrĩ kĩa nguo yake. Nao arĩa oothe maahuutirie makĩhonio.
Matthew15:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew15:2 “Nĩkĩ gĩtũmaga arutwo aaku maage kũhingia maũndũ marĩa twatigĩirwo nĩ maithe maitũ ma tene? Matiĩthambaga mooko ta ũrĩa kwagĩrĩire mbere ya kũrĩa!”
Matthew15:3 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:4 Nĩ ũndũ Ngai aathanire atĩrĩ
Matthew15:5 No inyuĩ muugaga atĩ mũndũ angĩĩra ithe kana nyina atĩrĩ
Matthew15:6 ndarĩ na bata wa gũtĩĩa ithe. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mũgakĩagĩra watho wa Ngai bata nĩ geetha mũrũmĩrĩre kĩrĩra kĩu kĩanyu.
Matthew15:7 Inyuĩ hinga ici! Isaia nĩamenyeete wega hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aarathire ũhoro wanyu akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew15:8 ‘Andũ aya maaheaga gĩtĩĩo na mĩromo
Matthew15:9 Gũtirĩ bata wao gũũthaathaiya
Matthew15:10 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ agĩĩta andũ harĩ we akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew15:11 Kĩndũ kĩrĩa gĩtoonyaga kanua ka mũndũ ti kĩo kĩmũthaahagia
Matthew15:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:13 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:14 Tiganaai nao! Nĩ itumuumu igĩtongoria itumuumu
Matthew15:15 Naake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew15:16 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:17 Mũtiramenya atĩ kĩrĩa gĩothe gĩtoonyagĩra kanua gĩthiaga nda gĩgacooka gĩkoima?
Matthew15:18 No kĩrĩa kiumaga na kanua kiumaga ngoroinĩ
Matthew15:19 Amu nĩ thĩinĩ wa ngoro ya mũndũ kuumaga meciiria mooru
Matthew15:20 Maũndũ macio nĩ mo mathaahagia mũndũ
Matthew15:21 Ningĩ Jesũ akiuma kũu agĩthiĩ ndeereinĩ cia matũũra ma Turo na Sidoni.
Matthew15:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew15:23 No Jesũ ndarĩ ũndũ aamũcookeirie. Nao arutwo aake magĩthiĩ harĩ we
Matthew15:24 Naake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew15:25 No mũtumia ũcio agĩũka agĩturia maru mbere yake akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew15:26 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:27 Naake mũtumia akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:28 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:29 Ningĩ Jesũ oima kũu agĩthiĩ agereire hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria rĩa Galili
Matthew15:30 Nao andũ aingĩ magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we makĩmũtwarĩra ithua
Matthew15:31 Nao andũ makĩgega mũno hĩndĩ ĩrĩa moonire andũ arĩa mataaragia makĩaria
Matthew15:32 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ agĩĩta arutwo aake harĩ we akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew15:33 Nao arutwo makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew15:35 Naake Jesũ agĩatha andũ maikare thĩ.
Matthew15:36 Agĩcooka akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo mũgwanja na tũthamaki tũu
Matthew15:37 Nao andũ oothe makĩrĩa makĩhũũna. Nao arutwo magĩcooka makĩũngania cienyũ iria ciatigarĩĩte makĩiyũria ciondo mũgwanja.
Matthew15:38 Andũ arĩa maarĩire maarĩ arũme ngiri inya
Matthew15:39 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew16:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew16:2 No Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew16:3 Ningĩ rũũciinĩ rũgĩkinya mũkoiga atĩrĩ
Matthew16:4 Kaĩ andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ nĩ ooru na nĩmaregeete gwĩtĩkia Ngai-ĩ! Mũranjĩĩra ndĩmũringĩre kĩama? Gũtirĩ kĩama mũkũringĩrwo tiga o kĩama kĩa Jona.”Naake agĩkĩmatiga agĩĩthiĩra.
Matthew16:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew16:6 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew16:7 Nao arutwo makĩambĩrĩria kwĩrana atĩrĩ
Matthew16:8 Naake Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeranaga akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew16:9 O na rĩu mũtirĩ mũrataũkĩrwo? Mũtiraririkana rĩrĩa ndahũũnirie andũ ngiri ithaano na mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtaano? Nĩ ciondo ciigana muonganirie?
Matthew16:10 Ningĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ndahũũnirie andũ ngiri inya na mĩgate mũgwanja-rĩ
Matthew16:11 Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma mwage kũmenya atĩ ti ũhoro wa mĩgate ngũmwaragĩria? Mwĩhũũgageei ndaawa ya Afarisai na Asadukai ya kũimbia mĩgate.”
Matthew16:12 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo makĩmenya atĩ ndameeraga mehũũgage ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate; no aameeraga mehũũgage ũrutani wa Afarisai na Asadukai.
Matthew16:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew16:14 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew16:15 Agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew16:16 Naake Simoni Petero akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew16:17 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew16:18 Ngũkwĩra atĩrĩ Petero
Matthew16:19 Nĩngaakũnengera macabi ma Ũthamaki wa igũrũ
Matthew16:20 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka agĩkaania arutwo aake na hinya mũno akĩmeera matikeere mũndũ o na ũmwe atĩ nĩ we Mesia.
Matthew16:21 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩambĩrĩria kwĩra arutwo aake atekũhithĩrĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew16:22 Naake Petero akĩoya Jesũ akĩmũtwara ndundu akĩmũkaania akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew16:23 Naake Jesũ akĩhũgũkĩra Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew16:24 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Matthew16:25 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew16:26 Nĩ amu mũndũ angĩĩguna nakĩ o na angĩgaya thĩ yothe no oorwo nĩ muoyo wake? Gũtirĩ kĩndũ angĩheana nĩ geetha acookerio muoyo wake.
Matthew16:27 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ e hakuhĩ gũũka e na riiri wa Ithe o na araika aake
Matthew16:28 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew17:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew17:2 Naake Jesũ akĩgarũrũka ũrĩa aatariĩ mamwĩroreire; ũthiũ wake ũkĩhenia ta riũa
Matthew17:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew17:4 Naake Petero akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Matthew17:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew17:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew17:7 No Jesũ agĩũka akĩmahuutia akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew17:8 Nao matiira maitho gũtirĩ mũndũ moonire tiga o Jesũ wiki.
Matthew17:9 Rĩrĩa maikũrũkaga kuuma kĩrĩmainĩ
Matthew17:10 Nao arutwo makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:11 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:12 No ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew17:13 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo magĩkĩmenya atĩ Jesũ aamaheaga ũhoro wa Johana Mũbatithania.
Matthew17:14 Nao maakinya harĩ andũ
Matthew17:15 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew17:16 Ndĩmũreeheire arutwo aaku
Matthew17:17 Naake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew17:18 Naake Jesũ agĩkũũma ngoma ĩyo
Matthew17:19 Nao arutwo magĩcooka magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Jesũ marĩ oiki makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:20 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:21 No ngoma ya mũthemba ũcio ndĩingatĩkaga na kĩndũ o kĩngĩ tiga o mahooya na kwĩhinga.”]
Matthew17:22 Rĩrĩa arutwo oothe maacookanĩrĩire hamwe kũu Galili
Matthew17:23 arĩa makaamũũraga
Matthew17:24 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew17:25 Naake Petero akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew17:26 Naake Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩ nĩ ageni.Jesũ agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew17:27 No tondũ tũtikwenda kũhĩtĩria andũ aya
Matthew18:1 Na hĩndĩ o ĩyo arutwo a Jesũ magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew18:2 Naake Jesũ agĩĩta kaana
Matthew18:3 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew18:4 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩnyiihagia ta kaana gaaka nĩ we mũnene kũrĩ arĩa angĩ Ũthamakiinĩ wa igũrũ.
Matthew18:5 Ningĩ mũndũ o wothe wamũkagĩra kaana ta gaaka thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa nĩ niĩ aamũkagĩra.
Matthew18:6 “Mũndũ o na ũmwe angĩhĩtithia kamwe ga tũũtũ tũnjĩtĩkĩĩtie atũme keehie
Matthew18:7 Kaĩ nĩ ũũru atĩ thĩ kũrĩ maũndũ matũmaga andũ mate wĩtĩkio wao-ĩ! Maũndũ ta macio nĩmarĩũkaga hĩndĩ ciothe
Matthew18:8 “Guoko gwaku kana kũgũrũ gwaku kũngĩtũma wĩhie
Matthew18:9 O narĩo riitho rĩaku rĩngĩtũma wĩhie
Matthew18:10 “Menyereraai mũtikaae kũnyarara o na kamwe ga tũũtũ tũniini nĩ ũndũ ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew18:11 Nĩ ũndũ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ookire kũhonokia arĩa moorĩĩte.]
Matthew18:12 “Mũgwĩciiria mũndũ ũrĩ na ng'ondu igana rĩmwe angĩĩka atĩa
Matthew18:13 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩrĩ
Matthew18:14 Ũguo noguo Ithe wanyu ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ o naake atangĩenda o na kamwe ga tũũtũ tũnyiinyi koore.
Matthew18:15 “Mũrũ kana mwarĩ wa thooguo angĩkũhĩtĩria
Matthew18:16 No rĩĩrĩ
Matthew18:17 Angĩrega kũmũthikĩrĩria
Matthew18:18 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew18:19 “Ningĩ ngũmwĩra na ma atĩrĩ
Matthew18:20 Nĩ ũndũ harĩa andũ eerĩ kana atatũ moonganĩĩte thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Matthew18:21 Naake Petero agĩthiĩ kwĩ Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew18:22 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew18:23 nĩ ũndũ ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta mũthamaki wendaga gũtuĩria mathiirĩ maake marĩa ndungata ciake ciarĩ namo.
Matthew18:24 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie gwĩka ũguo
Matthew18:25 Tondũ ndĩngĩahotire gũcirĩha
Matthew18:26 Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩturia ndu ĩkĩmũthaitha ĩkiugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew18:27 Naake mũthamaki akĩmĩiguĩra tha
Matthew18:28 “No ndungata ĩyo ĩkiuma kũu kwa mũthamaki ĩgĩcemania na ndungata ĩngĩ yarĩ na dinari ciayo igana rĩmwe
Matthew18:29 Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩturia ndu na ĩkĩmũthaitha atĩrĩ
Matthew18:30 No yo ĩkĩrega
Matthew18:31 Nacio ndungata iria ingĩ ciona ũguo ikĩraakara mũno
Matthew18:32 Naake mũthamaki agĩĩta ndungata ĩyo aarekeire thiirĩ akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew18:33 Wee nawe nĩũkwagĩrĩirwo nĩkũiguĩra ndungata ĩyo mũrutaga wĩra nayo tha o ta ũrĩa niĩ ngũiguĩrĩire tha.’
Matthew18:34 Tondũ wa maraakara
Matthew18:35 Naake Jesũ akĩrĩĩkia akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew19:1 Jesũ arĩĩkia kũmeera maũndũ macio akiuma Galili agĩthiĩ bũrũri wa Judea mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani.
Matthew19:2 Nao andũ aingĩ makĩmũrũmĩrĩra
Matthew19:3 Nao Afarisai amwe magĩthiĩ kũrĩ we makĩmũgeria makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew19:5 na akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew19:6 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio matirĩkoragwo marĩ eerĩ hĩndĩ ĩngĩ
Matthew19:7 Nao Afarisai makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:8 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:9 Ngũmwĩra atĩ mũndũ mũrũme o wothe ũngĩtigana na mũtumia wake
Matthew19:10 Nao arutwo aake makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew19:11 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:12 Nĩ ũndũ nĩkũrĩ itũmi cia mĩthemba mĩingĩ iria igiragia andũ mahikanie; amwe nĩ ũndũ maaciarirwo mahaana ta andũ ahakũre; angĩ nĩ ũndũ andũ nĩmaamatuire ũguo; nao angĩ magaga kũhikania nĩ ũndũ wa Ũthamaki wa igũrũ. Reke ũrĩa ũngĩhota kwamũkĩra ũrutani ũyũ awamũkĩre.”
Matthew19:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew19:14 No Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew19:15 Naake agĩciigĩrĩra mooko agĩcooka agĩĩthiĩra.
Matthew19:16 Na hĩndĩ ĩmwe mũndũ ũmwe agĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:17 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:18 Naake akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:19 tĩĩa thooguo na maitũguo; na ningĩ wende mũndũ ũrĩa mũrigainie naake o ta ũrĩa wĩyendeete wee mwene.”
Matthew19:20 Naake mũndũ ũcio mwĩthĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew19:21 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew19:22 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio mwĩthĩ aiguire ũguo
Matthew19:23 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Matthew19:24 Ngũmwĩra o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Matthew19:25 Nao arutwo maigua ũguo makĩgega mũno
Matthew19:26 Naake Jesũ akĩmarora akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew19:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew19:28 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew19:29 Mũndũ wothe ũtigĩĩte nyũmba ciake kana aariũ na aarĩ a nyina
Matthew19:30 No rĩĩrĩ
Matthew20:1 “Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta mũndũ ũrĩa woimagarire rũũciinĩ tene agĩthiĩ kwandĩka andũ a kũmũrĩmĩra mũgũnda wake wa mĩthabibũ.
Matthew20:2 Naake arĩĩkia kũiguithania nao atĩ ekũmarĩha o dinari agĩkĩmatũma makarute wĩra mũgũndainĩ wake wa mĩthabibũ.
Matthew20:3 Agĩcooka agĩthiĩ rĩngĩ ndũũnyũinĩ ta thaa ithatũ cia rũũciinĩ akĩona andũ mataarĩ na ũndũ meekaga
Matthew20:4 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew20:5 Nao magĩthiĩ. Agĩcooka agĩĩka o ũguo thaa thita cia mũthenya na ta thaa kenda.
Matthew20:6 Ningĩ ta thaa ikũmi na ĩmwe agĩthiĩ ndũũnyũinĩ akĩona andũ angĩ maikarĩĩte o ũguo
Matthew20:7 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew20:8 “Na hwaĩinĩ wakinya
Matthew20:9 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo thaa ikũmi na ĩmwe mookire
Matthew20:10 Rĩrĩa arĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo mbere maakinyire meciirĩĩtie atĩ mekũrĩhwo makĩria
Matthew20:11 Magĩkĩoya mũcaara ũcio
Matthew20:12 ‘Aya a thuutha maruta wĩra o ithaa rĩmwe
Matthew20:13 “Naake agĩcookeria ũmwe wao atĩrĩ
Matthew20:14 Rĩu kĩoe mũcaara waku na ũinũke. Nĩ niĩ ndeenda kũrĩha ũyũ wa thuutha o ta ũguo ndakũrĩha.
Matthew20:15 Githĩ ndiĩtĩkĩrĩĩtio gwĩka ũrĩa ngwenda na indo ciakwa? Kana ũkũigua ũiru nĩ ũndũ ndĩ mũtaana?’ ”
Matthew20:16 Naake Jesũ akĩrĩĩkia akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew20:17 Nao marĩ njĩrainĩ meerekeire Jerusalemu
Matthew20:18 “Twerekeire Jerusalemu kũrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩneanwo kũrĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho. Nao nĩmarĩmũtuĩra kũũragwo
Matthew20:19 macooke mamũneane kũrĩ andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ nĩguo anyũrũrio
Matthew20:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew20:21 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew20:22 No Jesũ akĩĩra aariũ acio a Zebedi atĩrĩ
Matthew20:23 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew20:24 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arutwo arĩa angĩ ikũmi maiguire ũguo
Matthew20:25 Naake Jesũ akĩmeeta oothe akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew20:26 No ũndũ ũcio ndũkaanooneke gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu. Ũrĩa ũkwenda gũtuĩka mũnene gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu nĩatuĩke ndungata ya arĩa angĩ.
Matthew20:27 Na angĩkorwo nĩkũrĩ ũmwe wanyu ũkwenda gũtuĩka wa mbere
Matthew20:28 Amu o naake Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ndookire gũtungatwo
Matthew20:29 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ na arutwo aake moimaga Jeriko
Matthew20:30 Nao atumuumu eerĩ maikarĩĩte mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra maigua atĩ nĩ Jesũ waahĩtũkaga makĩanĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew20:31 Nao andũ makĩmakũũma
Matthew20:32 Naake Jesũ akĩrũũgama akĩmeeta
Matthew20:33 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew20:34 Naake akĩmaiguĩra tha
Matthew21:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew21:2 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew21:3 Mũndũ angĩmũũria ũndũ
Matthew21:4 Ũndũ ũyũ wekirwo nĩ geetha ũhoro ũrĩa mũnabii aarĩĩtie ũhingio
Matthew21:5 “Ĩraai andũ a itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu atĩrĩ
Matthew21:6 Nao arutwo magĩgĩthiĩ
Matthew21:7 Makĩreehe ndigiri na njaũ ya yo
Matthew21:8 Nao andũ aingĩ makĩara nguo ciao njĩrainĩ
Matthew21:9 Nao andũ arĩa maamũtongoreetie na arĩa maamuumĩĩte thuutha
Matthew21:10 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aatoonyaga Jerusalemu
Matthew21:11 Nao andũ magĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew21:12 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ agĩtoonya Hekaarũ akĩrutũrũra arĩa oothe meendagĩria na maagũragĩra kuo. Agĩcooka akĩng'aũrania meetha cia arĩa maakũũranagia mbeeca o na itĩ cia arĩa meendagia ndutuura
Matthew21:13 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew21:14 Nao atumuumu na cionje magĩũka kũrĩ we kũu thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ
Matthew21:15 No athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho makĩraakara moona maũndũ macio ma kũmakania eekaga
Matthew21:16 Magĩkĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Matthew21:17 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmatiga akiuma nja ya itũũra rĩu agĩthiĩ Bethania akĩraara kuo.
Matthew21:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew21:19 Naake akĩona mũkũyũ mũkĩrainĩ wa njĩra agĩthiĩ harĩ guo
Matthew21:20 Nao arutwo moona ũguo
Matthew21:21 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:22 Maũndũ moothe marĩa mũrĩhooyaga mũrĩ na wĩtĩkio nĩmũrĩheagwo.”
Matthew21:23 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aatoonyire Hekaarũinĩ
Matthew21:24 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:25 Tanjĩĩraai atĩrĩ
Matthew21:26 Tũngiuga atĩ
Matthew21:27 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio magĩcookeria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Matthew21:28 “Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew21:29 Naake mwana ũcio agĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:30 Ningĩ ithe agĩthiĩ kũrĩ ũcio ũngĩ akĩmwĩra o ũguo. Naake akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew21:31 Nĩ ũrĩkũ wa acio eerĩ wekire ũrĩa ithe eendaga?”Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:32 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Matthew21:33 Ningĩ Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew21:34 Hĩndĩ ya kũgetha thabibũ yakinya
Matthew21:35 Nao akombori acio makĩnyiita ngombo icio ciake
Matthew21:36 Mwene mũgũnda agĩcooka agĩtũma ngombo ingĩ nyingĩ kũrĩ iria aatũmĩĩte hĩndĩ ya mbere
Matthew21:37 Thuutha wa ũguo akĩmatũmĩra mũũrũwe akĩĩĩraga atĩrĩ
Matthew21:38 No hĩndĩ ĩrĩa akombori acio moonire mũũrũwe makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Matthew21:39 Magĩkĩmũnyiita makĩmũruta nja ya mũgũnda makĩmũũraga.”
Matthew21:40 Jesũ agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:41 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew21:42 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew21:43 “Kwoguo ngũmwĩra atĩ Ũthamaki wa Ngai nĩũkaarutwo kuuma kũrĩ inyuĩ ũheeo andũ arĩa magaaciaraga maciaro maagĩrĩru. [
Matthew21:44 Na mũndũ ũrĩa ũkaagwĩra ihiga rĩu nĩagaathuthĩka
Matthew21:45 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew21:46 Nao magĩkĩgeria kũmũnyiita
Matthew22:1 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmaarĩria na ngerekano akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew22:2 “Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũhaana ta mũthamaki ũrĩa wathondekire iruga rĩa ũhiki wa mũũriũ.
Matthew22:3 Agĩcooka agĩtũma ndungata ciake ithiĩ igeete andũ arĩa meetĩirwo iruga
Matthew22:4 Thuutha ũcio agĩtũma ndungata ingĩ agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew22:5 No andũ acio meetĩirwo iruga gũtirĩ warĩ na bata narĩo. Maathiire o na mbere na mĩhang'o yao: ũmwe agĩthiĩ mũgũnda wake
Matthew22:6 nao arĩa angĩ makĩnyiita ndungata icio ciatũmĩĩtwo magĩcihũũra
Matthew22:7 Mũthamaki nĩaraakarire mũno na nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew22:8 Agĩcooka agĩĩta ndungata ciake agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew22:9 Thiĩi njĩrainĩ
Matthew22:10 Nacio ndungata icio igĩgĩthiĩ igĩĩta andũ arĩa oothe cionire
Matthew22:11 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew22:12 ‘Mũraata
Matthew22:13 Mũthamaki agĩkĩĩra ndungata atĩrĩ
Matthew22:14 Naake Jesũ akĩrĩĩkia na kuuga atĩrĩ
Matthew22:15 Ningĩ Afarisai magĩthiĩ makĩrĩĩkanĩra ũrĩa megũtega Jesũ na mĩario yake.
Matthew22:16 Magĩkĩmũtũmĩra arutwo amwe aao
Matthew22:17 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew22:18 Tondũ Jesũ nĩamenyaga mĩbango ĩyo yao mĩũru akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew22:19 Tanyoniai mbeeca ĩrĩa ĩrĩhaga igooti!”Magĩkĩmũreehera mbeeca ĩyo
Matthew22:20 naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:21 Nao makĩmũcookeria makĩmwĩra atĩ nĩ cia mũthamaki wa Roma.Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew22:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew22:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew22:24 “Mũrutani
Matthew22:25 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew22:26 No gũkĩhaana o ũguo na mũrũ wa nyina wa keerĩ na wa gatatũ o na acio angĩ oothe kinyagia wa mũgwanja.
Matthew22:27 Thuutha wao oothe
Matthew22:28 Rĩu-rĩ
Matthew22:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:30 Nĩ ũndũ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ arĩa akuũ makaariũka matikaahikanagia kana mahikage makaahaana ta araika arĩa me igũrũ.
Matthew22:31 Na ha ũhoro wa akuũ kũriũka-rĩ
Matthew22:32 ‘Nĩ niĩ Ngai wa Aburahamu
Matthew22:33 Nao andũ maigua ũguo makĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa ũrutani wake.
Matthew22:34 Na rĩrĩa Afarisai maiguire atĩ Jesũ nĩahoteete Asadukai na mĩario
Matthew22:35 na ũmwe wao warĩ mũrutani wa Watho akĩgeria kũmũtega na kĩũria.
Matthew22:36 Akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:37 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:38 Rĩu nĩrĩo rĩathani rĩrĩa inene mũno na rĩa bata mũno.
Matthew22:39 Na rĩa keerĩ rĩrĩa rĩrĩ bata mũno rĩhaana o ta rĩu; ‘Enda mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩ o ta ũrĩa wĩyendeete wee mwene.’
Matthew22:40 Maathani macio meerĩ nĩ mo mũthingi wa Watho wa Musa o na ũrutani wa anabii.”
Matthew22:41 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe Afarisai amwe moonganĩĩte hamwe Jesũ nĩamooririe atĩrĩ
Matthew22:42 “Mũgwĩciiria atĩa ũhoro wa Mesia? Nĩ mũrũ wa ũ?”Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:43 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew22:44 ‘Mwathani nĩerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ
Matthew22:45 Angĩkorwo Daudi nĩetire Mesia ‘Mwathani-rĩ
Matthew22:46 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wahotire gũcookeria Jesũ ũndũ
Matthew23:1 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩĩra andũ o hamwe na arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Matthew23:2 “Arutani a Watho na Afarisai nĩ o maheetwo rũũtha rwa gũtaũra Watho wa Musa.
Matthew23:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio no mũhaka mwathĩkagĩre na mũhingagie ũrĩa wothe mamwĩraga mwĩke; no mũtikaarũmagĩrĩre mĩtugo yao nĩ ũndũ matiĩkaga ũrĩa o eene mahunjagia.
Matthew23:4 Moohagĩra andũ mĩrigo mĩritũ mũno makamaigĩrĩra
Matthew23:5 Meekaga maũndũ moothe nĩ geetha moonwo nĩ andũ. Taroraai ndaamĩ iria irĩ na Maandĩko
Matthew23:6 Meendaga gũikarĩra itĩ cia mbere marugainĩ o na thunagogiinĩ.
Matthew23:7 Ningĩ meendaga kũgeithĩrio ndũũnyũ na gwĩtwo ‘Arutani
Matthew23:8 No rĩĩrĩ
Matthew23:9 Ningĩ gũũkũ thĩ ĩno mũtiagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩta mũndũ o na ũmwe ‘Baaba
Matthew23:10 O na ningĩ mũtiagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩtwo ‘atongoria’ nĩ ũndũ mũtongoria wanyu no ũmwe na nĩ we Mesia.
Matthew23:11 Ũrĩa mũnene mũno gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu no mũhaka akorwo arĩ ndungata yanyu.
Matthew23:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew23:13 “Kaĩ inyuĩ arutani a Watho na Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Hinga ici! Nĩ amu mũgiragia andũ matoonye Ũthamaki wa igũrũ
Matthew23:14 Kaĩ inyuĩ arutani a Watho na Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Hinga ici! Nĩ inyuĩ mũtoonyagĩrĩra atumia a ndigwa mũkamathũũkĩria mĩciĩ yao
Matthew23:15 “Kaĩ inyuĩ arutani a Watho na Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Hinga ici! Mũringaga maria na mũgatuĩkania mabũrũri nĩ geetha mũgĩe na mũrutwo ũmwe
Matthew23:16 “Kaĩ inyuĩ atongoria atumuumu mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Mũrutanaga atĩ
Matthew23:17 Inyuĩ irimũ ici ndumuumu! Nĩ kĩĩ kĩ bata makĩria
Matthew23:18 Na no mũrutanaga atĩrĩ
Matthew23:19 Kaĩ mũrĩ atumuumu-ĩ! Nĩ kĩĩ kĩrĩ bata makĩria
Matthew23:20 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ ekwĩhĩta na kĩgongoona ehĩtaga nakĩo o hamwe na iheeo iria irĩ ho;
Matthew23:21 na mũndũ angĩĩhĩta na Hekaarũ ehĩtaga nayo na akehĩta na Ngai ũrĩa ũikaraga thĩinĩ wayo.
Matthew23:22 Ningĩ mũndũ ehĩta na igũrũ ehĩtaga na gĩtĩ kĩa ũnene kĩa Ngai na akehĩta na Ngai ũrĩa ũgĩikaragĩra.
Matthew23:23 “Kaĩ inyuĩ arutani a Watho na Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Hinga ici! Mũhothaga gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi o na gĩa terere
Matthew23:24 Inyuĩ atongoria aya atumuumu! Mũcungaga ngi kuuma caaiinĩ wanyu no mũkameria ngamĩĩra!
Matthew23:25 “Kaĩ inyuĩ arutani a Watho na Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Hinga ici! Mũthambagia ikombe na thaani cianyu na igũrũ
Matthew23:26 Afarisai aya atumuumu! Ambaai mũthambie gĩkombe na thĩinĩ
Matthew23:27 “Kaĩ inyuĩ arutani a Watho na Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Hinga ici! Mũhaana ta ũrĩa mbĩĩrĩra cionekaga irĩ thaka ihakĩĩtwo rangi na igũrũ
Matthew23:28 Muonekaga na igũrũ mũrĩ eega nĩ andũ oothe no na kũu thĩinĩ mũiyũirwo nĩ ũhinga na meehia.
Matthew23:29 “Kaĩ inyuĩ arutani a Watho na Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩna-ĩ! Hinga ici! Mwakaga mbĩĩrĩra cia anabii na mũkagemia mbĩĩrĩra cia andũ arĩa maarĩ athingu.
Matthew23:30 Mũgacooka mũkoiga atĩ korwo mwarĩ muoyo hĩndĩ ya maithe maanyu mũtingĩekire ũrĩa meekire makĩũraga anabii.
Matthew23:31 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew23:32 Mũtigĩthiĩ na mbere mũhingie maũndũ marĩa maithe maanyu maambĩrĩirie!
Matthew23:33 Inyuĩ nyoka ici o inyuĩ ciana cia nduĩra! Mũkaahonoka atĩa gũthiĩ icuainĩ?
Matthew23:34 Nĩngaamũtũmĩra anabii na athuuri oogĩ o na arutani; amwe nĩmũkaamooraga
Matthew23:35 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio nĩmũgaakinyĩrwo nĩ iherithia nĩ ũndũ wa gũita thakame ya andũ oothe arĩa athingu
Matthew23:36 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Matthew23:37 “Jerusalemu
Matthew23:38 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew23:39 Kuuma rĩu ndũrĩ hĩndĩ ũkaanyona rĩngĩ kinya rĩrĩa ũkoiga atĩrĩ
Matthew24:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew24:2 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew24:3 Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aikarĩĩte thĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ
Matthew24:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew24:5 nĩ amu andũ aingĩ nĩmagooka makiugaga atĩ maraaria handũinĩ haakwa makoiga atĩrĩ
Matthew24:6 Ningĩ nĩmũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara na mũhuuhu wa mbaara
Matthew24:7 Namo mabũrũri nĩmagookanĩrĩra o na moothamaki mookanĩrĩre. Nakuo kũndũ kũingĩ nĩgũkaagĩa ng'aragu na ithingithia.
Matthew24:8 Maũndũ macio moothe magaakorwo mahaana ta kĩambĩrĩria kĩa ruwo ta rwa mũtumia akĩrũmwo aciare.
Matthew24:9 “Ningĩ nĩmũkaanyiitwo mũtwarwo mũkaherithio na mũũragwo. Nao andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩmakaamũmena nĩ ũndũ wakwa.
Matthew24:10 Nao andũ aingĩ nĩmagaatigana na wĩtĩkio wao hĩndĩ ĩyo; na makunyananĩre na mathũũrane o eene.
Matthew24:11 Ningĩ anabii aingĩ a maheeni nĩmakooneka na nĩmakaahĩtithia andũ aingĩ.
Matthew24:12 Na tondũ waganu nĩũkaingĩha
Matthew24:13 No ũrĩa ũgaakirĩrĩria kinya mũthia nĩakaahonokio.
Matthew24:14 Naguo ũhoro ũyũ Mwega wa Ũthamaki nĩũkaahunjio thĩ yothe ũhaana ta ũira kũrĩ ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe
Matthew24:15 “Nĩmũkoona ‘Kĩndũ gĩ thaahu na magigi’ kĩrĩa mũnabii Danieli aaririe ũhoro wakĩo
Matthew24:16 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa me Judea nĩmakoorĩra irimainĩ.
Matthew24:17 Naake mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ nyũmba igũrũ ndakaanaharũrũke acookere indo iria irĩ thĩinĩ wa nyũmba yake
Matthew24:18 kana ũrĩa wĩ mũgũnda acookere nguo ciake mũciĩ.
Matthew24:19 Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo marĩ na nda hĩndĩ ĩyo
Matthew24:20 Hooyai Ngai atĩ gwĩthara kwanyu gũtikaanakinye hĩndĩ ya heho kana mũthenya wa Thabatũ!
Matthew24:21 Amu hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩgũkooneka mathĩĩna makĩrĩĩte marĩa moothe maanoonwo kuuma rĩrĩa Ngai oombire thĩ nginyagia rĩu
Matthew24:22 No Ngai nĩanyiihanyiihĩĩtie matukũ macio ma mathĩĩna
Matthew24:23 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ angĩkaamwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew24:24 Nĩ amu Mesia a maheeni na anabii a maheeni nĩmakooneka
Matthew24:25 No inyuĩ nĩndamwĩra ũguo mbere ya hĩndĩ ĩyo!
Matthew24:26 “Nĩ ũndũ
Matthew24:27 Amu o ta ũrĩa rũheni rũhenũkaga kuuma mwena wa na irathĩro nginya wa na ithũĩro
Matthew24:28 “Kũrĩa guothe kũrĩ kĩimba nĩkuo nderi ikoongana.
Matthew24:29 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew24:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kĩmenyithia kĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩgĩkooneka kũũrĩa igũrũ; nao andũ oothe a thĩ nĩmakaarĩra moona Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agĩũka e thĩinĩ wa matu ma igũrũ e na hinya na riiri mũingĩ.
Matthew24:31 Hĩndĩ ĩyo karumbeeta nĩgakaahuuhwo
Matthew24:32 “Mwĩruteei na mũkũyũ; honge ciaguo ciambĩrĩria kũruta mathangũ nĩmũmenyaga atĩ hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ ĩ hakuhĩ.
Matthew24:33 Ũguo noguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkoona maũndũ macio
Matthew24:34 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Matthew24:35 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩigaathira
Matthew24:36 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ rĩrĩa mũthenya ũcio na thaa ĩyo igaakinya
Matthew24:37 O ta ũrĩa kwahaanaga matukũinĩ ma Noa
Matthew24:38 Nĩ amu mbere ya kĩguũ andũ nĩmaarĩaga na makanyua
Matthew24:39 Matiamenyaga ũrĩa kwahaanaga kinya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa oothe maatwarirwo nĩ mũiyũro wa maaĩ. Ũguo nĩguo gũcooka kwa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ gũkaahaana.
Matthew24:40 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ eerĩ nĩmagaakorwo mũgũnda hamwe
Matthew24:41 Nao atumia eerĩ nĩmagaakorwo marĩ hamwe magĩthĩa
Matthew24:42 “Kĩĩhũgeei nĩ ũndũ mũtiũĩ mũthenya ũrĩa Mwathani wanyu agacooka.
Matthew24:43 Menyaai na ma atĩ
Matthew24:44 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew24:45 “Ndungata ĩrĩa njĩhokeku na njũgĩ-rĩ
Matthew24:46 Ndungata ĩyo kaĩ nĩgĩaga na gĩkeno kĩnene ĩngĩkorererwo nĩ mũmĩathi ĩgĩĩka ũguo-ĩ!
Matthew24:47 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ mwene mũciĩ ehokagĩra ndungata ĩyo indo ciake ciothe.
Matthew24:48 No ndungata ĩyo ĩngĩkorwo ĩrĩ njũru ĩkĩĩre na ngoro
Matthew24:49 ĩkĩambĩrĩrie kũhũũra ndungata iria ingĩ
Matthew24:50 Mwathi wayo agacooka mũthenya ũrĩa ndungata ĩyo ĩtamwĩrĩgĩrĩire na ithaa rĩrĩa ĩtooĩ
Matthew24:51 amĩherithie na amĩikie hamwe na andũ arĩa hinga. Kũu andũ makaarĩra na mahagaranie magego.
Matthew25:1 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũkaahaananio na airĩĩtu ikũmi arĩa moire mataawa maao magĩthiĩ gũtũnga mũhikania.
Matthew25:2 Ataano aao maarĩ akĩĩgu na ataano maarĩ oogĩ.
Matthew25:3 Arĩa maarĩ akĩĩgu
Matthew25:4 no arĩa maarĩ oogĩ maakuuire mataawa maao na magĩkuua maguta.
Matthew25:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew25:6 “No gwakinya thaa thita cia ũtukũ gũkĩanĩrĩrwo atĩrĩ
Matthew25:7 Airĩĩtu acio ikũmi magĩgĩũkĩra na makĩgwatia mataawa maao.
Matthew25:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo airĩĩtu arĩa akĩĩgu makĩĩra arĩa oogĩ atĩrĩ
Matthew25:9 Nao arĩa maarĩ oogĩ makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew25:10 Nao arĩa akĩĩgu magĩteng'era magĩthiĩ kũgũra maguta
Matthew25:11 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew25:12 No mũhikania akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew25:13 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ikaragaai mwĩhũũgĩĩte
Matthew25:14 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo Ũthamaki wa igũrũ ũkaahaananio na mũndũ wathiaga rũgendo
Matthew25:15 Agĩcooka agĩcigaĩra o ndungata kũringana na ũhoti wayo; akĩgaĩra ndungata ĩmwe taranda ithaano
Matthew25:16 Na o hĩndĩ ĩyo ndungata ĩrĩa yatigĩirwo taranda ithaano ĩgĩthiĩ ĩkĩonjorithia taranda ciayo
Matthew25:17 Ĩrĩa yatigĩirwo igĩrĩ
Matthew25:18 No ndungata ĩrĩa yatigĩirwo ĩmwe nĩ mwathi wayo yoimagarire
Matthew25:19 “Thuutha wa hĩndĩ ndaaya
Matthew25:20 Ndungata ĩrĩa yanengereetwo taranda ithaano ĩgĩũka
Matthew25:21 Naake mwathi wayo akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew25:22 “Nayo ndungata ĩrĩa yanengereetwo taranda igĩrĩ ĩkĩingĩra ĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew25:23 Naake mwathi wayo akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew25:24 “Na hĩndĩ ĩyo ndungata ĩrĩa yanengereetwo taranda ĩmwe nayo ĩkĩingĩra ĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew25:25 Niĩ nĩndetigĩrire
Matthew25:26 “Naake mwathi wa ndungata ĩyo agĩkĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew25:27 Wakĩagĩrĩirwo nĩkũiga taranda yakwa bengi kũrĩa ingĩacookerio hamwe na maciaro maayo ndacooka.’
Matthew25:28 Mũnene ũcio agĩkĩĩra ndungata iria ingĩ atĩrĩ
Matthew25:29 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ wothe wĩ na indo nĩakongererwo ingĩ nyingĩ
Matthew25:30 Rĩu ndungata ĩno ya tũhũ mĩikiei na kũu nja ndumainĩ. Kũu nĩkuo andũ makaarĩra na mahagaranie magego.’
Matthew25:31 “Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agooka e Mũthamaki
Matthew25:32 na andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe nĩmagacookanĩrĩrio mbere yake. Naake nĩakaamaamũrania maita meerĩ o ta ũrĩa mũrĩithi aamũranagia ng'ondu na mbũri.
Matthew25:33 Nĩakaiga arĩa atheru mwena wake wa ũrĩo
Matthew25:34 Acooke eere arĩa magaakorwo mwena wake wa ũrĩo atĩrĩ
Matthew25:35 Nĩ amu ndaarĩ mũhũũtu mũkĩĩhe gĩa kũrĩa
Matthew25:36 ndaarĩ njaga mũkĩĩhe gĩa kwĩhumba; ndaarĩ mũrũaru mũkĩĩmenyerera
Matthew25:37 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo acio atheru nĩmakaamũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew25:38 Na nĩ rĩ twakuonire wĩ mũgeni tũgĩkũnyiita ũgeni
Matthew25:39 O na nĩ rĩ twakuonire wĩ mũrũaru kana wĩ njeera tũgĩũka gũkuona?’
Matthew25:40 Naake mũthamaki nĩakaamacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew25:41 “Ningĩ nĩagacooka eere arĩa magaakorwo mwena wake wa ũmotho atĩrĩ
Matthew25:42 Nĩ amu ndaarĩ mũhũũtu mũkĩnyima gĩa kũrĩa
Matthew25:43 ndaarĩ mũgeni mũkĩrega kũnyiita ũgeni; ndaarĩ njaga mũkĩrega kũũhe gĩa kwĩhumba; ndaarĩ mũrũaru na ndaarĩ njeera mũkĩrega gũũka kũũnyona.’
Matthew25:44 “Nao nĩmakaamũcookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew25:45 Naake Mũthamaki nĩakaamacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew25:46 Hĩndĩ ĩyo acio aaganu nĩmagaathiĩ iherainĩ rĩa tene na tene
Matthew26:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew26:2 “Nĩmũũĩ atĩ thigũkũ ya Bathaka nĩgũkinya thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ
Matthew26:3 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na athuuri magĩcemania mũciĩ kwa Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene wetagwo Kaiafa
Matthew26:4 makĩbanga kũnyiita Jesũ na hitho nĩguo mamũũrage.
Matthew26:5 No makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Matthew26:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew26:7 aikaire meethainĩ akĩrĩa
Matthew26:8 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa arutwo moonire ũguo makĩraakara makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Matthew26:9 Maguta maya nĩmangĩendio mbeeca nyingĩ iheeo athĩĩni.”
Matthew26:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmenya ũrĩa moigaga
Matthew26:11 Nĩ amu andũ arĩa athĩĩni mũrĩkoragwo nao hĩndĩ ciothe no mũtirĩkoragwo na niĩ hĩndĩ ciothe.
Matthew26:12 Anjitĩrĩria maguta macio nĩ geetha ahaarĩrĩrie mwĩrĩ wakwa ũhoroinĩ wa gũthikwo.
Matthew26:13 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ kũrĩa guothe ũhoro ũyũ Mwega ũkaahunjio thĩinĩ wa thĩ yothe
Matthew26:14 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo ũmwe wa arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ ũrĩa wetagwo Judasi Mũisikariota
Matthew26:15 akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:16 Kuuma hĩndĩ ĩyo Judasi akĩambĩrĩria gũcaria mweke wa kũneana Jesũ kũrĩ o.
Matthew26:17 Mũthenya wa mbere wa Thigũkũ ya mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia
Matthew26:18 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:19 Nao arutwo magĩĩka o ta ũrĩa Jesũ aameerĩĩte makĩhaarĩria irio cia Bathaka.
Matthew26:20 Gwakinya hwaĩinĩ
Matthew26:21 Rĩrĩa maarĩaga-rĩ
Matthew26:22 Nao arutwo makĩnyiitwo nĩ kĩeha kĩnene
Matthew26:23 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:24 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegũkua o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo
Matthew26:25 Naake Judasi ũrĩa mũmũkunyanĩri akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew26:27 Agĩcooka akĩoya gĩkombe
Matthew26:28 Ĩno nĩ yo thakame yakwa ya kĩrĩĩkanĩro ĩrĩa ĩgũitwo tondũ wa andũ aingĩ nĩ ũndũ wa kuohanĩrwo kwa meehia.
Matthew26:29 No ngũmwĩra atĩ
Matthew26:30 Nao marĩĩkia kũina rwĩmbo
Matthew26:31 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:32 No ndaariũkio nĩngaamũtongoria gũthiĩ Galili.”
Matthew26:33 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Matthew26:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:35 Naake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:36 Jesũ agĩcooka agĩthiĩ na arutwo aake handũ heetagwo Gethisemane
Matthew26:37 Akĩoya Petero na aariũ arĩa eerĩ a Zebedi agĩthiĩ nao. Naake agĩkĩambĩrĩria kũigua kĩeha na gũthĩĩnĩka ngoro
Matthew26:38 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:39 Agĩthiĩ kabere haniini
Matthew26:40 Rĩrĩa aacookire harĩa arutwo maarĩ agĩkora makomeete
Matthew26:41 Mwĩhũũgeei na mũhooe nĩguo mũtikagũe magerioinĩ. Ngoro nĩkwenda no mwĩrĩ ndũrĩ na hinya.”
Matthew26:42 Agĩcooka akĩmatiga rĩngĩ agĩthiĩ akĩhooya atĩrĩ
Matthew26:43 Naake acooka rĩngĩ harĩa arutwo maarĩ
Matthew26:44 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmatiga
Matthew26:45 Rĩrĩa aacookire harĩ arutwo akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew26:46 Ũkĩraai tũthiĩ; ũrĩa ũkũngunyanĩra nĩakinya!”
Matthew26:47 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aaragia ũguo Judasi
Matthew26:48 Judasi ũcio wamũkunyanagĩra nĩamaheete kĩmenyithia akameera atĩrĩ
Matthew26:49 Naake Judasi agĩthiĩ o rĩmwe harĩ Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:50 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:51 Naake ũmwe wa arĩa maarĩ na Jesũ
Matthew26:52 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:53 Githĩ ndũũĩ atĩ no njĩtie ũteithio kuuma kũrĩ Awa
Matthew26:54 No ningĩ-rĩ
Matthew26:55 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩũria andũ acio atĩrĩ
Matthew26:56 No maũndũ maya moonekeete nĩ geetha Maandĩko ma anabii mahinge.”Naake arĩĩkia kũnyiitwo
Matthew26:57 Nao acio maanyiitire Jesũ makĩmũtwara mũciĩ gwa Kaiafa ũrĩa warĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene
Matthew26:58 Naake Petero akĩmũrũmĩrĩra arĩ o haraaya
Matthew26:59 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene o na kĩama gĩothe magĩcaria ũira wa maheeni ũrĩa mangĩruta nĩguo mamũũragithie
Matthew26:60 no makĩaga
Matthew26:61 “Mũndũ ũyũ oigire atĩ no ahote gũtharia Hekaarũ ya Ngai
Matthew26:62 Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene akĩrũũgama akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Matthew26:63 No Jesũ agĩkira ki. Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:64 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:65 Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene aigua ũguo agĩtembũranga nguo yake nĩ ũndũ wa kũraakara akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:66 Mũgũtua atĩa?”Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Matthew26:67 Magĩcooka makĩmũtuĩra mata ũthiũ na makĩmũhũũra. Nao acio maamũgũthire makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:68 “Mesia tũrathĩre nũũ wakũgũtha!”
Matthew26:69 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew26:70 Naake Petero agĩkaana mbere yao oothe akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:71 Hĩndĩ ĩyo agĩthiĩ kĩhingoinĩ. Naake mũirĩĩtu ũngĩ ndungata akĩmuona akĩĩra andũ arĩa maarĩ hau atĩrĩ
Matthew26:72 Naake Petero akĩambĩrĩria kwĩhĩta akiugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:73 Thuutha wa ihinda iniini andũ arĩa maarũũgamĩĩte hau magĩthiĩ harĩ Petero makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Matthew26:74 Naake Petero akĩambĩrĩria kwĩhĩta akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew26:75 naake Petero akĩririkana ũrĩa Jesũ aamwĩrĩĩte atĩ
Matthew27:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew27:2 nao makĩmuoha na mĩnyororo
Matthew27:3 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Judasi ũrĩa wakunyanĩire Jesũ aamenyire atĩ Jesũ nĩatuĩrĩirwo gũkua
Matthew27:4 “Nĩnjĩhĩĩtie nĩ ũndũ wa gũkunyanĩra mũndũ ũtehĩĩtie nĩguo ooragwo.”Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:5 Naake Judasi agĩikania icunjĩ icio cia betha thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ
Matthew27:6 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene makĩoya mbeeca icio makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:7 Nao maacookania ndundu makĩiguithania atĩ magũre gĩthaka kĩa Mũũmbi Nyũngũ gĩtuĩke gĩa gũthikagwo ageni.
Matthew27:8 Nĩkĩo kinya o na ũũmũũthĩ gĩthaka kĩu gĩĩtagwo
Matthew27:9 Nacio ciugo iria ciarĩĩtio nĩ mũnabii Jeremia igĩkĩhinga harĩa oigĩĩte atĩrĩ
Matthew27:10 Magĩcitũmĩra na kũgũra gĩthaka kĩa Mũũmbi Nyũngũ kũringana na ũrĩa Mwathani aanjathĩĩte.”
Matthew27:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew27:12 No ndarĩ ũndũ aacookirie igũrũ rĩa maũndũ marĩa aathitangagwo namo nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na athuuri.
Matthew27:13 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:14 Jesũ ndacookirie ũndũ o na ũmwe
Matthew27:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew27:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩkwarĩ na mũndũ ũmwe woheetwo na woĩkaine mũno wetagwo Baraba.
Matthew27:17 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa andũ moonganire
Matthew27:18 We nĩamenyaga wega biũ atĩ atongoria a Ayahudi maareeheete Jesũ kũrĩ we nĩ ũndũ wa ũiru.
Matthew27:19 Na rĩĩri
Matthew27:20 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na athuuri makĩringĩrĩria andũ meere Pilato amoohorere Baraba no ooragithie Jesũ.
Matthew27:21 No Pilato akĩũria andũ atĩrĩ
Matthew27:22 Ningĩ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:23 No Pilato akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Matthew27:24 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Pilato oonire atĩ gũtiarĩ na bata wa gũthiĩ na mbere
Matthew27:25 Nao andũ oothe magĩcookia
Matthew27:26 Pilato agĩkĩmoohorera Baraba; na arĩĩkia kũhũũrithia Jesũ na kĩboko
Matthew27:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo thigari cia Pilato igĩtwara Jesũ mũciĩ kwa Barũũthi ũcio Mũroma
Matthew27:28 Igĩcooka ikĩmũruta nguo ciake ikĩmwĩkĩra nguo nduune
Matthew27:29 ikĩmũthondekera thũmbĩ ya mĩigua ikĩmwĩkĩra mũtwe
Matthew27:30 Igĩcooka ikĩmũtuĩra mata
Matthew27:31 Ciarĩĩkia kũmũnyũrũria ikĩmũruta nguo ĩyo nduune ikĩmwĩkĩra nguo ciake ikĩmuumagaria ikamwambe.
Matthew27:32 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew27:33 Ciakinya handũ heetagwo Gologotha
Matthew27:34 ikĩhe Jesũ ndibei yatukanĩĩtio na kĩndũ kĩrũrũ; no amĩcama akĩrega kũmĩnyua.
Matthew27:35 Nacio thigari ciarĩĩkia kũmwamba igĩcuukĩra nguo ciake mĩtĩ igĩcigayana.
Matthew27:36 Thuutha wa ũguo igĩikara thĩ kũmwĩrorera.
Matthew27:37 Naho hau igũrũ wa mũtwe wake hakĩandĩkwo ũndũ ũrĩa aathitangĩirwo: “Ũyũ nĩ we Jesũ
Matthew27:38 Igĩcooka ikĩamba aici eerĩ hamwe naake
Matthew27:39 Nao andũ arĩa maahĩtũkagĩra hau moona Jesũ makĩmũnyũrũria makĩinagia mĩtwe makiugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:40 “Wee ũngĩatharirie Hekaarũ na ũcooke ũmĩake na mĩthenya ĩtatũ-rĩ
Matthew27:41 O nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho na athuuri makĩmũnyũrũria makiugaga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:42 “Nĩarahonokagia arĩa angĩ
Matthew27:43 Ningĩ-rĩ
Matthew27:44 O nao aici arĩa maambanĩirio naake makĩmũruma o ũguo.
Matthew27:45 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew27:46 Ta thaa kenda Jesũ akĩgũũthũka na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:47 Nao andũ amwe arĩa marũũgamĩĩte hau makiuga atĩrĩ
Matthew27:48 Naake ũmwe wao agĩteng'era
Matthew27:49 No arĩa angĩ makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Matthew27:50 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akĩgũũthũka rĩngĩ na hinya mũno
Matthew27:51 Nakĩo gĩtambaya kĩa Hekaarũ gĩgĩatũkana maita meerĩ kuuma igũrũ kinya thĩ. Nakuo gũkĩgĩa na gĩthingithia
Matthew27:52 Nacio mbĩĩrĩra ikĩhingũka
Matthew27:53 makiuma mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ciao. Naake Jesũ aariũka
Matthew27:54 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew27:55 Naho nĩhaarĩ atumia aingĩ meeroragĩra ũrĩa kũrathiĩ na mbere me haraaya
Matthew27:56 Gatagatĩinĩ kaao haarĩ Mariamu Mũmagidali
Matthew27:57 Hwaĩinĩ ũcio mũndũ mũtongu woimĩĩte itũũra rĩa Arimathea wetagwo Josefu
Matthew27:58 agĩthiĩ kũrĩ Pilato akiuga anengerwo mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ. Naake Pilato agĩathana atĩ Josefu anengerwo.
Matthew27:59 Naake Josefu agĩkĩwoya
Matthew27:60 akĩũiga mbĩĩrĩrainĩ yake ĩrĩa eenjeete ihigainĩ. Agĩcooka akĩgaragaria ihiga inene akĩhinga mbĩĩrĩra
Matthew27:61 Naake Mariamu Mũmagidali na Mariamu ũcio ũngĩ maikarĩĩte hau kũng'ethanĩra na mbĩĩrĩra.
Matthew27:62 Mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
Matthew27:63 “Mwathi witũ
Matthew27:64 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio athana mbĩĩrĩra yake ĩrangĩrwo kinya mũthenya wa ĩtatũ
Matthew27:65 Naake Pilato akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew27:66 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Matthew28:1 Nayo Thabatũ yathira
Matthew28:2 O rĩmwe gũkĩgĩa na gĩthingithia kĩnene; mũraika wa Mwathani agĩikũrũka kuuma igũrũ
Matthew28:3 Mũraika ũcio ookire ahaana rũheni
Matthew28:4 Nao arangĩri makĩmaka mũno na makĩinaina
Matthew28:5 Naake mũraika ũcio akĩĩra atumia acio atĩrĩ
Matthew28:6 Ndarĩ haaha; nĩariũkĩĩte o ta ũrĩa oigire. Tookaai muone harĩa araarĩ.
Matthew28:7 Rĩu thiĩi narua mwĩre arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Matthew28:8 Nao makiuma mbĩĩrĩrainĩ na ihenya mamakĩĩte no marĩ na gĩkeno
Matthew28:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Matthew28:10 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew28:11 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa atumia acio maathiire
Matthew28:12 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai acio magĩcemania na athuuri
Matthew28:13 “Mũkuuga atĩ arutwo aake marookire ũtukũ maraiya mwĩrĩ wake mwĩ toro.
Matthew28:14 Barũũthi angĩigua ũguo nĩtũkũmwĩra atĩ mũtiĩhĩĩtie
Matthew28:15 Nao arangĩri makĩoya mbeeca
Matthew28:16 Nao arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe magĩthiĩ Galili kĩrĩmainĩ kũrĩa Jesũ aameerĩĩte mathiĩ.
Matthew28:17 Nao mamuona makĩmũthaathaiya o na gũtuĩka amwe aao maarĩ na nganja.
Matthew28:18 Naake Jesũ akĩmakuhĩrĩria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Matthew28:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio thiĩi kũrĩ andũ oothe kũndũ guothe mũmatue arutwo aakwa
Matthew28:20 na mũmarute gwathĩkĩra maũndũ moothe marĩa ndĩmwathĩĩte. Na nĩndĩkoragwo na inyuĩ hĩndĩ ciothe kinyagia ithirĩro rĩa mahinda.”
Mark1:1 Ũyũ nĩ Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega ũkoniĩ Jesũ Kristũ
Mark1:2 O ta ũrĩa mũnabii Isaia aandĩkire atĩrĩ:“Oneei
Mark1:3 kwĩ mũgambo wa mũndũ ũranĩrĩra werũinĩ akoiga atĩrĩ
Mark1:4 Naake Johana Mũbatithania agĩũka werũinĩ akĩhunjagia na akĩbatithanagia. akĩĩraga andũ atĩrĩ
Mark1:5 Nao andũ aingĩ magookaga kũrĩ we moimĩĩte bũrũriinĩ wa Judea guothe o hamwe na itũũra rĩothe rĩa Jerusalemu makiumbũraga meehia maao
Mark1:6 Johana eekĩraga nguo yathondekeetwo na guoya wa ngamĩĩra na akeyohaga mũcibi wa rũũa njohero. Irio ciake ciakoragwo irĩ ngigĩ na ũũkĩ wa gĩthaka.
Mark1:7 Aahunjagĩria andũ akĩmeeraga atĩrĩ
Mark1:8 Niĩ ndĩmũbatithagia na maaĩ
Mark1:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark1:10 Naake Jesũ oimĩra maaĩinĩ o ũguo
Mark1:11 Naguo mũgambo ũkiuma igũrũ ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Mark1:12 Ihinda o rĩu Roho akĩmũtwara werũinĩ
Mark1:13 kũrĩa aikarire matukũ mĩrongo ĩna akĩgerio nĩ Caitaani. Naake aikaranagia na nyamũ cia gĩthaka
Mark1:14 Na rĩĩrĩ Johana arĩĩkia kũnyiitwo
Mark1:15 akiugaga atĩrĩ
Mark1:16 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aageragĩra ndeereinĩ cia iria rĩa Galili akĩona Simoni na mũrũ wa nyina Anderea magĩtega thamaki na ngara tondũ ũcio nĩguo warĩ wĩra wao.
Mark1:17 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark1:18 Ihinda o rĩu magĩtiga ngara ciao cia gũtega thamaki makĩmũrũmĩrĩra.
Mark1:19 Naake aathianga haniini akĩona Jakubu mũrũ wa Zebedi me na Johana mũrũ wa nyina me gatarũinĩ magĩtuma ngara ciao.
Mark1:20 Akĩmeeta o na ihenya
Mark1:21 Naake Jesũ na arutwo aake magĩthiĩ itũũra rĩa Kaperinaumu
Mark1:22 Nao andũ makĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa aarutanaga
Mark1:23 Na ihinda o rĩu kũu thunagogi gũgĩũka mũndũ warĩ na ngoma. Naake agĩkaya akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark1:24 “Ũkwenda atĩa na ithuĩ wee Jesũ wa Nazarethi? Ũũkĩĩte gũtũniina? Nĩnjũũĩ wee wĩ ũ
Mark1:25 No Jesũ akĩmĩkũũma akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Mark1:26 Nayo ngoma ĩyo ĩkĩũmithia mũndũ ũcio
Mark1:27 Nao andũ oothe makĩgega
Mark1:28 O rĩmwe ngumo ya Jesũ ĩkĩambĩrĩria kũhunja kũndũ guothe matũũrainĩ marĩa maathiũrũrũkĩirie Galili.
Mark1:29 Nao moima thunagogi Jesũ agĩthiĩ na Jakubu na Johana magĩtoonya mũciĩ gwa Simoni na Anderea.
Mark1:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark1:31 Naake agĩthiĩ harĩ we
Mark1:32 Ningĩ hwaĩinĩ ũcio
Mark1:33 Nao andũ oothe a itũũra magĩũka makĩrũrũngana hau mũrangoinĩ.
Mark1:34 Naake Jesũ akĩhonia andũ aingĩ arĩa maarũarĩĩte mĩrimũ mwanya mwanya o na akĩingata ngoma
Mark1:35 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark1:36 Naake Simoni na arĩa angĩ maarĩ naake makĩmũkinyĩra
Mark1:37 makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark1:38 No Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark1:39 Agĩgĩthiĩ Galili guothe
Mark1:40 Naake mũndũ warũarĩĩte mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi agĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ agĩturia ndu akĩmũthaitha akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark1:41 Naake Jesũ akĩringwo nĩ tha
Mark1:42 Na ihinda o rĩu mũrimũ ũcio wa ngoothi ũgĩthira naake agĩthera.
Mark1:43 Naake Jesũ akĩmũkaania na hinya mũno akĩmwĩra ainũke o narua.
Mark1:44 Agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark1:45 No mũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ akĩambĩrĩria kũheana ũhoro ategwĩtigĩra
Mark2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark2:2 Nao andũ aingĩ mũno magĩkĩũngana o nginya gũkĩaga handũ mangĩikara
Mark2:3 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo andũ ana magĩũka makuuĩĩte mũndũ warĩ na mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga
Mark2:4 Rĩrĩa maaremirwo nĩkũmũkuhĩrĩria nĩ ũndũ andũ nĩmaahatĩkanaga
Mark2:5 Naake Jesũ oona ũrĩa andũ acio meetĩkĩĩtie akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wakuĩte ciĩga
Mark2:6 Nao arutani amwe a Watho arĩa maikaire kũu nyũmba makĩĩyũria na ngoro atĩrĩ
Mark2:7 “Nĩkĩ gĩgũtũma mũndũ ũyũ aarie ũguo? Nĩaruma Ngai! Nũũ ũngĩhota kuohanĩra meehia o tiga Ngai we wiki?”
Mark2:8 Naake Jesũ aamenya ũrĩa meeciiragia akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark2:9 Nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ mũhũthũ kwĩra mũndũ ũyũ ũkuĩte ciĩga
Mark2:10 Nĩngũmuonia atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ e na ũhoti gũũkũ thĩ wa kuohanĩra meehia.” Agĩkĩĩra mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga atĩrĩ
Mark2:11 “Ndakwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark2:12 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩrũũgama andũ oothe mamwĩroreire
Mark2:13 Thuutha ũcio
Mark2:14 Rĩrĩa aathiangaga o ũguo akĩona Lawi
Mark2:15 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aikarĩĩte kwa Lawi mũciĩ akĩrĩa irio
Mark2:16 Rĩrĩa arutani a Watho
Mark2:17 Naake Jesũ aigua ũhoro ũcio akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark2:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark2:19 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark2:20 No mũthenya nĩũgaakinya hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũhikania akeeherio gatagatĩinĩ kaao
Mark2:21 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩtumĩrĩra nguo ngũrũ kĩraka kĩa nguo njerũ nĩ ũndũ angĩĩka ũguo kĩraka kĩu no kĩguucie nguo ĩyo ngũrũ nayo ĩtembũke makĩria.
Mark2:22 Ningĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩkĩraga ndibei ya mũhihano mondoinĩ ĩrĩa ngũrũ ya rũũa
Mark2:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark2:24 Nao Afarisai makĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Mark2:25 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark2:26 Githĩ ndatoonyire nyũmba ya Ngai rĩrĩa Abiatharu aarĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene
Mark2:27 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark2:28 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩ Mwathani o na wa mũthenya wa Thabatũ.”
Mark3:1 Naake Jesũ akĩingĩra rĩngĩ thunagogiinĩ
Mark3:2 Na nĩhaarĩ na andũ amwe maacaragia ũndũ mangĩmũthitanga naguo. Magĩgĩikara mamũroreete moone kana nĩekũhonia mũndũ ũcio mũthenya wa Thabatũ.
Mark3:3 Naake Jesũ akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wonjeete guoko atĩrĩ
Mark3:4 Jesũ agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark3:5 Naake Jesũ akĩmarora araakarĩĩte
Mark3:6 Nao Afarisai makiuma nja
Mark3:7 Naake Jesũ na arutwo aake makiuma kũu magĩthiĩ iriainĩ rĩa Galili. Nao makĩrũmĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ aingĩ arĩa moimĩĩte Galili
Mark3:8 Jerusalemu
Mark3:9 Nao andũ magĩkĩingĩha mũno o kinya Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo maige gatarũ hakuhĩ aikare thĩinĩ wako
Mark3:10 Nĩahoneetie andũ aingĩ
Mark3:11 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩ na ngoma mamuona meegũithagia thĩ harĩ we
Mark3:12 Naake Jesũ agĩciikaania na hinya mũno itikaae kwĩra mũndũ we nĩ we ũũ.
Mark3:13 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akĩambata kĩrĩmainĩ igũrũ agĩĩta andũ arĩa eyendeire. Nao magĩũka kũrĩ we
Mark3:14 naake agĩthuura andũ ikũmi na eerĩ
Mark3:15 na magĩage na ũhoti wa kũingata ngoma.
Mark3:16 Andũ acio ikũmi na eerĩ nĩ Simoni (ũrĩa aatuire Petero)
Mark3:17 Jakubu na mũrũ wa nyina Johana
Mark3:18 Anderea
Mark3:19 na Judasi Mũisikariota
Mark3:20 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka akĩinũka mũciĩ. Nao andũ makĩũngana rĩngĩ o kinya we na arutwo arĩa maarĩ naake makĩaga ihinda rĩa kũrĩa.
Mark3:21 Nao andũ aao rĩrĩa maiguire ũguo magĩthiĩ kũmũnyiita tondũ andũ moigaga atĩrĩ
Mark3:22 Nao arutani amwe a Watho arĩa moimĩĩte Jerusalemu makĩambĩrĩria kuuga atĩrĩ
Mark3:23 Naake Jesũ akĩmeeta akĩmeera atĩrĩ na ngerekano
Mark3:24 Ningĩ ũthamaki ũngĩatũkana andũ aaguo mookanĩrĩre o eene
Mark3:25 O na mũciĩ ũngĩamũkana
Mark3:26 Naake Caitaani angĩĩyũkĩrĩra we mwene na agayũkane
Mark3:27 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũingĩra nyũmba ya mũndũ njamba akuue indo ciake ataambĩĩte kuoha mũndũ ũcio
Mark3:28 “Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩrĩ
Mark3:29 No mũndũ o wothe ũkaaruma Roho Mũtheru ndarĩ hingo akooherwo
Mark3:30 (Jesũ aameerire ũguo tondũ moigaga aarĩ na ngoma.)
Mark3:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark3:32 Nao andũ aingĩ arĩa maikaire thĩ mamũthiũrũrũkĩirie makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark3:33 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark3:34 Akĩroranga andũ arĩa maikarĩĩte thĩ agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark3:35 Mũndũ o wothe wĩkaga maũndũ marĩa Ngai eendaga
Mark4:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark4:2 Agĩkĩmaruta maũndũ maingĩ na ngerekano akiuga atĩrĩ:
Mark4:3 “Tathikĩrĩriai! Hĩndĩ ĩmwe mũhuri nĩoimagarire agĩthiĩ kũhura mbegũ.
Mark4:4 Na rĩrĩa aahuraga mbegũ
Mark4:5 Ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjarainĩ kũrĩa gũtaarĩ na tĩĩri mũingĩ
Mark4:6 Rĩrĩa riũa rĩarire rĩgĩcicina
Mark4:7 Ingĩ ikĩgũa mĩiguainĩ
Mark4:8 Ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru
Mark4:9 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark4:10 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aikarĩĩte arĩ wiki
Mark4:11 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark4:12 ‘Marorage na matione; mathikagĩrĩrie na matitaũkĩrwo.Nĩ amu mangĩmenya maacookerera Ngai
Mark4:13 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark4:14 Mũhuri ahuraga ũhoro wa Ngai.
Mark4:15 Andũ amwe nao mahaana mbegũ iria ciagũire njĩrainĩ. Acio maiguaga ũhoro
Mark4:16 Angĩ nao mahaana mbegũ iria ciagũire rũnyanjarainĩ. Rĩrĩa maigua ũhoro
Mark4:17 ĩndĩ ũkaaga kũrũma thĩinĩ wao
Mark4:18 Angĩ nao mahaana ta mbegũ iria ciagũire mĩiguainĩ. Acio nao nĩ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro makaũnyiita
Mark4:19 no mathĩĩna ma gũũkũ thĩ
Mark4:20 Nĩkũrĩ andũ angĩ nao mahaana ta mbegũ iria ciagũire tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru. Acio maigua ũhoro mawamũkagĩra na magaciara maciaro: amwe maita mĩrongo ĩtatũ
Mark4:21 Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark4:22 Kĩrĩa gĩothe kĩhithe nĩgĩkoonanio ũtheriinĩ
Mark4:23 Akorwo mwĩ na matũ makũigua kĩiguei!”
Mark4:24 Ningĩ akĩmeera rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Mark4:25 Mũndũ ũrĩa wĩ na indo nĩakaaheeo ingĩ
Mark4:26 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark4:27 Ahandaga
Mark4:28 Tĩĩri nĩguo ũtũmaga irio ikũre na iciare; ciambaga kũruta nguha
Mark4:29 Ciarĩĩkia gũkũra
Mark4:30 Jesũ agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark4:31 Ũtariĩ ta ũũ: Mũndũ ooyaga mbegũ ya mũtĩ wa karatarĩ
Mark4:32 Thuutha wa ihinda rĩna
Mark4:33 Jesũ nĩaheire andũ ũhoro na ngerekano ingĩ nyingĩ ta icio kũringana na ũrĩa maahotaga kũigua.
Mark4:34 Ndarĩ hingo aamaaragĩria ategũtũmĩra ngerekano. No rĩrĩa e na arutwo aake oiki nĩamataũragĩra maũndũ moothe.
Mark4:35 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark4:36 Magĩgĩtiga andũ
Mark4:37 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark4:38 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ aarĩ gatarũ thĩinĩ o thuutha akomeete na ageetiirania na kamuuto. Nao arutwo aake makĩmũũkĩria makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark4:39 Naake Jesũ agĩũkĩra agĩkũũma rũhuuho na akĩĩra iria rĩhoorere. Naruo rũhuuho rũgĩtiga kũhuruutana
Mark4:40 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩũria arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Mark4:41 Nao magĩĩtigĩra mũno
Mark5:1 Naake Jesũ na arutwo aake magĩkinya mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria rĩa Galili bũrũriinĩ wa Gerasa.
Mark5:2 Naake oima gatarũinĩ agĩtũngwo nĩ mũndũ woimĩĩte mbĩĩrĩrainĩ. Naake mũndũ ũcio aarĩ na ngoma
Mark5:3 na aatũũraga kũu mbĩĩrĩrainĩ. Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩahotire kũmuoha na kĩndũ o na mĩnyororo
Mark5:4 amu o na oohwo mooko na magũrũ na mĩnyororo na mabĩngũ maita maingĩ
Mark5:5 Aatũire oorũũraga mbĩĩrĩrainĩ na irĩmainĩ mũthenya na ũtukũ
Mark5:6 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio oonire Jesũ arĩ haraaya
Mark5:7 Akĩanĩrĩra akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark5:8 (Oigire ũguo tondũ Jesũ nĩoigĩĩte atĩrĩ
Mark5:9 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark5:10 Agĩgĩthaitha Jesũ mũno atĩ ndakaingate ngoma icio kuuma bũrũriinĩ ũcio.
Mark5:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark5:12 Nacio ngoma igĩthaitha Jesũ ikĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark5:13 Naake agĩciĩtĩkĩria. Nacio ngoma ikiuma igĩthiĩ igĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa ngũrũe. Naruo rũũru rũu ruothe
Mark5:14 Nao arĩithi a ngũrũe icio makĩũra magĩthiĩ makĩheana ũhoro itũũrainĩ o na mĩgũndainĩ. Nao andũ maigua ũguo magĩũka kuona ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte.
Mark5:15 Mooka he Jesũ makĩona mũndũ ũrĩa wakoragwo na mbũtũ ya ngoma arĩ harĩ Jesũ aikarĩĩte thĩ
Mark5:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark5:17 Nao andũ acio makĩambĩrĩria gũthaitha Jesũ oime kũu kwao.
Mark5:18 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aingĩraga gatarũ
Mark5:19 No Jesũ akĩmũgiria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark5:20 Naake mũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ akĩambĩrĩria kũheana ũhoro kũu Dekapoli guothe
Mark5:21 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kũringa mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria
Mark5:22 Gũgĩcooka gũgĩũka mũnene ũmwe wa thunagogi wetagwo Jairũ
Mark5:23 Akĩmũthaitha akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark5:24 Jesũ agĩgĩthiĩ naake
Mark5:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark5:26 na nĩathĩĩnĩkĩĩte mũno
Mark5:27 Tondũ nĩaiguĩte ũhoro wa Jesũ
Mark5:28 eekire ũguo tondũ eĩraga atĩrĩ
Mark5:29 Na ihinda o rĩu thakame ĩgĩtiga kuura
Mark5:30 Naake Jesũ akĩigua o rĩmwe oimwo nĩ hinya
Mark5:31 Nao arutwo aake makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark5:32 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũranga arore ũrĩa wamũhuutĩĩtie.
Mark5:33 No mũtumia ũcio tondũ nĩamenyaga ũrĩa eekĩĩtwo
Mark5:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark5:35 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ oigaga ũguo-rĩ
Mark5:36 Naake Jesũ akĩaga gũthikĩrĩria ũrĩa moigaga
Mark5:37 Magĩgĩthiĩ
Mark5:38 Rĩrĩa maakinyire kwa Jairũ magĩkora andũ magagaĩte makĩgirĩkaga na makĩrĩraga maanĩrĩire.
Mark5:39 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kũingĩra nyũmba akĩũria atĩrĩ
Mark5:40 Magĩkĩmũthekerera
Mark5:41 Agĩkĩnyiita kairĩĩtu guoko agĩkeera atĩrĩ
Mark5:42 Nako kairĩĩtu kau gagĩũkĩra o rĩmwe gagĩĩtwara. (Kaarĩ ka mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ.) Nao andũ moona ũguo makĩgega mũno.
Mark5:43 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera makahe gĩa kũrĩa. Agĩcooka akĩmakaania matikeere mũndũ o na ũmwe ũhoro ũcio.
Mark6:1 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiuma kũu agĩcooka itũũrainĩ rĩao
Mark6:2 Mũthenya wa Thabatũ wakinya akĩambĩrĩria kũrutana thunagogiinĩ. Na kũu thunagogi nĩkwarĩ andũ aingĩ mũno. Rĩrĩa maamũiguire makĩgega
Mark6:3 Githĩ ũyũ ti we bundi wa mbaaũ
Mark6:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark6:5 Naake Jesũ ndahotire kũringa ciama kũu itũũrainĩ rĩao o tiga nĩaigĩrĩire o andũ matarĩ aingĩ mooko arĩa maarĩ arũaru nao makĩhona.
Mark6:6 Naake akĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa maagĩĩte wĩtĩkio.
Mark6:7 Agĩcooka agĩĩta arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ akĩmatũma eerĩ eerĩ
Mark6:8 Ningĩ akĩmaatha matigekuuĩre kĩndũ o na kĩ rũgendoinĩ tiga o mũtirima akĩmeera matigakuue irio
Mark6:9 no mathiĩ meekĩrĩĩte iraatũ
Mark6:10 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark6:11 No kũrĩa andũ matakaamũnyiita ũgeni
Mark6:12 Nao magĩgĩthiĩ makĩhunjĩria andũ atĩ merire meehia maao.
Mark6:13 Ningĩ makĩingata ngoma nyingĩ
Mark6:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark6:15 Nao arĩa angĩ makoiga atĩrĩ
Mark6:16 No Herode aigua ũhoro ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark6:17 Herode nĩathanĩĩte atĩ Johana anyiitwo na aikio njeera. Herode eekĩĩte ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa Herodia ũrĩa aahikĩĩtie o na gũtuĩka aarĩ mũtumia wa mũrũ wa nyina Filipu.
Mark6:18 Johana nĩerĩĩte Herode atĩrĩ
Mark6:19 Kwoguo Herodia agĩgĩtuma Johana ũthũ na akĩenda kũmũũraga. No ndahotire
Mark6:20 nĩ amu Herode nĩetigĩrĩĩte Johana nĩ ũndũ wa kũmenya atĩ aarĩ mũndũ mwega na mũthingu
Mark6:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark6:22 Rĩrĩa mwarĩ wa Herodia ookire akĩina
Mark6:23 Mũthamaki agĩkĩĩhĩta akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark6:24 Naake mũirĩĩtu ũcio akiuma nja akĩũria nyina atĩrĩ
Mark6:25 Naake agĩtoonya o narua kwĩ mũthamaki akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark6:26 Ũndũ ũcio ũgĩtũma mũthamaki aigue kĩeha mũno
Mark6:27 Agĩgĩtũma mũrangĩri ũmwe wa arĩa maamũrangagĩra
Mark6:28 akĩũreehe wĩkĩrĩĩtwo kiugainĩ akĩũnengera mũirĩĩtu ũcio
Mark6:29 Nao arutwo a Johana maigua ũhoro ũcio magĩthiĩ makĩoya kĩimba gĩake
Mark6:30 Thuutha ũcio atũmwo a Jesũ magĩcooka magĩũka kũrĩ we makĩmwĩra maũndũ moothe marĩa meekĩĩte
Mark6:31 Na tondũ nĩkwarĩ na andũ aingĩ mookaga magĩthiaga
Mark6:32 Magĩkĩingĩra gatarũ marĩ oiki
Mark6:33 Nao andũ aingĩ makĩmoona magĩthiĩ
Mark6:34 Naake Jesũ oima gatarũinĩ
Mark6:35 Nakuo gwatua gũtuka arutwo aake magĩũka harĩ we makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark6:36 ĩra andũ mathiĩ nĩguo makinye mĩgũndainĩ
Mark6:37 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark6:38 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark6:39 Naake Jesũ agĩathana atĩ andũ oothe maikare thĩ ikundi ikundi kũu nyekiinĩ.
Mark6:40 Magĩgĩikara thĩ ikundi: imwe cia andũ igana
Mark6:41 Naake akĩoya mĩgate ĩyo ĩtaano na thamaki icio igĩrĩ
Mark6:42 Nao oothe makĩrĩa
Mark6:43 Nao arutwo magĩcooka makĩũngania cienyũ cia mĩgate o na cia thamaki iria ciatigarĩĩte
Mark6:44 Andũ arĩa maahũũnirio maarĩ arũme ngiri ithaano (5
Mark6:45 Na hĩndĩ o ĩyo Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake maingĩre gatarũ mathiage mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria meerekeire Bethisaida. Naake agĩtigwo akiugĩra andũ ũhoro.
Mark6:46 Arĩĩkia kũmoigĩra ũhoro agĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kũhooya.
Mark6:47 Gũgĩkinya hwaĩinĩ
Mark6:48 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩona arutwo aake makĩĩgũmĩra gũtwara gatarũ tondũ meerekeire na kũrĩa rũhuuho rwoimaga. Na kũrĩ o ũtukũ ta rĩrĩa ngũkũ igambaga agĩthiĩ kũrĩ o agereire maaĩ igũrũ
Mark6:49 Nao mamuona agereire maaĩ igũrũ
Mark6:50 Oothe magĩĩtigĩra mũno.Naake Jesũ akĩmaarĩria o rĩmwe akĩmeera atĩrĩ

Mark12:7 No akombori acio makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
