Mark12:14 Magĩgĩũka makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark12:15 No we Jesũ aamenya ũhinga wao agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark12:16 Nao magĩkĩmũreehere mbeeca
Mark12:17 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark12:18 Thuutha ũcio Asadukai
Mark12:19 “Mũrutani
Mark12:20 Rĩu-rĩ
Mark12:21 Naake wa keerĩ agĩcooka akĩhikia mũtumia ũcio
Mark12:22 Na rĩĩrĩ oothe mũgwanja magĩkĩmũhikia
Mark12:23 Rĩu-rĩ
Mark12:24 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark12:25 Amu rĩrĩa akuũ makaariũka magaakorwo mahaana ta araika arĩa me igũrũ
Mark12:26 Naguo ũhoro wa kũriũkio kwa arĩa akuũ-rĩ
Mark12:27 We nĩ Ngai wa arĩa me muoyo
Mark12:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark12:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark12:30 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Mark12:31 Narĩo rĩa keerĩ no ta rĩu
Mark12:32 Naake mũrutani ũcio wa Watho akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Mark12:33 Na atĩ no mũhaka mũndũ amwende na ngoro yake yothe
Mark12:34 Naake Jesũ aigua mũndũ ũcio nĩacookia wega akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark12:35 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aarutanaga Hekaarũinĩ akĩũria atĩrĩ
Mark12:36 Githĩ Daudi we mwene ahotithĩĩtio nĩ Roho Mũtheru ndoigire atĩrĩ:‘Mwathani eerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ
Mark12:37 Angĩkorwo Daudi we mwene nĩamwĩtire Mwathani-rĩ
Mark12:38 Naake akĩmaruta akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark12:39 Ningĩ makeenda kũheagwo itĩ cia mbere thunagogiinĩ o na handũ ha gĩtĩĩo marugainĩ.
Mark12:40 Acio no o matoonyagĩrĩra atumia a ndigwa na makaiya indo kuuma mĩciĩ yao
Mark12:41 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aikaire thĩ kũu Hekaarũinĩ hakuhĩ na harĩa andũ maahothagĩra
Mark12:42 No hagĩũka mũtumia mũthĩĩni wa ndigwa agĩikia tũthendi twĩrĩ
Mark12:43 Naake Jesũ agĩĩta arutwo aake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark12:44 Amu arĩa angĩ mahotha matigari ma ũtonga wao
Mark13:1 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oimaga Hekaarũinĩ
Mark13:2 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark13:3 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ aikarĩĩte thĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa Mĩtamaiyũ ang'etheire Hekaarũ
Mark13:4 makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark13:5 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark13:6 Amu andũ aingĩ nĩmagooka makiugaga atĩ maraaria handũinĩ haakwa makiugaga atĩrĩ
Mark13:7 Na rĩrĩa mũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara mũtikaanetigĩre. Maũndũ ta macio no mũhaka mooneke no ti atĩ ũcio nĩguo mũthia wa thĩ.
Mark13:8 Mabũrũri o na moothamaki nĩmagookanĩrĩra na nĩgũkaagĩa na ithingithia kũndũ kũingĩ
Mark13:9 “No inyuĩ mwĩmenyerereei tondũ nĩmũkaanyiitwo mũtwarwo kĩamainĩ. Ningĩ nĩmũkaahũũrĩrwo thunagogiinĩ
Mark13:10 No ithirĩro rĩtaanakinya no mũhaka Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega ũkaahunjĩrio andũ oothe.
Mark13:11 Rĩrĩa mũkaanyiitwo mũtwarwo igootiinĩ mũtikaanetange mũgĩciiria ũrĩa mũkoiga. Hĩndĩ ĩyo yakinya-rĩ
Mark13:12 Mũndũ nĩakaanengerana mũrũ wa nyina akooragwo
Mark13:13 Nao andũ nĩmakaamũmena nĩ ũndũ wakwa. No ũrĩa ũgaakirĩrĩria kinya ithirĩro
Mark13:14 “Nĩmũkoona ‘Kĩndũ gĩ thaahu na magigi’ kĩrĩ harĩa gĩtaagĩrĩire gũkorwo!” (Ũrĩa ũrathooma nĩamenye na ma ũrĩa gũkwĩrwo!) “Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa me Judea nĩmakoorĩra irĩmainĩ.
Mark13:15 Naake mũndũ ũrĩa ũgaakorwo nyũmba igũrũ
Mark13:16 kana ũrĩa wĩ mũgũnda acookere nguo ciake mũciĩ.
Mark13:17 Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo marĩ na nda hĩndĩ ĩyo
Mark13:18 Hooyai Ngai atĩ maũndũ macio matikaanakinye hĩndĩ ya heho!
Mark13:19 Amu hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩgũkooneka mathĩĩna makĩrĩĩte marĩa moothe maanoonwo kuuma rĩrĩa Ngai oombire thĩ kinyagia rĩu
Mark13:20 No Mwathani nĩanyiihanyiihĩĩtie matukũ ma mathĩĩna macio nĩ ũndũ wa arĩa aake athuure. Tiga nĩ ũguo gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩgaatigara.
Mark13:21 “Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ angĩkaamwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark13:22 Andũ mekwĩĩta Kristũ na anabii a maheeni nĩmakooneka
Mark13:23 No inyuĩ mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei
Mark13:24 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark13:25 nacio njata ciume igũrũ igwe thĩ
Mark13:26 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakooneka agĩũka arĩ thĩinĩ wa matu
Mark13:27 Naake nĩagaatũma araika makoonganie arĩa oothe athuure kuuma mĩena ĩrĩa ĩna yumaga rũhuuho
Mark13:28 “Mwĩruteei na mũkũyũ; honge ciaguo ciambĩrĩria kũruta mathangũ nĩmũmenyaga atĩ hĩndĩ ya ũrugarĩ ĩ hakuhĩ.
Mark13:29 Ũguo no taguo rĩrĩa mũkoona maũndũ macio magĩĩkĩka mũkaamenya atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ e hakuhĩ o ta mũrangoinĩ.
Mark13:30 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Mark13:31 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩigaathira
Mark13:32 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ rĩrĩa mũthenya ũcio ũgaakinya kana thaa
Mark13:33 Ikaragaai mwĩmenyereire na mwĩhũũgĩĩte tondũ mũtiũĩ rĩrĩa ihinda rĩu rĩgaakinya.
Mark13:34 Gũkaahaana ta mũndũ athiĩte rũgendo agatiga agaĩra ndungata ciake mawĩra maacio
Mark13:35 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwĩhũũgageei
Mark13:36 Kĩĩhũgeei ndakaanooke o rĩmwe nĩguo amũkore mũkomeete.
Mark13:37 Ũguo ngũmwĩra noguo ngwĩra andũ oothe: Mwĩhũũgageei!”
Mark14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark14:2 No makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Mark14:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark14:4 Nao andũ amwe arĩa maarĩ ho makĩraakara makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Mark14:5 Nĩmangĩendio makĩria dinari magana matatũ iheeo athĩĩni.” Magĩgĩtetia mũtumia ũcio mũno.
Mark14:6 No Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:7 Andũ arĩa athĩĩni-rĩ
Mark14:8 We nĩanjĩka ũrĩa ahota; aitĩrĩria mwĩrĩ wakwa maguta nĩ ũndũ wa kũũhaarĩrĩria gũthikwo.
Mark14:9 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ kũrĩa guothe Ũhoro Ũrĩa Mwega ũkaahunjio thĩinĩ wa thĩ yothe
Mark14:10 Thuutha ũcio Judasi Mũisikariota
Mark14:11 Nao magĩkena rĩrĩa Judasi aamaheire ũhoro ũcio
Mark14:12 Mũthenya wa mbere wa Thigũkũ ya mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia
Mark14:13 Naake Jesũ agĩgĩtũma arutwo aake eerĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:14 mũingĩre nyũmba ĩrĩa arĩtoonya
Mark14:15 Naake nĩekũmuonia nyũmba ya igũrũ
Mark14:16 Nao arutwo acio magĩgĩthiĩ itũũrainĩ
Mark14:17 Gwakinya hwaĩinĩ Jesũ agĩũka na arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ.
Mark14:18 Na rĩrĩa maikarĩĩte meethainĩ makĩrĩa akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:19 Nao arutwo makĩambĩrĩria kũnyiitwo nĩ kĩeha
Mark14:20 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Mark14:21 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegũkua o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo. Ĩndĩ kaĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũmũkunyanĩra e thĩĩna-ĩ! Kaba mũndũ ũcio atangĩaciarirwo!”
Mark14:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark14:23 Agĩcooka akĩoya gĩkombe
Mark14:24 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:25 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Mark14:26 Nao marĩĩkia kũina rwĩmbo makiuma magĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa mĩtamaiyũ.
Mark14:27 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:28 No ndariũka nĩngaamũtongoria gũthiĩ Galili.”
Mark14:29 Naake Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark14:30 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Mark14:31 Naake Petero akĩrega na hinya mũno akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:32 Thuutha ũcio magĩthiĩ magĩkinya handũ heetagwo Gethisemane. Marĩ hau Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Mark14:33 Akĩoya Petero
Mark14:34 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:35 Agĩgĩthiĩ kabere haniini
Mark14:36 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:37 Agĩcooka harĩa arutwo maarĩ
Mark14:38 Agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark14:39 Akĩmatiga rĩngĩ
Mark14:40 Naake acooka harĩa arutwo maarĩ agĩkora makomeete
Mark14:41 Agĩũka ihinda rĩa gatatũ
Mark14:42 Ũkĩraai tũthiĩ. Oneei ũrĩa ũkũngunyanĩra nĩakinya!”
Mark14:43 Na Jesũ o akĩaragia
Mark14:44 Naake Judasi ũrĩa wamũkunyanagĩra nĩamaheete kĩmenyithia akameera atĩrĩ
Mark14:45 Rĩrĩa Judasi aakinyire agĩgĩthiĩ eerekeire o harĩ Jesũ o rĩmwe akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:46 Nao magĩũka makĩnyiita Jesũ makĩmũrũmia biũ.
Mark14:47 Naake ũmwe wa arĩa maarũngiĩ hau agĩcomora rũhiũ rwa njora
Mark14:48 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark14:49 Ndĩratũũraga na inyuĩ Hekaarũinĩ
Mark14:50 Na arĩĩkia kũnyiitwo
Mark14:51 Naake mwanake ũmwe akĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ erigiicĩirie cuka. Na rĩrĩa andũ acio maatuire kũmũnyiita
Mark14:52 akĩmatigĩra nguo
Mark14:53 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark14:54 Naake Petero agĩthiĩ amũrũmĩrĩire arĩ o haraaya
Mark14:55 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene o na kĩama gĩothe magĩcaria ũira ũrĩa mangĩrutire nĩguo mooragithie Jesũ no makĩaga.
Mark14:56 No nĩkwarĩ andũ aingĩ maarutire ũira wa maheeni
Mark14:57 Nao andũ amwe magĩkĩrũũgama makĩruta ũira wa maheeni
Mark14:58 “Nĩtwamũiguire akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:59 Ĩndĩ o na moiga ũguo maũira maao makĩregana.
Mark14:60 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene akĩrũũgama hau mbere yao akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Mark14:61 No Jesũ agĩkira ki na ndamũtumũke. Naake mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark14:62 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Mark14:63 Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene agĩtembũranga nguo yake nĩ ũndũ wa kũraakara akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:64 Githĩ mũtiakĩiguĩra ũrĩa aruma Ngai? Mũgũtua atĩa?”Nao oothe makiuga magwatĩirie atĩ aagĩrĩire nĩkũũragwo.
Mark14:65 Nao amwe aao makĩambĩrĩria gũtuĩra Jesũ mata
Mark14:66 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark14:67 Nayo yakinya hau Petero ootagĩra mwaki ĩkĩmũkũũrĩra maitho ĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:68 Naake agĩkaana akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark14:69 Naake mũirĩĩtu ũcio oona Petero rĩngĩ akĩambĩrĩria kwĩra arĩa marũũgamĩĩte ho atĩrĩ
Mark14:70 No Petero agĩkaana rĩngĩ.Thuutha haniini arĩa marũũgamĩĩte hau makĩambĩrĩria kwĩra Petero atĩrĩ
Mark14:71 No Petero akĩambĩrĩria kwĩhĩta akiugaga atĩrĩ
Mark14:72 Ihinda o rĩu ngũkũ ĩgĩkũga rĩa keerĩ. Naake Petero akĩririkana ũrĩa Jesũ aamwĩrĩĩte
Mark15:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark15:2 Naake Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Mark15:3 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene magĩthitanga Jesũ na maũndũ maingĩ.
Mark15:4 Naake Pilato agĩcooka akĩmũũria rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Mark15:5 No Jesũ akĩaga kwaria rĩngĩ
Mark15:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark15:7 Thĩinĩ wa itoi iria ciarĩ njeera
Mark15:8 Nao andũ makĩũngana makĩũria Pilato eeke o ũrĩa aamenyereete gwĩka.
Mark15:9 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark15:10 Nĩ ũndũ nĩamenyaga atĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene maamũneanĩĩte kũrĩ we nĩ ũndũ wa ũiru.
Mark15:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark15:12 Naake Pilato agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark15:13 Nao makĩanĩrĩra magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Mark15:14 Naake Pilato akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Mark15:15 Na tondũ Pilato nĩendaga gũkenia andũ agĩkĩmoohorera Baraba. Agĩcooka akĩhũũrithia Jesũ na kĩboko
Mark15:16 Nacio thigari igĩtwara Jesũ nyũmbainĩ ya mĩcemanio kũu thĩinĩ kwa barũũthi
Mark15:17 Igĩcooka ikĩmũhumba nguo ya rangi wa babũ
Mark15:18 Igĩkĩambĩrĩria kũmũnyũrũria ikiugaga atĩrĩ
Mark15:19 Igakĩmũgũtha mũtwe na karũthanju o na ikamũtuĩra mata
Mark15:20 Ciarĩĩkia kũmũnyũrũria ikĩmũruta nguo ĩyo ya rangi wa babũ
Mark15:21 Nacio irĩ njĩra igĩcemania na mũndũ wetagwo Simoni wa kuuma Kurene
Mark15:22 Igĩgĩtwara Jesũ
Mark15:23 Na irĩ hau ikĩgeria kũmũhe ndibei yatukanĩĩtio na manemane
Mark15:24 Igĩkĩmwamba
Mark15:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ciamwambire kwarĩ thaa ithatũ cia rũũciinĩ.
Mark15:26 Naho igũrũ wake hakĩandĩkwo ũndũ ũrĩa aathitangĩirwo atĩrĩ
Mark15:27 Igĩcooka ikĩamba atuunyani eerĩ o hau ciambire Jesũ
Mark15:28 Namo maandĩko marĩa moigaga atĩ
Mark15:29 Nao andũ arĩa maahĩtũkagĩra hau moona Jesũ makĩmũnyũrũria makĩinagia mĩtwe makiugaga atĩrĩ
Mark15:30 kĩĩhonokie uume mũtĩ igũrũ!”
Mark15:31 O nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho makĩmũnyũrũria makiugaga atĩrĩ
Mark15:32 Kristũ
Mark15:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark15:34 Nacio thaa kenda ciakinya Jesũ akĩgũũthũka na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark15:35 Nao andũ amwe arĩa marũũgamĩĩte hau makiuga atĩrĩ
Mark15:36 Naake ũmwe wao agĩteng'era agĩtobokia thibonji ndibeiinĩ ngagatu
Mark15:37 Naake Jesũ akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene
Mark15:38 Hĩndĩ ĩyo gĩtambaya kĩa Hekaarũ gĩgĩatũkana maita meerĩ
Mark15:39 Naake Mũroma mũnene wa thigari igana ũrĩa warũũgamĩĩte hau oona ũrĩa atuĩkana akiuga atĩrĩ
Mark15:40 Naho hau nĩhaarĩ atumia meeroragĩra marĩ o haraaya
Mark15:41 Atumia acio maakoragwo na Jesũ Galili na nĩmaamũtungatagĩra. Ningĩ nĩhaarĩ na atumia angĩ aingĩ arĩa mookĩĩte naake Jerusalemu.
Mark15:42 Na tondũ warĩ mũthenya wa Jumaa
Mark15:43 Josefu ũrĩa womĩĩte Arimathea agĩthiĩ kwa Pilato akĩmũũria amwĩtĩkĩrie akuue mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ. Josefu aarĩ mũndũ watĩĩtwo nĩ andũ oothe a kĩama
Mark15:44 No Pilato akĩgĩa na nganja kana Jesũ nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua. Agĩgĩtũmanĩra Mũroma mũnene wa thigari igana akĩmũũria kana Jesũ nĩaniinĩĩte ihinda iraaya kuuma akua.
Mark15:45 Rĩrĩa eerirwo atĩ nĩakuĩte
Mark15:46 Naake agĩthiĩ akĩgũra cuka wa gataani
Mark15:47 Naake Mariamu Mũmagidali
Mark16:1 Nayo Thabatũ yathira
Mark16:2 Mũthenya wa kiumia rũũciinĩ tene
Mark16:3 Nao marĩ njĩrainĩ makooranagia atĩrĩ
Mark16:4 No rĩĩrĩ
Mark16:5 Nao magĩthiĩ makĩingĩra mbĩĩrĩra
Mark16:6 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark16:7 Rĩu gĩthiĩi mũkeere arutwo aake
Mark16:8 Nao makiuma mbĩĩrĩrainĩ mateng'ereete nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra na kũnyiitwo nĩ kĩeha. Matirĩ ũndũ meerire mũndũ nĩ ũndũ wa kũmaka.
Mark16:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark16:10 Naake Mariamu ũcio agĩthiĩ kũrĩ arutwo a Jesũ agĩkora makĩrĩra me na kĩeha.
Mark16:11 Akĩmeera atĩ Jesũ nĩariũkĩĩte
Mark16:12 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ akiumĩrĩra arutwo aake eerĩ hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maathiaga mĩgũndainĩ
Mark16:13 Nao makĩhũndũka makĩĩra arĩa angĩ atĩ nĩmoona Jesũ
Mark16:14 Thuuthainĩ Jesũ akiumĩrĩra arutwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe
Mark16:15 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Mark16:16 Na mũndũ o wothe ũgeetĩkia na abatithio nĩakaahonokio
Mark16:17 Nao arĩa mageetĩkia nĩmakaaheeo hinya wa kũringa ciama: nĩmakaingata ngoma kuuma kũrĩ andũ thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa; nĩmakaaria na thiomi ng'eni;
Mark16:18 mangĩkaanyiita nyamũ cia thĩ kana manyue thumu matirĩ ũũru makoona
Mark16:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
Mark16:20 Nao arutwo magĩthiĩ makĩhunjia Ũhoro kũndũ guothe
Mark16:21 Nao atumia acio magĩthiĩ kwĩ Petero na araata aake
Mark16:22 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ we mwene agĩtũma arutwo mwena wa irathĩro o na wa ithũĩro makaheane Ũhoro ũrĩa Mũtheru wa ũhonokio wa tene na tene.]
Luke1:1 Kũrĩ mũgaathe Theofilo: Andũ aingĩ nĩmarĩĩkĩĩtie kwandĩka ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa marĩĩkĩĩtie kuoneka gatagatĩinĩ gaitũ.
Luke1:2 Maandĩkire kũringana na ũrĩa twaheetwo ũhoro nĩ andũ arĩa meyoneire maũndũ macio kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria
Luke1:3 Na rĩu mũgaathe Theofilo
Luke1:4 Ngũkwandĩkĩra nĩ geetha ũmenye ũũma wa maũndũ marĩa ũrutĩĩtwo.
Luke1:5 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Herode aarĩ mũthamaki wa Judea
Luke1:6 Eerĩ maatũire marĩ athingu mbere ya Ngai
Luke1:7 Matiarĩ na mwana nĩ ũndũ Elizabethi aarĩ thaata
Luke1:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke1:9 Rĩrĩa mĩtĩ yacuukirwo
Luke1:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke1:11 Naake arĩ kũu thĩinĩ
Luke1:12 Rĩrĩa Zakaria aamuonire
Luke1:13 No mũraika ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:14 Wee nĩũgaakena
Luke1:15 Nĩ tondũ gagaakorwo karĩ mũndũ mũnene mbere ya Mwathani. Gatikaanyuaga ndibei kana njoohi
Luke1:16 nako nĩgagacookia andũ aingĩ a Isiraeli kũrĩ Mwathani Ngai wao.
Luke1:17 Ningĩ nĩgagaathiĩ mbere ya Mwathani na roho na hinya o ta wa Elija ũrĩa warĩ mũnabii. Nĩgagaatũma maithe meendane na ciana
Luke1:18 Naake Zakaria akĩũria mũraika atĩrĩ
Luke1:19 Naake mũraika akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:20 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke1:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke1:22 Rĩrĩa oimire
Luke1:23 Rĩrĩa matukũ maake ma gũtungata thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ maathirire
Luke1:24 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke1:25 “Rĩu Mwathani nĩandeithĩĩtie nĩguo eeherie gĩconoko gĩakwa gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ!”
Luke1:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke1:27 Aamũtũmire kũrĩ mũirĩĩtu thingi worĩĩtio nĩ mũndũ wetagwo Josefu warĩ wa rũciaro rwa mũthamaki Daudi. Mũirĩĩtu ũcio eetagwo Mariamu.
Luke1:28 Mũraika ũcio agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Mariamu akĩmũgeithia atĩrĩ
Luke1:29 Naake Mariamu agĩgĩtangĩka ngoro mũno nĩ ũndũ wa ngeithi icio cia mũraika
Luke1:30 Naake mũraika akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:31 Nĩũkũgĩa nda
Luke1:32 Nako nĩgagaatuĩka mũndũ mũnene
Luke1:33 Agaagatua mũthamaki wa andũ a Isiraeli tene na tene; ũthamaki wako ndũgaathira!”
Luke1:34 Naake Mariamu akĩĩra mũraika ũcio atĩrĩ
Luke1:35 Naake mũraika akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:36 Nĩũkũririkana mũtumia ũrĩa wanyu wĩtagwo Elizabethi ũrĩa weragwo atĩ ndangĩgĩa mwana
Luke1:37 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke1:38 Naake Mariamu agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke1:39 Matukũinĩ o ro macio Mariamu nĩathiire ahiũhĩĩte itũũrainĩ rĩarĩ bũrũriinĩ ũrĩa ũrĩ irĩma wa Judea.
Luke1:40 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke1:41 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke1:42 akĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke1:43 Nĩ kĩĩ gĩgũtũma ũndũ mũnene ta ũyũ woneke kũrĩ niĩ
Luke1:44 Nĩ amu mũgambo wa ngeithi ciaku wakinya matũinĩ maakwa o ro ũguo
Luke1:45 Na kaĩ kũraathimwo nĩ we nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtĩkia atĩ ũhoro ũrĩa werirwo nĩ Mwathani nĩũkaahinga-ĩ!”
Luke1:46 Naake Mariamu akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke1:47 na roho wakwa nĩũkeneete nĩ ũndũ wa Ngai Mũhonokia wakwa
Luke1:48 nĩ ũndũ nĩaririkanĩĩte kwĩnyiihia kwa ndungata yake ya mũirĩĩtu!Kuumagia rĩu njiarwa ciothe irĩnjĩtaga mũraathime
Luke1:49 nĩ ũndũ wa maũndũ manene marĩa Ngai ũrĩa wĩ hinya anjĩkĩĩte.Rĩĩtwa rĩake nĩ rĩtheru.
Luke1:50 Tha ciake nĩikinyagĩra arĩa oothe mamũtĩĩĩte
Luke1:51 Nĩonanĩĩtie hinya wa guoko gwake
Luke1:52 Nĩehereetie athamaki kuuma itĩinĩ ciao
Luke1:53 Nĩahũũnĩĩtie arĩa ahũũtu na mawega maingĩ
Luke1:54 Nĩaigĩĩte kĩrĩĩkanĩro kĩrĩa eerĩire maithe maitũ
Luke1:55 o ta ũrĩa eerĩire maithe maitũ
Luke1:56 Naake Mariamu agĩikara na Elizabethi ta mĩeri ĩtatũ
Luke1:57 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke1:58 Nao andũ arĩa maarigainie
Luke1:59 Mũthenya wa kanaana wakinya
Luke1:60 No nyina akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke1:61 Nao andũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke1:62 Magĩcooka makĩarĩria ithe wa kaana kau na mooko makĩmũũria rĩĩtwa rĩrĩa eendaga gatuuo.
Luke1:63 Naake Zakaria akĩũria aheeo kabaaũ ga kwandĩkĩra akĩandĩka atĩrĩ
Luke1:64 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Zakaria akĩhota kwaria rĩngĩ akĩambĩrĩria gũkumia Ngai.
Luke1:65 Nao andũ oothe arĩa maarigainie makĩiyũrwo nĩ guoya
Luke1:66 Mũndũ o wothe waiguaga ũhoro ũcio nĩeciiragia na akeyũria atĩrĩ
Luke1:67 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Zakaria ithe wa kaana kau
Luke1:68 “Mwathani Ngai wa Isiraeli arokumio!Tondũ nĩateithĩĩtie andũ aake
Luke1:69 Nĩatũheete mũhonokia mũnene
Luke1:70 o ta ũrĩa eeranĩire kuuma tene na tũnua twa anabii aake atheru
Luke1:71 atĩ nĩagaatũhonokia kuuma kũrĩ thũ ciitũ
Luke1:72 Nĩoigire atĩ nĩakaiguĩra maithe maitũ tha
Luke1:73 Nĩerĩire ithe witũ Aburahamu na mwĩhĩtwa
Luke1:74 atĩ nĩagaatũhonokia kuuma mookoinĩ ma thũ ciitũ
Luke1:75 tũrĩ athingu na tũrĩ atheru mbere yake
Luke1:76 “Nawe kaana gaaka
Luke1:77 Ũgaathiĩ kwĩra andũ aake atĩ nĩmekũhonokio na ũndũ wa kwoherwo meehia maao.
Luke1:78 Ngai witũ e tha na nĩ mũkirĩrĩria.Nĩagaatũma tũthererwo nĩ ũtheri wa ũhonokio
Luke1:79 uume igũrũ ũtherere andũ oothe arĩa matũũraga ndumainĩ na kĩĩruruinĩ gĩa gĩkuũ
Luke1:80 Nako kaana kau gagĩgĩkũra
Luke2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:2 Gũtaranwo kũu nĩkuo kwarĩ kwa mbere gwĩkwo rĩrĩa Kuirinio aarĩ barũũthi wa Siria.
Luke2:3 O mũndũ nĩagĩthiire kwĩyandĩkithia o itũũrainĩ rĩake kĩũmbe.
Luke2:4 O naake Josefu nĩambatire akiuma itũũra rĩa Nazarethi
Luke2:5 Aathiire kwĩyandĩkithia hamwe na Mariamu
Luke2:6 Me kũu Bethilehemu-rĩ
Luke2:7 Naake agĩgĩciara kahĩĩ gaake ka irigithaathi
Luke2:8 Nakuo kũu bũrũriinĩ ũcio nĩkwarĩ na arĩithi maikaire werũinĩ
Luke2:9 Mũraika wa Mwathani akĩmoimĩrĩra
Luke2:10 Naake mũraika ũcio akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke2:11 Ũtukũ wa ũũmũũthĩ
Luke2:12 Naguo ũhoro ũcio mũrĩũmenya na njĩra ĩno: nĩmũrĩona gakenge karigiicĩirio cuka
Luke2:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:14 “Ngai ũrĩa ũrĩ igũrũ mũno arakumio
Luke2:15 Rĩrĩa araika maambatire magĩcooka igũrũ magĩtiga arĩithi acio-rĩ
Luke2:16 Magĩgĩthiĩ mahiũhĩĩte
Luke2:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:18 Nao arĩa oothe maiguire ũrĩa arĩithi acio moigire makĩgega.
Luke2:19 Nowe Mariamu agĩikara akĩririkanaga maũndũ macio moothe na akameciiragia na ngoro.
Luke2:20 Nao arĩithi magĩcooka kũrĩ mahiũ maao
Luke2:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:23 Meekire ũguo kũringana na ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo Wathoinĩ wa Mwathani atĩ
Luke2:24 O na ningĩ nĩmaathiaga kũrutĩra Ngai igongoona rĩa ndirahũgĩ igĩrĩ kana tũtutuura twĩrĩ
Luke2:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩkwarĩ na mũndũ watũũraga Jerusalemu wetagwo Simeoni. Mũndũ ũcio aarĩ mũthingu na nĩatĩĩĩte Ngai
Luke2:26 na nĩamũmenyithĩĩtie atĩ ndagaakua atooneete Mesia ũrĩa weranĩirwo nĩ Mwathani.
Luke2:27 Simeoni nĩathiire Hekaarũinĩ atongoreetio nĩ Roho Mũtheru. Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:28 Simeoni agĩkooya
Luke2:29 “Rĩu
Luke2:30 Nĩ amu maitho maakwa nĩmeyoneire ũhonokio waku
Luke2:31 ũrĩa ũthondekeete andũ oothe me ho
Luke2:32 nĩguo ũtheri wa kũguũrĩria andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ ciothe wendi waku
Luke2:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:34 Naake Simeoni akĩmaraathima
Luke2:35 nacio hitho ciao ikĩmenyeke. Nakĩo kĩeha
Luke2:36 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:37 mũthuuriwe agĩcooka agĩkua. Hĩndĩ ĩyo aarĩ na mĩaka mĩrongo ĩnaana na ĩna. Ndarĩ hingo oimaga Hekaarũinĩ; aatũũraga athaathayagia Ngai ũtukũ na mũthenya
Luke2:38 O hĩndĩ ĩyo mũtumia ũcio agĩkinya
Luke2:39 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Mariamu na Josefu maarĩĩkirie gwĩka maũndũ moothe kũringana na watho wa Mwathani
Luke2:40 Nako kaana kau gagĩkũra na gakĩgĩa na hinya; kaiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ ũũgĩ
Luke2:41 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:42 Jesũ arĩĩkia kũhingia mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ-rĩ
Luke2:43 Rĩrĩa Bathaka yathirire
Luke2:44 meeciiragia kaarĩ o gĩkundiinĩ kĩa andũ a kwao. Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:45 Rĩrĩa maakaagire o biũ
Luke2:46 Thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩtatũ nĩguo maakoonire Hekaarũinĩ
Luke2:47 Andũ oothe arĩa maagathikĩrĩirie nĩmaagegaga nĩ ũndũ wa ũũgĩ wa macookio maako.
Luke2:48 Rĩrĩa aciari aako maakoonire makĩmaka
Luke2:49 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke2:50 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke2:51 Naake Jesũ agĩgĩcooka nao Nazarethi
Luke2:52 Naake Jesũ agĩgĩkũra akĩũhigaga
Luke3:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke3:2 nao Anasi na Kaiafa nĩ o maarĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene. Hĩndĩ ĩyo kiugo kĩa Ngai gĩgĩkinyĩra Johana mũrũ wa Zakaria arĩ werũinĩ.
Luke3:3 Kwoguo Johana agĩthiĩ akĩhunjagia bũrũriinĩ wothe ũrĩa wakuhĩrĩirie rũũĩ rwa Jorodani
Luke3:4 Eekire ũguo kũringana na ũrĩa handĩkĩĩtwo ibukuinĩ rĩa mũnabii Isaia atĩ:“Kwĩ mũgambo wa mũndũ ũranĩrĩra werũinĩ akoiga atĩrĩ:‘Haarĩriai njĩra ya Mwathani; na mũrũngarie tũcĩra twake!
Luke3:5 Mĩkuru yothe nĩĩkaiyũrio
Luke3:6 Andũ oothe nĩmakoona ũhonokio wa Ngai!’ ”
Luke3:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke3:8 Ĩkaai ciĩko cia kuonania atĩ nĩmwĩrirĩĩte meehia maanyu
Luke3:9 Na rĩu ithanwa nĩrĩhaarĩrie rĩa gũtema mũtĩ o gĩtinainĩ; mũtĩ o wothe ũtaciaraga maciaro meega ũrĩtemagwo ũgaikio mwakiinĩ.”
Luke3:10 Nao andũ makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke3:11 Naake Johana akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke3:12 Nao eetia a mbeeca cia igooti magĩũka kũbatithio
Luke3:13 Naake akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke3:14 Nacio thigari ikĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke3:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke3:16 Naake Johana agĩkĩmeera oothe atĩrĩ
Luke3:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke3:18 Johana nĩakĩhunjirie Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega na njĩra nyingĩ agĩthaithaga andũ magarũrĩre mĩthiĩre yao.
Luke3:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke3:20 Naake Herode agĩgĩĩka ũndũ mũũru makĩria; akĩnyiita Johana
Luke3:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke3:22 naake Roho Mũtheru agĩikũrũka igũrũ rĩake e na mwĩrĩ wahaanaga ta wa ndutuura. Naguo mũgambo ũkiuma igũrũ ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke3:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke3:24 mũrũ wa Mathati
Luke3:25 mũrũ wa Matathia
Luke3:26 mũrũ wa Maathi
Luke3:27 mũrũ wa Joanani
Luke3:28 mũrũ wa Meliki
Luke3:29 mũrũ wa Joshua
Luke3:30 mũrũ wa Simeoni
Luke3:31 mũrũ wa Melea
Luke3:32 mũrũ wa Jesii
Luke3:33 mũrũ wa Aminadabu
Luke3:34 mũrũ wa Jakubu
Luke3:35 mũrũ wa Serugu
Luke3:36 mũrũ wa Kainani
Luke3:37 mũrũ wa Methusela
Luke3:38 mũrũ wa Enoshu
Luke4:1 Naake Jesũ akiuma kũu rũũĩinĩ rwa Jorodani aiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru. Naake Roho ũcio akĩmũtongoria akĩmũtwara werũinĩ
Luke4:2 kũrĩa aageririo nĩ Mũcuukani matukũ mĩrongo ĩna. Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke4:3 Naake Mũcuukani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke4:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke4:5 Ningĩ Mũcuukani agĩtwara Jesũ handũ igũrũ
Luke4:6 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke4:7 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio-rĩ
Luke4:8 Naake Jesũ akĩmĩcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke4:9 Ningĩ Mũcuukani agĩcooka akĩmũtwara Jerusalemu
Luke4:10 nĩ ũndũ Maandĩko moigĩĩte atĩrĩ
Luke4:11 O na ningĩ nĩmoigĩĩte atĩrĩ
Luke4:12 No Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke4:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke4:14 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka bũrũriinĩ wa Galili
Luke4:15 Naake akĩrutana thunagogiinĩ
Luke4:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke4:17 Akĩnengerwo ibuku rĩa mũnabii Isaia
Luke4:18 “Roho wa Mwathani arĩ hamwe na niĩ
Luke4:19 Ningĩ nĩandũmĩĩte ngaanĩrĩre atĩ ihinda nĩikinyu rĩa Mwathani kũhonokia andũ aake.”
Luke4:20 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩhinga ibuku
Luke4:21 naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke4:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke4:23 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke4:24 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke4:25 Ningĩ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke4:26 O na gwatuĩka ũguo
Luke4:27 Ningĩ
Luke4:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke4:29 Magĩgĩũkĩra
Luke4:30 No Jesũ akĩgerera gatagatĩinĩ kaao agĩĩthiĩra.
Luke4:31 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka agĩthiĩ Kaperinaumu
Luke4:32 Andũ oothe nĩmaagegire nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa aarutanaga
Luke4:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke4:34 “Aa! Jesũ wa Nazarethi
Luke4:35 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke4:36 Nao andũ oothe makĩgega makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Luke4:37 Nayo ngumo ya Jesũ ĩgĩkĩhunja matũũrainĩ moothe marĩa maarĩ hakuhĩ.
Luke4:38 Naake Jesũ akiuma kũu thunagogiinĩ
Luke4:39 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ akĩrũũgama hakuhĩ naake
Luke4:40 Rĩrĩa riũa rĩathũaga
Luke4:41 O nacio ngoma nĩcioimire thĩinĩ wa andũ aingĩ ikĩanagĩrĩra ikoiga atĩrĩ
Luke4:42 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke4:43 No we akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke4:44 Kwoguo agĩgĩthiĩ akĩhunjagia thunagogiinĩ cia bũrũri wothe wa Judea.
Luke5:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:2 Naake Jesũ akĩona tũtarũ twĩrĩ hau hũgũrũrũinĩ cia iria
Luke5:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:4 Naake arĩĩkia kwaria akĩĩra Simoni atĩrĩ
Luke5:5 Naake Simoni akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke5:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:7 Magĩkĩheneria andũ arĩa maarutithanagia wĩra nao arĩa maarĩ gatarũinĩ kau kangĩ mooke mamateithie. Nao magĩgĩũka
Luke5:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:9 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke5:10 O nao aariũ a Zebedi
Luke5:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:13 Naake Jesũ agĩtambũrũkia guoko
Luke5:14 Naake Jesũ akĩmũkaania akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke5:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:16 No Jesũ nĩathiaga kũndũ kũrĩa gũtaakoragwo na andũ
Luke5:17 Mũthenya ũmwe Jesũ nĩkũrutana aarutanaga
Luke5:18 Nao andũ amwe magĩũka makuuĩĩte na ũrĩrĩ mũndũ warĩ mũrũaru mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga
Luke5:19 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:21 Nao arutani a Watho na Afarisai makĩambĩrĩria kũũrania atĩrĩ
Luke5:22 Naake Jesũ akĩmenya ũrĩa meeciiragia akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke5:23 Nĩ ũndũ ũrĩkũ mũhũthũ; kuuga
Luke5:24 Nĩngũmuonia atĩ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ e na ũhoti gũũkũ thĩ wa kuohanĩra meehia.” Agĩkĩĩra mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru mũrimũ wa gũkua ciĩga atĩrĩ
Luke5:25 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩrũũgama o rĩmwe andũ oothe mamwĩroreire
Luke5:26 Nao andũ oothe makĩgega
Luke5:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:28 Naake Lawi agĩũkĩra agĩtiga indo ciothe
Luke5:29 Naake Lawi agĩthondekera Jesũ iruga inene mũno gwake mũciĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke5:30 Nao Afarisai amwe
Luke5:31 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke5:32 Niĩ ndiũkĩĩte gwĩta arĩa athingu; njũkĩĩte gwĩta arĩa eehia merire.”

Luke5:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ

Luke5:37 O na ningĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩkĩraga ndibei ya mũhihano mondoinĩ ngũrũ. Angĩĩka ũguo-rĩ

Luke5:39 O na rĩĩrĩ

Luke6:11 Nao makĩiyũrwo nĩ maraakara

Luke6:14 Andũ acio ikũmi na eerĩ nĩ: Simoni (ũrĩa aatuire Petero)
Luke6:15 Mathayo
Luke6:16 Judasi mũrũ wa Jakubu
Luke6:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke6:18 nĩmookĩĩte kũmũthikĩrĩria na kũhonio mĩrimũ yao. O na arĩa maathĩĩnagio nĩ ngoma nĩmookire
Luke6:19 Na rĩĩrĩ

Luke6:21 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Luke6:22 “Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Luke6:23 Rĩrĩa maramwĩka ũguo-rĩ
Luke6:24 “No rĩĩrĩ
Luke6:25 “Kaĩ inyuĩ mũhũũnĩĩte rĩu mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Nĩmũkaahũũta!“Kaĩ o na inyuĩ mũratheka rĩu mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Mũkaarĩra na mũgirĩke!
Luke6:26 “Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ
Luke6:27 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩĩrĩ inyuĩ arĩa mũranjigua
Luke6:28 Raathimagaai arĩa maramũruma
Luke6:29 Mũndũ akũgũtha rũhĩ rũthĩa rũmwe
Luke6:30 Mũndũ o wothe akũhooya kĩndũ mũhe
Luke6:31 Ĩkaga andũ arĩa angĩ ũrĩa ũngĩenda magwĩkage.
Luke6:32 “Harĩ na uumithio ũrĩkũ kwenda o andũ arĩa mamwendeete? O na eehia nĩmeendeete arĩa mameendeete!
Luke6:33 Harĩ na uumithio ũrĩkũ gwĩka wega o andũ arĩa mamwĩkaga wega? O na eehia nĩmeekaga o ro ũguo!
Luke6:34 Harĩ na uumithio ũrĩkũ gũkombera o andũ arĩa mangĩmũrĩha? O na eehia nĩmakombagĩra eehia arĩa angĩ nĩ geetha makaamarĩha!
Luke6:35 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke6:36 Kwoguo
Luke6:37 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke6:38 Heanagaai
Luke6:39 O na ningĩ Jesũ nĩamaheire ngerekano ĩno akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke6:40 Ningĩ gũtirĩ mũrutwo mũnene gũkĩra mũrutani wake; no rĩĩrĩ
Luke6:41 “Nĩ kĩĩ gĩtũmaga wone kĩhuti kĩrĩa kĩ riitho rĩa mũrũ wa thooguo no ndũiguaga mũgogo ũrĩa wĩ riitho rĩaku?
Luke6:42 Kana ũngĩhota atĩa kwĩra mũrũ wa thooguo
Luke6:43 “Gũtirĩ mũtĩ mwega ũciaraga matunda mooru
Luke6:44 Mũtĩ o wothe ũmenyekaga na ũndũ wa matunda maaguo; andũ matituaga ngũyũ kuuma mĩtĩinĩ ya mĩigua kana magatua thabibũ mĩtareinĩ.
Luke6:45 Mũndũ mwega aaragia maũndũ meega moimĩĩte mũthiithũinĩ wa maũndũ meega marĩa me ngoroinĩ yake
Luke6:46 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke6:47 Nĩngũmuonia ũrĩa mũndũ o wothe ũũkaga kũrĩ niĩ
Luke6:48 Ahaana ta mũndũ ũrĩa agĩaka nyũmba aambire kwenja thĩ
Luke6:49 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:1 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kwĩra andũ maũndũ macio moothe agĩthiĩ Kaperinaumu.
Luke7:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:3 Rĩrĩa mũnene ũcio aiguire ũhoro wa Jesũ agĩtũma athuuri amwe a Ayahudi makamwĩte ooke ahonie ndungata ĩyo yake.
Luke7:4 Nao athuuri acio magĩthiĩ kwĩ Jesũ makĩmũthaitha magwatĩirie makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke7:5 nĩ ũndũ nĩendeete andũ aitũ
Luke7:6 Jesũ agĩgĩthiĩ hamwe nao. Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:7 o na ndikuona niĩ mwene njagĩrĩirwo nĩgũũka kũrĩ we; no rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:8 Nĩ ũndũ o na niĩ ndĩ mũndũ wathagwo
Luke7:9 Rĩrĩa
Luke7:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:11 Thuutha ũcio
Luke7:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:14 Agĩcooka agĩthiĩ akĩhuutia ithandũkũ
Luke7:15 Naake mũndũ ũcio wakuĩte agĩikara thĩ
Luke7:16 Nao andũ oothe arĩa maarĩ ho makĩnyiitwo nĩ guoya
Luke7:17 Naguo ũhoro ũcio wa Jesũ ũkĩhunja bũrũri wothe wa Judea o hamwe na matũũra marĩa maũthiũrũrũkĩirie.
Luke7:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:19 akĩmatũma kũrĩ Mwathani makamũũrie atĩrĩ
Luke7:20 Nao arutwo acio magĩthiĩ kwĩ Jesũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke7:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩhonia andũ aingĩ mĩrimũ na ndwarĩ ciao
Luke7:22 Agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo acio maatũmĩĩtwo nĩ Johana atĩrĩ
Luke7:23 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Luke7:24 Nao arutwo a Johana marĩĩkia gũthiĩ
Luke7:25 Mwagĩthiĩte kuona kĩ? Mwathiĩte kuona mũndũ wĩkĩrĩĩte nguo ĩ na riiri? Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke7:26 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:27 Johana nĩ we Maandĩko moigaga ũhoro wake atĩrĩ
Luke7:28 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke7:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:30 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:31 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke7:32 Mahaana ta ciana ciikarĩĩte ndũũnyũ ikĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Luke7:33 Nĩ gũkorwo Johana Mũbatithania ooka ehingĩĩte kũrĩa na kũnyua ndibei
Luke7:34 Naake Mũrũ wa Mũndũ ooka akĩrĩaga na akĩnyuaga mũroiga atĩrĩ
Luke7:35 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:36 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke7:37 Kũu itũũrainĩ rĩu nĩkwarĩ mũndũ wa nja warĩ mwĩhia. Rĩrĩa aiguire atĩ Jesũ nĩokĩĩte kũrĩa irio kwa Mũfarisai ũcio
Luke7:38 Akĩrũũgama thuutha wa Jesũ
Luke7:39 Rĩrĩa Mũfarisai ũcio wetĩĩte Jesũ oonire ũguo
Luke7:40 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke7:41 Jesũ agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

Luke7:45 Wee-rĩ

Luke8:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:2 O na ningĩ nĩhaarĩ atumia amwe arĩa maarutĩĩtwo ngoma na arĩa maahoneetio. Atumia arĩa maarĩ ho nĩ: Mariamu
Luke8:3 Joana mũtumia wa Husa ũrĩa warĩ mũrori wa indo cia Herode
Luke8:4 Ningĩ andũ magĩgĩthiĩ na mbere gũũka kũrĩ Jesũ moimĩĩte matũũrainĩ maingĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:5 “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe mũhuri nĩoimagarire agĩthiĩ kũhura mbegũ mũgũnda. Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:6 Ingĩ ikĩgũa rũnyanjara igũrũ
Luke8:7 Ingĩ ikĩgũa mĩiguainĩ
Luke8:8 Iria ingĩ nacio ikĩgũa tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru nacio igĩkũra na igĩciara
Luke8:9 Nao arutwo aake makĩmũũria ũrĩa ngerekano ĩyo yoigaga.
Luke8:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke8:11 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke8:12 Mbegũ iria ciagũire njĩrainĩ nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro no thuutha wa kũũigua
Luke8:13 Nacio iria ciagũire rũnyanjara igũrũ nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro
Luke8:14 Nacio iria ciagũire mĩiguainĩ nĩ andũ arĩa maiguaga ũhoro
Luke8:15 Nacio mbegũ iria ciagũire tĩĩriinĩ ũrĩa mũnoru
Luke8:16 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũgwatagia taawa agacooka akaũkunĩkĩra na irebe kana akaũiga rungu rwa ũrĩrĩ. Handũ ha gwĩka ũguo
Luke8:17 “Gũtirĩ ũndũ o wothe mũhithe ũtakoonanio ũtheriinĩ
Luke8:18 “Kwoguo mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei ũrĩa mũthikagĩrĩria
Luke8:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:20 Naake Jesũ akĩĩrwo atĩrĩ
Luke8:21 No Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke8:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:23 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa maathiaga-rĩ
Luke8:24 Nao arutwo aake magĩthiĩ makĩmũũkĩria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke8:25 Agĩcooka akĩũria arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Luke8:26 Naake Jesũ hamwe na arutwo aake magĩthiĩ kinya itũũra rĩa Gerasa
Luke8:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:28 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio oonire Jesũ
Luke8:29 Oigire ũguo nĩ ũndũ Jesũ nĩathĩĩte ngoma ĩyo yume thĩinĩ wake. Mũndũ ũcio nĩanyiitagwo nĩ ngoma ĩyo maita maingĩ na o na gũtuĩka nĩahingagĩrwo ooheetwo na mĩnyororo mooko na magũrũ
Luke8:30 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke8:31 Nacio ngoma icio igĩthaitha Jesũ ndagaciathe ithiĩ irimainĩ rĩrĩa iriku rĩtarĩ gĩturi.
Luke8:32 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:33 Ngoma icio igĩkiuma thĩinĩ wa mũndũ ũcio
Luke8:34 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:35 Nao andũ magĩkiumagara makeyonere ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte. Rĩrĩa maakinyire harĩ Jesũ magĩkora mũndũ ũcio warutĩĩtwo ngoma aikarĩĩte thĩ magũrũinĩ maake
Luke8:36 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:37 Nao andũ oothe a itũũra rĩu rĩa Gerasa makĩmũũria oime kũu kwao nĩ ũndũ nĩmaanyiitĩĩtwo nĩ guoya. Naake Jesũ agĩkĩhaica gatarũ
Luke8:38 Naake mũndũ ũcio warutĩĩtwo ngoma agĩthaitha Jesũ amwĩtĩkĩrie mathiĩ naake
Luke8:39 “Cooka mũciĩ ũkahunjie ũrĩa Ngai agwĩkĩire.”Naake mũndũ ũcio agĩgĩthiĩ itũũrainĩ rĩothe akĩhunjagia ũrĩa Jesũ aamwĩkĩire.
Luke8:40 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aacookire mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria
Luke8:41 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:42 nĩ ũndũ mũirĩĩtu wake wa mũũmwe warĩ wa mĩaka ta ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ
Luke8:43 Gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ acio nĩhaarĩ na mũtumia watũire oiraga thakame mĩaka ikũmi na ĩĩrĩ na gũtirĩ ndagĩtaarĩ o na ũmwe wahoteete kũmũhonia.
Luke8:44 Naake mũtumia ũcio akiuma Jesũ na thuutha akĩhuutia gĩcũrĩ kĩa nguo yake
Luke8:45 Naake Jesũ akĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke8:46 No Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke8:47 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:48 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke8:49 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ oigaga ũguo-rĩ
Luke8:50 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:51 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:52 Andũ oothe kũu mũciĩ nĩkũrĩrĩra maarĩragĩra mũirĩĩtu ũcio makĩmũcakayagĩra
Luke8:53 Nao andũ oothe makĩmũthekerera tondũ nĩmooĩ atĩ aarĩ mũkuũ.
Luke8:54 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke8:55 Naguo muoyo wake ũkĩmũcookerera
Luke8:56 Nao aciari aake magĩkĩgega mũno

Luke9:3 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke9:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:5 itũũra rĩrĩa andũ maarega kũmũnyiita ũgeni mwĩribaribage rũkũngũ rũrĩa rwĩ magũrũ maanyu mũkiuma kuo
Luke9:6 Nao arutwo magĩkiuma hau magĩthiĩra icagiinĩ ciothe makĩhunjagia Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega
Luke9:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:8 Angĩ nao moigaga nĩ Elija wonekeete
Luke9:9 Herode agĩkiuga atĩrĩ

Luke9:17 Nao andũ oothe makĩrĩa

Luke9:20 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ

Luke9:22 Agĩcooka

Luke9:27 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Luke9:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:29 Rĩrĩa aahooyaga
Luke9:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:31 Nao moonekaga me na riiri na maaragia naake ũhoro wa gĩkuũ gĩake
Luke9:32 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero na arutwo acio angĩ nĩmaahĩtĩĩtwo nĩ toro
Luke9:33 Rĩrĩa andũ acio maatuire gũtigana na Jesũ
Luke9:34 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero aaragia
Luke9:35 Naguo mũgambo ũkiuma ituinĩ ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke9:36 Thuutha wa mũgambo ũcio kũiguĩka
Luke9:37 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:38 Naake mũndũ ũmwe warĩ gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ akĩanĩrĩra akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke9:39 Rĩmwe nĩanyiitagwo nĩ ngoma akaanĩrĩra o rĩmwe; ĩmũũmagaragia nginya akaruta mũhũũyũ na kanua
Luke9:40 Thaithire arutwo aaku mamĩingate no matinahota.”
Luke9:41 Naake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke9:42 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:43 Nao andũ oothe makĩgega nĩ ũndũ wa hinya mũnene wa Ngai.
Luke9:44 “Mũtikaariganĩrwo nĩ ũhoro ũyũ ngũmwĩra! Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke9:45 No arutwo matiigana gũtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa aameeraga tondũ nĩmaahithĩĩtwo ũndũ ũcio matikaũmenye
Luke9:46 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:47 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aamenyire ũrĩa meeciiragia
Luke9:48 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke9:49 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:50 No Jesũ agĩcookeria Johana hamwe na arutwo arĩa angĩ atĩrĩ
Luke9:51 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:52 Agĩgĩtũma andũ mbere yake mathiĩ gĩcagiinĩ kĩmwe thĩinĩ wa Samaria makahaaragĩrie maũndũ moothe.
Luke9:53 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:54 Rĩrĩa arutwo aake
Luke9:55 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra na kũrĩ o akĩmakũũma.
Luke9:56 Jesũ hamwe na arutwo aake magĩcooka magĩthiĩ gĩcagiinĩ kĩngĩ.
Luke9:57 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke9:58 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke9:59 Agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ ũngĩ atĩrĩ
Luke9:60 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke9:61 Mũndũ ũngĩ naake akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke9:62 No Jesũ akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio atĩrĩ
Luke10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:2 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke10:3 Thiĩi! Ndamũtũma ta ng'ondu gatagatĩinĩ ka njũũi.
Luke10:4 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke10:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:6 Kũngĩkorwo kũu mũciĩ ũcio kwĩ mũndũ ũikaraga kuo wendeete thaayũ
Luke10:7 Ikaragaai kũu mũciĩ ũcio
Luke10:8 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:9 na mũhonagie andũ arĩa arũaru me kuo
Luke10:10 No rĩrĩa
Luke10:11 ‘O na rũkũngũ rwa itũũra rĩanyu rũrĩa rwĩnyiitĩrĩire magũrũ maitũ nĩtwarũribariba rũmũcookerere
Luke10:12 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Luke10:13 “Inyuĩ andũ a Korazini kaĩ mwĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! O na inyuĩ andũ a Bethisaida kaĩ mwĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Nĩ ũndũ ciama iria ciaringirwo matũũrainĩ maanyu korwo ciaringĩĩtwo Turo na Sidoni
Luke10:14 Ngai nĩakaiguĩra andũ a Turo na Sidoni tha nyingĩ kũmũkĩra inyuĩ Mũthenya wa Ituĩro.
Luke10:15 Na inyuĩ andũ a Kaperinaumu
Luke10:16 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Luke10:17 Nao andũ arĩa mĩrongo mũgwanja na eerĩ magĩcooka makeneete makĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke10:18 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke10:19 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke10:20 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:22 “Awa nĩanengereete maũndũ moothe; gũtirĩ mũndũ ũũĩ Mũũriũ nũũ tiga o Awa
Luke10:23 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩhũgũka na kũrĩ arutwo aake akĩmeera marĩ oiki atĩrĩ
Luke10:24 Nĩ ũndũ ngũmwĩra atĩ anabii aingĩ na athamaki aingĩ meeriragĩria kuona na kũigua maũndũ maya mũrona na mũkaigua
Luke10:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:26 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke10:27 Mũndũ ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke10:28 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke10:29 No mũrutani ũcio wa Watho akĩenda kwĩyagĩria akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke10:30 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke10:31 Ihinda o rĩu mũthĩnjĩri Ngai agĩũka agereire njĩrainĩ ĩyo. Rĩrĩa oonire mũndũ ũcio wahũũrĩĩtwo
Luke10:32 Ningĩ Mũlawii akĩhĩtũkĩra handũ hau
Luke10:33 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:34 agĩthiĩ harĩ we akĩmũthambia na ndibei kũrĩa aatiihangĩĩtio
Luke10:35 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:36 Jesũ arĩĩkia akĩũria mũrutani ũcio wa Watho atĩrĩ
Luke10:37 Naake agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke10:38 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:39 Maritha nĩarĩ na mwarĩ wa nyina wetagwo Mariamu
Luke10:40 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke10:41 Naake Mwathani akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke10:42 no ũndũ ũmwe noguo wĩ na bata. Mariamu nĩethuurĩire ũndũ ũrĩa mwega na ndegũtuunywo.”
Luke11:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:2 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke11:3 Tũheage o mũthenya irio ciitũ cia gũtũigana
Luke11:4 na ũtuohagĩre meehia maitũ
Luke11:5 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke11:6 ndĩ na mũraata wararĩrĩra gwakwa na ndirĩ na kĩndũ gĩa kũmũhe!’
Luke11:7 Naake mũraatawe arĩ na thĩinĩ amũcookerie atĩrĩ
Luke11:8 Ngũmwĩra na ma
Luke11:9 “Kwoguo ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ: Hooyai na nĩmũkũheeo; maathaai na nĩmũkuona; ringaringaai mũrango na nĩmũkũhingũrĩrwo.
Luke11:10 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ o wothe ũhooyaga nĩaheagwo
Luke11:11 Nĩ mũciari ũrĩkũ gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu ũngĩĩtio thamaki nĩ mwana wake
Luke11:12 Kana amwĩtie itumbĩ
Luke11:13 Angĩkorwo inyuĩ
Luke11:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:15 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:16 Andũ angĩ nao nĩmeendaga kũgeria Jesũ
Luke11:17 No Jesũ
Luke11:18 Kwoguo angĩkorwo ũthamaki wa Caitaani nĩwĩgayanĩĩtie ũkeyũkĩrĩra guo mwene-rĩ
Luke11:19 Angĩgĩkorwo niĩ nyingataga ngoma na hinya wa Beelizebuli-rĩ
Luke11:20 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:21 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke11:22 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:23 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũtarĩ hamwe na niĩ nĩ thũ yakwa; mũndũ ũrĩa ũtaracookereria ngĩcookereria nĩkũhurunja arahurunja.
Luke11:24 “Rĩrĩa
Luke11:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:26 Hĩndĩ ĩyo ngoma ĩyo ĩgathiĩ ĩkagĩĩra ngoma ingĩ mũgwanja njũru kũmĩkĩra
Luke11:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:28 No Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke11:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:30 Nĩ ũndũ
Luke11:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:32 Mũthenya wa Ituĩro andũ a Nineve nĩmagookĩra na igũrũ mathitange andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ
Luke11:33 “Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũgwatagia taawa agacooka akaũhitha kana akaũiga rungu rwa irebe; handũ ha gwĩka ũguo
Luke11:34 Maitho maaku nĩ mo taawa wa mwĩrĩ waku. Rĩrĩa maitho maaku marona wega
Luke11:35 Kwoguo kĩmenyerere ũtheri ũrĩa wĩ thĩinĩ waku ndũgaatuĩke nduma.
Luke11:36 Angĩkorwo mwĩrĩ waku wothe nĩũiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ ũtheri ũtarĩ handũ o na hamwe he nduma
Luke11:37 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:38 Naake Mũfarisai ũcio akĩmaka nĩkuona Jesũ akĩrĩa ataambĩĩte gwĩthamba mooko.
Luke11:39 Naake Mwathani agĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke11:40 Inyuĩ irimũ ici! Na githĩ Ngai ũrĩa wombire mwena wa na igũrũ to we wombire o na mwena wa na thĩinĩ?
Luke11:41 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke11:42 “Kaĩ inyuĩ Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Tondũ mũheaga Ngai gĩcunjĩ gĩa ikũmi o na gĩa bithaarĩ
Luke11:43 “Kaĩ inyuĩ Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Tondũ mwendaga gũikarĩra itĩ cia mbere thĩinĩ wa thunagogi na kũgeithĩrio ndũũnyũ na gĩtĩĩo!
Luke11:44 Kaĩ inyuĩ Afarisai mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Tondũ mũhaana ta mbĩĩrĩra ĩtarĩ na rũũri
Luke11:45 Naake mũrutani ũmwe wa Watho akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke11:46 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke11:47 Kaĩ mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Tondũ mwakagĩra anabii mbĩĩrĩra thaka
Luke11:48 Kwoguo inyuĩ mũrĩ aira na nĩmũnyiitaga ciĩko cia maithe maanyu mbaru
Luke11:49 Tondũ ũcio Ũũgĩ wa Ngai ũgĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke11:50 Kwoguo andũ a rũciaro rũũrũ nĩmekũherithio nĩ ũndũ wa anabii oothe arĩa mooragĩĩtwo kuuma rĩrĩa thĩ yombirwo
Luke11:51 kuuma kũũragwo kwa Habili kinya kũũragwo gwa Zakaria
Luke11:52 “Kaĩ inyuĩ arutani a Watho mũrĩ thĩĩnainĩ-ĩ! Tondũ nĩmwehereetie macabi ma kũhingũra mũrango wa gũtoonya nyũmba ya ũũgĩ
Luke11:53 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke11:54 makĩgeria kũmũtega maigue kana nĩharĩ ũndũ mũũru angiuga.
Luke12:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:2 Gũtirĩ ũndũ mũhumbĩre ũtakaahumbũrio
Luke12:3 Kwoguo ũndũ o wothe mwanaarĩria ndumainĩ
Luke12:4 “Araata aakwa
Luke12:5 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:6 “Githĩ tũnyoni tũtaano tũtiendagio tũthendi twĩrĩ? No rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:7 O na njuĩrĩ cianyu ciothe cia mũtwe nĩndare. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio tigagaai gwĩtigĩra; inyuĩ mwĩ goro gũkĩra tũnyoni tũingĩ!
Luke12:8 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke12:9 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:10 “Mũndũ o wothe waragia kiugo gĩa gũcambia Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakooherwo
Luke12:11 “Rĩrĩa andũ makaamũtwara mũgaciirithio nĩ andũ thunagogiinĩ kana mũgaciirithio nĩ athamaki kana aathani
Luke12:12 nĩ ũndũ Roho Mũtheru ihindainĩ rĩu nĩakaamũruta ũrĩa mwagĩrĩirwo nĩkuuga.”
Luke12:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:14 No Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke12:15 Agĩkĩmeera oothe atĩrĩ
Luke12:16 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmahe ngerekano akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke12:17 Naake akĩyũria na ngoro atĩrĩ
Luke12:18 Ngwĩka atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke12:19 Njooke njĩĩre ngoro yakwa atĩrĩ
Luke12:20 No Ngai akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio atĩrĩ
Luke12:21 “Ũguo noguo andũ arĩa meigagĩra mĩthiithũ matarĩ na ũngai matariĩ.”
Luke12:22 Ningĩ Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Luke12:23 Nĩ ũndũ muoyo wĩ bata gũkĩra irio
Luke12:24 Tamwĩciiriei ũhoro wa magoogo: matihandaga kana makagetha; matirĩ nyũmba cia kũiga irio kana makũmbĩ
Luke12:25 Ningĩ-rĩ
Luke12:26 Angĩkorwo mũtingĩhota gwĩka kaũndũ kaniini ta kau-rĩ
Luke12:27 Taroraai mahũa ma gĩthaka ũrĩa makũraga; matirutaga wĩra kana magetumĩra nguo
Luke12:28 Angĩkorwo Ngai nĩ we ũhumbaga nyeki ya gĩthaka ĩrĩa ĩrakũra ũũmũũthĩ na rũũciũ ĩkooma ĩgaikio riiko-rĩ
Luke12:29 “Kwoguo tigagaai gwĩtanga nĩ ũndũ wa kĩrĩa mũrĩrĩaga kana kĩrĩa mũrĩnyuaga
Luke12:30 nĩ tondũ o na andũ oothe a thĩ ĩno arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie metangaga na maũndũ o macio. Ithe wanyu nĩoĩ atĩ nĩmũbataragio nĩ maũndũ macio.
Luke12:31 Handũ ha gwĩkaga ũguo-rĩ
Luke12:32 “Tigaai gwĩtigĩra
Luke12:33 Endiai indo cianyu ciothe
Luke12:34 Nĩ ũndũ kũrĩa mĩthiithũ yanyu ĩrĩ
Luke12:35 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:36 mũhaana ta ndungata iria ikoragwo cietereire mwathi wacio oime irugainĩ rĩa ũhiki
Luke12:37 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Luke12:38 Kũraathimwo nĩ ndungata iria ikoragwo imwetereire akinye o na akorwo no kinya ũtukũ gatagatĩ kana thaa kenda cia ũtukũ!
Luke12:39 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:40 O na inyuĩ koragwoi mwĩhaarĩirie nĩ ũndũ Mũrũ wa Mũndũ agooka ithaa rĩrĩa mũtamwĩrĩgĩrĩire.”
Luke12:41 Naake Petero agĩkĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke12:42 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke12:43 Kũraathimwo-rĩ
Luke12:44 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ mwathi wayo ehokagĩra ndungata ĩyo indo ciake ciothe.
Luke12:45 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:46 mwathi wayo agacooka mũthenya ũrĩa ndungata ĩyo ĩtamwĩrĩgĩrĩire na ithaa rĩrĩa ĩtooĩ
Luke12:47 “Ndungata ĩrĩa ĩkoragwo ĩkĩmenya ũrĩa mwathani wayo ekwenda ĩĩke na ndĩrũmbũyagia gwĩka guo nĩkaahũũrwo mũno.
Luke12:48 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:49 “Njũkĩĩte gũcina thĩ
Luke12:50 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke12:51 Mwĩciiragia atĩ njũkĩĩte kũreehe thaayũ thĩ? Aaca; niĩ njũkĩĩte kũreehe nyamũkano.
Luke12:52 Kuuma rĩu andũ ataano a mũciĩ ũmwe marĩkoragwo magayũkanĩĩte; atatũ marĩkoragwo mameneete eerĩ
Luke12:53 Maithe marĩkoragwo mamenanĩĩte na aariũ aao
Luke12:54 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
Luke12:55 Rĩrĩa ningĩ mwaigua rũhuuho rũkĩhuruutana ruumĩĩte na mwena wa na kĩanda
Luke12:56 Inyuĩ hinga ici! Nĩmũũĩ gũtaũra ũrĩa gũkũhaana mwarora igũrũ kana thĩ; mũkĩremeetwo nĩgũkũũrana mahinda maya nĩkĩ?
Luke12:57 “Mũregaga gwĩtuĩra inyuĩ eene ũrĩa mwagĩrĩirwo nĩgwĩka nĩkĩ?
Luke12:58 Mũndũ angĩgũtwara igootiinĩ agũthitange
Luke12:59 Ngũkwĩra atĩ
Luke13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke13:2 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke13:3 Aaca tiguo! Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ o na inyuĩ mwaga kwĩrira meehia maanyu
Luke13:4 Ĩ nao andũ arĩa ikũmi na anaana maagwĩrĩirwo nĩ nyũmba ĩrĩa yarĩ ndaaya thĩinĩ wa itũũra rĩa Siloamu magĩkua
Luke13:5 Aaca tiguo! Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ o na inyuĩ mwaga kwĩrira meehia maanyu
Luke13:6 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩmahe ngerekano ĩno
Luke13:7 Agĩkĩĩra mũruti wĩra wa mũgũnda ũcio wake atĩrĩ
Luke13:8 No mũruti ũcio wa wĩra akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke13:9 Wakorwo ũciarĩĩte-rĩ
Luke13:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke13:11 Kũu thĩinĩ nĩkwarĩ na mũtumia warĩ na ngoma yatũmĩĩte atũũre e kĩonje mĩaka ikũmi na ĩnaana; aatũũraga ainamĩrĩire
Luke13:12 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aamuonire akĩmwĩta akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke13:13 Jesũ agĩkĩigĩrĩra mũtumia ũcio mooko
Luke13:14 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke13:15 Naake Mwathani agĩcookeria mũnene ũcio wa thunagogi atĩrĩ
Luke13:16 Hakĩrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Luke13:17 Oiga ũguo
Luke13:18 Naake
Luke13:19 Ũthamaki wa Ngai ũhaana ta mbegũ ya mũtĩ wa karatarĩ
Luke13:20 Ningĩ Jesũ agĩcooka akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke13:21 Ingĩũhaanania na ndaawa ya kũimbia mĩgate ĩrĩa mũtumia oire
Luke13:22 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ eerekeire Jerusalemu agereire icagiinĩ na matũũrainĩ akĩrutanaga.
Luke13:23 Naake mũndũ ũmwe akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke13:24 “Mwĩrutanagĩriei gũtoonyera mũromo ũrĩa mũceke
Luke13:25 Hĩndĩ iria mwene nyũmba agookĩra ahinge mũrango-rĩ
Luke13:26 Na inyuĩ nĩmũkaamũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke13:27 Naake nĩakaamũcookeria rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Luke13:28 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmũkaarĩra na mũhagaranie magego
Luke13:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke13:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo-rĩ
Luke13:31 O hĩndĩ ĩyo Afarisai amwe magĩũka kũrĩ Jesũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke13:32 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke13:33 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
Luke13:34 “Jerusalemu
Luke13:35 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke14:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke14:3 Naake Jesũ akĩũria arutani a Watho o na Afarisai atĩrĩ
Luke14:4 Nao magĩkira ki. Naake Jesũ akĩoya mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru
Luke14:5 Agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke14:6 Nao makĩremwo nĩkũmũcookeria.
Luke14:7 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire ũrĩa ageni arĩa meetĩĩtwo meendaga gũikarĩra itĩ iria ciaigĩirwo ageni a gĩtĩĩo
Luke14:8 “Rĩrĩa mũndũ agwĩtĩra iruga rĩa ũhiki-rĩ
Luke14:9 naake mũndũ ũcio ũmwĩtĩĩte inyuerĩ ooke akwĩre atĩrĩ
Luke14:10 Rĩrĩa wetĩrwo iruga-rĩ
Luke14:11 Nĩ ũndũ mũndũ o wothe wĩnenehagia nĩakaanyiihio
Luke14:12 Jesũ agĩcooka agĩĩta mũndũ ũrĩa wamwĩtĩĩte irugainĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke14:13 Wagĩa na iruga-rĩ
Luke14:14 na nĩũrĩraathimagwo nĩ tondũ acio matingĩhota gũkũrĩha. Ngai nĩ we ũgaakũrĩha rĩrĩa andũ arĩa athingu makaariũka.”
Luke14:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke14:16 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke14:17 Rĩrĩa thaa cia kũrĩa ciakinyire agĩtũma ndungata yake ĩthiĩ ĩkeere arĩa meetĩirwo iruga rĩu atĩrĩ
Luke14:18 Nao oothe o mũndũ akĩambĩrĩria kũheana gĩtũmi gĩa kũgiria athiĩ irugainĩ rĩu
Luke14:19 Naake ũngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke14:20 Naake ũrĩa ũngĩ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke14:21 “Ndungata ĩyo ĩgĩgĩcooka mũciĩ ĩkĩĩra mwathi wayo maũndũ macio moothe. Naake mwathi wayo aamaigua akĩng'ũrĩka mũno
Luke14:22 Thuutha wa ihinda iniini
Luke14:23 Naake mwathi wayo akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke14:24 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wa arĩa megwĩtĩĩtwo ũgũcama irio iria ngũmarugithĩirie!’ ”
Luke14:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke14:26 “Mũndũ ũrĩa ũgũũka kũrĩ niĩ no mũhaka aanyende gũkĩra ũrĩa eendeete ithe
Luke14:27 Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe ũtegũkuua mũtharaba wake anũmĩrĩre ndangĩhota gũtuĩka mũrutwo wakwa.
Luke14:28 “Mũndũ angĩkorwo arenda gwaka mũnaara-rĩ
Luke14:29 Angĩaga gwĩka ũguo
Luke14:30 makoiga atĩrĩ
Luke14:31 “Mũthamaki angĩkorwo agĩthiĩ kũrũa na mũthamaki ũngĩ-rĩ
Luke14:32 Angĩona atĩ ndangĩhota kũmũtooria
Luke14:33 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Luke14:34 “Cumbĩ nĩ mwega
Luke14:35 Cumbĩ ũcio ndũrĩ bata tĩĩriinĩ o na kana thumuinĩ; nĩgũteeo ũteagwo. Ũrĩa ũrĩ na matũ ma kũigua nĩakĩigue.”
Luke15:1 Mũthenya ũmwe eetia a mbeeca cia igooti na eehia nĩmookire gũthikĩrĩria Jesũ akĩrutana.
Luke15:2 Nao Afarisai na arutani a Watho makĩambĩrĩria kũng'ong'oora makiugaga atĩrĩ
Luke15:3 Tondũ ũcio Jesũ akĩmahe ngerekano ĩno akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke15:4 “Mũndũ ũmwe wanyu angĩkorwo e na ng'ondu
Luke15:5 Amĩona-rĩ
Luke15:6 Akinya mũciĩ eetaga araata aake na andũ arĩa arigainie nao akameera atĩrĩ
Luke15:7 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Luke15:8 “Kana rĩĩrĩ
Luke15:9 Amĩona-rĩ
Luke15:10 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ ũguo noguo araika makenaga rĩrĩa mwĩhia ũmwe eerira meehia maake.”
Luke15:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke15:12 Ũrĩa warĩ mũnyiinyi akĩĩra ithe atĩrĩ
Luke15:13 Matukũ maniini mathira
Luke15:14 Rĩrĩa aarĩĩkirie kũhũthĩra indo icio ciake ciothe
Luke15:15 Kwoguo
Luke15:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke15:17 Naake agĩĩcookera akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke15:18 Ngũũkĩra thiĩ kũrĩ Baaba ndĩmwĩre atĩrĩ
Luke15:19 Ndiagĩrĩirwo nĩgũcooka gwĩtagwo mũũrũguo
Luke15:20 Naake agĩgĩũkĩra akĩambĩrĩria gũcooka kũrĩ ithe.“Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke15:21 Naake mũũriũ ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke15:22 No ithe agĩĩta ndungata ciake agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
Luke15:23 Mũcooke mũthiĩ mũthĩnje gateegwa karĩa kanoru biũ
Luke15:24 nĩ ũndũ mwana ũyũ wakwa araarĩ mũkuũ na rĩu nĩariũkĩĩte; nĩaroorĩĩte na rĩu nĩonekeete.’ Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Luke15:25 “Maũndũ macio moothe magĩĩkĩka-rĩ
Luke15:26 Agĩgĩĩta ndungata ĩmwe akĩmĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke15:27 Nayo ndungata ĩyo ĩkĩmũcookeria ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke15:28 “Naake mũrũ wa nyina ũcio mũkũrũ agĩkĩraakara mũno
Luke15:29 No we agĩcookeria ithe atĩrĩ
Luke15:30 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke15:31 Naake ithe akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke15:32 Nĩtwagĩrĩirwo nĩgũkũngũiya na gũkena nĩ tondũ mũrũ wa maitũguo nĩarakuĩte
Luke16:1 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Luke16:2 Nakĩo gĩtonga kĩu gĩkĩmwĩta gĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke16:3 Naake mũndũ ũcio akiuga na ngoro atĩrĩ
Luke16:4 Rĩu nĩndamenya ũrĩa ngwĩka
Luke16:5 “Kwoguo agĩgĩĩta andũ arĩa oothe maarĩ na thiirĩ wa mwathi wake; akĩũria wa mbere atĩrĩ
Luke16:6 Naake akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke16:7 Mũrori ũcio agĩcooka akĩũria mũndũ ũngĩ atĩrĩ
Luke16:8 “Tondũ ũcio
Luke16:9 Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke16:10 Mũndũ o wothe ũkoragwo e mwĩhokeku na tũindo tũniini
Luke16:11 Kwoguo angĩkorwo ndũrĩ mwĩhokeku na ũtonga wa gũũkũ thĩ-rĩ
Luke16:12 Ningĩ angĩkorwo gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩkwĩhokera kĩndũ gĩake-rĩ
Luke16:13 “Gũtirĩ ndungata ĩngĩhota gũtungatĩra aathani eerĩ
Luke16:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke16:15 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke16:16 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke16:17 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke16:18 “Mũndũ mũrũme o wothe angĩtigana na mũtumia wake ahikie mũtumia ũngĩ nĩatharĩĩtie
Luke16:19 “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe nĩkwarĩ mũndũ warĩ gĩtonga
Luke16:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke16:21 e na mwĩhoko wa kũrĩa irio iria ingĩagũire thĩ gĩtonga kĩu gĩkĩrĩa. O na ngui nĩciokaga kũmũcũna ironda.
Luke16:22 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke16:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke16:24 Nakĩo gĩgĩĩta Aburahamu gĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke16:25 “No Aburahamu agĩcookeria gĩtonga kĩu atĩrĩ
Luke16:26 Hamwe na ũguo-rĩ
Luke16:27 Nakĩo gĩtonga kĩu gĩkĩĩra Aburahamu atĩrĩ
Luke16:28 ndĩ na aariũ a maitũ ataano
Luke16:29 “No Aburahamu akĩĩra gĩtonga kĩu atĩrĩ
Luke16:30 Nakĩo gĩtonga gĩgĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke16:31 Naake Aburahamu agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke17:1 Naake Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Luke17:2 Mũndũ ũcio nĩ kaba oohererwo ihiga rĩa gĩthĩi ngingo aikio iriainĩ
Luke17:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio kĩĩmenyagĩrĩreei ciĩkoinĩ cianyu.“Mũrũ kana mwarĩ wa thooguo angĩĩhia
Luke17:4 Angĩkwĩhĩria mũthenya ũmwe maita mũgwanja
Luke17:5 Nao atũmwo makĩĩra Mwathani atĩrĩ
Luke17:6 Naake Mwathani akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke17:7 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke17:8 Githĩ to amĩĩrire
Luke17:9 Ningĩ-rĩ
Luke17:10 Ũguo noguo o na inyuĩ mũhaana; rĩrĩa mweka ũrĩa wothe mwathĩĩtwo mwĩke-rĩ
Luke17:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke17:12 Rĩrĩa aatoonyaga gĩcagiinĩ kĩmwe nĩatũngirwo nĩ andũ ikũmi maarũarĩĩte mũrimũ mũũru wa ngoothi. Nao andũ acio makĩrũũgama haraaya
Luke17:13 makĩanĩrĩra makiuga atĩrĩ
Luke17:14 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aamoonire akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke17:15 Rĩrĩa ũmwe wao oonire atĩ nĩahonio-rĩ
Luke17:16 akĩĩgũithia magũrũinĩ ma Jesũ
Luke17:17 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩanĩrĩra akĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke17:18 Mũndũ ũyũ mũgeni no we wahũndũka ooke acookerie Ngai ngaatho?”
Luke17:19 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩĩra mũndũ ũcio atĩrĩ
Luke17:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke17:21 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkaamwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke17:22 Agĩcooka akĩĩra arutwo atĩrĩ
Luke17:23 Nĩkũrĩ andũ makaamwĩraga atĩrĩ
Luke17:24 Nĩ gũkorwo o ta ũrĩa rũheni rũhenũkaga rũkamũrĩka matu kuuma mwena ũmwe kinya ũrĩa ũngĩ
Luke17:25 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke17:26 O ta ũrĩa kwahaanaga matukũinĩ ma Noa
Luke17:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ maarĩaga na makanyua
Luke17:28 O na hĩndĩ ya Loti noguo kwahaanaga; andũ maatũũraga marĩaga na maanyuaga
Luke17:29 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke17:30 Ũguo noguo gũkaahaana rĩrĩa Mũrũ wa Mũndũ akoonanio.
Luke17:31 “Mũthenya ũcio-rĩ
Luke17:32 Taririkanaai mũtumia wa Loti!
Luke17:33 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa ũgeragia kũhonokia muoyo wake
Luke17:34 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Luke17:35 Nao atumia eerĩ magaakorwo magĩthĩa hamwe
Luke17:36 Andũ eerĩ magaakorwo makĩruta wĩra mũgũndainĩ hamwe
Luke17:37 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke18:1 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩhe arutwo aake ngerekano ya kũmaruta atĩ no mũhaka mahooyage hingo ciothe mategũkua ngoro.
Luke18:2 Agĩkĩmera atĩrĩ
Luke18:3 Itũũrainĩ o rĩu nĩkwarĩ na mũtumia wa ndigwa watũũraga athiaga kũrĩ mũciirithania ũcio akamwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:4 Mũciirithania ũcio nĩaikarire matukũ maingĩ aregeete kũmũteithia
Luke18:5 nĩngũteithia mũtumia ũyũ nĩ ũndũ wa ũrĩa athĩĩnĩĩtie. Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Luke18:6 Mwathani agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke18:7 Githĩ o naake Ngai ndangĩgĩteithĩrĩria andũ aake arĩa mamũkayagĩra ũtukũ na mũthenya? No aage kũmateithĩrĩria na ihenya?
Luke18:8 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ no amateithĩrĩrie na ihenya mũno. No rĩĩrĩ
Luke18:9 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩĩra andũ arĩa meetuaga atĩ nĩ o athingu
Luke18:10 “Hĩndĩ ĩmwe andũ eerĩ nĩmaambatire Hekaarũinĩ kũhooya; ũmwe aarĩ Mũfarisai
Luke18:11 “Naake Mũfarisai ũcio akĩrũũgama handũ e wiki akĩhooya atĩrĩ: ‘Ngai nĩndagũcookeria ngaatho nĩ ũndũ ndirĩ mũkoroku
Luke18:12 Ndĩhingaga maita meerĩ o kiumia
Luke18:13 “No mwĩtia wa mbeeca cia igooti aarũũgamĩĩte o haraaya
Luke18:14 Ngũmwĩra atĩ
Luke18:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke18:16 No Jesũ agĩĩta twana tũu akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke18:17 Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke18:18 Naake mũtongoria ũmwe wa Ayahudi akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke18:19 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke18:20 Wee nĩũũĩ ũrĩa maathani moigĩĩte atĩ; ‘Ndũkaanatharanie; ndũkaanoragane
Luke18:21 Naake Mũyahudi ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke18:22 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire ũguo akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:23 Rĩrĩa Mũyahudi ũcio aiguire ũguo
Luke18:24 Naake Jesũ oona ũrĩa aarĩ na kĩeha
Luke18:25 Nĩ ũndũ nĩ ũhũthũ ngamĩĩra gũtoonyera irima rĩa cindano
Luke18:26 Nao andũ arĩa maiguire ũguo makĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke18:27 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke18:28 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Petero akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke18:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke18:30 ũtakaagĩa na ũtonga mũingĩ matukũ maya tũrĩ
Luke18:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke18:32 Nĩ ũndũ nĩarĩnengeranwo kũrĩ andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ mamũnyũrũrie
Luke18:33 Ningĩ nĩmarĩcooka mamũhũũre na kĩboko na mamũũrage; no rĩĩrĩ
Luke18:34 No arutwo matiamenyire ũndũ o na ũmwe wa macio; nĩmaahithĩĩtwo ũrĩa Jesũ eendaga kuuga
Luke18:35 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke18:36 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio aiguire andũ aingĩ makĩhĩtũka akĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke18:37 Nao andũ makĩmwĩra atĩ nĩ Jesũ wa Nazarethi wahĩtũkagĩra hau.
Luke18:38 Naake akĩanĩrĩra akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke18:39 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩ mbere magĩkũũma mũtumuumu ũcio makĩmwĩra akire. No we akĩanĩrĩra mũno makĩria akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke18:40 Naake Jesũ akĩrũũgama agĩathana mũndũ ũcio areehwo harĩ we. Akuhĩrĩria akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke18:41 “Ũkwenda ngwĩkĩre atĩa?”Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:42 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke18:43 Ihinda o rĩu mũndũ ũcio akĩhota kuona
Luke19:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke19:2 Kũu Jeriko nĩkwarĩ mũnene ũmwe wa eetia a mbeeca cia igooti wetagwo Zakayo
Luke19:3 Mũndũ ũcio nĩageragia kuona Jesũ aarĩ ũ
Luke19:4 Kwoguo agĩgĩteng'era mbere ya andũ
Luke19:5 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aakinyire rungu rwa mũtĩ ũcio
Luke19:6 Naake Zakayo agĩkĩharũrũka na ihenya
Luke19:7 Nao andũ oothe arĩa moonire ũhoro ũcio
Luke19:8 Naake akĩrũũgama na igũrũ akĩĩra Mwathani atĩrĩ
Luke19:9 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:10 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Luke19:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke19:12 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke19:13 Atanathiĩ nĩetire ndungata ciake ikũmi
Luke19:14 No andũ a bũrũri wake matiamwendeete
Luke19:15 “Mũndũ ũcio nĩathiire agĩtuuo mũthamaki na agĩcooka. Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke19:16 Nayo ndungata ya mbere ĩgĩũka harĩ we ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:17 Naake akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:18 Nayo ndungata ya keerĩ ĩgĩũka ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:19 Naake akĩmĩĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:20 “Nayo ndungata ĩngĩ ĩgĩũka ĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:21 Nĩndagwĩtigĩrire nĩ ũndũ wee wĩ mũndũ mũhahanyi. Woyaga kĩrĩa gĩtarĩ gĩaku
Luke19:22 Naake mũnene ũcio akĩĩra ndungata ĩyo atĩrĩ
Luke19:23 Wakĩregire kũiga mina yakwa bengi nĩkĩ nĩguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa ngooka igaakorwo na maciaro?’
Luke19:24 “Mũnene ũcio agĩcooka akĩĩra andũ arĩa maarĩ hau atĩrĩ
Luke19:25 Nao andũ acio makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke19:26 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke19:27 Nao andũ acio thũ ciakwa matarenda nduĩke mũthamaki wao-rĩ
Luke19:28 Naake Jesũ arĩĩkia kuuga ũhoro ũcio
Luke19:29 Rĩrĩa aakinyire kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa mĩtamaiyũ
Luke19:30 “Thiĩi gĩcagiinĩ kĩĩrĩa kĩ mwena ũũrĩa ũngĩ; mũgĩtoonya nĩmũkuona njaũ ya ndigiri ĩtarĩ yakuua mũndũ
Luke19:31 Mũngĩũrio nĩ mũndũ mũramĩohora nĩkĩ
Luke19:32 Nao arutwo magĩgĩthiĩ
Luke19:33 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke19:34 Nao makĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke19:35 Magĩkĩmĩtwara kũrĩ Jesũ. Magĩcooka makĩmĩigĩrĩra nguo ciao
Luke19:36 Naake agĩgĩthiĩ na njĩra ahaicĩĩte njaũ ĩyo
Luke19:37 Rĩrĩa aakuhĩrĩirie itũũra rĩa Jerusalemu
Luke19:38 “Kũraathimwo nĩ mũthamaki ũrĩa ũgũũka na rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani! Thaayũ ũrogĩa igũrũ matuinĩ
Luke19:39 Nao Afarisai amwe arĩa maarĩ ho makĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke19:40 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke19:41 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke19:42 akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke19:43 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke19:44 Ĩgaakũniina o biũ wee mwene o hamwe na ciana ciaku; gũtirĩ ihiga igaatiga rĩ igũrũ wa rĩrĩa rĩngĩ
Luke19:45 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka agĩtoonya Hekaarũ akĩambĩrĩria kũingata andũ arĩa meendagĩria kuo
Luke19:46 akĩmeeraga atĩrĩ
Luke19:47 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke19:48 no matingĩahotire
Luke20:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke20:2 makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke20:3 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke20:4 Johana-rĩ
Luke20:5 Nao magĩciira me hamwe makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Luke20:6 Na twoiga
Luke20:7 Kwoguo makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke20:8 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke20:9 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩhe andũ ngerekano ĩno “Mũndũ ũmwe nĩahandire mĩthabibũ mũgũndainĩ wake
Luke20:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke20:11 Mwene mũgũnda agĩcooka agĩtũma ngombo ĩngĩ; nayo makĩmĩhũũra
Luke20:12 Ningĩ agĩcooka agĩtũma ngombo ĩngĩ ya gatatũ; nao makĩmĩtiihangia na makĩmĩingata.
Luke20:13 Naake mwene mũgũnda agĩkĩĩyũria atĩrĩ
Luke20:14 Rĩrĩa andũ acio maakomborithĩĩtio mũgũnda maamuonire makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
Luke20:15 Magĩkĩmũruta nja ya mũgũnda
Luke20:16 Agooka amoorage
Luke20:17 Naake Jesũ akĩmarora akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke20:18 Mũndũ o wothe ũgũagĩra ihiga rĩu nĩoinangagwo nĩrĩo
Luke20:19 Nao arutani a Watho hamwe na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene makĩgeria kũnyiita Jesũ o hĩndĩ ĩyo tondũ nĩmaamenyire atĩ aaheanire ngerekano ĩyo
Luke20:20 Kwoguo magĩcaria mweke
Luke20:21 Nao athigaani acio magĩkĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
Luke20:22 Tagĩtwĩre atĩrĩ
Luke20:23 Naake Jesũ aamenya wara wao akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke20:24 “Tanyoniai mbeeca ĩmwe. Mbica ĩno ĩ ho na rĩĩtwa rĩĩrĩ rĩ ho nĩ cia ũ?”Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Luke20:25 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke20:26 Nao magĩkĩremwo nĩkũnyiita Jesũ na mĩario ĩrĩa aaragia mbere ya mũingĩ
Luke20:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke20:28 makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke20:29 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke20:30 Naake wa keerĩ akĩhikia mũtumia ũcio
Luke20:31 O naake wa gatatũ o taguo
Luke20:32 Thuutha ũcio
Luke20:33 Rĩu-rĩ
Luke20:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke20:35 no rĩĩrĩ
Luke20:36 Andũ acio matigaakuaga tondũ magaakoragwo mahaana ta araika. Andũ acio magaakorwo marĩ ciana cia Ngai tondũ nĩmagaakorwo mariũkĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ gĩkuũ.
Luke20:37 O naake Musa nĩonanirie ũhoro wa kũriũka kwa akuũ; harĩa harĩ ũhoro wa kĩhinga gĩkĩhĩa eetire Mwathani
Luke20:38 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Luke20:39 Nao arutani amwe a Watho makiuga atĩrĩ
Luke20:40 Moigire ũguo nĩ ũndũ Asadukai acio matiacookire kũmũũria kĩũria kĩngĩ.
Luke20:41 Naake Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke20:42 Daudi we mwene nĩoigĩĩte ibukuinĩ rĩa Thaburi atĩrĩ
Luke20:43 nginya rĩrĩa ngaatũma ũrangĩrĩrie thũ ciaku.’
Luke20:44 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke20:45 Naake Jesũ akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Luke20:46 “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei arutani a Watho arĩa meendeete gũthiĩ meekĩrĩĩte nguo ndaaya
Luke20:47 Andũ o acio no o matoonyagĩrĩra atumia a ndigwa makaiya indo ciao
Luke21:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke21:2 Agĩcooka akĩona mũtumia mũthĩĩni warĩ wa ndigwa akĩhotha tũthendi twĩrĩ.
Luke21:3 Akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke21:4 Nĩ ũndũ-rĩ
Luke21:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke21:6 “Nĩmũkuona mĩako ĩno yoth
Luke21:7 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke21:8 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke21:9 Matikaanetigĩre rĩrĩa mũkaigua ũhoro wa mbaara
Luke21:10 Agĩthiĩ na mbere akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke21:11 Kũndũ kũingĩ nĩgũkaagĩa na ithingithia nene
Luke21:12 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke21:13 Ũcio ũgaakorwo arĩ mweke wanyu wa kũhunjia Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega.
Luke21:14 Mũtikaaneetange mũgĩĩciiria o mbere ũrĩa mũgaacookia mũgĩciirithio
Luke21:15 nĩ ũndũ
Luke21:16 Nĩmũkaanengeranwo o na nĩ aciari aanyu
Luke21:17 Andũ oothe nĩmakaamũmena nĩ ũndũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa
Luke21:18 no gũtirĩ rũcuĩrĩ o na rũmwe rwanyu rwa mũtwe rũkoora.
Luke21:19 Kũũmĩrĩria kwanyu nĩkuo gũgaatũma mũhonokie mĩoyo yanyu.
Luke21:20 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke21:21 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa magaakorwo Judea nĩmakoorĩra irĩmainĩ
Luke21:22 Nĩ ũndũ matukũ macio nĩ mo magaakorwo me ma kũherithanio nĩ geetha maũndũ moothe marĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo mahinge.
Luke21:23 Kaĩ atumia arĩa magaakorwo na nda na arĩa magaakorwo makĩongithia hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩmagaakorwo na thĩĩna-ĩ! Nĩ ũndũ gũũkũ thĩ ĩno nĩgũkaagĩa na kĩeha kĩnene
Luke21:24 Andũ amwe nĩmakooragwo na hiũ
Luke21:25 “Nĩgũkaagĩa na imenyithia riũainĩ
Luke21:26 Nao andũ nĩmakaaringĩka nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtigĩra
Luke21:27 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩakooneka agĩũka e thĩinĩ wa itu e na hinya na riiri mũingĩ.
Luke21:28 Rĩrĩa maũndũ macio makaambĩrĩria gwĩkĩka
Luke21:29 Ningĩ Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera ngerekano ĩno atĩrĩ
Luke21:30 Rĩrĩa muona ĩkĩruta mathangũ nĩmũmenyaga atĩ ihinda rĩa ũrugarĩ rĩ hakuhĩ.
Luke21:31 Ũguo noguo hĩndĩ ĩrĩa mũkoona maũndũ macio magĩĩkĩka
Luke21:32 “Ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ na ma
Luke21:33 Igũrũ na thĩ nĩigaathira
Luke21:34 “Mwĩmenyagĩrĩreei ngoro cianyu itikaanakorwo itahĩĩtwo nĩ ndĩa
Luke21:35 ta mũtego
Luke21:36 Koragwoi mwĩhaarĩirie hingo ciothe mũkĩhooyaga atĩ mũgĩe na hinya wa kweherera maũndũ macio moothe mageekĩka
Luke21:37 O mũthenya Jesũ nĩahunjagia Hekaarũinĩ
Luke21:38 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke22:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke22:2 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho nĩmaatuĩragia ũrĩa mangĩũragithia Jesũ na hitho
Luke22:3 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Caitaani agĩtoonya thĩinĩ wa Judasi ũrĩa wetagwo Mũisikariota
Luke22:4 Kwoguo Judasi agĩgĩthiĩ akĩrĩĩkanĩra na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na anene a arangĩri a Hekaarũ ũrĩa angĩakunyanĩire Jesũ kũrĩ o.
Luke22:5 Nao magĩgĩkena na makĩiguithanĩria atĩ nĩmekũmũrĩha mbeeca.
Luke22:6 Judasi nĩetĩkĩrire
Luke22:7 Naguo mũthenya wa mĩgate ĩtarĩ mĩĩkĩre ndaawa ya kũimbia
Luke22:8 Naake Jesũ agĩtũma Petero na Johana
Luke22:9 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke22:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Luke22:11 Mwatoonya thĩinĩ ĩraai mwene nyũmba ĩyo atĩrĩ
Luke22:12 Naake mũndũ ũcio nĩekũmuonia nyũmba nene ya igũrũ
Luke22:13 Nao magĩgĩthiĩ
Luke22:14 Narĩo ihinda rĩakinya
Luke22:15 Akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke22:16 Nĩ ũndũ ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ ndigaacooka gũcirĩa kinya rĩrĩa igaakorwo ciagĩrĩĩte biũ Ũthamakiinĩ wa Ngai.”
Luke22:17 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩoya gĩkombe
Luke22:18 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Luke22:19 Ningĩ akĩoya mũgate
Luke22:20 Ningĩ no taguo aamaneire gĩkombe marĩĩkia kũrĩa akiugaga atĩrĩ
Luke22:21 “No rĩĩrĩ
Luke22:22 Mũrũ wa Mũndũ nĩegũkua o ta ũrĩa Ngai atuĩte
Luke22:23 Nao arutwo makĩambĩrĩria kũũrania o eene nũũ gatagatĩinĩ kaao ũngĩekire ũguo.
Luke22:24 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke22:25 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke22:26 No ũguo tiguo inyuĩ mũhaana; rekeei ũrĩa mũnene gatagatĩinĩ kaanyu atuĩke ta arĩ we mũnyiinyi
Luke22:27 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke22:28 “Inyuĩ nĩmũkoreetwo hamwe na niĩ magerioinĩ maakwa;
Luke22:29 Kwoguo
Luke22:30 nĩ geetha mũkaarĩa na mũnyue meethainĩ yakwa Ũthamakiinĩ wakwa
Luke22:31 Naake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke22:32 No wee nĩngũhoeire wĩtĩkio waku ndũgaathire
Luke22:33 No Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Luke22:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke22:35 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩũria arutwo aake atĩrĩ
Luke22:36 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke22:37 Nĩ ũndũ ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
Luke22:38 Nao arutwo makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke22:39 Naake Jesũ akiuma itũũrainĩ rĩu
Luke22:40 Akinya ho akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke22:41 Agĩcooka akĩmeeherera agĩthiĩ o ta itĩĩna rĩa harĩa mũndũ angĩikia ihiga
Luke22:42 atĩrĩ
Luke22:43 Na o hĩndĩ ĩyo mũraika akĩmuumĩrĩra kuuma igũrũ
Luke22:44 Naake Jesũ akĩhooya mũno makĩria e na ruwo rũnene. Thithino yake yataataga thĩ ĩhaana ta mataata manene ma thakame.]
Luke22:45 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aarĩĩkirie kũhooya
Luke22:46 Agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke22:47 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke22:48 No Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke22:49 Rĩrĩa arutwo arĩa maarĩ na Jesũ moonire ũrĩa kwerekeire gwĩkĩka makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke22:50 Naake ũmwe wao agĩtema ngombo ya Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene
Luke22:51 No Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke22:52 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩũria athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arangĩri a Hekaarũ na athuuri arĩa mookĩĩte kũmũnyiita atĩrĩ
Luke22:53 Ndĩratũũraga na inyuĩ na mũtirĩ mwageria kũũnyiita. No rĩĩrĩ
Luke22:54 Nao magĩkĩnyiita Jesũ makĩmũtwara kwa Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene
Luke22:55 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke22:56 Nayo ndungata ĩmwe ya mũirĩĩtu ikĩmuona aikarĩĩte hau mwakiinĩ ĩkĩmũkũũrĩra maitho ĩkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke22:57 Naake Petero agĩkaana akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke22:58 Ihinda iniini rĩathira mũndũ ũngĩ akĩona Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke22:59 Thuutha wa ithaa rĩmwe
Luke22:60 No Petero akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke22:61 Naake Mwathani akĩhũgũka
Luke22:62 Naake Petero akiuma nja akĩrĩra e na ruwo rũingĩ.
Luke22:63 Nao andũ arĩa maarangĩrĩĩte Jesũ makĩmũnyũrũria na makĩmũhũũra.
Luke22:64 Magĩcooka makĩmuoha maitho na gĩtambaya makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke22:65 Magĩcooka makĩaria ciugo ingĩ nyingĩ cia kũmũruma.
Luke22:66 Kwarooka gũkĩa
Luke22:67 Makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke22:68 na ingĩmũũria mũtingĩcookia.
Luke22:69 Kuuma rĩu Mũrũ wa Mũndũ arĩkoragwo aikarĩĩte mwena wa ũrĩo wa Ngai Mwene Hinya Wothe.”
Luke22:70 Nao oothe makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke22:71 Magĩkĩũrania atĩrĩ
Luke23:1 O hĩndĩ ĩyo acio oothe arĩa moonganĩĩte magĩũkĩra
Luke23:2 Magĩkĩambĩrĩria kũmũthitanga makiuga atĩrĩ
Luke23:3 Naake Pilato agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Luke23:4 Naake Pilato akĩĩra athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na mũingĩ atĩrĩ
Luke23:5 No o makĩĩrutanĩria magwatĩirie makiuga atĩrĩ
Luke23:6 Rĩrĩa Pilato aiguire ũguo akĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke23:7 Arĩĩkia kũmenya atĩ Jesũ oimĩĩte bũrũri ũrĩa Herode aathanaga
Luke23:8 Rĩrĩa Herode oonire Jesũ
Luke23:9 Herode agĩkĩũria Jesũ ciũria nyingĩ
Luke23:10 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na arutani a Watho makĩrũũgama makĩmũthitanga na hinya mũno.
Luke23:11 Naake Herode na thigari ciake makĩmũmenereria
Luke23:12 Mũthenya o ro ũcio Herode na Pilato makĩgĩa ndũgũ nĩ ũndũ maatũire marĩ thũ.
Luke23:13 Naake Pilato agĩĩta athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene na aathani na mũingĩ
Luke23:14 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke23:15 O naake Herode ndanoona mahĩtia maake
Luke23:16 Kwoguo ngũmũhũũrithia iboko
Luke23:17 O hĩndĩ ya Thigũkũ ya Bathaka Pilato nĩamoohoragĩra muohwo ũmwe.]
Luke23:18 No rĩĩrĩ
Luke23:19 (Baraba ooheetwo nĩ ũndũ wa ngũĩ aarutithĩĩtie itũũrainĩ
Luke23:20 Naake Pilato agĩkĩarĩria mũingĩ o rĩngĩ
Luke23:21 No mũingĩ ũkĩanĩrĩra ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Luke23:22 Ningĩ Pilato akĩwarĩria riita rĩa gatatũ akĩũria atĩrĩ
Luke23:23 No mũingĩ ũgĩthiĩ na mbere kwanĩrĩra mũno makĩria atĩ Jesũ aambwo na mũthiainĩ kwanĩrĩra kwaguo gũkĩhootana.
Luke23:24 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato agĩtuĩra Jesũ kũringana na wendi waguo.
Luke23:25 Agĩkĩwohorera mũndũ ũrĩa wendaga
Luke23:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke23:27 Nĩarũmĩrĩirwo nĩ andũ aingĩ mũno. Amwe aao maarĩ atumia maagirĩkaga na makarĩra maanĩrĩire nĩ ũndũ wake.
Luke23:28 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra na kũrĩ o akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke23:29 Nĩ ũndũ ihinda nĩrĩrooka rĩrĩa andũ mariuga atĩrĩ
Luke23:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo andũ makeera irĩma atĩrĩ
Luke23:31 Nĩ ũndũ angĩkorwo maũndũ ta maya mareekwo mĩtĩ ĩ mĩruru-rĩ
Luke23:32 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke23:33 Rĩrĩa thigari icio ciakinyire handũ heetagwo
Luke23:34 Naake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke23:35 Nao andũ makĩrũũgama ho makĩĩrorera. Nao atongoria a Ayahudi makĩnyũrũria Jesũ makiugaga atĩrĩ
Luke23:36 O nacio thigari nĩciamũnyũrũririe; ciathiire harĩ we kũmũhe thiki
Luke23:37 ikĩmwĩraga atĩrĩ
Luke23:38 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke23:39 Naake ũmwe wa aici acio maambanĩirio naake akĩmũruma atĩrĩ
Luke23:40 No ũcio ũngĩ akĩmũkũũma akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke23:41 Ithuĩ-rĩ
Luke23:42 Mũici ũcio agĩcooka akĩĩra Jesũ
Luke23:43 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Luke23:44 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke23:45 nakĩo gĩtambaya kĩa Hekaarũ gĩgĩatũkana maita meerĩ.
Luke23:46 Naake Jesũ akĩgũũthũka na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ
Luke23:47 Naake mũnene wa thigari igana oona ũrĩa gwekĩka
Luke23:48 Rĩrĩa andũ oothe arĩa moonganĩĩte hau kwĩrorera moonire ũrĩa gwekĩka
Luke23:49 Nao andũ oothe arĩa maamũũĩ
Luke23:50 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke23:51 We ndaiguithanĩirie nao ũhoroinĩ wa gũtuĩra Jesũ
Luke23:52 Naake agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Pilato akĩũria aheeo mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ.

Luke24:7 ‘Mũrũ wa Mũndũ no mũhaka anengeranwo kũrĩ andũ eehia

Luke24:16 nĩmaamuonire

Luke24:21 Ithuĩ-rĩ
Luke24:22 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke24:23 no matinoona mwĩrĩ wake. Mookire matwĩra atĩ nĩmoimĩrĩirwo nĩ araika mameera atĩ e muoyo.
Luke24:24 Andũ amwe arĩa tuuma nao nĩmaathiire hau mbĩĩrĩrainĩ
Luke24:25 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke24:26 Githĩ gũtiragĩrĩire Mesia aherithio ũguo acooke athiĩ harĩa he na riiri wake?”
Luke24:27 Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmaiguithia ũhoro ũrĩa warĩĩtio ũmũkoniĩ mabukuinĩ moothe
Luke24:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke24:29 no o makĩmũthaitha makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ

Luke24:32 Nao andũ acio makĩĩrana atĩrĩ

Luke24:34 makiugaga atĩrĩ
Luke24:35 Nao andũ acio eerĩ makĩheana ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte njĩrainĩ
Luke24:36 O hĩndĩ ĩyo maateeretaga ũhoro ũcio
Luke24:37 Nao makĩmaka mũno
Luke24:38 Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke24:39 Taroraai mooko maakwa na magũrũ muone atĩ nĩ niĩ. Huutiai mwĩtĩkie nĩ ũndũ ngoma ndĩrĩ mwĩrĩ na mahĩndĩ ta ũrĩa mũrona ndĩ nacio.”
Luke24:40 [Na rĩĩrĩ
Luke24:41 No o matiigana kũmwĩtĩkia nĩ ũrĩa maakeneete na makagega. Naake agĩkĩmooria atĩrĩ
Luke24:42 Nao makĩmũnengera gĩcunjĩ gĩa thamaki gĩ kĩruge
Luke24:43 naake agĩkĩrĩa makĩonaga.
Luke24:44 Agĩcooka akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke24:45 O hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩhingũra meciiria maao nĩguo mamenye Maandĩko.
Luke24:46 Agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Luke24:47 Ningĩ no mũhaka ũhoro wa kwĩrira na kuoherwo meehia ũhunjĩrio andũ a ndũũrĩrĩ thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩake
Luke24:48 Inyuĩ mũrĩ aira a maũndũ macio.
Luke24:49 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Luke24:50 Agĩcooka akĩmatongoria kuuma kũu itũũrainĩ

Luke24:52 Nao makĩmũthaathaiya; magĩcooka Jerusalemu makeneete mũno
Luke24:53 magaikaraga Hekaarũinĩ mahinda moothe makĩgoocaga Ngai.
John1:1 Kĩambĩrĩriainĩ Kiugo aarĩ o kuo
John1:2 Kuuma o kĩambĩrĩriainĩ ũcio Kiugo harĩ Ngai.
John1:3 Indo ciothe ciombirwo nĩ Ngai agereire harĩ we
John1:4 Thĩinĩ wake nĩkwarĩ muoyo
John1:5 Naguo ũtheri nĩwaraga ndumainĩ
John1:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
John1:7 We ookire nĩ ũndũ wa ũira
John1:8 We ti we warĩ ũtheri
John1:9 Ũtheri ũrĩa wa ma ũrĩa ũũkaga thĩ kũmũrĩkĩra andũ oothe.
John1:10 We ũcio Kiugo aarĩ gũũkũ thĩ
John1:11 Ookire gwake mwene
John1:12 No arĩa oothe maamwamũkĩrire na makĩmwĩtĩkia
John1:13 Ciana icio itiaciarirwo na njĩra ya ndũire kana igĩciarwo nĩkwenda kwa mwĩrĩ
John1:14 We Kiugo agĩgĩtuĩka mũndũ na agĩikarania na ithuĩ
John1:15 Johana agĩkĩruta ũira igũrũ rĩake
John1:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
John1:17 Amu Watho wokire na Musa
John1:18 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ wona Ngai rĩ kana rĩ
John1:19 Ũyũ nĩguo ũira wa Johana rĩrĩa Ayahudi maamũtũmĩire athĩnjĩri Ngai na Alawii kuuma Jerusalemu makamũũrie atĩrĩ
John1:20 Naake akĩmoimbũrĩra atekũhitha akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John1:21 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John1:22 Magĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John1:23 Naake Johana akĩmacookeria na ciugo iria mũnabii Isaia aaririe atĩ:“ ‘Niĩ ndĩ o mũgambo wa mũndũ ũranĩrĩra werũinĩ akoiga: Rũngariai njĩra ya Mwathani!’ ”
John1:24 Nao acio maatũmĩĩtwo nĩ Afarisai
John1:25 makĩũria Johana atĩrĩ
John1:26 Naake Johana akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John1:27 Ũcio nĩ we ũgũũka thuutha wakwa na nĩ mũnene kũrĩ niĩ
John1:28 Acio maatũmĩĩtwo maaragĩa maũndũ maya na Johana itũũrainĩ rĩa Bethania
John1:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
John1:30 Ũyũ nĩ we ndamwĩrire ũhoro wake rĩrĩa ndoigire atĩrĩ
John1:31 Niĩ mwene ndiamũũĩ
John1:32 Johana agĩkĩheana ũhoro akiuga atĩrĩ
John1:33 O na hĩndĩ ĩyo ndinamũmenya
John1:34 Rĩu nĩnyonire
John1:35 Na rĩĩrĩ
John1:36 akĩona Jesũ akĩhĩtũka. Naake Johana akiuga atĩrĩĩrĩ
John1:37 Nao arutwo acio aake eerĩ maigua ũguo magĩthiĩ makĩrũmĩrĩra Jesũ.
John1:38 Naake Jesũ akĩĩhũgũra akĩmoona mamũrũmĩrĩire akĩmooria atĩrĩ
John1:39 Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John1:40 Na rĩĩrĩ
John1:41 Naake akĩamba gũthiĩ kũrĩ mũrũ wa nyina Simoni akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John1:42 Agĩgĩtwara Simoni kwĩ Jesũ.Naake Jesũ akĩmũrora akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John1:43 Na rĩĩrĩ
John1:44 (Kwao kwarĩ Bethisaida
John1:45 Naake Filipu agĩkora Nathanaeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John1:46 Naake Nathanaeli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John1:47 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire Nathanaeli agĩũka na kũrĩ we akĩaria ũhoro wake akiuga atĩrĩ
John1:48 Naake Nathanaeli akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John1:49 Naake Nathanaeli akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John1:50 Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John1:51 Agĩcooka akĩmeera marĩ oothe atĩrĩ
John2:1 Na thuutha wa mĩthenya ĩĩrĩ gũgĩkorwo kwĩ na ũhiki itũũrainĩ rĩa Kana bũrũriinĩ wa Galili
John2:2 Naake Jesũ hamwe na arutwo aake nĩmeetĩirwo ũhiki ũcio.
John2:3 Rĩrĩa ndibei yathirire kũu ũhikiinĩ
John2:4 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John2:5 Naake nyina agĩthiĩ akĩĩra ndungata atĩrĩ
John2:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
John2:7 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩĩra ndungata atĩrĩ
John2:8 Agĩcooka agĩciĩra atĩrĩ
John2:9 ikĩmũtwarĩra maaĩ macio maatuĩkĩĩte ndibei
John2:10 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John2:11 Kĩu nĩkĩo kĩama kĩa mbere kĩrĩa Jesũ aaringire
John2:12 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ
John2:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
John2:14 Nakuo thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ agĩkora andũ meendagia ng'ombe ng'ondu
John2:15 Naake oona ũguo
John2:16 Nao arĩa meendagia ndutuura akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John2:17 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo aake makĩririkana ũrĩa Maandĩko moigĩĩte atĩrĩ
John2:18 Nao atongoria a Ayahudi makĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
John2:19 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John2:20 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John2:21 No Jesũ aaragia ũhoro wa Hekaarũ ya mwĩrĩ wake.
John2:22 Na rĩĩrĩ
John2:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
John2:24 Nowe ndaigana kũmeehoka nĩ ũndũ nĩoĩ andũ oothe.
John2:25 Ndabataragio nĩkũheeo ũhoro wa mũndũ nĩ mũndũ ũngĩ tondũ we mwene nĩoĩ ngoro cia andũ.
John3:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John3:2 Mũndũ ũcio nĩathiire kũrĩ Jesũ ũtukũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John3:3 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John3:4 Naake Nikodemo akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John3:5 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John3:6 Mũndũ aciaragwo na mwĩrĩ nĩ aciari aake
John3:7 Tiga kũgega tondũ nĩndakwĩra atĩ no mũhaka ũciarwo rĩngĩ.
John3:8 Rũhuuho rũhuruutanaga o kũrĩa rũkwenda; nawe ũkaigua rũkĩgamba
John3:9 Naake Nikodemo akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John3:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John3:11 Ngũkwĩra na ma atĩ: twaragia maũndũ marĩa tũũĩ o na tũkoimbũra marĩa twĩyoneire
John3:12 Ndĩrakwĩra maũndũ ma gũũkũ thĩ
John3:13 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũrĩ wathiĩ igũrũ
John3:14 O ta ũrĩa Musa kũu werũinĩ aahaicirie nyoka ya rũthuku mũtĩ igũrũ ũguo noguo Mũrũ wa Mũndũ aagĩrĩirwo nĩkũhaicio igũrũ
John3:15 nĩ geetha mũndũ o wothe ũkũmwĩtĩkia agĩe na muoyo wa tene na tene.
John3:16 Amu tondũ wa ũrĩa Ngai eendire andũ a gũũkũ thĩ
John3:17 Tondũ Ngai ndatũmire Mũũriũ thĩ atuĩke mũciirithia wayo
John3:18 Ũrĩa wothe wĩtĩkĩĩtie Mũũriũ ndangĩtuĩrwo; no ũrĩa wothe ũtamwĩtĩkĩĩtie nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũtuĩrwo
John3:19 Narĩo ituĩro nĩ rĩĩrĩ ũtheri nĩũũkĩĩte thĩ
John3:20 Mũndũ o wothe wĩkaga ciĩko njũru nĩathũire ũtheri na ndarĩ hĩndĩ angĩũka ũtheriinĩ
John3:21 No mũndũ ũrĩa wĩkaga ciĩko njega nĩokaga ũtheriinĩ
John3:22 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ na arutwo aake nĩmaathiire Judea
John3:23 Johana o naake no aabatithanagĩria Ainoni
John3:24 (Hĩndĩ ĩyo Johana ndakoreetwo aikĩĩtio njeera.)
John3:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
John3:26 Magĩgĩthiĩ kwĩ Johana makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John3:27 Naake Johana agĩcookia atĩrĩ
John3:28 Inyuĩ mũrĩ aira atĩ nĩndoigire
John3:29 Mũhikania nĩ we ũkoragwo e mwene mũhiki; no mũraata wa mũhikania ũrĩa ũkoragwo hau hakuhĩ athikĩrĩirie
John3:30 We no mũhaka anenehe
John3:31 Ũrĩa uumaga igũrũ e igũrũ rĩa arĩa angĩ oothe. Ũrĩa wa kuuma thĩ
John3:32 Ũcio aheanaga ũhoro wa maũndũ marĩa ooneete na akaigua
John3:33 No rĩĩrĩ
John3:34 Ũrĩa ũtũmĩĩtwo nĩ Ngai aheanaga ũhoro wa Ngai
John3:35 Ithe nĩendeete Mũũriũ
John3:36 Ũrĩa wĩtĩkĩĩtie Mũũriũ e na muoyo wa tene na tene
John4:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John4:2 (No rĩĩrĩ ti Jesũ we mwene wabatithanagia; nĩ arutwo aake).
John4:3 Kwoguo akiuma kũu Judea agĩcooka rĩngĩ Galili
John4:4 na no mũhaka aangĩagereire bũrũri wa Samaria.
John4:5 Agĩgĩkinya itũũra rĩa Samaria rĩĩtagwo Sukaru
John4:6 hau nĩ ho gĩthima kĩa Jakubu kĩarĩ. Tondũ Jesũ nĩanogeete nĩ ũndũ wa rũgendo
John4:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
John4:8 (Hĩndĩ ĩyo arutwo aake nĩmaathiĩte itũũrainĩ kũgũra irio.)
John4:9 Naake mũtumia ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John4:11 Naake Mũtumia akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:12 Gĩthima gĩĩkĩ twaheirwo nĩ Ithe witũ Jakubu; naake aatũũraga anyuaga maaĩ kuuma haaha
John4:13 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John4:14 no ũrĩa wothe ũrĩnyuaga maaĩ marĩa ngũmũhe
John4:15 Naake mũtumia ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:16 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:17 Naake mũtumia ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
John4:18 Wanagĩa na athuuri ataano
John4:19 Mũtumia ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:20 Maithe maitũ ma tene
John4:21 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:22 Inyuĩ Asamaria mũtiũĩ nũũ mũthaathayagia
John4:23 Ihinda nĩrĩrooka
John4:24 Ngai nĩ Roho
John4:25 Mũtumia ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:26 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:27 Ihinda o rĩu arutwo aake magĩũka
John4:28 Na rĩĩrĩ
John4:29 “Tookaai mũkoone mũndũ wanjĩĩra maũndũ moothe marĩa ndaneeka. Ahota gũkorwo hiihi nĩ we Mesia?”
John4:30 Nao andũ magĩkiumagara magĩthiĩ kwĩ Jesũ.
John4:31 Mũira wa andũ acio makinye
John4:32 No we akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John4:33 Nao arutwo magĩkĩambĩrĩria kũũrania atĩrĩ
John4:34 No Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John4:35 Mwĩ na ũndũ muugaga atĩ
John4:36 Mũgethi wa irio nĩarĩhagwo mũcaara wake
John4:37 Amu nĩ ma ũrĩa thimo yugaga atĩ
John4:38 Niĩ ndamũtũma mũthiĩ mũkagethe mũgũnda ũrĩa mũtaarutĩire wĩra; andũ angĩ nĩ o maũrutĩire wĩra
John4:39 Na rĩĩrĩ
John4:40 Kwoguo rĩrĩa Asamaria mookire kwĩ Jesũ
John4:41 Na rĩĩrĩ
John4:42 nao magĩkĩĩra mũtumia ũcio atĩrĩ
John4:43 Na rĩĩrĩ
John4:44 Tondũ we mwene nĩoigĩĩte atĩrĩ
John4:45 Rĩrĩa aakinyire Galili
John4:46 Jesũ agĩgĩcooka rĩngĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Kana rĩrĩa rĩĩrĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Galili
John4:47 Naake rĩrĩa aiguire atĩ Jesũ nĩoimĩĩte Judea agooka Galili
John4:48 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:49 Naake mũnene ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:50 Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John4:51 Na rĩĩrĩ
John4:52 Naake akĩmooria nĩ ta thaa ciigana mũũrũwe arambĩrĩirie kũigua wega. Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John4:53 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩririkana atĩ hĩndĩ ĩyo norĩo Jesũ aramwĩrire atĩrĩ
John4:54 Kĩu nĩkĩo kĩama gĩa keerĩ kĩrĩa Jesũ aaringire kũu Galili oimĩĩte Judea.
John5:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John5:2 Kũu Jerusalemu
John5:3 Kũu ithakuinĩ icio nĩgwakomaga andũ aingĩ arũaru
John5:4 amu mũraika wa Mwathani nĩaikũrũkaga o ihinda rĩna akainainia maaĩ. Rĩrĩa maaĩ mainainio
John5:5 Naho hau nĩhaarĩ mũndũ ũmwe watũũrĩĩte e mũrũaru mĩaka mĩrongo ĩtatũ na ĩnaana.
John5:6 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aamuonire akĩmenya atĩ nĩatũũrĩĩte hau ihinda iraaya; akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John5:7 Naake mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũrũaru akiuga atĩrĩ
John5:8 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John5:9 Ihinda o rĩu mũndũ ũcio akĩhona
John5:10 Nao Ayahudi makĩĩra mũndũ ũcio wahoneetio atĩrĩ
John5:11 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John5:12 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John5:13 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũcio ndooĩ nũũ wamũhoneetie
John5:14 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ agĩkora mũndũ ũcio wahoneetio Hekaarũ thĩinĩ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John5:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũndũ ũcio agĩthiĩ akĩĩra anene a Ayahudi atĩ nĩ Jesũ wamũhoneetie.
John5:16 Nao Ayahudi makĩambĩrĩria kũnyariira Jesũ tondũ nĩekĩĩte ũguo mũthenya wa Thabatũ.
John5:17 No Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John5:18 Hĩndĩ ĩrĩa Jesũ oigire ũguo
John5:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jesũ agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
John5:20 Amu Ithe nĩendeete Mũũriũ
John5:21 O ta ũrĩa Ithe ariũkagia arĩa akuũ na akamahe muoyo
John5:22 Gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe Ithe witũ atuagĩra. Nĩetĩkĩrĩĩtie Mũũriũ atuanagĩre
John5:23 nĩ geetha andũ oothe mamũtĩĩe o ta ũrĩa matĩĩĩte Ithe. Ũrĩa wothe ũtatĩĩaga Mũũriũ
John5:24 “Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ: ũrĩa wothe ũiguaga ũhoro wakwa na ageetĩkia ũrĩa wandũmire
John5:25 Ngũmwĩra ũhoro wa ma atĩ ihinda nĩrĩkuhĩrĩirie na nĩikinyu
John5:26 O ta ũrĩa Ithe arĩ we kĩhumo kĩa muoyo
John5:27 Naake nĩaheete Mũũriũ ũhoti wa gũtuanĩra
John5:28 Tigaai kũgega nĩ ũguo ndamwĩra
John5:29 moime mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ciao
John5:30 “Gũtirĩ ũndũ ingĩĩka na ũhoti wakwa mwene; nduanagĩra kũringana na ũrĩa Ngai anjĩĩrĩĩte
John5:31 “Ingĩheana ũira wakwa niĩ mwene-rĩ
John5:32 No nĩharĩ ũngĩ ũrĩa ũheanaga ũira igũrũ rĩakwa na nĩnjũũĩ atĩ ũira ũrĩa aheanaga igũrũ rĩakwa nĩ wa ma.
John5:33 Inyuĩ nĩmwatũmĩire Johana andũ
John5:34 Ti atĩ niĩ nĩmbatairio nĩ ũira wa mũndũ; ndoiga ũguo nĩ geetha mũhonokio.
John5:35 Johana aahaanaga ta taawa wakanaga ũgatherera andũ
John5:36 No rĩĩrĩ
John5:37 Naake Awa ũrĩa wandũmire no we ũheanĩĩte ũira igũrũ rĩakwa. Inyuĩ mũtirĩ mwaigua mũgambo wake
John5:38 Ũhoro wake o naguo mũtiũigaga ngoroinĩ cianyu
