John5:39 Mũthoomaga Maandĩko tondũ mwĩĩraga atĩ thĩinĩ wamo nĩmũkuona muoyo wa tene na tene. Maandĩko macio maheanaga ũhoro wakwa!
John5:40 O na kũrĩ ũguo-rĩ
John5:41 “Niĩ ndicaragia kũgoocwo nĩ andũ.
John5:42 Ĩndĩ inyuĩ nĩnjũũĩ atĩ mũtirĩ na wendo wa Ngai ngoroinĩ cianyu.
John5:43 Njũkĩĩte na ũhoti wa Awa
John5:44 Mwakĩhota kũnjĩtĩkia atĩa
John5:45 Mũtikaae gwĩciiria atĩ nĩ niĩ ngaamũthitanga kũrĩ Awa. No rĩĩrĩ
John5:46 Angĩkorwo ti itherũ nĩmwetĩkĩĩtie Musa-rĩ
John5:47 Tondũ mũtiĩtĩkĩĩtie ũrĩa aandĩkire-rĩ
John6:1 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio Jesũ agĩthiĩ mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria rĩa Galili
John6:2 Nao andũ gĩkundi kĩnene makĩmũrũmĩrĩra
John6:3 Naake Jesũ akĩambata handũ kĩrĩmainĩ
John6:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo thigũkũ ya Ayahudi ya Bathaka nĩyakuhĩrĩirie.
John6:5 Naake Jesũ rĩrĩa aarorire akĩona andũ aingĩ magĩũka na kũrĩ we
John6:6 (Ooririe Filipu ũguo o amũgerie; amu we mwene nĩamenyaga ũrĩa egwĩka.)
John6:7 Naake Filipu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John6:8 Naake mũrutwo wake ũngĩ wetagwo Anderea
John6:9 “Haaha he kamwana ke na mĩgate ĩtaano ya mũtu wa mbaarĩ
John6:10 Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John6:11 Thuutha wa ũguo Jesũ agĩkĩoya mĩgate ĩyo
John6:12 Na rĩrĩa maarĩire makĩhũũna
John6:13 Magĩkĩũngania cienyũ cia mĩgate iria ciatigaarĩĩtio kuuma harĩ mĩgate ĩrĩa ĩtaano ya mũtu wa mbaarĩ
John6:14 Nao andũ moona kĩama kĩu Jesũ aaringire makiuga atĩrĩ
John6:15 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩmenya atĩ mũingĩ nĩwendaga kũmũnyiita ũmũtue mũthamaki na hinya; kwoguo agĩkiuma kũu agĩcooka rĩngĩ kĩrĩmainĩ arĩ o wiki.
John6:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
John6:17 makĩingĩra gatarũ nĩguo maringe mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria
John6:18 Na nĩkwarĩ na makũmbĩ ma maaĩ nĩ tondũ wa rũhuuho rũnene rũrĩa rwahuruutanaga.
John6:19 Rĩrĩa arutwo maakorirwo mathiĩte itĩĩna rĩa kiromita ithaano kana ithathatũ
John6:20 No we akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John6:21 Nao nĩmeendaga kũmũtoonyia gatarũinĩ
John6:22 Na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ andũ arĩa maatigĩĩtwo mũrĩmo ũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria makĩririkana atĩ mooneete harĩ gatarũ o kamwe hau
John6:23 No rĩĩrĩ
John6:24 Rĩrĩa andũ moonire atĩ Jesũ o na arutwo aake matiarĩ thĩinĩ wa tũtarũ tũu
John6:25 Rĩrĩa andũ maakorire Jesũ mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa iria makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John6:26 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John6:27 Tigagaai kũnogagĩra irio iria ithiraga; nogagĩraai irio iria itũũraga nĩ ũndũ wa muoyo wa tene na tene
John6:28 Nao magĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John6:29 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John6:30 Nao magĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John6:31 Maithe maitũ ma tene nĩmaarĩire mana rĩrĩa maarĩ werũinĩ o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo atĩrĩ
John6:32 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John6:33 Nĩ amu mũgate ũrĩa Ngai aheanaga
John6:34 Nao magĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John6:35 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John6:36 No nĩndĩmwĩrĩĩte atĩ nĩmũnyoneete na mũkaaga gwĩtĩkia.
John6:37 Arĩa oothe Awa aheete nĩmagooka kũrĩ niĩ
John6:38 nĩ amu ndioimire igũrũ njũke njĩke kwenda gwakwa
John6:39 Ũcio wandũmire ndeendaga nde o na ũmwe wa arĩa aaheete
John6:40 Tondũ wendo wa Awa nĩ atĩ arĩa oothe moonaga Mũũriũ na makamwĩtĩkia no mũhaka magĩe na muoyo wa tene na tene. Na niĩ nĩngaamariũkia mũthenya wa mũthia.”
John6:41 Na rĩĩrĩ
John6:42 Magĩkĩũrania atĩrĩ
John6:43 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John6:44 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota gũũka kũrĩ niĩ
John6:45 Anabii nĩmaandĩkire atĩrĩ
John6:46 Ũguo ti kuuga atĩ kwĩ mũndũ ũrĩ wona Awa; no rĩĩrĩ
John6:47 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ ũrĩa wothe wĩtĩkĩĩtie e na muoyo wa tene na tene.
John6:48 Nĩ niĩ mũgate wa muoyo.
John6:49 Maithe maanyu ma tene marĩ werũinĩ nĩmaarĩire mana
John6:50 Ũyũ nĩguo mũgate ũrĩa uumĩĩte igũrũ nĩguo mũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩũrĩa ndakaanakue.
John6:51 Nĩ niĩ mũgate wĩ muoyo ũrĩa woimire igũrũ
John6:52 Na rĩĩrĩ
John6:53 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John6:54 Ũrĩa wothe ũrĩaga mwĩrĩ wakwa
John6:55 Nĩ amu mwĩrĩ wakwa nĩ irio kũna; nayo thakame yakwa nĩ kĩndũ gĩa kũnyua kũna.
John6:56 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩaga mwĩrĩ wakwa na akanyua thakame yakwa
John6:57 O ta ũrĩa niĩ ndatũmirwo nĩ Awa ũrĩa mũtũũra muoyo
John6:58 Ũyũ nĩguo mũgate ũrĩa uumĩĩte igũrũ ũgooka thĩ; ndũhaana mũgate ũrĩa maithe maanyu ma tene maarĩire na thuutha magĩkua. Ũrĩa wothe ũrĩaga mũgate ũyũ egũtũũra tene na tene.”
John6:59 Jesũ oigire maũndũ macio rĩrĩa aarutanaga thunagogiinĩ kũu Kaperinaumu.
John6:60 Na rĩĩrĩ
John6:61 No Jesũ aamenya atĩ nĩmarang'oong'oora o na atarĩ mwĩre nĩ mũndũ nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũcio
John6:62 Ĩ korwo nĩkuona mwakĩona Mũrũ wa Mũndũ akĩambata acooke kũrĩa oimire?
John6:63 Muoyo ũheanagwo nĩ Roho; amu mwĩrĩ nĩ wa tũhũ. Ũhoro ũcio ndamũhe ũtũmaga mũgĩe na Roho wa Ngai
John6:64 Ĩndĩ nĩkũrĩ amwe aanyu o na rĩu matarĩ maretĩkia.” (Jesũ nĩoĩ kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria arĩa mateetĩkĩĩtie
John6:65 Agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
John6:66 Thuutha wa maũndũ macio andũ aingĩ arĩa maarũmĩrĩire Jesũ makĩmũtiga na matiacookire kũmũrũmĩrĩra rĩngĩ.
John6:67 Naake Jesũ agĩkĩũria arutwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ atĩrĩ
John6:68 Naake Simoni Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John6:69 na nĩtũrĩĩkĩĩtie gwĩtĩkia na kũmenya atĩ wee nĩ we ũrĩa Mũtheru wa Ngai.”
John6:70 Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John6:71 Akiuga ũguo aaragia ũhoro wa Judasi mũrũ wa Simoni Mũisikariota. Tondũ o na akorwo Judasi aarĩ ũmwe wa acio ikũmi na eerĩ nĩ we warĩ wa gũkaamũkunyanĩra.
John7:1 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ agĩceeranga Galili
John7:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
John7:3 aariũ a nyina makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John7:4 Amu gũtirĩ mũndũ ũhithaga ũndũ ũrĩa areeka angĩkorwo nĩekwenda kũmenyeka wega. Angĩkorwo nĩũragĩĩka maũndũ maya-rĩ
John7:5 (Nĩ amu o na aariũ a nyina matiamwĩtĩkĩĩtie.)
John7:6 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John7:7 Inyuĩ andũ matingĩmũmena
John7:8 Inyuĩ thiĩi thigũkũinĩ. Niĩ ndigũthiĩ nĩ amu hĩndĩ yakwa ĩrĩa yagĩrĩire ndĩrĩ ĩrakinya.”
John7:9 Arĩĩkia kũmeera ũguo agĩgĩtigwo kũu Galili.
John7:10 No rĩĩrĩ
John7:11 Nao Ayahudi nĩmaamũcaragia kũu thigũkũinĩ magakĩũranagia atĩrĩ
John7:12 Nao andũ nĩmaaragia ũhoro wake na kĩheehũ
John7:13 No gũtirĩ mũndũ waragia ũhoro wake aanĩrĩire nĩ tondũ oothe nĩmeetigagĩra anene a Ayahudi.
John7:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
John7:15 Nao Ayahudi mamũigua makĩgega mũno makĩũria atĩrĩ
John7:16 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John7:17 Mũndũ ũrĩa ũkwenda gwathĩkĩra Ngai nĩekũmenya kana ũrĩa ndutanaga
John7:18 Mũndũ ũrĩa waragia maũndũ maake na ũhoti waku we mwene akoragwo akĩenda kwĩgoocithia. No ũrĩa wendaga kũgoocithia ũrĩa wamũtũmire nĩ mwĩhokeku
John7:19 Githĩ Musa ndamũheire Watho? Ĩndĩ gũtirĩ mũndũ o na ũmwe wanyu wathĩkagĩra Watho ũcio. Mũrenda kũnjũraga nĩkĩ?”
John7:20 Nao andũ magĩcookia atĩrĩ
John7:21 Naake Jesũ agĩcookia akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John7:22 Musa aamwathire mũruithagie twana twanyu twa tũhĩĩ (o na gũtuĩka ti Musa wambĩrĩirie mũtugo ũcio
John7:23 Angĩkorwo nĩmwĩkaga ũguo atĩ nĩguo mũtigaathũũkie Watho wa Musa-rĩ
John7:24 Tigaai gũtuanagĩra kũringana na ũrĩa mũndũ ahaana
John7:25 Nao andũ amwe a kũu Jerusalemu makĩũria atĩrĩ
John7:26 Rĩu araarĩria mũingĩ na gũtirĩ ũndũ ũramwĩra! Hiihi anene nĩmamenyeete kũna atĩ ũyũ nĩ we Mesia?
John7:27 Rĩrĩa Mesia agooka gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkaamenya kũrĩa agaakorwo oimĩĩte
John7:28 Naake Jesũ o hĩndĩ ĩyo aarutanaga kũu Hekaarũinĩ akĩanĩrĩra akĩũria atĩrĩ
John7:29 ĩndĩ niĩ nĩndĩmũũĩ
John7:30 Nao Ayahudi magĩcaria ũrĩa mangĩmũnyiita
John7:31 Nao andũ aingĩ makĩmwĩtĩkia makiuga atĩrĩ
John7:32 Na rĩĩrĩ
John7:33 Naake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
John7:34 Inyuĩ nĩmũkaanjaria na mũtikaanyona
John7:35 Nao Ayahudi makĩũrania gatagatĩinĩ kaao atĩrĩ
John7:36 Aroiga atĩ tũkaamũcaria na tũtikaamuona
John7:37 Na rĩĩrĩ
John7:38 o ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo atĩrĩ
John7:39 Jesũ akiuga ũguo nĩ ũhoro wa Roho Mũtheru aaragia
John7:40 Rĩrĩa maiguire ciugo icio
John7:41 Angĩ nao makiuga atĩrĩ
John7:42 Githĩ Maandĩko matiugĩĩte atĩ Mesia akoima rũciaroinĩ rwa Daudi
John7:43 Gũgĩkĩgĩa na nyamũkano gatagatĩinĩ kaao nĩ ũndũ wa Jesũ.
John7:44 Amwe nĩmeendaga kũmũnyiita no gũtirĩ o na ũmwe wageririe kũmũikia mooko.
John7:45 Na rĩĩrĩ
John7:46 Nao magĩcookia atĩrĩ
John7:47 Nao Afarisai makĩũria arangĩri acio atĩrĩ
John7:48 Mũrĩ mwaigua mũnene o na ũmwe kana Mũfarisai ũmwĩtĩkĩĩtie?
John7:49 Andũ aya matooĩ Watho kaĩ nĩarume-ĩ!”
John7:50 Ũmwe wa Afarisai arĩa maarĩ ho nĩ Nikodemo
John7:51 “Kũringana na Watho witũ tũtingĩtuĩra mũndũ ũtarĩ mũciirithie na akamenyeka ũũru ũrĩa eekĩĩte.”
John7:52 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John8:1 Nao oothe o mũndũ akĩinũka gwake mũciĩ
John8:2 no Jesũ agĩthiĩ kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa mĩtamaiyũ.
John8:3 Naguo mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ rũũciinĩ tene agĩcooka Hekaarũ. Nao andũ oothe magĩũka kuo
John8:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
John8:5 makĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
John8:6 Wathoinĩ
John8:7 Makiuga ũguo meendaga kũgeria Jesũ maigue ũrĩa ekuuga nĩguo moone ũndũ wa kũmũthitanga naguo. No we akĩinamĩrĩra akĩandĩka thĩ na kĩara gĩake.
John8:8 Rĩrĩa maakĩrĩrĩirie kũmũũria ũhoro ũcio
John8:9 Agĩcooka akĩinamĩrĩra rĩngĩ agĩthiĩ na mbere kwandĩka na kĩara gĩake hau thĩ.
John8:10 Nao maigua ũrĩa aameerire magĩĩthiĩra ũmwe ũmwe
John8:11 Naake akĩinamũka akĩũria mũtumia ũcio atĩrĩ
John8:12 Naake akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John8:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
John8:14 Nao Afarisai makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John8:15 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John8:16 Inyuĩ mũtuanagĩra kũringana na ũmũndũ
John8:17 No o na ingĩtuanĩra-rĩ
John8:18 O na nĩkwandĩkĩĩtwo Wathoinĩ wanyu atĩ ũira wa aira eerĩ ũngĩigwithania-rĩ
John8:19 Nguumbũra haakwa niĩ mwene
John8:20 Nao magĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John8:21 Jesũ aaririe maũndũ macio moothe akĩrutana
John8:22 Ningĩ Jesũ akĩmeera rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
John8:23 Tondũ ũcio Ayahudi makĩũrania atĩrĩ
John8:24 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John8:25 Nĩkĩo ndamwĩra atĩ mũgaakua mwĩ o meehiainĩ maanyu. Angĩkorwo mũtigwĩtĩkia atĩ
John8:26 Nao magĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John8:27 Ndĩ na maũndũ maingĩ makuuga mamũkoniĩ
John8:28 Nao matiigana kũmenya atĩ Jesũ aamaheaga ũhoro wa Ithe.
John8:29 Agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
John8:30 Ũcio wandũmire e hamwe na niĩ; ndandigĩĩte ndĩ nyiiki
John8:31 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aaririe maũndũ macio andũ aingĩ nĩmaamwĩtĩkirie.
John8:32 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Jesũ agĩkĩĩra Ayahudi arĩa maamwĩtĩkirie atĩrĩ
John8:33 na nĩmũkaamenya ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma
John8:34 Nao makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John8:35 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John8:36 Ngombo ndĩrĩ hĩndĩ ĩtuĩkaga ya mũciĩ tene na tene
John8:37 Kwoguo gwakorwo nĩ Mũũriũ ũkũmwohorithia mũtige gũtuĩka ngombo
John8:38 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ mũrĩ njiarwa cia Aburahamu
John8:39 Njaragia maũndũ marĩa nyoneete kuuma harĩ Awa
John8:40 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John8:41 Niĩ ngoreetwo ngĩmũhe ũhoro wa ma
John8:42 Inyuĩ mwĩkaga ũrĩa ithe wanyu eekire.”Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John8:43 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John8:44 Nĩ kĩĩ kĩrakĩgiria mũtaũkĩrwo nĩ ũrĩa ndĩroiga? Nĩ tondũ mũtingĩhota kũũmĩrĩria gũthikĩrĩria ciugo ciakwa.
John8:45 Inyuĩ mwĩ ciana cia ithe wanyu Ngoma
John8:46 No tondũ niĩ njaragia ma
John8:47 Nũũ wanyu ũngĩhota kuonania meehia maakwa? Angĩkorwo njaragia ũhoro wa ma-rĩ
John8:48 Mũndũ o wothe wa Ngai nĩathikagĩrĩria ndeto cia Ngai. No inyuĩ mũticithikagĩrĩria tondũ mũtirĩ a Ngai.”
John8:49 Nao Ayahudi makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John8:50 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John8:51 Niĩ ndicaragia gĩtĩĩo gĩakwa niĩ mwene
John8:52 Ngũkĩmwĩra na ma atĩ mũndũ o wothe wathĩkagĩra ũrutani wakwa ndarĩ hingo agaakua.”
John8:53 Nao Ayahudi makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John8:54 Wee-rĩ
John8:55 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John8:56 Ũcio inyuĩ mũtirĩ mwamũmenya
John8:57 Ithe wanyu Aburahamu nĩakenire tondũ atĩ aarĩ wa kuona ihinda rĩrĩa niĩ ngooka; ihinda rĩu nĩarĩonire na agĩkena.”
John8:58 Nao Ayahudi makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John8:59 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John8:60 Nao makĩoya mahiga mamũhũũre
John9:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John9:2 Nao arutwo aake makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John9:3 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John9:4 Rĩrĩa kũrĩ mũthenya no mũhaka tũrute wĩra wa ũrĩa wandũmire; ũtukũ nĩũrooka rĩrĩa gũtarĩ mũndũ ũngĩhota kũruta wĩra.
John9:5 Ihinda rĩrĩa rĩothe ngũkorwo ndĩ gũũkũ thĩ
John9:6 Jesũ arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo
John9:7 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John9:8 Nao andũ arĩa maahakaine naake
John9:9 Andũ amwe magĩcookia atĩrĩ
John9:10 Nao magĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John9:11 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John9:12 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John9:13 Nao andũ acio magĩtwara mũndũ ũcio watũire e mũtumuumu kũrĩ Afarisai.
John9:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
John9:15 Nao Afarisai magĩkĩmũũria o rĩngĩ ũrĩa ahingũrirwo maitho. Naake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John9:16 Nao Afarisai amwe makiuga atĩrĩ
John9:17 Afarisai acio magĩkĩũria mũndũ ũcio o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
John9:18 No Ayahudi matiendaga gwĩtĩkia atĩ mũndũ ũcio kũrĩ hĩndĩ aarĩ mũtumuumu
John9:19 “Ũyũ nĩ mũrũ wanyu? Mũroiga atĩ aaciarirwo e mũtumuumu; rĩu ahoteete kuona atĩa?”
John9:20 Nao aciari aake magĩcookeria Ayahudi atĩrĩ
John9:21 No tũtiũĩ ũrĩa rĩu ahoteete kuona o na kana tũkamenya ũrĩa ũmũhingũrire maitho. Mũũriei; nĩ mũgima wa kwĩarĩrĩria!”
John9:22 Aciari aake moigire ũguo amu nĩmeetigagĩra Ayahudi
John9:23 Nĩkĩo aciari aake moigire atĩ
John9:24 Ayahudi magĩcooka magĩĩta mũndũ ũcio waciarĩĩtwo e mũtumuumu hĩndĩ ya keerĩ
John9:25 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John9:26 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John9:27 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John9:28 Nao Ayahudi makĩmũruma
John9:29 Ithuĩ nĩtũũĩ atĩ Ngai nĩarĩirie Musa no ũcio o na tũtiũĩ kũrĩa oimĩĩte!”
John9:30 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John9:31 Nĩtũũĩ Ngai ndathikagĩrĩria eehia; Ngai athikagĩrĩria mũndũ ũrĩa ũmũheaga gĩtĩĩo na ũrĩa wĩkaga ũrĩa eendaga.
John9:32 Kuuma rĩrĩa thĩ yombirwo gũtirĩ kwaiguuo mũndũ o na ũmwe wanahingũra maitho ma mũndũ waciarĩĩtwo e mũtumuumu.
John9:33 Tiga mũndũ ũyũ akorirwo oimĩĩte kwĩ Ngai gũtirĩ ũndũ angĩhota gwĩka.”
John9:34 Nao Ayahudi magĩcookia atĩrĩ
John9:35 Na rĩĩrĩ
John9:36 Naake mũndũ ũcio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
John9:37 Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John9:38 Mũndũ ũcio akiuga atĩrĩ
John9:39 Naake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
John9:40 Nao Afarisai amwe arĩa maarĩ naake maigua akiuga ũguo
John9:41 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John10:1 Jesũ agĩkiuga atĩrĩ
John10:2 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũingĩragĩra kĩhingo nĩ we mũrĩithi wa ng'ondu.
John10:3 Ũcio nĩahingũragĩrwo kĩhingo nĩ mũikaria wakĩo; nacio ikaigua mũgambo wake. Naake agagĩĩta ng'ondu ciake na marĩĩtwa maacio agaciumagaria.
John10:4 Oimagaria ciothe agacooka agacitongoria
John10:5 No rĩĩrĩ
John10:6 Jesũ agĩkĩmahe ũhoro na ngerekano ĩyo
John10:7 Thuutha ũcio Jesũ agĩkĩmeera rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
John10:8 Arĩa oothe mookire mbere yakwa nĩ aici na atuunyani
John10:9 Niĩ nĩ niĩ kĩhingo; ũrĩa wothe ũtoonyagĩra harĩ niĩ nĩakaahonoka; agaatoonyaga na oimage na oonage gĩa kũrĩa.
John10:10 Mũici ookaga nĩ geetha aiye
John10:11 “Niĩ nĩ niĩ mũrĩithi ũrĩa mwega
John10:12 Rĩrĩa mũndũ wa kũrĩhwo
John10:13 Mũndũ ũcio wa kũrĩhwo ooraga nĩ tondũ we no mũndũ wa mũcaara na ndarũmbũyanagia na ũhoro wa ng'ondu.
John10:14 (14-15) Niĩ nĩ niĩ mũrĩithi ũrĩa mwega. O ta ũrĩa Awa anjũũĩ
John10:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
John10:16 “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
John10:17 Gũtirĩ mũndũ ũkũnduunya muoyo wakwa. Nĩ niĩ ngũũheana na kwenda gwakwa. Ndĩ na ũhoti wa kũũheana na ũhoti wa kũũiyũkia rĩngĩ. Ũguo nĩguo Awa anjathĩĩte njĩke.”
John10:18 Ayahudi makĩamũkana rĩngĩ nĩ ũndũ wa ndeto icio.
John10:19 Aingĩ aao makiuga atĩrĩ
John10:20 Arĩa angĩ makiuga atĩrĩ
John10:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
John10:22 Naake Jesũ agĩkorwo agĩceeraceera o hau gĩthakuinĩ gĩa Solomoni kũu Hekaarũ thĩinĩ.
John10:23 Nao Ayahudi magĩũka makĩmũthiũrũrũkĩria makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John10:24 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John10:25 ĩndĩ inyuĩ mũtiĩtĩkagia nĩ tondũ mũtirĩ ng'ondu ciakwa.
John10:26 Ng'ondu ciakwa nĩciguaga mũgambo wakwa
John10:27 Niĩ nĩndĩciheaga muoyo wa tene na tene
John10:28 Awa ũrĩa ũheete cio nĩ mũnene gũkĩra andũ oothe
John10:29 Niĩ na Awa tũrĩ ũmwe.”
John10:30 Na arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo Ayahudi makĩoya mahiga rĩngĩ mamũhũũre na mo.
John10:31 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria atĩrĩ
John10:32 Nao Ayahudi makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John10:33 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John10:34 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
John10:35 mwakĩhota kuuga atĩa atĩ nĩndaruma Ngai tondũ nĩndoiga atĩ ndĩ Mũrũ wa Ngai. Haakwa mwene-rĩ
John10:36 Angĩkorwo ndiraruta wĩra wa Awa-rĩ
John10:37 No angĩkorwo njĩkaga ũrĩa Awa eendaga
John10:38 Nao Ayahudi makĩgeria o rĩngĩ ũrĩa mangĩmũnyiita
John10:39 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ agĩthiĩ rĩngĩ mũrĩmo ũũrĩa ũngĩ wa Rũũĩ rwa Jorodani kũrĩa Johana aabatithanagĩria o mbere
John10:40 Nao andũ aingĩ magĩũka kũrĩ we makiugaga atĩrĩ
John10:41 Nao andũ aingĩ kũu
John11:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John11:2 (Ũyũ nĩ Mariamu ũrĩa waitĩrĩirie Mwathani maguta marĩa maanungaga wega
John11:3 Mariamu na Maritha magĩgĩtũmanĩra Jesũ akeerwo atĩrĩ
John11:4 Rĩrĩa Jesũ aiguire ũhoro ũcio
John11:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
John11:6 Kwoguo rĩrĩa aiguire atĩ Lazaro nĩ mũrũaru akĩniina mĩthenya ĩngĩ ĩĩrĩ kũu aarĩ.
John11:7 Thuutha ũcio akĩĩra arutwo aake atĩrĩ
John11:8 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John11:9 Naake Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
John11:10 Ĩndĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũthiaga ũtukũ nĩahĩngagwo nĩ tondũ ndarĩ na ũtheri.”
John11:11 Jesũ agĩthiĩ na mbere kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ
John11:12 Nao arutwo makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John11:13 Ĩndĩ Jesũ eendaga kũmeera atĩ Lazaro nĩgũkua aakuĩte
John11:14 Agĩkĩmeera wega atĩrĩ
John11:15 no nĩngeneete nĩ ũndũ wanyu tondũ ndiraarĩ ho agĩkua. Ũkĩraai tũthiĩ kũrĩ we.”
John11:16 Naake Toma (ũrĩa wetagwo wa Mahatha) akĩĩra arutwo acio angĩ atĩrĩ
John11:17 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ aakinyire agĩkora atĩ Lazaro nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũthikwo na mĩthenya ĩna ĩgathira.
John11:18 Bethania yarĩ ta kiromita ithatũ kuuma Jerusalemu.
John11:19 Andũ aingĩ nĩmookĩĩte kũu gũcakaithia Maritha na Mariamu nĩ ũndũ wa gũkuĩrwo nĩ mũrũ wa nyina wao.
John11:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
John11:21 Naake Maritha akĩĩra Jesũ atĩrĩ
John11:22 No nĩnjũũĩ atĩ o na rĩu kĩrĩa gĩothe ũngĩĩtia Ngai nĩegũkũhe.”
John11:23 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John11:24 Maritha agĩcookia atĩrĩ
John11:25 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John11:26 na ũrĩa wothe wĩ muoyo na nĩanjĩtĩkĩĩtie ndarĩ hĩndĩ agaakua. Wee nĩwĩtĩkĩĩtie ũguo?”
John11:27 Maritha akiuga atĩrĩ
John11:28 Maritha oiga ũguo agĩcooka agĩthiĩ agĩĩta mwarĩ wa nyina Mariamu handũ e wiki
John11:29 Rĩrĩa Mariamu aiguire ũguo akiuma na ihenya agĩthiĩ kũmũtũnga.
John11:30 (No hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ ndakoreetwo atoonyeete gĩcagi thĩinĩ
John11:31 Nao Ayahudi arĩa maarĩ kũu nyũmba na Mariamu makĩmũcakaithia makĩmũrũmĩrĩra rĩrĩa moonire oima narua
John11:32 Naake Mariamu agĩgĩkinya harĩa Jesũ aarĩ
John11:33 Rĩrĩa Jesũ oonire ũrĩa Mariamu na arĩa maarĩ naake maarĩraga
John11:34 Akĩmooria atĩrĩ
John11:35 Naake Jesũ agĩita maithori.
John11:36 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
John11:37 Nao Ayahudi arĩa maarĩ ho makĩũrania atĩrĩ
John11:38 Naake Jesũ agĩthiĩ agĩthĩĩnĩkaga ngoro mũno
John11:39 Jesũ akiuga atĩrĩ
John11:40 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John11:41 Magĩgĩthengia ihiga. Jesũ akĩrora igũrũ akiuga atĩrĩ
John11:42 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ hingo ciothe nĩũnjiguaga no nguuga ũguo nĩ ũndũ wa andũ aya me haaha
John11:43 Oiga ũguo agĩcooka akĩgũũthũka na mũgambo mũnene akiuga atĩrĩ
John11:44 Naake Lazaro akiuma e muohe na ndaamĩ mooko na magũrũ o na akoohwo rũtaamĩ ũthiũ. Jesũ akĩĩra andũ acio maarĩ naake atĩrĩ
John11:45 Na rĩĩrĩ
John11:46 No amwe aao magĩthiĩ kũrĩ Afarisai makĩmeera ũrĩa Jesũ eekĩĩte.
John11:47 Nao Afarisai maheeo ũhoro makĩũngana hamwe na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene magĩĩta kĩama makĩũria atĩrĩ
John11:48 Twareka athiĩ na mbere ũguo
John11:49 No mũndũ ũmwe wao wetagwo Kaiafa
John11:50 Mũtikũmenya atĩ kaba mũndũ ũmwe akuĩre andũ handũ ha rũũrĩrĩ ruothe rũniinwo?”
John11:51 Ũndũ ũcio ndoigire eĩrĩĩte we mwene; tondũ akĩrĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene mwaka ũcio
John11:52 na to Ayahudi oiki
John11:53 Na rĩĩrĩ
John11:54 Kwoguo Jesũ ndacookire gũthiĩ kũu Judea akĩĩonithanagia; oimire kuo agĩthiĩ bũrũri warĩ werũinĩ
John11:55 Hĩndĩ ĩyo gũgĩkorwo atĩ thigũkũ ya Ayahudi ya Bathaka nĩyakuhĩrĩirie na andũ aingĩ nĩmaathiaga Jerusalemu nĩ ũndũ wa gwĩtheria mbere ya thigũkũ gũkinya.
John11:56 Nao nĩmaacaragia Jesũ
John11:57 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene o na Afarisai nĩmaathanĩĩte atĩ mũndũ ũrĩa ũkũmenya kũrĩa Jesũ arĩ
John12:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John12:2 Nakuo agĩthondekerwo irio cia hwaĩinĩ
John12:3 Naake Mariamu akĩoya cuuba yarĩ na maguta maanungaga wega ma goro mũno
John12:4 No mũrutwo ũmwe wa Jesũ
John12:5 “Nĩ kĩĩ kĩagiria maguta maya meendio Dinari magana matatũ iheeo athĩĩni?”
John12:6 Ĩndĩ ndoigire ũguo nĩ tondũ wa kũrĩrĩra athĩĩni
John12:7 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John12:8 Amu arĩa athĩĩni mwĩ nao hĩndĩ ciothe
John12:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
John12:10 Kwoguo athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene magĩthondeka mũbango wa kũũraga Lazaro o naake
John12:11 amu Ayahudi aingĩ maamenya ũrĩa Lazaro eekĩĩtwo nĩmaaregaga ũhoro wa athĩnjĩri Ngai mageetĩkia Jesũ.
John12:12 Na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ
John12:13 Magĩgĩkuua mathĩgĩ ma mĩkĩndũ
John12:14 Naake Jesũ akĩona njaũ ya ndigiri akĩmĩikarĩra igũrũ
John12:15 “Tigaai gwĩtigĩra inyuĩ andũ a itũũra rĩa Zayuni!Oneei mũthamaki wanyu nĩarooka aikarĩire njaũ ya ndigiri!”
John12:16 Arutwo aake matiigana kũmenya gĩtũmi kĩa ũndũ ũcio hĩndĩ ĩyo no thuutha rĩrĩa aarĩĩkirie kũgoocithio
John12:17 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩ naake rĩrĩa eetire Lazaro kuuma mbĩĩrĩrainĩ akĩmũriũkia kuuma kũrĩ akuũ
John12:18 Ũndũ ũcio nĩguo watũmire andũ oothe mamũtũnge tondũ andũ nĩmaiguĩte ũhoro wa kĩama kĩu aaringĩĩte.
John12:19 Nao Afarisai makĩĩrana atĩrĩ
John12:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
John12:21 Nao magĩthiĩ harĩ Filipu (ũrĩa woimĩĩte Bethisaida thĩinĩ wa Galili) makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John12:22 Naake Filipu agĩthiĩ akĩĩra Anderea ũhoro ũcio. Nao eerĩ magĩthiĩ makĩĩra Jesũ.
John12:23 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John12:24 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ
John12:25 Mũndũ o wothe ũrĩa wendeete muoyo wake nĩakaaũtee; ĩndĩ ũrĩa wothe ũthũũrĩĩte muoyo wake e gũũkũ thĩ nĩakaũtũũria muoyoinĩ wa tene na tene.
John12:26 Ũrĩa wothe ũkwenda kũndungatĩra no mũhaka anũmĩrĩre
John12:27 “Rĩu ngoro yakwa nĩrathĩĩnĩka mũno
John12:28 Awa goocithia rĩĩtwa rĩaku!”Na hĩndĩ ĩyo mũgambo ũkiuma na igũrũ ũkiuga atĩrĩ
John12:29 Nao andũ arĩa maarũngiĩ hau maigua mũgambo ũcio
John12:30 Ĩndĩ Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John12:31 Rĩu nĩ hĩndĩ thĩ ĩno ĩgũtuĩrwo; rĩu nĩ hĩndĩ mũnene wa gũũkũ thĩ egũikio nja.
John12:32 Niĩ ndarĩĩkia kũhaicio igũrũ nyume gũũkũ thĩ
John12:33 (Akiuga ũguo eendaga kuonania ũrĩa eerekeire gũkua.)
John12:34 Nao andũ magĩcookia atĩrĩ
John12:35 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John12:36 Gĩĩtĩkiei ũtheri rĩrĩa mwĩ naguo
John12:37 O na gũtuĩka nĩaringĩĩte ciama icio ciothe andũ acio makĩyonagĩra-rĩ
John12:38 nĩ geetha ciugo iria ciaririo nĩ mũnabii Isaia ihinge rĩrĩa oigire atĩrĩ:“Mwathani
John12:39 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio matingĩamwĩtĩkirie
John12:40 “Ngai nĩamatuĩte atumuumu
John12:41 Isaia oigire ũguo tondũ nĩoneete riiri wa Jesũ
John12:42 O na kũhaana ũguo anene aingĩ a Ayahudi nĩmeetĩkĩĩtie Jesũ; no tondũ nĩmeetigagĩra Afarisai
John12:43 O meendeete kũganwo nĩ andũ makĩria ya kũganwo nĩ Ngai.
John12:44 Naake Jesũ akĩanĩrĩra akiuga atĩrĩ
John12:45 Na rĩĩrĩ
John12:46 Niĩ njũkĩĩte ndĩ ũtheri wa thĩ
John12:47 Mũndũ angĩigua ciugo ciakwa na arege gũcirũmĩrĩra ndingĩmũtuĩra. Amu niĩ ndiokire gũtuĩra andũ
John12:48 Ũrĩa wothe ũkũrega kũnyamũkĩra
John12:49 Amu ndimũheete ũhoro na ũhoti wakwa niĩ mwene. Awa ũrĩa wandũmire nĩ we wanjathire ũrĩa ngwaria na nguuga.
John12:50 Nĩnjũũĩ atĩ Watho wake nĩguo muoyo wa tene na tene. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
John13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John13:2 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ na arutwo aake maarĩaga irio cia hwaĩinĩ
John13:3 Naake Jesũ nĩamenyaga atĩ Ithe nĩamũheete indo ciothe
John13:4 Kwoguo agĩgĩũkĩra
John13:5 Agĩcooka agĩĩkĩra maaĩ kĩraĩ akĩambĩrĩria gũthambia arutwo aake nyaarĩrĩ
John13:6 Rĩrĩa Simoni Petero aakinyĩrĩirwo akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
John13:7 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John13:8 Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John13:9 Simoni Petero agĩkĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John13:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John13:11 (Tondũ Jesũ nĩamenyaga ũrĩa ũkaamũkunyanĩra nĩkĩo oigire atĩ
John13:12 Jesũ arĩĩkia kũmathambia nyaarĩrĩ agĩcookia nguo yake ya igũrũ agĩcooka agĩikara thĩ harĩa aarĩ mbere. Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩmooria atĩrĩ
John13:13 Mũnjĩtaga Mũrutani na Mwathani
John13:14 Angĩkorwo niĩ ndĩ Mwathani na Mũrutani wanyu
John13:15 Gĩĩkĩ nĩ kĩonereria ndamũhe nĩ geetha o na inyuĩ mwĩkanage ũguo niĩ ndamwĩka.
John13:16 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ: ngombo ti nene kũrĩ mũmĩathi
John13:17 Tondũ nĩmwarĩĩkia kũmenya maũndũ macio
John13:18 “Ndiraaria ũhoro wanyu inyuothe
John13:19 Ndamwĩra ũhoro o mbere ũtaaneekĩka
John13:20 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ: ũrĩa wothe wamũkagĩra mũndũ ũrĩa ndũmĩĩte nĩ niĩ aamũkagĩra; na ũrĩa ũnyamũkagĩra nĩ ũrĩa wandũmire aamũkagĩra.”
John13:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
John13:22 Nao arutwo makĩrorana magegeete mũno marigĩĩtwo nũũ aaragia ũhoro wake.
John13:23 Na rĩĩrĩ
John13:24 Kwoguo Simoni Petero akĩheneria mũrutwo ũcio akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John13:25 Naake mũrutwo ũcio arĩ o hau gĩthũriinĩ kĩa Jesũ
John13:26 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John13:27 Naake Judasi ooya mũgate ũcio
John13:28 No arĩa maarĩ hau meethainĩ gũtirĩ wamenyire kĩrĩa gĩatũmire Jesũ eere Judasi ũguo.
John13:29 Ĩndĩ tondũ Judasi nĩ we wakuuaga mondo ya mbeeca
John13:30 Na rĩĩrĩ
John13:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
John13:32 Angĩkorwo Ngai nĩagoocithĩĩtio e thĩinĩ wake-rĩ
John13:33 Ciana ciakwa
John13:34 Na rĩu nĩngũmũhe rĩathani rĩerũ: Endanagaai mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ. O ta ũrĩa niĩ ndĩmwendeete
John13:35 Mũngĩendana mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ
John13:36 Na rĩĩrĩ
John13:37 Naake Petero akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John13:38 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John14:1 Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John14:2 Mũciĩ kwa Awa kwĩ na ciikaro nyingĩ. Korwo tiguo kũhaana-rĩ
John14:3 No ndarĩĩkia gũthiĩ na ndaamũthondekera handũ nĩngaacooka njũke ndĩmũiyĩre ndĩmũtware gwakwa nĩ geetha o na inyuĩ mũikarage o harĩa niĩ ndĩ.
John14:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
John14:5 Toma akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John14:6 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John14:7 Korwo nĩmũmenyeete-rĩ
John14:8 Filipu akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John14:9 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John14:10 Wee Filipu ndwĩtĩkĩĩtie atĩ niĩ ndĩ thĩinĩ wa Awa
John14:11 Ĩtĩkiai atĩ niĩ ndĩ thĩinĩ wa Awa
John14:12 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ ũrĩa wothe ũnjĩtĩkĩĩtie nĩageeka ciĩko ta iria njĩkaga
John14:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
John14:14 Mwahooya ũndũ o na ũrĩkũ thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa nĩndĩrĩwĩkaga.
John14:15 “Angĩkorwo nĩmũnyendeete nĩmũrĩathĩkagĩra maathani maakwa.
John14:16 Naniĩ nĩngũhooya Awa
John14:17 Ũcio nĩ we Roho ũrĩa ũguũranagĩria ũhoro wa ma wa Ngai. Andũ a thĩ matingĩhota kũmwamũkĩra
John14:18 “Niĩ ndikũmũtiga ta ciana cia ngoriai
John14:19 No ihinda iniini itigaru andũ a thĩ matige gũcooka kũnyona
John14:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
John14:21 “Mũndũ ũrĩa wothe wamũkagĩra maathani maakwa
John14:22 Naake Judasi (no ti ũrĩa Mũisikariota) akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John14:23 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John14:24 Naake ũrĩa wothe ũtanyendeete ndathĩkagĩra ũrutani wakwa. Naguo ũrutani ũrĩa mũiguaga kuuma kũrĩ niĩ ti wakwa niĩ mwene
John14:25 “Ndamwĩra maũndũ maya rĩu ndĩ hamwe na inyuĩ.
John14:26 No rĩĩrĩ
John14:27 “Thaayũ nĩguo ngũmũtigĩra; thaayũ wakwa nĩguo ndamũhe. No ndikũmũhe thaayũ taũrĩa andũ a thĩ maheanaga. Mũtigatangĩke ngoro
John14:28 Inyuĩ nĩmwaigua ngĩmwĩra atĩ
John14:29 Ndamwĩra maũndũ macio mataneekĩka nĩ geetha rĩrĩa mageekĩka mũgeetĩkia.
John14:30 Ndingĩhota kwaria maũndũ maingĩ na inyuĩ
John14:31 No rĩĩrĩ
John15:1 “Niĩ nĩ niĩ Mũthabibũ ũrĩa wa ma
John15:2 Rũhonge o ruothe rwĩ thĩinĩ wakwa rũtaciaraga matunda arũtinagia akarute
John15:3 Inyuĩ rĩu mũrĩ atheru nĩ ũndũ wa ũhoro ũrĩa ndanamũhe.
John15:4 Ikaragaai thĩinĩ wakwa
John15:5 “Nĩ niĩ mũthabibũ
John15:6 Ũrĩa wothe ũtegũikara thĩinĩ wakwa nĩegũteeo
John15:7 No mwaikara thĩinĩ wakwa nacio ciugo ciakwa ciikare thĩinĩ wanyu
John15:8 Ũndũ ũrĩa ũngĩgoocithia Awa no mũciarage matunda maingĩ
John15:9 O ta ũrĩa Ithe witũ anyendeete
John15:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
John15:11 “Ndamwĩra maũndũ macio nĩguo mũgĩe na gĩkeno ta kĩrĩa ndĩ nakĩo
John15:12 Narĩo rĩathani rĩakwa nĩ rĩĩrĩ: Endanagaai mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ o ta ũrĩa niĩ ndĩmwendeete inyuĩ.
John15:13 Gũtirĩ mũndũ wĩ na wendani mũnene gũkĩra ũyũ atĩ mũndũ no arute muoyo wake nĩ ũndũ wa araata aake.
John15:14 Inyuĩ mweka ũrĩa ndĩmwathĩĩte mũrĩ araata aakwa.
John15:15 Ndigũcooka kũmwĩta ndungata rĩngĩ
John15:16 Ti inyuĩ mwathuurire; nĩ niĩ ndamũthuurire na ngĩmũtũma mũthiĩ mũgaciare maciaro maingĩ marĩa magũtũũra. Naake Awa nĩarĩmũheaga kĩrĩa gĩothe mũrĩmũhooyaga thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa.
John15:17 Ndakĩmwatha atĩrĩ: Endanagaai mũndũ na ũrĩa ũngĩ.
John15:18 “Andũ a thĩ mangĩmũmena-rĩ
John15:19 Korwo mũrĩ a thĩ
John15:20 Ririkanaai ũrĩa ndamwĩrire atĩ: ‘Ngombo ti nene gũkĩra mũmĩathi.’ Angĩkorwo niĩ nĩmaanyariirire-rĩ
John15:21 Maũndũ macio moothe makaamwĩka tondũ mũrĩ aakwa na matiũĩ ũrĩa wandũmire.
John15:22 Korwo ndiokire na ngĩmahe ũhoro matingĩagĩire na meehia
John15:23 Ũrĩa wothe ũthũire nĩathũire o na Awa.
John15:24 Korwo mationire ciama iria ndaringire gatagatĩinĩ kaao
John15:25 Naguo ũndũ ũcio nĩ wa gũtũma ciugo ici ihingio iria ciandĩkĩĩtwo Wathoinĩ wao atĩ: ‘Maathũũrire o ũguo tũhũ.’
John15:26 “No rĩrĩa Mũteithia agooka
John15:27 O na inyuĩ nĩmũkaaheana ũira wakwa
John16:1 “Ndamwĩra maũndũ macio nĩ geetha mũtikaanatigithĩrie kũrũmia wĩtĩkio wanyu.
John16:2 Nĩmakaamũingata kuuma thunagogiinĩ
John16:3 Makaamwĩka maũndũ macio moothe nĩ tondũ niĩ matiigana kũũmenya
John16:4 No ndamwĩra maũndũ macio
John16:5 No rĩu nĩngũthiĩ kũrĩ ũrĩa wandũmire
John16:6 Tondũ rĩu nĩndamwĩra maũndũ macio
John16:7 Ĩndĩ ndĩramwĩra ũhoro wa ma atĩ nĩkwagĩrĩire thiĩ
John16:8 Naake rĩrĩa agooka nĩakoonia andũ a thĩ ũrĩa mahĩtĩĩtie ũhoroinĩ wa meehia
John16:9 Nĩmahĩtĩĩtie ũhoroinĩ wa meehia tondũ matinjĩtĩkĩĩtie;
John16:10 nĩmahĩtĩĩtie ũhoroinĩ wa ũthingu tondũ ngũthiĩ kũrĩ Awa na mũtigũcooka kũnyona;
John16:11 ningĩ nĩmahĩtĩĩtie ũhoroinĩ wa ciira tondũ mũnene wa gũũkũ thĩ nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũtuĩrwo.
John16:12 “Ndĩ na maũndũ mangĩ maingĩ ma kũmwĩra no mũtingĩhota kũmoomĩrĩria rĩu.
John16:13 No rĩrĩa Roho ũrĩa ũguũranagĩria ũhoro wa ma wa Ngai agooka nĩakaamũtongoria maũndũinĩ moothe ma ũũma. We ndakaaragia na ũhoti wake we mwene
John16:14 Nĩakangoocithia nĩ ũndũ akaamũkinyagĩria o ũhoro ũrĩa arutĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ niĩ.
John16:15 Kĩrĩa gĩothe Awa e nakĩo nĩ gĩakwa; nĩkĩo ndamwĩra atĩ Roho akaamũkinyagĩria o ũhoro ũrĩa arutĩĩte kuuma kũrĩ niĩ.
John16:16 “Thuutha wa ihinda iniini mũticooka kũnyona
John16:17 Nao amwe a arutwo aake makĩũrania atĩrĩ
John16:18 Akiuga
John16:19 Naake Jesũ amenya atĩ nĩmeendaga kũmũũria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John16:20 Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ: inyuĩ nĩmũkaarĩra na mũgirĩke
John16:21 Rĩrĩa mũtumia akinyĩrĩirwo nĩkũigua ruwo rwa gũciara nĩagĩaga na kĩeha
John16:22 Kwoguo inyuĩ rĩu mwĩ na kĩeha
John16:23 “Rĩrĩa mũthenya ũcio ũgaakinya mũtirĩ ũndũ mũkanjũũria. Ngũmwĩra na ma atĩ Awa nĩakaamũhingĩria ũndũ o wothe ũrĩa mũkaahooya thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa.
John16:24 Nginyagia rĩu mũtirĩ mwahooya ũndũ thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩakwa; hooyai na nĩmũkũheeo nĩguo gĩkeno kĩanyu gĩkinyanĩre.
John16:25 “Ndamwĩra maũndũ macio moothe na thimo. No ihinda nĩrĩgaakinya rĩrĩa itagaacooka kũmũhe ũhoro ũcio rĩngĩ na thimo
John16:26 Mũthenya ũcio wakinya
John16:27 amu Awa we mwene nĩamwendeete tondũ na inyuĩ nĩmũnyendeete
John16:28 Ndoimire kũrĩ Awa ngĩũka thĩ na rĩu nĩnguuma thĩ njooke kũrĩ Awa.”
John16:29 Nao arutwo aake makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John16:30 Rĩu nĩtwamenya atĩ wee nĩũũĩ maũndũ moothe; na ndũbatarĩĩtio kũũrio kĩũria nĩ mũndũ. Ũndũ ũcio nĩwatũma twĩtĩkie atĩ woimire kwĩ Ngai.”
John16:31 Naake Jesũ akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John16:32 Ihinda nĩrĩrooka
John16:33 Ndamwĩra maũndũ macio moothe nĩ geetha mũgĩe na thaayũ nĩ ũndũ wa kũnyiitana na niĩ. Andũ a thĩ nĩmarĩtũma mũnyamaare
John17:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John17:2 amu nĩwamũheire ũhoti igũrũ rĩa andũ oothe
John17:3 Naguo muoyo wa tene na tene nĩmakũmenye wee Ngai ũrĩa wa ma
John17:4 Nĩngũgoocithĩĩtie gũũkũ thĩ; nĩndĩkĩĩtie wĩra ũrĩa waheire ndute.
John17:5 Awa! Ngoocithia rĩu o maithoinĩ maaku; ngoocithia na ũgooci ũrĩa ndaarĩ naguo hamwe nawe thĩ ĩtaanoombwo.
John17:6 “Nĩndũmĩĩte ũmenyeke nĩ andũ arĩa waheire gũũkũ thĩ. Maarĩ aaku
John17:7 Rĩu nĩmamenyeete atĩ maũndũ moothe marĩa waheire moimaga kũrĩ we.
John17:8 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩndĩmaheete ũhoro ũrĩa waheire
John17:9 “Acio nĩ o ndĩrahoera. Ndikũhoera andũ a thĩ
John17:10 Kĩrĩa gĩothe ndĩ nakĩo nĩ gĩaku
John17:11 Rĩu niĩ nĩngũũka kũrĩ we; ndigũcooka gũkorwo ndĩ gũũkũ thĩ
John17:12 Rĩrĩa ndĩrakoragwo nao nĩndĩramamenyagĩrĩra na hinya wa rĩĩtwa rĩaku
John17:13 “Rĩu nĩndĩrooka kũrĩ we. Ndĩroiga maũndũ macio moothe ndĩ gũũkũ thĩ nĩ geetha magĩe na gĩkeno gĩakwa kĩrĩ gĩkinyanĩru ngoroinĩ ciao.
John17:14 Nĩndĩmaheete ũhoro waku
John17:15 Ndirakũhooya atĩ ũmarute gũũkũ thĩ
John17:16 Amu o ta ũrĩa o na niĩ itarĩ wa gũũkũ thĩ
John17:17 Matherie na ũndũ wa ũhoro ũrĩa wa ma; tondũ ũhoro waku nĩ wa ma.
John17:18 O ta ũrĩa wee wandũmire gũũkũ thĩ
John17:19 Nĩndĩthereetie nĩ ũndũ wao
John17:20 “Ningĩ ti aya oiki ndĩrahoera; ndĩrahoera o na arĩa marĩnjĩtĩkagia nĩ ũndũ wa ciugo cia andũ aya.
John17:21 Ndĩrakũhooya atĩ oothe matuĩke ũmwe. Awa! Marokoragwo thĩinĩ witũ
John17:22 Nĩndĩmaheete riiri ũrĩa wee ũheete nĩ geetha matuĩke ũmwe
John17:23 Niĩ thĩinĩ wao
John17:24 “Awa! Nĩngwenda aya ũheete o nao magĩikarage harĩa niĩ ndĩ nĩ geetha moonage riiri wakwa ũrĩa ũheete
John17:25 Awa Mũthingu! Andũ a thĩ matikũũĩ
John17:26 Nĩndatũmire makũmenye! Na no ngũthiĩ na mbere gwĩka ũguo
John18:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John18:2 Na rĩĩrĩ
John18:3 Kwoguo Judasi agĩgĩthiĩ kuo arĩ na thigari na arangĩri a Hekaarũ
John18:4 Tondũ Jesũ nĩamenyaga maũndũ moothe marĩa aakirie kuona
John18:5 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John18:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
John18:7 Naake Jesũ akĩmooria o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
John18:8 Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John18:9 (Oigire ũguo nĩ geetha ũrĩa oigĩĩte mbere ĩyo ũhinge
John18:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
John18:11 Jesũ akĩĩra Petero atĩrĩ
John18:12 Nacio thigari icio i hamwe na mũtongoria wacio o na arangĩri a Ayahudi ikĩnyiita Jesũ
John18:13 Ikĩamba kũmũtwara kwĩ Anasi
John18:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
John18:15 Naake Simoni Petero na mũrutwo ũngĩ makiuma Jesũ thuutha. Tondũ mũrutwo ũcio ũngĩ nĩoĩkaine nĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene
John18:16 Ĩndĩ Petero agĩtigwo kĩhingoinĩ. Naake mũrutwo ũcio woĩkaine nĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene agĩcooka nja
John18:17 Naake mũirĩĩtu ũcio waikaragia kĩhingo akĩũria Petero atĩrĩ
John18:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
John18:19 Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene agĩkĩũria Jesũ ũhoro wa arutwo aake o na wa maũndũ marĩa aarutanaga.
John18:20 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John18:21 Ũgũkĩnjũũria nĩkĩ? Ũria andũ arĩa manjiguire; moorie ũrĩa ndameerire nĩ o mooĩ ũrĩa ndoigire.”
John18:22 Na rĩrĩa Jesũ oigire ũguo
John18:23 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John18:24 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Anasi akĩneana Jesũ arĩ o muohe atwarwo gwa Kaiafa Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene.
John18:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
John18:26 Ningĩ ngombo ĩmwe ya Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai ũcio Mũnene
John18:27 Petero agĩkaana o rĩngĩ
John18:28 Na rũũciinĩ tene
John18:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Pilato agĩkiuma nja akĩmooria atĩrĩ
John18:30 Nao makĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John18:31 Naake Pilato agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
John18:32 (Gwekĩkire ũguo nĩ geetha ũrĩa Jesũ oigĩĩte ũhinge rĩrĩa aarĩĩtie ũhoro wa gĩkuũ kĩrĩa agaakua.)
John18:33 Pilato agĩgĩcooka nyũmba thĩinĩ agĩĩta Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John18:34 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John18:35 Pilato akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John18:36 Naake Jesũ agĩcookia atĩrĩ
John18:37 Pilato agĩkĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John18:38 Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John18:39 Tondũ kũringana na mũtugo wanyu nĩ atĩ hĩndĩ ya Bathaka ngamuohorera mũndũ ũmwe-rĩ
John18:40 No o magĩitĩka kwanĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ
John19:1 Gwakinya hau
John19:2 Nacio thigari igĩthondeka thũmbĩ ya mĩigua ikĩmwĩkĩra mũtwe; igĩcooka ikĩmwĩkĩra nguo ya babũ
John19:3 ikĩambĩrĩria gũũka harĩ we ikamwĩraga atĩrĩ
John19:4 Naake Pilato akiuma nja rĩngĩ akĩĩra Ayahudi atĩrĩ
John19:5 Jesũ agĩkiuma nja eekĩrĩĩte thũmbĩ ya mĩigua na nguo ya babũ. Naake oima nja Pilato akĩĩra Ayahudi atĩrĩ
John19:6 Na rĩrĩa athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene o na arangĩri a Hekaarũ maamuonire makĩanĩrĩra makiugaga atĩrĩ
John19:7 Nao andũ magĩcookia atĩrĩ
John19:8 Rĩrĩa Pilato aiguire ũrĩa moiga agĩĩtigĩra mũno makĩria.
John19:9 Agĩgĩcooka na thĩinĩ rĩngĩ akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
John19:10 Naake Pilato akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John19:11 Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John19:12 Rĩrĩa Pilato aiguire ũguo
John19:13 Rĩrĩa Pilato aiguire ciugo icio akĩruta Jesũ nja
John19:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo kwarĩ ta thaa thita mũthenya ũrĩa wa kwĩhaarĩria nĩ ũndũ wa Bathaka. Pilato agĩkĩĩra andũ atĩrĩ
John19:15 Nao andũ makĩanĩrĩra magĩcookia atĩrĩ
John19:16 Pilato agĩkĩneana Jesũ kũrĩ o athiĩ akaambwo.
John19:17 makĩmũtwara ekuuĩire mũtharaba
John19:18 Makĩamba Jesũ ho
John19:19 Naake Pilato akĩandĩkithia kĩmenyithia kĩoigaga atĩrĩ
John19:20 Naho hau Jesũ aambĩirwo haarĩ hakuhĩ na itũũra
John19:21 Nao athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene makĩĩra Pilato atĩrĩ
John19:22 Naake Pilato akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
John19:23 Nacio thigari ciarĩĩkia kwamba Jesũ ikĩgayania nguo ciake maita mana
John19:24 Thigari icio ikĩĩrana atĩrĩ
John19:25 Naho hau hakuhĩ na Mũtharaba nĩharũũgamĩĩte nyina
John19:26 Naake Jesũ oona nyina na mũrutwo ũrĩa eendeete marũngiĩ ho akĩĩra nyina atĩrĩ
John19:27 Agĩcooka akĩĩra mũrutwo ũcio atĩrĩ
John19:28 Thuutha wa ũguo
John19:29 Na rĩĩrĩ
John19:30 Jesũ arĩĩkia gũkunda akiuga atĩrĩ
John19:31 Thuutha ũcio anene a Ayahudi magĩthiĩ makĩhooya Pilato rũũtha rwa kuunanga magũrũ ma andũ acio maambĩĩtwo
John19:32 Kwoguo thigari igĩgĩthiĩ ikiunanga magũrũ ma andũ arĩa maambanĩirio na Jesũ.
John19:33 No rĩrĩa ciakinyire harĩ Jesũ igĩkora nĩarĩĩkĩĩtie gũkua
John19:34 Ĩndĩ mũũthigari ũmwe agĩikia itimũ agĩtheeca Jesũ mbaruinĩ
John19:35 (Mũndũ ũrĩa wonire ũndũ ũcio ũgĩĩkĩka nĩ we ũraheana ũira wake
John19:36 Ũndũ ũyũ wonekire nĩ geetha Maandĩko mahingio marĩa moigĩĩte atĩrĩ
John19:37 O na no harĩ Maandĩko mangĩ moigĩĩte atĩrĩ
John19:38 Thuutha ũcio Josefu wa kuuma itũũra rĩa Arimathea
John19:39 Naake Nikodemo
John19:40 Nao andũ acio eerĩ makĩoya mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ makĩwoha na cuka wa gataani o hamwe na mũtukanio ũcio wa maguta kũringana na mũtugo wa Ayahudi wa gũthikana.
John19:41 Na rĩĩrĩ
John19:42 Nao makĩiga mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ ĩyo
John20:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
John20:2 Agĩteng'era kũrĩ Simoni Petero
John20:3 Naake Petero na mũrutwo ũcio ũngĩ magĩthiĩ mbĩĩrĩrainĩ mateng'ereete
John20:4 no mũrutwo ũcio ũngĩ agĩkĩria Petero ihenya
John20:5 Akinya akĩinamĩrĩra
John20:6 Naake Simoni Petero ũrĩa warĩ thuutha akinya
John20:7 naguo taama ũrĩa woheete Jesũ mũtwe
John20:8 Hĩndĩ ĩyo mũrutwo ũcio ũngĩ ũrĩa wakinyĩĩte mbĩĩrĩrainĩ mbere ya Petero
John20:9 (Kinya hĩndĩ ĩyo matiakoreetwo mataũkĩirwo nĩ maandĩko atĩ no mũhaka ariũke oime kũrĩ arĩa akuũ.)
John20:10 Arutwo acio magĩcooka makĩinũka kwao.
John20:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
John20:12 Naake akĩona araika eerĩ me na nguo njerũ maikarĩĩte harĩa mwĩrĩ wa Jesũ warĩ
John20:13 Nao makĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John20:14 Mariamu arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo akĩĩhũgũra na thuutha akĩona Jesũ arũũgamĩĩte hau
John20:15 Naake Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John20:16 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Jesũ akĩmwĩta
John20:17 Jesũ akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John20:18 Naake Mariamu Mũmagidali agĩthiĩ akĩĩra arutwo a Jesũ atĩ nĩoneete Mwathani
John20:19 Na mũthenya o ro ũcio wa kiumia hwaĩinĩ
John20:20 Arĩĩkia kuuga ũguo akĩmoonia mooko maake o na mbaru ciake. Nao makĩiyũrwo nĩ gĩkeno nĩ ũndũ wa kuona Mwathani.
John20:21 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera o rĩngĩ atĩrĩ
John20:22 Hĩndĩ ĩyo akĩmahuuhĩrĩria mĩhũũmũ yake akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John20:23 Arĩa oothe mũrĩohagĩra meehia maao nĩmarĩohagĩrwo
John20:24 Na rĩĩrĩ
John20:25 Arutwo acio angĩ magĩkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John20:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
John20:27 Agĩcooka akĩĩra Toma atĩrĩ
John20:28 Naake Toma akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John20:29 Jesũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
John20:30 Nĩkũrĩ ciama ingĩ nyingĩ Jesũ aaringire arutwo aake makĩyonagĩra itaandĩkĩĩtwo thĩinĩ wa ibuku rĩĩrĩ.
John20:31 Ici irĩ ho ciandĩkĩĩtwo nĩ geetha mwĩtĩkie atĩ Jesũ nĩ we Mesia
John21:1 Thuutha ũcio
John21:2 Hĩndĩ ĩmwe Simoni Petero
John21:3 Simoni Petero akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John21:4 Rũũciinĩ riũa rĩkĩratha
John21:5 Naake akĩmooria atĩrĩ
John21:6 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John21:7 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo mũrutwo ũrĩa wendeetwo nĩ Jesũ akĩĩra Petero atĩrĩ
John21:8 Nao arutwo acio angĩ makiumĩra na gatarũ maguucĩĩtie rũgara rũiyũrĩĩte thamaki. Hau maarĩ hatiarĩ haraaya tondũ haarĩ ta mita igana rĩmwe kuuma rũteereinĩ.
John21:9 Maakinya rũteereinĩ magĩkora mwaki wa makara wakĩĩtio ũigĩrĩirwo thamaki na mũgate.
John21:10 Naake Jesũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
John21:11 Simoni Petero akĩingĩra gatarũ akĩguucia rũgara akĩruumĩria rũiyũrĩĩte thamaki nene
John21:12 Jesũ agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
John21:13 Jesũ agĩgĩũka
John21:14 Rĩu nĩrĩo riita rĩa gatatũ rĩa Jesũ kuumĩrĩra arutwo aake
John21:15 Marĩĩkia kwĩgagũra
John21:16 Agĩcooka akĩmũũria rĩa keerĩ atĩrĩ
John21:17 Agĩcooka akĩmũũria rĩa gatatũ atĩrĩ
John21:18 Ngũkwĩra na ma atĩ
John21:19 (Jesũ akiuga ũguo oonanagia ũrĩa Petero agaakua agoocithie Ngai.) Jesũ agĩcooka akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
John21:20 Na rĩĩrĩ
John21:21 Rĩrĩa Petero oonire mũrutwo ũcio akĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
John21:22 Naake Jesũ akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
John21:23 Tondũ ũcio ũhoro ũgĩkĩhunja gatagatĩinĩ ka arũmĩrĩri a Jesũ atĩ mũrutwo ũcio ndagaakua. Ĩndĩ Jesũ we mwene ndeerĩĩte mũrutwo ũcio ndagaakua; oigĩĩte atĩrĩ
John21:24 Mũrutwo ũcio nĩ we ũheanĩĩte ũhoro wa maũndũ maya
John21:25 Nĩkũrĩ maũndũ mangĩ maingĩ Jesũ eekire. Korwo no maandĩkwo moothe ũmwe ũmwe ngwĩciiria atĩ o na thĩ yo nyene ndĩngĩiganĩra mbuku iria ingĩandĩkwo.
Acts1:1 Kũrĩ mũgaathe Theofilo:Thĩinĩ wa ibuku rĩakwa rĩa mbere nĩndaandĩkire maũndũ moothe marĩa Jesũ eekire na marĩa aarutanire kuuma rĩrĩa aambĩrĩirie wĩra wake
Acts1:2 nginya mũthenya ũrĩa aatwarirwo igũrũ. Ataanatwarwo igũrũ nĩamaheire mawatho ahotithĩĩtio nĩ Roho Mũtheru.
Acts1:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts1:4 Rĩrĩa aikaranagia nao
Acts1:5 Amu Johana aabatithanagia na maaĩ
Acts1:6 Rĩrĩa atũmwo maacemanĩĩtie hamwe makĩũria Jesũ atĩrĩ
Acts1:7 Naake akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Acts1:8 No nĩmũrĩiyũrwo nĩ hinya rĩrĩa Roho Mũtheru arĩũka kũrĩ inyuĩ
Acts1:9 Naake arĩĩkia kũmeera ũguo
Acts1:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts1:11 makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts1:12 Thuutha ũcio atũmwo magĩcooka Jerusalemu moimĩĩte kĩrĩmainĩ kĩa mĩtamaiyũ. Kĩrĩma kĩu gĩ gũkuhĩ na Jerusalemu o ta handũ ha kiromita ĩmwe.
Acts1:13 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts1:14 Nao andũ acio oothe magaathaathayagia Ngai marĩ na ngoro ĩmwe
Acts1:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts1:16 “Araata aakwa thĩinĩ wa Mwathani
Acts1:17 Amu Judasi aarĩ ũmwe witũ na nĩaheetwo wĩra hamwe na ithuĩ.”
Acts1:18 (Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Acts1:19 Ũhoro ũcio ũkĩmenyeka nĩ arĩa oothe maatũũraga Jerusalemu
Acts1:20 “Tondũ thĩinĩ wa ibuku rĩa Thaburi kwandĩkĩĩtwo atĩrĩ:‘Mũciĩ wake ũrotiganĩrio; gũtikaanagĩe mũndũ ũgũtũũra kuo.’Ningĩ nĩkwandĩkĩĩtwo atĩrĩ:‘Mũndũ ũngĩ nĩoe wĩra wake.’
Acts1:21 (21-22) “Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts1:22 Nao makĩrũũgamia andũ eerĩ: Josefu
Acts1:23 Makĩhooya makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts1:24 wa kũruta wĩra na gũtuĩka mũtũmwo handũ ha Judasi ũrĩa wathiire handũ harĩa haarĩ haake.”
Acts1:25 Nao maikia kura
Acts2:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts2:2 O rĩmwe mũrurumo mũnene ũkiuma igũrũ
Acts2:3 Nao makĩona kĩndũ kĩahaanaga ta nĩnĩmbĩ cia mwaki iria ciahaanaga nĩmĩ
Acts2:4 Nao oothe makĩiyũrwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru
Acts2:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts2:6 Nao rĩrĩa maiguire inegene aingĩ aao magĩũka
Acts2:7 Magĩkĩgega mũno na makĩmaka makĩũrania atĩrĩ
Acts2:8 Kũhotekeete atĩa atĩ tũramaigua o mũndũ na mwarĩrie wa kũrĩa twaciarĩirwo?
Acts2:9 Ithuĩ tuumĩĩte mabũrũriinĩ ma Parithia
Acts2:10 Ferugia
Acts2:11 arĩa Ayahudi na arĩa magarũrũkĩĩte makahĩmbĩria Ũyahudi. Andũ angĩ aitũ moimĩĩte Kirete
Acts2:12 Nao oothe makĩgega makĩrigwo nĩ ũhoro ũcio
Acts2:13 No angĩ makĩnyũrũria andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts2:14 No Petero akĩrũũgama hamwe na atũmwo arĩa ikũmi na ũmwe
Acts2:15 Amu andũ aya ti arĩĩu ta ũguo mũgwĩciiria
Acts2:16 Ũyũ nĩ Ũhoro ũrĩa waririo nĩ mũnabii Joeli akiuga atĩrĩ:
Acts2:17 ‘Ngai ekuuga atĩrĩ: matukũinĩ ma kũrigĩrĩria nĩngaitĩrĩria andũ oothe Roho wakwa nao aariũ na aarĩ aanyu nĩmakaarathaga moohoro; aanake aanyu nĩmakoonaga cioneki
Acts2:18 Ĩĩ
Acts2:19 Nĩngoonania maũndũ ma kũgegania kũũrĩa igũrũ na ciama thĩ
Acts2:20 narĩo riũa nĩrĩkaagarũrwo rĩtuĩke nduma
Acts2:21 Nĩgũgaatuĩka atĩ mũndũ o wothe
Acts2:22 “Andũ a Isiraeli! Taiguai ciugo ici
Acts2:23 Jesũ ũcio waneanirwo kũringana na ũrĩa Ngai aatuĩte na akamenya mbere
Acts2:24 No Ngai nĩamũriũkirie akĩmuohora kuuma hinyainĩ wa gĩkuũ
Acts2:25 Amu Daudi ekuuga ũhoro wake atĩrĩ:‘Nĩndoonaga Mwathani mbere yakwa hĩndĩ ciothe; aakoragwo mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo nĩ geetha ndikeenyenyio.
Acts2:26 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio ngĩcanjamũka na ngĩina ndĩ na gĩkeno; naguo mwĩrĩ wakwa ũkĩhuurũka wĩ na kĩĩrĩgĩrĩro.
Acts2:27 Nĩ gũkorwo wee Ngai ndũgaatiganĩria muoyo wakwa kwa arĩa akuũ; ndũkaareka ndungata yaku ĩrĩa ĩhokekeete ĩbuthĩre mbĩĩrĩrainĩ.
Acts2:28 Wee nĩũnyonereirie njĩra cia muoyo; na nĩũgaatũma njiyũrwo nĩ gĩkeno nĩ ũndũ wa kuona ũthiũ waku.’
Acts2:29 “Andũ aitũ
Acts2:30 Daudi aarĩ mũnabii
Acts2:31 Tondũ nĩamenyeete ũhoro ũcio o mbere-rĩ
Acts2:32 Ngai nĩariũkirie Jesũ ũcio na ithuothe tũrĩ aira a ũhoro ũcio.
Acts2:33 Tondũ nĩatũgĩrĩĩtio agaikara guokoinĩ kwa ũrĩo kwa Ngai
Acts2:34 Amu Daudi we mwene ndaambatire igũrũ; we nĩkuuga oigire atĩrĩ:‘Mwathani Ngai nĩerire Mwathani wakwa atĩrĩ: Ikara mwena wakwa wa ũrĩo
Acts2:35 o nginya ngaatua thũ ciaku gaturwa ga kũigĩrĩra magũrũ maaku.’
Acts2:36 “Tondũ wa ũguo kĩmenyeei na ma inyuĩ andũ oothe a Isiraeli atĩ Jesũ ũcio mwambire mũtĩinĩ
Acts2:37 Nao andũ acio maigua ũguo magĩtheecwo ngoro makĩũria Petero na atũmwo acio angĩ atĩrĩ
Acts2:38 Naake Petero akĩmacookeria atĩrĩ
Acts2:39 Amu kĩĩranĩro kĩu nĩ inyuĩ mwerĩirwo na ciana cianyu o hamwe na arĩa me kũraaya
Acts2:40 Petero agĩkĩmaarĩria na ciugo icio na ingĩ nyingĩ
Acts2:41 Nao arĩa meetĩkirie ũhoro wake makĩbatithio
Acts2:42 Nao magĩikara marũmĩĩtie ũrutani wa atũmwo
Acts2:43 Namo maũndũ maingĩ ma magegania o na ciama ikĩringwo nĩ atũmwo
Acts2:44 Nao arĩa oothe meetĩkĩĩtie maikaraga hamwe makagwatanagĩra indo ciao ciothe hamwe.
Acts2:45 Nao nĩmeendagia ithaka na indo ciao
Acts2:46 O mũthenya nĩmaathiaga Hekaarũinĩ hamwe
Acts2:47 makĩgoocaga Ngai
Acts3:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts3:2 Naho hau mũromoinĩ wa Hekaarũ
Acts3:3 Rĩrĩa mũndũ ũcio oonire Petero na Johana magĩtoonya Hekaarũ
Acts3:4 Naake Petero na Johana makĩmũkũũrĩra maitho
Acts3:5 Naake akĩmarora erĩgĩrĩire atĩ nĩekũheeo kĩndũ nĩ o.
Acts3:6 No Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts3:7 Petero akĩnyiita mũndũ ũcio guoko kwa ũrĩo
Acts3:8 akĩrũũga na igũrũ akĩĩrũũgamia we mwene na akĩambĩrĩria gwĩtwara. Agĩgĩtoonya Hekaarũ hamwe nao etwarĩĩte na magũrũ akĩrũũgarũũgaga
Acts3:9 Nao andũ oothe maamuona agĩĩtwara akĩgoocaga Ngai
Acts3:10 na maamenya atĩ nĩ we waikaraga Mũromoinĩ Mũthaka wa Hekaarũ eetereire ũteithio
Acts3:11 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts3:12 Rĩrĩa Petero oonire andũ acio akĩmaarĩria akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts3:13 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Acts3:14 Inyuĩ mwakaanire ũrĩa mũthingu na mũtheru
Acts3:15 Mũkĩũraga mũheani wa muoyo
Acts3:16 Tondũ wa gwĩtĩkia
Acts3:17 “Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Acts3:18 No Ngai nĩahingirie ũrĩa oigĩĩte mbere na tũnua twa anabii oothe
Acts3:19 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio mwĩrireei
Acts3:20 Thuutha wa ũguo mũcooke mũgĩe na mahinda ma gwĩkĩrwo hinya wĩtĩkioinĩ wanyu uumĩĩte kwĩ Mwathani
Acts3:21 Naake no mũhaka aikarage kũu igũrũ
Acts3:22 Nĩ gũkorwo Musa oigire atĩrĩ
Acts3:23 Na nĩgũgaatuĩka atĩrĩ
Acts3:24 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Acts3:25 Inyuĩ-rĩ
Acts3:26 Ngai nĩariũkirie ndungata yake
Acts4:1 Na rĩrĩa Petero na Johana maaragĩria andũ acio
Acts4:2 Nao makĩraakara mũno maigua atũmwo acio makĩruta andũ makiugaga atĩ Jesũ nĩariũkĩĩte
Acts4:3 Magĩkĩmanyiita
Acts4:4 No rĩĩrĩ
Acts4:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts4:6 Hamwe nao nĩhaarĩ na Anasi Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene
Acts4:7 Makĩreehe Petero na Johana mbere yao
Acts4:8 Naake Petero aiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts4:9 ũũmũũthĩ tũraciirithio tondũ wa ũndũ ũcio mwega tũreekire wa kũhonia kĩonje
Acts4:10 Inyuĩ o na andũ oothe a Isiraeli ngũmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts4:11 Ũcio nĩ we ihiga rĩrĩa inyuĩ aaki mwaregire na nĩ we ũtuĩkĩĩte ihiga rĩrĩa rĩ bata gũkĩra marĩa mangĩ moothe mũthingiinĩ o ta ũrĩa maandĩko moigĩĩte.
Acts4:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts4:13 Nao athuuri a kĩama makĩgega mũno moona ũũmĩrĩru wa Petero na Johana. Ningĩ maamenya atĩ maarĩ andũ o ro ũguo na matiarĩ athoomu. Magĩkĩmenya atĩ nĩmaatũũranĩĩtie na Jesũ.
Acts4:14 No moona mũndũ ũcio wahoneetio arũngiĩ hakuhĩ na Petero na Johana
Acts4:15 Kwoguo makĩĩrwo moime kĩamainĩ
Acts4:16 “Andũ aya tũkũmeeka atĩa? Andũ oothe a Jerusalemu nĩmooĩ atĩ kĩama kĩnene nĩkĩringĩĩtwo nĩ o
Acts4:17 No nĩ geetha ũhoro ũyũ ndũgaatambe makĩria gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ-rĩ
Acts4:18 Magĩkĩmeeta kĩamainĩ makĩmeera matigaacooke kwaria kana kũrutana ũndũ na rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ.
Acts4:19 No Petero na Johana magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts4:20 amu ithuĩ no mũhaka tũthiĩ na mbere kwaria ũhoro ũrĩa tuoneete na tũiguĩte.”
Acts4:21 Thuutha wa kũmakaania na hinya
Acts4:22 Mũndũ ũcio wahonirio na njĩra ya kĩama aarĩ na makĩria ma mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna.
Acts4:23 Rĩrĩa Petero na Johana maarekereirio
Acts4:24 Nao andũ acio meetĩkĩĩtie maigua ũhoro ũcio
Acts4:25 Nĩwe waheire ithe witũ Daudi ciugo cia kwaria. Aarĩ ndungata yaku na aathĩĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru nĩoigire atĩrĩ
Acts4:26 Athamaki a gũũkũ thĩ nĩmehotoreete na aathani magacemania
Acts4:27 Amu ti itherũ Herode na Ponitio Pilato
Acts4:28 Meekire ũguo nĩ geetha mahingie maũndũ marĩa moothe watanyĩĩte gwĩka na hinya waku kuuma o kĩambĩrĩria.
Acts4:29 Rĩu Mwathani rora wone ũrĩa maratũmakia
Acts4:30 Tambũrũkia guoko gwaku ũhonanie
Acts4:31 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts4:32 Hĩndĩ ĩyo arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie maarĩ na ngoro ĩmwe na muorooto o ũmwe
Acts4:33 Nao atũmwo magakĩheanaga ũira wa kũriũka kwa Mwathani Jesũ me na hinya mũingĩ
Acts4:34 Gũtirĩ mũndũ warĩ mũthĩĩni gatagatĩinĩ kaao
Acts4:35 gĩgatwarwo harĩ atũmwo; o mũndũ aagayagĩrwo kũringana na mabata maake.
Acts4:36 Naake mũndũ wetagwo Josefu
Acts4:37 akĩendia mũgũnda wake
Acts5:1 No rĩĩrĩ
Acts5:2 Thuutha wa kũrĩĩkanĩra na mũtumia wake
Acts5:3 Naake Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts5:4 Rĩrĩa ũtarakĩendeetie-rĩ
Acts5:5 Naake Anania aigua ciugo icio
Acts5:6 Nao aanake magĩũka
Acts5:7 Na thuutha wa mathaa ta matatũ mũtumia wake agĩtoonya atekũmenya ũrĩa gwekĩkĩĩte.
Acts5:8 Naake Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts5:9 No Petero akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts5:10 Ihinda o rĩu akĩgũa thĩ magũrũinĩ ma Petero agĩkua. Nao aanake magĩtoonya magĩkora akuĩte
Acts5:11 Rĩrĩa kanitha wothe o na andũ arĩa angĩ maiguire maũndũ macio makĩnyiitwo nĩ guoya mũnene mũno.
Acts5:12 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts5:13 Nao andũ oothe arĩa mataarĩ a gĩkundi kĩao nĩmaamaheete gĩtĩĩo mũno
Acts5:14 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts5:15 Ciĩko irĩa atũmwo meekaga nĩciatũmaga o na andũ makuue arĩa maarĩ arũaru
Acts5:16 O na andũ aingĩ nĩmookaga kuuma matũũra moothe marĩa maarĩ hakuhĩ na Jerusalemu
Acts5:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts5:18 Makĩnyiita atũmwo makĩmaikia njeera ya mũingĩ.
Acts5:19 No mũraika wa Mwathani akĩhingũra mĩrango ya njeera ũtukũ akĩmaruta kuo akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts5:20 “Thiĩi mũrũũgame thĩinĩ wa Hekaarũ mwarĩrie andũ mũmahe ũhoro wothe wa muoyo ũyũ mwerũ.”
Acts5:21 Nao magĩgĩathĩka
Acts5:22 No thigari ciathiĩ itiigana kũmakora kũu njeera. Igĩgĩcookia ũhoro ikiuga atĩrĩ
Acts5:23 “Twakora njeera ĩrĩ hinge o wega
Acts5:24 Naake mũnene wa arangĩri a Hekaarũ na athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene maigua ũhoro ũcio magĩĩtigĩra mũno
Acts5:25 Hĩndĩ ĩyo gũgĩũka mũndũ akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts5:26 Naake mũnene wa Hekaarũ hamwe na thigari magĩthiĩ makĩreehe atũmwo mategũtũmĩra hinya
Acts5:27 Marĩĩkia kũmareehe
Acts5:28 “Githĩ tũtiamũkaanirie na hinya atĩ mũtikaanarutane thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩu
Acts5:29 Naake Petero na atũmwo acio angĩ magĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts5:30 Ngai wa maithe maitũ nĩariũkirie Jesũ ũrĩa mwambire mũtharaba igũrũ mũkĩmũũraga.
Acts5:31 Naake Ngai nĩamũtũũgĩririe agĩikara mwena wake wa ũrĩo
Acts5:32 Ithuĩ na ithuĩ tũrĩ aira a ũhoro ũcio
Acts5:33 Nao maigua ũhoro ũcio makĩng'ũrĩka mũno
Acts5:34 No Mũfarisai ũmwe wa kĩama wetagwo Gamalieli
Acts5:35 Naake akĩĩra kĩama atĩrĩ
Acts5:36 Nĩmũkũmenya atĩ matukũ mathiru
Acts5:37 Thuutha ũcio Judasi ũrĩa Mũgalili akĩyumĩria matukũinĩ ma kwĩyandĩkithia
Acts5:38 O na rĩu niĩ ngũmwĩra atĩ
Acts5:39 No angĩkorwo nĩ wa Ngai
Acts5:40 Gĩgĩĩta atũmwo gĩkĩmahũũra
Acts5:41 Nao atũmwo makiuma hau kĩamainĩ makeneete mũno tondũ Ngai nĩoneete maagĩrĩire kũherithio na njĩra ya thoni nĩ tondũ wa rĩĩtwa rĩu.
Acts5:42 Nao magĩthiĩ na mbere o mũthenya kũrutana na kũhunjia Hekaarũinĩ o na mĩciĩinĩ mategũtigithĩria
Acts6:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts6:2 Nao atũmwo arĩa ikũmi na eerĩ magĩĩta andũ arĩa angĩ meetĩkĩĩtie makĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts6:3 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio aariũ na aarĩ a Ithe witũ thĩinĩ wa Mwathani
Acts6:4 Ithuĩ-rĩ
Acts6:5 Ũndũ ũcio ũgĩgĩkenia andũ oothe
Acts6:6 Magĩkĩmareehe mbere ya atũmwo
Acts6:7 Naguo ũhoro wa Ngai ũgĩthiĩ na mbere gũtamba nao arutwo makĩingĩha mũno kũu Jerusalemu
Acts6:8 Naake Sitefano aiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ wega na hinya wa Ngai agĩĩka maũndũ ma kũgegania na akĩringa ciama gatagatĩinĩ ka andũ.
Acts6:9 Nao andũ amwe a gĩkundi kĩa thunagogi ĩrĩa yetagwo ya arĩa oohore
Acts6:10 No Roho akĩhe Sitefano ũũgĩ mũingĩ ũguo atĩ akĩaria matingĩahotire kũmwĩtiiria.
Acts6:11 Nao makĩheenereria andũ na hitho moige atĩrĩ
Acts6:12 Magĩgĩtũma ookĩrĩrwo nĩ andũ
Acts6:13 Magĩcooka makĩreehe aira a maheeni arĩa moigire atĩrĩ
Acts6:14 Tondũ nĩtũiguĩte akiuga atĩ Jesũ ũcio wa Nazarethi nĩagaatharia Hekaarũ ĩno
Acts6:15 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts7:1 Naake Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene akĩũria Sitefano atĩrĩ
Acts7:2 Naake Sitefano akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts7:3 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts7:4 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Aburahamu akiuma bũrũri wa Akalidei
Acts7:5 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts7:6 Ngai eerire Aburahamu atĩ: ‘Njiarwa ciaku igaatũũra bũrũri mũgeni irĩ ng'eni kũrĩa igaatuo ngombo na cione mathĩĩna mĩaka magana mana (400).
Acts7:7 Na niĩ nĩngaatuĩra rũũrĩrĩ rũu igaatungatagĩra na ndarĩĩkia gũciruta rũũrĩrĩinĩ rũu
Acts7:8 Ngai agĩgĩtũma irua rĩtuĩke rũũri rwa kĩrĩĩkanĩro. Nĩ ũndũ ũcio Aburahamu akĩruithia Isaaka arĩ wa mĩthenya ĩnaana thuutha wa gũciarwo. Naake Isaaka akĩruithia mũũrũwe Jakubu
Acts7:9 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts7:10 No Ngai aarĩ hamwe naake
Acts7:11 Thuutha ũcio gũkĩgĩa ng'aragu bũrũri wothe wa Misiri o na Kanaani
Acts7:12 No rĩrĩa Jakubu aiguire atĩ Misiri kwarĩ na irio
Acts7:13 Nao mathiĩ riita rĩa keerĩ
Acts7:14 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Josefu agĩtũmanĩra ithe Jakubu athiĩ Misiri na andũ aake oothe
Acts7:15 Naake Jakubu na aariũ aake magĩgĩthiĩ Misiri kũrĩa oothe maakuĩrĩire.
Acts7:16 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts7:17 “Na rĩrĩa ihinda rĩakuhĩrĩirie rĩa Ngai kũhingia kĩĩranĩro kĩrĩa eerĩire Aburahamu
Acts7:18 Na gũgĩkorwo kũgĩĩte na mũthamaki ũngĩ
Acts7:19 Mũthamaki ũcio nĩahinyĩrĩirie andũ aitũ mũno
Acts7:20 Hĩndĩ ĩyo nĩguo Musa aaciarirwo
Acts7:21 Na rĩrĩa aateirwo kuuma mũciĩ
Acts7:22 Musa agĩkĩrerwo na ũũgĩ wothe wa andũ a Misiri
Acts7:23 “Na hĩndĩ ĩrĩa aakinyirie mĩaka mĩrongo ĩna
Acts7:24 Naake oona ũmwe wao agĩĩkwo ũũru nĩ Mũmisiri agĩthiĩ kũmũũrĩria akĩmũteithĩrĩria
Acts7:25 (Musa eeciiragia atĩ andũ aao nĩmekũmenya atĩ Ngai nĩakaamũhũthĩra amarute ũkomboinĩ no o matiamenyire.)
Acts7:26 Na mũthenya ũyũ ũngĩ agĩkora Aisiraeli eerĩ magĩtetania
Acts7:27 Naake mũndũ ũrĩa wekĩĩte ũcio ũngĩ ũũru agĩikania Musa akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts7:28 Anga nĩũkwenda kũnjũraga ta ũrĩa ũrooragire Mũmisiri ira?’
Acts7:29 Rĩrĩa Musa aiguire ũguo
Acts7:30 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts7:31 Na rĩrĩa Musa oonire ũguo akĩgega
Acts7:32 ‘Nĩ niĩ Ngai wa maithe maanyu
Acts7:33 Naake Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts7:34 Hatirĩ nganja nĩnyoneete ũrĩa andũ aakwa marathĩĩnio kũu Misiri na nĩnjiguĩte kĩrĩro kĩao. Nĩnjũkĩĩte thĩ nĩguo ndĩmahonokie; rĩu ũka nĩngũgũtũma Misiri.’
Acts7:35 “Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts7:36 Akĩmatongoria akĩmaruta kuo thuutha wa kũringa ciama na gwĩka maũndũ ma magegania kũu Misiri na Iriainĩ Ituune
Acts7:37 Musa ũcio nowe werire andũ a Isiraeli atĩrĩ
Acts7:38 Ningĩ Musa ũcio nowe warĩ na andũ a Isiraeli kũu werũinĩ rĩrĩa aarĩirio nĩ mũraika kĩrĩmainĩ gĩa Sinai e hamwe na maithe maitũ
Acts7:39 “Ũcio nowe maithe maitũ maaregire gwathĩkĩra; makĩmũthinĩkania na makĩĩrirĩria gũcooka Misiri.
Acts7:40 Nao magĩkĩĩra Harũni atĩrĩ
Acts7:41 Namo matukũinĩ macio magĩthondeka mũhianano wa ndeegwa
Acts7:42 Naake Ngai akĩmatiganĩria
Acts7:43 Nĩkuoya muoire hema ya Moloku na mũhianano wa Refani njata ĩrĩa mũtuĩte Ngai yanyu
Acts7:44 “Maithe maitũ maarĩ na Hema ya kuonania atĩ Ngai aarĩ hamwe nao werũinĩ. Nayo yakĩĩtwo o ta ũrĩa Ngai eerĩĩte Musa
Acts7:45 Na thuutha ũcio
Acts7:46 Naake Daudi agĩkĩonwo arĩ mwagĩrĩru nĩ Ngai
Acts7:47 No nĩ Solomoni wamwakĩire nyũmba.
Acts7:48 “No rĩĩrĩ
Acts7:49 Mwathani ekuuga atĩrĩ
Acts7:50 Anga ti niĩ ndathondekire indo ici ciothe?’
Acts7:51 “Andũ aya aremi! Inyuĩ ngoro cianyu iteetĩkĩĩtie. O inyuĩ mũtaiguaga ũhoro wa Ngai! Ũguo noguo maithe maanyu meekire: o na inyuĩ noguo mũtũũraga mũreganĩĩte na Roho Mũtheru.
Acts7:52 Kũrĩ mũnabii maithe maanyu mataanyariirire? Mooragire o na arĩa maamenyithanĩĩtie o mbere gũũka kwa ũrĩa mũthingu
Acts7:53 Nĩ inyuĩ mwanengerirwo Watho nĩ araika na mũkĩaga kũwathĩkĩra!”
Acts7:54 Nao athuuri a Kĩama maigua maũndũ macio makĩng'ũrĩka mũno na makĩharagania magego nĩ ũndũ wake.
Acts7:55 No Sitefano aiyũrĩĩtwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru
Acts7:56 Naake akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts7:57 Hĩndĩ ĩyo andũ makĩanĩrĩra na mũgambo mũnene mahingĩĩte matũ maao makĩmũguthũkĩra oothe me hamwe
Acts7:58 makĩmuumia nja ya itũũra
Acts7:59 Nao rĩrĩa maamũhũũraga na mahiga
Acts7:60 Agĩcooka agĩturia ndu
Acts8:1 Naake Saũlũ agĩgĩĩtĩkĩra atĩ kũũragwo gwa Sitefano nĩkwagĩrĩire.
Acts8:2 Nao andũ amwe ahooi Ngai magĩthika Sitefano na makĩmũrĩrĩra mũno.
Acts8:3 Naake Saũlũ agĩũkĩrĩra kanitha
Acts8:4 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts8:5 Naake Filipu agĩthiĩ itũũrainĩ rĩnene rĩa Samaria akĩhunjĩria andũ a kuo ũhoro wa Mesia.
Acts8:6 Nao andũ aingĩ marĩ na ngoro ĩmwe nĩmaathikagĩrĩria Filipu
Acts8:7 Amu ngoma nĩcioimaga arĩa maarĩ nacio cianĩrĩire na mũgambo mũnene
Acts8:8 Gũgĩkĩgĩa na gĩkeno kĩnene mũno itũũrainĩ rĩu.
Acts8:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts8:10 Nao andũ oothe anyiinyi na anene nĩmaamũthikagĩrĩria makoigaga atĩrĩ
Acts8:11 Maamũthikagĩrĩria wega nĩ gũkorwo nĩamamakĩĩtie na ũragũri wake ihinda iraaya.
Acts8:12 Nao arĩa oothe meetĩkirie Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega wa Ũthamaki wa Ngai na wa Jesũ Kristũ
Acts8:13 Simoni o naake agĩĩtĩkia na akĩbatithio akĩrũmĩrĩra Filipu. Naake oona ciama na maũndũ ma magegania magĩĩkwo akĩmaka mũno.
Acts8:14 Rĩrĩa atũmwo arĩa maarĩ Jerusalemu maiguire atĩ andũ a Samaria nĩmaamũkĩrĩĩte ũhoro wa Ngai
Acts8:15 Nao maakinya
Acts8:16 amu Roho Mũtheru ndakoreetwo aikũrũkĩire o na ũmwe wao tiga o kũbatithio maabatithĩĩtio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Mwathani Jesũ.
Acts8:17 Nao Petero na Johana magĩkĩmaigĩrĩra mooko
Acts8:18 Naake Simoni oona atĩ mũndũ aiyũragwo nĩ Roho aigĩrĩrwo mooko nĩ atũmwo akĩĩrĩra atũmwo mbeeca
Acts8:19 akĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts8:20 No Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts8:21 Wee ndũrĩ na handũ kana igai wĩrainĩ ũyũ witũ
Acts8:22 Wĩrire nĩ ũndũ wa waganu ũcio waku
Acts8:23 Amu nguona wee wĩ na marũrũ maingĩ ma ũiru na ũkoohwo nĩ meehia.”
Acts8:24 Naake Simoni akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts8:25 Nao marĩĩkia kuumbũra na kũheana ũhoro wa Mwathani
Acts8:26 No rĩĩrĩ
Acts8:27 Naake Filipu agĩũkĩra agĩthiĩ. Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts8:28 Naake aathiaga agĩthoomaga ibuku rĩa mũnabii Isaia aikarĩĩte thĩ ngaariinĩ yake ĩrĩa yaguucĩĩtio nĩ mbarathi.
Acts8:29 Naake Filipu akĩĩrwo nĩ Roho atĩrĩ
Acts8:30 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Filipu akĩhiũha
Acts8:31 Naake mũndũ ũcio akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts8:32 Nako gacunjĩ ka maandĩko karĩa mũndũ ũcio aathoomaga nĩ gaaka:“O ta ũrĩa ng'ondu itwaragwo gũthĩnjwo
Acts8:33 Nĩaconorirwo
Acts8:34 Mũndũ ũcio warĩ mũhakũre akĩĩra Filipu atĩrĩ
Acts8:35 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Filipu akĩambĩrĩria kwaria akĩhe mũndũ ũcio Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega wa Jesũ
Acts8:36 O magĩthiaga na njĩra
Acts8:37 Naake Filipu akĩmũcookeria atĩrĩ
Acts8:38 Naake agĩathana atĩ ngaari ĩrũũgamio. Nao eerĩ Filipu na mũndũ ũcio magĩtoonya maaĩinĩ
Acts8:39 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts8:40 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts9:1 Hĩndĩ ĩyo Saũlũ agĩkorwo arĩ na ũũru mũingĩ na akoigaga atĩ arutwo oothe a Mwathani mooragwo. Agĩgĩthiĩ kũrĩ Mũthĩnjĩri Ngai Ũrĩa Mũnene
Acts9:2 akĩũria aheeo marũa ma gũthiĩ namo thunagogiinĩ iria ciarĩ Damasiki
Acts9:3 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts9:4 Naake akĩgũa thĩ
Acts9:5 Naake Saũlũ akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts9:6 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Acts9:7 Nao andũ arĩa maarĩ naake makĩrũũgama makirĩĩte ki
Acts9:8 Naake Saũlũ agĩũkĩra akĩrũũgama na ahingũra maitho ndahotire kuona kĩndũ. Agĩkĩnyiitwo guoko nĩ arĩa maarĩ naake
Acts9:9 Naake agĩikara mĩthenya ĩtatũ atekuona na atekũrĩa kana akanyua.
Acts9:10 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts9:11 Naake Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts9:12 na nĩoneete thĩinĩ wa kĩoneki mũndũ ũgwĩtwo Anania agĩtoonya nyũmba akamũigĩrĩra mooko nĩ geetha ahote gũcooka kuona.”
Acts9:13 No Anania agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts9:14 Rĩu aheetwo ũhoti nĩ athĩnjĩri Ngai arĩa anene ooke gũũkũ anyiite arĩa oothe magũthaathayagia.”
Acts9:15 No Mwathani akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts9:16 Nĩngũmuonia atĩ no mũhaka athĩĩnio nĩ ũndũ wakwa.”
Acts9:17 Naake Anania agĩgĩthiĩ agĩtoonya nyũmba akĩigĩrĩra Saũlũ mooko akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts9:18 Na ihinda o rĩu tũnyamũ tũhaana ngaracũ tũkiuma maitho maake tũkĩgũa thĩ
Acts9:19 na akĩrĩa irio akĩgĩa na hinya.
Acts9:20 Hĩndĩ o ĩyo agĩthiĩ thunagogiinĩ akĩhunjagia ũhoro wa Jesũ akiugaga atĩ Jesũ nĩ Mũrũ wa Ngai.
Acts9:21 Nao arĩa oothe maamũiguire makĩgega
Acts9:22 No Saũlũ agĩkĩrĩrĩria o kũgĩa na hinya na akĩrigithia Ayahudi arĩa maatũũraga kũu Damasiki na kũmoonia na ma atĩ Jesũ nĩ we Mesia.
Acts9:23 Thuutha wa matukũ maingĩ kũhĩtũka
Acts9:24 no Saũlũ akĩmenyithio. Ayahudi maikaraga marangĩire kĩhingo mũthenya na ũtukũ nĩguo mamũũrage.
Acts9:25 No arutwo aake makĩmuoya ũtukũ ũmwe
Acts9:26 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts9:27 No Baranaba akĩoya Saũlũ akĩmũtwara kũrĩ atũmwo
Acts9:28 Kwoguo Saũlũ agĩikarania na atũmwo
Acts9:29 Ningĩ nĩaragia na agakararania na Ayahudi arĩa maaragia Kĩngiriki
Acts9:30 Rĩrĩa andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie maamenyire ũguo
Acts9:31 Nao andũ a kanitha kũu guothe Judea
Acts9:32 Na rĩrĩa Petero aaceerangaga kũndũ na kũndũ
Acts9:33 Nakuo kũu agĩkora mũndũ wetagwo Aenea
Acts9:34 Petero akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts9:35 Nao andũ oothe arĩa maatũũraga Luda na Sharoni mamuona
Acts9:36 Nakuo itũũrainĩ rĩa Jopa nĩkwarĩ mũtumia mwĩtĩkia wetagwo Tabitha. (Rĩĩtwa rĩu na Kĩngiriki nĩ Dorokasi
Acts9:37 Na matukũinĩ macio mũtumia ũcio akĩrũara agĩkua. Na marĩĩkia kũmũthambia
Acts9:38 Tondũ Luda kwarĩ gũkuhĩ na Jopa
Acts9:39 Naake Petero agĩũkĩra agĩtwarana nao. Akinya
Acts9:40 No Petero akĩmeera moime nja oothe
Acts9:41 Naake Petero akĩmũnyiita guoko
Acts9:42 Naguo ũndũ ũcio ũkĩmenyeka Jopa guothe
Acts9:43 Naake Petero agĩikara kũu Jopa matukũ maingĩ kwa mũndũ wetagwo Simoni warĩ mũtanduki wa njũũa.
Acts10:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts10:2 Aarĩ mũndũ mũthingu na hamwe na andũ a mũciĩ wake maarĩ ahooi Ngai. Naake nĩahothagĩra andũ na ũtaana
Acts10:3 Mũthenya ũmwe ta thaa kenda cia mũthenya
Acts10:4 Naake Korinelio akĩmũrora amakĩĩte akĩmũũria atĩrĩ
Acts10:5 Rĩu tũma athuuri Jopa mageete Simoni ũrĩa wĩtagwo Petero
Acts10:6 ũrĩa ũnyiitĩĩtwo ũgeni gwa Simoni ũrĩa mũtanduki wa njũũa
Acts10:7 Rĩrĩa mũraika ũcio wamwaragĩria aathiire
Acts10:8 na aamataarĩria ũhoro wothe akĩmatũma Jopa.
Acts10:9 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts10:10 Naake akĩigua ahũtiĩ akĩenda kũrĩa. Rĩrĩa maahaaragĩria irio
Acts10:11 Agĩkĩona igũrũ rĩhingũkĩĩte
Acts10:12 Thĩinĩ wakĩo nĩkwarĩ mĩthemba yothe ya nyamũ cia magũrũ mana
Acts10:13 Naguo mũgambo ũgĩũka ũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:14 Naake Petero agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts10:15 Ningĩ mũgambo ũgĩũka rĩa keerĩ ũkĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:16 Ũndũ ũcio wekĩkire maita matatũ
Acts10:17 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts10:18 Nao magĩgĩĩtana nĩguo moorie kana Simoni ũrĩa wetagwo Petero anyiitĩĩtwo ũgeni kuo.
Acts10:19 Na rĩrĩa Petero eeciiragia ũhoro wa kĩoneki kĩu; Roho akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:20 Ũkĩra
Acts10:21 Naake Petero agĩikũrũka kuuma ngoroba
Acts10:22 Nao makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts10:23 Naake akĩmeera matoonye nyũmba
Acts10:24 Mũthenya wa keerĩ magĩkinya Kaisarea
Acts10:25 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts10:26 No Petero akĩmũrũũgamia akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts10:27 Agĩgĩtoonya o makĩaragia naake
Acts10:28 Agĩkĩmeera atĩrĩ
Acts10:29 Nĩ ũndũ ũcio
Acts10:30 Naake Korinelio agĩcookia atĩrĩ
Acts10:31 akĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ: ‘Korinelio! Mahooya maaku nĩmaiguitwo
Acts10:32 Kwoguo tũmana Jopa ũgĩĩre Simoni ũrĩa wĩtagwo Petero
Acts10:33 Kwoguo nĩndagũtũmanĩire hĩndĩ o ro ĩyo na nĩ weka wega mũno nĩ ũndũ wa gũũka. Rĩu-rĩ
Acts10:34 Naake Petero agĩkĩambĩrĩria kwaria akiuga atĩrĩ: “Rĩu nĩndamenya na ma atĩ Ngai ndarĩ mũthuutũkanio
Acts10:35 na thĩinĩ wa rũũrĩrĩ o na rũrĩkũ
Acts10:36 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Acts10:37 Ũhoro ũcio nĩwahunjirio Judea guothe
Acts10:38 Nĩmũũĩ ũrĩa Ngai aitĩrĩirie Jesũ wa Nazarethi Roho Mũtheru o hamwe na hinya. Naake Jesũ nĩathiaga agĩĩkaga maũndũ meega na akĩhonagia oothe arĩa maanyiitĩĩtwo nĩ ngoma nĩ gũkorwo Ngai aarĩ hamwe naake.
Acts10:39 O na ũrĩa ithuĩ tũrĩ aira a maũndũ marĩa moothe eekire thĩinĩ wa bũrũri wa Ayahudi na thĩinĩ wa Jerusalemu
Acts10:40 No Ngai nĩamũriũkirie mũthenya wa gatatũ na akĩmuonania.
Acts10:41 No rĩĩrĩ
Acts10:42 Rĩu-rĩ
Acts10:43 Nao Anabii oothe nĩmaheanaga ũira wake atĩ mũndũ o wothe ũmwĩtĩkĩĩtie nĩohagĩrwo meehia maake nĩ hinya wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ.”
Acts10:44 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts10:45 Nao andũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie a kuuma gĩkundi kĩa Ayahudi arĩa mookĩĩte na Petero makĩgega
Acts10:46 Nĩ gũkorwo nĩmaamaiguire makĩaria na thiomi na makĩgooca Ngai.
Acts10:47 Naake Petero agĩkĩũria atĩrĩ
Acts10:48 Agĩcooka akĩmaatha akĩmeera atĩ oothe mabatithio thĩinĩ wa rĩĩtwa rĩa Jesũ Kristũ. Nao makĩmũũria aikaranie nao matukũ maniini.
Acts11:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts11:2 Rĩrĩa Petero aambatire Jerusalemu
Acts11:3 “Nĩkĩ gĩatũmire ũthiĩ kũrĩ andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa matarĩ aruu na ũkĩrĩanĩra nao?”
Acts11:4 No Petero akĩambĩrĩria kũmataarĩria wega ũrĩa maũndũ meekĩkĩĩte
Acts11:5 “Ndaarĩ itũũrainĩ rĩa Jopa ngĩhooya na niĩ ngĩona kĩoneki
Acts11:6 Ndakĩbaara wega ngĩona nyamũ cia magũrũ mana
Acts11:7 Ngĩcooka ngĩigua mũgambo ũkĩnjĩĩra atĩrĩ
Acts11:8 No niĩ ngiuga atĩrĩ
Acts11:9 Naguo mũgambo ũkiuma o igũrũ ũkĩnjookeria riita rĩa keerĩ atĩrĩ
Acts11:10 Gwekĩkire ũguo maita matatũ
Acts11:11 Na ihinda o rĩu athuuri atatũ magĩkinya nyũmbainĩ ĩrĩa twarĩ matũmĩĩtwo kũrĩ niĩ kuuma Kaisarea.
Acts11:12 Naake Roho akĩnjĩĩra atĩ thiĩ nao itarĩ na ihenya. Nao andũ atandatũ arĩa meetĩkĩĩtie magĩgĩthiĩ hamwe na niĩ
Acts11:13 Naake agĩtwĩra ũrĩa ooneete mũraika arũngiĩ gwake nyũmba akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts11:14 Ũcio nĩagaakwĩra ndũmĩrĩri ĩrĩa ĩgaatũma wee na andũ a nyũmba yaku mũhonoke.’
Acts11:15 Na ndaambĩrĩria kwaria
Acts11:16 Hingo ĩyo ngĩkĩririkana ciugo cia Mwathani
Acts11:17 Angĩgĩkorwo Ngai nĩamaheire kĩheeo o ta kĩrĩa aatũheire ithuĩ rĩrĩa twetĩkirie thĩinĩ wa Mwathani Jesũ Kristũ-rĩ
Acts11:18 Nao andũ acio maigua ũguo magĩkira
Acts11:19 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts11:20 No nĩkwarĩ amwe aao a kuuma Kuporo na Kurene
Acts11:21 Naguo hinya wa Mwathani warĩ hamwe nao
Acts11:22 Naguo ũhoro wa ũndũ ũcio ũgĩkinya kũrĩ andũ a kanitha wa Jerusalemu
Acts11:23 Rĩrĩa aakinyire kuo akĩona ũrĩa Ngai aatugĩĩte andũ aake agĩkena
Acts11:24 Baranaba aarĩ mũndũ mwega
Acts11:25 Naake Baranaba agĩthiĩ Tariso gũcaria Saũlũ
Acts11:26 na rĩrĩa aamuonire
Acts11:27 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts11:28 Naake ũmwe wao wetagwo Agabo akĩrũũgama
Acts11:29 Nao arutwo magĩtua atĩ o mũndũ arute ũteithio kũringana na ũhoti wake
Acts11:30 Ũndũ ũcio magĩkĩũhingia
Acts12:1 Na hĩndĩ ĩyo mũthamaki Herode akĩambĩrĩria kũnyariira andũ amwe a kanitha.
Acts12:2 Agĩkĩũragithia Jakubu mũrũ wa nyina na Johana na rũhiũ.
Acts12:3 Na rĩrĩa oonire atĩ ũndũ ũcio eekire nĩwakenia Ayahudi
Acts12:4 Rĩrĩa aamũnyiitithirie akĩmũikia njeera kũrĩa aarangagĩrwo nĩ arangĩri ikundi inya
Acts12:5 Kwoguo Petero agĩgĩikio njeera
Acts12:6 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts12:7 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts12:8 Naake mũraika akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts12:9 Naake Petero akiuma nja
Acts12:10 Nao makĩhĩtũka arangĩri a mbere na a keerĩ
Acts12:11 Naake Petero eigua akiuga atĩrĩ
Acts12:12 Arĩĩkia kũmenya ũguo
Acts12:13 Rĩrĩa aaringaringire mũrango wa gũtoonya kuo
Acts12:14 Aamenya mũgambo wa Petero
Acts12:15 Nao andũ makĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts12:16 Petero agĩthiĩ o na mbere kũringaringa
Acts12:17 Amakiria na guoko
Acts12:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts12:19 Naake Herode agĩathana acario
Acts12:20 Naake Herode akĩraakario mũno nĩ andũ a Turo na Sidoni
Acts12:21 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts12:22 Naguo mũingĩ ũkĩanĩrĩra ũkiuga atĩrĩ
Acts12:23 O rĩmwe mũraika wa Mwathani akĩmũgũtha nĩ amu ndagoocithirie Ngai. Naake akĩrĩĩo nĩ igunyũ agĩkua.
Acts12:24 Naguo ũhoro wa Ngai ũgĩthiĩ na mbere kũhunjio na ũkĩingĩha.
Acts12:25 Naake Baranaba na Saũlũ makiuma Jerusalemu marĩĩkĩĩtie wĩra wao
Acts13:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts13:2 Rĩrĩa maahooyaga Mwathani mehingĩĩte
Acts13:3 Thuutha wa kwĩhinga kũrĩa na kũhooya
Acts13:4 Tondũ wa gũtũmwo nĩ Roho Mũtheru
Acts13:5 Rĩrĩa maakinyire Salamisi
Acts13:6 Rĩrĩa maatuĩkanirie gĩcigĩrĩra kĩu gĩothe magĩkinya handũ heetagwo Pafo
Acts13:7 Mũragũri ũcio aarĩ mũraata wa Barũũthi wa gĩcigĩrĩra kĩu wetagwo Serigio Paũlũ
Acts13:8 No mũragũri ũcio wetagwo Elimasi
Acts13:9 No Saũlũ
Acts13:10 akĩmwĩra atĩrĩ
Acts13:11 Atĩrĩĩrĩ
Acts13:12 Naake Barũũthi o na ũrĩa gwekĩka agĩĩtĩkia
Acts13:13 Naake Paũlũ na arĩa maarĩ naake makĩhaica meeri makiuma Pafo
Acts13:14 Nao magĩcooka makiuma Periga magĩthiĩ kinya Anitiokia bũrũriinĩ wa Pisidia
Acts13:15 Kwarĩĩkia gũthoomwo ũhoro kuuma ibuku rĩa Watho wa Musa na rĩa Anabii
Acts13:16 Naake Paũlũ akĩrũũgama
Acts13:17 Ngai wa andũ aya a Isiraeli nĩathuurire maithe maitũ
Acts13:18 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts13:19 Arĩĩkia kũniina ndũũrĩrĩ mũgwanja iria ciarĩ bũrũriinĩ wa Kanaani
Acts13:20 Maũndũ macio meekĩkire ihinda rĩa mĩaka magana mana na mĩrongo ĩtaano.“Thuutha wa ũguo akĩmahe Atiirĩrĩri Bũrũri nginya hĩndĩ ya mũnabii Samũeli.
Acts13:21 Nao magĩcooka makĩũria maheeo mũthamaki
Acts13:22 Amweheria
Acts13:23 Kuuma rũciaroinĩ rwa mũndũ ũyũ nĩ ho Ngai aareeheire andũ a Isiraeli mũhonokia Jesũ
Acts13:24 Mbere ya atanaambĩrĩria wĩra wake
Acts13:25 Naake Johana agĩkuhĩrĩria kũrĩĩkia wĩra wake nĩoigire atĩrĩ
Acts13:26 “Aariũ a Ithe witũ
Acts13:27 Amu andũ arĩa matũũraga Jerusalemu
Acts13:28 O na angĩkorwo matiarĩ na gĩtũmi kĩiganu gĩa kũmũũragithia-rĩ
Acts13:29 Nao marĩĩkia kũhingia maũndũ maake moothe marĩa maandĩkĩĩtwo
Acts13:30 No Ngai akĩmũriũkia kuuma kũrĩ akuũ
Acts13:31 na mĩthenya mĩingĩ nĩoimagĩrĩra andũ arĩa maambatĩĩte naake kuuma Galili magooka Jerusalemu
Acts13:32 Rĩu tũmũreeheire Ũhoro Mwega atĩ: kĩrĩa Ngai eerĩire maithe maitũ
Acts13:33 nĩakĩhingĩĩtie harĩ ithuĩ ciana ciao nĩ ũndũ nĩariũkĩtie Jesũ. O ta ũrĩa kwandĩkĩĩtwo Thaburiinĩ ya keerĩ atĩrĩ:‘Wee wĩ Mũrũ wakwa;Ũũmũũthĩ nĩndagũciara.’
Acts13:34 Naguo ũhoro ũyũ nĩguo Ngai aaririe wa kũriũka gwake kuuma kũrĩ akuũ ndakaanabuthĩre mbĩĩrĩrainĩ rĩ o rĩ:‘Nĩngaamũhe iraathimo theru na cia ma
Acts13:35 O na nĩoigĩĩte o Thaburiinĩ ĩngĩ atĩrĩ
Acts13:36 Amu Daudi nĩatungatĩire Ngai ihinda rĩake
Acts13:37 No ũcio Ngai aariũkirie ndaigana kũbutha.
Acts13:38 Kwoguo aariũ a Ithe witũ nĩtũkwenda mũmenye atĩ
Acts13:39 Mũndũ o wothe ũkũmwĩtĩkia nĩarĩtuagwo mũthingu maũndũinĩ marĩa Watho wa Musa ũtangĩamũtuire mũthingu.
Acts13:40 Mwĩmenyerereei
Acts13:41 ‘Tathikĩrĩriai inyuĩ anyũrũrania!Makaai na mũkue!Amu ũndũ ũrĩa ndĩreeka ũũmũũthĩmũtikaawĩtĩkia o na mũndũ angĩmũtaarĩria!’ ”
Acts13:42 Na rĩrĩa Paũlũ na Baranaba moimaga thunagogi
Acts13:43 Rĩrĩa mũcemanio wa thunagogi wathirire
Acts13:44 Thabatũ ĩrĩa yarũmĩrĩire hakuhĩ andũ oothe a itũũra makĩgomana handũ hamwe maigue Ũhoro wa Mwathani.
Acts13:45 No rĩĩrĩ
Acts13:46 No Paũlũ na Baranaba makĩaria moomĩrĩirie makiuga atĩrĩ
Acts13:47 Amu ũũ nĩguo twathirwo nĩ Mwathani atĩ:‘Nĩngũtuĩte ũtheri wa andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ
Acts13:48 Rĩrĩa andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ maiguire ũguo
Acts13:49 Naguo ũhoro wa Mwathani ũkĩhunja kũu guothe.
Acts13:50 No Ayahudi magĩthogotha anene a itũũra o na atumia a Ndũũrĩrĩ arĩa meyamũrĩire Ngai na maarĩ igweta thĩinĩ wa itũũra. Nao magĩtũma maambĩrĩrie kũnyariira Paũlũ na Baranaba
Acts13:51 Nao Paũlũ na Baranaba makĩmaribaribĩra rũkũngũ kuuma magũrũ maao
Acts13:52 Nakuo kũu Anitiokia eetĩkia makĩiyũrwo nĩ gĩkeno na Roho Mũtheru.
Acts14:1 Na rĩĩrĩ
Acts14:2 No Ayahudi arĩa mateetĩkirie magĩthogotha andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ
Acts14:3 No atũmwo magĩikara kũu hĩndĩ ndaaya
Acts14:4 Nao andũ a itũũra rĩu makĩamũkana: amwe magĩĩtĩkania na Ayahudi
Acts14:5 Rĩrĩa Ayahudi na andũ a Ndũũrĩrĩ me hamwe na anene aao meendaga gwĩka Paũlũ na Baranaba ũũru o na kũmahũũra na mahiga
Acts14:6 makĩmenya
Acts14:7 Makĩhunjia Ũhoro ũrĩa Mwega kuo.

Acts14:23 Naguo o kanitha makĩũthuurĩra athuuri aaguo
